1200006711.korean: 누… 누, 눈 좀 똑바로 뜨고...
1200006711.english: Nu… Nu, open your eyes properly...

1200006713.korean: 나, 나이가 몇 갠데... 아직도 이런 장난을...
1200006713.english: How old do you think I am... still playing these kinds of pranks...

1200006715.korean: - 평소엔 달콤하게만 느껴지던 그녀의 향기가 지금 이순간 유난히 씁쓸하게 느껴진다.
1200006715.english: Her scent, which usually feels only sweet, feels unusually bitter at this moment.

1200006717.korean: - 이미 그녀의 피부는 얼음장처럼 차가워진지 오래며,
1200006717.english: Her skin had long since turned as cold as ice,

1200006718.korean: - 그렇게 밝게 빛나던 맑은 눈동자까지 빛을 잃고 말았다.
1200006718.english: Even those clear eyes that used to shine so brightly lost their light.

1200006722.english: The one who loves tries to create because he despises!

1200006723.korean: 자신이 사랑한 것을 경멸할 줄 모르는 자가 사랑을 알겠는가!
1200006723.english: How can one who does not know how to despise what they have loved know love!

1200006724.korean: 나의 형제여, 그대의 사랑, 그대의 창조와 함께 그대의 고독 속으로 들어가라.
1200006724.english: My brother, enter into your solitude with your love, your creation.

1200006725.korean: 이윽고 정의가 다리를 절며 그대를 뒤따라올 것이다.
1200006725.english: Eventually, justice will follow you, limping.

1200006726.korean: 나의 형제여, 그대의 눈물과 함께 고독 속으로 들어가라.
1200006726.english: My brother, enter into solitude with your tears.

1200006727.korean: 나는 자기 자신을 넘어 창조하려고 파멸하는 자를 사랑한다."
1200006727.english: I love the one who destroys in order to create beyond himself.

1200006729.korean: [어느 한 평범한 남자와 평범한 여자가 있다.]
1200006729.english: [There is an ordinary man and an ordinary woman.]

1200006730.korean: [이 둘은 평범하게 사랑에 빠졌고, 평범한 아이를 낳았다.]
1200006730.english: [These two fell in love in an ordinary way and had an ordinary child.]

1200006731.korean: [그렇게 어디에나 있는 평범한 가정이 되기를 소원하며 행복을 꿈꿨다.]
1200006731.english: [And so, wishing to become an ordinary family like the ones found anywhere, I dreamed of happiness.]

1200006732.korean: [하지만 아이가 태어나자 아이 아빠는 돌연 사라졌다.]
1200006732.english: [But when the child was born, the father suddenly disappeared.]

1200006733.korean: [엄마는 그를 찾기 위해 온갖 수모를 견뎌야 했다.]
1200006733.english: [Mom had to endure all kinds of humiliation to find him.]

1200006734.korean: [수소문 끝에 이 세상에서 증발되어 버린 줄만 알았던 그를 그녀가 다시 마주했을 때,]
1200006734.english: [When she finally met him again after searching high and low, whom she thought had vanished from this world,]

1200006735.korean: [그는 어느새 또 다른 여자의 남자인 체였다.]
1200006735.english: He was suddenly acting like another woman's man.

1200006736.korean: [어디까지나 그녀의 목표는 이전과 동일하게 평범했던 삶으로 되돌아가는 것 뿐이었다.]
1200006736.english: Her only goal was to return to the ordinary life she had lived before.

1200006737.korean: ["여보, 당신이 필요해요, 행복했던 그 때로 돌아가고 싶어요..."]
1200006737.english: ["Honey, I need you. I want to go back to those happy times..."]

1200006738.korean: [하지만 그에게 돌아온 대답은 다시는 찾아오지 말아달라는 조소 섞인 부탁뿐이었다.]
1200006738.english: [But the only answer he received was a mocking request never to come back.]

1200006739.korean: [그의 외도 때문일까, 아니면 그저 버림받았다는 현실 때문일까,]
1200006739.english: [Is it because of his infidelity, or is it simply because of the reality of being abandoned?]

1200006740.korean: [평범하던 그녀의 삶은 한순간에 싸구려 신파극으로 변질되며 매우 빠른 속도로 무너져 내렸다.]
1200006740.english: Her ordinary life instantly turned into a cheap melodrama and crumbled at a very rapid pace.

1200006743.english: ["If only you weren't here... If only you weren't here..."]

1200006744.korean: [아이의 기도를 있는 힘껏 짓누르던 여자는 이내 지쳤다는 기색으로,]
1200006744.english: [The woman, who had been pressing down on the child's prayer with all her might, soon looked exhausted,]

1200006745.korean: [온몸에 힘을 풀고 쓰러지며 흐느낌을 멈추지 못했다.]
1200006745.english: [Gone with strength in his whole body and collapsed, unable to stop sobbing.]

1200006746.korean: [아이는 기회를 놓치지 않고 가쁜 숨을 몰아 쉬며 주위 공기를 바삐 빨아들였다.]
1200006746.english: [The child did not miss the opportunity and gasped for breath, busily sucking in the surrounding air.]

1200006747.korean: [멸시와 폭력이 난무하는 상황에 깨나 익숙한 모양이었다.]
1200006747.english: [He seemed quite accustomed to a situation rife with contempt and violence.]

1200006749.english: ["… Why on earth… Why on earth…"]

1200006750.korean: [아이는 슬픔이 끊임없이 생성되는 원인이 다름아닌 자신이라는 걸 알 수 있었다.]
1200006750.english: [The child realized that the cause of the endless generation of sadness was none other than himself.]

1200006751.korean: [평범한 가정 속에서 평범하게 사랑하는 법을 이해하지 못 했던 아이는,]
1200006751.english: [The child who could not understand how to love normally in an ordinary family,]

1200006752.korean: [어머니의 애정 방식을 그저 있는 그대로 겸허히 받아들이기로 했다.]
1200006752.english: I decided to humbly accept my mother's way of showing affection just as it is.

1200006753.korean: [그러나 아이와 달리, 능력도 조건도 그 어떤 것도 준비되지 못한 상태인 그녀는,]
1200006753.english: [However, unlike the child, she, who was unprepared in terms of ability, conditions, and everything else,]

1200006754.korean: [아이의 보호자로 평생을 함께 해야 한다는 공포가 엄습해왔다.]
1200006754.english: [The fear that I would have to be with the child as their guardian for the rest of my life overwhelmed me.]

1200006755.korean: [그녀에게 있어, 아이는 저주이자 비참함의 실체일 뿐이었다.]
1200006755.english: To her, the child was nothing but a curse and the embodiment of misery.

1200006756.korean: [여느 때와 같이, 익숙한 풍경과 익숙한 대화, 그리고 익숙한 체벌이 이어지고 있었다.]
1200006756.english: [As usual, familiar scenery, familiar conversations, and familiar corporal punishment continued.]

1200006757.korean: ["나한테 필요한 건 네가 아냐… 여보, 여보…"]
1200006757.english: ["It's not you I need... Honey, honey..."]

1200006759.korean: [하지만 여전히 아이의 눈에선 눈물은 커녕 땀 방울 하나 흘러 나올 생각이 없는 모양이었다.]
1200006759.english: [However, it seemed that not even a drop of sweat, let alone tears, would flow from the child's eyes.]

1200006760.korean: [매일 반복되는 학대야말로 아이에게는 지극히 평범하고 평화로운 일상이었다.]
1200006760.english: The daily abuse was, for the child, an extremely ordinary and peaceful everyday life.

1200006762.english: ['If I were to shed tears here, perhaps, even if just for a brief moment…']

1200006763.korean: ['엄마 품에 안길 수 있을 지 몰라.']
1200006763.english: ['I don't know if I'll be able to be held in Mom's arms.']

1200006764.korean: [아이는 늘 그래왔듯 얼굴 근육을 뭉개고 소리를 지르며 혼신의 우는 연기를 선보였다.]
1200006764.english: As always, the child contorted their facial muscles and screamed, delivering a crying performance with all their might.

1200006765.korean: [하지만 평소와 달리, 그녀의 진부한 반응에 아이는 흥미를 느꼈다.]
1200006765.english: [However, unlike usual, the child was intrigued by her clichéd reaction.]

1200006766.english: [In an attempt to recreate the inner pain within the child,]

1200006767.korean: [고사리 같이 작은 손으로 단박에 그녀의 기도를 졸랐다.]
1200006767.english: With small, fern-like hands, he immediately pleaded for her prayer.

1200006768.english: [The nape of my mother's neck, which I was touching for the first time, was warm,]

1200006769.korean: [상상 이상으로 말랑해 자르지 않고 방치해둔 손톱이 파고 들었다.]
1200006769.english: My fingernails, which were softer than I imagined and left uncut, grew in.

1200006771.korean: [일순간 눈앞이 번쩍이며 화약 터지는 소리가 났다.]
1200006771.english: [In an instant, there was a flash of light and the sound of exploding gunpowder.]

1200006772.korean: [의지와 달리 한참 돌아간 고개와 뒤늦게 열기가 올라오는 뺨,]
1200006772.english: [A head turned far against my will, and cheeks belatedly rising with heat,]

1200006773.english: [And I feel a fishy, ​​metallic taste in my mouth.]

1200006774.korean: [겁에 질린 그녀는 안쓰러울 정도로 몸을 떨어댔고,]

1200006775.korean: [눈물 자국 하나 없는 아이와 거리를 두고자 허둥대며 뒷걸음질쳤다.]
1200006775.english: [I hurriedly stepped back to keep my distance from the child, who had not a single tear stain.]

1200006778.korean: ["사탄도 주워가지 않을 새끼, 넌 태어나지 말았어야 해!!"]
1200006778.english: ["You bastard, even Satan wouldn't pick you up! You shouldn't have been born!!"]

1200006779.korean: [자신이 생각했던 것과 다른 그녀의 반응에 아이는 당황했다.]
1200006779.english: The child was flustered by her reaction, which was different from what he had expected.

1200006784.korean: ["머리에 피도 안 마른 자식 새끼가 감히 제 어미를 가르치려 들어?]
1200006784.english: ["How dare a brat with no blood on his head try to teach his own mother?"]

1200006785.english: [The corporal punishment up until then was literally nothing more than playing house.]

1200006786.english: [Fireworks kept flying behind the child's eyelids.]

1200006787.korean: [그러다 아이는 반사적으로 날아오는 손을 막으며 목 놓아 "엄마, 엄마..." 애원했다.]
1200006787.english: [Then, the child instinctively blocked the flying hand and cried out, "Mom, Mom..."

1200006790.english: ["…I’ve never given birth to someone like you!"]

1200006791.english: [There is no sign that her physical abuse will stop.]

1200006792.korean: [악에 받친 그녀의 입술 새로 거친 신음 소리가 터져 나온다.]
1200006792.english: [A rough moan bursts from between her lips filled with malice.]

1200006794.english: [Amidst the chaotic confusion, she spoke in a low voice.]

1200006798.korean: [아이의 이마를 타고 눈물을 대신할 선 붉은 피가 흐른다.]
1200006798.english: [Red blood flows down the child's forehead in place of tears.]

1200006799.english: [The child ran out of the house.]

1200006800.korean: [이제 더는 원인이나 이유 따위 중요치 않았다.]
1200006800.english: [Now, the cause or reason did not matter anymore.]

1200006803.korean: [돌아갈 보금자리가 없는 두 다리는 끝없이 난 길을 따라 걸어갔다.]
1200006803.english: [Two legs with no home to return to walked along the endless road.]

1200006804.korean: [아빠에겐 처음부터 존재하지 않았고 엄마에겐 죽임을 당할 뻔한 아이.]
1200006804.english: [A child who never existed for Dad from the beginning and was nearly killed by Mom.]

1200006805.english: [The child who decided to become an orphan of their own accord,]

1200006806.korean: [정처없이 떠돌아다니며 사람들이 버린 음식이나 옷으로 최소한의 형편만을 해결했다.]
1200006806.english: [Wandering aimlessly, he managed to sustain his bare livelihood with food and clothes discarded by others.]

1200006807.english: It was a very harsh situation for a young child.

1200006808.korean: [떠돌이 생활로 목숨을 연명한 지 얼마나 됐을까,]
1200006808.english: [How long have I been surviving by wandering?]

1200006809.korean: [또 어리고 연약한 두 다리는 어디까지 걸었을까.]
1200006809.english: And how far did those young, frail legs walk?

1200006810.korean: [멀리, 흰 커튼이 바람에 나부끼는 창가 너머로 기분 좋은 웃음 소리가 새어나온다.]
1200006810.english: [In the distance, a pleasant sound of laughter leaks out from beyond the window where white curtains are fluttering in the wind.]

1200006811.english: It was an ordinary family that seemed overflowing with happiness.

1200006813.english: [But for some, it is like a dream.]

1200006814.korean: [아이는 몸과 마음 모두 한계에 치달았기 때문일까,]
1200006814.english: [Is it because the child has reached the limits of both body and mind?]

1200006815.korean: [예전 가족의 모습이 함께 있는 기억 속에서 아이는 까무룩 정신을 잃었다.]
1200006815.english: [The child fainted in a memory filled with images of the family from the past.]

1200006821.korean: 어? 눈 떴다! 엄마~! 얘 일어났어요!
1200006821.english: Huh? Opened eyes! Mom! The kid woke up!

1200006823.korean: 아가, 정신이 좀 드니…? 정말 걱정했단다.
1200006823.english: My dear, are you coming to your senses...? I was really worried.

1200006825.korean: 네가 글쎄 우리 집 앞에서 쓰러져 있었지, 뭐니…
1200006825.english: You know what? You were lying collapsed in front of my house...

1200006827.korean: 부모님은 어디 계셔? 집은 어느 방향이고? 혹시 외지인이니?
1200006827.english: Where are your parents? Which way is your house? Are you an outsider by any chance?

1200006828.korean: - 초대받지 못한 꼬마 손님이 제 생각과 달리 비협조적인 태도를 보이자,
1200006828.english: When the uninvited little guest showed an uncooperative attitude contrary to my expectations,

1200006829.korean: - 아주머니는 심히 당황한 기색으로 좁은 방 안을 이리 저리 걸어다니더니,
1200006829.english: The woman walked back and forth in the small room looking extremely flustered,

1200006830.korean: - 한참이 지난 다음에야 다시금 말을 걸어왔다.
1200006830.english: It was only after quite some time had passed that he spoke to me again.

1200006831.korean: 아직은 얘기 하고 싶지 않은 거려나…?
1200006831.english: Maybe they don't want to talk about it yet...?

1200006833.korean: 원하는 만큼 우리 집에서 머물다 천천히 돌아 가도 괜찮단다.
1200006833.english: You can stay at my house for as long as you want and take your time going back.

1200006834.korean: 편히 쉬고 있으렴. 따뜻한 우유라도 한 잔 가져다 주마.
1200006834.english: Rest well. I'll get you a glass of warm milk.

1200006835.english: As soon as the lady left the room,

1200006836.korean: - 계속해서 그의 옆자리를 지키고 있던 남자 아이는 호기심 가득한 눈빛을 반짝이며 인사를 건넸다.
1200006836.english: The boy who had been sitting by his side greeted him with eyes sparkling with curiosity.

1200006838.english: My bed is super comfortable, right?

1200006843.english: … Well, … you don’t necessarily have to tell me!

1200006845.english: Then what should I call it...

1200006847.korean: 자기 이름도 모르는 바보랑 친구 먹는 건 처음이네!
1200006847.english: This is the first time I've been friends with a fool who doesn't even know their own name!

1200006855.korean: 내 침대인데 네가 주인인 것 마냥 굴다가 쫓겨나지나 말고.
1200006855.english: It's my bed, so don't act like you're the owner and get kicked out.

1200006858.korean: - 몸도 마음도 물에 젖은 솜 같던 아이는 그제서야 경계심을 내려놓고,
1200006858.english: The child, who was like waterlogged cotton in body and mind, finally let go of their guard,

1200006860.korean: - 이윽고 달콤한 꿈에 취해 고른 숨을 내뱉었다.
1200006860.english: Eventually, intoxicated by a sweet dream, he let out an even breath.

1200006861.english: I wonder how much time has passed since then,

1200006862.korean: - 잠에서 깨어난 소년은 간만에 느껴보는 개운함에 기지개를 켜며 슬그머니 방문을 잡아당겼다.
1200006862.english: The boy, having woken up, stretched at the refreshing feeling he hadn't experienced in a while and quietly pulled the door open.

1200006863.korean: - 뭐가 됐든 조용히 이곳을 떠날 작정이었다.
1200006863.english: Whatever the case, I intended to quietly leave this place.

1200006866.korean: - 누군가가 소년의 등을 있는 힘껏 끌어안았다.
1200006866.english: Someone hugged the boy's back with all their might.

1200006867.korean: - 얇고 뽀얀 팔이 허리에 감겨 꼼지락거렸다.
1200006867.english: A thin, pale arm wrapped around the waist and wiggled.

1200006871.korean: 너 이제보니 엄마가 말한 걔 구나!
1200006871.english: Now that I look at you, you're the one Mom was talking about!

1200006872.korean: 우리 집 앞에서 쓰러져 있었다던 도둑 고양이!
1200006872.english: The stray cat that was found collapsed in front of my house!

1200006877.korean: 아가, 네 것도 준비했으니 사양 말고 같이 먹자.
1200006877.english: Baby, I've prepared one for you too, so don't be shy and let's eat together.

1200006878.korean: - 아주머니는 나긋하고 다정한 미소로 소년을 반겼다.
1200006878.english: The woman welcomed the boy with a gentle and kind smile.

1200006879.english: Mom! Mom! I want a pancake!

1200006881.korean: - 촌스러운 꽃 무늬 자수 식탁보로 장식된 식탁에 둘러 앉은 가족들은,
1200006881.english: The family gathered around the dining table decorated with a tacky floral embroidered tablecloth,

1200006882.korean: - 빵과 과일을 맛있게 나누어 먹으며 도란도란 이야기 꽃을 틔운다.
1200006882.english: - We share bread and fruit while chatting happily.

1200006883.korean: 아가, 왜 먹질 않아, 혹시 입맛에 맞지 않니…?
1200006883.english: Baby, why aren't you eating? Is it not to your taste...?

1200006884.korean: - 따로 내어준 접시 위 음식에 손을 대지 않는 소년을 걱정하는 그녀가 조심스레 묻는다.
1200006884.english: Worried about the boy who is not touching the food on the separate plate, she asks cautiously.

1200006886.english: It’s my first time having such a warm meal…

1200006887.korean: - 그녀는 측은한 표정으로 아이의 머리를 소중히 쓰다듬었다.
1200006887.english: She gently stroked the child's head with a pitiful expression.

1200006888.korean: - 스치는 옷감에서 기분 좋은 비누 향기가 느껴졌다.
1200006888.english: A pleasant soap scent wafted from the brushing fabric.

1200006889.english: It smelled exactly like the blanket.

1200006890.korean: 겉보기로 누군가를 판단하는 건 잘못된 짓이지만,
1200006890.english: Judging someone by their appearance is wrong, but,

1200006891.korean: 아가, 당장 네가 따로 돌아갈 곳 없이 힘든 상황이 맞다면…
1200006891.english: My dear, if you are truly in a difficult situation with nowhere to go right now...

1200006892.korean: 우리가 힘이 닿는 데 까진 도와줄 수 있지 않을까, 그런 생각을 해봤단다.
1200006892.english: I was thinking that we might be able to help as much as we can.

1200006893.korean: 물론 어디까지나 네가 여기 있고 싶다는 마음이 있고, 불편하지 않다면 말이지.
1200006893.english: Of course, that is as long as you want to stay here and aren't uncomfortable.

1200006894.korean: 낯선 아줌마가 갑자기 이런 이야길 한다고 너무 무섭게 여기진 않아줬음 좋겠구나.
1200006894.english: I hope you don't find it too scary that a stranger is suddenly telling you this.

1200006895.korean: 나도 너만한 아이를 둔 엄마이다 보니…
1200006895.english: Since I am also a mother of a child your age…

1200006896.english: You know how I keep finding myself meddling?

1200006897.english: At the prime of his life, when he should have been loved…

1200006898.korean: - 소년은 만져지는 손길에 가만히 눈을 감고 과거를 떠올렸다.
1200006898.english: The boy quietly closed his eyes at the touch and recalled the past.

1200006899.korean: - 동경했던 분위기와 따듯한 온도, 식기들이 맞부딪히며 내는 크고 작은 생활 소음…
1200006899.english: - The atmosphere and warmth I longed for, the loud and small sounds of daily life made by tableware clinking together…

1200006900.korean: - 그 어느 것에서도 과거와 닮은꼴을 찾아볼 수 없는 장소였지만,
1200006900.english: It was a place where no resemblance to the past could be found in anything, but

1200006901.korean: - 어째선가 이유를 알 수 없는 안락함에 가슴 속 가득 떠맡은 짐 덩어리들을 전부 내 버린 느낌이었다.
1200006901.english: It felt as if I had cast aside all the heavy burdens I had carried in my heart in a sense of comfort I could not understand for some reason.

1200006902.korean: - 얼굴을 뒤덮는 보드라운 감촉에 아이는 감았던 눈을 떴다.
1200006902.english: The child opened their closed eyes at the soft sensation covering their face.

1200006903.english: Even though it was all darkness, I was not afraid.

1200006904.korean: - 뺨에 닿아 있는 그녀의 얇은 뜨개옷 위로 쿵, 쿵, 일정한 박동이 소년에게 전달됐다.
1200006904.english: A steady thump, thump, was transmitted to the boy through her thin knitted dress touching his cheek.

1200006907.korean: 오빠는 그것 말고 할 줄 아는 말이 없어?
1200006907.english: Is that the only thing you know how to say?

1200006908.korean: 자, 사이 좋게 싸우지 말고. 한 명씩 안아줄게, 응?
1200006908.english: Come on, don't fight nicely. I'll give you each a hug, okay?

1200006909.korean: - 그녀는 품에 가둔 소년의 작은 등을 토닥이며 보채는 아이들을 향해 방긋 웃어 보인다.
1200006909.english: She pats the small back of the boy she holds in her arms and smiles brightly at the whining children.

1200006910.korean: - 그토록 작은 몸이 아껴왔던 뜨거운 눈물이 마침내 쉼없이 흐른다.
1200006910.english: The hot tears that such a small body has cherished finally flow ceaselessly.

1200006911.korean: - 하염없이 울다 지친 소년은 침대 위에서야 비로소 눈물을 멈추고 잠에 들었다.
1200006911.english: The boy, exhausted from crying endlessly, finally stopped his tears and fell asleep only on the bed.

1200006912.english: Before I knew it, time had passed,

1200006913.korean: - 가족들의 보살핌 속에서 무럭무럭 자란 아이는 어느정도 존 가족 구성원으로 자리 잡은듯 했다.
1200006913.english: The child, having grown up healthy under the care of the family, seemed to have settled in to some extent as a member of John's family.

1200006914.korean: - 활기 넘치는 식사 시간 후, 오늘도 아이들은 양주머니 가득 간식 거리를 챙겨 마을 외곽으로 뛰어 나갔다.
1200006914.english: After a lively meal, the children once again packed their pockets full of snacks and ran out to the outskirts of the village.

1200006915.korean: -숲은 여름이 되어 푸른 빛으로 우거져 철새와 곤충의 울음 소리가 어렴풋이 들려왔다.
1200006915.english: As summer arrived, the forest grew lush with green, and the faint sounds of migratory birds and insects could be heard.

1200006916.korean: - 껍질에서 윤기가 흐르는 딱정벌레를 잡겠다는 일념 하나로 똘똘 뭉친 세 사람은,
1200006916.english: The three people, united by the single-minded determination to catch a beetle with a glossy shell,

1200006917.korean: - 송골송골 맺히는 땀방울을 닦아가며 기다란 나무 위 여기 저기를 들쑤셨다.
1200006917.english: Wiping away beads of sweat, I poked around here and there on the tall tree.

1200006918.english: Here! It's here, right here! Help me out!

1200006919.korean: - 존은 방정 맞은 제자리 뜀박질로 흩어진 아이들의 이목을 손을 흔들어 집중 시켰다.
1200006919.english: John waved his hand to draw the attention of the children who had scattered by his boisterous jumping in place.

1200006920.korean: - 소년은 서슴 없이 존에게 어깨를 내어 주었다.
1200006920.english: The boy unhesitatingly offered his shoulder to John.

1200006921.korean: - 곁에 선 레이첼이 목마 위에서 휘청대는 제 오빠의 등을 함께 올려다보며 꺄르르, 소리 내어 웃는다.
1200006921.english: Rachel, standing beside him, looks up at her brother's back as he sways on the hobby horse and giggles.

1200006926.korean: 오빠들 집중 하는 거 안 보여?
1200006926.english: Can't you see the guys are concentrating?

1200006929.english: She always gave my older brother piggyback rides...

1200006930.korean: - 레이첼은 볼멘소리를 내며 구두 끝으로 흙을 걷어찼다.
1200006930.english: Rachel kicked the dirt with the tip of her shoe while grumbling.

1200006933.korean: - 존은 딱정벌레 위치로 손수 만든 채집망의 거리를 점점 좁혀간다.
1200006933.english: John gradually narrows the distance of the handmade net to the beetle's location.

1200006940.english: I need to be careful not to get bitten by the tongs.

1200006942.korean: 여기 보이는 선이 배 끝까지 나 있지?
1200006942.english: The line you see here runs all the way to the end of the ship, right?

1200006945.english: How do you know so well?

1200006946.korean: 전생에 파브르 곤충 박사였던 거 아냐...?
1200006946.english: Weren't you Dr. Fabre the insectologist in your past life...?

1200006947.korean: 그냥 어쩌다 책에서 본 걸 기억하고 있었을 뿐이야.
1200006947.english: I just happened to remember seeing it in a book.

1200006948.korean: 근데 우리 오빠가 잡은 사슴벌레 말야…
1200006948.english: But you know the stag beetle my brother caught…

1200006954.korean: 우리 서로 사슴벌레를 잡아다가 집게로 싸움을 붙이자!
1200006954.english: Let's catch stag beetles and make them fight using pincers!

1200006955.korean: 누가 누가 더 큰 사슴벌레를 잡는 지 대결이다!
1200006955.english: It's a showdown to see who can catch the biggest stag beetle!

1200006957.english: What if the stag beetles don't want to fight?

1200006958.korean: 에이, 그럼 머리에 이렇게 크고 단단한 집게를 왜 달고 태어났겠어?
1200006958.english: Come on, then why would I have been born with such a big, hard clamp on my head?

1200006960.korean: 싸우는 데 사용하는 게 아닐 수도 있잖아!
1200006960.english: It might not be used for fighting!

1200006963.english: What if they are close brother and sister stag beetles...?

1200006964.korean: - 레이첼은 삐약거리는 귀여운 목소리로 두 소년을 향해 따져 물었다.
1200006964.english: Rachel questioned the two boys in a cute, chirping voice.

1200006965.korean: - 그 와중에 그녀의 손에 들린 사슴벌레는 격한 저항을 하며,
1200006965.english: In the meantime, the stag beetle in her hand put up fierce resistance,

1200006966.korean: - 이내 발라당 배를 까뒤집고 여러 가닥으로 난 다리를 마구 흔들고 있었다.
1200006966.english: Soon, it rolled over on its back and wildly shook its multi-pronged legs.

1200006967.korean: - 장난끼가 발동한 존의 입가에 의미심장한 미소가 번진다.
1200006967.english: A meaningful smile spreads across John's lips as he feels a mischievous urge.

1200006968.korean: 레이첼, 넌 대체 우리가 어딜 봐서 사이 좋은 남매라는 거야?
1200006968.english: Rachel, how on earth do you see us as close siblings?

1200006971.english: Rachel's face instantly turned red and then blue.

1200006972.korean: - 어깨를 털며 그들의 대화를 경청하던 소년은 한 마디 잔소리 대신 크게 한숨 지으며 고개를 저었다.
1200006972.english: The boy, who had been listening to their conversation while brushing his shoulders, shook his head with a deep sigh instead of a single word of nagging.

1200006973.korean: - 존은 묵묵히 자리를 지키는 소년의 팔을 잡아 당겼다.
1200006973.english: John pulled the arm of the boy who was silently holding his ground.

1200006974.korean: - 갸우뚱, 그의 몸이 우스꽝스럽게 기울며 존의 앞으로 고꾸라진다.
1200006974.english: - Tilts his head, his body leans comically, and he tumbles forward in front of John.

1200006976.korean: 누가 봐도 이쪽을 사이 좋은 형제지간으로 보지 않겠어?
1200006976.english: Anyone looking at us wouldn't see us as close brothers, right?

1200006978.english: Don't do that, it gives me goosebumps, John.

1200006979.korean: - 후덥지근한 공기 속에 섞인 습기가 한데 모인 듯 벌써 소녀의 커다란 눈망울에 눈물이 한가득 고였다.
1200006979.english: Tears had already welled up in the girl's large eyes, as if the humidity mixed in the muggy air had gathered together.

1200006982.korean: - 생뚱맞은 레이첼의 발언에 당황한 듯 했지만, 존은 웃으면서 말했다.
1200006982.english: Although he seemed taken aback by Rachel's unexpected remark, John spoke with a smile.

1200006984.english: How can you two act like this..?!

1200006985.english: And on top of that, you left me out completely???

1200006986.korean: - 두 남매 사이에서 이리저리 차이는 소년의 입장이 여간 귀찮지 않을 수 없었다.
1200006986.english: The boy, caught between the two siblings, was in a truly troublesome position.

1200006987.english: (I’ve gotten caught up in this brother and sister relationship again…)

1200006992.english: How long are you going to keep calling me a thieving cat?

1200006993.korean: 그럼 도둑 고양일 도둑 고양이라 부르지, 뭐라 부르겠어?
1200006993.english: Then, if it's a thieving cat, you call it a thieving cat, what else would you call it?

1200006994.korean: 네로야~ 남의 집에 함부로 들어오면 못 써!
1200006994.english: Nero, you shouldn't barge into other people's houses!

1200006995.english: Did you lose your mom by any chance?

1200006996.korean: - 존은 같잖게 꾸며낸 높은 목소리로 아주머니 말투를 흉내 내며,
1200006996.english: John mimicked the old woman's tone in a ridiculously high-pitched voice,

1200006997.korean: - 바닥에서 주운 나뭇가지로 소동물 대하는 시늉을 보여주려는 듯 사방팔방 허공을 저어댔다.
1200006997.english: He waved a twig he had picked up from the ground in all directions in the air, as if pretending to treat a small animal.

1200006999.korean: - 화가 난 소년은 즉각적으로 존의 멱살을 부여잡으며 분노를 표출했다.
1200006999.english: The angry boy immediately grabbed John by the collar and expressed his rage.

1200007000.korean: - 중심을 잃은 두 몸뚱아리가 원래부터 한 덩어리였던 것 처럼 흙밭을 데굴데굴 굴렀다.
1200007000.english: The two bodies, having lost their balance, rolled around on the dirt field as if they had been one mass from the beginning.

1200007003.english: Huh? You're not supposed to fight with family!

1200007010.english: It happened in the blink of an eye.

1200007011.korean: - 레이첼이 쥐고 있던 사슴벌레가 그녀의 손아귀를 벗어나 날개를 흔들며 작은 점이 되어 사라지는 중이었다.
1200007011.english: The stag beetle Rachel was holding slipped out of her grasp, flapped its wings, and was disappearing as a small dot.

1200007012.english: The stag beetle my brother caught for me...

1200007016.english: Come back, we can just catch it again, right!?

1200007017.korean: - 존은 더러워진 옷에 붙은 흙먼지와 나뭇잎을 털고 벌떡 일어나,
1200007017.english: John brushed the dirt and leaves off his dirty clothes and stood up abruptly,

1200007018.korean: - 멀어지는 제 동생을 멈춰 세우기 위해 목청 높여 소녀의 이름을 불렀다.
1200007018.english: I shouted the girl's name at the top of my lungs to stop my younger sibling from walking away.

1200007019.korean: - 그러나 레이첼의 모습은 이미 보이지 않은 채 였다.
1200007019.english: However, Rachel was already out of sight.

1200007020.korean: - 존은 넘어져있는 소년에게 손을 건네며 말했다.
1200007020.english: John reached out his hand to the fallen boy and said

1200007021.korean: 나도 아까 일은 사과할테니까, 지금은 좀 도와줘야겠다.
1200007021.english: I'll apologize for what happened earlier, so I should help you out now.

1200007023.korean: 네 명령 때문이 아니라 원래 그럴 생각이었거든.
1200007023.english: It’s not because of your order, but because that’s what I originally intended to do.

1200007025.english: Anyway, I told you he's prickly...

1200007026.korean: - 레이첼의 이름을 부르며 소년들은 참나무속 나무들의 수피를 더듬어가며 그 주위를 살폈다.
1200007026.english: Calling Rachel's name, the boys searched the surroundings, running their fingers through the bark of the oak trees.

1200007027.korean: - 깊은 숲 속까지 들어가다보니, 두 소년은 각기 다른 산비탈로 흩어졌다.
1200007027.english: As they went deep into the forest, the two boys scattered onto different mountain slopes.

1200007028.korean: - 기분 나쁜 습기와 내리 쬐는 열기에 얼굴을 뒤덮는 땀방울을 닦아내는 일도 귀찮아질 때 즈음,
1200007028.english: Around the time when even wiping away the beads of sweat covering your face becomes a bother amidst the unpleasant humidity and scorching heat,

1200007029.korean: - 소년은 마침내 근심 가득한 표정으로 나무 밑동 위에 앉아있는 레이첼을 찾아낼 수 있었다.
1200007029.english: The boy was finally able to find Rachel sitting on the base of the tree with a worried expression.

1200007033.english: Did you get lost too, brother?

1200007034.korean: - 레이첼은 눈을 가늘게 치켜 뜨고는 뭉근하게 그를 쳐다본다.
1200007034.english: Rachel narrows her eyes and stares at him slowly.

1200007035.korean: - 다소간 말문이 막힌 소년은 그녀의 손에 들린 사슴벌레를 가리켰다.
1200007035.english: The boy, somewhat speechless, pointed at the stag beetle in her hand.

1200007038.english: I caught it again, isn't that amazing?

1200007039.korean: - 소녀는 자리에서 일어나 꼭 쥐고 있던 사슴벌레를 몇 걸음 옆의 나무 껍질 위에 조심스럽게 얹어 놓는다.
1200007039.english: The girl stands up and carefully places the stag beetle she was holding tightly onto the bark of a tree a few steps away.

1200007040.english: However, for some reason, her gait is strange.

1200007041.korean: - 절뚝이는 다리로 시선을 내리니 무릎 아래 갓 생긴 상처로 엉망이다.
1200007041.english: I lowered my gaze with my limping leg and saw that the area below my knee was a mess from a fresh wound.

1200007044.korean: 아무리 생각해봐도 우리끼리 재밌으려고 싸움 붙이는 건 너무 못됐어!
1200007044.english: No matter how much I think about it, starting a fight just for fun among ourselves is really mean!

1200007045.korean: 부모님이 걱정하시겠다, 어서 집으로 돌아가렴, 사슴벌레야~!
1200007045.english: Your parents must be worried. Go home quickly, stag beetle!

1200007047.korean: - 사슴벌레를 잡고 있던 손가락이 벌어져 있던 집게가 맞물리며 레이첼의 손가락을 물었다.
1200007047.english: The finger holding the stag beetle bit Rachel's finger as the open pincers interlocked.

1200007048.korean: - 그녀의 비명에 놀란 소년은 재빨리 매달려 있는 사슴벌레를 무자비하게 내동댕이쳤다.
1200007048.english: Startled by her scream, the boy quickly and mercilessly threw the hanging stag beetle.

1200007049.korean: - 그러고도 분이 풀리지 않았다는 듯이 딱딱한 사슴벌레의 껍질이 으깨지도록 여러 번 짓밟으며 씩씩댔다.
1200007049.english: As if his anger was not appeased even after that, he stomped on the stag beetle's hard shell several times until it was crushed, panting heavily.

1200007053.korean: 그냥 놀라서 그랬어, 하나도 안 아파!
1200007053.english: I just said that because I was surprised. It doesn't hurt at all!

1200007056.english: ...Let's hurry back and apply the medicine.

1200007057.korean: - 레이첼은 무언가 만족스럽지 않다는 듯이 퉁명스런 눈빛을 거두지 않는다.
1200007057.english: Rachel does not take away her brusque gaze, as if something is unsatisfactory.

1200007060.korean: 그러다가 나중에 어른 돼서 여자들한테 인기 없다.
1200007060.english: Then later, when he grows up, he isn't popular with girls.

1200007061.english: … It’s okay if you don’t have it.

1200007062.korean: 오빠한테 시집 올 미래의 부인을 위해서라도 좀 웃는 연습도 하구, 응? 스마일!
1200007062.english: You should practice smiling a little, for the sake of your future wife who will marry you, okay? Smile!

1200007064.korean: - 그녀가 억지로 잡아 올린 입꼬리 때문에 그의 발음이 멍청하게 들린다.
1200007064.english: His pronunciation sounds stupid because of the corners of her mouth that she forced up.

1200007065.korean: - 이윽고 두 사람은 얼굴을 맞대고 폭소한다.
1200007065.english: Eventually, the two of them put their faces close together and burst into laughter.

1200007066.english: See, it feels good to smile, doesn't it?

1200007067.korean: 이제 장난 그만 치고 어서 업혀, 해 지기 전에 빨리 돌아가자.
1200007067.english: Stop messing around and get on my back. Let's hurry back before the sun goes down.

1200007068.english: If you're any later, the lady will be worried.

1200007070.korean: 바보도 아니고... 해 지기 전에 여런히 잘 돌아오겠지.
1200007070.english: He's not a fool... He'll surely be back safely before sunset.

1200007072.korean: - 부드러운 고동색 머리카락이 주인의 움직임에 따라 그녀의 볼을 간지럽혔다.
1200007072.english: - Her soft, dark brown hair tickled her cheek with her owner's movements.

1200007075.english: Oppa, do you hate my brother that much?

1200007077.english: Because we fight every single day!

1200007079.korean: 너도 어른들이 말씀하시는 거 들어본 적 있지?
1200007079.english: You've heard adults say that too, right?

1200007080.korean: 그럼 오빠들은 어른이 되면 에펠탑만하게 커지는 거야?
1200007080.english: So, when you guys grow up, will you grow up to be as big as the Eiffel Tower?

1200007081.english: What do you mean the Eiffel Tower? It'll be as big as Everest!

1200007082.korean: -공중으로 기분좋게 붕붕 흔들리던 소녀의 두 다리도 조금씩 움직임이 잦아든다.
1200007082.english: The girl's two legs, which had been swaying pleasantly in the air, also gradually slow down.

1200007083.korean: - 늘어지는 하품과 느슨해진 숨결이 소년의 뒤통수로 느껴진다.
1200007083.english: - A drawn-out yawn and loosened breathing are felt on the back of the boy's head.

1200007087.korean: 오빠가 우리 집에 온 뒤로, 가족 모두 예전으로 돌아온 것 같아서 다행이라고 생각해.
1200007087.english: I think it's a relief that our whole family seems to have gone back to how things used to be since my brother came to our house.

1200007088.korean: 알고 보면 울 오빠… 엄청 착해.
1200007088.english: Actually, my older brother... is super nice.

1200007089.english: Yawn... You're really good at studying, too...

1200007094.korean: - 소년은 적적한 나머지, 막연한 상상의 나래를 펼쳐본다.
1200007094.english: Feeling lonely, the boy lets his vague imagination run wild.

1200007095.korean: - 존이 있어야 할 자리 대신 본인의 얼굴을 그려넣는다.
1200007095.english: - Draw your own face in the place where John should be.

1200007096.korean: - 한없이 인자한 어머니의 모습은 점차 괴물처럼 몸집을 불리더니,
1200007096.english: The infinitely benevolent image of the mother gradually grew in size like a monster,

1200007097.korean: - 소년이 아닌 그의 옆에 선 레이첼을 삼켜버리고만다.
1200007097.english: - He ends up swallowing Rachel, who stands beside him, instead of the boy.

1200007098.korean: - 꼬리 무는 불안과 공포에 그의 발걸음은 달음박질로 바뀐다.
1200007098.english: Driven by a tangled web of anxiety and fear, his footsteps turn into a run.

1200007099.korean: - 그의 등에 업힌 소녀는 칭얼거림 하나 없이 고요하다.
1200007099.english: The girl on his back is quiet, without a single whin.

1200007100.korean: - 점차 지평선 너머 아늑한 ‘우리 집’이 눈앞으로 성큼 다가온다.
1200007100.english: - Gradually, the cozy 'our home' beyond the horizon draws closer to my eyes.

1200007101.korean: - 누군가가 안절부절 못하며 대문 앞을 좌우로 서성이는 중이었다.
1200007101.english: Someone was pacing back and forth in front of the gate, fidgeting nervously.

1200007103.korean: - 뿌연 흙먼지 속에서 녹초가 된 소년과 여동생을 발견하고는 울먹이며 허겁지겁 뛰어왔다.
1200007103.english: He spotted the exhausted boy and his younger sister in the thick dust and ran over in a panic, sobbing.

1200007105.english: Where have you been and why are you only coming back now?

1200007106.korean: (왜 고생은 내가 했는 데, 지가 우는 거지)
1200007106.english: (Why is she crying when I'm the one who did all the work?)

1200007107.korean: 무슨 일 있었던 건 아니지? 어디 다친 데는 없는 거지?
1200007107.english: Nothing happened, right? You're not hurt anywhere, are you?

1200007111.english: What are you talking about? If you're talking about your younger sister, she's here...

1200007113.korean: - 소년의 등에 업혀 곤히 잠든 레이첼을 받아 안은 존의 혈색이 삽시간 새파랗게 질려버린다.
1200007113.english: John's face instantly turns pale as he holds Rachel, who is sound asleep on the boy's back.

1200007115.english: It was a sight that was hard to believe even after seeing it.

1200007116.korean: - 고함을 내치는 존의 입을 당황하며 황급히 틀어막은 그가 숨 죽이며 되물었다.
1200007116.english: He hurriedly covered John's mouth in a panic as he let out a shout, then asked back while holding his breath.

1200007117.korean: 네 동생 잠든 거 안 보여?
1200007117.english: Can't you see your little brother is asleep?

1200007120.korean: - 그날 저녁 부터 가족들은 먹고 자는 것도 잊은 체 그녀의 곁을 지켰다.
1200007120.english: From that evening on, the family stayed by her side, forgetting even to eat and sleep.

1200007121.korean: - 고른 숨을 내쉬고 있는 소녀에게 유달리 병적으로 과도한 보호를 보이고 있었다.
1200007121.english: He was showing unusually pathological excessive protection to the girl who was breathing evenly.

1200007122.korean: - 도무지 듣도 보도 못한 생소한 상황의 연속이었지만,
1200007122.english: It was a series of completely unfamiliar situations that I had never heard of or seen before, but

1200007123.korean: - 소년은 누군가가 먼저 설명해주기도 전에 무언가 잘못되었음을 깨닫고만다.
1200007123.english: The boy realizes that something is wrong before anyone can explain it to him.

1200007124.korean: - 잠든 그녀가 깨어나지 않는 다는 걸.
1200007124.english: - That she, who is asleep, is not waking up.

1200007125.korean: - 레이첼이 깨어나지 않는 꿈속을 헤매인지 꼬박 사흘 째 밤이 되던 날,
1200007125.english: On the night of the third full night that Rachel had been wandering in a dream from which she could not wake,

1200007126.korean: - 늦은 새벽까지 협탁 불이 꺼지지 않는 존의 방문을 두드렸다.
1200007126.english: I knocked on John's door, where the bedside lamp remained lit until late at night.

1200007128.korean: 네가 왠 일이야, 이 시간까지 잠도 안 자고…
1200007128.english: What brings you here? You're up at this hour without even sleeping...

1200007132.english: Did you draw a map on the blanket?

1200007134.korean: 무슨 반응이 있어야 나도 재미있지 않겠냐,
1200007134.english: Wouldn't it be fun for me if there were some kind of reaction?

1200007135.korean: - 그는 애써 초조함과 피로를 감추려 평소와 다를 바 없는 시시콜콜한 장난을 걸어왔다.
1200007135.english: He tried hard to hide his nervousness and fatigue by playing the usual trivial pranks.

1200007138.english: So, outsiders don't need to know, is that it?

1200007141.korean: 너희 가족한테 무슨 말 못 할 비밀이라도 있는 모양인데…
1200007141.english: It looks like you have some secret you can't tell your family...

1200007142.korean: 적어도 걔가 지금 괜찮다, 아니다, 설명 해줄 수 있는 거잖아.
1200007142.english: At least he can explain whether he's okay or not right now.

1200007143.korean: 내가 뭐 하나부터 열 가지 다 이해 시켜달래?
1200007143.english: Do you mean I have to explain everything from A to Z?

1200007144.english: If only I had known at least a rough idea earlier…

1200007145.korean: 애초에 그런 곳으로 놀러다닐 생각 조차 안 했을 거야.
1200007145.english: I probably wouldn't have even thought about going to places like that in the first place.

1200007146.korean: 게다가, 넌 다 알고 있던 주제에 잘도 아픈 동생을…
1200007146.english: Besides, considering you knew all along, how dare you... your sick younger sibling...

1200007148.korean: - 소년은 하던 말을 멈추고 그의 말에 온 신경을 집중시켰다.
1200007148.english: The boy stopped speaking and focused all his attention on what he was saying.

1200007151.korean: 죽을 만큼 고통스럽다고 하면 어떨 것 같아?
1200007151.english: What would you think if someone said it was painful enough to kill you?

1200007153.korean: 넌 진짜 이런 순간 까지도 허튼 소리나 하고…
1200007153.english: You're really talking nonsense even at a moment like this...

1200007154.english: … It is not known exactly when it started, but,

1200007155.korean: …내 동생은 툭 하면 일상생활 중에도 이유 없이 잠들어버리는데다가…
1200007155.english: … My younger sibling falls asleep for no reason at the drop of a hat, even during daily life, and on top of that…

1200007156.korean: 오랜 악몽 때문에 몸도 마음도 허약해지고 있어.
1200007156.english: My body and mind are becoming weak due to a long nightmare.

1200007157.english: I thought things were finally getting better recently...

1200007159.korean: 그런데 다시 그 악몽을 꾸기 시작했나봐…
1200007159.english: But I think I've started having that nightmare again...

1200007162.korean: 레이첼이 악몽을 꾸고 나면, 다리가 여러 개 달린 뱀이 쫓아왔다는 이야기를 하니까...
1200007162.english: Whenever Rachel has a nightmare, she talks about a multi-legged snake chasing her...

1200007163.korean: - 존은 두 사람 사이 무거워진 공기의 흐름을 바꿔보려 노력한다.
1200007163.english: John tries to change the heavy atmosphere between the two.

1200007166.english: Have you heard of it? 'Soft Stone' …

1200007169.english: The name is unfamiliar, so I can't remember it.

1200007171.korean: 실은 우리가 한국으로 넘어 오게 된 것도 그것 때문이야.
1200007171.english: Actually, that is also why we came over to Korea.

1200007172.korean: 화석 연료 고갈 직전, 기적처럼 개발된 신물질!
1200007172.english: A new substance developed like a miracle just before fossil fuels were depleted!

1200007173.korean: 진화를 거듭해온 인류 과학 기술의 최대 산물!
1200007173.english: The greatest product of human science and technology that has continued to evolve!

1200007174.korean: 죽은 세포 재분열까지 촉진시킬 수 있을 거라는 전망도 나오고 있잖아!
1200007174.english: There are even predictions that it could promote the regrowth of dead cells!

1200007175.korean: 오리진 더스트를 사람한테 직접 쓸 수 있을진 모르겠지만,
1200007175.english: I'm not sure if Origin Dust can be used directly on a person, but,

1200007177.korean: 200살, 300살 사는 게 당연한 세상이 될 거라고!
1200007177.english: It's going to be a world where living to 200 or 300 is the norm!

1200007182.korean: 그런 엄청난 기술이 어떻게 일반 사람들이 사용하냐?
1200007182.english: How do ordinary people use such incredible technology?

1200007187.korean: 그만큼 어려운 기술이면, 당연히 돈 많고 권력 높은 사람들 사이에서나 사고 팔리겠지.
1200007187.english: If it is that difficult of a technology, naturally it would only be bought and sold among the wealthy and powerful.

1200007188.english: Do you have a lot of money?

1200007192.korean: 현실적으로 어느 정돈 실현 가능한 방법을 고민해 보는 게…
1200007192.english: It would be better to consider methods that are realistically feasible to some extent…

1200007193.korean: - 소년의 설교에 존은 잠시 고민하는 듯 했다.
1200007193.english: John seemed to ponder for a moment at the boy's sermon.

1200007195.korean: …그래, 너 말대로 누구나 그 엄청난 기술들을 사용하는 세상이 왔다고 치자,
1200007195.english: … Okay, let’s assume, just as you said, that a world has come where everyone uses those incredible technologies,

1200007196.english: But the reason for specifically revealing it to people is…

1200007199.english: Is it true that it was actually found?

1200007200.korean: 또 이상한 과학소설 같은거 너무 많이 읽은 거 아냐?
1200007200.english: Didn't you read too much weird science fiction again?

1200007203.english: I'm not as gloomy as you.

1200007205.korean: 이 과학바보랑 대화가 통할거라고 생각한 내가 바보지.
1200007205.english: I'm a fool for thinking I could have a conversation with this science dummy.

1200007206.korean: 아니, 과학은 너처럼 베베 꼬이지 않았다니까?
1200007206.english: No, I'm telling you, science isn't as twisted as you are.

1200007207.english: Sigh... If you're going to talk nonsense, I'm going back.

1200007210.korean: 지금부터 생명 공학 공부를 열심히 해서,
1200007210.english: I will study biotechnology hard starting now,

1200007211.korean: 내 여동생의 병을 치료하기 위한 ‘오리진 더스트’를 연구하는 회사를 직접 차릴 거야.
1200007211.english: I am going to personally start a company to research 'Origin Dust' to cure my younger sister's illness.

1200007212.korean: - 소년은 처음에 뜬구름 잡는 이야기라고 생각했지만,
1200007212.english: At first, the boy thought it was just wishful thinking, but

1200007215.korean: - 존의 반짝거리는 눈과 함께 자신의 꿈을 이야기하는 모습만큼은 진짜였다.
1200007215.english: The way John spoke of his dream, along with his sparkling eyes, was genuine.

1200007217.english: You have to keep helping me!

1200007219.korean: - 지석은 어쩔 수 없다는 듯 자신의 이마에 손을 갖다대고 고개를 절레절레 흔들었다.
1200007219.english: Ji-seok put his hand to his forehead and shook his head as if resigned to the situation.

1200007221.english: We're practically brothers, how can you treat us like this?

1200007224.english: Are you shy? You can be honest with me~.

1200007225.english: I'll help you, so stop now.

1200007227.english: Looking back now, that was the moment. The first time I made a decision.

1200007229.english: "I want to protect it with my own hands..."

1100711538.korean:
다음 스킨 구매 및 대상 전투원에게 선물 시, 배경이 활성화 됩니다.
스노우 페더 용 "Cool With You : 자애의 깃털 비키니"
1100711538.english:
The background will be activated when purchasing the next skin and gifting it to the target combatant.
 Snow Feather Dragon "Cool With You: Feather Bikini of Compassion"

1200200004.korean: 응, 언제 구조 신호가 올지 모르니까.
1200200004.english: Yeah, because you never know when a distress signal might come.

1200200005.korean: 바로 구조에 나설 수 있도록 대기 하고 있었어.
1200200005.english: I was on standby so I could go out for the rescue right away.

1200200006.english: ...How about you, sis? Did you find something today?

1200200007.korean: 응~~ 전혀~! 이렇다 할 수확 없음!
1200200007.english: Yeah~~ not at all~! No significant gains!

1200200008.korean: 오늘은 전보다 더 멀리 나가봤는데 쓸만한 건 그다지 찾지 못했어.
1200200008.english: I went further out today than before, but I didn't really find anything useful.

1200200009.korean: 그래도 뭔가 있었다고 하면 최근에 침몰한 함선을 찾았다 정도?
1200200009.english: Still, if I had to say something happened, it would be that a sunken ship was found recently?

1200200010.english: Even so, the supplies were completely empty!

1200200011.korean: 최근에 침몰했는데 우리에게 전달된 구조 신호가 없었다는 건 아무도 타고 있지 않았거나…
1200200011.english: It sank recently, and the fact that no distress signal was transmitted to us means that no one was on board or…

1200200012.english: I guess that means it's already too late.

1200200015.korean: 디오네~ 왜 이렇게 기운이 없어. 언니가 안아줄까?
1200200015.english: Dione~ Why are you so down? Shall I give you a hug?

1200200016.korean: 우으, 이미 안고 있잖아… 앗, 언니~ 머리 쓰다듬지 마.
1200200016.english: Ugh, you're already holding me... Ah, sis~ Don't stroke my head.

1200200017.korean: 뭐, 어때 항상 열심히 하는 디오네에게 칭찬! 칭찬! 혹시 부끄러운 거야?
1200200017.english: So what? Praise! Praise! for Dione, who always works so hard! Are you perhaps shy?

1200200019.english: … … How is it? It’s warm, isn’t it?

1200200021.korean: 몸이 이렇게 차가워질 때까지 계속 밖에 서 있었다니 정말 바보야.
1200200021.english: I'm such an idiot for standing outside until my body got this cold.

1200200023.korean: 하지만 이것 말고는 내가 할 수 있는 일이 뭔지 모르겠는걸…
1200200023.english: But I don't know what else I can do besides this...

1200200027.korean: 언제까지 이렇게 구조 요청만 기다리고 있을 거야?
1200200027.english: How long are you going to keep waiting for a rescue request like this?

1200200029.korean: 디오네가 인명 구조를 위한 바이오로이드인건 알겠지만… 그… 뭐냐….
1200200029.english: I know Dione is a bioroid for rescue, but... uh... what is it... .

1200200030.korean: 철충? 이라고 불려지는 것들이 나타난 이후로 지상의 인간 대부분이 없어졌어.
1200200030.english: Most of the humans on Earth have disappeared since the things called Iron Bugs appeared.

1200200031.korean: 어쩌면 이제 이 세상에 남은 인간이란 전부 멸종해 없어져 버렸을지도 몰라.
1200200031.english: Maybe all the humans left in this world have gone extinct.

1200200033.english: If humanity had really gone extinct, just like my sister said…

1200200034.english: From now on, I will not be focused on saving lives…

1200200035.korean: 무엇을 목적으로 살아가야 할 지 모르겠어…
1200200035.english: I don't know what purpose I should live for...

1200200038.korean: 앞으로 뭘 할지 같이 찾아보자고~ 그게 뭐가 되더라도 우리 둘이라면 분명 해낼 수 있을 거야.
1200200038.english: Let's figure out what to do next together. No matter what it turns out to be, the two of us can definitely make it happen.

1200200039.korean: 같이 찾아보자니… 언니는 뭔가 하고 싶은 거라도 있어?
1200200039.english: You suggested we look for it together… is there something you want to do, unnie?

1200200041.korean: ...미안, 사실 깊이 생각해 본 적은 없어.
1200200041.english: ...Sorry, actually I haven't really thought about it deeply.

1200200042.korean: 정말… 그러면서 나한테 뭘 하자고 하는 거야?
1200200042.english: Seriously... and yet you're trying to do something to me?

1200200043.english: Hmm... wait... I'll think about it now...

1200200044.english: Yeah... something I want to do...

1200200046.english: Just now, bam! Something popped into my head!

1200200049.korean: 그래! 모험! 미지의 장소를 찾아 나서는 탐험! 빛나는 보물을 찾는 트레저 헌팅! 듣기만 해도 좋잖아!
1200200049.english: Yeah! Adventure! Exploration to find unknown places! Treasure hunting to find shining treasures! Just hearing about it sounds great!

1200200050.english: Even if you suddenly suggest going on an adventure…

1200200051.korean: 지금 당장 시작하자는 건 아니야. 자고로 모험에는 갖은 준비가 필요하니까.
1200200051.english: I'm not suggesting we start right now. After all, adventures require all the necessary preparations.

1200200052.korean: 그러니까 모든 준비가 끝나거든 꼭 알려줘야해!
1200200052.english: So, make sure you let me know when everything is ready!

1200200053.korean: 디오네만 허락해준다면 언제든지 출발할 수 있도록 준비 해놓을 테니까!
1200200053.english: I'll have everything ready to leave anytime, as long as Dione gives me permission!

1200200054.english: It's definitely going to be fun!

1200200056.korean: 그럼 언니… 날 위해서 조금만 기다려줄래?
1200200056.english: Then, sis... could you wait just a little while for me?

1200200057.korean: 조금만 더… 마음의 준비가 필요할 것 같아…
1200200057.english: I think I need a little more... to prepare myself mentally...

1200200058.korean: 그때까지만 잠시… 우리의 모험을 미룰 수 있을까?
1200200058.english: Can we postpone our adventure just for a moment until then?

1200200060.korean: 대신 시간이 얼마나 걸리더라도 나와 꼭 모험을 가기로 한건 지켜야 해. 약속이다?
1200200060.english: Instead, no matter how long it takes, you have to keep your promise to go on an adventure with me. It's a promise, okay?

1200200062.korean: 그럼 나도 언제까지나 디오네 곁에 있어 주겠다고 약속할게.
1200200062.english: Then I promise I will stay by Dione's side forever, too.

1200300001.korean: 폐하, 그럼 정기 보고를 전달해 드리겠습니다.
1200300001.english: Your Majesty, I will now deliver the regular report.

1200300002.korean: -나는 사령실에서 흠잡을 곳이 없는 아르망의 완벽한 정기 보고를 듣고 있다.
1200300002.english: I am listening to Armand's flawless regular report from the command center.

1200300003.korean: -아아 부럽다… 저 보고에 적힌 내용들…. 얼마나 재미있었을까… 저걸 내가 했다면… 상상만 해도…
1200300003.english: Ah, I'm so jealous... of what's written in that report... How much fun it must have been... If I had done that... just imagining it...

1200300004.korean: 실례지만 폐하, 그런 표정을 지으셔도 이 정도의 일은 드리지 않을 겁니다.
1200300004.english: Excuse me, Your Majesty, even if you make that face, I would not have given you a task of this magnitude.

1200300007.korean: - 아르망은 웃으며 나에게 다가오더니 주머니에서 손수건을 꺼내 내 입가를 닦아주었다.
1200300007.english: Armand approached me smiling, took a handkerchief out of his pocket, and wiped the corners of my mouth.

1200300009.english: No, not at all. I am the one who gained something good.

1200300010.korean: - 아르망은 내 입가를 닦은 손수건을 소중히 접더니 주머니에 넣었다.
1200300010.english: Armand carefully folded the handkerchief he had used to wipe my mouth and put it in his pocket.

1200300011.korean: 레모네이드 알파님이라면 조사할 것이 있다며 잠시 자리를 비웠습니다.
1200300011.english: Lemonade Alpha stepped away for a moment, saying there was something to investigate.

1200300012.english: It seems he won't be returning for a while.

1200300013.korean: 참고로 이번 달은 물론 다음 달의 업무까지 전부 소화하고 자리를 비웠습니다.
1200300013.english: For your information, I have completed all work for this month as well as next month and have stepped away.

1200300014.korean: 그러니 아쉽게도 폐하께서 하시게 될 일은 없습니다.
1200300014.english: Therefore, unfortunately, there is nothing for Your Majesty to do.

1200300015.korean: 알파님은 자리를 비우셨고 다른 지휘관들도 오늘은 일정이 있어 대부분 나가 있습니다.
1200300015.english: Alpha is away, and most of the other commanders are also out today due to their schedules.

1200300017.english: Armand glanced at me cautiously, then…

1200300018.english: - Soon, approaching as if having made up his mind…

1200300019.korean: - 나에게 등을 기대며 무릎 위에 앉았다.
1200300019.english: - He leaned his back against me and sat on my lap.

1200300021.english: It's fine if it's just for a moment.

1200300022.english: It is incomplete, but for now, this is enough.

1200300023.korean: 제 예측이 맞다면 한 시간 이내에 폐하를 찾아오는 사람이 있을 겁니다.
1200300023.english: If my prediction is correct, someone will come to see His Majesty within an hour.

1200300024.korean: 다른 사람이 보는 앞에서 이런 애정 행위를 보이는 건 부끄러우니 폐하께서도 참아주세요.
1200300024.english: It is embarrassing to display such affection in front of others, so please refrain from doing so, Your Majesty.

1200300025.korean: - 나는 내 몸에 기댄 아르망의 작은 몸을 뒤에서 껴안았다.
1200300025.english: I hugged Armand's small body, which was leaning against mine, from behind.

1200300027.korean: - 아르망은 내가 껴안을 걸 예측했지만 이 이상은 안 된다는 눈초리로 나를 올려다봤다.
1200300027.english: Armand anticipated that I would hug him, but he looked up at me with a look that said, "No more than this."

1200300028.korean: 라고 하기에는 아래에서 뭔가가 닿고 있는 느낌이 듭니다만…
1200300028.english: That would be a stretch, though, because I feel like something is touching me from below...

1200300029.korean: - 솔직히 조금 답답하긴 하다. 한 시간 이내라면 가능하지 않을까…?
1200300029.english: - Honestly, it is a bit frustrating. Wouldn't it be possible if it were within an hour...?

1200300030.korean: - 그건 그렇고 조금 지고 있다는 느낌도 있단 말이지…
1200300030.english: Anyway, I do get the feeling that we're losing a little bit...

1200300031.english: Ah, come to think of it…

1200300032.korean: 어느 정도 충전 되었으니… 그럼 정기 보고를 계속하겠습니다.
1200300032.english: Now that it has charged up to some extent... I will continue with the regular report.

1200300033.english: What? Which one are you talking about...

1200300034.korean: - 나는 아르망을 껴안았을 때 주머니에서 슬쩍한 손수건을 보여주었다.
1200300034.english: I showed Armand the handkerchief I had swiped from my pocket when I hugged him.

1200300035.korean: - 조금 전 나의 침을 닦았던 그 손수건이다.
1200300035.english: It is the handkerchief that wiped my saliva a moment ago.

1200300036.english: Your Majesty, he has a bad habit of stealing.

1200300037.korean: - 아르망은 애써 평정심을 유지하는 걸로 보여도 귀가 빨개져 있었다.
1200300037.english: Armand was trying hard to maintain his composure, but his ears were turning red.

1200300038.korean: 어떻게 할 것도 없이 그건 그냥 손수건입니다.
1200300038.english: There is nothing to do with it; it is just a handkerchief.

1200300039.korean: 앗, 폐하께서 그럴 필요는 없습니다! 세탁이라면 제가 하겠습니다! 돌려주세요!
1200300039.english: Oh, Your Majesty, there is no need for that! If it is laundry, I will do it! Please give it back!

1200300040.korean: - 나에게서 손수건을 가져가려는 아르망. 하지만 어림도 없다.
1200300040.english: Armand tries to take the handkerchief from me. But he's no chance.

1200300041.korean: - 나는 의자 위에 서서 아르망이 절대 닿지 않는 높이에서 손수건을 흔들었다.
1200300041.english: I stood on a chair and waved a handkerchief from a height that Armand could never reach.

1200300045.korean: - 아르망은 거의 울 것 같은 표정으로 삐졌는지 고개를 돌렸다.
1200300045.english: Armand turned his head away, looking as if he were sulking and almost about to cry.

1200300046.english: Hmph... You really went too far.

1200300048.korean: - 나는 돌려주기 전에 손수건을 입에 물어 충분히 적신 뒤 그대로 아르망의 입에 넣었다.
1200300048.english: Before returning it, I took a bite of the handkerchief to soak it thoroughly, then put it directly into Armand's mouth.

1200300049.korean: 하읏, 헤… 헤하… 읍… 으음… 푸아… 하아… 하아…
1200300049.english: Haaah, heh... Heha... Ugh... Mmm... Phew... Haa... Haa...

1200300052.korean: - 작은 소동이 끝나고 아르망의 정기 보고를 전부 들었다.
1200300052.english: After the minor commotion ended, I heard all of Armand's regular reports.

1200300053.korean: - 그러던 중 나는 신경 쓰이는 한 부분에 의혹이 생겼다.
1200300053.english: In the meantime, I became suspicious of one part that was bothering me.

1200300054.korean: 네, 폐하. 정기 보고에 의문인 부분이라도 있으신지요?
1200300054.english: Yes, Your Majesty. Do you have any questions regarding the regular report?

1200300055.korean: 그거에 관해서라면 작은 사고가 있었다고 해야 할까… 폐하께서 크게 신경 쓸 일은 아닙니다.
1200300055.english: As for that, I suppose I should say there was a minor accident... It is not something Your Majesty needs to worry about too much.

1200300056.korean: - 뜻밖이다. 언제나 모든 걸 예측하여 당연하다는 듯이 행동하는 아르망이 대답을 회피하고 있다.
1200300056.english: - This is unexpected. Armand, who always predicts everything and acts as if it is a given, is avoiding the answer.

1200300057.korean: - 혹시라도 내가 모르는 곳에서 큰 사고라도 있었던 게 아닐까?
1200300057.english: Could it be that a major accident happened somewhere I don't know about?

1200300058.korean: - 만약 그렇다면 내가 모르고 넘어갈 수는 없다.
1200300058.english: If that is the case, I cannot just let it slide.

1200300060.korean: 실은 저희가 최근에 개장한 아쿠아 랜드의 워터 슬라이드 풀에서 사고가 있었습니다.
1200300060.english: Actually, there was an accident at the water slide pool at Aqua Land, which recently opened.

1200300061.korean: 전혀 예측하지 못한 사고였기에 시설을 이용하고 있던 대원 대다수가 물에 빠지고 말았습니다.
1200300061.english: As it was a completely unexpected accident, the majority of the personnel using the facility ended up falling into the water.

1200300062.korean: 다행히 크게 다친 인원은 없었고 사고 자체도 규모가 크지 않았습니다.
1200300062.english: Fortunately, no one was seriously injured, and the accident itself was not large in scale.

1200300063.korean: 그러나 안전 요원의 부족, 대원들의 수상 구조 훈련이 되어 있지 않아 피해가 커진 것으로 생각됩니다.
1200300063.english: However, it is believed that the damage was exacerbated due to a shortage of safety personnel and the lack of water rescue training among the crew members.

1200300064.korean: - 확실히... 워터 파크를 개장하면서 안전을 충분히 고려했다고 보기에는 부족한 부분이 있었을지도 모른다.
1200300064.english: Certainly... there may have been shortcomings in considering safety sufficiently when opening the water park.

1200300065.korean: - 대원들 역시 물에 익숙한 사람이 있는가 하면 익숙하지 않은 사람도 있을 테니 피해가 커지는 것도 이해가 간다.
1200300065.english: It is understandable that the damage is escalating, as some of the crew members are accustomed to the water while others are not.

1200300066.korean: - 그나저나 아르망이 예측하지 못한 사고라니 대체 무슨 일이 있었던 거지?
1200300066.english: By the way, an accident that Armand didn't foresee? What on earth happened?

1200300067.korean: 우선 사고에 대해서는 수습이 완료되었고 안전 요원을 늘리도록 지시는 해놓은 상황입니다.
1200300067.english: First of all, the accident has been brought under control, and instructions have been given to increase the number of safety personnel.

1200300069.korean: - 이번에는 다행히 큰 사고로 이어지지 않았지만, 다음에 같은 일이 또 일어나지 않으리란 법은 없다.
1200300069.english: Fortunately, it did not lead to a major accident this time, but there is no guarantee that the same thing won't happen again.

1200300070.korean: - 그렇다면 미리 대비를 해두는 편이 좋겠지.
1200300070.english: In that case, it would be better to prepare in advance.

1200300071.korean: 네, 폐하의 뜻을 모두에게 전하도록 하겠습니다.
1200300071.english: Yes, I will convey Your Majesty's will to everyone.

1200300072.english: You mean I am the right person for the job. Understood.

1200300074.english: If Your Majesty truly wishes to know, I will tell you, but...

1200300075.korean: - 마지막까지 말하기가 정말 곤란한지 다시 말끝을 흐리는 아르망.
1200300075.english: Armand trails off again, as if finding it really difficult to speak until the very end.

1200300076.korean: 라비아타 통령이 워터 슬라이드를 타보고 싶다고 하여… 그만…
1200300076.english: President Laviata said she wanted to try the water slide... so...

1200300077.korean: - 나는 이번 일을 불문에 부치기로 했다.
1200300077.english: I decided to let this matter slide.

1200300082.english: Tch, to think Alpha would act like that...

1200300086.korean: 하지만, 나는 조금 더 자극이 있으면 좋겠는데.
1200300086.english: But, I wish there was a little more stimulation.

1200300087.english: This much is fine, isn't it?

1200300089.english: But what are you going to do about this?

1200300090.english: Really? Then since it's dirty, I'll wash it and give it back to you.

1200300091.korean: 자, 말해봐. 이걸 어떻게 하려고 했어?
1200300091.english: Now, tell me. How were you planning to do this?

1200300094.english: Sorry, sorry, I went too far with the joke.

1200300096.english: Will you forgive me for this?

1200300097.korean: 아, 그리고 나중에 사용 후기 말해 줄 수 있어?
1200300097.english: Oh, and can you tell me about your experience after using it later?

1200300099.korean: 수복실에 다녀간 인원이 좀 많은 것 같은데?
1200300099.english: It seems like quite a lot of people have visited the recovery room.

1200300100.english: Armand, could you explain it in detail?

1200300102.korean: 아르망, 시간이 비는 인원들에게 전달해 주겠어? 수상 구조 훈련을 한다고 말이지.
1200300102.english: Armand, could you pass this on to the people who have time? That we're doing water rescue training.

1200300103.korean: 본격적인 훈련은 다음에 하겠지만 이번에는 간단하게 연습이라는 걸로.
1200300103.english: We'll do the proper training next time, but for now, let's just keep it simple as practice.

1200300104.korean: 그리고 이 일의 교육 적임자를 불러와 주겠어?
1200300104.english: And could you bring in the right person to teach this job?

1200300106.english: So what was the cause of the accident in the end?

1200400001.korean: - 잠시 후, 한 바이오로이드가 사령실로 들어왔다.
1200400001.english: A short while later, a bioroid entered the command room.

1200400003.korean: - 디오네는 아직 정식으로 오르카에 합류한 지 얼마 지나지 않아 어색함에 나와 살짝 거리를 두려는 것 같이 느껴졌다.
1200400003.english: It felt like Dione was trying to keep a slight distance from me out of awkwardness, as it hadn't been long since she officially joined Orca.

1200400004.korean: - 서로 알고 지낸 시간이 적으니 어쩔 수 없다고 해도 이 서먹함은 조금 서운할지도…
1200400004.english: Even if it’s unavoidable since we haven’t known each other for long, this awkwardness might be a little disappointing…

1200400005.korean: 사령관님 덕분에 매일 좋은 생활을 보내고 있어요.
1200400005.english: Thanks to you, Commander, I am having a good life every day.

1200400006.korean: 이전이라면 이런 생활은 분명 꿈에도 생각하지 못했을 거예요.
1200400006.english: In the past, I certainly wouldn't have even dreamed of living a life like this.

1200400007.english: Once again, thank you for accepting me.

1200400008.korean: 아르망씨에게 사령관님이 저에게 맡기실 일이 있다고 들었어요.
1200400008.english: I heard from Mr. Armand that the Commander has a task for me to handle.

1200400009.korean: 제가 잘할 수 있을지 모르겠지만… 사령관님의 부탁이라면… 해볼게요!
1200400009.english: I'm not sure if I can do this well... but if it's your request, Commander... I'll give it a try!

1200400011.korean: 사고!? 어디에서? 구조가 필요한 상황인 거야!? 그렇다면 지금 당장 출발할게!
1200400011.english: An accident!? Where? Is it a situation where rescue is needed!? Then I'll leave right now!

1200400012.korean: 혹시 육지쪽의 사고라도 괜찮아! 기본적인 구조 요령은 전부 알고 있어!
1200400012.english: Even if the accident happens on land, it's okay! I know all the basic rescue procedures!

1200400013.korean: 걱정하지 마! 내가 반드시 구조해 보일 테니까!
1200400013.english: Don't worry! I will definitely rescue you!

1200400014.korean: 그, 그렇구나, 다행이야. 난 또… 큰 사고가 있는 줄 알았어.
1200400014.english: Oh, I see. That's a relief. I thought... there had been a big accident.

1200400015.korean: 나야말로 미안해. 구조에 관련된 일이면 뜨거워진다고 해야 할까 조금 흥분해 버리거든…
1200400015.english: I'm the one who should be sorry. When it comes to rescue work, I guess you could say I get heated up... or maybe I just get a little worked up.

1200400017.korean: 아! 죄송해요! 사령관님 앞에서 이런 태도를 보이다니…
1200400017.english: Ah! I'm sorry! To think I would show such an attitude in front of the Commander…

1200400021.korean: 사고가 났을 때를 대비하여 철저하게 준비해 두는 것
1200400021.english: Being thoroughly prepared in case of an accident

1200400022.korean: 전부 구조 대원이 해야 할 일이야.
1200400022.english: It is all work that the rescue workers have to do.

1200400023.korean: 맡겨줘, 모두가 훌륭한 구조 대원이 될 수 있도록 내가 도와줄게!
1200400023.english: Leave it to me, I'll help everyone become a great rescue worker!

1200400025.korean: - 이걸로 전달할 얘기는 끝났다. 다른 사안이 없다면 이대로 훈련 준비를 진행하면 되는데...
1200400025.english: That is all I have to say. If there are no other matters, we can proceed with the training preparations as is...

1200400026.korean: - 나는 문득 디오네가 오르카에 합류할 때 했던 말이 떠올랐다.
1200400026.english: I suddenly remembered what Dione said when she joined Orca.

1200400028.korean: - 내 질문에 디오네의 몸과 표정이 굳었다.
1200400028.english: Dione's body and expression stiffened at my question.

1200400029.english: - Oh no! Was that a question I shouldn't have asked!

1200400030.korean: 아니요, 그 정도까지 민감한 건 아니에요.

1200400031.english: However, since I haven't found it yet...

1200400033.english: The Commander is kind. You are exactly as I heard.

1200400034.korean: - 디오네는 거리감이 있던 아까와는 다르게 누그러진 표정으로 살짝 웃었다.
1200400034.english: Dione smiled slightly with a softened expression, unlike the distance she had shown earlier.

1200400035.korean: - 아무래도 디오네의 나의 대한 호감도가 상승한 모양이다.
1200400035.english: It seems Dione's affection for me has increased.

1200400036.korean: - 누군지는 모르겠지만 내 좋은 얘기를 전파해 줘서 고마워!
1200400036.english: I don't know who you are, but thank you for spreading my good story!

1200400037.english: Hehe, that might be the case.

1200400038.korean: 그럼, 저는 훈련 준비를 하러 가볼게요.
1200400038.english: Well then, I'll go get ready for training.

1200400040.korean: - 그럼, 이제 남은 건 훈련 장소 정도인가?
1200400040.english: So, is the only thing left now just the training grounds?

1200400041.korean: - 오르카 파크에서 진행해도 괜찮지만 그러면 시설을 이용하는 다른 인원에게 방해가 될 수도 있으니…
1200400041.english: It would be fine to hold it at Orca Park, but that might disturb other people using the facility, so…

1200400042.korean: - 적당히 아무 섬에서 하면 되려나? 근데 섬이라고 해도 이 주변에 아는 게 없단 말이지…
1200400042.english: - Should I just do it on any random island? But even if it is an island, I don't know anything around here...

1200400045.korean: - 아르망의 예측으로 누군가가 찾아올지는 알았는데 트리아이나였을 줄이야.
1200400045.english: I knew someone would come based on Armand's prediction, but I never imagined it would be Triaina.

1200400046.korean: 전부 캡틴 덕분이지~! 캡틴이 이번에 유럽을 세력권에 넣었잖아.
1200400046.english: It's all thanks to the Captain! You brought Europe into your sphere of influence this time.

1200400047.korean: 그래서 탐사 대장인 나는 눈코 뜰 새도 없이 바쁘단 말씀!
1200400047.english: So, as the expedition leader, I'm saying I'm incredibly busy!

1200400048.korean: 바로 얼마 전에도 예티를 찾으려고 잠깐 돌아다녔는데 아쉽게도 별다른 수확이 없었어.
1200400048.english: Just a short while ago, I went around looking for a Yeti, but unfortunately, I didn't have any luck.

1200400049.korean: 이야~ 그때는 아찔했어~ 설마 아직 남아있는 AGS가 있을 줄은 몰랐거든~
1200400049.english: Wow, that was nerve-wracking back then. I never imagined there would still be any AGS units left.

1200400050.korean: 그러고 보니 얼마 전에 라비아타가 그런 말을 했었던 것 같기도…
1200400050.english: Come to think of it, I think Laviata might have said something like that not long ago...

1200400051.korean: 물론, 캡틴에게 새로운 모험을 제안하기 위해서지!
1200400051.english: Of course, it's to propose a new adventure to the Captain!

1200400052.english: The Captain and I are business partners, you know~

1200400053.korean: 에헤헤, 물론 알고 있지! 캡틴도 분명 마음에 들어 할 거야.
1200400053.english: Hehehe, of course I know! The Captain will definitely like it, too.

1200400054.korean: 내가 이번에 휴양지 같은 멋진 섬을 하나 발견했는데…
1200400054.english: I recently discovered a wonderful island that feels like a resort…

1200400055.korean: 그 섬에서 뭘 찾았냐면… 으에에~? 잠깐, 캡틴?
1200400055.english: What I found on that island was… Eeee~? Wait, Captain?

1200400056.korean: 아직 제대로 된 이야기는 시작도 하지 않았는데?
1200400056.english: The proper story hasn't even started yet?

1200400057.korean: …오? 오오~? 잘은 모르겠지만 캡틴의 의욕이 넘치는 걸 보니 나도 끓어오르기 시작했어!
1200400057.english: … Oh? Ooh~? I’m not exactly sure, but seeing how overflowing with enthusiasm the Captain is, I’m starting to get worked up too!

1200400058.korean: - 이걸로 구조 훈련을 진행할 장소도 정해졌다.
1200400058.english: With this, the location for the rescue training has also been determined.

1200400059.korean: - 휴양지 같은 섬이라면 훈련이 끝나고 참가한 인원들에게도 좋은 휴식이 되겠지.
1200400059.english: If it is an island like a resort, it would be a good rest for the participants after the training is over.

1200400060.korean: 좋아, 캡틴 허가도 받았으니 모험 준비를 해보실까! 이거 정말 기대되는데~!
1200400060.english: Alright, now that I've got the Captain's permission, shall we get ready for the adventure! I'm really looking forward to this!

1200400061.korean: - 그때 들뜬 트리아이나에게서 뭔가가 바닥으로 떨어졌다.
1200400061.english: Just then, something fell to the floor from the excited Triaina.

1200400063.korean: 어? 아아아! 고마워 캡틴. 기쁜 나머지 그만 떨어트렸나 봐.
1200400063.english: Huh? Ahhh! Thanks, Captain. I must have dropped it because I was so happy.

1200400064.korean: - 나는 떨어진 머리핀을 주워 트리아이나에게 건네주었다.
1200400064.english: I picked up the fallen hairpin and handed it to Triaina.

1200400065.korean: - 그런데 저 머리핀 어디서 본 것 같은데…?
1200400065.english: By the way, I feel like I've seen that hair clip somewhere before...?

1200400067.korean: 응? 뭐야 뭐야? 정말 뜬금없는 질문이네? 자매기를 말하는 거야?
1200400067.english: Huh? What, what? That's a really random question. Are you talking about sisters?

1200400068.korean: 언니는 없어. PECS에서 만들어진 탐사용 바이오로이드는 나 하나뿐이거든.
1200400068.english: I don't have an older sister. I'm the only exploration bioroid created by PECS.

1200400069.korean: 동생이라면… 그렇네... 있을 수도 있지만 잘 모르겠어.
1200400069.english: As for a younger sibling… yeah… there might be, but I’m not sure.

1200400070.korean: 나는 제조되고 나서 바로 탐사를 위해 제조지를 떠나 멀리 파견됐으니까.
1200400070.english: Because right after I was manufactured, I left the site of production and was dispatched far away for exploration.

1200400071.korean: 하지만 지금까지 한 번도 본 적 없으니까 아마 없지 않을까?
1200400071.english: But since I've never seen it before, I don't think there probably isn't one.

1200400073.korean: 저, 저기 캡틴…? 지금 어디를 보고 있는 거야?
1200400073.english: Hey, Captain...? Where are you looking right now?

1200400074.korean: 설마 욕구 불만인 거야? 아무리 나라도 그렇게 빤히 보면 부끄러운데…
1200400074.english: Are you seriously frustrated? Even I would be embarrassed if you stared at me like that...

1200400075.korean: 그 뭐냐… 이번 모험이 잘 마무리되면 그쪽으로 수당 지불할까…?
1200400075.english: Um... what is it... if this adventure wraps up well, should I pay you over there...?

1200400076.korean: - 이리하여 트리아이나와의 새로운 비즈니스가 잘 체결되었다.
1200400076.english: Thus, a new business deal with Triaina was successfully concluded.

1200400077.korean: 디오네 오랜만이야. 여기서 지내는 건 괜찮아?
1200400077.english: Dione, long time no see. Is it okay staying here?

1200400078.english: It's a relief if you're doing well.

1200400079.english: Actually, there was a bit of an accident.

1200400080.korean: 잠, 잠깐! 진정해! 이미 상황 종료된 사고야. 큰 피해도 없었어!
1200400080.english: Wait, hold on! Calm down! The accident is already over. There wasn't any major damage!

1200400081.english: Sorry for saying this so suddenly.

1200400082.english: ...You are definitely a completely different person from a moment ago.

1200400083.korean: 아니야. 덕분에 디오네가 얼마나 인명 구조에 열의를 가졌는지 알게됐어.
1200400083.english: No. Thanks to you, I realized how passionate Dione is about saving lives.

1200400084.korean: 디오네에게라면 구조 훈련 교육을 부탁하기에 적임이라고 생각하는데 어때?
1200400084.english: I think Dione is the perfect person to ask for rescue training. What do you think?

1200400085.korean: 이번 사고는 대원들의 훈련이 제대로 되어있지 않는 게 컸거든.
1200400085.english: The lack of proper training among the team members was a major factor in this accident.

1200400086.korean: 그래서 수상구조대원인 디오네에게 구조 훈련 교육을 부탁할까해.
1200400086.english: So I'm thinking of asking Dione, a water rescue worker, for rescue training.

1200400087.english: Haha, thanks. Then I'll leave it to you.

1200400088.korean: 그러고 보니 찾는 사람이 있다고 했는데 찾았어?
1200400088.english: Come to think of it, you mentioned someone was looking for you. Did you find them?

1200400089.korean: 민감한 질문이었다면 미안. 애써 대답하지 않아도 괜찮아.
1200400089.english: I'm sorry if that was a sensitive question. It's okay if you don't go out of your way to answer.

1200400091.korean: 생각보다 가까운 곳에 있을지도 모르잖아? 알고 보니 우리 오르카에 있다거나?
1200400091.english: It might be closer than we think, you know? Maybe it turns out it's in our Orca?

1200400092.english: Okay. I'll let you know once the detailed schedule is set.

1200400094.korean: 요즘 통 보이지 않던데 바쁜 모양이네.
1200400094.english: I haven't seen you around lately; you must be busy.

1200400095.english: So, what is the reason you came to see me?

1200400096.english: Oh? Shall we hear the story?

1200400097.korean: 알고 있겠지만 나와의 비즈니스는 쉽지 않아.
1200400097.english: As you know, doing business with me isn't easy.

1200400098.english: That's a really great business proposal!

1200400100.korean: 이야~ 역시 탐사 대장 트리아이나야! 이번 모험이 정말 기대되는걸?
1200400100.english: Wow, just like Expedition Leader Triaina! I'm really looking forward to this adventure!

1200400103.english: Do you happen to have an older sister or something?

1200500003.korean: 저희가 왜 여기서 이러고 있는지 말임다.
1200500003.english: I'm telling you why we're doing this here.

1200500004.korean: 수상 사고 예방을 위한 구조 훈련 교육이라고 했잖아요. 못 들었나요?
1200500004.english: I told you it was rescue training to prevent water accidents. Didn't you hear?

1200500005.korean: 그건 저도 들었지 말입니다. 근데 분명 시간이 비는 인원들 참가라고 했지 말임다.
1200500005.english: I heard that, too. But they clearly said that only those with free time would participate.

1200500006.korean: 저 오늘 비번이지 말입니다... 야간 근무 끝난 지 아직 2시간밖에 안지났지 말임다…
1200500006.english: I'm off today, you know... It's only been two hours since my night shift ended, you know...

1200500007.korean: 알고 있어요… 브라우니… 저랑 같이 근무였으니까 저도 잘 알고 있다고요…
1200500007.english: I know... Brownie... I know very well because we used to work together...

1200500008.korean: 스틸 라인의 다른 인원은 아무도 안 보이는데…
1200500008.english: I don't see anyone else on the steel line...

1200500009.korean: 저희 이거 그냥 짬 맞은 거 아닌지 말임다…
1200500009.english: I'm asking if we just got stuck with this...

1200500010.korean: 알고 있어요… 크흑, 저도 잘 알고 있어요… 그러니 부탁이니 제발 조용히 해주세요...
1200500010.english: I know... *sob*, I know very well... So please, I beg of you, be quiet...

1200500011.korean: 구조 훈련! 누군가를 구하는 건 멋진 일이지! 이날을 위해 네리는 열심히 근력을 키워왔다구!
1200500011.english: Rescue training! Saving someone is such a cool thing! Neri has been working hard to build up her strength for this day!

1200500012.korean: 네리는 오늘도 기운이 넘치는구나… 구조 훈련 같은 건 이미 몇 번이나 했는데. 갑자기 이제 와서...
1200500012.english: Neri is full of energy again today... We've already done rescue training so many times. Suddenly, coming up now...

1200500013.korean: 저희에게는 사령관님이 직접 부탁한 일이니 실망시키지 않게 열심히 해봐요.
1200500013.english: Since the Commander personally asked us to do this, let's do our best not to disappoint him.

1200500014.korean: 그런데 테티스의 모습이 보이지 않는데 못 보셨나요?
1200500014.english: But I can't see Thetis. Didn't you see her?

1200500015.korean: 앗, 조금 전까지 옆에 있었는데? 정말 없잖아!?
1200500015.english: Huh, he was right next to me just a moment ago? He really isn't here!?

1200500016.korean: 도망쳤구나 테티스…! 제가 가서 잡아 올게요!
1200500016.english: You ran away, Tethys…! I’ll go catch you!

1200500017.korean: 운디네 괜찮아요. 곧 교육이 시작할 거예요. 테티스에게는 제가 잘 말해둘게요.
1200500017.english: It's alright, Undine. The training will begin soon. I'll make sure to explain the situation to Thetis.

1200500018.korean: 부함장님은 테티스를 너무 봐주는 거 아니에요?
1200500018.english: Vice Captain, aren't you being too lenient with Tethys?

1200500019.korean: 그런가요? 저는 모두를 똑같이 대한다고 생각하는데.
1200500019.english: Is that so? I think I treat everyone the same.

1200500020.korean: 그럼 이건 어떤가요? 훈련이 끝나면 제가 사령관님에게 직접 포상을 부탁드려볼게요.
1200500020.english: Then how about this? Once the training is over, I will personally ask the Commander for a reward.

1200500021.korean: 물론, 참가하지 않은 테티스는 못 받는 거고요.
1200500021.english: Of course, Tethys who did not participate cannot receive it.

1200500023.korean: 후후, 물론 네레이드도 받을 수 있어요.
1200500023.english: Hehe, of course you can get Nereid too.

1200500025.english: If that's the case... I'll do my best...

1200500026.korean: 네! 모두 다 같이 열심히 해봐요.
1200500026.english: Yes! Let's all work hard together.

1200500029.korean: 다른 지휘관들은 다들 일정이 있어 자리를 비웠는데…
1200500029.english: The other commanders were all away because of their schedules...

1200500030.korean: 몸소 구조 훈련 교육에 참여하다니 한가하신가 보죠? 대장?
1200500030.english: Participating in rescue training in person—you must have a lot of free time, Captain?

1200500031.korean: 그야 나는 우수하니까. 부관, 너야말로 아주 한가한 모양이네?
1200500031.english: Well, I am excellent. Adjutant, you seem to be the one with nothing to do.

1200500032.korean: 그런데, 설마 그런 속이 다 비치는 경박한 수영복으로 훈련을 받을 생각은 아니겠지?
1200500032.english: But, surely you aren't planning to train in such a see-through, frivolous swimsuit, are you?

1200500033.korean: 글쎄요. 누구처럼 위 아래가 나뉜 음탕 그 자체 수영복이 아닌 건전한 일체형 수영복이라서요.
1200500033.english: Well, it’s a wholesome one-piece swimsuit, not the pure lewdness of a split-top like some people's.

1200500034.korean: 하긴 누구처럼 빈약함밖에 없는 절벽과 다르게 나이스 바디인 나는 아.쉽.게.도 위 아래가 나뉘지 않은 수영복은 입을 수가 없어서 말이야.
1200500034.english: Come to think of it, unlike someone who is nothing but a cliff with nothing but skinny fat, I have a nice body, so unfortunately, I can't wear swimsuits that aren't divided into top and bottom.

1200500039.english: You are all such energetic people…

1200500040.korean: 생각보다 교육받는 인원이 적은데 혹시 더 올 예정인가요?
1200500040.english: The number of people receiving training is smaller than expected. Are more expected to join?

1200500041.english: No! Um, thank you for your consideration.

1200500042.korean: 하지만 부담스럽다고 해서 제가 구조 행위에 힘을 빼는 일은 절대 없을 거예요!
1200500042.english: However, just because it feels burdensome, I will absolutely never let my guard down in the rescue effort!

1200500044.korean: 맡겨진 이상 수상구조대원으로서 철저하게 물속이 얼마나 무서운 건지 알게 해주겠어!
1200500044.english: Now that I've been entrusted with this, as a water rescuer, I'll make you thoroughly realize just how scary the underwater world is!

1200500045.korean: 무슨 소리를 하는 거야? 당신도 훈련에 참여하는 게 당연하잖아.
1200500045.english: What are you talking about? It's only natural that you participate in the training too.

1200500046.korean: 언제 어디서 사고가 날지 모르니까 대비를 위한 구조 훈련인걸.
1200500046.english: It's a rescue drill to prepare, because you never know when or where an accident might happen.

1200500047.korean: 아니면 당신은 구조만 받고 정작 자신이 구조해야하는 상황이 닥쳤을 때 못 본 채 할 셈이야?
1200500047.english: Or are you planning to just accept rescue and then turn a blind eye when you are actually in a situation where you have to rescue others?

1200500048.korean: 자, 자, 불평은 나중에 하기로 하고 그럼, 준비 운동부터 시~작!
1200500048.english: Alright, alright, let's save the complaining for later. So, let's start with the warm-up!

1200500049.korean: 먼저 물에 빠지지 않는 법부터 시작해서 빠진 사람의 구조, 심폐 기능이 정지한 사람의 소생술…
1200500049.english: First, starting with how not to fall into water, then rescuing a drowning person, resuscitation for a person whose cardiopulmonary function has stopped...

1200500050.korean: 그리고 인공 호흡을 하는 방법을 알려줄 거야.
1200500050.english: And I'm going to teach you how to perform artificial respiration.

1200500051.korean: 전부 목숨과 직결되는 일이니 모두 진지하게 교육을 받았으면 좋겠어.
1200500051.english: Since this is all directly related to life and death, I hope everyone takes the education seriously.

1200500052.korean: - 디오네는 수상구조대원답게 차근차근 모두에게 시범을 보이며 구조 훈련 교육 진행했다.
1200500052.english: Dione conducted the rescue training step-by-step, demonstrating the techniques to everyone like a true water rescuer.

1200500053.korean: - 처음에는 의욕이 없는 사람도 있었지만 진지하게 교육에 임하는 디오네의 모습에 하나둘 의욕적으로 교육을 받기 시작했다.
1200500053.english: At first, there were some who lacked motivation, but seeing Dione take the education seriously, one by one they began to receive training with enthusiasm.

1200500054.english: That's the end of the resuscitation.

1200500055.korean: 다음은 마지막으로 인공 호흡법. 그럼, 먼저 시범을 보여야 하니까.
1200500055.english: Next up is artificial respiration. Well then, I need to demonstrate first.

1200500057.korean: 왜 그래? 아까 소생술 때도 도와줬잖아?
1200500057.english: What's wrong? You helped with the resuscitation earlier, didn't you?

1200500058.korean: 인공 호흡도 소생술과 마찬가지로 매우 중요한 구조법이야.
1200500058.english: Artificial respiration is a very important rescue method, just like resuscitation.

1200500059.korean: 모두에게 시범을 보여줘야 진행할 수 있으니까 어서 준비해 줘.
1200500059.english: We need to demonstrate to everyone before we can proceed, so please get ready quickly.

1200500060.korean: - 디오네는 나와 인공 호흡 시범을 하는 게 아무렇지도 않은지 진지한 표정이었다.
1200500060.english: Dione had a serious expression on her face, as if she didn't mind demonstrating artificial respiration with me at all.

1200500061.korean: - 입을 맞대는 행위 정도야 지금까지 셀 수 없을 정도로 했지만… 갑자기 모두가 보는 앞에서 부탁받으니 당황스럽다.
1200500061.english: I’ve kissed countless times by now... but I’m flustered to be asked to do this suddenly in front of everyone.

1200500062.korean: - 다른 사람이라면 모를까… 디오네와는 아직 그런 사이는 아닌데… 어떻게 할까?
1200500062.english: It might be different with someone else... but we're not that close with Dione yet... What should I do?

1200500064.korean: - 디오네가 저렇게 진지하게 임하고 있는데 사령관인 내가 대충할 수는 없지.
1200500064.english: With Dione taking this so seriously, I, as the commander, can't just do a half-hearted job.

1200500065.korean: 당신은 여기에 누워서 의식을 잃은 사람의 연기를 해줘.
1200500065.english: You lie down here and act like someone who has lost consciousness.

1200500066.korean: 나는 인공 호흡을 하는 시범을 보여줄 테니까.
1200500066.english: I'm going to demonstrate artificial respiration.

1200500067.korean: - 나는 디오네의 말대로 바닥에 누워 눈을 감았다.
1200500067.english: I lay down on the floor and closed my eyes, just as Dione had said.

1200500068.korean: 그럼 시작할게… 먼저 상대방의 의식이 있는지 없는지 확인하고… 기도를 확보한 다음에…
1200500068.english: Okay, I'll start... First, check if the other person is conscious or not... then secure the airway...

1200500074.korean: 그러자 눈앞에는 새빨개진 디오네의 얼굴이 나를 내려다보고 있었다.
1200500074.english: Then, Dione's bright red face was looking down at me right in front of me.

1200500075.english: Are you seriously feeling embarrassed now!?

1200500076.english: (Ah… um… so… what should I… do here…)

1200500079.korean: 잠깐을 고민하던 디오네는 각오를 다졌는지 나에게 입을 맞대었다.
1200500079.english: After hesitating for a moment, Dione seemed to steel herself and pressed her lips against mine.

1200500081.korean: - 디오네의 입술 엄청 부드럽네… 계속 이렇게 있고 싶을지도…
1200500081.english: - Dione's lips are so soft... I might want to stay like this forever...

1200500082.korean: 이렇게 입을 맞대고 숨을 불어넣어 주세요!
1200500082.english: Please press your lips together like this and blow air into them!

1200500083.korean: 그래, 입을 맞대고 숨을… 어…? 흐업~~!?
1200500083.english: Yeah, kissing and breathing… uh…? Hup~~!?

1200500084.korean: 상대방이 의식을 되찾을 때까지 반복해서 진행해요!
1200500084.english: Repeat this process until the other person regains consciousness!

1200500086.korean: 쾌락과 고통이 오가는 인공 호흡은 잠시동안 계속되었다.
1200500086.english: The artificial respiration, alternating between pleasure and pain, continued for a while.

1200500087.korean: - 역시 아무리 훈련이라고 해도 단계를 많이 앞지르는 느낌이 든다.
1200500087.english: As expected, even though it is just training, it feels like I am far ahead of the stage.

1200500088.korean: - 여기서는 차라리 다른 사람이랑… 메이라던가… 응…?
1200500088.english: - Here, I'd rather be with someone else... like Mei... huh...?

1200500089.korean: 문득 시선을 돌리니 메이와 시선을 마주쳤다.
1200500089.english: I suddenly turned my gaze and met Mei's eyes.

1200500091.korean: 메이는 나와 마주치자 시선을 돌리더니 신경 쓰이는지 다시 힐끔 나를 바라보았다.
1200500091.english: May turned her gaze away as soon as she met mine, then glanced back at me as if bothered.

1200500092.english: Is this... jealousy? Mei... you're cute.

1200500093.korean: 응, 그래도 상관없어. 그러면 아무나 한 명 나 대신에 시범을…
1200500093.english: Yeah, that's fine. Then, could anyone demonstrate in my place...

1200500094.korean: 흐, 흥! 정말이지 어쩔 수 없네~ 사령관의 부탁이니 도와줄게.
1200500094.english: H-Hmph! I really can't help it~ It's the Commander's request, so I'll help.

1200500095.korean: - 내가 지목하자 메이는 기쁘게 활짝 웃으며 나에게 다가왔다.
1200500095.english: When I pointed at her, May smiled brightly and approached me.

1200500096.english: So, what do I need to do?

1200500097.english: Okay, I just need to lie down, right?

1200500100.korean: - 나는 천천히 메이의 입술에 입을 가져갔다.
1200500100.english: I slowly brought my mouth to Mei's lips.
