1200500102.korean: - 메이의 작고 앙증맞은 입술의 감촉은 뜨거우면서도 촉촉했다.
1200500102.english: The touch of Mei's small, adorable lips was hot yet moist.

1200500104.korean: - 메이는 점점 숨이 거칠어졌고 맞대었던 입술은 촉촉하게 빛이 나고 있었다.
1200500104.english: Mei's breathing grew increasingly ragged, and their pressed lips were glistening with moisture.

1200500105.korean: - 그 요염한 모습에 결국 참을 수 없던 나는…
1200500105.english: Unable to resist that alluring appearance, I...

1200500106.korean: 으읍!? 사령관…! 뭘… 넣는…! 아앗… 으응… 안 돼에…
1200500106.english: Ugh!? Commander…! What… are you putting in…! Ahh… Mm… Nooo…

1200500107.korean: - 나와 메이의 뜨거운 인공 호흡?은 계속되었고…
1200500107.english: Me and Mei's hot artificial respiration? continued...

1200500108.english: In the end, I got scolded terribly by Dione.

1200500109.korean: - 역시 모두 앞에서 시범을 하는 건 조금 부끄럽다.
1200500109.english: As expected, it is a bit embarrassing to demonstrate in front of everyone.

1200500110.korean: - 부끄럽지 않은 상대와 하는 거라면 괜찮으려나… 세이렌이라던가?
1200500110.english: - I wonder if it would be okay if I did it with someone I'm not ashamed of... like a Siren?

1200500111.korean: - 그렇게 생각하며 세이렌을 쳐다보니 세이렌은 웃으며 손을 흔들어 주었다.
1200500111.english: As I looked at the siren thinking that, she smiled and waved her hand.

1200500112.english: Yes, Commander, what is the matter?

1200500113.korean: 응, 문제없어. 설명은 내가 할 테니까.
1200500113.english: Yeah, no problem. I'll explain it.

1200500114.english: Yes… Yes…!? Um, so… I understand?

1200500115.korean: - 나는 자리에 누워 눈을 감았고 디오네의 인공 호흡 교육이 시작됐다.
1200500115.english: I lay down and closed my eyes, and Dione's artificial respiration training began.

1200500116.korean: 먼저 상대방의 의식을 확인해야 해 한 번 해보겠어?
1200500116.english: You have to check the other person's consciousness first. Would you like to try?

1200500117.korean: 앗, 네…! 사령관님! 사령관님! 정신 차리세요! 사령관님의 의식이 없어요…!
1200500117.english: Ah, yes…! Commander! Commander! Wake up! You are unconscious…!

1200500119.english: I held my breath for a moment.

1200500121.korean: 그럼, 인공 호흡을 해야 하니까 기도를 확보.
1200500121.english: Okay, then, since we need to perform artificial respiration, secure the airway.

1200500123.korean: 마지막으로 입을 맞대고 숨을 천천히 불어넣는 거야.
1200500123.english: Finally, press your lips together and slowly blow air into them.

1200500124.korean: 입을 맞대고… 숨을… 사령관님의… 입에… 내 입을…
1200500124.english: Kissing... breathing... into the Commander's... mouth... my mouth...

1200500126.korean: - 눈을 감고 있는 나에게 부드러운 감촉이 입술에 전해졌다.
1200500126.english: A soft sensation was transmitted to my lips as I closed my eyes.

1200500127.korean: - 그리고 세이렌의 입을 통해 숨결이 들어와 조금씩 내 폐에 공기를 채웠다.
1200500127.english: And breath entered through the siren's mouth, gradually filling my lungs with air.

1200500128.korean: - 숨결이 멈추자 나는 천천히 숨을 내쉬었고 세이렌은 마찬가지로 나의 숨을 전부 받아주어 폐의 공기를 나의 것으로 가득 채웠다.
1200500128.english: As my breath stopped, I slowly exhaled, and the Siren likewise took in my entire breath, filling my lungs with my own air.

1200500131.korean: 저기, 두 사람? 언제까지 순환 호흡을 할 셈이야…?
1200500131.english: Hey, you two? How long do you plan to keep doing circular breathing...?

1200500133.korean: 인공 호흡은 전혀 하지 않았잖아. 처음부터 다시!
1200500133.english: You didn't give artificial respiration at all. Let's start over from the beginning!

1200500134.korean: 처음부터 다시... 네… 사령관 다시 실례할게요.
1200500134.english: Starting over... Yes... Commander, excuse me again.

1200500136.korean: - 긴장해서인지 좀 처럼 인공 호흡을 하지 못하는 세이렌 덕분에 순환 호흡은 계속되었다.
1200500136.english: Circulatory respiration continued thanks to Siren, who was unable to perform artificial respiration for some reason, perhaps due to nervousness.

1200500138.korean: 아니, 이게 전부야. 예정에 없던 훈련이기도 하고.
1200500138.english: No, that's all. It was an unscheduled training session, too.

1200500139.korean: 본격적으로 진행하는 훈련은 날을 다시 잡아서 할 생각이야.
1200500139.english: I plan to schedule a new day for the full-scale training.

1200500140.korean: 그러는 편이 디오네한테도 부담이 적을 거라 생각했는데 괜한 걱정이었을까?
1200500140.english: I thought that would be less of a burden on Dione as well, but was it unnecessary worry?

1200500141.korean: 오 스위치가 켜졌군. 나는 이만 가볼 테니 잘 부탁해.
1200500141.english: Oh, the switch is on. I'll be going now, so please take care of me.

1200500145.english: Well... back then, that was resuscitation...

1200500151.english: (Weren't you going to demonstrate artificial respiration?)

1200500153.korean: 혹시 다른 사람과 해도 괜찮을까? 디오네도 그러는 편이 설명하기 쉬울 것 같은데
1200500153.english: Would it be okay if I did it with someone else? I think it would be easier to explain to Dione that way too.

1200500155.korean: 내가 인공 호흡을 할 테니까 메이는 누워있어 줘.
1200500155.english: I'll give you artificial respiration, so please lie down, May.

1200500156.korean: 의식을 잃은 연기를 해야 하니까 눈을 감고…
1200500156.english: Since I have to act like I've lost consciousness, I'll close my eyes...

1200500157.korean: 상대방의 의식을 확인하고 기도를 확보한 다음… 인공 호흡을…
1200500157.english: Check the other person's consciousness and secure the airway, then… perform artificial respiration…

1200500158.english: Siren, could you come over here for a moment?

1200500159.korean: 디오네, 시범만 하는 거면 다른 사람이랑 해도 상관없지?
1200500159.english: Dione, if it's just a demonstration, it's fine to do it with someone else, right?

1200500160.korean: 들었지 세이렌? 나는 누워있을 테니까 디오네의 지시에 따라 인공 호흡을 해줘.
1200500160.english: Did you hear that, Siren? I'll lie down, so please give artificial respiration according to Dione's instructions.

1200600001.korean: 여기까지! 모두 고생했어. 잊지 말고 꼭 수분 보충해야 해!
1200600001.english: That's all for now! Great job everyone. Don't forget to stay hydrated!

1200600002.korean: - 마지막은 조금 문제가 있었지만 구조 훈련 교육은 무사히 종료되었다.
1200600002.english: - There was a slight problem at the end, but the rescue training was successfully completed.

1200600003.korean: - 생각보다 하드한 훈련 교육에 디오네의 말처럼 물속을 너무 만만하게 볼 게 아닌 것 같다.
1200600003.english: The training is harder than I thought, and as Dione said, it seems we shouldn't underestimate the underwater world.

1200600005.korean: 당신이 있어서 그런지 모두 잘 따라와 줘서 훈련이 잘 끝났어. 고마워.
1200600005.english: Maybe it's because you were there, but everyone followed along well, so the training went smoothly. Thank you.

1200600006.korean: 나의 열성… 그렇네… 이렇게 구조 활동을 한 적이 얼마 만인지 모르겠어.
1200600006.english: My enthusiasm… that’s right… I don’t know how long it’s been since I’ve done rescue work like this.

1200600007.korean: 오랜 시간이 지나면서 어쩌면 구조에 대해서 잊어버리지 않았을까 걱정했는데…
1200600007.english: I was worried that perhaps I might have forgotten about the structure as time passed...

1200600008.korean: 응, 맡겨줘. 당신을 포함해서 모두를 위험에서 구조해 보일게.
1200600008.english: Yeah, leave it to me. I'll save everyone, including you, from danger.

1200600009.korean: - 디오네는 이제 익숙해졌는지 처음 봤을 때의 거리감은 완전히 사라졌다. 정식으로 오르카의 일원이 되었다고 봐도 되겠지.
1200600009.english: Dione seems to have gotten used to it now; the sense of distance I felt when I first saw her has completely disappeared. I suppose it’s safe to say she has officially become a member of Orca.

1200600010.korean: - 남은 거라면 디오네가 찾는 인물인데… 계속 신경 쓰인다. 아르망에게 부탁해서 찾아봐달라고 해야 하나…
1200600010.english: - The only thing left is the person Dione is looking for... It keeps bothering me. Should I ask Armand to look for him...

1200600013.korean: 준비도 끝났으니 언제든지 출발 가능해! 그래서 캡틴에게 말하려고 왔는데… 미안, 혹시 대화 중이었어?
1200600013.english: Everything is ready, so we can leave anytime! That’s why I came to tell the Captain… Sorry, were you talking by any chance?

1200600014.korean: 오? 처음 보는데 새로운 오르카의 대원이야? 반가워 나는 트리아이나야! 최고의 모험가지!
1200600014.english: Oh? I've never seen you before. Are you a new member of the Orca? Nice to meet you. I'm Triaina! The best adventurer!

1200600016.korean: - 트리아이나를 본 디오네는 놀란 표정을 감추지 못했고 이내 슬픈 얼굴로 고개를 떨궜다.
1200600016.english: Dione could not hide her surprised expression upon seeing Triaina, and soon lowered her head with a sad face.

1200600017.english: I'm sorry, I'll go back first…!

1200600018.korean: 디오네는 그 말을 끝으로 도망치듯 우리에게서 멀어졌다.
1200600018.english: With those words, Dione walked away from us as if running away.

1200600020.korean: 나 뭔가 잘못한 거야…? 지금은 조금 상처받았을지도…
1200600020.english: Did I do something wrong...? Maybe you're a little hurt right now...

1200600021.korean: 그런데 캡틴 방금 이름이 뭐라고 했어?
1200600021.english: By the way, Captain, what did you just say your name was?

1200600024.english: Now it is time to prepare for the adventure.

1200600026.korean: 나는 그저 참가만 했을 뿐이야. 모두를 따르게 한 건 디오네의 열성이지 않을까?
1200600026.english: I merely participated. Wasn't it Dione's enthusiasm that made everyone follow?

1200600027.english: Dione was a better water rescuer than anyone else.

1200600028.english: I'll continue to ask you to help rescue everyone.

1200600029.korean: 괜찮아, 마침 잘 왔어. 트리아이나 이쪽은 수상구조대원인 디오네야.
1200600029.english: It's okay, you came at just the right time. This is Dione, a water rescue worker.

1200600034.english: Can you tell me more about the new adventure?

1200700001.korean: 모험이여 내가 돌아왔다! 웰컴 투 어드벤처!
1200700001.english: Adventure, I am back! Welcome to Adventure!

1200700002.korean: 오오! 탐사 대장과 함께 새로운 모험! 네리는 이미 준비 완료야!
1200700002.english: Oh! A new adventure with the expedition leader! Neri is already ready!

1200700003.korean: 역시 네리 부 탐사 대장! 훌륭해! 나머지 대원들도 네리 부 탐사 대장을 본받도록!
1200700003.english: As expected of Captain Neri Bu! Excellent! The rest of the crew should follow Captain Neri Bu's example!

1200700004.korean: 어쩌다가 일이 이렇게… 구조 훈련으로 끝이 아니었냐구~!
1200700004.english: How did things end up like this… I thought it was supposed to be just a rescue drill!

1200700005.korean: 당연히 끝이 아니지 모험의 끝은 없어! 우리들의 모험은 지금부터 시작이야!
1200700005.english: Of course not the end! There is no end to an adventure! Our adventure begins now!

1200700006.korean: 트리아이나씨와 탐사는 정말 오랜만이네요. 이렇게 다시 모험하게 되어서 반가워요.
1200700006.english: It’s been a really long time since I went on an expedition with Triaina. I’m glad to be on an adventure with you again.

1200700007.korean: 나도 마찬가지야. 함께 리오보로스의 유산을 탐사한 멤버가 이렇게 다시 모이다니! 모험의 인연이 계속되고 있다는 게 아니겠어?
1200700007.english: I feel the same way. To think the members who explored the Legacy of Rioboros together have reunited like this! Doesn't this just prove that the bonds of adventure are continuing?

1200700008.korean: 오 캡틴! 멋진 말을 하잖아! 바로 그거야!
1200700008.english: Oh Captain! That's a cool thing to say! That's exactly it!

1200700010.korean: 당신이 모험을 좋아하는지는 몰랐어... 나는 왜 불린 거야?
1200700010.english: I didn't know you liked adventure... Why was I called?

1200700011.english: I'm a lifeguard... but this is land.

1200700012.korean: - 디오네는 한숨을 내쉬며 힐끗 트리아이나가 있는 곳을 바라보았다.
1200700012.english: Dione let out a sigh and glanced at where Triaina was.

1200700014.korean: 알겠어. 탐사에는 구조가 필요한 상황이 자주 발생하는 건 사실이니까.
1200700014.english: I understand. It is true that situations requiring rescue frequently occur during exploration.

1200700015.korean: - 나는 일행들과 살짝 떨어진 뒤 세이렌을 불렀다.
1200700015.english: I separated slightly from my companions and called the siren.

1200700016.english: Yes, did you call me, Commander?

1200700017.korean: 아뇨! 누구도 아닌 사령관님의 부탁인걸요! 게다가 트리아이나씨와의 모험은 정말 기대돼요.
1200700017.english: No! It's a request from none other than the Commander! Besides, I'm really looking forward to the adventure with Triaina.

1200700018.korean: 그리고… 분명 무슨 사정이 있는 거겠죠?
1200700018.english: And… surely there must be some reason, right?

1200700019.korean: - 세이렌은 서로 떨어져 있는 두 사람을 바라보았다.
1200700019.english: The siren looked at the two people standing apart.

1200700020.korean: 후훗, 그때와는 반대네요. 그때는 트리아이나씨가 저를 신경 써주었죠. 이제야 그 빚을 갚을 수 있겠네요.
1200700020.english: Hehe, it's the opposite of back then. Back then, Triaina took care of me. Now I can finally repay that debt.

1200700023.korean: 부탁하신 대로 구조 훈련을 열심히 했어요. 그러니까 호라이즌 멤버에게 포상을 주실 수 있을까요?
1200700023.english: We worked hard on the rescue training just as you requested. So, could you give the Horizon members a reward?

1200700025.english: It means once a colleague, always a colleague.

1200700026.english: Because rescue workers are needed for the exploration?

1200700027.english: It's a small island, so who knows?

1200700028.english: How about an adventure to welcome Dione?

1200700030.korean: 피곤할 텐데 무리한 부탁을 해서 미안해
1200700030.english: I'm sorry for asking such an unreasonable favor when you must be tired.

1200700031.korean: 응, 그러니까 두 사람을 잘 부탁할게.
1200700031.english: Yeah, so please take good care of the two of them.

1200700033.korean: 물론이야. 원하는 게 있으면 나중에 말해줘.
1200700033.english: Of course. If there is anything you want, let me know later.

1200800001.korean: 으, 더워... 습해… 그리고 벌레… 네리 부탁해…
1200800001.english: Ugh, it's hot... humid... and bugs... Neri, please take care of me...

1200800002.english: Leave it to me! Nerineri! Solve it cutely and coolly!

1200800003.korean: 고마워, 그런데 네리는 한결같구나… 순수함이 너무 눈부셔… 조금 부러울지도…
1200800003.english: Thank you. But Neri, you are so consistent... Your innocence is dazzling... I might be a little envious...

1200800004.korean: 그야 네리는 근력과 귀여움을 유지하기 위해 운동을 빼먹지 않으니까!
1200800004.english: After all, Neri never skips her workouts to maintain her strength and cuteness!

1200800005.korean: 아니, 운동을 한다고 해서 순수함도 유지된다고 생각되진 않는데…
1200800005.english: No, I don't think exercising helps maintain one's innocence...

1200800006.english: How much further is it to the destination, Triaina?

1200800007.korean: 음, 신호가 있는 쪽으로 방향은 맞는 것 같은데 조금 더 들어가야 하나 봐.
1200800007.english: Hmm, it looks like I'm heading in the right direction toward the signal, but I guess I need to go a little further.

1200800008.english: Yes, I have a question for the expedition leader.

1200800009.english: Oh, what is it! Undine Expedition Member!

1200800010.korean: 그 신호가 있는 곳에는 뭐가 있나요?
1200800010.english: What is where that signal is?

1200800011.korean: 아주 좋은 질문입니다. 운디네 탐사 대원.
1200800011.english: That is a very good question. Undine Expedition Member.

1200800012.korean: 그 질문에 답을 드리자면 저도 모릅니다.
1200800012.english: To answer that question, I don't know either.

1200800014.korean: 이 섬에서 알 수 없는 신호가 잡히기 시작한 게 얼마 전이거든. 그래서 아무런 정보도 없어.
1200800014.english: It hasn't been long since unknown signals started being picked up on this island. So, there is no information at all.

1200800015.korean: 그리고 아무런 정보가 없으니까 이렇게 모두와 함께 모험을 시작한 게 아니겠어?
1200800015.english: And isn't it because we had no information that we started this adventure together with everyone like this?

1200800016.korean: 한 마디로 우리는 그 알 수 없는 신호 때문에 이 고생을 하고 있다는 거군요…
1200800016.english: In short, it seems we are going through all this trouble because of that unknown signal…

1200800017.korean: 그게 바로 모험이지! 궁금증과 호기심에 이끌려 미지의 신호를 탐사한다. 크으 모험의 피가 끓는다니깐!
1200800017.english: That's what adventure is all about! Driven by curiosity and wonder, I explore unknown signals. Ugh, my adventurous blood is boiling!

1200800019.korean: 디오네씨… 였죠? 표정이 안 좋으신데 무슨 일이 있으신가요?
1200800019.english: It was Dione... wasn't it? You look upset. Is something wrong?

1200800020.korean: 세이렌씨는 트리아이나…씨와 오래 알고 지낸 사이 같은데 항상 저런 식인가요?
1200800020.english: It seems like Siren has known Triaina for a long time. Is she always like that?

1200800021.korean: 네, 맞아요. 저희와 처음 만났을 때도 보물 이야기를 꺼내며 모험을 하자고 하셨죠.
1200800021.english: Yes, that's right. Even when we first met, you brought up the story of treasure and suggested we go on an adventure.

1200800022.english: He may look eccentric on the outside, but he is a good person.

1200800023.korean: 예전의 저는 살아남는 것밖에는 생각하지 않았어요. 임무를 최우선으로만 생각했죠.
1200800023.english: In the past, I thought about nothing but surviving. I considered the mission my top priority.

1200800024.korean: 한순간의 실수로 자매들을 잃은 경험이 저의 어깨를 무겁게 했어요. 더 이상 동료를 잃지 않도록…
1200800024.english: The experience of losing my sisters due to a momentary mistake weighed heavily on my shoulders. So that I would not lose any more colleagues…

1200800025.korean: 하지만 저의 그 어깨를 가볍게 해주신 분이 사령관님이고 그런 사령관님의 뜻을 알게해주신 분이 트리아이나씨에요.
1200800025.english: However, the one who lightened the burden on my shoulders was the Commander, and the one who made me understand the Commander's intentions was Triaina.

1200800027.korean: 알려줘서 고마워요. 조금은 트리아이나씨가 어떤 사람인지 알 수 있을 것 같아요.
1200800027.english: Thank you for letting me know. I think I can get a little sense of what kind of person Triaina is.

1200800028.korean: 저기, 저기! 디오네는 어떻게 오르카 저항군에 합류하게 된 거야?
1200800028.english: Hey, hey! How did Dione end up joining the Orca Resistance?

1200800029.korean: 얘는 갑자기 그런 질문을 하면 어떡해! 경우에 따라서는 민감한 사람도 있다고!
1200800029.english: How can he suddenly ask a question like that! There are sensitive people depending on the situation!

1200800031.korean: 윽, 그야 궁금하지 않냐고 물어보면 궁금하기는 한데…
1200800031.english: Ugh, well, if you ask me if I'm curious, I am curious, but...

1200800032.english: It's okay. It's not a big deal.

1200800033.english: I listened to Mr. Orangeade's Radio Orca.

1200800034.korean: 라디오 방송을 듣고 찾아온 난민이 많다고는 들었는데 디오네도 그랬구나. 그렇다면 역시 사령관님이 목적?
1200800034.english: I heard that many refugees came after listening to the radio broadcast, and I see that Dione was one of them. In that case, is the Commander your target after all?

1200800038.english: Ugh, I'm sorry... Please forget about it...

1200800039.korean: 아뇨, 사심이 전혀 없었다고 하면 거짓말이겠죠.
1200800039.english: No, it would be a lie to say I had absolutely no ulterior motives.

1200800040.korean: 실제로 사령관님을 직접 봤을 때는 멋진 분이라 생각했어요…
1200800040.english: When I actually saw the Commander in person, I thought he was a wonderful person…

1200800041.korean: 제가 오르카에 온건 찾고 있는 사람이 있어서예요.
1200800041.english: The reason I came to Orca is because there is someone I am looking for.

1200800042.english: Someone you're looking for? Like a colleague?

1200800043.korean: 네, 동료이자 저한테 둘도 없이 소중한 언니를 찾고 있어요.
1200800043.english: Yes, I am looking for a colleague and an older sister who is irreplaceable to me.

1200800044.korean: 그렇구나… 찾고 있다는 건 아직 언니를 찾지 못한 거야?
1200800044.english: I see... Does "looking for" mean you haven't found your sister yet?

1200800045.english: … … Unfortunately, it seems it wasn't in Orca.

1200800046.english: Speaking of older sister, I was thinking of Neri.

1200800047.korean: 디오네, 트리아이나와 많이 닮지 않았어? 머리색도 똑같고 사실 디오네의 언니가 트리아이나라던가!
1200800047.english: Doesn't Dione look a lot like Triaina? Her hair color is the same, and actually, isn't Triaina her older sister?

1200800049.korean: (야, 네리 이번에는 네가 민감한 부분 건드렸잖아!)
1200800049.english: (Hey, Neri, this time you touched a sensitive spot!)

1200800050.korean: (으, 네리는 생각한 걸 그대로 말한 것뿐인걸...)
1200800050.english: (Ugh, Neri just said exactly what she was thinking...)

1200800051.korean: 오? 무슨 이야기를 그렇게 하는 거야? 나도 끼워줘~
1200800051.english: Oh? What are you talking about? Let me join in too!

1200800052.korean: 디오네가 언니를 찾기 위해 오르카에 왔는데
1200800052.english: Dione came to Orca to find her sister, but

1200800053.korean: 디오네와 트리아이나가 많이 닮아서 자매가 아닐까 하는 얘기를 하고 있었어.
1200800053.english: We were talking about how Dione and Triaina look so alike that they might be sisters.

1200800054.english: Indeed, indeed... I understand the story.

1200800055.korean: 사실 나도 디오네가 어릴 적 이별한 여동생이 아닐까 생각하고 있었지.
1200800055.english: Actually, I was also thinking that Dione might be the younger sister I was separated from when I was young.

1200800056.korean: 여동생? 언니가 아니라? 그리고 우린 바이오로이드니까 어릴 적이란 게 없잖아.
1200800056.english: A younger sister? Not an older sister? And since we're bioroids, we don't have a childhood.

1200800057.korean: 운디네 대원은 낭만이 없구나… 그리고 뭘 비교한 건지 모르겠지만 내가 언니야.
1200800057.english: Undine has no romance... And I don't know what you're comparing, but I'm the older sister.

1200800058.english: Just a moment, I'll be right back.

1200800059.korean: 디오네 안녕! 아까는 제대로 인사를 못해서 찾아왔어!
1200800059.english: Hi Dione! I came to find you because I couldn't properly say hello earlier!

1200800060.korean: 트리아이나…씨… 저기, 아까는 갑자기 가버려서 죄송해요.
1200800060.english: Triaina... Ms... Um, I'm sorry for leaving so suddenly earlier.

1200800061.english: No! I don't care at all!

1200800062.korean: 그리고 혹시 무슨 일이 있으면 나를 의지하라고 말하고 싶었어.
1200800062.english: And I wanted to tell you to rely on me if anything happens.

1200800064.korean: 응, 왜일까? 어째서인지 디오네가 동생처럼 느껴져서?
1200800064.english: Yeah, I wonder why? Is it because for some reason, Dione feels like a younger sister?

1200800065.korean: 이래 봬도 내가 오르카에서 지낸 시간이 상당…...
1200800065.english: Believe it or not, I’ve spent a considerable amount of time in Orca…

1200800068.english: Ms. Triaina… ! She’s not my older sister...!

1200800069.korean: - 디오네는 또 다시 트리아이나에게서 멀어졌고 이 모험은 길어질 것 같았다.
1200800069.english: Dione moved away from Triaina again, and it seemed this adventure would be long.

1200900001.korean: 제군! 지금까지 고생 많았다! 모두의 노력이 있었기에 우리는 목표에 다다를 수 있었다.
1200900001.english: Gentlemen! You’ve worked hard so far! Thanks to everyone’s efforts, we were able to reach our goal.

1200900002.korean: 수많은 시련과 강대한 적들이 우리의 앞을 가로막았지만 우리는 절대 포기하지 않았지!
1200900002.english: Countless trials and mighty enemies stood in our way, but we never gave up!

1200900003.korean: 왜냐하면 우리에겐 뜨겁게 불타오르는 모험의 피가 흐르고 있기 때문이다!
1200900003.english: Because the blood of burning adventure flows within us!

1200900004.korean: 그리고 그 모험의 종착지에 다다른 지금! 우리는 그 무엇과 비교할 수 없는 보물을 얻게 될 것이다.
1200900004.english: And now that we have reached the end of that adventure! We will obtain a treasure incomparable to anything else.

1200900005.korean: 자신감을 가져라! 제군에게는 그럴 자격이 있다!

1200900006.korean: 자, 보아라! 드높은 이 광경을! 바로 여기가 우리 모험의 종착지다!
1200900006.english: Now, behold! This lofty sight! This is the very end of our adventure!

1200900008.korean: 드디어... 이 길고 길었던 모험이... 끝난 거야…
1200900008.english: Finally... this long, long adventure... is over...

1200900011.english: I'm not sure if you're really happy, but Ms. Triaina...

1200900012.korean: 여기에는 아무것도 없습니다. 보이는 거라고는 텅 빈 공터입니다.
1200900012.english: There is nothing here. All you can see is an empty lot.

1200900015.korean: 다들 안녕?! 내가 새로 부임한 탐사 대장님이야. 박수로 맞이해 주면 좋겠어.
1200900015.english: Hey everyone! I'm the newly appointed expedition leader. I'd like you to welcome me with applause.

1200900016.korean: 옷?! 방금까지 있던 트라아이나 탐사 대장은 어디 갔어?
1200900016.english: Clothes?! Where did the Triaina expedition leader, who was just here, go?

1200900017.korean: 헤헤! 녀석은 실패의 책임을 지고 사퇴했어. 지금의 나는 뉴-뉴 트리아이나! 실패를 딛고 일어난…
1200900017.english: Hehe! He took responsibility for the failure and resigned. Now I am New-New Triaina! Rising from failure…

1200900018.english: The ending of the failed expedition leader is…

1200900020.korean: 우오옷! 일을 서두르지 마! 운디네 대원!

1200900021.korean: 안타깝게도… 힘내세요 트리아이나씨… 짧지만 함께해서 즐거웠어요…
1200900021.english: Unfortunately… Stay strong, Triaina… It was a pleasure being with you, even if it was short…

1200900022.korean: 세이렌 대원! 대장을 그렇게 쉽게 포기하면 안 돼!
1200900022.english: Siren! You can't give up on the Captain so easily!

1200900023.korean: 오? 그러면 부 탐사 대장인 네리가 다음 탐사 대장이 되는 건가?
1200900023.english: Oh? Then is Neri, the deputy expedition leader, going to be the next expedition leader?

1200900024.korean: 이럴 수가! 전혀 예상치 못한 곳에서 야망의 움직임이…!
1200900024.english: I can't believe it! Moves of ambition from a completely unexpected place…!

1200900025.korean: 단서! 그래 단서! 이곳에 진짜 목적지를 향하는 단서가 있는 게 틀림없어! 봐바! 신호는 분명 여기서 나오고 있다고!
1200900025.english: A clue! That's right, a clue! There must be a clue here leading to the real destination! Look! The signal is definitely coming from here!

1200900026.korean: 단서는 무슨! 단서라고 할만한 건 아무것도 없잖아! 설마 이 넓은 공터에서 보이지도 않는 단서라도 찾으라는 거야?
1200900026.english: Clues? What clues! There isn't a single thing that could even be called a clue! You're not expecting me to look for invisible clues in this huge open field, are you?

1200900027.english: Hmm... so... maybe it's more manageable than I thought...?

1200900028.korean: 한 번이면 돼. 내가 한 방에 편안하게 해 주겠어.
1200900028.english: Once is enough. I'll make you comfortable in one go.

1200900029.english: Agh, save me, Captain! This is a coup!

1200900030.korean: 사령관님, 길이 막히고 말았어요. 어떻게 하죠?
1200900030.english: Commander, the road is blocked. What should we do?

1200900032.korean: 누군가가 인위적으로 이 넓은 공터를 만들었을 수도 있다는 말씀이군요.
1200900032.english: So you are saying that someone might have artificially created this large open space.

1200900033.english: Now that I hear it, it certainly seems suspicious.

1200900034.korean: 운디네, 상공에서 이 일대를 살펴보고 무언가 이상한 곳이 있다면 알려주세요.
1200900034.english: Undine, survey this area from above and let me know if you see anything strange.

1200900035.english: Oh, yes! You mean in the air? I get it.

1200900036.korean: 네레이드, 이 공터의 지면을 확인해 주시겠어요?
1200900036.english: Nereid, could you check the ground of this clearing?

1200900038.korean: 정말로 이곳이 인위적으로 만들어졌다면 어디로 이어지는 입구라던가 단서가 있을 거예요.
1200900038.english: If this place was really created artificially, there must be an entrance or some clue leading somewhere.

1200900039.korean: 저는 뭘 하면 될까요! 세이렌 탐사 대장님!
1200900039.english: What should I do, Siren Expedition Leader!

1200900040.korean: 네...? 어느새, 제가 대장으로… 그러면… 트리아이나씨는…
1200900040.english: What...? Before I knew it, I became the leader... Then... Ms. Triaina...

1200900041.korean: 이 사탕을 드릴 테니 먹고 있어 주세요. 그럼 저도 조사에 다녀올게요!
1200900041.english: Here is a candy for you, so please eat it. I'll be off to my investigation now!

1200900043.korean: 캡틴 있잖아… 다들 바쁜 모양이야... 아, 이 사탕 맛있다.
1200900043.english: Captain, you know... everyone seems busy... Ah, this candy is delicious.

1200900044.korean: - 트리아이나는 자신이 짐짝 취급이 된 게 조금 충격이었는지 그대로 구석에 쪼그려 앉았다.
1200900044.english: Triaina crouched down in a corner, perhaps because she was a bit shocked to be treated like luggage.

1200900047.korean: 그렇구나… 그래서 이번 일을… 당신에게는 못 당하겠네… 혹시 매번 이런 식인 거야?
1200900047.english: I see... So that's why this happened... I really can't handle you... Is it always like this?

1200900048.english: Well then, I'll be going now.

1200900050.korean: 응? 혹시 위로해 주려고 온 거야? 에헤헤, 이거 못 볼 꼴을 보여줘 버렸네~
1200900050.english: Huh? Did you come to cheer me up by any chance? Hehehe, I really let you see my embarrassing side~

1200900051.korean: 정말로 탐사 대장 자리에서 내려와야 할지도 모르겠어.
1200900051.english: I really might have to step down from the expedition leader position.

1200900052.korean: 하지만 괜찮아! 나는 이런 일로 포기하거나 하지 않으니까!
1200900052.english: But it's okay! I don't give up because of things like this!

1200900054.english: I know someone similar to Triaina.

1200900055.korean: 항상 무모한 일을 저지르고… 실패하고… 혼자서 침울해하고…
1200900055.english: Always doing reckless things… failing… feeling depressed all alone…

1200900056.korean: 하지만 절대 포기하지 않고 밝게 웃으며 다시 일어서 나아가는 사람이었죠.
1200900056.english: But he was someone who never gave up, smiled brightly, and got back up to move forward.

1200900057.korean: 오, 나처럼 위대한 모험가가 또 있었다니 그 사람이랑은 좋은 콤비가 될 수 있을 것 같은데?
1200900057.english: Oh, I didn't know there was another great adventurer like me. I think we could make a great team.

1200900058.korean: 그러… 네요… 분명 좋은 콤비가 됐을지도… 모르겠어요.
1200900058.english: I see... that's true... We might have definitely made a good duo... I'm not sure.

1200900061.korean: 응? 뭐야, 갑자기 사과하고? 설마 디오네도 날 뎅겅~ 할 셈이야?
1200900061.english: Huh? What, apologizing all of a sudden? You're not planning to chop me off, are you?

1200900062.korean: 안 해요! 제가 사과하는 건 아까 숲에서 소리친 걸 말하는 거예요!
1200900062.english: I'm not doing that! What I'm apologizing for is shouting in the forest earlier!

1200900063.korean: 햐~ 그런 걸 아직도 신경 쓰고 있었던 거야?
1200900063.english: Wow, you were still worrying about that?

1200900064.korean: 괜찮아, 난 벌써 잊었어. 봐봐, 숲에서? 어라? 무슨 일이 있었더라?
1200900064.english: It's okay, I've already forgotten. Look, in the forest? Huh? What happened again?

1200900065.korean: 벌써 잊으셨다면 그건 그거대로 뭔가 상처 입네요.
1200900065.english: If you have already forgotten, that hurts in its own way.

1200900066.korean: 캬아! 잊을 리가 있나! 난 모두와 함께한 모험은 절대 잊지 않는다고!
1200900066.english: Whoa! How could I ever forget! I never forget adventures I shared with everyone!

1200900067.korean: 그때는… 아니, 사실 처음 디오네를 봤을 때부터 묘하게 친근감이 느껴지더라구.
1200900067.english: Back then… no, actually, ever since I first saw Dione, I felt a strange sense of familiarity.

1200900068.korean: 같은 PECS 사의 바이오로이드여서 그런 걸지도 모르겠지만 지금까지 만났던 PECS사 바이오로이드에게는 이런 감정을 느낀 적이 없었거든.
1200900068.english: Maybe it's because we're both bioroids from PECS, but I've never felt this way about any of the PECS bioroids I've met so far.

1200900069.korean: 간단하게 말하면… 그래, 디오네에게는 뭔가 남다른 인연이 느껴졌다고 할까?
1200900069.english: To put it simply… yeah, should I say I felt a special connection with Dione?

1200900070.korean: 헤헤~ 내가 말했지만 뭔가 부끄럽네.. 꼭 고백한 것 같잖아!
1200900070.english: Hehe~ I said it myself, but I feel a bit embarrassed.. It really feels like I confessed!

1200900072.korean: … …트리아이나씨는 어째서 모험을 시작하게 되었나요? 세상이 멸망하고 충격받으시진 않으셨나요.
1200900072.english: … … Why did you start your adventure, Triaina? Weren't you shocked by the destruction of the world?

1200900073.korean: 그야 나도 처음에는 적지 않게 충격받았지.
1200900073.english: Of course, I was quite shocked at first, too.

1200900074.korean: 뭘 해야 할지도 모르고 한 달 내내 바다만 바라보고 있었거든?
1200900074.english: I didn't know what to do, so I just stared at the sea for a whole month.

1200900075.korean: 그러던 어느 날 갑자기 정신이 빠밤! 하고 들었지 뭐야.
1200900075.english: Then one day, I suddenly snapped right back to reality.

1200900076.korean: 뭐, 그렇게 트레저 헌팅을 시작했지. 빠밤! 하고 말이야.
1200900076.english: Well, that's how the treasure hunting started. Ta-da!

1200900078.korean: 음… 그건… 그날… 그래, 낭만이라고 해야 할까?
1200900078.english: Hmm... that... that day... yeah, should I call it romance?

1200900082.korean: 아, 응, 이런저런 이유가 있지만 내 안에 '모험가의 피'가 흐르고 있기 때문이지!
1200900082.english: Ah, yeah, there are various reasons, but it’s because the 'blood of an adventurer' flows within me!

1200900083.korean: 세상이 멸망했다고 방황해 봤자 별수 없잖아? 그렇다고 죽고 싶은 것도 아니고 무언가를 위해 삶을 살자고 생각했어.
1200900083.english: What good would it do to wander around thinking the world has ended? It’s not like I want to die, so I decided to live my life for something.

1200900085.korean: 헤헤, 뭔가 또 부끄러운 소리를 해버린 것 같네.
1200900085.english: Hehe, I think I've said something embarrassing again.

1200900086.korean: 오? 저쪽에서 세이렌이 손을 흔드는 걸 보니까 뭔가 찾은 모양이야. 어서 가보자.
1200900086.english: Oh? I see a siren waving her hand over there, so it looks like she found something. Let's go check it out.

1200900089.korean: 저도… 트리아이나씨를 처음 봤을 때... 특별한 인연이 있다고 생각했어요…...
1200900089.english: I also... when I first saw Triaina... thought we had a special connection...

1200900090.korean: 뭐라고? 목소리가 작아서 잘 안 들렸는데.
1200900090.english: What? Your voice was quiet, so I couldn't hear you well.

1200900091.korean: 자, 어서 가봐요 모두가 기다리고 있잖아요!
1200900091.english: Come on, let's go! Everyone is waiting!

1200900093.korean: 잠깐만, 이 공터… 조금 이상하다고 생각되지 않아?
1200900093.english: Wait a minute, this vacant lot… doesn't it seem a little strange?

1200900094.korean: 우리는 지금까지 길이 없는 험난한 숲을 이동했어. 그런데 여기는 너무나도 깨끗해
1200900094.english: We have traveled through a rugged forest with no paths until now. But it is so clean here.

1200900095.english: As if it were made this way on purpose.

1200900098.english: You have something you want to say, don't you?

1201000001.korean: - 잠시 후, 상공에서 살펴보던 운디네가 무언가 발견했고 그 지점을 중심으로 네레이드의 탐색 끝에 지면에 숨겨져 있는 입구를 발견했다.
1201000001.english: Shortly after, Undine, who was observing from above, discovered something, and after Nereid’s search centered on that spot, they found an entrance hidden in the ground.

1201000002.korean: 설마 공터 밑에 이런 게 숨겨져 있을 줄은… 지하로 들어가는 입구로 보이는데 쉘터 시설일까요?
1201000002.english: I never imagined something like this would be hidden under the vacant lot... It looks like an entrance leading underground; could it be a shelter facility?

1201000003.korean: 완전 부활! 퍼펙트 뉴-뉴 트리아이나 탐사 대장 등장!
1201000003.english: Complete Resurrection! Perfect New-New Triaina Expedition Leader Appears!

1201000004.korean: 거 봐! 내가 뭐랬어! 나는 새로운 단서가 있을 거라 믿고 있었다구!
1201000004.english: See! I told you! I believed there would be a new clue!

1201000005.english: Ugh, I can't believe there really is a clue...

1201000006.korean: 어때? 어때? 운디네 대원? 아무것도 없다고? 다시 한번 말해보겠어?
1201000006.english: How about that? How about that, Undine? You say there's nothing? Can you say that again?

1201000007.english: Ugh... I'm so frustrated... but I have nothing to say...

1201000008.english: Ahem! Neri found it! Praise her!

1201000009.korean: 후후, 네레이드 정말 잘하셨어요. 그럼 어떻게 하시겠어요? 퍼펙트 뉴-뉴 트리아이나 탐사 대장님?
1201000009.english: Haha, Nereid, you did a great job. Then, what are you going to do, Perfect New-New Triaina Expedition Leader?

1201000010.korean: 쯧쯧쯧, 어리석은 질문이군! 세이렌 '전 탐사 대장!'
1201000010.english: Tsk tsk tsk, what a foolish question! Siren 'Former Expedition Captain!'

1201000011.korean: 우리의 모험은 아직 끝나지 않았다! 오히려 이제부터 시작이야! 새로운 모험이 우리를 기다리고 있다고!
1201000011.english: Our adventure isn't over yet! On the contrary, it's just beginning! A new adventure awaits us!

1201000012.english: Oh! The adventure isn't over yet!

1201000013.korean: 잠깐, 아직 더 할 셈인 거야?
1201000013.english: Wait, are you planning to do more?

1201000014.english: (They say so. What should we do, Commander?)

1201000015.korean: (제가 봤을 때 이곳은 멸망 전쟁 이전에 만들어진 오래된 쉘터로 생각돼요.)
1201000015.english: (From what I've seen, this place seems to be an old shelter built before the War of Annihilation.)

1201000016.korean: (쉘터 내부를 확인하는 정도라면 지금의 전력으로도 충분히 할 수 있어요.)
1201000016.english: (If you just need to check the inside of the shelter, the current power is sufficient.)

1201000017.korean: (하지만 혹시 모를 일에 대비해 사령관님의 안전을 생각한다면… ...)
1201000017.english: (However, considering the Commander's safety just in case…)

1201000020.korean: - 멸망 전쟁 이전에 만들어진 쉘터라면 오르카에 도움이 되는 정보나 자원이 남아 있을지도 모른다.
1201000020.english: If the shelter was built before the War of Annihilation, there might still be information or resources remaining that would be helpful to Orca.

1201000021.korean: - 그러나 지금 이 상황에서 무리하게 탐사를 강행할 필요가 없는 건 사실이다.
1201000021.english: However, it is true that there is no need to forcefully proceed with the exploration in the current situation.

1201000022.korean: (이런 말씀 드리고 싶지 않지만, 엄청 혼날 거라 생각해요...)
1201000022.english: (I don't want to say this, but I think I'm going to get scolded a lot...)

1201000023.english: (Commander!? Are you really sure you'll be okay?)

1201000024.korean: - 나는 새로운 목적지의 발견으로 들떠있는 대원들을 바라보았다.
1201000024.english: I looked at the crew members, who were excited about the discovery of a new destination.

1201000026.korean: (그럼요! 맡겨주세요. 사령관님의 기대에 부응할 수 있도록 최선을 다할게요.)
1201000026.english: (Of course! Leave it to me. I will do my best to live up to your expectations, Commander.)

1201000027.korean: (아... 하지만 만약에 지휘관님들에게 들키면 변호는 해드리지 않을 거예요.)
1201000027.english: (Ah... but if the commanders find out, I won't defend you.)

1201000028.english: (Because I'm scared of getting scolded by them.)

1201000029.english: (Hehe, it's all thanks to you, Commander!)

1201000032.english: What do you think of Siren?

1201000033.english: Does this mean the exploration ends here?

1201000034.korean: 여기서 무리하게 강행했다가 들키면 지휘관들에게 혼나겠지?
1201000034.english: If I push ahead forcefully here and get caught, I'll get scolded by the commanders, right?

1201000036.korean: 모험이잖아! 새로운 던전을 발견했는데 이걸 안 들어가 볼 수는 없지!
1201000036.english: It's an adventure! I've discovered a new dungeon, so I can't just not go in!

1201000038.korean: 조금만 더 두 사람을 같이 있게 해줄까 싶어.
1201000038.english: I'm thinking of letting the two of you stay together just a little longer.

1201000039.english: So, I'm sorry to bother you, Siren, but could I ask you a favor?

1201000041.english: So even the Sirens have come to speak their minds...

1201100001.korean: - 시설의 내부로 진입한 우리들은 중심부로 여겨지는 장소를 향해 나아가고 있었다.
1201100001.english: Having entered the facility, we were moving toward what was considered the center.

1201100002.korean: 상당히 오래된 시설일 텐데 전력이 아직 살아있다니 놀랐어요.
1201100002.english: It must be a fairly old facility, so I was surprised that the power is still working.

1201100003.korean: 쉘터 시설은 몇 번인가 봤지만 저도 이렇게까지 보존이 잘 된 경우를 보는 건 처음이에요.
1201100003.english: I've seen shelter facilities a few times, but this is the first time I've seen one preserved this well.

1201100004.korean: 최근까지 누가 관리라도 하고 있었던 걸까요?
1201100004.english: Was someone managing this until recently?

1201100005.korean: 있을 수 있는 일이지만 가능성은 매우 낮을 거로 생각해요.
1201100005.english: It is possible, but I think the probability is very low.

1201100006.korean: 운이 좋게 철충의 피해를 받지 않은 시설이 아닐까요?
1201100006.english: Could it be a facility that was lucky enough not to be damaged by Iron Bugs?

1201100007.korean: 그렇군요. 그래도 관리가 잘 되어 있어서 다행이에요.
1201100007.english: I see. Still, it's a relief that it's well-maintained.

1201100008.korean: 오래된 시설이라고 생각해서 위험하지 않을까 걱정했는데…
1201100008.english: I was worried it might be dangerous because I thought it was an old facility...

1201100009.english: With this, there won't be any safety accidents.

1201100010.english: Hehe, since you are a lifeguard, Dione. You are sensitive about safety.

1201100011.korean: 네, 맞아요. 음… 하지만 지금은 바다가 아니니 그냥 구조대원이겠네요.
1201100011.english: Yes, that's right. Hmm... but since it's not the ocean right now, they must just be rescue workers.

1201100012.korean: 물론이야. 모두의 안전을 최우선으로 생각할 거야.
1201100012.english: Of course. I will prioritize everyone's safety above all else.

1201100013.korean: 그리고, 당신도... 내가 구조해야 할 유일한 인간인걸.
1201100013.english: And, you too... are the only human I need to rescue.

1201100014.korean: 수상구조대원의 이름을 걸고 당신을 구해 보일게.
1201100014.english: I swear on the name of a lifeguard, I'll save you.

1201100015.english: Have you done a lot of rescue work in the past, Dione?

1201100016.english: Are you talking about the past...?

1201100017.korean: - 디오네는 안 좋은 일을 떠올린 듯 슬픈 표정을 지으며 입을 다물었다.
1201100017.english: Dione closed her mouth with a sad expression, as if recalling something bad.

1201100019.korean: 앗, 죄송해요. 갑자기 질문드려서... 무리해서 답변해 주지 않으셔도 괜찮아요.
1201100019.english: Oh, I'm sorry for asking this so suddenly... It's okay if you don't go out of your way to answer.

1201100020.korean: 아니에요. 딱히 문제가 있는 건 아니에요. 단지…
1201100020.english: No, it's not. There isn't really a problem. It's just…

1201100021.korean: 그때의 일은 떳떳하게 말씀드리기가 어려웠을 뿐이에요.
1201100021.english: It is just that it was difficult for me to speak openly about what happened back then.

1201100023.english: I am a bioroid designed for structural purposes.

1201100024.korean: 때문에 구조에 임할 때는 누구보다 책임감과 열성을 다해 움직이게 만들어졌어요.
1201100024.english: Therefore, when undertaking a rescue, I was made to act with more responsibility and enthusiasm than anyone else.

1201100025.korean: 실제 구조 행위를 할 때는 다소 격한 모습을 보여드릴지도 모르겠네요.
1201100025.english: I might show a somewhat intense side when actually carrying out the rescue operation.

1201100026.korean: 자신에게 주어진 사명을 위해 최선을 다해 움직인다는 건 정말 멋지다고 생각해요.
1201100026.english: I think it is really cool to do your best to fulfill the mission given to you.

1201100028.korean: 하지만 저는 그 말을 들을 자격이 없어요.
1201100028.english: But I don't deserve to hear that.

1201100031.korean: 저는 구조를 위해 만들어졌지만, 전쟁이 계속되고 제 역할은 변질되어 전쟁만을 위한 전투원이 되었어요.
1201100031.english: I was created for rescue, but as the war continued, my role became corrupted, and I became a combatant solely for the war.

1201100032.korean: 무슨 일이 있어도 구조를 최우선으로 하는 천칭은 점점 적을 처치한다 쪽으로 기울기 시작했고…
1201100032.english: Libra, who prioritizes rescue above all else, began to tilt increasingly toward eliminating the enemy…

1201100033.english: In the end, the scales were reversed.

1201100034.korean: 아무도 구조 명령을 내려주지 않았어요. 바로 앞에 구조를 바라는 이들이 그렇게나 많았는데…
1201100034.english: No one gave the rescue order. There were so many people right in front of us hoping for rescue...

1201100035.korean: 구조를 바라는 이의 외침을 무시하고 적을 죽이기 위해 움직이는 수상구조대원.
1201100035.english: A water rescue worker who moves to kill the enemy, ignoring the cries of those seeking rescue.

1201100036.korean: 웃기지 않나요? 이 손으로 구조한 수 보다 죽인 수가 더 많은 구조대원이라니…
1201100036.english: Isn't it funny? A rescue worker who has killed more people with these hands than he has saved...

1201100037.korean: 그리고 저는… 이 세상 누구보다 소중하다고 생각한 사람에게조차 손을 내밀려고 하지 않았어요.
1201100037.english: And I… didn’t even try to reach out to the person I considered more precious than anyone else in this world.

1201100038.korean: 저는… 주어진 사명에 최선을 다하지 못한 거예요…
1201100038.english: I… failed to do my best in the mission given to me…

1201100040.korean: 사령관님! 부함장님! 적이에요! 시설 안에서 무장한 AGS가 나타났어요!
1201100040.english: Commander! Vice-Captain! It's the enemy! An armed AGS has appeared inside the facility!

1201100041.korean: 앞에서 네리와 트리아이나가 버텨주고 있지만 빨리 도와줘야 해요!
1201100041.english: Neri and Triaina are holding the line up ahead, but we need to help quickly!

1201100043.english: I'll help out from the front, too!

1201100044.korean: - 오르카는 구조대원을 최전방에 세울 만큼 약하지도 잔혹하지도 않으니까!
1201100044.english: - Orca isn't weak or cruel enough to put rescue workers on the front lines!

1201100045.english: I'll ask you to rescue everyone if push comes to shove.

1201100047.korean: 이 시설을 지키도록 명령받은 독립된 AGS일 확률이 높아.
1201100047.english: It is highly likely that it is an independent AGS ordered to guard this facility.

1201100048.korean: 세이렌, 운디네 바로 두 사람에게 합류를
1201100048.english: Siren and Undine immediately joined the two.

1201100050.english: It's fine, leave it to us!

1201200001.korean: - 공격을 한 것은 예상대로 시설을 지키도록 명령받은 경비 AGS였고 우리는 거친 환영 인사를 막아내었다.
1201200001.english: As expected, the attackers were the security AGS ordered to defend the facility, and we fended off their rough welcome.

1201200002.english: There are no moving AGSs…. Ending the battle.

1201200003.korean: 으아! 죽는 줄 알았네. 대체 뭐야 갑자기 나타나서는 다짜고짜 공격하다니.
1201200003.english: Agh! I thought I was going to die. What the hell? Appearing out of nowhere and attacking out of nowhere.

1201200005.korean: 트리아이나씨는 다치지 않으셨나요? AGS와 제일 먼저 조우하여 공격받았다고 들었는데.
1201200005.english: Are you unharmed, Triaina? I heard you were the first to encounter the AGS and were attacked.

1201200006.korean: 하마터면 위험할 뻔했지만 AGS를 보자마자 바로 쏘우피쉬에 탑승해서 괜찮아.
1201200006.english: I almost got into trouble, but as soon as I saw the AGS, I boarded the Sawfish right away, so I'm fine.

1201200007.korean: 굳이 말하자면 급하게 탑승하느라 부딪혀서 머리에 혹이 생긴 정도려나?
1201200007.english: If I had to say, I guess it’s just a bump on my head from bumping into something while boarding in a hurry?

1201200008.korean: 아야야… 말하고 나니까 머리에 통증이 퍼지네.
1201200008.english: Ow ow... now that I've said it, the pain is spreading to my head.

1201200009.korean: 혹시 모르니 제가 한 번 봐볼게요. 전투 중에는 본인도 눈치채지 못하는 상처를 입는 경우가 많거든요.
1201200009.english: I’ll take a look just in case. It’s common to sustain injuries during combat that even the person themselves doesn’t notice.

1201200011.korean: - 그때 침묵하던 AGS중의 한 기가 갑자기 움직이더니 디오네를 향해 총구를 겨눴다.
1201200011.english: Just then, one of the silent AGS units suddenly moved and aimed its gun at Dione.

1201200015.korean: - 총의 발사와 동시에 트리아이나가 디오네를 감쌌고 세이렌은 재빠르게 AGS를 처리했다.
1201200015.english: As soon as the gun was fired, Triaina shielded Dione, and Siren quickly dealt with the AGS.

1201200016.korean: 아… 트리아이나씨가 저를 몸으로 감싸서… 트리아이나씨…?
1201200016.english: Ah... Triaina wrapped her body around me... Triaina...?

1201200021.korean: 와왁! 이번에는 진짜 죽는 줄 알았네.
1201200021.english: Whoa! I really thought I was going to die this time.

1201200022.korean: 하루에 몇 번이나 목숨이 왔다 갔다 하는 거야.
1201200022.english: How many times a day does life come and go?

1201200023.korean: 아무리 내가 이 모험의 주인공이라고 해도 이러면 몸이 남아나질 않는다고.
1201200023.english: Even if I am the protagonist of this adventure, my body won't survive if I keep doing this.

1201200024.korean: 아, 캡틴 난 괜찮아. 화려하게 다이브 하긴 했지만 다치진 않았어.
1201200024.english: Ah, Captain, I'm fine. I did a flashy dive, but I didn't get hurt.

1201200025.english: How was that? That was a perfectly nice dive catch, right?

1201200026.korean: 헤헤, 나는 탐사 대장이잖아. 대장은 동료를 지키기 위해 있는 거니까!
1201200026.english: Hehe, I'm the expedition leader, you know. A leader exists to protect their comrades!

1201200027.korean: 트리아이나씨! 괜찮으세요!? 죄송해요. 제가 제대로 확인했더라면…
1201200027.english: Ms. Triaina! Are you alright!? I'm sorry. If only I had checked properly...

1201200028.korean: 괜찮아! 괜찮아! 후후후, 이걸로 탐사 대장의 위엄이 더욱 올라갔겠는데?
1201200028.english: It's fine! It's fine! Hahaha, I bet the expedition leader's prestige has risen even higher with this, hasn't it?

1201200029.korean: 어때 디오네? 멋진 탐사 대장을 다시 보게 되었으려나?
1201200029.english: How was it, Dione? Did you get to see the cool expedition leader again?

1201200030.korean: 앞으로는 감사와 존경을 담아 탐사 대장님이라고 불러줬으면 좋겠어.
1201200030.english: From now on, I would like you to call me Expedition Leader with gratitude and respect.

1201200033.korean: 어? 디오네? 왜 그래? 설마 화난 거야? 두 손은 왜?
1201200033.english: Huh? Dione? What's wrong? You're not angry, are you? Why are your hands like that?

1201200034.korean: 잠깐, 으햐아아 아파! 아햐! 볼 꼬힙히먀아~!
1201200034.english: Wait, owaa, that hurts! Aww! My cheek is pinched!

1201200037.korean: - 디오네는 그렇게 말하고는 자리를 피하듯 트리아이나에게서 멀어졌다.
1201200037.english: Dione said that and walked away from Triaina as if to avoid the situation.

1201200039.korean: 캡틴… 나 뭔가 또 잘못한 거야?
1201200039.english: Captain… did I do something wrong again?

1201200040.korean: 트리아이나씨 걱정하지 마세요. 분명 디오네씨는 감정 표현이 서툴러서 그럴 거예요.
1201200040.english: Don't worry, Triaina. It's probably just because Dione isn't good at expressing her emotions.

1201200043.english: Alright! Then resume exploration! Let's go!

1201200044.korean: - 자리를 떠나며 나는 AGS의 잔해를 바라보았다.
1201200044.english: As I left, I looked at the wreckage of the AGS.

1201200045.korean: - 우리를 습격한 AGS는 정말로 이 시설에 남겨진 경비용일까?
1201200045.english: - Is the AGS that attacked us really a security unit left behind at this facility?

1201200050.english: For now, it's a relief that you weren't hurt.

1201200051.korean: 하지만 정말 무모했어! 하마터면 탐사 대장을 잃을 뻔했다고!
1201200051.english: But that was really reckless! We almost lost the expedition leader!

1201200052.korean: 라고… 말하고 싶지만 네가 아니었다면 디오네가 크게 다쳤을 거야 고마워.
1201200052.english: I want to say that... but if it weren't for you, Dione would have been seriously hurt. Thank you.

1201200053.english: You could say the same this time, couldn't you?

1201200055.korean: 자, 그럼 정비가 끝나면 다시 움직이자.
1201200055.english: Alright then, let's get moving again once the maintenance is finished.

1201300001.korean: - 경비 AGS와 조우한 이후, 우리는 시설 내부에 진입할수록 빈번하게 나타나는 AGS와 전투가 이어졌다.
1201300001.english: After encountering the security AGS, battles continued with AGSs that appeared more frequently as we advanced further into the facility.

1201300002.korean: 다가오는 적의 신호 없음. 이 구역은 안전한 것 같아요.
1201300002.english: No signs of approaching enemies. This area seems safe.

1201300003.korean: 경계를 풀 수는 없지만 잠시 휴식 정도는 할 수 있을 거예요.
1201300003.english: You won't be able to let your guard down, but you'll be able to take a short break.

1201300004.korean: 으으… 지쳤어… 이런 강 노동은 나랑 어울리지 않는다고… 피부에도 좋지 않단 말이야.
1201300004.english: Ugh... I'm exhausted... This kind of hard labor doesn't suit me... It's not good for my skin either.

1201300005.korean: 운디네는 운동이 부족해! 네리처럼 평소에 열심히 운동해 두면 전혀 문제없다고!
1201300005.english: Undine is lacking exercise! If you exercise diligently like Neri does, it won't be a problem at all!

1201300007.korean: 으… 반박할 힘조차 없어… 그래요. 저는 운동 부족이에요. 힘없고 나약한 존재예요.
1201300007.english: Ugh... I don't even have the strength to refute... That's right. I lack exercise. I am a powerless and weak being.

1201300008.korean: 오오, 드디어 인정했다. 앞으로는 네리와 함께 단련하는 거야!
1201300008.english: Oh, I finally admit it. From now on, I'm going to train with Neri!

1201300009.korean: 애초에 경비 AGS가 계속 나타나는 게 이상하다구~! 도대체 여긴 뭐 하는 곳인거야!
1201300009.english: It's weird that the security AGS keeps showing up in the first place! What on earth is going on here!

1201300011.korean: 처음에는 단순히 멸망 이전에 만들어진 쉘터라고 생각했지만…
1201300011.english: At first, I thought it was simply a shelter built before the apocalypse, but…

1201300012.korean: 시설 내부의 상태와 수차례에 이르는 AGS의 공격으로 확신했습니다.
1201300012.english: I was convinced by the condition inside the facility and the repeated attacks by AGS.

1201300013.korean: 이곳은 멸망 이후에 누군가에 의해 계속 관리되거나 만들어진 시설이에요.
1201300013.english: This is a facility that has been continuously managed or created by someone since the apocalypse.

1201300014.korean: 그리고 그 주인은 우리를 달갑게 여기지 않는 것 같아요.
1201300014.english: And it seems the owner doesn't welcome us.

1201300015.english: They might be watching from somewhere.

1201300017.english: Ms. Triaina, could I talk to you for a moment?

1201300018.english: Huh? What is it? What is it?

1201300019.korean: 사령관님에게도 말씀드리겠지만 이번 탐사를 제안한 트리아이나씨에게 먼저 말씀드리는 게 맞는 것 같아요.
1201300019.english: I will mention it to the Commander as well, but I think it is right to tell Ms. Triaina, who proposed this expedition, first.

1201300020.korean: 저희의 이번 탐사 목적은 트리아이나씨가 이 섬에서 발견한 특이 신호 지점의 탐사에요.
1201300020.english: Our purpose for this expedition is to explore the unique signal point discovered by Triaina on this island.

1201300021.korean: 그리고 이 시설을 발견했고 이곳에서 나오는 신호의 정체를 파악하기 위해 내부로 들어왔죠.
1201300021.english: And I discovered this facility and came inside to figure out the source of the signal coming from here.

1201300022.korean: 하지만 침입자를 막기 위한 경비 AGS와 수 차례 전투가 벌어졌어요.
1201300022.english: However, several battles broke out with the security AGS to stop the intruder.

1201300023.korean: … …지금 우리는 목적을 알 수 없는 곳에서 앞으로 몇 번 더 일어날지 모르는 전투를 경계하고 있는 상황이에요.
1201300023.english: ... ... Right now, we are on alert for battles that may occur several more times in a place with an unknown purpose.

1201300024.korean: 저는 이 이상 임무를 계속하는 건 위험하다고 판단, 임무를 중지하고 귀환을 제안하려고 해요.
1201300024.english: I have determined that continuing the mission any longer is dangerous, so I would like to propose halting the mission and returning.

1201300025.english: So I'm sorry, but... the exploration is...

1201300026.korean: 좋아! 그럼 모험은 여기까지 하고 그만 돌아갈까!
1201300026.english: Alright! Then shall we end the adventure here and head back?

1201300028.korean: 왜 놀라고 그래? 돌아가자는 거 아니었어?
1201300028.english: Why are you so surprised? Weren't you saying we should go back?

1201300029.korean: 그건 맞지만… 괜찮으신가요? 아직 그… 목적을 달성한 게 아닌데.
1201300029.english: That's true, but... are you okay? We haven't achieved our goal yet.

1201300030.korean: 그야 모험을 마지막까지 끝내지 못하는 건 아쉽지만 그렇다고 무리할 생각은 없어!
1201300030.english: It’s a shame I can’t finish the adventure to the very end, but I have no intention of pushing myself too hard!

1201300031.korean: 모험의 끝을 보는 것보다 동료 모두가 무사히 돌아가는 게 제일 중요하지 않겠어?
1201300031.english: Isn't it most important for all your companions to return safely, rather than seeing the end of the adventure?

1201300032.korean: 혹시 세이렌은 내가 목적을 위해서라면 수단과 방법을 가리지 않고 피도 눈물도 없는 탐사 대장이라 생각한 거야?
1201300032.english: Did Siren perhaps think I was a heartless expedition leader who would stop at nothing to achieve my goals?

1201300033.english: To be honest, I did think that a little bit.

1201300034.korean: 햐~ 이렇게 몰라봐 주다니 대장은 서운해~
1201300034.english: Wow~ I'm a little disappointed that you didn't recognize me like this~

1201300035.english: Hehe, I'm just kidding. I trust Triaina.

1201300036.english: Then, I will inform the commander that the mission is being suspended.

1201300039.english: Is being a commander still difficult?

1201300041.korean: 하지만 임무보다 더 중요한 게 있다는 걸 알았으니까요.
1201300041.english: But because I realized there was something more important than the mission.

1201300042.korean: 그렇구나, 그렇구나... 이해했어. 못 보던 사이 세이렌도 어른이 된 거구나.
1201300042.english: I see, I see... I understand. Siren has grown up since I last saw you, too.

1201300043.korean: 이게 바로 독립하는 자식을 떠나보내는 부모의 심정인가... 감동에 눈물이 나오려고 해.
1201300043.english: Is this exactly how parents feel when sending off their independent child...? I'm so moved I feel like crying.

1201300044.english: Who are you calling a parent!

1201300045.korean: - 첫 AGS의 습격 이후로 디오네는 줄곧 깊은 고민을 하는 걸로 보였다.
1201300045.english: Since the first AGS attack, Dione appeared to be constantly deep in thought.

1201300048.korean: 아… 당, 당신…! 깜짝 놀랐잖아! 놀라게 하지 말아줘.
1201300048.english: Ah… D-you…! You startled me! Please don't scare me.

1201300051.korean: 응, 정말 많이 고민하고 있어… 어쩔 줄을 모를 정도로…
1201300051.english: Yeah, I'm really agonizing over it... to the point where I don't know what to do...

1201300052.korean: 아니, 사실은 이미 고민할 필요가 없을지도 몰라. 내 스스로도 답은 이미 나와 있다는 걸 아니까.
1201300052.english: No, actually, I might not even need to worry about it. Because I know the answer is already there myself.

1201300053.korean: 다만, 나는 지금 그저… 무서운 거야…
1201300053.english: However, right now I'm just... scared...

1201300054.english: A good opportunity to make an impression...?

1201300055.korean: 앗…!? 당, 당신! 대체 무슨 생각을 하는 거야!
1201300055.english: Ah…!? D-You! What on earth are you thinking!

1201300056.korean: 이런, 어딘지도 모르는 장소에서… … 분명 날 놀리는 거지!
1201300056.english: Oh no, in a place I don't even know... ...they're definitely making fun of me!

1201300059.korean: 아무리 당신의 부탁이라지만 솔직히 지금 건 좀…
1201300059.english: Even though it is your request, honestly, this is a bit...

1201300060.korean: 당신의 대한 평가를 조금 수정해야 할지도 모르겠어…
1201300060.english: I might need to revise my assessment of you a little...

1201300061.korean: 최우선 구조 대상으로 해야 할지 말아야 할지…
1201300061.english: Whether or not to make them the top priority for rescue...

1201300062.korean: 그래서 당신이 이렇게 말을 걸어주었다는 건 전부 알고 있다는 거겠지?
1201300062.english: So the fact that you spoke to me like this means you know everything, right?

1201300064.korean: PECS사의 심해 탐사용 바이오로이드 트리아이나를 바탕으로 만들어진 인명 구조 바이오로이드 디오네… 그게 바로 나야.
1201300064.english: Dione, a life-saving bio-android created based on PECS’s deep-sea exploration bio-android Triaina… That’s me.

1201300065.korean: 당신이 예상하는 것처럼 트리아이나는 나의 언니야.
1201300065.english: As you might expect, Triaina is my older sister.

1201300067.korean: 모르겠어… 정말로 언니인지… 그때의 트리아이나 언니는 이제 이 세상에는 없다는 걸 나는 알고 있으니까…
1201300067.english: I don't know... if she really is my sister... because I know that the Triaina from back then is no longer in this world...

1201300068.english: That day… a distress signal came.

1201300069.korean: 철충이 나타나 전쟁이 계속되고 시간이 흘러 인류가 멸망한 줄 알았던 때에 발생한 구조 신호…
1201300069.english: A distress signal occurred at a time when humanity was thought to have perished as the war continued with the appearance of Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs)...

1201300070.korean: 나는 아직 살아있는 인간이 있을 수도 있다는 희망을 가지고 언니와 함께 구조 신호가 발생한 지점으로 향했어.
1201300070.english: I headed to the spot where the distress signal came from with my sister, holding onto the hope that there might still be humans alive.

1201300071.korean: 그리고 기적이라고 해야 할지… 그곳에는 정말로 살아있는 인간이 있었어.
1201300071.english: And whether to call it a miracle... there was actually a living human there.

1201300072.korean: 만신창이 상태로 금방이라도 죽을 것 같은 한 명의 인간…
1201300072.english: A human being in a battered state, looking like they could die at any moment…

1201300073.korean: 나와 언니는 필사적으로 구조하려고 했지만 구조 신호를 탐지한 건 우리 뿐만이 아니었어…
1201300073.english: My sister and I tried desperately to rescue them, but we weren't the only ones who detected the distress signal…

1201300074.korean: 맞아, 많은 철충이 몰려들었지. 그래도 어떻게든 우리는 빠져나갔어. 인간을 구조하려고 필사적으로 움직였어...…
1201300074.english: That's right, a lot of Iron蟲s swarmed in. Still, we somehow managed to escape. We moved desperately to rescue the humans...

1201300075.korean: 하지만 결국 위기의 상황에 놓여버렸고… 언니는 나를 감싸느라 치명상을 입었어.
1201300075.english: But in the end, we ended up in a crisis... and my sister suffered a fatal injury while shielding me.

1201300076.korean: 그런 위기의 상황에서 인간은 이렇게 말했어.
1201300076.english: In such a crisis situation, humans said this.

1201300077.korean: "쓰러진 고철 따위는 내버려둬! 방패가 되든 나를 지키란 말이다! 이 쓸모없는 바이오로이드!"
1201300077.english: "Leave the fallen scrap metal alone! Protect me, whether you become a shield! You useless bioroid!"

1201300078.korean: 나는… 아무것도 할 수 있는 게 없었어… 그저 인간의 말을 들을 뿐…
1201300078.english: I… couldn’t do anything… just listen to humans…

1201300079.korean: 위기의 상황에서 그때 언니가 몸을 던졌고 우리는 다 같이 절벽 위에서 바다로 떨어졌어.
1201300079.english: In a crisis situation, my older sister threw herself, and we all fell from the cliff into the sea together.

1201300080.english: I... had to... make a choice.

1201300081.korean: 인간과 치명상을 입은 언니… 두 사람 중에 구할 사람을…...
1201300081.english: The human and the fatally wounded older sister… who to save between the two…

1201300082.korean: 나는 선택했고… 정신을 차리고 해안선에 도착했을 때는…
1201300082.english: I made a choice… and when I came to my senses and arrived at the coastline…

1201300083.korean: 싸늘한 인간의 시체만이 옆에 있었어. 원래부터 만신창이 상태였으니 버티지 못했던 거야.
1201300083.english: Only a cold human corpse lay beside me. It was in a terrible state to begin with, so it couldn't hold out.

1201300084.korean: 그리고 언니의 모습을 그 어디에서도 찾을 수 없었어…
1201300084.english: And I couldn't find my sister anywhere...

1201300085.korean: 나는 한 번의 잘못된 선택으로 그 누구보다 가장 소중하고 좋아하는 언니를 잃고 말았어.
1201300085.english: I ended up losing my older sister, whom I cherished and loved more than anyone else, because of one wrong choice.

1201300086.korean: 놓지 말아야 했는데… 붙잡아야 했는데… 언니의 그 손을…
1201300086.english: I shouldn't have let go... I should have held on... your hand...

1201300088.english: This is… what happened to me…

1201300089.korean: 사실 처음부터 알고 있었어. 오르카에 트리아이나씨가 있다는 소식을 들었을 때부터 내가 알고 있는 언니가 아니라는 건.
1201300089.english: Actually, I knew from the beginning. Ever since I heard the news that Triaina was in Orca, I knew she wasn't the older sister I knew.

1201300090.korean: 하지만 정신을 차렸을 때는 오르카에 합류해 언니를 찾는 나의 모습이 있었어…
1201300090.english: But when I came to my senses, I found myself joined Orca and searching for my sister…

1201300091.korean: 그리고 트리아이나씨를 만났을 때 다시 한번 실감했어.
1201300091.english: And I realized it once again when I met Triaina.

1201300092.korean: 언니는 이제 이 세상에 없다는 걸… 다시 만날 수 없다는 걸…
1201300092.english: That my sister is no longer in this world... that I can never meet her again...

1201300093.english: But the longer I stay with Ms. Triaina…

1201300094.korean: 내가 알고 있는 언니와 다르다는 걸 알면서도… 행동이… 목소리가… 안아주었을 때의 따뜻함이…
1201300094.english: Even though I knew she was different from the older sister I knew… her actions… her voice… the warmth when she hugged me…

1201300095.korean: 언니와 겹쳐보고 있는 내가 있어… 트리아이나씨는 나의 언니가 아닌데…
1201300095.english: There is a part of me that sees my sister reflected in her… even though Ms. Triaina isn’t my sister…

1201300099.korean: 정말로 그걸로 괜찮은 걸까…? 나의... 이 마음에 솔직해지는 걸로…
1201300099.english: Is that really okay...? I'll just be honest with... this feeling of mine...

1201300101.korean: 고마워… 당신 덕분에 드디어 마음이 정리된 것 같아.
1201300101.english: Thank you… Thanks to you, I think I’ve finally sorted out my feelings.

1201300103.korean: 운디네가 이쪽으로 다가오는 적의 신호를 잡았어요!
1201300103.english: Undine has detected the signal of an enemy approaching!

1201300104.korean: 그런데 그 수가 지금까지와 비교가 안 될 만큼 많아요!
1201300104.english: But the number is incomparably large compared to before!

1201300105.korean: 안 돼요! 후방에서도 몰려오고 있어요. 정면으로 싸우는 수밖에는 없을 것 같아요.
1201300105.english: No! They are swarming in from the rear as well. I think we have no choice but to fight head-on.

1201300106.english: Commander, I need your help. May I ask for your assistance?

1201300107.korean: 호라이즌, 지금부터 사령관님의 지시에 따라 전투를 시작합니다!
1201300107.english: Horizon, we will begin the battle now under the Commander's orders!

1201300110.english: Sorry, I didn't mean to surprise you.

1201300111.english: Because he looked like he was troubled about something.

1201300112.korean: 지금이 어필하기 좋은 기회인 것 같아서
1201300112.english: I think now is a good opportunity to make an impression.

1201300113.korean: 혹시 내 볼도 좀 꼬집어 줄 수 있을까 해서
1201300113.english: I was wondering if you could pinch my cheek a little too.

1201300118.english: There are various forms of families.

1201300119.korean: 그리고 누구든지 새로운 가족을 만들 수 있지
1201300119.english: And anyone can make a new family.

1201300120.korean: 오르카에는 아이가 넷이나 있는 엄마도 있는걸
1201300120.english: There is even a mother with four children in Orca.

1201300121.korean: 디오네가 언니를 얼마나 소중하게 생각하고 있는지는 알겠어
1201300121.english: I can tell how much Dione cherishes her older sister.

1201300122.korean: 그 누구도 그 자리를 대신할 수도 없다는 것도
1201300122.english: The fact that no one can take that position

1201300123.korean: 하지만 대신이 아닌 새로운 가족을 만드는 건 디오네의 마음이 아닐까?
1201300123.english: But isn't it Dione's heart to create a new family instead of a replacement?

1201300125.english: I'm glad if it was helpful.

1201400001.korean: - 지금까지와는 다른 대규모 공세로 긴 전투가 이어졌고 우리는 마침내 모든 적을 쓰러트렸다.
1201400001.english: A long battle ensued with a large-scale offensive unlike anything seen before, and we finally defeated all the enemies.

1201400002.korean: 햐~! 역시 캡틴이야! 저 물량 앞에서 어떻게 되나 싶었는데. 도와줘서 고마워~!
1201400002.english: Wow! You're the Captain! I was wondering how we would handle that volume of enemies. Thanks for helping!

1201400003.english: Commander, the battle is over. Everyone is safe.

1201400004.korean: 네레이드가 모두를 지키느라 조금 다쳤지만 중상은 아니에요.
1201400004.english: Nereid got a little hurt protecting everyone, but it's not a serious injury.

1201400005.english: It was a fierce battle against the enemy's offensive.

1201400006.korean: 이곳에 남은 모든 병력을 전부 쏟아부은 게 아닐까요?
1201400006.english: Could it be that they poured all the remaining troops into this place?

1201400007.english: Does that mean they've exhausted all their troops...?

1201400008.korean: - 모두의 상태가 걱정됐지만 나는 한 가지 불안 요소를 떠올랐다.
1201400008.english: I was worried about everyone's condition, but one source of anxiety came to mind.

1201400009.korean: - 이 시설은 누군가에 의해 계속 관리되거나 만들어진 시설이다.
1201400009.english: - This facility is one that is continuously managed or created by someone.

1201400010.korean: - 그리고 그 인물은 침입자를 달갑게 여기지 않았고 AGS를 동원하여 우리를 공격했다.
1201400010.english: And that character did not welcome the intruder and mobilized the AGS to attack us.

1201400011.korean: - 몇 차례의 공격에도 침입자는 격퇴되지 않았고 결국은 모든 병력을 쏟아부어 최후의 공격을 감행했다.
1201400011.english: The invaders were not repelled despite several attacks, and eventually, all troops were poured into a final assault.

1201400012.english: Even so, they were unable to deal with the intruder.

1201400013.english: - In that case… the last action the other party will take is…

1201400016.korean: 모두! 지금 바로 이 시설에서 빠져나가야 해요!
1201400016.english: Everyone! We need to get out of this facility right now!

1201400017.korean: - 세이렌은 내 지시에 조금의 의문을 가지지 않고 즉각적으로 대응했다.
1201400017.english: The Siren responded immediately to my instructions without the slightest doubt.

1201400018.korean: - 한 가지의 불안 요소… 이 상황에서 상대방이 취할 수 있다고 생각되는 최후의 수.
1201400018.english: - One element of uncertainty… the final move the opponent is thought to take in this situation.

1201400019.korean: - 나는 괜한 걱정이며 아무 일도 일어나지 않기를 바라고 있었다.
1201400019.english: I was worried for nothing and hoped that nothing would happen.

1201400021.korean: - 나의 바람은 무자비하게도 배신당하며 그것은 곧 현실로 일어났다.
1201400021.english: My hopes were mercilessly betrayed, and that soon became reality.

1201400023.english: Waaah! What is it this time?!

1201400024.korean: 운디네 진정하세요! 네레이드 움직일 수 있겠어요?
1201400024.english: Undine, calm down! Nereid, can you move?

1201400026.korean: - 칩입자를 격퇴하지 못했을 경우의 최후의 수… 시설을 통째로 폭파하는 선택…
1201400026.english: - The last resort in case the intruders are not repelled… the option to blow up the entire facility…

1201400027.korean: - 상대는 아무런 망설임도 없이 당연한 행동처럼 그것을 실행에 옮겼다.
1201400027.english: The other party carried it out without any hesitation, as if it were a natural action.

1201400029.english: Ugh, another explosion sound in the distance?

1201400030.korean: - 그때 멀리 떨어진 곳에서 다시 폭발음이 들리더니 직후 몰아치기 시작하는 불길한 소리가 들려오기 시작했다.
1201400030.english: Just then, another explosion was heard from a distance, followed immediately by an ominous sound of a raging storm.

1201400031.english: This is… the sound of water…! Seawater is entering the facility…!

1201400032.korean: - 우리는 서둘러 큰 통로 옆에 있는 작은 통로로 향했다.
1201400032.english: We hurried to the small passageway next to the large one.

1201400034.korean: - 호라이즌 멤버와 내가 옆 통로에 도착했을 때 폭발로 금이 간 천장이 무너져 잔해가 떨어졌다.
1201400034.english: When the Horizon members and I arrived at the side passageway, the ceiling, cracked by the explosion, collapsed and debris fell.

1201400036.korean: - 잔해는 그대로 뒤 따라오던 디오네를 덮쳤다.
1201400036.english: The debris struck Dione, who was following behind.

1201400038.english: Oh dear, was that a bit reckless this time?

1201400039.korean: - 무너진 잔해가 디오네를 덮치기 직전 쏘우피쉬에 탑승한 트리아이나가 디오네를 감쌌다.
1201400039.english: Just before the collapsed debris struck Dione, Triaina, aboard the Sawfish, shielded Dione.

1201400042.korean: 저는 괜찮아요. 그것보다 물소리가…! 어서 탈출을!!
1201400042.english: I'm fine. More importantly, the sound of the water…! Escape quickly!!

1201400043.korean: 음… 힘들지도… 조금 무리했는지 기체가 잘 움직이지 않아. 나는 괜찮으니까 디오네 먼저 도망쳐.
1201400043.english: Hmm... it might be tough... Maybe I pushed myself a little too hard, because the aircraft isn't moving well. I'm fine, so Dione, you run away first.

1201400044.korean: 그게 무슨 소리예요! 제가 트리아이나씨를 두고 갈 리가 없잖아요!
1201400044.english: What are you talking about! There is no way I would leave Triaina behind!

1201400045.english: It's okay! I'll get it for you right away!

1201400047.english: Dione, I'm sorry... Please don't be angry...

1201400049.korean: - 트리아이나는 겨우 움직이는 쏘우피쉬의 한쪽 팔로 디오네를 들어 올려 그대로 우리가 있는 통로를 향해 던졌다.
1201400049.english: Triaina lifted Dione with one of the barely moving arms of the sawfish and threw her straight toward the passageway where we were.

1201400052.english: Ms. Dione! It's dangerous! The water!!

1201400053.korean: 아직 늦지 않았어요! 할 수 있어요! 제가 반드시 구할게요!
1201400053.english: It's not too late! You can do it! I will definitely save you!

1201400054.korean: - 나는 통로를 벗어나려는 디오네를 붙잡아 내 쪽으로 잡아당겼다.
1201400054.english: I grabbed Dione, who was trying to get out of the passageway, and pulled her toward me.

1201400055.korean: - 그 직후 거센 물살이 큰 통로를 휩쓸었다.
1201400055.english: - Immediately after that, a strong current swept through the large passage.

1201400056.english: - Everything that was inside the passageway…

1201400062.korean: 지금 당장 모두를 데리고 이 시설에서 벗어나자 서둘러!
1201400062.english: Let's get everyone out of this facility right now! Hurry!

1201400063.english: You must not be separated from each other!

1201400064.korean: 모두!! 저쪽에 있는 옆 통로로! 곧 물길이 들이닥칠 거야!
1201400064.english: Everyone!! Go to the side passage over there! The water is coming in soon!

1201500001.korean: 사령관님… 안전한 위치에 도착했어요. 여기서부터는 무너질 걱정은 없을 거예요.
1201500001.english: Commander… we have reached a safe location. From here on, there will be no need to worry about it collapsing.

1201500002.korean: 그리고 시설이 무너진 여파 때문인지 오르카와 통신이 되지 않아요. 연락하기 위해서는 출구와 좀 더 가까워질 필요가 있어 보여요.
1201500002.english: Also, perhaps due to the aftermath of the facility collapse, we cannot communicate with Orca. It looks like we need to get a little closer to the exit to contact her.

1201500003.korean: - 시설 폭파가 시작된 이후 우리는 무너지는 시설과 물살을 피해 안전한 위치에 도착했다.
1201500003.english: After the explosion began, we reached a safe location by avoiding the collapsing facilities and the currents.

1201500007.korean: 사령관님 서둘러 오르카로 돌아가 트리아이나씨의 수색 부대 편성을 부탁드립니다.
1201500007.english: Commander, please hurry back to Orca and organize a search party for Triaina.

1201500008.english: If you hurry, it won't be too late.

1201500009.english: I have a favor to ask of you.

1201500011.korean: 지금 바로 트리아이나씨의 구조에 가고 싶어.
1201500011.english: I want to go rescue Triaina right now.

1201500012.korean: 위험하다는 건 알아. 하지만 나는 더 이상 망설임으로 후회하고 싶지 않아.
1201500012.english: I know it's dangerous. But I don't want to regret it anymore from hesitating.

1201500013.korean: 당신이 말했지, 새로운 가족을 만드는 건 나의 마음이라고… 그러니까…
1201500013.english: You said that creating a new family is up to me... so...

1201500014.korean: 내가 할 수 있는 전력을 다해서 이번에는 반드시 언니를 구하고 싶어.
1201500014.english: I want to do everything in my power to save my sister this time no matter what.

1201500016.english: Yeah, with Neri, right? Got it!

1201500018.korean: 지금은 이 시설에 들어갈 때와 상황이 달라요.
1201500018.english: The situation is different now compared to when I first entered this facility.

1201500019.korean: 시설은 폭파된 상태로 언제 무너질지 몰라요.
1201500019.english: The facility has been blown up, and we don't know when it might collapse.

1201500020.korean: 운디네와 네레이드도 도움 요청을 하러 가면 전력도 부족해요.
1201500020.english: Even Undine and Nereid are short on power when they go to ask for help.

1201500021.korean: 지휘관들에게 엄청 혼나는 정도로는 끝나지 않을 거예요.
1201500021.english: It won't end with just getting severely scolded by the commanders.

1201500022.english: So you're saying you're going no matter what...

1201500024.korean: 사령관님이 덜 혼나도록 제가 최선을 다해 변호해 드릴게요.
1201500024.english: I will do my best to defend you so that you don't get scolded too much, Commander.

1201500025.korean: 그리고, 탐사 대장을 구하는 건 대원으로서 당연한 걸요.
1201500025.english: And, saving the expedition leader is only natural for a member.

1201500028.korean: - 트리아이나를 구조하기 위해 다시 시설 안쪽으로 들어온 우리는 사고가 일어난 장소 근처로 돌아왔다.
1201500028.english: We re-entered the facility to rescue Triaina and returned to the vicinity of the accident site.

1201500030.korean: 물소리가 들리지 않아서 혹시나 했는데 격벽이 내려가 있어요. 비상시에 자동으로 내려가도록 만들어졌나 봐요.
1201500030.english: I couldn't hear the sound of water, so I was worried, but the bulkhead is down. It looks like it's designed to lower automatically in an emergency.

1201500031.korean: 이 상태라면 물에 떠내려갈 걱정은 괜찮을 거예요.
1201500031.english: In this state, you don't have to worry about it being washed away.

1201500032.english: I can't say for sure, but I think it's low.

1201500033.korean: 누군가에 의한 의도적인 폭파라고 해도 이미 한 번의 폭파로 시설 대부분과 경비 AGS가 파괴되었어요.
1201500033.english: Even if it was an intentional explosion by someone, most of the facility and the security AGS were already destroyed in a single explosion.

1201500034.korean: 상대는 지금 우리가 이 상황에서 다시 내부로 들어올 거라 생각도 못 하고있을 거예요.
1201500034.english: The other side probably doesn't even think that we would come back inside in this situation.

1201500035.korean: - 잠시 후, 우리는 트리아이나가 물살에 휩쓸렸던 장소에 도착했다.
1201500035.english: A short while later, we arrived at the place where Triaina had been swept away by the current.

1201500037.korean: - 물길이 지나간 통로는 무너진 천장과 함께 바닥도 무너져 구덩이가 만들어져 있었다.
1201500037.english: The passageway where the water flowed had a collapsed floor along with the ceiling, creating a pit.

1201500038.korean: 무너진 규모로 보아 이 밑에도 큰 공간이 있는 게 아닐까요?
1201500038.english: Judging by the scale of the collapse, isn't there a large space underneath as well?

1201500039.korean: 그리고 바닥이 무너지면서 트리아이나씨는 그 밑으로 떨어진 거고요.
1201500039.english: And as the floor collapsed, Ms. Triaina fell underneath.

1201500040.english: Triaina was on board the Sawfish.

1201500041.korean: 바닥이 무너졌다면 천장에서 떨어진 잔해에서 벗어났을 거예요.
1201500041.english: If the floor had collapsed, I would have escaped the debris falling from the ceiling.

1201500042.korean: 쏘우피쉬는 잠수용 기체니까 물에 떠내려가도 문제없으니 언니는 이 밑에서 무사할 확률이 높아요.
1201500042.english: Since Sawfish is a diving gas, it won't be a problem even if it drifts away, so there is a high chance you will be safe down here.

1201500043.korean: - 희망의 가능성을 품고서 우리는 어두운 구덩이 속으로 내려갔다.
1201500043.english: Holding onto the possibility of hope, we went down into the dark pit.

1201500044.korean: - 구덩이 밑으로 내려온 우리를 기다리고 있던 것은 거대한 동굴이었다.
1201500044.english: What awaited us when we came down to the bottom of the pit was a huge cave.

1201500045.korean: 설마 밑에 이런 거대한 동굴이 있었을 줄은…
1201500045.english: I never imagined there would be such a huge cave underneath…

1201500046.english: Was he trying to build something here?

1201500047.korean: - 섬의 알 수 없는 지하 시설… 그 아래에 있는 거대한 동굴…
1201500047.english: - The island's unknown underground facility... the huge cave beneath it...

1201500048.korean: - 만약 이 지하 시설은 아직 미완성이고 이 동굴 전체를 이용하여 뭔가를 만들 생각이었다면 상당한 규모의 시설이다.
1201500048.english: If this underground facility is still unfinished and the intention was to use the entire cave to build something, it would be a facility of considerable scale.

1201500049.korean: - 그런 규모의 시설에서 대체 뭘 하려고 한 거지?
1201500049.english: What on earth were they trying to do in a facility of that size?

1201500050.english: There are traces of battle here!

1201500051.english: It is clearly the trace of a battle. In that case, is it Ms. Triaina?

1201500052.korean: - 그때 그리 멀지 않은 곳에서 무언가 크게 부딪치는 소리가 들려왔다.
1201500052.english: Just then, a loud crashing sound was heard from not far away.

1201500054.korean: - 우리는 소리가 들리는 곳으로 서둘러 향했다.
1201500054.english: We hurried toward the source of the sound.

1201500057.english: Ahaha... This time it might really be dangerous...

1201500058.korean: 쏘우피쉬도 완전히 고장 났고 정말로 꼼짝없이 당하게 생겼네…
1201500058.english: The Sawfish is completely broken, and it looks like I'm really helpless to get this done...

1201500059.english: Ah... this... I can't move now.

1201500060.korean: 최후가 철충에게 당하는 거라니 조금 꼴사납네.
1201500060.english: It’s a bit unsightly that you meet your end at the hands of an Iron Bug.

1201500061.english: Siren… I wonder if she won’t save me this time too…

1201500064.english: I might have done something really sorry to Dione...

1201500065.english: I wanted to keep that promise...

1201500068.english: Spotted a large number of Iron蟲! Commander!

1201500071.korean: 지금 바로 네레이드와 같이 오르카로 돌아가 구조 도움 요청을 부탁해
1201500071.english: Go back to Orca with Nereid right now and ask for rescue assistance.

1201500076.english: That… I’ll figure it out somehow!

1201500078.korean: 그럼, 우리의 문제아 탐사 대장님을 구하러 가보자고
1201500078.english: Well then, let's go rescue our troublemaker expedition leader.

1201500079.english: Is there a possibility that the facility could be blown up again?

1201500081.english: Okay, then let's go down slowly!

1201500082.english: It's not that far! Let's hurry!

1201600001.korean: 이 소리는! 사령관님! 위쪽 시설의 폭파가 다시 시작된 것 같아요! 곧 여기도 무너질 거예요!
1201600001.english: That sound! Commander! I think the explosions at the facility upstairs have started again! This place is going to collapse soon, too!

1201600002.english: It's okay! I just lost consciousness!

1201600003.english: I've confirmed it! Please take care of Ms. Dione and Ms. Triaina!

1201600004.english: From now on, I will escape with all my might!

1201600005.korean: - 우리는 바깥에서 흘러들어오는 빛으로 향했고 그 끝에는 바깥으로 이어진 절벽이 있었다.
1201600005.english: We headed toward the light flowing in from outside, and at the end of it was a cliff leading outside.

1201600006.korean: - 잠깐의 망설임 끝에 우리는 무너지는 동굴을 뒤로하고서 절벽에서 바다로 뛰어내렸다.
1201600006.english: After a brief moment of hesitation, we left the collapsing cave behind and jumped from the cliff into the sea.

1201600008.korean: 조금... 지쳤지만 괜찮아요. 모두 무사히 해안선에 도착해서 다행이에요.
1201600008.english: I'm a little... tired, but I'm okay. I'm glad everyone arrived at the coastline safely.

1201600010.english: Ms. Triaina! Snap out of it!

1201600012.korean: - 디오네는 트리아이나의 의식을 확인하더니 곧바로 심폐소생술을 시작했다.
1201600012.english: Dione checked Triaina's consciousness and immediately started cardiopulmonary resuscitation.

1201600013.english: Open your eyes, please... I beg you...

1201600014.korean: 이제 두 번 다시 손을 놓지 않기로 정했단 말이야… 그런 아픔은 이제 겪고 싶지 않아…
1201600014.english: I’ve decided never to let go again… I don’t want to go through that kind of pain anymore…

1201600015.korean: 이런 건 치사해! 미안하다고 하지 말란 말이야…! 화내지 말라고 해도 무리야!
1201600015.english: That's so unfair! I told you not to apologize…! It's impossible even if I tell you not to get angry!

1201600016.korean: 화낼 거야! 일어나면 혼낼 거야! 도망칠 생각하지 마! 절대로 놓치지 않을 테니까!
1201600016.english: I'm going to get angry! I'm going to scold you when you wake up! Don't even think about running away! I will never let you get away!

1201600017.korean: 언제나 그랬던 것처럼... 웃는 얼굴로 받아줘… 곁에 있어 줘…
1201600017.english: Just like always... accept me with a smile... stay by my side...

1201600018.korean: 그러니까 부탁이야… 제발 눈을 떠 줘…!
1201600018.english: So please... please open your eyes...!

1201600020.english: Hehehe... As expected... I guess I made him angry...

1201600022.korean: 오, 드디어 나를 언니로 받아주는 거야?
1201600022.english: Oh, are you finally accepting me as your older sister?

1201600023.korean: 걱정끼쳐서 미안... 그러니까… 이럴 때는… 음! 일단 허그라도 할까?
1201600023.english: Sorry for making you worry... So... in times like this... Hmm! How about a hug first?

1201600024.korean: 늦지 않았어… 이번에는 늦지 않았어… 흑…
1201600024.english: I'm not late... I'm not late this time... *sob*...

1201600027.korean: 몰라…! 으흑… 우으… 흑… 바보..! 정말 바보…! 매번… 매번…
1201600027.english: I don't know…! Ugh… Ugh… Sob… Idiot..! You really are an idiot…! Every time… every time…

1201600028.korean: 용서하지 않을 거야! 절대로 용서하지 않을 거야! 죽어도 용서 못 해!
1201600028.english: I won't forgive you! I will never forgive you! I won't forgive you even if I die!

1201600029.english: I will never let go now.

1201600031.english: I'm going to get angry... I'm going to scold you...

1201600032.english: Ahaha, I guess I'll have to accept it, right?

1201600033.korean: 도망칠 생각하지 마… 절대로 놓치지 않을 거니까.
1201600033.english: Don't even think about running away... because I will never let you go.

1201600034.english: I don't run away. I'm always confident!

1201600035.korean: 언제나 그랬던 것처럼... 웃는 얼굴로 받아줘… 곁에 있어 줘…
1201600035.english: Just like always... accept me with a smile... stay by my side...

1201600037.korean: 앞으로는 내가 너의 곁에 있어 줄게.
1201600037.english: From now on, I will be by your side.

1201600038.korean: - 두 사람의 대화는 우리를 찾으러 온 구조 부대가 올 때까지 계속되었고
1201600038.english: The conversation between the two continued until the rescue team came to find us.

1201600039.korean: - 오랜 시간 홀로 길을 헤매던 디오네는 드디어 모험의 끝에 도달했다.
1201600039.english: After wandering alone for a long time, Dione finally reached the end of her adventure.

1201600040.english: Let's hurry out of here, Triaina?

1201600041.english: I see the light coming in from outside over there!

1201600042.english: I... am fine... What about Siren?

1201700002.korean: 말도 없이 기지에서 나가, 탐사를 시작하고, 우연히 숨겨진 시설을 발견해서, 사고에 휘말리고, 구조에 나서, 무사히 구조해서 돌아왔단 말씀인가요? 폐하?
1201700002.english: Are you saying that you left the base without a word, began an exploration, accidentally discovered a hidden facility, got caught up in an accident, set out on a rescue mission, and returned safely? Your Majesty?

1201700003.korean: - 무사히 오르카로 돌아온 나는 아르망에게 지금까지 있었던 일을 이야기했고 아르망은 기가 찬다는 표정을 지었다.
1201700003.english: - Having returned safely to Orca, I told Armand everything that had happened, and Armand looked dumbfounded.

1201700004.korean: - 참고로 나는 정좌하고 있다. 누군가 강요한 건 아니지만 지금은 그래야만 한다고 나의 본능이 강렬하게 호소하고 있다.
1201700004.english: For reference, I am sitting cross-legged. No one forced me, but my instincts are strongly pleading that I must do so right now.

1201700005.korean: 제가 모르는 사이 멋진 모험을 하고 오셨군요. 폐하. 마치 하나의 단편 작품을 본 기분입니다.
1201700005.english: You have returned from a wonderful adventure without me knowing, Your Majesty. It feels like I have just read a short story.

1201700006.korean: 솔직한 심정을 말씀드리면 아무리 저라도 이번만큼은 화가 났습니다.
1201700006.english: To be honest, even I was angry this time.

1201700007.korean: 저의 일은 폐하의 보좌입니다. 만약 폐하의 신변에 무슨 일이 생기면 그건 곧 저의 책임입니다.
1201700007.english: My duty is to assist Your Majesty. If anything happens to Your Majesty, it is my responsibility.

1201700008.korean: 폐하는 저를 길바닥에 나앉게 만드실 생각인지요?
1201700008.english: Your Majesty, do you intend to leave me on the streets?

1201700009.korean: 그게 아니면… 폐하는… 더 이상 제가 쓸모없다는 의미 인가요…?
1201700009.english: If not... does Your Majesty mean... that I am no longer useful to you...?

1201700010.korean: 정말 그런 뜻이라면… 알겠습니다. 저는 이만 보좌 자리에서 물러나겠습니다…
1201700010.english: If that is truly what you mean… I understand. I will now step down from my position as aide…

1201700011.english: Your Majesty, thank you for everything.

1201700012.korean: 폐하가 곁에 와주셔서… 정말로… 행복했습니다… 다시 볼 날은 분명 오지 않겠지요…
1201700012.english: I was truly... happy that Your Majesty came to my side... I suppose the day we see each other again will never come...

1201700015.korean: 후후, 가끔은 이렇게 폐하로부터 기쁜 말을 듣는 게 저의 소소한 행복입니다.
1201700015.english: Hehe, hearing such joyful words from Your Majesty every now and then is my small happiness.

1201700016.korean: 네, 사실 폐하께서 이러시는 경우가 한두 번이 아니니까요.
1201700016.english: Yes, in fact, this is not the first or second time Your Majesty has acted this way.

1201700017.english: I am used to it now. I will forgive you.

1201700018.korean: 어차피 다른 지휘관들이 용서하지 않을 테니까요.
1201700018.english: Because the other commanders won't forgive them anyway.

1201700019.english: Come to think of it, I forgot to mention this.

1201700020.korean: 폐하의 구조 요청을 받고서 모든 지휘관에게 최우선 사항으로 폐하의 구조를 요청했습니다.
1201700020.english: Upon receiving His Majesty's request for rescue, I requested all commanders to prioritize His Majesty's rescue.

1201700021.korean: 한 명도 빠짐없이 모든 지휘관이 바로 오겠다고 답변해 주었으니 슬슬 도착할 겁니다.
1201700021.english: Every single commander has replied that they will come right away, so they should be arriving soon.

1201700022.korean: 아, 참고로 조사를 위해 외부에 파견 나갔던 레모네이드 알파님도 곧 돌아온다고 합니다.
