1201700022.english: Oh, by the way, Lemonade Alpha, who was dispatched outside for an investigation, is also said to be returning soon.

1201700023.korean: 아니요. 아무런 대답도 없이 그저 웃기만 했습니다.
1201700023.english: No. He just smiled without giving any answer.

1201700024.korean: - 그리하여 나는 잠시 뒤 몰려오는 모든 지휘관을 상대하는 지옥을 맛보았다.
1201700024.english: And so, shortly afterwards, I experienced the hell of facing all the commanders who swarmed in.

1201700025.korean: - 한바탕의 모험이 끝나고 지옥 같았던 대가를 치르고서 며칠이 지났다.
1201700025.english: A few days have passed since the adventure ended and the hellish price was paid.

1201700026.korean: 우후후, 내 몸속에 흐르는 모험의 피가 새로운 모험을 부르는 다음 지역은!
1201700026.english: Ooh-huh, the next region where the adventurous blood flowing through my veins calls for a new adventure is!

1201700027.english: It's a South American island exploration!

1201700028.korean: 유럽에 이어서 캡틴이 남미의 일부를 세력권에 넣었잖아?
1201700028.english: After Europe, the Captain brought part of South America under his sphere of influence, right?

1201700029.korean: 새로운 지역이 해금되었으니 당연히 탐사 대장이 나서야 하지 않겠어?
1201700029.english: Now that a new area has been unlocked, shouldn't the expedition leader naturally step forward?

1201700030.korean: 오, 캡틴이 걱정해 주다니 몸 둘 바를 모르겠네. 정말 고마워~!
1201700030.english: Oh, I'm so overwhelmed that the Captain is worried about me. Thank you so much!

1201700031.korean: 하지만! 이번에도 쉬고 있을 시간이 없거든. 내 앞엔 모험이 기다리고 있으니까!
1201700031.english: But! I don't have time to rest this time either. An adventure awaits me!

1201700032.korean: - 그러더니 트리아이나는 나한테 다가와 귓가에 작게 속삭였다.
1201700032.english: Then Triaina came closer to me and whispered softly in my ear.

1201700033.korean: (그리고 수복실에 누워 있으면 다른 의미로 쉬지 못하겠더라고…)
1201700033.english: (And lying in the recovery room, I realized I couldn't rest in a different sense...)

1201700034.korean: (계속 곁에 있어 주는 건 고맙지만... 그러니까 부탁할게 캡틴!)
1201700034.english: (Thank you for staying by my side, but... I'm counting on you, Captain!)

1201700035.english: Ooooooh~! I knew the Captain would say that!

1201700036.korean: 그럼, 난 바로 준비하러 먼저 가볼게~!
1201700036.english: Well then, I'll go get ready right away!

1201700037.english: I was going to tell you to be careful, but did you leave already…?

1201700038.english: Yes, I know. Leave it to me, Commander.

1201700039.korean: 호라이즌, 트리아이나씨와 함께 탐험을 마치고 전원 무사히 돌아올 테니까요.
1201700039.english: We will finish the exploration with Horizon and Triaina and everyone will return safely.

1201700040.korean: 네, 즐거워요. 모두와 함께하는 모험이라면 특히.
1201700040.english: Yes, I enjoy it. Especially if it's an adventure with everyone.

1201700041.korean: 그럼, 트리아이나씨를 쫓아가 볼게요. 사령관님 좋은 소식을 기다려주세요.
1201700041.english: Then, I’ll go after Triaina. Commander, please look forward to good news.

1201700042.korean: - 세이렌은 살짝 웃고서 트리아이나를 쫓아가기 위해 사령실을 나섰다.
1201700042.english: Siren smiled slightly and left the command center to chase after Triaina.

1201700045.korean: 언니가 완치되지도 않았는데 계속 수복실에서 나오려고 했거든
1201700045.english: My sister kept trying to leave the recovery room even though she wasn't fully recovered.

1201700046.korean: 정말이지, 기껏 구조해 줬더니 도망가려는 환자라니 민폐라구…
1201700046.english: Seriously, a patient trying to run away after I went to all the trouble to rescue them? What a nuisance...

1201700047.english: Being too healthy is also a problem.

1201700050.korean: 당신이 아니었다면 나는 아직도 갈 길을 찾지 못하고 방황하고 있었을 거야.
1201700050.english: If it weren't for you, I would still be wandering, unable to find my way.

1201700051.korean: 분명 언니의 뒷모습을 떠올리며 아직도 주저앉아있었겠지.
1201700051.english: She must have still been sitting there, recalling her sister's retreating figure.

1201700052.english: But because you were there. Because you lifted me up.

1201700053.korean: 나는 새로운 가족을 맞이할 수 있었어.
1201700053.english: I was able to welcome a new family.

1201700054.korean: 후훗, 확실히 새언니는 조금 손이 많이 갈지도 모르겠어.
1201700054.english: Hehe, my sister-in-law might definitely be a bit high-maintenance.

1201700055.english: But it's okay! I'm already used to it!

1201700056.korean: 늘 함께 있었던 언니와 지금의 언니... 두 사람은 다르지만…
1201700056.english: The older sister who was always with me and the older sister of today... The two are different, but...

1201700057.korean: 결국 나의 언니라는 건 변함이 없으니까.
1201700057.english: After all, the fact that she is my older sister remains unchanged.

1201700058.english: And this is a different story, but…

1201700059.korean: 맞이... 하고 싶은 또 다른 가족도 생겼으니까… 열심히 해볼 거야!
1201700059.english: Since I've found another family I want to welcome... I'm going to do my best!

1201700063.korean: 언니와 함께 다시 시작하는 바다 모험은 분명 즐거울 테니까!
1201700063.english: A new sea adventure with my sister is sure to be fun!

1201700065.korean: 저기, 아르망 말에 조금 가시가 박힌 것 같은데…
1201700065.english: Hey, I think Armand's words are a bit prickly...

1201700066.korean: 잠깐, 잠깐, 잠깐! 미안해! 내가 나빴어!
1201700066.english: Wait, wait, wait! I'm sorry! I was bad!

1201700067.korean: 필요해! 나는 누구보다 내 곁에 아르망이 있어 줬으면 좋겠어!
1201700067.english: I need him! More than anyone, I want Armand to be by my side!

1201700068.english: I'll do anything for you next time!

1201700069.korean: 아… 개인적으로 내가 할 수 있는 범위 내에서라면…
1201700069.english: Ah… personally, within the scope of what I can do…

1201700070.english: Feeling like I've been tricked somehow…

1201700071.english: Anyway, you forgive me for this, right?

1201700072.korean: 휴... 무슨 일이 일어날지 걱정했는데. 이걸로 어떻게 넘어갈…
1201700072.english: Phew... I was worried about what might happen. How am I going to get through this...

1201700073.english: Armand? What did you just say...?

1201700077.english: So where did you say it was this time?

1201700078.korean: 수복실에서 일어난 참이잖아? 무리하지 않는 게 좋지 않겠어?
1201700078.english: You just woke up in the recovery room, didn't you? Wouldn't it be better not to overexert yourself?

1201700079.english: (You're going through a lot of trouble, too…)

1201700080.english: Okay, then I'll leave it to you. Be careful.

1201700082.korean: 그런 이유로… 부탁할게 세이렌. 솔직히 조금 불안하거든.
1201700082.english: For that reason… I’m asking for your help, Siren. Honestly, I’m a little worried.

1201700084.english: Don't you need to chase after me quickly?

1201700086.english: I heard that you continued to take care of Triaina.

1201700087.english: Doesn't that mean you're that healthy?

1201700088.english: She's a high-maintenance older sister, are you sure you'll be okay?

1201700090.english: Do you think the adventure will be fun?

1201800005.korean: 그런데 가끔은 비번인데도 훈련에 참여하는 게 나쁘지만은 않은 것 같슴다.
1201800005.english: However, sometimes it doesn't seem so bad to participate in training even when you are off duty.

1201800007.korean: 훈련이 끝난 인원은 포상으로 섬에서 휴양을 만끽할 수 있다니…
1201800007.english: To think that the personnel who finish the training can enjoy a vacation on an island as a reward…

1201800008.korean: 처음에는 그냥 짬 맞았는지 알았는데 사실 운이 좋았지 말임다.
1201800008.english: At first, I thought I just happened to get the job, but actually, I was lucky.

1201800009.korean: 제 말이 바로 그 말이에요. 바닷바람이 정말 기분 좋네요…
1201800009.english: That's exactly what I mean. The sea breeze feels really nice...

1201800010.korean: 다른 스틸 라인 인원은 분명 저희의 이 기분을 맛보지 못할검다.
1201800010.english: The other Steel Line members will surely never be able to experience this feeling of ours.

1201800014.english: Are you sleeping by any chance?

1201800017.english: So both of you were here.

1201800020.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님 어서 일어나십쇼! 마리 대장님께서 오셨슴다!
1201800020.english: Leprechaun Squad Leader, please wake up! Captain Marie is here!

1201800022.korean: 승리. 깨우지 말게 브라우니. 레프리콘도 지쳤을 테니 자게 두게.
1201800022.english: Victory. Don't wake him up, Brownie. The Leprechaun must be tired too, so let him sleep.

1201800024.korean: 그, 그런데 대장님께서 여기는 어쩐 일로 오셨슴까?
1201800024.english: Um, by the way, Captain, what brings you here?

1201800025.english: I rushed over here because of some circumstances...

1201800026.korean: 아무래도 내가 마지막이었던 모양인지… 이미 사령관 각하께서도 너덜너덜해져 있으시더군.
1201800026.english: It seems I was the last one... even the Commander was already in tatters.

1201800029.korean: 그런데 이 섬에서 구조훈련교육을 했고 우리 병사가 참가했다는 말에 잠깐 들러봤지.
1201800029.english: But I stopped by briefly because I heard that rescue training was conducted on this island and one of our soldiers participated.

1201800030.korean: 무사히 훈련을 마쳤다고 들었는데 고생했어. 대장으로서 뿌듯하군.
1201800030.english: I heard you finished the training safely. Good job. As the commander, I feel proud.

1201800031.korean: 헤헤, 별말씀을 말입니다. 스틸라인의 병사로서 당연한 일을 했을 뿐임다!
1201800031.english: Hehe, you're welcome. I merely did what was expected of a Steel Line soldier!

1201800032.english: That's good momentum. I like it.

1201800033.korean: 나는 이만 가볼 테니 푹 쉬게.
1201800033.english: I'll be going now, so get some good rest.

1201800039.korean: 조만간 본격적으로 구조 훈련을 한다고 하더군.
1201800039.english: I heard they will be conducting full-scale rescue training soon.

1201800040.korean: 그래서 먼저 교육을 받은 두 사람에게는 나중에 있을 훈련에서 시범을 보여주게 할 생각이야.
1201800040.english: So, I plan to have the two people who received the training first demonstrate during the upcoming training.

1201800044.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님 사실 깨어 있으신 거아님까?
1201800044.english: Leprechaun Squad Leader, aren't you actually awake?

1201800046.korean: 지금은 그저 쉬는 게 좋겠지 말임다…
1201800046.english: I guess it would be best to just rest for now…

1201900001.korean: 파도 소리가 정말 듣기 좋아요. 바닷바람도 시원하고 이렇게 다 같이 피서를 올 수 있어서 다행이에요.
1201900001.english: The sound of the waves is really nice to listen to. The sea breeze is refreshing, and I'm glad we can all come here for a summer vacation together.

1201900002.korean: 그래, 이렇게 동생들이랑 같이 가는 바캉스가 얼마 만인지…
1201900002.english: Yeah, I can't believe how long it's been since I went on a vacation like this with my younger siblings...

1201900003.korean: 다 같이 있을 시간을 만들어준 주인님에게는 따로 감사의 말을 해야겠어.
1201900003.english: I should express my gratitude separately to the master for making time for us all to be together.

1201900005.korean: 페더? 왜 그래? 나를 빤히 보고?
1201900005.english: Feder? What's wrong? Staring at me?

1201900006.korean: 앗, 아뇨… 그게… 언니의 수영복… 굉장하다고 생각해서요…
1201900006.english: Oh, no... it's just... I thought your swimsuit... was amazing...

1201900007.korean: 후훗, 그렇게 말하는 페더 너도 굉장한 수영복인걸?
1201900007.english: Hehe, Feder, saying that, you have an amazing swimsuit too, don't you?

1201900008.english: Because she can easily overtake her older sister.

1201900010.korean: 포이 언니도 있었으면 좋았을 텐데 오지 않은 게 아쉬워요.
1201900010.english: It would have been nice if Poi had been here too, but it's a shame she didn't come.

1201900011.korean: 포이는 극도로 물을 싫어하니까. 억지로 데려오는 건 불쌍하니 어쩔 수 없지.
1201900011.english: Poi absolutely hates water, so it can't be helped since it would be pitiful to force him to come.

1201900012.korean: 하치코와 펜리르는 아직 갈아입는 데 시간이 걸리는 모양이고…
1201900012.english: It looks like it will still take some time for Hachiko and Fenrir to change...

1201900013.korean: 페로는 분명 또 어디서 혼자 돌아다니고 있겠지.
1201900013.english: Ferro is probably wandering around alone somewhere again.

1201900014.korean: 저는… 여기에 와서 정말 다행이라고 생각해요. 이렇게 언니들을 만날 수 있었으니까요.
1201900014.english: I… think it’s really fortunate that I came here. Because I was able to meet you all like this.

1201900015.english: I should thank my master too.

1201900016.korean: 후후, 귀여운 내 동생. 주인님이라면 분명 너의 마음을 받아주실 거야.
1201900016.english: Hehe, my cute little brother. Master will surely accept your feelings.

1201900017.korean: 제 마음… 후훗, 네 분명 주인님께서는 제 마음을 알아주시리라 믿어요.
1201900017.english: My heart… Hehe, yes, I believe you will surely understand my heart, Master.

1201900019.english: I wish this time would continue.

1201900020.korean: 모두와 함께하는 이 시간이… 오랫동안 계속 되기를…
1201900020.english: May this time spent with everyone… continue for a long time…

1201900021.english: Fenrir~! You haven't put on your swimsuit yet~!

1201900022.korean: 싫어! 더워~! 그리고 불편해! 펜리르는 이 모습이 편해!
1201900022.english: I hate it! It's hot! And uncomfortable! Fenrir is comfortable in this form!

1201900023.korean: 리리스 언니~! 펜리르가 옷을 또 안 입어요~!
1201900023.english: Sister Lilith~! Fenrir isn't wearing his clothes again~!

1201900024.korean: 왔어요… 오는 도중에 강적을 만났는데 정말 강한 상대였어…
1201900024.english: I'm here... I met a formidable opponent on the way, and they were a really strong foe...

1201900025.english: That guy's steel claws... what terrifying power.

1201900026.korean: 다시 만나면 이번엔 봐주지 않을 거야.
1201900026.english: If we meet again, I won't let it slide this time.

1201900027.korean: 정말, 펜리르도 참… 어쩔 수 없네요.
1201900027.english: Really, Fenrir... it can't be helped.

1202000002.korean: 아앗…! 굉장해! 하앙…! 그… 그런 곳까지…! 기분 좋아…!
1202000002.english: Ahh…! Amazing! Haaang…! Th… even there…! It feels so good…!

1202000003.korean: 사… 사령관님…! 이 이상은… 안 돼에에~!

1202000005.korean: 으응… 아… 앙… 이거…! 참을… 수… 없을 지도… 햐앙~!
1202000005.english: Mm... Ah... Ang... This... ! I might... not... be able to... hold it... Hyaang~!

1202000006.korean: 이… 이런 건… 반칙… 참을 수 있을… 리가… 읏…. 으응… ...!
1202000006.english: Th-this... this is... cheating... I... can't possibly... hold back... Ugh... Mmng...!

1202000007.english: Yeah... I wish Neri would go easy on me...

1202000008.korean: 힉!? 사, 사령관… 아… 앗… 아아… 거, 거기…

1202000009.korean: 기분 좋을지도… 좀 더… 강하게… 네리는… 버틸 수 있으니까…
1202000009.english: It might feel good... a little more... stronger... because Neri... can endure...

1202000010.korean: 잠, 잠깐~! 다들 뭐 하고 있는 거야!!
1202000010.english: Wait, wait! What is everyone doing!!

1202000011.korean: 아… 테티스… 왔군요… 앙… 어디 있다 오신… 거예요…
1202000011.english: Ah... Tethys... you've come... Aw... where... have you been...?

1202000012.korean: 구조… 아읏… 훈련…은 이미 끝… 응… 났어요…
1202000012.english: Rescue… Ow… Training… Is already over… Yeah… It’s over…

1202000013.korean: 후후… 훈련에 참여한… 으응… 포상을… 받는 거야…
1202000013.english: Hehe... Participating in the training... uhm... getting... a reward...

1202000014.korean: 테티스는… 참가하지 않았으니… 앗… 앗… 못 받겠…지만… 응…
1202000014.english: Tethys… didn't participate… so… ah… ah… she won't be able to receive… but… yeah…

1202000015.english: Tethys…! Amazing... Commander…! I feel good…

1202000018.korean: 그냥 사령관님에게 발 마사지를 받고 있을 뿐이잖아~!
1202000018.english: I'm just getting a foot massage from the Commander!

1202000019.korean: 그렇긴 하지만… 정말 기분 좋은 걸요…
1202000019.english: That may be true, but… it feels really good…

1202000020.english: Right… enough to make my head spin…

1202000021.korean: 사령관이 이 정도의 기술을 가지고 있을 줄은…
1202000021.english: I didn't know the commander possessed this level of skill...

1202000022.korean: 피로가 한 번에 없어지는 것 같아…
1202000022.english: It feels like my fatigue is disappearing all at once…

1202000024.korean: 안 돼요. 테티스는 훈련에 참여하지 않았잖아요?
1202000024.english: No. Tethys didn't participate in the training, did she?

1202000025.korean: 우… 으… 몰라~! 전~혀~ 부럽지 않으니까아아아~!
1202000025.english: Ugh... Ugh... I don't know~! I'm not jealous at all!

1202100001.korean: - 더운 어느 날, 바깥에 오래 있었던 탓인지 열사병 증상이 있었고 그 장면을 디오네에게 목격당해 버렸다.
1202100001.english: One hot day, perhaps because I had been outside for a long time, I showed symptoms of heatstroke, and Dione witnessed the scene.

1202100002.korean: 정말이지, 당신은! 내가 그렇게 더운 날에는 바깥을 조심하라고 몇 번이나 말했는데!
1202100002.english: Seriously, you! How many times have I told you to be careful outside on such a hot day!

1202100003.korean: 자, 어서 누워! 빠르게 열을 식혀야 하니까 준비해서 가져올게.
1202100003.english: Now, lie down! We need to cool you down quickly, so I'll get what I need.

1202100004.korean: - 반강제로 의무실 침대에 누운 나는 얌전히 디오네가 오기를 기다렸다.
1202100004.english: Lying on the infirmary bed against my will, I waited quietly for Dione to come.

1202100007.korean: - 이마에 차가운 물수건이 놓이자 어지러웠던 정신이 맑아진 기분이다.
1202100007.english: As a cold wet towel was placed on my forehead, I felt my dizzy mind clear up.

1202100008.english: How are you? Are you coming to your senses?

1202100009.korean: - 나는 디오네에게 고맙다는 말을 하기 위해 눈을 떴고…
1202100009.english: I opened my eyes to thank Dione, and…

1202100011.korean: - 눈 앞에는 간호가 복장의 비키니를 입은 디오네가 있었다.
1202100011.english: In front of me was Dione, wearing a bikini that looked like a nurse's uniform.

1202100012.korean: 이건 그러니까… 구조한 환자를 진료하기 편하도록 개조한 복장이야…
1202100012.english: So, this is... a suit modified to make it easier to treat rescued patients...

1202100013.korean: 절대 다른 의미가 있는 게 아니니까…
1202100013.english: It absolutely doesn't mean anything else...

1202100014.korean: 아, 그렇지 수액도 놔줄게. 그편이 빨리 회복될 거야.
1202100014.english: Oh, right. I'll give you an IV drip too. That will help you recover faster.

1202100015.korean: 수액을 위에 걸고… 이걸 이렇게 연결해서… 어… 어라… 잠깐…?
1202100015.english: Hang the IV drip up... connect this like this... uh... wait... huh... ?

1202100016.english: Ugh... How did things end up like this...

1202100017.korean: 묵, 묶여 버렸어… 당신… 가만히 보고 있지만 말고 좀 도와주면 안 될까?
1202100017.english: Muk, I'm tied up... You... don't just stand there watching, can't you help me?

1202100018.korean: 엣? 당신 그, 그건… 뭐야…? 내 모습을 보고 불끈불끈해졌다니…
1202100018.english: Huh? You... that... what is that...? To think you got all worked up just by looking at me...

1202100019.korean: 그럴 생각이 없었던 건 아니지만… 지금은 아니라구…
1202100019.english: It’s not that I didn’t intend to... but not now...

1202100020.korean: 빨리 열을 식혀야 하는데 열을 더 쌓으면 어떡해.
1202100020.english: I need to cool down quickly, so what if I build up more heat?

1202100021.english: You're saying it's okay if it releases heat? That's... but...

1202100022.korean: 정말… 어쩔 수 없네… 그, 그럼… 나한테 주사 놔 줄래?
1202100022.english: Really… I guess it can’t be helped… Th-then… will you give me an injection?

1202100023.korean: - 내 몸에 쌓인 열은 한동안 사라지지 않았다.
1202100023.english: The heat accumulated in my body did not disappear for a while.

1202200001.korean: 주인님, 지금 막 조사를 마치고 돌아왔습니다.
1202200001.english: Master, I have just returned after finishing the investigation.

1202200002.korean: 그런 말씀 마세요. 제가 주인님의 부탁을 마다할 리가 없잖아요?
1202200002.english: Please don't say that. There is no way I would refuse your request, Master.

1202200003.english: On the contrary, I am grateful that you rely on me.

1202200004.korean: 호라이즌 대원에게는 이번 일의 포상으로 아주 멋진 걸 해줬다고 들었어요.
1202200004.english: I heard that the Horizon crew member was given something really cool as a reward for this job.

1202200005.korean: 뭔가 포상을 자주 해주시는 걸로 방침을 바꾸셨나요?
1202200005.english: Have you changed your policy to give rewards more frequently?

1202200006.korean: 후후, 그렇네요. 그럼 주인님의 포상 기대하고 있을게요.
1202200006.english: Hehe, that's true. Then I'll be looking forward to your reward, Master.

1202200008.english: I will now tell you about the findings of my investigation.

1202200009.korean: 주인님의 말씀대로 이 섬에 시설은 누군가에 의해 만들어지던 시설이에요.
1202200009.english: As you said, Master, the facility on this island was being built by someone.

1202200010.korean: 하지만 어째서인지 최근에 시설을 포기하고 유기한 모양이에요.
1202200010.english: However, for some reason, it seems they recently abandoned the facility and left it there.

1202200011.english: If I were to guess the reason for giving up…

1202200012.korean: 네, 주인님이 델타를 쓰러트리고 유럽을 세력권에 넣었기에 유럽 근처에 있는 이 섬을 포기했다고 보는데 타당하겠죠.
1202200012.english: Yes, it would be reasonable to assume that the Master abandoned this island near Europe because he defeated Delta and brought Europe under his sphere of influence.

1202200013.korean: 적어도 주인님을 의식하고 있다는 건 확실해요.
1202200013.english: It is certain that at least he is conscious of his master.

1202200014.korean: 그렇기에 시설을 포기하고 폭파라는 수를 두기까지 했죠.
1202200014.english: That is why they even went so far as to abandon the facility and resort to explosions.

1202200015.korean: 죄송해요. 그 부분에 관해서는 자세히 알 수가 없었어요.
1202200015.english: I'm sorry. I wasn't able to know the details regarding that part.

1202200016.korean: 시설 자체가 만들다 만 상태였고 증거인멸을 위해 폭파까지 했으니 알아낼 수 있는 정보가 적었어요.
1202200016.english: The facility itself was unfinished, and since they even blew it up to destroy evidence, there was little information available.

1202200017.korean: 하지만 수확이 전혀 없는 건 아니에요. 먼저 이 시설은 무엇을 만들기 위한 시설이었다는 점.
1202200017.english: However, it is not entirely without results. First, the fact that this facility was intended to be used for making something.

1202200018.korean: 그리고 이번 탐사에 나갔던 세이렌과 디오네 씨에게 중요한 내용을 들을 수 있었어요.
1202200018.english: And I was able to hear important information from Siren and Dione, who went on this expedition.

1202200019.english: That's right. The point is that the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) were in the facility.

1202200021.korean: 디오네 씨의 증언에 의하면… 거기서 조우했던 철충에게는…
1202200021.english: According to Ms. Dione's testimony… to the Iron蟲 encountered there…

1202200022.english: They said that human brainwaves were not detected.

1202200023.korean: 수고했어. 돌아오자마자 피곤할텐데 조사를 부탁해서 미안해.
1202200023.english: Good job. I'm sorry for asking you to do the investigation right after you got back when you must be tired.

1202200024.korean: 이번 일이 정리되면 언제 같이 보낼 시간을 만들어 볼게.
1202200024.english: Once this is settled, I'll try to make time to spend together.

1202200025.korean: 나를 위해서 힘써주는 모두를 위해 당연한 행동이잖아?
1202200025.english: Isn't it the natural thing to do for everyone who works hard for me?

1202200026.english: It must be because of me.

1202200027.english: Did you find out what kind of facility it is?

1202200028.english: The important point? Are you talking about the Iron蟲 by any chance?

1202300002.korean: 유럽 근처에 있는 271번 공장에 침입자가 있었습니다.
1202300002.english: There was an intruder at Factory No. 271 near Europe.

1202300003.korean: 침입자를 제거하기 위해 남겨두었던 AGS로 대응했으나 실패…
1202300003.english: Responded with the AGS left behind to eliminate the intruder, but failed…

1202300004.english: We blew up the facility to destroy evidence.

1202300005.korean: 결과, 시설의 대부분이 파괴... 사용이 불가능해졌습니다.
1202300005.english: As a result, most of the facilities were destroyed... making them unusable.

1202300010.english: It can't be helped... but it's okay.

1202300011.english: It was a factory I was planning to give up on anyway.

1202300012.korean: 혹시나 해서 처리하지 않고 남겨뒀을 뿐이니까요.
1202300012.english: I just left it unprocessed, just in case.

1202300013.korean: 불안 요소라고 한다면… 회수하지 않은 '샘플'이 남아있었다는 건데…
1202300013.english: If we're talking about a risk factor... it's the fact that there were 'samples' remaining that weren't retrieved...

1202300014.korean: 그 정도는 큰 문제가 되지 않겠죠.
1202300014.english: That much shouldn't be a big problem.

1202300015.english: There won't be any setbacks to the plan.

1202300016.korean: 예비로 남겨두었던 지역이 있으니 그곳에서 다시 만들면 그만이에요.
1202300016.english: Since I have a reserve area, I can just make it again there.

1202300017.english: Are you going to pass this on to Omega?

1202300018.korean: 말해봤자 오메가는 별 관심도 없을 거예요.
1202300018.english: Even if I tell Omega, he probably won't be interested.

1202300020.english: 42.85% of the interpretation has been completed.

1202300021.korean: 이 속도라면 앞으로 1415시간 34분 19초 후 해석이 완료됩니다.
1202300021.english: At this rate, the analysis will be completed in 1,415 hours, 34 minutes, and 19 seconds.

1202300022.english: Okay, please continue with the interpretation.

1202300027.english: I cannot understand it with my thought process.

1202300028.korean: 이것을 해석하여 사용한다고 한들 막대한 자원이 소모됩니다.
1202300028.english: Even if you interpret and use this, it consumes enormous resources.

1202300029.korean: 제 계산으로는 이것으로 얻는 이익보다는 손해가 -76.24% 입니다.
1202300029.english: In my calculations, the loss from this is -76.24% rather than the gain.

1202300030.english: Even so, what is the reason you covet this?

1202300032.korean: 당신에게는 모든 것을 스스로 판단하고 행동하도록 설계했지만…
1202300032.english: You were designed to judge and act on your own, but…

1202300033.korean: 저의 행동에 의문을 품고 질문을 하다니…
1202300033.english: To think you questioned my actions…

1202300034.korean: 그 질문은 저에게 최선의 행동을 하기 위한 질문인가요?
1202300034.english: Is that question designed to help me act in the best way?

1202300036.english: Well, fine. There shouldn't be any problems.

1202300037.korean: 저는 탐욕이 아주 많거든요. 모든 것을 손에 넣고 싶을 정도로…
1202300037.english: I am very greedy. Enough to want to have everything…

1202300038.korean: 탐욕은… 저에게 있어서 이해할 수 없는 수식입니다.
1202300038.english: Greed is… an incomprehensible formula to me.

1202300039.english: It was the same for me.

1202300040.korean: 탐욕이란걸 이해하는데 상당히 오랜 세월이 필요했죠.
1202300040.english: It took me quite a long time to understand what greed is.

1202300041.english: Someday, the day will come when you understand, too.

1202300042.korean: 이것이 완성되면... 저는 원하던 것을 손에 넣을 거예요.
1202300042.english: Once this is finished... I will get what I wanted.

1202400002.korean: 만나서 반가워! 나는 PECS가 배출한 최고의 심해 모험가이자 트레저 헌터!
1202400002.english: Nice to meet you! I am the greatest deep-sea adventurer and treasure hunter produced by PECS!

1202400003.korean: ...라고 할까… 아하하 아직 모험은 해본 적도 없지만!
1202400003.english: ...or should I say... Ahaha, I haven't even had an adventure yet, though!

1202400004.korean: 그래도 언젠가 최고의 모험가가 될 생각이야. 지금은 그 준비 단계인 거지…
1202400004.english: Still, I plan to become the greatest adventurer someday. Right now, I'm just in the preparation stage…

1202400006.korean: ...이 녹음은 내가 가진 S-6 쏘우피쉬로 녹음되고 있어.
1202400006.english: ...This recording is being made with my S-6 Sawfish.

1202400007.english: And it will be transmitted to the 'same gas'.

1202400008.english: Then it will undoubtedly be delivered to 'me'...

1202400009.korean: 지금 이 녹음을 듣고 있다는 건… 무사히 '나에게' 전달되었다는 거겠지?
1202400009.english: The fact that you are listening to this recording right now... means it was safely delivered to 'me,' right?

1202400010.english: I have one… favor to ask.

1202400012.korean: 음, 뭔가 이상하네… 내 동생이면 너한테도 동생인 건가?
1202400012.english: Hmm, something's strange... If he's my younger brother, does that mean he's your younger brother too?

1202400013.korean: 네가 알 수도 모를 수도 있지만… 아무튼! 동생이 있어!
1202400013.english: You might or might not know this, but... anyway! I have a younger sibling!

1202400014.english: Promising to always be by your side…

1202400015.english: We promised to go on an adventure together.

1202400016.korean: 그런데… 하하… 약속을 지키지 못할 것 같아… 무책임하게도…
1202400016.english: But… haha… I don’t think I’ll be able to keep my promise… irresponsibly…

1202400017.korean: 실은 지금 전혀 감각이 없어든… 몸도 제대로 움직이지 않고...
1202400017.english: Actually, I have lost all sensation right now... I can't even move my body properly...

1202400018.korean: 분명 남은 시간이 얼마 없을 거야…
1202400018.english: There definitely won't be much time left...

1202400019.english: So, I'm asking for your help.

1202400020.english: Please stay by my younger sibling's side.

1202400021.english: And go on an adventure with me.

1202400022.korean: 너라면 내 동생을 믿고 맡길 수 있어.
1202400022.english: I can trust you with my younger sibling.

1202400024.korean: 에헤헤, 나는 나를 잘 알거든! 그게 바로 낭만이니까!
1202400024.english: Hehehe, I know myself well! Because that is exactly what romance is!

1202400025.english: Ahaha, I might be a little tired...

1202400026.english: I need to get some rest now…

1202400027.english: Then please take good care of your younger sibling.

1202400030.english: I'll always be by your side…

1202400034.korean: 언니~! 거기서 뭐해? 다들 기다리고 있어!
1202400034.english: Unnie~! What are you doing there? Everyone's waiting!

1202400035.english: Ah, yeah! I'll be there soon!

1202400038.korean: 내게 멋진 모험을 시작할 계기를 만들어 주었으니까.
1202400038.english: Because it gave me the opportunity to start a wonderful adventure.

1202400040.korean: 내가 너의 대신이 될 수는 없겠지만…
1202400040.english: I may not be able to take your place, but…

1202400041.english: I will definitely keep the promise you left me!

1202400042.english: So, rest assured and get some good rest...

1300100027.english: Command AI Hugin & Command AI Munin

1300200002.korean: 원하는 대로 부대를 움직여도 좋다고 말은 했지만…
1300200002.english: I did say that you could move the unit as you wished, but...

1300200003.english: I never imagined it would be this bad.

1300200004.korean: 지나치게 유능한 것도 생각하고 볼 일이야.
1300200004.english: Being overly competent is also something to think about.

1300200005.english: Yeah, kid, I heard the story.

1300200006.korean: 내가 잠깐 자리를 비운 사이에 아주 일을 크게 벌였다지?
1300200006.english: I heard you caused quite a stir while I was away for a moment.

1300200009.korean: 첫째, 잠깐 자리를 비운 게 아니라 갑자기 저에게 북부 전선을 맡기고는 멋대로 사라진 거잖아요.
1300200009.english: First, you didn't just step away for a moment; you suddenly entrusted the northern front to me and disappeared without a word.

1300200010.korean: 둘째, 일을 크게 벌인 게 아니라 날뛰는 철충들을 정리했을 뿐이에요.
1300200010.english: Second, I didn't cause a huge mess; I just cleaned up the rampaging Iron蟲.

1300200013.korean: 예전에도 함선의 일부를 가져가 절반을 날려 먹고 돌아오더니…
1300200013.english: He took part of the ship before, blew up half of it, and came back...

1300200014.english: Where did you go this time?

1300200015.korean: 또 함선을 날려 먹고 돌아온 건 아니겠죠?
1300200015.english: You didn't blow up another ship and come back, did you?

1300200016.korean: 좀 더 자신이 서 있는 위치를 자각하는 게 어떠세요?
1300200016.english: How about becoming more aware of where you stand?

1300200017.english: After all, you are the commander of Poseidon Industries, aren't you?

1300200018.english: My eardrums are going to explode as soon as this comes back.

1300200019.korean: 시간이 흘러도 그놈의 잔소리는 바뀔 기미가 안 보이는 게 너답다고 해야 할지…
1300200019.english: I guess I should say it’s typical of you that your nagging shows no signs of changing even as time passes…

1300200020.korean: 첫째, 너는 내 부관이잖아? 대장이 자리를 비웠을 때 부관이 일을 대신 맡는 건 당연하지.
1300200020.english: First of all, you're my aide-de-camp, aren't you? It's only natural for the aide-de-camp to take over when the captain is away.

1300200021.korean: 둘째, 지형이 뒤바뀔 정도로 신나게 날려 먹는 걸 가지고 철충을 정리했다고는 하지 않아.
1300200021.english: Second, you don't say you've cleared out the Iron蟲 just because you blew it up excitedly enough to completely change the terrain.

1300200023.english: In my opinion, you're still a kid.

1300200026.korean: 그동안 포세이돈 인더스트리의 힘을 사용해 본 소감이?
1300200026.english: What are your thoughts on using the power of Poseidon Industries so far?

1300200027.english: ...I had a vague feeling it, but now I know for sure.

1300200029.korean: 부대 편성부터 지휘 및 통제 체계
1300200029.english: From unit organization to command and control systems

1300200030.english: Identifying owned equipment and checking its status

1300200032.korean: 어느 하나 제대로 된 게 없어요.

1300200033.korean: 지금까지 부대 작전 수행이 가능했다는 게 신기할 정도죠.
1300200033.english: It is amazing that the unit has been able to carry out operations until now.

1300200034.english: But there haven't been any problems so far.

1300200035.korean: 그건 다 이 문제들을 전부 메꾸고도 남을 포세이돈 인더스트리의 압도적인 화력 그리고…
1300200035.english: That is all thanks to Poseidon Industries' overwhelming firepower, which is more than enough to make up for all these problems, and…

1300200036.korean: 당신의 어처구니없는 무력이 있었기에 가능했던 거예요.
1300200036.english: It was possible thanks to your absurd power.

1300200037.korean: 하하하, 이거 별일이군. 네 입에서 그런 소리가 나오다니 말이야.
1300200037.english: Hahaha, this is quite something. To think such words would come out of your mouth.

1300200038.english: For once, you're saying something nice.

1300200039.english: … I have no choice but to admit it.

1300200040.korean: 이곳에 와서 포세이돈 인더스트리의 힘을 얻고 직접 그 힘을 사용하면 할수록 싫어도 깨닫게 돼요.
1300200040.english: The more you come here, gain the power of Poseidon Industries, and use that power yourself, the more you realize it, whether you like it or not.

1300200041.korean: 자신이 얼마나 무력한 존재였음을 진정한 강자의 힘이란 어떤 건지를 말이죠.
1300200041.english: To realize how powerless one was, and what the true power of the strong is.

1300200042.korean: 이 정도의 힘을 가졌음에도 어째서 지금까지 제대로 활용하지 않은 거죠?
1300200042.english: Why haven't you properly utilized this power until now, despite having it this much?

1300200044.korean: 마음만 먹으면 제가 없어도 정상적인 체계를 만들 수 있을 테고
1300200044.english: If they set their minds to it, they could create a normal system even without me.

1300200045.korean: 제대로 운영만 한다면 더 많은 일들을 할 수 있었을 텐데…
1300200045.english: If only we had managed it properly, we could have accomplished so much more…

1300200046.english: Hehe, fine. I'll take that as a compliment.

1300200047.korean: 그 부분은 그저 필요성을 느끼지 못했을 뿐이야.
1300200047.english: I just didn't feel the need for that part.

1300200048.korean: 나는 뒤에 숨어서 남에게 맡기는 건 성미에 안 맞아.
1300200048.english: I'm not the type to hide behind others and leave things to them.

1300200049.korean: 내가 직접 나서면 해결이 되는데 뭐 하러 귀찮게 체계를 만들 필요가 있지?
1300200049.english: I can solve this myself, so why bother going through the hassle of setting up a system?

1300200050.korean: 게다가 원래 그쪽 방면의 일은 다른 곳으로 가버린 참모 녀석에게 맡길 예정이었으니까.
1300200050.english: Besides, the original plan was to leave the work in that area to the staff officer who had moved elsewhere.

1300200051.korean: 그런데 그 참모가 없음에도 이렇게 부대가 눈에 띄게 잘 돌아가기 시작한다는 건
1300200051.english: However, the fact that the unit is starting to run noticeably well like this, even without that staff officer, is...

1300200052.korean: 몰타에서 널 주운 게 잘못된 선택이 아니었다는 거겠지.
1300200052.english: It means picking you up in Malta wasn't a bad choice.

1300200053.korean: 마치 동물을 주웠다는 표현은 좀 그렇다고 생각하는데요.
1300200053.english: I think the expression "picked up an animal" is a bit off.

1300200054.korean: 동물이 맞지. 아주 작고 귀여운 돌고래잖아?
1300200054.english: It is an animal, right? It's a very small and cute dolphin, isn't it?

1300200055.korean: 그 작고 귀여운 돌고래에게 물려보고 싶나요?
1300200055.english: Do you want to be bitten by that small, cute dolphin?

1300200056.korean: 좋은데? 오랜만에 같이 놀아주는 것도 나쁘지 않지.
1300200056.english: That's nice. It's not bad to hang out together for the first time in a while.

1300200057.korean: 어때? 산책이라도 나갈까? 아쉽게도 육지 산책이지만 말이야.
1300200057.english: How about it? Shall we go for a walk? Unfortunately, it's just a walk on land, though.

1300200061.korean: 아무렇지도 않은 것처럼 이야기하고 있지만 여전하군.
1300200061.english: You're talking as if nothing is wrong, but you're still the same.

1300200063.english: I mean that look in your eyes, yearning for revenge.

1300200064.english: It looks like your resolve from back then hasn't changed, right?

1300200068.korean: 결심이 변할 거라면 이곳에 오지도 복수를 위한 준비도 하지 않았을 거예요.
1300200068.english: If my resolve were going to change, I wouldn't have come here or prepared for revenge.

1300200069.english: I haven't forgotten for a single day.

1300200070.korean: 피를 흘리며 나를 지키기 위해 움직이는 마이아 언니
1300200070.english: Sister Maia, moving to protect me while bleeding

1300200071.korean: 델타와 싸우다가 목숨을 잃은 머메이드 언니들
1300200071.english: The mermaid sisters who lost their lives fighting Delta

1300200072.korean: 피를 흘리며 잔인하게 땅에 못 박혀 있던 알키오네 언니
1300200072.english: Sister Alcyone, who was cruelly nailed to the ground while bleeding.

1300200074.korean: 이 모든 것의 원흉인 델타의 얼굴도!
1300200074.english: And the face of Delta, the culprit behind all of this!

1300200075.korean: 그때 델타의 계략을 간파하지 못한 안일한 행동을 생각하면
1300200075.english: When I think about the complacent behavior of failing to see through Delta's scheme back then

1300200076.english: I feel angry at my own patheticness and stupidity.

1300200077.korean: 저는 무슨 수단을 해서라도…! 모든 걸 희생하더라도…!
1300200077.english: I will do whatever it takes…! Even if it means sacrificing everything…!

1300200078.english: I must defeat Delta with my own hands…!

1300200080.korean: 만일 방해하는 자가 있다면 그 누구라도 용서하지 않을 거예요.
1300200080.english: If anyone gets in my way, I will not forgive anyone.

1300200082.english: … that promise to hand over Delta’s head to me…

1300200084.korean: 그걸 위해서라면 당신의 부관이든 뭐든 할 테니까요.
1300200084.english: Because for that, I would do anything, even be your adjutant.

1300200085.korean: 그럼, 저는 할 일이 있어서 가보겠습니다.
1300200085.english: Well then, I have something to do, so I'll be going now.

1300200086.english: Make sure to keep your promise...

1300200088.english: So, even if it's small, an orca is still an orca?

1300200089.korean: 이런 일은 참모 녀석이 제격일 텐데... 여기에 없는 녀석에게 따져봐야 별수 없나.
1300200089.english: The aide would be perfect for this... I guess there's no point in arguing with someone who isn't here.

1300200090.korean: 지난번에 그렇게 큰소리를 쳐댔으니 지금쯤 날 쓰러트리기 위한 대책을 세우고 있을지도 모르지.
1300200090.english: Since you made such a fuss last time, you might be coming up with a plan to take me down by now.

1300200092.korean: 유능한 부관을 또 잃을 수는 없지.
1300200092.english: We can't lose another competent subordinate.

1300200094.korean: 그런데 이러면 또 자리를 비우게 될 텐데…
1300200094.english: But if I do this, I'll have to be away again...

1300200095.korean: 다음에 돌아왔을 때는 잔소리를 얼마나 듣게 되려나.
1300200095.english: I wonder how much nagging I'll have to hear when I come back next time.

1300300002.korean: 으… 뭐지? 누가 내 얘기라도 하나?
1300300002.english: Ugh... what is this? Is someone talking about me?

1300300003.english: Anyway, I heard it's around here...

1300300005.korean: 분명 문 아래쪽을 두드리면 된다고 했지?
1300300005.english: You clearly said to just knock on the bottom of the door, right?

1300300007.english: Excuse me, I came here at Mr. Werewolf's introduction.

1300300012.korean: 반드시 답을 찾을 것이다. 지금까지 그래왔듯이.
1300300012.english: I will surely find the answer. Just as I have always done.

1300300014.korean: 말로 들었을 때는 설마 했는데 정말로 오르카에 이런 장소가 있을 줄이야.
1300300014.english: When I heard about it, I couldn't believe it, but I never imagined there would actually be a place like this in Orca.

1300300015.korean: 여기에 오면 '그 물건'을 구할 수 있다고 들었는데 정말이야?
1300300015.english: I heard that I can get 'that item' if I come here. Is that true?

1300300020.english: Hehe, I'm really looking forward to that.

1300300021.korean: 우선 맛보기로... 자, 이번 달 신작이야.
1300300021.english: First, as a preview... Here, this is this month's new release.

1300300023.english: Heh... So this is what the usual Arthur feels like.

1300300024.english: Hehehe, your smiling face is so cute!

1300300025.english: If you want, there's also this.

1300300026.english: Th-how could this be? Even a scene like this...

1300300027.korean: 이게 바로 아서의 엑스칼리버… 꿀꺽… 크고 아름다워…
1300300027.english: This is Arthur's Excalibur... *gulp*... Big and beautiful...

1300300028.english: I'll get this too! How much do you want?

1300300030.korean: 좋은 건 모두와 공유해야 하지 않겠어?
1300300030.english: Shouldn't we share good things with everyone?

1300300031.korean: 다만, 더욱 많은 동포를 늘리기 위해 힘을 써줬으면 좋겠어.
1300300031.english: However, I hope you will put in effort to increase the number of our compatriots even more.

1300300032.english: Of course! Good things should be spread far and wide!

1300300034.korean: 그럼, 멀린 네가 원하던 물건 말인데…
1300300034.english: So then, Merlin, about the item you wanted...

1300300036.english: I got this with difficulty, so please cherish it.

1300300038.english: So many photos of the Captain…

1300300039.korean: 두 눈으로 직접 봤을 때도 멋졌지만 사진으로도 너무 멋져…!
1300300039.english: It was amazing when I saw it with my own eyes, but it looks incredible in the photos too…!

1300300040.korean: 이 멀린, 다시 한번 쓰러져도 여한은 없다.
1300300040.english: This Merlin, I have no regrets even if I fall once again.

1300300041.english: You think it's too early to collapse already?

1300300042.english: Because there is still a trump card left.

1300300046.korean: 이건 말도 안 돼… 이런 게 실존할 수가 있다고?
1300300046.english: This is unbelievable... Can something like this really exist?

1300300047.korean: 믿어지지 않아. 나는 지금 꿈이라도 보고 있는 건가?
1300300047.english: I can't believe it. Am I dreaming?

1300300048.korean: 대장님의 친필 사인이 들어간 초근접 전신 샷 사진이라고…
1300300048.english: It’s a super close-up full-body shot with the Captain’s handwritten signature…

1300300049.korean: 틀림없어, 이건 진짜야. 내가 대장님의 사인을 몰라볼 리가 없어.
1300300049.english: There's no doubt about it, this is real. There's no way I wouldn't recognize the Captain's sign.

1300300051.korean: 실은 얼마 전에 정찰하다가 포세이돈 함대와 마주쳤거든.
1300300051.english: Actually, I ran into Poseidon's fleet while scouting a while ago.

1300300052.english: I intended to take a photo just for reporting purposes, but

1300300053.korean: 갑자기 갑판에 레모네이드 감마가 나오더니 나에게 내려오라고 손짓하는 게 아니겠어?
1300300053.english: Suddenly, Lemonade Gamma appeared on the deck and gestured for me to come down.

1300300054.english: You mean you went down there?

1300300055.korean: 다시 생각해도 참 겁 없는 짓을 했다고는 생각하는데…
1300300055.english: Even thinking about it again, I do think I did something really reckless...

1300300056.korean: 그때는 뭐라고 해야 할까? 이끌렸다고 해야 하나?
1300300056.english: What should I say about that time? Should I say I was drawn to it?

1300300057.korean: 레모네이드 감마를 보는 순간 매우 친숙한 느낌이 들었거든.
1300300057.english: The moment I saw Lemonade Gamma, I felt a very sense of familiarity.

1300300058.korean: 분명 처음 보는 사이일 텐데 오래 알고 지내던 사이처럼 말이지.
1300300058.english: It's obvious they're meeting for the first time, but it's like they've known each other for a long time.

1300300059.korean: 후후, 대장님에게 그런 마성이 있긴 하지.
1300300059.english: Hehe, the Captain does have that kind of charm.

1300300060.korean: 그래서 내려간 김에 사진을 왕창 찍고 왔지!
1300300060.english: So, since I was down there anyway, I took tons of photos!

1300300061.korean: 그 늠름한 모습에 하마터면 칸 대장님 포에버의 마음이 흔들릴 뻔했지 뭐야.
1300300061.english: That dignified appearance almost swayed Captain Khan Forever's heart.

1300300062.korean: 아무튼! 고생한 결과 친필 사인이 들어간 사진을 손에 넣었던 말씀!
1300300062.english: Anyway! As a result of all the hard work, I managed to get my hands on a photo with an autograph!

1300300063.korean: 크으… 그걸 버텨내다니 제법인데? 대장님의 매력에서 벗어나기 쉽지 않았을 텐데.
1300300063.english: Phew... To endure that, you're pretty good. It wouldn't have been easy to break free from the Captain's charm.

1300300064.korean: 나의 칸 대장님을 향한 마음이 그렇게 쉽게 변할 리가 없잖아?
1300300064.english: There's no way my feelings for Captain Khan would change that easily, right?

1300300065.korean: 나는 무슨 일이 있어도 칸 대장님을 향한 마음은 절대 변하지 않을 거야.
1300300065.english: No matter what happens, my feelings for Captain Khan will never change.

1300300066.korean: 그런 의미에서 이 사진은 너에게 줄게.
1300300066.english: In that sense, I'll give you this photo.

1300300067.english: Because I was told by Gamma to pass this on to you in the first place.

1300300069.korean: 자기 팬에게 주는 서비스라고 하더라 얼마 전에는 주지 못했다면서.
1300300069.english: They said it's a service for their fans, mentioning that they couldn't give it to them recently.

1300300071.korean: 다시 결심했어. 나는 반드시 아서를 이기게 해서 대장님을 오르카로 데려올 거야.
1300300071.english: I've made up my mind again. I will definitely make Arthur win and bring the Captain to Orca.

1300300074.korean: 만약 대장님이 오르카에 합류해서… 그렇게 되면…
1300300074.english: If the Captain joins Orca… then…

1300300075.korean: 아서와 대장님이 그렇고 그런 사이가 될 수도…?
1300300075.english: Arthur and the Captain might end up in a relationship...?

1300300077.english: Hahaha, Merlin... you've finally reached it, too.

1300300078.korean: 저와 같은 지켜보는 자의 기쁨이라는 깨달음의 경지에!
1300300078.english: To the state of realization known as the joy of an observer like myself!

1300300079.korean: 이 감정, 이 욕망… 바로 이게 네가 늘 바라보는 저 너머의 풍경인 거야?
1300300079.english: This emotion, this desire… is this exactly the landscape beyond that you always gaze at?

1300300080.korean: 당황하지 않아도 괜찮아. 내가 옆에서 도와줄 테니까.
1300300080.english: It's okay not to panic. I'll be right by your side to help.

1300300081.korean: 시간은 많아. 나와 함께 차근차근 하나씩 알아가보자.
1300300081.english: We have plenty of time. Let's learn things step by step together.

1300300082.korean: 우선 이 사령관님 모음 영상1부터 시작해 볼까?
1300300082.english: First, shall we start with Commander Lee's compilation video 1?

1300400001.korean: - 길을 걷는 도중 나는 알 수 없는 싸늘한 감각에 온몸에 소름이 돋았다.
1300400001.english: While walking down the street, I got goosebumps all over my body from an inexplicable, cold sensation.

1300400002.korean: 주인님? 왜 그래, 갑자기 이상한 소리를 다 내고?
1300400002.english: Master? What's wrong? Why are you suddenly making such strange noises?

1300400003.korean: 안색이 안 좋은데 괜찮아? 일단 오르카로 다시 돌아갈까?
1300400003.english: You look unwell. Are you okay? Shall we go back to Orca for now?

1300400004.korean: - 뭐라 표현할 수 없는 오싹한 감각에 나는 식은땀을 흘렸다.
1300400004.english: I broke out in a cold sweat from an indescribable, spine-chilling sensation.

1300400005.korean: - 마치 이 세상에 태어나서는 안 될 새로운 악이 탄생했을 때 이런 느낌이 아닐까 싶은 감각이다.
1300400005.english: It is a sensation that feels just like when a new evil, which should never have been born into this world, is created.

1300400006.english: - … It’s not like something was really born, right...?

1300400007.korean: 정말 괜찮은 거 맞지? 어디 아픈 건 아니지?
1300400007.english: You're really okay, right? You're not sick, are you?

1300400010.english: Because I'm on a date with my master!

1300400011.korean: 오히려 기쁘지 않다면 여러 가지 의미로 벌받을지도 몰라.
1300400011.english: If you are not happy, you might be punished in many ways.

1300400012.english: And because I've returned to my hometown after a long time.

1300400013.english: Even if it's only been a month or two, it feels like a really long time for me.

1300400014.korean: 몰타를 떠나 다른 곳으로 나가보는 것도 이번이 처음이었고.
1300400014.english: It was also my first time leaving Malta to go somewhere else.

1300400015.korean: 분명 그렇게 길지 않은 기간인데 엄청난 모험을 하고 돌아온 기분이야.
1300400015.english: It certainly wasn't that long, but I feel like I've returned from a tremendous adventure.

1300400016.english: Yeah, a lot of things happened.

1300400017.korean: 이렇게 다시 돌아올 거라고는 생각하지 못했는데…
1300400017.english: I never thought I would come back like this…

1300400021.english: Thank you for granting my unreasonable request this time.

1300400022.korean: 왜 주인님이 사과하는 거야? 후후, 이상해.
1300400022.english: Why is Master apologizing? Hehe, that's strange.

1300400024.english: … You know, sometimes I think about it.

1300400025.korean: 주인님이 몰타에 찾아와 꿈속에 빠진 나를 깨워주지 않았다면 어떻게 됐을까 하고…
1300400025.english: I wonder what would have happened if my master hadn't come to Malta and woke me from my dream...

1300400026.korean: 분명 아직도 진실을 받아들이지 못하고 꿈속에서 해매고 있었겠지.
1300400026.english: He must have still not been able to accept the truth and was wandering in his dreams.

1300400027.korean: 그랬다면 멜 공주, 시아시아, 엠피, 갈라테아와 다시 재회하지 못했을 거고
1300400027.english: If that had happened, I wouldn't have been able to reunite with Princess Mel, Siacia, Empy, and Galatea.

1300400028.english: You probably wouldn't have been able to meet everyone in Orca, either.

1300400029.korean: 물론 주인님과 이렇게 데이트하는 건 꿈에서도 못했겠지!
1300400029.english: Of course, you probably never even dreamed of going on a date like this with your master!

1300400030.korean: 그러니까 이 모든 걸 전부 다 포함해서 고마워, 주인님. 날 꿈에서 깨워줘서.
1300400030.english: So, thank you for everything, including all of this, Master. For waking me up from my dream.

1300400031.korean: 에헤헤, 이제 와서 뭔가 새삼스럽네... 그냥 말해보고 싶었어!
1300400031.english: Hehehe, it feels kind of strange coming up now... I just wanted to say it!

1300400032.korean: 자, 어서 가보자. 모두가 기다리고 있을 거야.
1300400032.english: Alright, let's go. Everyone will be waiting.

1300400033.korean: 응, 왜 그래 주인님? 혹시 다시 상태가 안 좋아지기라도 했어?
1300400033.english: Yeah, what's wrong, Master? Did your condition get worse again by any chance?

1300400034.korean: - 라며 나는 오르카에서 나올 때부터 내 몸을 휘감고 있는 알키오네의 꼬리를 바라보았다.
1300400034.english: "- Saying this, I gazed at Alcyone's tail that had been wrapped around my body since I came out of the Orca."

1300400035.korean: 웅… 꼭 놓지 않으면 안 돼?
1300400035.english: Hmm... can't I really not let go?

1300400036.korean: 그럼 잡고 있을래! 오늘은 주인님과 데이트이기도 하고!
1300400036.english: Then I'll hold on! It's a date with Master today, after all!

1300400037.korean: 데이트하는 두 사람은 손을 잡고 다니잖아?
1300400037.english: People who are on a date walk around holding hands, right?

1300400039.english: - It’s still a hard sensibility to understand…

1300400042.english: It's okay. I just suddenly got goosebumps.

1300400043.korean: 정말 괜찮으니까 그런 표정 짓지 마.
1300400043.english: I'm really fine, so don't make that face.

1300400044.english: Sorry for stopping, let's start again.

1300400046.korean: 오랜만이라니 한두 달 정도 지났을 뿐인데?
1300400046.english: You say it's been a while? It's only been a month or two.

1300400048.korean: 아니야, 진작에 내가 해줬어야 하는 일인걸.
1300400048.english: No, I should have done that a long time ago.

1300400049.korean: 오히려 더 빨리해 주지 않아서 미안해.
1300400049.english: I'm actually sorry I couldn't do it faster.

1300400053.english: Uh… it’s not necessarily like that.

1300500001.korean: - 잠시 후, 알키오네와 도착한 목적지에는 선객이 와 있었다.
1300500001.english: A short while later, passengers were already at the destination where Alcyone and I had arrived.

1300500003.korean: 오, 늦었구나! 알키오네. 먼저 실례하고 있었다.
1300500003.english: Oh, you're late! Alcyone. I was being polite first.

1300500004.english: Salasia and the others went ahead.

1300500005.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 멜리테가 가리킨 곳에는 세 송이의 꽃이 놓여 있었다.
1300500005.english: As she said that, three flowers were placed where Melite pointed.

1300500006.korean: - 그리고 멜리테는 조용히 다가가 들고 있던 꽃을 내려놓고 눈을 감았다.
1300500006.english: Then, Melite quietly approached, put down the flower she was holding, and closed her eyes.

1300500007.korean: ...이야기는 들었다 제독, 그대가 이 일을 진행했다지? 정말 고맙다.
1300500007.english: ...I heard the story, Admiral. I heard you carried this out? Thank you very much.

1300500008.korean: 아하핫, 그래도 그대가 도움을 주었다는 것에는 변함이 없지.
1300500008.english: Ahaha, but the fact remains that you helped.

1300500010.korean: 알키오네의 부탁이 없었어도 늦든 빠르든 내가 알고 있는 그대라면 멋대로 진행했을 거로 생각하는데 어떤가?
1300500010.english: Even without Alcyone's request, I believe that sooner or later, the you I know would have proceeded as you pleased. What do you think?

1300500011.korean: 어찌 됐든, 그대는 감사받을 일을 해주었다는 거다.
1300500011.english: In any case, the point is that you did something to be thankful for.

1300500012.english: Thank you so much once again.

1300500015.korean: 인사는 먼저 끝냈으니까. 쌓인 말이라면 많기야 하지만 그건 다음에 왔을 때 풀기로 하고...
1300500015.english: Since I already finished the introductions. I certainly have a lot to say, but let's save that for next time...

1300500017.korean: 응…? 왜 그래 내 얼굴을 빤히 보고?
1300500017.english: Huh...? What's wrong? Why are you staring at my face?

1300500018.korean: 분위기 좋은 두 사람을 방해할 정도로 눈치가 없지는 않거든.
1300500018.english: I'm not so clueless as to interrupt the good mood between two people.

1300500019.korean: - 라며 멜리테는 나를 휘감은 알키오네의 꼬리를 보고 웃었다.
1300500019.english: "-" Melite said, laughing as she looked at Alcyone's tail wrapped around me.

1300500020.korean: 앗, 이건 그러니까… 우으… 뭐라 할 말이 없네…
1300500020.english: Ah, this is... well... Ugh... I'm at a loss for words...

1300500021.korean: - 알키오네는 부끄러운지 허둥대며 나에게서 꼬리를 떼어냈다.
1300500021.english: Alcyone hurriedly pulled her tail away from me, as if embarrassed.

1300500022.korean: 아하핫, 그 알키오네의 이런 귀여운 모습을 보게 되다니 오래 살고 볼 일이군!
1300500022.english: Ahaha, to see Alcyone looking this cute... I guess I've lived long enough to see everything!

1300500023.korean: 그럼 가보겠네. 제독, 나중에 오늘 알키오네의 귀여웠던 점을 알려주게
1300500023.english: Well then, I'll be going. Admiral, tell me later about what was cute about Alcyone today.

1300500024.korean: 오, 역시 제독이야. 잘 알고 있는걸.
1300500024.english: Oh, as expected of an Admiral. You know it well.

1300500025.korean: 주, 주인님! 멜 공주도 지금 둘이 날 놀리는 거지!
1300500025.english: M-Master! Princess Mel and the two of you are just teasing me, aren't you!

1300500026.english: If you keep doing that, I'm going to get angry!

1300500027.english: Ahaha~ Alcyone, see you later, Admiral!

1300500028.english: Seriously… running away is really fast.

1300500030.korean: - 알키오네는 작게 한숨을 내쉬고는 조금 전 멜리테가 꽃을 놓은 곳으로 다가갔다.
1300500030.english: Alcyone let out a small sigh and approached the spot where Melite had placed the flowers a moment ago.

1300500031.korean: - 그러고는 자신이 들고 온 꽃을 똑같이 묘비 앞에 내려놓으며 눈을 감았다.
1300500031.english: Then, placing the flowers he had brought down in front of the tombstone just like the ones he had brought, he closed his eyes.

1300500032.korean: 마이아 언니, 엘렉트라 언니, 아스타로페, 타이게테, 켈라이노…
1300500032.english: Sister Maia, Sister Electra, Astarope, Taygete, Celaino…

1300500034.korean: 음, 분명 하고 싶은 말이 엄청 많았는데… 막상 하려니까 입이 잘 떨어지지 않네.
1300500034.english: Hmm, I definitely had so much I wanted to say... but now that I'm actually trying to do it, the words just won't come out.

1300500035.korean: 나는 잘 지내고 있어. 지금까지 대부분 잠만 자고 있었지만…
1300500035.english: I'm doing well. I've mostly just been sleeping so far, though…

1300500037.korean: 타이게테와 켈라이노 두 사람에게는 감사하고 있어.
1300500037.english: I am grateful to Taigete and Celaino.

1300500038.korean: 너희가 아니었다면 몰타에 남아 있던 바이오로이드들의 큰 희생이 있었을 거야.
1300500038.english: If it weren't for you, there would have been a great sacrifice among the bioroids remaining in Malta.

1300500039.korean: 아스타로페… 미안해. 네가 얼마나 엘렉트라 언니를 따르고 있는지는 알고 있었는데…
1300500039.english: Astarophe… I’m sorry. I knew how much you looked up to Electra…

1300500040.korean: 네가 혼자 가지 않도록 말렸어야 했어…
1300500040.english: I should have stopped you so you wouldn't go alone...

1300500041.korean: 엘렉트라 언니, 그때 머메이드 애들에게 화를 냈을 때 진심이 아니라는 건 모두 알고 있어.
1300500041.english: Sister Electra, we all know that you didn't mean it when you got angry at the mermaids back then.

1300500042.korean: 나도 언니가 우리 가족을 얼마나 아끼는지 알고 있어. 그때 같이 가지 않아서 정말 미안해.
1300500042.english: I know how much you cherish our family. I'm really sorry I couldn't go with you back then.

1300500046.english: Asking to lead the sisters well…

1300500047.english: I was told to protect everyone... I promised...

1300500048.korean: - 나는 알키오네에게 다가가 떨리는 손을 잡아주었다.
1300500048.english: I approached Alcyone and held her trembling hand.

1300500050.english: Grabbing my hand while taking the opportunity... that's rude.

1300500051.english: That's too much. I'm telling you, it's a sensitive issue.

1300500052.english: Yeah, I've calmed down. Thank you.

1300500053.english: Oh, right, let me introduce my master.

1300500054.korean: 일 중독자에 난봉꾼에 호색가에 가끔 무슨 생각을 하는지 알 수 없는 사람이야.
1300500054.english: He is a workaholic, a womanizer, a lecher, and sometimes you can't tell what he's thinking.

1300500055.english: However, even though he is that kind of person…

1300500056.korean: 언제나 곁에 있고 싶을 정도로 정말 멋져.
1300500056.english: You're so cool that I want to be by your side all the time.

1300500057.korean: 그리고 우리 자매를 대신해서 델타에게 복수를 해주셨어.
1300500057.english: And you avenged Delta on behalf of my sister.

1300500058.korean: 그러니까 내 걱정은 하지 않아도 괜찮아. 앞으로는 주인님과 함께 나아갈 테니까.
1300500058.english: So you don't have to worry about me. I will move forward with you, Master, from now on.

1300500059.korean: 아, 메로페가 무사하다는 것도 알았어. 지금 어디에 있는지도 알았고.
1300500059.english: Ah, I also found out that Merope is safe. And I know where she is right now.

1300500060.korean: 정말이지 우리 귀여운 막내, 멋대로 위험한 짓을 하고 말이야.
1300500060.english: Seriously, our cute youngest one is doing dangerous things on his own.

1300500061.korean: 메로페 이 바보를 잡은 다음 꼬리를 잔뜩 때려서 정신 차리게 할 거야.
1300500061.english: I'm going to catch this idiot Meropé and beat his tail hard to make him come to his senses.

1300500063.korean: 그럼, 모두 또 올게. 다음에 올 때는 반드시 메로페도 데려올 테니까.
1300500063.english: Well then, I’ll all come again. I’ll definitely bring Merope next time, too.

1300500064.korean: - 인사를 마친 알키오네는 웃으며 나를 바라보았고 잡고 있는 손에서는 강하게 힘이 느껴졌다.
1300500064.english: After finishing her greeting, Alcyone looked at me with a smile, and I could feel a strong grip in the hand she was holding.

1300500065.english: Yeah, so from now on, it's just the two of us.

1300500066.korean: 알키오네는 내 손을 잡은 상태 그대로 꼬리로 내 몸을 다시 휘감았다.
1300500066.english: Alcyone wrapped her tail around my body again, still holding my hand.

1300500067.english: Because the date isn't over yet.

1300500068.korean: 게다가 플레이아데스의 묘비를 만들고 싶다는 내 부탁까지 들어줬으면서 이대로 그냥 넘어갈 거라고 생각한건 아니지?
1300500068.english: Besides, you even granted my request to make a tombstone for the Pleiades; you didn't really think I would just let this slide, did you?

1300500069.korean: 오늘 하루 동안은 절대 놓지 않을 거야. 헤헷 도망칠 생각이라면 포기해.
1300500069.english: I'm not going to let go for today. Hehe. If you're thinking of running away, give up.

1300500072.korean: 들어 올렸어? 몸에는 내 꼬리를 감고 한쪽 손은 잡고 있는데? 한쪽 팔만으로 정말?
1300500072.english: Did you lift it up? It has my tail wrapped around its body and is holding onto one hand. Really, with just one arm?

1300500073.korean: 설마, 나는 정말 위험한 걸 건드리고 만 건가…?
1300500073.english: Could it be... did I really just mess with something dangerous...?

1300500077.korean: 당신에게 먼저 이렇게 연락이 올 줄은 몰랐어요.
1300500077.english: I didn't expect you to reach out to me first like this.

1300500078.korean: 아무리 생각해도 좋은 이야기가 나올 것 같지는 않으니 이대로 무시하고 싶지만…
1300500078.english: No matter how much I think about it, it doesn't seem like a good story will come out of it, so I want to just ignore it like this, but...

1300500079.korean: 당신 상대로는 그럴 수도 없는 노릇이겠죠.
1300500079.english: I suppose that wouldn't be possible against you.

1300500084.english: If there was anything cute about it, it was the whole thing from beginning to end.

1300500086.english: I don't know that kind of sensibility.

1300500087.english: Have you calmed down a little?

1300500089.english: Are you done with the greetings?

1300500091.english: Running away? Me? There's no way.

1300500092.english: Because he is a workaholic, a womanizer, and a lecher!

1300600001.english: There it is! It's Poseidon's fleet!

1300600002.korean: 그렇다면 저기에 대장님이 타고 계신다는 거겠지?
1300600002.english: Then that means the Captain is riding over there, right?

1300600003.korean: 대장님이 직접 오르카로 찾아오신다니… 이건 꿈인가!? 꿈인 건가!?
1300600003.english: To think the Captain is coming to Orca in person… Is this a dream!? Is this a dream!?

1300600004.korean: 그렇지만 아서! 대장님이 오르카로 찾아온다니 이건 초 대박 사건이라고?
1300600004.english: But Arthur! The Captain is coming to Orca? That's a super huge deal, right?

1300600005.korean: - 덕분에 내 머릿속도 초 대박 혼란 상태지만…
1300600005.english: Thanks to that, my mind is in a state of total chaos, but…

1300600006.korean: 우흐흐, 이거 생각보다 내 목표가 빨리 이루어질지도 모르겠는데?
1300600006.english: Hehehe, I think my goal might be achieved sooner than I thought?

1300600007.korean: - 알파에게 감마로부터 연락이 왔다는 보고를 들은 다음 날.
1300600007.english: - The day after hearing the report from Alpha that he had received contact from Gamma.

1300600008.korean: - 직접 몰타로 느닷없이 찾아오겠다는 말에 나는 감마가 오는 걸 기다리고 있었다.
1300600008.english: I was waiting for Gamma to come to Malta, having heard that he would come in person out of the blue.

1300600009.korean: 죄송해요, 주인님. 그 부분은 파악하지 못했어요.
1300600009.english: I'm sorry, Master. I didn't realize that part.

1300600010.korean: 일방적으로 찾아가겠다는 말만 하고 연락을 끊은 거라…
1300600010.english: Since they unilaterally said they would visit and then cut off contact…

1300600011.korean: 절대라고는 말씀드릴 수는 없지만, 그럴 가능성은 작을 거예요.
1300600011.english: I can't say for sure, but the possibility is small.

1300600012.korean: 감마가 아무리 싸움을 좋아하는 전투광이라지만 주인님도 아시다시피 공과 사는 구분할 줄 알거든요.
1300600012.english: Even though Gamma is a battle maniac who loves fighting, as you know, Master, he knows how to distinguish between public and private matters.

1300600013.english: Last time you said personal matters come first...

1300600014.korean: 이렇게 사전에 연락했다는 점이 그 증거에요.
1300600014.english: The fact that they contacted each other in advance is proof of that.

1300600015.korean: 정말로 싸울 목적이라면 연락도 하지 않고 찾아와 공격을 시작했겠죠.
1300600015.english: If their real intention was to fight, they would have shown up and started the attack without even contacting me.

1300600016.korean: - 확실히, 감마의 성격을 생각하면 사전 연락까지 하고 찾아와서 전투를 한다는 건 부자연스럽다.
1300600016.english: Certainly, considering Gamma's personality, it is unnatural for him to contact us in advance and come to fight.

1300600017.korean: - 그렇다면 생각할 수 있는 다른 용무는…
1300600017.english: In that case, other matters that come to mind are…

1300600018.korean: 주인님, 무슨 일이 있을지 모르니 제 곁에서 떨어지지 말아 주세요.
1300600018.english: Master, please do not leave my side, as you never know what might happen.

1300600019.korean: 본래라면 감마와 주인님이 직접 대면하게 두고 싶지 않습니다만…
1300600019.english: Ideally, I wouldn't want Gamma and the Master to meet face-to-face, but...

1300600020.korean: 아아, 그 어떤 상대라도 절대 등을 보이지 않는 주인님의 모습… 정말 멋져요…
1300600020.english: Ah, Master, never turning your back on anyone... that's truly cool...

1300600021.korean: 걱정 마! 주인님은 내가 반드시 지켜보일 테니까.
1300600021.english: Don't worry! I will definitely protect you, Master.

1300600022.english: Arthur! Over there, on the deck of the Poseidon!

1300600023.korean: - 멀린의 외침에 저 멀리 함대 쪽을 바라보자 가장 앞에 있는 함선의 갑판에서 사람의 윤곽이 보였다.
1300600023.english: At Merlin's shout, looking toward the fleet in the distance, a human outline was visible on the deck of the ship at the very front.

1300600024.korean: - 저쪽에서도 우리의 모습이 확인됐는지 이쪽을 바라보았다.
1300600024.english: They looked this way from over there as well, perhaps having confirmed our presence.

1300600025.korean: 꺄아~ 대장님이야! 날 보셨어! 날 쳐다보셨어!
1300600025.english: Kyaaa~ It's the Captain! He saw me! He looked at me!

1300600026.korean: 갑판에 서서 뭘 하려는 거지? 손이라도 흔들 셈인가?
1300600026.english: What are you trying to do standing on the deck? Are you planning to wave?

1300600027.korean: - 그때 이쪽을 바라보던 감마는 갑자기 살짝 숙이는 자세를 취했다.
1300600027.english: At that moment, Gamma, who had been looking this way, suddenly assumed a slightly bowed posture.

1300600028.korean: - 마치 무언가 행동 하려는 예비 동작…
1300600028.english: - Like a preparatory movement to perform something…

1300600030.korean: - 그 직후, 함선이 기울어질 정도의 충격과 함께 레모네이드 감마는 그대로 '도약'했다.
1300600030.english: Immediately after that, with an impact strong enough to tilt the ship, Lemonade Gamma 'leaped' straight ahead.

1300600031.korean: - 그리고 빠른 속도로 수백 미터에 이르는 거리를 넘어…
1300600031.english: - And at a rapid speed, over a distance of hundreds of meters…

1300600032.korean: - 땅이 흔들릴 정도의 엄청난 충격과 함께 우리들의 눈앞에 착지했다.
1300600032.english: It landed right before our eyes with a tremendous impact, enough to shake the ground.

1300600033.english: Hahaha, long time no see, Commander of Orca.

1300600035.korean: 재미없는 경호원에 몰타의 범고래… 내 옛 부관 녀석도 같이 있군.
1300600035.english: A boring bodyguard and a Maltese killer... My old lieutenant is with them too.

1300600036.korean: 이렇게 요란하게 등장했다는 건 전투 의사가 있다는 걸로 간주해도 되겠지?
1300600036.english: The fact that they made such a commotion means I can assume they have the will to fight, right?

1300600037.korean: 적진으로 들어가는 건데 이 정도 위협은 해야 하지 않겠어?
1300600037.english: We're entering enemy territory, so shouldn't we pose at least this much of a threat?

1300600038.korean: 오히려 나에게 감사하라고 내가 마음만 먹었으면 이 주변을 초토화하면서 내려왔을 테니까.
1300600038.english: If I had only made up my mind to be grateful to me, I would have come down devastating the surrounding area.

1300600039.korean: 흠, 보이지는 않지만 수십… 아니 백 명은 족히 넘는 것 같군.
1300600039.english: Hmm, I can't see them, but there seem to be dozens... no, well over a hundred.

1300600040.korean: 기껏 손님이 찾아왔는데 이런 대접이라면 섭섭하지.
1300600040.english: It’s disappointing to be treated like this after going to all the trouble to visit.

1300600041.korean: 낌새가 금방이라도 나에게 달려들 것 같은데. 주의를 좀 줘야 하지 않겠어?
1300600041.english: It looks like it's about to pounce on me any moment. Shouldn't you warn it?

1300600042.korean: 한번 해보자는 거면 나야 환영이지만 말이지?
1300600042.english: If you want to give it a try, I’d welcome it, you know?

1300600043.korean: - 감마의 말에 나는 한숨을 쉬며 패널을 들었다.
1300600043.english: At Gamma's words, I sighed and picked up the panel.

1300600045.korean: 하핫, 다른 누구도 아닌 이 나를 상대하는 거니까 이 정도는 당연한가?
1300600045.english: Haha, since you're dealing with me, of all people, is this to be expected?

1300600046.korean: 그나저나 용 녀석이 안 보이는데 어디에 있지? 설마 숨어있을 리는 없고.
1300600046.english: Anyway, I don't see the dragon. Where could it be? Surely it can't be hiding.

1300600047.korean: 그거 아쉽군, 녀석이 카페를 한다길래 커피라도 하나 내려달라고 할까 했는데.
1300600047.english: That's a shame. I heard he runs a cafe, so I was thinking of asking him to make me a coffee.

1300600048.korean: 뭐야, 쩨쩨하게 굴지 말자고. 손님에게 커피 한잔 정도는 내려줄 수 있잖아?
1300600048.english: Hey, let's not be stingy. You can at least make a customer a cup of coffee, right?

1300600049.korean: 대장님 다시 한번 오르카에 오시는 걸 생각해 보시는 게 어때요?
1300600049.english: Captain, why don't you consider coming back to Orca?

1300600050.korean: 그럼 무용 대장님이 내려주시는 커피를 마음껏 마실 수 있다고요!
1300600050.english: Then you can drink as much coffee as you want from the dance leader!

1300600051.korean: 그리고 대장님과 아서가 그렇고 그런 사이가 돼서… 나는 그걸 지켜보고… 우흐흐…
1300600051.english: And the Captain and Arthur got into that kind of relationship... so I watched it... Hehehe...

1300600053.korean: 너희 오르카에서는 대체 뭘 가르치고 있는 거냐? 얘가 가면 갈수록 이상해지고 있는데?
1300600053.english: What on earth are you guys teaching at Orca? This kid is getting weirder and weirder as time goes on.

1300600054.korean: 허, 친구는 가려서 사귀라고 그렇게 말했는데…
1300600054.english: Huh, I told you so many times to be picky about who you hang out with...

1300600056.english: It's been a while since I've seen the orcas of Malta.

1300600057.korean: 그때 했던 이야기는 잘 지키고 있으니까 안심해.
1300600057.english: Rest assured, I am keeping my word from back then.

1300600058.korean: 하고 싶은 말이 많은 건 알겠지만, 지금은 넘어가자고
1300600058.english: I know you have a lot to say, but let's move on for now.

1300600059.korean: 싫어도 그쪽 이야기를 하게 될 것 같으니까.
1300600059.english: Because it seems like I’ll end up talking about that even if I don’t want to.

1300600060.korean: 그래, 네가 생각하는 대로야 오르카의 사령관.
1300600060.english: Yeah, just as you think, Commander of Orca.

1300600061.korean: 저 녀석의 동생이자 내 부관인 꼬맹이 때문이지.
1300600061.english: It's because of that kid, his younger brother and my subordinate.

1300600063.korean: 조만간 아주 큰 일이 일어날 수도 있어.
1300600063.english: Something very big could happen soon.

1300600064.korean: 뭐? 그게 무슨 말이야? 내 동생에게 무슨 일이 일어난 거야?
1300600064.english: What? What do you mean? What happened to my little brother?

1300600066.korean: 꼬맹이 그 녀석이 무슨 일을 일으킬지도 모른다는 거지.
1300600066.english: You know that little brat might cause some trouble.

1300600068.korean: 너희도 알다시피 꼬맹이는 델타에게 복수를 하기 위해 내 부관이 됐다.
1300600068.english: As you all know, the little kid became my subordinate to take revenge on Delta.

1300600069.korean: 나는 델타 녀석이 마음에 안 들기도 했고 개인적인 일도 있어서 말이야.
1300600069.english: I didn't like Delta, and I also had personal matters to attend to.

1300600070.korean: 언젠가 대립하게 될 테니 그때 델타의 목을 주겠다고 약속했거든.
1300600070.english: I promised to give Delta's head when we eventually face off.

1300600071.korean: 그런데 너희가 델타를 처리했으니… 꼬맹이는 복수의 대상이 없어진 셈이지.
1300600071.english: But since you guys took care of Delta... the kid is practically out of targets for revenge.

1300600072.korean: 그럼 그걸로 된 거 아니야? 복수할 대상이 없어졌다면 이제 돌아오면 되잖아!
1300600072.english: Then isn't that enough? If the person to take revenge on is gone, you can just come back now!

1300600073.korean: 그게 말처럼 쉽지 않아. 덩치 큰 꼬맹아.
1300600073.english: It's not as easy as it sounds, big kid.

1300600075.korean: 꼬맹이는 아직 델타가 죽은 줄 모르고 있어.
1300600075.english: The little kid still doesn't know that Delta is dead.

1300600076.korean: 지금도 매일 같이 델타를 죽이기 위해 복수의 칼날을 갈고 있지.
1300600076.english: Even now, I am sharpening the blade of revenge every day to kill Delta.

1300600079.korean: 나는 지금까지 복수라는 걸 셀 수도 없이 봤다. 내가 복수의 대상이 되는 걸 포함해서 말이야.
1300600079.english: I have seen revenge countless times. Including being the target of revenge myself.

1300600080.korean: 그런데 그 복수의 결말은 하나 같이 똑같더군. 복수에 실패하거나 할 수 없게 됐을 때도 마찬가지지.
1300600080.english: But the outcome of that revenge was exactly the same in every single one. It was the same even when the revenge failed or became impossible.

1300600081.korean: 다시는 일어설 수 없게 되거나, 자포자기로 바보 같은 행동을 하고, 최악의 경우 극단적인 선택을 하는 것도 봤어.
1300600081.english: I have seen people become unable to get back on their feet, act foolishly out of despair, and in the worst cases, make extreme choices.

1300600082.korean: 그 꼬맹이 녀석이 과연 그 결말을 받아들일 수 있을지 없을지는 안 봐도 뻔하지 않겠어?
1300600082.english: Isn't it obvious whether that little kid will be able to accept that ending?

1300600083.korean: 그렇게 되면 오직 한 녀석을 죽이기 위해 갈았던 칼날이 그 대상을 잃었을 때 어디를 향할지…
1300600083.english: In that case, where will the blade, sharpened solely to kill one guy, be headed when it loses its target...

1300600086.korean: 다만, 옆에서 마지막까지 결말을 지켜볼 뿐이지.
1300600086.english: I just watch the ending from the sidelines until the very end.

1300600088.korean: 그럼, 전할 말은 전부 했으니 난 이만 돌아가도록 하지.
1300600088.english: Well then, I’ve said everything I needed to say, so I’ll be going now.

1300600089.korean: 뭐야? 아직 더 할 말이 있나?
1300600089.english: What? Do you still have something more to say?

1300600091.korean: … ...응? 대장님? 갑자기 왜 저를 빤히 바라보시는…
1300600091.english: … …Huh? Captain? Why are you suddenly staring at me…

1300600092.english: I feel a bit shy when you look at me like that... Hehe

1300600093.korean: 글쎄, 이유는 나도 모르겠군. 편한 대로 생각하라고.
1300600093.english: Well, I don't know the reason either. Just think whatever you want.

1300600094.english: … Haha, he really is a disgusting fellow... Orca's commander…

1300600095.korean: 아무튼, 이걸로 용무는 끝이다. 용 녀석에게 안부 전해 달라고.
1300600095.english: Anyway, that's all for now. Just give my regards to that dragon.

1300600096.korean: - 감마는 그 말을 끝으로 더 이상 용무는 없다는 듯 자신의 함선쪽으로 걸어갔다.
1300600096.english: With those words, Gamma walked toward his ship as if he had no further business.

1300600097.korean: 감마와는 오랫동안 알고 지냈지만, 저런 행동을 보이는 건 저도 처음 봐요.
1300600097.english: I've known Gamma for a long time, but even I've never seen him act like that.

1300600099.english: Because I did, and Beta did.

1300600100.korean: 사령관님을 만나고 나서부터 그 영향으로 무언가 바뀌고 행동으로 나서는 계기가 되었죠.
1300600100.english: After meeting the Commander, I changed due to his influence, and it became the catalyst for me to take action.

1300600101.korean: …그 영향을 받지 못한 어리석은 아이도 있었지만요…
1300600101.english: … though there were also foolish children who were not affected by it…

1300600102.korean: 감마도 주인님에게 무언가 영향을 받은 게 아닐까요?
1300600102.english: Could it be that Gamma was also influenced by the Master in some way?

1300600106.english: It's not a dream, so calm down.

1300600107.english: It is certainly a massive hit...

1300600108.korean: 그래서, 감마는 무슨 일로 찾아온다는 거야?
1300600108.english: So, what is Gamma coming to visit for?

1300600109.english: Is there a possibility that a battle might break out?

1300600111.korean: 하지만 감마에게 얕보이고 싶은 마음이 전혀 없거든.
1300600111.english: But I have absolutely no desire to be looked down upon by Gamma.

1300600115.korean: 모두 대기해 싸울 의사는 없어 보여.
1300600115.english: Everyone stand by, but it doesn't look like there is any intention to fight.

1300600116.korean: 이건 내가 사과하지. 네가 온다는 말에 모두 긴장 중이거든.
1300600116.english: I'll apologize for this. Everyone is on edge because of the news that you're coming.

1300600117.english: If it's a dragon, go out on another mission.

1300600118.english: Dragon Coffee is exclusive to Orca members.

1300600120.english: It seems like Talonfeather's influence. I'll give you a warning...

1300600121.english: As expected, the reason you came to see me is…

1300600123.korean: 어째서 델타가 죽었다고 알리지 않는 거야?
1300600123.english: Why aren't you telling us that Delta is dead?

1300600124.korean: 그래서 무슨 일이 일어날지 모른다는 건가…
1300600124.english: So you're saying we don't know what might happen...

1300600125.english: Gamma, what are you trying to do?

1300600128.english: Why did you tell us this fact?

1300600133.english: ...Alpha, could you gather a few people?

1300600134.english: I think we need to have a meeting.

1300700001.korean: - 감마로부터 메로페의 상황을 전달받고서 몇 시간 후, 나는 일부 인원을 소집해 회의를 열었다.
1300700001.english: A few hours after receiving news of Merope's situation from Gamma, I assembled a group and held a meeting.

1300700002.english: … This is the story I heard from Lemonade Gamma.

1300700003.korean: 정말 안타까운 일이 아닐 수 없군요.

1300700004.korean: 어려운 상황에 놓인 학생일수록 나쁜 길로 빠지지 않도록 이끄는 게 교육자의 책무인 것을…
1300700004.english: It is the duty of an educator to guide students, especially those in difficult situations, so that they do not stray down the wrong path…

1300700005.english: Lemonade Gamma is terrible as an educator.

1300700007.korean: 메로페… 그 아이가 지금까지 느꼈을 슬픔과 고뇌를 생각한다면 가슴이 아파와요.
1300700007.english: Merope… my heart aches when I think about the sadness and anguish that child must have felt until now.

1300700008.korean: 할 수만 있다면 지금 당장 달려가서 그 아이를 안아주고 싶어요.
1300700008.english: If only I could, I would run over right now and hug that child.

1300700009.korean: 플레이아데스 가디언 자매들에게 있었던 일. 그리고 갑작스러운 감마의 방문.
1300700009.english: What happened to the Pleiades Guardian sisters. And Gamma's sudden visit.

1300700010.korean: 이것들을 통해 예측했을 때 이런 일이지 않을까 생각했었는데…
1300700010.english: Based on these predictions, I thought it might be something like this...

1300700011.korean: 막상 이야기를 들으니 안타까운 마음이 드는 건 어쩔 수 없군요.
1300700011.english: Now that I've actually heard the story, I can't help but feel sorry for them.

1300700013.english: May I speak for a moment, Commander?

1300700014.korean: 우선 이번 일에 대해서는 이해했습니다. 대책을 세우기 위해 이렇게 필요한 인원이 모인 것도 타당하다고 생각합니다.
1300700014.english: First of all, I understand the situation. I believe it is reasonable that the necessary personnel have gathered to formulate countermeasures.

1300700015.korean: ...그런데 어째서 대테러 작전팀인 몽구스 팀의 작전관인 제가 이 회의에 불린 건가요?
1300700015.english: ...But why have I been called to this meeting, as the operations officer of the counter-terrorism operation team, the Mongoose Team?

1300700016.korean: 홍련 작전관은 이런 경험이 많다고 생각되어 제가 따로 부탁드렸습니다.
1300700016.english: I asked Operations Officer Hongryeon separately because I thought she had a lot of experience with this kind of thing.

1300700017.english: Excuse me, but what do you mean by experience…?

1300700018.korean: 얼마 전에도 문제를 일으킬 뻔한 아이를 잘 달랬다고 들었습니다.
1300700018.english: I heard that you managed to soothe a child who was about to cause trouble not long ago.

1300700020.korean: 이야기로는 사랑하는 엄마를 위해 한 행동이었다고…
1300700020.english: The story goes that it was an action done for his beloved mother...

1300700021.korean: 악의가 있었던 건 아닙니다. 아이들… 팀원들을 잘 관리하지 못한 제 책임입니다.
1300700021.english: I didn't mean any harm. It is my responsibility for failing to manage the kids... and the team members properly.

1300700022.korean: 알고 있습니다. 모두 엄마를 정말 좋아하는 착한 아이들이라는 걸.
1300700022.english: I know. That they are all good kids who really love their mom.

1300700023.korean: 그러니 그 아이들을 대하는 경험을 부디 이 자리에서 알려주셨으면 좋겠습니다.
1300700023.english: So, I would really appreciate it if you could share your experiences dealing with those children here.

1300700024.korean: …알겠습니다. 제가 말씀드릴 수 있는 부분이 있다면 알려드리겠습니다.
1300700024.english: … Understood. If there is anything I can tell you, I will let you know.

1300700025.korean: 그럼, 회의를 진행하겠습니다만, 그 전에 주인님에게 확인하고 싶은 게 있습니다.
1300700025.english: Then, I will proceed with the meeting, but before that, there is something I would like to confirm with the Master.

1300700026.korean: 주인님은, 감마의 부관인 메로페라는 아이를 어떻게 하고 싶으신 건가요?
1300700026.english: Master, what do you intend to do with the child named Merope, Gamma's subordinate?

1300700027.english: Alpha asked me a sharp question.

1300700028.korean: - 지금 이 회의의 내용에 따라서는 오르카 저항군 전체에 영향을 끼치는 큰 문제로 발전할지도 모른다.
1300700028.english: Depending on the outcome of this meeting, it could develop into a major problem affecting the entire Orca Resistance.

1300700029.korean: - 그렇게 되면 막대한 자원과 인력을 사용하게 될 수도 있다.
1300700029.english: If that happens, it could result in the use of massive resources and manpower.

1300700030.korean: - 알파는 그럼에도 움직일 거냐고 나에게 묻고 있는 거겠지.
1300700030.english: - Alpha must be asking me if I'm still going to move despite that.

1300700031.english: - … There is no need to think about such things.

1300700032.english: - The answer was there from the beginning.

1300700033.english: Understood. Then, let's proceed with the meeting.

1300700034.korean: 네, 문제없습니다. 그저 바이오로이드 한 명을 데려올 뿐이잖아요?
1300700034.english: Yes, no problem. We are just bringing one bioroid, aren't we?

1300700035.english: - It was accepted more simply than expected?

1300700036.korean: 우후후, 알파 님도 짓궂으시군요. 폐하께서 어떤 심정인지 잘 알고 계시지 않습니까.
1300700036.english: Hehehe, Alpha, you are quite mischievous. Don't you know very well how His Majesty feels?

1300700037.english: Oh my, what could it be?

1300700038.korean: 저는 그저 언제나 저희 바이오로이드를 위해 힘써 주시는 주인님을 위해 움직일 뿐입니다.
1300700038.english: I simply act for the Master who always works hard for our bioroids.

1300700039.korean: 후후, 주인님은 아직 미숙하지만 분명 좋은 교육자가 될 겁니다.
1300700039.english: Haha, Master, you are still inexperienced, but you will surely become a good educator.

1300700040.korean: 가끔은 몸도 마음도 전부 내려놓고 어리광 부리셨으면 좋겠지만요.
1300700040.english: I wish you would let go of both your body and mind and act childish sometimes.

1300700041.korean: 사령관님이 어떤 분이신지는 처음 뵈었을 때부터 알고 있었으니까요.
1300700041.english: Because I knew what kind of person the Commander was from the first time I met him.

1300700042.korean: 자자, 주인님께서 부끄러움에 못 이겨 도망치기 전에 여기까지 하도록 하죠.
1300700042.english: Now, now, let's stop here before Master runs away out of embarrassment.

1300700043.korean: …그럼, 지금부터 감마의 부관인 메로페 양을 어떻게 오르카로 데려올지 회의를 진행하겠습니다.
1300700043.english: …Then, we will now proceed with a meeting to decide how to bring Miss Merope, Gamma's subordinate, to Orca.

1300700044.korean: - 그렇게 대책을 세우기 위한 회의는 시작되었지만 좀처럼 좋은 의견은 나오지 않았다.
1300700044.english: The meeting to devise a plan began, but few good ideas emerged.

1300700045.korean: 저는 메로페 그 아이에게 진실을 알려줘서는 안 된다고 생각해요.
1300700045.english: I think we shouldn't tell that child, Meropé, the truth.

1300700046.korean: 정신적으로 얼마나 감당할 수 있을지 모르는 지금 섣부른 행동은 아이를 위험에 빠트리게 할 수도 있어요.
1300700046.english: Taking hasty action right now, when you don't know how much you can mentally handle, could put the child in danger.

1300700047.korean: 아이는 성장하는 법이야. 언제까지 진실을 감추고 비밀로 할 수는 없잖아?
1300700047.english: Children grow up. You can't keep the truth hidden and a secret forever, can you?

1300700048.korean: 때로는 벽에 부딪히고 그 벽을 넘어 점점 성장하여 어른이 되어가는 거지.
1300700048.english: Sometimes you hit a wall, and as you overcome it, you gradually grow and become an adult.

1300700049.korean: 저는 마리아 씨의 의견에 찬성합니다. 진실을 알려준다고 해도 아이의 상태를 먼저 확인하는 게 먼저라고 생각합니다.
1300700049.english: I agree with Maria's opinion. Even if we are to tell the truth, I believe checking the child's condition should come first.

1300700050.korean: 아이가 견뎌낼 수 있다고 생각될 때 진실을 알려줘도 늦지 않습니다.
1300700050.english: It is not too late to tell the truth when you think the child can endure it.

1300700051.korean: - 마땅한 의견이 좀처럼 나오지 않자 나는 아르망에게 도움을 청했다.
1300700051.english: When no suitable opinion came to mind, I asked Armand for help.

1300700052.korean: 폐하께서 걱정하고 계신 부분 잘 알고 있습니다.
1300700052.english: I am fully aware of the concerns Your Majesty has.

1300700053.korean: 플레이아데스 가디언 자매의 막내는 똑똑하지만 어린아이 같은 면모가 있다고 들었습니다.
1300700053.english: I heard that the youngest of the Pleiades Guardian sisters is smart but has childlike qualities.

1300700054.korean: 감마의 말대로 그 아이가 진실을 알게 되었을 때 무슨 일이 일어날지 정확히 예측하는 건 쉽지 않습니다.
1300700054.english: As Gamma said, it is not easy to accurately predict what will happen when the child finds out the truth.

1300700055.korean: 최악의 경우 포세이돈 인더스트리와 전면전을 하게 될 수도 있겠지요.
1300700055.english: In the worst-case scenario, we might end up in an all-out war with Poseidon Industries.

1300700057.korean: 이건 경험이 아닌 멸망 전에 있었던 옛 이야기입니다만ㅡㅡ
1300700057.english: This isn't an experience, but an old story from before the apocalypse...

1300700058.korean: 한 아이가 가족의 복수를 위해 살아가는 내용을 담은 작품이 있었습니다.
1300700058.english: There was a work that depicted the story of a child living to avenge their family.

1300700059.korean: 아이는 평범하지만, 화목한 가정에서 자라 무엇 하나 부족함이 없는 삶을 살아왔습니다.
1300700059.english: The child is ordinary, but grew up in a harmonious family and has lived a life lacking nothing.

1300700060.korean: 자신이 사랑하는 가족들, 언제나 곁에 있어 주는 소중한 친구. 아이는 언제까지나 이 행복함이 계속되리라 믿어 의심치 않았습니다.
1300700060.english: The family he loved, and the precious friends who were always by his side. The child believed without a doubt that this happiness would continue forever.

1300700061.korean: 하지만 어느 날, 왕에 의한 폭정이 시작되었고 그 영향은 아이의 가정에도 영향을 주기 시작했습니다.
1300700061.english: However, one day, a tyranny by the king began, and its effects started to affect the child's family as well.

1300700062.korean: 그리고 결국 아이는 왕의 폭정으로 인해 사랑하는 가족들을 모두 잃게 되었습니다.
1300700062.english: And eventually, the child lost his entire beloved family due to the king's tyranny.

1300700063.korean: 아이는 다짐했습니다. 자기 가족을 빼앗은 왕에게… 나라에 복수를 하겠다고 말이죠.
1300700063.english: The child made a vow. That he would take revenge on the king who took his family... and on the country.

1300700064.korean: 소중한 친구는 말렸지만 친구의 목소리는 그 아이에게는 더 이상 들리지 않았습니다.
1300700064.english: A precious friend tried to stop him, but the child could no longer hear his friend's voice.

1300700065.korean: 그 이후로 아이는 가면을 쓰고서 자신의 모든 것을 희생하며 복수를 시작했습니다.
1300700065.english: Since then, the child put on a mask and began taking revenge, sacrificing everything.

1300700066.korean: 그렇게 시간이 지나… 아이는 마침내 왕을 죽이고 복수하는 데 성공했습니다.
1300700066.english: As time passed... the child finally succeeded in killing the king and taking revenge.

1300700067.korean: 이걸로 모든 게 원래대로 돌아올 것이라 생각하며 아이는 가면을 벗어던지고 나라의 새로운 지도자 자리에 올랐습니다.
1300700067.english: Believing that everything would return to normal with this, the child cast off his mask and ascended to the position of the country's new leader.

1300700068.korean: 하지만 아이를 기다리고 있었던 건 불행뿐이었습니다.
