1300700068.english: However, only misfortune awaited the child.

1300700069.korean: 나라는 점점 쇠퇴해져 갔고 국민들은 가난과 불안 속에서 힘든 나날을 보내게 되었습니다.
1300700069.english: The country gradually declined, and the people came to spend difficult days in poverty and anxiety.

1300700070.korean: 그리고 그 원인으로 백성들은 가면의 인물을 지목했습니다.
1300700070.english: And the people pointed to the masked figure as the cause.

1300700071.korean: 그 가면의 인물이 왕을 죽였기에, 왕을 죽이기 위해 나라를 무너트렸기에 이 모든 일이 일어나 나라가 망해가고 있다고 말이죠.
1300700071.english: They are saying that all of this is happening and the country is falling apart because the figure behind the mask killed the king, and because he destroyed the country to kill the king.

1300700072.korean: 백성들의 분노는 극에 달했지만 아이는 그 가면의 인물이 자신이었다는 걸 미처 말할 수 없었습니다.
1300700072.english: The people's anger reached its peak, but the child could not bring himself to say that the figure behind the mask was himself.

1300700073.korean: 자신의 복수로 인해 모든 사람이 불행에 빠졌다는 사실을 외면했습니다.
1300700073.english: He turned a blind eye to the fact that everyone was plunged into misery because of his revenge.

1300700074.korean: 그때 가면을 쓴 누군가가 나타나 자신이 왕을 죽이고 이 나라를 망쳤다고 외쳤습니다.
1300700074.english: Then, someone wearing a mask appeared and shouted that he had killed the king and ruined the country.

1300700075.korean: 모두가 가면의 인물을 잡아야 한다고 말했고 아이는 어쩔 수 없이 가면의 인물을 붙잡아 처형했습니다.
1300700075.english: Everyone said that the masked figure had to be captured, so the child had no choice but to capture and execute the masked figure.

1300700076.korean: 덕분에 백성들의 분노는 잠재워졌고 아이는 가면의 인물이 누군지 궁금하여 가면을 벗겨보았습니다.
1300700076.english: Thanks to this, the people's anger was quelled, and the child, curious about the identity of the masked figure, took off the mask.

1300700077.korean: 그러자 그 가면의 너머에는 자신의 소중한 친구의 얼굴이 있었습니다.
1300700077.english: Then, beyond that mask, there was the face of his precious friend.

1300700078.korean: 소중한 친구의 희생으로 나라의 안정을 되찾았다는 사실에 아이는 큰 충격에 빠졌고
1300700078.english: The child was deeply shocked by the fact that the country's stability was restored through the sacrifice of a precious friend, and

1300700079.korean: 그렇게 아이는 스스로 자취를 감추고 이 이야기는 여기서 끝납니다.
1300700079.english: And so, the child disappears on their own, and the story ends here.

1300700080.english: … … What should I say… It’s a sad story.

1300700081.korean: 이야기라는걸 알지만 그 아이는 얼마나 마음이 아팠을까요.
1300700081.english: Even though I know it’s just a story, how heartbroken must that child have been?

1300700082.korean: 도무지 좋은 이야기라고는 할 수 없을 것 같군요.
1300700082.english: I don't think it can be called a good story at all.

1300700083.korean: 안타깝게도 중간에 연재가 중단되어 결말은 나오지 않았습니다.
1300700083.english: Unfortunately, the serialization was discontinued midway, so the ending was not released.

1300700084.korean: 친구의 희생으로부터 다시 일어나 행복한 삶을 살았을 수도 있고, 충격에서 벗어나지 못하고 슬픈 나날을 보냈을지도 모릅니다.
1300700084.english: He might have risen again from his friend's sacrifice and lived a happy life, or he might have spent sad days unable to recover from the shock.

1300700085.english: I am glad if I have been of help to Your Majesty.

1300700086.korean: 연락하는 건 문제없습니다만, 아무래도 해답은 찾으신 모양이군요.
1300700086.english: There is no problem with getting in touch, but it seems you have found the answer.

1300700087.korean: 그런데, 표정을 보아하니 또 어처구니없는 작전을 떠올리신 건 아니시죠?
1300700087.english: But judging by your expression, you haven't come up with another ridiculous plan, have you?

1300700088.korean: 주인님을 곁에서 한두 번 본 게 아니니까요.
1300700088.english: It’s not like I haven’t seen my master by my side once or twice.

1300700089.korean: 그래서, 이번엔 또 뭘 저지를 생각이신가요?
1300700089.english: So, what are you planning to do this time?

1300700090.korean: 설마, 감마와 전면전을 하게 되는 일은 아니겠죠?
1300700090.english: Surely, we aren't going to end up in an all-out war with Gamma, are we?

1300700092.english: … My head is starting to hurt.

1300700093.korean: - 나는 기가 질렸다는 알파를 향해 다시 크게 미소 지었다.
1300700093.english: I smiled broadly again at Alpha, who looked intimidated.

1300700096.korean: 뭐가 되었든 간에, 내가 할 일은 하나야.
1300700096.english: Whatever it is, I have only one thing to do.

1300700097.korean: 메로페가 무사히 언니의 품으로 돌아올 수 있도록 하는 것.
1300700097.english: To ensure that Meropé can safely return to her older sister's arms.

1300700099.korean: 그러니까 부탁할게. 두 사람이 다시 만날 수 있게 도와줘.
1300700099.english: So, I'm asking you a favor. Please help the two of them meet again.

1300700104.korean: 고마워, 아르망 좋은 힌트가 된 것 같아.
1300700104.english: Thanks, Armand. I think that was a good hint.

1300700105.english: Alpha, will you be able to contact Gamma?

1300800001.english: Hey, are you serious? The Orca commander?

1300800002.korean: 일단 확인해 두는데 어디 머리를 다친 건 아니겠지?
1300800002.english: Just to check, you didn't hit your head, did you?

1300800005.korean: 하하하하핫! 좋아, 마음에 들어! 잘은 모르겠지만 그 계획에 어울려주마!
1300800005.english: Hahahaha! Alright, I like it! I'm not entirely sure, but I'll go along with that plan!

1300800006.korean: 하지만, 그렇게 되면 우리 포세이돈 함대와 전면전을 할 수도 있는데 그 각오는 한 거겠지?
1300800006.english: However, if that happens, we might have to go to an all-out war with our Poseidon fleet. You are prepared for that, aren't you?

1300800007.korean: 모의전이라… 하하핫 재밌군! 그럼 나도 그 모의전에 어디 참가해 보자고!
1300800007.english: A mock battle... Hahaha, how fun! Then I’ll join that mock battle too!

1300800008.korean: 그런 섭섭한 소리하지 말라고 이런 재미있는 이벤트에 내가 참가하지 않으면 뭘 하라는 거야.
1300800008.english: Don't say such hurtful things. If I don't participate in such a fun event, what am I supposed to do?

1300800009.korean: 좋아, 기대하면서 기다리지 부디 날 실망시키지 말아 달라고.
1300800009.english: Okay, I'll wait with anticipation. Please don't disappoint me.

1300800011.english: Are you really okay with this?

1300800012.korean: 잘 흘러만 간다면 더할 나위 없겠지만… 리스크가 너무 크다고 생각해요.
1300800012.english: It would be perfect if things went smoothly, but... I think the risk is too high.

1300800013.korean: '오르카를 델타의 부대로 변장해 델타가 살아 있다는 연극'을 하겠다니… 들킬 가능성이 너무 크지 않을까요?
1300800013.english: "Planning to 'disguise Orca as Delta's unit and put on a play pretending Delta is alive'... wouldn't the chances of getting caught be too high?"

1300800016.korean: …정말, 그렇게 말씀하시면 제가 여기서 더 말할 수 없잖아요.
1300800016.english: … Really, if you say that, I can't say anything more here.

1300800017.korean: 알겠습니다. 그럼 상세 내용을 정리해서 각각 해당 인원들에게 전달할게요.
1300800017.english: Understood. Then I will organize the details and send them to the respective individuals.

1300800018.korean: 이번 건의 보상은 나중에 철저히 주인님에게 받을 테니까 나중에 각오하세요.
1300800018.english: I will receive my full compensation for this matter from you later, Master, so be prepared.

1300800019.korean: - 나의 해답이 정답인지는 알 수 없다. 어쩌면 더 좋은 해답이 있을지도 모른다.
1300800019.english: I cannot know if my answer is the correct one. Perhaps there is a better answer.

1300800020.korean: - 하지만 이 슬픈 이야기를 배드 엔딩으로 끝낼 수는 없다.
1300800020.english: However, we cannot end this sad story with a bad ending.

1300800021.korean: - 이야기의 끝은 반드시 해피 엔딩으로 끝나야 하니까.
1300800021.english: Because the story must end with a happy ending.

1300800023.korean: 이 방법이 지금 할 수 있는 최고의 선택이라고 생각해.
1300800023.english: I think this is the best choice you can make right now.

1300800024.korean: 전투 훈련을 위한 모의전 한번 한다고 생각하지 뭐
1300800024.english: I'll just think of it as a mock battle for combat training.

1300800025.korean: 네가 참가하는 건 좀 피해줬으면 좋겠는데

1300800026.english: … Then I will assume you have accepted it.

1300800027.korean: 상세한 일정이나 내용은 추후 다시 연락하지.
1300800027.english: We will contact you again later for the detailed schedule or contents.

1300800028.korean: 괜찮아, 우리 쪽에는 이 방면의 스페셜리스트가 다수 있잖아?
1300800028.english: It's okay, we have plenty of specialists in this field on our side, you know?

1300800029.korean: 게다가 캐스팅에 완벽한 인물도 있고 말이지.
1300800029.english: Besides, there is even a perfect person for the casting.

1300900001.korean: - 델타가 살아 있는 것처럼 연기를 한다.
1300900001.english: Delta acts as if he is alive.

1300900002.korean: - 그렇게 되면 메로페는 분명 델타를 공격할 가능성이 매우 높다.
1300900002.english: - If that happens, it is highly likely that Merope will definitely attack Delta.

1300900003.korean: - 즉, 우리는 레모네이드 감마가 이끄는 포세이돈 부대와 전면전을 치러야 한다는 걸 의미한다.
1300900003.english: - In other words, it means we have to fight an all-out war against the Poseidon forces led by Lemonade Gamma.

1300900004.korean: - 포세이돈 부대와는 한번 싸워서 이겼다고는 하나 결코 만만한 상대는 아니다.
1300900004.english: Although they defeated Poseidon's forces once, they are by no means an easy opponent.

1300900005.korean: - 지난번의 싸움도 감마가 용과의 싸움을 우선시했기에 허술해진 틈을 타 함대를 무력화할 수 있었다.
1300900005.english: In the last battle as well, we were able to neutralize the fleet by taking advantage of the vulnerability caused by Gamma prioritizing the fight with the dragon.

1300900006.korean: - 게다가 그때 보여준 함대가 포세이돈의 총 전력이라고는 생각하기 어렵다.
1300900006.english: Furthermore, it is difficult to believe that the fleet shown at that time was Poseidon's total strength.

1300900007.korean: - 그런 이유로 포세이돈 부대를 상대하기 위해서 세밀한 작전을 세울 필요가 있고
1300900007.english: For that reason, it is necessary to devise a detailed strategy to deal with Poseidon's forces, and

1300900008.korean: - 그 작전을 세우기 위해 자처한 녀석이 바로…
1300900008.english: The guy who volunteered to devise that plan was none other than…

1300900009.english: It is none other than this super beautiful girl, Merlin.

1300900010.korean: 음하하하, 감히 내 허락도 없이 대장님의 부관 자리를 빼앗아?
1300900010.english: Hahaha, how dare you take the Captain's position without my permission?

1300900011.korean: 메로페라는 녀석에게는 참모로서의 실력 차이를 뼈저리게 알게 해주겠어.
1300900011.english: I’m going to make that guy Meropé painfully realize the difference in skill as a strategist.

1300900012.korean: 이번 전면전에서 압도적인 차이로 승부를 내면 내 실력에 감동한 대장님이 그 녀석을 버리고 오르카로 넘어올 게 틀림없어!
1300900012.english: If I win this all-out battle by an overwhelming margin, the Captain will be so impressed by my skills that he will surely abandon that guy and switch sides to Orca!

1300900013.korean: - 아니, 이번 작전은 메로페를 위한 작전인데…
1300900013.english: - No, this operation is for Merope...

1300900014.korean: 그런데… 있잖아, 아서 정말 괜찮은 거야…?
1300900014.english: But… you know, Arthur, are you really okay…?

1300900015.korean: 음, 그게 실컷 떠들어대고 이제 와서 말하기도 뭐하지만…
1300900015.english: Well, I've been talking about it so much, it feels a bit late to bring this up now, but...

1300900016.korean: 아서도 있고 무용 대장님도 있는데 내가 정말 이번 작전의 지휘를 맡아도 괜찮은 건가 해서…
1300900016.english: With Arthur and Captain Dancer here, I was wondering if it's really okay for me to take command of this operation…

1300900018.korean: 맡겨만 준다면 아서의 기대에 부응하기 위해서라도 그 누구보다 잘할 자신이 있는걸!
1300900018.english: If you just leave it to me, I'm confident I can do better than anyone else, if only to live up to Arthur's expectations!

1300900019.korean: 지금 이 순간에도 그 꼬맹이를 혼쭐내주기 위해 수백 가지의 작전을 떠올리고 있단 말씀!
1300900019.english: I'm telling you, even at this very moment, I'm coming up with hundreds of strategies to teach that little brat a lesson!

1300900022.korean: 으헤~ 어떡하지? 너무 달아서 또 당뇨병으로 쓰러질 것 같아...
1300900022.english: Ugh~ What should I do? It's so sweet I feel like I'm going to collapse from diabetes again...

1300900023.korean: 나중에 닥터에게 가서 주사 한 대 놔달라고 해야 할지도…
1300900023.english: I might have to go see a doctor later and ask for an injection...

1300900024.korean: 좋았어! 나를 믿어주는 아서와 무용 대장님을 위해 그리고 내가 더 뛰어난 부관이라는 걸 증명하기 위해
1300900024.english: Alright! For Arthur and Captain Muyong, who believe in me, and to prove that I am a better副官 (subordinate officer).

1300900025.english: I'm going to make sure this operation succeeds.

1300900026.korean: 나는 대장님의 부관 그리고 포세이돈의 참모가 될 예정으로 만들어졌으니까 그에 대한 지식은 전부 들어가 있어.
1300900026.english: I was created to be the Captain's adjutant and Poseidon's chief of staff, so I have all the knowledge regarding that in me.

1300900027.korean: 포세이돈 함대의 전력은 물론 어느 정도의 화력을 가졌는지 그리고 운용 방법까지.
1300900027.english: Not only the military power of the Poseidon fleet, but also the extent of its firepower and even its operational methods.

1300900028.korean: 원래 나에게 맡겨질 일이고 대장님의 행동을 생각하면 오랜 시간 참모 자리가 공석이었다고 해도 크게 바뀌진 않았을 거야.
1300900028.english: It was originally a job that was supposed to be assigned to me, and considering the Captain's actions, things wouldn't have changed much even if the staff officer position had been vacant for a long time.

1300900029.korean: 변수라고 한다면 그 꼬맹이가 내 참모 자리를 빼앗아 앉았다는 건데…
1300900029.english: If there is a variable, it is that that kid snatched my aide position...

1300900030.korean: 나 정도는 아니겠지만 제법 똑똑하다고 들었으니 포세이돈 함대의 가장 큰 장점을 죽이는 어리석은 운용 방침으로 바꾸지는 않았을 거야.
1300900030.english: He probably isn't as smart as I am, but I've heard he's quite clever, so he wouldn't have changed to a foolish operational policy that kills the greatest strength of the Poseidon fleet.

1300900031.korean: 타의 추종을 불허하는 압도적인 화력ㅡㅡ 그게 포세이돈 함대의 가장 큰 장점이자 우리가 생각해야 하는 가장 큰 과제지.
1300900031.english: Unrivaled, overwhelming firepower—that is the Poseidon fleet's greatest strength and the biggest challenge we have to consider.

1300900032.korean: - 포세이돈 함대의 화력이라면 밴쿠버 섬에서 똑똑히 경험했다.
1300900032.english: As for the firepower of the Poseidon fleet, I experienced it clearly on Vancouver Island.

1300900033.korean: - 단순히 함대의 포격만으로 작은 섬 정도는 통째로 지도에서 사라지게 할 정도의 화력…
1300900033.english: - Firepower capable of wiping an entire small island off the map with just fleet bombardment…

1300900034.korean: - 그런 화력의 집합체가 우리 부대로 포구를 향한다고 생각하면 식은땀이 날 정도다.
1300900034.english: The thought of such a concentration of firepower aimed at our unit gives me a cold sweat.

1300900035.korean: 뭐, 사실 그 과제는 어떻게 해결할지 이미 생각해 뒀지만!
1300900035.english: Well, actually, I've already thought about how to solve that assignment, but!

1300900036.korean: 이제 남은 건 어떻게 포세이돈 화력을 무력화시킬까인데…
1300900036.english: Now all that remains is figuring out how to neutralize Poseidon's firepower...

1300900037.korean: 크흐흐, 어떻게 해야 꼬맹이 녀석을 좌절시킬 정도로 묵사발을 낼 수 있을까?
1300900037.english: Hehehe, how can I beat that little brat to a pulp enough to make him feel utterly defeated?

1300900039.korean: - 나는 이번 작전에서 메로페를 이길 생각으로 가득한 멀린을 보며 차마 입을 열 수가 없었다.
1300900039.english: I couldn't bring myself to speak as I watched Merlin, who was filled with the thought of defeating Merope in this operation.

1300900040.korean: - 제대로 작전을 전부 설명하지 않은 내 잘못이지만, 이렇게 들떠 있는 멀린에게 사실을 전하기에는 마음이 아프다.
1300900040.english: It is my fault for not properly explaining the entire plan, but it hurts my heart to tell the truth to Merlin, who is so excited.

1300900041.korean: - 이번 작전을 성공시키기 위해서는 우리가 메로페에게 일부러 져줘야 한다는 사실을…
1300900041.english: - The fact that we have to intentionally lose to Merope to make this operation a success…

1300900042.english: What's wrong? Why is your voice suddenly getting lower?

1300900043.english: It really feels like it's too late.

1300900045.english: That is why I am leaving it to you.

1300900046.korean: 이번 작전에 만큼에서는 그 누구보다 자신감이 넘치는 게 멀린 너니까.
1300900046.english: Because you, Merlin, are more confident than anyone else when it comes to this operation.

1300900047.english: The same goes for this opinion.

1300900048.korean: 자기 부관에게라면 믿고 맡길 수 있다고 연락이 왔어.
1300900048.english: I received a message saying that they could trust and leave it to their subordinate.

1300900049.english: Looks like you have a good plan, right?

1300900050.korean: 포세이돈 함대의 가장 큰 장점이라고 하면…
1300900050.english: If I were to say the greatest strength of the Poseidon fleet is…

1301000001.korean: - 델타가 살아 있는 것처럼 연기를 한다.
1301000001.english: Delta acts as if he is alive.

1301000002.korean: - 다시 말하지만 이게 이번에 우리 진행할 작전이다.
1301000002.english: - To reiterate, this is the operation we are proceeding with this time.

1301000003.korean: - 그렇게 되면 매우 당연하게도 필요한 역할이 있는데…
1301000003.english: - In that case, very naturally, there is a necessary role...

1301000005.korean: 그게 아니야! 델타는 그렇게 싱겁게 행동하지 않는다고!
1301000005.english: That's not it! Delta doesn't act that blandly!

1301000006.korean: 좀 더 잔혹하고! 폭력적이고! 시기와 질투가 가득한 미친년처럼!
1301000006.english: More cruel! Violent! Like a crazy bitch full of envy and jealousy!

1301000007.korean: 파이팅! 세 사람 다 잘하고 있어. 후후, 조금만 더 하면 좋은 영감을 얻을 수 있을 것 같아.
1301000007.english: Keep it up! All three of you are doing great. Hehe, I think you'll get some good inspiration if you just keep at it a little longer.

1301000008.english: On earth… how did I end up in this state…

1301000009.korean: 그러게 말이에요… 그런데 뭔가 꼭 나쁘지 않은 것 같기도…
1301000009.english: I know, right... but somehow it doesn't seem entirely bad...

1301000010.korean: 후우, 역시 그때 무조건 반대를 해야 했어요…
1301000010.english: Phew, I really should have opposed it unconditionally back then…

1301000011.korean: 설마, 이런 어처구니없는 일로 흘러가게 될 줄은…
1301000011.english: I never imagined it would turn out to be such absurd...

1301000012.korean: 자, 그럼 다시 한번 더 간다. 3, 2, 1… 액션!
1301000012.english: Alright, here we go again. 3, 2, 1… Action!

1301000013.korean: 쯧, 자매 둘이 의자 하나 몫도 못 하다니…
1301000013.english: Tsk, to think two sisters can't even do the work of a single chair...

1301000014.korean: 이 쓸모없는… 년들… 아직도 이해가 안 되네?
1301000014.english: These useless… bitches… I still don’t understand?

1301000015.korean: 무능…하고 천…박한 년들이 어떻게 회장님을 홀…
1301000015.english: Incompetent… and lowly… bitches, how could they… the Chairman…

1301000018.korean: 아직도 독설을 내뱉는 데에 망설임이 느껴져.
1301000018.english: I can still feel the hesitation in spitting out harsh words.

1301000019.korean: 으윽, 하지만 어쩔 수 없잖아요! 저는 델타처럼 그런 경박한 말투를 사용하지 않는다고요.
1301000019.english: Ugh, but what can I do! I don't use such a frivolous tone like Delta.

1301000020.korean: 게다가 그런 욕설을 다른 분들을 향해 말하라니… 마음이 편치 않아요.
1301000020.english: Besides, to be told to say such profanities to others… I feel uneasy.

1301000021.korean: 잘 들어. 이번 작전의 핵심은 델타가 살아 있는 것처럼 연기를 하는 거야.
1301000021.english: Listen carefully. The key to this operation is for Delta to act like he is alive.

1301000022.korean: 그러기 위해서는 델타의 역을 맡은 사람의 연기가 가장 중요해.
1301000022.english: To do that, the acting of the person playing Delta is the most important.

1301000023.korean: 그리고 그 역할을 하기에 가장 적합한 인물이 바로 당신이고 그 역할을 지도하기에 가장 적당한 인물이 바로 나지.
1301000023.english: And you are the most suitable person to play that role, and I am the most suitable person to lead that role.

1301000024.korean: 어쩐지 평소와 태도가 많이 다른 것 같은데... 다른 사적 감정이 들어간 건 아니죠?
1301000024.english: For some reason, your attitude seems very different from usual... You aren't getting involved with any personal feelings, are you?

1301000025.korean: 사령관에게 나밖에 할 수 없는 일을 직접 부탁했으니까 이 정도는 당연하잖아?
1301000025.english: Since I personally asked the Commander to do something only I can do, isn't this to be expected?

1301000027.korean: 크흑… 해주겠어요. 이렇게 된 이상 완벽하게 델타를 연기해 보겠어!
1301000027.english: *Sob*... I'll do it. Since things have come to this, I'll play Delta perfectly!

1301000029.korean: 걱정하지 마 사령관, 내가 이 일을 맡은 이상 완벽하게 델타 그 자체로 만들어 보일 테니까.
1301000029.english: Don't worry, Commander. Since I've taken on this job, I'll make it look like Delta itself.

1301000030.korean: - 배우가 극중 인물 연기에 심취한 나머지 작품이 끝난 뒤에도 후유증이 남았다는 사례를 들은 적이 있다.
1301000030.english: I have heard of cases where an actor became so immersed in their character that they suffered aftereffects even after the project ended.

1301000031.korean: 하하하, 괜찮아. 작전이 끝나고 한 달 정도 충분히 재활 기간을 거쳐서 원래대로 돌아올 수 있게 할 테니까.
1301000031.english: Hahaha, it's fine. Once the operation is over, I'll make sure you have a full month or so of rehabilitation so you can return to normal.

1301000032.korean: - 그 말은 그럼 한 달 동안은 연기에 심취한 상태일 거라는 건가? …어쩐지 엄청 미안한 짓을 해버린 것 같다.
1301000032.english: So, does that mean you'll be immersed in acting for a month? … Somehow, I feel like I've done something really bad.

1301000033.korean: - 이번 작전을 위해서는 델타가 살아 있는 모습을 보여야 했고 그러기 위해서라면 누군가는 델타의 연기를 할 필요가 있다.
1301000033.english: For this operation, Delta had to show that he was alive, and to do so, someone needed to act as Delta.

1301000034.korean: - 그리하여 누가 델타를 연기할지 선택을 해야 했고… 그 결과…
1301000034.english: So, we had to choose who would play Delta... and as a result...

1301000035.english: Are you talking about the Delta role?

1301000036.korean: 지난번에 캐스팅에 완벽한 인물이라는 게 이런 뜻이었군요…
1301000036.english: So this is what it meant last time that someone was the perfect person for casting…

1301000037.korean: 확실히 인정하기는 싫지만 델타와 저는 자매이기도 하고 성격 또한 잘 알고 있어요.
1301000037.english: I really don't want to admit it, but Delta and I are sisters, and I know her personality well.

1301000038.korean: 그런 델타의 연기를 한다면 제가 적임이라는 사실은 부정할 수 없겠죠.
1301000038.english: If I were to play Delta in that role, I wouldn't be able to deny that I am the right fit.

1301000039.korean: 하지만, 그런 이유에서라면 여기에 적임자가 한 명 더 있잖아요?
1301000039.english: But if that is the reason, isn't there one more suitable person here?

1301000040.korean: 저와 똑같은 델타의 자매이며 마찬가지로 성격 또한 잘 알고 있죠.
1301000040.english: She is Delta's sister just like me, and I know her personality just as well.

1301000041.korean: …알파 언니? 설마 저를 말하는 거는 아니죠? 그렇죠?
1301000041.english: … Alpha? You're not talking about me, are you? Right?

1301000042.korean: 베타… 오르카의 일원이 된다는 건 이런 험난한 일도 마다하지 않아야 해.
1301000042.english: Beta… becoming a member of the Orca means you shouldn’t shy away from such arduous tasks.

1301000043.korean: 베타도 이제 오르카의 일원이니까 열심히 해야 하지 않을까?
1301000043.english: Since Beta is a member of Orca now, shouldn't he work hard too?

1301000044.korean: 그건 그렇지만… 그래도 무리에요! 제가 델타를 연기한다니… 상상하기만 해도… 아무튼 무리에요!
1301000044.english: That's true, but... still, it's impossible! Me playing Delta... just imagining it... anyway, it's impossible!

1301000045.korean: 제가 생각했을 때 저보다는 언니가 더 델타의 연기를 잘할 수 있다고 생각해요!
1301000045.english: I think my older sister can play Delta better than me!

1301000049.english: Hehehe, what are you talking about, Beta?

1301000050.korean: 대체 어떤 부분이 나랑 델타가 닮았다는 걸까?
1301000050.english: What on earth is similar between me and Delta?

1301000051.korean: 지금처럼 웃는 표정으로 상대에게 압박을 주는 그 검은 모습이 델타랑 똑같은걸요!
1301000051.english: That dark side of you, pressuring your opponent with a smiling face just like now, is exactly the same as Delta!

1301000052.korean: - 확실히 그런 면이 없는 건 아니지…
1301000052.english: It's certainly not without that aspect...

1301000053.english: There's nothing this kid won't say to her older sister, is there?

1301000054.korean: 그러면 너는 어떤데! 평소에는 조용한 척하지만 네가 오르카 시크릿 네트워크에서 익명의 이름으로 악플을 달고 있는 거 모를 줄 알아?
1301000054.english: Then what about you! You pretend to be quiet all the time, but do you think I don't know you're posting hateful comments anonymously on the Orca Secret Network?

1301000055.korean: 그악플 누가 보면 델타가 입력한 줄 착각할 정도로 심했다고?
1301000055.english: Those hate comments were so severe that anyone reading them would mistake them for Delta typing them in?

1301000057.korean: 윽, 그… 그렇지만 걔네들이 먼저 저를 자극했는걸요! LA 캐노니어즈를 욕했단 말이에요.
1301000057.english: Ugh, th... but they provoked me first! I'm telling you, they insulted the LA Canoneers.

1301000058.korean: 우후후, 아무래도 이번 기회에 언니의 위엄을 보여야 할 것 같군요.
1301000058.english: Hehehe, it looks like I should take this opportunity to show my dignity.

1301000059.korean: 저도 조금은 성장했다는 걸 보여줄 거예요!
1301000059.english: I'm going to show that I've grown a little too!

1301000060.korean: - 이리하여 두 자매의 양보할 수 없는 전쟁의 서막이 오르게…
1301000060.english: Thus, the curtain rises on the unyielding war between the two sisters…

1301000061.korean: 저기 이야기가 좀처럼 끝나지 않을 것 같아서 미리 말해두는데 베타에게 델타 역은 무리야.
1301000061.english: Hey, since it looks like this story won't end anytime soon, I'm telling you in advance: Delta Station is too much for Beta.

1301000063.english: Forget the explanation or not, is it because the body type doesn't fit?

1301000065.korean: 듣자하니 델타가 살아있다는 걸 보여주기 위해 연기를 해야 한다는 건데.
1301000065.english: From what I hear, Delta has to act to show that she is alive.

1301000066.korean: 연기를 하는 사람의 체형이 델타와 전혀 다르면 속일 수가 없지 않겠어?
1301000066.english: If the person acting has a completely different physique from Delta, wouldn't it be impossible to fool them?

1301000067.korean: 사실 알파 너도 델타보다는 좀 큰 편이긴 한데 그 정도는 옷으로 감싸는 걸로 어느 정도 해결할 수 있어.
1301000067.english: Actually, Alpha, you are a bit bigger than Delta, but you can manage that to some extent by wrapping yourself in clothes.

1301000068.korean: 하지만 베타 정도의 체형은 아무리 옷으로 가린다고 해도 도저히…
1301000068.english: However, a body type like Beta's is just... impossible to hide, no matter how much you cover it with clothes.

1301000069.korean: 응? 왜 그래? 설명이 필요한 거 아니야?
1301000069.english: Huh? What's wrong? Don't you need an explanation?

1301000070.korean: 그렇게 나는 구석을 가리켰고 그곳에는 베타가 쪼그려 앉아 중얼거리고 있었다.
1301000070.english: So I pointed to a corner, and Beta was crouching there, muttering.

1301000071.korean: 하하하하, 그래요. 저는 폭식의 레모네이드에요. 옷으로는 가릴 수도 없을 정도로 뚱뚱한 체형이에요.
1301000071.english: Hahaha, that's right. I am the Lemonade of Binge Eating. I have a body type so fat that I can't even hide it with clothes.

1301000072.korean: 알고 있어요. 알고 있다고요. 그래서 지금까지 다이어트에 몇 번이나 도전을 한 건데… 그치만… 그치만 오르카에서 나오는 밥이 너무 맛있는 걸 어떡해요.
1301000072.english: I know. I really do. That’s why I’ve attempted to diet so many times already… But… but what can I do? The food at Orca is just too delicious.

1301000073.korean: 아… 이제 끝이야. 그냥 죽을까? 그래요, 이렇게 모욕을 받고 사느니 이참에 현실에서 로그아웃하고 계정을 삭제하고 새로운 캐릭터를 다시 생성하는 게 나아요.
1301000073.english: Ah... it's over now. Should I just die? Yeah, rather than living like this, enduring such humiliation, it's better to just log out of reality, delete my account, and create a new character.

1301000074.korean: 다음 캐릭터는 좀 더 날씬한 체형으로 만들어야지. 하하하하…
1301000074.english: I should make the next character a bit slimmer. Hahahaha...

1301000075.korean: - 미처 보기가 안쓰러울 정도로 망가져 있는 베타의 모습이 그곳에 있었다.
1301000075.english: Beta was there, looking so broken that it was pitiful to even look at.

1301000076.english: … I’m not thrilled about it, but I have no choice.

1301000077.korean: 그래도 베타에게는 이긴 기분도 들고 제가 가장 적합하다는 사실에는 부정할 수 없으니까요.
1301000077.english: Still, I feel like I won against Beta, and I can't deny the fact that I am the most suitable.

1301000078.korean: 잘할 수 있을지는 모르겠지만 해볼 수 있는 데까지는 노력해 볼게요.
1301000078.english: I'm not sure if I can do it well, but I'll try my best.

1301000080.korean: 회장님의! 총애를! 앗아간! 년이! 감히! 나에게! 그만두라고! 말을 걸어!?
1301000080.english: The bitch who stole the Chairman's favor dares to tell me to stop!?

1301000081.korean: 내가 경고를! 했는데도! 그만두지! 않았던! 네년이!?
1301000081.english: You bitch who didn't stop even though I warned you!?

1301000082.korean: 벌레 같은 년들 아니랄까 봐, 벌레처럼 끈질기네.
1301000082.english: Just like bugs, they are as persistent as bugs.

1301000083.korean: - …어, 생각보다 너무 잘하고 있는 거 같은데…?
1301000083.english: - … Uh, I think I'm doing much better than I expected…?

1301000084.korean: 좋아, 바로 그거야! 그대로 좀 더 과감하게! 좀 더 증오를 담아서!
1301000084.english: Good, that's it! Just like that, a little more daring! With a little more hatred!

1301000085.english: I don't care, just hurry up and finish this...

1301000086.korean: 아앗… 나 왠지 새로운 무언가에 눈을 뜬 것 같기도…
1301000086.english: Ah... somehow I feel like I've opened my eyes to something new...

1301000087.korean: 좋아, 좋아! 다음 작품의 새로운 아이디어가 떠올랐어! 우후후후
1301000087.english: Great, great! I’ve hit the spot with a new idea for my next project! Woohoo!

1301000088.korean: 우후후, 저도 이제야 감을 잡은 것 같아요.
1301000088.english: Hehehe, I think I've finally got the hang of it.

1301000089.korean: 생각해 보니 평소에 담아두었던 스트레스를 풀 좋은 기회였어요.
1301000089.english: Come to think of it, it was a good opportunity to release the stress I had been holding back.

1301000091.korean: - 이거 괜찮은 거 맞나? 어쩌면 나는 터무니 없는 걸 탄생시킨게 아닐까?
1301000091.english: Is this really okay? Maybe I've created something ridiculous?

1301000092.english: How's the wrist cut? Is it going well?

1301000093.korean: 열정적인 건 좋은데. 작전이 끝났을 때 원래대로 돌아올 정도로 부탁해.
1301000093.english: It's good to be passionate, but please make sure you return to your normal self when the operation is over.

1301000094.korean: 응, 알파가 이 역할에 적임이라고 생각해.
1301000094.english: Yeah, I think Alpha is the right fit for this role.

1301000095.english: List cut, that's as far as it goes…

1301000096.english: Beta's mental state is already at zero...

1301000097.english: For that reason, I'm asking for your help, Alpha.

1301000098.english: I trust that Alpha will do a good job.

1301100002.english: Princess Mel? What brings you here?

1301100003.english: What else could it be? I came to find you.

1301100004.korean: 내가 여기 있는 줄은 어떻게 알고?
1301100004.english: How did you know I was here?

1301100005.korean: 아이는 곤란한 일이 있으면 부모를 찾는 법이라고 제독이 알려주더구나.
1301100005.english: The Admiral told me that children look for their parents when they are in trouble.

1301100006.korean: 그래서 ATLAS가 잠들어 있는 이곳에 있을 거라 생각했지.
1301100006.english: So I thought ATLAS would be here where he is asleep.

1301100009.english: It has completely stopped working now.

1301100010.korean: 심각한 회로 부식을 견디면서 오랫동안 날 돌봐줬으니까.
1301100010.english: Because it took care of me for a long time while enduring severe circuit corrosion.

1301100011.korean: 듣기로는 이곳에 테마파크를 건설하면서 ATLAS도 옮기려고 했지만 주인님이 이곳에 놔두자고 했대.
1301100011.english: I heard that they were planning to move ATLAS while building the theme park here, but the owner said to leave it here.

1301100012.korean: 아직 돌아올 아이가 있다면서. 그 아이가 돌아왔을 때 이곳에 ATLAS가 없다면 쓸쓸해 할 거라고.
1301100012.english: You said there is still a child coming back. That when that child returns, if ATLAS isn't here, they will feel lonely.

1301100013.english: Hahaha, I suppose that’s certainly true.

1301100014.korean: ...아이는 곤란한 일이 있으면 부모를 찾는 법… 인가…
1301100014.english: ...Is it natural for children to seek out their parents when they are in trouble...?

1301100015.korean: 그 말대로야. 조금 곤란한 일이 있어.
1301100015.english: That's exactly right. I have a bit of a problem.

1301100016.korean: 메로페를 반드시 데려오겠다고 결심했는데 막상 때가 다가오니까 메로페를 만났을 때 무슨 말을 해야 할지 잘 모르겠거든.
1301100016.english: I was determined to bring Merope back, but now that the time is approaching, I'm not sure what to say when I meet him.

1301100017.korean: 이런 고민을 하는 게 나답지 않다는 건 알고 있지만…
1301100017.english: I know it’s not like me to be worrying like this, but…

1301100018.korean: 지금 와서 생각하지만, 참 오랫동안 꿈을 꾸고 있었다고 생각하고 있어. 완전 늦잠꾸러기야.
1301100018.english: Now that I think about it, I feel like I've been dreaming for a very long time. I'm such a late sleeper.

1301100019.korean: 꿈속에 있던 나에게는 고작 몇 개월이라는 시간으로밖에 느껴지지 않지만
1301100019.english: To me, who was in a dream, it feels like nothing more than a few months, but

1301100020.korean: 메로페는 몇 년이라는 세월 동안 복수를 위해 살아가고 있었어.
1301100020.english: Merope had been living for several years seeking revenge.

1301100022.english: Thinking about it that way… I got scared.

1301100023.korean: 지금의 메로페가 과연 내가 알고 있는 귀여운 막내 메로페일까 하는 생각이 머릿속에서 떠나지를 않아.
1301100023.english: I can't get the thought out of my head whether the current Merope is really the cute youngest Merope I know.

1301100024.korean: 어쩌면 내가 아는 메로페는 이제 없을…
1301100024.english: Maybe the Merope I know no longer exists…

1301100027.korean: 음, 이래서는 닿지 않는 군… 잠깐 숙여봐라.
1301100027.english: Hmm, I can't reach it like this... Bend down for a moment.

1301100029.korean: 으으… 아파라, 멜 공주? 왜 갑자기 딱밤을 때리는 거야?
1301100029.english: Ow... That hurts, Princess Mel? Why are you suddenly flicking my forehead?

1301100030.english: It is a case of saying useless things.

1301100031.korean: 알키오네 네가 생각하는 게 뭔지는 나도 잘 알고 있다. 걱정도 당연히 되겠지.
1301100031.english: Alcyone, I know very well what you are thinking. Of course you would be worried.

1301100032.korean: 하지만 그럴 때일수록 가족이 힘이 되어줘야 하는 게 아니겠느냐.
1301100032.english: But shouldn't family be a source of strength precisely at times like that?

1301100033.korean: 네가 생각하고 있는 메로페는 고작 몇 년으로 사람이 바뀔 아이더냐?
1301100033.english: Are you thinking of Merope as someone who can change in just a few years?

1301100034.korean: ...으응, 그렇게 생각 안 해. 메로페는 우리 자매 중에 누구보다 순수한 아이니까.
1301100034.english: ...Nope, I don't think so. Merope is the purest of us sisters.

1301100036.korean: 그럼, 혼자가 되었다는 이유만으로 마음이 약해질 아이더냐?
1301100036.english: Then, is he the type to become soft-hearted just because he is alone?

1301100037.korean: 혼자서 복수를 위해 감마의 밑으로 들어갈 정도인걸. 절대 마음이 약하진 않지.
1301100037.english: He's the type to go under Gamma's wing alone for revenge. He's definitely not soft-hearted.

1301100039.korean: 나도 메로페 그 아이와 자주 놀아주었으니 잘 알고 있다.
1301100039.english: I also played with that child, Meropé, often, so I know him well.

1301100040.korean: 메로페는 누구보다 똑똑하고 강한 아이라는 걸 말이다.
1301100040.english: That Meropé is a child who is smarter and stronger than anyone else.

1301100041.korean: 제독도 그걸 알고 있지만 만일을 생각해서 이번 작전을 생각한 거겠지.
1301100041.english: The Admiral knows that, but he must have planned this operation just in case.

1301100042.english: For the sake of only one thing.

1301100044.korean: 메로페가 무사히 알키오네... 너에게 돌아올 수 있도록 말이다.
1301100044.english: So that Merope can return safely to you, Alcyone...

1301100047.korean: 나도 참, 별것도 아닌 걸로 걱정하고 있었네. 나답지 않게…
1301100047.english: I can't believe I was worrying about something so trivial. That's so unlike me...

1301100048.korean: 이래서는 메로페가 돌아왔을 때 오히려 잔소리를 듣게 될 뻔했잖아.
1301100048.english: At this rate, I would have ended up getting nagged when Merope came back.

1301100049.korean: 고마워, 멜 공주 덕분에 눈이 확 떠졌어.
1301100049.english: Thank you, Princess Mel. Thanks to you, my eyes were wide open.

1301100050.korean: 뭘, 괜히 너희 자매들의 뒤치닥꺼리를 한두 번 한 게 아니다.
1301100050.english: Well, it’s not like I’ve cleaned up after you sisters once or twice for no reason.

1301100051.english: You don't have to think of it that hard.

1301100052.korean: 만일 메로페가 조금 바뀌었다고 해도 사춘기가 왔다고 생각하면 되지 않겠느냐.
1301100052.english: Even if Meropé has changed a little, couldn't we just assume that puberty has arrived?

1301100053.korean: 헤에, 메로페의 사춘기라 조금 보고 싶은걸?
1301100053.english: Hehe, Meropé's puberty... I'd actually like to see it a little.

1301100054.korean: 그럼, 우리 귀여운 막내가 나쁜 길로 빠지지 않도록 언니인 내가 힘써야겠지?
1301100054.english: Then, as the older sister, I should do my best to make sure our cute youngest doesn't go down the wrong path, right?

1301100055.korean: 다시 결심했어. 무슨 일이 있어도 메로페를 데려올 거야.
1301100055.english: I've made up my mind again. No matter what happens, I'm going to bring Meropé back.

1301100056.english: Even if it means beating its tail hard.

1301200002.korean: 아무런 말도 없이 갑자기 사라지지 말라고 그렇게 말했잖아요?
1301200002.english: I told you not to suddenly disappear without saying a word, didn't I?

1301200003.korean: 가져간 함대는 무사히 가지고 돌아온 거겠죠?
1301200003.english: The fleet they took must have returned safely, right?

1301200004.english: Nagging as soon as I got back…

1301200005.english: Do you intend to become my mother?

1301200006.english: Since I came back early this time, let's just let it slide.

1301200007.english: I also brought some news that you might like.

1301200009.korean: 뭐, 그건 조금 나중에 천천히 이야기하도록 하고…
1301200009.english: Well, let's talk about that slowly a little later...

1301200010.korean: 그럴싸한 말로 그냥 넘어갈 생각은 아니시겠죠?
1301200010.english: You aren't planning to just let this slide with some plausible excuse, are you?

1301200011.korean: 너는 대체 나를 뭐로 아는 거냐?
1301200011.english: What on earth do you think of me?

1301200012.korean: …할 일은 안 하고 책임감 없고 농땡이 피우는 지휘관?
1301200012.english: … A commander who doesn't do his job, is irresponsible, and slacks off?

1301200013.korean: 설사 그게 사실이라고 해도 해서는 안 되는 말이 있다는 걸 알아둬라.
1301200013.english: Even if that is true, keep in mind that there are things you must not say.

1301200014.korean: 애초에 일을 제대로 하면 듣지 않을 소리잖아요.
1301200014.english: That’s not something you would hear if you did your job properly in the first place.

1301200015.english: Let me ask you just one thing, little one.

1301200016.korean: 뭐예요, 갑자기? 평소 같으면 신경 쓰지 않고 바로 물어봤으면서.
1301200016.english: What's with the sudden change? Usually, you wouldn't hesitate to ask right away.

1301200018.korean: 대체 내 부관들은 하나같이 따박따박 말대답을 받아치는지 모르겠군.
1301200018.english: I don't know why all my subordinates talk back so bluntly.

1301200019.english: I have no intention of losing a single word.

1301200020.english: So, what is it? What are you going to ask?

1301200022.korean: 그래… 너, 델타에게 복수를 한 이후에는 어쩔 셈이냐?
1301200022.english: So... what do you plan to do after you get revenge on Delta?

1301200025.korean: 복수를 위해 포세이돈에 합류한 녀석이 복수를 끝낸 다음에 뭘 할지.
1301200025.english: What the guy who joined Poseidon for revenge will do after he finishes his revenge.

1301200026.english: That kind of thing… doesn't really matter.

1301200027.english: Just answer the question in silence.

1301200029.english: There is no need to think about it.

1301200030.korean: 제가 지금 생각 중인 건 델타에게 복수하는 것뿐이에요.
1301200030.english: All I'm thinking about right now is getting revenge on Delta.

1301200031.english: Because I have lived like this solely for that.

1301200033.korean: 그렇다면 슬슬 때가 된 것 같군.
1301200033.english: Then it looks like it's about time.

1301200035.english: This is the good news I mentioned earlier.

1301200036.korean: 이번에 어쩌다 보니 델타와 전면전을 하게 됐거든.
1301200036.english: I ended up in an all-out war with Delta this time.

1301200037.english: I don't mind if you just tweak it a bit and move on, but...

1301200038.korean: 실수로 힘 조절에 실패한 나머지 사고가 일어나도 어쩔 수 없는 거 아니겠어?
1301200038.english: If an accident happens because you accidentally failed to control your strength, it can't be helped, can it?

1301200039.english: How about it, kid? Are you going with me?

1301200040.english: ...Of course. I've been waiting for this moment.

1301200042.english: I will definitely fulfill that resolution.

1301300001.korean: 이거 참, 엡실론 녀석에게 정보 하나 들으러 왔다가 별걸 다 보고 가는군.
1301300001.english: Well, I came here just to get some information from Epsilon, but I’m seeing all sorts of things.

1301300002.korean: 오메가 녀석은 기어코 베타의 케스토스 히마스를 빼앗은 모양이고
1301300002.english: It looks like that Omega guy finally stole Beta's Kestos Himas.

1301300004.korean: 하핫, 대체 어디가 휴전 협정이라는 건지.
1301300004.english: Haha, I really don't know where the ceasefire agreement is.

1301300005.korean: 용무도 마쳤고 볼 사람도 다 봤고 뜻밖의 정보도 얻었으니 나는 이제 돌아가려고 하는데…
1301300005.english: I have finished my business, seen everyone I needed to see, and obtained some unexpected information, so I am about to head back…

1301300006.korean: 나에게 무슨 할 말이 있는 모양이지?
1301300006.english: It looks like you have something to tell me.

1301300010.english: Lemonade, the secretary leading Poseidon Industries.

1301300011.korean: 그리고 네 동생, 메로페를 부관으로 두고 있고 말이야.
1301300011.english: And I have your younger brother, Merope, as my deputy.

1301300012.korean: 그래서? 다른 바이오로이드도 없이 혼자서 날 찾아와 뭘 말하고 싶은 거지?
1301300012.english: So what? You came looking for me all alone, without any other bioroids. What do you want to say?

1301300014.english: Is my younger sibling doing well?

1301300015.korean: 쪼그만 녀석이 매일 같이 잔소리를 하는 걸 보면 잘 지내고 있다고 봐야겠지.
1301300015.english: Seeing how the little guy nags every day, I suppose I must be doing well.

1301300017.korean: 다짜고짜 내 동생을 돌려달라면서 덤벼들지 알았는데 덩치에 비해 생각보다 침착한 모양이군.
1301300017.english: I thought he would just lunge at me demanding my brother back, but he seems calmer than I expected for his size.

1301300018.korean: 내가 그렇게 똑똑한 건 아니지만 전력 차이 정도는 알 수 있어.
1301300018.english: I'm not that smart, but I can tell the difference in power.

1301300019.korean: 델타와 싸우면서 그 부분은 뼈저리게 알았으니까.
1301300019.english: I learned that painfully while fighting Delta.

1301300020.korean: 그리고 메로페는 스스로 원해서 따라간 거잖아.
1301300020.english: And Merope went along because she wanted to, didn't she?

1301300021.korean: 게다가 일단 너는 나와 메로페를 구해준 생명의 은인이기도 하니 지금 당장 적대할 생각은 없어.
1301300021.english: Besides, since you are a lifesaver who saved me and Merope, I have no intention of being hostile right now.

1301300022.korean: …나와 메로페를 구해줘서 고마워. 이 말은 하고 싶었어.
1301300022.english: … Thank you for saving me and Merope. I wanted to say this.

1301300023.korean: 신경 쓰지 마라. 나는 그저 재밌어 보이는 녀석을 찾았을 뿐이니까.
1301300023.english: Don't worry about it. I just found a guy who looked interesting.

1301300024.korean: 그리고, 지금이라는 건 언젠가는 나에게 덤비겠다는 거겠지?
1301300024.english: And, "now" implies that you intend to challenge me someday, right?

1301300025.korean: 물론이야. 필요하다면 널 쓰러트리고 내 동생을 데려올 거야.
1301300025.english: Of course. If necessary, I'll take you down and bring my brother back.

1301300026.korean: 하핫! 누가 자매 아니랄까 봐 당돌한 면은 똑같군, 쓰러트리겠다는 말을 당사자 앞에서 하고 말이야.
1301300026.english: Haha! Just like sisters, you're exactly audacious, saying you'd take me down right in front of me.

1301300027.english: … … Hmm, I think I said this last time.

1301300028.korean: 내가 여기서 널 죽여버릴 수도 있다는 생각은 못 한 모양이지?
1301300028.english: You didn't seem to think I could kill you right here, did you?

1301300029.korean: 내 입으로 말하기는 부끄럽지만, 나는 가디언 시리즈 중에서는 아주 강하거든?
1301300029.english: It's embarrassing to say this myself, but I'm actually quite strong in the Guardian series, you know?

1301300030.korean: 혼자서 널 이길 수는 없지만, 주인님이 도와주시러 오실 때까지 시간 끄는 정도는 할 수 있어!
1301300030.english: I can't beat you on my own, but I can stall for time until Master comes to help!

1301300032.korean: 하하하하! 이거 참, 어떻게 반응이 하나 같이 다 똑같은지.
1301300032.english: Hahaha! Seriously, how is it that every single reaction is exactly the same?

1301300033.english: It must be the influence of that last human.

1301300034.korean: 반드시 자신들을 구해주러 올 거라는 그 믿음 말이야.
1301300034.english: I mean that belief that someone will definitely come to save them.

1301300035.korean: 실제로 아까부터 숨어 있는 놈들의 기척이 느껴지는 게 분명 어딘가에서 지켜보고 있는 거겠지.
1301300035.english: Actually, I've been feeling the presence of those guys hiding for a while now, so they must be watching from somewhere.

1301300037.korean: 나도 지금 당장은 뭘 할 기분이 아니니 더 할 말이 없다면 난 가보도록 하마.
1301300037.english: I'm not in the mood to do anything right now, so if you have nothing more to say, I'll be going.

1301300039.korean: 뭐냐, 아직 더 할 말이 남았나?
1301300039.english: What? Do you still have more to say?

1301300040.korean: 나는 언젠가 반드시 내 동생을 데려갈 거야.
1301300040.english: I will definitely take my younger sibling with me someday.

1301300043.english: Please take good care of my little brother, Meropé.

1301400005.english: You're not a stalker, so stop following me around.

1301400006.korean: 스토커라뇨! 저는 그냥 존경하는 대장님의 모습을 이 두 눈에 새겨두고자 따라가는 것뿐인데요!
1301400006.english: Stalker?! I'm just following you to engrave the image of the Captain I respect into my own two eyes!

1301400008.korean: 그래서, 이번에는 또 무슨 말을 하려고?
1301400008.english: So, what are you going to say this time?

1301400010.korean: 이왕 몰타까지 온 김에 관광이나 같이하실 생각 없으세요?
1301400010.english: Since you're already in Malta, would you like to go sightseeing together?

1301400012.korean: 에이, 그러지 마시고 한번 같이 둘러봐 주세요. 몰타에 오르카 파크도 하나 생겼다구요!
1301400012.english: Come on, don't be like that. Please take a look around with me. There's an Orca Park in Malta, you know!

1301400013.korean: 뭐냐, 그건? 그러고 보니 지난번에 왔을 때와 다르게 뭔가가 생기긴 했군.
1301400013.english: What is that? Come to think of it, something has changed since the last time I was here.

1301400014.english: It's a theme park made by Orca, and it's a real amusement park.

1301400015.korean: 관람차부터 롤러코스터, 유령의 집까지 없는 게 없다고요.
1301400015.english: From Ferris wheels to roller coasters and haunted houses, there is nothing missing.

1301400016.korean: 너는 내가 테마파크에서 하하호호 놀고 있는 모습이 상상이 되냐?
1301400016.english: Can you imagine me laughing and having fun at a theme park?

1301400017.english: Uh... um... honestly, it doesn't really work out.

1301400018.korean: 하지만 그렇기 때문에 더더욱 보고 싶은데요?
1301400018.english: But that is precisely why I want to see it even more.

1301400019.english: Like the sight of the Captain riding a carousel

1301400020.korean: 대장님이 유령의 집에서 겁에 질린 모습이라던가
1301400020.english: Like the captain looking terrified in the haunted house

1301400021.korean: 마지막에는 대장님이 아서와 함께 관람차를 타고…
1301400021.english: In the end, the Captain rides the Ferris wheel with Arthur…

1301400022.korean: 관람자가 꼭대기에 올라갔을 때쯤 두 사람은…
1301400022.english: By the time the spectator reached the top, the two people…

1301400024.korean: 하아, 잠깐 안 본 사이 대체 누구에게 뭘 배운 거냐.
1301400024.english: Haa, who on earth did you learn anything from while I wasn't looking?

1301400025.korean: 후후, 제 친구 탈론페더에게 새로운 걸 좀 배웠죠.
1301400025.english: Hehe, I learned something new from my friend Talonfeather.

1301400026.korean: 각성... 새로운 눈이 떠졌다고 해야 할까요?
1301400026.english: Awakening... Should I say that a new eye has opened?

1301400027.korean: 탈론페더 또 그 녀석이냐? 대체 어떤 놈인지 참 궁금하군.
1301400027.english: Talonfeather, is it that guy again? I'm really curious what kind of person he is.

1301400028.korean: 어? 얼마 전에 보신 거 아니에요? 그때 대장님의 사진을 찍었다고 들었는데.
1301400028.english: Huh? Didn't you see that recently? I heard you took a picture of the Captain back then.

1301400030.korean: 그 녀석이구나? 어쩐지 좀 이상한 놈이라고 생각했는데...
1301400030.english: So it's him? I thought he was a bit strange...

1301400031.korean: 좀 특이한 친구긴 하지만 나쁜 얘는 아니에요. 좋은 걸 같이 공유도 해준다고요!
1301400031.english: He's a bit of a unique friend, but he's not a bad person. He even shares good things with you!

1301400032.english: Oh, while we're at it, would you like to watch it with us, Captain?

1301400033.english: I will never watch it, even if I die.

1301400034.korean: 날 꺾겠다고 자신만만하게 말하길래 뭔가 단단히 준비하고 있을 줄 알았는데.
1301400034.english: He spoke so confidently that he would defeat me, so I thought he would be well-prepared.

1301400035.korean: 이상한 취미나 만들고 원래 내 참모가 돼야 했을 녀석이 이렇게 변했다고 생각하니 머리가 어지럽다.
1301400035.english: It makes my head spin to think that the guy who was supposed to be my aide has changed like this, developing strange hobbies.

1301400036.korean: 대장님을 꺾겠다는 생각은 지금도 변함 없는 걸요?
1301400036.english: My determination to defeat the Captain hasn't changed, has it?

1301400037.korean: 대장님의 부관 자리를 빼앗은 메로페를 전략과 전술적으로 이겨서 반드시 대장님을 오르카로 데려올거에요.
1301400037.english: I will strategically and tactically defeat Merope, who stole the Captain's position as adjutant, and definitely bring the Captain to Orca.

1301400038.korean: 하하하하, 한놈은 내 부관을 데려가겠다고 하고 한놈은 나를 데려가겠다고 하고 아주 그냥 다 가져가지 그러냐.
1301400038.english: Hahaha, one guy says he'll take my subordinate and the other says he'll take me. Why don't you just take them all?

1301400041.english: If you are sincere, I feel the same way.

1301400042.korean: 뭐가 됐든 싸움이라면 나도 전력으로 받아주마.
1301400042.english: Whatever it is, if it's a fight, I'll take it on with all my might.

1301400043.korean: 내 예상이 맞다면 어쩌면 그리 멀지 않은 날이 될 거다.
1301400043.english: If my prediction is correct, that day might not be too far off.

1301400045.english: Captain, you are the one who needs to be prepared.

1301400046.english: Because our Orca will definitely win!

1301500008.english: Hehe, you closed your eyes, didn't you! I won!

1301500009.korean: 우으! 방금 건 치사해! 웃긴 표정을 짓다니 반칙이잖아!
1301500009.english: Ugh! That was unfair! Making a funny face is cheating!

1301500010.english: Cheating? This is all part of the snowball fight technique!

1301500011.korean: 후후, 이것이 바로 다년간의 수련 끝에 터득한 또 하나의 비기 이름하여…
1301500011.english: Hahaha, this is yet another secret technique I mastered after years of training—its name is…

1301500013.korean: 그럼 나도 그거 터득할래! 웃긴 표정을 짓는 거면…
1301500013.english: Then I'll master that too! If it's making funny faces…

1301500014.english: Like this? How about that? Is it funny?

1301500015.english: Hmm... when Sia does it... rather than being funny...

1301500018.korean: 우으! 그럼, 엠피 언니! 엠피 언니!
1301500018.english: Ugh! Then, MP Unnie! MP Unnie!

1301500023.korean: 후후후, 시아에게 웃긴 표정의 재능이 없는 걸지도?
1301500023.english: Hahaha, maybe Sia doesn't have the talent for funny faces?

1301500024.korean: 갈라테아! 다시 한번 승부야! 시아가 반드시 그 비기를 터득할 거야!
1301500024.english: Galatea! It's time for another match! Sia will definitely master that secret technique!

1301500025.english: Fine, I'll accept the challenge again and again!

1301500026.english: I'm not entirely sure, but hang in there...?

1301500028.korean: 멜리테, 어서 오세요. 생각보다 오래 걸리셨네요? 그리고 왠지 기분도 좋아 보이고.
1301500028.english: Welcome, Melite. It took longer than I expected. And you seem to be in a good mood for some reason.

1301500029.korean: 알키오네를 만나고 오는 길이다. 사령관과 둘이 찾아왔더구나.
1301500029.english: I am on my way back after meeting Alcyone. The Commander and I came to see her.

1301500030.english: I see. Will Alcyone be alright?

1301500031.korean: 제독이 곁에 있으니 괜찮을 거다. 오히려 좋은 분위기였다.
1301500031.english: It will be fine since the Admiral is by my side. In fact, the atmosphere was good.

1301500032.korean: 알키오네의 그런 모습을 보자니 옛날 생각이 나더구나.
1301500032.english: Seeing Alcyone like that reminded me of the old days.

1301500033.korean: 그때는 힘든 나날을 보내면서도 평화로운 날에는 다 같이 웃으며 지냈었지.
1301500033.english: Back then, even though we went through tough days, we all laughed together on peaceful days.

1301500034.korean: 맞아요… 힘들었지만 그래도 알키오네 덕분에 웃을 수 있었어요.
1301500034.english: That's right... It was tough, but thanks to Alcyone, I was able to smile.

1301500035.korean: 그러니, 이번에는 알키오네 계속 웃을 수 있게 도와주자꾸나.
1301500035.english: So, this time, let's help Alcyone keep smiling.

1301500041.english: Oh my! This shouldn't be cute...

1301500042.korean: 아하하, 잘은 모르겠지만 삐진 시아도 귀엽구나.
1301500042.english: Ahaha, I'm not entirely sure, but sulking Sia is cute too.

1301500044.english: It is a really peaceful day.

1301600001.korean: 하하하하! 언니~ 이거 봐라? 방패로 서핑하는 거 보여줄까?
1301600001.english: Hahaha! Big sister~ Look at this? Shall I show you surfing with a shield?

1301600002.korean: 알키오네! 마이아 언니가 방패로 서핑하지 말라고 몇 번이나 말했잖아!
1301600002.english: Alcyone! Maia told you so many times not to surf with your shield!

1301600004.english: Yeah, right. I just arrived. Alcyone.

1301600006.korean: 언니 말은 귓등으로도 안 듣는다 이거지? 응?
1301600006.english: So you don't listen to a single word I say, do you? Huh?

1301600007.korean: 언니, 하, 한 번만 봐 줘! 오늘은 쉬어도 된다고 박사님들이 그러셨잖아!
1301600007.english: Sister, ha, please let me off just this once! The doctors said I could take a break today!

1301600008.korean: 쉬어도 된다고 했지, 무기로 서핑하라고 하진 않았잖아!
1301600008.english: I told you it was okay to rest, but I didn't tell you to surf with weapons!

1301600009.korean: 엘렉트라, 아스타로페가 그러던데 너도 알키오네 방패에 올라 타 서핑했다고 그러던데?
1301600009.english: Electra, Astarophe said you surfed on Alcyone's shield too, didn't she?

1301600011.english: Sister, are you the only one sneaking out?

1301600012.korean: 맞아. 언니 가끔 보면 혼자 안한 척 하더라?
1301600012.english: Right. Sometimes I see you acting like you didn't do it all by yourself.

1301600014.korean: 타이게테, 켈라이노. 그나저나 메로페 어디 있어?
1301600014.english: Taigete, Celaino. By the way, where is Merope?

1301600015.korean: 메로페? 박사님들이 수영복 준 거 입고 온다고 탈의실 갔던데?
1301600015.english: Merope? I saw her go to the changing room to wear the swimsuit the doctors gave her.

1301600016.korean: 가만 보면 박사님들은 메로페만 예뻐하는 것 같더라. 나도 수영복 입고 싶었는데…
1301600016.english: Come to think of it, it seems like the doctors only have a soft spot for Merope. I wanted to wear a swimsuit too...

1301600017.korean: …난 솔직히 그 쫄쫄이 원피스 수영복 그냥 줘도 안 입을 것 같아.
1301600017.english: … Honestly, I don't think I would wear that tight-fitting one-piece swimsuit even if you just gave it to me.

1301600018.english: Do you want to wear something like that?

1301600019.korean: 입고 싶다는 건 아니고! 그, 그냥… 메로페한테만 신경 써주는 게… 나도, 나도 나름 막내였는데.
1301600019.english: It's not like I want to wear it! Um, just... paying attention only to Meropé... I mean, I was the youngest too, after all.

1301600020.korean: 뭐야, 켈라이노? 너 지금 막내 질투하는 거야? 푸하하하~
1301600020.english: What, Kelaino? Are you jealous of the youngest? Hahaha~

1301600021.korean: 자, 우리 삐진 켈라이노. 언니가 화 좀 풀어줄까? 웃차!
1301600021.english: Here, my sulking Kelaino. Shall Big Sister cheer you up? Oops!

1301600022.english: Eek?! What are you doing, sis… Kyaaaah!

1301600023.korean: 아스타로페 언니! 우리 지정된 구역 벗어나면 안 돼, 알았지?!
1301600023.english: Astarope! We can't leave the designated area, got it?!

1301600024.korean: 짜잔! 천재 병약 범고래 미소녀 등장!
1301600024.english: Ta-da! Introducing the genius, sickly killer whale beauty!

1301600025.english: Wow, Meropé. That swimsuit is really cute!

1301600026.korean: 우음… 꼬리도 그렇고… 수영복이 너무 조여서 답답해.
1301600026.english: Ugh... the tail too... and the swimsuit is so tight it feels stuffy.

1301600027.korean: 우와~ 이거 봐 알키오네 언니! 수영복 이름에 메로페까지 써 있어!
1301600027.english: Wow~ Look at this, Alcyone! The swimsuit even has "Merope" written on it!

1301600030.korean: 우리 막내 너무 귀엽다. 언니랑 서핑 한 번 해볼까?
1301600030.english: Our youngest is so cute. Shall we try surfing together?

1301600031.korean: 언니, 메로페 말고 나도 한 번 태워 줘. 응? 응?
1301600031.english: Unnie, give me a ride too, not Meropé. Huh? Huh?

1301600032.korean: 그럼 타이게테부터 태워줄까? 자, 얼른 타자~
1301600032.english: Then, shall I give you a ride on the Taigete first? Come on, let's get on!

1301600033.korean: 야 알키오네! 방패로 서핑하지 말라 했잖아!
1301600033.english: Hey Alcyone! I told you not to surf with your shield!

1301600035.english: They look huge, but they're just kids...

1301600036.korean: 마이아 언니! 언니도 같이 놀자, 응?
1301600036.english: Maia unnie! Let's play together, okay?

1301600037.korean: ...오늘은 눈 감아주는 거다? 알았어, 같이 갈게.
1301600037.english: ...So you're turning a blind eye today? Got it, I'll go with you.

1301600039.english: Sisters! I… I want to play with you too!

1301600041.korean: 기, 기다려 언니들! 나만 두고 가기야?!
1301600041.english: W-wait, sisters! Are you really leaving me behind?!

1301600042.korean: 하아! 하아! 하아! 언니! 나 좀 기다려 주지… 흐이잉…
1301600042.english: Haa! Haa! Haa! Sister! Couldn't you wait for me... Hiiiing...

1301600043.english: Haha, I'm really sorry about this.

1301600044.korean: 응? 언니… 목소리가 갑자기 왜 그래?
1301600044.english: Huh? Sister... what's wrong with your voice all of a sudden?

1301600045.korean: 내가 아직도 네 언니로 보이나... 메로페?
1301600045.english: Do I still look like your older sister... Meropé?

1301600046.korean: 델타?! 어... 어째서 네가 여기에?! 내 언니들, 언니들은 어디 있지?
1301600046.english: Delta?! Uh... why are you here?! My sisters, where are they?

1301600047.korean: 아, 언니들? 알키오네한테 보내 준 선물인데… 아~ 넌 따로 안 받아봤겠네?
1301600047.english: Ah, sisters? It's a gift I sent to Alcyone... Ah, I suppose you haven't received one separately?

1301600048.english: This is, the older sisters' tails… O-ooh?!

1301600049.korean: 우웩… 콜록, 콜록콜록! 우읍! ...내 언니들을 어쨌어?! 용서 못해 델타!
1301600049.english: Ugh… Cough, cough cough! Ugh! ...What did you do to my sisters?! I can't forgive you, Delta!

1301600052.korean: 제법 똑똑하구나. 알키오네는 내가 마리오네트로 개조한 자매들을 다 죽여버렸는데.
1301600052.english: You're quite smart. Alcyone killed all the sisters I turned into marionettes.

1301600053.korean: 알키오네 언니?! 말해 델타! 언니는... 언니는 어디있어!!
1301600053.english: Alcyone?! Tell me, Delta! You... where are you!!

1301600054.english: Here, this is your older sister, Alcyone.

1301600055.korean: 언니… 머리에 총을… 그리고 그 못은… 안 돼 언니… 언니, 언니이!!
1301600055.english: Sister... a gun to the head... and that nail... No, Sister... Sister, Sisteryy!!

1301600056.korean: 용서 못해! 죽여버리겠어 델타! 네 목을 베서 언니들 무덤에 바칠 거야!!
1301600056.english: I can't forgive you! I'm going to kill you, Delta! I'm going to cut off your head and offer it on my sisters' graves!!

1301600057.english: I'll kill you! I'll kill you! I said I'll kill you!… Aaaaaaaah!!

1301600058.korean: 하아… 하! 흐읏… 으읏… 꾸, 꿈...?
1301600058.english: Haa… Ha! Hng… Ugh… A, a dream...?

1301600060.korean: 마이아 언니… 엘렉트라 언니… 아스타로페, 타이게테, 켈라이노 언니…
1301600060.english: Sister Maia... Sister Electra... Astarope, Taygete, Sister Celaino...

1301600064.english: I'm going to kill Delta and take her to my sisters' graves.

1302100003.korean: …후우, 언제까지 그렇게 삐진 채로 있을 거야?
1302100003.english: …Phew, how long are you going to stay sulking like that?

1302100004.korean:
알키오네…
마음은 이해하지만 어쩔 수 없는 경우도 있는 거잖아?
1302100004.english:
Alcyone…
 I understand how you feel, but there are times when it can't be helped, you know?

1302100005.korean: 그건, 그렇지만… 그리고 삐진 거 아니야.
1302100005.english: That is, but... and I'm not sulking.

1302100006.english: Does MP think this is okay?

1302100007.english: … There’s no way I’d think it’s okay.

1302100008.korean: 너에게 이야기를 들었을 때 나도 분하다고 생각했어.
1302100008.english: I felt angry too when I heard the story from you.

1302100010.korean:
하지만 이번만큼은 사령관님이 하신 말씀이 맞아.
너도 사실 머리로는 이해하고 있잖아.
1302100010.english:
But this time, the Commander is right.
 You actually understand it in your head, don't you?

1302100012.korean:
자, 자, 두 사람 다 거기까지 하거라.
둘이 싸울 정도로 사이가 좋다는 건 잘 알았다.
1302100012.english:
Now, now, both of you stop there.
 I knew very well that the two of them were close enough to fight.

1302100015.korean: 음! 살라시아와 갈라테아 두 사람과 잠깐 놀아주고 오는 길이다.
1302100015.english: Hmm! I'm on my way back after playing with Salasia and Galatea for a bit.

1302100016.korean:
보아하니 알키오네에게 무슨 일이 있었던 모양인데
상황도 그렇고 제독 얘기가 나온 걸 보니 가벼운 문제는 아닌 것 같구나.
1302100016.english:
It looks like something happened to Alcyone.
 Given the situation and the fact that the Admiral was mentioned, it seems this is not a trivial matter.

1302100017.korean: 얼마 전까지만 해도 꼬리로 꼬옥 붙잡을 정도로 사이가 좋더니 그새 싸우기라고 했느냐?
1302100017.english: Just a short while ago, you were close enough to hold on tight with your tails, so how could you start fighting already?

1302100018.korean:
싸웠다거나 그런 거 아니야!
단지, 납득을 하기가 어려웠을 뿐이야.
1302100018.english:
It's not like we fought or anything!
 It's just that it was difficult to accept.

1302100019.korean:
멜리테, 그게…
저도 알키오네에게 들어서 알았지만 이번 작전과 관련된 일이 좀 있었어요.
1302100019.english:
Melite, that is…
 I also found out about it from Alcyone, but there was a bit of a matter related to this operation.

1302100021.korean: 주인님, 그럼 나는 이번 작전에서 언제 등장하면 되는 거야?
1302100021.english: Master, then when am I supposed to appear in this operation?

1302100022.korean: 후후, 메로페 내가 등장하면 많이 놀라겠지?
1302100022.english: Hehe, Merope, you'll be really surprised when I show up, won't you?

1302100023.english: Master? What did you just say?

1302100024.korean:
어? 왜?
언니인 내가 메로페를 정신 차리게 해서 데려와야 하는 게 아니야?
1302100024.english:
Huh? Why?
 Shouldn't I, as the older sister, be the one to snap Merope out of it and bring her back?

1302100025.english: I will explain that to you.

1302100026.korean:
이번 작전은 레모네이드 델타가 죽었다는 걸 모르는 메로페를 상대로 우리 오르카가
델타의 부대를 연기하고 의도적으로 패배함으로써 메로페의 복수를 완성하는 게 목표에요.
1302100026.english:
In this operation, our Orca is against Merope, who is unaware that Lemonade Delta is dead.
 The goal is to complete Merope's revenge by acting as Delta's unit and intentionally losing them.

1302100027.korean: 그러기 위해서는 델타의 부대로 보일 필요가 있고 그렇게 준비가 진행되고 있어요.
1302100027.english: To do so, we need to appear as Delta's unit, and preparations are underway to do so.

1302100028.korean:
그러니 이번 작전에 참전하시기에는 무리가 있습니다.
연기하는 델타군에 알키오네 님이 있으면 누가 봐도 이상하니까요.
1302100028.english:
Therefore, it would be difficult for you to participate in this operation.
 Because it would look strange to anyone if Lady Alcyone were in the acting Delta Army.

1302100029.korean:
메로페 입장에서 보면 오히려 충격일 겁니다.
몰타에 잠들어 있을 자신의 언니가 델타 쪽에 있는 걸로 보이니 말이죠.
1302100029.english:
From Merope's perspective, it would actually be a shock.
 It seems that her older sister, who is supposed to be asleep in Malta, is in the Delta region.

1302100031.korean:
이건 알키오네 님뿐만 아니라 머메이드 부대 분들도 마찬가지예요.
메로페와 친분이 있는 사람은 이번 작전에서 제외될 거예요.
1302100031.english:
This applies not only to Lady Alcyone but also to the Mermaid Troops.
 Anyone who is close to Merope will be excluded from this operation.

1302100033.korean:
과연, 그러니까 알키오네는 메로페를 데려오는 역할을 하고 싶었지만
그러지 못해서 한 마디로 삐졌다는 거구나.
1302100033.english:
Indeed, that is to say, Alcyone wanted to play the role of bringing Merope, but
 So, basically, you're sulking because you couldn't do that.

1302100034.korean:
그러니까 삐진 거 아니라니까.
난 그냥…
1302100034.english:
I'm telling you, I'm not sulking.
 I just…

1302100035.korean: 메로페를 정신 차리게 하는 게 언니인 내 역할이라고 생각했을 뿐이야.
1302100035.english: I just thought it was my role as the older sister to bring Meropé back to her senses.

1302100036.english: Haha, isn't that basically the same thing?

1302100037.korean:
그래도 마음은 나도 이해가 가는구나.
엠피트리테가 분하다고 말하는 이유도 알겠다.
1302100037.english:
Still, I can understand how you feel.
 I understand why Amphitrite says she is upset.

1302100038.korean:
메로페와 우리는 델타를 상대로 몰타를 지키기 위해 함께 싸워온 동료다.
그리고 그 동료가 델타에게 복수하기 위해 움직이고 있지.
1302100038.english:
Merope and I are comrades who have fought together to defend Malta against Delta.
 And that colleague is on the move to take revenge on Delta.

1302100039.korean: 그렇다면 그게 설사 연극이라 할지라도 돕는 게 동료로서 해야 할 도리이지 않겠느냐?
1302100039.english: In that case, even if it is just a play, wouldn't it be the duty of a colleague to help?

1302100040.korean: 그렇지만 우리가 이번 작전에서 나설 자리가 없는 건 사실인걸?
1302100040.english: But it's true that there is no place for us in this operation, isn't it?

1302100041.korean:
정말로 그렇게 생각하느냐?
이 작전은 연극이다. 연극이기 때문에 할 수 있는 일도 있는 법이다.
1302100041.english:
Do you really think so?
 This operation is a play. And because it is a play, there are things that can be done.

1302100043.korean: 후후, 우리가 오르카 소속이라고 해서 연극에서도 반드시 이쪽에 있을 필요는 없지 않겠느냐?
1302100043.english: Haha, just because we belong to Orca doesn't mean we necessarily have to be on this side in the play, does it?

1302100045.korean: 아쉽지만 이번 작전에서 알키오네는 참전하지 않아.
1302100045.english: Unfortunately, Alcyone will not be participating in this operation.

1302100046.english: Leave it to me, I will definitely bring Merope back.

1302200001.korean: - 작전 개시까지 이제 수일 남은 상황. 나는 현시점의 중간보고를 받았다.
1302200001.english: With only a few days remaining until the start of the operation, I received the current interim report.

1302200002.korean: 다른 작전에 사용 중인 함선을 제외하고 현재 가용할 수 있는 함선의 모든 정비가 끝났어요.
1302200002.english: Maintenance on all currently available ships has been completed, with the exception of those in use for other operations.

1302200003.korean:
그리고 오빠가 부탁한 대로 각 함선에 탈출 포트와 방어벽을 추가했어.
이거라면 항행 불능이 되어도 탑승자가 탈출할 때까지 시간을 벌 수 있을 거야.
1302200003.english:
And just as my brother asked, I added escape pods and defensive walls to each ship.
 With this, even if it becomes unnavigable, we will be able to buy time until the passengers can escape.

1302200004.korean:
다른 누구도 아닌 오빠의 부탁인데 이 정도쯤이야.
게다가 유럽의 자원과 인프라를 손에 넣은 지금의 오르카라면 그렇게 어렵지 않은 부탁인걸.
1302200004.english:
It's a request from my brother, of all people, so this is nothing.
 Besides, for the current Orca, having secured Europe's resources and infrastructure, it wouldn't be such a difficult request.

1302200005.korean:
하지만 시간이 부족해서 아쉬웠어요.
조금 더 시간이 있었더라면 좀 더 다양한 기능을 넣어봤을 텐데…
1302200005.english:
However, it was a shame that I didn't have enough time.
 If I had a little more time, I would have added a wider variety of features…

1302200006.korean:
아자즈 언니도 참~
그런 기능들을 넣었다간 큰일 난다니깐!
1302200006.english:
Azaz, really~
 I'm telling you, it would be a disaster if we added features like that!

1302200007.korean: - 아무래도 닥터가 아자즈의 폭주를 잘 막아준 모양이다.
1302200007.english: It looks like the Doctor did a good job of stopping Azaz's rampage.

1302200008.korean: 아, 그래도 함선이 점프해서 360도 회전하는 기능은 보고 싶었을지도?
1302200008.english: Ah, but maybe they still wanted to see the feature where the spaceship jumps and rotates 360 degrees?

1302200009.korean: - 함선이 점프해서 360도 회전? 뭐야, 그거? 궁금해 나도 보고 싶어.
1302200009.english: - A spaceship jumps and spins 360 degrees? What is that? I'm curious, I want to see it too.

1302200010.korean: 아쉽지만 그런 시간은 없으니 다음 기회에 하셔야 할 겁니다.
1302200010.english: It’s a shame, but we don’t have that time, so you’ll have to do it next time.

1302200011.korean: - 음, 못 보는 건가. 점프해서 360도 회전…
1302200011.english: - Hmm, can't see it? Jump and spin 360 degrees...

1302200012.english: The deployment of AGS ships is also complete.

1302200013.korean: 아니, 각 함선에 AGS를 배치하도록 지시하시지 않으셨습니까?
1302200013.english: Wait, didn't you order the deployment of AGS to each ship?

1302200014.korean: 지시에 따라 최선을 다해 임무를 완수한 자에게 그런 차가운 반응이라니…
1302200014.english: To receive such a cold reaction to someone who did their best to complete the mission according to orders…

1302200015.english: Are you planning to discriminate against AGS right now?

1302200016.english: Are you saying that AGS is not a member of Orca?

1302200017.korean: 오르카의 AGS여, 단결하라! 리턴즈 한 번 보여드립니까?
1302200017.english: Orca's AGS, unite! Shall we show you Returns?

1302200018.korean: 누구에게 지시했다 한들 당연히 보고는 각 그룹의 대표가 해야 하는 게 아니겠습니까?
1302200018.english: Regardless of who was instructed, shouldn't the representative of each group naturally be the one to report?

1302200019.korean:
그렇기에! 이 합법적이고 민주적인 절차에 따라 AGS의 대표가 된 Mr~~ 알~프레드!
바로 제가 직접 사령관님께 보고하러 온 것입니다.
1302200019.english:
Therefore! Mr. Alfred, who has become the representative of AGS through this legal and democratic process!
 I have come to report directly to the Commander.

1302200020.korean:
Mr 알프레드 AGS 대표…!
아, 이 얼마나 아름답고 멋진 울림인가!
1302200020.english:
Mr. Alfred, CEO of AGS…!
 Ah, what a beautiful and wonderful resonance!

1302200021.korean: - 나는 얼마 전 알프레드가 가상공간에서 진행했던 부정 선거 운동을 떠올렸다.
1302200021.english: I recalled the election fraud campaign Alfred had conducted in virtual space a while ago.

1302200022.korean: - 분명 선거관리 위원회의 입회하에 다시 하라고 말했는데, 권력욕이 넘치는 게 포기할 줄 모르네.
1302200022.english: I clearly told them to do it again in the presence of the Election Commission, but they are so power-hungry that they refuse to give up.

1302200023.korean:
쿠후훗! 쿠후후훗!
그렇죠, 선거를 하긴 했지요.
1302200023.english:
Kuhuhut! Kuhuhuhut!
 That's right, we did hold an election.

1302200025.korean: 폐하, 이런 말씀드리기 외람되옵니다만 저 말은 사실입니다.
1302200025.english: Your Majesty, I may be presumptuous to say this, but those words are true.

1302200026.korean: 아니요, Mr 알프레드 님이 AGS 대표라는 사실 말입니다.
1302200026.english: No, I mean the fact that Mr. Alfred is the representative of AGS.

1302200027.korean:
얼마 전, 선거관리 위원회의 입회하에 정식으로 AGS 대표를 뽑기 위한 선거가 열렸고
그 결과 Mr 알프레드 님이 당선되었습니다.
1302200027.english:
Not long ago, an election to formally elect an AGS representative was held in the presence of the Election Management Committee, and
 As a result, Mr. Alfred was elected.

1302200028.korean:
이 부분은 알파 님이 담당하셨는데 폐하께도 아시다시피 최근 리스트컷 님에게 붙잡혀 계십니다.
그래서 미처 보고를 드리지 못한 걸로 생각됩니다.
1302200028.english:
Alpha was in charge of this part, but as Your Majesty is aware, he has recently been captured by Listcut.
 So, I believe I was unable to report it.

1302200029.korean: - 지금까지 정식은 아니지만 알바트로스와 에이다는 이미 오르카의 AGS 대표라고 봐도 무방하다.
1302200029.english: Although not yet official, it is safe to say that Albatross and Ada are already the representatives of Orca's AGS.

1302200030.korean: - 이 둘이 아니더라도 선거에 관심 있는 AGS가 분명 있었을 텐데 그 전부를 이기고 알프레드가 당선됐다고?
1302200030.english: Even if it wasn't these two, there must have been other AGS interested in the election, so you're saying Alfred won against all of them?

1302200031.korean: 에이다 님은 자신은 우주에 있으니 지상의 일은 지상에서 담당하는 게 맞다며 참여하지 않았습니다.
1302200031.english: Ada did not participate, saying that since she was in space, it was right for matters on Earth to be handled there.

1302200032.korean: 알바트로스 중장은 자신은 이미 군사 권력을 쥐고 있으니 민정에 대한 권력까지 얻어 독재자로 보일 생각은 없다며 참여를 거부하였습니다.
1302200032.english: Lieutenant General Albatross refused to participate, stating that since he already held military power, he had no intention of gaining power over civilian affairs as well and appearing as a dictator.

1302200033.korean: 그 외의 AGS들도 관심이 없다, 일을 늘리고 싶지 않다, 몸집이 커서 회의에 참석할 수 없다 등의 이유로 선거에 불참.
1302200033.english: Other AGS members also did not participate in the election for reasons such as having no interest, not wanting to increase their workload, or being too large to attend meetings.

1302200034.korean: 그런 상황에서 부정 선거라도 잠깐 대표가 되었던 알프레드가 그냥 대표하면 되지 않아? 라는 이야기로 흘러갔고
1302200034.english: In that situation, the conversation drifted to the question, "Why doesn't Alfred, who briefly became the representative even through election fraud, just take the representative role?"

1302200035.korean: 그 틈을 노려 Mr 알프레드 님이 몇 가지 공약을 내걸어 환호 속에 당선되었습니다.
1302200035.english: Taking advantage of that opportunity, Mr. Alfred put forward several pledges and was elected amidst cheers.

1302200036.korean:
쿠후훗! 그렇게 된 겁니다!
저는 이제 명실상부 AGS의 대표라는 겁니다.
1302200036.english:
Kuhuhut! That's how it turned out!
 I am now the undisputed representative of AGS.

1302200037.korean: - 할 말은 많지만 정식으로 진행한 선거에서 당선되었다면 여기서 내가 더 할 수 있는 말은 없다.
1302200037.english: I have a lot to say, but if you were elected in a formal election, there is nothing more I can say here.

1302200038.korean:
감사합니다!
크흑, 참으로 길었습니다. 이 자리에 오기까지의 과정… 순탄하지만은 않았지요.
1302200038.english:
thank you!
 *Sob*, it has truly been a long journey. The process of getting to where I am today... it wasn't exactly smooth sailing.

1302200039.korean: 이런, 다시 떠올리기만 해도 눈물이 나오려고 하는군요.
1302200039.english: Oh dear, just thinking about it again makes me want to cry.

1302200040.korean: …눈물? Mr.알프레드 씨는 AGS인데 눈물이 나오는 건가요?
1302200040.english: … Tears? Mr. Alfred is an AGS, so are you crying?

1302200041.korean:
물론이지요. AGS에게도 감정이 있으니까요.
이 눈물은 마음의 눈물로… 잠깐, 아자즈 양? 그런 눈빛으로 다가오지 말아 주셨으면 합니다만?
1302200041.english:
Of course. After all, AGS has feelings too.
 These tears are tears of the heart… Wait, Miss Azaz? I’d appreciate it if you didn’t approach me with that kind of look.

1302200042.korean:
잠깐, 호기심… 보기만 정말로 보기만 할테니까요.
괜찮아요, 동력이 살아있는 로봇은 해체하진 않으니까요. 아, 분해는 해볼 수도…
1302200042.english:
Wait, curiosity… I’m just going to look, really just look.
 It's fine, we don't dismantle robots that are powered. Oh, wait, we could try taking them apart...

1302200043.korean:
같은 뜻이 아닙니까?
그리고 분명 보기만 한다고 하시지 않았나요? 으어엇!?
1302200043.english:
Isn't it the same meaning?
 And didn't you clearly say you were just looking? Ugh!?

1302200045.korean: - 전부터 아자즈가 알프레드에게 관심이 있는 건 알았는데… 큰일은 없겠지.
1302200045.english: I've known for a while that Azaz has been interested in Alfred... I don't think it will be a big deal.

1302200046.korean:
Mr 알프레드 AGS 대표가 내건 공약은 주 3일 근무제, 매달 과금에 사용할 수 있는 포인트 지급.
그리고 전지 교환 휴가 사용 등이 있습니다.
1302200046.english:
The pledges made by Mr. Alfred, the CEO of AGS, are a three-day workweek and the provision of points that can be used for monthly billing.
 And there are things like battery replacement and vacation usage.

1302200048.english: The other content is similar, would you like to hear more?

1302200049.korean: - 다음 AGS 대표는 절대 알프레드가 되지 않을 거라 생각했다.
1302200049.english: I thought Alfred would never be the next AGS representative.

1302200050.korean: - 공약 지키지 못한 당선자의 말로는 불 보듯 뻔하다.
1302200050.english: The fate of an elected official who fails to keep their promises is obvious.

1302200051.english: Excuse me for a moment, Admiral.

1302200052.english: Master, excuse me for a moment.

1302200053.korean: 그대에게 이번 작전과 관련해서 긴히 할 말이 있네.
1302200053.english: I have something important to tell you regarding this operation.

1302200054.korean: 듣자 하니 작전을 지휘하는 참모도 작전 내용에 조금 불만이 있었다고 들었는데 맞는가?
1302200054.english: I heard that even the staff officer in charge of the operation had some complaints about the details. Is that correct?

1302200055.korean: - 이번 작전은 델타의 부대를 연기하여 포세이돈과 전투를 치루고 고의로 패배해야 한다.
1302200055.english: - In this operation, Delta's unit must be put on a role to fight Poseidon and intentionally lose.

1302200056.korean: - 그 사실을 몰랐던 멀린은 메로페와의 승부할 생각에 불타오르고 있었지만, 사실을 전하자 적지 않게 충격을 받았다.
1302200056.english: Merlin, unaware of the truth, was burning with the desire to duel Merope, but was considerably shocked when the truth was revealed.

1302200057.korean: - '내가 그 꼬맹이에게 져야 한다고?' 아직도 그 부들거리면서 한 말이 잊히지가 않는다.
1302200057.english: "'You mean I have to lose to that little brat?' I still can't forget those words he said while trembling."

1302200058.english: So, I’m thinking of making a suggestion.

1302200059.korean: 후후, 모두에게 있어서 나쁜 제안은 아닐 거야.
1302200059.english: Hehe, it won't be a bad offer for everyone.

1302200060.korean: 두 사람 다 시간이 빠듯했을 텐데 수고했어.
1302200060.english: You both must have been pressed for time, so good job.

1302200062.korean: ...근데 알프레드, 또 네가 왜 여기 있어?
1302200062.english: ...But Alfred, why are you here again?

1302200063.english: I clearly gave the instructions to the Albatross, didn't I?

1302200064.korean: 하아… 또 부정 선거를 한 거야?
1302200064.english: Haa... Did they rigg the election again?

1302200065.korean: 응? 알프레드가 부정 선거를 한 거 말이지?
1302200065.english: Huh? You mean Alfred rigged the election?

1302200066.korean: 잠깐, 잠깐 그 얘기 지금 처음 듣는데?
1302200066.english: Wait, wait, this is the first time I've heard that.

1302200067.korean: 에이다와 알바트로스는? 선거에 참여 안 했어?
1302200067.english: What about Ada and Albatross? Didn't they participate in the election?

1302200068.english: Okay. Regardless of the process, congratulations on your election.

1302200069.korean: 그런데 아르망, 알프레드가 내건 공약이 뭐야?
1302200069.english: By the way, Armand, what is Alfred's pledge?

1302200071.english: Melite? And even Alcyone? What's going on?

1302200072.english: So it's the story of Merlin... That's right.

1302300001.korean: - 약속대로 감마에게 전면전을 선전 포고를 하기로 한 당일.
1302300001.english: - The day we were scheduled to declare all-out war on Gamma as promised.

1302300002.korean: - 오르카는 앞으로 일어날 일에 긴장감이 감돌고 있었다.
1302300002.english: Orca was filled with tension over what was about to happen.

1302300003.korean:
...이상으로 모든 준비가 완료되었습니다. 폐하
이제 남은 건 포세이돈에 선전 포고를 하는 것 뿐입니다.
1302300003.english:
...With that, all preparations are complete. Your Majesty
 All that remains now is to declare war on Poseidon.

1302300004.korean:
선전 포고라면 맡겨줘.
어떻게든 늦지 않고 완성할 수 있었어.
1302300004.english:
Leave the declaration of war to me.
 Somehow, I was able to finish it without being late.

1302300005.korean: 내가 말했잖아? 내가 이 일을 맡은 이상 알파를 완벽하게 델타 그 자체로 만들어 보이겠다고.
1302300005.english: Didn't I tell you? Since I took on this job, I said I would make Alpha into Delta itself perfectly.

1302300006.korean: 마지막에 가서는 내가 지도했지만 너무 똑같아서 순간 욱했다니까?
1302300006.english: I was the one coaching them in the end, but it was so identical that I actually lost my temper for a moment!

1302300007.english: I almost had a relapse of PTSD.

1302300008.korean: 아무튼, 누가 봐도 완벽한 연기일 거야. 그 부분은 내가 장담할게.
1302300008.english: Anyway, anyone can see that it's perfect acting. I guarantee that part.

1302300010.korean: 만약 이 전투가 연극이 아닌 진심을 다한 총력전이라고 해도 저희 오르카가 질 리는 없을 겁니다.
1302300010.english: Even if this battle were not a play but a full-scale war fought with all our might, there is no way our Orca would lose.

1302300011.korean: 유럽과 남미의 일부를 손에 넣은 지금 오르카는 매우 큰 세력으로 성장했습니다.
1302300011.english: Now that Orca has seized control of parts of Europe and South America, it has grown into a very powerful force.

1302300012.korean: 남은 비서 레모네이드 전부와 동시에 싸우는 건 아직 무리겠지만, 하나의 세력과의 전투라면 이길 수 있을 겁니다.
1302300012.english: It might be too difficult to fight all the remaining Secretaries Lemonade at the same time, but we should be able to win if we fight against just one faction.

1302300014.english: Yes, it is just as Your Majesty thinks.

1302300015.korean:
포세이돈 인더스트리의 창시자인 알렉산드로스 C. 패튼 회장.
그 감마를 만들어낸 인물인 만큼 전투광에 약육강식 성향의 소유자였습니다.
1302300015.english:
Alexandros C. Patton, Chairman and founder of Poseidon Industries.
 As the person who created that Gamma, he was a battle maniac with a survival-of-the-fittest mentality.

1302300016.korean:
바다를 지배하는 자가 세계를 지배한다.
포세이돈 인더스트리의 슬로건입니다.
1302300016.english:
He who rules the sea rules the world.
 This is the slogan of Poseidon Industries.

1302300017.korean: 그리고 그걸 증명하듯 세계 최고의 해군 전력을 보유하고 있지요.
1302300017.english: And as if to prove it, they possess the world's best naval power.

1302300018.korean:
압도적인 물량, 압도적인 화력. 전형적인 거함거포주의 사상의 해군입니다만
단순하면서도 최강이란 사실에는 의심의 여지가 없습니다.
1302300018.english:
Overwhelming numbers, overwhelming firepower. It is a navy based on the typical "big gun" ideology, but
 There is no room for doubt that it is simple yet the strongest.

1302300019.korean:
그런 상대와 전력을 다한 전면전을 펼친다면…
아니, 전면전이 아니라고 해도…
1302300019.english:
If we were to wage an all-out, full-scale war against such an opponent…
 No, even if it’s not an all-out war…

1302300020.korean: 지금까지처럼 피해와 희생 없이 이기기란 쉽지 않은 상대입니다.
1302300020.english: It is not an easy opponent to defeat without damage and sacrifice, as has been the case so far.

1302300021.korean:
폐하도 그걸 아시기에 직접적인 희생을 내지 않는 함대전을 선택하신 거겠지요.
후후, 정말 폐하답습니다.
1302300021.english:
Your Majesty must have known this, which is why you chose a fleet battle that would avoid direct casualties.
 Haha, that is truly fitting for Your Majesty.

1302300022.korean:
이야기가 길어졌습니다만, 이번 작전의 목표는 연극이 들키지 않고 적절한 타이밍에 패배하는 겁니다.
그러기 위해서는 작전 참모의 지휘가 중요합니다만…
1302300022.english:
I’ve gone on a bit long, but the goal of this operation is to lose at the right moment without the act being discovered.
 For that to happen, the command of the operations staff is important, but…

1302300023.english: I think there won't be any problems with her.

1302300024.korean: 좋아, 그럼 내가 할 일은 끝났으니 난 먼저 가서 준비하고 있을게.
1302300024.english: Okay, then I'm done with my work, so I'll go ahead and get ready.

1302300025.korean: 고생은 무슨 진짜 고생은 내 동생들이 했지. 아, 클로스컷은 제외하고.
1302300025.english: What hardship? My younger siblings were the ones who really suffered. Oh, except for the close-up cut.

1302300027.english: Hehehe, Commander, do you know that?

1302300028.english: Bioroids don't break as easily as you'd think...

1302300029.korean: 괜찮아, 이 정도면 아직 되돌릴 수 있어.
1302300029.english: It's okay, we can still turn it around at this point.

1302300030.korean: 정신을 회복하는 건 시간은 좀 걸리겠지만…
1302300030.english: It will take some time to recover my sanity, but...

1302300031.korean:
세 사람이라니? 나도?
아, 과연 그렇게 보고 있는 거구나.
1302300031.english:
Three people? Me too?
 Ah, so that is how you are seeing it.

1302300032.korean:
사령관 있잖아?
사실 이번 작전에 대한 이야기를 들었을 때 말이야.
1302300032.english:
You know the commander?
 Actually, when I heard about this operation...

1302300033.korean: 델타의 연기를 해야 할 사람은 알파가 아니라 내가 아닐까 하고 생각했어.
1302300033.english: I thought that I, not Alpha, might be the one who should be playing Delta.

1302300034.korean:
단순히 델타에 대해서 잘 알고 있으니까를 떠나서
오르카에 있는 그 누구보다 내가 델타와 닮았다고 느꼈으니까.
1302300034.english:
Beyond simply knowing Delta well
 Because I felt that I resembled Delta more than anyone else in Orca.

1302300035.korean: 사령관도 느꼈을 거야. 내가 같은 테일러라도 클로스컷과 많은 차이가 있다는 걸.
1302300035.english: The commander must have felt it too. That even though I am a tailor, there is a big difference between me and the close cut.

1302300036.korean:
거의 한 세기 동안 옆에 있었으니까 영향이 없는 편이 이상하지.
아무튼 적지 않게 나에게 영향을 준 건 틀림없는 사실이야.
1302300036.english:
It would be strange if it didn't have an impact, considering it has been right next to me for almost a century.
 Anyway, it is an undeniable fact that it influenced me quite a bit.

1302300037.korean:
인제 와서는 원래의 내 모습이 어땠는지조차 기억나지 않아.
오히려 처음부터 이 모습이지 않았을까 생각할 정도지.
1302300037.english:
Now that I've come this far, I can't even remember what I used to be like.
 In fact, it’s to the point where I think it might have looked like this from the beginning.

1302300038.korean: 델타는 음습한 미소로 계략을 짜고 잔혹하고 잔인하게 자비 없이 과감한 행동을 했어.
1302300038.english: Delta plotted with a sinister smile and acted daringly, cruelly, and mercilessly.

1302300039.korean:
동생을 구하기 위해서라지만, 나는 선택 받지 못한 동생들을 내 손으로 죽였어.
델타와 마찬가지로 잔혹하고 잔인하게 자비 없이 과감하게 말이야.
1302300039.english:
I said it was to save my younger siblings, but I killed the unchosen ones with my own hands.
 Just like Delta, cruel, brutal, merciless, and daring.

1302300040.korean:
그러니까 나에게는 사과하지 않아도 괜찮아.
적어도 무리하지는 않았어. 그저… 내 원래 모습의 일부를 보여줬을 뿐이니까.
1302300040.english:
So, it's okay if you don't apologize to me.
 At least I didn't push myself too hard. I just… showed a part of my true self.

1302300042.korean: - 나는 조용히 리스트컷에게 다가가 이마를 콕 찔렀다.
1302300042.english: I quietly approached Listcut and poked him on the forehead.

1302300043.english: - Hmm, it's still a cute scream.

1302300044.korean: - 굳이 긴말을 할 필요는 없다. 이미 다 끝난 일이니까.
1302300044.english: There is no need to say much. It is already over.

1302300045.korean: - 그러니까 지금은 한 가지의 사실만을 알려주면 된다.
1302300045.english: So, for now, you just need to tell me one fact.

1302300046.korean: - 그 사실 덕분에 지금의 리스트컷이 살아서 이곳에 있는 거니까.
1302300046.english: - Because it is thanks to that fact that the current List Cut is alive and here.

1302300049.korean:
아하하, 기습 공격에 꼼짝 없이 당했는걸? 갑자기 사령관이 너무 멋있게 보여.
이거 오늘 밤 못 참을지도…
1302300049.english:
Hahaha, I was completely caught off guard by the surprise attack. Suddenly, the commander looks so cool.
 I might not be able to hold out tonight...

1302300050.korean:
흐응, 어쩔 수 없나. 그럼 뽑아놓고 기다릴게.
일주일 치로 말이지.
1302300050.english:
Hmm, I guess it can't be helped. Then I'll pick it out and wait.
 For a week's worth, you know.

1302300051.korean: - 리스트컷은 그때 보았던 가벼운 미소를 띄었다.
1302300051.english: Listcut wore the light smile he had seen back then.

1302300052.korean:
송출 수신 장비 완료.
카메라 세팅 완료.
1302300052.english:
Transmission and reception equipment completed.
 Camera setup complete.

1302300053.korean: 포세이돈 함대로부터 통신 연결 신호 확인.
1302300053.english: Confirmed communication connection signal from Poseidon Fleet.

1302300055.korean: - 포세이돈에 작전 개시를 알리는 선전 포고를 준비가 끝났다.
1302300055.english: Preparations are complete for the declaration of war announcing the commencement of the operation to Poseidon.
