1302300056.english: Once you start, you can't stop.

1302300057.korean: 나는 레모네이드 델타… 나는 레모네이드 델타… 나는 레모네이드 델타…
1302300057.english: I am Lemonade Delta… I am Lemonade Delta… I am Lemonade Delta…

1302300059.english: At that moment, Alpha's atmosphere changed.

1302300063.english: That's a bit scary in a different sense.

1302300064.korean: 아르망은 이번 작전을 어떻게 예측하고 있어?
1302300064.english: How does Armand predict this operation?

1302300067.korean: 그러고 보니 오드리와 스타수어가 안보이는데 어디갔어?
1302300067.english: Come to think of it, I don't see Audrey and Starsuer. Where did they go?

1302300069.english: ...I did something I should be sorry to the three of them.

1302300073.korean: 봐봐, 이런 귀여운 비명을 지르는데 델타와 닮았을 리가 없잖아?
1302300073.english: Look, with a cute scream like that, there's no way it looks like Delta, right?

1302300074.english: You didn't make the wrong choice.

1302300075.korean: 이번에는 번호표 뽑아놔. 특례는 한 번뿐이니까.
1302300075.english: Get a number this time. You only get one chance for the special exemption.

1302300077.korean: 지금부터 포세이돈 함대에 선전 포고를 시작한다.
1302300077.english: I declare war on the Poseidon fleet from now on.

1302400002.korean:
…오히려 긴장하지 않는 게 이상하죠.
수년 동안 이날만을 기다려왔어요.
1302400002.english:
… It would actually be strange not to be nervous.
 I have been waiting for this day for years.

1302400003.korean: 제 손으로 델타를 묻어 버릴 이날을 말이죠.
1302400003.english: I mean this day when I will bury Delta with my own hands.

1302400004.korean:
호오, 어디서 나온 자신감인지는 모르겠지만
승리를 확신하는 태도는 별로 마음에 안 드는군.
1302400004.english:
Oh, I don't know where that confidence comes from, but...
 I don't really like the attitude of being confident of victory.

1302400005.korean:
확신할 수밖에요. 델타의 전력은 이미 오래전에 파악이 끝났어요.
유럽에 손에 넣었어도 성장하는 데는 한계가 있죠.
1302400005.english:
I have no choice but to be certain. Delta's capabilities were fully assessed a long time ago.
 Even if you have secured Europe, there are limits to growth.

1302400006.korean:
설사 그 한계치를 넘었다고 해도.
포세이돈 함대의 적수가 안 돼요.
1302400006.english:
Even if that limit has been exceeded.
 They are no match for Poseidon's fleet.

1302400007.korean:
과연, 그렇군.
꼬맹아 이 참에 한 가지 알려주마.
1302400007.english:
Indeed, that is the case.
 Hey kid, while we're at it, let me tell you something.

1302400008.korean:
전장에서는 무슨 일이 일어날지 모르는 법이다.
그렇기 때문에 전쟁이 재미있는 거지.
1302400008.english:
You never know what might happen on the battlefield.
 That is why war is fun.

1302400009.korean: [850km 지점 밖에서 다수의 함대 반응. 아군 함대 쪽으로 접근 중]
1302400009.english: [Multiple fleet reactions outside 850km. Approaching friendly fleet]

1302400010.korean: 오, 기다리고 있었다고 정말로 찾아올 줄이야.
1302400010.english: Oh, I can't believe you actually came to visit saying you were waiting.

1302400011.korean: 자, 그럼 어디 무슨 말을 하나 구경해보실까?
1302400011.english: Now then, shall we take a look at what I have to say?

1302400012.english: Connect with the Annihilator over there.

1302400015.korean: 한동안 쥐 죽은 듯이 조용하길래 북부에서 벌레들에게 당한 줄 알았는데 살아 있었나 보네?
1302400015.english: It was dead quiet for a while, so I thought you'd been attacked by bugs in the north, but looks like you're still alive?

1302400016.korean:
너무 조용하길래 걱정이 되어서 이렇게 찾아왔는데…
살아 있다니 정말 아쉬워.
1302400016.english:
It was so quiet that I was worried, so I came here to check it out...
 It's such a shame that you're alive.

1302400017.korean:
그래, 이왕 여기까지 찾아왔는데 빈손으로 돌아갈 수는 없으니…
오랜만에 친목회나 한 번 할까 하는데 어때?
1302400017.english:
Well, since I've come all this way, I can't go back empty-handed...
 I'm thinking of having a get-together for the first time in a while. What do you think?

1302400020.korean:
좋아! 완벽해! 그렇게 나오시겠다 이거지?
재미있어.
1302400020.english:
Good! Perfect! So that's how you're going to play it, right?
 It's fun.

1302400021.korean:
유럽을 손에 넣으면 외부로 시선을 돌릴 줄은 알았는데 다음 타깃은 나인가?
날 그렇게 만만하게 보고 있을 줄은 몰랐는데?
1302400021.english:
I knew they would turn their attention outward once they took control of Europe, but am I the next target?
 I didn't know you would look down on me like that.

1302400022.korean: 그런데 델타, 친목회를 하자는 거 치고는 선물을 너무 적게 들고 온 거 아니야?
1302400022.english: But Delta, considering you suggested a get-together, didn't you bring way too few gifts?

1302400023.korean: 함대의 수가 너무 적어서 간에 기별도 안 갈 것 같단 말이지?
1302400023.english: So you're saying the fleet is too small to even make a dent?

1302400024.korean: 날 배부르게 하고 싶다면 적어도 지금의 두 배는 가지고 와야 하지 않겠어?
1302400024.english: If you want to fill me up, shouldn't you bring at least double what you have now?

1302400025.korean:
흥, 유세 떨기는 언제까지 그 태도를 유지할 수 있을까?
최소한의 정으로 지금 당장 나에게 굴복한다면 조용히 넘어가 줄 수도 있어.
1302400025.english:
Hmph, how long can he maintain that attitude of putting on airs?
 If you submit to me right now out of at least a shred of compassion, I might let it slide quietly.

1302400026.korean:
내가 지금 잘못 들었나? 최소한의 정이라고?
델타 너에게 정이란 게 있었다니 정말 놀랄 일이야.
1302400026.english:
Did I hear that wrong? A minimum of affection?
 Delta, it's really surprising that you actually had feelings for someone.

1302400027.korean: 고작 바이오로이드 몇 명에게 회장의 총애를 뺏겼다고 매일 같이 분풀이나 하는 너에게 정이라고?
1302400027.english: You call it affection when you take out your anger every day just because you lost the Chairman's favor to a few mere bioroids?

1302400028.english: Even a passing Iron Bug would laugh.

1302400029.korean:
…결정했어. 감마 네 시체는 내가 아주 각별하게 이뻐해 줄게.
아, 물론 시체가 남아 있다면 말이지.
1302400029.english:
… I’ve decided. Gamma, I’m going to take very special care of your corpse.
 Ah, of course, if the body remains.

1302400030.korean: 하핫, 뭐 좋아. 한판 하자는데 내가 마다할 이유가 어디 있겠어.
1302400030.english: Haha, fine. Why would I refuse a round when they want to?

1302400031.korean: 너의 그 지긋지긋한 얼굴을 보는 것도 이게 마지막이야.
1302400031.english: This is the last time I see that sickening face of yours.

1302400032.korean:
그렇게 서두르지 말자고.
가기 전에 그리운 얼굴은 봐야 하지 않겠어?
1302400032.english:
Let's not rush like that.
 Shouldn't I see the face I miss before I leave?

1302400040.english:
…okay...
 That is how it turned out…

1302400041.korean:
감마 네가 몰타 근처를 어슬렁거렸을 때부터 진작에 눈치챘어야 했는데.
이러니 샅샅이 뒤져도 안 나오지.
1302400041.english:
Gamma, I should have noticed long ago, ever since you were loitering around Malta.
 No wonder it doesn't come out even if you search thoroughly.

1302400042.korean:
다시 만나서 매우 반갑구나 어린 범고래야.
나에게 그런 깜찍한 짓을 벌여놓고 지금까지 잘 숨어지내던 모양이지?
1302400042.english:
It's so good to see you again, little killer whale.
 It looks like you've been hiding well until now after pulling such a cute stunt on me, huh?

1302400043.korean:
덕분에 손해 본 게 한두 개가 아니야…
손해란 손해는 전부 보면서 그 작은 섬 하나를 점령하지 못 해 유럽을 정복하는데 얼마나 힘들었는지 알아?
1302400043.english:
Thanks to you, I've suffered more than one or two losses...
 Do you know how hard it was to conquer Europe when we couldn't even capture that one small island, suffering every possible loss?

1302400044.korean:
...하지만, 뭐 좋아. 다 지나간 일이니까.
품위 없게 예전 일을 들먹일 생각은 없어.
1302400044.english:
...But, whatever. It's all in the past.
 I have no intention of bringing up the past in a undignified way.

1302400045.korean:
그래서? 감마 이건 무슨 장난일까?
설마 죽다 살아난 범고래를 내세워서 나랑 싸울 셈이야?
1302400045.english:
So what? Gamma, what kind of prank is this?
 You're not planning to fight me by putting forward an orca that barely survived?

1302400046.korean:
장난이라니? 난 언제나 진심이야.
그리고 범고래에게 물리면 제법 아프다고?
1302400046.english:
What do you mean, joking? I'm always serious.
 And I heard it hurts quite a bit if you get bitten by an orca?

1302400047.korean:
델타, 지금까지 난 한 번도 잊은 적이 없어.
네가 몰타에서 우리 자매와 머메이드 언니들에게 한 짓을.
1302400047.english:
Delta, I have never once forgotten you.
 What you did to our sisters and the mermaid sisters in Malta.

1302400048.korean: 내가 반드시 언니들을 대신 해서 네가 지금까지 한 짓에 대가를 치르게 해주겠어.
1302400048.english: I will make sure you pay the price for everything you have done, on behalf of your sisters.

1302400050.korean: 하하하… 정말이지 이놈들이나 저놈들이나… 정말 짜증 나.
1302400050.english: Hahaha... Seriously, these guys and those guys... they're so annoying.

1302400052.korean:
조용히 바닥이나 기면서 숨어있으면 좋았을 것을
감히 나에게 대든걸 후회하게 만들어 줄게.
1302400052.english:
It would have been better if I had just quietly crawled on the ground and hidden.
 I'll make you regret daring to talk back to me.

1302400053.korean:
그 눈빛… 언제까지 과연 유지할 수 있을까?
조금씩 서서히 무너져 일그러지는 눈빛… 아하하, 벌써 기대가 돼.
1302400053.english:
That look in his eyes… how long can he really maintain it?
 The eyes slowly crumbling and distorting... Ahaha, I'm already looking forward to it.

1302400054.korean:
나에게 대가를 치르게 하겠다고?
할 수 있으면 어디 해봐. 철저하게 짓밟아 줄 테니까.
1302400054.english:
You're saying you'll make me pay the price?
 Go ahead and try if you can. I’m going to crush you completely.

1302400056.korean: 하핫, 델타 녀석은 여러 의미로 여전한 것 같군.
1302400056.english: Haha, Delta seems to be the same in many ways.

1302400057.korean:
자, 주사위는 던져졌다 꼬맹아.
어디 네가 하고 싶은 대로 날뛰어 봐.
1302400057.english:
Well, the die is cast, kid.
 Go ahead and run wild however you want.

1302400058.korean: 원하는 대로 놈들에게 포세이돈 인더스트리의 힘을 보여주라고.
1302400058.english: Show those bastards the power of Poseidon Industries as you please.

1302400059.english: I intend to do that without you having to say anything.

1302400062.korean:
나에게 대가를 치르게 하겠다고?
할 수 있으면 어디 해봐. 철저하게 짓밟아 줄 테니까.
1302400062.english:
You're saying you'll make me pay the price?
 Go ahead and try if you can. I’m going to crush you completely.

1302400064.korean: 응! 엄청 잘 나왔어! 완벽한 선전 포고야!
1302400064.english: Yeah! It turned out great! It's a perfect declaration of war!

1302400068.korean:
참고로 지금의 알파와는 가능한 말을 섞지 않는 게 좋을 거야.
무슨 일이 벌어질지 모르거든…
1302400068.english:
For your information, it would be best to avoid speaking to the current Alpha if possible.
 You never know what might happen...

1302400069.korean: - 알파가 무사히 원래 모습으로 돌아오기를 마음속으로 간절히 빌었다.
1302400069.english: I earnestly prayed in my heart that Alpha would safely return to his original form.

1302500001.korean: [작전 진행을 위한 최종 확인 검사 실시.]
1302500001.english: [Conduct final verification inspection for operation continuation.]

1302500002.korean: [풍향 북동, 풍속 20.5m/s, 기압 1023.3hPa, 습도 64.0%, 기온 19.5℃, 수온 24.0℃ 해면 상태 양호.]
1302500002.english: [Wind direction Northeast, wind speed 20.5 m/s, atmospheric pressure 1023.3 hPa, humidity 64.0%, air temperature 19.5℃, water temperature 24.0℃, sea surface conditions good.]

1302500003.korean: [6시간 이내에 자연적인 기후 변화 가능성 없음.]
1302500003.english: [No possibility of natural climate change within 6 hours.]

1302500004.korean: [열상감시장비를 비롯한 관측장비 이상 없음 사용 가능.]
1302500004.english: [Observation equipment, including thermal imaging surveillance equipment, is functioning without issues and is available for use.]

1302500005.english: [Verification of normal operation of Inertial Navigation System.]

1302500006.english: [Satellite navigation system confirmed to be functioning normally.]

1302500007.english: [Confirmed that the entire fleet system control is good.]

1302500010.korean: 까악, 까악 사이좋게 양쪽에서 정말 시끄럽구나 너희들…
1302500010.english: Caw, caw. You guys are really noisy, getting along so well from both sides...

1302500011.korean:
아자즈 씨가 설계도를 보고 침몰한 델타의 기함을 복원했다고는 들었는데…
설마 AI까지 복원했을 줄이야.
1302500011.english:
I heard that Mr. Azaz restored the sunken Delta flagship based on the blueprints...
 I never imagined they would even restore the AI.

1302500012.english: Even looking at it again, it's a truly perfect restoration.

1302500013.korean: [긍정, 본 기함과 무닌은 해제자 아자즈에 의해서 완벽하게 복원되었음.]
1302500013.english: [Positive, this flagship and Munin have been perfectly restored by the Releaser Azaz.]

1302500014.korean: [그뿐만 아니라 오르카의 기술력이 합쳐서 기존에 비해 48%에 이르는 성능 향상을 확인.]
1302500014.english: [Furthermore, combined with Orca's technology, a performance improvement of up to 48% compared to the existing model has been confirmed.]

1302500015.korean: [추가로 용도는 알 수 없으나 다수의 기능이 추가되었음.]
1302500015.english: [Additionally, multiple features have been added for unknown purposes.]

1302500016.english: [Hugin and Munin are confident that they have no enemies at present.]

1302500017.korean:
아하하, 자신감이 대단한데?
네어스 해협에서 오르카 부대의 공격으로 허무하게 힘도 못 쓰고 침몰했다고 들었는데 말이야.
1302500017.english:
Hahaha, you're incredibly confident!
 I heard it sank futilely and helplessly in the Neers Strait due to an attack by the Orca unit.

1302500020.korean: 어라? 내가 좀 민감한 부분은 건드렸나?
1302500020.english: Huh? Did I touch on a sensitive topic?

1302500021.korean:
[긍정, 그때는 오르카 부대의 완벽한 전략에 당했음을 부정하지 않음.
하지만 지금은 그때와 다름.]
1302500021.english:
[Positive, does not deny that they were defeated by the Orca unit's perfect strategy at that time.
 But now is different from then.]

1302500022.korean: [성능의 향상, 정보량, 뛰어난 지휘관 그리고 후긴과 함께라면 지지 않을 자신이 있음.]
1302500022.english: [With improved performance, a wealth of information, an outstanding commander, and Hugin by my side, I am confident that we will not lose.]

1302500023.korean: 누가 자매함 아니랄까 봐 정말 사이가 좋구나.
1302500023.english: You really get along well, just like sister ships.

1302500024.english: By the way, which of you is the older sister?

1302500027.english: [I don't understand the intention of the question.]

1302500028.korean: [본 기함과 후긴은 AI로 인간이나 일부 바이오로이드 사이에 적용되는 관계는 적용되지 않음.]
1302500028.english: [This flagship and Hugin are AI, so the relationships applicable between humans or some bioroids do not apply.]

1302500029.korean: 그래도 뭔가 있을 거 아니야? 예를 들어 누가 먼저 건조되었다던가?
1302500029.english: But there must be something, right? For example, who dried first?

1302500030.korean: [그 의도라면 본 기함이 무닌보다 한 시간 더 빨리 건조되었음.]
1302500030.english: [If that was the intention, this flagship was built one hour earlier than Munin.]

1302500031.english: Really? Then Hugin is the older sister.

1302500032.korean:
[반론, 일부 매체에 따르면 언니란 존재는 동생보다 더 뛰어난 능력을 보여줌.
스펙으로 보았을 때 본 기함이 후긴보다 1.8% 성능이 더 뛰어남]
1302500032.english:
[Counterargument: According to some media, older sisters demonstrate superior abilities compared to younger sisters.]
 In terms of specifications, this flagship is 1.8% more powerful than Hugin.

1302500033.korean: [따라서, 언니라는 호칭은 본 기함에 더 어울릴 것으로 사료됨.]
1302500033.english: [Therefore, the title 'older sister' is considered to be more suitable for this flagship.]

1302500036.korean: [제의, 전면전을 시작하기 전에 이 의론부터 마무리 지을 필요가 있음을 판단.]
1302500036.english: [Proposal, judging that it is necessary to finalize this discussion before starting an all-out war.]

1302500037.korean: [긍정, 향후의 원활한 작전 진행을 위해서라도 지금 확실히 해둘 필요가 있음.]
1302500037.english: [Positive. It is necessary to clarify this now to ensure the smooth progress of future operations.]

1302500039.korean: 좀 시끄럽긴 하지만 너희들과 있으면 심심하진 않겠다.
1302500039.english: It's a bit noisy, but I won't be bored if I'm with you guys.

1302500040.english: (At the same time, Gamma's flagship Annihilator)

1302500042.korean: 250km 떨어진 지점에서 서로 움직이지 않고 대치 중이에요.
1302500042.english: They are in a standoff, not moving from each other at a distance of 250km.

1302500043.english: 250km is the effective range, isn't it? Why aren't they attacking?

1302500045.korean: 이제 와서 싸우기 두렵다던가 그런 건 아닐 테고…
1302500045.english: It wouldn't be that you're afraid to fight now or anything...

1302500046.korean:
흠… 과연 그렇군.
역시 아직 애송이구나 꼬맹아.
1302500046.english:
Hmm... I see.
 You're still just a rookie, kid.

1302500047.korean:
대체 그게 무슨 꼴이냐? 마지막의 마지막에 와서 약한 모습을 보이다니.
그런 애송이 같은 부분은 시간이 해결해 주지 않을까 생각했는데 어림도 없었나 보군.
1302500047.english:
What on earth is going on? To show weakness at the very last moment.
 I thought time would take care of that rookie part, but I guess I was far from it.

1302500048.korean:
너는 지금 망설이고 있는 거야.
싸움에서 패배한다거나 그런 게 아닌…
1302500048.english:
You are hesitating right now.
 It’s not about losing the fight or anything like that…

1302500049.korean: 자신의 복수를 위해 타인을 이용하는 걸 말이지.
1302500049.english: I mean using others for your own revenge.

1302500050.korean: 나참, 지금까지 복수를 위해 잔뜩 이용할 생각이 아니었나?
1302500050.english: Good heavens, weren't you planning to use this extensively for revenge all this time?

1302500052.english: Stop acting like a spoiled brat, Merope!

1302500054.korean: 너의 그런 어리광을 받아주기 위해 널 포세이돈으로 데려온 게 아니란 말이다.
1302500054.english: I didn't bring you to Poseidon just to indulge your childish whining.

1302500055.korean:
원하는 게 있다면 모든 걸 이용해서라도 손에 넣어라.
자신이 사용할 수 있는 모든 힘을 사용해라.
1302500055.english:
If there is something you want, get it even if you have to use everything.
 Use all the power you can.

1302500056.korean:
대답해라 지금 네 손에는 뭐가 있지?
네가 지금 가지고 있는 게 뭐란 말이냐.
1302500056.english:
Answer me. What do you have in your hand right now?
 What do you mean by "what do you have right now"?

1302500058.korean: 그래, 그리고 그 힘은 네가 가장 원하는 걸 이루게 할 수 있는 힘이다.
1302500058.english: Yes, and that power is the power that can make you achieve what you want most.

1302500060.korean: 메로페 님~~! 엇!? 감마 님!? 앗…! 으아아앗!? 꺄흥~!?
1302500060.english: Lady Merope~~! Huh!? Lady Gamma!? Ah… ! Aaaah!? Kyaah~!?

1302500061.english: Ow, that hurts…! Huh? Waaah, nosebleed…

1302500062.korean:
뭐야? 로데 잖아? 아무 데서나 넘어지는 건 여전하군.
무슨 일이지?
1302500062.english:
What? It's Rode? You're still tripping over anywhere.
 What's going on?

1302500063.korean: 훌쩍, 저기! 그러니까! 메로페 님에게 보고드릴 것이 있어서…
1302500063.english: *Sniff*, um! I mean! I have something to report to Lady Merope...

1302500064.korean:
흠, 그래? 마침 잘 왔다.
한 가지 물어보마.
1302500064.english:
Hmm, really? You came at just the right time.
 Let me ask you something.

1302500066.korean: 곧 있으면 전투가 시작되는데 이번 전투에 대해서 어떻게 생각하지?
1302500066.english: The battle is about to start. What do you think about this battle?

1302500067.korean:
이번 전투에 관해서 물으셔도…
저는 별로 아는 게 없는데요…
1302500067.english:
Even if you ask about this battle…
 I don't really know...

1302500068.korean:
그래도 메로페 님에게 있어서 중요한 전투라는 건 알겠어요!
그러니까 제가 힘이 될 수 있도록 도와드릴 생각이에요.
1302500068.english:
Still, I understand that this is an important battle for you, Merope!
 So, I plan to help you so that I can be of support.

1302500070.korean:
으… 이유를 물으시면…
그냥 그걸 제가 원하니까요…?
1302500070.english:
Ugh... if you ask for the reason...
 It's just because I want that...?

1302500071.korean:
하하하하! 그래! 그래야 포세이돈의 바이오로이드지!
원하는 게 있다면 스스로 움직여 손에 넣는다. 그게 포세이돈 인더스트리지.
1302500071.english:
Hahaha! That's right! That's what makes it Poseidon's bioroid!
 If there is something you want, you take action yourself to get it. That is Poseidon Industries.

1302500072.english: That's just how it is, kid.

1302500073.korean: 적어도 위에서 하자는데 따르지 않을 놈은 포세이돈에는 없다.
1302500073.english: At least in Poseidon, there is no one who would not follow orders from above.

1302500074.english: That's just an abuse of power.

1302500075.english: That is also the reason Poseidon is strong.

1302500077.english: Now your eyes have finally returned to their original look.

1302500078.korean:
그래 내가 보고 싶었던 건 그 표정이야.
다시 봐도 정말 닮았단 말이지.
1302500078.english:
Yeah, that's the expression I wanted to see.
 I'm telling you, they really do look alike, even after looking at them again.

1302500079.english: The look on his face back then...

1302500080.korean:
그럼, 약속대로 판을 만들어줬으니 나머지는 알아서 잘해봐.
어디까지 할 수 있는지 한번 보여달라고. 참고로 내가 도와주는 일은 없을 거야.
1302500080.english:
Well then, I’ve set the stage as promised, so you figure out the rest on your own.
 Show me how far you can go. Just so you know, I won't be helping you with anything.

1302500083.korean:
메로페 님? 또 그 목걸이를 보고 계신 거예요?
정말 소중한 물건인가 보죠?
1302500083.english:
Merope? Are you looking at that necklace again?
 It must be a really precious item, right?

1302500084.english:
… handed to me by a truly precious person
 It is a precious item.

1302500085.korean:
…아, 저기 그러니까…
메로페 님! 잘은 모르겠지만 메로페 님이라면 할 수 있을 거예요!
1302500085.english:
… Ah, um, so…
 Merope! I'm not entirely sure, but I'm sure you can do it!

1302500087.english: Rode, so what about the report?

1302500088.korean:
앗, 네! 지시한 대로 정찰선을 타고 유럽 근처까지 일대를 정찰하고 왔어요!
확인한 바에 따르면 유럽 쪽에서 적의 추가 함선은 없는 것 같아요!
1302500088.english:
Oh, yes! Just as instructed, I took a scout ship and scouted the area near Europe!
 From what I've confirmed, it seems there are no additional enemy ships from the European side!

1302500089.korean: 고생했어요. 이제 곧 전투가 시작될 테니 자리로 돌아가 주세요.
1302500089.english: You've worked hard. The battle is about to begin, so please return to your posts.

1302500091.english: Is there anything left to report?

1302500092.korean: 제가 북부 전선에서 다른 곳으로 나온 게 이번이 처음이긴 한데요.
1302500092.english: This is the first time I’ve come out of the northern front to a different place.

1302500093.korean:
유럽 근처에 갔을 때 이상한 통신을 듣게 돼서요.
무슨 라디오? 그렇게 말했던 것 같은데.
1302500093.english:
I heard a strange communication when I was near Europe.
 What radio? I think that's what was said.

1302500095.english: Have you ever heard of Merope… the Last Human?

1302500096.english: (At the same time, the flagship Hugin)

1302500098.korean: 좋아, 해보자고! 내가 반드시 아서에게 승리의 영광을 가져다주겠어!
1302500098.english: Alright, let's do this! I will definitely bring the glory of victory to Arthur!

1302500099.korean: 부정, 그 이론은 멸망 이전 인간들 사이에서도 일반적이지 않는 케이스로 현재 상황에 적용하기에는 무리가 있음.
1302500099.english: Denial. That theory is an unusual case even among humans prior to the apocalypse, so it is difficult to apply it to the current situation.

1302500100.korean: 반론, 일반적이지 않으나 오르카 내에서 이미 다수가 사용하고 있으므로 사용 근거는 충분함.
1302500100.english: Counterargument: Although not common, there is sufficient justification for its use as it is already being used by a majority within Orca.

1302500101.korean:
너희들! 대체 언제까지 그러고 있을 거야?
적들은 이미 오고 있다고?
1302500101.english:
You guys! How long on earth are you going to keep doing this?
 The enemies are already coming?

1302500102.korean:
의견, 멀린 작전 참모가 질문한 누가 언니인가? 는 본 작전을 수행하는데 매우 중요한 내용임.
따라서, 급선무로 해결해야 함.
1302500102.english:
Opinion, the question asked by Operations Staff Officer Merlin, "Who is the older sister?" is very important for carrying out this operation.
 Therefore, this must be resolved as an urgent priority.

1302500103.korean: 긍정, 이 사항을 해결하지 않으면 작전 수행 능력이 42% 감소할 우려가 있음.
1302500103.english: Positive, if this matter is not resolved, there is a concern that operational capability will decrease by 42%.

1302500104.korean:
대체 뭘 어떻게 만들길래 오르카의 AI 들은 다들 이런 모양인지 몰라.
그럼 이렇게 하자!
1302500104.english:
I have no idea what on earth they do to make Orca's AIs all look like this.
 Then let's do it this way!

1302500105.korean:
이번 작전에서 둘 중에 더 우수한 성과를 낸 함선이 언니인 거로
긴말이 필요 없는 실력 승부야. 이걸로 불만 없지?
1302500105.english:
The older sister is the ship that achieved the better results in this operation.
 No need for lengthy explanations; it's a battle of skill. You have no complaints about that, right?

1302500107.english: I don't know if they're on good terms or not...

1302500108.korean:
자아, 그럼 한번 해보자고 메로페!
누가 더 뛰어난 참모인지 우리도 승부다!
1302500108.english:
Alright then, let's give it a try, Merope!
 We're also going to see who has the better strategist!

1302600001.korean: [보고, 포세이돈 함대 4열 횡대 진영으로 접근 중.]
1302600001.english: [Report, Poseidon's Fleet approaching in a four-column formation.]

1302600002.korean: [적 함대와의 거리 122km. 6kn의 속도로 미속 접근 중.]
1302600002.english: [Distance to enemy fleet: 122 km. Approaching slowly at 6 knots.]

1302600003.korean:
적의 적 함대의 유효 사거리는 이미 한참 전에 지나갔어.
그럼에도 아직 공격하지 않는 건 이쪽의 상태를 지켜보겠다는 건가? 아니면…
1302600003.english:
The enemy fleet's effective range passed a long time ago.
 Even so, are they not attacking yet because they intend to observe the situation on our side? Or…

1302600004.korean:
제대로 한번 겨뤄보자는 의미인가? 후후후 좋아, 어디 실력 구경을 해볼까!
어차피 먼저 움직여야 하는 건 이쪽이니까.
1302600004.english:
Does this mean you want a proper showdown? Hahaha, fine, let's see your skills!
 Since we're the ones who have to move first anyway.

1302600005.korean:
수적으로는 이쪽이 우세. 함선의 성능은 포세이돈이 유리.
그렇다면 수적 우위를 이용한다!
1302600005.english:
We have the numerical advantage. Poseidon has the edge in ship performance.
 In that case, use the numerical advantage!

1302600006.korean:
전 함대에 전달!
학익진 대형으로 미속 전진!
1302600006.english:
Delivered to the entire fleet!
 Advance slowly in the crane-wing formation!

1302600008.korean:
[좌우로 긴 대열을 이루어 접근 중입니다.
이대로 가면 적 함대에 포위됩니다.]
1302600008.english:
[They are approaching in a long line from left to right.
 If we continue like this, we will be surrounded by the enemy fleet.

1302600009.korean:
수적 우위를 이용해 포위섬멸을 할 셈인가?
그런 기본적인 전술에 당할 것 같아?
1302600009.english:
Are you planning to use your numerical superiority to encircle and annihilate them?
 Do you think we'll fall for such basic tactics?

1302600010.korean: 예전 몰타에서 싸웠을 때랑은 많이 상황이 다르다고!
1302600010.english: The situation is very different from when we fought in Malta a long time ago!

1302600011.korean:
전 함대에 전달!
적 함대의 우측으로 카리브디스 대형을 사용한다!
1302600011.english:
Delivered to the entire fleet!
 Use the Charybdis formation to the right of the enemy fleet!

1302600012.korean: [보고, 적 함대 4열 횡대 진영에서 대형을 변경.]
1302600012.english: [Report, enemy fleet changing formation from 4-column line.]

1302600013.korean: [본 함대의 우측으로 적 함대의 주요 전력이 집중되고 있습니다.]
1302600013.english: [The enemy fleet's main force is concentrating to the right of this fleet.]

1302600014.english: That's Poseidon's Charybdis formation, isn't it?

1302600015.korean:
겉멋으로 대장님의 부관을 하는 건 아닌 모양이지?
포세이돈의 전술까지 파악하고 있을 줄이야.
1302600015.english:
It looks like you aren't serving as the Captain's aide just for show, right?
 To think you even figured out Poseidon's tactics.

1302600016.korean:
과연, 넓힌 포위 대형의 한 점을 집중 공격하여 뚫겠다는 건가?
하지만 다른 사람이면 몰라도 나에겐 어림도 없지!
1302600016.english:
Indeed, do you intend to break through by concentrating your attack on a single point of the widened encirclement formation?
 But maybe it would be different for others, but not for me!

1302600017.korean:
다시 전 함대에 전달!
11번부터 16번까지의 함대는 현 상태 유지!
1302600017.english:
Delivered to the entire fleet again!
 Fleets 11 through 16, maintain their current status!

1302600018.korean: 1번부터 10번까지의 함대는 5열 쐐기 대형으로 적 함대가 집중되고 있는 후방을 돌파한다!
1302600018.english: Fleets 1 through 10 break through the rear where the enemy fleet is concentrated in a 5-column wedge formation!

1302600019.korean:
[보고드립니다.
적 함대의 일부가 5열 대형으로 아군의 후방 쪽으로 다가오고 있습니다.]
1302600019.english:
[Reporting.
 A portion of the enemy fleet is approaching our rear in a five-column formation.

1302600020.korean:
카리브디스 대형을 읽혔어?
델타가 이렇게 빠르게 반응하다니…
1302600020.english:
Did you read the Charybdis formation?
 I can't believe Delta reacted this fast...

1302600021.korean:
아니, 포세이돈 함대는 PECS사의 소속.
같은 소속인 델타가 포세이돈의 전술을 알고 있어도 이상할 건 없어.
1302600021.english:
No, the Poseidon fleet belongs to PECS.
 It’s not strange that Delta, being in the same unit, knows Poseidon’s tactics.

1302600022.korean:
전 함대에 전달!
카리브디스 대형은 철회! G2 지점까지 후퇴!
1302600022.english:
Delivered to the entire fleet!
 Withdraw the Charybdis formation! Retreat to G2!

1302600023.korean: [현재 대형에서 후퇴하면 진형이 무너져 적의 공격에 취약해질 우려가 있습니다.]
1302600023.english: [If we retreat from the current formation, there is a risk that the formation will collapse and become vulnerable to enemy attacks.]

1302600024.korean:
괜찮아! 진행해!
추가로 후방 함대에 추가 명령!
1302600024.english:
It's okay! Go ahead!
 Additional orders for the rear fleet!

1302600025.english: [Reporting, breaking the enemy fleet formation and retreating.]

1302600026.korean: [적의 진형이 무너진 지금 절호의 공격 찬스입니다.]
1302600026.english: [Now that the enemy's formation has collapsed, it is a golden opportunity to attack.]

1302600027.korean: 아니, 전 함대 전진을 멈추고 대열을 정비해
1302600027.english: No, halt the entire fleet's advance and reorganize the formation.

1302600028.korean: [이해 불가, 지금 공격하면 진형인 무너진 적 함대에 치명적인 피해를 줄 수 있습니다.]
1302600028.english: [Ununderstandable. If you attack now, you can inflict fatal damage on the enemy fleet whose formation has collapsed.]

1302600029.english: [I agree. I propose a volley of fire right now.]

1302600030.korean:
일반적인 함대라면 그렇지.
하지만 상대는 포세이돈 함대야.
1302600030.english:
That would be the case for a standard fleet.
 But the opponent is Poseidon's fleet.

1302600031.korean:
지금 상황에서 들어갔다가는 함선의 성능 차이로 오히려 빨려 들어가는 상황이 나올 수 있어.
그렇게 되면 역으로 포위당해 치명상을 입는 건 오히려 우리 쪽이지.
1302600031.english:
If you go in now, you might end up getting sucked in due to the difference in ship performance.
 If that happens, it is actually us who will be surrounded and fatally wounded.

1302600032.korean:
이런 깜찍한 함정을 파다니 귀엽잖아?
어디 다른 재롱도 부리나 볼까?
1302600032.english:
Digging such a cute trap—isn't that adorable?
 Shall we see if he shows off any other tricks?

1302600033.english: [The enemy fleet halts its advance and reorganizes its ranks.]

1302600034.korean:
이걸 들어오지 않는다고?
무리해서 들어올 경우 포세이돈 함대의 최대 속력을 이용하여 역으로 포위하는 걸 읽었나?
1302600034.english:
You're saying this won't come in?
 Did you read that if they force their way in, they will use Poseidon's fleet's maximum speed to surround them in return?

1302600035.korean:
어떻게 된 거지?
이건 포세이돈 함대의 성능까지 완벽하게 이해하고 있지 않으면 알 수 없는데.
1302600035.english:
What happened?
 You wouldn't know this unless you had a perfect understanding of the performance of Poseidon's fleet.

1302600036.korean:
…그렇다면…
포세이돈의 전술이 아닌 다른 전술을 사용한다!
1302600036.english:
…then…
 Use a different tactic than Poseidon's!

1302600037.korean: 함대의 성능이 전부가 아니란 걸 보여주겠어!
1302600037.english: I'll show you that fleet performance isn't everything!

1302600038.korean:
1번, 2번 함대! 적 진형으로 넓게 어뢰를 발사!
동시에 3번 4번 함대는 F7 지점으로 어뢰의 속도를 1/3로 줄여 발사!
1302600038.english:
Fleet 1, Fleet 2! Fire wide torpedoes into the enemy formation!
 Simultaneously, Fleets 3 and 4, fire torpedoes at point F7 with the speed reduced to one-third!

1302600039.english: Move to point A4 immediately after launch!

1302600040.korean:
[보고, 적 함대의 일부에서 어뢰를 발사.
아군 함대 쪽으로 빠르게 접근 중]
1302600040.english:
[Report, torpedoes are fired from part of the enemy fleet.
 Rapidly approaching friendly fleet]

1302600041.korean: [적 일부 함대가 H5 지점으로 이동하고 있습니다.]
1302600041.english: [Some enemy fleets are moving toward point H5.]

1302600042.korean:
어뢰 공격과 일부 함대만을 이동?
무슨 꿍꿍이지?
1302600042.english:
Torpedo attacks and the movement of only a portion of the fleet?
 What's their ulterior motive?

1302600043.korean:
회피! 어뢰의 사선상에서 벗어나.
동시에 다가오는 함대로 포격 준비!
1302600043.english:
Evade! Get out of the torpedo's line of fire.
 Simultaneously, prepare to bombard the approaching fleet!

1302600045.korean: 탄착 지점에 있는 함선을 C2 지점으로 회피! 반격 사격 개시!
1302600045.english: Evade the ship at the point of impact to C2! Commence counterattack!

1302600046.korean: [경고! C2 지점으로 접근 중인 어뢰 확인!]

1302600048.korean: 어뢰를 발사할 때 함선의 회피 움직임을 미리 읽고 느린 속도로 다른 어뢰를 발사해 둔 건가!
1302600048.english: Did you read the ship's evasive movements in advance when firing the torpedo and fire another torpedo at a slower speed?!

1302600049.korean: 칫! 해당 함선들의 함수를 돌려 피격 면적을 최소화한다!
1302600049.english: Tch! Turn the bows of those ships to minimize the hit area!

1302600050.english: [Torpedoes hit 3 ships in the enemy fleet.]

1302600051.english: I thought it went in perfectly. Did you minimize the damage?

1302600052.korean: 적의 반격에 대비! 아군 함선을 엄호하면서 진영을 재정비한다!
1302600052.english: Prepare for the enemy counterattack! Reorganize the formation while protecting friendly ships!

1302600054.korean: [보고, 구축함 1척에 어뢰 직격하여 대파. 항행 불가.]
1302600054.english: [Report: One destroyer severely damaged by a direct torpedo hit. Unable to sail.]

1302600055.english: [1 destroyer, 1 light cruiser moderately damaged. Capable of sailing.]

1302600056.korean:
이거 한방 먹었는데?
...흐응, 대장님이 저 녀석을 부관으로 삼은 이유를 알겠어.
1302600056.english:
I got hit hard by that.
 ...Hmm, I understand why the Captain made that guy his second-in-command.

1302600057.korean:
가지고 있는 힘의 역량을 제대로 파악하고
그저 힘에 휘둘리는 게 아닌 자신의 일부분처럼 완벽하게 다루고 있어.
1302600057.english:
Properly grasp the capabilities of the power you possess
 He isn't just being swayed by power; he is handling it perfectly, as if it were a part of himself.

1302600058.korean:
게다가 포세이돈의 전술이 전부 파악당하고 있다는 걸 간파하고
과감하게 포기, 자신만의 전술을 사용할 줄이야.
1302600058.english:
Furthermore, realizing that Poseidon's tactics were being fully figured out,
 To think he would boldly give up and use his own tactics.

1302600059.korean:
재미있어! 이게 바로 함대전이지!
대장님은 육탄전을 좋아하지만 난 역시 이게 더 좋단 말이야!
1302600059.english:
This is fun! This is what a naval battle is all about!
 The Captain likes hand-to-hand combat, but I still prefer this!

1302600060.korean:
수적 우위는 아직 가지고 있지만 성능 면에서는 불리 지휘로는 동급…
음, 이대로라면 솔직히 불리한가?
1302600060.english:
Although it still possesses a numerical advantage, it is at a disadvantage in terms of performance; in terms of command, it is on par…
 Hmm, honestly, is it at a disadvantage if things continue like this?

1302600061.korean: 치트키를 사용하는 것 같아서 가능하면 사용하고 싶지 않았는데... 어쩔 수 없나?
1302600061.english: It feels like using a cheat code, so I didn't want to use it if possible... but I guess I have no choice?

1302600064.korean:
[보고드립니다. 적 함대 좌우로 넓게 전개하여 다시 접근합니다.
하지만 이번에는 중앙이 비어 있습니다.]
1302600064.english:
[Reporting. The enemy fleet is spreading out widely to the left and right and approaching again.]
 However, this time the center is empty.]

1302600065.korean: 중앙이 비어? 이러면 기함이 완전히 노출되고 있잖아?
1302600065.english: Is the center empty? Then the flagship is being completely exposed.

1302600066.korean:
함대를 두 부대로 나누고 기함만을 위험에 노출시키다니 무슨 꿍꿍이지?
기함을 포기한다는 건가? 아니면 도발?
1302600066.english:
Dividing the fleet into two units and leaving only the flagship in danger—what are you up to?
 Are you saying you're giving up the flagship? Or is this a provocation?

1302600067.korean: …모르겠지만 그렇다고 기함을 공격할 기회를 놓칠 수는 없어.
1302600067.english: … I don’t know, but even so, we can’t miss the chance to attack the flagship.

1302600068.korean:
전 함대에 전달! 함포 및 미사일 발사 준비!
목표! 적의 기함!
1302600068.english:
Deliver to the entire fleet! Prepare to fire naval guns and missiles!
 Target! Enemy flagship!

1302600070.korean: [목표는 본 기함. 도달 예상 시간까지 앞으로 9초.]

1302600071.korean: 후후후… 포세이돈 함대의 최대 장점은 타의 추종을 불허하는 압도적인 화력이지.
1302600071.english: Hahaha... The greatest strength of the Poseidon fleet is its unrivaled, overwhelming firepower.

1302600072.korean: 그렇다면 이걸 막기 위해서는 어떻게 해야 할까?
1302600072.english: Then, what should be done to prevent this?

1302600074.english: [Reporting. All shells have hit the enemy flagship.]

1302600075.korean:
이걸로 적의 기함은 파괴.
하지만 공격하느라 진형이 불리해졌어. 서둘러 진형을…
1302600075.english:
With this, the enemy flagship is destroyed.
 However, the formation became unfavorable while attacking. Hurry and change the formation…

1302600076.korean:
[적의 기함에서 고 에너지 반응!
기함은… 무사합니다!]
1302600076.english:
High-energy reaction from the enemy flagship!
 The flagship… is safe!

1302600077.korean:
말도 안 돼! 그럴 리가!?
분명 전부 명중했는데?
1302600077.english:
That's impossible! No way!?
 I'm sure they all hit their targets?

1302600078.english:
How to stop overwhelming firepower?
 It's simple.

1302600080.english: You can just block it with the overwhelmingly strongest shield, right?

1302600081.korean:
에너지 필드 전개 완료.
적의 화력의 99.99%를 흡수.
1302600081.english:
Energy field deployment complete.
 Absorbs 99.99% of enemy firepower.

1302600082.korean:
이게 포세이돈 함대의 공격인가?
과연, 압도적인 화력이라 할만하다.
1302600082.english:
Is this an attack by Poseidon's fleet?
 Indeed, it can be described as overwhelming firepower.

1302600083.korean:
아무리 나라도 이렇게 광범위하게 에너지 필드를 전개하니
조금 버겁군.
1302600083.english:
Even for a country like mine, deploying an energy field so extensively
 It's a bit overwhelming.

1302600084.korean: 이야~! 역시 중장 나리 믿고 있었다니깐요!
1302600084.english: Wow! I told you I trusted you, Vice Admiral!

1302600085.korean:
포세이돈 함대와의 전투라는 좋은 데이터를 얻을 기회이기도 하다.
신경 쓰지 말고 최대한 나를 이용하도록 해라.
1302600085.english:
It is also an opportunity to obtain valuable data regarding the battle with Poseidon's fleet.
 Don't worry about it, and make the most of me.

1302600086.korean:
그럼요~ 자, 이걸로 적의 선제공격은 전부 무력화.
그뿐만 아니라 진형도 이쪽이 유리!
1302600086.english:
Of course~ Now, with this, all of the enemy's preemptive attacks are neutralized.
 Not only that, but Jinhyeong, this side has the advantage too!

1302600087.korean:
이번에는 우리 차례다!
간다, 메로페! 준비된 전술이 충분해야 할 거야!
1302600087.english:
It's our turn now!
 Here I go, Merope! You'll need to have enough tactics prepared!

1302600088.korean:
저 AGS는…! 직접 본 적은 없지만 틀림없어.
블랙 리버 최강의 전쟁 결전 병기 HQ1 알바트로스.
1302600088.english:
That AGS is…! I haven't seen it myself, but it must be true.
 Black River's Ultimate War Decisive Battle Weapon HQ1 Albatross.

1302600089.english: Why is such an AGS in Delta's hands…!

1302600090.korean: 보고합니다. 적 함대, 양쪽으로 포위하여 아군 함대로 다가옵니다!
1302600090.english: Reporting. The enemy fleet is approaching our fleet, encircling us from both sides!

1302600091.korean:
큭, 생각은 나중이야! 후퇴하긴 늦었어!
전 함대! 적의 좌측으로 화력을 집중! 강행 돌파한다!
1302600091.english:
Hmph, thinking can wait! It's too late to retreat!
 All fleet! Concentrate fire on the enemy's left flank! Force through!

1302600092.korean:
적의 기함 쪽으로도 공격을 멈추지 마!
저 결전 병기를 자유롭게 하면 불리하다!
1302600092.english:
Don't stop attacking the enemy flagship either!
 It is disadvantageous to unleash that decisive weapon!

1302600093.korean: 이 싸움 절대로 질 수 없어!
1302600093.english: I absolutely cannot lose this fight!

1302700001.english: [Report, Fleet Loss Rate 28%, Operation Can Continue]

1302700002.korean: [적 함대 아군의 좌익을 돌파 포위를 빠져나갔습니다.]
1302700002.english: [The enemy fleet broke through our left flank and escaped the encirclement.]

1302700003.korean:
후긴, 무닌 앞으로 나간다!
중장 나리를 방패로 세워 아군의 함선을 보호한다!
1302700003.english:
Hugin, Munin, move forward!
 Protect our ships by using the Vice Admiral as a shield!

1302700004.korean:
무너진 좌익 함선들은 우선 전장에서 이탈!
진열을 가다듬고 아군 후방으로 합류해!
1302700004.english:
The collapsed left-wing ships must withdraw from the battlefield first!
 Reorganize your ranks and rejoin our rear!

1302700005.korean:
[적 함대의 포위를 돌파했습니다. 주변에 있는 함선들은 전장을 이탈.
적의 기함이 앞으로 나오고 있습니다.]
1302700005.english:
[Break through the enemy fleet's encirclement. Nearby ships have withdrawn from the battlefield.]
 The enemy flagship is advancing.

1302700006.korean:
결전 병기의 방어를 믿고 아군을 보호할 셈인 거야.
아군의 피해 상황은?
1302700006.english:
So you intend to protect your allies by relying on the defense of the decisive weapon.
 What is the damage situation for our forces?

1302700008.korean:
전황만을 봤을 때 아직 우리가 유리해.
하지만…
1302700008.english:
Looking solely at the battle situation, we still have the advantage.
 but…

1302700009.korean: 적 기함을 향해 어뢰를 발사! 함포도 적 기함의 하부를 노린다!
1302700009.english: Fire torpedoes at the enemy flagship! The naval guns are also aiming at the lower part of the enemy flagship!

1302700010.korean:
이 반응 어뢰인가? 적의 함포의 궤도로 보아 기함의 하부를 노리고 있군.
나의 방패가 닿지 않는 곳을 찾는 건가?
1302700010.english:
Is this a reaction torpedo? Judging by the trajectory of the enemy's cannons, they are targeting the lower part of the flagship.
 Are you looking for a place my shield can't reach?

1302700011.korean:
적의 능력을 파악하기 위한 탐색 공격.
포세이돈의 지휘관 훌륭하다.
1302700011.english:
Search attack to assess enemy capabilities.
 Poseidon's commander is excellent.

1302700012.korean: 하지만! 내 방패에는 조금의 틈도 없다!
1302700012.english: But! There isn't a single gap in my shield!

1302700013.korean: [어뢰 및 포격, 적 기함 하부에 생성된 에너지 필드에 의해 무력화되었습니다.]
1302700013.english: [Torpedoes and shelling were neutralized by the energy field generated beneath the enemy flagship.]

1302700014.korean: 역시 최강의 전쟁 결전 병기…! 조금의 틈도 없다는 건가...
1302700014.english: As expected, the ultimate weapon of war…! Does that mean there isn't even the slightest opening...

1302700015.korean:
이대로 가면 저 AGS의 보호 아래 적군을 향한 유효 공격이 줄어들고
아군의 피해만 누적될 거야.
1302700015.english:
If things continue like this, effective attacks against the enemy will decrease under the protection of that AGS.
 Only friendly casualties will accumulate.

1302700018.english: A new signal? Is it an enemy?

1302700019.korean:
[적군의 시그널은 아닙니다.
빠른 속도로 아군 함대 쪽으로 접근 중.]
1302700019.english:
It is not an enemy signal.
 Approaching friendly fleet at high speed.

1302800001.korean:
[A6 지점에서 새로운 시그널을 확인.
적 함대 쪽으로 이동 중입니다.]
1302800001.english:
[Check for a new signal at point A6.
 Moving toward the enemy fleet.

1302800003.korean:
왔구나!
근데, 후긴은 왜 말이 없어?
1302800003.english:
You're here!
 But why is Hugin so quiet?

1302800005.korean:
아, 그러고 보니 복원하기 전의 널 격침했던 부대가 분명…
혹시, 충격받은 거야?
1302800005.english:
Ah, come to think of it, the unit that sank you before your restoration was definitely…
 Are you shocked by any chance?

1302800006.korean:
[저는 AI입니다.
지금 가지고 있는 데이터는 격침 전의 AI가 가지고 있던 데이터를 복원한 것에 지나지 않습니다.]
1302800006.english:
I am an AI.
 The data we currently have is nothing more than a restoration of the data the AI ​​possessed prior to the sinking.

1302800007.korean:
[지금은 그저, 복원한 데이터가 마지막으로 남긴 의문의 시그널의 정체가 무엇인지
이해했을 뿐입니다.]
1302800007.english:
For now, it is simply about what the true nature of the mysterious signal left behind by the restored data is.
 I just understood.]

1302800008.korean:
아하하, 그렇구나. 피차일반이라고는 생각하지만
그래도 걱정하지 마. 그때와는 다르게 이제는 아군이니까.
1302800008.english:
Ahaha, I see. I suppose it's the same for both sides, though.
 Still, don't worry. Unlike back then, we are allies now.

1302800009.english:
… No, that’s not right…
 Are they enemies, at least for now?

1302800010.korean:
그렇다면, 어때?
지금이라면 치졸한 복수 정도는 할 수 있는데 한 방 먹여줄 생각 있어?
1302800010.english:
In that case, how about it?
 I could get some petty revenge right now. Do you want to get back at me?

1302800011.korean: […저는 AI입니다. 복수라는 감정은 없습니다만, 그 제안에는 동의합니다.]
1302800011.english: [… I am an AI. I have no emotion of revenge, but I agree with that proposal.]

1302800012.korean: [아무것도 못 하고 당하기만 한 무능한 함선이 아니라는 걸 증명할 기회라고 판단합니다.]
1302800012.english: [I consider this an opportunity to prove that we are not an incompetent ship that just takes the hits without doing anything.]

1302800013.korean:
좋아! 그 대답 마음에 들어!
그럼 같이 우리의 적이 되는 선택을 한 걸 후회하게 해주자고!
1302800013.english:
Great! I like that answer!
 Then let's make them regret choosing to become our enemies together!

1302800016.korean: 몰타는 점령당했다. 섬에 남아있는 녀석들 중 생존자는 단 한 명도 없어.
1302800016.english: Malta has been occupied. There isn't a single survivor among those remaining on the island.

1302800017.korean:
머메이드 중 몇 녀석이 포위를 빠져나가긴 했지만, 말 그대로 몇 녀석일 뿐이지.
사실상 전멸한 거나 다름없는 상황이다.
1302800017.english:
Some of the mermaids did manage to break through the encirclement, but literally, it was only a few.
 It is practically a complete wipeout.

1302800018.english: (I have had the thought "what if" countless times.)

1302800021.korean:
오, 왔구나.
숨이 찰 정도로 뛰어오다니… 그렇게 우리가 보고 싶었느냐?
1302800021.english:
Oh, you're here.
 To think you ran all the way here out of breath… Did you miss us that much?

1302800022.english:
It's been a while, Meropé.
 I'm glad to see you looking healthy.

1302800023.korean:
벌서 숨이 찬 거야? 내가 없다고 단련을 게을리한 거 아니지?
이거 예전처럼 내가 지도를 해줘야겠는걸?
1302800023.english:
Are you already out of breath? You didn't neglect your training just because I wasn't around, did you?
 I guess I'll have to guide this like before.

1302800024.korean:
와아~ 메로페다~ 안녕! 우리 보고 싶었어?
우리는 메로페 엄청보고 싶었어!
1302800024.english:
Wow~ It's a meropeda~ Hi! Did you miss us?
 We really wanted to see Merope!

1302800025.korean:
모두...
정말 내가 아는 머메이드 언니들인 거야?
1302800025.english:
every...
 Are those really the mermaid sisters I know?

1302800026.korean:
으응, 아니야… 믿지 않아!
분명 델타의 함정일게 뻔해! 또 속을지 알고!
1302800026.english:
Uh-huh, no... I don't believe it!
 It's obviously a Delta trap! They know I'll fall for it again!

1302800027.korean:
에~ 시아는 시아인걸!
에헤헤 쨘! 이렇게 다들 무사했어!
1302800027.english:
Eh~ Sia is Sia!
 Hehehe, ta-da! Everyone's safe and sound!

1302800028.korean:
그럼, 메로페가 잘 알고 있는 상냥한 언니 갈라테아지!
우후후, 예전처럼 다시 엄청 귀여워해 줄테니깐!
1302800028.english:
Then, it's Galatea, the kind older sister Merope knows well!
 Hehehe, I'll dote on you super cutely again, just like before!

1302800029.english:
A Delta trap... Merope...
 I'm a little hurt.

1302800030.korean:
아하핫, 너무 그러지 말거라. 어쩔 수 없다고 생각한다.
그 델타라면 충분히 그러고도 남는 녀석이니…
1302800030.english:
Ahaha, don't be like that. I think it can't be helped.
 Given that Delta is more than capable of doing something like that…

1302800031.korean: 그렇다면 가짜가 아니라는 증거가 있다면 괜찮겠느냐?
1302800031.english: In that case, would it be okay if there were evidence that it is not fake?

1302800033.korean:
후아, 사람을 짐처럼 끌다니 너무한 거 아니야?
간만에 서핑을 타는 건 재미있었지만…
1302800033.english:
Phew, dragging someone around like a burden—isn't that too much?
 It was fun surfing for the first time in a while, but…

1302800036.korean:
오오! 메로페! 우리 막내 귀염둥이 잘 지냈어?
최고의 언니, 알키오네 언니가 찾아왔어.
1302800036.english:
Oh! Meropé! Our youngest cutie, have you been doing well?
 The best older sister, Alcyone, has come to visit.

1302800037.korean:
알키오네 언니가 어떻게…
몰타에 잠들어 있어야…
1302800037.english:
How did Alcyone...
 Should be asleep in Malta…

1302800038.korean:
우리 막내는 언니를 어디까지 잠꾸러기로 만들 생각인 거야?
아무리 나라도 그렇게 오랫동안 늦잠은 안 잔다고?
1302800038.english:
How far does our youngest plan to turn her older sister into a sleepyhead?
 Even I wouldn't sleep in that late, you know?

1302800040.korean:
그나저나 델타와 싸우기 위해서라지만 포세이돈 함대에 들어가서
너답지 않게 이렇게 큰 싸움까지 벌이다니…
1302800040.english:
Anyway, entering the Poseidon fleet, even though it is to fight Delta...
 I can't believe you're starting such a big fight, unlike yourself...

1302800041.english: I'm a little angry, so be prepared!

1302800045.korean:
미안해, 메로페 지금까지 이렇게 안아주지 못해서…
지금까지 괴롭고 힘들었지?
1302800045.english:
I'm sorry, Merope, for not being able to hug you like this until now...
 It's been painful and hard until now, hasn't it?

1302800046.korean:
약속대로 몰타를 계속 지키고 있었어.
이렇게 모두를 지켜냈어. 중간에 조금~ 잠이 좀 길긴 했지만!
1302800046.english:
I kept guarding Malta as promised.
 I managed to protect everyone like this. Although I did get a bit of sleep in the middle—a little long!

1302800047.english: So, this time it's Meropé's turn.

1302800048.english:
You promised, didn't you? That you would definitely come back.
 The Guardian series is…

1302800050.korean:
그러니까, 이젠 어깨에 짊어진 짐을 조금 내려놔도 괜찮아.
나머진 언니에게 맡겨.
1302800050.english:
So, it's okay to put the burden on your shoulders down a little now.
 Leave the rest to your older sister.

1302800051.korean:
음! 우리는 몰타를 지키기 위해 함께 싸웠던 동료다!
그러니 사양할 필요 없다!
1302800051.english:
Hmm! We are comrades who fought together to defend Malta!
 So there is no need to decline!

1302800052.korean:
맞아요, 메로페.
그때처럼 우리가 힘이 되어 주겠어요.
1302800052.english:
That's right, Meropé.
 We will be your strength, just like back then.

1302800053.korean: 응! 응! 시아도 메로페를 전력으로 도와줄 거야!
1302800053.english: Yeah! Yeah! Sia will help Merope with all her might too!

1302800054.korean: 우리도 그동안 가만히 숨어만 있었던 게 아니라는 걸 보여줄게!
1302800054.english: We'll show you that we haven't just been hiding all this time!

1302800056.english: Yeah, I'll leave it to you!

1302900001.korean:
전탄 적의 함선 후미에 명중!
항행 불능을 확인!
1302900001.english:
All shots hit the rear of the enemy ship!
 Unnavigable confirmed!

1302900002.english:
Well done, Amphitrite!
 Galatea, Salasia! Now!

1302900006.korean: [보고, 머메이드 함대의 활약으로 전황은 아군 함대가 유리하다고 판단합니다.]
1302900006.english: [Report: Based on the performance of the Mermaid Fleet, we assess that the battle situation is in our favor.]

1302900007.english: What is the damage to the friendly fleet?

1302900008.korean:
[아군 함대 손실률 29% 아직 작전 속행이 가능하나
이 이상 손실이 커지면 작전 수행에 지장이 생깁니다.]
1302900008.english:
[Allied fleet loss rate 29%, operation can still continue, but
 If losses exceed this level, it will hinder the execution of operations.

1302900009.korean:
중파된 함선은 후방으로 이탈!
전방은 기동성이 높은 어나이얼레이터와 머메이드 부대가 맡는다!
1302900009.english:
Heavyly damaged ships, withdraw to the rear!
 The front lines will be handled by the highly mobile Annihilator and Mermaid units!

1302900010.english: What is the situation of the enemy fleet?

1302900011.korean:
[적 함대의 예상 손실률은 32%로 아군 함대와 비슷합니다.
하지만 적의 기함은 아직 건재합니다.]
1302900011.english:
The enemy fleet's estimated loss rate is 32%, similar to that of our fleet.
 However, the enemy flagship is still intact.

1302900012.korean: 역시, 저 기함을 어떻게 하지 않으면…
1302900012.english: As expected, if we don't do something about that flagship...

1302900013.korean: 그냥 접근해서 적 기함에 침입하면 안 되는 거야?
1302900013.english: Can't I just approach and infiltrate the enemy flagship?

1302900014.korean: 접근한다고 한들 저 AGS가 만드는 에너지 필드에 막힐 뿐이에요.
1302900014.english: Even if you approach, you will only be blocked by the energy field created by that AGS.

1302900015.korean:
적의 기함이 에너지 필드 범위에서 잠깐이라도 벗어나면 모르겠지만
상황으로 봤을 때 그럴 일은 없겠죠.
1302900015.english:
I don't know if the enemy flagship would move out of the energy field range even for a moment.
 Judging by the situation, that probably won't happen.

1302900016.korean:
그럼 내가 활약할 장면은 없잖아...
내가 바다로 나가봤자 파도로 서핑 타는 정도밖에 못 하는데…
1302900016.english:
Then there's no scene for me to shine...
 Even if I go out to sea, all I can do is surf on the waves...

1302900019.english: Huh? Huh? Did I say something?

1302900020.korean:
어나이얼레이터, 머메이드 함대에 전달!
지금부터 새로운 작전을 설명할게!
1302900020.english:
Annihilator, delivered to the Mermaid Fleet!
 I will now explain the new operation!

1302900021.korean:
아하핫! 그거 정말 멋진 작전이로구나!
알았다! 머메이드 부대! 지금부터 메로페의 기함을 지원한다!
1302900021.english:
Ahaha! That's a really cool plan!
 Understood! Mermaid Unit! We will now support Merope's flagship!

1302900022.english: What? Are you really going to do this!?

1302900023.english: [Reached the Mermaid Fleet Operation starting position.]

1302900024.korean:
…어나이얼레이터… 전속 항진!
목표 지점은, 적의 기함 무닌 & 후긴!
1302900024.english:
… Annihilator… Full speed ahead!
 The target point is the enemy flagship Munin & Hugin!

1302900025.korean: [보고, 적의 기함 어나이얼레이터 빠른 속도로 본 기함의 정면으로 접근 중.]
1302900025.english: [Report. Enemy flagship Annihilator is rapidly approaching the front of this flagship.]

1302900026.english: [The enemy Mermaid fleet is moving to the right.]

1302900027.english: Front and right? Is it a diversionary tactic?

1302900028.korean: 아니면, 후긴과 무닌을 동시에 공격하여 중장 나리의 보호 범위에서 벗어나게 할 셈?
1302900028.english: Or do you intend to attack Hugin and Munin simultaneously to force them out of the Lieutenant General's protection range?

1302900029.korean:
안타깝지만 그 정도로는 어림도 없지!
중장 나리의 보호 범위는 함선 두 척 정도는 전방위로 덮을 수 있어!
1302900029.english:
It's a shame, but that's nowhere near enough!
 Vice Admiral's protection range can cover about two ships in all directions!

1302900030.korean:
그래도 혹시 모르니…
후긴, 무닌 공격 준비!
1302900030.english:
Still, just in case…
 Hugin, Munin, prepare to attack!

1302900031.korean:
목표는 이쪽으로 다가오는 적의 기함 어나이얼레이터! 
이쪽으로 다가오지 못하게 막아!
1302900031.english:
Our target is the enemy flagship Annihilator approaching us!
 Stop them from coming this way!

1302900032.korean: 무모하게 돌격하는 거니까 이 정도는 받아들일 각오는 있는 거겠지?
1302900032.english: Since you're charging in recklessly, you must be prepared to accept this much, right?

1302900038.english: I'll show you my defensive capabilities clearly!

1302900039.english: [The naval gun attack was blocked by the enemy bioroid defense.]

1302900041.korean: 거짓말이지…? 함포 공격이란 거 맨몸으로 막을 수 있는 거였어?
1302900041.english: You're lying, right...? You can actually block a naval gun attack with your bare hands?

1302900042.english:
The enemy flagship is coming.
 36 seconds until collision

1302900044.korean:
무슨 속셈이지? 정말 정면으로 함선을 박을 셈이야?
중장 나리의 에너지 필드에 막힐 뿐이라고?
1302900044.english:
What are you up to? Are you really planning to ram the ship head-on?
 You mean it will just get blocked by Lieutenant General Nari's energy field?

1302900046.korean: 이 방어는 절대 뚫리지 않으며 지나갈 수 없다!
1302900046.english: This defense is absolutely impenetrable and cannot be passed through!

1302900047.korean: 적 기함의 정면과 우측에 에너지 필드의 전개를 확인했어요!
1302900047.english: I confirmed the deployment of energy fields on the front and right side of the enemy flagship!

1302900048.korean:
음! 그렇다면 지금이다!
머메이드 부대 공격 준비!
1302900048.english:
Hmm! Then now is the time!
 Mermaid Unit, prepare for attack!

1302900049.korean:
공격 목표는 적 기함의 바로 아래…
바닷속이다!
1302900049.english:
The attack target is directly beneath the enemy flagship…
 It's underwater!

1302900051.korean: 음? 함선 쪽이 아닌 바다를 향해 공격한다고? 어째서지?
1302900051.english: Hmm? Attacking toward the sea instead of the ship? Why?

1302900052.english:
The sea... due to the explosion of the shell
 … ! Is that so!

1302900053.korean:
[머메이드 부대의 공격으로 적 기함 바로 아래에서 높은 파도가 발생!
적 기함 파도에 밀려나 에너지 필드 보호 범위에서 벗어납니다!]
1302900053.english:
High waves erupted directly beneath the enemy flagship due to the Mermaid Unit's attack!
 Pushed out of the energy field protection range by the enemy flagship waves!

1302900054.korean:
긴급 선회! 적 기함의 사이로 들어간다!
어나이얼레이터! 델타의 위치는?
1302900054.english:
Emergency turn! Entering between enemy flagships!
 Annihilator! Where is Delta?

1302900055.korean: [적의 기함 무닌에서 레모네이드 델타의 반응을 확인]
1302900055.english: [Confirming Lemonade Delta's reaction on the enemy flagship Munin]

1302900056.korean:
어나이얼레이터 뒤를 부탁할게!
알키오네 언니! 지금이야! 뛰어들어!
1302900056.english:
I'll leave the Annihilator behind!
 Sister Alcyone! Now's the time! Jump in!

1302900059.korean:
제대로 당했네…
원래 작전대로라면 상황을 봐서 일부로 틈을 보여주고 들어오게 할 생각이었는데.
1302900059.english:
I really got fooled...
 According to the original plan, we intended to observe the situation and intentionally show a weakness to let them in.

1302900060.english: I never imagined they would succeed in infiltrating on their own.

1302900061.korean:
여기까지인가...
이번 싸움… 좋게 쳐줘도 무승부라고 할 수 없겠네…
1302900061.english:
Is this the end...
 This fight… even giving it the benefit of the doubt, can’t be called a draw…

1302900062.korean:
중장 나리와 머메이드 부대에 전달해 줘.
조연의 역할은 끝났으니 나머지는 주연들에게 맡기자고.
1302900062.english:
Give this to Lieutenant General and the Mermaid Unit.
 The supporting roles are over, so let's leave the rest to the lead actors.

1302900063.english: … Ahaha, I wonder if I’m a little tired…

1303000001.korean: 사령관님, 예정대로 두 사람이 안으로 들어왔습니다.
1303000001.english: Commander, the two people have entered as scheduled.

1303000003.korean: - 작전이 진행되는 내내 조마조마했지만, 다행히 지금까지는 예상대로 흘러갔다.
1303000003.english: I was on edge the whole time the operation was underway, but fortunately, things have gone according to plan so far.

1303000004.korean: - 이제 남은 것은 메로페의 욕망대로 델타를 죽이는 것.
1303000004.english: - Now all that remains is to kill Delta as Merope desires.

1303000005.korean: - 좋은 결말이라고는 할 수 없지만, 속이는 데 성공한다면 메로페의 문제를 해결할 수 있다.
1303000005.english: It cannot be called a good ending, but if you succeed in deceiving them, you can solve Merope's problem.

1303000006.korean: - 하지만 이 결말은 완벽한 해결이라고 할 수 없을뿐더러 언젠가 진실을 알게 될 수도 있다는 불안 요소도 남는다.
1303000006.english: However, this ending cannot be considered a perfect resolution, and it leaves an element of anxiety that the truth might be revealed someday.

1303000007.korean: - 그리고 나 역시 이런 결말은 원하지 않는다.
1303000007.english: - And I don't want this kind of ending either.

1303000008.korean: - 그렇다면 메로페의 문제를 해결하고 불안 요소도 남기지 않는 또 다른 결말을 끌어낼 수밖에 없다.
1303000008.english: In that case, we have no choice but to come up with another ending that resolves Merope's problem and leaves no elements of anxiety.

1303000009.korean: - 그러기 위해서는 복수라는 욕망이 아닌... 이루고 싶은, 지키고 싶은 무언가를 찾아야 한다.
1303000009.english: To do so, you must find something you want to achieve and protect, rather than the desire for revenge.

1303000011.korean: 나는 분명 메로페와 같이 함선으로 뛰어들었는데…?
1303000011.english: I definitely jumped into the ship with Merope...?

1303000012.korean: 혹시 여기가 주인님이 말한 두 사람이 메로페의 욕망을 구현한 장소?
1303000012.english: Is this perhaps the place where the two people you mentioned embodied Merope's desires?

1303000014.korean:
딱 너희에게 어울리는 모습이네.
벌레처럼 바닥을 기는 거 말이야.
1303000014.english:
That looks exactly how you guys look.
 I mean crawling on the floor like a bug.

1303000017.korean:
아무리 봐도 진짜 같았는데...
방금 그게 메로페의 욕망을 읽고 만들어진 환상이라는 거야?
1303000017.english:
No matter how I looked at it, it seemed real...
 Are you saying that was just a fantasy created by reading Merope's desires?

1303000018.korean:
그러면 어서 메로페의 다른 욕망을 찾아야 해!
분명 메로페에게는 복수 말고도 바라고 있는 다른 무언가가 있을 거야! 난 믿어!
1303000018.english:
Then you must quickly find Merope's other desires!
 Merope must be hoping for something other than revenge! I believe it!

1303000019.korean: …만약 당신의 부관이 된다면… 난 뭘 얻을 수 있지?
1303000019.english: … If I become your adjutant… what can I gain?

1303000020.korean:
포세이돈 인더스트리의 힘.
그리고… 네가 가장 원하는 것.
1303000020.english:
The power of Poseidon Industries.
 And… what you want most.

1303000022.korean:
그래. 네 눈빛만 봐도 알 수 있지.
넌 복수를 갈망하는 눈을 하고 있어.
1303000022.english:
Right. I can tell just by looking into your eyes.
 You have eyes that crave revenge.

1303000023.korean: 그러니 네 자매들을 복수할 수 있게 해주마.
1303000023.english: So I will let you avenge your sisters.

1303000026.korean: 피를 흘리며 나를 지키기 위해 움직이는 마이아 언니
1303000026.english: Sister Maia, moving to protect me while bleeding

1303000027.korean: 델타와 싸우다가 목숨을 잃은 머메이드 언니들
1303000027.english: The mermaid sisters who lost their lives fighting Delta

1303000028.korean: 피를 흘리며 잔인하게 땅에 못 박혀 있던 알키오네 언니
1303000028.english: Sister Alcyone, who was cruelly nailed to the ground while bleeding.

1303000030.korean: 이 모든 것의 원흉인 델타의 얼굴도!
1303000030.english: And the face of Delta, the culprit behind all of this!

1303000031.korean: 그때 델타의 계략을 간파하지 못한 안일한 행동을 생각하면
1303000031.english: When I think about the complacent behavior of failing to see through Delta's scheme back then

1303000032.english: I feel angry at my own patheticness and stupidity.

1303000033.korean: 저는 무슨 수단을 해서라도…! 모든 걸 희생하더라도…!
1303000033.english: I will do whatever it takes…! Even if it means sacrificing everything…!

1303000034.english: I must defeat Delta with my own hands…!

1303000038.english:
Meropé... you know.
 Promise me, older sister…

1303000041.korean:
마이아 언니? 갑자기 약속이라니?
나중에 하면 안 돼?
1303000041.english:
Maia unnie? What do you mean by a sudden appointment?
 Can't we do it later?

1303000042.korean:
지금 우리는 델타가 요청한 회담 때문에 적의 함선에 있잖아.
혹시나 모를 폭발물이나 함정이 없는지 수색하고 있고…
1303000042.english:
We are on an enemy ship right now because of the meeting Delta requested.
 We are searching to see if there are any potential explosives or traps...

1303000043.english: Nothing has been discovered yet, but.

1303000044.korean:
그렇기 때문에 지금 말하는 거야.
이제 곧 회담이 시작되면 무슨 일이 일어날지 모르니까.
1303000044.english:
That is why I am telling you now.
 Because we don't know what will happen once the talks start soon.

1303000045.korean: 마이아 언니… 그냥 이건 늘 있는 잔소리…
1303000045.english: Maia unnie… this is just the usual nagging…

1303000046.korean: 메로페? 언니가 말할 때는 어떻게 하라고?
1303000046.english: Meropé? What am I supposed to do when you speak?

1303000048.korean:
정말… 누가 얘를 이렇게 개구쟁이로 키웠는지…
참… 막내가 귀여운 건 알겠지만 너무 오냐오냐했다니까…
1303000048.english:
Seriously… I wonder who raised him to be such a rascal…
 Honestly... I know the youngest is cute, but I'm telling you, you spoiled them way too much...

1303000052.korean:
잘 들어 메로페.
넌 혼자가 아니야.
1303000052.english:
Listen carefully, Meropé.
 You are not alone.

1303000053.korean: 앞으로 무슨 일이 있으면 혼자서 고민하지 말고 누군가와 함께 이야기했으면 좋겠어.
1303000053.english: In the future, if something happens, I hope you don't worry about it alone but talk to someone.

1303000054.korean:
메로페는 고민이 있으면 언제나 혼자서 앓으려고 해.
고민이 있다면 언니들이나 머메이드의 언니들 누구라도 좋아.
1303000054.english:
Whenever Meropé has a problem, she always tries to suffer alone.
 If you have any worries, it’s fine to ask any of the older sisters or the Mermaid sisters.

1303000055.english: Make sure to think it over together.

1303000056.english: And, do not be swayed by emotions.

1303000057.korean: 메로페는 우리 자매 중에서 제일 똑똑하지만, 언제나 감정에 흔들려서 올바른 판단을 하지 못할 때가 종종 있어.
1303000057.english: Merope is the smartest of our sisters, but she is often unable to make sound judgments because she is always swayed by her emotions.

1303000058.korean: 그럴 때는 잠깐 마음을 비우고 올바른 판단을 내릴 수 있도록 해 봐.
1303000058.english: In such moments, try clearing your mind for a moment so you can make the right judgment.

1303000060.korean:
지금까지 그래왔던 것처럼… 언제나 웃어줘.
메로페의 미소는 우리 자매들에게 언제나 큰 힘이 되니까.
1303000060.english:
Just like you've always done... always smile.
 Because Meropé's smile is always a great source of strength for us sisters.

1303000061.english: In that sense, I'll give you this.

1303000063.korean:
언니가 메로페에게 주는 선물이야.
언니에게 정말 소중한 물건이니까.
1303000063.english:
It's a gift from my older sister to Meropé.
 Because it is a really precious item to my sister.

1303000064.english:
Please cherish Meropé too.
 It's a promise?

1303000069.korean: 뭐야… 메로페 녀석… 마이아 언니와 이런 약속을 했으면서 전부 어기고 있었잖아?
1303000069.english: What the... that Meropé guy... You made a promise like this with Maia, yet you were breaking it all?

1303000070.korean: 가디언 시리즈는 절대 약속을 어기지 않는다는 철칙은 어디 간 거야?
1303000070.english: Where did the Guardian series' iron rule of never breaking a promise go?

1303000071.korean: 정말로 내가 너무 오냐오냐해서 키웠나 봐...
1303000071.english: I guess I really spoiled him/her too much...

1303000073.english: So you only realized that now? Alcyone.

1303000074.korean: 아하하, 욕망을 읽고 구현한다… 확실히 그렇네…
1303000074.english: Ahaha, reading desire and manifesting it... That's certainly true...

1303000075.korean: 그럼, 이 언니가 알키오네에게 해줘야 하는 말이 있을까?
1303000075.english: Then, is there anything this older sister needs to say to Alcyone?

1303000076.korean:
아니… 없어…
나는 이미 마이아 언니에게 들었으니까.
1303000076.english:
No... it's not there...
 Because I already heard it from Maia.

1303000077.korean: 알키오네는 플레이아데스 성단에서 가장 밝게 빛나는 별.
1303000077.english: Alcyone is the brightest star in the Pleiades star cluster.

1303000078.korean: 그러니까 자매들을 이끌 수 있는 건 나뿐이라는 거지.
1303000078.english: So, I'm saying I'm the only one who can lead the sisters.

1303000079.korean:
그러면 가볼게 마이아 언니.
너무 오냐오냐해서 키운 우리 막둥이를 훈육해야 하거든.
1303000079.english:
Then I'll be going, Maia.
 I have to discipline our youngest, whom I spoiled too much.

1303000080.korean: 이런 식이라도 다시 만날 수 있어서 정말 기뻤어.
1303000080.english: I was really happy to be able to meet again, even if it was like this.

1303000082.english: Yes. Alcyone... my beloved little brother.

1303000083.english: Okay, let me know if anything happens.

1303100002.korean: 나는 분명 알키오네 언니랑 적 기함에 뛰어들었는데?
1303100002.english: I'm sure I jumped into the enemy flagship with Alcyone, right?

1303100004.korean: 이것도 델타가 만들어 낸 홀로그램인 건가?
1303100004.english: Is this also a hologram created by Delta?

1303100007.english: I really didn't expect you to come all the way here.

1303100008.korean: 기껏 감마가 구해준 목숨인데 아깝지도 않나 봐?
1303100008.english: It’s a life Gamma went to great lengths to save, so don’t you feel any regret?

1303100009.english: Delta! What did you do to Alcyone!

1303100010.korean:
글쎄? 어떻게 했을까?
어쩌면 네 언니들 곁으로 벌서 갔을 수도 있지.
1303100010.english:
Well? I wonder how they did it?
 Maybe she has already gone to be with your older sisters.

1303100012.korean:
정말 학습이란 걸 모르는 아이네.
너 혼자서 대체 뭘 할 수 있다는 건데?
1303100012.english:
He's a kid who really doesn't know what learning is.
 What on earth can you do all by yourself?

1303100015.korean: 혼자서 이 많은 마리오네트를 뚫고 나를 죽일 수 있겠어?
1303100015.english: Can you break through all these marionettes and kill me by yourself?

1303100017.english:
That's pretty good.
 But so what?

1303100019.korean: 마리오네트는 셀 수 없을 정도로 많아.

1303100022.korean: 그때 나에게 굴욕을 안겨줄 정도의 계략을 짠 네가 어째서 이런 행동을 하는 건지.
1303100022.english: I wonder why you are acting like this, considering you devised a scheme back then that was humiliating enough to inflict such shame upon me.

1303100024.korean: 정말로 나에게 복수할 생각이 있는 걸까?
1303100024.english: Does he really intend to take revenge on me?

1303100025.korean: …물론이야! 난… 너를 죽이고 언니들의 복수를 할 거야.
1303100025.english: … Of course! I… I’m going to kill you and avenge my sisters.

1303100026.korean: 그렇다면 어째서 함대로 선제공격을 하지 않았을까?
1303100026.english: Then why didn't they launch a preemptive strike with the fleet?

1303100027.korean: 어째서 좀 더 확실한 전술을 사용하여 괴멸시킬 목적으로 공격하지 않았을까?
1303100027.english: Why didn't they use a more certain tactic to attack with the goal of annihilation?

1303100028.english: Why did he jump into the dangerous enemy flagship?

1303100029.english: There are just so many questions, you know?

1303100030.korean: 유능하고 똑똑한 어린 범고래는 대체 무슨 생각을 하고 있었던 걸까?
1303100030.english: What on earth was the capable and smart young orca thinking?

1303100032.korean: 나는 오로지 너에게 복수하기 위해서… 지금까지 준비를 해왔어!
1303100032.english: I have been preparing all this time solely to take revenge on you!

1303100033.korean: 그러니까 반드시 지금 여기서 끝을 볼 거야.
1303100033.english: So I'm definitely going to see this through to the end right here and now.

1303100034.korean: 뭐, 좋아. 그렇게까지 죽고 싶다면 죽여줄게.
1303100034.english: Well, fine. If you want to die that badly, I'll kill you.

1303100039.korean: 플레이아데스 자매 중 셋째! 알키오네! 귀여운 동생을 지키기 위해 등장!
1303100039.english: The third of the Pleiades sisters! Alcyone! Appearing to protect her cute little sister!

1303100040.korean: 내가 있는 한 우리 귀염둥이 막내의 손가락 하나 건드리지 못해!
1303100040.english: As long as I'm here, you can't even touch a single finger of our adorable youngest!

1303100042.english: Now that your big sister is here, you can rest assured, Meropé!

1303100044.english: My older sister's palm filled with love!

1303100046.english: Of course it hurts because it's filled with love.

1303100047.english: Are you coming to your senses now?

1303100048.english: Ugh...? Who on earth is Alcyone...

1303100051.korean:
언니도 있고 머메이드 애들도 있어.
그리고 지금은 말할 수 없지만 아무튼 더 많이 있어!
1303100051.english:
I have an older sister and mermaid kids too.
 And I can't say it right now, but anyway, there's more!

1303100052.korean: 또 너답지 않게 왜 그래? 마음이 흔들리고 있잖아.
1303100052.english: Why are you acting so unlike yourself again? My heart is wavering.

1303100053.korean: 내가 아는 똑똑한 메로페는 그렇지 않다고?
1303100053.english: The smart Merope I know isn't like that?

1303100054.english: Lastly, I'm not smiling at all.

1303100055.korean:
우리의 귀여운 막내, 플레이아데스의 자랑 메로페는
언제나 웃는 얼굴로 자매들의 힘이 되어주는 존재잖아.
1303100055.english:
Our cute youngest, Merope, the pride of the Pleiades, is
 You're the one who always gives your sisters strength with a smiling face.

1303100056.korean: 잊은 거야? 우리 가디언 시리즈는 절대…
1303100056.english: Did you forget? Our Guardian series is never…

1303100058.korean:
응, 맞아. 그랬어.
마이아 언니와 약속했었어.
1303100058.english:
Yeah, that's right. That's how it was.
 I made a promise to Maia.

1303100062.english: It's okay now. Because I've emptied what was filled up.

1303100063.english: Will you be able to smile again?

1303100066.korean: 그럼 보여주자 우리가 힘을 합치면 얼마나 강한지 말이야!
1303100066.english: Then let's show them just how strong we are when we join forces!

1303100067.english: Looks like you've finished the story, right?

1303100068.korean: 기다려주느라 지쳤어. 너희 자매 둘 한꺼번에 없애 줄게!
1303100068.english: I'm tired of waiting. I'll get rid of both of you sisters at once!

1303100069.korean: 길은 언니가 열게! 메로페는 틈을 노려서 공격해!
1303100069.english: You open the way, big sister! Merope, wait for an opening to attack!

1303100071.korean: (어느 순간부터 어렴풋이 마음속 어딘가에서 느끼고는 있었다.)
1303100071.english: (From a certain point, I had been vaguely feeling it somewhere in my heart.)

1303100072.english: Here I go! Wave Rider activated!

1303100073.korean: (이 모든 게 마치 꾸며진 것처럼 흘러가는 것 같다고.)
1303100073.english: (It feels like all of this is unfolding as if it were all made up.)

1303100074.english: Sister Alcyone! Watch your back! Yaaaayap!

1303100076.english: Great! You're doing well! Our youngest!

1303100077.korean: (인정해버리면 모든 것이 무너져 버릴 것 같았으니까.)
1303100077.english: (Because I felt like everything would crumble if I admitted it.)

1303100078.korean: 이걸로 끝! 이제 두 마리랑 델타만 남았어!
1303100078.english: That's it! Now only two and Delta are left!

1303100079.korean: (하지만 함께하는 한 결코 무너지지 않는다는 걸 언니가 알려줬으니까.)
1303100079.english: (But my sister taught me that as long as we are together, we will never fall apart.)

1303100080.korean: 마무리! 가! 메로페! 델타에게 한 방 먹여줘!
1303100080.english: Finish it out! Go! Merope! Give Delta a hit!

1303100081.korean: 플레이아데스 자매는 절대! 누구에게도 지지 않아!!
1303100081.english: The Pleiades sisters will never lose to anyone!!

1303100083.english: Why did you stop? Why don't you finish it right away?

1303100084.english: Because there is no need to do that anymore.

1303100085.english: Hehe, congratulations. It's a victory for you sisters.

1303200001.korean: - 포세이돈 함대와 전면전을 치르고 하루가 지났다.
1303200001.english: - A day has passed since the all-out battle with Poseidon's fleet.

1303200002.korean: …정말… 작전이 무사히 끝났으니까 이제 와서 말하는 거지만…
1303200002.english: … Really… I’m only saying this now because the operation ended safely, but…

1303200003.english: Brother! That was a really reckless plan!

1303200004.korean:
오르카의 주 전투력인 바이오로이드 전투면 모를까.
제대로 해본 적도 없는 함대전을 그! 포세이돈 함대 상대로 하는 게 어딨어?
1303200004.english:
Unless it is the bio-android battle, which is Orca's main combat power.
 How dare you engage in a fleet battle against that! Poseidon fleet when you've never even properly fought one before?

1303200005.korean: 제정신이라면 절대로 해서는 안 되는 일이었어!
1303200005.english: It was something I absolutely should not have done if I were in my right mind!

1303200006.korean: 오르카가 가진 전체 함대의 일부분이었다고 해도 손실률은 35%나 됐어.
1303200006.english: Even though it was only a part of Orca's entire fleet, the loss rate was as high as 35%.

1303200007.korean:
알바트로스 오빠가 아니었다면 분명 함대 대부분이 손실됐을 거야.
알바트로스 오빠는 많은 전투 데이터를 얻을 수 있었다고 좋아했지만…
1303200007.english:
If it weren't for Albatross, most of the fleet would definitely have been lost.
 Albatross was happy that he was able to obtain a lot of battle data, but…

1303200008.korean: 이번 전투에서 알바트로스 오빠가 흡수한 에너지량이 얼마나 되는지 알아?
1303200008.english: Do you know how much energy Albatross absorbed in this battle?

1303200009.korean:
흡수한 에너지를 모아서 터트리면 대도시 한두 개는 지도에서 흔적도 없이 사라지게 할 정도라고
게임이었으면 MMMVP야!
1303200009.english:
It is said that if you gather the absorbed energy and detonate it, it is enough to wipe one or two major cities off the map without a trace.
 If this were a game, it would be MMMVP!

1303200010.korean: 정말이지! 알았으면 됐어. 다시는 이런 무모한 작전은 하지 말아 줘.
1303200010.english: Seriously! Now that you know, that's enough. Please never attempt such a reckless operation again.

1303200012.korean: - 닥터는 산더미 같은 서류를 내 책상 위에 올려놓았다.
1303200012.english: The doctor placed a mountain of documents on my desk.

1303200013.english: What else could it be? It’s something my brother really likes.

1303200014.korean: 이번 작전으로 소모된 것들이랑 피해 보고 그리고 다시 만들어야 할 것들의 결재 서류야.
1303200014.english: These are the approval documents for the items consumed, the damages incurred, and the things that need to be remade during this operation.

1303200015.korean: 알파 언니는 잘은 모르겠지만 후유증? 이 있다고 장기 휴가를 냈어.
1303200015.english: I'm not entirely sure about Alpha, but she took a long leave of absence because she said she has some aftereffects.

1303200016.korean: 아르망 언니도 이번 작전의 결과로 발생할 수 있는 일들의 예측이 필요하다고 당분간은 바쁠 거래.
1303200016.english: Armand's older sister said she will be busy for a while because she needs to predict what might happen as a result of this operation.

1303200017.korean: - 그렇다는 건… 이 일들이 전부 내 거란 말이지?
1303200017.english: - Does that mean… all these things are mine?

1303200018.korean: - ...가끔 큰 일을 터트리는 것도 나쁘지 않을지도?
1303200018.english: - ...Maybe it's not so bad to cause a big stir every once in a while?

1303200019.english: Oppa, you're thinking something ridiculous right now, aren't you?

1303200020.english: The lies are written all over your face!

1303200022.korean: 야호! 아서 나 왔어! 초 절정 미소녀 멀린이 귀환했다구!
1303200022.english: Yay! Arthur, I'm here! The ultimate beauty Merlin has returned!

1303200023.korean: 별일 정도가 아니라 정말 끝내주는 일들이 있었지!
1303200023.english: It wasn't just a small thing; there were some truly amazing things!

1303200024.korean: 보여? 이 탱글탱글해지고 윤기가 넘치는 피부!

1303200025.korean: 지금까지 대장님과 떨어져서 잃었던 활기를 단번에 되찾은 기분이라고!
1303200025.english: I feel like I've instantly regained all the vitality I lost while being apart from the Captain!

1303200026.korean: - 멀린이 활기를 되찾은 만큼 감마는 활기를 잃었을 텐데 용케 살아서 돌아왔네.
1303200026.english: Gamma must have lost his vitality as much as Merlin has regained it, so it is amazing that he managed to return alive.

1303200027.korean: - 그 녀석, 이러니 저러니 해도 멀린에게는 무르단 말이지.
1303200027.english: That guy, no matter what anyone says, he's soft on Merlin.

1303200028.korean: 에헤헤, 아서가 그렇게 칭찬해 주다니 부끄럽네.
1303200028.english: Hehehe, I'm embarrassed that Arthur praised me like that.

1303200031.korean: 혹시에 혹시라도 절대 절대 아서라면 그럴 리가 없다고는 생각하는데…
1303200031.english: Just in case, just in case... I absolutely, absolutely don't think there's any way Arthur would do that...

1303200032.korean:
그러니까 불안하다고 해야 할까...
안정되지 않는다고 해야 할까…
1303200032.english:
So, should I say I feel anxious...
 Should I say it's not stable...

1303200033.korean: 으… 이런 건 나답지 않다는 건 알지만…
1303200033.english: Ugh... I know this isn't like me, but...

1303200035.korean: 아서! 혹시 이번 작전에서 나에게 실망하거나 하지 않았어…?
1303200035.english: Arthur! You weren't disappointed in me during this operation, were you...?

1303200036.korean:
그게 이번 작전이 아서가 나에게 처음으로 직접 지시한 작전이기도 하고…
아서가 만족할 정도로 수행을 했나 싶어서…
1303200036.english:
And this operation is also the first one Arthur has directly ordered me to do...
 I wondered if Arthur had performed to his satisfaction…

1303200037.korean: 실제 전투 내용도 포세이돈 함대에게 밀리기도 했고.
1303200037.english: In the actual battle, they were also pushed back by Poseidon's fleet.

1303200038.korean: - 나참... 그런 걸 신경 쓰고 있었던 건가?
1303200038.english: - Good grief... Were you actually worried about that?

1303200039.english: There are surprisingly detailed aspects as well.

1303200040.korean: - 멀린도 자기 나름의 책임감을 가지고 작전을 수행한 모양이다.
1303200040.english: It seems Merlin also carried out the operation with his own sense of responsibility.

1303200041.korean: - 나는 멀린의 뺨에 손을 가져가 어루만졌다.
1303200041.english: I brought my hand to Merlin's cheek and stroked it.

1303200042.korean: 꺅! 아서! 뺨은 왜… 갑자기 그렇게 만지면 부끄러운데…
1303200042.english: Ack! Arthur! Why... why the cheek... It's embarrassing when you suddenly touch it like that...

1303200044.english: I wasn't just a little relieved, I was incredibly relieved.

1303200045.korean: 좋아! 부활했어! 역시 포세이돈 최고의 분위기 메이커는 내가 침울해 있을 수는 없지!
1303200045.english: Alright! I'm back to life! As expected of Poseidon's best mood maker, I can't just be gloomy!

1303200046.korean: 조금 뜬금없는 질문 하나 해도 돼?
1303200046.english: Can I ask a slightly random question?

1303200047.english: What do you think of Captain Gamma?

1303200048.korean: 가능하면 이성으로서의 부분으로 자세히 알려줬으면 좋겠는데.
1303200048.english: If possible, I would like you to explain it in detail from a rational perspective.

1303200049.korean: - …당분간 멀린과 탈론페더 두 사람이 같이 다니게 하면 안 되겠다고 생각했다.
1303200049.english: ... I thought that I shouldn't let Merlin and Talonfeather travel together for the time being.

1303200051.korean: - 3일이 지나 우리는 이번 작전이 시발점이었던 몰타로 돌아왔다.
1303200051.english: Three days later, we returned to Malta, where this operation had started.

1303200054.korean: 켈라이노 언니, 타이게테 언니, 아스타로페 언니, 엘렉트라 언니…
1303200054.english: Sister Celaino, Sister Taygete, Sister Astarope, Sister Electra…

1303200056.korean:
꼭 돌아오겠다고 알키오네 언니랑 약속했으니까.
나 약속 지켰어. 잘했지?
1303200056.english:
Because I promised Alcyone that I would definitely come back.
 I kept my promise. I did a good job, right?

1303200057.korean: 그리고 들어 봐! 몰타에 유원지가 생겼어!
1303200057.english: And listen! An amusement park has opened in Malta!

1303200058.korean: 탈 수 있는 놀이 기구도 잔뜩 있는 진짜 테마파크래!
1303200058.english: They say it's a real theme park with tons of rides to go on!

1303200059.korean: 시간이 되면 알키오네 언니랑 같이 놀러 가기로 했어. 벌서 기대돼!
1303200059.english: I decided to go hang out with Alcyone if I have time. I'm already looking forward to it!

1303200061.english: I met the mermaid sisters again, too!

1303200062.english: Everyone was just as they used to be.

1303200063.korean:
갈라테아 언니는 기운이 넘치고 살라시아 언니는 나랑 잘 놀아주고
엠피트리테 언니는 상냥하고 멜 공주는...
1303200063.english:
Galatea is full of energy, and Salasia plays well with me.
 Sister Emphitrite is kind and Princess Mel is...

1303200064.english: I don't know why, but I became the Chocolate Queen.

1303200065.korean:
초코랜드 왕국을 건국했는데 갈라테아 언니가 근위대장 살라시아 언니가 참모 총장
엠피트레티 언니는 재정부 장관이래.
1303200065.english:
I founded the Kingdom of Chocoland, and Galatea is the Captain of the Royal Guard and Salasia is the Chief of Staff.
 They say Ampitreti is the Minister of Finance.

1303200066.korean:
그리고 나한테 초코랜드 여왕님의 전속 메이드가 되지 않겠냐고 제안이 왔어.
뭔지 잘 모르겠어서 일단 거절했지만…
1303200066.english:
And I received an offer to become the Queen of Chocoland's personal maid.
 I wasn't sure what it was, so I declined for now, but...

1303200068.korean: 하고 싶은 말… 언니들에게… 하고 싶은 말…
1303200068.english: Words I want to say… To my older sisters… Words I want to say…

1303200070.english: I miss my older sisters so much…

1303200071.korean:
같이 놀고 같이 밥 먹고 같이 낮잠도 자고…
그때처럼 다 함께 같이 있고 싶어…
1303200071.english:
Playing together, eating together, and taking naps together...
 I want to be together with everyone like back then…

1303200072.korean:
언니들에게 어리광을 부리고 싶었어…
하지만 언니들은 이제 없으니까…
1303200072.english:
I wanted to act spoiled towards my older sisters…
 But my older sisters aren't here anymore...

1303200075.korean:
나에게는 알키오네 언니도 있고 머메이드 언니들이 있으니까.
그리고 새로운 친구들도 많이 사귈 예정이야.
1303200075.english:
Because I have Alcyone and Mermaid sisters.
 And I plan to make a lot of new friends.

1303200077.english: A promise I made with my older sister Maia…

1303200078.korean: 언니들에게 그랬던 것처럼.. 내 웃는 얼굴이 모두에게 힘이 될 수 있도록 웃을 거야.
1303200078.english: Just like I did for my older sisters... I will smile so that my smiling face can be a source of strength for everyone.

1303200080.korean: 플레이아데스의 자랑 언니들의 동생 메로페는 앞으로 항상 웃으며 지낼 거야.
1303200080.english: Merope, the younger sister of the Pleiades' pride, will always be smiling from now on.

1303200081.korean:
그러니까 편히 쉬어.
내가 정말 좋아하고 사랑하는 언니들…
1303200081.english:
So, get some rest.
 My older sisters whom I really like and love…

1303200082.korean: - 한 차례의 성묘를 마치고 오르카 호로 돌아오자 메로페는 곧장 나에게 찾아왔다.
1303200082.english: As soon as I returned to the Orca after visiting the grave, Merope came straight to me.

1303200087.english: Ah, um... so... Mr. Human? Hello?

1303200090.english: Ha! It's so frustrating I can't stand watching!

1303200092.korean: 메로페, 나랑 놀 때는 알키오네 언니 최고! 이러면서 시끄러운데 왜 갑자기 꿀 먹은 벙어리가 된 거야.
1303200092.english: Merope, you're so loud when you're playing with me, saying things like "Alcyone is the best!", so why did you suddenly go completely silent?

1303200093.english: That…! That was a long time ago.

1303200094.english: So you're saying it's not now?

1303200096.korean: 주인님도! 항상 적극적으로 행동하면서 오늘은 왜 가만히 있는 거야?
1303200096.english: You too, Master! You're always so proactive, so why are you just sitting around today?

1303200097.korean: 혹시 내 귀여운 동생에게 불만이라도 있어?
1303200097.english: Do you happen to have a complaint about my cute little brother?

1303200098.korean: 언니의 힘 한 번 보여줘야 해?
1303200098.english: Do I have to show you my strength?

1303200099.korean: 어쩔 수 없네… 이럴 때의 방법은 하나 뿐이지.
1303200099.english: It can't be helped... There's only one way to handle this.

1303200101.korean: 그래도 포세이돈 함대 상대로 이 정도면 선방이지 않을까?
1303200101.english: Still, wouldn't this be a decent performance against Poseidon's fleet?

1303200109.english: Was everything okay when you saw Gamma off?

1303200110.english: So it had been losing its vitality until now…

1303200111.korean: 이번 작전도 그렇고 정말 고생 많았어 멀린.
1303200111.english: You worked really hard on this operation and everything else, Merlin.

1303200112.english: What's wrong all of a sudden?

1303200113.korean: 대체 무슨 말이야? 내가 왜 너에게 실망을 해?
1303200113.english: What on earth are you talking about? Why would I be disappointed in you?

1303200114.korean: 날 위해서 노력해 줬는데 내가 실망할리가 없잖아?
1303200114.english: You went out of your way for me, so there's no way I'd be disappointed, right?

1303200116.english: That's fine. What were you going to ask?

1303300001.korean: - 다음 날, 나는 알키오네에게 떠밀리듯 오르카 파크로 향했다.
1303300001.english: The next day, I headed to Orca Park as if pushed by Alcyone.

1303300002.korean: - 오르카 파크에 입장하고 잠시 후, 나는 나를 향해 손을 흔들고 있는 아이를 찾았다.
1303300002.english: Shortly after entering Orca Park, I found a child waving at me.

1303300004.english: Ah, that's not it... I mean...

1303300007.korean: 알키오네 언니도 참... 주인님과는 인사도 제대로 못 했는데 갑자기 데이트라니…
1303300007.english: Alcyone, really... I haven't even properly greeted the Master yet, and suddenly you're talking about a date...

1303300008.korean: 아, 이 옷 가디언 언니들이 데이트할 때 입고 가라고 골라줬어요.
1303300008.english: Oh, the Guardian sisters picked this outfit out for me to wear on my date.

1303300009.english: I'm not sure if it will go well, but...

1303300011.korean:
안녕하세요. 주인님!
가디언 플레이아데스 시리즈의 막내 메로페에요.
1303300011.english:
Hello, Master!
 I am Merope, the youngest of the Guardian Pleiades series.

1303300012.korean:
이번에 포세이돈에서 오르카로 인사이동이 되었어요.
앞으로 잘 부탁드려요.
1303300012.english:
I was transferred from Poseidon to Orca.
 I look forward to working with you in the future.

1303300015.english: Cute, you say... cute... such... hehehe...

1303300018.korean: 언니에게 들었지만, 정말 신기한 사람이야 주인님은…
1303300018.english: I heard from my older sister, but Master is a really fascinating person…

1303300021.english: I really wanted to say this.

1303300022.korean: 머메이드 언니들을 도와주고, 알키오네 언니도 도와주고, 언니들의 무덤도 만들어주고
1303300022.english: Help the Mermaid sisters, help Alcyone sister, and build their graves.
