1303300023.korean: 내가 다시 언니들과 재회할 수 있게 도와줘서 정말 고마워.
1303300023.english: Thank you so much for helping me reunite with my sisters again.

1303300024.korean:
오르카에는 엄청 민폐를 끼쳤는데 아무 말 없이 받아주고…
이 보답을 어떻게 해야 할지 모르겠어.
1303300024.english:
I caused a huge nuisance to Orca, but she accepted me without saying a word...
 I don't know how to repay you.

1303300025.korean: 그게 뭔데? 내가 할 수 있는 일이면 뭐든지 할게!
1303300025.english: What is that? I'll do anything I can!

1303300026.korean: 뭐야 그게! 그런 건 보답도 부탁도 아닌 걸!
1303300026.english: What is that! That's neither a reward nor a request!

1303300028.english: Then this time, I promise for my master.

1303300029.korean: 모두를 위해서 그리고 주인님을 위해서 웃겠다고.
1303300029.english: I said I would smile for everyone and for my master.

1303300032.korean: 그런데 알키오네 언니는 어디있어? 둘이 같이 온 거 아니야?
1303300032.english: But where is Alcyone? Didn't the two of them come together?

1303300033.korean: - 나는 사라진 알키오네를 찾기 위해 주변을 둘러봤고…
1303300033.english: I looked around to find the missing Alcyone, and…

1303300034.korean: - 멀리 떨어진 쓰레기통 뒤에 숨어 있는 알키오네의 모습을 찾았다.
1303300034.english: I found Alcyone hiding behind a trash can far away.

1303300035.korean: - 힐끗힐끗 여기를 바라보는 게 아무래도 우리의 모습을 지켜볼 생각인가 보다.
1303300035.english: - Seeing how it keeps glancing over here and there, it looks like it intends to watch us.

1303300037.english: … ! I just had a good idea!

1303300038.english: Master, won't you play hide-and-seek with me starting now?

1303300039.korean: 응! 지금부터 알키오네 언니를 피해서 둘이서 데이트하는 거야.
1303300039.english: Yeah! From now on, we're going on a date just the two of us, avoiding Alcyone.

1303300040.korean: 모처럼 테마파크에 왔는걸! 방해받지 않고 놀고 싶어!
1303300040.english: I’ve come all the way to a theme park! I want to play without being disturbed!

1303300041.korean: 그런데 나는 여기는 처음이라 길을 잘 모르니까…
1303300041.english: But since it's my first time here and I don't know the way well...

1303300042.english: Master, can you… hold my hand?

1303300044.korean: - 메로페는 아이 같은 천진난만한 얼굴로 웃었다.
1303300044.english: Meropé smiled with an innocent, childlike face.

1303300045.english: This must be Merope's original form.

1303300046.english: Because it's Orca Park, full of dreams and hopes! … Right?

1303300047.korean: 아, 미안 너무 귀여워서 할 말을 잃었어.
1303300047.english: Ah, sorry, you're so cute I'm speechless.

1303300049.english: And it's okay to speak comfortably.

1303300050.korean: 오히려 언니 때처럼 편하게 대해주는 게 나도 편할 거야.
1303300050.english: Actually, it would be more comfortable for me if you treated me casually, just like you did with your older sister.

1303300052.korean: 두 사람이 다시 만날 수 있도록 결심했으니까.
1303300052.english: Because I decided that the two of them could meet again.

1303300053.english: And as for a reward, one is enough.

1303300055.english: … I never break a promise … Right?

1303300056.korean: 그러고보니 안 보이네? 오르카 파크까지는 같이 왔는데.
1303300056.english: Come to think of it, I don't see you. We came to Orca Park together, though.

1303300057.korean: 저기 숨어 있네… 뭘 하는 건지…
1303300057.english: Hiding over there… I wonder what they’re doing…

1303300059.english: Of course. Is there anywhere you'd like to go?

1303300060.korean: 그래 지금은 모든 걸 잊어버리고 신나게 놀자!
1303300060.english: Okay, let's forget everything for now and have some fun!

1303400001.korean:
참고로 지금의 알파와는 가능한 말을 섞지 않는 게 좋을 거야.
무슨 일이 벌어질지 모르거든…
1303400001.english:
For your information, it would be best to avoid speaking to the current Alpha if possible.
 You never know what might happen...

1303400002.korean: - 리스트컷은 그렇게 말했지만, 역시 걱정돼서 함대가 출발하기 전 알파를 만나기 위해 찾아갔다.
1303400002.english: Listcut said that, but I was still worried, so I went to see Alpha before the fleet departed.

1303400005.korean: 우리가 서로 안부를 물어볼 사이는 아닌 것 같은데? 무슨 일이지?
1303400005.english: I don't think we're close enough to ask how each other is doing. What's up?

1303400006.korean: - 리스트컷의 설명으로는 알파가 델타 연기에 심취했을 경우 자신이 오르카에 소속되어 있는 일에 위화감을 느낄 것을 대비해
1303400006.english: - According to the explanation of the List Cut, this is to prepare for the possibility that Alpha might feel a sense of unease about being affiliated with Orca if he becomes engrossed in Delta's acting.

1303400007.korean: - 아무튼! 델타가 오르카에 합류했다라는 설정을 넣었다고 했다.
1303400007.english: - Anyway! They said they added the setting that Delta joined Orca.

1303400008.english: - If it really were Delta, would it have felt like this?

1303400009.korean: 하! 헛소리도 그런 헛소리가 따로 없네?

1303400010.korean: 강제로 명령해서 시켜놓고 이제 와서 그런 소리를 해?
1303400010.english: You forced me to do it, and now you're saying something like that?

1303400011.korean: - …아무래도 내가 강제로 명령해서 시켰다는 설정 같다…
1303400011.english: - … It seems like the premise is that I forced him to order it…

1303400012.korean: - 누가 보면 한 순간에 내 평판이 땅에 떨어질 일이다…
1303400012.english: If anyone saw this, my reputation would be ruined in an instant…

1303400013.english: If you were going to apologize, you shouldn't have given the order in the first place.

1303400014.korean:
이런 터무니 없는 작전을 진행하고 억지에도 정도가 있어.
고생하는 바이오로이드는 생각도 안하는 거야? 주인님?
1303400014.english:
There is a limit to how absurd you can be with such a ridiculous operation.
 Don't you even think about the suffering bioroids? Master?

1303400015.korean: - 지금 뭐라고? 주인님이라고 말한 것 같은데 잘못 들었나? 말하는 것도 조금 알파 같았는데?
1303400015.english: - What did you just say? I think you said "Master." Did I hear wrong? Even the way you spoke sounded a bit like an Alpha.

1303400016.korean: 하? 무슨 또 헛소리를 하는 거지? 내가 왜 너 따위를 주인님이라 불러야 하는 건데?
1303400016.english: Huh? What kind of nonsense are you spouting again? Why should I call someone like you "Master"?

1303400017.korean: 그런 헛소리를 할 시간이 있다면 어떻게 하면 무사히 작전을 끝낼 수 있을지 생각이나 하라고.
1303400017.english: If you have time to spout such nonsense, you should be thinking about how to safely finish the operation.

1303400018.korean: - 거친 말투를 사용하면서도 생각하는 건 알파답다고 해야 하나? 나도 좀 혼란스럽다.
1303400018.english: Should I say that despite using rough language, his way of thinking is typical of an Alpha? I'm a bit confused myself.

1303400019.korean: 그 어린 범고래 말이지? 감히 나에게 대든 걸 후회하게 만들어 주겠어.
1303400019.english: You mean that young killer whale? I'll make him regret daring to talk back to me.

1303400021.korean: - 지금의 델타는 알파가 혼신의 연기하고 있을 뿐이다.
1303400021.english: The current Delta is merely Alpha giving his all in his performance.

1303400022.korean: - 내가 지금 이 질문을 한다고 한들 정답이 될 수도 없으며 되어서도 안 된다.
1303400022.english: Even if I were to ask this question now, it could not be the correct answer, nor should it be.

1303400023.korean: - 알고 있지만 그래도 나는 궁금증을 참을 수 없었다.
1303400023.english: I knew it, but I still couldn't suppress my curiosity.

1303400027.korean: 내가 할 수 있는 말은 하나뿐이야.
1303400027.english: There is only one thing I can say.

1303400028.korean:
나는 무슨 일이 있어도… 언제까지나 내가 사랑하는 걸 위해…
오로지 그거 하나뿐을 위해서… 모든 걸 바칠 거야.
1303400028.english:
No matter what happens… forever for the sake of what I love…
 I will give everything for that one and only reason.

1303400029.english: Alpha, are you okay over there?

1303400031.korean: 아니, 준비는 잘 되었나 걱정이 되서…
1303400031.english: No, I was just worried about whether everything was well prepared…

1303400034.english: Hey, didn't you just call me Master?

1303400035.korean: 아무튼 메로페와 만났을 때는 잘 부탁할게.
1303400035.english: Anyway, I'll be counting on you when I meet Merope.

1303400038.korean: 우리가 서로 잘 해내갈 방법이 있을까?
1303400038.english: Is there a way for us to get along well?

1303500001.korean: - 포세이돈 함대와 전면전이 곧 시작되려는 상황.
1303500001.english: - A situation where an all-out war with Poseidon's fleet is about to begin.

1303500002.korean: - 나는 함대의 최후방에서도 멀리 떨어진 섬에 만든 임시 기지에서 상황을 지켜보고 있었다.
1303500002.english: I was watching the situation from a temporary base built on an island far from the rear of the fleet.

1303500003.korean: ...주인님, 포세이돈의 함선 한 척이 이 섬 쪽으로 다가와 정박 요청을 했습니다.
1303500003.english: ...Master, one of Poseidon's ships has approached this island and requested to dock.

1303500004.korean: - 지금 상황에서의 포세이돈의 함선, 그리고 리리스의 찡그린 표정으로 보아 이곳에 찾아올 인물은 한 사람밖에 없다.
1303500004.english: Judging by Poseidon's ship in the current situation and Lilith's frowning face, there is only one person who will come here.

1303500005.korean: - 나는 한숨을 쉬며 이 섬에 찾아온 함선의 정박 요청을 승인했다.
1303500005.english: I sighed and approved the ship's request to dock at the island.

1303500006.korean: - 그리고 잠시 후, 아니나 다를까 레모네이드 감마가 찾아왔다.
1303500006.english: And a short while later, sure enough, Lemonade Gamma arrived.

1303500007.korean: 어디서 지켜보고 있을 거라 생각했는데 이런데 숨어 있었나 오르카의 사령관?
1303500007.english: I thought you'd be watching from somewhere, but was the Orca Commander hiding here?

1303500008.korean:
딱히 용무는 없어. 그냥 같이 구경이나 할까 해서 찾아왔지.
스포츠도 혼자서 구경하는 것보다 다 같이 구경하는 게 즐겁잖아? 그런 거야.
1303500008.english:
I don't really have anything specific. I just came by to look around together.
 Just like with sports, it's more fun to watch together than alone, right? It's like that.

1303500009.korean:
그럼 괜찮네! 나는 싸움 구경할 때는 양쪽 다 응원하는 타입이니까.
원한다면 불리한 쪽에 붙어서 도와주기도 하지.
1303500009.english:
Then that’s fine! I’m the type to cheer for both sides when watching a fight.
 If you want, I'll even side with the disadvantaged party to help.

1303500010.korean:
처음엔 그러려고 했는데… 보아하니 용도 없고 그냥 부관에게 맡겨도 괜찮겠다 생각했지.
어차피 꼬맹이를 위한 이벤트니까 말이야.
1303500010.english:
I intended to do that at first... but seeing as it wasn't useful, I thought it would be fine to just leave it to the adjutant.
 It's an event for the little one anyway.

1303500011.korean:
뭐야? 내가 참가하지 않아서 아쉬운 거야?
지금이라도 원한다면 참가해 줄 수도 있는데?
1303500011.english:
What? Are you disappointed that I didn't participate?
 I could participate even now if you wanted.

1303500012.korean: 하핫, 뭐 좋아. 너에겐 빚진 것도 있었고 알파의 재밌는 모습도 볼 수 있었으니까.
1303500012.english: Haha, well, fine. I owe you something, and I got to see a funny side of Alpha.

1303500013.korean: 이번 일로 빚은 없던 걸로 하자고.
1303500013.english: Let's pretend the debt never happened because of this.

1303500014.korean:
뭐야? 갑자기? 그러지 마라.
감사를 주고받을 사이는 아니잖아?
1303500014.english:
What? Suddenly? Don't do that.
 We're not exactly close enough to exchange thanks, are we?

1303500015.korean: 거스름? 넌 내 부관을 구했고 난 그 꼬맹이를 건졌으니 똑같은 거 아닌가?
1303500015.english: Change? You saved my subordinate and I rescued that kid, so isn't it the same thing?

1303500017.korean:
하! 이거 데려갈 생각으로 가득하잖아?
내 부관을 두 명이나 뺐을 셈이야? 주겠다고 한 기억은 없는 것 같은데?
1303500017.english:
Ha! You're totally thinking of taking this away, aren't you?
 Are you planning to take two of my adjutants? I don't recall ever saying I would give them to you.

1303500018.korean: 복지가 있는 세력은 오르카밖에 없을 거다.
1303500018.english: Orca is probably the only faction with welfare.

1303500020.english: Haha, that's really disgusting, Commander of Orca.

1303500021.korean:
오, 포세이돈 함대가 움직이기 시작했군.
곧 전투가 시작되겠어.
1303500021.english:
Oh, Poseidon's fleet has started to move.
 The battle is about to begin.

1303500022.english: Well then, I'll be going now.

1303500023.korean: 그러려고 했는데 누군가가 계속 날 꼬시려는 것 같아서 말이야.
1303500023.english: I was going to do that, but it feels like someone keeps trying to flirt with me.

1303500024.english: Hmph, there's no need for that.

1303500025.korean: 당분간 북부 전선에 가야 해서 볼 일이 없을 거 같지만…
1303500025.english: I have to go to the northern front for a while, so I probably won't see you, but...

1303500026.english: Haha, well then, I'll be looking forward to it.

1303500028.korean: 보통 응원하는 팀이 다르면 같은 장소에 앉지 않지만.
1303500028.english: Usually, if you support different teams, you don't sit in the same place, but...

1303500029.korean: 참가할 것처럼 말하더니 결국 구경만 하려고?
1303500029.english: You acted like you were going to participate, but in the end, you're just planning to watch?

1303500030.english: Please bear with me this time.

1303500032.english: Certainly... but this time there is some left over.

1303500033.english: ...as if it were the child support up to now.

1303500034.english: Everyone in Orca is my family.

1303500035.english: That is for Merope to decide.

1303500036.korean: 미리 말하지만 오르카의 복지는 세계 최고야.
1303500036.english: I'll say it in advance: Orca's welfare is the best in the world.

1303500037.english: So it's the best in the world.

1303500038.korean: 원하는 게 있다면 최대한 해줄 거야.
1303500038.english: If there is anything you want, I will do my best to help you.

1303500039.english: You said we were going to look around together?

1303500040.korean: 도움이 필요하면 말해 거스름을 돌려주러 갈 테니까.
1303500040.english: If you need help, let me know and I'll come give you your change.

1303500041.korean: 네가 싫다고 해도 내 마음대로 할 거야. 누가 그랬던 것처럼.
1303500041.english: Even if you say you don't want to, I'm going to do as I please. Just like someone did.

1303600001.english: She jumped in! Makina, now's the time!

1303600004.korean: 작전 대상의 욕망을 읽고 구현하는데 성공했어요.
1303600004.english: I succeeded in reading and realizing the target's desires.

1303600005.korean: 정말로 복수가 아닌 다른 욕망이 있는지 모르겠지만, 나머지는 저 아이와 언니의 몫이겠죠.
1303600005.english: I don't know if there really is a desire other than revenge, but the rest is up to that child and her older sister.

1303600006.english: What are the works I created?

1303600007.english: I have implemented it for now.

1303600008.english: Yeah, I hope I never have to use it...

1303600010.korean: 마키나? 무슨 생각을 그렇게 하고 있어?
1303600010.english: Makina? What are you thinking about so much?

1303600011.korean:
아무것도 아니에요.
그저… 누군가의 욕망을 다시 구현화하는 일을 다시 하게 될 줄은 몰랐으니까요.
1303600011.english:
It's nothing.
 It’s just… I never thought I would be doing the work of realizing someone’s desires again.

1303600012.korean: 아직도 예전 일을 신경쓰고 있는 거야?
1303600012.english: Are you still thinking about the past?

1303600013.korean: 지금은 그때와는 달라! 마키나도 잘 알고 있잖아?
1303600013.english: Things are different now than they were back then! Makina knows that well, right?

1303600014.korean: 그리고 최면을 거는 장치는 부셔졌으니까 어디까지나 욕망을 읽어서 구현화한 것 뿐이고!
1303600014.english: And since the hypnosis device was broken, it was merely a manifestation of reading desires!

1303600015.korean:
남의 욕망을 읽는 것부터가 문제라고 생각하지만…
그래도 고마워요 메리. 날 위해서 그렇게까지 말해줘서.
1303600015.english:
I think reading other people's desires is the problem in the first place, but...
 Still, thank you, Mary. Thank you for saying all that for my sake.

1303600016.korean: 하지만 그때도 말했듯이 좋은 의도가 꼭 좋은 결과를 낳는 건 아니에요.
1303600016.english: But as I said back then, good intentions don't necessarily lead to good results.

1303600017.korean: 그러니까 좋은 의도로 했을지라도 책임을 질 각오가 있어야 한다고 생각해요.
1303600017.english: So, I think you must be prepared to take responsibility, even if you did it with good intentions.

1303600019.korean:
제가 저지른 일들을 속죄하겠다고 생각했을 때부터 각오하고 있었어요.
사령관님과 오르카 호의 사람들… 그리고 메리 당신을 위해서요.
1303600019.english:
I was prepared from the moment I decided to atone for the things I had done.
 For the Commander, the people of the Orca... and for you, Mary.

1303600020.korean: 그럼 나도 각오할 게! 나도 이번 작전의 관여했으니까.
1303600020.english: Then I'll be prepared too! After all, I was involved in this operation.

1303600021.korean:
그리고 나는 마키나의 파트너니까!
마키나가 짊어질 각오의 절반은 내가 같이 들어줄게!
1303600021.english:
And I'm Makina's partner!
 I'll help carry half of the resolve Makina has to bear!

1303600023.korean:
헤헤, 후아암~ 
조금 긴장이 풀려서 그런가 조금 졸릴지도…
1303600023.english:
Hehe, yawn~
 Maybe it's because I've relaxed a bit, but I might feel a little sleepy...

1303600024.korean: 바쁜 와중에도 무리해서 이번 작전을 도왔으니까요.
1303600024.english: Because they went out of their way to help with this operation despite being busy.

1303600025.english: Yeah… it was a close call right before the deadline…

1303600026.korean: 메리의 일은 끝났으니 잠시 쉬는 게 어때요? 무릎베개 해드릴게요.
1303600026.english: Mary's work is finished, so why don't you take a break? I'll let you use my lap as a pillow.

1303600027.korean:
앗, 정말!?
아… 그리고 아직 작전 중인데… 으 그래도 마키나의 무릎베개…
1303600027.english:
Oh, really!?
 Ah... and we're still in the middle of the operation... Ugh, still, Makina's lap pillow...

1303600028.korean: 지금이 아니면 당분간은 이런 기회가 없을 지도?
1303600028.english: If not now, there might not be another opportunity like this for a while.

1303600029.english: Whoa! Then I'll do it now!

1303600030.korean: 헤헤~ 마키나의 무릎베개~ 따뜻해~ 좋은 향기도 나고~
1303600030.english: Hehe~ Makina's lap pillow~ It's warm~ And it smells nice~

1303600031.english: With this, I might... sleep... well...

1303600033.english: May this paradise continue unchanged in the future…

1303700006.korean:
그만 좀 울어라.
네 울음소리에 메로페 녀석의 잔소리가 없어도 귀청 떨어지겠다.
1303700006.english:
Stop crying.
 Your crying is enough to make my eardrums burst, even without Meropé's nagging.

1303700007.korean: 그치만… 훌쩍 감마 님이 메로페 님이 포세이돈을 떠나 돌아오지 않을 거라고 하셨잖아요.
1303700007.english: But... *sniff* Gamma said that Merope would leave Poseidon and not return.

1303700008.korean: 이번 작전으로 메로페 님이 떠나는지 알았으면 도와주지 않을 걸 그랬어요!
1303700008.english: If I had known Merope was leaving because of this operation, I wouldn't have helped!

1303700009.korean: 네가 도와주지 않는다고 해서 결과가 바뀌지는 않았을 것 같다만?
1303700009.english: I don't think the outcome would have changed even if you hadn't helped.

1303700011.korean:
나참, 메로페가 온 뒤로 좀 쓸만한 녀석이 되었다고 생각했는데
없어지자마자 이 꼴인가…
1303700011.english:
Good grief, I thought he'd become a decent guy ever since Meropé arrived.
 Is this the state it ends in the moment it disappears...

1303700012.korean: 어나이얼레이터, 함대의 긴급 수리과 재정비가 끝나는 대로 북부 전선 기지로 돌아간다.
1303700012.english: Annihilator returns to the northern front base as soon as the fleet's emergency repairs and reorganization are completed.

1303700013.korean: 얼굴도 안 보고 그냥 갈 셈이에요?
1303700013.english: Are you planning to just leave without even seeing my face?

1303700016.korean:
돌아오셨군요! 감마 님이 메로페 님이 떠날 거라고 하셨는데 아니죠? 그렇죠? 아니죠?
돌아오신 거 맞죠?
1303700016.english:
You're back! Gamma said Merope would leave, but that's not true, is it? Right? It's not, is it?
 You're back, right?

1303700019.korean:
…사실이에요. 저는 포세이돈을 떠나기로 했어요.
처음부터 포세이돈에는 제 목적을 이루기 위해 들어온 거였으니까요.
1303700019.english:
… It’s true. I decided to leave Poseidon.
 Because I joined Poseidon from the beginning to achieve my own purpose.

1303700021.korean:
괜찮아요. 다시 영영 못 보는 것도 아니니까요.
연락하고자 하면 언제든지 연락할 수도 있어요.
1303700021.english:
It's okay. It's not like I'll never see you again.
 You can contact me anytime you want.

1303700022.korean: 그리고, 생각보다 다시 만나는 날이 가까울지도 모르고요.
1303700022.english: And, the day we meet again might be closer than you think.

1303700024.korean:
…그럼 저랑 한 가지 약속해요.
제가 없더라도 울지 않고 웃으면서 지내겠다고요.
1303700024.english:
… Then, promise me one thing.
 She said that even if I wasn't there, she would live happily without crying.

1303700025.korean: 그 약속을 지키면 제가 다시 로데를 만나러 꼭 찾아갈게요.
1303700025.english: If you keep that promise, I will definitely come to visit Rode again.

1303700027.korean:
물론이에요. 가디언 시리즈는 절대 약속을 어기지 않으니까요.
그런 의미로 로데에게는 이걸 줄게요.
1303700027.english:
Of course. The Guardian series never breaks a promise.
 In that sense, I will give this to Rode.

1303700028.korean:
이건… 메로페 님의 목걸이…
소중한 사람에게 받은 거라고 하지 않으셨어요?
1303700028.english:
This is… Merope’s necklace…
 Didn't you say it was received from someone precious?

1303700029.korean:
저는 이제 괜찮아요. 이 목걸이가 없어도 소중한 사람과의 약속을 잊지 않을 거니까요.
그러니까 로데에게 건네주는 거예요. 로데가 이 목걸이를 보고 약속을 지킬 수 있도록.
1303700029.english:
I'm okay now. Because even without this necklace, I won't forget the promise I made to someone precious.
 So, I am giving it to Rode. So that Rode can see this necklace and keep her promise.

1303700032.korean:
네, 할 수 있어요! 메로페 님과의 약속 꼭 지킬게요.
그러니까 꼭 다시 만나러 와주세요.
1303700032.english:
Yes, I can do it! I will definitely keep my promise to Merope.
 So please make sure to come see me again.

1303700035.korean: 됐어. 내가 널 주운 이유는 변덕도 있지만 그때의 네 눈빛이 옛날의 용과 닮았기 때문이야.
1303700035.english: That's enough. The reason I picked you up is partly because of my whims, but also because the look in your eyes back then resembled the dragon of old.

1303700036.korean:
그런데 이제 너에게는 그 눈빛이 느껴지지 않아.
너에게 흥미가 없어졌단 소리지.
1303700036.english:
But now I can't feel that look in your eyes.
 It means I've lost interest in you.

1303700037.korean: 흥미가 없는 녀석이 떠나든 말든 난 상관 안해.
1303700037.english: I don't care if the guy I'm not interested in leaves or not.

1303700038.english: Then please sign the document here.

1303700040.korean:
인사이동 확인 서류에요. 오르카로 전향하기 전에 어딘가에 소속이 되어 있고
그곳에 지휘관이 있다면 특별한 이유가 없는 한 지휘관이 사인한 서류가 필요하다고 해서요.
1303700040.english:
This is a document confirming the personnel transfer. I was affiliated with somewhere before transferring to Orca.
 I heard that if there is a commander there, a document signed by the commander is required unless there is a special reason not to.

1303700041.korean: 나중에 다른 말이 나오지 않게 하기 위함이래요.
1303700041.english: They say it is to prevent any other talk from arising later.

1303700046.english: I don't remember keeping a promise, though?

1303700047.english: No, he definitely kept his promise.

1303700048.english: I will come back to repay you someday.

1303700050.korean: 그래서, 저놈은 대체 왜 여기 있는 거냐?
1303700050.english: So, why on earth is that guy here?

1303700051.korean: 데헷~ 물론 대장님을 볼 수 있는 기회니까 찾아왔지요!
1303700051.english: Hehe~ Of course I came because it's a chance to see the Captain!

1303700052.korean: 포세이돈 함선으로 돌아가려는데 갑자기 나타나서는 무조건 따라가겠다고 해서…
1303700052.english: I was about to return to Poseidon's ship when he suddenly appeared and said he would follow me no matter what...

1303700053.korean: ...미리 말해두는데 친구는 가려 사귀어라… 저놈처럼 되지 말고…
1303700053.english: ...Let me tell you in advance: be selective about who you befriend... Don't end up like that guy...

1303700054.korean: 그게 무슨 소리예요! 대장님 제 친구들은 전부 좋은 애들 뿐이라고요!
1303700054.english: What are you talking about! Captain, all my friends are good guys!

1303700055.korean: 그나저나 대장님! 작전 중에 은밀~하게 아서랑 만난 것 같은데 무슨 이야기를 하셨어요?
1303700055.english: By the way, Captain! It looks like you met Arthur secretly during the operation. What did you talk about?

1303700056.korean: 역시 대장님도 오르카로 오실 생각이신 거죠?
1303700056.english: So, Captain, you're planning to come to Orca as well, right?

1303700058.korean: 감마 님? 그럼 메로페 님이랑 헤어지지 않아도 되는 거예요?
1303700058.english: Gamma? Then I don't have to break up with Merope?

1303700059.korean: 하아… 이게 전부 그 사령관의 작전이라면 정말 무서운 놈이야…
1303700059.english: Haa... If this is all part of that commander's plan, he's a really scary guy...

1303800001.korean: 안녕, 모두들! 초 절정 미소녀이자 포세이돈의 진정한 참모 그리고 오르카의 귀염둥이 멀린이야~!
1303800001.english: Hello everyone! It's Merlin, the ultimate beauty, Poseidon's true advisor, and Orca's cutie~!

1303800002.korean:
오늘은 특별한 게스트를 데려왔어!
얼마 전에 있었던 승부는 서로의 전력의 차이도 있었고 여러 가지 이유로 진검 승부하기가 어려웠지.
1303800002.english:
I brought a special guest today!
 The match we had recently was difficult to have a real showdown due to the difference in our respective strengths and various other reasons.

1303800003.korean:
그래서 오늘은! 불평불만할 수 없는 진짜 진검 승부로 누가 더 포세이돈의 참모이자
감마 대장님의 부관에 어울리는지 정하는 거야!
1303800003.english:
So today! In a real sword fight where no complaints are allowed, who is more of Poseidon's advisor and
 It's about deciding if you're suitable to be Captain Gamma's adjutant!

1303800004.english: Now, for that reason, it's a showdown! Merope!

1303800006.korean: 하아… 설마 감마 님이 말한 참모가 이런 녀석일 줄이야…
1303800006.english: Haa... I never imagined the strategist Gamma mentioned would be a guy like this...

1303800007.korean:
그래도 승부를 내는 건 좋아.
누가 더 뛰어난 부관인지 흑백을 가리는 건 나도 하고 싶었으니까.
1303800007.english:
Still, I like settling the score.
 I wanted to distinguish between black and white who the superior adjutant was, too.

1303800008.english: So, what are you going to decide the match with?

1303800009.korean: 후후후, 서로의 지능을 겨루는 승부이니 당연히 지능을 사용하는 걸로 해야 하지 않겠어?
1303800009.english: Hahaha, since this is a battle of intelligence, shouldn't we naturally use our intelligence?

1303800010.korean:
그런 이유로 체스야!
해본 적은 없지만!
1303800010.english:
That is why it's chess!
 I've never done it, but!

1303800013.korean: 후후, 제법인걸? 나도 이제 제대로 게임을 이해했어. 그럼 다시 한번 해보자고.
1303800013.english: Hehe, pretty good. I really understand the game now. Then let's try again.

1303800015.korean: 이렇게 하고... 이렇게 해서… 이러면… 체크메이트
1303800015.english: Do it like this... and like this... then... checkmate

1303800016.korean:
좋아, 좋아. 이제야 몸이 풀렸어~ 아니, 머리가 풀렸어.
그럼, 제대로 한번 해볼까!
1303800016.english:
Okay, okay. My body is finally loosened up~ No, my mind is loosened up.
 Well then, shall we give it a proper try?

1303800018.english: So, I won this time too, right?

1303800019.korean:
쿠후훗, 지금까지의 저의 실력은 고작 53%에 불과했습니다.
전력으로 상대할 생각은 없었지만 이제부터는 본 실력을 보여드리도록 하죠.
1303800019.english:
Kuhuhut, my skill level so far was only 53%.
 I didn't intend to fight with all my might, but from now on, I'll show you my true skills.

1303800021.english: It looks like I won again this time, doesn't it?

1303800022.korean:
처음이군요. 이 나를 이렇게까지 불타오르게 하는 상대는!
좋습니다! 당신의 그 뜨거운 도전 받아들이도록 하죠! 자아, 덤비도록 하세요!
1303800022.english:
This is the first time. An opponent who has made me burn with such passion!
 Alright! I'll accept your fiery challenge! Now, bring it on!

1303800027.korean: (이번에도 내가 이긴 것 같은데… 어쩔 수 없나… 이대로라면 영원히 안 끝날 것 같고.)
1303800027.english: (I think I won this time too... I guess it can't be helped... At this rate, it feels like it will never end.)

1303800029.korean: !! 하하하하! 실수했구나 메로페! 너답지 않게 치명적인 실수를 하다니!
1303800029.english: !! Hahahaha! You made a mistake, Merope! To think you made such a fatal mistake, so unlike you!

1303800030.korean: 이걸 이렇게 해서… 체크메이트 나의 승리다!
1303800030.english: By doing this... Checkmate, I win!

1303800031.korean: 축하해, 그럼 승부도 났으니 이만 여기까지 하는 걸로…
1303800031.english: Congratulations. Well then, since the match is over, let's wrap it up here…

1303800032.english: Shameless~ You're totally useless~ You couldn't do anything, right?

1303800034.english: … No, I won all the previous matches.

1303800035.english: So what? I won the last game though.

1303800040.english: I don't play games with noobs.

1303800041.english: The showdown between the two will probably continue.

1303900001.korean: 그래서 알파 언니가 나에게 그러는 거 있지!
1303900001.english: So, you know what Alpha said to me!

1303900002.korean: 그야 물론 내가 다른 언니들에 비해서 조~금 무겁긴 하지만 그 정도는 절대 아닌데!
1303900002.english: Of course, I am a little heavier than the other older sisters, but I'm definitely not that heavy!

1303900003.korean: 마음만 먹으면 분명 델타의 체형쯤 나도 충분히 할 수 있어.
1303900003.english: If I set my mind to it, I could definitely achieve a physique like Delta's.

1303900004.korean: 아하하, 베타는 옛날부터 먹는 걸 좋아했으니까.
1303900004.english: Ahaha, Beta has liked eating since way back.

1303900005.english: Ugh, are you going to do that too, Shepherd?

1303900006.korean: 아, 미안 미안 다른 생각은 없었어.
1303900006.english: Oh, sorry, sorry. I didn't have any other thoughts.

1303900007.korean:
그건 그렇고, 말하는 걸 보면 오르카에서 잘 지내는 것 같아서 다행이야.
밥이 제일 중요한데 잘 먹고 있으니 말이지.
1303900007.english:
Anyway, judging by what you're saying, it's a relief to hear you're doing well in Orca.
 Food is the most important thing, and since you are eating well...

1303900009.korean: 오우, 이번에는 정말 그대로의 의미야! 밥이 얼마나 중요한데!
1303900009.english: Oh, this time it really means exactly what it says! You know how important rice is!

1303900010.korean: 내 동생이 새로 이사 간 집에서 잘 적응할 수 있을지 걱정하는 건 언니로서 당연하잖아?
1303900010.english: As an older sister, isn't it only natural to worry about whether my younger sibling will be able to adjust to their new home?

1303900011.korean:
뭐, 그쪽 이야기는 다음에 만나서 다시 해보자.
이 언니가 도와줄테니까.
1303900011.english:
Well, let's talk about that again next time we meet.
 I'll help you.

1303900013.english: … I want to see Shepherd soon.

1303900014.english: You're watching right now, aren't you?

1303900016.english: Hmm... that might be a bit difficult for now?

1303900018.korean:
마침 파나마 해운을 지난 참이려나?
여기서부터가 문제인데 정직하게 육로로 갈지 아니면 바다를 건너 갈지 말이지.
1303900018.english:
I wonder if it just happened to pass Panama?
 This is where the problem begins: whether to take the honest route overland or cross the sea.

1303900019.korean: 오메가에게 들키지 않고 북미로 들어가는 게 여간 쉬운 게 아니더라고.
1303900019.english: It turns out getting into North America without Omega finding out isn't easy at all.

1303900020.korean: 흐음, 어디서 누가 도와줄 사람이 하늘에서 뚝 떨어지면 좋겠지만 어쩔 수 없지.
1303900020.english: Hmm, it would be nice if someone just dropped from the sky to help, but I guess it can't be helped.

1303900022.english: I… when this operation is over, I’ll tell the commander…

1303900024.korean:
아하하, 그렇게 걱정하지 마.
내가 이런 거 한두 번 하는 게 아니라는 거 잘 알잖아?
1303900024.english:
Ahaha, don't worry so much.
 You know very well that this isn't the first time I've done this, right?

1303900025.korean: 그리고 정 위험하면 오르카에 도움 요청을 할 테니까 그때는 잘 부탁할게.
1303900025.english: And if it gets too dangerous, I'll ask Orca for help, so I'll leave it to you then.

1303900026.english:
Yes, I'll be waiting.
 Is it absolutely necessary?

1303900027.english: Okay, then I'll talk to you again.

1303900029.korean:
미안해 베타.
당분간은 통화하기가 좀 힘들 것 같아.
1303900029.english:
Sorry, Beta.
 I think it will be a bit difficult to talk for the time being.

1303900030.korean: 오메가 녀석, 무슨 생각으로 갑자기 보안 수준을 이렇게나 올렸는지…
1303900030.english: Omega, what was he thinking suddenly raising the security level this much...

1303900031.korean:
북미 내부에서 무슨 일이 일어났거나…
아니면 들키고 싶지 않은 뭔가를 꾸미고 있는 건가…
1303900031.english:
Something happened inside North America or…
 Or are they plotting something they don't want to be caught…

1303900032.english: I wonder if Yumi is okay.

1400200001.korean: -레모네이드 델타와 카라카스 사건 이후 많은 바이오로이드들이 합류했다.
1400200001.english: Many bioroids joined after the Lemonade Delta and Caracas incidents.

1400200002.korean: -밀려드는 바이오로이드들의 신상 정보를 읽는 것만 하더라도 하루의 반 이상이 지나갔다.
1400200002.english: Just reading the flood of personal information about the bioroids took up more than half the day.

1400200003.korean: 주인님, 아예 컴패니언 분들께 부탁해 침대에 몸을 묶어달라 해야겠군요…?
1400200003.english: Master, I guess I'll have to ask the companions to tie me to the bed...?

1400200004.korean: -어제 책상 위에서 엎어져 잠든 이후, 알파의 시선이 더 따가워졌다.
1400200004.english: Since falling asleep face down on the desk yesterday, Alpha's gaze has become stinging.

1400200006.korean: 주인님이 쉬겠다는 말을 믿느니, 펜리르가 옷을 입겠다는 말을 믿겠어요.
1400200006.english: I would believe Fenrir saying he would get dressed rather than my master saying he would rest.

1400200007.english: - How did Fenrir end up becoming Orca's representative exhibitionist...?

1400200008.english: Master, I have something important to tell you.

1400200009.korean: -알파의 표정이 심각해지자, 나는 등받이 의자를 끌고 자세를 고쳐 앉았다.
1400200009.english: As Alpha's expression grew serious, I pulled the backrest of my chair over and adjusted my posture.

1400200010.korean: 오늘자 보고서에는 올라오진 않았지만... 우리 저항군에 합류한 바이오로이드가 있습니다.
1400200010.english: It wasn't mentioned in today's report, but... there is a bioroid that has joined our resistance.

1400200011.korean: 출신이 의심스러워서요. 그 바이오로이드는 북아메리카 동부에서 왔다 밝혔어요.
1400200011.english: Because I suspect its origin. That bioroid revealed that it came from Eastern North America.

1400200013.korean: 다른 바이오로이드와 달리 그 개체는 주인님께 큰 위해를 끼칠 것 같아서 심문실에 감금해놨어요.
1400200013.english: Unlike other bioroids, that individual seems likely to cause great harm to the Master, so I have confined him in the interrogation room.

1400200014.korean: -갑작스러운 행위에 의아해 하자, 그녀는 자신의 패널을 내게 내밀었다.
1400200014.english: When I looked puzzled by her sudden action, she held out her panel to me.

1400200015.korean: 해당 개체는 과거 펙스 기밀 문서를 찾다 파악했습니다. 멜트... 퍼블릭 서번트 소속 바이오로이드에요.
1400200015.english: We identified this entity while searching through past PEX confidential documents. Melt... is a bio-android belonging to the Public Servant.

1400200016.korean: 서류 상에선 개발 단계에서 폐기된 바이오로이드였습니다.
1400200016.english: On paper, it was a bioroid that was discarded during the development phase.

1400200017.korean: 불면증 치료를 위해 기획된 바이오로이드였는데… 악용될 소지가 있어 정식 생산 허가가 거부 되었어요.
1400200017.english: It was a bioroid designed to treat insomnia... but official production approval was denied due to the potential for misuse.

1400200018.korean: 인식 번호도 없는 걸 보니 추측 상 펙스 측에서 불법적으로 생산한 바이오로이드 같습니다.
1400200018.english: Judging by the fact that it doesn't even have an identification number, I suspect it is a bioroid illegally produced by PEX.

1400200019.korean: 멜트는 촉각신경을 자극하는 성대와 최면을 거는 안구를 가졌어요.
1400200019.english: Melt has vocal cords that stimulate tactile nerves and hypnotic eyes.

1400200020.korean: 능력을 남용한다면 인간을 최면 상태로 조종하는 것은 물론, 목소리를 통해 뇌 신경을 손상시킬 수 있죠.
1400200020.english: If you abuse your ability, you can not only manipulate humans into a hypnotic state but also damage their brain nerves through your voice.

1400200021.korean: 이런 점을 노리고 펙스 회장들이 양산 제작한 것 같습니다.
1400200021.english: It seems the PEX chairmen mass-produced this with this in mind.

1400200022.korean: -왜 알파가 따로 격리를 시켜놨는지 어느 정도 이해 할 수 있었다.
1400200022.english: I could understand to some extent why Alpha had isolated him separately.

1400200023.korean: -생물체를 조종하는 바이오로이드라면 내게도 위험요소가 될 것은 분명하다.
1400200023.english: If it is a bioroid that controls living organisms, it is clear that it would be a risk factor for me as well.

1400200024.korean: -하지만... 과거 행적 때문에 합류한 바이오로이드를 다시 내쫓은 적은 없었다.
1400200024.english: However... they never kicked out a bioroid that had joined because of their past actions.

1400200025.korean: -만에 하나, 멜트라는 개체가 오메가의 첩자라 하더라도 친근하게 다가간다면 북아메리카에 대한 정보를 캐 낼 수 있다.
1400200025.english: Even if, by any chance, Melt is an Omega spy, if you approach him in a friendly manner, you can extract information about North America.

1400200026.korean: 만일의 사태에 대비해 추방하는 게 좋을 것 같지만... 주인님께 우선 보고를 드리는 게 옳다고 생각해 말씀드렸습니다.
1400200026.english: I think it would be best to expel him just in case... but I told you because I thought it was right to report to the Master first.

1400200027.english: What punishment do you intend to hand down, Master?

1400200028.english: Are you planning to meet in person?

1400200029.korean: 그렇긴 해요… 하지만 조심해서 나쁠 건 없다고 생각합니다 주인님.
1400200029.english: That is true... but I don't think it hurts to be careful, Master.

1400200030.english: ...Understood. Then, shall we go to the interrogation room together?

1400200031.korean: -의자를 끌고 일어서자 알파는 나를 심문실로 안내했다.
1400200031.english: As I pulled up a chair and stood up, Alpha led me to the interrogation room.

1400200032.korean: -어두운 불이 켜진 아래 멜트가 안대와 수갑을 찬 채 의자에 묶여있었다.
1400200032.english: Under the dim light, Melt was tied to a chair, blindfolded and handcuffed.

1400200033.english: Shirayuri was waiting by the glass window outside the interrogation room.

1400200034.korean: -오르카에 심각한 위해를 가할 수 있는 만큼, 조심해야만 했지만… 멜트라는 바이오로이드가 다소 안쓰럽게 보였다.
1400200034.english: - I had to be careful since it could cause serious harm to Orca, but… the bioroid named Melt looked somewhat pitiful.

1400200035.korean: 입을 아예 다문 걸 보니 목적이 있는 게 분명해요, 사령관님.
1400200035.english: Seeing that you've kept your mouth shut completely, it's clear you have an objective, Commander.

1400200036.korean: 양산된 멜트는 은밀하게 정부 요인에게 보내져 세뇌시키거나, 뇌를 녹이는 암살에 이용됐다고 기록되어 있어요.
1400200036.english: It is recorded that mass-produced melts were secretly sent to government officials to brainwash them or used for assassinations that melted their brains.

1400200037.korean: -꽤 살벌한 과거였음에도 당장 저렇게 묶여있는 모습이 안타까울 따름이다.
1400200037.english: Even though it was a rather brutal past, it is just a pity to see him tied up like that right now.

1400200038.korean: 주인님, 이제 마이크도 켜졌으니... 직접 심문하시면 됩니다.
1400200038.english: Master, now that the microphone is on... you can interrogate them directly.

1400200040.korean: -멜트는 소리가 난 쪽으로 고개를 돌렸지만, 마스크 때문인지 입을 쉽사리 열지 못했다.
1400200040.english: Melt turned his head toward the sound, but perhaps because of the mask, he could not easily open his mouth.

1400200041.korean: 주인님, 마스크를 조사해본 바, 목소리를 내는데는 아무런 지장이 없습니다.
1400200041.english: Master, I have examined the mask, and there is no difficulty in speaking.

1400200042.korean: 아니에요. 멜트는 양산형 개체라 인간의 명령을 우회할 능력은 없어요.
1400200042.english: No. Melt is a mass-produced unit, so it does not have the ability to bypass human commands.

1400200043.korean: 명령권을 직접 쓰시는 건 어떻게 생각하세요, 사령관님?
1400200043.english: What do you think about you exercising command authority directly, Commander?

1400200044.korean: -명령권을 우회할 수 있는 개체도 아닌 바이오로이드에게 강제로 입을 열게 하고 싶진 않았다.
1400200044.english: I didn't want to force a bioroid, who isn't even capable of bypassing orders, to speak.

1400200045.english: Are you planning to let Angel read your emotions?

1400200046.korean: 그야 당연히 발각되면 안 되니까 그런 거 아닐까요, 주인님?
1400200046.english: Of course, isn't it because they can't be caught, Master?

1400200047.english: You mean there must be a special reason?

1400200049.korean: -알파가 패널로 호출한 뒤, 얼마 지나지 않아 엔젤이 도착했다.
1400200049.english: Angel arrived not long after Alpha called the panel.

1400200050.korean: -단단히 묶인 멜트를 보던 엔젤은 창 너머에서 보이는 멜트의 감정을 읽기 시작했다.
1400200050.english: Angel, watching Melt tightly bound, began to read Melt's emotions visible through the window.

1400200053.korean: -둘의 침묵이 흐르고, 엔젤은 화들짝 놀라 얼굴이 빨개졌다.
1400200053.english: Silence fell between the two, and Angel was startled, her face turning red.

1400200054.korean: 역시 더러운 속내를 가지고 있었군요! 사령관님, 당장 제게 맡겨 주시면…
1400200054.english: As expected, you had dirty intentions! Commander, if you leave it to me right now…

1400200059.korean: 도저히, 버틸 수가… 저 분, 저 상황에서 왜 흥분하고… 아앗… 하…?!
1400200059.english: I just can't hold back... That person, why are they getting so worked up in that situation... Ahh... Ha...?!

1400200060.korean: 으, 으흠! 흐음… 다른 감정도 읽어드릴게요.
1400200060.english: Uh, uhm! Hmm... I'll read you some other emotions as well.

1400200061.korean: -엔젤은 다시 멜트를 빤히 쳐다보다 입을 열었다.
1400200061.english: Angel stared intently at Melt again and opened her mouth.

1400200064.english: I don't see any malice toward the Savior.

1400200065.korean: 많이 위축되고… 죄책감만 읽혀요, 아주 많이 어두워보여요…
1400200065.english: He looks very withdrawn... I can only read guilt, he looks very dark...

1400200066.korean: …혹시 저희를 속이려고 다른 감정을 품는 건 아닐까요?
1400200066.english: … Could it be that they harbor other feelings to deceive us?

1400200067.korean: -감정을 완벽하게 컨트롤하는 스파이가 있단 소린 못 들어 보았다.
1400200067.english: I have never heard of a spy who can perfectly control their emotions.

1400200068.korean: ...그나저나 흥분 돼. 나 이제 어떻게 되는 걸까. 이대로 아아… 하아
1400200068.english: ...Anyway, I'm excited. What's going to happen to me now? Just like this... ah... haa

1400200069.korean: 그나저나 이젠 더는… 감응을… 후으… 저도 전염이…
1400200069.english: Anyway, now... no more... the sensitivity... *sigh*... I'm contagious too...

1400200070.korean: -순진한 엔젤을 지켜주기 위해서라도 샅샅이 읽을 필요는 없을 것 같다.
1400200070.english: - I don't think there is a need to read it thoroughly, even to protect the innocent Angel.

1400200071.english: Are you sure you'll be okay?

1400200072.english: … Understood. I’ll take the confiscated tablet to Melt as well.

1400200073.korean: -시라유리는 심문실로 내려가, 멜트의 눈과 수갑을 풀고 태블릿을 건네주었다.
1400200073.english: Shirayuri went down to the interrogation room, unlocked Melt's eyes and handcuffs, and handed him the tablet.

1400200074.korean: -그러자 멜트는 빠르게 태블릿에 글씨를 적어 내려갔다. 시라유리는 멜트가 쓴 글씨를 읽었다.
1400200074.english: Then, Melt quickly wrote on the tablet. Shirayuri read what Melt had written.

1400200075.korean: 마지막 인간님, 필요하시다면 계속 포박하셔도 좋습니다. 저는 위험한 바이오로이드니까요.
1400200075.english: Last Human, you may keep me bound if necessary. I am a dangerous bioroid, after all.

1400200077.korean: 저는 누구도 해치고 싶지 않습니다. 마지막 인간님에 대한 이야기는 오르카 라디오를 통해 들었습니다.
1400200077.english: I do not want to harm anyone. I heard the story about the last human through Orca Radio.

1400200078.korean: 따뜻하고 친절하고 자상한 분이라 들었습니다. 제가 위험하다면 이곳에서 나가도록 하겠습니다.
1400200078.english: I have heard that you are a warm, kind, and considerate person. If I am in danger, I will leave this place.

1400200081.korean: -나는 푹 고개를 숙인 채, 눈을 보여주지 않으려는 멜트의 모습을 지켜보다 이내 입을 열었다.
1400200081.english: I watched Melt with my head bowed low, refusing to show his eyes, and then I opened my mouth.

1400200083.english: ...If you say so, Master, I won't ask any more questions either.

1400200084.english: What is it you'd like to ask?

1400200085.english: Would you be okay with just taking that much of a measure?

1400200086.korean: -물론 의심이 풀린 건 아니었다. 하지만 그렇다고 제발로 찾아온 바이오로이드를 기약 없이 가둘 수는 없다.
1400200086.english: Of course, the suspicions were not cleared. However, even so, we cannot confine a bioroid that came of its own accord indefinitely.

1400200087.korean: -내 마음을 읽은 엔젤이 고개를 끄덕이자 알파도 수긍했다.
1400200087.english: As Angel, who had read my mind, nodded, Alpha also agreed.

1400200088.korean: 알겠습니다 주인님. 멜트가 머물 방을 안내 할게요.
1400200088.english: Understood, Master. I will show you the room where Melt will be staying.

1400200089.english: I won't do that next time...

1400200090.english: Why didn't you write it in the report?

1400200091.english: If it's North America, isn't it the Omega Zone?

1400200092.english: But I heard some of the bioroids are from North America too?

1400200093.english: Is there a bioroid that even Alpha didn't know about?

1400200095.english: What is it that you even went so far as to make it secretly?

1400200096.english: Let's go to the interrogation room first.

1400200097.english: You can't just banish them without thinking.

1400200098.english: You don't even have certainty that Melt is an Omega spy, do you?

1400200102.korean: 혹시, 마스크 때문에 불편해서 그런 거야?
1400200102.english: Is it because you're uncomfortable with the mask?

1400200103.english: Does it have a command bypass function?

1400200105.english: I'm curious why they're keeping their mouths shut like that.

1400200106.korean: 겨우 그런 이유 때문에 입을 다물고만 있을까?
1400200106.english: Would they just keep their mouths shut for such a trivial reason?

1400200107.english: Yes. I want to find out what kind of feeling it is.

1400200112.english: Let me go. And take off the blindfold, too.

1400200113.english: It doesn't seem like there is any murderous intent.

1400200116.english: Let's wait and see. If they say it like that, they must be serious.

1400200117.english: Thanks, and I have a favor to ask.

1400200118.english: I wish you would select and assign a surveillance officer to Melt.

1400300001.korean: 어서오세요, 리리스 양. 드릴 말씀이 있어서 급하게 불렀어요.
1400300001.english: Welcome, Miss Lilith. I called you urgently because I have something to tell you.

1400300002.english: What kind of matter is this?

1400300003.korean: 혹시, 최근 합류한 바이오로이드 중 멜트라는 아이에 대해 들으셨죠?
1400300003.english: By any chance, have you heard about Melt, one of the bioroids who recently joined?

1400300004.korean: 보내주신 자료를 읽어서 대충은 파악했어요… 그런데, 주인님께서 정말 받아준다 하셨어요?
1400300004.english: I read the materials you sent and got a rough idea... But, did the Master really say they would accept me?

1400300005.korean: 감시역을 붙이면 괜찮다고 하셨지만, 여러모로 걱정돼요.
1400300005.english: You said it would be fine if we assigned a monitor, but I'm worried in many ways.

1400300006.korean: 혹시라도 주인님이 멜트한테 세뇌된다면 저항군 전체가 뿌리째 흔들릴 거예요.
1400300006.english: If Master gets brainwashed by Melt, the entire resistance will be shaken to its roots.

1400300007.korean: 리리스 양이 경호를 전담하시는 만큼, 이 부분은 주인님을 설득시켜 주세요.
1400300007.english: Since Miss Lilith is in charge of security, please persuade the Master regarding this matter.

1400300008.korean: 알겠어요. 지금 같이 가죠 알파 님.
1400300008.english: Okay. Let's go together now, Alpha.

1400300009.korean: 주인님, 리리스 양께서 드릴 말씀이 있다고 해서 같이 왔어요.
1400300009.english: Master, Miss Lilith said she had something to tell us, so we came together.

1400300010.korean: 일단, 주인님께서도 아시겠지만… 멜트가 멸망 전 어떤 바이오로이드였는진 아시죠?
1400300010.english: First off, Master, as you probably know... you know what kind of bioroid Melt was before the apocalypse, right?

1400300011.korean: 인간과 바이오로이드의 정신을 조종한다는 것 자체가 위험요소입니다.
1400300011.english: The very act of manipulating the minds of humans and bioroids is a risk factor.

1400300012.korean: 주인님께서 얼마나 바이오로이드를 아끼시는지 알지만, 멜트는 오르카에 있어 시한폭탄이나 다름없어요.
1400300012.english: I know how much Master cherishes the bioroids, but Melt is practically a ticking time bomb to Orca.

1400300013.english: Lilith stroked the black mamba and clenched her fist.

1400300014.korean: 주인님께서 말씀만 하시면 제 선에서 제거할게요.
1400300014.english: If you just say the word, I will take care of it myself.

1400300015.korean: 엔젤은 악의가 없다고 했지만… 전 무조건적으로 멜트를 신뢰해선 안 된다고 생각해요.
1400300015.english: Angel said she didn't mean any harm, but... I don't think we should trust Melt unconditionally.

1400300016.korean: -객관적으로 본다면, 멜트의 정신 조종 능력은 오르카 저항군에 있어 위협적이다.
1400300016.english: Objectively speaking, Melt's mind control ability is a threat to the Orca resistance.

1400300017.korean: -오르카의 총 지휘관이나 다름없는 내가 세뇌된다면 저항군은 손쉽게 붕괴된다.
1400300017.english: If I, who am practically the supreme commander of Orca, am brainwashed, the resistance will easily collapse.

1400300018.korean: -그렇기에 알파와 리리스가 멜트에게 극도로 예민한 할 수밖에 없었다.
1400300018.english: That is why Alpha and Lilith had no choice but to be extremely sensitive to Melt.

1400300019.korean: 주인님, 다시 멜트를 가두는 건 어떠신가요?
1400300019.english: Master, how about locking up Melt again?

1400300020.korean: 저랑 알파 님이 말씀 드렸듯 위험 요소에요! 적어도 주인님 눈에서 치워버리는 정도는…
1400300020.english: As Alpha and I mentioned, it is a risk factor! At the very least, getting it out of Master's sight...

1400300021.korean: -나는 조그마한 귀마개랑 선글라스를 꺼내 둘에게 보여주었다.
1400300021.english: I took out small earplugs and sunglasses and showed them to the two of them.

1400300023.korean: -멜트 이야기를 들은 닥터는 조만간 다른 지휘관들의 귀마개와 선글라스를 만들어주기로 했다.
1400300023.english: Upon hearing Melt's story, the Doctor decided to make earmuffs and sunglasses for the other commanders soon.

1400300024.korean: 확실히 주인님이 대비책을 세워두신 건 좋지만…
1400300024.english: It is certainly good that Master has prepared countermeasures, but...

1400300025.korean: 역시 멜트를 오르카호에서 추방시키는 게 제일 좋은 방법 같아요.
1400300025.english: I think the best way is to banish Melt from the Orca.

1400300026.korean: 오메가와도 관련이 아예 관련이 없다고 할 수 없어요 주인님.
1400300026.english: You can't say that it has absolutely no connection to Omega, Master.

1400300027.korean: -추방하는 방안도 좋았지만... 멜트가 목적이 있다면 다시 침입하는 것도 어려운 일은 아니었다.
1400300027.english: Expulsion was a good idea, but... if Melt had a goal, invading again wouldn't have been difficult.

1400300029.korean: -작정하고 멜트가 날 조종하려 한다면, 자신의 능력을 최대한 써서 잠입할 수도 있다.
1400300029.english: If Melt is determined to manipulate me, I could use my abilities to the fullest to infiltrate.

1400300030.korean: -엔젤도 멜트에게서 나에 대한 적의를 강하게 느끼진 않았다고 했다.
1400300030.english: Angel also said that she didn't feel strong hostility toward me from Melt.

1400300031.english: Yes, just say the word, Master.

1400300032.korean: 주인님 뜻이 정 그러시면... 제 자매를 감시역에 붙이도록 할게요, 주인님.
1400300032.english: If that is truly your wish, Master... I will assign my sister to the surveillance role, Master.

1400300033.korean: -근접 경호가 주 업무인 컴패니언이라면 곁에서 감시하는 역할 정도는 가능하다.
1400300033.english: If the companion's primary duty is close protection, they can perform the role of monitoring from the side.

1400300034.english: Is there anything else you would like to convey to the team members?

1400300035.korean: 네, 알겠습니다... 지휘관들이 세뇌를 당한다면 그것도 큰일이니까요.
1400300035.english: Yes, I understand... because if the commanders were brainwashed, that would be a big problem too.

1400300036.korean: -임시방편이긴 하지만, 곧바로 세뇌를 당해 지휘부가 마비 당하는 일은 없을 것이다.
1400300036.english: Although it is a temporary measure, the command will not be immediately brainwashed and paralyzed.

1400300037.english: But Master... I'm still worried even like this.

1400300038.korean: 대원들에게 최대한 멜트랑 이야기를 섞거나 마주치지 말아달라 당부할게요.
1400300038.english: I will ask the team members to avoid talking to or running into Melt as much as possible.

1400300039.korean: -어쩌다보니 멜트를 왕따시키는 것 같아 기분이 씁쓸했다.
1400300039.english: I felt bitter because it seemed like I was ostracizing Melt somehow.

1400300040.korean: -리리스와 알파에게 선글라스와 귀마개를 준 뒤, 멜트를 호출했다.
1400300040.english: After giving Lilith and Alpha sunglasses and earmuffs, I called Melt.

1400300042.korean: -문을 열고 들어온 멜트는 안대를 쓴 채 더듬거리며 손을 허공에 휘저었다. 리리스에게 눈짓하자, 거칠게 그녀를 의자에 앉혔다.
1400300042.english: Melt, who had opened the door and entered, fumbled and waved his hands in the air while wearing a blindfold. He gestured to Lilith, and she roughly sat her down in a chair.

1400300044.english: As I signaled to Lilith, she grabbed the blindfold and took it off.

1400300046.korean: -멜트는 눈을 어디다 둬야 할지 몰라 이리저리 시선을 피하더니 고개를 푹 숙였다.
1400300046.english: Melt didn't know where to look, so he averted his gaze here and there, then bowed his head low.

1400300048.korean: -멜트는 잠시 침묵하더니, 들고 온 태블릿으로 글씨를 써 내게 보여주었다.
1400300048.english: Melt was silent for a moment, then wrote on the tablet he had brought and showed it to me.

1400300049.english: Thank you. But are you really okay?

1400300052.korean: 거짓말! 북아메리카가 오메가 구역인 걸 우리가 모를 줄 알아?!
1400300052.english: Lies! Do you think we don't know North America is the Omega Zone?!

1400300053.korean: 리리스가 목소리를 높이자, 멜트는 황급히 태블릿에 무언가를 썼다.
1400300053.english: As Lilith raised her voice, Melt hurriedly wrote something on the tablet.

1400300054.english: "I am not a bioroid belonging to Lord Omega."

1400300055.korean: 주인님, 어서 명령권을 써서라도 이 바이오로이드의 정체가 뭔지 밝혀야 해요.
1400300055.english: Master, we must find out the true identity of this bioroid immediately, even if we have to use our command authority.

1400300057.korean: -물론 확실하게 명령권을 써도 되지만… 바르그 때를 제외한다면 쓴 적이 없었기에 망설여졌다.
1400300057.english: Of course, I could certainly use my authority to issue commands, but... I hesitated because I had never used it except during the time of Varg.

1400300058.english: I decided to treat Melt as gently as possible.

1400300059.korean: -내 질문에 흠칫, 멜트의 동공이 커졌다. 리리스가 멜트의 머리에 블랙 맘바를 겨누자, 그녀는 황급히 태블릿에 글씨를 써내려갔다.
1400300059.english: Startled by my question, Melt's pupils widened. As Lilith aimed the Black Mamba at Melt's head, she hurriedly wrote on the tablet.

1400300060.english: I wanted to find the meaning of my existence

1400300062.korean: -이유가 모호했지만 해를 끼치지 않기 위해 눈을 애써 감는 멜트의 모습이 상당히 안쓰러웠다.
1400300062.english: Although the reason was vague, it was quite pitiful to see Melt struggling to close his eyes so as not to cause harm.

1400300063.english: Thank you for treating me this way even though you know my past.

1400300064.korean: -멜트의 눈가에 눈물이 흘러내렸다. 리리스는 별 수 없이 그녀에게서 성큼 물러났다.
1400300064.english: Tears streamed down Melt's face. Lilith had no choice but to step back from her.

1400300066.korean: 멜트는 별안간 입을 틀어막고 흐느꼈다. 듣고 있던 리리스의 미간이 좁혀졌다.
1400300066.english: Melt suddenly covered his mouth and sobbed. Lilith, who was listening, furrowed her brow.

1400300067.korean: -내 안전에 예민한 리리스의 마음도 이해가 가지만, 이런 방법으로는 멜트가 편하게 본심을 말할 수 없다.
1400300067.english: I understand Lilith's sensitivity regarding my safety, but Melt cannot comfortably express his true feelings this way.

1400300069.korean: -나그네의 외투를 벗긴 건 찬바람이 아닌, 뜨거운 햇볕이란 멸망 전 동화처럼,
1400300069.english: Like the fairy tale from before the apocalypse that it was not the cold wind but the hot sun that stripped the traveler of his coat,

1400300070.korean: -멜트가 스스로 편하게 이야기할 때까지 기다려 보기로 했다.
1400300070.english: I decided to wait until Melt felt comfortable enough to talk on his own.

1400300071.english: I don't want to do that.

1400300072.english: These are earplugs and sunglasses that I asked the doctor to make.

1400300073.korean: 최면을 걸어서 다시 잠입할 수도 있잖아.
1400300073.english: You could hypnotize them to infiltrate again.

1400300074.english: If that was the purpose from the beginning…

1400300075.english: It probably wasn't caught carelessly either.

1400300076.english: I have a favor to ask of you, Lilith.

1400300077.english: I want to have a Companion handle the surveillance.

1400300078.english: Commanders, please wear earplugs and sunglasses.

1400300079.english: Did you wear the eye patch yourself?

1400300080.korean: 걱정 마, 네 눈을 봐도 최면은 안 걸려.
1400300080.english: Don't worry, I won't get hypnotized even if I look into your eyes.

1400300081.korean: 이야기나 하려고 불렀어. 할 수 있지?
1400300081.english: I called you to talk. You can do it, right?

1400300082.english: Yeah, it's fine. Make yourself comfortable.

1400300083.korean: 묻고 싶은 게 몇 개 있는데 질문해도 돼?
1400300083.english: I have a few things I'd like to ask. Can I ask?

1400300084.english: Were you a bioroid working under Omega?

1400300086.english: For what reason did you join the resistance?

1400300087.english: Existence… meaning? Is that the reason you joined?

1400300088.english: Okay. I won't ask any more questions.

1400400001.korean: -대원들에게 멜트와 당분간 마주치거나 대화를 하지 말라 일렀지만 혼자 다니는 모습을 보니 마음이 편친 않았다.
1400400001.english: I had instructed the team members not to run into or talk to Melt for the time being, but seeing him walking around alone made me feel uneasy.

1400400003.korean: -멜트는 대답 대신 태블릿을 들어 빠르게 받아적기 시작했다.
1400400003.english: Instead of answering, Melt picked up the tablet and started taking notes quickly.

1400400004.english: Yes, they all seem like nice people.

1400400005.english: It's okay, it's better this way.

1400400006.english: It seemed that Melt himself was trying to be careful.

1400400007.korean: -하지만 대화 한 번 못하고 침묵하는 모습이 상당히 불편해보였다.
1400400007.english: However, the sight of them remaining silent without even being able to have a single conversation looked quite uncomfortable.

1400400008.korean: -내 질문에 멜트는 태블릿에 글씨를 조심스레 써서 보여주었다.
1400400008.english: In response to my question, Melt carefully wrote on the tablet and showed it to me.

1400400009.korean: 『마스크는 썼지만 위험해요 혹시라도 사령관님께서 잘못 되시면 큰일이잖아요』
1400400009.english: "I'm wearing a mask, but it's dangerous. It would be a disaster if something happened to you, Commander."

1400400010.korean: -나는 대답 대신 멜트의 옆에 앉았다. 내 갑작스러운 행동에 멜트는 옆자리로 피하며 눈을 내리깔았다.
1400400010.english: Instead of answering, I sat down next to Melt. At my sudden action, Melt moved to the side and lowered his eyes.

1400400012.korean: -나는 손을 내밀어 태블릿을 달라 손짓했다. 멜트는 고민하다 결국 태블릿을 내게 내밀었다.
1400400012.english: I reached out and gestured for the tablet. Melt hesitated for a moment, then finally handed it to me.

1400400013.korean: -태블릿에 멜트가 알아볼 수 있도록 또박또박 글씨를 써내려갔다.
1400400013.english: - He wrote clearly on the tablet so that Melt could recognize it.

1400400014.english: "Commander, you don't need to do that."

1400400015.korean: -서로 필담을 나눌 줄은 생각도 못했다는 듯 멜트가 쥔 펜이 떨렸다.
1400400015.english: The pen Melt held trembled as if he had never imagined they would be communicating in writing.

1400400016.english: You really didn't have to go to such lengths to care.

1400400018.korean: 『사령관님께선 정말 친절하시네요 멸망 전 인간님들보다 훨씬』
1400400018.english: "Commander, you are really kind, much kinder than the humans before the apocalypse."

1400400019.english: "Oh, it's rude to even compare. I'm sorry."

1400400020.korean: -나에 대한 적의는 멜트에게서 느껴지지 않았지만 필사적으로 내게서 시선을 피했다.
1400400020.english: I didn't sense any hostility toward me from Melt, but he desperately avoided my gaze.

1400400021.korean: -...말도 제대로 못하고 입을 다문 모습은 동화 속 저주에 걸린 공주님 같아 안쓰럽다.
1400400021.english: ...Seeing her mouth shut, unable to even speak properly, makes her look like a princess under a curse in a fairy tale; it is pitiful.

1400400022.english: Please stop staring at me; it's awkward.

1400400023.korean: 『괜찮아요 폐를 끼칠 순 없죠 신경 써주셔서 감사드려요』
1400400023.english: It's okay. I can't be of any trouble. Thank you for your concern.

1400400024.korean: -멜트는 빠르게 태블릿에 글씨를 쓴 뒤 지웠다. 그리고 태블릿에 무언가를 후다닥 적어 내게 보여주었다.
1400400024.english: Melt quickly wrote on the tablet and erased it. Then, he hurriedly wrote something on the tablet and showed it to me.

1400400025.english: "I'll be going now, Commander. I apologize for taking up your time."

1400400026.korean: 멜트는 정중히 내게 꾸벅 인사한 뒤 황급히 내게서 멀어졌다. 괜스레 얼굴을 붉히는 모습을 보니 너무 내 오지랖이 넓었나 보다.
1400400026.english: Melt bowed politely to me and hurriedly walked away. Seeing him blush for no reason, I guess I was being too nosy.

1400400027.english: Master, no matter how much I think about it, I suspect Melt.

1400400028.korean: -영 마음이 놓이지 않아 리리스는 멜트와 내 뒤를 밟고 있었나 보다.
1400400028.english: Lilith must have been following Melt and me because she wasn't at ease at all.

1400400029.korean: 주인님을 피해다니기만 하고… 가시방석에 앉은 느낌이에요.
1400400029.english: I just keep avoiding my master... I feel like I'm sitting on a bed of thorns.

1400400030.korean: 후훗, 권속이여. 아주 심각한 이야기를 하고 있는 것 같구나?
1400400030.english: Hehe, my familiar. It seems like we are having a very serious conversation.

1400400031.korean: -뒤에서 별안간 들리는 소리에 뒤를 돌아보니, LRL이 서 있었다.
1400400031.english: Turning around at a sudden sound from behind, I saw LRL standing there.

1400400032.korean: 짐이 오늘 조금 수상한 소문을 하얀 야수에게서 들었느니라.
1400400032.english: Today, I heard a somewhat suspicious rumor from the white beast.

1400400033.korean: 악마가 이곳으로 왔다는 이야기를 들었노라. 그게 사실인 것이냐?
1400400033.english: I heard that the devil came here. Is that true?

1400400034.korean: -악마가 뭔가 싶어 곰곰이 생각하다, 멜트를 바로 떠올렸다. 아무래도 아이들은 멜트의 마스크 장식을 보고 악마를 떠올린 듯했다.
1400400034.english: I pondered what the devil was and immediately thought of Melt. It seemed the children had thought of the devil after seeing Melt's mask decoration.

1400400035.korean: 짐의 권능으로 고통받는 악마를 진정시키고, 착한 악마로 바꾸도록 하겠도다!
1400400035.english: I shall soothe the suffering demon with my power and turn him into a good demon!

1400400036.english: Mr. LRL, you are so cheerful even in a situation like this…

1400400037.korean: 저 악마의 얼굴은 슬펐노라… 마치 짐이 등대에 있었을 때와 비슷하구나.
1400400037.english: That devil's face was sad... just like when I was in the lighthouse.

1400400038.korean: 그리하여 결심했도다. 짐이 그 외로운 악마를 구원해주겠다고!
1400400038.english: And so I resolved. I would save that lonely devil!

1400400039.korean: 안 돼요, LRL씨. 괜히 세뇌당하려면 어쩌시려고요?
1400400039.english: No, LRL. What do you intend to do if you end up getting brainwashed for no reason?

1400400040.korean: 지, 짐은 세뇌 같은 건 안 당하느니라!
1400400040.english: I, I will not be brainwashed!

1400400043.korean: -물론 멜트에게 아무도 접근하지 말라 말은 했지만, 오늘 내가 봤던 멜트는 상당히 외로워 보였다.
1400400043.english: Of course, I told them not to approach Melt, but the Melt I saw today looked quite lonely.

1400400044.korean: -합류하고 싶었던 이유도 암울했는데 여기서도 말 한 마디 못하고 혼자 돌아다니는 게 맞을까?
1400400044.english: The reason I wanted to join was grim, too, but is it right for me to wander around alone here, unable to say a single word?

1400400045.korean: 주인님, 혹시라도 멜트가 LRL 님을 세뇌한다면...
1400400045.english: Master, if by any chance Melt brainwashes LRL...

1400400047.korean: 맞느니라. 남을 무시하는 건 나쁜 일이라고 공주님이 그러셨느니라.
1400400047.english: That is correct. The Princess said that ignoring others is a bad thing.

1400400048.korean: 하필 그런 예시를… 리리스 그러면 정말 속상한데…
1400400048.english: Of all examples, why did you have to use that… It’s really upsetting for Lilith…

1400400049.korean: 알겠어요 주인님. 더는 주인님께 말씀 안 드릴게요.
1400400049.english: I understand, Master. I won't tell you anything more.

1400400050.korean: 후후, 그렇다면 내일부터 짐이 그 악마의 친구가 되겠느니라!
1400400050.english: Hahaha, then starting tomorrow, I shall become that devil's friend!

1400400051.english: Leave it to me, my kin!

1400400054.korean: 정말 말을 못하는 이유가 따로 있어?
1400400054.english: Is there really a specific reason why you can't speak?

1400400055.english: "It's a bit better if we talk like this, right?"

1400400057.korean: 『오르카의 모든 대원들을 신경 써주는 게 내 임무야』
1400400057.english: It is my duty to look after all the members of Orca.

1400400058.english: Why don't you get a checkup from the doctor soon?

1400400062.english: Then, LRL, will you be Melt's friend?

1400400063.english: But we can't keep bullying them forever.

1400400064.korean: 리리스도 위험하다면서 왕따시키면 기분 안 좋잖아.
1400400064.english: It doesn't feel good to bully Lilith while saying she's dangerous, does it?

1400500001.korean: 큭큭… 외로운 악마여. 혹시 심심하더냐? 짐의 권속이 너를 걱정하여 내 특별히 이곳까지 행차.
1400500001.english: Hehe... Lonely Demon. Are you bored? My familiar is worried about you, so I have specially traveled all the way here.

1400500004.korean: -멜트의 시선에 겁먹은 LRL은 그대로 내 뒤에 쪼르르 숨어버렸다.
1400500004.english: LRL, frightened by Melt's gaze, scurried right behind me and hid.

1400500006.korean: 으흠! 얘기는 권속에게 들었다. 보아하니 친구가 없다고 들었는데…
1400500006.english: Ahem! I heard the story from a retainer. From the looks of it, I heard he has no friends...

1400500008.english: If you want, Jim will be your friend!

1400500010.english: Do you... do you dislike it?!

1400500012.korean: 흐이이잉… 그리폰보다 무서워… 왜 말을 안 해?
1400500012.english: Heeeeee... Scarier than a griffon... Why aren't you saying anything?

1400500013.korean: -멜트는 LRL을 빤히 보다, 태블릿에 글씨를 써 보여주었다.
1400500013.english: Melt stared at LRL, then wrote on the tablet to show him.

1400500014.korean: 『울지 마세요 사정이 있어서 전 말할 수 없어요』
1400500014.english: "Please don't cry. I have a reason not to tell you."

1400500015.korean: 흐읍… 정말이야? 내가 싫어서 그런 건 아니고?
1400500015.english: *Gasp*... Really? It's not because you dislike me, is it?

1400500016.english: Of course. Could you please move away from me a little?

1400500017.korean: …권속, 정말 이 악마는 저주에 걸린 것 같구나. 정말 슬픈 일이로다.
1400500017.english: … My familiar, it seems this demon is truly under a curse. What a truly sad thing.

1400500018.english: "A devil? Why am I a devil?"

1400500019.korean: -LRL은 드래곤 슬레이어에 나왔던 인물로 대원들의 별명을 짓곤 하는데… 괜히 오해하는 모양이었다.
1400500019.english: -LRL is a character from Dragon Slayer who often gives nicknames to the members... it seemed like there was a misunderstanding.

1400500020.korean: 아, 오해 하지 말거라! 짐이 듣기론 착한 악마라 들었도다!
1400500020.english: Ah, do not misunderstand! I have heard that I am a benevolent devil!

1400500022.english: So, um... whimper... I guess I'm scared after all...

1400500023.korean: -대충 아무런 말을 꾸며내야 멜트의 오해가 풀릴 것이다.
1400500023.english: I will have to make up some random story to clear up Melt's misunderstanding.

1400500024.korean: -옆에서 맞장구를 쳐주자 그제야 LRL이 용기내어 멜트에게 다가갔다.
1400500024.english: Only when someone chimed in from the side did LRL muster the courage to approach Melt.

1400500025.korean: 그, 그렇느니라! 악룡의 무시무시한 명령을 거부하고 저주에 걸린 악마! 착한 악마 말이다!
1400500025.english: Th-that is so! A demon cursed for refusing the evil dragon's terrifying command! I mean a good demon!

1400500028.korean: -순간이었지만 멜트가 웃음을 참았다. 멜트의 손이 급히 마스크에 향했다.
1400500028.english: It was only for a moment, but Melt suppressed a laugh. Melt's hand hurriedly reached for the mask.

1400500029.korean: -LRL은 멜트가 웃는 것을 본 게 기뻤는지 덥석 그녀의 손을 잡았다.
1400500029.english: -LRL grabbed her hand, as if he was happy to see Melt smile.

1400500030.korean: 착한 악마여! 짐의 영토인 오르카를 소개해주도록 하겠노라. 따라 오거라!
1400500030.english: Good devil! Let me introduce you to my territory, Orca. Follow me!

1400500032.english: The Orca members will hate me.

1400500033.korean: 아닐 것이다! 짐이 옆에 있으니 짐의 부하들은 필히 좋아할 것이다!
1400500033.english: No, that won't be the case! Since Jim is by his side, his subordinates will surely be pleased!

1400500035.korean: -멜트는 LRL에게 손을 잡힌 후 복도를 걸어갔다. 붙임성이 좋은 아이인 만큼 멜트도 LRL에게는 마음을 열지 않을까?
1400500035.english: Melt walked down the hallway after LRL took his hand. Since he is such a friendly kid, wouldn't Melt open his heart to LRL too?

1400500036.english: LRL, no way, you didn't tame a devil?!

1400500038.korean: 후훗, 그렇도다 하얀 야수여. 짐의 은혜에 악마는 짐의 권속이 되기로 맹세했느니라!
1400500038.english: Hahaha, so it is, White Beast. In gratitude for my grace, the Devil has sworn to become my familiar!

1400500041.korean: 우와… 대단해 LRL… 정말 강한 악마를 부하로 만들었을 줄이야…
1400500041.english: Wow… That’s amazing, LRL… I never thought you’d make such a strong demon your subordinate…

1400500042.english: Ahem, anyway, nice to meet you. My name is Alvis!

1400500044.korean: 엄청 조용해, 발키리 언니 보는 것 같아…
1400500044.english: It's so quiet, it's like watching Valkyrie...

1400500046.korean: 야수여. 이 악마에게 친구를 구해줄 수 있겠는가?
1400500046.english: O Beast, can you save your friend from this devil?

1400500047.korean: 당연하지! 멜트 언니~ 발할라 언니들도 소개시켜줄게!
1400500047.english: Of course! Melt, I'll introduce you to the Valhalla sisters too!

1400500048.korean: 어떠냐, 짐의 친구가 이리 많으니, 악마 또한 친해지고 싶지 않더냐?!
1400500048.english: How about that? With so many friends, don't you want to become friends with the Devil too?!

1400500051.korean: LRL, 그렇다면 동료가 왔으니 그걸 해야겠지?
1400500051.english: LRL, then since a teammate has arrived, we should do that, right?

1400500052.korean: 후후… 그것이라면 바로 그걸 말하는 것이냐?
1400500052.english: Hahaha... If that is what you mean, is that exactly it?

1400500054.korean: 친구가 된 기념으로 안드바리의 창고에서 참치캔과 초코바를 가져와 파티를 열겠도다!
1400500054.english: To celebrate becoming friends, I will bring cans of tuna and chocolate bars from Andvari's warehouse and throw a party!

1400500056.korean: 범죄라니! 이것은 숭고한 행사이자 우정의 맹약이니라!
1400500056.english: A crime! This is a noble ceremony and a pledge of friendship!

1400500058.korean: 좋아, 안드바리도 오르카 대원이 창고를 구경한다고 하면 열어줄 지도 몰라!
1400500058.english: Okay, Andvari might open the warehouse if an Orca member says they want to look around!

1400500059.english: I didn't say I wanted to look around.

1400500060.korean: 하하! 악마여. 짐은 악마의 마음을 읽고 있느니라… 분명 구경가고 싶은 것이지?
1400500060.english: Haha! Oh Devil. I am reading your mind... You clearly want to go watch, don't you?

1400500062.korean: LRL. 아무래도 멜트 언니는 아니라고 한 것 같은데?
1400500062.english: LRL. I think Melt said it wasn't her?

1400500063.korean: 부끄러워하지 말거라 악마여! 악마의 마음은 이미 짐이 다 읽었.
1400500063.english: Do not be ashamed, Devil! I have already read your mind.

1400500064.korean: 여기서 뭔 짓을 꾸미고 있었을까, 꼬맹이들?
1400500064.english: What were you kids plotting here?

1400500066.korean: 그, 악마라는 게 사악하단 악마는 아니고…
1400500066.english: Well, the devil isn't the kind of evil devil...

1400500067.korean: LRL, 그니까… 저주를 받은 악마란 말이지?
1400500067.english: LRL, so... you mean a cursed demon?

1400600001.english: Aren't you going to raise your hand properly?

1400600003.english: Alvis, can you see your arm going down?

1400600004.korean: 히잉… 새로운 대원한테 창고 구경 시켜주는 게 뭐 어때서…?!
1400600004.english: Hmph... What's wrong with showing a new member around the warehouse...?!

1400600005.english: Are you calling that an excuse?!

1400600008.korean: 자꾸 말했잖아. 창고에 있는 건 우리가 훈련 나갈 때만 먹는 거라고!
1400600008.english: I've told you repeatedly. The stuff in the warehouse is only for when we go out for training!

1400600010.korean: …근데 멜트 씨는 왜 같이 손 들고 계세요?
1400600010.english: … But why are you raising your hands together, Mr. Melt?

1400600012.korean: 설마... 진짜 창고를 털 생각을 하신 건 아니죠?
1400600012.english: Surely... you weren't actually thinking of robbing the warehouse, were you?

1400600014.korean: 하아, 돌아버리겠네. 새로 온 분한테 참 좋은 거 가르친다?
1400600014.english: Haa, I'm going crazy. You really are teaching the newcomer a good thing, aren't you?

1400600015.korean: 히잉… 아니 언니… LRL이 먼저 말했는데에…
1400600015.english: Hng... No, sis... LRL said it first...

1400600016.english: Now you're even selling out your colleagues?

1400600018.korean: 『잘못했습니다 제가 가자고 했어요 다른 분들은 잘못 없어요』
1400600018.english: "I was wrong. I was the one who suggested going. The others are not at fault."

1400600019.korean: 감싸지 마세요. LRL이랑 알비스가 부식창고 원데이 투데이 터는 것도 아니고.
1400600019.english: Don't cover for them. It's not like LRL and Alvis are robbing the food warehouse for the first time.

1400600021.korean: …처음 봤을 땐 엄청 위험한 분이신 줄 알았는데…
1400600021.english: … When I first saw him, I thought he was a really dangerous person…

1400600022.korean: 알비스랑 LRL도 좀 배우란 말이야! 서로 빠져 나가려고만 하고…
1400600022.english: Alvis and LRL need to learn a thing or two! All they do is try to get away with it...

1400600024.korean: 동료잖아요. 대장이나 다른 지휘관 분들께선 조심하라 하셨지만, 그래도 전 오르카에 합류한 이상, 모두 동료라고 생각해요.
1400600024.english: We are comrades, after all. The Captain and other commanders told me to be careful, but since I joined Orca, I consider everyone my comrade.

1400600026.korean: 어떤 이유에서인진 잘 모르겠지만, 말을 아예 안 하신다고 들었는데, 답답할 것 같네요.
1400600026.english: I'm not sure why, but I heard that he doesn't speak at all, which must be frustrating.

1400600028.korean: 언니도 며칠 전에 나쁜 말 했잖아! 대장이랑 발키리 언니한테 이를 거야!
1400600028.english: You said mean things a few days ago, too! I'm going to tell the Captain and Valkyrie!

1400600029.korean: 내가 욕했다는 거랑... 네가 창고 터는 거랑 죄질이 같을 거 같아?
1400600029.english: Do you think the severity of my swearing... is the same as you robbing a warehouse?

1400600030.korean: 치… 다음부턴 욕 절대 안 하겠다면서… 언니... 진짜.
1400600030.english: Tch... You said you'd never swear again... Unnie... seriously.

1400600033.korean: 당연한 거 아니에요? 물론… 위험한 능력을 가졌지만… 사령관님께서 받아들이셨잖아요.
1400600033.english: Isn't that obvious? Of course... even though he has dangerous abilities... the Commander accepted him.

1400600034.english: "It's the first time I've heard the word 'colleague'"

1400600035.korean: 짐은 멜트의 동료가 아니니라! 악마, 악마는 짐의 권속이 아닌가?!
1400600035.english: Jim is not Melt's comrade! Demon, isn't the demon Jim's familiar?!

1400600037.english: Hng... Don't keep staring at me like that...

1400600041.korean: 아니, 그게 아니라요… 그, 그니까… 말을 아예 못하는 그런 쪽인 줄 알았는데…
1400600041.english: No, that's not it... Um, I mean... I thought they were the type who couldn't speak at all...

1400600044.english: By the way, why do you write on a tablet?

1400600046.korean: 으음… 그렇게 무안하게 쳐다 보시면… 알았어요. 안 물을게요.
1400600046.english: Hmm... If you look at me so awkwardly... Fine. I won't ask.

1400600048.korean: 있잖아요, 저도 오르카에서 최근 복원된 개체라 여기가 정말 어떤 분위기다, 이런 건 사실 잘 모르겠어요.
1400600048.english: You know, since I'm also a recently restored individual from Orca, I honestly don't really know what the atmosphere is like here.

1400600049.korean: 하지만 이건 확실해요. 사령관님은 그 어느 바이오로이드라도 함부로 대하지 않는 분이세요.
1400600049.english: But one thing is certain. The Commander is someone who does not treat any Bio-android disrespectfully.

1400600050.korean: 멜트 씨 목소리도 들어보고 싶네요. 살짝 궁금하기도 하고…
1400600050.english: I'd like to hear Melt's voice too. I'm a little curious, you know...

1400600052.korean: 먼저 가볼게요. 총을 그렘린 언니한테 맡겨야 해서…
1400600052.english: I'll go ahead first. I have to leave the gun with Gremlin...

1400600054.korean: LRL이랑 알비스는 그대로 복도에서 손 들고 있어!
1400600054.english: LRL and Alvis, stay in the hallway with your hands up!

1400600056.korean: 그럼 가볼게요. 나중에 뵐게요. 멜트 님.
1400600056.english: Well then, I'll be going now. See you later, Melt.

1400700001.english: You heard everything about Melt, right?

1400700002.korean: 주인님이 아무리 괜찮다고 말씀하셨긴 했지만… 확실히 주의해야 되겠어요.
1400700002.english: Even though my master said it was fine... I definitely need to be careful.

1400700003.korean: 그럼 언니는 누구한테 감시를 붙이실 생각이세요?
1400700003.english: Then, who are you planning to have keep an eye on?

1400700004.korean: 역시 제일 믿음직한 건 페로긴 하지만…
1400700004.english: As expected, Ferro is the most reliable one, but...

1400700005.korean: 죄송해요, 언니… 카페 아모르 일 때문에 24시간 동안 붙어있긴 힘들 것 같아요.
1400700005.english: I'm sorry, unnie... I don't think it will be easy to stay together for 24 hours because of work at Cafe Amor.

1400700006.korean: 응, 페로는 안 될 것 같았어. 워낙 맡은 일이 많아서... 그렇다면 역시 페더가 잘 맞을 것 같은데.
1400700006.english: Yeah, I didn't think Ferro would work out. He has so much work to do... In that case, I think Feather would be a better fit.

1400700007.korean: 아, 아니지. 페더는 어제까지 주인님 경호를 맡았으니까 쉬어야지.
1400700007.english: Ah, no. Feather should rest since he was guarding the Master until yesterday.

1400700008.korean: 언니, 다른 언니들이 바쁘면 제가 맡을게요.
1400700008.english: Sister, if the other sisters are busy, I'll take it.

1400700009.korean: 아냐, 주인님께서 연속으로 근무를 시키진 말라 하셨잖아.
1400700009.english: No, Master told me not to make you work consecutive shifts.

1400700010.korean: 그리고 항상 감시해야 하는 만큼... 제일 컨디션이 좋은 자매를 붙이는 게 좋겠어.
1400700010.english: And since they always have to keep an eye on them... I think it would be best to assign the sister who is in the best condition.

1400700011.english: ...How good it would have been if Fenrir had been there.

1400700012.korean: 펜리르는 신사에 숨어 있다 시티가드 분들한테 발각되서…
1400700012.english: Fenrir was hiding in the shrine but was discovered by the City Guards...

1400700013.korean: 최대한 들키지 말라 했는데… 하아, 얘기는 들었어. 어쩔 수 없는 일이지.
1400700013.english: I told you to try your best not to get caught... Sigh, I heard the story. I guess it can't be helped.

1400700014.english: Sister, isn't Fenrir coming to visit?

1400700015.korean: …가중처벌이라서 이번엔 훈방 조치로는 안 끝난다 그러더라.
1400700015.english: … They said that since it is an aggravated punishment, it won't end with just a warning this time.

1400700017.korean: 생각 안 해본 건 아니지만… 하치코는 베이커리 때문에 많이 바쁠 예정이야.
1400700017.english: It’s not that I haven’t thought about it... but Hachiko is going to be very busy because of the bakery.

1400700018.korean: 하치코가요? 음식이라곤 미트파이 밖에 못 만드는데요?
1400700018.english: Hachiko? The only food he can make is meat pies.

1400700019.korean: 요샌 소완한테 조리법을 많이 배웠는지 조금 실력이 늘었대.
1400700019.english: They say his skills have improved a bit lately, perhaps because he learned a lot of recipes from Sowan.

1400700020.korean: 요즘 아우로라가 도와달라 해서 두 가지 일을 동시에 하긴 힘들 거야.
1400700020.english: Aurora has been asking for help lately, so it's going to be hard to do two things at once.

1400700021.english: Then… in the end, there is only one sister left.

1400700022.korean: 솔직히 별로 믿음직스럽진 않지만, 그래도 제일 시간이 남아 도는 아이지.
1400700022.english: Honestly, he's not very reliable, but he's the one with the most free time.

1400700023.english: So you're planning to leave it to Poi?

1400700024.korean: 제대로 된 임무를 맡긴 적은 없어서 많이 서운하다고 그러는데… 언제까지 안 줄 순 없지.
1400700024.english: They say they are very disappointed because they have never been given a proper mission... but I can't keep withholding it forever.

1400700025.english: ...Will Poi be able to do it properly?

1400700026.korean: 페더가 어떤 마음인지는 언니도 알아. 하지만, 다른 자매들의 시간을 뺏을 순 없잖아.
1400700026.english: I know how Feder feels. But you can't take up the other sisters' time.

1400700027.korean: 영 포이가 못 미덥긴 하지만. 주인님을 경호하는 것도 아니고…
1400700027.english: I do find Young Poi unreliable, though. It's not like he's guarding the Master or anything...

1400700028.korean: 언니가 멜트를 주시하는 것도 있으니 괜찮을 것 같기도 해요.
1400700028.english: Since my older sister is keeping an eye on Melt, I think it might be okay.

1400700029.korean: 그렇게 말해주니 다들 고마워. 그러면 포이랑 이야기를 좀 해보도록 할게.
1400700029.english: Thanks everyone for saying that. Then, I’ll go talk to Poi.

1400700031.english: Hehe~ Unnie, what did you call me for?

1400700032.korean: 너한테 맡길 임무가 있어서 따로 불렀어.
1400700032.english: I called you aside because I have a mission to entrust to you.

1400700033.korean: 임무요? 무슨 임무인데 그래요? 혹시 주인님의 밤시중 임무?
1400700033.english: A mission? What kind of mission is it? Is it perhaps a mission to attend to your master at night?

1400700035.korean: 그게 아니면… 주인님이랑 아. 이. 만. 들. 기. 임무?
1400700035.english: If not that… a mission to. make. a. baby. with. the Master?

1400700036.korean: 포이. 조금 더 집중해줄 수 있을까?
1400700036.english: Poi. Could you focus a little more?

1400700037.korean: 농담 한 번 해봤는데... 그래서 어떤 임무에요 언니?
1400700037.english: I was just joking... So, what kind of mission is it, unnie?

1400700038.english: You heard the story about Melt, right?

1400700039.korean: 그 마스크 쓰고 다니는 음침한 애 말이에요?
1400700039.english: You mean that creepy kid who goes around wearing a mask?

1400700040.korean: 그래. 멜트… 그 개체가 최면이랑 정신조종을 할 수 있단 얘기도 들었지?
1400700040.english: Right. Melt… you also heard that that entity can perform hypnosis and mind control, right?

1400700041.korean: 정신 조종? 마인드 컨트롤… 마인드 브레이크…
1400700041.english: Mind control? Mind control… Mind break…

1400700044.korean: 그래, 우린 근접 경호를 담당하니까… 기척을 빠르게 캐치할 수도 있고.
1400700044.english: Yeah, since we're in charge of close protection... we can also quickly detect their presence.

1400700045.korean: 감각도 훨씬 예민하니, 그 애가 뭘 꾸미든 간에 사전에 제압이 가능할 거야.
1400700045.english: My senses are much sharper, so whatever he plots, I'll be able to subdue him beforehand.

1400700046.korean: 언니가 이러시는 걸 보니… 엄청 강한 여자 같은데요?
1400700046.english: Seeing you act like this… you seem like a really strong woman.

1400700047.korean: 조심해. 까딱 잘못하면 포이도 정신지배를 당해 버릴지 몰라.
1400700047.english: Be careful. If you're not careful, Poi might fall under mind control too.

1400700048.korean: 포이가 정신지배라… 헤에… 혹시 멜트한테 부탁해서 주인님을 세뇌시키면… 인정사정없이… 헤헤...
1400700048.english: So Poi is mind control... Heh... If I ask Melt to brainwash my master... I won't show any mercy... Hehe...

1400700049.korean: 자꾸 집중 못하면 페더한테 부탁할 거야?
1400700049.english: If you keep losing focus, are you going to ask Feder for help?

1400700050.korean: 죄송해요 언니. 그냥 신기하기도 하고 재밌어 보여서…
1400700050.english: I'm sorry, unnie. It just looked fascinating and fun...

1400700051.korean: 포이, 다른 자매들이 너한테 맡긴다 하니까 걱정했었어.
1400700051.english: Poi, I was worried because the other sisters said they would leave it to you.

1400700052.english: Sister, I can do it too!

1400700053.korean: 그래, 포이도 잘 할 수 있을거라 믿어. 잘할 수 있지?
1400700053.english: Yeah, I believe Poi can do well too. You can, right?

1400700054.korean: 잔소리 같긴 해도 정말 중요한 일이야. 주인님 안전이 달린 일이라고.
1400700054.english: It might sound like nagging, but it is really important. Your safety depends on it, Master.

1400700056.korean: 그리고 포이. 혹시라도… 포이가 생각하기에 좀 수상한 점이 있다고 느껴지면…
1400700056.english: And Poi. Just in case… if you feel there is anything a bit suspicious…

1400700057.korean: 주인님께 해를 끼치기 전에 먼저 처리해.
1400700057.english: Deal with it before it harms your master.

1400700058.korean: 혹시라도 주인님께서 순식간에 세뇌되시면 오르카는 바로 마비되니까.
1400700058.english: Because if Master gets brainwashed in an instant, Orca will be paralyzed immediately.

1400700060.korean: 그래, 포이만 믿을게. 혹시 의심스러운 일이 생기면 언니랑 주인님께 보고해.
1400700060.english: Okay, I'll trust only Poi. If anything suspicious happens, report it to your sister and Master.

1400700063.english: She seemed like a pretty interesting woman.

1400800001.korean: 아하하하하! 악마, 오늘이야말로 악룡의 저주를 풀고 짐이 악마를 구원하겠도다!
1400800001.english: Ahahahaha! Devil, today is the day I will break the evil dragon's curse and save you!

1400800003.korean: 난 왜 이 놀이에 꼈는지 물어봐도 될까, LRL?
1400800003.english: May I ask why I joined this game, LRL?

1400800004.korean: 짐의 하얀 야수가 진정한 모습으로 각성한 모습이 필요했다. 그의 이름은 바로!
1400800004.english: Jim needed the White Beast to awaken to its true form. Its name was none other than!

1400800006.korean: 라이언이 아니니라! 좀 더 멋진 이름을… 진조의 하얀 야수가 각성한 진명!
1400800006.english: It is not Ryan! A cooler name... The True Name of the White Beast of the True Ancestors, who has awakened!

1400800008.korean: 히잉… 궈, 권속이여! 뭐라고 한 마디 좀 해보거라!
1400800008.english: Hng... Gwo, my kin! Say something!

1400800009.korean: -사령관실을 나와 잠시 기지개를 키던 중 LRL과 픽시, 그리고 멜트가 노는 것을 지켜봤다.
1400800009.english: After leaving the commander's office and stretching for a moment, I watched LRL, Pixie, and Melt playing.

1400800010.korean: -...픽시는 알비스처럼 LRL의 놀이를 잘 받아주는 성격은 아닌가 보다.
1400800010.english: ...It seems Pixie isn't the type to go along with LRL's games like Alvis does.

1400800011.korean: 남는 시간에 이 빌어 쳐먹을 무기나 손질할 생각이었는데…
1400800011.english: I was planning to spend my spare time cleaning this goddamn weapon...

1400800012.korean: 아무리 정비를 맡겨도 실전에선 탄이 걸린단 말입니다 사령관님… 내 무기를 내가 믿질 못하는 게 말이 됩니까?!
1400800012.english: No matter how much maintenance I entrust it to, the ammunition still jams in the actual battle, Commander… Does it make sense that I can't even trust my own weapon?!

1400800013.korean: 멸망 전 인간들은 하나같이 빡대가리밖에 없었던 건… 아, 죄송합니다 사령관님. 인류를 욕하려던 건 아니었는데…
1400800013.english: The fact that all humans before the apocalypse were nothing but idiots… Ah, I’m sorry, Commander. I didn’t mean to insult humanity…

1400800014.korean: -보통의 발할라 대원들과 다르게 픽시는 상당히 까칠했다.
1400800014.english: Unlike the usual Valhalla members, Pixie was quite prickly.

1400800015.english: "I'm sorry, Pixie. If you were busy, I should have stopped LRL."

1400800016.korean: 응? 하아... 신경 쓰시진 마세요. 그냥, 이 염병할 총 때문에 골치가 아파서 그렇지…
1400800016.english: Huh? Haa... Don't worry about it. It's just that this damn gun is giving me a headache...

1400800017.korean: 아... 근데 진짜 그렇게만 소통하시면 불편하실 것 같네요. 무슨 생각이신지도 잘 모르겠고…
1400800017.english: Ah... but honestly, I think it would be uncomfortable if you only communicated like that. I don't really know what you're thinking, either...

1400800018.korean: 다시 말하지! 이 악마는 불행히도 마왕의 저주를 받아.
1400800018.english: I'll say it again! Unfortunately, this demon has been cursed by the Demon King.

1400800019.korean: 생각해보니... 지랄맞게 불편하겠네요. 발키리 언니도 집중하면 말도 안 하고 몇 시간 동안 조준경만 보던데.
1400800019.english: Come to think of it... that would be damn uncomfortable. Even Valkyrie doesn't say a word and just stares at her scope for hours when she's focused.

1400800020.korean: 닥터한테 한 번 부탁이라도 해보시지 그러세요?
1400800020.english: Why don't you try asking the doctor for a favor?

1400800021.korean: 다음부턴 픽시 언니랑 안 놀 거야!
1400800021.english: I'm not going to play with Pixie anymore!

1400800022.korean: -아랫입술을 비죽 내민 채 볼을 부풀리는 LRL의 머리를 부드럽게 쓰다듬어주었다.
1400800022.english: I gently stroked LRL's head as he pouted his lower lip and puffed out his cheeks.

1400800023.korean: -다시 멜트로 돌아가서… 생각해보니 닥터한테 부탁해 멜트의 목소리랑 최면 능력을 약화시키는 방법도 있을 것이다.
1400800023.english: -Going back to Melt... come to think of it, there might be a way to ask the Doctor to weaken Melt's voice and hypnotic abilities.

1400800024.korean: 『그 방법도 생각 안 해본 건 아닌데 괜히 오르카 분들을 귀찮게 해드릴 것 같아요』
