1400800024.english: It’s not that I haven’t thought about that method, but I feel like I’d just be bothering the Orca members for no reason.

1400800026.english: "Thank you for your words, but it's okay."

1400800027.korean: 짐이 악룡과의 일전을 준비하는 상황이었건만... 특별히 권속에게 양보하도록 하지!
1400800027.english: I was preparing for a decisive battle with the evil dragon... but I will make an exception and yield to my subordinates!

1400800028.korean: -양해를 구하고 나는 멜트와 함께 사령관실로 향했다.
1400800028.english: After asking for permission, I headed to the commander's office with Melt.

1400800029.korean: -어느 정도 마음을 열고 있는 것 같긴 하지만, 이상할 정도로 자신이 입을 여는 것을 겁냈다.
1400800029.english: It seemed like he was opening up to some extent, but he was strangely afraid to speak up.

1400800030.korean: -대체 무엇이 멜트의 입을 막고 있는 걸까…?
1400800030.english: -What on earth is shutting Melt's mouth...?

1400800031.korean: -사령관실의 문을 열고 들어가던 중, 내 침실 이불이 크게 부풀어 올라있는 게 보였다.
1400800031.english: As I opened the door to the commander's office and entered, I saw that my bedroom duvet was greatly puffed up.

1400800033.korean: -이불 밖으로 검은 꼬리가 살랑거리는 걸 보니 포이가 확실했다.
1400800033.english: Seeing the black tail wagging from under the blanket, it was definitely Poi.

1400800035.korean: -...내 이불에 자신의 체취를 남기려는 듯 몸을 비비던 포이가 벌떡 일어섰다.
1400800035.english: Poi, who had been rubbing his body against my blanket as if trying to leave his scent, suddenly stood up.

1400800036.korean: -헛기침하자, 이불 밖으로 빠져 나온 포이가 흐트러진 옷을 추슬러 입었다.
1400800036.english: As he cleared his throat, Poi slipped out from under the covers and straightened his disheveled clothes.

1400800037.korean: 죄송해요… 주인님 냄새가 너무 향긋해서… 포이도 모르게…
1400800037.english: I'm sorry... Master, your scent was so fragrant... that even Poi didn't realize...

1400800038.korean: 네? 혼자 이야기 나누신다고요? 그건 좀 힘들 것 같은데...
1400800038.english: What? You're talking to yourself? That seems a bit difficult...

1400800039.english: However… if something happens to you, Master…

1400800041.korean: -포이가 바깥으로 나가자, 나는 헛기침을 한 뒤 흐트러진 이불을 정리하곤 멜트를 앉혔다.
1400800041.english: As Poi went outside, I cleared my throat, tidied the disheveled blankets, and sat Melt down.

1400800042.korean: -멜트는 눈을 마주치지 못하고 고개를 숙이다, 이내 태블릿에 무언가를 써 내게 보여주었다.
1400800042.english: Melt couldn't meet my eyes and lowered his head, then soon wrote something on his tablet and showed it to me.

1400800043.korean: 『오르카 대원분들은 모두 사령관님을 믿고 잘 따르는군요』
1400800043.english: "The Orca members all trust and follow the Commander well."

1400800044.english: I shouldn't have stated the obvious.

1400800046.korean: -멜트는 여전히 시선을 제대로 두지 못한 채 다른 곳을 쳐다보자, 난 그녀의 양볼을 잡았다.
1400800046.english: As Melt still couldn't look straight ahead and kept staring elsewhere, I grabbed her cheeks.

1400800048.korean: -멜트는 괜스레 얼굴을 빨갛게 물들이더니, 손을 허우적거렸다.
1400800048.english: Melt blushed for no reason and flailed his hands.

1400800052.korean: -내 대답에 멜트는 안절부절 못하다, 결국 시선을 천천히 돌려 나와 마주했다.
1400800052.english: Melt fidgeted nervously at my answer, and eventually slowly turned his gaze to face me.

1400800053.korean: -역시 멜트는 어색한 듯 고개를 숙인 뒤, 빠르게 태블릿으로 글씨를 써 내게 보여주었다.
1400800053.english: As expected, Melt lowered his head awkwardly, then quickly wrote on his tablet and showed it to me.

1400800054.english: I'm sorry, I think it's going to be difficult after all.

1400800055.english: Melt's breathing quickened at my words.

1400800056.korean: -멜트는 가슴에 손을 얹고 고민하다 이윽고 태블릿에 글씨를 천천히 써 내려갔다.
1400800056.english: Melt placed his hand on his chest and pondered for a moment, then slowly began to write on the tablet.

1400800057.korean: 『인간님의 눈을 똑바로 쳐다보는 건 오랜만이에요 무섭기만 했는데』
1400800057.english: It's been a long time since I looked you straight in the eye. I was just scared.

1400800060.english: Didn't you say you were going to leave the maintenance to a Gremlin?

1400800061.korean: 귀찮진 않아. 그게 닥터 역할인 걸?
1400800061.english: It’s not a hassle. That’s the doctor’s role, you know.

1400800062.korean: LRL, 잠깐 멜트랑 이야기 좀 하고 와도 될까?
1400800062.english: LRL, can I go talk to Melt for a moment?

1400800064.korean: 멜트랑 이야기를 좀 하려는데 자리 좀 비켜줄래?
1400800064.english: I'd like to talk to Melt for a bit. Could you move aside?

1400800065.english: I've put on all the protective gear.

1400800066.korean: 걱정하지 마, 정 그러면 문 밖에서 대기해.
1400800066.english: Don't worry, if you really want to, wait outside the door.

1400800068.korean: 내가 마지막 인간이니 그런 거겠지… 아마도?
1400800068.english: I guess it's because I'm the last human... probably?

1400800069.korean: 사람이랑 이야기할 땐 눈을 쳐다봐야지. 멜트.
1400800069.english: You should look people in the eye when you talk to them. Melt.

1400800071.korean: 그러니까 우리, 눈 보고 이야기 하자.
1400800071.english: So, let's look each other in the eye and talk.

1400900001.korean: 흐음… 심심해… 안에서 무슨 이야길 하길래...?
1400900001.english: Hmm... I'm bored... What are they talking about inside...?

1400900004.korean: …음?! 킁킁… 킁… 주인님 냄새?! 너, 방금 사령관실에서 뭐 했어?
1400900004.english: … Mmm?! Sniff sniff… sniff… Master’s scent?! What were you just doing in the Commander’s office?

1400900006.korean: 혹시, 주인님이랑 긴급 성관계라도 가진 거야?
1400900006.english: Did you perhaps have emergency sex with your master?

1400900008.english: Blushing?! No way… you with your master?!

1400900009.english: (It's been a while since I... made eye contact with a human...)

1400900012.korean: (후아… 후웃… 가슴 떨려… 오랜만에 보는 인간님의 눈망울… 하아...)
1400900012.english: (Phew... Hmph... My heart is pounding... Seeing Human's eyes for the first time in a long while... Haa...)

1400900015.korean: 야, 멜트! 멜트! 왜 갑자기 쓰러져?!
1400900015.english: Hey, Melt! Melt! Why did you suddenly collapse?!

1400900016.korean: 주인님, 안에서 무슨 일이 있었길래 멜트가 기절했어요?
1400900016.english: Master, what happened inside that made Melt faint?

1400900017.korean: -...나와 면담을 마친 멜트는 무슨 이유에서인지 모르지만 기절했다고 한다.
1400900017.english: ...It is said that Melt fainted for some unknown reason after finishing his interview with me.

1400900018.korean: 흐음… 킁킁, 으음… 이불에 냄새도 없는 것 같고…
1400900018.english: Hmm... sniff sniff, mmm... It doesn't seem to smell on the blanket either...

1400900019.korean: -포이는 정말 샅샅이 찾겠다는 기세로 킁킁거리며 냄새를 맡았다.
1400900019.english: Poi sniffed around with the determination to search thoroughly.

1400900021.korean: 아니, 그게 아니라요… 정말 얌전하게 주인님이랑 대화한 거예요?
1400900021.english: No, that's not it... Did you really talk to your master quietly?

1400900022.korean: 리리스 언니가 말한 만큼 위험한 존재는 아닌 것 같네요. 괜히 걱정 잔뜩했네.
1400900022.english: It doesn't seem like they are as dangerous as Lilith said. I worried for nothing.

1400900023.korean: -아무래도 포이가 맡은 만큼 리리스가 엄하게 주의를 줬겠지?
1400900023.english: Since Poi was in charge, Lilith must have warned him strictly, right?

1400900024.english: But Master, I have a question.

1400900025.korean: 왜 주인님께선 멜트를 따뜻하게 대하시는 거예요? 멜트는 주인님께 엄청 위험한 애라 들었는데.
1400900025.english: Why are you treating Melt so warmly, Master? I heard Melt is extremely dangerous to you.

1400900029.korean: -포이도 지나친 성욕 때문에 개발 단계에서 폐기되었다.
1400900029.english: - Poido was also scrapped during the development stage due to excessive sexual desire.

1400900030.korean: -바이오로이드의 생명을 박탈한다는 행위가 폐기인 걸 생각해보면… 양산형인 멜트는 어떤 험한 꼴을 당하며 살아왔을까?
1400900030.english: Considering that depriving a bioroid of its life is equivalent to disposal... what kind of harsh ordeals must the mass-produced Melt have endured to survive?

1400900031.korean: -만약 포이가 살아 남은 멸망 전 개체였다면 해맑진 않겠지.
1400900031.english: -If Poi were a surviving individual from before the apocalypse, he wouldn't be so cheerful.

1400900032.english: What? Happiness… What do you mean?

1400900033.korean: -구 인류가 바이오로이드를 어떻게 다뤘는지는 이미 여러 바이오로이드들에게 들었다.
1400900033.english: I have already heard from several bioroids how the old humanity treated bioroids.

1400900036.english: … No. I’ll be going now, Master.

1400900037.english: All the bioroids regard me as hope.

1400900038.korean: -그 희망은 내가 구 인류와 달리 바이오로이드들을 아끼고 보호한다는 믿음에서 시작한다.
1400900038.english: That hope begins with the belief that, unlike the old humanity, I cherish and protect the bioroids.

1400900039.korean: -하지만 내 온정 때문에 오르카는 어쩌면 위험한 도박을 하고 있는 건 아닐까?
1400900039.english: But because of my kindness, isn't Orca perhaps taking a dangerous gamble?

1400900041.english: Poi, are you keeping a close eye on things?

1400900042.korean: 아, 네… 네 언니! 헤헤… 잘 하고 있어요.
1400900042.english: Ah, yes… Yes, big sister! Hehe… You're doing well.

1400900043.english: Did you notice anything strange by any chance?

1400900044.english: For now, that is the case.

1400900045.english: Okay. Thanks for letting me know… um?

1400900047.korean: 포이, 네 몸에서 왜... 주인님 이불 냄새가 나니?
1400900047.english: Poi, why... does your body smell like Master's blanket?

1400900049.korean: 포이, 언니가 말하지 않았니? 철저하게 멜트를 감시해야 한다고.
1400900049.english: Poi, didn't I tell you? That you have to keep a close eye on Melt.

1400900050.korean: 그, 그러면 언니! 언니도 잘못한 거 있잖아요!
1400900050.english: Th-then, sis! You did something wrong too!

1400900051.english: Poi, are you talking back to your older sister right now?

1400900052.korean: 며칠 전에 언니 사령관실 당직일 때 주인님이랑 밤새 한 거 포이가 모를 줄 알아요?
1400900052.english: Do you think Poi doesn't know that you stayed up all night with Master a few days ago while your sister was on duty at the Commander's office?

1400900054.korean: 아침에 문을 열었더니 언니랑 주인님 냄새에 포이도 흥분해서…
1400900054.english: When I opened the door in the morning, Poi got excited by the smell of my sister and master too…

1400900056.korean: 언니는 늘 공과 사를 지키신다면서… 다른 언니들한테 다 말할… 으븝?!
1400900056.english: You said you always keep work and personal life separate… telling all the other sisters… uh-huh?!

1400900058.korean: 언니들, 리리스 언니 밤새 주인님이랑… 으브브븝?!
1400900058.english: Sisters, Lilith stayed up all night with her master… *Sob*?!

1400900059.english: Please, I get it, just be quiet!

1400900064.english: Does Poi know about Melt's past?

1400900068.english: You don't have any memories from before the apocalypse.

1400900069.korean: 멜트가 위험한 능력을 가진 건 맞아.
1400900069.english: It's true that Melt has dangerous abilities.

1400900070.korean: 근데 그렇게 설계된 걸 멜트 탓으로 돌릴 수 있어?
1400900070.english: But can you really blame the melt for it being designed that way?

1400900071.korean: 포이도 안기고 싶은 걸 포이 탓이라 하긴 싫지?
1400900071.english: You don't want to blame Poi for wanting to be hugged, do you?

1400900072.english: Do you have anything more to say, Poi?

1401000001.korean: 누가 자꾸 나한테 내 딸을 죽이라 했어.
1401000001.english: Someone kept telling me to kill my daughter.

1401000003.korean: 나한테 내 딸을 죽이라 했다고! 그렇지 않으면 날 죽인다고 했어!
1401000003.english: He told me to kill my daughter! He said he would kill me if I didn't!

1401000004.korean: 인간님… 인간님께서 아꼈던 따님이셨잖아요, 어째서… 우웁...
1401000004.english: Human... You were the daughter you cherished, why... Ugh...

1401000005.english: Heeheehee… Hurry up and praise me, praise meee… Heeheeheehee!

1401000007.korean: 히히히히! 우힛! 이히히히히! 그래… 그래… 이 느낌이야… 좋아, 좋, 우윽?! 으으으으그극?!
1401000007.english: Hehehehe! Ooh! Hehehehe! Right… right… this is the feeling… Good, good, ugh?! Ughhhhh?!

1401000008.english: It’s… my fault. Someone who was so kind…

1401000009.korean: 우히히히! 크읏… 히히히! 하하하… 아아아악! 히히히히… 우히히히히!
1401000009.english: Uhihihi! Ugh… Hehehe! Hahaha… Aaaargh! Hehehihi… Uhihihihi!

1401000010.english: Come on… kill me… Hehehe! Ahahahaha!

1401000011.korean: 그렇게 따님을 아끼셨는데… 제가… 정말 잘못했어요, 용서해주세요…
1401000011.english: You cherished your daughter so much... I... I was truly wrong, please forgive me...

1401000012.korean: 어서, 내게 쾌락을 선사해다오, 이 목소리를 없애다오…
1401000012.english: Come on, grant me pleasure, get rid of this voice…

1401000014.korean: …으흐흐… 제발 날 죽여줘… 하하하하... 이 고통을 없애줘...
1401000014.english: … Hehehe… Please kill me… Hahahaha… Take away this pain…

1401000015.korean: 이제야… 제가 할 일이 생겼네요… 이제 고통을… 끝내드릴게요.
1401000015.english: Finally… I have something to do… Now, I will… put an end to your pain.

1401000018.korean: 응? 악마여. 무슨 일이길래 그러는 것이냐?
1401000018.english: Huh? Devil. What is the matter that makes you act like this?

1401000020.korean: 악마여, 권속이 우리한테 할 말이 있다는데 같이 가겠느냐?
1401000020.english: O demon, your kin has something to tell us; will you come with them?

1401000022.english: Alright... Let's head to the commander's office, you devil!

1401000023.korean: -오르카호를 정박한 곳 근방을 정찰한 결과, 이 근방에서 오메가의 부대나 철충이 보인다는 보고는 없었다.
1401000023.english: As a result of scouting the area near where the Orca was anchored, there were no reports of Omega units or Iron蟲s being seen in the vicinity.

1401000024.korean: 사령관, 정말 우리 밖에 나가는 거야?! 정말?! 정마알?!
1401000024.english: Commander, are we really going outside?! Really?! Seriously?!

1401000025.korean: 응! 완전 좋아! 얼른 같이 가자 사령관... 응? 응?
1401000025.english: Yeah! I love it! Let's hurry up and go together, Commander... Huh? Huh?

1401000026.korean: -이김에 멜트와 친해진 LRL을 데리고 나가 마음의 문을 완전히 열게 하는 것이 중요했다.
1401000026.english: Taking this opportunity, it was important to take LRL, who had become close with Melt, out and help her completely open her heart.

1401000029.english: It's okay if I don't go

1401000030.korean: -내 부탁에 멜트는 한참이나 고민하다 떨리는 손으로 태블릿에 글을 적었다.
1401000030.english: At my request, Melt thought for a long time before writing on the tablet with trembling hands.

1401000032.korean: -나는 소완이 싸준 도시락과 함께 안전이 확보된 지역 중 가장 접근성이 좋은 곳으로 대원들과 향했다.
1401000032.english: I headed with the team to the most accessible location among the safe areas, along with the lunch box Sowon had packed.

1401000033.korean: 가을 피크닉은 처음이에요, 사령관님… 정말 기대되네요.
1401000033.english: This is my first autumn picnic, Commander… I’m really looking forward to it.

1401000035.korean: 하하하, 악마여 즐겁지 않은가? 짐이 특별히.
1401000035.english: Hahaha, isn't this fun, Devil? I am especially pleased.

1401000036.korean: LRL 님. 남을 악마라고 부르는 건 부적절한 말이에요.
1401000036.english: LRL, calling someone a devil is inappropriate.

1401000037.korean: 멜트라는 이름을 두시고, 어째서 악마라고 부르시는 거죠?
1401000037.english: Why do you call him a devil when he has the name Melt?

1401000040.korean: 그나저나 멜트 님께선 티를 좋아하시나요? 얼그레이가 제일 향이 좋답니다. 다즐도 있는데…
1401000040.english: By the way, Melt, do you like tea? They say Earl Grey smells the best. There's also Dazzle...

1401000041.korean: -다행이도 LRL과 멜트, 엘리는 자연스럽게 즐거운 피크닉 분위기를 이어갔다.
1401000041.english: Fortunately, LRL, Melt, and Ellie naturally continued the enjoyable picnic atmosphere.

1401000042.korean: 흐냐앙… 가을이라서 그런가... 너무 나른해서 살짝 졸려요 주인님.
1401000042.english: Hnyaang… Is it because it’s autumn… I feel so lethargic and a little sleepy, Master.

1401000043.korean: 주인님 불끈 주사 한 방이면 정신이 확! 깰 것 같은데에… 히히.
1401000043.english: Master, I feel like one shot would snap you right back to reality... Hehe.

1401000044.english: ...I ended up bringing Poi, Melt's supervisor, along as well.

1401000045.korean: -안전이 확보된 지역 중 바다가 잘 보이는 언덕에 가지고 온 돗자리를 펴고 쉬기로 했다.
1401000045.english: We decided to spread out the mat we brought and rest on a hill overlooking the sea in a safe area.

1401000046.korean: 포이 님, 이 차 향이 좋은데 드실래요?
1401000046.english: Poi, this tea smells nice. Would you like some?

1401000047.korean: 으앗 뜨거! 이거 왜 이렇게 뜨거워?!
1401000047.english: Ow, that's hot! Why is this so hot?!

1401000048.english: Since it's cold, of course it's hot.

1401000050.korean: LRL 님, 손은 제대로 털고 드시는 거죠?
1401000050.english: LRL, you make sure to properly shake your hands before eating, right?

1401000051.korean: 당연히 깨끗하게 털었느니라! 그러니까 한 입… 흐헤헤에… 맛있어…
1401000051.english: Of course I cleaned it all out! So, one bite… Hehehe… Delicious…

1401000052.korean: -그렇게 간만의 휴식시간을 즐기는 대원들을 뒤로한 채 나는 멜트를 불러 옆에 앉혔다.
1401000052.english: Leaving the crew members behind to enjoy their long-awaited break, I called Melt over and had him sit next to me.

1401000057.korean: 『전 외로운 게 나아요 많은 분들을 제 손으로 죽였는 걸요』
1401000057.english: "I prefer being lonely. After all, I killed many people with my own hands."

1401000059.korean: -멜트는 대답 대신 마스크를 두 손으로 움켜쥐었다.
1401000059.english: Instead of answering, Melt clutched the mask with both hands.

1401000061.korean: 『잃고 싶지 않아요 마지막 인간님도 그리고 오르카에서 만난 모두도』
1401000061.english: "I don't want to lose the last human, and everyone I met in Orca."

1401000062.korean: -이윽고 멜트는 태블릿을 내려놓은 뒤, 나를 빤히 바라보다.
1401000062.english: Eventually, Melt put down the tablet and stared at me intently.

1401000064.korean: -눈을 붉게 물들였다. 순간이었지만 온몸의 감각이 뻣뻣하게 굳어버렸다.
1401000064.english: My eyes turned red. It was only for a moment, but all the senses in my body stiffened.

1401000066.korean: -동시에 멜트의 뒤로 손톱을 치켜 든 포이가 사납게 멜트 쪽으로 뛰어올랐다.
1401000066.english: At the same time, Poi, raising his claws behind Melt, leaped fiercely toward Melt.

1401000067.korean: -설마, 멜트가 정말 나를 조종하기 위해 이런 일을 벌였을까 의심이 들던 순간,
1401000067.english: Just as I began to suspect that Melt might have really done this to manipulate me,

1401000068.korean: -거대한 폭발과 함께 포이가 내 등 뒤의 AGS를 클로로 베었다.
1401000068.english: With a massive explosion, Poi slashed the AGS behind my back with his claw.

1401000069.korean: -폭발을 시작으로 무수한 AGS들이 나와 포이, 그리고 멜트와 대원들을 둘러쌌다.
1401000069.english: Starting with an explosion, countless AGS units emerged and surrounded Poi, Melt, and the crew.

1401000070.english: Master, step back behind me immediately!

1401000071.korean: -포이의 고함에 황급히 그녀의 뒤로 물러서면서도 이상한 기분이 들었다.
1401000071.english: As I hurriedly stepped back behind her at Poi's shout, I felt a strange sensation.

1401000072.korean: -어떻게, 이런 규모의 AGS가 오르카의 감시를 피해 내가 있던 곳에 도달 했을까?
1401000072.english: How did an AGS of this size manage to reach where I was, evading Orca's surveillance?

1401000073.english: The leaves are changing color, so shall we go on an outing?

1401000074.english: You must have felt stifled staying only on the Orca, right?

1401000075.english: Well then, I should go too.

1401000076.english: Do you want to come with Melt too?

1401000077.korean: 그럼. 오르카호에 합류하고 나서 첫 나들이잖아?
1401000077.english: Then. This is your first outing since joining the Orca, right?

1401000078.english: I really want to go with Melt.

1401000079.english: The scenery is nice, isn't it?

1401000080.english: Melt, do you want to sit closer?

1401000081.english: You've been careful enough so far.

1401000082.korean: 그렇게 혼자 있으면 정말 안 외로워?
1401000082.english: Aren't you really lonely being alone like that?

1401000083.english: Are you really worried that I might hurt you?

1401100001.english: There are 3 minutes left until the mock battle. Are you ready?

1401100002.korean: 우리가 호드보다 뛰어난 부대란 걸 달링한테 확실히 보여주자고.
1401100002.english: Let's make sure Darling that we are a superior unit to the Horde.

1401100003.korean: 우앗, 대장... 호드 언니들이랑 싸우는 건가요?
1401100003.english: Whoa, Captain... are you fighting the Horde sisters?

1401100004.korean: 정말로 싸우는 건 아니고, 적으로 가장해서 싸우는 거예요.
1401100004.english: We aren't actually fighting; we are fighting while pretending to be enemies.

1401100005.korean: 픽시도 복원했으니까 그간 짰던 포메이션에 변화도 생겼으니까요.
1401100005.english: Since Pixie has been restored, there have been changes to the formation I had been using.

1401100006.english: Are you all ready now, Pixie?

1401100008.english: You're really fired up, aren't you?

1401100009.korean: 언니들이랑 정식으로 합을 맞추는 건 처음이니까요.
1401100009.english: It’s because it’s the first time I’m officially working together with my older sisters.

1401100010.korean: 오늘을 위해서 제 화기도 단단히 정비해뒀…
1401100010.english: I've also thoroughly prepared my weapon for today…

1401100017.korean: 잠깐 모의전은 중지해야 할 것 같습니다. 대장.
1401100017.english: I think we need to pause the mock battle for a moment, Captain.

1401100018.english: Okay, I'll tell Khan that we'll start later.

1401100019.korean: 분명히 어제까지만 하더라도 부드럽게 장전 됐는데... 진짜 개같은 총!
1401100019.english: It definitely loaded smoothly just yesterday... This damn gun!

1401100020.korean: …픽시. 알비스가 옆에서 듣고 있는데. 좀 말을 가리는 건 어때요?
1401100020.english: … Pixie. Alvis is listening right next to you. Why don't you watch your words a little?

1401100021.english: ... I was planning to really push myself and fight hard today.

1401100022.korean: 급할 때 일수록 쉬어가란 말이 있어요. 천천히 하세요, 픽시.
1401100022.english: There's a saying that the more urgent the situation, the more you should take a break. Take it easy, Pixie.

1401100024.english: … Wait a minute! Pixie, lower your head!

1401100025.korean: 엇… 으아아아… 어라?! 방금 우리 맞은 편에서 탄이...!
1401100025.english: Uh... Aaaah... Huh?! Just now, Tan was right across from us...!

1401100026.english: What is this, is that a stray shot from the Horde?!

1401100028.english: Huh? C-Captain... What's with the sudden...

1401100029.korean: 탄이 날아온 쪽에서 AGS가 나타났어…! 발키리, 지휘부에서 사전 경고 같은 건 없었어?
1401100029.english: An AGS appeared from the direction the bullets came from…! Valkyrie, wasn't there any prior warning from command?

1401100030.english: I'll contact command right now… huh?

1401100032.korean: 이상하다… 분명 이 근방 모두에 위험 요소는 없다고 마리한테 들었는데?
1401100032.english: That's strange... I was sure Mari told me there were no dangers anywhere around here?

1401100033.english: Captain, there's an enemy up ahead!

1401100034.korean: 모의전이라 실탄을 충분히 가져오진 않았는데… 발키리, 일단 호드 애들한테 연락 좀 취해줘!
1401100034.english: It's just a mock battle, so I didn't bring enough live ammo... Valkyrie, please contact the Horde first!

1401100035.english: Understood. I will do my best.

1401100037.korean: 응? 진짜 적이 뜬금없이 나타날 거라곤 진짜 생각도 못했는데?
1401100037.english: Huh? I really didn't think a real enemy would show up out of the blue.

1401100038.korean: 대장, 발할라랑 모의전 하는 거 아니었어요?
1401100038.english: Captain, weren't you supposed to be having a mock battle with Valhalla?

1401100039.english: No matter how much I think about it, something feels off…

1401100040.korean: 일단 싸우고 봐야 할 것 같은데 대장?
1401100040.english: I think we'll have to fight first, Captain?

1401100041.korean: ...이런 수의 적이 어떻게 기척 없이 나타났지?
1401100041.english: ...How did such a number of enemies appear without a sound?

1401100042.korean: 큰일났어요 대장! 지금 발할라랑 지휘부에 연락이 닿질 않아요!
1401100042.english: We're in big trouble, Captain! We can't get in touch with Valhalla or Command right now!

1401100043.english: Is that true?! I'm in big trouble...

1401100044.english: ...Everyone, follow me swiftly and break through the encirclement!

1401100046.korean: (그런데 눈 앞의 적... 너무 익숙한 기분이야.)
1401100046.english: (But the enemy right in front of me... it feels so familiar.)

1401100047.korean: 닥터, 레이더망에 갑자기 적 출현이라니… 이게 무슨 일이죠?
1401100047.english: Doctor, an enemy suddenly appearing on the radar... What's going on?

1401100048.english: I'm still figuring it out right now, too, unnie...

1401100049.korean: 분명 며칠 전 정찰에선 안전하단 보고가 올라왔었는데… 주인님이 하필 자리를 비우실 때…!
1401100049.english: The reconnaissance report from a few days ago definitely said it was safe… but of all times, it had to be when the Master was away…!

1401100050.korean: 어떻게 말도 안 되는 공격이 가능한 거야?
1401100050.english: How is such a ridiculous attack possible?

1401100051.korean: 닥터, 다른 지휘관들도 전부 연락이 안 되나요?
1401100051.english: Doctor, are you unable to contact any of the other commanders either?

1401100052.korean: 누군가 순식간에 통신 방화벽을 무너뜨렸어, 연산량이 너무 빨라. 바이오로이드 속도는 아닌 것 같아…
1401100052.english: Someone breached the communication firewall in an instant; the computation speed is too fast. It doesn't seem like the speed of a bioroid...

1401100053.korean: 도와드릴 일이 있다면 말씀해주세요! 지금 주인님의 안전이 위험하니...
1401100053.english: Please let me know if there is anything I can help you with! Your safety is at risk right now, Master...

1401100056.korean: …사령관님이 가신 쪽으로 AGS들이 몰려간단 팬텀의 보고가 있었어요.
1401100056.english: … There was a report from Phantom that the AGS units were swarming toward the direction the Commander went.

1401100057.korean: 갑자기 대량의 적이 순간이동 되듯 나타난 건 상식적으로 말이 되지 않아…
1401100057.english: It doesn't make sense logically that a massive number of enemies suddenly appeared as if they were teleported...

1401100059.korean: 이렇게 대규모 AGS가 출몰했다면 분명 레이더든, 뭐든 사전에 걸렸을 거야.
1401100059.english: If such a large-scale AGS had appeared, it would surely have been detected by radar or something beforehand.

1401100060.korean: 그렇죠. 분명 며칠 전까진 안전한 걸 확인했으니까요.
1401100060.english: That's right. Because I definitely confirmed that it was safe until a few days ago.

1401100061.korean: 저도 닥터 의견에 동의해요. 순식간에 AGS가 일제히 나타났다는 건 말이 안 돼요.
1401100061.english: I agree with the Doctor's opinion as well. It doesn't make sense that the AGS appeared all at once in an instant.

1401100062.korean: 생각해보면 오메가가 이런 말도 안 되는 병력을 밑도 끝도 없이 보낼 리는 없어요.
1401100062.english: Come to think of it, there is no way Omega would send such a ridiculous force out of nowhere.

1401100063.korean: ...잠깐, 이런 짓을 할 수 있는 게 누군지 알 것 같아요.
1401100063.english: ...Wait, I think I know who could do something like this.

1401100065.korean: 지금 동시다발적으로 나타났다는 적이... 진짜 적이 아니라 정교한 홀로그램이라면 설명 되죠.
1401100065.english: It makes sense if the enemies that just appeared simultaneously... aren't real enemies but sophisticated holograms.

1401100066.korean: 이건 제 추측이지만... 제타 쪽에서 벌인 짓 같아요.
1401100066.english: This is just my guess, but... I think Zeta did this.

1401200001.english: (I hate it… I hate it now, not anymore…)

1401200002.english: (I... wasn't created to be this kind of bioroid.)

1401200003.english: (For the comfortable nights of humans… Therapy Bio-roid…)

1401200005.korean: 멜트, 회장님의 다음 지시 사항이야. 회장님에게 반대하는 상원위원을 조종하라는 임무다.
1401200005.english: Melt, here is the Chairman's next instruction. Your mission is to manipulate the senator who opposes the Chairman.

1401200007.english: Stop whining and get ready for the mission.

1401200008.english: … I wasn’t created to do this.

1401200011.korean: 네 능력을 쓰기 싫으면 말해. 폐기하고 다른 개체를 만들면 그만이니까.
1401200011.english: If you don't want to use your ability, just say so. I can simply discard it and create another entity.

1401200013.korean: …앞으로 몇 명의 인간님들을 제 능력으로 망가뜨려야 하나요?
1401200013.english: … How many more humans do I have to ruin with my abilities?

1401200014.english: Then, shall I ask you just one thing?

1401200015.korean: 하기 싫다고 찡찡거려서 폐기당한 애들을 몇 명이나 봐왔었지, 멜트?
1401200015.english: How many kids have you seen get discarded for whining they didn't want to do it, Melt?

1401200017.english: Melt slumped onto the ground and gasped for breath.

1401200018.korean: 감히… 우리 주인님을 일부러 위험에 빠트린 거야?!
1401200018.english: How dare you… deliberately put my master in danger?!

1401200019.english: For a brief moment… I believed in you!

1401200020.english: Master... but isn't this just the perfect situation?

1401200021.korean: -물론 지금 상황을 판단해 보았을 때 상황이 의심스러운 건 사실이다.
1401200021.english: Of course, judging by the current situation, it is true that it is suspicious.

1401200022.korean: -멜트와 함께 오르카 호의 바깥을 나서자 오메가의 AGS가 출몰했다, 그리고 긴급 통신 또한 먹통이었다.
1401200022.english: As we stepped outside the Orca with Melt, Omega's AGS appeared, and emergency communications were also cut off.

1401200023.korean: -멜트가 오메가와 내통하고 있다는 정황이 될 수도 있었지만, 말이 되지 않는 부분들이 많다.
1401200023.english: It could have been a sign that Melt was colluding with Omega, but there are many parts that don't make sense.

1401200027.korean: 주인님, 언니들한테 연락이 안 돼요… 어떻게 하죠?
1401200027.english: Master, I can't get in touch with the sisters... What should I do?

1401200028.korean: -말은 그렇게 했지만 이 수많은 적을 포이 혼자서 뚫을 수 없었다.
1401200028.english: He said that, but Poi alone could not break through these numerous enemies.

1401200029.korean: 사령관님… 시라유리 언니나 닥터한테도 연락이 닿질 않아요.
1401200029.english: Commander... I can't get in touch with Shirayuri or the Doctor either.

1401200030.korean: -별다른 방법이 떠오르진 않던 그때, 멜트가 태블릿에 글씨를 써 우리에게 보여주었다.
1401200030.english: Just when no particular solution came to mind, Melt wrote on a tablet and showed it to us.

1401200031.english: Are you wearing earplugs? Please make sure to block them.

1401200032.korean: -갑자기 왜 귀마개를 꼈나는 질문도 잠시, 멜트는 후들거리는 다리를 이끌고 포이의 앞에 섰다.
1401200032.english: The question of why he was suddenly wearing earplugs was brief, and Melt stood in front of Poi, dragging his trembling legs.

1401200033.english: What are you trying to do, Melt?

1401200034.korean: -포이의 질문에도 멜트는 아랑곳하지 않은 채 손가락으로 우리의 귀를 가리켰다.
1401200034.english: Melt pointed his finger at our ears, paying no heed to Foy's question.

1401200035.korean: -멜트의 수신호에 모두 귀를 막자 그녀는 마스크를 개방한 뒤 외쳤다.
1401200035.english: As everyone covered their ears at Melt's hand signal, she opened her mask and shouted.

1401200038.english: It is a shock that makes my head ring, even though I am wearing earplugs.

1401200039.korean: -멜트의 공격을 받은 AGS들의 불빛들이 심하게 깜빡거리다 이내, 회로가 터졌다.
1401200039.english: The lights of the AGS units attacked by Melt flickered violently, and soon, the circuits exploded.

1401200041.english: Sister, snap out of it! Ugh... I feel dizzy...

1401200043.english: With Melt's voice, the AGS that surrounded us were neutralized.

1401200045.english: … Melt. You… blood at the corner of your mouth?

1401200048.korean: -하지만 역부족이었다. 단 둘이서 이렇게나 많은 적을 상대할 순 없다. 어떻게든 오르카에 이 상황을 알려야 했다.
1401200048.english: However, it was not enough. The two of us couldn't face this many enemies alone. We had to somehow inform Orca of the situation.

1401200049.english: Yes, Commander. Just say the word!

1401200050.english: Okay! I'll let the people outside know!

1401200053.english: The waiting AGSs soon rushed at us.

1401200054.english: Master, I sent Ellie out safely!

1401200056.korean: -여태껏 보지 못했던 규모의 적들을 본 LRL의 다리가 후들거렸다.
1401200056.english: LRL's legs trembled at the sight of enemies of a scale never seen before.

1401200057.korean: -LRL을 꼭 끌어안자, 멜트와 포이는 등을 맞대 선 후 AGS들과 대치했다.
1401200057.english: As they hugged LLR tightly, Melt and Poi stood back-to-back and confronted the AGSs.

1401200059.korean: -멜트는 대답 대신 귀를 가리켰다. 나와 포이, 그리고 LRL이 귀마개를 틀어막자, 멜트가 그제야 입을 열었다.
1401200059.english: Melt pointed to his ears instead of answering. Only after Poi, LRL, and I covered our ears with earplugs did Melt finally speak.

1401200060.korean: 지금 제 목소리는... 강제로 제 목소리 출력을 극대화 시킨 상태에요.
1401200060.english: Right now, my voice... is in a state where I have forcibly maximized my voice output.

1401200061.korean: 어느 정도 AGS의 회로는 무력화시킬 수 있을 거예요.
1401200061.english: You will be able to neutralize the AGS circuit to some extent.

1401200062.korean: -멜트는 어지러워하면서도 애써 몸을 일으킨 뒤 외쳤다.
1401200062.english: Melt struggled to sit up despite feeling dizzy, then shouted.

1401200066.korean: 마음만 먹으면 얼마든지 멜트는 날 제거했어.
1401200066.english: If he set his mind to it, Melt could have eliminated me anytime.

1401200067.korean: 이렇게 요란한 일을 벌일 리는 없단 거야.
1401200067.english: There is no way they would cause such a commotion.

1401200069.english: I have no choice but to force my way through.

1401200072.english: Ellie, I'm sorry, but do I need to ask you a favor?

1401200073.english: Escape and let the Orca know about this.

1401200074.english: Poi takes care of the enemies attacking Ellie.

1401200075.english: Melt… will you neutralize the AGS?

1401300001.english: The Girl Who Walks at Night

1401300002.english: It was the name of the Melt Project.

1401300003.korean: 내가 처음 눈을 떴을 땐 나를 기획했던 연구원은 없었다.
1401300003.english: When I first opened my eyes, the researcher who had planned me was gone.

1401300004.korean: 나중에 듣기론… 정부 쪽에 내가 양산되는 것을 고발하려다 돌아가셨다.
1401300004.english: I heard later... that he passed away while trying to report to the government that I was being mass-produced.

1401300005.korean: 회장님들의 의도 대로 인간님들을 세뇌하는 임무에 투입되었다.
1401300005.english: I was deployed on a mission to brainwash the humans as intended by the chairmen.

1401300007.korean: 인간님들은 내가 만든 꿈 속에서 죽어갔다.
1401300007.english: Humans died in the dream I created.

1401300008.korean: 내 현실에서 벗어날 꿈을 찾고 싶었다.
1401300008.english: I wanted to find a dream to escape my reality.

1401300009.english: I thought that was my paradise.

1401300011.korean: 죽은 인간님들은 꿈 속에서 나를 괴롭혔다.
1401300011.english: The dead humans tormented me in my dreams.

1401300016.english: Melt instinctively looked for the tablet.

1401300017.korean: -나는 멜트에게 입술을 가리켰다. 떨리는 손으로 멜트는 마스크를 확인하자 작게 한숨쉬었다.
1401300017.english: I pointed to Melt's lips. Melt let out a small sigh as he checked the mask with trembling hands.

1401300018.english: Is it really... okay... to say this?

1401300020.korean: -훌쩍거리던 멜트는 내 품에 달려들어 꼭 안겼다.
1401300020.english: Melt, who had been sniffling, ran into my arms and hugged me tightly.

1401300021.korean: 흐윽… 으읍… 사령관님, 감사해요… 정말, 사령관이랑 이렇게 말하고 싶었어요.
1401300021.english: *Sob*... *Mmm*... Thank you, Commander... I really wanted to say this to you.

1401300022.korean: 아녜요 사령관님… 제가 사령관님이었어도 그러셨을 것 같아요…
1401300022.english: No, Commander... I think I would have done the same if I were you...

1401300023.english: … Reality was stifling, and dreams were scary.

1401300024.korean: 사는 것 자체가 너무 힘들고 저주스러웠어요.
1401300024.english: Life itself was so hard and cursed.

1401300025.korean: 지금 이건... 제 꿈일까요… 아님 제 현실일까요 사령관님?
1401300025.english: Is this... my dream... or my reality, Commander?

1401300026.korean: -그렇게 말한 뒤, 나는 멜트에게 카드를 건네주었다. 정식으로 오르카의 대원임을 증명하는 인식증이었다.
1401300026.english: After saying that, I handed the card to Melt. It was an identification card proving that he was officially a member of Orca.

1401300027.english: … Really, am I allowed to accept this?

1401300031.korean: -그리고 나는 그제야 멜트의 이야기를 들을 수 있었다.
1401300031.english: And only then was I able to hear Melt's story.

1401300032.korean: -멜트는 정부 측에서 생산 허가를 받지 못했고, 펙스의 은밀한 일을 수행하기 위해 양산형으로 생산되었다.
1401300032.english: - Melt did not receive production approval from the government and was mass-produced to carry out Pex's covert operations.

1401300033.korean: -고급 개체도 아니었고 안전성은 고려하지 않았기에 양산된 멜트는 움직이는 마약이나 다름 없었다.
1401300033.english: It was not a high-quality product, and since safety was not considered, the mass-produced Melt was no different from a moving drug.

1401300034.korean: -정부 요인을 폐인으로 만들거나 암살하는데 썼으며 세상에 드러나선 안 되었기에 멜트는 일회용품 쓰듯 이용되었다.
1401300034.english: It was used to ruin or assassinate government officials, and since it had to remain hidden from the world, Melt was used like a disposable item.

1401300035.korean: -멜트는 자신의 일에 최선을 다하고, 자부심을 가진 성격으로 설계되었다.
1401300035.english: Melt was designed to have a personality that does his best at his work and takes pride in it.

1401300036.korean: -그래야 인간을 확실히 세뇌시킬 수 있었기 때문이었다.
1401300036.english: It was because that was the only way to definitely brainwash humans.

1401300037.korean: -그렇게 임무 수행 과정 중, 인간들을 망가뜨렸다는 죄책감에 시달리는 개체들도 여지 없이 폐기되었다.
1401300037.english: In this way, during the course of the mission, individuals tormented by guilt over having ruined humans were also discarded without exception.

1401300038.korean: …인간님들이 멸망했다고 들었을 때는 오히려 좋았어요. 이제 더는 인간님들을 안 망가뜨려도 되는구나.
1401300038.english: … When I heard that humans had perished, I was actually glad. I thought, ‘Now I don’t have to ruin humans anymore.’

1401300039.korean: 하지만 제타 님은 절 가만히 놔두지 않으셨죠.
1401300039.english: But Zeta didn't leave me alone.

1401300040.korean: …사령관님을 세뇌시키란 명령을 듣고 결국 이곳에 잠입했어요.
1401300040.english: … I infiltrated this place after receiving orders to brainwash the commander.

1401300041.korean: 사령관님을 세뇌시킬 기회도 많았죠. 제가 마음을 독하게… 먹었다면요.
1401300041.english: There were plenty of opportunities to brainwash the Commander. If only I had hardened my mind...

1401300042.korean: 하지만 절대 그럴 수 없었어요. 사령관님을 모시는 오르카 대원 분들은 행복했어요.
1401300042.english: But that was absolutely impossible. The Orca members serving the Commander were happy.

1401300043.english: You were living a truly sweet reality.

1401300044.korean: …인간님들을 따르던 바이오로이드 분들의 행복도 제가 모조리 짓밟아버렸는데.
1401300044.english: … I completely trampled on the happiness of the bioroids who followed the humans, too.

1401300045.korean: 사령관님까지 세뇌시키고 싶진 않았어요. 이젠 이런 삶은… 싫었어요.
1401300045.english: I didn't want to brainwash even the Commander. I didn't want a life like this anymore...

1401300046.english: … And I wanted to follow the Commander.

1401300047.korean: 더는 겁쟁이 같이 도망치고, 혼자 덜덜 떨고 싶지 않았어요.
1401300047.english: I didn't want to run away like a coward and tremble alone anymore.

1401300048.korean: -멜트가 펙스 세력의 첩자였던 것은 사실이었지만, 그녀는 자신의 의지로 명령을 거부했다.
1401300048.english: It was true that Melt was a spy for the Pex forces, but she refused the order of her own free will.

1401300049.english: I'm happy... I wish this time would last forever.

1401300050.korean: -나는 멜트가 깨어나면 건네달라는 LRL의 편지를 멜트에게 주었다.
1401300050.english: I gave Melt the letter from LRL asking me to hand it over when Melt wakes up.

1401300052.korean: 악룡의 속박에서 깨어났으니, 제 진짜 이름을 정해주었다고 하네요?
1401300052.english: Now that I've awakened from the evil dragon's bondage, they say they've given me a real name?

1401300054.english: They say it's a devil that gives people sweet dreams?

1401300055.korean: 네... 원래 제 목적은 인간님들의 달콤한 숙면을 도와주는 바이오로이드로 설계되었으니까요.
1401300055.english: Yes... my original purpose was to be designed as a bioroid that helps humans get a sweet, restful sleep.

1401300056.korean: -그러고보니, 요즘 대원들 사이에서 새로운 아쿠아랜드 시설을 원하는 것 같았다.
1401300056.english: Come to think of it, it seemed like the members wanted a new Aqualand facility these days.

1401300059.english: Which dream… are you talking about?

1401300060.english: Um, can I really do this?

1401300063.english: I'm looking forward to it, Commander.

1401300065.english: I asked the doctor to fix the mask perfectly.

1401300071.korean: 앞으로 네가 누릴 수 있는 현실.
1401300071.english: The reality you can enjoy in the future.

1401300072.korean: 그럼, 오르카에 온 걸 환영해. 멜트.
1401300072.english: Well then, welcome to Orca. Melt.

1401300073.korean: 멜트, 그럼 이제 다시 얘기 해볼까?
1401300073.english: Melt, then shall we talk again?

1401300075.english: How is it here right now?

1401300076.korean: 참, 멜트. LRL이 쓴 편지야. 읽어볼래?
1401300076.english: Oh, by the way, Melt. It's a letter written by LRL. Want to read it?

1401300079.english: Exactly what kind of devil is it?

1401300082.english: Wouldn't you like to work at the new facility?

1401300083.english: I'll make your true dream come true.

1401300085.korean: 멜트가 직접 맡아서 해줄 수 있어?
1401300085.english: Can Melt take charge of it himself?

1401300086.english: I'll make it for you right away if you want.

1401300087.english: There are a lot of fun friends too.

1401300089.korean: 다들 착하니까 친해질 수 있을 거야.
1401300089.english: Everyone is nice, so you'll be able to become friends.

1401400001.korean: -멜트의 병문안을 뒤로 한 뒤, 사령관실로 돌아왔을 때는 닥터와 알파가 대기하고 있었다.
1401400001.english: After leaving Melt's hospital visit behind, when I returned to the commander's office, the Doctor and Alpha were waiting.

1401400002.english: Brother, I was looking for it anyway.

1401400003.korean: 멜트 언니 마스크 덮개 고치다가, 이상한 걸 좀 찾았거든?
1401400003.english: While fixing Melt's mask cover, I found something weird.

1401400004.korean: -닥터는 주머니를 뒤적거리더니 이내 내게 무언가를 건네주었다.
1401400004.english: The doctor rummaged through his pockets and soon handed me something.

1401400005.english: It was a chip with the Bismarck Corporation logo on it.

1401400007.korean: 멜트 언니 목소리가 촉각 신경을 건드리는 능력이 있는 건 알지?
1401400007.english: You know Melt's voice has the ability to stimulate tactile nerves, right?

1401400008.korean: 의도적으로 안전 장치도 없앤 걸 모자라, 증폭 장치까지 추가로 붙였다는 건…
1401400008.english: The fact that they not only intentionally removed the safety device but also added an amplification device is…

1401400009.korean: -확실하게 날 세뇌하거나 암살하기 위한 의도로 밖에 보이지 않았다.
1401400009.english: It certainly looked like nothing more than an intention to brainwash or assassinate me.

1401400010.korean: 강화 인간이나 바이오로이드를 완전히 세뇌시킬 정도까지 출력을 높였어.
1401400010.english: I increased the output to the point where I could completely brainwash enhanced humans or bioroids.

1401400011.korean: 이거… 당하는 사람도 사람이지만, 사용자한테까지 큰 부담을 주게 만든 물건이야.
1401400011.english: This... it's a product that places a huge burden not only on the person suffering from it but also on the user.

1401400012.korean: 애초부터 목적부터가 불순했는데… 제타가 쓸데없이 멜트를 배려할 이유는 없죠.
1401400012.english: The purpose was impure from the start... so there is no reason for Zeta to needlessly be considerate of Melt.

1401400013.korean: 침입한 쪽에서 데이터들을 모두 삭제한 것 같은데... 어느 정도 복구해볼게, 오빠.
1401400013.english: It looks like the intruders deleted all the data... I'll try to recover some of it, oppa.

1401400014.korean: 저한테 따로 시키실 일은 있으신가요, 주인님?
1401400014.english: Is there anything else you would like me to do, Master?

1401400015.korean: 워낙 비밀스러운 애라 정보를 남겼을 진 모르겠지만… 최대한 찾아서 보내드릴게요.
1401400015.english: Since he is such a secretive person, I'm not sure if he left any information... but I will try my best to find it and send it to you.

1401400017.english: What kind of facility would you like to build?

1401400018.english: I want to portray the reality that Melt has always longed for.

1401400019.korean: 생각해보니 보련이 풀지 못한 부분은 멜트가 풀어줄 수 있겠군요.
1401400019.english: Come to think of it, Melt could solve the parts that Boryeon couldn't.

1401400020.korean: 네, 알겠습니다 주인님. 건설에 쓰일 자원을 분배할게요.
1401400020.english: Yes, I understand, Master. I will distribute the resources to be used for construction.

1401400021.english: And so, the incident that unfolded with Melt joining came to a close.

1401400023.korean: 닥터 님께선 더 있으라곤 하셨지만… 조만간 괜찮아지면 바로 나갈 것 같아요.
1401400023.english: The doctor told me to stay longer, but... I think I'll leave as soon as I feel better.

1401400024.korean: 그나저나 의외인데? 내가 상상한 멜트 목소리는 이런 게 아니었는데.
1401400024.english: Anyway, that's unexpected. The Melt voice I imagined wasn't like this.

1401400025.english: What kind of voice were you imagining?

1401400026.english: A slightly elegant vibe, like Lilith?

1401400027.korean: 아직 제대로 듣진 못했지만… 아름다우신 목소리를 가지셨나 보네요.
1401400027.english: I haven't heard it properly yet, but... it seems you have a beautiful voice.

1401400028.korean: 그나저나 멜트, 진짜 궁금한데… 정말 눈으로 최면을 걸 수 있는 거야?
1401400028.english: By the way, Melt, I'm really curious... can you really hypnotize someone with your eyes?

1401400029.english: Hmm... Yes. But why are you acting like this?

1401400030.korean: 포이한테 한 번만 걸어줄 수 있어? 어떤 느낌인지 궁금해.
1401400030.english: Can you give Poi a call just once? I'm curious what it feels like.

1401400031.korean: 최면 상태가 되면 무의식적인 행동이 나올 수도 있는데... 괜찮으시겠어요?
1401400031.english: Unconscious behaviors might occur when you are under hypnosis... Are you sure you'll be okay with that?

1401400032.korean: 한 번만 걸려보고 싶어! 멜트는 이제 우리 편이니까 안 위험하잖아?
1401400032.english: I just want to get caught once! Melt is on our side now, so it's not dangerous, right?

1401400033.english: … Okay. I’ll bet a safe amount.

1401400034.korean: -멜트가 쓸 수 있는 테라피실이 생겼다는 말을 전하기 위해 입원실의 문을 열었다.
1401400034.english: I opened the door to the hospital room to tell Melt that a therapy room he could use had become available.

1401400035.korean: -노크하고 문을 열자, 내 눈에 보이는 것은...
1401400035.english: I knocked and opened the door, and what I saw was...

1401400038.english: Master♥ Let's hurry up and do that!

1401400040.korean: -순식간에 포이는 치마 아래서 무언가를 벗곤 내 입 안으로 쑤셔 넣었다.
1401400040.english: In an instant, Poi took something off under her skirt and shoved it into my mouth.

1401400042.korean: 죄송해요 사령관님… 포이님이 최면을 걸어달라 하셔서 살짝만 걸었는데… 이렇게 폭주하실 줄은…
1401400042.english: I'm sorry, Commander... Poi asked me to hypnotize you, so I only did a light one... I didn't expect you to go berserk like this...

1401400043.korean: -이게 대체 무슨 상황인가 파악할 겨를도 없이 포이는 내 바지를 한 번에 내려버렸다.
1401400043.english: Before I could even figure out what on earth was going on, Poi pulled my pants down in one go.

1401400046.korean: 잡아먹는 게 아냐… 잠깐만 얌전히 있으면 금방 끝나… 헤헤… 주인님…
1401400046.english: I'm not going to eat you... Just stay still for a moment and it'll be over soon... Hehe... Master...

1401400048.korean: 주인님께선 바이오로이드에게 포상을 내린다... 오르카의 상식이잖아요?
1401400048.english: The Master bestows rewards upon the Bio-roids... That's Orca's common sense, isn't it?

1401400050.korean: 주인님… 멜트도 주인님의 그걸 궁금해 하더라고요…♥
1401400050.english: Master... Melt was curious about your... thing too... ♥

1401400051.english: Corn...! Let's see the corn, Master!

1401400052.english: Hmph... Haa... That is the Commander's...

1401400053.english: Nyaaah… Master… ♥ Poi is so happy… ♥

1401400054.korean: 크고… 늠름해… 옥수수라고 하기엔 너무 커…
1401400054.english: It's big... and majestic... too big to be called corn...

1401400055.english: It's incredibly big, thick... heavy... and hard...

1401400056.korean: -멜트는 감탄사를 내뱉으며 주저앉아 포이와 나를 지켜보았다.
1401400056.english: Melt let out an exclamation of admiration, slumped down, and watched Poi and me.

1401400057.korean: -나는 결국 포이의 최면이 풀릴 때까지 그녀를 열심히 달래주어야만 했다.
1401400057.english: In the end, I had to work hard to soothe Poi until the hypnosis wore off.

1401400058.korean: -가쁜 숨을 쉬며 이 행위를 관음하는 멜트의 시선이 너무도 뜨거웠다.
1401400058.english: Melt's gaze, as he watched this act while breathing heavily, was intensely hot.

1401400059.korean: 냐앙… 한 번 더어… 한 번 더어… 냐앙… 포이는 아직 부족해요...
1401400059.english: Meow… One more time… One more time… Meow… Poi still isn't enough...

1401400060.korean: -...멜트가 오르카에 대해 절대로 오해하지 않았으면 좋겠다.

1401400065.english: So you sent Melt to hurt me?

1401400066.korean: 닥터, 혹시 수거한 드론 좀 분석할 수 있어?
1401400066.english: Doctor, by any chance, can you analyze the recovered drone?

1401400067.english: Thank you. I'd appreciate it if you could do a little extra work for me.

1401400068.korean: 제타에 대한 데이터를 더 보내줄 수 있어?
1401400068.english: Can you send me more data about Zeta?

1401400069.korean: 아, 그리고 한 가지 더 있는데.
1401400069.english: Oh, and there's one more thing.

1401400070.english: I want to build facilities at Aqualand...

1401400071.english: A therapy room operated by Melt.

1401400073.english: Melt, may I come in by any chance?

1401400074.english: Poi, what's wrong all of a sudden?

1401500001.korean: 악마여, 그리고 하얀 야수여. 짐과 함께 안드바리의 창고를 탐험할 준비를 마쳤는가?
1401500001.english: O Devil, and O White Beast. Are you ready to explore Andvari's warehouse with Jim?

1401500002.korean: 후후, 진조여. 당신의 은혜에 보답하기 위해서라도 이 악마는 준비가 되었어요.
1401500002.english: Hahaha, True Ancestor. This demon is ready, if only to repay your kindness.

1401500003.korean: 우와... 멜트 언니 목소리 엄청 부드러워!
1401500003.english: Wow... Melt's voice is so soft!

1401500004.korean: 하얀 야수여, 악룡으로부터 해방한 악마의 진정한 힘은 대단하기 그지 없었도다.
1401500004.english: O White Beast, the true power of the demon freed from the evil dragon was beyond compare.

1401500005.korean: 들었어 나도… 멜트 언니가 우아아아아아! 소리지르니까 적들이 다 쓰러졌다면서?
1401500005.english: I heard that, too... I heard that all the enemies fell down when Melt screamed, "Waaahhhh!"

1401500006.english: It's not that bad, Mr. Alvis.

1401500007.korean: LRL 양. 죄송하지만 멜트씨와 할 말이 있는데 이야기 좀 나눠도 될까요?
1401500007.english: Miss LRL. I'm sorry to bother you, but I have something to talk to Mr. Melt about. May we talk for a moment?

1401500008.english: Hmm... do I really have to do it?

1401500012.korean: 혹시 저번 일 때문에 그러신 건가요? 포이 님께 최면을 걸면 안 됐었는데…
1401500012.english: Did you do that because of what happened last time? I shouldn't have hypnotized Poi...

1401500013.korean: 포이에 대해 아시는 게 있으신가요, 멜트 씨?
1401500013.english: Do you know anything about Poi, Mr. Melt?

1401500014.korean: 아뇨, 포이 님이 저한테 얘기는 안 하셨어요.

1401500015.korean: 포이도 당신과 비슷하게 폐기 됐던 제 자매에요.
1401500015.english: Poi is my sister who was discarded just like you.

1401500017.korean: 멸망 전 인간님들께 인기 있었던 모델인 저희들과 다르게 포이는 과한 성욕 때문에 폐기되었죠.
1401500017.english: Unlike us, who were popular models among humans before the apocalypse, Poi was discarded due to excessive sexual desire.

1401500019.korean: 다시 생각해보면 우리 자매의 아픈 손가락이에요.
1401500019.english: Come to think of it, she is my sister's sore spot.

1401500021.korean: 아시다시피 저흰 주인님을 가까이서 경호하는 경호부대에요.
1401500021.english: As you know, we are a security unit that protects the Master from close range.

1401500022.korean: 멜트 님께 감시역을 붙였던 것도, 그리고… 의심이 들면 죽이라고 말했던 것도 저였고요.
1401500022.english: It was me who assigned a surveillance agent to Melt, and... it was also me who told him to kill anyone he suspected.

1401500023.english: Because that is the duty of a companion to guard the master.

1401500024.korean: 이해해요. 제가 워낙 안 좋은 일에 쓰였다보니 그 정도 의심이 드는 건 마찬가지에요.
1401500024.english: I understand. Since I was used for such bad purposes, it is only natural for me to have that level of suspicion.

1401500025.korean: 멸망 전에도 다른 바이오로이드 분들께 미움만 받았던 걸요.
1401500025.english: Even before the apocalypse, I was only hated by the other bioroids.

1401500027.korean: 포이가 우리 자매들 말고 친구가 생긴 건 이번이 처음이에요. 멜트 님에 대해 많이 이야기하더군요.
1401500027.english: This is the first time Poi has made a friend other than us sisters. She talked a lot about Melt.

1401500029.korean: 멜트 씨는 포이를 친구라고 생각 안 하셨나요?
1401500029.english: Didn't you consider Foy a friend, Mr. Melt?

1401500030.english: The thing is, my friend... is... I...

1401500031.korean: 포이가 자기 입으로 친하게 지내고 싶다 했는데… 멜트 님은 아니신가 보군요?
1401500031.english: Poi said himself that he wanted to be close with me... but I guess that doesn't apply to you, Melt?

1401500032.korean: 아, 아녜요! 포이 님도 좋은 분이세요… 단지, 그런 이야기는 처음 들어서…
1401500032.english: Oh, no! Poi is a good person too... It's just that, it's the first time I've heard something like that...

1401500034.korean: 포이랑 같이 주인님을 지켜주셔서 정말 감사드려요.
1401500034.english: Thank you so much for protecting Master together with Poi.

1401500035.korean: 감사 받으려고 한 건 아니에요! 인사까지는 안 하셔도…
1401500035.english: I didn't do it to expect thanks! You don't have to go as far as saying hello…

1401500036.korean: 정식으로 사과드릴게요. 멜트씨를 지나치게 의심해 민감하게 대했어요.
1401500036.english: I would like to formally apologize. I was overly suspicious of Mr. Melt and treated him sensitively.

1401500037.korean: 해야 할 일을 했을 뿐인데… 그리고 충분히 이해해요.
1401500037.english: I just did what I had to do... and I fully understand.

1401500038.korean: 그러고보니, 요즘 제 동생들이 여러가지 일을 해서 피곤하다고 하더군요.
1401500038.english: Come to think of it, my younger siblings have been saying they are tired lately because they have been doing various things.

1401500039.korean: 조만간 아쿠아랜드에 멜트 씨를 위한 테라피 치료실이 생긴다고 하던데…
1401500039.english: I heard that a therapy room for Mr. Melt is opening at Aqualand soon...

1401500040.korean: 한 번 들려서... 제 동생들 피로를 풀어주실 수 있으신가요, 멜트님?
1401500040.english: Could you stop by... and relieve my younger siblings' fatigue, Melt?

1401500042.korean: 하하… 역시... 좀 그렇죠? 마음에 안 내키신다면… 어쩔…
1401500042.english: Haha… As expected… it’s a bit much, isn’t it? If you’re not in the mood… what can I do…

1401500043.korean: 언제든지요. 꼭, 오실 수 있으신 거죠?
1401500043.english: Anytime. You can definitely come, right?

1401500044.english: Hehe... I'll be looking forward to it, Mr. Melt.

1401500045.korean: 우우… 멜트, 무슨 말 한 거야? 리리스가 막 혼냈어?
1401500045.english: Ugh... Melt, what did you say? Did Lilith just scold you?

1401500048.korean: 휴우… 다행이니라. 짐은 악마의 표정이 어두워서 또 엄~ 청 혼나는 줄 알았느니라.
1401500048.english: Phew... What a relief. The devil's expression was so grim that I thought I was going to get scolded really, really hard again.

1401500049.korean: LRL 님, 하나 궁금한 게 있어요.

1401500050.english: Huh? What are you curious about?

1401500051.korean: LRL 님이 말한 악룡은 뭐예요? 드래곤 슬레이어에 나오나요?
1401500051.english: What is the evil dragon LRL mentioned? Does it appear in Dragon Slayer?

1401500052.korean: 으음, 사악한 용들이 섬기는 용의 대장이로다, 아 참... 그 대장의 이름이 니... 니… 으음… 니…
1401500052.english: Hmm, he is the captain of the dragons served by the evil dragons. Ah right... that captain's name is Ni... Ni... Hmm... Ni...

1401500053.korean: 니드호그요? 후훗, 그 분은 제가 어느 정도 알고 있죠.
1401500053.english: Nidhogg? Heh heh, I know him to some extent.

1401500054.korean: 악마… 그 악룡과 정말 친했던 것이냐…?
1401500054.english: Demon… were you really close with that evil dragon…?

1401500055.korean: 그거 아시나요? 사실 니드호그를 수하로 부리는 무서운… 으음, 여왕 하나가 더 있단 사실이요.
1401500055.english: Did you know? Actually, there is another scary… um, queen who commands Nidhogg.

1401500056.korean: 그럴 수가?! 니드호그를 수하로 부리는… 악룡의 존재가 더 있었단 말이냐?
1401500056.english: How could this be?! Are you saying there were more evil dragons... commanding Nidhogg as a subordinate?

1401500057.korean: ...아주 무서운 용일지도 모르죠. 마음이 없고, 아주 차가운… 악룡의 여왕이요.
1401500057.english: ...It might be a very fearsome dragon. Heartless, very cold… the Queen of Evil Dragons.

1401500058.korean: 짐이 드래곤 슬레이어에서 본 건 용의 마녀 뿐이었는데… 악룡의 여왕이란 자는 정말 무서운 존재로구나…
1401500058.english: The only thing I saw in Dragon Slayer was the Dragon Witch… The Queen of Evil Dragons is truly a terrifying being…

1401500059.korean: 엥? 진짜 멜트 언니 드래곤 슬레이어에 나오는 악마였어?!
1401500059.english: Huh? Was Melt really a demon from Dragon Slayer?!

1401500060.korean: 글쎄요... 한 때는 그랬을 지도요? 그럼, 드래곤 슬레이어의 주인공은 누군가요?
1401500060.english: Well... maybe that was the case at one time? Then, who is the protagonist of Dragon Slayer?

1401500061.korean: 그건 바로 용살자이니라! 우리 오르카호의 용살자는 바로 짐의 권속이고!
1401500061.english: That is none other than the Dragon Slayer! The Dragon Slayer of our Orca is none other than my own minion!

1401500062.english: So the dragon slayer... saved the demon, LRL?

1401500063.korean: 그래, 정의로운 용살자는 그 누구라도 구원해주는 것이다! 악마도 구원받지 않았느냐!
1401500063.english: Yes, a righteous dragon slayer saves anyone! Wasn't even the devil saved!

1401500064.korean: 네, 생각해보니 그렇네요… 절 구원해준, 용살자님.
1401500064.english: Yes, come to think of it, that's true... Dragon Slayer, who saved me.

1401600001.english: Master, the construction of the therapy room is finished.

1401600002.korean: 워낙 비축한 자원이 많아서 빠르게 완성되기도 했지만…
1401600002.english: It was completed quickly because there were so many stockpiled resources, but…

1401600003.korean: 멜트가 직접 테라피 치료실 아이디어를 준 것도 있어서 빠르게 진행됐던 것 같아요.
1401600003.english: I think it progressed quickly because Melt personally gave the idea for the therapy room.

1401600004.korean: 곧 있으면 근무 시간도 끝났는데 패널은 그만 보시고, 테라피 치료를 받으러 가시는 건 어떠세요?
1401600004.english: Your workday is ending soon, so why don't you stop looking at the panel and go get some therapy?

1401600006.english: I asked because I was curious if you were joking or serious.

1401600007.korean: 가끔 보면 진짜 웃으시면서 종잡을 수 없는 일을 하시잖아요.
1401600007.english: Sometimes, you really do unpredictable things while smiling.

1401600008.english: Suddenly, I became an Orca madman.

1401600009.korean: 제가 아까 전에 둘러보고 왔는데, 특별한 느낌이라서 깜짝 놀랐어요.
1401600009.english: I looked around a bit earlier, and I was surprised because it felt special.

1401600010.korean: 직접 멜트가 마중나온다고 하더군요. 지금 한 번 가보실래요?
1401600010.english: I heard Melt is coming to pick you up in person. Would you like to go take a look now?

1401600011.korean: -안 그래도 몸이 찌뿌둥했었는데, 이김에 멜트의 테라피를 받아보는 것도 나쁘진 않을 것 같다.
1401600011.english: My body was feeling a bit stiff anyway, so I don't think it would be a bad idea to try Melt's therapy while I'm at it.

1401600012.korean: -아쿠아랜드의 테라피 치료실로 발걸음을 옮기던 중, 우두커니 선 한 여자의 모습에 걸음을 멈추었다.
1401600012.english: As I was walking toward the therapy room at Aqualand, I stopped in my tracks at the sight of a woman standing still.

1401600014.korean: -멜트는 평소와 다르게 마치, 카엔과 제로가 입을 법한 유카타를 입고 날 맞이했다.
1401600014.english: Unlike usual, Melt greeted me wearing a yukata that looked like something Kaen and Zero would wear.

1401600015.korean: 엔라이 님께서 제게 귀띔해주신 옷이옵니다. 소녀, 아름… 답습니까?
1401600015.english: This is the outfit that Enrai tipped me off about. Girl, is it… beautiful?

1401600016.korean: 후훗, 그럼… 가을 색이 짙어지는 이 밤… 소녀와 테라피 치료실까지 걸어보시겠사옵니까?
1401600016.english: Hehe, then… on this night as the autumn colors deepen… would you like to take a walk to the therapy room with the girl?

1401600017.korean: -유카타를 입은 뒤 쿠노이치 자매들에게서 어느 정도 옛 말투를 연습했나 보다.
1401600017.english: It seems that after putting on the yukata, she practiced the old way of speaking to some extent from the kunoichi sisters.

1401600018.korean: -빙긋 웃으며 멜트의 손을 잡곤 함께 발을 내디뎠다.
1401600018.english: Smiling, he took Melt's hand and stepped forward together.

1401600019.korean: 사령관님. 원래는 내일 정식 오픈이긴 했지만… 사령관님을 모시고 싶어 오늘 밤 특별히 열었어요.
1401600019.english: Commander, the official opening was originally scheduled for tomorrow, but... we opened it specially tonight because we wanted to invite you.

1401600020.korean: 네, 제가 사령관님께 선사해드리고 싶어서 알파 님께 부탁드렸어요.
1401600020.english: Yes, I asked Alpha because I wanted to give it to the Commander as a gift.

1401600021.korean: 근데 사령관님. 혹시 LRL님이 좋아하시는 드래곤 슬레이어에 대해서 아시나요?
1401600021.english: By the way, Commander. Do you happen to know about the Dragon Slayer that LRL likes?

1401600022.korean: -LRL이 제일 좋아하는 만화, LRL의 오랜 시간을 함께 해온 만화책이었다.
1401600022.english: - It was LRL's favorite comic, a comic book that had been with LRL for a long time.

1401600023.korean: -LRL은 자신과 친한 사람들에게 그 책에 나오는 등장인물의 별명을 붙여주었다.
1401600023.english: -LRL gave nicknames to the people close to him based on the characters in that book.

1401600024.korean: 네, 설정이 디테일 했던 것 같아요. 악룡의 명을 거역하여 저주 받은… 악마라고요.
1401600024.english: Yes, I think the setting was detailed. A demon cursed for disobeying the evil dragon's command...

1401600026.english: Of course. You are the Dragon Slayer who lifted my curse.

1401600027.korean: -멜트가 고개를 돌리자 나는 그녀가 찬 마스크를 가리켰다.
1401600027.english: As Melt turned her head, I pointed at the mask she was wearing.

1401600028.korean: 아, 안 돼요... 사령관님! 아직 위험하실 수도 있어요…
1401600028.english: Oh, no... Commander! It might still be dangerous for you...

1401600033.korean: -멜트는 고민하다 결국, 자신의 마스크를 조심스레 벗곤 나를 바라보았다.
1401600033.english: After hesitating for a moment, Melt finally carefully removed his mask and looked at me.

1401600034.english: … Commander, do you feel dizzy or suddenly tired?

1401600035.korean: -귀는 물론, 피부가 간질거릴 정도로 나긋하고 감미로운 목소리였다.
1401600035.english: It was a voice so gentle and sweet that it tickled not only the ears but also the skin.

1401600036.korean: -그저 듣기만 했는데도 불구하고 온천에 푹 몸을 담구는 듯한 감각이다.
1401600036.english: Even just listening to it gives me the sensation of being fully immersed in a hot spring.

1401600038.english: What? Is that really true, Commander?

1401600041.korean: -늘 마스크로 얼굴을 가리던 멜트의 웃음은 환하게 빛났다.
1401600041.english: Melt's smile, which usually covered his face with a mask, shone brightly.

1401600042.korean: -멜트의 주변으로 빨간 단풍잎이 반짝였다. 그리고 멜트의 웃음도 아름답게 반짝였다.
1401600042.english: Red maple leaves twinkled around Melt. And Melt's laughter also twinkled beautifully.

1401600043.korean: 처음으로… 처음으로 들었어요. 제 얼굴이 아름답다고, 제 목소리가 아름답다고…
1401600043.english: For the first time… for the first time, I heard it. That my face is beautiful, that my voice is beautiful…

1401600044.korean: 사령관님, 이건 제 꿈인가요… 제 현실인가요?
1401600044.english: Commander, is this my dream... or my reality?

1401600046.english: Melt soon snuggled right into my arms.

1401600047.english: Thank you, Commander… Thank you so, so much…

1401600048.korean: 제 한몸 바쳐 사령관님을 영원히 모실게요…!
1401600048.english: I will devote my entire being to serve you forever, Commander…!

1401600049.korean: -멜트의 말에 화답하듯 가을의 낙엽들이 달빛 아래 흔들렸다.
1401600049.english: As if responding to Melt's words, the autumn leaves swayed under the moonlight.

1401600050.korean: -아쿠아랜드의 테라피 치료실로 오자, 멜트는 내 손을 이끌고 이부자리에 눕혔다.
1401600050.english: When we arrived at the therapy room in Aqualand, Melt led me by the hand and laid me down on the bed.

1401600051.korean: 소녀의 테라피 치료실에 뫼시게 되어 영광이옵니다, 나리.
1401600051.english: It is an honor to serve you in the girl's therapy room, my lord.

1401600052.korean: 엔라이 님 의견을 참고해서, 직접 말씨와 기술을 익혀보았사옵니다. 후훗…
1401600052.english: Taking Enrai's advice into consideration, I have personally practiced the manner of speaking and the techniques. Hehe...

1401600053.korean: -말을 마친 멜트는 다소곳이 앉은 후 내 머리를 자신의 허벅다리 위에 올려놓았다.
1401600053.english: After finishing his words, Melt sat down demurely and rested my head on his thigh.

1401600054.korean: -멜트는 마스크를 몇 번 만지작거리다 이내 입을 열었다.
1401600054.english: Melt fiddled with his mask a few times and then opened his mouth.

1401600055.korean: 나리, 몸의 힘을 쭉 빼시고… 소녀의 목소리와 눈을 집중해주시기 바라옵니다.
1401600055.english: Sir, please relax your body completely... and focus on the girl's voice and eyes.

1401600056.korean: -편하게 몸에 힘을 빼자, 어둠 속에서 멜트의 눈이 반짝였다.
1401600056.english: As he relaxed his body, Melt's eyes sparkled in the darkness.

1401600057.korean: -살짝 나른한 느낌과 함께 수건이 눈 위에 올라갔다. 조심스레 내 몸을 두드리던 멜트는 한 군데서 멈추었다.
1401600057.english: With a slightly drowsy feeling, the towel was placed on my eyes. Melt, who had been gently patting my body, stopped at one spot.

1401600058.korean: 나리… 힘을 쭉 빼라고 하였사온데… 이곳은 여전히 단단하시군요?
1401600058.english: Sir... I told you to relax completely... but this place is still so firm?

1401600059.korean: …흐, 흐흠… 그렇다면, 소녀가 직접 가라앉히도록 하겠사옵니다.
1401600059.english: … H-hmm… In that case, I shall personally calm it down.

1401600060.korean: -가라앉히겠다는 게 무엇을 말하는지 잘 이해가 가지 않던 그때, 끈적거리는 젤 소리가 들렸다.
1401600060.english: Just when I didn't quite understand what it meant to "sink," I heard the sound of sticky gel.

1401600061.korean: 힘을 쭉… 빼시기 바라옵니다. 소녀가 도와드리겠사옵니다.
1401600061.english: Please fully relax. I, your girl, will assist you.

1401600062.korean: -멜트의 속삭이는 소리, 그리고 차갑고 끈적한 것이 내 몸에 뿌려졌다.
1401600062.english: - Melt's whispering sound, and something cold and sticky was sprayed on my body.

1401600063.korean: -한참이 지나고 나는 게운해진 몸을 일으켰다. 확실히, 몸의 피로가 사라진 것 같았지만,
1401600063.english: After quite some time had passed, I got up, feeling refreshed. Certainly, the fatigue seemed to have disappeared, but,

1401600064.korean: -포이가 지쳐 나가떨어질 정도로 단단한 내 피로는 가시지 않았다.
1401600064.english: My fatigue, which was so severe that it caused Poi to collapse from exhaustion, did not subside.

1401600065.english: Are you still not fully recovered from your fatigue?

1401600066.korean: 하아… 소녀의 불찰이… 나리의 피로를 풀지 못한 죄...
1401600066.english: Haa... It is the girl's fault... the sin of not being able to relieve the Lord's fatigue...

1401600067.korean: 소녀가 엄히 벌을 받아야 할 것 같사옵니다.
1401600067.english: It seems the girl deserves to be severely punished.

1401600068.korean: -얹어놓았던 수건을 떼고 일어선 멜트는 내게 회초리를 가져와 내밀었다.
1401600068.english: Melt removed the towel he had placed on me, stood up, and brought the switch to me.

1401600069.korean: …소녀를 엄히 벌하시고, 소녀의 목소리로 피로를 더 푸시옵소서.
1401600069.english: … severely punish the girl, and relieve your fatigue further with her voice.

1401600070.korean: -내 손에 들린 회초리, 그리고 멜트는 스르륵, 유카타를 내렸다.
1401600070.english: The switch in my hand, and Melt lowered the yukata with a soft slither.

1401600071.korean: 아직 밤은 긴 게 맞사오니... 그 회초리와 나리의 회초리로… 소녀의 첫실수를 혼내주시옵소서…♥
1401600071.english: It is true that the night is still long... so with that switch and your switch, my lord... please punish this girl's first mistake... ♥

1401600072.korean: -리리스와 몇 번이고 해본 플레이지만, 이런 플레이는 어려웠다. 그래도 멜트가 원한다면…
1401600072.english: I’ve played this with Lilith many times, but this kind of play was difficult. Still, if Melt wants it…

1401600073.korean: -나는 손에 회초리를 잡은 뒤 천천히 멜트의 등을 문질렀다.
1401600073.english: I held the switch in my hand and slowly rubbed Melt's back.

1401600075.korean: -그리고 그날은 밤새, 테라피 치료실에는 환희의 신음소리만이 들렸다.
1401600075.english: And that night, only groans of ecstasy could be heard in the therapy room.

1401600076.korean: -후일담이지만, 멜트의 테라피 치료는 내가 다녀간 뒤, 이틀 후에나 오픈하게 되었다.
1401600076.english: As an afterword, Melt's therapy treatment didn't open until two days after I visited.

1401600077.korean: -멜트의 허리를 마사지하던 보련은 얼마나 하드한 플레이를 했냐며 기겁할 정도였지만…
1401600077.english: Boryeon, who was massaging Melt's waist, was shocked to the point of asking just how hard the play had been, but...

1401600078.english: As long as Melt was happy, isn't that okay?

1401600079.english: The Girl Who Walks at Night END.

1401600080.english: Oh, already? That's faster than I thought.

1401600082.korean: 패널 들고 가서 테라피 받는 것도 좋을 것 같아.
1401600082.english: I think it would be a good idea to take the panel with you and get therapy.

1401600083.english: ...Why are you staring at me like that, Alpha?

1401600084.english: I'm just kidding. I'm going to go take a look right now.

1401600089.korean: 피곤할 것 같은데… 할 수 있겠어?
1401600089.english: It looks like it would be tiring... can you do it?

1401600091.english: Come to think of it, Melt, you called me a devil, didn't you?

1401600092.english: He's too kind for a devil.

1401600094.korean: 앞으로도 이렇게 말해줄 수 있어 멜트?
1401600094.english: Can you keep saying this to me in the future, Melt?

1401600095.english: I have one more favor to ask, Melt.

1401600096.korean: 마스크 벗고, 한 번 말해줄 수 있어?
1401600096.english: Can you take off your mask and tell me?

1401600097.english: It's okay. I heard the curse is lifted?

1401600098.english: I want to hear Melt's real voice.

1401600101.english: Your bare face is as beautiful as your voice.

1401600103.english: It is the dream you wanted to dream, and it is also reality.

1401600105.english: The vibe of your voice has changed again?

1401700001.english: … Okay, so you want to give it a try?

1401700002.korean: 닥터, 통신 방화벽 복구는 어떻게 됐나요?
1401700002.english: Doctor, how was the communication firewall recovery?

1401700003.korean: 어렵긴 하지만 절반 정도 복구 됐어, 알파 언니. 이제 긴급 회선으로 연락할 수 있을 거야.
1401700003.english: It's difficult, but it's about half restored, Alpha. You should be able to contact us via the emergency line now.

1401700004.korean: 생각도 못했어요, 제타가 오메가한테 적극적으로 협력하고 있었다니…
1401700004.english: I never imagined Zeta was actively cooperating with Omega…

1401700005.korean: 엘리하고도 도저히 연락이 닿질 않아요… 대체 무슨 일이…
1401700005.english: I absolutely can't get in touch with Ellie either... What on earth is going on...

1401700006.korean: 당장 섣부른 전투를 중단해야 해요, 이건 제타의 함정이에요, 아군끼리 충돌할 가능성도 있어요.
1401700006.english: We must stop this hasty battle immediately. This is Zeta's trap, and there is a possibility of friendly fire.

1401700007.korean: 하지만 눈 앞의 적이 진짜 적인지 홀로그램인지 어떻게 구분할 수 있죠?
1401700007.english: But how can you tell if the enemy in front of you is a real enemy or a hologram?

1401700010.english: I connected you. Answer me quickly, sis!

1401700011.english: Can you hear me? Who's there?

1401700012.korean: 레오나, 저에요 알파. 지금 바깥 상황은 어떻죠?
1401700012.english: Leona, it's me, Alpha. What's the situation like outside right now?

1401700013.korean: 제대로 당한 것 같아. 홀로그램 드론들이 사방에 깔려있어.
1401700013.english: I think I've been completely ripped off. Holographic drones are scattered everywhere.

1401700014.korean: 칸이… 한 번 이런 비슷한 경험을 해봤다고 하더라고.
1401700014.english: Khan said... he'd had a similar experience once.

1401700015.english: Are you perhaps referring to the hologram that Makina operated?

1401700016.korean: 그렇다 하더라고. 지금 우린 허깨비한테 묶여있어.
1401700016.english: That's what they say. We're tied up by a phantom right now.

1401700017.korean: 위급한 상황이야 레오나 언니! 지금 오빠가 무방비 상태에 노출됐어!
1401700017.english: It's an emergency, Leona! Brother is exposed and defenseless right now!

1401700018.korean: 알고 있어. 지금 칸이랑 합류했고, 달링을 구할 대원들도 차출한 상태야.
1401700018.english: I know. I’ve joined forces with Khan now, and I’ve also selected soldiers to rescue Darling.

1401700019.korean: 한 번 겪었던 만큼, 칸이 직접 앞장서겠다네?
1401700019.english: Having gone through it once, Khan says he will take the lead himself?

1401700021.korean: 전투 감각은 칸이 나보다 뛰어난 편이야. 맡겨볼만 해.
1401700021.english: Khan has better combat instincts than me. He's worth leaving to him.

1401700023.english: Have you heard from Darling by any chance?

1401700024.korean: 적은 철저하게 주인님을 고립시켰어요. 제대로 당했어요.
1401700024.english: The enemy thoroughly isolated the Master. You were properly defeated.

1401700025.korean: 닥터랑 제가 뚫고 있는 중이긴 하지만, 간단하진 않아요.
1401700025.english: The doctor and I are currently working on clearing it, but it isn't simple.

1401700026.korean: 알았어. 달링 위치 파악하는 대로 전투에 돌입할게.
1401700026.english: Alright. I'll enter the battle as soon as I locate Darling.

1401700027.korean: 피크닉에 따라간 엘리가 어떻게든 우리랑 연락이 되야겠네요.
1401700027.english: Ellie, who went on the picnic, needs to get in touch with us somehow.

1401700028.korean: 일단 베타까지 불러 시스템을 정상화하는데 주력할게요.
1401700028.english: For now, I will focus on normalizing the system by bringing in the beta.

1401700029.korean: 시라유리씨는 최대한 대원들에게 적 대부분은 홀로그램이란 걸 전파해주세요.
1401700029.english: Ms. Shirayuri, please spread the word to the squad members as much as possible that most of the enemies are holograms.

1401700031.english: Khan, can you definitely distinguish them?

1401700032.korean: 걱정마라. 한 번 겪어봐서 어느 정도 감으로 구분은 가능하니까.
1401700032.english: Don't worry. I've experienced it once, so I can tell the difference to some extent by feel.

1401700033.korean: 알았어. 믿어볼게. 우리 쪽에서 도와줄 건 있어?
1401700033.english: Okay. I'll trust you. Is there anything we can help with?

1401700034.korean: 돌격은 나와 하이에나랑 워울프가 맡도록 하지. 그리고 우리가 돌격할 동안 엄호해줄 대원이 필요하다.
1401700034.english: I’ll have the hyena, werewolf, and I handle the charge. And we need some cover while we charge.

1401700035.korean: 그건 걱정 마. 엄호사격은 픽시가 맡아줄 테니까.
1401700035.english: Don't worry about that. Pixie will take care of the covering fire.

1401700036.english: It's the first battle, so you're confident, Pixie?

1401700038.korean: 여어, 폴라베어. 그 덩치로 우릴 따라 잡을 수 있겠어?
1401700038.english: Hey, Polar Bear. Do you think you can catch up to us with that size?

1401700039.korean: 얜 라이언이라고! 그리고 얘도 엄청 빨라!
1401700039.english: This one's Ryan! And he's super fast, too!

1401700040.korean: 그래? 생긴 건 엄청 둔하게 생겼는데, 우리 등 뒤를 맡겨도 되겠어?
1401700040.english: Really? You look super clumsy, but can you really trust us with your back?

1401700041.korean: 라이언이 얼마나 빨리 사람 찢는지 보여줘?
1401700041.english: Do you want me to show you how fast Ryan tears people apart?

1401700042.korean: 알았어 알았어~ 나 참… 발할라 애들은 재밌게 받아쳐주질 않는다니까.
1401700042.english: Okay, okay~ Seriously... The Valhalla kids just don't play along in a funny way.

1401700043.korean: ….잡담은 그만하도록 하지. 사령관의 안전을 빠르게 확보해야 한다.
1401700043.english: … Let's stop the small talk. We must secure the commander's safety quickly.

1401700044.korean: 일단 나와 워울프는 최대한 앞으로 돌격한다.
1401700044.english: First, the werewolf and I charge forward as far as we can.

1401700046.korean: 픽시는 혹시 모를 진짜 적이 있을 지도 모르니 엄호 사격을 해주며 따라와주면 좋겠군.
1401700046.english: Pixie, I'd appreciate it if you could follow along and provide covering fire, just in case there are real enemies.

1401700050.korean: 경호대장… 어떻게 여기까지 왔지? 혼자 뚫고 온 건가?
1401700050.english: Chief of Security… how did he get here? Did he break through alone?

1401700051.korean: 주인님의 목숨이 위급한데... 가만히 앉아 기다릴 순 없죠.
1401700051.english: Master's life is in danger... I can't just sit around and wait.

1401700052.korean: 그리고 제 동생이 위험한데, 언니로서 모른척 할 수 없고요, 칸씨.
1401700052.english: And my younger sibling is in danger, so as their older sister, I can't pretend not to know, Mr. Khan.

1401700053.korean: …알겠다. 그렇다면 경호대장은 우리 뒤를 맡기도록 하지.
1401700053.english: … Understood. In that case, I’ll leave the head of the security detail to protect us.

1401700055.korean: …만일 이 일의 원흉인 멜트란 년이 배신했다면 제가 책임 지고 죽여버리겠어요.
1401700055.english: … If that bitch Meltran, the culprit behind this, has betrayed us, I will take responsibility and kill her.

1401700056.korean: 그건 나중에 확인하도록 하고… 지금은 사령관의 목숨을 최우선이니 당장 출격해야 한다.
1401700056.english: We'll check that later... Right now, the commander's life is the top priority, so we must sortie immediately.

1401700057.korean: 총 지휘는 내가 맡을게. 특이사항이 있다면 나한테 보고해줘.
1401700057.english: I'll take overall command. Please report to me if there are any special circumstances.

1401700059.english: Yes, I look forward to working with you, Leona.

1401800001.english: Poi and Melt got along well.

1401800002.korean: -멜트가 목소리로 적을 무력화 시키면, 포이가 재빨리 달려들어 제압했다.
1401800002.english: When Melt neutralized the enemy with his voice, Poi quickly rushed in and subdued him.

1401800005.korean: 진짜 괜찮은 거 맞아? 멜트… 너 입가에 피가…
1401800005.english: Are you really okay? Melt... there's blood on your lips...

1401800007.korean: -멜트의 입가가 온통 피로 물든 걸 보니, 멜트와 포이 둘만으로 상대하기는 역부족이었다.
1401800007.english: Seeing that Melt's mouth was completely stained with blood, it was clear that Melt and Poi alone were no match for the opponent.

1401800008.english: Are you really okay, Melt? Isn't it hard?

1401800013.korean: 살짝 빗겨 나갔어요. 죄송해요… 주인님을 먼저 보호했어야 했는데…
1401800013.english: It missed slightly. I'm sorry... I should have protected you first, Master...

1401800015.english: It's okay, so cheer up and stand up.

1401800017.korean: 주인님이면 모르겠지만, 너까지 보호하긴 힘드니까… 얼른.
1401800017.english: I wouldn't mind if it were my master, but it's hard to protect you too... so hurry up.

1401800019.korean: -멜트는 몸을 가까스로 부축해 다시 일어려 하자, 포이가 멜트에게 손을 건네고 일으켰다.
1401800019.english: As Melt struggled to support himself and tried to stand up again, Poi reached out a hand to help him up.

1401800021.korean: 우리 언니가 언젠가 한 번, 리제랑 이렇게 싸웠다는데…
1401800021.english: I heard my older sister once had a fight with Rize like this...

1401800022.korean: 뭔가 엄청… 뿌듯하네. 할 수 있지, 멜트?
1401800022.english: I feel so… proud for some reason. You can do it, right, Melt?

1401800024.korean: -멜트가 고개를 끄덕임과 동시에 포이는 앞을 향해 내달렸다.
1401800024.english: As soon as Melt nodded, Poi ran forward.

1401800025.korean: -멜트와 포이가 힘을 합쳐 오메가의 AGS를 파괴하기 시작했다, 하지만 수는 줄지 않았고 둘은 가쁜 숨을 내쉬었다.
1401800025.english: Melt and Poi joined forces and began destroying Omega's AGS, but the numbers did not decrease, and the two were breathing heavily.

1401800026.korean: 하아... 언니만 있었으면 아무 것도 아니었는데...
1401800026.english: Haa... If only my sister were here, it would have been nothing...

1401800029.english: Wait, Melt… what are you trying to do?

1401800031.korean: -멜트는 수많은 AGS의 앞에 선 후, 마스크의 덮개를 해제한 뒤 귀를 막으라 손짓했다.
1401800031.english: After standing in front of the numerous AGSs, Melt removed the cover of his mask and gestured for them to cover their ears.

1401800032.korean: 안 되겠어요… 너무 많아요, 모두들… 귀를 완전히 막아주세요…
1401800032.english: This won't do... There are too many, everyone... Please cover your ears completely...

1401800033.korean: 제 목소리를 극한까지 끌어 올릴 거예요. 잘못하면 뇌신경이 망가질 수 있으니까 조심하세요…!
1401800033.english: I'm going to push my voice to the absolute limit. Be careful, because if I'm not careful, it could damage your nerves...!

1401800034.korean: -잘 들리진 않았지만 귀를 꽉 틀어막으라는 신호에 포이와 나, 그리고 LRL은 두 손으로 귀마개를 힘껏 틀어 막았다.
1401800034.english: Although we couldn't hear clearly, at the signal to cover our ears tightly, Poi, LRL, and I covered our ears with our earplugs using both hands.

1401800036.korean: -완전히 소음이 차단된 탓에 멜트의 입모양을 봐야 했지만, 확실히 이해할 수 있었다.
1401800036.english: Because the noise was completely blocked out, I had to look at Melt's mouth, but I could definitely understand.

1401800037.english: I… have spent my whole life ruining you, human.

1401800038.korean: 테라피 바이오로이드와는 전혀 어울리지 않는 삶이었어요.
1401800038.english: It was a life that didn't suit a therapy bioroid at all.

1401800039.korean: ...모든 오르카 대원분들이 좋아하시는 사령관님을 제가 망가뜨리고 싶지 않았어요.
1401800039.english: ...I didn't want to ruin the Commander, whom all the Orca members like.

1401800040.korean: 제 목소리를 사령관님께서 듣지 못하시는 게 아쉬워요.
1401800040.english: It is a shame that the Commander cannot hear my voice.

1401800041.english: I had so much I wanted to say...

1401800042.korean: 감사하다고, 절 믿어주시고 따뜻하게 대해주셔서 감사했는데…
1401800042.english: I said thank you, thank you for trusting me and treating me warmly...

1401800043.korean: …그 말을 제 목소리로 전하지 못해서, 너무 아쉬워요.
1401800043.english: … I am so disappointed that I couldn't convey those words in my own voice.

1401800044.korean: 살아남는다면… 사령관님과는 직접 대화를… 해보고 싶어요.
1401800044.english: If I survive… I’d like to have a direct conversation with the Commander.

1401800045.korean: -멜트의 말이 끝난 뒤, 그녀는 AGS 앞에 마주섰다.
1401800045.english: After Melt finished speaking, she stood facing the AGS.

1401800046.english: - Huge energy began to surge from Melt's mask.

1401800048.korean: -멜트의 몸이 뒤로 밀려남과 동시에, 엄청난 충격파가 우리와 적들을 집어삼켰다.
1401800048.english: As Melt's body was pushed backward, a massive shockwave engulfed us and the enemies.

1401800050.korean: 어서 가야 해요, 그년이 무슨 짓을 저지른 게 분명해요!
1401800050.english: We have to go right now! She's definitely done something wrong!

1401800051.english: Haa... Haa, Captain Khan! Captain of the Security Guard!

1401800052.english: That's... Ellie, who went with the commander.

1401800053.korean: 지금 사령관님께서 포위되신 상태에요… 어서 합류하셔야 해요!
1401800053.english: The Commander is surrounded right now… You need to join forces immediately!

1401800054.english: Are you alright, Commander? As for Poi… what about Poi?!

1401800055.korean: 아마… 지금 포이님께선 멜트 님이랑 같이 적을 막고 계실 거예요!
1401800055.english: Poi is probably holding off the enemy with Melt right now!

1401800056.english: … You mean Melt is helping Poi protect the Master?

1401800057.korean: 아무래도 경호대장은 괜한 걱정을 한 것 같군.
1401800057.english: It looks like the head of the security detail worried for nothing.

1401800058.korean: 다행이지만, 겨우 두 명이서 싸우는 거라면 빨리 합류해야 돼요!
1401800058.english: That's a relief, but if it's just two of us fighting, we need to join forces quickly!

1401800059.korean: 픽시, 엘리를 안전하게 레오나 대장이 있는 곳으로 안내하겠나?
1401800059.english: Pixie, will you safely escort Ellie to where Captain Leona is?

1401800062.korean: 자책은 나중에 하지, 경호대장. 시간이 없다.
1401800062.english: Save the self-blame for later, Captain of the Security Guard. There is no time.

1401800066.english: It's okay, you did well, Poi.

1401800067.english: Melt, what are you planning to do?!

1401900002.korean: -분명 음소거 되었음에도 불구하고, 뇌를 누군가 주무르는 블쾌한 기분이다.
1401900002.english: Even though it is clearly muted, it feels like someone is manipulating my brain—an unpleasant sensation.

1401900003.korean: -멜트의 충격파를 직격당한 AGS들은 일제히 가동을 멈추고 검은 연기를 내뿜었다.
1401900003.english: The AGS units, struck directly by Melt's shockwave, all ceased operation and emitted black smoke.

1401900006.korean: -멜트의 마스크는 스파크와 함께 탄 냄새가 진동했다.
1401900006.english: Melt's mask emitted a burning smell accompanied by sparks.

1401900007.korean: 이제, 제 목소리를… 사령관님께서도 들으실 수 있으시군요…?
1401900007.english: So, now… you can hear my voice… Commander… too…?

1401900009.english: That's a relief... Really, that's a relief...

1401900010.english: It was a voice that only killed other humans…

1401900014.korean: -황급히 맥박을 체크했다. 다행히도 멜트에게 큰 이상은 없었다.
1401900014.english: - I hurriedly checked his pulse. Fortunately, there was nothing seriously wrong with Melt.

1401900015.korean: -그때, 익숙한 권총소리와 엄청난 바람이 망가진 적을 향해 쏟아졌다.
1401900015.english: Just then, a familiar gunshot and a tremendous gust of wind poured down on the broken enemy.

1401900018.korean: 언니! 헤헤, 못 보는 줄 알았어요!
1401900018.english: Sister! Hehe, I thought I wouldn't be able to see this!

1401900019.korean: 그래 포이. 언니도 걱정 많이 했단다.
1401900019.english: Yes, Poi. Your older sister was very worried, too.

1401900020.english: By the way, where is Melt?

1401900022.korean: -리리스는 블랙 맘바를 재장전 한 후 망설임 없이 내 앞으로 다가왔다.
1401900022.english: After reloading the Black Mamba, Lilith approached me without hesitation.

1401900023.korean: 주인님 경호… 실패했어요. 죄송해요. 한 순간도 방심해선 안 됐었는데…
1401900023.english: Master's protection... I failed. I'm sorry. I shouldn't have let my guard down for even a single moment...

1401900024.english: Really… wasn’t it Melt who betrayed us?

1401900025.korean: -리리스는 따가운 시선으로 멜트를 쏘아보았지만, 멜트의 입가에 묻은 피와 다친 몸을 보자 부끄러운 듯 고개 숙였다.
1401900025.english: Lilith glared at Melt with a stinging look, but upon seeing the blood on Melt's lips and his injured body, she lowered her head in shame.

1401900026.english: … I'm sorry. I thought Melt had betrayed me.

1401900027.korean: -경호하는 입장에서 멜트는 당연히 위험요소였고 충분히 리리스가 오해할만한 상황이었다.
1401900027.english: From a security standpoint, Melt was naturally a risk factor, and it was a situation where Lilith could easily have misunderstood.

1401900028.korean: 아까의 그 엄청난 충격파도… 멜트가 방출한 충격파였나?
1401900028.english: That massive shockwave from earlier... was that a shockwave released by Melt too?

1401900029.english: I feel sorry for doubting you, even if it was only for a moment.

1401900031.korean: -포이가 가리킨 곳에는 오메가의 AGS들이 다시금 우리를 향해 진격했다.
1401900031.english: At the spot Poi pointed to, Omega's AGS units advanced toward us once again.

1401900032.english: There is no need to worry about that.

1401900033.korean: -칸은 어딘가를 조준하고 격발하자, AGS들의 모습들이 흐려지더니 우리의 시야에서 사라졌다.
1401900033.english: As Khan aimed and fired, the figures of the AGSs blurred and disappeared from our sight.

1401900034.english: It's a hologram using a drone.

1401900035.english: ...I don't know who it is, but they are full of malice...

1401900036.korean: -그제야 나는 어째서 수많은 적들이 갑자기 출몰했는지 이해할 수 있었다.
1401900036.english: Only then could I understand why so many enemies had suddenly appeared.

1401900037.korean: 레오나가 추적해본 결과, 이런 드론들이 우리 근처 상공에 몇 십 개씩 떠있다고 하더군.
1401900037.english: Leona tracked it down and said there are dozens of these drones hovering in the sky near us.

1401900038.korean: 지금 닥터와 알파가 홀로그램을 생성하는 드론들을 추적하는 중이다.
1401900038.english: Doctor and Alpha are currently tracking drones that generate holograms.

1401900039.korean: 우릴 홀로그램으로 붙잡아두고 주인님을 암살하려는 의도였어요.
1401900039.english: Their intention was to trap us as holograms and assassinate the master.

1401900040.korean: 사실 전… 멜트가 벌인 일이라고만 생각했었는데.
1401900040.english: Actually, I… I just thought it was something Melt did.

1401900041.korean: 일단 후퇴하기로 하지. 아직 위험요소가 남아있을 지도 모르니까.
1401900041.english: Let's retreat for now. There might still be risks remaining.
