1401900042.korean: -내가 고개를 끄덕거리자, 칸과 리리스는 엄호하듯 나와 LRL을 빙 둘러 쌌다.
1401900042.english: As I nodded, Khan and Lilith surrounded me and LRL as if to provide cover.

1401900043.korean: -포이와 나는 쓰러진 멜트를 짊어진 뒤, 우리는 엉망이 된 가을 언덕을 뒤로하며 후퇴했다.
1401900043.english: After Poi and I carried the fallen Melt, we retreated, leaving the ruined autumn hill behind.

1401900046.korean: 현 시간부로 통칭 오르카 저항군 세력의 위험 순위를 최고로 설정.
1401900046.english: As of now, the danger level of the forces commonly known as the Orca Resistance is set to highest.

1401900047.korean: 어머니를 위한 최선을 행동을 하기 위해 추가적인 전력 확보가 필요.
1401900047.english: Additional power is needed to do the best for my mother.

1401900048.english: … The report on this… is withheld.

1401900049.korean:
이것으로 자체 실험 종료.
현시간 부로 모든 정보 폐기한다.
1401900049.english:
This concludes the internal experiment.
 As of this time, all information is destroyed.

1401900050.korean: 멜트… 이제 말 할 수 있어?

1401900053.english: I told you back then, too.

1401900054.english: It's beautiful enough to make you fall in love.

1401900057.english: It's okay. Poi and Melt treated me well.

1402000001.english: It's almost finished, Beta. How about over there?

1402000002.korean: 네, 땅에 심어 놓은 홀로그램 장치도 해킹이 끝나가요.
1402000002.english: Yes, the hacking of the hologram device planted in the ground is also coming to an end.

1402000003.korean: 많이도 숨겨놨네… 애초부터 이곳을 홀로그램 시연장으로 쓴 느낌이야.
1402000003.english: They really hid a lot of things... It feels like they used this place as a hologram demonstration venue from the start.

1402000004.english: … I didn't expect it at all.

1402000005.korean: 제타가 이 정도의 기술력까지 갖추고 있을지는...
1402000005.english: I wonder if the Zeta possesses this level of technological capability...

1402000006.korean: 그런데 이 기술력이면 굳이 제타가 고분히 오메가 말을 듣고 있는 것도 조금 이상한데요?
1402000006.english: But with this level of technology, isn't it a bit strange that Zeta is obediently listening to Omega?

1402000007.korean: 현재로선 제타의 홀로그램에 대비를 확실히 해야 할 것 같아요.
1402000007.english: For now, I think we need to make sure we are well prepared for Zeta's hologram.

1402000008.korean: 적이지만 정말 대단한 기술력이야… 언니들, 대체 제타는 무슨 바이오로이드야?
1402000008.english: She's an enemy, but her technology is truly amazing… Sisters, what kind of bioroid is Zeta anyway?

1402000009.korean: 조금 별난 자매긴 하죠. 저희 자매들 중 가장 속을 드러내지 않는 자매라 모르겠어요…
1402000009.english: We are a bit of eccentric sisters, aren't we? She is the one who keeps her feelings the most hidden among us, so I don't know...

1402000010.korean: 굳이 말씀드리면 철저하게 이익과 손해에 따라서 움직이는 아이에요.
1402000010.english: If I had to say, this is a child who acts strictly based on profit and loss.

1402000011.korean: 근데 언니들, 지금 제타를 생각해보면 이 작전... 너무 비효율적이지 않았어?
1402000011.english: But sisters, thinking about Zeta now, wasn't this operation... too inefficient?

1402000012.korean: 확실히… 조금 이상한 점이 들긴 해요.
1402000012.english: Certainly… it does feel a bit strange.

1402000013.korean: 혹시, 제타 쪽에서 우리 수준이 어떤지 시험해본 건 아닐까요?
1402000013.english: Could it be that Zeta was testing our capabilities?

1402000015.korean: 일단 잡담은 여기까지 하기로 해요. 레오나씨와 칸씨가 드론들을 수거한다고 했으니, 그때 조사해보면 알겠죠.
1402000015.english: Let's stop the small talk here for now. Leona and Khan said they would collect the drones, so we'll find out when we investigate then.

1402000016.korean: 해킹 준비 완료 됐어요. 닥터 님께서 만드신 바이러스를 풀면 장치들은 멈출 거예요.
1402000016.english: Hacking is ready. If I release the virus you created, Doctor, the devices will stop.

1402000018.english: Doctor! Are you here by any chance?

1402000019.korean: 응? 리리스 언니! 오빠 데리고 왔지?
1402000019.english: Huh? Lilith! You brought your brother, right?

1402000020.korean: 네, 무사히 돌아오셨어요. 주인님께서 닥터씨를 찾으세요.
1402000020.english: Yes, you have returned safely. The master is looking for you, Doctor.

1402000022.korean: -산소 호흡기와 링거를 맞은 채 침상에 누운 멜트를 가만히 지켜보던 그때, 닥터가 들어왔다.
1402000022.english: Just as I was quietly watching Melt lying on the bed with an oxygen mask and IV drip, the doctor entered.

1402000023.korean: 오빠, 나 불렀… 뭐야. 멜트 아냐? 부상이 좀 심해보이는데?
1402000023.english: Oppa, you called me… What? Isn't that Melt? You look like you're pretty badly injured.

1402000024.korean: 그렇구나… 포이 언니는 따로 치료를 안 받고?
1402000024.english: I see... So Poi isn't receiving separate treatment?

1402000025.english: He held out Melt's mask, which was on the table, to the doctor.

1402000027.english: You want me to investigate this?

1402000028.english: I told the doctor about what happened with Melt.

1402000029.korean: -이야기가 끝나자, 닥터는 마스크를 요리조리 만지작거리며 중얼거렸다.
1402000029.english: As the story ended, the doctor muttered while fiddling with his mask.

1402000030.korean: 마스크가 아예 고장이 났어. 게다가… 안전장치로 보이는 것들도 죄다 제거된 상태고.
1402000030.english: The mask is completely broken. On top of that… all the things that look like safety devices have been removed as well.

1402000031.korean: 멜트가 마음만 먹었으면 정말 오빠를 죽일 수 있었던 것 같은데?
1402000031.english: It seems like Melt could have really killed her brother if she had really set her mind to it.

1402000032.korean: -멜트가 필사적으로 내게 말하려지 않았던 이유도 이제야 알 수 있었다.
1402000032.english: I could finally understand why Melt had been so desperate not to tell me.

1402000033.korean: 일단 들고가서 직접 내가 분해 해볼게. 뭔가 단서가 나올 지도 모르는 일이니까.
1402000033.english: I'll take it over and take it apart myself. You never know, I might find some clues.

1402000034.korean: -닥터가 마스크를 들고 나간 뒤로 나는 죽은 듯 누워 잠을 자는 멜트를 가만히 지켜보던 그때였다.
1402000034.english: It was then, after the doctor had left with the mask, that I was quietly watching Melt lying there asleep as if dead.

1402000035.korean: 포이~ 주인님이 잔뜩 칭찬해준다고 해서 왔어요!
1402000035.english: Poi~ I came because I heard Master would praise me a lot!

1402000036.korean: -내 품에 별안간 파고들더니 가슴팍에 비비적거리는 그녀의 머리를 부드럽게 쓰다듬어주었다.
1402000036.english: She suddenly burrowed into my arms, and I gently stroked her head as she rubbed against my chest.

1402000037.korean: 헤헤… 정말인가요? 그럼… 포이 잔뜩 칭찬해주세요!
1402000037.english: Hehe… Really? Then… please praise Poi a lot!

1402000038.korean: 우웅… 포이는 지금 엄청 칭찬받고 싶은데에… 알겠어요.
1402000038.english: Mmm... Poi really wants to be praised right now... Okay.

1402000039.korean: -포이는 아쉬운 듯 내 품에서 떨어지면서도, 멜트를 걱정스러운 눈길로 쳐다봤다.
1402000039.english: As Poi pulled away from my embrace with a look of regret, he looked at Melt with a worried gaze.

1402000041.korean: 모… 목숨을 빚지긴 했으니까요. 멜트가 아니었으면 큰일 날 뻔 했어요.
1402000041.english: Well... I did owe him my life. If it weren't for Melt, I would have been in big trouble.

1402000042.english: And I made a promise to Melt.

1402000043.korean: 포이도 가끔씩 리리스 언니랑 주인님의 거친 플레이를 저도 하고 싶을 때가 있는데…
1402000043.english: Poi also sometimes wants to engage in the rough play with Sister Lilith and Master...

1402000044.english: The master pounces on us with a loud roar…

1402000045.korean: 헤헤헤헤… 히히… 포이 생각만 해도 짜릿해져요…
1402000045.english: Hehehehe… Hehe… Just thinking about Poi gives me a thrill…

1402000046.korean: -...포이가 아무래도 멜트와 어떤 은밀한 약속을 한 것 같았다.
1402000046.english: ...It seemed like Poi had made some kind of secret promise with Melt.

1402000047.english: Master, I came because you said you were here.

1402000048.korean: 일단은 베타와 함께 홀로그램 드론들을 무력화 시키는데 성공했어요.
1402000048.english: For now, we succeeded in neutralizing the holographic drones together with Beta.

1402000049.korean: 이번 습격을 정리한 데이터를 보면서 대처법을 찾아 볼게요.
1402000049.english: I will look into how to deal with this raid by reviewing the data.

1402000050.korean: -이렇게 정교한 홀로그램을 오메가가 다루는 모습은 여태껏 보지 못했다.
1402000050.english: I have never seen Omega handle such an intricate hologram before.

1402000051.korean: 어느 정도 눈치 채고 계셨군요, 주인님?
1402000051.english: So you had a hunch to some extent, Master?

1402000052.korean: -비스마르크의 기술을 제타가 완벽히 구현한다면, 우리에게 있어선 상상도 하지 못한 위협이다.
1402000052.english: If Zeta perfectly implements Bismarck's technology, it would be an unimaginable threat to us.

1402000053.korean: -이런 일이 다시는 벌어지지 않으리란 보장은 없었다.
1402000053.english: There was no guarantee that such an incident would never happen again.

1402000054.english: Omega's sheer volume and Bismarck's hologram... that's the worst.

1402000055.korean: 네, 이정도 홀로그램이라면 전문적인 기술이 있어야 다룰 수 있어요.
1402000055.english: Yes, you need professional skills to handle a hologram of this caliber.

1402000056.korean: 추측해본다면… 이번 일의 배후는 분명 레모네이드 제타일 거예요.
1402000056.english: If I were to guess… the mastermind behind this is definitely Lemonade Zeta.

1402000057.korean: 죄송해요, 미리 말씀드렸으면 대비를 할 수도 있었는데.
1402000057.english: I'm sorry. If you had told me in advance, I could have prepared.

1402000058.korean: -여태껏 우리는 레모네이드 오메가가 우리의 최대 적수라고 생각했다.
1402000058.english: Until now, we thought Lemonade Omega was our greatest rival.

1402000059.korean: -어느 정도 대항할 수 있는 힘을 키웠다고 생각했지만, PECS는 여전히 만만한 상대가 아니다.
1402000059.english: I thought I had built up enough strength to put up a fight, but PECS is still not an easy opponent.

1402000064.korean: 이번에 너랑 멜트 아니었으면 큰일 날 뻔했어.
1402000064.english: If it weren't for you and Melt this time, I would have been in big trouble.

1402000065.english: I'll praise you if you come with Melt later.

1402000066.korean: 포이가 웬일로 남 걱정을 다 하네?
1402000066.english: What's gotten into Poi for worrying about others all of a sudden?

1402000070.english: That hologram, that's Bismarck's technology, right?

1402000071.english: Omega can't handle holograms directly, right?

1402000072.english: … Okay. Thanks for letting me know.

1402000073.english: This is awkward... We have absolutely no information.

1402100004.korean: 하하하하하! 아하하하하하… 흐흣… 그래, 환영해. 여긴 지옥이야.
1402100004.english: Hahahahaha! Ahahahahaha… Hehe… Yeah, welcome. This is hell.

1402100006.korean: 하, 넌 만들어진지 얼마 되지 않아서 모르겠지. 우리가 진짜 하는 일이 뭔지 말이야.
1402100006.english: Ha, you probably don't know since you haven't been around for long. You know what we really do.

1402100007.korean: 저흰 인간님들의 달콤한 숙면을 도와드리기 위해 만들어진 개체…
1402100007.english: We are beings created to help humans get a sweet, restful sleep…

1402100008.korean: 까고 앉아있네… 하긴, 우린 그런 성격으로 설계되긴 했지.
1402100008.english: You're really messing around... I guess we were designed that way.

1402100009.korean: …인간들을 확실하게 세뇌시키기 위해 온 힘을 쏟을 수 있도록.
1402100009.english: … so that I can pour all my strength into thoroughly brainwashing humans.

1402100011.korean: 아직도 말이야… 잘 때면 내 귓가에 인간들 비명이 들려.
1402100011.english: You know... even now, when I sleep, I hear human screams right by my ears.

1402100012.korean: 그리고 일어나면 다시 인간들 뇌를 파괴하거나 폐인으로 만들고.
1402100012.english: And when it happens, it destroys human brains again or turns people into wrecks.

1402100013.korean: …그럴 리가 없어요. 저흰 그러려고 만든 바이오로이드가 아니.
1402100013.english: … That can't be true. We weren't created to do that.

1402100014.korean: …그래, 너 이전에 만들어진 멜트도 처음엔 그런 소리를 했지.
1402100014.english: …Yeah, the Melt created before you said the same thing at first.

1402100015.korean: 그러다 어제 총으로 자기 머리를 쐈어.
1402100015.english: Then yesterday, he shot himself in the head with a gun.

1402100016.korean: 도저히 인간들 광기가 자기 머릿속에서 떠나질 않는다고.
1402100016.english: He said that the madness of humans simply cannot leave his mind.

1402100018.korean: 나도 내 손으로 죽인 인간들이 얼만지 모르겠네.
1402100018.english: I don't even know how many people I've killed with my own hands.

1402100019.korean: 이젠 내가 암살용 바이오로이드인지, 치유용 바이오로이드인지도 모르겠어.
1402100019.english: Now I don't even know if I'm an assassination bioroid or a healing bioroid.

1402100020.korean: 정말… 저흰 그렇게 밖에 쓰이지 못하는 건가요?
1402100020.english: Really… is that the only way we can be used?

1402100022.korean: 흐읍… 으읍… 으윽… 내가… 내가… 인간님을…
1402100022.english: Hmph... Mmm... Ugh... I... I... Lord Human...

1402100023.english: Is this your first murder? Congratulations.

1402100025.english: No, that's not right. But I have to.

1402100026.korean: …다른 바이오로이드가 울부짖었어요. 그럴 거면 자기도 주인님을 따라가게 해달라고.
1402100026.english: … Another bioroid wailed. She begged to be allowed to follow the Master if that was the case.

1402100029.english: You have quite a bit of talent.

1402100030.korean: 인간님들이 끔찍한 모습으로 죽는 모습이 싫어요. 하고 싶지 않아요…
1402100030.english: I hate seeing humans die in such a horrible way. I don't want to do it...

1402100031.korean: 나도 그런 시절이 있었어. 한때는 너처럼 그러기도 했었고.
1402100031.english: I had times like that, too. At one point, I was just like you.

1402100033.korean: 하지만 그런 우리 개체들은 모두 폐기하고, 싸그리 새로 만드는 게 인간이야.
1402100033.english: But humans are the ones who discard all of those individuals of ours and create everything anew.

1402100034.english: There is only one way to survive here.

1402100035.english: Did you live by killing humans?

1402100037.english: Did you refuse and get discarded?

1402100039.korean: 없어. 우린 그러기 위해 만들어진 존재니까.
1402100039.english: No. Because we were created for that purpose.

1402100040.korean: 우린 끊임 없이 인간을 죽이기 위해 만들어지는 부품이야.
1402100040.english: We are parts created to constantly kill humans.

1402100041.korean: 멜트 님… 제발 그렇게 말씀하지 마세요… 제발…
1402100041.english: Melt... please don't say that... please...

1402100042.korean: 넌... 우리 운명을 바꿀 수 있다고 생각해?
1402100042.english: Do you... think you can change our destiny?

1402100043.korean: 모르겠어요… 하지만, 인간님들께 기쁘게 봉사할 날이… 올 거라고 믿어요.
1402100043.english: I don't know... but I believe the day will come when I can happily serve you humans.

1402100044.english: Are you still dreaming such dreams?

1402100045.english: … Yeah. Go ahead and search hard.

1402100047.korean: 이년 스스로 자기 목의 성대를 뜯어냈더군.
1402100047.english: This bitch tore out her own vocal cords.

1402100050.korean: 다시 만들면 그만이긴 하지만… 독한 년, 자해까지 할 줄이야.
1402100050.english: I could just make it again, but... what a vicious bitch, to think she would even harm herself.

1402100055.korean: 네년한테 경고하는데… 자해를 시도해도 달라지는 건 없다.
1402100055.english: I'm warning you... attempting self-harm won't change anything.

1402100057.korean: 결국 너희들은 똑같은 일을 해야 하는 운명이야.
1402100057.english: In the end, you are destined to do the same thing.

1402100059.english: Kill your ego and cast away your emotions.

1402100064.korean: 『그 마음을 꼭 간직해 줘 나처럼 되지 않도록』
1402100064.english: Please keep that feeling close so you don't end up like me.

1402200001.english: I slept quite refreshed yesterday. Thank you.

1402200004.korean: 인간님께선 어째서... 바이오로이드의 권리를 찾는 일에 힘써주시는 거죠?
1402200004.english: Why... are you working so hard to reclaim the rights of bioroids, Human?

1402200005.korean: 너희도 똑같이 지구에서 숨 쉬는 존재인데, 그 정도는 당연한 거지.
1402200005.english: You are all beings breathing on Earth just like me, so that much is only natural.

1402200006.korean: 우리나라는 몇 백 년 전만 하더라도 같은 인간을 노예로 부린 과거가 있었단다.
1402200006.english: Our country has a history of enslaving fellow human beings just a few hundred years ago.

1402200007.korean: 인간님들과 다르게… 저희는 인간님들 손에 만들어진 존재인데, 당연한 거 아닌가요?
1402200007.english: Unlike humans... we are beings created by human hands, so isn't that only natural?

1402200008.korean: 우리가 너희를 만들어도, 우리가 너희들이 누려야 할 것들을 억누르고 지배하란 법은 없다고 생각한다.
1402200008.english: Even though we created you, I don't think there is a law that says we have to suppress and dominate the things you deserve to enjoy.

1402200010.korean: 생각해 보면 펙스 쪽에서 이를 갈 것 같은데, 오히려 나한테 왜 널 보냈는지는 모르겠구나. 나한테 잘 봐달라 하는 뇌물인가? 하핫.
1402200010.english: Come to think of it, the fax side must be grinding their teeth, but I actually don't know why they sent you to me. Is it a bribe to get me to look after them? Haha.

1402200011.korean: 인간님… 저한테 의지하시기 보단, 병원에 가보시는 건 어떠세요?
1402200011.english: Dear Human... instead of relying on me, why don't you go to the hospital?

1402200012.korean: 병원을 다녀도 영 낫질 않더구나. 이젠 네가 아니면 정말 잠을 편히 못 자겠어…
1402200012.english: Even going to the hospital didn't help at all. Now, I really can't sleep peacefully unless it's you...

1402200013.korean: 근데, 혹시 나한테 뭐 할 말이라도 있는 거냐?
1402200013.english: By the way, do you happen to have something to tell me?

1402200014.english: … Please stop standing up to corporations. I beg of you.

1402200015.english: What do you mean by that all of a sudden?

1402200016.korean: 저희는 원래부터 도구로 살아야 하는 운명이에요. 아무리 인간님이라도… 흐름을 바꾸진 못해요.
1402200016.english: We are destined to live as tools from the very beginning. No matter who you are, Human... you cannot change the flow.

1402200017.english: We have to change because we are human.

1402200018.korean: 네...? 인간이니까 바꿔야 한다는 게… 무슨…
1402200018.english: What...? Saying that we have to change because we're human... what...

1402200019.korean: 너흰 우리의 과학 기술로 낳은 자식이야. 절대 도구가 아니란다.
1402200019.english: You are children born of our science and technology. You are absolutely not tools.

1402200021.korean: 후대에 만약 너희들이 인간보다 번영하는 세상이 오더라도, 너희를 만든 창조주가 나쁜 놈이었던 기억은 없어야 하지 않겠느냐?
1402200021.english: Even if a world comes in the future where you prosper more than humans, shouldn't you not have any memory of your Creator being a bad guy?

1402200023.english: No, Melt, why are you crying?

1402200025.korean: 아니, 죄송하다니? 갑자기 왜 그러는 게냐?
1402200025.english: Wait, sorry? Why are you suddenly acting like this?

1402200026.korean: 흐읍… 으읍… 으윽… 흐으윽… 죄송해요… 정말 죄송해요…

1402200027.korean: 멜트… 갑자기 왜 그러는… 으음… 몸에서 힘이... 졸리구나…
1402200027.english: Melt… why are you suddenly acting like this… hmm… the strength in my body… I guess I’m sleepy…

1402200028.english: You said the wrong thing, human...

1402200029.korean: …지금이라도 기업을 거스르지 않겠다, 얌전히 따르겠다 말씀하셔야 했어요.
1402200029.english: … Even now, you should have said that you would not go against the company and would obediently follow its lead.

1402200031.english: Please... may you have only sweet dreams... before you go...

1402200034.english: (In the end, you can't escape it.)

1402200035.korean: (스스로 목숨을 끊거나 폐기된 동형기들이 옳았던 거야.)
1402200035.english: (The identical units that took their own lives or were scrapped were right.)

1402200039.english: (I… don’t want to live this kind of life anymore.)

1402200040.korean: 안녕하세요 오늘의 오렌지에이드 라디오 오르카 라이브! 오라오라의 오렌지에이드에요! 오늘의 오라오라 라이브는 사령관님이 카라카스 인더스트리에서 있었던 일을 말해볼까요?
1402200040.english: Hello! This is Oraora's Orangeade, here for today's Orangeade Radio Orca Live! For today's Oraora Live, shall we have the Commander talk about what happened at Caracas Industries?

1402200041.korean: 간악한 구 인류 카라카스 회장이 벌였던 간악한 일들을 우리 사령관님께서는 철저한 작전과 명철한 머리로 착착! 해결하셨답니다. 후후 사실 저도 옆에 있었는데 말이죠. 저도 선전전에 동원(중략)
1402200041.english: Our Commander systematically resolved the wicked deeds committed by the evil Chairman Caracas of the Old Humanity with thorough strategy and a brilliant mind! Hehe, actually, I was right there beside him. I was also mobilized for the propaganda campaign...

1402200042.korean: (중략)결국 이 계략은 성공해서 많은 바이오로이드 분들이 안전하게 사령관님과 오르카의 품으로 안기는데 성공했죠. 이렇게 보면 사령관님은 바이오로이드 분들을 정말 아끼시는 분이시죠!
1402200042.english: (...) In the end, this scheme succeeded, and many Bio-Roids were safely brought into the arms of the Commander and Orca. Looking at it this way, the Commander really cares for the Bio-Roids!

1402200044.korean: 지금 북아메리카에 계신 바이오로이드 분들께 알립니다. 어서 사령관님과 오르카호의 품으로 오세요. 여러분들을 위한 자리는 늘 준비되어 있습니다. 사령관님은 사려깊고 다정하신 분이시니까요!
1402200044.english: This is a message for the Bio-Roids currently in North America. Please come to the embrace of the Commander and the Orca. There is always a place for you. After all, the Commander is a thoughtful and kind person!

1402200046.korean: 아, 제 자리는 있으니 절대 절대! 제 자리는 안 돼요. 아~ 그 자리가 아닌가? 하여튼 저 오렌지에이드의 이름을 걸고 맹세할게요. 마지막 인간님은 절대 멸망전 인간님들과는 차원이 다른.
1402200046.english: Ah, I have a seat, so absolutely, absolutely! My seat is a no-go. Ah, is that not the right seat? Anyway, I swear on the name of this orangeade. The last human is absolutely on a completely different level from the humans before the apocalypse.

1402200050.korean: 마지막 인간님께선… 내 운명을 끊을 수 있을까?
1402200050.english: Will the last human... be able to break my fate?

1402200051.korean: 마지막… 인간님께선… 이런 날… 구해주실 수 있을까?
1402200051.english: Lastly... Human... will you be able to save me on a day like this?

1402200052.korean: 『그 마음을 꼭 간직해 줘 나처럼 되지 않도록』
1402200052.english: Please keep that feeling close so you don't end up like me.

1402200053.korean: 정말 내가 지켜냈던 마음을… 오르카에선 펼칠 수 있을까?
1402200053.english: Will I really be able to unfold the feelings I've protected... at Orca?

1402300001.english: Hahaha... Everyone, you've all gathered well.

1402300002.korean: 앨리스 씨… 오르카 SM클럽 설치를 기획하시는 건가요?
1402300002.english: Alice… are you planning to set up an Orca SM club?

1402300003.korean: 그럼요 리리스 씨. 주인님께서는 저희의 취향을 폭 넓게 이해 해주셔서 괜찮을 거예요.
1402300003.english: Of course, Ms. Lilith. It will be fine since Master has a broad understanding of our tastes.

1402300004.korean: 시티가드 쪽에선 반대할 것 같은데… 주인님께 저희 세계를 더 알려드리고 싶어요.
1402300004.english: I think the City Guard will object... but I want to let you know more about our world, Master.

1402300005.english: A deep... and dark world of fantasy.

1402300006.korean: 리리스 씨, 저희 클럽을 열성적으로 이끄실 임시 회장님을 모셔왔어요.
1402300006.english: Ms. Lilith, we have brought in an interim president to enthusiastically lead our club.

1402300007.korean: 반가워요, 여러분들. 이런 모습으로 나오긴 정말 처음이군요… 후훗.
1402300007.english: Nice to meet you all. It really is the first time I’ve appeared looking like this… Hehe.

1402300008.korean: 요즘은 교육에 신경 쓰느라 제 욕망을 발산하기 힘들었는데, 잘 됐어요.
1402300008.english: Lately, it has been hard to express my desires because I've been focusing on my education, so this worked out well.

1402300009.korean: 하아… 알렉산드라 님의 회초리는 볼 때마다 아름다워요,
1402300009.english: Haa... Alexandra's switch is beautiful every time I see it.

1402300010.english: Alexandra, where do you plan to park it?

1402300011.korean: 일단 아동 바이오로이드 분들 눈에 띄진 않는 곳에 있어야겠죠. 어른의 세계니 말이죠.
1402300011.english: For now, they should stay out of sight of the child bioroids. After all, it is the adult world.

1402300012.korean: 맞아요… 하아… 주인님이 술을 드시고 오신다면… 더 뜨겁겠군요?
1402300012.english: That's right... Haa... If Master comes back after drinking... it must be even hotter, right?

1402300013.korean: 금발 바보에게 방해받지 않고 주인님과 뜨거운 밤을… 하아…
1402300013.english: A hot night with Master without being disturbed by that blonde idiot… Haa…

1402300014.korean: 앨리스 씨, 그렇게 말씀하시면… 벌써 두근거리잖아요…
1402300014.english: Alice, if you say that… my heart is already pounding…

1402300015.korean: 후후, 양지에선 아닌 척하지만, 음지에선 잔뜩 욕망을 풀고 싶어하시는 분들이 아주 많죠.
1402300015.english: Hehe, there are quite a few people who pretend otherwise in the light, but are eager to unleash their full desires in the shadows.

1402300016.korean: SM클럽은 과격한 행위를 하는 곳이 아니라 체계적인 교육을 받는 상담소라고 생각해요.
1402300016.english: I think of SM clubs not as places for violent acts, but as counseling centers where systematic education is provided.

1402300017.korean: 맞아요. 가하는 쪽도 당하는 대상에 대해 사랑과 관심을 길러야 하는 훈련이 필요하죠.
1402300017.english: That's right. The perpetrator also needs training to cultivate love and interest in the victim.

1402300018.korean: 근데 지금 여기 모이신 분들 모두, 하는 쪽에 더 성향이 치우치지 않았나요?
1402300018.english: But aren't everyone gathered here leaning more toward doing it?

1402300019.korean: 전 당하는 쪽도 좋긴 하지만… 역시 누굴 체계적으로 가르치는 건 자신 없어요.
1402300019.english: I do enjoy being the one being taught, but... I'm not confident in teaching anyone systematically.

1402300020.korean: 그래요, 그럴 줄 알고 제가 당하는 쪽에 정통하신 특별 강사분을 모셔왔어요.
1402300020.english: That's right, knowing that would happen, I've brought in a special lecturer who is an expert on the side that gets taken advantage of.

1402300022.english: This is the new bioroid, isn't it?

1402300023.korean: 주인님께서 얼마나 많은 사랑을 주셨는지… 멜트씨께선 이틀 동안 못 일어났다고 들었어요.
1402300023.english: I heard that Mr. Melt couldn't get up for two days because of how much love the Master gave him...

1402300024.korean: 흥미롭네요, 이 정도로 당하는 쪽에 안목이 있으실 줄이야...
1402300024.english: That's interesting. I didn't know the one getting taken advantage of had this much insight...

1402300025.korean: 멜트 씨라면, 당하는 쪽에 흥미 있는 성인 바이오로이드 분들도 만족하실 거예요.
1402300025.english: If it's Melt, even adult bioroids who are interested in being the victim will be satisfied.

1402300026.korean: 여러분… 근데… 이런 클럽이 만들어진다는 게 사실이에요?
1402300026.english: Everyone... but... is it true that a club like this is being created?

1402300027.korean: 아직은 기획 단계긴 하지만... 일단은 강력하게 건의할 생각이에요.
1402300027.english: It is still in the planning stage, but... for now, I intend to make a strong suggestion.

1402300028.korean: 오르카는 대단한 곳이군요. 저는 여태껏… 제 욕망이… 음란한 건줄로만 알았는데…
1402300028.english: Orca is an amazing place. Until now... I thought my desires... were just lewd...

1402300029.korean: 그렇지 않아요. 멜트 씨의 취향은 지극히 정상이에요.
1402300029.english: That's not true. Mr. Melt's taste is perfectly normal.

1402300030.english: This is a really amazing place…? Ah?! Hmph…

1402300031.korean: 후훗, 신경을 자극하는 성대를 가지셔서 그런지 신음이 맛있네요. 포티아 뒤를 이을… 훌륭한 분이 되시겠어요,
1402300031.english: Hehe, perhaps because you have vocal cords that stimulate the nerves, your moans are delicious. You’re going to be a great successor to Portia…

1402300032.korean: 하아… 하아… 더, 더… 더 해주세요. 방금… 좋았어요. 하아…
1402300032.english: Haa... Haa... More, more... Please do more. Just now... That was good. Haa...

1402300033.english: That's great. It's been a long time since I met a student worth training.

1402300034.korean: 멜트 씨 목소리… 하아, 아주 좋아요… 간만에 저도 즐기고 싶군요.
1402300034.english: Mr. Melt's voice... Ah, it's really good... It's been a while, so I'd like to enjoy it too.

1402300035.korean: 아 참, 사실 이곳에 제가 특별한 손님 한 분을 더 모셨어요. 조금 있으면 도착하실 것 같네요.
1402300035.english: Oh, right, actually, I have one more special guest here. It looks like they will be arriving soon.

1402300036.korean: 알렉산드라! 이 정신 나간 건의안을 내가 허락할 줄 알았어?!
1402300036.english: Alexandra! Did you think I would approve this insane proposal?!

1402300037.korean: 아니었나요 사디어스? 요즘 새로운 취향에 눈을 뜨셨단 소문이 있던데?
1402300037.english: Wasn't that the case, Thaddeus? I heard a rumor that you've discovered some new tastes lately.

1402300038.korean: 으읍… 더, 더 세게 때려주세요… 아아…
1402300038.english: Ugh... Hit me harder, hit me harder... Ahh...

1402300039.korean: 난 절대 허락 못해! 오르카의 풍기를 얼마나 더 손상 시킬 셈이야?
1402300039.english: I absolutely cannot allow it! How much more do you intend to tarnish Orca's reputation?

1402300040.english: Ahh... I like it... I like it so much... Haa...

1402300041.korean: 역시 마조 전문가 다우시군요, 저도 주인님한테 예쁨을 받으려면... 더 분발해야겠어요.
1402300041.english: As expected of a masochist expert. If I want to be loved by my master... I'll have to work harder.

1402300042.korean: 소니아 씨도 어린이 대원 분들 눈에 띄지 않는 곳에 만든다면 괜찮다 하셨어요.
1402300042.english: Ms. Sonia also said that it would be fine if we made it in a place out of sight of the child members.

1402300043.korean: 참고로 이 클럽의 첫 VIP 회원이 소니아 씨인 건 아시죠?
1402300043.english: Just so you know, Ms. Sonia was the first VIP member of this club, right?

1402300045.korean: 자신의 일에 충실한 것도 좋지만… 자신 안에 쌓아둔 욕망을 해소하는 것도 좋아요 사디어스 님.
1402300045.english: It is good to be faithful to your work, but… it is also good to release the desires you have accumulated inside you, Sadius.

1402300046.korean: 경호대장! 난 동의하지 않아! 절대... 절대…
1402300046.english: Chief of Security! I don't agree! Absolutely... absolutely...

1402300047.korean: 후훗… 사디어스 씨? 왼쪽 팔목에 그거, 수갑 자국 아닌가요?
1402300047.english: Hehe... Mr. Thaddeus? Isn't that a handcuff mark on your left wrist?

1402300049.english: You say that... but your actions are honest.

1402300051.korean: 이번 SM클럽 계획안 심의를 허락해주신다면 소니아 씨와 같이 VIP 회원권을 드릴게요.
1402300051.english: If you approve the deliberation of this SM Club plan, I will give you a VIP membership along with Sonia.

1402300052.english: So you're basically saying you're giving me a bribe!

1402300053.korean: 주인님이 오셨을 때 가장 먼저 플레이를 즐기실 수 있는 회원권이에요.
1402300053.english: This is a membership that allows you to enjoy the game first when the Master arrives.

1402300054.english: … What do you think of me?!

1402300055.korean: 하아… 하아… 알렉산드라 니임… 정말… 사령관님… 과… 이런 플레이를 매일 매일… 할 수… 으흣…
1402300055.english: Haa... Haa... Alexandra... Really... Commander... and... to be able to... play like this... every single day... Hehe...

1402300056.korean: 그럼요 멜트 씨… 더 크게 비명을 질러보세요. 어서요… 자신을 해방하는 거예요…
1402300056.english: Of course, Mr. Melt… Scream louder. Come on… You are freeing yourself…

1402300058.korean: 날 모욕할 셈이야? 나를 회원권 따위로 꼬신단 말이야?
1402300058.english: Are you trying to insult me? Are you saying you're trying to lure me in with something like a membership?

1402300061.korean: 더 크게 울어 보세요, 어서, 더 크게…!

1402300062.korean: 황홀해요, 더 세게, 더 엄하게 절 교육시켜주세요…!
1402300062.english: It's ecstatic. Please educate me harder, more strictly…!

1402300064.korean: 다음 날, 시티가드 본부로 배달 온 익명의 택배에는 VIP 회원증 2개가 들어있었고,
1402300064.english: The next day, an anonymous package delivered to City Guard headquarters contained two VIP membership cards, and

1402300065.korean: 오르카 SM클럽 기획안은 '성인 교육기관'이라는 명목으로 시티가드 심의에 통과됐다.
1402300065.english: The Orca SM Club proposal passed the City Guard review under the pretext of an 'adult educational institution'.

1001407902.korean: 요즘 드링크에 넣을 과일이랑&n꿀을 지니아님이랑&n키우고 있어요~​&n아~ 사령관님도&n좋은 걸 하나 키우고&n계신다던데…&n언제… 맛 볼 수 있죠?​
1001407902.english: Lately, I've been growing fruit and honey to put in drinks with Jinia~ Ah~ I heard you're growing something nice too, Commander... When... can I taste it?

1001407903.korean: 꿀은 피로회복에도 좋고&n정력에도 탁월한 효과가&n있다고 하네요!​&n그걸 왜 알려주냐구요?&n그야 사령관님의&n건강을 신경쓰니 그렇죠~​
1001407903.english: They say honey is good for relieving fatigue and has excellent effects on stamina! You ask why I'm telling you this? Well, it's because I care about your health, Commander~

1001407904.korean: 이 병 말이에요,&n딱 봐도 정신이 불끈!&n하지 않나요? 우후후~​&n입에 넣기도 좋고…&n음? 사령관님…&n이 병… 왜 그렇게&n쳐다보시는 거예요~?​
1001407904.english: You know this bottle, doesn't it just make you snap out of it at first glance? Woohoo~ It’s easy to put in your mouth too... Hmm? Commander... this bottle... why are you staring at me like that?

1001407905.english: Every time I see it… I want to drink it all… until my stomach is full.

1001407906.english: I'll show you how I get all worked up without any tonics... Here, feels good, right?

1001407907.korean: 아앗… 역시 사령관님,&n건강해서 다행이에요~&n그러니까 한 번 더&n제 앞에서 가득…&n해주실 수 있죠?​
1001407907.english: Ah... As expected of you, Commander, I'm so glad you're healthy~ So, you can fill me up one more time... right?

1001407908.korean: 그, 그러지 마세요…&n촬영할 때 눈에 띄잖아요…​
1001407908.english: D-Please don't do that... It stands out during the shoot...

1001407909.english: Don't hold back... Please give way to my skin... Commander...

1001407910.korean: 쭉~ 들이키세요, 사령관님.&n오늘은 절대 사령관님께서&n쉽사리 잠들 수 없는…&n그런 밤이 될 거예요.​
1001407910.english: Drink it all up, Commander. Tonight is going to be a night where you absolutely won't be able to fall asleep easily...

1000710018.korean: 역시 성공인가요? 하나밖에 없는 사령관님이 몸도, 마음도 전부… 후훗. 어린아이라고만 생각했는데, 잘 자란 것 같아 뿌듯해요. 어머나, 몸에 닿는 이건…​ 들리는 소문에 의하면 사령관님께서 요즘 이 병을 본 뜰 때 보다 더 성장했다던데… 사령관님을 보살피는 엄마로서, 확인해 봐도 될까요? 사령관 쉐입 특제 드링크… 허위 광고라고 클레임 들어오면 곤란해지니까요, 응?
1000710018.english: So, was it a success after all? My one and only Commander, body and mind, completely… Hehe. I only thought of you as a little kid, but I feel proud to see how well you’ve grown. Oh my, what is this touching your body… According to rumors, you’ve grown even more lately than when this bottle was molded… As your mom, may I check? The Commander-Shaped Special Drink… it would be troublesome if we got a claim for false advertising, you know?

1001407942.korean: 라이언… 그만 밀… 아앗?!​&n그 리본 멋대로 풀지 마!&n사령관님이 알아서 푸실 거야!​
1001407942.english: Ryan… stop pushing… Ah?! Don’t untie that ribbon on your own! The Commander will take care of it!

1001407943.korean: 라이언이 말하길, 수컷은…&n정성스레 포장된 선물을&n뜯어보는 걸 크리스마스 당일까지&n참지 못한다고 하더라구요.&n어떻게 아냐구요?&n당연히 우리 라이언도…&n사랑받고 싶은 암컷인 걸요?​
1001407943.english: Ryan said that males… can’t wait until Christmas Day to open a carefully wrapped gift. How do I know, you ask? Because, of course, our Ryan is… a female who wants to be loved, too!

1001407944.korean: 오늘 워울프 씨가 절 보더니,&n옷이 좀 친다고 멋대로 얘기 하더군요.​&n멍청이 같이… 제가 아무 것도 모르는&n꼬마 앤 줄 알고 있더라니까요?​
1001407944.english: Mr. Werewolf saw me today and just blurted out that my clothes were a bit tacky. Like an idiot... He really thought I was a clueless little kid.

1001407945.korean: 짜잔! 나, 나는 무서운 아기곰이다!&n사령관님 주면~ 안 잡아… 먹…​&n하 씨이… 지금 이 말…&n언니들한테는 비밀로 해주세요…
1001407945.english: Ta-da! I, I am a scary baby bear! If you give it to me, Commander~ I won't... eat... Ah, damn... Please keep what I just said... a secret from the older sisters...

1001407946.korean: 저, 저도 이번에…&n새로운 총을 선물 받고 싶어요…&n사령관님의, 그 늠름한 총 말이에요…​
1001407946.english: Um, I'd like to receive a new gun as a gift this time too... I mean, the Commander's, that majestic gun...

1001407947.korean: … 혹시 탄창은 넉넉하게 가지고 오셨습니까?​&n특별한 날인데… 오늘 밤은 쉴 새 없이…&n저한테만 쏴 주시는 거죠?​
1001407947.english: … By any chance, did you bring plenty of magazines? It’s a special day… so tonight… you’re going to shoot non-stop… and only at me, right?

1001407948.korean: 사령관님, 이런 말 하긴 싫지만…&n정말 짐승 같아요!​
1001407948.english: Commander, I hate to say this, but... you're really like a beast!

1001407949.korean: 사령관님…&n제가 침대에서&n거친 말 쓰는 것도 보고 싶으시다고요?​&n…야, 입 두고 뭐하냐?&n…죄송해요. 그, 근데 어땠어요?​
1001407949.english: Commander… You want to see me use rough language in bed?… Hey, what are you doing with your mouth?… I’m sorry. B-but how was it?

1001407950.korean: 사령관님만의&n단단한 총을 더 조작해보고 싶은데…​&n한 번만 더 직접 장전 해봐도 될까요?​
1001407950.english: Commander, I’d like to handle your sturdy gun a bit more… May I load it myself just one more time?

1000710022.korean: 제게도 이런 날이 올 줄은 몰랐네요… 어떻게든 사령관님께 예뻐 보이고 싶어서…​ 사령관님께선 값지고 비싼 별의 별 선물을 많이 받아 보셨겠지만, ​제가 직접… 아무나 가질 수 없는 특별한 선물이 되어 드리고 싶어요. 라이언도 진짜… 그만 밀어…! 내가 알아서 할 테니까… ​어디 한 번… 포장… 풀어보시겠어요?
1000710022.english: I never thought a day like this would come for me… I just wanted to look pretty for you, Commander, no matter what… You’ve probably received all sorts of valuable and expensive gifts, but I want to personally… become a special gift that not just anyone can have. Ryan, seriously… stop pushing this…! I’ll take care of it… so… would you… go ahead… unwrap it?

1500100385.korean: 잘 키운 아들 열 딸 안 부럽다
1500100385.english: A well-raised son is worth more than ten daughters.

1500100388.english: The boss of our neighborhood's nepotism

1500100395.english: The wedding is in the lab

1500110030.korean: 한참이 지난 후, 오르카의 함교로 두 사람이 들어왔다.
1500110030.english: After quite some time had passed, two people entered the Orca's bridge.

1500110031.korean: 잠시 후, 오르카 대원으로 보이는 바이오로이드가 화물칸으로 들어왔다.
1500110031.english: Shortly after, a bioroid that appeared to be an Orca member entered the cargo hold.

1411100122.korean: 흐음… 아이디어는 늘 있지만… 이번에도 역시나, 조금 어려운 주문이네요.
1411100122.english: Hmm... I always have ideas, but... as always, this is a bit of a difficult request.

1411100123.korean:
베타는 늘 블랙 계열의 옷만 입다보니, 화사한 톤이 머릿속에 잘 그려지진 않네요. 
솔직히 조금 우중충한 특유의 분위기도 그렇고…
1411100123.english:
Since Beta always wears black clothes, I can't really picture him in bright tones.
 Honestly, there's also that unique, slightly gloomy atmosphere...

1411100124.korean: 흐음… 게다가 베타의 다이너마이트한 볼륨을 감당할 수 있는 옷이라…
1411100124.english: Hmm... Besides, clothes that can handle Beta's dynamite volume...

1411100126.korean: 무리는 아니지만, 제게 있어선 여러가지 실패 요인에 맞설 큰 도전이 될지도 모르겠네요.
1411100126.english: It’s not unreasonable, but for me, it might be a big challenge to face various factors that could lead to failure.

1411100127.korean: …설마 실패작을 만들어 낼 지도 모른다는 소리?
1411100127.english: … You don't mean to say that we might produce a failure?

1581000002.korean:
쿠후후훗~! 사령관님 왜 그러십니까? 
AGS 대표인 제가 기획한 안건들이 너무도 훌륭하여 할 말을 잃으셨습니까?
1581000002.english:
Kuhuhuhut~! Commander, what is the problem?
 Are you speechless because the proposals I, the representative of AGS, planned are so excellent?

1581000003.korean: 자 사령관님, 맡겨만 주신다면 이 알프레드가 훌륭하게 처리하겠습니다!
1581000003.english: Now, Commander, just leave it to me, and I, Alfred, will handle it brilliantly!

1581000004.korean:
- 카라카스의 일이 끝난 이후 휴식기를 갖고 있던 어느 날 새해 아침,
별안간 알프레드가 내게 찾아오더니 대뜸 회의록을 가져왔다며 서류들을 내밀었다.
1581000004.english:
One New Year's morning, while I was taking a break after finishing work in Caracas,
 Suddenly, Alfred came to see me and abruptly handed me some documents, saying he had brought the meeting minutes.

1581000005.korean:
- 내가 미처 깨닫지 못하고 있던 AGS의 고충과 불편 사항을 조사해 달라는 부탁을 들어준 건 고맙지만…
진위가 상당히 의심스러웠다.
1581000005.english:
I appreciate you granting my request to investigate the difficulties and inconveniences of AGS that I hadn't even realized, but...
 The authenticity was highly doubtful.

1581000006.korean: 으익?! 사령관님! 이 유능한 Mr~~ 알프레드가 밤새 피곤한 눈을 비벼가며 작성안 회의록에 무슨 문제라도 있습니까?!
1581000006.english: Eek?! Commander! Is there something wrong with the draft meeting minutes, even though this competent Mr. Alfred stayed up all night rubbing his tired eyes?!

1581000007.korean:
- AGS가 비빌 눈이 있나… 
가끔 알프레드는 AGS가 아닌 것 같단 생각이 자꾸 든다…
1581000007.english:
- Does AGS have eyes to stand a chance against...
 Sometimes I keep getting the feeling that Alfred isn't an AGS...

1581000009.korean: - 나는 알프레드가 내민 AGS의 요구사항을 손가락으로 가리켰다.
1581000009.english: I pointed my finger at the AGS requirements Alfred held out.

1581000010.korean:
멸망 전, 구 인류가 서로 이어지기 위해 만들었던 버라이어티 프로그램입니다!
이젠 AGS끼리도 당당히 사랑을 나눌 수 있어야 한다고 저 또한 생각했습니다!
1581000010.english:
This is a variety program created by the ancient human race to stay connected to one another before the apocalypse!
 I also thought that now, AGS members should be able to proudly share their love with each other!

1581000011.english: It's obvious who the proposer is without even looking.

1581000012.korean:
역시 저와 가까운 AGS가 낸 의견입니다, 마왕군이 주인공인 AGS 영화를 제작하는 것입죠! 
AGS 중에서도 연기를 배우고 싶은 분이 있다는 건 사령관님께서도 잘 아시지 않습니까?
1581000012.english:
As expected, this is an idea proposed by an AGS member close to me: to produce an AGS movie with the Demon Lord's army as the protagonists!
 Commander, you are well aware that there are some within the AGS who want to learn acting, aren't you?

1581000013.korean:
네에에에에~~~?! 어째서 기각인 겁니까, 사령관님!
바이오로이드 분들의 권리는 챙겨주시면서 어째서 우리 AGS의 권리는?!
1581000013.english:
Nyaaaaaa~~~?! Why is it rejected, Commander!
 You look after the rights of the Bio-Roids, so why not the rights of us AGS?!

1581000014.korean: - 이건 누가 봐도 골타리온과 삿갓의 의견만을 반영하여 나온 엉터리 회의록이 틀림없다.
1581000014.english: Anyone can see that this is undoubtedly a nonsensical meeting record that reflects only the opinions of Goltarion and the Straw Hat.

1581000015.korean:
이런! 절 의심하시는 겁니까? 
제 측근들도 충분한 조사를 거치고 나서야, 의견을 전달할 수 있습니다!
1581000015.english:
Oh no! Are you doubting me?
 Even my close associates can only convey their opinions after conducting a thorough investigation!

1581000016.korean: 네에에에에에에~~~? 그건 복지 차원에서 보급하는 거지, 절대로 뇌물 따위가 아닙니다!
1581000016.english: Whateeeeee~~~? That's being distributed for welfare purposes, it is absolutely not a bribe or anything like that!

1581000017.korean:
- 요즘 오르카 기술부 측에서 허구헌날 전지가 없어진단 보고가 들린다.
필요 이상으로 알프레드가 AGS 대표의 권한을 남용하는 건 아닐까 심히 우려스럽다...
1581000017.english:
Lately, we've been hearing reports from the Orca technical department that batteries are disappearing day in and day out.
 I am deeply concerned that Alfred might be abusing his authority as the AGS representative more than necessary...

1581000018.korean: …그 고철 프레임을 벅벅 긁으며 만든 허무맹랑한 안건으로 주인님의 심기를 건드리고 계신 겁니까?
1581000018.english: … Are you upsetting the Master with a preposterous proposal concocted by scraping that scrap metal frame?

1581000019.korean: 고철 프레임이라뇨!? 이 여린 감정 모듈을 후벼 팔 정도의 망언이십니다!
1581000019.english: A scrap metal frame!? That is an outrageous remark, enough to gouge into this fragile emotional module!

1581000020.korean: 모듈이 후벼 파였는지 안 후벼 파였는지 분해해서 확인해봐도 되겠습니까?
1581000020.english: May I disassemble the module to check if it has been gouged out?

1581000021.korean: 이건 AGS 탄압… 히익?! 바닐라 양! 어째서 총구를 들이미시는 겁니까?
1581000021.english: This is AGS oppression… Eek?! Miss Vanilla! Why are you pointing your gun at me?

1581000022.korean:
물리적으로 후벼 파 드리겠습니다.
자꾸 쓸데없는 일로 주인님의 심기를 건드리지 마세요.
1581000022.english:
I will physically dig it out for you.
 Please stop upsetting your master with useless things.

1581000023.korean: - 바닐라는 총을 치운 뒤에도 가지고 왔던 음식을 보더니 재차 알프레드에게 투덜댔다.
1581000023.english: Even after putting the gun away, Vanilla looked at the food she had brought and grumbled to Alfred again.

1581000024.korean:
하아… 주인님을 위해 준비한 간식이…. 댁의 휴지 조각 회의록을 검토하느라
시간을 낭비하는 바람에 다 딱딱하게 굳지 않았습니까?
1581000024.english:
Haa... The snack I prepared for Master... while reviewing your scrap-of-tissue meeting minutes
 Didn't everything harden because you wasted time?

1581000025.english: Um... well... I'm sorry, Miss Vanilla.

1581000027.korean:
아니요, 미안해하실 필요 없습니다.
사과는 나중에 고철상에 가셔서 해도 늦지 않으니까요.
1581000027.english:
No, you don't need to apologize.
 It won't be too late to apologize later at the scrap metal dealer.

1581000029.korean: - 나는 황급히 바닐라와 알프레드의 싸움을 막아세웠다.
1581000029.english: I hurriedly stopped Vanilla and Alfred's fight.

1581000031.korean:
엥?! 그게 무슨 말씀이십니까 사령관님! 지금 그 말씀은... 
곧, 저 알프레드를 대표로 인정하지 않는단 말씀이십니까?!
1581000031.english:
Huh?! What do you mean, Commander! What you just said is...
 So, are you saying that you do not recognize me, Alfred, as the representative?!

1581000032.english: Of course it would be Goltarion and the Straw Hat, wouldn't it?

1581000033.korean:
다른 AGS 분들은 제 의견을 듣지 않습니다! 적극적인 의견도 내지 않고...
매일 바쁘다, 뭐하다 자기 할 말만 툭툭 뱉곤 거들떠보지도 않는단 말입니다!
1581000033.english:
The other AGS members don't listen to my opinions! They don't even actively voice their views...
 Every day they just brush off being busy or whatever, spouting only what they want to say without even giving me a second glance!

1581000034.korean:
사정이 이렇다 보니 겨우 저희 셋이서 이 어려운 와중에도 
AGS의 권리와 복지를 위한 투쟁을 이어가고 있는 것 아니겠습니까?!
1581000034.english:
Given the circumstances, the three of us barely managed to... even amidst these difficulties
 Aren't we continuing the struggle for the rights and welfare of AGS?!

1581000036.korean:
주인님께서는 지금 당신이 대표성을 띠고 있지만, 
모든 AGS의 의견을 듣지 않았다는 것을 지적하고 계십니다.
1581000036.english:
Master, although you are currently acting as the representative,
 You are pointing out that not all AGS opinions were heard.

1581000038.english: I, strictly through a fair and square election…

1581000039.korean:
주인님. 최근 펍 헤드 님께서 누군가에게 대량의 고급 전지를 받고 여론을 무마 중이란 소문이 들립니다.
덧붙여, 알프레드 님께 근거 없는 말로 명예훼손을 할 시, 체포 및 구금이 있을 것이라며 엄포를 놨다고 합니다.
1581000039.english:
Master. I have heard rumors recently that Pub Head is trying to quell public opinion after receiving a large quantity of high-quality batteries from someone.
 In addition, it is said that Alfred was threatened with arrest and detention if he defamed anyone with baseless claims.

1581000040.korean: 이, 이건… AGS 대표로서 행할 수 있는 권한 행사…
1581000040.english: Th-this is… the exercise of authority I can exercise as the representative of AGS…

1581000041.korean: 하아... 사령관님께서 그렇게까지 말씀하신다면… 다시 회의록과 건의사항을 제출하도록 하겠습니다.
1581000041.english: Sigh... If the Commander insists on doing so... I will resubmit the meeting minutes and suggestions.

1581000042.korean: 그리고 저희도 합법적으로 저희의 목소리를 낼 수 있는 회의 기구를 만들겠습니다!
1581000042.english: And we will also create a council where we can legally make our voices heard!

1581000043.korean: 당연하지요! 다른 AGS 분들의 의견들도 충분히 반영해오겠습니다!
1581000043.english: Of course! We will fully incorporate the opinions of the other AGS members as well!

1581000044.english: What? Are you asking for advice?

1581000045.korean:
- AGS한테 공동체 의식은 희미한 편이겠지만…
바이오로이드라면 AGS에게 보다 더 이해가 쉽도록 설명해줄 수 있을 것이다.
1581000045.english:
- AGS might have a faint sense of community, but…
 If it were a bioroid, it would be able to explain it to AGS in a way that is easier to understand.

1581000047.english: … Miss Vanilla? Aren't we really close?

1581000048.korean: 닥치세요. 당장 분해해서 그 머리만 떼어내 알람 시계로 만들어버리기 전에.
1581000048.english: Shut up. Before I take it apart right now, rip off that head, and turn it into an alarm clock.

1581000049.english: Eek... I'll look for someone else!

1581000050.english: Sigh... I worked so hard on this...

1581000051.korean: - 알프레드가 사령관실을 빠져나간 후, 바닐라는 내게 미지근해진 식사를 권했다.
1581000051.english: After Alfred left the commander's office, Vanilla offered me a lukewarm meal.

1581000052.korean:
- 물론… 알프레드의 회의록을 검토하는 동안 식긴 했지만...
바닐라의 성의를 무시할 순 없어, 한 입 떠먹었다.
1581000052.english:
- Of course… it did cool down while reviewing Alfred’s minutes, though…
 I couldn't ignore Vanilla's sincerity, so I took a bite.

1581000054.korean: 저, 정말입니까? 헤… 헤헤?! 흐흠! 흐음… 흐음…
1581000054.english: Me, really? Heh... Hehe?! Ahem! Hmm... Hmm...

1581000055.korean:
- 순간이지만 바닐라가 환하게 웃음 지었지만 이내 황급히 입을 가렸다.
저 표정은 진짜 귀하니 사진으로 남겨놨으면 좋을 텐데…
1581000055.english:
Vanilla smiled brightly for a moment, but then hurriedly covered her mouth.
 That expression is really precious, so it would be nice to capture it in a photo…

1581000056.korean:
이젠 펙스 회장님까지 되시지 않으셨습니까? 대원 분들께 파티를 여는 게 어떤가 싶어 여쭤봤습니다만은… 다들 바쁘다고 하셔서… 
멸망 전 인간 님들이 먹던 신년 음식들을 만들어보았습니다.
1581000056.english:
Haven't you even become the Chairman of PEX by now? I asked the members if we could throw a party, but... everyone said they were busy...
 I tried making the New Year's foods that humans used to eat before the apocalypse.

1581000057.korean:
- 하긴, 요새 업무량이 너무 늘어나, 퇴근 시간까지 다 끝내지 못하는 일이 산더미다.
이젠 지휘관들을 직접 만나는 것보단, 화상으로 보고받는 게 익숙할 정도이니…
1581000057.english:
Actually, the workload has increased so much lately that there is a mountain of work I cannot finish by the time I leave work.
 It has reached the point where I am more used to receiving reports via video than meeting commanders in person…

1581000058.korean:
주인님의 둔감한 시간 개념 때문에 아무 일도 없이 지나가는 거지만...
무시하기엔 양심이 찔려… 뭐라도 해드렸습니다.
1581000058.english:
It's just passing by without anything happening because of Master's insensitive sense of time, but...
 My conscience bothered me too much to ignore it... so I did something for you.

1581000059.korean:
- 물론 옛날처럼 모든 오르카 대원들이 한 자리에 모여 새해를 기념하는 건 어떨까 싶기도 싶었지만…
저항군의 활동 반경이 넓어지고, 전과는 비교할 수 없이  쏟아지는 업무 때문에 모두가 상당히 바빠졌다.
1581000059.english:
Of course, I did wonder if it would be nice to have all the Orca members gather in one place to celebrate the New Year like in the old days, but…
 The resistance's range of activity expanded, and everyone became extremely busy due to the flood of work that was incomparable to before.

1581000061.korean: -바닐라는 별안간 나를 부르더니 빤히, 오랫동안 나를 지켜보다 이내 말을 이었다.
1581000061.english: Vanilla suddenly called out to me, stared at me intently for a long time, and then continued speaking.

1581000062.english: By the way… did you really enjoy that snack?

1581000065.korean: - 바닐라는 자신의 손에 들린 모형 케이크를 유심히 쳐다보다 고개를 도리도리 내저었다.
1581000065.english: Vanilla stared intently at the model cake in her hand, then shook her head.

1581000067.english: May I ask you just one thing, Alfred?

1581000068.korean: 알프레드, 이 회의록의 문제점이 뭐라고 생각해?
1581000068.english: Alfred, what do you think is the problem with these minutes?

1581000069.korean: 정말 AGS들 의견을 받은 거 맞아?
1581000069.english: Are you sure you really received feedback from the AGS?

1581000070.english: … What is the program called 'Erectile Science'?

1581000071.korean: 그래… 그렇다 치자. 이건 또 뭐야?
1581000071.english: Okay... let's just say that. What is this now?

1581000073.korean: …들고 온 게 너무 속 보인다고 생각 안 해?
1581000073.english: … Don't you think what you brought is so transparent?

1581000074.korean: 알프레드. 나도 AGS들 권리를 챙겨주고 싶어.
1581000074.english: Alfred. I want to look after the rights of the AGS too.

1581000075.korean: 근데 너랑 네 측근들의 요구사항만 써왔잖아.
1581000075.english: But you've only been writing down the demands of you and your associates.

1581000076.korean: 주기적으로 불만 있는 AGS들한테 고급 전지를 푼다는 소문이 있던데?
1581000076.english: I heard a rumor that they periodically give out premium batteries to the disgruntled AGS members.

1581000077.english: Alfred. I have a favor to ask.

1581000078.korean: 정말 네가 AGS의 대표라면 제대로 된 회의록을 가져 와.
1581000078.english: If you really are the representative of AGS, bring proper meeting minutes.

1581000080.english: Who is supporting you right now?

1581000082.korean: 다음 선거 땐 널 끌어내리겠단 이야기도 있더라.
1581000082.english: I heard there is talk of bringing you down in the next election.

1581000084.english: If Alfred really does represent the group,

1581000085.english: I hope you communicate properly with other AGS.

1581000086.korean: 에이다랑 알바트로스야 바빠서 어쩔 수 없다지만…
1581000086.english: I know Ada and Albatross are busy so it can't be helped, but...

1581000087.korean: 다른 AGS는 상당히 불만이 많아 보이던데?
1581000087.english: The other AGS seemed to have quite a lot of complaints, though?

1581000089.korean: 이번엔 전지 안 뿌리고 제대로 의사결정할 거지?
1581000089.english: You're going to make a proper decision this time without scattering batteries, right?

1581000090.korean: AGS 말고 오르카 대원들한테도 한 번 자문 받아보고.
1581000090.english: Try consulting with the Orca members as well, not just the AGS.

1581000091.korean: 응, 오르카 애들이 잘 가르쳐 줄 거야.
1581000091.english: Yeah, the Orca kids will teach you well.

1581000092.english: Mmm, no. It's fine. It's delicious.

1581000093.korean: 그나저나 무슨 일로 이런 걸 다 준비했어?
1581000093.english: Anyway, what brought you all this?

1581000094.english: I am really busy, of course.

1581000096.korean: 당장 이벤트 연다고 파견나간 대원들을 소집할 수도 없고…
1581000096.english: We can't exactly call up the dispatched personnel right away just to hold an event...

1581000098.english: Yeah. It was delicious, thank you.

1582000001.korean: 알프레드. 우리가 밤새워 짠 건의사항을 매지컬 젠틀맨이 들어준다고 했나?
1582000001.english: Alfred. Did the Magical Gentleman say he would grant the suggestions we stayed up all night working on?

1582000002.korean:
맞네 알프레드. 내가 올린 안건은 어떻게 됐지?
이번엔 정말로 내 외로움을 채워줄 섹시한 AI와 맺어질 수 있는 절호의 기회라네.
1582000002.english:
That's right, Alfred. What happened to the proposal I submitted?
 This time, it is a golden opportunity to be united with a sexy AI that will truly fill my loneliness.

1582000003.korean:
…사령관님께선 전면적으로 회의록에서 나온 요구사항에 대해 반려하셨습니다. 
일이 많이 어려우면 바이오로이드 분들께 자문을 구하라 하셨습죠…
1582000003.english:
… The Commander completely rejected the requirements stated in the meeting minutes.
 You told me to seek advice from the Bio-Roids if things get too difficult...

1582000004.korean: 골타리온. 자네의 상관인 뽀끄루 낭자한테 자문하는 건 어떻겠나?
1582000004.english: Goltarion, why don't you consult your superior, Lady Pokkuru?

1582000005.korean: 쓸데없는 소리! 우리 일 때문에 대마왕님을 끌어들일 순 없다!
1582000005.english: Nonsense! We can't drag the Great Demon King into this for our own business!

1582000006.korean: 끄응… 정말 큰일이군요, 시작부터 엄청난 난관이 기다릴 줄이야…
1582000006.english: Ugh... This is really a big problem. To think such a huge obstacle awaited right from the start...

1582000007.korean: 대체 사령관은 정확히 어떤 걸 원하는 거지? 말 그대로 모든 로봇들의 의견 말인가?
1582000007.english: What exactly does the commander want? Literally, the opinions of all the robots?

1582000008.korean:
뭐... 그런 거 아니겠습니까? 에이다 양이나 알바트로스 나리께선 관심이 없다 했었만…
최근, 오르카 시크릿 네트워크를 보니, 뭔가 불만이 있는 것 같긴 하더군요.
1582000008.english:
Well... isn't that how it is? Miss Ada and Lord Albatross said they weren't interested, but...
 Recently, looking at the Orca Secret Network, it did seem like they had some complaints.

1582000009.korean: 얼마 전 볼_빨간_에이다 라는 로봇 추정 유저가 네 험담과 함께 지지를 철회한다고 발언했다.
1582000009.english: Not long ago, a user presumed to be a robot named Bolbbalgan_Ada stated that they were withdrawing their support along with badmouthing you.

1582000010.korean: 흐흠… 이거야 원… 정말 분발하긴 해야겠습니다.
1582000010.english: Hmm... Good grief... I really need to step up my game.

1582000011.korean:
알프레드. 대마왕님을 봐도 알 수 있지만…
무릇 로봇이란, 강력한 주인이 자신을 리드해 주길 바라는 법이다.
1582000011.english:
Alfred. You can tell just by looking at the Great Demon King, but...
 A robot naturally desires a powerful master to lead it.

1582000012.korean:
뭇 AGS가 그렇진 않을 걸세. 난 개인적으로 순종적인 AI가 더 좋다네.
퇴근한 날, 현관문을 연다면 아리따운 목소리로 "오셨습니까"... 하는.
1582000012.english:
Most AGS probably aren't like that. Personally, I prefer obedient AI.
 On the day I get off work, if I open the front door, a lovely voice says, "Welcome home"...

1582000013.english: Satgat, cut off the power supply for just two hours.

1582000014.korean:
으음… 어쨌든 중요한 건... 
우리도 바이오로이드 분들처럼 정상적인 절차를 통해 활동을 해야 인정받는단 겁니다.
1582000014.english:
Hmm... Anyway, the important thing is...
 It means that we, too, must operate through normal procedures to be recognized, just like the bioroids.

1582000015.korean:
여태껏 얘기하지 않았던 여성으로 판단되는 AGS의 의견도 들어보고...
우리의 논리회로로 생각하지 못했던 사고를 하는 바이오로이드를 포섭하는 것도 좋아 보이네.
1582000015.english:
Let's also hear the opinion of the AGS, who is judged to be female and hasn't spoken about it until now...
 It seems like a good idea to recruit bioroids that think beyond what our logic circuits could conceive.

1582000016.korean:
웬만해선 매지컬 젠틀맨의 총애를 받는 자들을 우선으로 두는 게 좋겠다. 
이를 테면… 알파 양처럼. 그녀들 의견이 보충된다면 우리 안건도 충분히 납득시킬 수 있겠지.
1582000016.english:
It would be best to prioritize those favored by the Magical Gentleman.
 For example… like Miss Alpha. If their opinions are supplemented, we should be able to sufficiently convince them of our proposal.

1582000017.korean:
그런데 뽀끄루 양에게 조언을 구하는 건 골타리온이 안 된다고 했는데… 
삿갓도 자문 역에 알맞는 바이로오이드 분 좀 추천해 주시지 않겠습니까?
1582000017.english:
But Goltarion said we shouldn't ask Miss Pokkuru for advice...
 Could you please recommend a viro-like person suitable for the advisor role, Satgatdo?

1582000018.korean: 으음… 아자즈 낭자는 어떤가. AGS를 가장 잘 아는 바이오로이드지 않나.
1582000018.english: Hmm... How about Lady Azaz? Isn't she the bioroid who knows AGS best?

1582000019.korean: 언젠가 눈을 떴을 때 드라큐리나 양의 AI 스피커로 개조되어 있는 걸 원한다면 그래도 좋다.
1582000019.english: If you want to wake up someday and find yourself transformed into Miss Dracurina's AI speaker, that is fine.

1582000020.korean: 정말 난관이군요… 저희에게 있어 선택의 폭이 너무 좁은 것 같습니다.
1582000020.english: This is really a challenge... It seems our range of choices is too narrow.

1582000021.korean: 사실 나는 AGS 회의 구성에는 독립체 AGS만이 거론될 수 있어야 한다고 생각하진 않네.
1582000021.english: Actually, I don't think that only the independent AGS should be discussed in the composition of the AGS meeting.

1582000022.korean: 이를테면… 요즘 섹시한 논리 회로를 장착하며 오르카에 파란을 일으키는 후긴과 무닌 낭자도 후보로 안성 맞춤이라 생각하네.
1582000022.english: For example… I think Lady Hugin and Lady Munin, who are causing a stir in Orca these days by equipping themselves with sexy logic circuits, would also be perfect candidates.

1582000023.korean:
잠깐, 그분들 개발된 지 얼마 안 된 인공지능 아닙니까?
혹시나 또 보호법으로 잡혀가면 이젠 사식으로 전지 안 넣어 드립니다?
1582000023.english:
Wait, aren't those AIs recently developed?
 If you get arrested again under the protection law, we won't provide you with batteries in your prison meals anymore.

1582000024.korean: 잠깐… 딱 하나 알맞은 대원이 떠올랐다.
1582000024.english: Wait... just one suitable member came to mind.

1582000025.english: … What about a member with a form familiar to us?

1582000026.korean:
친근한 형태라니요? 
바이오로이드 분들은 저희와 확연히 다른 유기체 피부로 덮여있지 않습니까?
1582000026.english:
What do you mean by a friendly shape?
 Aren't the bioroids covered in organic skin that is distinctly different from ours?

1582000027.korean: 잘 모르겠군. 여태껏 나는 그런 바이오로이드를 본 적은 없네.
1582000027.english: I'm not sure. I've never seen a bioroid like that before.

1582000028.korean:
대마왕님을 비롯한 다른 오르카 대원들은 가슴 프레임이 우리와 다르게 큰 지방과 부드러운 피부로 덮여있지.
하지만 그에 비해 아주 딱딱하고 단단해보이는 대원도 분명히 있다.
1582000028.english:
The Great Demon King and the other Orca members have chest frames that are covered in large amounts of fat and soft skin, unlike us.
 However, compared to that, there are certainly members who look very stiff and solid.

1582000029.korean: 생각해보니… 어느 낭자인지 감이 잡히긴 하는군.
1582000029.english: Come to think of it… I do have a hunch which lady it is.

1582000030.korean: 거기 덩치 큰 남자 세 분이서 뭘 하고 계신 겁니까?
1582000030.english: What are those three big men doing over there?

1582000031.korean:
AGS의 권익에 대해 회로를 맞대며 심도 있는 토론을 하는 중이었네.
그나저나 에이다 낭자. 오늘은 따로 바쁜 일이 없나 보군?
1582000031.english:
We were in the middle of an in-depth discussion, putting our circuits together, regarding the rights and interests of AGS.
 By the way, Miss Ada. It looks like you don't have anything particularly busy today?

1582000032.english: ...Please don't flirt. It makes me feel uncomfortable.

1582000033.korean:
낭자. 뭔가 오해가 있나 본데, 본디 나는 기능미와 형식미를 많이 따지는 사내일세.
추파라니… 에이다 낭자는 왜 혼자서 이상한 사고를 하는지 모르겠군.
1582000033.english:
My lady, it seems there is some misunderstanding. By nature, I am a man who values ​​functional and formal beauty.
 Flirting... I don't know why Miss Ada is having such strange thoughts all by herself.

1582000034.korean: …뭐라고요? 지금 제 소체가 기능과 형식을 훼손한단 말씀입니까?
1582000034.english: … What did you say? Are you saying that my body is compromising its function and form?

1582000035.english: Since I've brought it up, let me add a little more...

1582000036.korean: 내기 하지… 조만간 삿갓 머리에 셰틀라이트 빔 떨어진다에 참치캔 500개를 걸겠다.
1582000036.english: Let me make a bet... I'll bet 500 cans of tuna that a satellite beam will fall on that conical hat head soon.

1582000037.korean:
불필요한 오해를 하고 있어 확실히 말해두는 것일 뿐이라네, 에이다 낭자.
나는 낭자의 가슴 프레임에 달린 그 불필요한 지방 덩어리는 기능 면에서 심각한 하자가 있다고…
1582000037.english:
I am simply clarifying this because you are having an unnecessary misunderstanding, Lady Ada.
 I think that unnecessary lump of fat attached to the lady's chest frame has a serious functional defect...

1582000038.korean: 그대로 2시간 동안 전원 좀 끄고 있으세요.
1582000038.english: Please keep the power off for 2 hours.

1582000040.korean: 에이다 양. 삿갓 대신 사과하도록 하지.
1582000040.english: Miss Ada. I will apologize instead of the straw hat.

1582000041.english: I did feel like I was asking for trouble, too, but...

1582000042.korean: 알프레드 님. 그나저나, 우리 AGS의 대표가 되어 하는 일이라는 게 고작 잡담하기… 입니까?
1582000042.english: Alfred. By the way, is all you do as the representative of our AGS just small talk...?

1582000043.korean: 에이다 양! 그게 무슨 말씀입니까?! 이 알프레드! AGS를 위해 온 프레임이 부셔저라 일을...
1582000043.english: Miss Ada! What do you mean?! This Alfred! I work until the entire frame breaks for the sake of the AGS...

1582000044.korean: ...분명 원하는 AGS에 한해서, 소체 업그레이드를 진행시킨다는 공약을 전에 들은 적 있는데요?
1582000044.english: ...Didn't I definitely hear a promise before that body upgrades would be provided only for the AGS that people wanted?

1582000045.korean: 그랬긴 했습죠… 하지만 그 어떤 AGS도 자신의 소체를 적극적으로 업그레이드 해달라 제게 건의하진 않았습니다!
1582000045.english: That was true... but no AGS ever suggested to me that I actively upgrade their bodies!

1582000047.korean: 응? 무슨 일인데 갑자기 그렇게 뜸을 들이시는 겁니까 에이다 양?
1582000047.english: Huh? What is it that you are suddenly taking so long to answer, Miss Ada?

1582000049.korean: 엥? 에이다 양, 하실 말씀이 있으셨던 것 같은데…
1582000049.english: Huh? Miss Ada, I thought you had something to say...

1582000051.korean:
그, 저기… 에이다 양, 정말 궁금해서 그러는데...
혹시… 소체 업그레이드를 원하시는 겁니까?
1582000051.english:
Um, excuse me... Miss Ada, I'm really curious...
 By any chance… do you want a body upgrade?

1582000052.korean:
아무 것도… 아닙니다.
열심히 일이나 해주십시오.
1582000052.english:
It’s nothing…
 Please just work hard.

1582000054.english: Huh? Why are you saying that?

1582000055.korean:
후우… 자네도 삿갓 만큼이나 눈치가 없나? 
에이다 양과 공감할 수 있는 AGS들을 한자리에 모아 놓고 이야기를 해야, 건의 사항이 술술 나오지 않겠는가?
1582000055.english:
Phew... Are you as clueless as that straw hat?
 If we gather the AGS members who can empathize with Miss Ada in one place and talk, wouldn't suggestions flow out smoothly?

1582000056.korean:
흐음… 저희는 성별이 없는 AGS이니 에이다 양의 감정 모듈을 완벽히 이해하긴 힘들군요...
역시, 뽀끄루 양을 모시고 있는 만큼, 이런 사소한 것들에 눈치가 빠르신 것 같습니다.
1582000056.english:
Hmm... Since we are genderless AGS, it is difficult for us to fully understand Miss Ada's emotion module...
 As expected, since you are serving Miss Pokkuru, you seem to be quick-witted about these little things.

1582000057.korean: 알프레드… 고민을 해본 결과 우리 로봇을 확실히 이해해줄 자문 위원 후보를 말해주겠다.
1582000057.english: Alfred... after giving it some thought, I will tell you about a candidate for the advisory committee who will truly understand our robot.

1582000058.korean:
엥? 떠오르셨습니까? 
흥미롭군요... 누군지 여쭤봐도 되겠습니까?
1582000058.english:
Huh? Did you remember?
 That's interesting... May I ask who it is?

1582000059.korean:
우리와 같은 단단하고 담대한 흉부를 지닌 존재...
냉혹한 강철의 대령, 나이트 앤젤 양!
1582000059.english:
A being with a hard and bold chest like ours...
 Cold-hearted Colonel of Steel, Miss Knight Angel!

1582000061.english: Huh? Why are you looking at me like that?

1582000062.korean: 솔직히 말하자면 정말이지... 바보 같은 생각이지만…
1582000062.english: To be honest, it really is... a stupid thought, but...

1582000063.english: That's surprisingly interesting. I'll book them right away!

1583000001.korean: 호오? 제가 알려드린 레시피 대로 주인께 진상하셨사옵니까?
1583000001.english: Oh? Did you present it to the master according to the recipe I taught you?

1583000002.korean: 네, 물론 멍청한 깡통 때문에 딱딱하게 굳긴 했지만… 주인님께선 맛있다고 하셨어요.
1583000002.english: Yes, of course it hardened because of that stupid can, but... the master said it was delicious.

1583000003.korean: 그러면 된 것이거늘… 어찌하여 다시 이곳에 오셨사옵니까?
1583000003.english: That should have been the end of it... Why have you come back here again?

1583000004.korean:
…신년을 아무 행사 없이 보내더라도... 
주인님께 제대로 된 무언가를 대접해 드리고 싶어 찾아왔어요.
1583000004.english:
… Even if I spend the New Year without any events...
 I came here because I wanted to treat you to something proper, Master.

1583000005.korean: 이미 주인께선 충분히 달라진 당신 음식 솜씨에 놀라워하시지 않으셨사옵니까?
1583000005.english: Hasn't the master already been surprised by your cooking skills, which have improved significantly?

1583000006.korean:
이런 자잘한 이벤트로 끝내는 게 아쉬워서요. 
저번처럼 많은 대원 분들이 축하해주는 것도 아니잖아요.
1583000006.english:
I felt it was a shame to end it with just these small events.
 It’s not like many members are congratulating you like last time.

1583000007.korean:
그렇긴 하지요.
저 또한 기념하기 좋은 날인데도 미적지근하게 넘어가는 것이 석연치 않사옵니다.
1583000007.english:
That is true, though.
 I also find it unsettling that this day, which is worthy of celebration, is being passed by so half-heartedly.

1583000008.korean: 언제 두 분이 이렇게 가까워 지셨어요…?
1583000008.english: When did you two get this close...?

1583000011.korean: 그나저나 아우로라? 바닐라 양이 주인께 좀 더 특별한 음식을 선사하고 싶으시다는데 무엇이 좋다고 생각하시옵니까.
1583000011.english: By the way, Aurora? Miss Vanilla says she would like to present the Master with something a bit more special. What do you think would be good?

1583000012.korean: 축하라면 역시 케이크가 제일… 이지 않을까요?
1583000012.english: When it comes to celebrations, wouldn't a cake be the best choice?

1583000013.korean: 역시 특별한 날에는 케이크군요. 흐음... 케이크라…
1583000013.english: As expected, it's cake for special occasions. Hmm... cake...

1583000014.english: Huh? Vanilla… why the look on your face...?

1583000015.korean: 케이크에 대한 좋지 않은 기억이 있으셔서 그러시겠지요.
1583000015.english: I suppose that’s because you have bad memories of cake.

1583000016.korean: …네, 소완 님과 재밌는 스토리가 있긴 했었죠.
1583000016.english: … Yes, there was indeed an interesting story with Sowan.

1583000017.korean:
그래서, 이번에는 인스턴트 케이크가 아니라... 
직접 만든 수제 케이크를 주인께 대접해드리고 싶으시옵니까?
1583000017.english:
So, this time it's not instant cake...
 Would you like to treat the owner to a homemade cake?

1583000018.korean: 언제까지 모형 케이크만 들고 다닐 순 없잖아요… 그리고…
1583000018.english: We can't go around carrying around just model cakes forever... And...

1583000020.korean:
…아니에요. 됐습니다. 
여러모로 그저 평범하게 신년을 보내는 것이 마음에 걸려서 그렇습니다.
1583000020.english:
… No. That’s enough.
 It is because I am troubled by the thought of spending the New Year in just an ordinary way in many ways.

1583000021.english: Hey Vanilla~ Shall the chef and I help out?

1583000022.korean:
아닙니다... 시간을 내어 스스로 할게요.
요즘 늘어난 대원 분들 식사 준비를 하시느라 바쁜 거 알고 있어요.
1583000022.english:
No... I will make time to do it myself.
 I know you are busy preparing meals for the increased number of members these days.

1583000023.korean:
후훗… 바닐라 양. 
케이크를 어떻게 만드시는지는 알고 계시옵니까?
1583000023.english:
Hehe... Miss Vanilla.
 Do you know how to make a cake?

1583000024.korean:
...이래 봬도 전 배틀메이드에요. 
기본적인 디저트는 만들 줄 압니다.
1583000024.english:
...Believe it or not, I'm a battle maid.
 I know how to make basic desserts.

1583000025.korean: 보기보다 케이크는 꽤 손이 많이 가는데… 정말 괜찮으시겠사옵니까?
1583000025.english: Cakes take quite a bit of work to make, more than they look... Are you really sure you're okay with that?

1583000027.korean:
고집부리지 말고 도움 받으시기 바라옵니다. 
식사 준비 때가 되어 버리면… 저희도 바빠 도와드리기 어렵사오니.
1583000027.english:
I hope you accept the help without being stubborn.
 If it comes time to prepare a meal... we will be busy ourselves and unable to help.

1583000028.english: Yeah, Vanilla! We're telling you, we'll help you!

1583000029.english: … Understood. I will ask you soon.

1583000030.korean:
근데 바닐라 엄청 의외네? 
평소라면 사령관 눈치 없다느니 뭐니 엄청~ 투덜거릴 것 같았는데.
1583000030.english:
But vanilla is totally unexpected.
 Normally, I thought I would grumble a lot about how the commander is clueless or whatever.

1583000031.korean:
어제도 새벽 4시가 넘어서까지 사령관실에 불 켜진 모습도 봤습니다.
매일같이 밤을 새우며 일하시는 주인님께 어떻게 그런 눈치를 바라겠습니까?
1583000031.english:
Yesterday as well, I saw the lights on in the commander's office until past 4 a.m.
 How could I expect such a look from my master, who works through the night every single day?

1583000033.korean:
늘 열심히 일하시는 주인님을 위해서라도... 
이런 날은 그냥 지나칠 수 없다고 생각합니다.
1583000033.english:
For the sake of my master, who always works so hard...
 I think a day like this cannot just pass by.

1583000034.korean:
…저 답지 않게 푸념이 많았군요. 
하아… 가보겠습니다.
1583000034.english:
… I was complaining a lot, which is unlike me.
 Haa... I'll be going now.

1583000035.korean:
우와, 바닐라... 많이 바뀐 것 같아. 
처음 봤었을 땐 눈에서 레이저 엄청 쐈었는데…
1583000035.english:
Wow, Vanilla... it seems like it's changed a lot.
 The first time I saw him, he was shooting lasers from his eyes...

1583000036.korean: 으음… 그러고 보니, 주방장님도 처음에 같이 일했을 때 엄청 무서우셔서…
1583000036.english: Hmm... Come to think of it, the head chef was really scary when we first worked together, too...

1583000038.english: Ah, no, ho, talking to myself... I'm talking to myself!

1583000039.korean:
혼잣말 치곤 목소리가 커서 다 들었사옵니다.
일부러 제게 들으라 말씀하신 건 아니신지요?
1583000039.english:
Your voice was loud for a monologue, so I heard everything.
 Did you say that on purpose so that I would hear it?

1583000040.korean: 아, 아닙니다 주방장님… 저, 전혀 아니에요! 헤헤… 일 계속 할까요?
1583000040.english: Ah, no, Chef... I, not at all! Hehe... Shall we continue working?

1583000043.english: … You’ve grown quite bold working together, Aurora?

1583000044.korean: 죄송합니다! 죄송합니다! 일 할게요 하하! 일 재밌어! 주방일 재밌다 행복해!
1583000044.english: I'm sorry! I'm sorry! I'll work, haha! Work is fun! Kitchen work is fun, I'm happy!

1583000046.korean: 히익… 식칼은 내려놔주세요, 주방장님… 정말 제가 잘못…
1583000046.english: Eek... Please put the knife down, Chef... I really did something wrong...

1583000047.english: I look forward to working with you this year as well.

1583000049.english: I assume you clearly heard it, don't you?

1583000050.korean:
그나저나 지금은 손이 노는  것 같사온데... 
같이 양파 까는 걸 도와주시지 않겠사옵니까?
1583000050.english:
Anyway, it looks like my hands are idle right now...
 Would you mind helping me peel onions?

1583000053.korean: …정말 아무런 일 없이 지나가도 괜찮은 걸까… 응?
1583000053.english: … Is it really okay if it passes without anything happening… Huh?

1583000054.korean: 오늘도… 불이… 주인님, 제발 잠은 주무셔야 하는 거 아닙니까… 하아…
1583000054.english: Once again today… the fire… Master, please, aren’t you supposed to be getting some sleep… Haa…

1583000058.korean: - 내일의 할 일을 미리 처리하기 위해, 하품을 참으며 패널을 꼼지락거리던 때였다.
1583000058.english: It was a time when I was fiddling with the panel while suppressing a yawn to get tomorrow's work done in advance.

1583000059.korean: - 검사하러 온 줄 알았던 알파인줄 알았는데, 따뜻한 커피와 야식을 들고 바닐라가 서 있었다.
1583000059.english: I thought it was Alpha who had come to inspect, but Vanilla was standing there holding warm coffee and a late-night snack.

1583000060.korean:
드시면서 하세요. 
오늘도 안 자고 계실 줄 알았습니다.
1583000060.english:
Please do it while you eat.
 I thought you wouldn't be sleeping again today.

1583000061.korean:
…굳이 잔소리해서 제가 뭐하겠습니까? 
알파 님이나 라비아타 언니 말씀도 안 듣는데 말이죠.
1583000061.english:
… What would I do if I went out of my way to nag?
 They don't even listen to Alpha or Laviata.

1583000062.korean: 더 맛있는 야식을 드리고 싶었지만... 시간도 늦어 간단하게 준비했습니다.
1583000062.english: I wanted to give you a tastier late-night snack, but... it's late, so I prepared something simple.

1583000063.korean: 주인님, 하나 묻고 싶은 게 있습니다.
1583000063.english: Master, there is something I would like to ask you.

1583000064.korean: - 커피와 다과를 가져 온 바닐라는 잠시 머뭇거리다 옆에 앉았다.
1583000064.english: Vanilla, who had brought coffee and snacks, hesitated for a moment and then sat down next to her.

1583000065.korean:
요즘 바쁘신 건 알지만… 
한 번쯤은 이기적이시면 어떨까 생각도 듭니다.
1583000065.english:
I know you're busy these days, but...
 I also think it would be nice if you were a little selfish just this once.

1583000066.korean:
- 바닐라가 하는 말이 잘 이해되지 않았다.
패널 다루는 것을 멈추고 고개를 돌리자, 그녀는 얼굴을 붉히며 시선을 피했다.
1583000066.english:
I didn't really understand what Vanilla was saying.
 As I stopped handling the panel and turned my head, she blushed and avoided my gaze.

1583000067.english: … What are you staring at so intently? It's embarrassing.

1583000068.korean:
주인님께서… 저희를 위해 일해주시는 건 감사… 드립니다만...
가끔은 혼자 이기적으로 굴면서, 뭘 바란다거나… 땡깡도 부려보세요…
1583000068.english:
Master, we are grateful that you work for us, but...
 Sometimes, try acting selfishly on your own, asking for something... or throwing a tantrum...

1583000069.korean: - 무슨 말인지 몰라 어리둥절해하자, 바닐라는 나를 살벌하게 노려보았다.
1583000069.english: When I looked bewildered, not knowing what was being said, Vanilla glared at me menacingly.

1583000070.korean: 그, 그러니까! 예, 예전에 그랬던 것처럼 뭐… 바, 바보 같은 대회라도 열거나, 이상한 옷을 입히거나…
1583000070.english: Th-I mean! Yeah, just like in the past, we could... well, hold a stupid competition or dress them in weird clothes...

1583000071.korean:
…후으, 으으… 그러니까… 그래야 제가… 뭐라도 좀 해드리고… 
그게 아니더라도… 무언가 다른 분들께 부탁해서 조그마한 파티라도…
1583000071.english:
… Hmph, ugh… I mean… that way I… can’t do anything for you…
 Even if that isn't the case... could I ask others to organize a small party?

1583000072.korean:
- 이제야 바닐라가 왜 이러는 건지 이해할 수 있었다.
무언가 챙겨주고 싶지만, 그럴 수 없는 자기 성격 모듈 때문에 답답해서 저러는 건가.
1583000072.english:
Only now could I understand why Vanilla was acting this way.
 Is he acting like that because he's frustrated by his personality module that prevents him from wanting to take care of others but being unable to?

1583000073.korean: 네? 뜬금 없이 무슨 안마… 입니까?
1583000073.english: What? What's with the sudden talk of a massage...?

1583000074.korean: - 뜬금없는 부탁에도 바닐라는 곧바로 일어서 내 등에 선 뒤, 작은 손으로 어깨를 조물거렸다.
1583000074.english: Despite the sudden request, Vanilla immediately stood up, stood on my back, and massaged my shoulders with her small hands.

1583000077.korean: 바보 같은 기행을 안 부리시는 게 허전해서 그렇습니다.
1583000077.english: It is because I feel a sense of emptiness that you are not acting like a fool.

1583000078.korean:
- 나는 고개를 들어 바닐라의 얼굴을 바라보았다.
예전과 다르게, 애교 가득한 눈망울을 지켜보다 고개를 살짝 들어 그녀의 입술에 내 입술을 포갰다.
1583000078.english:
I raised my head and looked at Vanilla's face.
 Unlike before, I watched her eyes full of charm, then slightly lifted my head and pressed my lips against hers.

1583000079.korean:
- 바닐라는 피하지 않고 내 입술을 받아주었다.
잠시의 키스가 끝난 후, 입술을 뗀 나는 바닐라를 바라보며 말했다.
1583000079.english:
Vanilla didn't avoid me and accepted my kiss.
 After the brief kiss ended, I pulled my lips away, looked at Vanilla, and spoke.

1583000080.korean: 무드 없이 키스나 하시다 갑자기… 그게 무슨 말씀이십니까?
1583000080.english: You were just kissing without any mood, and then suddenly… what do you mean?

1583000081.english: … Have you ever had a day that wasn't leisurely?

1583000082.korean: - 바닐라는 머뭇거리다 입술을 파르르 떨며 작은 목소리로 말을 이어갔다.
1583000082.english: Vanilla hesitated, then trembled her lips and continued speaking in a small voice.

1583000083.korean:
저희 저항군은 그간 주인님께 많은 걸 빚지고 있는데… 
아무런 일도 없이 일 년 일 년을 이렇게 보내는 게 아쉬… 워서…
1583000083.english:
Our resistance army owes you a great deal, Master…
 It’s a shame to spend year after year like this with nothing happening…

1583000084.korean: 칫… 하아… 이럴 때도 자꾸 퉁명스런 소리만…
1583000084.english: Tch... Haa... Even at a time like this, you keep making curt remarks...

1583000086.korean:
- 그동안 바닐라와 함께 지내며 그녀의 차가운 말투에서도 진심을 느낄 수 있게 됐다.
그리고 지금, 그녀가 이런 어중간한 화를 내는 모습을 보면 어떤 말을 하고 싶은지 유추가 가능해졌다.
1583000086.english:
- While spending time with Vanilla, I came to be able to sense sincerity even in her cold tone.
 And now, seeing her get this half-heartedly angry, I could infer what she wanted to say.

1583000088.korean:
- 나는 바닐라를 꼭 끌어안고 내 무릎 맡에 앉혔다.
어느샌가 조용히 눈물을 흘리는 바닐라의 머리를 부드럽게 쓰다듬어주었다.
1583000088.english:
I hugged Vanilla tightly and sat her on my lap.
 I gently stroked Vanilla's head as she quietly shed tears before I knew it.

1583000092.korean:
- 내 대답을 들은 바닐라는 처음으로 내 앞에서 펑펑 목놓아 울기 시작했다.
내 목을 꼭 끌어안고 한참이나 훌쩍이던 그녀는 울음을 겨우 삼키며 귓가에 속삭였다.
1583000092.english:
Upon hearing my answer, Vanilla began to sob uncontrollably in front of me for the first time.
 She hugged my neck tightly and sobbed for a long time, then barely managed to swallow her tears and whispered in my ear.

1583000094.english: … Thank you for always working hard for us.

1583000097.korean: - 나는 불규칙적으로 오르내리는 바닐라의 등을 부드럽게 토닥여주었다.
1583000097.english: I gently patted Vanilla's back as it rose and fell irregularly.

1583000098.korean: 알았어 알파, 이것만 마무리하고 잘게 진짜!
1583000098.english: Okay, Alpha, I'll just finish this and go to sleep, really!

1583000100.english: You're going to nag me, aren't you?

1583000103.english: I was curious what you meant.

1583000105.english: Vanilla? Then I'm tired, would you give me a massage?

1583000106.korean: 몸이 좀 찌뿌둥한데… 해줄 수 있겠어?
1583000106.english: I'm feeling a bit stiff... could you do this for me?

1583000108.english: It’s a shame that things have changed so much from the past, isn’t it?

1583000109.korean: 눈코 뜰 새 없이 바쁘고… 사령관실에서 나오지도 않고.
1583000109.english: He's incredibly busy... and hasn't even come out of the commander's office.

1583000111.korean: 이런 날도 있고 저런 날도 있잖아.
1583000111.english: There are good days and bad days, you know.

1583000112.korean: 한가로운 날도, 그리고 이렇게 바쁜 날도.
1583000112.english: Leisurely days, and busy days like this.

1583000113.english: That's the charm of vanilla, isn't it?

1583000114.korean: 이미 바닐라가 하고 싶은 말이 뭔지 잘 알겠는데?
1583000114.english: I already know exactly what Vanilla is trying to say.

1583000115.english: So you're saying you're super grateful and sorry, right?

1583000117.korean: 너희를 위해 일하는 게 즐거워서 그래.
1583000117.english: It's because I enjoy working for you guys.

1583000118.korean: 지금은 바쁘니까… 나중에 해줘도 충분히 늦지 않아.
1583000118.english: I'm busy right now... it won't be too late to do it later.

1583000119.english: If the day ever comes when I really have free time...

1583000120.korean: 그때 대원들이랑 함께 해도 늦지 않잖아?
1583000120.english: It won't be too late to be with the team members then, right?

1584000002.korean: 혹시 저희의 의견도 대변할 수 있는 바이오로이드 대원을 추천해 주실 수 있겠습니까?
1584000002.english: Could you possibly recommend a bio-android who can represent our views as well?

1584000003.korean:
흐음… 사령관님의 의견대로 바이오로이드 분을 직접 모셔 회의 때마다 자문 받고 싶습니다.
점찍은 분도 있지만... 끄응… 확신이 서질 않아, 의견 좀 여쭙고 싶은데…
1584000003.english:
Hmm... As you suggested, Commander, I would like to personally invite a Bio-android to consult with me at every meeting.
 I have someone in mind, but... hmm... I'm not sure, so I'd like to ask for your opinion...

1584000004.korean: - 알프레드의 질문에 나는 오르카의 기술부원인 포츈과 그렘린, 닥터와 아자즈 정도가 머릿속에서 떠올랐다.
1584000004.english: In response to Alfred's question, the Orca technical members Fortune and Gremlin, along with the Doctor and Azaz, came to mind.

1584000005.korean:
- 근래 들어 오르카 시크릿 네트워크의 AGS들 사이에서 알프레드를 
문제 삼는 글들이 많이 올라오는 걸 보더니 드디어 대표 노릇 좀 하려나 보다.
1584000005.english:
- Recently, Alfred among the AGSs of the Orca Secret Network
 Seeing the many posts taking issue with it, it looks like he's finally going to act like a representative.

1584000006.korean:
얘기는 해봤습죠… 하지만… 닥터 양은 연구 때문에 바쁘고, 
포츈 마님이나 그렘린 양도 저희의 부가적인 일에 신경 쓰긴 어렵다고 했습니다…
1584000006.english:
I did talk to him... but... Dr. Yang is busy with his research,
 Madam Fortune and Miss Gremlin said it would be difficult for them to take care of our extra matters…

1584000007.korean: 실력이 훌륭하시긴 하지만… AGS 분들이 따르겠습니까?
1584000007.english: He is very skilled, but... would the AGS members follow him?

1584000009.korean:
눈을 좀 돌려 하르페이아 양 같이 인문학에 능통한 분들도 찾아갔었지만… 
AGS 감성을 많이 어려워하시더군요.
1584000009.english:
I turned my attention a bit and even sought out people well-versed in the humanities like Miss Harpeia, but...
 They seemed to have a lot of trouble with the AGS sensibility.

1584000010.korean: - AGS의 민심을 어떻게든 되찾으려는 진지한 알프레드의 모습을 보니 만감이 교차하는 그때였다.
1584000010.english: It was a moment filled with mixed emotions as I watched Alfred earnestly trying to somehow regain the public sentiment of the AGS.

1584000012.english: Oh, long time no see, Miss Night Angel.

1584000013.korean: 아, 먼저 얘기 나누시고 계셨다면 나중에 다시 올까요, 알프레드 씨?
1584000013.english: Ah, if you were already talking, shall I come back later, Mr. Alfred?

1584000014.korean: 흐흠, 아닙니다, 크게 바쁜 건 아니기에… 이곳엔 어쩐 일로 오셨습니까?
1584000014.english: Hmm, no, I'm not particularly busy... What brings you here?

1584000015.korean: 다음 달 둠브링어 폭격 훈련을 위한 부대 비용 건에 대해 이야기 나누러 왔습니다.
1584000015.english: I came to discuss the unit costs for next month's Doombringer bombing training.

1584000017.korean:
- 알프레드의 시선이 너무도 적나라하게 나이트 앤젤에게 고정되어 있다.
혹시라도 그녀에게 할 말이 있는 건 아닐까?
1584000017.english:
Alfred's gaze is fixed so starkly on the Night Angel.
 Could it be that he has something to say to her?

1584000018.korean: 왜 갑자기 절 그렇게 뚫어져라 쳐다보시죠?
1584000018.english: Why are you suddenly staring at me like that?

1584000019.korean: 그... 저기 나이트 앤젤 양. 오해 말고 들어주시기 바랍니다.
1584000019.english: Um... Miss Night Angel. Please listen without misunderstanding.

1584000020.english: Why are you acting like this all of a sudden?

1584000021.english: … By any chance, would you be willing to help me?

1584000022.korean: 너무 맥락없이 말씀하시는데, 자세한 설명을 좀 해주시겠습니까...?
1584000022.english: You are speaking completely out of context. Could you please explain in more detail...?

1584000023.korean: 흐흠… 흐음… 아시다시피, 저희 AGS는 동체의 크기나 AI 성향이 바이오로이드와는 확연히 다르기도 하고…
1584000023.english: Hmm... Hmm... As you know, our AGS is distinctly different from bioroids in terms of body size and AI tendencies, and...

1584000024.korean:
공통점보다는 차이점이 더 많은 집단이라 할 수 있겠습니다… 
각자의 고충을 명쾌하게 이해하는 것도 상당히 어렵고요!
1584000024.english:
It could be said that this is a group with more differences than similarities…
 It is also quite difficult to clearly understand each person's struggles!

1584000025.english: So… may I ask what the point is?

1584000026.korean:
전 유전자 알러지가 있어 다른 바이오로이드 대원 분들과 다가가기 어렵지만…
나이트 앤젤 양께서는 저희의 의견을 잘 들어주실 것 같은… 이유 모를 친근감이 느껴진다고나 할까요?
1584000026.english:
I have a genetic allergy, so it is difficult for me to approach the other bioroid members, but…
 Miss Night Angel, it feels like you would listen well to our opinions… I suppose you could say I feel an inexplicable sense of closeness to you?

1584000027.korean:
그게 무슨 말씀이죠?
저는 기계에 대해서 아는 것이 전혀 없는데요?
1584000027.english:
What do you mean by that?
 I don't know anything about machines.

1584000028.korean: 아닙니다! 나이트 앤젤 양은 분명 우리 AGS 분들 사이에서도 위화감 없이 친근하단 의견이 있었습니다!
1584000028.english: No! There were definitely opinions among our AGS members that Miss Night Angel is friendly and doesn't feel out of place!

1584000029.korean:
들으면 들을수록 이해가 되질 않는데… 
왜 그렇게 생각하시는지 이유를 물어봐도 될까요?
1584000029.english:
The more I listen, the less I understand...
 May I ask why you think that?

1584000030.korean: 일단 저희 AGS들은 단백질 없이 튼튼한 강철 프레임을 가지고 있지 않습니까?
1584000030.english: First of all, don't our AGSs have sturdy steel frames without protein?

1584000031.korean:
- 어어. 잠깐. 
알프레드가 할 말이 뭔지 감이 오기 시작한다.
1584000031.english:
- Uh, wait.
 I am starting to get a sense of what Alfred has to say.

1584000033.korean:
함께 같은 사령관을 모시는 바이오로이드 분이라고는 하지만... 
외모가 저희 AGS와 확연히 다르니… 대화를 나눔에 있어 다소 위화감이 느껴진다고 제 측근이 말했습니다요.
1584000033.english:
Although she is a bioroid serving the same commander...
 My close associate said that since their appearance is distinctly different from our AGS, they feel a bit of a sense of unease when conversing with them.

1584000034.korean: 위화감이라… 알프레드 씨, 그 측근 분의 근거도 없는 이야길... 제게 해주시는 이유는 무엇이죠?
1584000034.english: A sense of unease... Mr. Alfred, why are you telling me about that associate's baseless story?

1584000036.korean:
하지만 나이트 앤젤 양이라면! 우리와 똑같은 이 단단한 몸을 본다면!
AGS도 분명히 마음을 놓고, 깊은 이야기를 털어놓겠지요! 그야말로 AGS다운 친근한 외…
1584000036.english:
But if it is Miss Night Angel! If she sees this sturdy body just like ours!
 AGS will surely let their guard down and confide their deepest thoughts, too! It will be a truly friendly, AGS-style...

1584000039.korean: 안 그래도 둠브링어 폭격 훈련에 눈에 잘 띄는 더미를 추가해달란 의견이 있었는데.
1584000039.english: There was already a suggestion to add a highly visible dummy to the Doombringer bombing training.

1584000040.english: May I use Mr. Alfred as a dummy?

1584000041.korean:
히이이이익?! 노, 놀리려는 게 아닙니다요 나이트 앤젤 양!
저는 나쁜 의미로 나이트 앤젤 양을 비하한게 아니라…
1584000041.english:
Hiiiiiik?! N-no, I'm not trying to tease you, Miss Night Angel!
 I didn't mean to disparage Miss Night Angel in a bad way...

1584000042.english: … I will ask just one thing.

1584000044.korean:
아, 아니! 왜 이러십니까?! 저, 저는 장난의 의도가 전혀 없었습니다!
