1001408066.korean: …주인님도&n어쩔 수 없는 수컷이군요.&n바스트업 체조 결과물을&n확인보시지요… 어서…♥​
1001408066.english: … Master, you are a helpless male after all. Check out the results of the bust-up exercises… Hurry… ♥

1001408067.korean: 정말 쉬지도 않고&n절 원하시는 겁니까&n주인님?&n흐음… 이 칼립소를 원하신다면…&n언제든 맡겨만 주세요, 후훗…​
1001408067.english: Do you really want me without even a break, Master? Hmm... If you want this Calypso... just leave it to me anytime, hehe...

1000710033.korean: 멀리 떨어져 주세요. 주인님 또한 제 독에 중독된다면… 알겠습니다.​&n…이렇게 섬기는 분과 가까이 있는 건 처음입니다. 게다가 어린 아이나 다름 없는 이 체구를 가진 제게도 사랑을 듬뿍 주시다니…​&n실전은 처음이라 서툴지도 모르지만… 오늘 밤, 이 칼립소… 주인님을 최상으로 모시리라 맹세할 테니… 기대해 주시지요…♥
1000710033.english: Please stay far away. If you, Master, are also poisoned by my venom… I understand. … This is the first time I have been this close to the One I serve. Moreover, to think you shower so much love on someone like me, with a physique no bigger than a child’s… It may be clumsy since this is my first time in the field… but tonight, I, Calypso… swear to serve you with the utmost respect… so please look forward to it… ♥

1000710034.korean: 이 자수에 새겨진 수국의 꽃말은 ‘진실한 사랑＇이라고 하지요… 몸은 비록 소녀지만, 마음만큼은 주인님의 사랑을 바라는 여자.​&n이 마음을 알아준 주인님을 위해서라도 이 칼립소, 주인님께 평생 봉사하겠습니다.​&n후후… 부담갖지 마시지요. 주인님을 위하여 열심히 독학하였습니다. 소나기가 심하니… 어서 저와 같이 숙소로 들어가시지요…♥
1000710034.english: They say the flower language of the hydrangeas embroidered on this is 'true love'… Though I am a girl in body, I am a woman whose heart longs for my Master's love. For the sake of you, Master, who have recognized my heart, I, Calypso, will serve you for the rest of my life. Hehe… Please do not feel burdened. I have diligently taught myself for your sake. The rain is heavy… so please come back to the quarters with me… ♥

1411111113.english: At the same time, Tainan, the outskirts of Oghigia-

1411111117.korean: 같은 시간, 타이중 시(철충 점령 구역)-
1411111117.english: At the same time, Taichung City (Iron Bug occupied zone)-

1411111127.english: [C][FF0000]You killed him You killed him You killed him[-][/C]

1411111131.english: I have to kill him, right?

1411111133.korean: 그 아이가 좋아하는 바다를… 유유히 헤엄치길 바라는 마음에...
1411111133.english: In the hope that the child will swim leisurely in the sea they love...

1411111134.korean: 딸이 사춘기였으면 딱 칼립소 같았을 것 같다는 생각도 들고…
1411111134.english: I also think that if my daughter were going through puberty, it would have been exactly like Calypso...

1599000001.korean:
[i]바다 가운데 외딴 오귀기아 섬에는 긴 머리를 곱게 빗은,
아틀라스의 딸 칼립소가 살고 있는데, 그녀는 무시무시한 여신이었습니다.[-][/i]
1599000001.english:
[i] On the remote island of Oghigia in the middle of the sea, there was a woman with long, finely combed hair,
 Atlas's daughter Calypso lived there, and she was a fearsome goddess.

1599000002.korean:
- 메로페가 무사히 합류한 이후, 잠시 시간을 내어 한국과 일본에 위치한 
바이오로이드 기지를 시찰하고자 이동 중이다.
1599000002.english:
After Merope safely rejoined, I took some time to visit the locations in Korea and Japan
 We are on our way to inspect the bioroid base.

1599000003.korean:
사령관, 혹시 우리가 가는 곳에 엘븐 목장은 없어?
이 누나 말이야, 넓게 펼쳐진 들판에서 우유 짜는 거 한 번 해보고 싶었거든!
1599000003.english:
Commander, by any chance, is there no Elven ranch where we are going?
 You know what, I've always wanted to try milking cows in a wide-open field!

1599000004.korean: 그래서 말인데, 자~ 이 누나가 직. 접 짜온 따끈따끈 밀크야. 마셔볼래?
1599000004.english: So, here's some piping hot milk that your big sister squeezed right in front of you. Want to try some?

1599000005.korean:
후후, 사령관. 밀크를 먹어야 쑥쑥 자라는 거라고…
부끄러워할까 봐, 보온병에 담아오기까지 했는데… 싫은 거야?
1599000005.english:
Hehe, Commander. You have to drink milk to grow big and strong...
 I even brought it in a thermos because I was worried you might be embarrassed... Do you not like it?

1599000006.korean:
- 처음 하토르와 만난 곳은, 입구가 무너진 PECS의 연구시설이었다.
아주 오랜 기간 동안 홀로 고립됐던 탓에 오르카의 단체 생활에 적응하기 힘들지도 모르겠단 걱정이 있었지만, 다행히도 그녀는 빠르게 적응했다.
1599000006.english:
The first place I met Hathor was the PECS research facility, where the entrance had collapsed.
 There were concerns that she might have difficulty adapting to Orca's group life because she had been isolated alone for such a long time, but fortunately, she adapted quickly.

1599000007.korean: - 이따금 날 과도하게 챙겨주려는 게 부담스럽긴 하지만… 고마우니 받아주고 있다.
1599000007.english: Sometimes it is a bit overwhelming that they try to look after me excessively, but... I accept it because I am grateful.

1599000008.korean: 헤헤 고마워, 사령관, 얼마든지 말해, 이 누나는 사령관을 굶기지 않을 거니까!
1599000008.english: Hehe, thanks, Commander. Tell me anything, big sister won't let you go hungry!

1599000009.english: Oh, thank you! I'll enjoy this.

1599000010.korean: 야, 야! 그거 너 마시라고 준 거 아니거든?!
1599000010.english: Hey, hey! I didn't give that to you to drink!

1599000011.korean: - 옆에 있던 천아는 씩 웃으며 하토르가 가지고 온 보온병의 우유를 들이켰다.
1599000011.english: Cheona, who was standing next to her, grinned and gulped down the milk from the thermos Hathor had brought.

1599000012.korean: 꿀꺽… 꿀꺽… 으… 읍?! 이거 뭐야?! 너무 비리잖아?! 이거 엘븐 우유 맞아?!
1599000012.english: Gulp… Gulp… Ugh… Mmm?! What is this?! It tastes so fishy?! Is this really Elven milk?!

1599000013.korean: 무슨 소리야, 우유라니. 그거 내 거에서 직접 짠 밀크인데.
1599000013.english: What are you talking about? Milk? That's milk squeezed directly from mine.

1599000015.korean: 뭐야, 그럼 지금 내가 마신 거… 서, 설마…
1599000015.english: What? Then what I just drank... S-surely not...

1599000016.korean:
- 천아는 사색이 된 채로 하토르의 가슴을 향해 시선을 돌렸다.
마치, 먹지 말아야 할 것을 삼키기라도 했다는 듯 몸서리치던 그때, 누군가의 노크 소리가 울려펴졌다.
1599000016.english:
Cheona turned her gaze toward Hathor's chest, her face pale.
 Just as I was shuddering as if I had swallowed something I shouldn't have, the sound of a knock rang out.

1599000018.korean: 그게… 신원 불명의 바이오로이드가 호라이즌 호위함을 두들기면서 뭐라고 한다는데요…?
1599000018.english: Well… I heard that an unidentified bioroid is banging on the Horizon escort ship and saying something…?

1599000019.korean:
- 나는 내 귀를 의심했다.
항해하는 함선을 따라잡을 정도로 수영 속도가 빠르다고?
1599000019.english:
I couldn't believe my ears.
 You swim fast enough to catch up to a sailing ship?

1599000020.english: What should I do? If they don't open it, won't I drown?

1599000021.korean:
- 믿기지 않는 말이었지만… 직접 헤엄치며 선체를 두드리면서까지 
우리와 접촉하려는 바이오로이드를 내칠 순 없다.
1599000021.english:
It was hard to believe, but... even swimming and tapping on the hull myself
 We cannot turn away bioroids that try to contact us.

1599000022.korean: 후아… 이것 참, 빨리 좀 멈춰주지 그랬어? 따라잡느라 얼마나 힘들었는지 알아?
1599000022.english: Phew... Seriously, why didn't you stop sooner? Do you have any idea how hard it was to catch up?

1599000023.korean:
- 오르카가 부상한 후, 함교 위에 올라서자, 물에 흠뻑 젖은 장신의 바이오로이드가 
가쁜 숨을 몰아 쉬며 머리카락의 물을 죽죽 짜냈다.
1599000023.english:
After Orca surfaced, as she stepped onto the bridge, a tall, soaking wet bio-android
 Gasping for breath, I squeezed the water out of my hair.

1599000024.korean:
응? 이봐. 난 오케아니데스 프로젝트 바이오로이드라고.
해양전을 수행하기 위해 만든 바이오로이드인데, 이 정도도 못하겠어?
1599000024.english:
Huh? Hey. I'm a Project Okeanides bioroid.
 You're a bioroid built to conduct naval warfare; can't you even do this much?

1599000025.english: … Did you say you belong to the Okeanides?

1599000026.korean:
하아… 김새네. 마지막 인간. 사인이라도 해달라 할 줄 알았더니만~
내가 왕년에 말이야. 블랙리버 놈들 전함을 처참히 부숴놓기로 얼마나 유명했는지 알아?
1599000026.english:
Sigh... What a letdown. The last one. I thought you'd at least ask for an autograph.
 You know back in the day. Do you know how famous I was for absolutely destroying those Black River warships?

1599000027.korean:
아마 2차 연합전쟁 때의 일인 것 같소만… 대양에서 대기하던 전함들이
이유 없이 반파 당하거나 폭침당하는 일이 비일비재했었소.
1599000027.english:
It seems to be from the Second Coalition War... the battleships waiting in the ocean
 It was a common occurrence for ships to be half-destroyed or sunk for no reason.

1599000028.korean:
아, 당신이 그 유명했던 블랙리버의 무적의 용이야?
하하~ 이런! 언제 한 번 제대로 붙어보고 싶었는데.
1599000028.english:
Ah, are you the famous invincible dragon of Black River?
 Haha~ Oh no! I've always wanted to have a proper showdown.

1599000029.korean: 혹시라도 저항군을 불러 세운 이유가 결투를 신청하는 것이라면 거절하겠소.
1599000029.english: If the reason you summoned the resistance fighters is to challenge me to a duel, I will refuse.

1599000030.korean: 그냥 해본 말이지~ 알았어. 알았어. 정식으로 우리 소개를 해야겠네.
1599000030.english: I was just kidding~ Okay, okay. I guess we should formally introduce ourselves.

1599000031.korean:
오케아니데스 프로젝트의 라미아야. 
대만에 있는 삼안 산하 유흥단지를 지키는 바이오로이드지.
1599000031.english:
Lamia from the Okeanides Project.
 It is a bioroid guarding the entertainment complex under San'an in Taiwan.

1599000032.korean: ...대만, 삼안의 유흥단지라면 혹시 오귀기아를 말하는 것이오?
1599000032.english: ...Taiwan, if you are talking about the entertainment district of San'an, are you perhaps referring to Ogwigia?

1599000033.korean:
주인님께선 모르실 수도 있겠군요… 
멸망 전 삼안에서 계획적으로 만든 유흥 단지였어요.
1599000033.english:
Master, you might not know...
 It was an entertainment complex intentionally created by Saman before the apocalypse.

1599000034.korean:
최고를 자랑하는 시설이이긴 했죠. 하지만 정확히 오귀기아의 용도는... 
삼안의 최신 바이오로이드를 고위층에게 공개하는 일종의 시연장이었어요.
1599000034.english:
It was indeed a facility that boasted the best. However, the exact purpose of Ougigia was...
 It was a kind of demonstration venue to unveil Saman's latest bioroids to the upper echelons.

1599000035.korean:
그래. 맞아… 멸망 후에도 큰 언니와 작은언니, 그리고 나는 
지긋지긋한 그 섬을 철충으로부터 지켜왔어.
1599000035.english:
Right. That's right... even after the apocalypse, my eldest sister, my second sister, and I
 I've been protecting that dreadful island from the Iron Bugs.

1599000036.korean: 기록 상으론 대만도 철충의 손에 떨어졌다고 하던데…
1599000036.english: According to the records, I heard that Taiwan also fell into the hands of the Iron蟲...

1599000037.korean:
흥, 그건 아무것도 모르는 인간들이 멋대로 적은 기록이지. 
삼안 관계자들의 마지막 명령을 따라 우린 쭉 철충과 교전을 벌여왔어.
1599000037.english:
Hmph, that's just a record written arbitrarily by people who know nothing.
 Following the last orders of the Saman officials, we have been fighting the Iron蟲 all along.

1599000038.korean:
- 바이오로이드 저항군의 상황은 그리 좋지 못했던 것이 대부분이었다.
오랜 시간 철충과 전투를 지속했다는 것은, 지금도 건재한 병력이 존재한다는 뜻 아닐까?
1599000038.english:
- The situation of the bioroid resistance forces was mostly not very good.
 The fact that they have continued fighting the Iron蟲 for such a long time implies that there are still intact troops remaining, doesn't it?

1599000039.korean:
오귀기아는 과거 삼안이 병참기지화를 진행하면서 많은 물자들이 비축되어 있었거든.
…큰 언니가 행방불명되기 전까진 철충 놈들이랑 제법 비등했었다고.
1599000039.english:
Oghigia had a large amount of supplies stockpiled in the past as Saman was converting it into a logistics base.
 … We were actually on pretty good terms with those Iron Bugs until my eldest sister went missing.

1599000040.korean:
그래. 타이베이 쪽에서 나타난 '거대 철충'들의 습격으로 인해 전세가 밀렸어.
큰 언니가 우리를 퇴각시킨 후, 홀로 그 철충들과 싸우던 중 행방불명 되었지.
1599000040.english:
Right. The tide of battle turned against us due to the attack by 'Giant Iron Bugs' that appeared from the direction of Taipei.
 After our eldest sister sent us to retreat, she went missing while fighting those Iron Bugs alone.

1599000041.korean: 자세한 건 나도 몰라. 그냥, 엄청나게 강력한 철충이었어.
1599000041.english: I don't know the details either. It was just an incredibly powerful Iron Bug.

1599000042.korean: 뭐야, 인간. 라디오에서 들은 거론 백전백승의 지휘관 아니었나?
1599000042.english: What the hell, human. Wasn't he the commander I heard on the radio who was undefeated in every battle?

1599000043.korean: - 철충 중에 큰 덩치를 자랑하는 게 한 둘은 아니다만… 아무래도 대만에 정찰을 보내야겠다.
1599000043.english: There are quite a few Iron蟲 that boast large sizes... but I guess I should send a scout to Taiwan.

1599000044.korean: 이젠 웬만한 전투 장비들은 다 파괴됐고… 승산도 없어... 정식으로 합류를 요청하려 해.
1599000044.english: Most of the combat equipment is destroyed now... and there is no chance of winning... I am going to formally request to join.

1599000045.korean: - 그런데 굳이 훨씬 이전 부터 도움을 요청할 수 있었음에도 독립적으로 움직여온 이유는 뭘까?
1599000045.english: But why did they act independently when they could have asked for help much earlier?

1599000046.english: Then Lamia let out a deep sigh.

1599000047.korean: 사정이 있달까… 우리... 작은 언니의 정신 상태 때문에 그래.
1599000047.english: I guess you could say there are circumstances... It's because of... my older sister's mental state.

1599000048.korean:
작은 언니는 아직 인류가 멸망했단 사실을 인정하지 않고 있거든.
아직도 작은 언니의 인지 상태는 연합전쟁 시기에 머물러있지.
1599000048.english:
My older sister still doesn't accept the fact that humanity has perished.
 My older sister's cognitive state is still stuck in the time of the Coalition War.

1599000049.korean: 자신이 모시던 오귀기아 관리자가 여전히 살아있다고 믿어.
1599000049.english: He believes that the Oghigia administrator he served is still alive.

1599000050.korean:
…실제로 만나보면 그런 말 못 할 텐데. 상태가 생각보다 심각해.
특히나 큰 언니가 행방불명 된 뒤로 증세가 더 심각해졌어.
1599000050.english:
… You wouldn't be able to say that if you actually met me. The condition is more serious than you think.
 The symptoms got even more severe, especially after my eldest sister went missing.

1599000051.korean:
고지식해서 답답하지만… 그래도 큰 언니가 잘 챙겨달라 타일렀으니 말이야.
미안하지만, 우리 작은 언니를 설득해줄 수 있겠어?
1599000051.english:
It's frustrating because he's so old-fashioned... but my eldest sister told me to take good care of him.
 I'm sorry, but could you persuade my little sister?

1599000052.korean:
- 상태가 얼마나 심각한지는 잘 모르겠지만… 당장 첫만남부터 자신만만하던
라미아의 표정이 급격히 어두워졌다.
1599000052.english:
I'm not sure how serious the situation is, but... he was so confident right from the first meeting
 Lamia's expression suddenly darkened.

1599000053.korean: - 하는 수 없이 뱃머리를 대만으로 돌려, 상황을 확인해 보기로 했다.
1599000053.english: Having no other choice, we decided to turn the bow of the ship toward Taiwan to check the situation.

1599000054.korean:
- 대원들에게 사전 정찰을 부탁한 결과, 거대 철충은 목격되지 않았고,
타이베이 쪽에는 철충을 생산하는 공장이 있단 보고를 받았다.
1599000054.english:
As a result of asking the team members to conduct reconnaissance in advance, no giant Iron蟲 was sighted, and
 I received a report that there is a factory producing Iron Bugs in the Taipei area.

1599000055.korean:
- 라미아가 말했던, '거대 철충'의 흔적은 발견되지 않았지만,
보고 받은 대로라면, 충분히 오르카 쪽에서 손쉽게 점령이 가능한 수준이었다.
1599000055.english:
- Although no traces of the 'Giant Iron Bug' that Lamia mentioned were found,
 Based on the reports, it was at a level where Orca could easily occupy it.

1599000056.korean:
- 하지만 공장에서 끊임없이 생산되는 철충을 소수의 자매들이 막아냈다는 말을 떠올린다면...
오케아니데스 대원들은 상당히 수준급의 무력을 지닌 것이라 해석할 수 있다.
1599000056.english:
However, if you recall the story of how a small number of sisters stopped the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) that were endlessly produced in the factory...
 It can be interpreted that the members of the Okeanides possess a considerably high level of military prowess.

1599000057.korean:
라미아가 말한 거대철충은 보이지 않소.
우리 병력을 투입하면 탈환도 쉬우리라 사료되오.
1599000057.english:
I don't see the giant iron bug that Lamia mentioned.
 I believe that if we deploy our troops, recapturing it will be easy.

1599000058.korean:
거 봐~ 우리 말이야, 허세 아니라고. 
삼안 바이오로이드의 걸작이란 말이지… 응? 하하~
1599000058.english:
See? We're not just showing off.
 So you're saying it's a masterpiece by Saman Bio-roids... huh? Haha~

1599000059.korean:
…오히려 더 큰 문제는 말이야. 대만에서 제일 위험한 건…
언제 어디서 폭발할지 모르는 작은 언니 히스테리야.
1599000059.english:
… Actually, the bigger problem is… the most dangerous thing in Taiwan is…
 My older sister is a hysteria who could explode anytime, anywhere.

1599000060.korean:
언니한테는 AGS 토벌을 도와주러 온 바이오로이드 PMC 회사의 회장이라고 소개할까 해. 
협조 부탁할게?
1599000060.english:
I'm thinking of introducing myself to my sister as the chairman of a bio-android PMC company that came to help with the AGS subjugation.
 I'd like to ask for your cooperation.

1599000061.korean: - 멸망 전 인간을 연기 해달라는 라미아의 부탁에 어리둥절했지만, 따르기로 했다.
1599000061.english: I was bewildered by Lamia's request to act like a human from before the apocalypse, but I decided to follow her.

1599000062.korean:
- 용이 대만 북쪽 철충 구역의 동향을 확인한 후, 
이상이 없음을 확인 받은 뒤 타이난 시의 항구에 상륙했다.
1599000062.english:
- After Yong confirmed the movements in the Iron蟲 zone north of Taiwan,
 After confirming that there were no issues, they landed at the port of Tainan City.

1599000063.korean:
그래 불러오지. 대신 내가 말한 연기는 확실히 해달라고.
우리 언니는 아직 인류 멸망을 믿지 않으니까…
1599000063.english:
Okay, I'll bring them in. But make sure they deliver the performance I mentioned.
 Because my older sister still doesn't believe in the end of humanity...

1599000064.korean: 걱정 마, 오히려 얼마만의 손님이냐고 팔짝팔짝 뛸 걸? 으휴, 아무튼 작은 언니를 데리고 올게.
1599000064.english: Don't worry, in fact, she'll probably jump for joy at having a guest for the first time in ages. Ugh, anyway, I'll bring my older sister.

1599000065.korean: 우와… 누난 저항군 바이오로이드 거점이라 해서 폐허나 다름없는 곳일 줄 알았는데…
1599000065.english: Wow... I thought since it was a Resistance Bio-android base, it would be practically a ruin...

1599000066.english: Hahaha~ I heard the Oughigia Spa is so good?

1599000067.korean: 엘븐, 우리 사령관이랑 놀러온 거 아니거든?
1599000067.english: Elven, we didn't come here to hang out with our commander, okay?

1599000068.korean: 아 왜~ 엘븐 목장에서 그간 열심히 일했으니까 쉬면 좋잖아.
1599000068.english: Ah, why not? You've worked so hard at the Elven Ranch, so it would be good to rest.

1599000069.korean: 사령관님, 아머드메이든 부대 모두 인원 확인 됐습니다.
1599000069.english: Commander, all personnel of the Armored Maiden unit have been confirmed.

1599000070.korean: …웬일로 사령관님 경호 업무에 참여한다고 하셨지 말입니까?
1599000070.english: … What brings you to say you’re participating in the Commander’s security duties?

1599000071.korean: 당연히 사령관님의 안전을 지키고 대만의 철충을 무찌르기 위해 그랬지.
1599000071.english: Of course, I did it to protect the Commander's safety and defeat the Iron蟲 in Taiwan.

1599000072.korean: 대장… 들고 오신 목욕바구니는 좀 숨기고 말씀하시지 않겠습니까?
1599000072.english: Captain... wouldn't you mind hiding the bath basket you brought before you speak?

1599000073.korean: 야 팬서야. 땀 흘리는 군인은 하루에 한 번씩 샤워해야지.
1599000073.english: Hey Panther. A sweating soldier needs to take a shower once a day.

1599000074.korean: 그럼 샤워할 거만 챙겨오시지... 마스크 팩에… 왜 태닝 오일까지 들고 오셨습니까?
1599000074.english: Then you should have just brought your shower supplies... face masks... and why did you bring tanning oil too?

1599000075.korean: 만일을 위해서지. 만일을 위해서. 거 참.
1599000075.english: It's just in case. Just in case. Good grief.

1599000076.korean: 오~ 나스호른! 나 마스크 팩 좀 빌려줘!
1599000076.english: Oh~ Nashorn! Lend me a face mask!

1599000077.korean: 오케이~ 접수. 그럼 나도 엘븐 밀크 로션 있으면 빌려줘.
1599000077.english: Okay, got it. Then, if you have any Elven Milk Lotion, lend it to me too.

1599000078.english: … Aren't you just here to hang out!

1599000079.korean:
- 떠들썩한 대원들의 분위기를 뒤로 하며 라미아의 복귀를 기다리던 무렵,
그녀는 자신이 언니라고 부르는 바이오로이드와 함께 우리 앞에 섰다.
1599000079.english:
Around the time I was waiting for Lamia's return, leaving the boisterous atmosphere of the squad members behind,
 She stood before us with the bioroid she called her older sister.

1599000081.korean:
네, 저는 오케아니데스 프로젝트의 둘째이자 현재 유흥 단지를 총괄하는 칼립소라고 합니다.
정말 얼마 만의 손님인지… 너무 기뻐, 이렇게 마중 나왔습니다.
1599000081.english:
Yes, I am Calypso, the second of the Okeanides Project and the current head of the entertainment complex.
 It’s been so long since we’ve had a guest… I’m so happy that I’ve come out to greet you like this.

1599000082.korean: - 칼립소는 다행이도 경계심을 가지지 않은 채, 내게 예를 갖추어 인사했다.
1599000082.english: Fortunately, Calypso greeted me respectfully without being wary.

1599000083.korean: 대만을 포위한 블랙리버 측 AGS를 토벌해주시기 위해 오셨단 말씀을 들었습니다.
1599000083.english: I heard that you have come to eliminate the Black River AGS that has surrounded Taiwan.

1599000084.korean: 저희가 최상의 서비스로 최선을 다해 모실 생각이니…
1599000084.english: We intend to do our utmost to serve you with the best service, so…

1599000086.korean: - 칼립소는 말을 끝마치지 못하고 우리 대원들 중, 하토르를 멍하니 쳐다보았다.
1599000086.english: Calypso could not finish her sentence and stared blankly at Hathor, one of our men.

1599000087.korean: …응? 왜 그렇게 빤히 봐? 내 얼굴에 뭐… 묻었어?
1599000087.english: … Huh? Why are you staring at me like that? Is there… something on my face?

1599000089.korean: 그 저질스러운 갑옷은 대체 뭐죠? 가슴에 그런 걸 달고 다니면 부끄럽지 않습니까?
1599000089.english: What on earth is that tacky armor? Aren't you ashamed to walk around with something like that on your chest?

1599000090.english: Hathor became sullen at Calypso's answer.

1599000091.korean:
…너무해. 나름 PECS 최신 기술로 만들어진 비밀 병기인데. 
너도… 거의 나체나 다름없는 수영복 입고 있잖아…
1599000091.english:
… That’s too much. It’s a secret weapon created with the latest PECS technology, after all.
 You're wearing a swimsuit that's practically naked, too...

1599000092.korean: 이... 이건 교양과 지성이 깃든 오케아니데스의 전투용 예복입니다!
1599000092.english: Th-this is the battle robe of the Oceanides, imbued with culture and intellect!

1599000094.korean: 아닙니다! 당신의 그 음탕한 착유기랑 제 옷이 같은 줄 아십니까?!
1599000094.english: No! Do you think my clothes are the same as your lewd milking machine?!

1599000095.korean:
- 하토르와 칼립소의 투닥거림은 끝이 보이지 않는다.
나는 하토르의 갑옷이 특수한 의상이라는 걸 열심히 어필한 후에야 오귀기아에 입장할 수 있었다.
1599000095.english:
- The bickering between Hathor and Calypso seems endless.
 I was only able to enter Ogygia after earnestly emphasizing that Hathor's armor was a special outfit.

1599000098.korean: 큰 언니도… 라미아도… 그리고 저 하토르란 바이오로이드도… 온 바이오로이드 모두…
1599000098.english: My eldest sister... Lamia... and that bio-android named Hathor... all the bio-androids...

1599000099.korean: 저렇게 거대해지려면 대체 뭘 먹어야 하는 건데…?!
1599000099.english: What on earth do you have to eat to get that huge…?!

1599000100.korean: - ...칼립소의 기죽은 혼잣말을 도착할 때까지 계속 들어야만 했다.
1599000100.english: - ...I had to keep listening to Calypso's dejected monologue until we arrived.

1599000103.english: It's not that I dislike it, but...

1599000105.english: I'll drink it later when I'm alone...

1599000110.korean: 사연이 있을 거 같은데… 일단은 들어보고 판단해야겠지?
1599000110.english: I think there's a story behind it... I guess I'll have to listen to it first before judging, right?

1599000112.korean: 어떻게 함선을 따라잡을 정도로 빠르게 수영하는 거야?
1599000112.english: How do you swim fast enough to catch up to a ship?

1599000115.english: Was there a place like that?

1599000117.korean: 멸망 후에도 그쪽 상황은 나쁘지 않았던 모양이네?
1599000117.english: It looks like the situation over there wasn't bad even after the fall?

1599000120.english: I can't really tell just from that...

1599000122.english: If they had known of our existence…

1599000123.english: Couldn't they have asked for help directly?

1599000124.english: … Can't you just explain it properly?

1599000125.english: … Okay, I understand. I'll check it out myself.

1599000129.korean: 작은 언니를 불러와 줄 수 있겠어?
1599000129.english: Could you call my younger sister?

1599000130.korean: 그런 대화 몇 마디로 속아 넘어갈까?
1599000130.english: Do you think I would fall for a few words of conversation like that?

1599000131.korean: 적어도 오귀기아 근처는 깔끔하게 관리한 거 같네.
1599000131.english: At least the area near Oughigia seems to be well-maintained.

1599000133.english: … Are you, that, Lamia's older sister, a bio-android?

1599100001.korean: 하아~ 팬서야, 나 아무래도 새로운 목표가 생긴 거 같다.
1599100001.english: Haa~ Panther, I think I've found a new goal.

1599100002.korean: 뭡니까? 쓸데없는 소리를 하려는 건 아니셨으면 좋겠지 말입니다.
1599100002.english: What is it? I hope you aren't trying to say something useless.

1599100003.korean: 이곳도 어쨌거나 소수의 철충 무리가 있다는 소린 사령관님께 들은 것 같은데.
1599100003.english: Anyway, I think I heard from the Commander that there are a small group of Iron蟲 here as well.

1599100004.korean: 이곳의 철충이 토벌된다면 앞으로도 쭉 대만을 지키는 방위 지휘관이 되는 건 어떨까?
1599100004.english: If the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) here are eradicated, how about becoming a defense commander who protects Taiwan for a long time to come?

1599100005.korean: 대장, 철충은 물 못 건너는 거 아시지 않습니까.
1599100005.english: Commander, you know that Iron蟲 can't cross water, don't you?

1599100006.korean:
혹시 모르지. 철충 놈들이 기습을 해올 지도 몰라.
내가 여기서 평생 지켜야 하지 않을까?
1599100006.english:
You never know. The Iron蟲s might launch a surprise attack.
 Shouldn't I protect this place for the rest of my life?

1599100007.korean: 그럼 저도 대장님을 따라서 이곳을 지키는 부관으로 남겠습니다.
1599100007.english: Then I will also stay here as the deputy commander, following you, Captain, to guard this place.

1599100008.korean: 팬서? 넌 빠져도 될 것 같은데.
1599100008.english: Panther? I think you could stay out of this.

1599100009.english: Captain, why don't you step aside for me?

1599100010.korean: 무슨... 푸우! 우부부붑?! 부관이 지휘관 잡는… 푸우우, 야, 팬서! 뜨거워! 뜨겁다고!
1599100010.english: What... Pooh! Ooooooh?! The adjutant grabbing the commander... Pooh, hey, Panther! It's hot! I said it's hot!

1599100011.korean: 예, 대장을 향한 제 뜨거운 충정이라 생각하십쇼!
1599100011.english: Yes, please consider this my burning loyalty to the Captain!

1599100012.english: Phew... so warm... It's been a while since I've enjoyed a spa.

1599100013.korean: 오… 예전에 봤을 때보다 더 커진 거 같은데?
1599100013.english: Oh… it looks bigger than when I saw it before?

1599100015.korean: 사령관이 맨날 만져서 커진 거 아니야?
1599100015.english: Didn't it get bigger because the commander touches it all the time?

1599100016.korean: 자, 자꾸... 이, 이상한 소리 할래 너…?!
1599100016.english: Now, are you going to keep... saying weird things...?!

1599100017.english: Yahahaha! Here it is, here it is!

1599100018.korean: 무려 16K 고화질 카메라로 촬영한 남탕 직캠…!
1599100018.english: Men's bathhouse fancam filmed with a whopping 16K high-definition camera…!

1599100019.korean: 와 진짜? 어디 한 번 봐봐… 와… 대박.
1599100019.english: Wow, really? Let me take a look... Wow... Amazing.

1599100020.korean: 그런 걸 또 왜 보고 앉았어, 넌…!
1599100020.english: Why are you sitting there looking at that again...!

1599100021.korean: 우와… 대단해, 저게 밤마다 우리를 기쁘게 해준다는 거지? 으흐흐흐…
1599100021.english: Wow… that’s amazing. So that makes us happy every night, right? Hehehe…

1599100022.english: There's really nothing you can't say!

1599100023.korean:
아 살짝 아쉽긴 하네. 이때 딱 문이 열리고, 누군가… 
아앗? 탕을 잘못 들어왔네요? 하면서 안절부절 못하고… 막 이런 전개가… 헤헤…
1599100023.english:
Ah, that is a bit of a shame. Just then, the door opened, and someone…
 "Ah? I entered the wrong bath?" she said, fidgeting nervously... and the story unfolded like that... Hehe...

1599100024.english: … This is seriously the worst, Talonfeather.

1599100025.korean: 그러고보니, 아까 세크메트가 직접 사령관 목욕을 시켜준다 하지 않았어?
1599100025.english: Come to think of it, didn't Sekhmet say earlier that she would personally give the Commander a bath?

1599100026.korean: 그래서 사령관이 기습적으로 혼자 들어간 거잖아.
1599100026.english: So that's why the commander went in alone in a surprise attack.

1599100027.korean: 야 잠깐… 여기 벽 말이야… 넘어가면 바로 남탕 아니야? 너, 혹시 어깨 좀 빌려줄 수 있어?
1599100027.english: Hey, wait a minute... about this wall... if you go over it, isn't it right into the men's changing room? Hey, can you lend me your shoulder by any chance?

1599100028.english: Are you crazy? Are you really going to cross over?

1599100029.korean: 오오… 미녀 엘븐 두 명이 비키니를 입고... 좋은 앵글인데?
1599100029.english: Oh... two beautiful Elven ladies in bikinis... That's a good angle, isn't it?

1599100030.korean: 진짜 다들 미쳤어…! 변태, 야한 건 안 된다고!
1599100030.english: Seriously, everyone's crazy...! Perverts, I said no to lewd stuff!

1599100032.korean: 흐읏… 너희들 그만 봐! 몰래 카메라는 범죄야! 안 돼!
1599100032.english: Hmph... Stop looking, you guys! Hidden cameras are a crime! No!

1599100033.english: I told you I'm not doing it...?

1599100035.korean: …있잖아. 다크 엘븐. 그런 말 하면서 왜 혼자 열심히 보고 있어?
1599100035.english: … You know what? Dark Elven. Why are you watching so intently all by yourself while saying things like that?

1599100036.english: You seem really lonely these days?

1599100037.korean: 외, 외롭긴 누가 외로워! 이 변태들! 나, 난 나갈 거야!
1599100037.english: Who, who's lonely! You perverts! I, I'm leaving!

1599100038.korean: 저기… 다크엘븐, 내 패널은 줘야지! 왜 가지고 가는 거야…?
1599100038.english: Hey… Dark Elven, you have to give me my panel! Why are you taking it…?

1599100039.korean:
- 간만에 기분 좋은 스파를 즐긴 뒤, 긴장을 풀기 위해 옷차림을 가볍게 만들고 방을 나서자
언제부터 대기하고 있었던 건지 덤덤하게 서 있던 칼립소가 나를 보며 수건을 건넸다.
1599100039.english:
After enjoying a pleasant spa treatment for the first time in a while, I lightened my clothes to relax and left the room.
 Calypso, who had been standing there nonchalantly for who knows how long, looked at me and handed me a towel.

1599100040.english: Chairman, was the water temperature okay?

1599100041.korean:
다행입니다, 예고 없이 찾아오신 귀한 손님이시다보니… 
제가 급히 엘리자베스와 함께 열심히 청소했지요.
1599100041.english:
That is a relief, since you are a distinguished guest who visited without notice…
 I hurriedly cleaned hard with Elizabeth.

1599100042.korean: - 내 질문 대신 칼립소의 해파리 촉수가 마치 인사하듯 팔랑거렸다.
1599100042.english: Instead of my question, Calypso's jellyfish tentacles fluttered as if greeting me.

1599100043.korean:
후훗, 우아한 아이라, 애칭 또한 우아하게 지어줬지요. 
이제부터 저녁 만찬을 준비하겠습니다.
1599100043.english:
Hehe, since she is an elegant girl, I gave her an elegant nickname as well.
 I will now prepare the dinner banquet.

1599100045.korean:
현재 중병에 걸리신 상태로 절대안정을 위해 관계자 외 접근은 불허합니다. 
마음은 감사드리지만, 관리자님의 개인 사정을 이해해 주시기 바랍니다.
1599100045.english:
As the individual is currently suffering from a serious illness, access by anyone other than authorized personnel is prohibited to ensure absolute rest.
 I appreciate your kindness, but please understand your personal circumstances.

1599100046.korean: 곧 저녁 시간이니, 손님분들께 특식을 대접해 드리겠습니다, 기대해 주십시오.
1599100046.english: It is almost dinner time, so we will treat our guests to a special meal. Please look forward to it.

1599100047.korean: - 칼립소는 황급히 대화를 끝낸 후 자리를 피했다. 아무래도 쉽게 마음을 열어줄 것 같지 않다.
1599100047.english: Calypso hurriedly ended the conversation and left. It didn't seem like she would open up easily.

1599100048.korean: 왜 갑자기 따로 불러낸 거야, 작은 언니?
1599100048.english: Why did you suddenly call me out alone, little sister?

1599100049.korean: 큰 언니 흔적을 찾아오겠다면서 대체 몇 주를 허비한 거야? 너까지 AGS에 당한 줄 알았잖아!
1599100049.english: How many weeks did you waste trying to find traces of your eldest sister? I thought you'd been taken by the AGS too!

1599100050.korean: 샅샅이 찾느라… 미안해. 근데… 역시 큰 언니 생존 흔적은 없었어.
1599100050.english: I'm sorry for searching so thoroughly... But... as expected, there were no traces of my eldest sister surviving.

1599100051.korean: 언니가 블랙리버의 그 깡통들 따위한테 쉽게 당했을 리 없어. 다시 날이 밝는 대로 수색해 봐.
1599100051.english: There is no way my sister would have been easily defeated by those tin cans from Black River. Search again as soon as it gets light.

1599100052.korean: 작은 언니... 큰 언니가 겨우 블랙리버가 만든 AGS에 당했을 거라 생각해? 우리 중에 가장 강했는데?
1599100052.english: Little sister... do you really think Big sister would have been defeated by just an AGS made by Black River? She was the strongest among us.

1599100053.korean: 그래, 그러니까 납득이 안 된다는 거잖아! 언니가 그렇게 허무하게 당했을 리 없어!
1599100053.english: Right, that's why I'm saying I can't understand it! There's no way you were defeated so easily!

1599100054.korean: ...블랙리버가 진짜로 할 일이 없어서 이 섬에 AGS를 쑤셔박는 거겠어?
1599100054.english: ...Do you think Black River really has nothing better to do than shove AGS units onto this island?

1599100055.english: Then what are you going to explain it to!

1599100056.korean: 언니, 알아듣기 쉽게 말할게. 저건 블랙리버의 AGS가 아니…
1599100056.english: Sister, I'll explain it simply. That isn't Black River's AGS...

1599100057.korean:
뻔하지! 삼안의 씨를 말리려는 블랙리버의 작당이야! 
지금 저 깡통들이 난리를 쳐대는 통에 손님도 다 끊겼다고!
1599100057.english:
It's obvious! It's Black River's plot to wipe out Saman!
 We've lost all our customers because those tin cans are making such a ruckus!

1599100058.korean: 그게 몇 십 년 동안 지속됐다는 게 말이 된다고 생각…
1599100058.english: I think it makes sense that that lasted for decades…

1599100059.korean:
이젠 언니도 없는 마당에… 이제 와서 이 섬을 버리고 도망이라도 가자는 거야?!
병상에 누우신 우리 관리자님은 어쩌고?
1599100059.english:
Now that my sister is gone too... are you suggesting we abandon this island and run away at this point?!
 What about our manager who is lying in a hospital bed?

1599100061.korean:
…관리자님께서 깨어나시면, 분명 나한테 실망하실 거야. 
시설 관리는 엉망에… 내가… 내가 오귀기아를 망쳤어…
1599100061.english:
… When the manager wakes up, they will definitely be disappointed in me.
 The facility management is a mess… and I… I ruined Oughigia…

1599100063.korean:
라미아, 이젠 너랑 나 둘뿐이야… 아직 늦지 않았으니까 
관리자님이 깨어나시기 전에 다시 제대로 해보는 거야.
1599100063.english:
Lamia, it's just you and me now... because it's not too late.
 I'm going to try doing it properly again before the manager wakes up.

1599100065.korean: 그러니까 제발, 언니 말 잘 따라줘.

1599100067.korean: 조심하렴. 그 AGS들한테 너마저 잃어버릴 순 없으니까.
1599100067.english: Be careful. We can't lose you to those AGS too.

1599100068.english: Huh? Uh… yeah. It was good.

1599100070.english: Ah... so that was the name of a jellyfish.

1599100071.korean: 혹시 괜찮다면 식사 전에… 하나 묻고 싶은 게 있는데.
1599100071.english: If you don't mind, there is something I’d like to ask you before the meal.

1599100072.korean: 관리자 분께 감사 인사를 드리고 싶어. 개인적으로 뵙는게 가능할까?
1599100072.english: I would like to thank the manager. Would it be possible to meet in person?

1599200001.korean: 아~ 씨. 시간 더럽게 안 가네…!
1599200001.english: Ah, damn it. Time is dragging like hell...!

1599200002.english: Why the hell are you acting like this?

1599200003.korean: 사령관은 지금 저 안에서 좋다고 히히덕거리고 있을 거 아냐!
1599200003.english: The commander must be giggling happily inside right now!

1599200005.korean: 고급 스파… 있다고 해서, 홍련한테 추천 받은 비키니도 급하게 빌려 왔는데…
1599200005.english: I heard there was a luxury spa... so I hurriedly rented the bikini Hong-ryeon recommended, but...

1599200006.english: That wasn't lingerie, it was a bikini? Oh my god.

1599200007.korean: 걔... 사실 그런 것도 좋아한다고 들었단 말이야…
1599200007.english: I heard that... actually, he likes that kind of thing too...

1599200008.korean:
야, 그건 너보다 훨~ 씬 가슴도 크고 농염한 여자가 입어야 섹시한 거지, 
네가 입으면 그냥 엄마 옷 빌려 입은 꼬맹이야.
1599200008.english:
Hey, that looks sexy only on a woman with much bigger breasts and a voluptuous figure than you.
 If you wear it, you just look like a kid wearing your mom's clothes.

1599200009.english: Hey you bastard! Are you done talking?

1599200010.korean: 이이이이이익! 진짜 뭐야! 왜 우리는 여기 있어야 되냐고! 나도 스파 가고 싶었단 말이야!
1599200010.english: Eeeeeek! Seriously, what the heck! Why do we have to be here?! I wanted to go to the spa too!

1599200011.korean:
하아~ 진짜 가고 싶은데... 
위대하신 우리 엠프레시스 하운드 대장님께서 가지 말라고 엄포 놨잖아.
1599200011.english:
Sigh~ I really want to go...
 Our great Captain Empress Hound warned us not to go.

1599200012.korean: 아니, 우리가 크게 테러를 벌인 것도 아니고… 그냥… 건물 조금 부수기만 했잖아...
1599200012.english: No, it's not like we committed a major terrorist act... we just... destroyed a little bit of the building...

1599200013.korean: 건물 부순 게 조그마한 일이니 배터리?
1599200013.english: Is destroying a building a small thing, battery?

1599200014.korean: 솔직히 난 그때 정전 시킨 거 빼곤 뭐 없었다?
1599200014.english: Honestly, I didn't do anything back then except cause a power outage.

1599200015.korean: 반면에 너희는 어땠냐? 인간들한테 칼이랑 폭탄 던지면서 난리쳤잖아!
1599200015.english: On the other hand, what about you guys? You were causing chaos, throwing knives and bombs at humans!

1599200016.korean:
아쉽지만 우리가 괜히 가봤자 그 쪽과는 껄끄러워지기만 할 뿐이다.
헌데… 주인님께선 우리가 이곳에서 테러를 벌였단 사실을 알고 계시나?
1599200016.english:
It’s a shame, but going there would only make things awkward with them.
 However… does the Master know that we committed an act of terror here?

1599200017.korean: 아니~ 모를 걸. 말하려고 했는데, 이미 오귀기아로 가버린 후였지.
1599200017.english: No, you probably wouldn't know. I was going to tell you, but you had already left for Oughigia.

1599200018.korean: 아 옛날 생각나네. 그 이상한 동물들 데리고 다니는 놈들, 지금 생각해 봐도 개 빡세긴 했어.
1599200018.english: Ah, that brings back old memories. Those guys who traveled around with those weird animals—even thinking about it now, they were totally tough.

1599200019.english: It looks like you struggled quite a bit.

1599200020.korean:
우리가 삼안 바이오로이드를 한 두 번 상대 해본 것도 아니지만… 
진짜 걔네는 원래 용도에서 벗어난 애들 같더라.
1599200020.english:
It’s not like we haven’t faced Saman Bio-roids once or twice, but…
 They really seemed like kids who deviated from their original purpose.

1599200021.korean: 그러고보니 너, 그때 반쯤 다쳐서 제발 도와달라고 엉엉 울지 않았냐?
1599200021.english: Come to think of it, didn't you cry your eyes out begging for help back then when you were half-injured?

1599200022.korean: 누가 울어?! 지도 어버버거리고 얼탔으면서 무슨.
1599200022.english: Who are you crying?! You were stammering and spaced out yourself, so what are you talking about?

1599200023.korean: 아 맞다, 너네들이랑 얘기하니까 기억 나는데…
1599200023.english: Oh right, talking to you guys reminds me...

1599200024.korean: 그때 습격했을 때 말이야… 천아, 너랑 좀 비슷한 분위기 풍기는 바이오로이드도 있지 않았냐?
1599200024.english: You know back when we raided... Cheon-ah, wasn't there a bio-android that gave off a vibe a bit similar to yours?

1599200025.korean: 그랬나? 으음… 아 맞다. 진짜 그러고보니 그런 애가 있긴 했었네.
1599200025.english: Was that so? Hmm... Oh, right. Come to think of it, there really was someone like that.

1599200026.english: … What are you guys talking about?

1599200027.korean: 아니 왜~ 진짜 어떻게 콕 집어 말해야 할지 모르겠는데… 진짜 같이 세워놓으면 묘하게 닮은 애가 있었다고.
1599200027.english: No, why~ I really don't know exactly how to put it... but there was this one that looked strangely similar when you put them side by side.

1599200029.korean: 아, 맞다. 생각났다. 진짜 그렇네. 그때 너도 기겁하지 않았냐?
1599200029.english: Oh, right. I just remembered. You're absolutely right. Weren't you terrified back then, too?

1599200031.korean:
아냐… 근데 다시 생각해보니까 닮은 건지는 잘 모르겠다.
그 홍련 언니? 걔랑 장화 넌 붙여 놓으면 자매 같이 똑같기야 하지만.
1599200031.english:
No… but now that I think about it again, I’m not sure if they really look alike.
 That Hong-ryeon older sister? If you put her and Jang-hwa together, you two look exactly alike, like sisters, though.

1599200033.english: Should I say they look like a mother and daughter?

1599200035.korean: 생각해보니, 여제 아줌마가 우리 만들었을 때 이곳 저곳에서 유전자 빼오고 그랬지 아마?
1599200035.english: Come to think of it, when Aunt Empress created us, she probably took genes from here and there, right?

1599200036.korean: 그래, 내 유전자에도 용 중장의 유전자가 포함되었지.
1599200036.english: Right, General Yong's genes are included in my genes as well.

1599200037.english: Hey, wasn't it the Fenrir gene?

1599200038.english: ...I didn't inherit those genes for exhibitionism!

1599200039.korean: 이년 봐라? 사령관 앞에서 홀딱 벗고 꼬리 흔드는 거 보면 딱 걔라고.
1599200039.english: Look at this bitch. Seeing her strip naked and wagging her tail in front of the commander, it's definitely her.

1599200040.korean: 웃기지 마라! 난 그런 음탕한 유전자 따윈 받지 않았다!
1599200040.english: Don't make me laugh! I didn't inherit such lewd genes!

1599200041.korean: 야, 그냥 순순히 인정해~ 인정하면 편해!
1599200041.english: Hey, just admit it easily~ It'll be easier if you admit it!

1599200042.korean: 그, 그렇다면 너도 어쨌거나 탈취한 유전자를 사용해서 만든 바이오로이드 아니냐!
1599200042.english: Th-then, aren't you also a bioroid created using stolen genes anyway!

1599200044.english: Wait a minute… Hey, are you by any chance…

1599200045.english: Why do you keep bringing up the past?

1599200046.korean: 분명 내가 봤단 말이야. 분위기가 진짜 묘하게 비슷한 바이오로이드랑 네가 죽자고 싸우는 거.
1599200046.english: I definitely saw it. You fighting to the death with a bio-android that has a really strangely similar vibe.

1599200048.korean: 푸하하하하하! 아~ 잠깐, 나도 기억난다. 너 나이 먹으면 딱 저 얼굴 될 거 같은데.
1599200048.english: Hahahaha! Ah, wait, I remember that too. I think you'll look exactly like that when you get older.

1599200049.english: I'm telling you, that's right. Isn't it?

1599200051.korean: 야, 혹시 말이야… 그 난폭한 여자 유전자로 만든 바이오로이드가 너 아니냐?
1599200051.english: Hey, by any chance... aren't you the bioroid made with that violent woman's genes?

1599200052.english: Damn it! There's no way that's true!

1599200054.korean: 그 존나 삭은 여자가 네 유전자 주인이면 평생 놀려먹긴 좋겠네.
1599200054.english: If that damn aged woman is the owner of your genes, it would be nice to tease her for the rest of your life.

1599200055.korean: 아이씨, 그만 얘기해! 나 바람 쐬러 나갈 거야!
1599200055.english: Ugh, stop talking! I'm going out for some fresh air!

1599200056.english: … Is that certain? Isn't a strong negation a positive?

1599200057.english: It's the first time I've seen him so flustered.

1599200059.korean:
난 그때 여제님 곁을 지키느라 무슨 일이 있었는지 모르지만…
너희들이 싸웠다던 바이오로이드 부대는 어땠길래 그렇지?
1599200059.english:
I don't know what happened back then because I was guarding the Empress's side, but...
 What was that bio-android unit you guys fought like?

1599200060.english: … Ugh, I don't even want to think about it.

1599200061.korean: ...우리가 맞서 본 애들 중에 가장 강했어.
1599200061.english: ...He was the strongest of the kids we faced.

1599300002.korean: 후아, 하아~ 개운해! 오랜만에 진짜 좋았어… 헤헤…
1599300002.english: Phew, haa~ That feels so refreshing! It's been a long time since I felt this good… Hehe…

1599300003.korean: 하아, 마무리로 엘븐 우유 한 잔 쭉 들이키는 것도 좋은데… 응? 어라, 칼립소!
1599300003.english: Haa, gulping down a glass of Elven milk to finish off would be nice... Huh? Wait, Calypso!

1599300005.korean:
고마워~ 오늘 언니가 칼립소 덕분에 싹싹, 깨끗이 씻었어!
헤헤… 엄청 좋아, 후아… 구출되기 전까지만 해도 씻는다는 건 진짜 상상도 못했었는데…
1599300005.english:
Thanks~ Thanks to Calypso, I washed myself thoroughly today!
 Hehe… I love it so much, phew… Before I was rescued, I really couldn’t even imagine taking a shower…

1599300006.english: … I’m glad to hear you liked it.

1599300007.korean: 응! 묵었던 피로가 싹 풀리는 기분이라고 해야 하나? 후아…
1599300007.english: Yeah! Should I say it feels like all my pent-up fatigue has completely melted away? Phew...

1599300008.english: But… what do you mean by rescue?

1599300009.korean:
응? 아… 응! 언니는 말이야, 예전에 철… 아아, 아니지! 헤헤…
나쁜 놈들 때문에 오랫동안 연구소에 갇혔던 적이 있었거든~
1599300009.english:
Huh? Ah… yeah! You know, back in the day, Cheol… Ah, no, wait! Hehe…
 I was once locked up in a research lab for a long time because of those bad guys.

1599300010.english: You're saying you were… trapped in a research institute?

1599300011.korean: 응. 그때 말이야… 연구원들이 이 언니를 구하러 오겠다고 말했는데… 결국 돌아오지 않았어.
1599300011.english: Yeah. You know back then... the researchers said they would come to rescue me... but in the end, they didn't come back.

1599300013.english: You must have had a really hard time.

1599300014.korean: 음… 헤헤, 그런데 사령… 아니지, 우리 회장님이 멋있게 딱 등장해서, 언니, 엄청 감동 먹었잖아.
1599300014.english: Um... hehe, but the commander... no, wait, our chairman made such a cool entrance, and I was totally moved, sis.

1599300015.english: Does the Chairman also tend to take good care of the bioroids?

1599300016.english: Yeah, of course~ It’s almost excessive.

1599300018.korean:
저희 관리자님께서도 바이오로이드를 많이 아껴주시는 편입니다.
주 5일 근무에, 연차... 야근을 하는 인원들에겐 특별수당까지 지급 하셨죠.
1599300018.english:
Our manager also tends to take good care of the bioroids.
 A five-day workweek, annual leave... and you even paid special allowances to those working overtime, right?

1599300020.korean: 저희 관리자님께서는 다른 인간 님들처럼 바이오로이드를 노예처럼 부리는 분이 아닙니다.
1599300020.english: Our manager is not someone who treats bioroids like slaves, unlike other humans.

1599300021.korean:
아직 이곳에 남은 오귀기아의 바이오로이드들도
관리자님께 받은 은혜를 갚기 위해 블랙리버의 AGS와 목숨을 바치며 싸우죠.
1599300021.english:
The Oghigia bioroids still remaining here
 To repay the favor received from the manager, I fight with the Black River AGS, sacrificing my life.

1599300022.korean: …그렇구나. 그런 인간들이 또 있을 줄은 몰랐네.
1599300022.english: … I see. I didn't know there were people like that.

1599300023.korean: 내가 아는 인간들이란… 그저 자기 생각만 하면서 사는 종속이라 생각했거든.
1599300023.english: I used to think that the people I know were... subordinates who lived only thinking about themselves.

1599300024.korean: 하토르는 칼립소에게 자신이 과거 연구 시설 속에 고립되었던 이야기를 털어놓았다.
1599300024.english: Hathor confided in Calypso the story of how she had been isolated in a research facility in the past.

1599300025.korean: …얼마나 갇혀 있었는지 까먹을 정도가 되니까, 인간에게 드는 감정이 그리 좋지 않았어.
1599300025.english: … As I got to the point where I had forgotten how long I had been trapped, I didn't feel very good about humans.

1599300026.korean: 나중에서야 그 연구원들이 실제로는 날 구하지 못할 상황이었단 걸 알게 됐지만… 여전히 밉다는 생각 밖에 하지 못했거든.
1599300026.english: It wasn't until later that I realized those researchers actually couldn't save me... but I still couldn't think of anything but hating them.

1599300027.english: … You have a deeper scar than it looks. I didn't know.

1599300028.korean: 사고 때문이라고는 하지만… 그동안은 줄곧 배신 당했다고 생각했으니까...
1599300028.english: They say it was because of an accident... but all this time I felt like I had been betrayed...

1599300029.korean:
차라리 돌아오겠다고 말하지 않았더라면… 지키지도 못할 약속을 믿고...
언젠간 올 거야… 그렇게 생각할 수밖에 없었어. 그렇게 몇 달, 아니… 몇 년, 아니…
1599300029.english:
If only I hadn't said I would come back... trusting a promise I couldn't keep...
 It will come someday… I had no choice but to think that. Like that, a few months, no… a few years, no…

1599300030.korean: 몇십 년을 혼자 어두운 곳에서 혼자 지세워야 했는지…
1599300030.english: I wonder how many decades I had to spend all alone in a dark place…

1599300032.english: So, have you overcome it now?

1599300033.korean: …오랜 시간이 걸렸어. 회장님이 아니었다면 언니는… 영원히 그 사람들을 저주했을 거야.
1599300033.english: … It took a long time. If it weren't for the Chairman, my sister… would have cursed those people forever.

1599300034.korean:
…물론, 세레스티아나와 세크메트의 도움도 있지만... 
이 누나의 마음을 열어주는 데 가장 큰 역할을 한 사람은 회장님이거든.
1599300034.english:
… Of course, there is also the help of Celestiana and Sekhmet...
 The person who played the biggest role in opening this older sister's heart was the Chairman.

1599300038.korean:
제가 듣기론 절 만든 삼안 산업의 수뇌부들은 그저 저희를 소모품 정도로 생각했지요.
이곳에 와 관리자님과 만나기 전까진 그런 운명에 대해 특별한 생각이 없었습니다.
1599300038.english:
From what I heard, the executives at Saman Industries, who created me, simply regarded us as expendables.
 I didn't have any particular thoughts about such fate until I came here and met the manager.

1599300039.korean:
하지만, 관리자님을 만나고 난 뒤로, 마침내 제 존재를 인정받은 것 같았죠.
저 또한 기약없이 AGS와 싸우면서도 관리자님이 깨어나길 믿고 있어요.
1599300039.english:
However, after meeting the manager, I felt like my existence was finally acknowledged.
 I, too, believe that the Administrator will wake up, even as I fight the AGS with no end in sight.

1599300040.korean: …그래서, 하토르 님께선. 자신의 존재를 알아주고 기뻐해주는 회장님을 많이 사랑하십니까?
1599300040.english: … So, Lady Hathor, do you love the Chairman very much for acknowledging your existence and rejoicing in your presence?

1599300041.korean: 사, 사랑? 으엣? 아… 아니! 사랑이라니… 그게 무슨 소리야~ 어린 애가 무슨 그런 소리를…
1599300041.english: L-Love? Huh? Ah... no! Love... what are you talking about? How can a little kid say such a thing...

1599300042.korean: 죄송하지만, 저도 알 건 다 압니다.
1599300042.english: I'm sorry, but I know everything there is to know.

1599300043.korean: 아니 뭐… 그, 언니가 널 아가 취급한 건 아니고… 그냥 더치걸이나, LRL 또래같이 보여서…
1599300043.english: No, well... it's not like she treated you like a baby... it's just that you looked like a Dutch girl or someone around LRL's age...

1599300044.korean:
죄송하지만, 전 성인 바이오로이드입니다.
...너무 어리게만 봐주시는 것도 때에 따라선 실례가 될 수 있습니다.
1599300044.english:
I'm sorry, but I am an adult bioroid.
 ...seeing me as too young can sometimes be rude.

1599300045.korean:
…으음, 미안해. 대답하자면… 언니는 회장님 때문에 다시 인간을 믿게 됐어.
음… 신뢰라는 감정과 더 가까운 것 같은데… 이걸 사랑이라고 해야 하나?
1599300045.english:
… Um, sorry. To answer… my sister has come to trust humans again because of the Chairman.
 Hmm... it feels closer to the emotion of trust... should I call this love?

1599300046.korean: 하나 묻고 싶은게 있습니다만은… 하토르 님께선…
1599300046.english: There is one thing I would like to ask... Lady Hathor...

1599300047.korean:
- 저녁을 먹은 후 어슬렁거리며 오귀기아를 걷던 중, 
칼립소와 하토르가 이야기를 하는 모습이 보였다.
1599300047.english:
While strolling through Oguigia after dinner,
 I saw Calypso and Hathor talking.

1599300048.english: Oh? Chairman, how was the meal?

1599300049.korean: - 역시 멸망 전 세계 최고를 자랑하던 삼안의 유흥단지 답게, 경험할수록 놀라운 시설이다.
1599300049.english: As expected of Saman's entertainment complex, which boasted being the best in the world before the apocalypse, the facilities are amazing the more you experience them.

1599300050.korean: 괜찮으셨습니까? 다행입니다. 식재료들이 변변치 않아 걱정했는데…
1599300050.english: Were you alright? That's a relief. I was worried because the ingredients weren't very good...

1599300051.korean: 후훗, 관리자님께도 어서 알려드려야겠군요. 간만에 오신 손님께서 서비스에 만족하고 계시니…
1599300051.english: Hehe, I should let the manager know right away. Since the guest, who hasn't visited in a while, is satisfied with the service...

1599300052.korean: 역시, 늘 시설을 깨끗이 관리한 보람이 있습니다.
1599300052.english: As expected, it has paid off to always keep the facilities clean.

1599300053.korean:
- 마치 어린아이가 칭찬을 받은 것처럼 해맑은 웃음을 띤 칼립소는,
조금 지친 표정으로 돌아온 라미아와 몸을 부닥쳤다.
1599300053.english:
Calypso, wearing a bright smile like a child who has been praised,
 I bumped into Lamia, who had returned with a slightly tired expression.

1599300055.korean: 뭐야. 왜 어린 애처럼 굴고 있어, 언니?
1599300055.english: What's wrong? Why are you acting like a little kid, unnie?

1599300056.korean: …흠흠. 흐음, 아니야. 아무 것도… 그나저나, 내가 준 일은 어쩌고 돌아온 거야?
1599300056.english: … Ahem. Hmm, no. Nothing… Anyway, what happened to the work I gave you?

1599300057.korean: 뭐 알면서 그래? 남아있을 게 뭐가 있다고…
1599300057.english: Do you know what you're talking about? What is there left to be left...

1599300059.korean: 간만에 스파 오픈 했다고 들었는데, 몸이 좀 쑤셔서 말이야! 잘 쓸게 언니! 하하하하~
1599300059.english: I heard the spa opened for the first time in a while, and my body's been a bit sore! I'll make good use of it, unnie! Hahaha~

1599300060.korean:
흥, 내가 청소할 땐 무슨 뻘짓이냐고 잔소리하더니, 이제 와서?
놀지 말고 좀 도와. 일손 모자란 거 안 보여?
1599300060.english:
Hmph, you nagged me about what kind of nonsense I was doing when I was cleaning, and now you're coming here?
 Stop goofing off and help out. Can't you see we're short-handed?

1599300062.korean: 하다못해, 로비에 쌓인 먼지라도 털란 말이야!
1599300062.english: At the very least, dust off the floor in the lobby!

1599300063.korean: 우리가 여기서 빗자루 질이나 하려고 만들어진 바이오로이드는 아닐 텐데?
1599300063.english: We weren't made just to sweep here, were we?

1599300064.korean:
그럼 네 원래 업무인 경비라도 하란 말이야! 기억 안 나? 너 말이야…
블랙리버 바이오로이드들이 급습했을 때 제대로 대응 못하고 우스운 꼴 보여줬잖아!
1599300064.english:
Then at least do your original job as a security guard! Don't you remember? I'm talking about you...
 You couldn't respond properly when the Black River Bio-roids raided and made a fool of yourself!

1599300065.english: No matter the situation, you did a good job kicking them out!

1599300066.korean:
네 얼굴에 난 그 흉터도 그년들이 낸 거 아니야? 
언제 또 그 마리아 밑에 있던 테러리스트들이 쳐들어 올지 알고!
1599300066.english:
Didn't those bitches make that scar on your face, too?
 Who knows when those terrorists under Maria might break in again!

1599300068.korean: - 칼립소와 라미아의 말다툼에서 튀어나온 단어에 머릿속에 익숙한 얼굴들이 스쳐 지나간다.
1599300068.english: Familiar faces flash through my mind at the words that came out of Calypso and Lamia's argument.

1599300069.korean: 손님… 어떻게 그 집단을 아시는 거죠?
1599300069.english: Sir... how do you know that group?

1599300070.korean: - 무심결에 중얼거린 단어였지만, 최대한 머리를 굴려 칼립소의 현재 상태를 떠보기로 했다.
1599300070.english: It was a word I muttered unintentionally, but I racked my brain as much as I could to gauge Calypso's current state.

1599300071.korean: - 나는 하토르 옆에 선 후, 그녀의 옆구리를 쿡쿡 찌르며 윙크했다.
1599300071.english: I stood next to Hathor, poked her in the side, and winked.

1599300072.korean: 으…응? 아~ 네, 네! 회장님… 그랬죠! 하하…
1599300072.english: Uh... huh? Ah~ Yes, yes! Chairman... that's right! Haha...

1599300073.korean:
어이, 손님. 정말이야? 제법 잘 싸우나 보네?
PECS 쪽에 겨뤄 볼 만한 년은 레모네이드 감마 말곤 없을 거라 생각했는데 말이야.
1599300073.english:
Hey, sir. Really? You look like you fight quite well.
 I thought Lemonade Gamma was the only one who could stand a chance against PECS.

1599300074.korean:
조금 시간이 지났습니다만... 이곳이 한창 붐비던 때에
삼안 측과 접선하려던 블랙리버의 간부를 암살하겠다는 연유로 기습을 받았습니다.
1599300074.english:
It has been a while, but... back when this place was at its peak...
 We were ambushed on the grounds that a Black River executive was attempting to make contact with Saman.

1599300075.korean: 막내의 실수로 놓치고 말았지만요. 그 때 숨통을 아주 끊어버려야 했었는데…
1599300075.english: I missed it because of the youngest's mistake, though. I should have completely cut off its lifeline back then...

1599300076.korean:
네, 회장님… 이후 내막은 모르지만... 블랙리버 측에선 이후로 앙심이라도 품었는지, 
AGS를 계속 풀어 이곳을 점령하려고 해요.
1599300076.english:
Yes, Chairman... I don't know the inside story, but... I wonder if Black River held a grudge afterwards,
 They keep releasing AGS to take over this place.

1599300077.korean:
그러고보니 손님… 손님의 용병 바이오로이드 중에선 
블랙리버 사에서 만든 것으로 추정되는 개체들도 보이던데…
1599300077.english:
Come to think of it, Guest... among the Guest's mercenary bioroids
 I also saw some specimens that appeared to have been made by Black River...

1599300079.korean: 언니, 블랙리버 바이오로이드를 가지고 있다고 다 블랙리버 소속이겠어? 거 참…
1599300079.english: Sister, just because someone has a Black River Bio-roid, do you think they belong to Black River? Come on...

1599300080.korean:
…죄송합니다. 회장님. 아무래도 저희 측 손실이 많았다보니… 
저도 모르게 의심했습니다.
1599300080.english:
… I am sorry, Chairman. Since our side suffered significant losses…
 I suspected it without even realizing it.

1599300081.korean: - 애써 분위기를 가라앉히기 위해 칼립소를 띄워주자, 그녀는 노기를 거두었다.
1599300081.english: When I tried to cheer up Calypso to calm the atmosphere, she let go of her anger.

1599300082.english: Excuse me. I hope you have a pleasant time in Oughigia.

1599300083.korean: - 칼립소의 현실은 여전히 멸망 전에 머물러 있는 듯했다.
1599300083.english: - Calypso's reality seemed to still be stuck before the apocalypse.

1599300084.english: What are the two of you doing?

1599300088.english: … Huh? Wait, what did you say?

1599300089.english: Are you perhaps talking about the Empress Hound…?

1599300092.korean: 블랙리버에서도 꽤 애를 먹던 바이오로이드 아닌가.
1599300092.english: Isn't that the bioroid that gave Black River quite a hard time?

1599300093.english: They're famous on our side too...

1599300094.english: Hathor fought against them, too, right?

1599300095.korean: 너희는 어떻게 엠프레시스 하운드 바이오로이드를 알게 됐어?
1599300095.english: How did you guys find out about the Empressis Hound bioroid?

1599300097.korean: 그... 걔네는 블랙리버에서 내가 구입한 바이오로이드야.
1599300097.english: Uh... those are the bioroids I bought in Black River.

1599300098.korean: 이곳을 떠도는 AGS 하곤 관련 없어, 나도 블랙리버 소속이 아니고…
1599300098.english: I have nothing to do with the AGS wandering around here, and I'm not affiliated with Black River either…

1599300100.korean: 관리자 분은… 좋겠네. 이렇게 믿음직한 바이오로이드를 둬서.
1599300100.english: The administrator... is lucky. To have such a reliable bioroid.

1599400001.english: Commander, you look like you have a lot on your mind.

1599400002.korean:
- 아까 전 칼립소와의 대화 후 머릿속이 복잡해졌다. 무슨 이유인지 알 수 없지만…
 칼립소는 자신만의 세계에 담을 치고 이방인을 밀어내고 있다.
1599400002.english:
My mind has been a mess since my conversation with Calypso earlier. I don't know why, but...
 Calypso is building a wall around her own world and pushing out strangers.

1599400003.english: It's serious, right? I'm seriously dying to give you a good smack on the head...

1599400004.korean:
…그 마음, 어쩐지 이해할 것 같기도 해. 
갑자기 믿고 따르던 인간이 없어진다는 걸 받아들이긴 어려운 법이지…
1599400004.english:
… Somehow, I think I can understand that feeling.
 It’s hard to accept that someone you trusted and followed is suddenly gone…

1599400005.korean:
- 필요 이상으로 자기 세계에 매몰되어 있다… 
그리고, 주인이 살아있다고 믿는다.
1599400005.english:
- Buried in their own world more than necessary…
 And, I believe the owner is alive.

1599400006.korean:
- 낙원 때의 일을 다시 생각해 본다면, 바이오로이드에게 있어 존경하고 따르는 인간의 죽음과
부재는 바이오로이드에게 정신적인 문제를 유발할 수 있다는 건 엄연한 사실이다.
1599400006.english:
- If we reflect on the events of Paradise, for the bioroids, the death of the human they respect and follow, and
 It is an undeniable fact that absence can cause mental problems in bioroids.

1599400007.korean: …음, 누나가 생각하기엔 사령관이 진실을 알려주고 설득하는 게 나을 것 같아.
1599400007.english: … Hmm, I think it would be better for the commander to tell the truth and persuade them.

1599400008.korean:
귓등으로도 듣지 않을 거야. 무덤가에 가서 매일 말을 걸고 
문안 인사를 하는 수준인데 어디서부터 뭘 어떻게 설득하겠다는 거지?
1599400008.english:
I won't listen to a word. I'll go to the graveyard and talk to them every day.
 It's just at the level of paying respects; where do you even begin to think about persuading them, and how exactly do you intend to do it?

1599400009.korean: 그렇다고 이렇게 연기만 계속 할 순 없잖아. 우리의 적은 철충인데.
1599400009.english: But we can't just keep acting like this. Our enemy is the Iron蟲 (Iron Bug).

1599400010.korean:
좋은 방법 없어? 당신은 그런 바이오로이드들을 불러 모으는 동안 
이렇다 할 설득 같은 건 해본 경험은 없는 거야?
1599400010.english:
Isn't there a good way? While you are gathering those bioroids
 Have you never really tried to persuade anyone before?

1599400013.korean: 뭐, 그렇게 보일 수도 있겠지. 우리 언니는 꽤 응석받이였거든.
1599400013.english: Well, I suppose it might seem that way. My older sister was quite spoiled, you know.

1599400014.korean: 둘째 언니는 전쟁에 많이 나가지 못했어.
1599400014.english: My second older sister couldn't go to war much.

1599400015.english: Because the manager was so fond of the child…

1599400016.korean:
당연한 얘기지만, 나는 이런 시시껄렁한 유흥단지 관리하는 일을 그리 좋아하진 않았어. 
큰 언니야 원래부터 무슨 일이든 맡은 바 묵묵히 일하는 성격이었지만…
1599400016.english:
Needless to say, I didn't really like managing this kind of shabby entertainment complex.
 My eldest sister has always been the type to quietly do whatever she is assigned, but...

1599400017.korean: 둘째 언니는 이 일을 마치 처음부터 주어진 과업이나 천직처럼 여기며 지냈지.
1599400017.english: My second older sister lived as if this work were a task given to her from the very beginning or a calling.

1599400019.korean:
...저 멍청한 언니. 
조금만 생각해도 자기가 터무니없는 소릴 하는 걸 알 텐데.
1599400019.english:
...that stupid older sister.
 If he thought about it for a moment, he would realize he is talking nonsense.

1599400020.korean:
잠깐, 왜 그렇게까지 언니를 비웃는 거야! 그래도 하나뿐인 언니 아니야?
너무해! 언니를 어떻게 그런 식으로 매도할 수 있…
1599400020.english:
Wait, why are you laughing at her like that! Isn't she your only sister?
 That's too much! How could you slander my sister like that…

1599400021.korean:
…그럼? 저 답도 없는 상황 똑똑히 봤잖아? 
마지막 인간을 보고도 저리 헛소리를 삑삑해대는데?
1599400021.english:
… Then? You saw that hopeless situation clearly, didn't you?
 Even after seeing the last human, it's still squeaking nonsense like that?

1599400022.korean:
물론 처음에는 받아들이기 힘들 거야… 하지만, 사령관이랑 오르카는 포기하지 않아.
이 언니도 처음엔 그랬어. 하지만 세크메트랑 세레스티아가 끝까지 날 케어해줬어.
1599400022.english:
Of course, it will be hard to accept at first… but the Commander and Orca won't give up.
 This older sister was like that at first, too. But Sekhmet and Celestia took care of me until the end.

1599400023.korean: 칼립소의 마음도, 시간이 지나면서 차차 괜찮아 질 거야…!
1599400023.english: Calypso's heart will gradually get better as time goes by...!

1599400025.korean:
잘 알아 둬. 나는 큰 언니랑 주먹다짐을 하면서까지 진실을 말해줘야 한다고 주장했어.
하지만 큰 언니는 마지막까지도 작은 언니 편을 들면서 진실을 외면하는데 동조했지.
1599400025.english:
Remember this. I insisted that I had to tell the truth, even going so far as to get into a fistfight with my eldest sister.
 However, the eldest sister sided with the younger sister until the very end and joined in turning a blind eye to the truth.

1599400026.korean: - 라미아는 어깨를 으쓱한 후, 소파에서 일어섰다.
1599400026.english: Lamia shrugged her shoulders and stood up from the sofa.

1599400027.korean: …미우나 고우나 큰 언니가 떠나버린 지금, 이제 우릴 지탱해 줄 버팀목은 없어.
1599400027.english: … Whether we like it or not, now that our eldest sister has left, there is no longer a pillar to support us.

1599400028.korean: …글쎄. 나도 철충과 싸우다 죽으면 그땐 작은 언니가 정신을 차리고 이곳을 떠나지 않을까?
1599400028.english: … Well. If I die fighting the Iron蟲 too, wouldn't my little sister come to her senses and leave this place then?

1599400030.english: Haha. What's with those expressions? I'm just kidding.

1599400033.korean: 거 참. 개그 하나 받아 치지도 못 하긴.
1599400033.english: Seriously. You can't even crack a joke.

1599400034.korean: 내가 아는 선에서 설명해 보도록 하지.
1599400034.english: Let me explain it to the best of my knowledge.

1599400035.korean:
오귀기아의 관리자는 병이 아니라, 삼안 상층부에 의해 암살당했어. 
중요 정보를 블랙리버에 넘겼다는 죄목이었지.
1599400035.english:
Oghigia's manager was not killed by illness, but was assassinated by the upper echelons of Saman.
 The charge was that he handed over important information to Black River.

1599400036.korean: 작은 언니랑 관리자는 특출나게 사이가 좋았어. 누가 보면 엄마랑 딸 같아 보이기까지 했지…
1599400036.english: My younger sister and the manager were exceptionally close. Anyone watching would even think they were a mother and daughter…

1599400037.korean:
아마 관리자가 누군가한테 암살당한 뒤로 큰 언니는… 
관리자를 못 지킨 죄책감에 저러는 언니의 헛소리를 묵인하기로 마음 먹은 듯 해.
1599400037.english:
Probably after the manager was assassinated by someone, the eldest sister…
 It seems like she decided to turn a blind eye to her older sister's nonsense, as she acts that way out of guilt for failing to protect the manager.

1599400038.english: ...I'm tired, so I'll be going now.

1599400039.english: Ah, come to think of it... humans?

1599400040.korean: …여기 온 바이오로이드들의 대화를 엿듣자니, 제법 튼실한 대구경 포를 가지고 있다던데.
1599400040.english: … Listening to the conversation of the bioroids here, I heard they have quite a sturdy large-caliber cannon.

1599400041.korean: 내 침대로 와줄 수 있겠나? 만들어지고 몇십 년 동안 남자 없이 생활했더니… 후끈해져서 말이야.
1599400041.english: Could you come to my bed? I’ve been living without a man for decades since I was created... and I’m getting all worked up, you know.

1599400043.korean: 호텔 방문 열어놓고 있을 테니 찾아오라고?
1599400043.english: You're telling me to come find me since I'll leave the hotel room door open?

1599400044.korean: - 라미아가 사라진 후, 하토르는 한숨을 푹 내쉬었다.
1599400044.english: After Lamia disappeared, Hathor let out a deep sigh.

1599400045.english: I have a long way to go, longer than I thought...

1599400046.korean: 지금 이 세상엔 누나보다 우울한 바이오로이드는 없었을 거라 생각했는데... 하하…
1599400046.english: I thought there couldn't be a bioroid more depressed than you in this world... Haha...

1599400047.korean:
뭐랄까…  제때 어리광 부리지 못하고 자란 아이 같다고 해야 할까…?
애써 괜찮다고 해도… 속은 까맣게 탄… 그런 거 있잖아…
1599400047.english:
How should I put it… should I say they seem like a child who grew up unable to act spoiled at the right time…?
 Even if you try hard to say you're okay... but inside you're burning up... you know that feeling...

1599400049.korean: - 그때, 별안간 패널로 시라유리의 호출 마크가 띄워졌다.
1599400049.english: Just then, Shirayuri's call mark suddenly appeared on the panel.

1599400050.english: Commander, are you available for a moment?

1599400051.korean: 사령관님이 부탁하신 대로, 오귀기아와 오케아니데스 프로젝트에 대한 자료를 최대한 수집했어요.
1599400051.english: As requested by the Commander, I have collected as much data as possible regarding the Ogygia and Oceanides projects.

1599400052.korean:
일단 오르카 서버 내부 망 데이터에선 자료가 손상되어 있었어요.
아마 스발바르 방주 쪽으로 데이터 요청을 해야 할 것 같아요.
1599400052.english:
First of all, the data on the Orca server's internal network was corrupted.
 I think we will probably have to request data from the Svalbard Ark.

1599400053.korean:
...무슨 이유에서인지 모르겠지만, 삼안 측에서 오귀기아와 
오케아니데스 프로젝트에 대한 정보를 철저하게 감추고 싶어 했던 것 같아요.
1599400053.english:
...I don't know why, but Saman's side, Oghigia and
 It seems they wanted to thoroughly hide information about the Okeanides Project.

1599400054.korean: - 나는 문득 라미아가 내게 넘긴 정보가 떠올랐다.
1599400054.english: I suddenly remembered the information Lamia had passed on to me.

1599400055.korean: 안 그래도 말씀드리려고 했어요. 그 여자의 이름은 '소피아 첸'이에요.
1599400055.english: I was actually going to tell you. Her name is Sophia Chen.

1599400056.korean: 특이한 점으론... 오케아니데스 프로젝트를 이끌었던 천재 과학자더군요.
1599400056.english: One notable point is... he was a genius scientist who led the Okeanides Project.

1599400057.korean: 추측하건대, 삼안 측에서 어떠한 사유로 인해 강제로 보직을 변경당한 걸로 추정돼요.
1599400057.english: Presumably, it is presumed that Saman forced him to change his position for some reason.

1599400058.english: Why are you acting like this?

1599400059.korean: 암살… 이요? 흥미롭네요. 현재까지 그런 정보는 확인된 바 없거든요.
1599400059.english: Assassination…? That’s interesting. So far, no such information has been confirmed.

1599400060.korean: 기술 유출이요? …알겠습니다. 방주 쪽 므네모시네 님께 자료 요청을 부탁드릴게요.
1599400060.english: Technology leakage? … Understood. I will ask Mnemosyne on the Ark side to request the data.

1599400061.korean: 도움이 될 자료가 나온다면 조만간 연락드리겠습니다.
1599400061.english: I will contact you soon if any helpful materials become available.

1599400062.korean: - 통신이 끝난 후, 긴 한숨을 쉬었다.
1599400062.english: After the communication ended, I let out a long sigh.

1599400067.english: There is something I want to ask.

1599400069.english: Didn't it feel like they wanted to be acknowledged?

1599400070.english: Is there a special reason for that?

1599400071.english: Huh? What are you talking about?

1599400072.english: … What are you planning to do?

1599400074.korean: 네 큰 언니는 왜 칼립소를 감싼 거야?
1599400074.english: Why did your older sister defend Calypso?

1599400076.english: I don't have that... Shall I give you a can of tuna?

1599400082.english: It looks like Hathor is really worried about Calypso.

1599400083.korean: 그래도 칼립소는 하토르한테 마음을 연 것처럼 보이는데.
1599400083.english: Still, it looks like Calypso has opened her heart to Hathor.

1599400084.korean: 나랑은 제대로 된 대화를 안 하려 하더라…
1599400084.english: They didn't want to have a proper conversation with me...

1599400088.korean: 오귀기아 관리자 이름이 뭔지 알 수 있을까?
1599400088.english: Do you know the name of the Oughigia manager?

1599400089.english: ...A scientist? Not from a management background?

1599400091.english: They say that woman was assassinated in Saman.

1599400092.english: The security was more thorough than I thought.

1599400093.english: Could it be retaliation for the technology leak?

1599500001.korean: 야, 기억나냐? 너 저기서 혼자 뒤처져가지곤 자기도 데려가달라고 찡얼거렸던 거.
1599500001.english: Hey, do you remember? You lagged behind over there all by yourself and whined about wanting to be taken along.

1599500002.korean: 네가 도망가겠다고 건물 다 폭파 시켜버려서 도망칠 곳이 없었던 거였잖아!
1599500002.english: You blew up the whole building to escape, so there was nowhere to run!

1599500003.korean: 뭐래. 그래도 내가 거기서 결국 살려줬었잖아.
1599500003.english: What are you talking about? I did end up saving you there, though.

1599500004.korean: …언제까지 밖을 나돌아다닐 셈이냐. 이제 슬슬 들어갈 때도 되지 않았나?
1599500004.english: … How long do you plan to keep wandering around outside? Isn't it about time you headed back inside?

1599500005.korean: 야, 너 때문에 우리만 손가락 빨고 있잖아!
1599500005.english: Hey, because of you, we're the only ones left sucking our thumbs!

1599500006.korean:
다시 한번 강조하지만 혹시나 하는 만약을 위해 그런 것 아니더냐. 
나라고 안 놀고 싶은 건 줄 아느냐?
1599500006.english:
I emphasize this once again: isn't it just to be safe, just in case?
 Do you think I don't want to play?

1599500007.korean: 하여튼 똥강아지, 이럴 때만 대장이라고 혼자 진지한 척하지?
1599500007.english: Anyway, you little brat, you act all serious and act like the boss only when it suits you, right?

1599500008.korean: 흥, 주인님께선 이미 너희에 대한 통제 권한을 내게 주셨다는 걸 잊었나?
1599500008.english: Hmph, have you forgotten that Master has already given me control over you?

1599500009.korean: 아~ 난 인정 못해. 무슨 닭살 돋게 대장이야?
1599500009.english: Ah, I can't accept that. Why the cringe-worthy "boss" act?

1599500011.english: A bioroid that raided this place long ago…?!

1599500013.korean: - 솔직히 소완이 해준 요리 만큼은 아니지만, 정갈하고 맛있다.
1599500013.english: Honestly, it’s not quite as good as the food Sowan makes, but it’s neat and tasty.

1599500014.korean: 그리고 오늘은 특별히, 제가 직접 회장님을 대접하기 위해 내온 음식입니다.
1599500014.english: And today, I have specially prepared this food to treat the Chairman myself.

1599500015.english: - Haha, that looks like delicious food.

1599500017.korean: - ...하도 비주얼이 위험해 나도 모르게 말이 거꾸로 잘못 나왔다.
1599500017.english: - ...The visuals were so dangerous that I unintentionally blurted out the wrong words.

1599500018.korean: 오랜만에 오신 귀한 손님이신 만큼… 제가 만든… 특제 카스테라...
1599500018.english: Since you are such a distinguished guest visiting after a long time… my homemade… special castella…

1599500019.korean: 어어, 그거 먹으면 안 돼 손님. 지지.
1599500019.english: Hey, you can't eat that, sir. Naughty.

1599500020.korean:
- 라미아는 칼립소가 만든 독극물을 그대로 쓰레기통에 쳐박았다.
…칼립소가 울먹거렸지만 내게 있어선 참으로 다행이었다.
1599500020.english:
Lamia threw the poison Calypso had made directly into the trash can.
 … Calypso choked up, but for me, it was truly a relief.

1599500022.korean: 언니는 음식 내오기 전에 간만 보면 되지 뭘 자꾸 직접 요리를 하려 해?
1599500022.english: You just need to taste the food before serving it; why do you keep trying to cook it yourself?

1599500023.korean: 무, 무슨 소리냐! 내가 몇 년을 홀로 독학해 완성했는데…?!
1599500023.english: W-What are you talking about! I spent years teaching myself to master this...?!

1599500024.korean: - …이게 빵인지 자수정인지 소완이 물었을 것 같다.
1599500024.english: - … I think Sowon would have asked if this was bread or amethyst.

1599500025.korean:
흥, 예전 여기서 일했던 소완은 제 실력이 형편없다면서 불같이 화를 냈었죠...
회장님이 아시는 소완 개체도 부디 그런 덜떨어진 소완이 아니길 빌겠습니다.
1599500025.english:
Hmph, Sowan, who used to work here, got furious saying my skills were terrible...
 I hope the Sowan you know, Chairman, is not that kind of dim-witted Sowan either.

1599500026.korean: - 칼립소의 머리에 올려진 엘리자베스도 호응하듯 촉수를 치켜들었다.
1599500026.english: Elizabeth, perched on Calypso's head, also raised her tentacles in response.

1599500027.korean: 칫… 이번엔 진짜 요리사로서의 재능을 인정받고 싶었는데.
1599500027.english: Tch... I really wanted to be recognized for my talent as a chef this time.

1599500028.korean:
당연한 것 아니겠습니까? 호텔 지배인은 미각 뿐만 아니라 요리에도 조예가 깊어야 하는 법입니다.
그것이 오귀기아를 관리하는 이 칼립소가 지녀야 할 덕목이지 않겠습니까?
1599500028.english:
Isn't that only natural? A hotel manager must be well-versed in cooking as well as having a sense of taste.
 Wouldn't that be the virtue that this Calypso, who manages Ogygia, should possess?

1599500029.korean: 관리자님이 깨어나신다면 제 향상된 요리 실력을 선보이고 싶은데…
1599500029.english: If the manager wakes up, I’d like to show off my improved cooking skills…

1599500031.korean:
관리자님은 병이 위독하시어 현재 누구도 만나실 수 없습니다.
제가 나중에 직접 말씀드리겠습니다.
1599500031.english:
The administrator is in critical condition and cannot meet anyone at the moment.
 I will tell you directly later.

1599500032.korean: 으음~ 이 호텔 음식 엄청 맛있어! 으헤헤… 칼립소~ 언니 한 접시 더 먹어도 돼?
1599500032.english: Mmm~ The food at this hotel is super delicious! Hehehe… Calypso~ Can I have another plate, sis?

1599500033.korean:
네, 아이들에게 말해 더 내오겠습니다. 
하토르 님 같이 식성이 좋으신 분을 보니, 저도 덩달아 기분이 좋군요.
1599500033.english:
Yes, I will tell the children and bring out more.
 Seeing someone with such a good appetite like Hathor makes me feel good too.

1599500034.english: Calypso! We are in big trouble!

1599500035.english: What can I do for you?

1599500036.korean:
그게… 칼립소 님께서 시키신 일을 하려고 잠시 오귀기아 외각에 나갔다가…
엠프레시스 하운드로 추정되는 바이오로이드들이 서성이는 걸 봤어요!
1599500036.english:
Well… I went out to the outskirts of Ogygia for a moment to do something Lady Calypso ordered, and…
 I saw bioroids presumed to be Empressis Hounds loitering around!

1599500038.korean: - 나는 포크와 나이프를 떨어뜨리며 벌떡 일어나 그들에게 자초지종을 설명하려 했다.
1599500038.english: I dropped my fork and knife, jumped up, and tried to explain the whole situation to them.

1599500040.korean: 바퀴벌레 같은 것들… 그 난리를 쳐놓고 뻔뻔하게 여길 다시 기어들어와?
1599500040.english: You cockroach-like creatures... After causing such a ruckus, how dare you shamelessly crawl back in here?

1599500041.korean: …회장님. 회장님께서도 엠프레시스 하운드의 악명에 대해선 잘 알고 계신다 말하지 않으셨습니까?
1599500041.english: … Mr. Chairman. Didn't you say that you are also well aware of the Empressis Hound's notoriety?

1599500042.english: They inflicted severe damage on Ogygia.

1599500043.english: I will take care of it right away and be back.

1599500044.korean:
- 칼립소는 자리를 박차고 달려나갔다.
나와 하토르도 황급히 자리에서 일어난 후, 칼립소의 뒤를 따랐다.
1599500044.english:
- Calypso kicked off her seat and ran out.
 Hathor and I hurriedly rose from our seats and followed Calypso.

1599500045.korean: …저 언니 뭘 들었는데 갑자기 또 저래?
1599500045.english: … What did she hear that she's suddenly acting like that again?

1599500047.korean: 엠프레시스… 하운드? 설마 너… 그 애들도 너의 휘하에 있었단 말이야?
1599500047.english: Empressis… Hound? Don’t tell me… you mean those kids were under your command too?

1599500048.korean: 사령관, 누나 먼저 가볼게! 지금이라도 칼립소를 잘 타이르면 알아들을 지도 몰라!
1599500048.english: Commander, I'll go ahead! If we talk to Calypso nicely even now, she might understand!

1599500049.korean: 젠장! 하필 작은 언니가 제일 꼴보기 싫어하는 것들을…! 당장 뜯어 말려야 해!
1599500049.english: Damn it! Of all things, why did it have to be the things my older sister hates the most…! I have to stop them right now!

1599500050.korean: - 지금 칼립소의 이상행동은 그저 귀엽다고 웃어 넘길 수준이 아니라는걸, 라미아의 굳은 표정으로 감지할 수 있었다.
1599500050.english: Lamia’s stern expression made it clear that Calypso’s current strange behavior was not something to simply laugh off as cute.

1599500051.korean: 와, 근데 뭔가 이상하다… 여기 멸망 전만 해도 여기 사람이 바글바글했는데.
1599500051.english: Wow, but something's off... This place used to be packed with people right before the apocalypse.

1599500052.english: … I know, right. It’s actually a bit spooky.

1599500053.english: Oh my, my Janghwa~ Did you get the chills?

1599500055.english: Hey, wait... that guy... get out of the way!

1599500056.english: Maria's bastards... It's been a while, huh?

1599500058.english: You... that flat jellyfish from back then?

1599500059.korean:
잘 왔습니다. 당신과는 처음이지만… 보아하니, 당신도 엠프레시스 하운드 소속 같군요.
뭐 하여튼… 묫자리까지 잘들 오셨습니다. 늘 찝찝했는데, 드디어 박멸할 수 있겠군요.
1599500059.english:
Welcome. It is my first time meeting you, but... judging by the looks of it, you seem to be a member of the Empress Hound as well.
 Well, anyway... welcome to the burial site. I've always had a bad feeling about it, but it looks like I can finally get rid of it.

1599500060.english: Extermination? Hey, are you done talking?

1599500061.korean: 닥치세요. 지금 대만에 돌아다니는 이 AGS도 마리아가 농간을 부려 풀어놓은 거겠죠?
1599500061.english: Shut up. This AGS roaming around Taiwan right now was probably released by Maria through some kind of trickery, too, right?

1599500062.korean: 쟤 지금 뭔 소릴 하는 거야?
1599500062.english: What is he talking about right now?

1599500064.korean: 야! 잠깐! 뭔가 오해를 하고 있나 본데… 우린 테러하러 온 게 아니라고!
1599500064.english: Hey! Wait! You seem to be misunderstanding something... We didn't come here to commit terrorism!

1599500066.english: Of all people, the scariest one came!

1599500067.english: Die, you bastards who are worse than cockroaches… !

1599500068.korean: (어떻게 하지? 주인님의 명 없이는… 그대로 베어버릴 수 없어…!)
1599500068.english: (What should I do? Without my master's command… I can't just cut it down like that…!)

1599500069.english: Hey, you little brat! Watch out!

1599500070.korean: 제 앞에서 한 눈을 파시다니. 제법이시군요.
1599500070.english: To think you were distracted right in front of me. You're quite something.

1599500074.english: Come to think of it... you're the one who emits electricity.

1599500076.english: … I guess there is camaraderie even among trash?

1599500077.korean:
파프니르를 껴안고 쓰러진 천아의 재킷이 칼립소의 손톱에 찢어졌다.
당황스러워하는 것도 잠시, 천아는 등으로부터 불에 지진 듯 뜨거운 느낌이 퍼져나가는 걸 느꼈다.
1599500077.english:
Cheona's jacket was torn by Calypso's claws as she collapsed while hugging Fafnir.
 After a brief moment of bewilderment, Cheona felt a burning sensation spreading from her back.

1599500081.english: Oh, really? I'm looking forward to it.

1599500084.korean: 먹을 수 있는 거 정말 맞지?

1599500085.korean: 그… 맛만 보는 게 아니라 진짜, 요리를 배우고 싶으면…
1599500085.english: Um… if you want to learn how to cook, not just taste it…

1599500086.korean: 요리사 중에 소완이 있는데… 나중에 정식으로 배워보지 그래?
1599500086.english: There's a chef named Sowon... why don't you try learning properly later?

1599500087.korean: 아냐. 내가 아는 소완은 너한테 친절할 거야.
1599500087.english: No. The Sowan I know will be kind to you.

1599500088.korean: 그나저나 칼립소는 모든 일에 완벽하고 싶어하네…?
1599500088.english: Anyway, Calypso wants to be perfect at everything...?

1599500089.korean: 근데… 관리자 분을 정말 만나볼 수는 없어?
1599500089.english: But... is it really impossible to meet the manager?

1599500090.english: … I could give you some good medicine.

1599500093.english: Wait a minute! I'll explain everything!

1599500096.english: There's no reason to be that wary...!

1599500097.english: Saying you're going to fight our Empress Hounds...

1599500098.english: I didn't expect them to react that sensitively...

1599600001.english: Haa... Hey! Where did you leave your mind...

1599600005.english: Hey, Cheon-ah! Snap out of it! Hey! Hey!

1599600006.korean: 천아, 겨우 긁힌 걸 가지고 무슨 엄살이지?
1599600006.english: Cheona, why are you making such a fuss over just a scratch?

1599600007.korean: 엄살인지 아닌지는, 당신도 당하시면 아실 겁니다.
1599600007.english: You will know whether it’s an exaggeration or not once you experience it yourself.

1599600009.korean:
전 암살에 특화된 바이오로이드… 
제 체내의 독은 현재로서도 마땅한 해독제가 없죠.
1599600009.english:
A bioroid specialized in assassination…
 There is currently no proper antidote for the toxins in my body.

1599600010.korean:
그저 할 수 있는 거라곤... 
제 독에 범벅이 되어 몸부림치다 벌레답게 죽는 것뿐이에요.
1599600010.english:
All I can do is...
 I'm just going to writhe in agony, covered in my poison, and die like a bug.

1599600012.korean:
그나저나, 당신 제법이군요. 
자신을 여제라고 부르는 정신병자의 꼭두각시 주제에…
1599600012.english:
By the way, you're quite something.
 You're just a puppet of a psychopath who calls herself an empress…

1599600013.english: … What did you just say? A psychopath?

1599600017.korean:
- 황급히 도착했을 때, 내 눈 앞에 펼쳐진 광경은 처참했다.
칼립소에게 상처를 입은 천아는 파르르 몸을 떨고 있었다.
1599600017.english:
When I arrived in a hurry, the sight that unfolded before my eyes was devastating.
 Cheona, who had been wounded by Calypso, was trembling.

1599600018.korean:
- 내 명령 때문인지, 칼립소와 바르그는 싸움을 멈추었다.
황급히 나는 천아에게 달려가 그녀를 들어올렸다.
1599600018.english:
- Perhaps because of my command, Calypso and Varg stopped fighting.
 I hurriedly ran to Cheona and lifted her up.

1599600020.korean: 아… 씨이, 가오 떨어지게… 그냥 가볍게 긁힌 건데…
1599600020.english: Ah... damn it, how embarrassing... It was just a light scratch...

1599600021.korean: 회장님, 명령만 내려주신다면 숨통을 완전히 끊어놓겠습니다.
1599600021.english: Chairman, if you just give the order, I will cut off their lifeline completely.

1599600022.korean: - 내 고함에 칼립소의 눈빛엔 두려움이 서렸다.
1599600022.english: At my shout, fear filled Calypso's eyes.

1599600023.english: Damn it... How pathetic... I'm not going to die...

1599600024.korean: - 하지만 말과 다르게 천아의 동공은 흔들리고 있었고 긁힌 상처는 보라빛으로 문드러지는 중이었다.
1599600024.english: However, contrary to his words, Cheona's pupils were trembling, and the scratched wound was festering into a purple color.

1599600026.korean: - 바르그는 죽일 듯 칼립소를 노려보다, 이내 어금니를 악물며 답했다.
1599600026.english: Varg glared at Calypso as if to kill her, then gritted his teeth and answered.

1599600028.korean: - 화를 애써 억누르는 내 목소리에 장화와 파프니르는 천아를 부축했다.
1599600028.english: At the sound of my voice trying hard to suppress my anger, Janghwa and Fafnir supported Cheona.

1599600029.korean:
- 라미아와 칼립소의 입에서 엠프레시스 하운드가 튀어나왔을 때부터 간담이 서늘했지만,
칼립소가 이렇게 강경한 태도로 전투태세에 돌입할 것이라고는 미처 예상하지 못했다.
1599600029.english:
I was terrified from the moment the Empressis Hound sprang from Lamia and Calypso's mouths, but
 I never expected Calypso to enter combat mode with such a hardline attitude.

1599600030.korean:
- 그 무엇보다, 내가 아끼는 대원들에게 손을 대버린 칼립소를 막지 못한
내 자신의 안일함에 이유 모를 분노가 치밀어 올랐다.
1599600030.english:
More than anything, I failed to stop Calypso from laying a hand on the soldiers I cherish.
 Inexplicable anger welled up inside me at my own complacency.

1599600032.korean: …전, 회장님의 안위를 위협하는 블랙리버의 벌레를 처리했을 뿐인데.
1599600032.english: … I merely dealt with the Black River bugs that were threatening the Chairman's safety.

1599600037.english: … That can't be. No, the manager is here.

1599600040.korean: - 칼립소의 눈에 한 줄기 눈물이 주르륵 흘러내렸다.
1599600040.english: A single tear streamed down Calypso's eye.

1599600046.english: Commander! S-stop it. Snap out of it!

1599600047.korean: 둘째 언… 니… 그만해. 이제 그만…
1599600047.english: Second older sister... stop it. Stop now...

1599600048.korean:
- 하토르와 라미아의 목소리에 그제야 머리가 차가워졌다. 
칼립소는 나를 올려다보며 나지막하게 중얼거렸다.
1599600048.english:
It was only then that my head cooled down at the voices of Hathor and Lamia.
 Calypso looked up at me and muttered softly.

1599600049.korean:
저는 오귀기아의 호텔 지배인… 칼립소… 
손님을 경호하기 위한 오케아니데스 프로젝트의 바이오로이드…
1599600049.english:
I am the hotel manager of Oughiguia… Calypso…
 A bioroid from the Okeanides Project designed to guard guests…

1599600052.korean: 인간님들을… 지키기 위한… 삼안 산업의… 기대를 안고… 태어난…
1599600052.english: Born... with the expectations of Saman Industries... to protect... the human race...

1599600053.korean: 사령관… 그만해! 이런 방법은 옳지 않아!
1599600053.english: Commander… Stop it! This isn't the right way!

1599600055.korean: - 칼립소는 초점없는 눈망울로 나를 올려다보며 마치, 혼잣말 하듯 대답했다.
1599600055.english: Calypso looked up at me with unfocused eyes and answered as if talking to herself.

1599600056.korean: 관리자님을, 그리고 인간 님을 지키기 위해… 확실하게… 벌레를 박멸하려 했을 뿐인데…
1599600056.english: I only intended to exterminate the bugs thoroughly... to protect the Administrator and Human...

1599600057.korean: …라미아처럼, 큰 언니처럼... 자랑스러운 오케아니데스 프로젝트의 일원이 되고 싶었을 뿐인데.
1599600057.english: … I just wanted to be a proud member of the Okeanides Project, like Lamia, like my big sister.

1599600058.english: Why… are you angry at me…?

1599600062.english: … I wanted to do it properly.

1599600066.korean:
- 칼립소는 비명을 지르며 머리를 쥐어잡은 채 뒷걸음질쳤다.
그리고 이내 나를 피해 황급히 어디론가 도망치기 시작했다.
1599600066.english:
- Calypso screamed and backed away while clutching her head.
 And soon, he started to hurriedly run away somewhere to avoid me.

1599600067.korean: 사령관! 누나가 칼립소를 뒤쫓을게, 사령관은 어서 오르카 호로 가 봐!
1599600067.english: Commander! I'll chase after Calypso. You go to the Orca right away!

1599600068.korean: 인간, 저항군 측에 독을 치료할 만한 바이오로이드가 있나?
1599600068.english: Are there any bioroids on the human or resistance side capable of treating the poison?

1599600069.korean: 얼른 가, 뭐가 됐든 최대한 빠른 시간 내에 조치해야 돼!
1599600069.english: Go quickly! Whatever it is, you have to take action as soon as possible!

1599600070.korean:
- 하토르는 황급히 칼립소가 달음박질한 쪽을 향해 뛰어가기 시작했다.
나는 라미아와 함께 오르카 호에 복귀했다.
1599600070.english:
Hathor hurriedly started running toward where Calypso had run.
 I returned to the Orca ship with Lamia.

1599600081.english: You guys go back to the Orca too.
