1599600085.english: … I told you I would explain everything.

1599600086.korean: 이곳의 인간 관리자는 이미 죽고 없다는 걸 아직도 모르겠어…?
1599600086.english: Don't you still realize that the human manager here is already dead...?

1599600087.korean: 칼립소. 우린 널 도와주러 온 거야.
1599600087.english: Calypso. We've come to help you.

1599600088.english: … If this is truly for my own good

1599600090.korean: 이쯤 하면 됐잖아! 이제 그만 정신 차리고 현실을 직시해!
1599600090.english: That's enough! Snap out of it and face reality!

1599600091.english: Do you really have to make me go this far...?

1599600096.english: Why… why didn't you admit it?

1599700005.english: I'm in pain... really... in pain...

1599700007.english: You know... so why are you acting like this...?

1599700009.english: You… made it like this, didn't you?

1599700021.korean: 빌어먹을 블랙리버 놈들 죽어… 죽어, 죽어!!
1599700021.english: Damn Black River bastards, die... die, die!!

1599700024.korean: 난 관리자님을… 인간 님을 실망시키지 않았어.
1599700024.english: I didn't disappoint the Manager... the Human.

1599700025.korean: 난 할 일을 했을 뿐이야, 난… 난…
1599700025.english: I just did what I had to do, I… I…

1599700029.korean: 정신 차려! 진정하라고! 철충 구역까지 왜 들어 온 거야?!
1599700029.english: Snap out of it! Calm down! Why did you come into the Iron蟲 zone?!

1599700032.english: … I should be praised. I should be recognized…

1599700033.korean: 칼립소, 지금 많이 혼란스러운 건 알겠어, 하지만 언니 말 좀 들어 볼래?
1599700033.english: Calypso, I know you're really confused right now, but can you listen to me?

1599700035.korean:
언니도 알아… 다정했던 인간이 없어졌다는 상실감이 어떤지… 
언니도 오랜 시간 동안 갇혀있으면서 겪어봤는걸?
1599700035.english:
You know, too... what it feels like to lose someone who was so kind...
 You've experienced it too, having been trapped for a long time, haven't you?

1599700036.korean:
원망스러웠어, 구하러 오겠다고 약속했었으니까…
그 말만 믿고 버틴 세월이 몇십 년이나 됐었으니까…
1599700036.english:
I resented it, because he had promised to come save me…
 Because I had endured for decades believing only those words…

1599700037.korean: 시끄러워! 시끄러워, 아니야, 관리자님은 죽지 않았어! 아니야 아니야!
1599700037.english: Shut up! Shut up, no, the manager isn't dead! No, no!

1599700038.korean:
네가 관리자를 지키지 못해서 죄책감이 있는 건 언니도 알아… 이해할 수 있어!
인간들은 죽었다는 걸 인정해야 해… 네가 상대하는 건 철충이라는 사실을...
1599700038.english:
I know you feel guilty for not being able to protect the manager... I can understand!
 You have to admit that humans are dead... the fact that you are facing Iron Bugs...

1599700041.korean: 난… 난 아냐… 난… 난… 난!
1599700041.english: I… I’m not… I… I… I!

1599700042.korean: …날 구하러 오겠다는 연구원들도, 휩노스 병으로 모두 죽었어.
1599700042.english: … The researchers who said they would come to save me also all died of Hypnos disease.

1599700043.korean: 구출된 뒤에야 그런 일이 있었다는 걸 알게 됐지... 누굴 원망해야 할지 모르겠더라.
1599700043.english: I only found out what had happened after I was rescued... I didn't know who to blame.

1599700044.korean: 네가 섬겼던 인간이 암살당한 건 어쩔 수 없었던 사고인 거야… 그러니까…
1599700044.english: The assassination of the person you served was an unavoidable accident... So...

1599700047.korean: 무슨 일인지는 모르지만… 많이 힘들구나, 너.
1599700047.english: I don't know what's going on, but... you must be having a really hard time.

1599700048.korean: 흐읍… 흐윽… 아냐… 난 아냐… 난 아니에요… 난, 난… 관리자님을…
1599700048.english: *Gasp*... *Sob*... No... It's not me... It's not me... I, I... I... the Manager...

1599700049.korean: 오케아니데스… 오케… 흐윽… 전… 명예… 큰 언니… 흐… 으읍…
1599700049.english: Okay... Okay... *Sob*... I... Honor... Big Sister... *Sob*... *Gasp*...

1599700051.korean: 아뇨, 전 말이죠… 잘 했어요. 전… 오귀기아를 지키고… 인간님을 지키고…
1599700051.english: No, you see... I did well. I... protected Oghigia... and protected the Human...

1599700056.english: I'm sorry... I shouldn't have done that...

1599700057.english: … Calypso. It’s fine, so hurry… let’s go back now.

1599700058.korean: 순식간에 철충 분대를 도륙한 칼립소는 허탈해하며 무릎을 꿇었다.
1599700058.english: Calypso, having slaughtered the Iron蟲 squad in an instant, knelt down in despair.

1599800001.korean: - 닥터는 천아에게 할 수 있는 최대한의 응급처치를 마친 후,  그녀의 몸을 면밀히 검사했다.
1599800001.english: After performing the maximum possible emergency treatment on Cheon-ah, the doctor thoroughly examined her body.

1599800002.english: … Good heavens! What on earth was they exposed to...

1599800003.korean: ...천아 언니가 아닌 보통 바이오로이드였으면 그 자리에서 즉사했을지도 몰라.
1599800003.english: ...If it had been a regular bioroid instead of Cheona, she might have died instantly on the spot.

1599800004.korean: 오빠, 천아 언니가 뱀 유전자를 가지고 있다는 거 알지?
1599800004.english: Oppa, you know Cheona has snake genes, right?

1599800005.korean: 다행히도 유전자 형질 덕분에 칼립소가 주입한 맹독을 어느 정도 버텨내고 있긴 하지만… 이건 정말이지 일반적인 독이 아냐.
1599800005.english: Fortunately, thanks to my genetic traits, I am able to withstand the deadly poison injected by Calypso to some extent, but... this really isn't just ordinary poison.

1599800006.korean: 대응할 만한 혈청이 현재로선 없어… 어떻게 이런 독이 세상에 있을 수가 있지?
1599800006.english: There is no serum to counter it right now… How can such a poison exist in the world?

1599800007.korean: - 닥터의 기술력으로도 칼립소의 독을 해독할 수 없단 사실에 적잖이 당황하던 그때였다.
1599800007.english: It was at that moment that he was quite taken aback by the fact that even the Doctor's technology could not detoxify Calypso's poison.

1599800008.english: How is the child lying down right now?

1599800010.korean: 이봐 꼬마, 우리 언니의 독을 버틸 수 있는진 미지수지만... 내 피로 혈청을 만들어 치료해 봐.
1599800010.english: Hey kid, it’s not known if you can withstand my sister’s poison... but try making a serum out of my blood to treat it.

1599800012.korean:
이 꼬맹이가… 내가 하라는 대로만 해!
난 바다뱀 유전자로 설계된 바이오로이드니 맹독에 저항하는 데 도움이 될 거야.
1599800012.english:
This little brat... just do as I say!
 I'm a bioroid designed with sea serpent genes, so I'll help you resist deadly venom.

1599800013.korean:
- 라미아가 소리를 빽 지르자, 닥터는 내 눈치를 보며 그녀의 피 샘플을 채취했다.
산소마스크를 쓴 채 누워있는 천아를 바라보던 라미아는 표정을 구겼다.
1599800013.english:
As Lamia screamed, the doctor glanced at me and took a blood sample.
 Lamia scowled as she looked at Cheona, who was lying down wearing an oxygen mask.

1599800016.korean: 이봐, 그 표정. 꼭 우리 관리자를 생각나게 만드는군. 쓸데없이 전전긍긍하는 모습 말이야.
1599800016.english: Hey, that look on your face. It reminds me exactly of our manager. That way he pacing around for no reason.

1599800017.korean: 전쟁 중에 바이오로이드를 잃은 적은 없었나.
1599800017.english: Have you never lost a bioroid during a war?

1599800018.korean: 우리 오빠는 여태껏 벌였던 전투에서 단 한 명의 희생자도 만들지 않았어.
1599800018.english: My brother hasn't caused a single casualty in any of the battles he has fought so far.

1599800019.korean:
바이오로이드 하나 다쳤다고 당황하는 게 어이가 없군.
지휘실력은 좋은 것 같지만… 너무 무뎌.
1599800019.english:
It's ridiculous to see you panicking just because one bioroid got hurt.
 His conducting skills seem good, but... he's too dull.

1599800020.english: What are you trying to say...?

1599800021.korean: …별 건 아니야. 그냥, 옛날 생각이 나서 말이야.
1599800021.english: … It’s nothing special. It’s just that it reminded me of the old days.

1599800022.korean:
그래, 우리 자매들의 안위를 쓸데없이 걱정하던 관리자랑 분위기가 상당히 비슷해서 말이지. 
유약한 놈 따윈 정말이지 딱 질색이야.
1599800022.english:
Yeah, the atmosphere is quite similar to that of the manager who used to worry needlessly about our sisters' safety.
 I really hate weaklings.

1599800023.english: Well, it was quite a long time ago.

1599800024.korean:
이녀석과, 그 빨간 머리. 그리고 그 이상한 꼬리를 단… 좀 맹한 애랑… 
하여튼 그놈들이 우리 오귀기아에 쳐들어왔던 적이 있었지.
1599800024.english:
This guy, and that red-haired one. And that one with the strange tail… the slightly dim-witted one…
 Anyway, those guys once invaded our Oghigia.

1599800025.korean:
… 생각해보니, 그때 그녀석들은 꽤 강했던 것 같은데. 
여제의 사냥개라는 것들이 이빨 한 번 무뎌졌어.
1599800025.english:
…Come to think of it, those guys seemed pretty strong back then.
 The Empress's hounds have had their teeth dulled.

1599800026.korean: 얘가 내 얼굴에 칼자국을 남긴 애야.
1599800026.english: This is the kid who left a knife mark on my face.

1599800027.korean: 그래. 제법 잘 싸우던 년이었는데. 널 만나고 나선 많이 유해진 것 같네.
1599800027.english: Yeah. She used to be quite a fighter. But she seems to have softened a lot since meeting you.

1599800028.korean:
- 나와 많은 시간을 보내며 여러가지 감정을 나눈 아이들이라서 그런가…
솔직히 라미아의 회상에 그리 공감이 가지는 않았다.
1599800028.english:
Is it because they are children who have spent a lot of time with me and shared various emotions...?
 Honestly, I didn't really empathize with Lamia's recollections.

1599800029.korean: 결과는 무승부였다. 저 셋은 무사히 도망쳤지.
1599800029.english: The result was a draw. Those three escaped safely.

1599800030.korean:
하지만, 삼안의 높은 인간들은 우리를 칭찬하기 보단, 
큰 투자금을 들이고도 블랙리버 바이오로이드를 제압 못한, 무능한 놈들이라는 책망 뿐이었지.
1599800030.english:
However, rather than praising us, the high-ranking humans of Saman,
 There was nothing but reproach that they were incompetent guys who couldn't subdue the Black River Bio-roids despite investing a large amount of money.

1599800031.korean: …그래서 작은 언니가 유독 분노를 품었을 지도 모르겠네.
1599800031.english: … So maybe that’s why my older sister harbored such anger.

1599800032.korean: 응? 하하하하. 뭐랄까, 여러 생각이 들어서 말이야. 내 고운 얼굴에 칼자국을 낸 게 괴씸하기도 하고…
1599800032.english: Huh? Hahaha. How should I put it... I have a lot of thoughts running through my head. It feels a bit outrageous that someone left a knife mark on my pretty face, and...

1599800033.korean: 어설프게라도 내 유전자를 흉내낸 게 재밌기도 하고.
1599800033.english: It’s also fun to have mimicked my genes, even if clumsily.

1599800034.korean: - 이 여자와… 천아가… 같은 유전자를 공유하고 있다고?
1599800034.english: - This woman… and Cheon-ah… share the same genes?

1599800035.english: Why are you looking at me like that?

1599800036.english: … Is there a law against that?

1599800037.korean:
오빠… 오빤 눈치 못 챘어? 이 여자랑 천아 언니…
머리 색도 그렇고 혀도 그렇고…
1599800037.english:
Oppa… didn’t you notice? This woman and Cheona unnie…
 The hair color, and the tongue...

1599800038.korean:
누가 봐도 연관 있을 거 같은 얼굴이잖아. 
분위기가 천아 언니랑은 180도 다르지만…
1599800038.english:
It’s a face that anyone would think is connected.
 The vibe is completely different from Cheona unnie, but…

1599800040.korean:
하하하… 죽이고 싶던 년이, 오르카 저항군에 합류했다, 이건가? 얄궂은 운명이군 그래.
서로 죽이고 죽이던 년들이 한 깃발 아래서 싸운다라…
1599800040.english:
Hahaha... So the bitch I wanted to kill has joined the Orca Resistance? What a cruel twist of fate.
 To think that bitches who used to kill each other are fighting under one banner…

1599800041.korean: 하아… 문제는 우리 언니가 어떻게든 정신을 차려야 한다는 건데 말이야.
1599800041.english: Haa... The problem is that my sister needs to pull herself together somehow.

1599800042.korean: - 라미아는 위협스레 혀를 낼름거리는 백아의 머리를 손가락으로 쓱쓱 문댔다.
1599800042.english: Lamia rubbed Baek-ah's head with her finger as he threateningly stuck out his tongue.

1599800045.korean: - 라미아는 천천히 고개를 들어 나를 응시했다.
1599800045.english: Lamia slowly raised her head and stared at me.

1599800046.korean: 작은 언니가 오르카에 위해를 끼친 건 맞다.
1599800046.english: It is true that the younger sister caused harm to Orca.

1599800048.korean:
하지만… 당신을 위해서 그랬다는 말은 거짓이 아니었다고.
난 하나뿐인 우리 언니를 포기할 수 없을 듯해, 그러니…
1599800048.english:
But… saying that I did it for you wasn't a lie.
 I don't think I can give up on my one and only older sister, so...

1599800050.korean: 한 번만 더 우리 언니에게 기회를 주면 안 되겠어?
1599800050.english: Can't you give my sister just one more chance?

1599800052.korean: - 깊은 침묵이 이어지는 가운데, 닥터는 자신의 패널을 두드렸다.
1599800052.english: Amidst the deep silence, the doctor tapped his panel.

1599800053.korean: …어, 시라유리 언니? 음… 응? 오빠 여기 있어. 왜?
1599800053.english: … Uh, Shirayuri-nee? Hmm… Yes? Big brother is here. Why?

1599800054.english: Yeah... my sister is urgently looking for my brother?

1599800058.english: … Is there no way to decipher it?

1599800063.korean: 그나저나, 너희들… 대체 무슨 악연이 있는 거야?
1599800063.english: Anyway, you guys... what on earth is your bad luck with each other?

1599800067.english: I'm sorry to interrupt you with this serious topic.

1599800068.english: Cheona, your cheeks are going to wear out.

1599800075.english: … We have a few kids like that.

1599900002.korean:
- 시라유리는 나 말고도 다른 지휘관들을 호출했다.
호출 받은 지휘관들은 오르카 호의 대원이 다쳤다는 급보를 듣곤 어두운 표정을 감추지 못했다.
1599900002.english:
Shirayuri called other commanders besides me.
 The summoned commanders could not hide their grim expressions upon hearing the urgent news that a crew member of the Orca had been injured.

1599900003.korean: 대체 어떻게 된 일이죠? 대원이 다쳤다니…
1599900003.english: How on earth did this happen? To think a team member got hurt…

1599900004.korean: - 역시나 라미아의 말대로 모두들 예민한 반응을 보였다.
1599900004.english: As expected, just as Lamia said, everyone reacted sensitively.

1599900005.english: … What happened to make them this hostile?

1599900006.korean: 오케아니데스는 그럴 수밖에 없었어요. 일단 방주에서 보낸 자료를 보실까요?
1599900006.english: The Oceanides had no choice but to do so. First, shall we take a look at the materials sent from the Ark?

1599900007.korean:
- 시라유리는 우리들에게 자료들을 나누어주었다.
대부분의 내용은 라미아와 칼립소가 내게 말한 내용과 일치했다.
1599900007.english:
- Shirayuri shared the materials with us.
 Most of the content matched what Lamia and Calypso told me.

1599900008.korean:
- 특히 오귀기아의 관리자, 소피아와 관련된 자료가 나오자 
이를 읽던 지휘관들의 표정이 눈이 커졌다.
1599900008.english:
- Especially when materials related to Sophia, the administrator of Oghigia, appeared
 The commanders' expressions widened as they read this.

1599900009.korean: …소피아, 바이오로이드 공학의 연금술사로 불린 천재 과학자... 이름을 들으니 저도 기억나네요.
1599900009.english: … Sophia, the genius scientist known as the alchemist of bioroid engineering... Hearing the name reminds me of her, too.

1599900010.korean: 이 여자는… 블랙리버에서도 상당히 탐냈던 인재였소.
1599900010.english: This woman… was a talent highly sought after even in Black River.

1599900011.korean: 다음 장을 보시겠어요? 소피아를 암살했던 암살 바이오로이드에 대한 정보에요.
1599900011.english: Would you like to see the next chapter? It contains information about the assassin bioroid that assassinated Sophia.

1599900012.korean: - 페이지를 넘긴 순간, 나는 아주 익숙한 얼굴이 보였다.
1599900012.english: The moment I turned the page, I saw a very familiar face.

1599900014.korean: 칼립소는… 자신을 창조했던 과학자, 소피아를 죽였어요.
1599900014.english: Calypso… killed Sophia, the scientist who created her.

1599900015.korean: 추측하건대, 칼립소 스스로가 이런 범행을 저질렀을 리는 없고…
1599900015.english: Presumably, Calypso herself could not have committed such a crime…

1599900017.korean:
정확히 말씀드리자면… 블랙리버의 반 앙헬파 측 수장, 
마리아에게 자료를 넘겼다는 이유로 암살당했어요.
1599900017.english:
To be precise… the leader of the anti-Angel faction in Black River,
 He was assassinated for handing over materials to Maria.

1599900018.korean: 그 당시, 연합 전쟁 때는 과학자들이 자신의 연구 데이터를 암암리에 팔아먹는 일이 비일비재했죠.
1599900018.english: At that time, during the United States War, it was commonplace for scientists to secretly sell their research data.

1599900019.korean: 당장 어느 기업이 이길지 모르는 판국에… 보험을 들어 두는 선택은 그리 놀라운 일도 아니죠.
1599900019.english: In a situation where it is uncertain which company will win right now... choosing to take out insurance is not that surprising.

1599900020.korean:
…소피아는 당시 삼안의 수뇌부도 쉬이 못 건들 정도의 영향력을 지닌 여자긴 했어요.
하지만… 자신이 창조한 바이오로이드의 정보를 넘겼을 것 같진 않아 보여요.
1599900020.english:
… Sophia was a woman with enough influence at the time that even the leadership of Saman couldn't easily mess with her.
 However… it doesn’t look like he would have handed over the information of the bioroid he created.

1599900021.korean:
…저도 그 부분이 의심스럽긴 해요. 오귀기아의 관리자로 좌천당한 것도 모자라 
자신이 만들었던 바이오로이드에게 감시까지 당하는 상황에서… 정보를 넘겼다…
1599900021.english:
… I am also suspicious about that part. As if being demoted to Oguigia’s manager wasn't enough,
 In a situation where he was even being monitored by the bioroids he created... he handed over the information...

1599900023.korean: 여하튼 현재 칼립소가 저런 행동을 보이는 이유도 이렇게 정의할 수 있겠네요.
1599900023.english: Anyway, the reason Calypso is currently behaving that way can be defined in this way as well.

1599900024.korean:
자신의 창조주를 죽인 죄책감에서 도피하고 싶은 감정인 거죠.
그리고 자신의 죄책감과 증오를 애써 블랙리버로 돌리는 거라 짐작됩니다.
1599900024.english:
It is the feeling of wanting to escape from the guilt of having killed one's creator.
 And it is presumed that he is trying hard to redirect his guilt and hatred toward Black River.

1599900025.korean: 칼립소의 처분은 어떻게 하실 생각이시죠, 주인님?
1599900025.english: What do you plan to do with Calypso, Master?

1599900026.korean: - 라비아타가 질문을 던지자, 모든 지휘관들의 시선이 내게 쏠렸다.
1599900026.english: As Laviata asked the question, all the commanders' eyes turned to me.

1599900027.korean:
- 하지만 이렇게 한다고 해서 지금의 상황이 달라질 것은 아무것도 없다.
결국 칼립소도 피해자이기 때문이다.
1599900027.english:
However, doing this will not change anything about the current situation.
 After all, it is because Calypso is also a victim.

1599900029.korean: - 그때, 이야기를 듣고 있던 바르그가 손을 들었다.
1599900029.english: At that moment, Varg, who had been listening to the story, raised his hand.

1599900030.korean: 바이오로이드에게 내려진 명령은 우리와 같이 항명권이 없는 이상, 어길 수 없다.
1599900030.english: Unless they have the right to disobey like us, orders given to bioroids cannot be disobeyed.

1599900031.korean: …당장이라도 내 부하를 다치게 한 칼립소를 찢어 발기고 싶긴 하다만.
1599900031.english: … I do want to tear Calypso apart right now for injuring my subordinate, though.

1599900032.korean:
칼립소는 필시, 원치 않는 명령에 억지로 복종했을 것이다.
바이오로이드에게 있어 명백히 '주인'이라고 명시된 자의 명령은 절대적이지.
1599900032.english:
Calypso must have been forced to obey unwanted orders.
 For a bioroid, the orders of the one explicitly designated as the 'master' are absolute.

1599900033.korean:
나 또한 한 때, 주인님께 칼을 겨눈 적이 있었고, 
그것을 속죄하기 위해 노력해왔었다.
1599900033.english:
I, too, once aimed a sword at my master, and
 I had been trying to atone for it.

1599900034.korean:
자신을 창조한 자라면, 어머니처럼 여겼을 것이니… 고통스러웠을 터…
그녀에게 속죄할 기회를 한 번은 주는 것이 어떤가 제안한다.
1599900034.english:
If it was the one who created him, he would have regarded her like a mother... so it must have been painful...
 I suggest giving her a chance to atone at least once.

1599900035.korean: 물론 여제님처럼 자비 없이 후환을 없애는 것이 최고로 깔끔한 방법이지만...
1599900035.english: Of course, eliminating future threats mercilessly like the Empress is the cleanest method, but...

1599900036.korean: 그 누구도 용서하지 않았던 여제님의 주변은 결국 아무것도 남지 않게 됐다.
1599900036.english: In the end, nothing remained around the Empress, who had forgiven no one.

1599900037.korean: 반면, 주인님의 주변엔 출신이 다른 모든 바이오로이드가 힘을 모아 한 목표를 향해 나아가고 있지 않은가?
1599900037.english: On the other hand, aren't all the bioroids around you, Master, from different backgrounds, joining forces and moving toward a single goal?

1599900038.korean: 주인님께서도... 칼립소에게 만회할 수 있는 기회를 주는 게 어떻겠습니까…?
1599900038.english: Master, wouldn't it be a good idea to give Calypso a chance to make amends...?

1599900040.korean:
이 일은 저희 엠프레시스 하운드에게 맡겨주시길 바랍니다.
저희가 과거에 얽혀있는 만큼, 저희 스스로 해결하도록 하겠습니다.
1599900040.english:
Please leave this task to Empressis Hound.
 Since we are entangled in the past, we will resolve it ourselves.

1599900042.english: I will bring Calypso before the master.

1599900043.korean: …저는 여제님의 처형인이었으며, 결코 명을 실패한 적 없습니다.
1599900043.english: … I was the Empress's executioner, and I never failed to obey her orders.

1599900044.korean: 최소한의 폭력으로, 제 자신을 포함해 다치는 이가 없게 하겠습니다.
1599900044.english: I will use the minimum amount of violence possible to ensure that no one, including myself, gets hurt.

1599900047.korean: - 바르그는 자리에서 일어선 뒤, 내게 경례했다.
1599900047.english: Barg stood up from his seat and saluted me.

1599900048.korean: 이 바르그, 주인님의 명을 완수하고… 안전하게 복귀하겠습니다.
1599900048.english: I, Varg, will fulfill my master's orders... and return safely.

1599900051.english: So you're saying it was a decision made by the Saman leadership...

1599900054.korean: 칼립소의 행동이 정당하다고 볼 순 없어.
1599900054.english: Calypso's actions cannot be considered justified.

1599900055.english: It is only natural to hold someone accountable.

1599900058.english: Are you confident you won't get hurt?

1600000002.korean: 너희들! 어서 날 두고 먼저 가! 여기는… 내가 맡는다!
1600000002.english: You guys! Leave me behind and go ahead! I'll handle this place…!

1600000004.korean: 나는 너희들의 대장이다! 대장이 먼저 앞서 너희를 지키는 건 당연한 사명이자 숙명...
1600000004.english: I am your leader! It is my natural duty and destiny for the leader to go first and protect you...

1600000006.korean: 제발 그만하시고 앞장서 주시면 안 됩니까?
1600000006.english: Please stop and can't you take the lead?

1600000007.korean: 거 참… 분위기 좀 살릴 겸으로 농담 한 번 해본 걸 가지고...
1600000007.english: Good grief... I just cracked a joke to liven up the mood...

1600000008.korean: 대장, 그동안 그렇게 꿀 빠셨으면 이젠 일하실 때 아니십니까?
1600000008.english: Boss, if you've been living the easy life all this time, isn't it time to get to work?

1600000009.korean:
아, 그 해파리... 왜 갑자기 혼자 뛰쳐 나가서 미친 짓을 하는 거냐고.
사령관님은 왜 또 우리한테 미행을 붙이는 건지…
1600000009.english:
Ah, that jellyfish... why did it suddenly run out on its own and do something crazy?
 I wonder why the Commander is having us followed again...

1600000010.korean: 으으… 오늘은 날 잡고 태닝할 생각이었는데… 하아아아아…
1600000010.english: Ugh... I was planning to set aside some time today to get a tan... Haaah...

1600000011.korean: 기왕 오신 거, 여기서 땀 흘리면서 태닝하시지 말입니다.
1600000011.english: Since you're already here, why not get a tan and work up a sweat?

1600000012.korean:
팬서, 난 말이야… 이 외골격만 입으면 숨이 턱턱 막힌단 말이야.
후우… 소장 진급 심사만 떨어졌어도 그대로 전역했을 거라고.
1600000012.english:
Panther, you know... whenever I wear this exoskeleton, I can barely breathe.
 Phew... If I had just failed the promotion review for Major General, I would have retired right then and there.

1600000013.korean: 예, 그래서 되셨으니까 더 열심히 일하셔야 되지 말입니다, 대장!
1600000013.english: Yes, so now that you've made it, you have to work even harder, Captain!

1600000014.english: Let's hurry up and leave. Io and Kalista have gathered too...

1600000016.english: Alright. Commander, the Armored Maidens will sortie!

1600000018.english: Is this operation being broadcast live, Spriggan?

1600000019.korean: 응? 왜… 아아! 맞아! 스파에서 씻다가 갑자기 출격 명령받아서 그런지 나도 모르게 무심코…
1600000019.english: Huh? Why… Ah! Right! Maybe it’s because I suddenly received a sortie order while showering at the spa, but I unconsciously…

1600000020.english: It looks too natural for that.

1600000021.korean: 핫… 맞아! 아아앗?! 깜빡했어… 갈아입고 올까?
1600000021.english: Hot… Right! Ahhh?! I forgot… Should I go change?

1600000024.korean: 죽어… 죽어, 죽어! 여긴 너희같은 더러운 놈들이 침입할 곳이 아냐!
1600000024.english: Die… die, die! This isn't a place for filthy bastards like you to invade!

1600000025.korean: 와, 저 여자 대단한데…? 우리가 굳이 걱정할 이유가 있었나.
1600000025.english: Wow, that woman is amazing...? Was there really any reason for us to worry?

1600000026.korean: 이상하게... 화풀이하는 느낌으로 저러는 것 같지 말입니다.
1600000026.english: Strangely... it feels like they are doing that to take out their anger.

1600000029.english: Oh no, I think I've been shot.

1600000030.korean: 수신 양호, 사령관님. 연락 받았지 말입니다.
1600000030.english: Reception good, Commander. I received your message.

1600000031.korean:
저 해파리. 혼자 철충들한테 닥돌하고 있지 말입니다.
라미아랑, 하토르가 어떻게든 뜯어 말리고 있는데… 구해야 하는 거 아닙니까?
1600000031.english:
That jellyfish. It's charging headlong at the Iron Bugs all by itself.
 Lamia and Hathor are trying their best to stop them... shouldn't we save them?

1600000032.korean:
- 팬서는 대답 대신 카메라를 철충이 있는 쪽으로 향했다.
칼립소가 비틀거리면서도 계속해서 철충에게 몸을 내던지는 모습이 보인다.
1600000032.english:
Instead of answering, Panther pointed the camera toward where the Iron Bug was.
 Calypso is seen staggering while continuously throwing herself at the Iron蟲.

1600000033.korean: 사령관님, 저희가 그냥 제압해서 데리고 와도 되지 않습니까?
1600000033.english: Commander, can't we just subdue them and bring them in?

1600000034.korean:
- 지금 칼립소의 정신 상태로는 천아와 같이 또 누군가가 다칠 지도 모른다.
해독제가 없는 상황에서 칼립소를 무리하게 제압할 순 없다.
1600000034.english:
Given Calypso's current mental state, someone else might get hurt just like Cheona.
 You cannot forcibly subdue Calypso without an antidote.

1600000035.english: Huh? Is Varg joining the operation?

1600000036.korean:
- 지금 상황에서 아머드 메이든이 투입한다면 
눈이 뒤집어진 칼립소는 적과 아군을 가리지 못하고 폭주할 것이다.
1600000036.english:
- If the Armored Maiden is deployed in the current situation
 Calypso, blinded by greed, will run amok, unable to distinguish between friend and foe.

1600000038.korean: 사령관님, 우울한 얼굴 처음 보지 말입니다.
1600000038.english: Commander, this is the first time I've seen you look so gloomy.

1600000039.english: He has a handsome face... Haha...

1600000040.korean: - 팬서의 기분 전환용 농담에도 불구하고, 내 패널은 칼립소를 향했다.
1600000040.english: Despite Panther's lighthearted joke, my panel turned toward Calypso.

1600000041.korean: - 그녀의 손톱은 갈팡질팡하며 철충을 사정 없이 찢는 중이다.
1600000041.english: Her fingernails are haphazardly tearing apart the Iron蟲.

1600000042.korean: - ...그리고 칼립소의 눈에선 하염없이 눈물이 흐르고 있다.
1600000042.english: - ...And tears are flowing endlessly from Calypso's eyes.

1600000043.korean:
- 그저, 하토르와 바르그가 칼립소의 마음을 돌리길 바랐고, 
라미아가 자신의 언니와 함께 무사히 합류하기를 바랐다.
1600000043.english:
- They simply hoped that Hathor and Varg would change Calypso's mind,
 Lamia hoped to safely reunite with her older sister.

1600000050.english: [There is no antidote for Calypso's poison.]

1600000051.english: [I don't want to see you guys get hurt.]

1600100003.english: Die… die, die, I said, right now!

1600100004.english: That's not like you, older sister.

1600100006.korean: …언니는 암살 바이오로이드라고. 누구보다 냉정해야 할 사람이 저렇게 허술하게 싸우진 않아.
1600100006.english: … She’s an assassination bioroid. Someone who should be more level-headed than anyone else wouldn’t fight that sloppily.

1600100007.english: If he gets shot while doing that…

1600100010.korean: 아오 저 빡통! 내가 저럴 줄 알았다!
1600100010.english: Oh my god, that idiot! I knew he'd be like that!

1600100015.korean: 피가… 더는 무리야! 칼립소, 어서 물러 서!
1600100015.english: The blood... I can't take it anymore! Calypso, step back!

1600100017.korean: 하토르... 비켜! 지금 네가 말리러 가봤자 다치기만 할 거야!
1600100017.english: Hathor... get out of the way! You'll only get hurt if you try to stop them now!

1600100018.korean: 사령관이 그랬어, 최대한 칼립소가 다치지 않게…
1600100018.english: The commander said to do his best to keep Calypso from getting hurt...

1600100019.korean: 지금 언니 눈 돌아간 거 안 보여?!
1600100019.english: Can't you see my sister's eyes have rolled back right now?!

1600100030.korean: 대체 저 걸레짝이 된 몸으로 뭘 하겠다는 건지…!
1600100030.english: What on earth does he intend to do with that tattered body…!

1600100036.english: Even if it costs me my life…

1600100037.korean:
칼립소와 하토르, 그리고 라미아는 칼립소를 둘러싼 철충을 모두 쓰러뜨렸다.
칼립소의 몸은 이미 전투 불능 상태에 가까웠다.
1600100037.english:
Calypso, Hathor, and Lamia defeated all the Iron Bugs surrounding Calypso.
 Calypso's body was already close to being unable to fight.

1600100044.english: Let's take him away quickly... because it's dangerous here.

1600100050.korean: …너, 자꾸 고집 부리면 언니가 화낼 거야?!
1600100050.english: … If you keep being stubborn, your older sister will get angry!

1600100054.korean: 그럼... 무슨 근거로 저한테 언니라고 뻐기시는 거죠?
1600100054.english: Then... on what grounds are you acting all high and mighty calling me 'older sister'?

1600100056.english: I, I'm taller than you, and...

1600100058.korean: 바, 발육 상태도 좋잖아! 그럼 언니지!
1600100058.english: Hey, your development is good too! Then you're the older sister!

1600100060.korean: 그 이야기는 안 꺼내는 게 차라리 나았을 텐데.
1600100060.english: It would have been better not to bring that up.

1600100062.english: … What time is it now, Lamia?

1600100067.english: Wait… just leave me alone for a moment, Lamia.

1600100070.korean: …너, 칼립소가 왜 저러는지 자세한 내막은 모르는 거잖아?
1600100070.english: … You don't know the full story behind why Calypso is acting like that, do you?

1600100071.korean: 그게 뭐든 이젠 인정해야 될 거 아냐! 씨… 식량 아깝게 무덤 앞에서 소꿉장난이나 하고!
1600100071.english: Whatever it is, you have to admit it by now! Damn it... wasting food playing house in front of a grave!

1600100073.korean: 에엥? 넌, 그 아까 작은 언니랑 싸웠던 꼬맹이?
1600100073.english: Huh? You're that little kid who fought with the older sister earlier?

1600100074.korean:
…네 혈청이 천아에게 어느 정도 효과가 듣고 있단 보고가 들어왔다.
내 부하를 구해준 것에 대해선 고맙게 생각한다.
1600100074.english:
… We have received reports that your serum is having some effect on Cheona.
 I am grateful for saving my subordinate.

1600100075.korean:
다행이네, 근데… 그 얘길 하려고 여기까지 다시 온 건 아닐 거고... 
결국 우리 언니 목을 따는 쪽으로 합의 보고 온 거야?
1600100075.english:
That's a relief, but... you wouldn't have come all the way back here just to talk about that...
 So, in the end, you came back having agreed to slit my sister's throat?

1600100077.korean: 잠깐… 바르그! 글쎄라니! 설마 진짜로 사령관이 칼립소를 죽이라고 한 건… 아… 니지?
1600100077.english: Wait… Varg! What do you mean, "I don't know"! You didn't actually order the Commander to kill Calypso… did you…?

1600100079.english: The master ordered that Calypso be brought.

1600100080.korean:
최대한 무력충돌 없이 설득해야 하는 임무이니... 
내가 직접 칼립소의 상태를 봐야 할 것 같다.
1600100080.english:
Since it is a mission to persuade without armed conflict as much as possible...
 I think I need to check Calypso's condition myself.

1600100081.korean: …그런 눈빛으로 보지 마라. 나도 피를 묻힐 생각은 없으니.
1600100081.english: … Don't look at me like that. I have no intention of getting my hands dirty with blood either.

1600100082.english: Guide me to where Calypso is.

1600200005.korean: 잠을 그렇게도 많이 주무셨는데, 정말이지 관리자님은… 언제쯤 일어날 생각이십니까?
1600200005.english: You slept so much, Manager... when do you plan to wake up?

1600200007.korean: 관리자님께서 병환이 깊어지신 후로 오귀기아는 모두 엉망이 됐습니다.
1600200007.english: Since the manager's illness worsened, everything in Oghigia has become a mess.

1600200008.korean: …당장 안 일어나시면, 저 정말 화낼 겁니다.
1600200008.english: … If you don’t get up right now, I’m going to get really angry.

1600200014.english: The last human injured the bioroid they cherished.

1600200018.english: I… miss you very much, Manager.

1600200019.korean: 큰 언니와, 라미아와… 그리고 관리자님과 함께 했던 일상이…
1600200019.english: The daily life I spent with my eldest sister, Lamia… and the manager…

1600200024.korean:
관리자님, 역시나 아무런 말씀이 없으시군요… 
제가 무어라 더 말씀을 드려야겠습니까?
1600200024.english:
Manager, as expected, you haven't said anything...
 What more can I say?

1600200026.korean: 마지막 인간님 휘하의 바이오로이드 분들은… 정말 행복해 보이더군요.
1600200026.english: The bioroids under the command of the last human... looked really happy.

1600200027.korean:
엠프레시스 하운드… 그년들을 다시 봤을 땐 정말이지 갈기갈기 찢어 죽이고 싶었습니다.
하지만, 세월이 지나도 무뎌지지 않은 감정들이…
1600200027.english:
Empress Hound… When I saw those bitches again, I really wanted to tear them to shreds and kill them.
 However, emotions that have not dulled even as time passes…

1600200028.korean: 저는 불행한데, 그년들은 너무 행복해 보여서...
1600200028.english: I'm unhappy, but those girls look so happy...

1600200030.korean: 모실 수 있는 인간이 있다는 게…

1600200035.english: The reason for his passing is…

1600200036.english: I know it's because of me...

1600200042.english: How could I have the audacity to miss you…

1600200044.korean: 아니… 엄마라고 부르면 안 되는 거겠죠...
1600200044.english: No... I shouldn't call her Mom, right...

1600200046.korean: 엄마를 죽인 딸은 존재할 수… 없는 거잖아요?
1600200046.english: A daughter who killed her mother cannot exist... right?

1600200048.english: No... even you would be too good for me, Master.

1600200049.korean:
애초부터, 제가 섬겼던 하나뿐인 주인님도 아니었으니까...
그러니까… 애초에 전 주인님이라 부를 자격도 없어요…
1600200049.english:
Because, from the beginning, he wasn't even the one and only master I served...
 I mean... to begin with, I don't even have the right to call you Master...

1600200052.english: I'm sorry... for making you pass away...

1600200053.korean: 모든 게 다 제 탓이에요… 흐윽… 으읍… 흐아아앙…

1600200059.korean: 네가 현실로 나오지 않고 은둔한다고 해서... 그곳이 편안한 곳은 아니다.
1600200059.english: Just because you don't come out into reality and live in seclusion... that place isn't a comfortable place.

1600200060.korean: 네깟 년이 뭘 안다고 주둥이를 나불…
1600200060.english: What do you know, you worthless bitch, to be running your mouth…

1600200061.korean:
나 또한 잘 알고 있어서 하는 말이다. 한때 나 또한 하토르처럼, 
그리고 너처럼… 현실을 받아들이지 않았던 때가 있었지.
1600200061.english:
I say this because I know it well, too. At one time, I, too, like Hathor,
 And like you… there was a time when I didn’t accept reality.

1600200062.korean: 네 죄는 회피하는 게 아니라... 직접 마주해야 씻을 수 있다.
1600200062.english: You cannot wash away your sins by avoiding them... you must face them directly.

1600200063.english: To be continued in Part 2 of <The Palace of the Reclusive Goddess>…

1600300002.korean: 그렇게 하루종일 지켜보다간 망부석 되겠어요, 진짜.
1600300002.english: If you keep watching like that all day, you'll turn into a statue, seriously.

1600300004.english: … Is that tiny kid really my older sister?

1600300005.korean:
만들어진 건 너보다 한참 전이야. 추가로 실험할 게 많아서 저렇지.
근데… 저거 봐, 헤엄치는 모습… 정말 우아하지 않아?
1600300005.english:
It was created long before you did. It looks like that because there are still many additional experiments to do.
 But… look at that, the way it swims… isn't it really elegant?

1600300006.korean: …신경 써주는 거에 반의반만큼만이라도 절 좀 같이 신경 써 주는 건 어때요?
1600300006.english: … How about you care about me even just a quarter of the way you care about me?

1600300007.korean: 넌 충분히 튼튼하잖니. 작은 언니한테 질투하는 거야?
1600300007.english: You're strong enough. Are you jealous of your older sister?

1600300008.english: … Even though I look like this... I'm the youngest member of this project.

1600300009.korean: 솔직히 말해줘? 나도 맨처음 널 봤을 때 나보다 먼저 만들어진 언니라고 생각했지 뭐야?
1600300009.english: Do you want me to be honest? When I first saw you, I thought you were an older sister who was created before me, you know?

1600300010.korean: 응? 뭐냐. 오늘도 찾아 온 거냐?
1600300010.english: Huh? What is it? Did you come to visit again today?

1600300011.korean: 전 그냥 큰 언니한테 볼일이 있어 찾아 온 거지, 저딴 꼬맹이 따위엔 관심 없습니다.
1600300011.english: I just came to visit my older sister for business; I have no interest in a brat like that.

1600300012.korean: 라미아. 너 말이야, 쟤한테 준다고 한동안 맛있는 사탕은 전부 모아둔 거 다 알 거든?
1600300012.english: Lamia. I know you've been saving up all the delicious candy for a while to give to her, okay?

1600300013.korean:
그냥 단 걸 안 좋아해서 안 먹고 쌓아둔 거죠, 언니.
이왕이면 홍삼 맛이나 진한 쌍화차맛 같은 건 왜 안 주는지 몰라…
1600300013.english:
I just don't like sweets, so I didn't eat them and piled them up, unnie.
 I don't know why they don't give out flavors like red ginseng or strong Ssanghwa tea...

1600300014.english: … Even my father-in-law doesn't eat red ginseng candy.

1600300015.korean: 허… 흐, 흐흠! 그나저나 저 꼬맹이 언니는 언제쯤 나올 수 있어요?
1600300015.english: Hmph... H-hmm! Anyway, when can that little girl come out?

1600300016.korean: 몇 가지 테스트만 하면 끝나… 크기는 저래도, 너희들보다 예산이 훨씬 많이 투입됐어.
1600300016.english: We just need to do a few tests and it'll be done... Even though it's that size, a much larger budget was invested than for you guys.

1600300017.korean: 그렇게 돈이랑 더스트를 때려 박았으면서도, 왜 저렇게 부실하게 생긴 건데?
1600300017.english: Even though they poured so much money and dust into it, why does it look so flimsy?

1600300020.korean:
좋은 아침은 무슨 개풀 뜯는 소리. 
위에서 칼립소는 언제쯤 출시하냐고 밤낮없이 쪼는 거 몰라?
1600300020.english:
Good morning? What kind of bullshit is that?
 Don't you know the people up there are nagging you day and night about when Calypso is going to be released?

1600300021.korean:
몇 가지 테스트만 더 하면 됩니다. 
변이 맹독과 특수 합금 골격 적합성 검사만 끝나면…
1600300021.english:
We just need to do a few more tests.
 Once the compatibility test between the mutated deadly venom and the special alloy skeleton is finished…

1600300022.korean:
근데 말이야, 거 좀… 라미아나 리더를 보면 크기가 큰데… 
저 해파리는 영 비실거리는 것 같단 말이야.
1600300022.english:
But you know, well... if you look at Lamia or the leader, they are big...
 That jellyfish looks really weak.

1600300023.korean: 적어도 가디언 시리즈보다는 더 웅장하고 커다래야 하는 거 아냐?
1600300023.english: Shouldn't it be at least grander and bigger than the Guardian series?

1600300024.korean:
칼립소의 독은 쉽게 해독되는 독이 아닙니다.
그런 독을 버틸만한 골격을 크게 만들려면 더스트가 배는 족히 더 들게 될 겁니다…
1600300024.english:
Calypso's poison is not easily detoxified.
 To make a skeleton large enough to withstand such poison, it would take well over twice as much Dust…

1600300025.korean:
하아, 요즘 애들은 뭐만 하면 돈이 부족하다, 더스트가 부족하다… 그쪽을 해결해 주면 그다음부턴 시간이 부족하다, 
현대 기술력으로는 부족하다… 응? 저런 깡마른 애가 전투에 나가서 뭘 하겠어?
1600300025.english:
Sigh, kids these days, no matter what, they say they're short on money, short on dust... and once I take care of that, they say they're short on time.
 Modern technology isn't enough... Huh? What could a skinny kid like that possibly do in battle?

1600300028.korean: 너희들 말이야. 저년 폐기하고 다시 지원금 끌어오면 그땐 크게 만들 수 있겠어? 응? 그건 또 자신 없잖아?
1600300028.english: I'm talking to you guys. If you scrap that woman and bring in the funding again, do you think you can make it big then? Huh? You're not confident about that, are you?

1600300029.korean: ...이곳에서 쫓겨나신 소피아님이 아니면 칼립소를 보완하는 건 절대 불가능합니다.
1600300029.english: ...It is absolutely impossible to complement Calypso unless it is Sophia, who was driven out of here.

1600300030.korean:
가끔 보면 과학자 놈들은 똑똑한 건지 멍청한 건지 예술가 놀이에 심취해선 똥오줌도 못 가리고 발명품에 애착을 갖는단 말이지.
엄연히 그 인간 흉내 내는 로봇 주인은 너희들한테 따박따박 월급 주고 터무니없이 부르는 개발비를 외부에서 끌어오는 바로 우리인데!
1600300030.english:
Sometimes I wonder if scientists are smart or stupid; they get so engrossed in playing artist that they lose their sense of propriety and become attached to their inventions.
 Clearly, the owners of those human-mimicking robots are none other than us, who pay you a steady salary and bring in the ridiculously high development costs from outside!

1600300032.korean:
…뭐야 너. 왜 그딴 눈으로 쳐다봐? 지금 너희들 프로젝트는 
삼안에서 투자 대비 수익률이 가장 안 나오는 암덩어리라고!
1600300032.english:
… What's wrong with you? Why are you looking at me like that? Your project right now is
 It's the cancerous tumor at Saman with the lowest return on investment!

1600300033.korean:
에휴, 말을 말자. 됐으니까 대충 빨리 출시해. 
상부 측에선 너희들을 대만에 배치시키기로 했어.
1600300033.english:
Ugh, let's not even talk about it. Never mind, just release it quickly.
 The higher ups decided to deploy you guys to Taiwan.

1600300034.english: If it's Taiwan... isn't that where Sophia is?

1600300035.korean:
그래. 더는 미룰 수 없어. 
너희의 데이터를 주주들과 전 세계 투자자들에게 광고해 우리 삼안이 건재하다는 걸 증명해야 해.
1600300035.english:
Right. I can't put it off any longer.
 You must advertise your data to shareholders and investors worldwide to prove that our Saman is still going strong.

1600300036.korean: 다른 저희 자매들은 아직 시험 단계에 있지 않습니까?
1600300036.english: Aren't our other sisters still in the testing phase?

1600300037.korean: 입 다물어, 네 놈들이 다 만들어 지는 걸 기다릴 만큼 한가롭지 않으니까.
1600300037.english: Shut your mouths, I'm not so idle as to wait for you guys to finish making it.

1600300038.korean: 당장 우리가 저 빌어먹을 블랙리버와 PECS 때문에 해양전에서 물 먹는 게 한 두 번이 아니라고!
1600300038.english: It’s not just once or twice that we’ve been humiliated in naval battles because of those damn Black Rivers and PECS!

1600300039.korean: 칼립소 저 깡통도 같이 엮어 빨리 대만으로 보내.
1600300039.english: Calypso, tie that tin can up too and send it to Taiwan quickly.

1600300040.korean: 하, 저 인간은 볼 때마다 뒤지게 패고 싶다니까.
1600300040.english: Ha, every time I see that guy, I want to beat him to death.

1600300041.english: … You should watch your words, Lamia.

1600300043.korean:
…칼립소가 말은 안 해도, 너희들한테 자격지심이 많을 거다.
너희들이랑 다르게 아직도 연구소에서 테스트만 반복하고 있으니까.
1600300043.english:
… Even though Calypso doesn't say it, she probably has a lot of inferiority complex towards you guys.
 Unlike you guys, I'm still just repeating tests at the lab.

1600300044.korean: 그래서, 제 언니를 볼 수 나 있긴 한 거예요?
1600300044.english: So, am I even able to see my sister?

1600300045.korean: 거의 다 끝나가. 소피아 님을 보거든 안부나 전해줘라.
1600300045.english: It's almost finished. If you see Sophia, please give her my regards.

1600300046.english: … Don't fight and get along well.

1600300048.korean: 누구 입영시켜요? 조금 있음 눈물 콧물 질질 흘리겠네.
1600300048.english: Who are you drafting? Soon they'll be shedding tears and snot.

1600300049.korean: 대만으로 보내는 건 사실상 너희를 죽음으로 내모는 거나 다름없잖아.
1600300049.english: Sending you to Taiwan is practically the same as driving you to your death.

1600300050.korean: 제 동생들은 제가 직접 지킬 테니까요. 앞으로도 계속 태어날 자매들과 연구소 연구원 분들을 잘 부탁드립니다. 연구원장님.
1600300050.english: I will protect my younger siblings myself. I ask that you take good care of the sisters who will continue to be born and the researchers at the institute. Director.

1600300051.korean:
너희들이 쉽게 죽을 거라곤 생각 안 하지만… 그래도 몸 조심해라.
그래도 소피아 님이 움직이는 너희를 보시면 좋아하실 거야, 완성도 되기 전에 쫓겨나셨으니까.
1600300051.english:
I don't think you guys will die easily... but still, take care of yourselves.
 Still, Sophia will be happy to see you guys in action, since she was kicked out before you were even finished.

1600300052.korean:
그 여자가 우리 엄마라도 되는 것처럼 말합니다?
전 딱히 그 여자한테 친근감도 없고, 이 지긋지긋한 연구소 좀 벗어나면 소원이 없겠어요.
1600300052.english:
She talks as if she were my mother?
 I don't really feel any closeness to that woman, and I would be perfectly happy if I could just get out of this dreadful research institute.

1600300053.korean:
그러고보니, PECS의 레모네이드 감마인가… 
제법 우리 쪽을 물먹였다고 들었는데, 기회가 되면 꼭 한번 붙어보고 싶네요.
1600300053.english:
Come to think of it, is that PECS' Lemonade Gamma...
 I heard they really gave us a hard time, so if I get the chance, I would definitely like to face them.

1600300054.korean: 네가 상대할 수 있는 수준의 바이오로이드가 아니야. 경솔하게 굴지 말자?
1600300054.english: She's not a bioroid you can handle. Let's not be rash, okay?

1600300055.korean: 그러시겠죠~ 네네… 그렇담 큰 언니 정도면 이길 수 있지 않을까요?
1600300055.english: I suppose so~ Yes, yes… In that case, wouldn't someone like the eldest sister be able to win?

1600300056.english: … Well, wouldn't that woman be stronger?

1600300057.korean: 가만 보면 큰 언니는 우리들 중 가장 강하면서 왜 그리 싸움을 싫어하는 건지 모르겠네요…
1600300057.english: Come to think of it, my eldest sister is the strongest among us, so I don't understand why she hates fighting so much…

1600300059.korean: 하~ 정색하시긴… 알겠어요 큰 언니. 내가 잘못 말했네. 미안해요.
1600300059.english: Haa... You're being so serious... Okay, big sister. I misspoke. I'm sorry.

1600300060.korean: 안녕하세요 큰 언니. 오케아니데스 프로젝트의 둘째, 칼립소 인사드립니다.
1600300060.english: Hello, big sister. This is Calypso, the second sister of the Okeanides Project, saying hello.

1600300061.korean: 와, 수조에 있을 때보다 어떻게 더 작아 보이는 거 같지?
1600300061.english: Wow, how does it look even smaller than when it was in the tank?

1600300062.korean: 반가워, 칼립소. 설명은 다 들었겠지. 내가 리더고, 여기… 라미아가 막내.
1600300062.english: Nice to meet you, Calypso. You must have heard the explanation. I'm the leader, and here… Lamia is the youngest.

1600300065.korean: …어째서, 큰 언니랑 라미아는 그렇게 큰 거죠? 다들 저랑 같은 체격인 줄 알았는데.
1600300065.english: … Why are my eldest sister and Lamia so big? I thought everyone was the same size as me.

1600300066.korean: 커? 뭐가 큰데? 키 말하는 거야 언니?
1600300066.english: Big? What's big? Are you talking about your height, unnie?

1600300068.korean: …하하. 칼립소, 너도 운동하면 많이 커질 텐데?
1600300068.english: … Haha. Calypso, you'd get really big if you worked out, too.

1600300070.korean: 네, 저희는 오늘 대만으로 떠나는 거죠?
1600300070.english: Yes, we are leaving for Taiwan today, right?

1600300072.korean:
막상 보니까… 진짜 조그맣네. 
당장 우리 상대는 무적의 용이나 감마처럼 무지막지한 년들인데.
1600300072.english:
Now that I've actually seen it... it's really small.
 Right now, our opponents are monstrous women like the Invincible Dragon or Gamma.

1600300073.korean:
됐다, 이미 돈은 돈 대로 다 끌어다 썼는데 뭐 어쩌겠냐.
출발이나 하자고. 얼른 날 따라 와.
1600300073.english:
That's it. I've already spent all the money I could, so what can I do?
 Let's just get going. Hurry up and follow me.

1600300074.korean: …뭐야 둘째 언니. 뭐 그렇게 표정이 침울해?
1600300074.english: … What's wrong, second sister? Why do you look so gloomy?

1600300077.korean: 그, 라미아? 그러고보니 칼립소 처음 만날 때 준다고 인형 가져오지 않았니?
1600300077.english: Uh, Lamia? Come to think of it, didn't you bring a doll to give to Calypso when you first met her?

1600300078.korean: 거참 재미없게. 나중에 깜짝 선물로 주려고 그랬는데…
1600300078.english: That's really boring. I was planning to give it to you as a surprise later...

1600300079.korean: 필요 없어요. 인형에 딱히 관심 있는 것도 아니고.
1600300079.english: I don't need it. I'm not particularly interested in dolls anyway.

1600300080.english: … I went to all that trouble to think of you.

1600300081.korean: 필요 없… 으아아아아앗?! 드, 들어올리지 마세요, 큰 언니!
1600300081.english: I don't need it… Aaaaaaaah?! D-Don't lift me up, Big Sister!

1600300082.english: Hahaha, Calypso… my cute little brother…

1600300083.korean: 난 네가 수조에서 헤엄칠 때마다 얼마나 안아주고 싶었는지 몰라.
1600300083.english: You have no idea how much I wanted to hug you every time you swam in the tank.

1600300084.korean:
…쓸데없이 감상적이시군요, 큰 언니. 
저희 자매들의 리더라고 하셔서 기대했는데…. 어서 내려주시기나 하시죠.
1600300084.english:
… You’re being unnecessarily sentimental, big sister.
 I had high expectations because you said you were the leader of our sisters... Just hurry up and let us down.

1600300085.english: ...I'm tired, so I want to be alone for a while.

1600300086.korean: 거 참, 언니가 아니라 동생 하나 키우는 거 같… 아얏?! 왜 때려요 언니?!
1600300086.english: Come on, it feels like I'm raising a younger sibling, not an older one... Ow?! Why did you hit me, sis?!

1600300087.english: Treat Calypso like an older sister.

1600400002.korean: 네, 소피아 님. 뵙게되어 영광입니다. 관리자님을 도와 오귀기아를 도우러...
1600400002.english: Yes, Sophia. It is an honor to meet you. To help the Administrator and assist Oguigia...

1600400003.korean:
돕기는 무슨~ 너희들 여기 전투 데이터 누적하러 온 거잖아? 내가 모를 줄 알아?
유흥단지에서 할 줄 아는 거라도 있어? 응?
1600400003.english:
Help? What help? You guys just came here to accumulate combat data, didn't you? Do you think I don't know?
 Do you know how to do anything at the entertainment district? Huh?

1600400004.korean: 속성이긴 하지만, 배 안에서… 이것저것 배우긴 했습니다, 관리자님.
1600400004.english: It was just a brief session, but I did learn a few things on board... Manager.

1600400005.korean:
하아~ 농담이야, 농담. 뭘 그리 딱딱하게 굴어?
네가 첫째지? 내가 예상했던 그대로 구현됐네… 둘째랑 막내는 어디있어?
1600400005.english:
Haa~ I'm just kidding, just kidding. Why are you being so stiff?
 You're the eldest, right? It turned out exactly as I expected... Where are the second and the youngest?

1600400006.english: They are waiting outside. Shall I let them in?

1600400007.english: Of course, they're just like my own children.

1600400008.english: Understood. I will let you in.

1600400009.english: Hey~ Are you the human who created us?

1600400010.korean: 관리자님께 무슨 무례한 말투지…? 어서 고치지 못해?
1600400010.english: What kind of rude tone is that toward the manager...? Can't you fix it right away?

1600400011.korean: 아~ 아냐 아냐. 후후, 라미아도 제법 예쁘게 나왔네.
1600400011.english: Ah~ no, no. Hehe, Lamia came out quite pretty too.

1600400013.korean: 거 작은 언니. 웃음 참는 시늉이라도 좀 해주면 안 돼?
1600400013.english: Hey, little sister. Can't you at least pretend to hold back your laughter?

1600400014.korean: 아냐, 섹시한데? 좋아 좋아, 아주 좋아~ 그리고…
1600400014.english: No, it's sexy? Good, good, really good~ And…

1600400018.english: Calypso... Hehe, is this a coincidence?

1600400019.korean: 칼립소? 혹시 말이야… 오귀기아 명칭의 유례를 알고 있니?
1600400019.english: Calypso? By any chance… do you know the origin of the name Oughigia?

1600400020.english: I'm sorry, Manager... I don't know.

1600400021.korean: 오귀기아는, 옛날 우리 인간들의 신화 속에서 칼립소란 여신이 다스리던 섬의 이름이었단다.
1600400021.english: Ogygia was the name of the island ruled by the goddess Calypso in our ancient human mythology.

1600400024.korean: 좀 진심을 담아서 대답할 수도 있잖니.
1600400024.english: You could have answered with a little more sincerity.

1600400025.korean: 관리자님, 저희가 할 일을 어서 말씀해 주시… 어어엇?! 제 엘리자베스 쓰다듬지 마세요!
1600400025.english: Manager, please tell us what we need to do… W-what?! Don't pet my Elizabeth!

1600400026.korean:
엘리자베스? 후후, 딱 네가 지어줄 이름이긴 하네.
하여튼~ 모두 오귀기아에 온 걸 환영해. 같이 잘 지내보자고!
1600400026.english:
Elizabeth? Hehe, that’s exactly the kind of name you’d give her.
 Anyway, welcome to Oughigia, everyone. Let's get along well together!

1600400027.english: Manager, I have brought your breakfast.

1600400029.english: Are you not coming to work separately?

1600400030.korean: 출근해봤자 내가 아는 게 있어야지. 사실상 좌천되서 이곳에 온 건데.
1600400030.english: Even if I go to work, I don't know anything. I practically got demoted and came here.

1600400031.english: … Don't you have to do your work?

1600400032.korean: 아~ 귀찮다. 오늘 그냥 출근하지 말까?
1600400032.english: Ah, this is such a hassle. Should I just skip work today?

1600400033.korean:
상부 측에서 관리자님을 좋게 보고 있지 않습니다. 
무슨 수를 써서라도 업무에 다시 복귀해야지 않겠습니까?
1600400033.english:
The upper management does not view you favorably.
 Shouldn't we get back to work by any means necessary?

1600400034.korean:
글쎄~ 다시 돌아가더라도 내 자리는 없을걸.
이곳에 처박혀있다는 게 뭘 의미하는 건지는 네가 더 잘 알 텐데?
1600400034.english:
Well, even if I went back, I don't think there would be a place for me.
 You should know better than anyone what it means to be stuck here.

1600400035.korean: …저희를 만든 관리자님께서 이렇게 나태하실 줄은 몰랐군요.
1600400035.english: … I didn't know the administrator who created us would be this lazy.

1600400038.korean: 우리 아가도 이 정도까진 아니었는데 말이야.
1600400038.english: Even my baby wasn't this bad.

1600400039.english: … Children, is that what you mean?

1600400041.korean: 이상한 소리 하실 거면 출근이나 하시죠.
1600400041.english: If you're going to talk nonsense, just go to work.

1600400042.korean:
아, 잔소리는… 알았어.  내 비서 바이오로이드들이 업무 알려줄 테니까 걔네한테 배워.
난 이 유흥단지에 대해선 문외한이고 지금도, 앞으로도, 관리할 생각은 없으니까.
1600400042.english:
Ah, stop nagging... Fine. My bio-android assistants will teach you the job, so learn from them.
 I am a layman regarding this entertainment district, and I have no intention of managing it now or in the future.

1600400043.korean: 진짜... 최소한의 관리조차 안 하실 거란 말씀입니까?
1600400043.english: Seriously... are you saying you won't even do the bare minimum of maintenance?

1600400044.korean: 응. 내년에 퇴직할까 생각 중인데, 네가 대신 맡아 볼래?
1600400044.english: Yeah. I'm thinking of retiring next year, would you like to take over?

1600400045.korean:
설령 주신다고 할지언정 제가 맡진 않겠지만… 
적어도 관리자님처럼 이렇게 무책임한 경영은 하지 않을 겁니다.
1600400045.english:
Even if they offered it to me, I wouldn't take it, but...
 At the very least, I won't manage things as irresponsibly as you, the manager.

1600400046.korean:
하아. 딱딱하긴... 내가 널 구상했을 땐 이런 애는 아니었어. 
까칠하단 말이야, 귀여운 구석도 없고…
1600400046.english:
Haa. You're so stiff... You weren't like this when I envisioned you.
 I mean, she's prickly, and she doesn't have a cute side at all...

1600400047.korean: …어떤 근거로 제 성격을 그렇게 추측하신 거죠?
1600400047.english: … On what grounds did you guess my personality like that?

1600400049.korean: 글쎄, 우리 똑똑한 칼립소가 맞춰볼까? 내가 왜 그렇게 생각했을까?
1600400049.english: Well, shall we have our clever Calypso guess? Why do you think I did that?

1600400050.korean: …관리자님, 절 어린 애 취급 하지 마시길 바랍니다. 전 성인이니까요.
1600400050.english: … Manager, please do not treat me like a child. I am an adult.

1600400051.english: Ah, seriously... that's a shame. Sigh.

1600400053.korean: 아… 큰 언니. 시간이 남길래 청소하고 있었어요.
1600400053.english: Ah... Big Sister. I had some spare time, so I was cleaning.

1600400055.english: Did you complete your mission well, older sister?

1600400056.english: Yeah. I had a good trip.

1600400059.korean: 큰 언니… 하나 묻고 싶은 게 있어요.
1600400059.english: Big sister... there is something I want to ask you.

1600400061.korean:
…저는 언니랑 라미아와 다르게, 왜 전투 임무에 나가지 못하는 거죠?
저도 엄연히 오케아니데스의 바이오로이드인데…
1600400061.english:
… Unlike my sister and Lamia, why can't I go on combat missions?
 I am strictly an Okeanides bioroid, too...

1600400062.korean: 관리자님께서 널 전장으로 내보내는 건 한사코 반대하고 있어.
1600400062.english: The administrator is adamantly opposed to sending you to the battlefield.

1600400064.korean: 글쎄… 잘 모르겠네. 대신 칼립소는 호텔 일 잘 하고 있잖아?
1600400064.english: Well… I’m not sure. But Calypso is doing a good job at the hotel, isn’t she?

1600400065.korean: 제가 있어야 할 곳은 이곳이 아닌 걸 언니도 잘 알고 있잖아요.
1600400065.english: You know very well that this isn't where I belong.

1600400066.korean: 하하… 칼립소, 전장이란 곳은 그리 재미있는 곳이 아니야.
1600400066.english: Haha... Calypso, the battlefield isn't exactly a fun place.

1600400067.korean: 제가 만드는 데까지 가장 많은 비용이 들었다고 들었어요. 전 그에 걸맞은 결과를 삼안에 보여드리고 싶어요.
1600400067.english: I heard that it cost the most to create. I want to show Saman results that are worth it.

1600400068.korean: 칼립소, 너도 우리랑 마찬가지로 훌륭한 오케아니데스의 대원이야. 자긍심을 가져.
1600400068.english: Calypso, you are a fine member of the Oceanides, just like us. Be proud of yourself.

1600400069.korean:
언니는 상부에서 충분한 신뢰를 받고 계시지 않습니까? 
라미아도 제법 혁혁한 전공을 세웠고요.
1600400069.english:
Don't you have sufficient trust from your superiors?
 Lamia also achieved quite a distinguished feat.

1600400071.korean: 저는 호텔 바이오로이드가 아니라, 엄연한 전투 바이오로이드입니다.
1600400071.english: I am not a hotel bioroid, but a combat bioroid.

1600400072.korean: 전, 제 존재가 오케아니데스의 이름에 걸맞다는 걸, 보여드리고 싶습니다.
1600400072.english: I would like to show you that my existence is worthy of the name of the Oceanides.

1600500003.korean: 무슨 일 때문에 부르셨습니까? 아직 일과가 안 끝났는데…
1600500003.english: What did you call me for? My work isn't finished yet...

1600500004.korean: 이 옷 한 번 입어보지 않을래?
1600500004.english: Why don't you try on this outfit?

1600500006.korean:
아오자이야, 우리 딸아이 입히려고 했었는데…
네가 입으면 딱 맞을 것 같아서 가져왔어.
1600500006.english:
I was planning to dress my daughter in an Ao Dai...
 I brought it because I think it will fit you perfectly.

1600500007.korean: 감사드리지만, 늘 경계 태세를 갖춰야 하는 만큼… 지금 유니폼이 훨씬 더 편합니다.
1600500007.english: I appreciate it, but since I always have to be on alert... my current uniform is much more comfortable.

1600500008.korean: 아쉽구나… 그럼 나중에라도 한 번 입어보렴.
1600500008.english: That's a shame... Then try wearing it sometime later.

1600500010.korean: 관리자님… 질문이 있습니다. 어째서 절 특별하게 대해주시는 거죠?
1600500010.english: Administrator… I have a question. Why do you treat me specially?

1600500011.korean: 응? 그게 무슨 말이니, 난 라미아와 너, 네 언니 모두를 평등하게 대하고 있어.
1600500011.english: Huh? What do you mean? I treat Lamia, you, and your sister equally.

1600500012.korean: 언니와 라미아는 삼안 측 특수전 요원으로 참전하여 큰 성과를 보였다고 들었습니다.
1600500012.english: I heard that my older sister and Lamia participated as special forces agents for Saman and achieved great results.

1600500013.korean: 반면 저는 관리자님께서 파견을 원치 않고 계셔서...
1600500013.english: On the other hand, since the manager does not want me to be dispatched...

1600500015.korean: 칼립소는 그렇게까지 전장에 꼭 나가고 싶어?
1600500015.english: Does Calypso really want to go to the battlefield that much?

1600500016.korean: 본래 저는 다른 용도로 쓰일 예정이지 않았습니까? 이렇게 시간을 보내는 것보단…
1600500016.english: Weren't I originally intended to be used for a different purpose? Rather than spending time like this…

1600500017.korean:
칼립소, 그럼 호텔 일은 너한테 있어 그렇게까지 중요한 임무가 아닌 거야?
너~ 호텔 지배인 아니니? 네 지시를 따르는 바이오로이드가 얼마나 많은데.
1600500017.english:
Calypso, so the hotel work isn't that important a mission to you?
 Aren't you the hotel manager? There are so many bioroids following your orders.

1600500018.korean: 아닙니다 관리자님! 그게 아니라… 그저, 저는.
1600500018.english: No, Manager! That's not it... I just...

1600500019.english: Calypso. Could you come over here for a moment?

1600500021.korean: 소피아는 칼립소의 어깨를 조심스레 붙잡은 뒤, 호텔 연회장에 놓인 피아노 앞으로 데려갔다.
1600500021.english: Sophia carefully took Calypso's shoulder and led her to the piano in the hotel banquet hall.

1600500022.english: Why are you acting like this all of a sudden?

1600500023.korean: 시간 나면… 나랑 같이 피아노 쳐줄 수 있겠니?
1600500023.english: If you have time… could you play the piano with me?

1600500024.english: I don't know how to play it, but... I understand.

1600500025.korean: 그럼, 기초부터 가르쳐줄까? 후후… 자 우선 손을 이렇게 모으고…
1600500025.english: So then, shall I teach you the basics? Hehe... Now, first, put your hands together like this...

1600500027.english: Don't feel pressured, just give it a try. Now... hurry up...

1600500028.korean: …어후, 누군 블랙리버 놈들이랑 잔뜩 싸우느라 바쁜데. 누군 한가롭게 피아노나 치고 있고. 에휴…
1600500028.english: … Ugh, some people are busy fighting the Black River bastards, while others are just idly playing the piano. Sigh…

1600500029.english: Lamia, do you want to play the piano too?

1600500030.korean: 저런 오글거리는 거 별로 안 하고 싶어요.
1600500030.english: I don't really want to do that kind of cringey stuff.

1600500031.korean:
내가 알기론 관리자님께선 과거에 사고로 딸을 잃으신 것 같더라.
아마… 칼립소를 유달리 예뻐하시는 이유도 어쩌면 딸아이 같아서 그런 거 아닐까?
1600500031.english:
As far as I know, it seems the manager lost their daughter in an accident in the past.
 Maybe… the reason he is so fond of Calypso is perhaps because she is like a daughter to him?

1600500032.korean: 흥, 그래봤자 죽은 애가 돌아오는 것도 아니… 아아아아아악!
1600500032.english: Hmph, even so, it’s not like the dead kid is coming back… Aaaaaaaah!

1600500034.english: Oh my god… Argh! It hurts, sis!

1600500035.korean: 우리에게 내릴 명령권이 없더라도 우리를 만든 인간에게 존중하는 태도를 보여, 라미아.
1600500035.english: Even if you have no authority to give us orders, show respect to the humans who created us, Lamia.

1600500037.english: You're really putting on a show.

1600500040.korean: 칼립소는 차출하면 안 된다고 막아세우더니, 결국 하는 꼬라지가 가족놀이냐?
1600500040.english: You blocked Calypso from being drafted, but look at the way you're acting now—is this some kind of family game?

1600500041.korean: …칼립소가 해야 할 일은 모두 저와 라미아가 소화하고 있지 않습니까?
1600500041.english: … Aren’t Lamia and I handling all of Calypso’s work?

1600500042.korean: 상부 쪽에선 칼립소의 실전 데이터가 필요하다면서 난리친단 말이다, 젠장할…
1600500042.english: The higher ups are making a fuss, saying they need Calypso's real-world combat data, damn it...

1600500043.korean: 내가 아니었으면 너희뿐만 아니라 저 되지도 않는 해파리 년은 벌써 죽였을 거다.
1600500043.english: If it weren't for me, I would have killed not only you guys but also that useless jellyfish bitch by now.

1600500045.korean: 진짜 쟨 길 가다 벼락이라도 맞아 뒤졌으면 좋겠네.
1600500045.english: I really wish that guy would get struck by lightning and die while walking down the street.

1600500046.korean: …라미아, 우리도 할 일이 끝났으니 업무 복귀나 하자고.
1600500046.english: … Lamia, we’re done with our work, so let’s get back to work.

1600500048.korean: 칼립소, 제법 피아노를 잘 치는데... 내일도 나랑 같이 쳐주면 안 되겠니?
1600500048.english: Calypso, you play the piano quite well... Won't you play with me tomorrow too?

1600500049.korean: 호텔에 쌓인 일이 산더미입니다, 게다가 관리자님께서도 바쁘신데… 어떻게…
1600500049.english: There is a mountain of work piled up at the hotel, and on top of that, the manager is busy too... How...

1600500050.korean: 호텔일만한다고 투덜댈 땐 언제고? 하아~ 어쩔 수 없네. 그러면 내일 칼립소랑 같이 휴가 낼까?
1600500050.english: Just when were you complaining about only doing hotel work? Sigh... I guess it can't be helped. Then, should we take a day off tomorrow together with Calypso?

1600500051.korean: 아, 안 됩니다 관리자님! 저랑 관리자님이 동시에 휴가를 내면 유흥단지 일이 돌아가겠습니까?!
1600500051.english: Ah, no, Manager! If you and I take leave at the same time, do you think the entertainment complex will be able to function?!

1600500052.korean: 그럼 내일 시간 내서 나랑 피아노 쳐줄 수 있지, 칼립소?
1600500052.english: Then you can make time to play the piano with me tomorrow, Calypso?

1600500053.english: … Understood, Manager. I will do so.

1600500055.korean:
아, 안 됩니다 관리자님! 하, 함부로 제게 손을 대시면 안 된다고요…
저한텐 해독 불가능한 독이 온몸에 흐르고 있어요, 스치기만 하셔도 위독…
1600500055.english:
Ah, no, Manager! Ha, I told you not to lay a hand on me so carelessly…
 An indetoxifiable poison is flowing through my entire body; even a slight touch would be critical...

1600500056.korean: 어머나 칼립소, 머리카락이… 보랏빛으로 변했구나? 하하하~ 역시 내 작품이야!
1600500056.english: Oh my, Calypso, your hair… has turned purple? Hahaha~ As expected, it’s my creation!

1600500062.korean: 칼립소? 혹시 좋아하는 음식 있니? 저녁에 간만에 솜씨 좀 부려볼까 하는데?
1600500062.english: Calypso? Do you happen to have a favorite dish? I'm thinking of cooking a bit for dinner for the first time in a while.

1600500064.korean: 해주고 싶어서 그래. 정말 먹고 싶은 거 있니?
1600500064.english: I just want to do it for you. Is there anything you really want to eat?

1600500067.korean: 만두 맞지? 나도 좋아하는데. 같이 먹을래?
1600500067.english: It's dumplings, right? I like them too. Want to eat some together?

1600500068.korean: 제가 관리자님께 말씀드린 적도 없었는데… 그걸 어떻게 아시죠?
1600500068.english: I never even mentioned that to the manager... How do you know that?

1600500069.english: Well… how did you know? Haha~

1600600001.korean: 이봐 소피아! 아무리 너라도, 상부의 명을 계속 어기면 어떻게 되는지 알고 있지?!
1600600001.english: Hey Sophia! Even you know what happens if you keep disobeying orders from above, right?!

1600600002.korean: 오귀기아에서 제 업무를 도와줄 바이오로이드가 필요하단 거 모르세요?
1600600002.english: Don't you know that I need a bioroid to help with my work at Ougia?

1600600003.korean: 지금 그 개체들이 뭘 하러 이곳에 왔는지는 너도 잘 알잖아!
1600600003.english: You know perfectly well what those creatures came here to do!

1600600004.korean:
오귀기아는 최상의 서비스를 위해 만들어진 삼안의 유흥단지고
오케아니데스 프로젝트는 최고의 휴식을 위한 평화를 유지하고자 파견된 경비 부대죠.
1600600004.english:
Oguigia is Saman's entertainment complex built for the best service.
 The Okeanides Project is a security unit dispatched to maintain peace for the ultimate rest.

1600600005.korean: 그게, 제가 받은 인수인계 서류 상 내용입니다만?
1600600005.english: That is the content according to the handover documents I received, isn't it?

1600600007.korean: 제가 오케아니데스 프로젝트 바이오로이드의 모든 유전자 지도를 가지고 있다는 거, 잊지 않으셨겠죠?
1600600007.english: You haven't forgotten that I have the genetic maps of all the Okeanides Project bioroids, have you?

1600600008.korean: 지금 후속 단계에 있는 라미아의 자매 개체들도 제가 없다면 완전한 구현은 어려우실 텐데요?
1600600008.english: It would be difficult to fully implement Lamia's sister entities currently in the follow-up stage without me, wouldn't it?

1600600009.english: Is this bitch threatening us right now?!

1600600011.korean:
이년은 감히 어따 대고 하라 마라야! 
네 명령권자가 누군지 알아?!
1600600011.english:
How dare this bitch tell me what to do!
 Do you know who your commander is?!

1600600012.english: … There are many eyes watching. I wish you would stop.

1600600013.english: Are you... threatening me right now?

1600600014.korean: …권위를 위해 가장 합리적인 제안을 안내드린 것뿐입니다.
1600600014.english: … I merely presented the most reasonable suggestion for the sake of authority.

1600600015.korean: 네년이… 윗선에서 좋아할 만한 실적을 내니까, 이젠 네가 뭐 인간이라도 된 것 같아?!
1600600015.english: You bitch... just because you're putting out results the higher-ups like, do you think you've become a human being or something?!

1600600018.korean: 실력 좋다고 뻐기지 마. 널 대체할 애들? 삼안 기술력으로도 수두룩하니까.
1600600018.english: Don't brag about how good you are. There are plenty of people who can replace you, given Saman's technology.

1600600019.korean:
과연 그럴까요? 날 쫓아내고 나선 연구가 지지부진하단 소리가 나오고 있던데?
저 없이 하려니 많이 힘들죠?
1600600019.english:
Is that really the case? I've heard rumors that the research has been making little progress since they kicked me out.
 It must be really hard trying to do it without me, right?

1600600021.korean: 자꾸 이런 식으로 이년 저년 찾으면서 협박질이나 해대면, 옛정이고 뭐고 확 블랙리버로 이직합니다?
1600600021.english: If you keep threatening me like this, looking for this bitch and that bitch, I’m going to forget all old ties and just switch jobs to Black River, okay?

1600600022.korean: 한 마디만 더 지껄여봐!! 아주 그냥!!
1600600022.english: Say just one more word!! Just you dare!!

1600600024.korean: 쌍년! 언젠간 오늘을 두고두고 후회할 거야! 알았어?!
1600600024.english: You bitch! Someday you’ll regret today for the rest of your life! Got it?!

1600600028.korean: …관리자님, 오귀기아의 현장 업무 지시 사항에 관련하여…
1600600028.english: … Manager, regarding the field work instructions from Oughigia…

1600600030.english: Big sister, why is there a wound on your lip...

1600600032.english: Did you get hit by the commanding officer?

1600600034.korean:
큰 언니. 관리자님 만큼이나 그분 또한 동등한 존재입니다.
비록 언사는 거칠지 몰라도, 따라주시기 바랍니다.
1600600034.english:
Big sister. That person is just as equal as the manager.
 Although my words may be rough, please follow along.

1600600037.korean: …네가 우리들보다 인정받고 싶어하는 마음은 잘 알지만. 너무 그것에 목매달지 마렴.
1600600037.english: … I know you want to be recognized more than us, but don't obsess over it too much.

1600600039.korean: 언니 말씀도 알겠지만… 우린 바이오로이드인 이상, 인간 님들께 봉사해야 해요.
1600600039.english: I know you understand, but... as long as we are bioroids, we must serve the humans.

1600600040.korean: 삼안 상부의 명령이든, 관리자님의 명령이든. 주어진 명령을 수행하기만 하면 그만입니다.
1600600040.english: Whether it is an order from Saman's upper management or the manager, you simply need to execute the given command.

1600600043.english: Don't try to be recognized too blindly.

1600600045.english: You're the one who needs to fix that messed-up way of thinking.

1600600046.korean: 칼립소 넌… 인정 받는 것이 그렇게 좋아?
1600600046.english: Calypso, do you… like being acknowledged that much?

1600600047.korean: 그것이 저희가 해야 할 의무이지 않습니까? 관리자님.

1600600048.english: … You really are like an AGS.

1600600051.korean:
…왜, 왜 그러십니까?! 분명 말씀드렸지 않았습니까?
제 신체엔 독이 있어 함부로 만지시다 감염되면 안 된다고요!
1600600051.english:
… Why, why are you doing this?! Didn't I clearly tell you?
 I have poison in my body, so you must not touch me carelessly and get infected!

1600600054.korean:
그래… 그래도 냉혈한은 아니었구나 너.
내가 네 손을 잡자마자 손톱 먼저 집어넣는 걸 보니까…
1600600054.english:
Right... so you weren't a cold-blooded person after all.
 Seeing you pull your fingernails in first the moment I held your hand...

1600600055.korean:
관리자님을 다치게 하고 싶지 않습니다.
말씀드렸을 텐데요? 제 독은 강철마저 녹일 정도로 강한…
1600600055.english:
I don't want to hurt the manager.
 I think I told you. My poison is strong enough to melt even steel…

1600600057.korean: 갑자기 무슨 쌩뚱 맞은 소리시죠! 관리자님… 제발 정신…
1600600057.english: What kind of nonsense is that all of a sudden! Administrator... please, get a grip...

1600600058.korean: 여어 우리 언니, 언제 관리자 딸이 다 됐어? 이제 우리 자매 탈퇴야?
1600600058.english: Hey, big sister, when did you become the administrator's daughter? Are we sisters leaving the group now?

1600600059.english: Shut up, you muscle-brained old maid!

1600600060.korean: 라미아도 복귀했니? 후후… 으음… 다치지 않은 걸 보니 다행이구나.
1600600060.english: Did Lamia return too? Hehe... Hmm... It's a relief to see she wasn't hurt.

1600600061.korean: …거 참. 낯 간지럽게. 자, 언니 먹으라고 홍삼 캔디도 가져왔어.
1600600061.english: ...Come on. That's embarrassing. Here, I brought some red ginseng candy for you to eat.

1600600062.english: Who would eat this kind of thing!

1600600063.english: That's a shame... Manager, want some?

1600600064.korean: 아니… 그… 난 괜찮아. 나도 그걸 좋아하진 않아서…
1600600064.english: No… um… I’m fine. I don’t like that either, so…

1600600065.korean: 그거 아쉽네. 진짜 맛있는데… 그나저나 간만에 일찍 끝내고 왔는데 우리 꼬맹이 언니랑 좀 놀아볼까?
1600600065.english: That's a shame. It was really delicious... Anyway, I finished work early for the first time in a while, so shall we play with my little one for a bit?

1600600066.english: Playing? What do you mean, playing...?!

1600600067.korean: 큰 언니가 작은 언니랑 많이 놀라고 했단 말이야. 근데 난 레슬링하고 노는 거 좋아해서…
1600600067.english: My eldest sister told me to play a lot with my second sister. But I like wrestling and playing, so...

1600600068.korean: …너 그 땀 냄새나고 천박한 무술을 나한테 하겠다고?
1600600068.english: … You're going to do that sweaty, vulgar martial arts to me?

1600600069.korean:
언니, 임무 나갔다가 본 레슬링 만화책이 있는데...
거기서 내가 재밌는 기술 하나 알아왔거든.
1600600069.english:
Sister, I have a wrestling comic book that I saw while on a mission...
 I learned a fun technique there.

1600600071.korean: …하지 마. 절대… 하지… 야! 이거 안 놔?! 야! 야!
1600600071.english: … Don't do it. Absolutely… don't… Hey! Aren't you going to let go of this?! Hey! Hey!

1600600072.english: ...lifting my older sister as she is...

1600600073.korean: …꺄악 하지 마! 하지 말라고 이 근육 뇌!
1600600073.english: … Aaaah! Stop it! I said stop it, you muscle brain!

1600700004.korean: 매일 연습하는데... 실력이 늘지 않는 게 이상하지 않겠습니까, 관리자님?
1600700004.english: I practice every day... wouldn't it be strange if my skills weren't improving, Manager?

1600700008.korean: 칼립소, 잠깐만 나랑 어디 좀 같이 가지 않을래?
1600700008.english: Calypso, wait a minute, won't you come somewhere with me?

1600700009.korean: 어딜 말이시죠? 당장 밖에는 전쟁터나 다름 없는데... 위험하십니다.
1600700009.english: Where are you talking about? It’s practically a battlefield right now... It’s dangerous.

1600700010.english: It won't take long. Just a very short moment...

1600700014.english: Is this your first time here?

1600700017.english: It's a large-caliber bullet fired by Lamia.

1600700019.english: It’s practically a battlefield right now, though…

1600700020.korean: 전쟁 전까지만 하더라도… 참 좋은 곳이었는데.
1600700020.english: It was such a nice place, at least until the war.

1600700021.english: … I don’t know what your purpose is in bringing me here, Manager.

1600700022.korean: 칼립소, 널 볼 때마다 내 딸이 생각 나.
1600700022.english: Calypso, every time I see you, I think of my daughter.

1600700023.english: … Haha, I wasn't supposed to say that.

1600700024.korean:
그 따님과 절 왜 자꾸 같이 보시는 거죠?
그 분과 제가 닮기라도 했습니까…?
1600700024.english:
Why do you keep looking at that daughter and me together?
 Do I resemble that person at some point...?

1600700025.korean: 그래, 해파리를 아주 좋아했고… 해양 과학자가 꿈이었어. 나처럼 말이야.
1600700025.english: Yeah, I really liked jellyfish... and my dream was to become a marine scientist. Just like me.

1600700026.english: … He passed away early due to illness, though.

1600700028.english: I am sorry to hear this.

1600700029.korean:
…하하, 옛날 일인데 자꾸 해서 미안.
사실... 넌, 내 딸의… 하아… 아냐. 됐다.
1600700029.english:
… Haha, sorry for bringing up something from the past.
 Actually... you are my daughter's... Haa... No. Never mind.

1600700032.korean: 밤 중에도 호텔 로비에서 계속 앉아 일을 한다고 들었어. 그렇게까지 열심히 할 필요 없어.
1600700032.english: I heard you keep sitting and working in the hotel lobby even at night. You don't need to work that hard.

1600700033.korean: 정말 태평한 소리나 하고 계시군요. 관리자님이 일을 안 하시니 제가 다 해야 하지 않습니까?
1600700033.english: You are really talking nonsense. Since you aren't doing any work, don't I have to do it all?

1600700034.korean: 너도 하지 마~ 찾아오는 사람이 얼마나 있다고 때 빼고 광내고 있어?
1600700034.english: You shouldn't do that either. How many people actually visit? Why are you scrubbing everything clean and polishing?

1600700036.korean: 칼립소, 내가 왜 널 전쟁에 내보내지 않으려 하는지 알고 있어?
1600700036.english: Calypso, do you know why I don't want to send you to war?

1600700037.english: … Isn't it because you see me like a daughter?

1600700038.korean: 물론 그것도 있긴 하지만… 난 네가 살인 병기가 되는 걸 지켜 보고 싶지 않아.
1600700038.english: Of course, that is part of it, but... I don't want to watch you become a killing machine.

1600700041.korean:
저희 부대는 원래부터 해양전을 위해 고안된 바이오로이드 입니다.
그리고 이런 식으로 상부의 명을 계속해서 거스르시다간… 분명 보복을 당하게 될 겁니다.
1600700041.english:
Our unit consists of bioroids originally designed for naval warfare.
 And if you continue to disobey orders from above like this… you will surely face retaliation.

1600700042.korean: 저도… 관리자님이 다치는 걸 보고 싶지 않습니다.
1600700042.english: I also… don’t want to see the manager get hurt.

1600700043.korean: 뭐야… 너도 내 걱정해주는 거야? 하하하~ 드디어 나한테 마음을 열었구나!
1600700043.english: What… are you worried about me too? Hahaha~ You’ve finally opened your heart to me!

1600700044.korean: 껴, 껴안지 말아주세요! 가시에 찔릴 수도 있단 말이에요!
1600700044.english: Please, please don't hug me! I could get pricked by thorns!

1600700049.english: … Ha, I can't seem to speak.

1600700050.korean: 하하~ 너 나한테 엄마라고 한 거지, 그렇지?
1600700050.english: Haha~ You called me Mom, right?

1600700053.korean: 정말 엄마 다운 행동을 해 보이신다면 그땐, 제가 한… 번 불러 드리도록 하… 우아아앗?!
1600700053.english: If you really act like a mom, then... I'll call you once... Waaah?!

1600700055.korean: 갑자기 껴안으시면 안 됩니다! 제발… 제발!
1600700055.english: You mustn't hug me suddenly! Please... please!

1600700056.english: Hahaha~ Calypso. Thank you so much…

1600700057.english: … Thank you for calling me Mom.

1600700063.korean: 예전에 블랙리버, 마리아 리오보로스 분파 측에서 테러리스트를 보낸 건 알고 있지?
1600700063.english: You know that the Black River and Maria Rioboros factions sent terrorists in the past, right?

1600700064.english: … I know. We suffered quite a lot of damage.

1600700065.korean: 라미아와 유사한 유전자를 가진 것으로 추정되는 바이오로이드가 나타났다.
1600700065.english: A bioroid presumed to have genes similar to Lamia has appeared.

1600700067.korean:
삼안의 연구단지는 민간에게 비밀리에 운영되고 있으니 윗선에서 판단하기를, 
기술 유출은 이곳 오귀기아에서 시작되었다는 결론에 이르렀다.
1600700067.english:
Since Saman's research complex is being operated secretly from the private sector, the higher ups should make a judgment,
 It was concluded that the technology leak originated here in Ougia.

1600700068.korean: …범인이 오귀기아에 있단 말씀입니까? 제가 직접 찾아내겠습니다.
1600700068.english: … Are you saying the culprit is in Ogygia? I will find him myself.

1600700069.korean: 그럴 필요 없어. 이미 범인은 밝혀졌으니까.
1600700069.english: There is no need for that. The culprit has already been identified.

1600700074.korean:
…소피아 첸이 배신을 하고 유전 정보를 넘겨줬다면, 
마리아 분파 측에서 저희 유흥 단지에 쳐들어 올 이유가 없지 않습니까?
1600700074.english:
… If Sophia Chen betrayed them and handed over the genetic information,
 There is no reason for the Maria faction to raid our entertainment complex, is there?

1600700075.korean: 이 일은 자매들과 함께 논의를 해보겠…
1600700075.english: I will discuss this matter with my sisters…

1600700076.korean:
카리브디스, 그 망할 년과 상의할 필요는 없어.
그리고 설마 너, 지금 날… 아니, 삼안을 의심하는 거냐?
1600700076.english:
Charybdis, there is no need to consult with that damn bitch.
 And surely you aren't doubting me... no, Saman, right now?

1600700077.korean:
…명령권자님. 솔직히 말해, 소피아 측에선 의심스러운 행동을 보이지 않았습니다.
죄송하지만 다시 한 번 신중하게…
1600700077.english:
… Commander. To be honest, Sophia’s side did not show any suspicious behavior.
 I apologize, but please be careful once again...

1600700078.korean: 내가 아무런 이유도 없이 멋대로 떠드는 줄 알아?
1600700078.english: Do you think I'm just rambling on for no reason?

1600700079.korean: 하지만, 정확한 증거도 없는 상태에서 갑작스레 관리자님을 죽이라고 명하시는 건…
1600700079.english: However, suddenly ordering the manager to be killed without any concrete evidence…

1600700080.korean: 네가 그년이랑 놀고 있으니, 정말 인간이라도 된 것 같아? 모녀간의 정이라도 생긴 건가?
1600700080.english: Now that you're hanging out with that bitch, do you really think you've become a human being? Did you develop some kind of mother-daughter bond?

1600700082.korean: 하지만… 이 일과 관련해선 자매들과 얘기를 나눠 봐야 하겠습니다. 분명 뭔가 잘못된…
1600700082.english: However… I need to talk to my sisters about this matter. Clearly, something is wrong…

1600700083.korean: 입 닥치고 시키는 대로만 하란 말이야!
1600700083.english: Shut your mouth and just do as I say!

1600700085.korean: 당장 소피아를 죽여라. 오케아니데스 프로젝트 중지 명령이 떨어졌으니, 우리도 이제 그 여자는 필요 없어.
1600700085.english: Kill Sophia immediately. The order to halt the Okeanides Project has been issued, so we don't need her anymore.

1600700087.korean: 자, 잠시만요… 제가 확인해보면 안 되겠습니까?
1600700087.english: Now, just a moment... May I check it out?

1600700090.korean: 네 명령권자는 나야, 그 여자가 아니라고!
1600700090.english: I'm the one in command, not that woman!

1600700092.korean: 당장 오늘 밤 그 여자를 죽여라.
1600700092.english: Kill that woman tonight, right now.

1600800002.korean: 어, 칼립소 님? 이 야심한 밤에 왜 방으로…
1600800002.english: Uh, Calypso? Why are you in my room at this late hour…

1600800010.korean: 카, 칼립소 님… 제발… 이러시면… 아아악!
1600800010.english: K-Calypso... please... if you do this... Aaaah!

1600800012.english: I am… a… bioroid… from the Okeanides Project…

1600800014.korean: 칼립소 님… 지금 멈추지 않으면… 쏘겠…
1600800014.english: Calypso... if you don't stop now... I'll shoot...

1600800019.korean: 음산한 달빛이 내리는 밤, 칼립소는 소피아의 침실에 도달했다.
1600800019.english: On a night bathed in eerie moonlight, Calypso reached Sophia's bedroom.

1600800020.korean:
하필 라미아 님께서 자리를 비우실 때…! 칼립소 님, 제발 멈추세요! 
저는 칼립소 님을 사살하고 싶지 않습니다!
1600800020.english:
Of all times, when Lady Lamia is away…! Lady Calypso, please stop!
 I do not want to kill Calypso!

1600800024.english: … Did Saman tell you to kill me?

1600800026.korean: …라미아의 유전 정보를 왜 블랙리버에 넘기신 거죠?
1600800026.english: … Why did you hand over Lamia's genetic information to Black River?

1600800028.english: Why… did you hand it over…?

1600800031.english: So that's what Saman said to you...

1600800033.english: I'm asking why you did that!

1600800034.korean: 칼립소… 슬프게 우는 건 처음 보네.
1600800034.english: Calypso… This is the first time I’ve seen you cry sadly.

1600800037.english: … Do you really think I handed it over?

1600800038.korean:
칼립소의 어깨는 심하게 떨리고 있다. 
피범벅이 된 손톱의 핏물을 털어낸 칼립소는 소피아에게로 걸어왔다.
1600800038.english:
Calypso's shoulders are trembling violently.
 Calypso brushed the blood off her blood-stained fingernails and walked toward Sophia.

1600800039.english: You did hand over the materials... right?

1600800041.korean: 제가, 소피아 님을 죽여도… 전 그저 임무를 수행한… 바이오로이드가 되는 거 맞죠?
1600800041.english: Even if I kill Sophia… I’ll just become a bioroid that carried out a mission… right?

1600800043.english: You're a bioroid who did something praiseworthy... right?

1600800046.korean:
제발… 아니죠? 아니라고 해주세요... 네? 명령이라도 해주세요…
하지 마라, 하지 마라… 제발, 제발…
1600800046.english:
Please… it’s not true, right? Please tell me it’s not true… please? At least give me an order…
 Don't do it, don't do it... Please, please...

1600800047.english: You must be having a really hard time... Daughter?

1600800048.korean: 엄마를 죽이고 싶지 않아요… 흐읍… 으윽…
1600800048.english: I don't want to kill Mom... *Sob*... *Ugh*...

1600800049.english: Calypso, from now on… listen carefully…

1600800050.korean: 내가 많이 아프니까… 쓰러진 거야. 네가 죽인 게 아니야… 응?
1600800050.english: I collapsed because I was in a lot of pain... You didn't kill me... okay?

1600800051.korean: 아프니까… 딸이 조금 편하게 해주는 거야. 알았지?
1600800051.english: Since you're in pain... your daughter is making you feel a little more comfortable. Got it?

1600800052.english: What do you mean... what are you talking about?

1600800053.korean: 그리고 딸은… 명령을 잘 수행한… 삼안의 훌륭한 바이오로이드가 되는 거야.
1600800053.english: And the daughter… will become a fine bioroid of Saman… who carried out the orders well.

1600800054.korean: …못해요. 저는… 못해. 못한다고요, 제발, 죽이지 말라 명령을…
1600800054.english: … I can’t. I… I can’t. I said I can’t, please, the order not to kill…

1600800055.korean: …이해해. 난 딸에게 명령하고 싶지 않은걸? 하하… 나 없어도 잘 지내야… 해? 알았지. 칼립소?
1600800055.english: … I understand. I don't want to give my daughter orders, you know? Haha… You have to get along well without me… okay? Got it, Calypso?

1600800056.korean: 그게 무슨… 안 돼… 안 돼!

1600800057.korean: 소피아는 천천히 다가 온 후, 그대로 칼립소의 손톱을 스스로 자신의 배에 찔러넣었다.
1600800057.english: Sophia approached slowly, then stabbed Calypso's fingernails into her own stomach.

1600800060.korean:
소피아는 주저앉은 뒤 울컥 피를 쏟아냈다.
그러면서도 애써 웃으며 그녀의 고운 뺨을 쓰다듬었다.
1600800060.english:
Sophia slumped down and choked out blood.
 Even so, he forced a smile and stroked her pretty cheek.

1600800061.korean: 대체 왜 그러셨어요… 엄마, 네? 네…?
1600800061.english: Why on earth did you do that… Mom, yes? Yes…?

1600800063.korean:
엄마는… 많이 아파서, 네가 편하게 해준 거야. 
병이 깊어졌고… 우리 딸이 고통스러운 엄마를 편히 쉬게 한 거야.
1600800063.english:
Mom... was in a lot of pain, so you made her comfortable.
 The illness worsened... and my daughter let her suffering mother rest in peace.

1600800067.korean: 엄마… 엄마! 엄마아… 흐읍! 엄마… 죽으면 안 돼요… 네?
1600800067.english: Mom... Mom! Mom... *Sob*! Mom... You can't die... Please?

1600800068.english: Calypso's fingernails were soaked with Sophia's blood.

1600800069.korean: 죄송… 해요… 흐읍… 으윽… 용서해… 주세요…

1600800071.english: What? You guys?! Why are you collapsing...

1600800073.korean: 무슨 일이야… 뭔데 여기가 난장판인 거야?!
1600800073.english: What's going on... Why is this place such a mess?!

1600800074.korean: 제가… 죽였어요. 제가 소피아 님을 죽였다고요…
1600800074.english: I… killed her. I killed Sophia…

1600800075.korean: 그게 무슨 소리야... 칼립소, 너 무슨 짓을 벌인…
1600800075.english: What do you mean... Calypso, what have you done...

1600800076.english: Sister... it's not my fault, is it?

1600800077.english: Calypso, why did you... my mother

1600800078.korean:
명령권자님이 제게 죽이라 명령하셨어요… 
언니처럼 항명권이 있었더라면… 죽이지… 않았을… 않았을…
1600800078.english:
The commander ordered me to kill...
 If I had the right to insubordination like my sister… I wouldn’t have… killed…

1600800079.korean: 그 인간이 결국... 너한테 명령한 거니?
1600800079.english: Did that guy eventually... give you an order?

1600800080.korean:
언니… 제발, 제가 어쩔 수 없었다고 얘기해주세요…
제발, 제가… 제가… 엄마를 죽인 딸은 세상에 없는 거잖아요… 네?
1600800080.english:
Sister… please, please tell me I couldn’t help it…
 Please, I... I... There is no daughter in this world who killed her mother, is there...? Please?

1600800082.korean: 그렇게 보지 마세요 제발… 잘 했다고… 하하하하하하하! 하하하하하하! 삼안에 공로를 세운…
1600800082.english: Please don't look at me like that... I did a good job... Hahahahahaha! Hahahahaha! The one who contributed to Saman...

1600800084.korean: 절 죽여주세요… 언니… 살고 싶지 않아요, 제발…
1600800084.english: Please kill me… Sister… I don’t want to live, please…

1600800087.korean:
…칼립소, 그래. 맞아. 넌, 넌… 할 일을 했을 뿐이야.
그래, 네 탓이 아니야, 인간의 명령이라면… 넌 따라야지.
1600800087.english:
… Calypso, yeah. That's right. You, you… just did what you had to do.
 Right, it's not your fault. If it's a human's command... you have to follow it.

1600800088.korean: 언니… 죄송해요, 정말 죄송해요… 제발… 절 용서하지 마세요… 흐읍… 으윽…
1600800088.english: Sister… I’m sorry, I’m really sorry… Please… don’t forgive me… *Sob*… *Ugh*…

1600800089.english: Calypso, calm down... What did the manager say?

1600800090.korean: 제 탓이 아니라고, 그저 병에 걸리셨고, 제가, 제가 편하게 해드렸다고…
1600800090.english: I told them it wasn't my fault, that they just got sick, and that I, I made them comfortable...

1600800092.korean: ...칼립소, 넌 잘못이 없어… 그저, 그 명령을 내린… 그 인간이 잘못된 거야.
1600800092.english: ...Calypso, you are not at fault... It is just that the human who gave the order is wrong.

1600800093.korean: 오늘 밤 일은… 너랑 나 빼곤… 아무도 모르는 거야. 알았지?
1600800093.english: What happens tonight… nobody knows… except you and me. Got it?

1600800094.korean:
한 가지 질문이 있습니다. 관리자님.
어째서 칼립소를 그렇게 아끼시는 거죠?
1600800094.english:
I have a question, Manager.
 Why do you cherish Calypso so much?

1600800095.korean: 너무 치사하다고 생각하니? 걔만 특별히 아껴서?
1600800095.english: Do you think that's too petty? Because you're especially fond of him?

1600800096.english: That is not it, but I wanted to ask because I was curious.

1600800097.korean: 너랑 라미아… 그리고 앞으로 나올 너희 자매들한텐 미안한 소리지만…
1600800097.english: I'm sorry to say this to you and Lamia... and to your sisters who will appear in the future, but...

1600800098.korean:
칼립소는… 내가 좀 욕심을 부려서 만든 아이야.
내 딸은 바다를 좋아했지만... 몸이 많이 약했던 아이거든.
1600800098.english:
