Calypso is… a character I created because I got a bit greedy.
 My daughter liked the sea, but... she was a very frail child.

1600800099.korean:
그 아이가 좋아하는 바다를… 유유히 헤엄치길 바라는 마음에...
칼립소의 유전자에는 내 딸의 유전자를 섞었단다.
1600800099.english:
In the hope that the child will swim leisurely in the sea they love...
 I mixed my daughter's genes into Calypso's.

1600800100.english: Then really… she’s just like a real daughter.

1600800101.korean:
하하… 까칠한게... 딸이 사춘기였으면 딱 칼립소 같았을 것 같다는 생각도 들고…
잔소리만 안 하면 정말 좋을 텐데 말이야.
1600800101.english:
Haha… being so prickly… it also makes me think that if my daughter were going through puberty, she would have been exactly like Calypso…
 It would be really nice if you just didn't nag.

1600800103.english: … I hear the Okeanides Project has been scrapped.

1600800105.korean:
…내가 없어진다면, 칼립소를 잘 돌봐주겠니?
동생처럼 다정하게 대해주면서.
1600800105.english:
… If I disappear, will you take good care of Calypso?
 Treating me affectionately like a younger sibling.

1600800107.english: Of course, uh... it's Money's order...

1600800108.korean: 어머니? 하하~ 카리브디스, 너도 응석받이인 줄은 몰랐는데?
1600800108.english: Mother? Haha~ Charybdis, I didn't know you were spoiled too?

1600800109.korean:
그나저나 뜬금없이 왜 없어진단 소릴 하세요... 
관리자님께서 삼안에 남아서 할 일이 얼마나 많으신데.
1600800109.english:
Anyway, why are you suddenly saying it's disappearing...
 The manager has so much work to do staying at Saman.

1600800111.korean:
하아… 사실, 같이 온 그 삼안 관계자는 프로젝트 초반부터 나랑 사이가 안 좋았어. 
아마 무슨 수를 써서라도 방패막이 없어진 날 없애려 들 거야.
1600800111.english:
Haa... Actually, that Saman official who came with me didn't get along with me from the beginning of the project.
 They will probably try to eliminate me on the day my shield is gone, no matter what it takes.

1600800112.korean: 혹시 내가 무슨 일이 생긴다면… 불쌍한 네 자매들을 잘 돌봐줘…
1600800112.english: If something happens to me… please take good care of the four poor sisters…

1600800115.korean: 어머… 칼립소, 왔으면 인기척이라도 좀 내지 그러니…?
1600800115.english: Oh my... Calypso, since you're here, couldn't you at least make some noise...?

1600800117.english: … Excuse me, Manager. Here is the Oughigia financial statement.

1600800118.korean:
[i]대만의 유흥단지 오귀기아에는 긴 머리를 곱게 빗은,
소피아의 딸 칼립소가 살고 있는데, 그녀는 가여운 바이오로이드였습니다.[-][/i]
1600800118.english:
[i] In Taiwan’s entertainment district Oguigia, there are women with long, neatly combed hair,
 Sophia's daughter Calypso lives there, and she was a pitiful bioroid.

1411111136.english: Outskirts of Taipei, Orca Ground Forces-

1600801001.english: … You're telling me not to evade my sins?

1600801003.korean: 죽지도 못해, 살아 있는 고통을… 내게 설교하지 마, 이 역겨운 테러리스트!
1600801003.english: I can't even die, the pain of being alive… Don't preach to me, you disgusting terrorist!

1600801004.english: … I guess I really have to resort to violence?

1600801007.english: Die, die! I said die! Aaaaaaaah!

1600801011.korean: 의지를 잃은 무술은, 몽유병만도 못한 흐느적거림에 불과하다.
1600801011.english: Martial arts that have lost their will are nothing more than a limp swaying, worse than sleepwalking.

1600801013.korean: …내가 잡은 이 스콜과 하티에는 주인님을 향한 마음과 내 부대원들을 지켜내겠다는 의지가 담겨있다.
1600801013.english: … These Skol and Hatie that I captured contain my heart for my master and my determination to protect my unit members.

1600801015.korean: 칼립소, 너는 손톱날을 세우면서 어떤 각오를 하고 있지?
1600801015.english: Calypso, what kind of resolve are you making as you sharpen your claws?

1600801017.english: I'm asking what kind of determination is behind it!

1600801019.korean: 네 공격에는 그 어떤 책임감도, 누군가를 지키고자 하는 의지 그 무엇도 없다. 갈 곳 없는 분노만이 담겨 있을 뿐이지.
1600801019.english: There is no sense of responsibility or will to protect anyone in your attack. It contains nothing but aimless rage.

1600801020.korean: 그따위 마음가짐이라면 철충은 죽일 수 있을지 몰라도, 내게 독을 찔러 넣을 순 없다.
1600801020.english: With that kind of mindset, you might be able to kill the Iron蟲, but you cannot stab me with poison.

1600801022.english: Listen carefully before I crush your arm.

1600801024.korean: …소피아가 무슨 감정을 가지고 널 만들었을지 생각해 봐라. 자식이 이러는 모습을 어미가 좋아할 것 같나?!
1600801024.english: … Think about what feelings Sophia had when she created you. Do you think a mother would like seeing her child act like this?!

1600801026.korean: 널 그렇게 아꼈다던 큰 언니는, 네가 이따위 추태를 벌이는 중이라는 걸 알고서도 네 편이 되주겠냔 말이다.
1600801026.english: Do you think your eldest sister, who supposedly cared for you so much, would take your side even knowing that you are putting on such a disgraceful act?

1600801027.korean: 흐읍… 으윽… 네가, 네가 대체 뭘 알아?! 뭘 아냐고!
1600801027.english: *Gasp*... *Ugh*... You, what on earth do you know?! What do you know?!

1600801028.korean: 죽, 죽어야지만 그 입을 다물... 꺄아아앗?!
1600801028.english: You'll only shut your mouth if you die... Kyaaaah?!

1600801029.english: Go ahead and swing it a hundred times.

1600801030.korean: …으으윽?! 끄흑?! 이거 안 놔?! 놔, 놓으라고! 네가 뭘 아냔 말이…
1600801030.english: … Ugh?! Sob?! Aren't you going to let go?! Let go, I said let go! What do you know…

1600801031.korean: 바르그! 그만해! 칼립소한테 너무 심한 거 아니야?!
1600801031.english: Varg! Stop it! Aren't you being too harsh on Calypso?!

1600801032.korean:
방해말고 가만히 있어라!
그렇게 안일하게 여기다 이 상황까지 오게 되었지 않나?!
1600801032.english:
Don't disturb me, just stay still!
 Didn't we end up in this situation because we were so complacent?!

1600801034.korean: 주인님이 명령했고, 이 일은 전적으로 우리의 '임무'다… 방해 말아라.
1600801034.english: The Master gave the order, and this is entirely our 'mission'... Do not interfere.

1600801036.korean: 나도 한때 주인님께 칼까지 겨누었던 치욕스러운 짓을 했었다.
1600801036.english: I, too, once committed the shameful act of even pointing a knife at my master.

1600801038.korean: 나도 똑같이 주인님의 바이오로이드에 칼을 겨눴다. 아니…
1600801038.english: I aimed my sword at my Master's bioroid in the same way. No...

1600801039.korean:
…어쩌면, 너보다 더 심한 짓을 했다. 
여제님이 되살아나지 않을 걸 알면서도… 적의 밀정 역할까지 자처했으니까…
1600801039.english:
… Maybe, I did something worse than you.
 Even though I knew the Empress wouldn't be revived... I even volunteered to be an enemy spy...

1600801040.korean:
그래, 하지만 주인님께선 이런 나도 거둬주셨다…!
엄마에 대한 죄책감과 부채 의식이라면… 나 또한… 충분히 이해하고 공감할 수 있다…
1600801040.english:
Yes, but Master took in even someone like me…!
 If it is guilt and a sense of indebtedness toward my mother… I, too… can fully understand and empathize…

1600801041.korean:
칼립소를 제압한 바르그는 스콜을 칼립소의 머리맡에 꽂았다.
그늘진 바르그의 얼굴에서 미지근한 물방울이 칼립소의 볼 위로 떨어졌다.
1600801041.english:
After subduing Calypso, Varg stuck Skoll into Calypso's head.
 A lukewarm drop of water fell from Barg's shadowed face onto Calypso's cheek.

1600801043.korean: 사랑이라는 이름으로 더 큰 죄를 지으려 하지 마라…
1600801043.english: Do not try to commit a greater sin in the name of love…

1600801045.korean:
날 죽여… 차라리… 내가 반항했다고… 인간님한테 말해, 그래서 죽였다고…
날 용서해 줄 수 있는 인간은 이미 이 세상에 없어. 어디에도... 없어.
1600801045.english:
Kill me… rather… tell the human that I resisted… and that’s why they killed me…
 There is no one in this world who can forgive me. Nowhere... is there.

1600801046.english: I don't want to live like this anymore...

1600801047.english: … In the end, do you intend to evade it through death?

1600801049.korean: 그건 사죄가 아닌, 질 나쁜 은둔일 뿐이다.
1600801049.english: That is not an apology, but merely a bad form of seclusion.

1600801051.korean:
내 어머니나 다름없는 여제님도 돌아가셨다...
한 번이라도 더 여제님께 더 잘할 걸… 한 번이라도 더, 여제님께 보답할 걸...
1600801051.english:
The Empress, who was like a mother to me, has also passed away...
 I should have treated the Empress better, even just one more time... I should have repaid the Empress, even just one more time...

1600801052.english: However, the cruel reality did not change.

1600801053.korean: …칼립소, 네가 죽음을 선택한다고 해서, 이 모든 게 해결될 거라 생각하나?
1600801053.english: … Calypso, do you think choosing death will resolve all of this?

1600801054.english: What on earth... am I supposed to do...

1600801056.english: You are the beautiful daughter Sophia left behind.

1600801057.korean: …살아서, 네 가여운 엄마를 계속해서 기억하고, 네 죄를 끊임없이 참회해라.
1600801057.english: … Live on, continue to remember your poor mother, and ceaselessly repent for your sins.

1600801058.korean: 그것이… 널 창조한 소피아의 뜻임에 틀림없으니.
1600801058.english: That must be… the will of Sophia, who created you.

1600801060.korean: 주인님께선 네게 명령을 통한 굴복보단… 네가 직접 오길 바라신다.
1600801060.english: The Master wants you to come in person rather than submit through orders.

1600801062.korean: 미안하다… 그 시절 내 부하들이, 여제님의 명령을 들었을 뿐이란 구차한 변명 따윈 이제와 하고 싶지 않다.
1600801062.english: I'm sorry... I don't want to make the pathetic excuse now that my subordinates back then were merely following the Empress's orders.

1600801064.korean: 네가 저주했던 내 여제님도… 네 자매들이 칼을 갈았던 앙헬도… 더는 없다.
1600801064.english: My Empress whom you cursed... and Angel, whom your sisters sharpened their swords against... are no more.

1600801066.korean: 그리고 지금, 유일무이한 인간이신 우리 주인님께서... 네게 기회를 주고자 하신다.
1600801066.english: And now, our Master, the one and only human... wishes to give you a chance.

1600801067.english: The human... wants to meet me...?

1600801068.korean: 주인님을 직접 만나 네 죄를 사하라.
1600801068.english: Meet the Master in person and forgive your sins.

1600801069.korean: - 함교로 나가자, 초췌한 모습으로 돌아온 칼립소가 내게 예를 갖춰 고개 숙인 뒤 무릎을 꿇었다.
1600801069.english: As I went out to the bridge, Calypso, who had returned looking haggard, bowed her head in respect to me and knelt.

1600801070.english: Finally... I would like to greet you... Human... once again. And...

1600801071.korean: …인간님이 아끼시는 바이오로이드께 해를 끼친 일에 대하여… 정식으로 사과드리고 싶습니다.
1600801071.english: … I would like to formally apologize for causing harm to the bioroid that you cherish, Human.

1600801074.korean: - 칼립소의 퉁퉁 부운 눈을 본 나는 착잡한 마음이 들었다.
1600801074.english: Seeing Calypso's swollen eyes, I felt a sense of unease.

1600801075.korean: - 약간의 생체기를 볼 때, 자신의 의지로 왔다기보단 바르그와의 마찰이 있었음을 감지할 수 있었다.
1600801075.english: - Judging by the slight scratches, I could sense that there had been friction with Varg rather than him coming of his own free will.

1600801076.korean: - 나는 천천히 칼립소에게 다가간 후, 고개를 숙였다.
1600801076.english: I slowly approached Calypso and bowed my head.

1600801077.english: You do not need to apologize to me, Human...

1600801078.english: - Calypso was taken aback by my remark.

1600801079.english: It's because of my forced nature, so why...

1600801081.korean:
저는 두 번이나 인간 분들께 씻을 수 없는 큰 죄를 짓고야 말았습니다.
저는 인간님 앞에 있을 자격이 없습니다.
1600801081.english:
I ended up committing an unforgivable sin against people twice.
 I am not worthy to stand before you, human.

1600801082.korean:
혹시나 합류를 요청하시는 건으로 절 부르셨다면...
인간님께 이번과 같은 폐를 끼칠 일 없도록 은둔하며 지내려고 합니다.
1600801082.english:
If you called me by any chance to ask me to join...
 I intend to live in seclusion so as not to cause you any trouble like this again.

1600801083.korean: - 억지로 칼립소를 끌고 가기 위해 명령을 내리고 싶은 생각은 없었다.
1600801083.english: I had no intention of giving orders to drag Calypso away by force.

1600801084.korean:
사령관은 전투가 아닌 이상은 함부로 명령을 내리지 않아.
우리를 최대한 존중해주는 편이야.
1600801084.english:
A commander doesn't issue orders arbitrarily unless it's a battle.
 They tend to respect us as much as possible.

1600801085.korean: …적어도 네게 암살 명령을 내렸던 그 인간과는 다르다고.
1600801085.english: … At least he is different from the man who gave you the assassination order.

1600801086.korean: 알겠습니다, 하지만 제 바람이라면… 이곳에 남고 싶습니다.
1600801086.english: I understand, but if it is my wish… I would like to stay here.

1600801087.korean:
라미아는… 이 섬에 남아있는 걸 갑갑해하는 아이이니만큼…
인간님께서 잘 거둬 오르카 저항군에 합류시켜 주시길 부탁드립니다.
1600801087.english:
Since Lamia is a child who feels stifled staying on this island...
 I ask that you take good care of me, Human, and have me join the Orca Resistance.

1600801088.korean: 그래도 네 동생인데... 홀로 섬에 남으면 외롭지 않겠어?
1600801088.english: Still, he's your little brother... won't he be lonely if he's left alone on the island?

1600801089.korean: …혼자가 편합니다. 저 혼자 오귀기아를 관리해도 괜찮습니다.
1600801089.english: … I am more comfortable alone. It is fine for me to manage the Oughigia by myself.

1600801090.korean:
…저의 고집 때문에 이곳에서 목숨을 바쳐 일해 온 
오귀기아의 바이오로이드들도 이젠… 퇴직할 때가 되었군요.
1600801090.english:
… I have dedicated my life to working here because of my stubbornness
 It looks like it's time for Ougia's bioroids to retire now...

1600801091.english: ...Please take good care of my younger sibling and the bioroids.

1600801098.korean:
- 나는 대답 대신 천천히 칼립소에게 다가와 손을 내밀었다.
칼립소는 긴장한 듯 거리를 두고 주춤거리며 물러섰다.
1600801098.english:
Instead of answering, I slowly approached Calypso and held out my hand.
 Calypso stepped back, keeping her distance and hesitating as if nervous.

1600801099.korean: 조심하세요, 전… 독이 있어… 제가 긴장하지 않으면 인간님께서…
1600801099.english: Be careful, I… have poison… If I’m not careful, the human…

1600801100.english: That's... I was worried you might get hurt... Ah...

1600801101.korean: - 나는 칼립소의 손을 잡은 후, 두 손으로 감쌌다.
1600801101.english: After taking Calypso's hand, I wrapped it in both hands.

1600801102.korean: 그, 그러지 마세요. 정말 다치실 수…
1600801102.english: D-please don't do that. You could really get hurt...

1600801104.korean: - 칼립소는 머뭇거리다 천천히 내 손을 맞잡았다.
1600801104.english: Calypso hesitated, then slowly took my hand.

1600801106.korean: 오랜… 만에… 느껴요. 인간님의 손이… 이렇게… 따뜻… 했었나요?
1600801106.english: For the first time... in a long time... I feel it. Were your hands... always... this warm...?

1600801109.korean: - 칼립소는 한참이나 내 손을 잡고 훌쩍거리다 이내 힘이 풀린 듯 주저앉았다.
1600801109.english: Calypso held my hand and sobbed for a long time, then soon slumped down as if her strength had drained away.

1600801110.english: Oh dear... I'm sorry for such a disgraceful display...

1600801111.korean: - 피로가 심각한 걸 보니 일단은 안정을 취해야 할 것 같았다.
1600801111.english: Seeing how severe the fatigue was, it seemed like I needed to rest for now.

1600801112.korean: 괘, 괜찮습니다… 이 정도 상처 쯤은… 읏…?!
1600801112.english: I-I'm fine... A wound like this is nothing... Ugh...?!

1600801113.korean: 칼립소, 언니가 부축해줄게. 같이 병실로 가자… 응?
1600801113.english: Calypso, I'll support you. Let's go to the hospital room together... okay?

1600801114.korean: 더 이상 폐를 끼칠 순 없습니다...
1600801114.english: I can't cause any more trouble...

1600801115.english: ...I will excuse myself only until my wound heals.

1600801120.english: I'm sorry for using my authority so carelessly.

1600801121.korean: 나도 전후 파악도 못하고 화낸 거... 너한테 사과하고 싶어.
1600801121.english: I want to apologize to you for getting angry without even understanding the context.

1600801122.english: I won't force you to join.

1600801133.english: It looks like you're badly hurt...

1600801134.english: After resting a little at Orca.

1600801135.english: Leaving like this is truly a nuisance.

1600801136.english: You need to take care of your health first.

1600802001.korean: 여어~ 우리 공주님, 여기 계셨어? 듣기론 그 강아지한테 엄청나게 얻어터졌다면서?
1600802001.english: Hey there~ My little princess, you're here? I heard you got beaten up pretty badly by that dog?

1600802003.korean: 이거 질투 나는데? 마지막 인간 손을 언니가 먼저 잡아봤다는 거 말이야.
1600802003.english: This is making me jealous. I mean, the fact that you were the first to hold the last human's hand.

1600802005.korean: 마지막 인간은 생각보다 납작 가슴을 좋아하나 봐?
1600802005.english: Does the last human like flat chests more than expected?

1600802006.korean: 쓸데없는 소리나 하려고 온 거면 빨리 나가.
1600802006.english: If you came here just to talk nonsense, get out immediately.

1600802007.korean:
거 참. 이제 남은 건 작은 언니뿐인데.
언니를 생각하는 이 동생의 마음을 몰라주니 섭섭한걸…?
1600802007.english:
Good grief. Now the only one left is my older sister.
 It hurts that you don't understand how your younger sibling cares for you...

1600802008.english: Here, I brought some red ginseng candy. Do you want some?

1600802009.korean:
내가 먹을 것 같아?
되지도 않는 소리 하지 말고. 무슨 얘기가 하고 싶어서 왔어?
1600802009.english:
Do you think I'll eat it?
 Stop talking nonsense. What do you want to talk about?

1600802010.english: … Okay. I understand. I'll get straight to the point.

1600802011.english: I want to join the Orca Resistance.

1600802012.korean: 언니는 합류하지 않겠다고 했다면서… 대체 이곳에 무슨 이유가 있어 남으려고 하는 거야?
1600802012.english: You said you wouldn't join... What on earth is your reason for wanting to stay here?

1600802013.korean: …관리자님이 계신 곳이잖아. 그리고 실종된 큰 언니도 찾아야 하고.
1600802013.english: … It’s where the manager is. And we also have to find my missing older sister.

1600802015.english: … For the sake of both of you… I’m going to stay here…

1600802016.korean: 그래, 그럴 줄 알았어. 언니 똥고집이 대체 어딜 가겠어.
1600802016.english: Yeah, I knew it. Where on earth would your stubbornness go?

1600802017.korean: 이번 기회에 들어나 보자, 언니. 대체 왜 그렇게 현실을 부정하고 있었던 거야?
1600802017.english: Let's take this opportunity to hear it, sis. Why on earth were you denying reality like that?

1600802019.korean:
큰 언니는 끝까지 언니가 헛소리했던 걸 받아줬고… 
오귀기아 애들도 언니 뜻에 군말 없이 따라줬지.
1600802019.english:
My eldest sister put up with my nonsense until the very end...
 The kids in Ogwigia followed my sister's wishes without a word of complaint.

1600802020.korean: 소피아, 그 여자가 죽은 날에 무슨 일이 있었던 거야, 정확히?
1600802020.english: Sophia, exactly what happened on the day she died?

1600802022.korean: 칼립소는 그간 있었던 일을 라미아에게 털어놓았다.
1600802022.english: Calypso confided in Lamia about everything that had happened.

1600802024.korean: 삼안 수뇌부가 시켰으면… 그건 언니 탓이 아니잖아. 그만 내려놓으라고.
1600802024.english: If the Saman leadership ordered it… that’s not your fault, unnie. I told you to let it go.

1600802025.korean: 라미아… 넌, 관리자님에 대해 어떻게 생각했니?
1600802025.english: Lamia… what did you think of the Manager?

1600802026.korean: 우릴 만든 장본인이긴 했지만, 난 그다지 특별한 감정이 없었어.
1600802026.english: Even though he was the one who created us, I didn't have any particular feelings for him.

1600802027.korean:
분명 언니한테는 중요한 인간이었겠지.
설령 사실이 아니더래도 그렇게 생각하는 편이 내 속이 덜 뒤집어지니까 말이지.
1600802027.english:
He must have been an important person to my sister.
 Even if it’s not true, thinking that way makes me feel less upset.

1600802028.korean: 내가 중요하게 생각하는 건, 지금 살아남은 우리 자매들 뿐이야.
1600802028.english: The only thing I care about is my sisters who are still alive.

1600802029.korean: 그 근육질 뇌에 생각하는 세포라곤 전혀 없을 줄 알았는데.
1600802029.english: I thought there wouldn't be any thinking cells in that muscular brain.

1600802030.korean: 그렇게 말하면 섭섭한데…? 난 언니가 실험 중에도 큰 언니랑 함께 응원했다고.
1600802030.english: That's a bit hurtful to say...? I told you that I cheered for you along with your eldest sister even during the experiment.

1600802031.korean: 이런 말 낯간지럽게 들릴진 몰라도, 우리 자매들에 대한 내 마음은 큰 언니와 똑같아.
1600802031.english: It might sound cheesy, but my feelings for my sisters are exactly the same as my eldest sister's.

1600802033.english: … Huh? What is it, cow? Do you have something to say?

1600802034.korean: 괜히 둘 이야기에 끼어든 것 같이 돼 버렸네. 몸은 좀 괜찮아?
1600802034.english: It ended up looking like I butted into your conversation for no reason. Are you feeling a bit better?

1600802035.korean:
…걱정해 주실 필요 없어요. 제 신체 유전자는 해파리를 기반으로 해...
보통 바이오로이드보단 회복 속도가 빠른 편입니다.
1600802035.english:
… You don't need to worry. My body's genes are based on jellyfish...
 Its recovery speed is generally faster than that of a standard bioroid.

1600802036.korean: 신기하네… 확실히 바다 생물이니까… 뭔가 다르긴 하구나…
1600802036.english: That's fascinating... Since it's a sea creature... it definitely is different in some way...

1600802037.korean: 실례인 줄 알지만 이야기를 들은 후로 꼭 묻고 싶었던 질문입니다.
1600802037.english: I know it is rude, but this is a question I really wanted to ask after hearing the story.

1600802039.english: It was a question I really wanted to ask someday, but...

1600802040.korean:
하토르 님께선, 마지막 인간님을 통해 상처를 극복하셨습니까?
몇십 년 동안, 증오하고 원망했던… 그리고 그리워했던… 인간들에 대한 애증 말입니다.
1600802040.english:
Lady Hathor, did you overcome your wounds through the last human?
 I mean the love-hate relationship with the humans I have hated, resented, and longed for for decades.

1600802042.korean: …전, 아직도 잠을 자면, 관리자님의 모습이 떠오릅니다. 쉽게 떨쳐낼 수 없었습니다.
1600802042.english: … Even now, when I sleep, the image of the Manager comes to mind. I couldn't easily shake it off.

1600802043.korean: 일을 하면서 잠시나마 잊어버릴 수 있지만, 잠이 들면 꿈속에 나타나 저를 괴롭혔죠.
1600802043.english: I could forget about it for a while while working, but when I fell asleep, it appeared in my dreams and tormented me.

1600802044.korean: …하토르 님은, 마지막 인간님을 만나 그 상처를 극복… 하셨습니까?
1600802044.english: … Lady Hathor, did you meet the last human and overcome that wound…?

1600802045.korean:
아직 완전히 극복한 건 아니야… 조금은 후유증도 있고.
하하… 어떻게 그걸 짠~ 하고 쉽게 잊어버리겠어?
1600802045.english:
I haven't completely gotten over it yet... I still have some aftereffects.
 Haha... How could I just forget that so easily?

1600802046.english: We are also bioroids similar to humans.

1600802048.korean:
나도 그랬었어. 하지만… 사령관은, 이런 우리를 이해 해주고, 상처가 아물게끔 보살펴줘.
늘 우리를 먼저 생각하고… 우리를 위해준다고.
1600802048.english:
I was like that too. But… the Commander understands us and takes care of us so that our wounds heal.
 Always thinking of us first... and looking out for us.

1600802050.korean: 그런 사령관 앞에서, 이 언니가 우울모드만 반복할 수 없잖아.
1600802050.english: I can't just keep going into a gloomy mood in front of a commander like that.

1600802051.korean: …이거야 원. 오글거려 죽겠네. 오르카는 다 그런 애들만 모였나?
1600802051.english: … Good grief. It’s so cringey I could die. Is Orca full of people like that?

1600802052.korean:
아까 전에 네가 만난 바르그란 애도, 초반엔 날을 세웠다고 들었는데…
지금은 사령관만 보면 꼬리 흔들고 난리가 아니라니까?
1600802052.english:
I heard that Vargran, the kid you met earlier, was also on edge at first...
 I'm telling you, right now they're wagging their tails and going absolutely crazy just by seeing the commander.

1600802053.korean: 하긴, 저기 누워있는 내 짝퉁도 예전에 비하면 독기가 빠져있더라.
1600802053.english: Come to think of it, even my fake lying over there has lost some of its venom compared to before.

1600802054.korean:
오글거리는 것 같아도, 우리들은 이렇게 서로를 감싸주면서 여기까지 온 거야.
…칼립소도 괜찮은 것 같아서 다행이네. 둘 얘기 방해해서 미안!
1600802054.english:
Even though it might sound cheesy, we’ve come this far by supporting each other like this.
 … I'm glad Calypso seems okay too. Sorry for interrupting your conversation!

1600802055.korean: …흥. 진작 언니가 제정신이었다면 저 철충 놈들은 큰 언니와 내가 부쉈을 거라고.
1600802055.english: … Hmph. If my sister had been in her right mind, my eldest sister and I would have destroyed those Iron Bugs long ago.

1600802059.english: Oh my, you speak so early.

1600802060.korean:
- 문을 열고 잠시 천아의 상태를 확인한 나는, 안정된 상태로 쉬고 있음을 확인한 후
칼립소와 라미아가 머물고 있는 방을 들렀다.
1600802060.english:
After opening the door and briefly checking on Cheona's condition, and confirming that she was resting in a stable state,
 I stopped by the room where Calypso and Lamia were staying.

1600802063.korean: 섬멸… 말씀입니까? 저 때문에 그러실 필요는…
1600802063.english: Annihilation… you mean? You don’t need to do that because of me…

1600802064.korean:
- 대만의 철충은 정찰 결과 그 수가 많지는 않았다고 한다면...
유라시아 구역의 교두보가 적은 우리에겐 이곳의 전투 케이스는 앞으로를 위한 좋은 경험이 될 것이다.
1600802064.english:
- If reconnaissance results indicate that the number of Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) in Taiwan was not large...
 For us, with few bridgeheads in the Eurasian region, the combat case here will be a valuable experience for the future.

1600802065.korean:
- 거대 철충이라는 존재는 필시 연결체라고 짐작 되지만...
그간 알터리움 광산을 점거하며 쌓아두었던 데이터로 맞서는 데 어려움은 없을 것이다.
1600802065.english:
- I suspect that the Giant Iron蟲 is surely a connector, but...
 There will be no difficulty in fighting back using the data accumulated while occupying the Alterium Mine.

1600802066.korean:
- 나는 라미아와 칼립소를 부른 후, 
정찰한 타이베이의 사진 중, 거대철충으로 의심되는 위성 사진을 꺼내 보였다.
1600802066.english:
After I called Lamia and Calypso,
 Among the reconnaissance photos of Taipei, he showed a satellite photo suspected to be of a giant iron bug.

1600802067.korean: …내가 말한 건 이녀석들이 맞지만, 큰 언니가 싸웠던 거대 철충은 이 것과 달랐어.
1600802067.english: … These guys are correct, but the giant Iron Bug my eldest sister fought was different from this.

1600802068.korean: 정확히 말씀드리면… 동종을 포식을 하는 놈이었어요.
1600802068.english: To be precise… it was a predator of its own kind.

1600802069.english: … He was a guy who was on a completely different level from these guys.

1600802070.korean:
- 포식하는 연결체. 짐작이 가는 연결체가 있지만… 
확실하지 않은 이상 섣부른 판단을 내리긴 이르다.
1600802070.english:
- Predatory Nexus. I have a guess as to which one it is, but…
 It is too early to make a hasty judgment unless it is certain.

1600802072.korean: - 조사를 마치고 수복실을 나오던 중, 라미아가 갑작스레 나를 불렀다.
1600802072.english: As I was leaving the recovery room after finishing the investigation, Lamia suddenly called out to me.

1600802073.korean: …작은 언니 좀 잘 설득시키지 그랬어. 말은 엄청 잘하더만.
1600802073.english: … You should have tried harder to persuade your older sister. She was so good at talking.

1600802074.korean:
…생각 같아선 저 빡통 언니도 같이 데려가고 싶지만.
가기 싫은 떼쟁이를 억지로 승선시킬 순 없으니... 굳이 합류는 안 시켜도 돼.
1600802074.english:
… I’d love to take that idiot sister with me, too, but.
 I can't force a spoiled brat who doesn't want to go onto the ship... so you don't necessarily have to make them join.

1600802075.korean: - 라미아는 내게 가까이 다가온 후, 처음으로 고개를 숙였다.
1600802075.english: After Lamia approached me, she bowed her head for the first time.

1600802076.korean: 우리 언니를 제정신으로 돌아오게 해준 거에 대해선… 고맙다.
1600802076.english: I'm grateful for bringing my sister back to her senses.

1600802077.korean: - 아직 명쾌하게 해결된 건 아니지만… 포근한 라미아의 진심이 느껴졌다.
1600802077.english: It hasn't been clearly resolved yet... but I could feel Lamia's warm sincerity.

1600802081.korean: 칼립소가 여기 남는다고 해서… 이곳 철충을 섬멸할까 해.
1600802081.english: Just because Calypso is staying here... I'm thinking of annihilating the Iron蟲s in this place.

1600802082.english: No. That isn't necessarily the case.

1600802084.english: This Iron Bug is a Predator.

1600802085.korean: 혹시, 큰 언니가 당했다는 게 이 거대 철충이야?
1600802085.english: By any chance, is this giant Iron Bug what your eldest sister was attacked by?

1600802087.korean: 포식이면… 기억날 듯 말 듯 한데.
1600802087.english: If it's predation... I kind of remember it, but not quite.

1600802090.korean: 조금 더 시간을 주는 게 좋겠어.
1600802090.english: I think it would be better to give it a little more time.

1600803001.korean:
- 지휘관 전체 회의를 하기 전, 나는 여태껏 대만을 어지럽힌 
타이베이의 철충들에 대한 정찰 보고서를 검토했다.
1600803001.english:
- Before the full commanders' meeting, I... the one that has been causing chaos in Taiwan so far
 I reviewed the reconnaissance report on the Iron蟲 in Taipei.

1600803002.korean:
남은 철충들은 사령관님이 오신 뒤로 타이베이에 틀어박혔어요.
저희와의 교전을 최대한 피하는 중이죠.
1600803002.english:
The remaining Iron蟲s have holed up in Taipei since the Commander arrived.
 They are trying to avoid engaging us as much as possible.

1600803003.korean: 아뇨, 그 외의 연결체 흔적은 없었어요.
1600803003.english: No, there were no other traces of connections.

1600803004.korean:
- 흐레스벨그의 분석 결과 또한 용의 정찰 결과와 별반 다르지 않았다.
프레데터야 어차피 한 번 겨뤄 봤던 철충이니 큰 걸림돌은 아니었다.
1600803004.english:
- Hresvelgr's analysis results were also not much different from the dragon's reconnaissance results.
 The Predator wasn't a major obstacle since it was an Iron Bug that had already been fought once.

1600803005.korean:
- 존재를 감추려하는 이유를 아무리 생각해봐도, 
철충들의 내부 상황을 모르는 우리로썬 쉽사리 답을 낼 수 없었다.
1600803005.english:
No matter how much I think about the reason for trying to hide the existence,
 As we did not know the internal situation of the Iron蟲, we could not easily come up with an answer.

1600803006.korean:
사령관님의 말씀에 저도 신경이 쓰여, 지속적으로 타이베이를 관찰한 결과...
감시하던 탈론페더의 레이더 측에서 특이한 현상 하나를 발견하긴 했습니다.
1600803006.english:
I was also concerned by the Commander's remarks, so as a result of continuously observing Taipei...
 The Talonfeather radar monitoring the area did discover a peculiar phenomenon.

1600803007.korean: - 보고서의 다음 장을 넘긴 나는 타이베이 공장 단지 중심부에 찍힌 붉은 점을 보았다.
1600803007.english: Turning to the next page of the report, I saw a red dot marked in the center of the Taipei factory complex.

1600803008.korean:
대부분의 철충들은 레이더에 정확히 감식되지만… 
제대로 식별이 어려운 붉은 점으로 표식되는 적이 확인되더군요.
1600803008.english:
Most Iron Bugs are accurately identified by radar, but…
 I noticed enemies marked by red dots that were difficult to identify properly.

1600803009.korean: 철충들이 공장 밑에 자신들만 아는 지하 시설을 만들어 놓은 듯합니다.
1600803009.english: It seems the Iron蟲 have built an underground facility under the factory that only they know about.

1600803010.korean: 이 부분은 죄송하지만… 직접 침투하지 않는 이상, 불가능할 것 같습니다.
1600803010.english: I apologize for this, but... unless we infiltrate directly, it seems impossible.

1600803011.korean:
저희 쪽 광학미채도 어렴풋이 탐지하는 것 같습니다.
철충들의 경계 태세가 올라간 걸 보면… 필사적으로 무언가를 지키려는 것으로 보입니다.
1600803011.english:
It seems they are also vaguely detecting our optical camouflage.
 Judging by the heightened alert level of the Iron蟲… it appears they are desperately trying to protect something.

1600803012.korean: 아마도... 수색하기 위해선 공장 자체를 폭격해, 모조리 무력화 시키는 게 최선이라 생각됩니다.
1600803012.english: Perhaps... I think the best way to search is to bomb the factory itself and neutralize everything.

1600803013.korean:
- 포식을 하는 연결체라면, 어느 정도 유추는 가능하다.
게다가 연결체가 지하에 있다면 예상외의 머릿수가 숨어 있을 가능성도 높다.
1600803013.english:
- If it is a preying connector, it is possible to make an inference to some extent.
 Furthermore, if the connection is underground, there is a high possibility that an unexpected number of people are hiding there.

1600803014.korean:
가능성이 없는 건 아니죠. 그간 철충의 알터리움 광맥을 점거하면서 
상대했던 포식 연결체라면… 둠이터와 프레데터 둘 외에는 없었으니까요.
1600803014.english:
It’s not impossible. While occupying the Iron蟲’s Alterium veins...
 As for the predatory nexus I faced... there were no others other than the Doom Eater and the Predator.

1600803015.korean:
- 하지만 어디까지나 추론이다. 전혀 다른, 새로운 철충일 수도 있었다.
수집된 정보들을 보자니 조금은 답답한 마음이지만, 지휘관들을 소집해 작전을 세워보기로 결정했다.
1600803015.english:
However, this is merely speculation. It could have been a completely different, new type of Iron蟲.
 Looking at the collected information, I feel a bit frustrated, but I decided to convene the commanders and formulate a plan.

1600803016.korean: - 이윽고 회의실에 모든 지휘관이 모이자, 나는 흐레스벨그와 탈론페더의 자료를 화면에 띄웠다.
1600803016.english: Eventually, as all the commanders gathered in the conference room, I displayed the data on Hresvelgr and Talonfeather on the screen.

1600803017.korean: - 변수는 철충의 지하시설에 숨은 포식형 연결체다.
1600803017.english: - The variable is a predatory connector hidden in the Iron蟲's underground facility.

1600803018.korean:
부득이하게 주군을 대신하여 한국과 일본의 기지를 시찰하러 간 발할라와 
탈론페더를 제외한 호드를 뺀다면 모든 병력을 동원할 수 있소.
1600803018.english:
Valhalla, who went to inspect bases in Korea and Japan on behalf of his master out of necessity, and
 If we exclude the Horde with the exception of Talonfeather, we can mobilize all our forces.

1600803019.korean: …저렇게 틀어박히기만 한다면, 우리 쪽에서 억지로 끌어내는 수밖엔 없겠소.
1600803019.english: … If they just stay holed up like that, we’ll have no choice but to drag them out by force.

1600803020.korean: - 이렇게 된 이상, 모든 병력을 투입하여 불확실성을 최소화하는 편이 좋을 것이다.
1600803020.english: Given the circumstances, it would be best to commit all troops to minimize uncertainty.

1600803021.korean: 좋아, 오메가랑 싸우기 전, 몸풀기용으로 좋겠네.
1600803021.english: Okay, this would be good for a warm-up before fighting an Omega.

1600803023.english: It's a shame, but... I understand.

1600803027.korean: [c][00FF00][연설을 한 뒤에 투입해도 되는지 묻고 싶다.][-][/c]
1600803027.english: [c][00FF00][I would like to ask if I can be inserted after the speech.][-][/c]

1600803028.korean: - ...고개를 끄덕거리자 알바트로스의 안광에서 푸른 빛이 번쩍였다.
1600803028.english: ...As I nodded, a blue light flashed in the Albatross's eyes.

1600803029.english: Your Excellency, what should we do?

1600803031.english: Is there nothing you can leave to us?

1600803033.korean:
- 그렇게 전 대원한테 명령을 내린 후, 나는 작전실에 앉아 
타이베이로 이동하는 오르카 병력을 지켜보았다.
1600803033.english:
After giving the order to all the team members like that, I sat in the operations room
 I watched the Orca troops moving toward Taipei.

1600803034.english: Mr. Human. I'm also... in battle...

1600803035.english: This little wound… is it… okay… ah?

1600803036.korean:
- 나는 칼립소에게 손가락으로 전광판을 보여주었다.
철충들이 타이베이 중심부에 완벽히 포위당한 모습을 가리켰다.
1600803036.english:
I showed the electronic display to Calypso with my finger.
 It pointed to the sight of the Iron蟲s being completely surrounded in the center of Taipei.

1600803037.english: As expected, you… don’t trust me…

1600803038.english: In that case, even if it is just to apologize to you, Human...

1600803039.korean:
- 엔젤에게 칼립소의 감정을 살펴봐달라 해본 결과, 
칼립소의 감정은 분노보단 죄책감과 의무감만이 보인다는 대답을 들었다.
1600803039.english:
As a result of asking Angel to look into Calypso's feelings,
 I was told that Calypso's emotions showed only guilt and a sense of duty, rather than anger.

1600803040.korean: - 의무감이라는 감정이 왜 칼립소의 마음에 있는지는 나도, 엔젤도 이해하긴 어려웠지만…
1600803040.english: It was difficult for both Angel and me to understand why the feeling of duty existed in Calypso's heart, but...

1600803041.korean: - …다시금 분별없던 내 행동에 미안함이 몰려왔고, 지금만큼은 칼립소의 마음을 어루만져주는 것이 필요하다 생각됐다.
1600803041.english: ...A wave of apology washed over me once again for my thoughtless actions, and I felt that, at least for now, I needed to soothe Calypso's heart.

1600803043.korean: - 엘리자베스를 쓱쓱 쓰다듬자, 촉수가 하늘거리며 흔들거린다.
1600803043.english: As I stroke Elizabeth, her tentacles flutter and sway.

1600803045.korean: 저는 늘 솔직하고, 진심입니다… 절 전투에 출격시켜 주세요.
1600803045.english: I am always honest and sincere… Please send me into battle.

1600803046.korean: - 칼립소의 마음을 모르는 것은 아니다. 하지만 그녀의 상처 입은 정신을 보듬어 주지 않고는 전장에 내보낼 순 없다.
1600803046.english: It is not that I do not understand Calypso's feelings. However, I cannot send her to the battlefield without comforting her wounded spirit.

1600803047.korean: - 나는 의자에서 일어나 칼립소의 손을 꼭 맞잡은 후, 눈높이를 맞추었다.
1600803047.english: I stood up from the chair, held Calypso's hand tightly, and met her eye level.

1600803048.korean: 절 위해서 그러실 필요는 없습니다… 어째서...
1600803048.english: You don't need to do that for me... Why...

1600803049.korean: - 섣부르게 명령권을 사용한 내 잘못을 직시한다.
1600803049.english: I face my mistake in rashly using my authority.

1600803051.korean:
- 나는 칼립소를 다독이듯 꼭 끌어안아 주었다.
어설프게 팔을 휘적거리던 칼립소는 내 어깨에 얼굴을 묻곤 흐느꼈다.
1600803051.english:
I hugged Calypso tightly, as if to comfort her.
 Calypso, who had been awkwardly flailing her arms, buried her face in my shoulder and sobbed.

1600803052.korean: 흐읍… 흐윽… 인간님… 고작 절 위해 이렇게까지...
1600803052.english: *Sob*... *Sob*... My Human... You went to such lengths just for me...

1600803053.korean: - 혼자서 악착같이 버텨왔을 그녀에게 잠시나마 안식처가 될 수 있다면 좋겠다.
1600803053.english: I hope this can be a sanctuary, even if only for a short while, for her, who has tenaciously endured all alone.

1600803054.korean: 흐레스벨그, 프레데터 말고 다른 연결체는 없었어?
1600803054.english: Hresvelgr, weren't there any other connectors besides the Predator?

1600803055.korean: 정체를 알아낼 수 있는 방법은 없을까…
1600803055.english: Is there no way to find out its true identity...

1600803056.korean: 사전 지식이 없는 상대와 아무런 준비 없이 싸울 순 없어.
1600803056.english: You can't fight an opponent you have no prior knowledge of without any preparation.

1600803057.korean: 이곳에서만 발견되는 유독 특이한 사항은 없어?
1600803057.english: Are there any particularly unique features found only here?

1600803058.english: Is it impossible to scan the inside?

1600803059.english: What was the result of Shade's infiltration?

1600803060.korean: …저기에 라미아가 말한 연결체가 있을 지도 모르겠네.
1600803060.english: … The connector Lamia mentioned might be over there.

1600803061.english: Thank you, Hresvelgr. You were a great help.

1600803062.korean: 혹시, 그 포식 연결체… 둠이터… 아닐까?
1600803062.english: Could it be... that predatory connector... the Doom Eater...?

1600803063.korean: 용, 동원 가능한 병력이 어느 정도야?
1600803063.english: Yong, how many troops can be mobilized?

1600803065.korean: 메이는 용이랑 같이 북부 타이베이 공장에 모든 화력을 투사해 줘.
1600803065.english: Mei, project all your firepower onto the factory in northern Taipei together with Yong.

1600803066.korean: 그건 안 돼. 시가전이 될 지도 모르니까.
1600803066.english: That won't do. It might turn into urban warfare.

1600803068.english: Occupy the underground passage of the Iron蟲 factory.

1600803071.korean: 마리는 군을 나눠 동부랑 서부 전선을 맡아줘.
1600803071.english: Marie, please divide the army and take charge of the eastern and western fronts.

1600803075.english: It's okay to go out after you've fully recovered.

1600803078.korean: 그럼 먼저 내 사죄는 이걸로 할게.
1600803078.english: Then, I’ll take this as my apology first.

1600803080.english: I wish Calypso would be a little more honest, too.

1600803082.english: We'll take revenge on your sister.

1600803083.english: This is a gift of reconciliation.

1600803087.english: I will lighten the burden on Calypso's heart.

1600804001.english: … What can I do for you?

1600804002.korean: 사령관한테 참전하겠다고 말했는데 안 보내줬다고 꽁해있을까 봐…
1600804002.english: I was worried he might be sulking because he told the commander he would join the war but wasn't sent...

1600804004.english: My older sister came to comfort me for a moment.

1600804006.english: … I am simply following the order to rest.

1600804007.english: Haha, yeah, yeah... I get it.

1600804009.korean: 응, 이번엔 직접 내가 칼립소를 도울 차례니까.
1600804009.english: Yeah, this time it's my turn to help Calypso myself.

1600804010.korean: 순수하신 건지… 아님, 긍정적이신 건지… 전투에 나가는 분 얼굴로 보이진 않습니다.
1600804010.english: I wonder if you are innocent... or if you are just positive... You don't look like someone going into battle.

1600804011.korean: 응? 뭔가 좀 비장하고 그래야 하나? 언니는 그런 진지한 거 잘 못하는데~
1600804011.english: Huh? Should I try to be a bit dramatic or something? You're not very good at being that serious, sis~

1600804012.korean:
…큰 언니와 라미아는 늘 아무 말 없이 나갔다 돌아오곤 했으니까요.
특히나, 큰 언니는 전장을 늘 혐오스럽게 생각해 왔었습니다.
1600804012.english:
…because my eldest sister and Lamia would always go out and come back without saying a word.
 In particular, my eldest sister had always found the battlefield repulsive.

1600804013.korean: 하하… 사실 전장이란 게, 즐거움이 넘쳐 흐를 수 있는 곳은 아니지. 어떻게 잘못 될지도 모르고...
1600804013.english: Haha... To be honest, the battlefield isn't exactly a place where fun can overflow. You never know how things might go wrong...

1600804014.korean: 하지만, 이 언니는 사령관을… 그리고 우리 엘븐즈를 지키기 위해서라고 생각한다면…
1600804014.english: However, if you consider that this older sister is doing this to protect the Commander… and us Elvens…

1600804016.english: … You are quite sentimental. It doesn't suit war, though.

1600804017.korean: …아니, 전장에 제대로 나서 본 경험이 적은 제가 할 말은 아니네요. 실언이었습니다.
1600804017.english: … No, that’s not really something I should be saying, having had little experience properly stepping onto the battlefield. It was a slip of the tongue.

1600804020.korean: 꼭 네가 활약하지 않더라도, 누구한테 인정받지 않더라도…
1600804020.english: Even if you don't necessarily shine, even if you aren't recognized by anyone...

1600804021.english: There is someone who will love you.

1600804023.korean:
내가 네 과거에 대해 이게 맞다 저게 맞다 하는 건 주제 넘지만…
적어도 칼립소 넌 오귀기아를 잘 관리 해왔고…
1600804023.english:
It might be presumptuous of me to say what is right or wrong about your past, but...
 At least Calypso, you have managed Oughigia well...

1600804024.korean: 언니도, 이젠 연구원들이 왜 그렇게 날 살리고 싶어 했는 지 이해할 수 있게 됐어.
1600804024.english: Sister, now you can understand why the researchers wanted to save me so much.

1600804025.korean: 좋잖아? 사령관을 만나고, 행복하니까. 계속해서 살아가는 거야.
1600804025.english: It's good, isn't it? Because I met the Commander and I'm happy. So I'll keep living.

1600804027.korean: 어쩐지… 오르카 분들은 삶의 의미를 많이 생각하시는군요.
1600804027.english: I guess... the Orca members think a lot about the meaning of life.

1600804028.korean: 후후, 그런가? 자, 칼립소는 몸이 회복될 때까지 푹 누워있어.
1600804028.english: Hehe, is that so? Now, Calypso, just lie down until you recover.

1600804029.english: This big sister will protect Oguigia!

1600804033.korean: 응? 언니 도움이 필요한 일이라도 있니?
1600804033.english: Huh? Is there something you need help with, older sister?

1600804034.korean:
…어느 주인이 있었지요. 그 주인은 딸을 잃어, 딸과 비슷한 인형을 만들고, 
그 인형을 딸처럼 대했습니다.
1600804034.english:
… There was a certain owner. That owner lost his daughter, so he made a doll that resembled her, and
 I treated that doll like a daughter.

1600804035.korean: 그렇다면 그 인형은 딸의 인생을 사는 건지, 인형의 인생을 사는 건지에 대한 당신의 의견이 궁금합니다.
1600804035.english: In that case, I am curious to hear your opinion on whether the doll is living the daughter's life or the doll's life.

1600804036.english: … Huh? What? That's a weird question?

1600804037.korean: 궁금해서 그렇습니다. 앞으로도 당신이 제 언니라고 뻐길 예정이라면 대답 정도는 해주시겠죠.
1600804037.english: I'm just curious. If you plan to keep bragging that you're my older sister, surely you'll give me an answer.

1600804039.english: … If it was difficult, you do not have to answer.

1600804040.korean:
하지만 제작 의도와는 별개로... 주인의 딸로서나 인형 개인으로서나
남이 생각하는 인생이 아닌 본인이 하고자 하는 바에 더욱 집중하면 되는 게 아닐까?
1600804040.english:
However, regardless of the production intent... whether as the owner's daughter or as an individual doll
 Wouldn't it be better to focus more on what you want to do, rather than the life others envision?

1600804042.korean: 칼립소~ 이거 설마 네 얘기는 아니지?
1600804042.english: Calypso~ You're not talking about you, are you?

1600804043.korean: 아, 아닙니다! 그럴 리가요! 아무것도 아닙니다!
1600804043.english: Ah, no! That can't be! It's nothing!

1600804044.korean: 너무 진지하게 물어보니까 언니도 휩쓸려서 진지하게 답해버렸잖아~
1600804044.english: You asked so seriously that I got swept up in it and ended up giving a serious answer too~

1600804045.korean: 생각해보니 …라미아도 상당히 비슷하게 대답했을 것 같군요.
1600804045.english: Come to think of it… I imagine Lamia would have answered quite similarly.

1600804047.korean: ...어떻게 보면 제가 조금은… 제 자신이 아닌 남의 기준에 너무 목매달았던 것 같군요.
1600804047.english: ...In a way, it seems I was a bit... too fixated on other people's standards rather than my own.

1600805001.english: You look like you're having quite a good time. Boss?

1600805002.korean: 당연한 거 아니겠어? 석기시대로 돌려보내는 건 늘 흥분되지.
1600805002.english: Isn't that obvious? Sending things back to the Stone Age is always exciting.

1600805003.korean: 스카이나이츠 대원들이 공장 지대 방공망을 무력화하는 데 성공했습니다.
1600805003.english: The Sky Knights succeeded in neutralizing the air defense network in the factory zone.

1600805004.korean: 좋아, 철충 놈들한테도 신이 있을 진 모르겠지만… 곁으로 보내버리자고!
1600805004.english: Alright, I don't know if those Iron Bugs have a god or not... but let's send them to their side!

1600805005.korean: 그러고 보니, 이번 지상 작전군에는 오케아니데스 애들도 참여한다고 하지 않았나?
1600805005.english: Come to think of it, didn't they say the Okeanides are participating in this ground operations force too?

1600805006.english: I heard that someone named Lamia is participating.

1600805007.korean:
아~ 그래? 난 그 칼립소란 여자가 참전하는 줄 알았는데. 
그나저나 부관은 그 여자, 한 번 만나본 적 있어? 좀 작던데.
1600805007.english:
Oh, really? I thought that woman named Calypso was joining the fight.
 By the way, Deputy, have you ever met that woman? She was a bit small.

1600805008.korean: ...얼핏 봤는데 작진 않더군요. 요철 정도는 있던데.
1600805008.english: ...I took a quick look, and it didn't seem small. There were some bumps, though.

1600805009.korean: 의외네? 동질감이 꽤 있을 줄 알았는데.
1600805009.english: That's unexpected. I thought there would be quite a sense of camaraderie.

1600805010.korean:
대장, 겨우 그 정도로 '없다'라고 말하는 게 웃긴 소리입니다.
…그렇게라도 티가 난다면 대체 얼마나 좋을지.
1600805010.english:
Captain, it is ridiculous to say 'there isn't one' for just that reason.
 … I wonder how wonderful it would be if it showed even that much.

1600805011.english: Are you afraid of losing Orca's strongest title?

1600805012.korean: …제가 이딴 타이틀의 최강을 들고 있어봤자 좋을 게 있습니까?
1600805012.english: … Is there any benefit to me holding the title of "Strongest" like this?

1600805013.korean:
[c][00FF00][지휘하고 계시는 단장님을 대신해 보고드립니다, 사령관님.
현재 공업 지대 방공망을 무력화시키는 데 성공했습니다.][-][/c]
1600805013.english:
[c][00FF00][I am reporting on behalf of the commander in command, Commander.
 We have succeeded in neutralizing the air defense network in the industrial zone.

1600805014.korean: [c][00FF00][네, 철충 측에서도 이 정도의 공세를 생각하진 못 했는지, 전열이 흐트러졌습니다.][-][/c]
1600805014.english: [c][00FF00][Yes, perhaps even the Iron蟲 did not anticipate an offensive of this magnitude, as their battle lines have been disrupted.][-][/c]

1600805015.english: [c][00FF00][I will now contact the Doombringers and bombard them.][-][/c]

1600805017.korean: - 흐레스벨그의 보고를 들은 난, 남부 전선을 맡은 지휘관에게 통신했다.
1600805017.english: Upon hearing Hresvelgr's report, I communicated with the commander in charge of the southern front.

1600805018.english: [c][00FF00][Ahhhh. All my strength is draining away… ][-][/c]

1600805019.korean:
[c][00FF00][…사령관님. 저는 이 임무에는 전~ 혀 어울리지 않습니다.
마리 대장이나 용 대장에게 지휘권을 주시길 강력히 요구 드립니다.][-][/c]
1600805019.english:
[c][00FF00][… Commander. I am not suited for this mission at all.
 I strongly request that command be granted to Captain Mari or Captain Yong.

1600805021.english: [c][00FF00][Is that really true? Aren't you going to go back on your word?][-][/c]

1600805023.korean: [c][00FF00][대장, 작전이 얼마 안 남았는데, 제발 긴장이라도 하시지 말입니다…?][-][/c]
1600805023.english: [c][00FF00][Captain, the operation is almost over, please at least try to stay alert… ?][-][/c]

1600805024.korean: [c][00FF00][지금 내가 긴장하는 건 저 철충 놈들보다 네 잔소리라고 팬서야.][-][/c]
1600805024.english: [c][00FF00][What I'm nervous about right now isn't those Iron Bugs, it's your nagging, Panther.][-][/c]

1600805025.english: [c][00FF00][Wouldn't Panther take command on his own? Haha.][-][/c]

1600805026.korean: [c][00FF00][대장, 업무는 제가 다 맡아서 했으니까, 현장 지휘라도 직접 하시지 말입니다!][-][/c]
1600805026.english: [c][00FF00][Captain, I took care of all the duties, so at least take direct command on the ground yourself!][-][/c]

1600805027.korean:
[c][00FF00][아아, 난 원래 바지사장 아니었냐… 팬서야…
그나저나 오늘 점심은 전투식량이냐? 이왕이면 난 소완 특식이 좋은데.][-][/c]
1600805027.english:
[c][00FF00][Ah, wasn't I originally just a figurehead... Panther...
 Anyway, is it MREs for lunch today? If I'm going to have one, I'd prefer Sowan's special.

1600805028.korean: [c][00FF00][대장, 첫 현장 지휘인데 제발 진지하게 임해주시면 안 되겠습니까?!][-][/c]
1600805028.english: [c][00FF00][Captain, this is your first field command, can't you please take it seriously?!][-][/c]

1600805029.korean: [c][00FF00][먹고 사는 게 제일 중요하지… 점심은 중대 사항이야 팬서야.][-][/c]
1600805029.english: [c][00FF00][Making a living is the most important thing… Lunch is a critical matter, Panther.][-][/c]

1600805030.korean: [c][00FF00][하여튼... 지상 작전군 모두한테 연락해 봤는데... 준비는 끝났습니다.][-][/c]
1600805030.english: [c][00FF00][Anyway... I contacted the entire Ground Operations Force... Preparations are complete.][-][/c]

1600805031.korean: - …그래, 나스호른이 말은 저렇게 해도 잘 해내겠지.
1600805031.english: - …Yeah, even though Nashorn says that, he'll probably do a good job.

1600805032.korean: - 순간 나스호른의 얼굴이 잠시 일렁이더니, 타이베이 쪽으로 거대한 먼지구름이 피어올랐다.
1600805032.english: In an instant, Nashorn's face flickered briefly, and a massive cloud of dust rose toward Taipei.

1600805033.korean: - 이것을 신호로, 나는 오르카 전체 채널을 향해 명령했다.
1600805033.english: - Using this as a signal, I issued a command to the entire Orca channel.

1600805035.korean: 유감없이 때려 부수는구만… 시가전 돌입할 때 꽤 귀찮아지겠는데.
1600805035.english: They're really smashing everything to pieces... It's going to be quite a hassle when urban warfare starts.

1600805036.korean: 아쉽다... 저기 근처에 엄청 큰 야구장도 있다고 들었는데.
1600805036.english: That's a shame... I heard there's a huge baseball stadium nearby.

1600805037.korean: 그러고 보니, 사령관이 야구 리그도 개막해 보자고 했었지?
1600805037.english: Come to think of it, the commander suggested starting a baseball league, didn't he?

1600805038.korean: 맞아~ 프로야구도 오르카에서 개최하면 어떨까 싶기도 하고.
1600805038.english: Right~ I was also thinking it might be a good idea to host professional baseball at Orca.

1600805039.korean: 멸망 전 최고의 구단, 필라델피아 엘븐즈의 영광을 다시 한번 재현을…!
1600805039.english: Restore the glory of the Philadelphia Elvens, the greatest team before the apocalypse, once again…!

1600805040.korean: 우승컵 딱 한 번 들어봤다는 그 구단 말이야?
1600805040.english: You mean the club that has lifted the championship trophy just once?

1600805041.korean: 무, 무슨 소리야! 포스트 시즌 진출은 꾸준히 했었다고! 매번 아깝게 미끄러져서 그렇지...
1600805041.english: W-what are you talking about! I've been making the postseason consistently! It's just that we always slipped up by a narrow margin...

1600805043.english: What, what do you want me to do?!

1600805044.korean: 아 왜~ 엘븐즈에서 자주 불렀던 응원가 있잖아.
1600805044.english: Ah, why~ You know that cheer song we used to sing often in Elvenz.

1600805045.english: I'm happy to be an Elven...?

1600805047.english: … Let’s stop the small talk and get ready. Iron Bugs are pouring out.

1600805052.english: This is your chance to establish a major, isn't it?

1600805055.english: I'll give you plenty of reward vacation time this time.

1600805061.english: From now on, we will exterminate all Iron蟲 in Taiwan!

1600806001.korean: [c][00FF00][사령관님, 보고드립니다, 현재 연결체의 행방을 추적하는데 어려움을 겪고 있습니다.][-][/c]
1600806001.english: [c][00FF00][Commander, reporting that we are currently having difficulty tracking the whereabouts of the Nexus.][-][/c]

1600806002.korean: [c][00FF00][...알바트로스 중장님이 공장 내부로 직접 들어가셔야 할 것 같습니다.][-][/c]
1600806002.english: [c][00FF00][...It seems Lieutenant General Albatross will have to go inside the factory himself.][-][/c]

1600806003.korean:
[c][00FF00][…이유는 모르겠지만 철충들의 움직임이 훨씬 조직적으로 변했습니다.
현재 가용 가능한 항공 전력은 모두 지상군을 지원하는 중입니다.][-][/c]
1600806003.english:
[c][00FF00][… I don't know why, but the Iron蟲's movements have become much more organized.
 All currently available air power is supporting ground forces.

1600806004.korean: - 이미 팬텀과 레이스, 탈론페더에게 추적 명령을 내려놓았지만… 연결체의 존재는 오리무중이었다.
1600806004.english: Tracking orders had already been issued to Phantom, Wraith, and Talonfeather, but… the existence of the connector remained a mystery.

1600806005.korean:
- 이 넓은 타이베이에서 연결체와 숨바꼭질을 하는 양상이 썩 유쾌하진 않았다.
철저하게 적은 우리의 손실을 최대한으로 강요하기 위해 발악했다.
1600806005.english:
Playing hide-and-seek with the connector in this vast Taipei was not a very pleasant experience.
 They desperately struggled to force the maximum possible loss on us, which was extremely small.

1600806006.korean:
[c][00FF00][보고드리오, 주군. 공격 받은 철충들이 지상군 측으로 돌격하고 있소. 
다음 명령을 하달해 주시오!][-][/c]
1600806006.english:
[c][00FF00][I report, my lord. The attacked Iron蟲 are charging toward the ground forces.
 Please issue the following command!

1600806007.korean: - 포식하는 연결체와 프레데터를 방해하는 것이 우선이었다.
1600806007.english: The priority was to disrupt the predatory connectors and predators.

1600806009.korean: - 나는 용에게 명령을 하달한 후, 통신을 아스널에게로 돌렸다.
1600806009.english: After giving the order to the dragon, I turned the communication to Arsenal.

1600806010.korean: [c][00FF00][그대가 하달한 그대로, 프레데터를 집중적으로 포격하는 중이다.][-][/c]
1600806010.english: [c][00FF00][We are concentrating our bombardment on the Predator exactly as you ordered.][-][/c]

1600806011.korean: [c][00FF00][걱정하지 말게, 그대여. 신은 최강의 포병대를 가진 쪽에 서는 법이니.][-][/c]
1600806011.english: [c][00FF00][Do not worry, my friend. God always sides with the one possessing the strongest artillery.][-][/c]

1600806013.korean: [c][00FF00][더 달아오른 내 몸을 이끌고, 오귀기아의 스위트룸에서 기다리겠다.][-][/c]
1600806013.english: [c][00FF00][Leading my even more heated body, I will wait in Oguigia's suite.][-][/c]

1600806014.korean:
- 아스널과의 무전이 끝난 후, 나는 전선 현황을 지켜보았다.
철충의 물량이 우리를 압도하는 건 아니었지만…
1600806014.english:
After the radio communication with Arsenal ended, I watched the status of the front lines.
 It wasn't that the sheer number of Iron蟲 overwhelmed us, but...

1600806015.korean: - 공장 쪽을 속히 점령하는 것이 중요하다.
1600806015.english: It is important to quickly occupy the factory area.

1600806017.korean:
[c][00FF00][지금 지하 시설로 부대원을 투입하는 중이지만,
녀석들의 저항이 거세다. 전투가 끝나는 대로 보고하지.][-][/c]
1600806017.english:
[c][00FF00][We are currently deploying troops into the underground facility, but
 Their resistance is fierce. I will report as soon as the battle is over.

1600806018.korean:
- 내 옆에는 홍련이 참모 자격으로 서 있었다.
모든 현장 지휘관에게 연락한 후, 나는 홍련과 함께 전황을 지켜보았다.
1600806018.english:
Hong-ryeon was standing next to me as a staff officer.
 After contacting all the field commanders, I watched the battle situation with Hongryeon.

1600806019.korean:
- 전체적인 물량이 우리에 비해 부족했던 철충은
우리 화력에 제대로 대응하지 못한 채 돈좌당하는 중이다.
1600806019.english:
- The Iron蟲, whose overall quantity was insufficient compared to ours
 They are being held back without being able to properly respond to our firepower.

1600806020.korean:
- 철충 측에선 오케아니데스 프로젝트의 산발적인 저항만을 겪다,
대규모 저항군의 공세를 처음 받아보는 만큼, 이에 대한 준비가 부족했을 것이다.
1600806020.english:
- The Iron蟲 side only experienced sporadic resistance from the Okeanides Project,
 As this was the first time they had faced a large-scale offensive by the resistance, they were likely unprepared.

1600806021.korean: - 하지만 오히려 잘 풀리는 만큼, 이유 모를 불안함이 엄습했다.
1600806021.english: However, the more things went well, the more an inexplicable anxiety struck.

1600806023.korean:
…저도 늘 작전에 참여할 때마다 보이지 않는 안개를 걸어가는 느낌입니다.
아이들이 제 실수로 다치지 않을까, 늘 염려스럽기만 해요.
1600806023.english:
… I also always feel like I am walking through an invisible fog whenever I participate in an operation.
 I am always worried that the children might get hurt because of my mistake.

1600806024.korean:
하지만 그렇다고 해서, 아이들을 내보내지 않을 순 없죠.
그럴 때마다 아이들이 부디, 잘 해내길 기원할 뿐이고요.
1600806024.english:
But even so, we can't just not send the children out.
 Whenever that happens, I just hope the children do well.

1600806025.korean: - 홍련은 천천히 다가와, 내 손을 꼭 맞잡았다.
1600806025.english: Hongryeon slowly approached and held my hand tightly.

1600806026.korean:
저는 팀을 지휘하는 지휘관이고, 사령관님은 집단군을 지휘하는 원수시잖아요.
모든 대원 하나하나를… 지휘관처럼 세세하게 케어하실 순 없으시죠.
1600806026.english:
I am a commander leading a team, and you are a marshal leading an army group.
 You can't take care of every single member... in as much detail as a commander does, can you?

1600806028.korean:
- 하지만, 내 안일함이 불러온… 예기치 못한 불상사는 늘 있었다.
칼립소의 고의는 아니었지만, 천아를 잃을 뻔했고 다소 감정적으로 그녀를 질책했다.
1600806028.english:
However, there were always unexpected mishaps brought about by my complacency.
 Although it was not intentional, Calypso nearly lost Cheona and somewhat emotionally reprimanded her.

1600806029.korean: - 전선이 아닌 평시에도 이런 일이 일어났는데, 전투에서 이런 일이 발생한다면…
1600806029.english: If this happened even in peacetime, not just on the front lines, what would happen in combat…

1600806030.korean: 모든 책임을 혼자서 지고, 완벽하게 행동하시는 것도 좋지만…
1600806030.english: It is good that you take all the responsibility alone and act perfectly, but...

1600806031.korean: 이제 저항군은 사령관님 혼자서 통제할 수 있을 만큼 작은 집단이 아닙니다.
1600806031.english: The resistance is no longer a group small enough for you to control alone, Commander.

1600806032.korean:
하지만, 그만큼 저희도 최선을 다해...
사령관님과 함께 성장해 나가는 걸 지켜보시길 부탁드립니다.
1600806032.english:
However, we also did our best...
 I ask that you watch us grow together with the Commander.

1600806033.korean: - 그렇게 대답한 홍련은 내 패널을 조심스레 손가락으로 가리켰다.
1600806033.english: Hongryeon, having answered that way, carefully pointed her finger at my panel.

1600806034.korean: - 아스널, 마리, 알바트로스, 메이, 용... 모두의 모습이 실시간으로 패널 화면에 잡혔다.
1600806034.english: - Arsenal, Marie, Albatross, May, Yong... everyone's faces were captured on the panel screen in real time.

1600806035.korean: - 모두 내 지휘 아래, 내게 승리를 가져다주기 위해 달려나간다.
1600806035.english: - Everyone under my command rushes forward to bring me victory.

1600806036.korean: - 홍련의 다정한 말투에 잠시 마음을 가라앉히던 그때, 보고가 날아들었다.
1600806036.english: Just as I was calming my mind for a moment at Hong-ryeon's gentle tone, a report came in.

1600806037.korean: [c][00FF00][보고드립니다, 사령관님. 철충들이 폐허가 된 타이베이 중심부로 숨었습니다.][-][/c]
1600806037.english: [c][00FF00][Reporting, Commander. The Iron蟲 have hidden in the ruined center of Taipei.][-][/c]

1600806038.korean:
- 나는 폐허가 된 타이베이의 위성 사진 데이터를 받아 확인해 보았다.
중심부는 건물 밀집도가 높은 만큼, 어쩔 수 없이 저항군들이 나누어 섬멸해야 했다.
1600806038.english:
I received and checked the satellite image data of the ruined Taipei.
 As the central area was densely packed with buildings, the resistance forces had no choice but to split up and annihilate them.

1600806040.korean: [c][00FF00][포상 휴가에 1일을 더 얹는 건 어떻겠습니까, 사령관님?][-][/c]
1600806040.english: [c][00FF00][How about adding one more day to the reward leave, Commander?][-][/c]

1600806042.korean:
- 나스호른의 미소를 마지막으로 통신이 끝났다.
초록색으로 표시된 오르카 저항군들이 분산하여 타이베이의 시내로 들어갔다.
1600806042.english:
The communication ended with Nashorn's smile as the finale.
 The Orca resistance fighters, marked in green, dispersed and entered downtown Taipei.

1600806043.korean:
- 그리고 쉴 새 없는 지휘관들의 현장 보고가 날아들었다.
정신없이 지휘를 하며, 어느새 타이베이 이곳저곳에 찍힌 붉은 점들은 점차 사라지기 시작했다.
1600806043.english:
And ceaseless field reports from commanders poured in.
 As I frantically conducted, the red dots scattered across Taipei gradually began to disappear.

1600806044.korean: 다행이군요… 이제 전투가 어느 정도 마무리…
1600806044.english: That's a relief... The battle is somewhat wrapped up now...

1600806046.korean:
- 그때였다. 아머드메이든과 하토르가 싸우고 있는 화면에서, 낮은 기계음이 들렸다.
그리고 남은 붉은 점들이 모조리 남부전선으로 몰리기 시작했다.
1600806046.english:
It was then. A low mechanical sound was heard from the screen where the Armored Maiden and Hathor were fighting.
 And the remaining red dots all began to flock to the Southern Front.

1600806050.english: [C][FF0000]All together and break through the enemy's encirclement![-][/C]

1600806051.korean: - 철충의 소리를 들음과 동시에, 나스호른에게서 통신이 이어졌다.
1600806051.english: - As soon as the sound of the Iron蟲 was heard, a communication came in from Nashorn.

1600806053.korean: [c][00FF00][사령관님이 예상한 둠이터가 나타났는데… 남은 적들 모두 모두 우리 전선 쪽으로 전부 밀려들고 있습니다.][-][/c]
1600806053.english: [c][00FF00][The Doom Eater the Commander predicted has appeared… and all the remaining enemies are surging toward our front line.][-][/c]

1600806054.korean: - 패널 속 둠이터와 철충들은 아머드메이든에게 포격당하면서도 무리하게 돌격하기 시작한다.
1600806054.english: The Doom Eaters and Iron Bugs inside the panel begin to charge recklessly while being bombarded by the Armored Maiden.

1600806055.korean: - 이윽고 둠이터가 노성을 내질렀고, 엄청난 굉음과 함께 통신이 끊겼다.
1600806055.english: Soon, the Doom Eater let out a roar, and communication was cut off with a tremendous explosion.

1600806056.english: The enemy's... final desperate struggle began.

1600806058.korean: 나스호른 소장과는 떨어져 있지만, 최대한 빠르게 합류하라 지시하겠습니다!
1600806058.english: Although you are separated from Director Nashorn, I will order you to join him as soon as possible!

1600806059.korean:
- 예측하지 않은 건 아니지만, 시가전 특성상, 
이곳저곳 분산된 아군을 유동적으로 움직일 순 없었다.
1600806059.english:
It’s not that we didn’t anticipate it, but due to the nature of urban warfare,
 It was not possible to move the allied forces scattered here and there fluidly.

1600806060.korean:
- 그리고 칼립소는, 나와 오르카 저항군의 전투를 유심히 지켜보았다.
그녀의 동공에는 나를 위해 싸우는 지휘관들과 대원들의 영상이 반사되었다.
1600806060.english:
And Calypso watched the battle between me and the Orca resistance closely.
 The image of the commanders and soldiers fighting for me was reflected in her pupils.

1600806064.korean: 호라이즌은 연결체가 포식하지 못하도록 철충을 없애!
1600806064.english: Horizon, eliminate the Iron蟲 so the Nexus can't devour you!

1600806066.english: How is the ground support artillery situation?

1600806070.english: How is the situation at the Iron蟲 factory?

1600806071.english: You'd think I'd be used to it by now...

1600806074.korean: 나, 정말 잘하고 있는 게 맞을까?
1600806074.english: Am I really doing the right thing?

1600806079.english: Are you okay? I'm watching too!

1600806082.english: Where is the Mongoose team right now?

1600807001.korean: 다들 들으십시오. 현재 사령관님께서 내리신 명령은 지상군을 공격하는 기동 철충의 저지입니다.
1600807001.english: Listen, everyone. The order currently issued by the Commander is to intercept the mobile Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) attacking the ground forces.

1600807002.korean: 흐레스벨그! 현재 타이난 위성 지도를 전 대원한테 전송하는데 성공했어!
1600807002.english: Hresvelgr! We have successfully transmitted the current Tainan satellite map to all members!

1600807003.korean: 잘했습니다. 혹시 연결체에 대한 정보는 아직입니까?
1600807003.english: Well done. By any chance, do you not have information about the connector yet?

1600807004.korean: …녀석이 작정하고 숨은 것 같아. 녀석만 죽는다면 철충이 와해되긴 할 텐데.
1600807004.english: … It looks like he deliberately hid. If only he died, the Iron蟲 would collapse.

1600807005.korean: 최대한 오르카 병력을 분산시켜 갉아먹으려는 전략이겠죠.
1600807005.english: It is likely a strategy to disperse the Orca forces as much as possible and wear them down.

1600807006.english: I'll try my best to look for it with the other members...!

1600807007.korean: 알겠습니다. 저는 단장님과 함께 공중 지원을 보조하겠습니다.
1600807007.english: Understood. I will assist with air support alongside the Commander.

1600807009.english: … You seem to be having a good time, Commander.

1600807010.korean: 내 제자들이 어엿한 창공의 기사들이 되었는데 뿌듯하지 않을 리 있겠는가?
1600807010.english: My disciples have become full-fledged Knights of the Sky; how could I not feel proud?

1600807011.korean: 이대로 지휘관에서 은퇴하고, 슬레이프니르한테 대장을 맡겨도 되겠네.
1600807011.english: You could retire as commander right now and hand over the captaincy to Sleipnir.

1600807012.korean:
단장님이 안 계신다면 억제기가 없는 꼴입니다.
평생, 옆에서 지휘해 주시기 바랍니다.
1600807012.english:
If the commander is not here, it is like having no inhibitor.
 I hope you will conduct by my side for the rest of my life.

1600807013.korean: 후훗, 자네가 든든한 부관 역할을 하고 있는데 뭐 그리 걱정이겠나. 하하~
1600807013.english: Hehe, with you serving as a reliable adjutant, what is there to worry about? Haha~

1600807014.english: ...Commander, there is a request for support from the western district.

1600807015.korean: 그래, 도움을 마다하지 않을 이유는 없지. 어서 같이 가세나!
1600807015.english: Right, there's no reason not to help. Let's go together!

1600807017.english: Huh? Why are you looking at me like that?

1600807018.korean: …요즘 사령관님과 만나신 후로 젊어지신 것 같습니다, 단장님?
1600807018.english: … You seem to have gotten younger since meeting with the Commander lately, Commander?

1600807020.korean:
후후, 그런 말은 대놓고 하는 게 아니라네… 후후.
내게도 수줍은 봄이 찾아오는 기분을 망치지 말게.
1600807020.english:
Hehe, you shouldn't say things like that so openly... Hehe.
 Don't ruin the feeling that a shy spring is coming to me, too.

1600807021.korean: 흐흠, 으흠… 자, 어서 가세나, 흐레스벨그!
1600807021.english: Ahem, ahem... Now, let's go, Hresvelgr!

1600807023.english: Things are roughly settling down. But…

1600807024.korean: 사령관이 말한 그 연결체는 코빼기도 안 보입니다.
1600807024.english: The connector the commander mentioned is nowhere to be seen.

1600807026.korean:
다이카도 정보를 수집 중이긴 하지만… 
작정하고 숨은 연결체를 하나하나 건물 뒤져가며 찾는 건 건초 더미에서 바늘 찾기급이에요.
1600807026.english:
Daika is also gathering information, but…
 Trying to find hidden connections by searching through the building one by one is like finding a needle in a haystack.

1600807027.korean: 대장, 나이트 앤젤. 꽤 한가한가 보네?
1600807027.english: Captain, Night Angel. You seem to have quite a bit of free time.

1600807028.korean:
사령관님이 말씀하신 연결체는 포착되었습니까?
저희 휘하의 대원들 모두를 빌려드렸는데…
1600807028.english:
Has the connection you mentioned, Commander, been detected?
 We lent you all the members under our command…

1600807029.korean:
지금 연결체를 찾을 때가 아냐, 모든 철충들의 진격 방향이 바뀌었어.
지상군은 무너진 잔해 때문에 지원오기 힘들어서 결국 우리만 바쁘다고.
1600807029.english:
Now is not the time to look for the link; the direction of all the Iron蟲's advance has changed.
 It's hard for the ground forces to come to our aid because of the collapsed debris, so in the end, we're the only ones busy.

1600807030.korean:
그렇군요… 저랑 메이 대장은 사령관의 명령이 있을 때까진 대기하는 중입니다.
출격 명령이 떨어진다면 합류해 싸우겠습니다.
1600807030.english:
I see... Captain Mei and I are on standby until we receive orders from the Commander.
 If the order to sortie is given, I will join the fight.

1600807033.korean: 그러고 보니까, 그 우리 저항군 공격한 애 중에 칼...
1600807033.english: Come to think of it, among the guys who attacked our resistance, there was Kal...

1600807034.korean: 예 압니다. 저만큼 특정부위가 작다는 그 바이오로이드요. 예 예.
1600807034.english: Yes, I know. That bioroid with a specific part that is that small. Yes, yes.

1600807035.korean: 아니, 그, 그게 아니라… 난 네가 친하게 지냈으면…
1600807035.english: No, uh, that's not it... I just wish you could be close...

1600807036.korean: 친하게 지내고 말고는 제가 알아서 하겠습니다. 이상하게 엮지 마세요.
1600807036.english: Whether we get along or not is up to me. Please don't try to get involved in anything strange.

1600807037.korean: …아니, 난 그래도 네가 친밀감을 느끼고 있을 줄 알았는데.
1600807037.english: … No, I still thought you would feel a sense of intimacy.

1600807039.korean:
저에 대한 관심이 이렇게나 많으신 줄은 몰랐군요.
다시 말씀드리지만 제가 얼핏 본 칼립소 씨는 그 정도로 빈약하진 않았습니다.
1600807039.english:
I didn't know you were this interested in me.
 As I mentioned before, the Mr. Calypso I briefly saw was not that meager.

1600807040.korean: 으음... 그 생태계에도 급이 있나…? 대장은 어떻게 생각해?
1600807040.english: Hmm... Is there a hierarchy in that ecosystem too...? What do you think, Captain?

1600807041.korean: 글쎄, 작아 본 적이 없어서 그런 건 생각도 못 하겠는데.
1600807041.english: Well, I've never been small, so I can't even imagine that.

1600807043.korean: 그 혹시 몰라. 바스트업 체조를 하면 커지지 않을까?
1600807043.english: You never know. Maybe it will get bigger if I do bust-up exercises?

1600807044.english: It won't get bigger. Absolutely not.

1600807045.korean: 오~ 안 커진다는 건… 시도는 해봤다는 거야?
1600807045.english: Oh~ So you mean it didn't get bigger... that you tried?

1600807046.korean: …왜 그런 해파리 분이 나타나셔서 쓸데없이 자꾸.
1600807046.english: … Why did such a jellyfish appear and keep doing useless things.

1600808001.korean: 제군들, 몽구스 팀에게 배웠던 시가전 교리를 전격적으로 활용할 때가 왔다!
1600808001.english: Gentlemen, the time has come to fully utilize the urban warfare doctrine you learned from the Mongoose Team!

1600808002.korean: 시가전 교리? 저희가 그거 배운 적 있었슴까, 레프리콘 분대장님?
1600808002.english: Urban warfare doctrine? Have we ever learned that, Leprechaun Squad Leader?

1600808003.korean: 브라우니… 저번 시가전 워게임에서 제일 먼저 탈락해, 연대장님께 얼차려 받지 않았나요?
1600808003.english: Brownie… didn’t you get punished by the regimental commander for being the first to be eliminated in the last urban warfare wargame?

1600808004.korean: …아, 하하하. 아~ 그, 이, 이번엔 실수 안할 검다!
1600808004.english: … Ah, hahahaha. Ah~ Th-th-this time, I won't make a mistake!

1600808005.korean:
브라우니. 그간의 지옥 훈련 결과를 각하께 보여드릴 때가 왔다.
우리가 오르카 최고의 보병 전력임을 각하께 유감없이 보여드리도록.
1600808005.english:
Brownie. The time has come to show His Excellency the results of the hellish training we have been doing.
 To show Your Excellency without regret that we are the Orca's finest infantry force.

1600808007.korean: 브라우니, 이번에 또 실수하시면 안 도와드려요?
1600808007.english: Brownie, if you make another mistake this time, won't I help you?

1600808008.korean: 좋아, 제군들! 어서 사령관님께 제일 먼저 승전보를 알릴 수 있도록 최선을 다하라!
1600808008.english: Alright, gentlemen! Do your utmost to be the first to report the victory to the Commander!

1600808009.korean: 우리의 목표는 간단하다. 저 앞의 프레데터들을 사정없이 포격하는 것이지.
1600808009.english: Our goal is simple. To bombard those Predators up ahead without mercy.

1600808012.korean:
후훗, 말이 어려웠나 에밀리…? 사정이란 일의 이유라는 뜻도 있고
그릇된 일을 바로잡는다는 뜻도 있지.
1600808012.english:
Hehe, was that hard to understand, Emily...? The word "circumstances" can also mean the reason for something.
 It also means correcting wrongdoings.

1600808013.english: … Alright, I'll bombard you mercilessly. Captain, leave it to me.

1600808014.korean:
참고로 에밀리. 가장 중요한 사정의 세 번째 뜻은 
남녀 간의 치열한 싸움 속, 절정에 다다른 순간 분출…
1600808014.english:
For reference, Emily. The third meaning of the most important situation is
 Amidst the fierce battle between men and women, erupting at the climax…

1600808015.korean:
에밀리 성교육은 제가 맡기로 한 거 잊으셨습니까? 
거기까지입니다.
1600808015.english:
Did you forget that I was supposed to be in charge of Emily's sex education?
 That is all.

1600808017.korean:
우리는 오르카에서 제조된 이후, 
전장에서 활약하며 지지 않았던 무적의 군단이다.
1600808017.english:
Since we were manufactured at Orca,
 It is an invincible legion that distinguished itself on the battlefield and never lost.

1600808018.korean: 제군들의 어깨에는 오르카 저항군의 승리란 망토가 걸쳐져 있을 것이다!
1600808018.english: The cloak of the Orca Resistance's victory will be draped over your shoulders!

1600808019.korean: 자, 따라 해라, 제군들, 우리는... 최강이다!
1600808019.english: Now, repeat after me, gentlemen, we are... the strongest!

1600808020.korean: 저 머저리는 우릴 세워놓고 무슨 말을 하는 건지 모르겠군.
1600808020.english: I don't know what that idiot is talking about after making us stand here.

1600808021.korean:
때론 저런 시적인 연설이 인간 역사 속에서 큰 승리의 원동력이 됐다고 하더군.
본기 또한 지금은 이런 연설이 필요하다고 느낀다.
1600808021.english:
They say that sometimes, such poetic speeches have been the driving force behind great victories in human history.
 I also feel that such a speech is needed now.

1600808022.korean: 흥, 내가 나서는 한 패배할 일은 없다. 먼저 출격하도록 하지.
1600808022.english: Hmph, as long as I step forward, there is no defeat. I’ll sortie first.

1600808023.korean: 이보게. 자네, 연결체에 대한 공략은 다 알고…
1600808023.english: Look here. You know the strategy for the Nexus, don't you…

1600808024.korean: 공략? 공략은 약한 자가 강한 자를 이기기 위한 잔머리에 불과하지.
1600808024.english: Strategy? A strategy is nothing more than a trick for the weak to defeat the strong.

1600808025.korean: 내 앞에 나타난다면 그 누구든 파괴할 뿐이다.
1600808025.english: If anyone appears before me, I will only destroy them.

1600808026.korean:
확실히 자네다운 생각이군, 좋아.
알바트로스의 연설이 끝나는 대로 본기도 자네와 함께 합류하겠네.
1600808026.english:
That’s certainly a typical thought of yours. Good.
 As soon as Albatross finishes his speech, Bonki will join you.

1600808027.korean: 따라오건 말건 상관은 없지만, 이번에는 그 시끄러운 음성 센서를 꺼라.
1600808027.english: It doesn't matter whether you follow me or not, but this time, turn off that loud voice sensor.

1600808029.korean:
좋아, 둠브링어랑 스카이나이츠가 왔다갔다 하며 우릴 지원해줄 거야.
그리고… 서부는 마리랑 캐노니어가 해줄 거고…
1600808029.english:
Okay, the Doombringer and Sky Knights will be going back and forth to support us.
 And… Marie and Cannoneer will take care of the West…

1600808031.korean:
우리가 맡는 부분은 타이베이 남부야.
엘븐이랑, 우리 아머드메이든. 그리고… 하토르와 라미아까지.
1600808031.english:
The area we are in charge of is southern Taipei.
 The Elven, and our Armored Maiden. And… even Hathor and Lamia.

1600808032.korean:
…솔직히 대장께서 이렇게 진지한 모습을 보니 감개무량하지 말입니다.
이번 전선 배치는 사령관님이랑 대장이 직접 짰다던데, 사실입니까?
1600808032.english:
… Honestly, seeing the Captain looking so serious fills me with deep emotion.
 I heard that the Commander and the General personally planned this frontline deployment. Is that true?

1600808033.korean: 나도 진지하게 한다면 해 팬서야. 그래도 오르카에서 먹은 밥값은 해야 할 거 아니냐.
1600808033.english: If I take it seriously, I'll do it, Panther. Still, shouldn't I earn my keep from the meals I ate at Orca?

1600808034.korean:
최고의 야구팀은 피츠버그 아이언메이든이지. 
그중에서도 역시 최고의 변화구를 던지는 칼리스타!
1600808034.english:
The best baseball team is the Pittsburgh Iron Maidens.
 Among them, Kalista, who throws the best breaking ball!

1600808035.korean: 웃기지 마! 그럼 뭐해?! 캐노니어즈한테 물은 물대로 먹었으면서!
1600808035.english: Don't be ridiculous! So what?! You got soaked by the Canoniers, after all!

1600808036.korean: 물은 먹었지. 근데 너네 엘븐즈는 포스트시즌 가서 물 먹어보긴 했었냐?
1600808036.english: We got burned. But have you Elvenz ever even gotten burned in the postseason?

1600808038.english: Enough with the local talk. Let's get ready, guys.

1600808041.korean: 끝나고 봐, 칼리스타. 내가 엘븐즈의 찬란한 역사를 다시 설명해 줄 테니까!
1600808041.english: Watch out for this, Kalista. I’ll explain the glorious history of the Elvenz to you again!

1600808043.korean: 자, 빨리 끝내고 쉬러 가자, 다들 알았지?
1600808043.english: Alright, let's finish this quickly and go rest, everyone got it?

1600809004.english: … The enemies are swarming in strangely large numbers?

1600809007.korean: 이열, 하토르. 제법인데? 너… 으응?! 잠깐 나와!
1600809007.english: Wow, Hathor. You're pretty good. You… huh?! Come out for a moment!

1600809008.english: Agh?! W-why did you suddenly push me...

1600809013.korean: 이야, 호쾌한걸? 그 기계 팔 좀 탐나는데.
1600809013.english: Wow, that's impressive! I'm kind of coveting that mechanical arm.

1600809014.korean: 원래는… 하아, 나무를 심는 데 쓰긴 했지만… 철충 놈들을 찌부러뜨리는 데도 나쁘진 않아.
1600809014.english: Originally… haa, I used it to plant trees… but it’s not bad for crushing those Iron Bugs either.

1600809016.korean: 그래도 얼마 안 남았어, 힘내자 엘븐!
1600809016.english: Still, there isn't much left. Let's hang in there, Elven!

1600809017.korean: 좋아, 우리도 할 땐 하는 애들이라고!
1600809017.english: Fine, we're the kind of guys who get things done when it matters!

1600809018.korean: …확실히, 내가 봤던 멸망 전의 바이오로이드 부대보단 여기저기 나사가 빠지긴 했지만.
1600809018.english: … Certainly, compared to the pre-apocalyptic bioroid units I saw, this one was loose here and there, though.

1600809019.english: Seeing it dominate to this extent... that's amazing.

1600809020.korean: 말했잖아. 사령관 밑에서 우린 단 한 명의 사상자도 없이 이겨왔다고.
1600809020.english: I told you. Under the Commander, we have won without a single casualty.

1600809021.korean:
…솔직히 말해, 네 사령관이 그저 유약한 놈인 줄 알았어.
나중에 사령관을 다시 만나면, 꼭 사과할게.
1600809021.english:
… Honestly, I thought your commander was just a weakling.
 I will definitely apologize when I meet the commander again later.

1600809025.english: … Wait. It seems like the behavior pattern has changed.

1600809030.english: There it is, that giant Iron Bug!

1600809031.korean: 젠장, 드디어 나왔나? 뭐야, 저 녀석 뒤로 몰려오는 철충들은 또 뭔데?!
1600809031.english: Damn it, did it finally show up? What the heck, who are those Iron Bugs swarming behind that guy?!

1600809033.korean: 사령관님이 예상하신 둠이터가 나타났는데… 남은 적들 전부가 우리 전선 쪽으로 밀려들고 있습니다.
1600809033.english: The Doom Eater you predicted, Commander, has appeared... and all the remaining enemies are pushing toward our front line.

1600809034.english: That... what on earth is that Iron Bug...

1600809037.korean: 모두 피… 크읏 거, 건물이… 피해 다들!
1600809037.english: Everyone pee... Ugh, the building... Get out of the way, everyone!

1600809041.english: Get out of here, everyone! Damn it!

1600809043.korean: 아 머리야… 제대로 얻어맞았네... 그나저나… 건물 잔해에 깔렸나? 빌어먹을 철충 놈들…
1600809043.english: Ah, my head... I really got hit hard... Anyway... am I trapped under the building debris? Those damn Iron蟲s...

1600809046.english: … Hathor? What's wrong with you all of a sudden?

1600809047.korean: 시, 싫어… 이렇게 갇히는 건… 또… 또…
1600809047.english: N-no... I hate being trapped like this... again... again...

1600809049.korean: 제발, 날 버리지 마… 모두들… 허억… 하아…

1600809050.english: Snap out of it, Hathor! Why are you suddenly...

1600809051.english: … It collapsed… Uh, what do I do?

1600809052.english: What on earth are you talking about...

1600809053.korean: 갑갑해… 사, 살려줘… 버리지 말아줘, 누나가 잘못했어 사령관… 또 이러는 건 싫어…!
1600809053.english: I feel so suffocated… P-save me… Please don’t abandon me, I was wrong, Commander… I don’t want this to happen again…!

1600809054.korean: …갑자기 왜 이러는 거야 너?! 너… 후유증이라는 게…?
1600809054.english: … Why are you suddenly acting like this?! You… what is this aftereffect…?

1600810001.korean:
- 나는 나스호른 쪽에 무전을 다시 보냈다.
얼마간의 잡음 후, 나스호른의 얼굴이 보였다.
1600810001.english:
I sent a radio message back to the Nashorn.
 After some noise, Nashorn's face came into view.

1600810002.english: [c][00FF00][Commander, I was just about to contact you anyway… ][-][/c]

1600810003.korean: [c][00FF00][…좋지 않습니다. 하토르랑 라미아가… 붕괴된 건물 안에 깔렸습니다.][-][/c]
1600810003.english: [c][00FF00][… This is not good. Hathor and Lamia… are trapped inside the collapsed building.][-][/c]

1600810004.korean:
[c][00FF00][최대한 엘븐이랑 아머드메이든 대원들이 잔해를 치우려고 하는데…
다른 철충들의 공격 때문에 여의치 않습니다.][-][/c]
1600810004.english:
[c][00FF00][The Elven and Armored Maiden members are trying their best to clear the debris…
 It is not feasible due to attacks from other Iron Bugs.

1600810005.korean:
- 하토르는 기존 엘븐들과 다르게 전투에 특화되었긴 했지만…
긴 유폐 생활 때문에, 그녀는 심한 폐소공포증이 있었다.
1600810005.english:
Although Hathor was specialized in combat unlike the existing Elven,…
 Due to her long period of confinement, she had severe claustrophobia.

1600810006.korean: - 혹시라도 하토르가 이성을 잃고 그때로 되돌아간다면 큰일이 아닐 수 없다.
1600810006.english: If Hathor were to lose her reason and return to that time, it would be a serious disaster.

1600810007.korean: 죄송합니다… 철충들이 끈질게 달라붙는 바람에… 도착이 늦을 것 같아요...!
1600810007.english: I'm sorry... The Iron Bugs have been persistently latching on... so I think I'll be late arriving...!

1600810008.korean:
- 머리를 빠르게 돌려 지원 요청을 할 병력을 떠올렸지만...
현재로선 뿔뿔히 흩어진 저항군이 건물 잔해들을 해치고 빠른 지원을 오는 데는 한계가 있었다.
1600810008.english:
I quickly scanned my head to think of troops to call for support, but...
 As of now, there were limits to how quickly the scattered resistance forces could make their way through the building debris to provide support.

1600810009.english: Master…! Shall we go provide support?!

1600810010.english: [c][00FF00][Captain of Security, I told you we'd be late even if we left Orca now… ][-][/c]

1600810011.korean:
- 철충들은 최후의 발악을 하는 중이었고, 승리의 고지는 얼마 남지 않았다.
하지만 하토르와 라미아의 위급 상황을 이대로 방치할 순 없는 노릇이었다.
1600810011.english:
The Iron蟲 were making their final desperate struggle, and the height of victory was not far off.
 However, they could not simply leave Hathor and Lamia in such a critical situation.

1600810012.korean: [c][00FF00][일단 계속해서 작업 진행해 보겠습니다. 전황이 급해, 일단은 통신 끊겠습니다.][-][/c]
1600810012.english: [c][00FF00][I will continue with the work for now. The situation is urgent, so I will disconnect communication for now.][-][/c]

1600810013.korean: - 철충들의 예기치 못한 돌발 행동에 당황하던 그때였다.
1600810013.english: It was just then that I was taken aback by the Iron蟲's unexpected and sudden actions.

1600810015.korean:
저는… 이곳에서 자매들과 함께 여러 번 소모전을 벌인 적 있습니다.
제 불명예를 씻고, 만회할 기회를… 주세요.
1600810015.english:
I… have fought wars of attrition with my sisters here several times.
 Please give me a chance to clear my name and make amends.

1600810016.korean:
전 해파리 유전자를 기반으로 한 신체라 회복력은 보통 바이오로이드보다 빠른 편이니… 
지금 투입해도 전투에 지장은 없을 겁니다.
1600810016.english:
Since my body is based on jellyfish genes, my recovery speed is faster than that of a normal bioroid...
 Even if deployed now, it won't hinder the battle.

1600810017.korean: …둠이터는 저도 버거운 상대인데, 당신 혼자 가능하다고요?
1600810017.english: … Even I struggle against Doom Eater, and you're saying you can handle it alone?

1600810018.korean:
전 특수전을 상정해 만든 만큼, 당신 만큼의 전투력은 가지고 있습니다.
…이길 자신은 없지만, 시간 벌기 만큼은 가능합니다.
1600810018.english:
As it was designed with special operations in mind, it possesses combat capabilities comparable to yours.
 … I'm not confident I can win, but I can at least buy some time.

1600810019.korean: 그리고… 인간님께 받았던 은혜를 보답하고 싶습니다.
1600810019.english: And… I would like to repay the kindness I received from you, Human.

1600810020.korean: 그럴 수도 있습니다. 하지만, 이렇게 앉아 있을 수는 없습니다.
1600810020.english: That may be the case. However, we cannot just sit here.

1600810021.korean: 제 임무는 호텔 관리 외에도... 들어온 불청객들을 처리하는 역할입니다.
1600810021.english: In addition to hotel management, my role is to deal with uninvited guests.

1600810022.korean: 오귀기아로 들어오는 저들의 더러운 발자국을 참을 수 없습니다.
1600810022.english: I cannot tolerate their filthy footprints entering Ogygia.

1600810024.korean: - 칼립소는 고개를 천천히 들어 나를 올려다보았다.
1600810024.english: - Calypso slowly raised her head and looked up at me.

1600810025.korean: 그간… 언니로서 챙기지 못했던 라미아와, 하토르 님을 구하고 싶습니다.
1600810025.english: I want to save Lamia and Lady Hathor, whom I haven't been able to look after as an older sister all this time.

1600810026.korean: 마지막 인간님의 군대가 오기 전까지 버티겠습니다.
1600810026.english: I will hold out until the last human army arrives.

1600810027.korean: 이번만큼은 제가 명예를 세울 수 있도록 허락해 주세요.
1600810027.english: Please allow me to uphold my honor this time.

1600810028.korean:
저는 인간님 소속의 바이오로이드가 아닙니다. 
설사 제가 죽는다 한들, 인간님의 명성에 누 끼치는 일은 없겠지요.
1600810028.english:
I am not a bioroid belonging to the Human.
 Even if I were to die, it would not tarnish your reputation, Human.

1600810029.korean: - 칼립소의 어깨가 파르르 떨렸다. 그녀는 주먹을 불끈 쥔 채 다시금 나를 올려다보며 말했다.
1600810029.english: Calypso's shoulders trembled. Clenching her fists tightly, she looked up at me again and spoke.

1600810030.korean:
오귀기아에 인간님과 인간님이 아끼시는 분들이 오신 이상,
그분들의 안전은 오케아니데스의 이 칼립소가 책임져야 하는 법입니다.
1600810030.english:
Now that Human and those whom Human cherishes have come to Oghigia,
 It is the law that this Calypso of the Oceanides must take responsibility for their safety.

1600810031.korean: 그것이… 제가 늘 마음 속에 담아왔던 철칙이었습니다.
1600810031.english: That was… a strict rule I had always kept in my heart.

1600810032.korean:
…한때의 실수로 인간 님이 아끼시는 분들께 손상을 입힌바,
모든 바이오로이드의 하늘과 같은 인간님께… 실망을 끼쳤기에…
1600810032.english:
… having caused damage to those whom Human cherishes due to a momentary mistake,
 To the human who is like the heavens to all bioroids… because I have disappointed you…

1600810033.korean: …이 칼립소의 바람을, 한 번은 들어주지 않으시겠습니까?
1600810033.english: … Won’t you grant this Calypso’s wish just this once?

1600810034.korean: 제가 죽는다 해도, 이곳을 묫자리로 생각했기에 여한은 없습니다.
1600810034.english: Even if I die, I have no regrets because I considered this place my burial site.

1600810035.korean: - 칼립소의 말에 나는 자리에서 일어나 칼립소에게 다가갔다.
1600810035.english: At Calypso's words, I got up from my seat and approached Calypso.

1600810036.korean: 죄, 죄송합니다... 제가 미덥지 못한 탓에 실망만 안겨드릴 뿐이군요...
1600810036.english: I, I am sorry... It seems I have only caused you disappointment because I was unreliable...

1600810039.korean: - 그러자 칼립소의 눈가에 눈물이 주르륵 흘렀다.
1600810039.english: Then, tears streamed down Calypso's face.

1600810040.english: I will obey your command on the honor of the Oceanides…

1600810041.korean: - 나는 결국 대기하던 나이트 앤젤을 급히불러 칼립소를 신속히 남부 전장에 보내주기로 했다.
1600810041.english: I eventually hurriedly called the waiting Night Angel and decided to quickly send Calypso to the southern battlefield.

1600810042.english: … It’s my first time doing transportation, but I understand.

1600810043.korean:
- 나는 칼립소와 나이트 앤젤이 오르카호 통로를 걸어가는 모습을 지켜보았다.
여전히 사지로 그녀를 내보내는 것 같아 마음이 편치 않았지만…
1600810043.english:
I watched Calypso and Night Angel walk through the Orca's passageway.
