 I still felt uneasy, as if I were sending her into a death trap, but...

1600810044.korean: - 칼립소가 겪었던 일을 곱씹으며, 그녀를 존중해주기로 했다.
1600810044.english: Reflecting on what Calypso had gone through, I decided to respect her.

1600810046.english: I might be a bit heavy. Are you sure you'll be okay?

1600810047.korean: 저희가 쓰는 사출 포드를 이용하면 빠르게 날아갈 수 있을 겁니다.
1600810047.english: If you use the ejection pod we use, you will be able to fly quickly.

1600810048.korean:
대신, 공중에 뜬 순간부터 칼립소 씨의 체중을 고려하여 최대로 가속할 거라...
심하게 어지러우실 수 있으니 마음의 준비를 해주시기 바랍니다.
1600810048.english:
Instead, from the moment it takes off, it will accelerate to the maximum, taking into account Mr. Calypso's weight...
 Please be prepared for severe dizziness.

1600810054.english: Hongryeon! Is the Mongoose Team still far away?

1600810058.korean: 혼자서 뭘 어떻게 할 수 있는 상황이 아니야.
1600810058.english: It’s not a situation where I can do anything on my own.

1600810063.english: But you are still way off.

1600810064.korean: 난 너한테 죽으라고 한 적 없어.
1600810064.english: I never told you to die.

1600810065.korean: 이런 널 전장으로 내보내고 싶지 않지만...
1600810065.english: I don't want to send you to the battlefield like this, but...

1600810066.english: Please. Make sure you come back alive.

1600810067.english: I believe we will all come back together.

1600811003.korean:
저 녀석들, 우리를 뚫고 포위망을 빠져 나갈 속셈인가?
윽?! 하마터면 맞을 뻔했군… 이오… 고맙다.
1600811003.english:
Are those guys planning to break through our encirclement?
 Ugh?! I almost got hit... Io... Thank you.

1600811005.english: Panther, what about the Mongoose Team?

1600811006.english: … I just got a call saying they ran into Iron Bugs… !

1600811007.korean:
빌어먹을… 스프리건, 이오! 탄을 최대한 급소에 맞춰!
여기서 탄을 쓸데없이 소모할 순 없어!
1600811007.english:
Damn it… Spriggan, Io! Hit the vital spot as hard as you can with the bullets!
 I can't waste ammo here!

1600811008.english: Haa... Ugh... To think I'd be digging a hole... Ughhhhh...

1600811009.english: Shut up! Aren't you digging it out quickly?!

1600811010.korean: 난… 난 전투 요원이지, 삽질은 취미가 아니라고…
1600811010.english: I... I'm a combatant, digging isn't my hobby...

1600811011.korean: 어서 빨리 파내야해, 하토르… 폐소공포증이 있다고!
1600811011.english: We have to dig this out quickly, Hathor... I have claustrophobia!

1600811012.korean: 누가 모르는 줄 알아?! 나도 전력으로 힘내는 중이라고! 으랴아아아아앗!
1600811012.english: Do you think I don't know?! I'm giving it my all too! Ughhhhh!

1600811013.korean: 파도파도 끝이 없네… 진짜… 무슨 힘 내는 주문이라도 있었으면…
1600811013.english: The more I dig, the more endless it is... Seriously... If only there were some kind of spell to give me strength...

1600811014.english: I know an order; would you like me to do it for you?

1600811015.korean: 그냥 하는 소리니까 얼른 너도 파!
1600811015.english: I'm just kidding, so hurry up and dig too!

1600811016.english: I love you, Director of Elvenz~~~~~~

1600811020.english: … The work is going surprisingly fast?

1600811026.korean: 후아… 하아… 씨, 후아… 하아… 더럽게 힘드네…
1600811026.english: Phew... Haa... Damn, phew... Haa... This is fucking tough...

1600811028.english: Haa... Hey, Hathor... I brought her out...

1600811030.english: … Haa… Hah… This place… This place…

1600811032.korean: 살려줘… 혼자… 혼자 있고 싶지… 않아…
1600811032.english: Save me… I… I don’t want to be… alone…

1600811033.english: … He's in really bad shape. What should I do?

1600811034.english: Hathor, please snap out of it!

1600811035.korean: …하아, 무서워… 사령관… 누나… 누나… 혼자 두지…
1600811035.english: … Haa, I'm scared… Commander… Sister… Sister… Don't leave me alone…

1600811036.korean: 큰일 났어… 세레스티아랑, 세크메트가 아니라면… 진정시키기 힘든데…
1600811036.english: I'm in big trouble... If it's not Celestia and Sekhmet... it's going to be hard to calm them down...

1600811041.korean: …아씨! 하필 기계 팔도 반쯤 망가진 마당에!
1600811041.english: …Damn it! Of all times, the mechanical arm is already half-broken!

1600811042.korean: …이봐. 하토르! 정신 차려! 지금 이럴 시간 없다고!
1600811042.english: … Hey, Hathor! Snap out of it! We don't have time for this right now!

1600811043.korean: 이 근육 뇌! 너, 하토르가 어떤 일을 겪었는지 알고서나 그런 소리를 하는 거야?!
1600811043.english: You muscle brain! Do you even know what Hathor went through before you say something like that?!

1600811044.korean: 그게 뭐든 간에 지금 우리 사정을 철충이 봐줄 것 같냐?! 제기랄…!
1600811044.english: Whatever it is, do you think the Iron蟲 will go easy on us right now?! Damn it…!

1600811045.korean:
…하, 이 장면 어디서 많이 본 거 같은데
큰 언니가 행방불명 되기 전에 딱 이랬단 말이지...
1600811045.english:
… Ha, I feel like I've seen this scene somewhere before.
 My eldest sister was exactly like this right before she went missing...

1600811046.korean:
아하~ 이거 참. 사령관이랑 질펀한 밤 좀 보내보려 했더니만.
이거야 원. 처녀로 죽게 생겼잖아? 재미도 못 보고…
1600811046.english:
Aha~ Well, this is something. I was hoping to have a wild night with the Commander.
 Good heavens. I'm going to die a virgin? Not even getting to enjoy myself...

1600811048.korean:
너희들은 그 물러터진 사령관한테 돌아가는 게 낫겠어.
하나라도 잘못되면 애처럼 훌쩍거릴 텐데, 괜히 원망 받기 싫어.
1600811048.english:
You guys would be better off going back to that soft-hearted commander.
 If even one thing goes wrong, I’ll be sobbing like a child, and I don’t want to be blamed for no reason.

1600811049.korean: 너 혼자서? 이길 순 있는 거야?
1600811049.english: You alone? Can you really win?

1600811050.korean:
해봐야지. 어떻게든. 어차피 나야 정식 오르카 대원도 아닌데... 
죽는다고 해도 큰 공백으로 남지 않을 테고...
1600811050.english:
I have to give it a try. Somehow. It's not like I'm an official Orca member anyway...
 Even if I die, it won't leave a huge void...

1600811051.english: Get away, muscle brain. You're getting in the way.

1600811054.english: What? Why did you come alone?

1600811055.korean: 절 데리고 오신 분은 방금 남은 잔당을 처리하기 위해 지원가셨습니다.
1600811055.english: The person who brought me has just gone to provide support to deal with the remaining remnants.

1600811056.english: Do you... think you can do it on your own?

1600811057.korean: 다른 분들이 오실 때까지 시간벌이 정도는 할 수 있을 겁니다.
1600811057.english: I should be able to buy some time until the others arrive.

1600811058.korean: 그나저나 하토르 님… 적을 앞에 두고 무슨 추태를 보이고 있는 거죠?
1600811058.english: By the way, Lady Hathor... what kind of disgraceful behavior are you displaying right in front of an enemy?

1600811060.korean: 당신이 그렇게 입버릇처럼 사랑한다, 신뢰한다, 말하던 인간 님 앞에서…
1600811060.english: In front of the person you habitually said you loved and trusted...

1600811062.korean: 언니, 대체 왜 여기에 온 거야?!
1600811062.english: Sister, why on earth did you come here?!

1600811063.korean:
네가 하도 한심하게 적들을 대접하는 꼴이 우스워 찾아왔어.
전에도 그렇게 하운드들을 놓쳤잖아?
1600811063.english:
I came here because it was ridiculous to see you treating your enemies so pathetically.
 You let the hounds get away like that before, didn't you?

1600811064.korean:
…넌 오르카에 합류하려고 했으니까. 이제부터 인간 님의 군인이야.
그리고 난… 저들을 물리쳐야 할, 오귀기아의 지배인 칼립소고.
1600811064.english:
… Since you intended to join Orca. From now on, you are a soldier of Lord Human.
 And I am… Calypso, the ruler of Oghigia, who must defeat them.

1600811065.korean: 난 오귀기아의 지배인이자 네 언니인 만큼... 너흴 지킬 의무가 있는 법이고.
1600811065.english: As the manager of Oghigia and your older sister... I have a duty to protect you.

1600811068.korean: …그간 못했던 언니 노릇 좀 해볼 생각이니까.
1600811068.english: … I’m thinking of finally getting to act like an older sister, something I haven’t been able to do for a while.

1600811070.korean:
하토르 님. 그렇게 제 언니라고 계속 뻐기시려면 
적어도 큰 언니만큼의 단단함을 보여주시기 바랍니다.
1600811070.english:
Lady Hathor, if you want to keep acting like you're my older sister...
 Please show at least as much strength as your older sister.

1600811072.korean:
…여러분들도 방해가 되니, 물러서 주시기 바랍니다.
이 칼립소가, 직접 저들을 맞이하겠습니다.
1600811072.english:
… You are also getting in the way, so please step back.
 I, Calypso, will personally welcome them.

1600811073.korean: 마지막 인간 님의 안위를 흔드는 당신들에게 묻겠습니다.
1600811073.english: I ask you, who are shaking the safety of the last human.

1600811074.korean:
…장갑은 단단히 두르고 오셨습니까? 
당신을 만든 자들에게 기도는 다 마치셨는지요?
1600811074.english:
… Did you put on your gloves securely?
 Have you finished praying to those who created you?

1600811075.korean: 호텔 구석에 몰린 채, 덜덜 떨며 제게 목숨을 구걸할 준비는 되셨습니까?
1600811075.english: Are you ready to be cornered in a hotel room, trembling, and begging me for your life?

1600811076.korean: 인사드리지요. 오귀기아의 호텔 지배인이자 쓰레기 처리 담당 칼립소, 입니다.
1600811076.english: Greetings. I am Calypso, the hotel manager and waste disposal officer at Oguigia.

1600811077.korean:
이 칼립소와 엘리자베스가 대접해 드리는 맹독의 연회를
부디 사양하지 않고 즐겨주시기 바랍니다.
1600811077.english:
The deadly poison banquet hosted by Calypso and Elizabeth
 Please do not hesitate to enjoy it.

1600812001.korean: - 나는 의자를 붙든 채, 패널 속 칼립소와 철충들의 싸움을 지켜보았다.
1600812001.english: Holding onto my chair, I watched the fight between Calypso and the Iron Bugs inside the panel.

1600812002.english: ... So it wasn't just empty bravado.

1600812003.english: To think I'd have to clash with the Iron蟲s all by myself…

1600812004.korean:
- 확실히, 수 십 년간 싸워온 전투 경험 때문인지, 칼립소는 능숙하게 철충들을 처리해나갔다.
하지만, 칼립소 홀로 대항하기에는 여전히 철충의 수는 방대했다.
1600812004.english:
Certainly, perhaps due to decades of combat experience, Calypso skillfully dealt with the Iron蟲.
 However, the number of Iron Bugs was still too vast for Calypso to fight against alone.

1600812005.korean: - 부탁이니 몽구스팀들이 오기 전까지지만 버텨 줘, 칼립소…
1600812005.english: Please, just hold out until the mongoose team arrives, Calypso…

1600812007.korean: [c][00FF00][…미안, 지금 거의 다 왔… 적 발견!][-][/c]
1600812007.english: [c][00FF00][… Sorry, I’m almost there… Found an enemy!][-][/c]

1600812008.korean: [c][00FF00][헤헤… 괜찮아. 우리 걱정은 하지 말라고. 얼른 합류할게!][-][/c]
1600812008.english: [c][00FF00][Hehe… It’s fine. Don’t worry about us. We’ll join you right away!][-][/c]

1600812009.english: [c][00FF00][We're going to get hurt? Eh~ Commander, you're worrying too much.][-][/c]

1600812011.english: [c][00FF00][Okay, don't worry! I'll join as soon as possible!][-][/c]

1600812012.korean:
- 미호가 심각한 상황을 애써 바꿔보려 미소로 답했지만…
분산되었던 철충 중 한 지점으로 기습해 퇴각을 시도하는 것은 새로운 패턴이었다.
1600812012.english:
Miho replied with a smile, trying hard to change the serious situation, but…
 Attempting to retreat by launching a surprise attack on a single point among the dispersed Iron蟲 was a new pattern.

1600812013.korean:
- 무엇보다 중요한 건 대원들의 무사 귀환.
칼립소를 전장으로 내모는 것 외엔 뾰족한 수가 없었다는 사실에 죄책감이 몰려들었다.
1600812013.english:
- The most important thing is the safe return of the team members.
 A wave of guilt washed over me at the fact that there was no other option but to drive Calypso into the battlefield.

1600812016.korean: - 나는 대답 대신 주먹을 꾹 움켜쥐었다.
1600812016.english: Instead of answering, I clenched my fist tightly.

1600812019.english: Haa... Ugh, yeah... I'm okay now...

1600812020.english: … Hathor. Let's retreat. You look very tired.

1600812021.english: Elven, is it okay if I leave the battlefield?

1600812022.korean: 지원군으로 칼립소가 우리 대신 싸우고 있어… 혼자.
1600812022.english: Calypso is fighting in our place as reinforcements… all alone.

1600812024.english: Don't worry! They fought really well.

1600812025.korean: …안 돼! 이대로 못 본 척 놔두고 갈 수는 없어!
1600812025.english: … No! I can't just pretend I didn't see this and leave!

1600812028.korean: 위, 위험해…! 사령관이 하토르는 구출 즉시 곧장 데리고 복귀하랬어!
1600812028.english: W-Dangerous…! The commander told us to bring Hathor back immediately after rescuing her!

1600812029.korean: 사령관한텐 미안하지만… 가야 해. 그간… 나, 칼립소한테 참견이란 참견은 다 했단 말이야.
1600812029.english: I'm sorry to the Commander, but... I have to go. In the meantime... I've interfered in Calypso's life in every way possible.

1600812031.korean: …그 성치 못한 몸으로 어딜 가겠다는 거야?
1600812031.english: … Where do you think you're going in that frail body?

1600812032.korean: 그 애가 그렇게 죽게 놔둘 순 없다고! 언니라고 그랬는데… 정말 도움이 필요할 때 비겁하게 숨어버리면 언니가 못 돼!
1600812032.english: I can't just let her die like that! You called me your older sister... If you cowardly hide away when she really needs help, you aren't a true older sister!

1600812033.korean: …나참. 진짜 물렁한 사령관에 물렁한 동료들이구만. 오글거려서 못 봐주겠네.
1600812033.english: … Good grief. What a soft commander and soft colleagues. It’s so cringeworthy I can’t stand watching it.

1600812035.english: Well, even if they say I can't return like this?

1600812036.korean: …그래, 그래. 나도 오르카에 합류할 예정인데 동료 시체 들고 돌아가면 체면이 안 서잖아.
1600812036.english: … Yeah, yeah. I'm planning to join Orca too, so it would be embarrassing to go back carrying a comrade's corpse.

1600812038.korean: 하하하하… 라미아. 너, 실은 네 작은 언니가 걱정되서 그렇지?
1600812038.english: Hahahaha... Lamia. Actually, you're worried about your little sister, aren't you?

1600812039.korean:
큰 언니 부탁 때문에 가는 거야.
정말, 이래저래 손이 가는 귀찮은 빡통이라니까…
1600812039.english:
I'm going because of my older sister's request.
 Seriously, I'm telling you, he's such a troublesome idiot who requires a lot of attention...

1600812042.english: … Now it’s just you and me.

1600812044.english: … The last human asked me to come back alive.

1600812053.english: … Just a little more, strength… Haa… Haa…

1600812055.english: The atonement of the last human...

1600812060.korean: 아야야야야야야야! 와 진짜 단단해! 어깨 아파 죽겠네…
1600812060.english: Ow ow ow ow ow! Wow, that's really hard! My shoulder is killing me...

1600812062.english: … What on earth are you doing back here?!

1600812063.korean:
헤헤... 칼립소도 같이 살아 돌아가야지.
저 녀석, 이 누나한테 지독한 악몽을 선사했겠다? 각오는 됐겠지?
1600812063.english:
Hehe... Calypso has to come back alive with us, too.
 That guy must have given this older sister a terrible nightmare, right? You're prepared, aren't you?

1600812064.korean:
물러나세요, 하토르 님이 다치면 인간 님께 면이 서지 않을 겁니다.
이건 제 일이니 제가… 아야야야야앗?!
1600812064.english:
Step back. If Hathor gets hurt, you won't be able to save face, Human.
 This is my job, so I... Ow ow ow ow!

1600812065.korean: 똥고집 피우고 허세 부릴 때마다 한 대씩 쥐어박을 거야, 언니. 알았어?
1600812065.english: Every time you act stubborn and show off, I'm going to smack you. Got it?

1600812070.korean: 모두 물러서세요, 여긴 제가 할당된 청소 구역이라니까요!
1600812070.english: Everyone step back! I told you this is my assigned cleaning zone!

1600812071.korean:
아이씨… 귀찮아 죽겠네! 빨리빨리 끝내자고, 이 바보 해파리야!
나 오귀기아에서 태닝은 필수에, 누릴 수 있는 건 죄다 누려야지만 돌아갈 테니까!
1600812071.english:
Ugh... this is driving me crazy! Let's get this over with quickly, you stupid jellyfish!
 Tanning is a must in Oughigia, and I won't go back unless I enjoy everything there is to enjoy!

1600812073.korean: 우리 대장이… 그러자는데, 협력 좀 해주지 말입니다.
1600812073.english: Our leader... says so, so please cooperate.

1600812074.korean:
사령관님. 아머드메이든 열외자 없습니다.
이제 이놈만 죽이면 대만 철충 박멸도 끝입니다.
1600812074.english:
Commander, there are no exceptions among the Armored Maidens.
 Now, if we just kill this guy, the extermination of the Iron蟲 in Taiwan will be complete.

1600812076.korean: 알겠습니다, 사령관님, 포상 주는 거 잊지 않으셨음 좋겠습니다.
1600812076.english: Understood, Commander. I hope you don't forget to give out rewards.

1600812078.korean:
- 나스호른은 그렇게 말한 뒤, 둠이터를 향해 나겔링을 조준했다.
아머드메이든의 전원도 무기를 조준한 후, 사정없이 난사하자, 둠이터가 몸부림쳤다.
1600812078.english:
After saying that, Nashorn aimed Nagelling at the Doom Eater.
 After the Armored Maiden's power supply also aimed its weapon and fired indiscriminately, the Doom Eater thrashed about.

1600812079.korean: - 하지만 수십 년 동안 철충을 먹어치운 둠이터의 장갑이 그리 간단하게 뚫릴 것 처럼 보이진 않았다.
1600812079.english: However, the armor of the Doom Eater, which had devoured Iron蟲 for decades, did not look like it would be penetrated so easily.

1600812080.korean: 젠장… 이제 남은 탄도 전부 떨어졌어...
1600812080.english: Damn it... I've run out of all the remaining ammo...

1600812081.korean: 비켜, 소장. 여기부턴 우리가 할 테니까!
1600812081.english: Move aside, Chief. We'll handle this from here on!

1600812082.korean: - 라미아는 빠르게 앞으로 달려나간 후, 박차올라, 그대로 둠이터를 걷어찼다.
1600812082.english: Lamia ran forward quickly, sprang up, and kicked Doom Eater.

1600812083.korean: 아아악?! 내 발… 아야야야! 자, 마무리는!
1600812083.english: Aaaargh?! My foot… Ow ow ow! Alright, the finish!

1600812084.korean: - 아머드메이든과 라미아의 타격으로 휘청거리며 중심을 잃은 둠이터 앞에 하토르와 칼립소가 달려나가 최후의 일격을 선보인다.
1600812084.english: Hathor and Calypso rush forward and deliver the final blow to the Doom Eater, who has staggered and lost his balance from the blows of the Armored Maiden and Lamia.

1600812087.korean: - 둘의 공격을 마지막으로, 둠이터는 땅에 쓰러졌다.
1600812087.english: With the final attack from the two, Doom Eater collapsed to the ground.

1600812088.korean: - 비로소, 대만을 점거한 철충들이 오르카에 의해 섬멸되는 순간이다.
1600812088.english: Finally, this is the moment when the Iron蟲s occupying Taiwan are annihilated by Orca.

1600812095.english: [As of this moment, Taiwan is our territory]

1600813003.english: Hathor... Thank you for your hard work.

1600813005.korean: 하토르… 제발 무리는 하지 말라, 그렇게 말했건만…
1600813005.english: Hathor… I told you not to push yourself too hard, but…

1600813007.korean: …도중에 건물 잔해가 덮쳤다고 들었어요. 정말 괜찮은 거 맞죠?
1600813007.english: … I heard you were hit by building debris on the way. You're really okay, right?

1600813008.korean: 괜찮아! 하하… 걱정 안 해도 돼!
1600813008.english: It's okay! Haha... You don't have to worry!

1600813009.korean: 나중에 돌아가면 잔뜩 혼날 준비나 하세요.
1600813009.english: Get ready to get a good scolding when you get back later.

1600813010.korean: 아~ 또 잔소리는… 나 정말 괜찮다니까?
1600813010.english: Ah, you're nagging again... I'm telling you, I'm really fine!

1600813012.korean: 꺄아아아아아악! 나한테 이상한 기술 걸지 말란 말이야!
1600813012.english: Aaaaaaaah! I said don't use weird techniques on me!

1600813013.korean: 아 왜. 언니도 사실 즐기는 중이잖아. 그렇지?
1600813013.english: Oh, why? You're actually enjoying it too, aren't you?

1600813014.english: Lamia, Calypso told you to stop...

1600813015.korean: 언니랑 이렇게 재밌는 상황 놀이 중이잖아요.
1600813015.english: I'm having such a fun role-playing game with my older sister.

1600813018.english: Hahaha~ You guys are really enthusiastic about having fun, aren't you?

1600813019.english: Manager... this is just toying with me...

1600813020.english: How about this? Lamia Rolling Thunder!

1600813021.korean: 꺄아아아아아악! 이 미친년이 진짜…?! 제발 말려줘요 언니!
1600813021.english: Kyaaaaaaah! This crazy bitch, seriously…?! Please stop her, sis!

1600813022.korean: 푸하하하하 아하하하하~ 너희들 진짜 아침부터 웃기게 할래?
1600813022.english: Puhahaha Ahahahaha~ Do you guys really want to be funny first thing in the morning?

1600813023.korean: 언니, 갑자기 저쪽은 왜 뚫어져라 쳐다 봐?
1600813023.english: Sister, why are you suddenly staring so intently over there?

1600813025.korean: 하아, 이 언니. 또 다쳤구만 진짜.
1600813025.english: Haa, this older sister. She got hurt again, seriously.

1600813027.korean: 내려 놔! 무슨 짐짝처럼 들쳐 업어?!
1600813027.english: Put me down! Why are you carrying me like a piece of luggage?!

1600813028.korean: 짐짝 맞지. 몇십 년 동안이나 내 속을 뒤집어 놓은 짐짝.
1600813028.english: You're a burden, right? A burden that has turned my insides upside down for decades.

1600813029.english: Let go… I said let go… Ugh… Mmm…

1600813030.korean: …뭐야, 기절한 거야? 정신력으로 버텼네 이 빡통이 진짜!
1600813030.english: … What, did he faint? He held on pure willpower, this idiot!

1600813032.english: Thank you for being alive, Calypso.

1600813033.korean:
- 뜻하지 못한 돌발상황이 있었지만, 대만의 철충을 완벽하게 제압했다.
칼립소는 답례로 모든 대원들에게 오귀기아를 개방했다.
1600813033.english:
Despite an unexpected emergency, the Iron蟲 in Taiwan was completely subdued.
 In return, Calypso opened Ogygia to all the members.

1600813034.korean: - 마침, 아쿠아랜드의 스파가 그리워지려던 찰나에, 오귀기아의 스파는 그 이상으로 좋은 휴식이 되었다.
1600813034.english: Just as I was about to miss the spa at Aqualand, the spa at Ougia was an even better rest.

1600813036.english: Good. Great~ Haha, this is it.

1600813037.korean: 하아~ 사령관이랑 스파라니… 이 누나는 꿈도 못 꿔본 일인 걸?
1600813037.english: Haa~ The Commander and a Spy… I couldn’t even dream of that!

1600813038.korean:
- 오르카에선 남자 샤워실이라 해도, 사실 상 내 전용 샤워실이나 다름 없다.
이렇게 대원들과 혼욕하는 것도 대원 간의 결속을 다지는데 좋은 경험이...
1600813038.english:
At Orca, even though it is the men's shower room, it is practically my private shower room.
 Taking a mixed bath with the team members like this is also a good experience for strengthening the bond between them...

1600813041.korean:
응? 이봐. 지금 여탕은 미어터지는 중이라고.
여긴 딱 봐도 자리가 널찍한데 좀 같이 쓰면 좋잖아.
1600813041.english:
Huh? Hey. The women's bath is packed right now.
 It's obvious there's plenty of space here, so it would be nice to share it.

1600813042.korean:
오, 그 수영복 안에 있는 게, 인류 재건의 상징이야? 
실루엣만 봐도 커 보이는데 제법?
1600813042.english:
Oh, is that thing inside the swimsuit a symbol of the reconstruction of humanity?
 It looks big just from the silhouette, quite a bit?

1600813043.korean: 이봐 하토르. 넌 저 인류 재건을 제대로 본 적 있어?
1600813043.english: Hey Hathor. Have you ever properly seen that reconstruction of humanity?

1600813044.english: … No. I've never had that happen to me.

1600813045.korean: 좋아, 쇠뿔도 단 김에 빼라고. 사령관. 하토르랑 같이 즐겨보지 않겠어?
1600813045.english: Fine, strike while the iron is hot. Commander, why don't you have some fun with Hathor?

1600813046.korean: 거기 잠깐, 풍기문란입니다! 우리 주인님을 감히 무분별하게 덮치진 마세요!
1600813046.english: Wait a minute, that is public indecency! Do not dare to recklessly assault our master!

1600813047.korean:
아… 그, 그게?! 주, 주인님의 욕탕에 혹시나 불온한 것들이 있지 않을까…
리리스가 잠시 숨어서 지켜보고 있었어요. 괘, 괜찮죠?
1600813047.english:
Ah… Th-that?! M-Master, I was worried there might be something ominous in your bath…
 Lilith was hiding and watching for a moment. You, you're okay, right?

1600813048.korean: - 할 말이 많긴 하지만… 그래도 경호대장인 만큼, 지금은 눈 감아주기로 했다.
1600813048.english: I have a lot to say, but... since he is the head of the security detail, I decided to let it slide for now.

1600813049.korean: 하핫, 농담이라고. 사실 나도 피곤해서 당장 딴 생각이 들진 않아.
1600813049.english: Haha, I'm just kidding. Actually, I'm tired too, so I can't think of anything else right now.

1600813050.korean:
- 다행히 칼립소가 욕탕에서 공연 음란죄를 벌였다며 화낼 일은 없을 예정이다.
의외로 우리 넷은 얌전히 탕에 앉아 오붓한 휴식만을 만끽했다.
1600813050.english:
Fortunately, there is no reason to get angry about Calypso committing public obscenity in the bathhouse.
 Surprisingly, the four of us sat quietly in the bath and simply enjoyed a cozy rest.

1600813052.korean: 고생하셨어요, 하토르 님. 활약이 대단하셨는 걸요?
1600813052.english: You worked hard, Hathor. You were amazing!

1600813053.korean:
하하~ 아냐 아냐. 그냥, 뭐… 오르카 대원들 모두가 노력했잖아.
나스호른 대장도 그렇고, 블러디팬서도, 엘븐도, 그리고… 칼립소도.
1600813053.english:
Haha~ No, no. It's just... well... all the Orca members tried their best, you know.
 Captain Nashorn, Bloody Panther, Elven, and… Calypso, too.

1600813054.english: By the way, Commander. Is Calypso okay?

1600813055.korean:
사과하지 사령관. 물러터졌다고 쓴소리 한 거 말이야.
난 인간들에 대해 그리 좋게 생각하는 편은 아니었어.
1600813055.english:
Apologize, Commander. I mean for the harsh words calling you too soft.
 I wasn't exactly a very good person when it came to humans.

1600813057.korean:
소피아가 무턱대고 언니만 싸고돌면서 아기 취급하는 게 어떤 부분에선 소름끼치고 마음에 들지 않았거든.
너도 혹시 그런 놈은 아닐까 좀 답답하게 느껴지긴 했어.
1600813057.english:
In some ways, it was creepy and I didn't like how Sophia blindly doted on her older sister and treated her like a baby.
 I did feel a bit frustrated, wondering if you might be that kind of guy too.

1600813058.korean:
…뭘 모르는 소리시군요. 주인님이 모두를 그만큼 아끼셨기에 여기까지 온 거죠.
당신들이 몇 십 년간 이기지도 못했던 그 철충을 주인님께서 끝내지 않았나요?
1600813058.english:
… You don't know what you're talking about. It is because the Master cared for everyone that much that we came this far.
 Didn't the Master finish off that Iron Bug that you couldn't even defeat for decades?

1600813059.korean:
하핫, 그래. 할 말이 없다.
과거에도 삼안의 그 꼴통 놈들이 수뇌부로 있던 탓에 블랙리버를 몰아내는 게 어려웠지.
1600813059.english:
Haha, yeah. I have nothing to say.
 It was difficult to drive out Black River in the past because those idiots from Saman were in the leadership.

1600813060.korean:
그녀석들에게 바이오로이드는 그저 도구였으니까.
명령을 내리면서도 대전략을 명확히 설정하지 않았고, 그저 수치와 성능만 믿고선 전장에 밀어넣는 식이었지.
1600813060.english:
Because to those guys, bioroids were just tools.
 Even while issuing orders, they didn't clearly establish a grand strategy; instead, they simply pushed into the battlefield relying solely on numbers and performance.

1600813061.korean:
…사령관은 그렇지 않아. 늘 우리를 먼저 생각하니까.
우리 역시 사령관이 믿음을 주는 만큼 노력으로 보답하고 싶어.
1600813061.english:
… The Commander isn't like that. Because he always thinks of us first.
 We also want to repay the Commander's trust with our own efforts.

1600813062.english: Because the Commander's dream is our Orca's dream.

1600813063.korean: - 괜스레 하토르와 라미아의 칭찬과 결의를 육성으로 듣게 되니 멋쩍었다.
1600813063.english: I felt awkward for no reason hearing Hathor and Lamia's praise and determination in their own voices.

1600813064.korean: 헌데, 그래서… 우리 미련한 언니는 어쩔 셈이지?
1600813064.english: But, so... what is my foolish older sister planning to do?

1600813065.korean: 그래서… 우리 언니가 정말 남길 원한다고 생각하나?
1600813065.english: So… do you think my sister really wants to keep it?

1600813066.english: Yeah, that’s so typical of you.

1600813067.korean: 아 라미아. 궁금한 게 있는데… 혹시 소피아가 좋아했던 나무나 꽃이 뭔지 알아?
1600813067.english: Ah, Lamia. I have a question... Do you happen to know what tree or flower Sophia liked?

1600813068.english: Huh? Why am I suddenly curious about that?

1600813069.korean:
칼립소가 합류하지 않는다 해도, 뭔가 좋은 선물을 해주고 싶거든.
안 그래도 레아랑 엘븐이 이곳이 하도 황량해서 떠나기 전에 뭐라도 심어보겠다고 팔 걷어붙이려는 모양인데…
1600813069.english:
Even if Calypso doesn't join, I want to give her a nice gift.
 It looks like Leah and Elven are rolling up their sleeves to plant something before leaving because this place is so desolate...

1600813070.korean:
글쎄… 소피아가 좋아했던 꽃이라...
그러고 보니… 딸 아이의 기일 마다 수국을 공수하긴 했었지.
1600813070.english:
Well... the flower Sophia liked...
 Come to think of it... I did get hydrangeas every anniversary of my daughter's death.

1600813071.english: Got it! I'll tell Elven and Leah!

1600813073.english: Yeah, sure. Shall I move aside?

1600813074.english: … Right. It’s something I couldn’t even dream of.

1600813075.english: What! How did you guys get in here?!

1600813080.english: Yeah. The recovery speed is fast, but...

1600813081.korean: 그동안의 감정을 추스르려면 시간이 필요할 거야.
1600813081.english: You will need time to compose yourself after all this time.

1600813082.english: Since Calypso said she would stay in Taiwan…

1600813083.english: I want to respect your choice.

1600814001.korean:
관리자님, 묻히신 곳은 좋습니까? 
눈 여겨 본 곳 중 가장 양지 바른 곳으로 마지막 인간 님과 함께 모셔드렸습니다.
1600814001.english:
Manager, is the burial site good?
 I escorted you to the sunniest spot among the places I had my eye on, along with the last human.

1600814002.korean: 전에 계시던 냉동 보존고 보단… 훨씬 따뜻하실 겁니다.
1600814002.english: It will be much warmer than the freezer you had before.

1600814003.korean:
…그나저나 이곳도, 철충의 공격으로 많이 황량해졌군요.
이곳은 소피아 님께서 취미 삼아 관리하던 수국 정원이 있던 걸로 기억하는데…
1600814003.english:
… Anyway, this place has become quite desolate due to the Iron蟲's attacks, too.
 I remember this place having a hydrangea garden that Sophia used to tend as a hobby...

1600814004.korean: 지금 여러분은 거기서 뭣들 하는 겁니까?
1600814004.english: What are you all doing up there right now?

1600814005.korean: 응? 아… 그게 그냥… 하하, 묘지인데 뭔가 휑한 것도 이상해서, 나무 좀 심고 있었어.
1600814005.english: Huh? Ah... well, just... haha, it's a graveyard, but it felt a bit strange that it was so bare, so I was planting some trees.

1600814006.korean: 저흰 신경 쓰지않으셔도 돼요. 자리 비켜드릴까요?
1600814006.english: You don't need to worry about us. Shall I move over?

1600814007.english: … Um, since we're at it, the one our manager liked...

1600814008.english: No... no... please do as you wish.

1600814009.korean: 어차피 시간이 남는다면, 제가 심어서 가꾸면 될 일이니…
1600814009.english: Since I have spare time anyway, I can just plant and tend to it myself…

1600814011.korean:
아니… 엄마. 여기서 푹 쉬세요. 이제 더는 누구도 죽지 않을 거예요.
비록, 시체는 못 찾았지만… 큰 언니도 묘비를 만들어 놨어요.
1600814011.english:
No... Mom. Please get some good rest here. No one will die anymore.
 Even though we couldn't find the body... my eldest sister made a tombstone too.

1600814012.korean:
엄마… 마지막 인간 님의 합류 요청은… 거절했어요.
엄마 홀로 이곳에 남게 되면, 많이 쓸쓸할 거잖아요.
1600814012.english:
Mom... I declined the last human's request to join...
 If Mom is left here all alone, she will be very lonely.

1600814013.korean: 라미아도… 큰 언니도, 저 때문에 고생 많이 했잖아요. 라미아는 절 대신해서 훌륭한 저항군의 일원이 될 거예요.
1600814013.english: Lamia... and my eldest sister, you know how much you suffered because of me. Lamia will become an excellent member of the resistance in my place.

1600814014.korean: 아이고, 누구 입영시켜? 눈물 콧물 질질 흘리는 거 봐. 진짜.
1600814014.english: Oh my god, who are you sending to the army? Look at them, tears and snot streaming down their faces. Seriously.

1600814015.korean: 너?! 크흠… 흐읍… 꺼, 꺼져 근육 뇌…
1600814015.english: You?! *Cough*... *Gasp*... Get, get lost, muscle brain...

1600814016.korean:
언니, 사령관이 언니 죄도 묻지 않겠다 하고... 
이제 언니도 보아하니, 제정신으로 살기로 마음을 바꾼 거 같은데.
1600814016.english:
Sister, the commander said he wouldn't even hold you accountable for your crimes...
 Now that I see it, it looks like you've changed your mind and decided to live a normal life.

1600814017.korean: 나랑 같이 오르카로 갈 생각은 없어?
1600814017.english: Don't you want to go to Orca with me?

1600814018.korean: …내가 무슨 낯짝으로 오르카에 가니. 혐오스럽게 느낄 분들이 많을 거야.
1600814018.english: … How dare I go to Orca? There are going to be a lot of people who find it disgusting.

1600814019.korean: 혐오스럽게 느낄 분이라는 게 설마 날 지칭하는 건 아니겠지?
1600814019.english: You aren't referring to me when you say 'the person who would feel disgusted,' are you?

1600814021.korean:
소피아는 수국을 좋아한다고 했나? 
이 근방에는 없어, 산지를 돌아다니며 겨우 꺾어왔다.
1600814021.english:
Did Sophia say she likes hydrangeas?
 There aren't any around here, so I had to wander around the mountains to barely manage to pick one.

1600814023.korean: …그, 내가 때린 곳은 이제 좀 괜찮아졌나? 생각해보니 너무 세게 제압했던 것 같군.
1600814023.english: … Um, is the spot where I hit it feeling a bit better now? Come to think of it, I think I subdued it too hard.

1600814024.korean: 괜찮습니다. 남아있는 상처도 며칠 후면 말끔히 나을 겁니다.
1600814024.english: It's okay. The remaining wound will heal completely in a few days.

1600814026.korean:
이곳에 남는다는 소릴 들었다. 
어머니 때문이라면 어쩔 수 없다만…
1600814026.english:
I heard that you are staying here.
 If it's because of my mother, I guess it can't be helped...

1600814027.korean: 우리가 불편해서 이곳에 남는게 이유라면, 멸망 전 일에 대해… 다시 사과하고 싶다.
1600814027.english: If the reason we are staying here is because we are uncomfortable, then regarding what happened before the apocalypse… I want to apologize again.

1600814029.korean: 야 바르그! 여기 있었어?! 한참 찾았잖아!
1600814029.english: Hey, Barg! You were here?! I've been looking for you for ages!

1600814031.korean: 다친 곳도 별로 없는데 뭐~ 이 언니는 괜찮아~
1600814031.english: I'm barely hurt, so whatever~ This older sister is fine~

1600814032.korean: 그때 심한 말을 했던 건… 도가 지나쳤습니다.
1600814032.english: Saying harsh things back then... went too far.

1600814033.korean:
아? 괜찮아… 사실 네가 아니었으면… 난 다시 일어서지 못했을 거야.
…고마워. 그때는 오히려 너한테 도움을 받았으니까.
1600814033.english:
Ah? It's okay... Actually, if it weren't for you... I wouldn't have been able to get back on my feet.
 … Thank you. Because back then, I actually received help from you.

1600814034.korean:
바르그한테 준 거. 이거 내가 같이 찾아서 꺾어준 거다?
나한테 대신 주라고 떠넘겼는데… 사과하고 싶어 하는 거 같아서 양보한 거야.
1600814034.english:
This is what I gave to Varg. I found this together with him and broke it for him, you know?
 They tried to pass the responsibility on to me, but I gave in because it seemed like they wanted to apologize.

1600814035.korean: 가슴은 무거운 주제에… 입은 상당히 가볍군.
1600814035.english: You have such a heavy heart... yet you have such a loose tongue.

1600814037.korean: 칼립소… 우리 같이 바깥에 나가보는 건 어때?
1600814037.english: Calypso… How about we go outside together?

1600814039.korean: 제가 가고 싶다고 하여, 갈 수 있는 것도 아닙니다. 마지막 인간 님의 입장도 있지요.
1600814039.english: Just because I want to go doesn't mean I can. There is also the position of the last human being.

1600814040.korean: 추모하러 와주셔서 감사합니다. 조금 생각이 많아져서 그러니, 잠시... 혼자 있게 해주세요.
1600814040.english: Thank you for coming to pay your respects. I am a bit deep in thought right now, so please... leave me alone for a moment.

1600814041.korean: - 소피아의 묘지 주변을 꾸며줄 정원을 만든다는 소식에, 잠깐이지만 손수 팔을 걷어붙이고 일하는 중이었다.
1600814041.english: Upon hearing the news that a garden was being built to decorate the area around Sophia's grave, I rolled up my sleeves and was working on it myself, albeit briefly.

1600814042.korean: 얼마만의 일인가요 정말? 간만에 본업으로 돌아간 것 같네요.
1600814042.english: How long has it been? Really? It feels like I've finally returned to my main job after a long time.

1600814043.korean: 엘븐이랑 저희가 힘을 합하면 내일 바로 꽃을 틔울 거예요.
1600814043.english: If we join forces with the Elven, we will make the flowers bloom tomorrow.

1600814044.korean: 안타까운 아이던데… 엄마가 좋아하는 꽃들이 피어난 걸 보면 분명 기뻐할 거예요.
1600814044.english: She was such a pitiful child... She will surely be happy to see the flowers her mom likes bloom.

1600814045.korean: 이봐 사령… 뭐야? 당신 직접 삽질은 왜 하는 거야…?
1600814045.english: Hey Commander… what? Why are you digging yourself…?

1600814046.english: There are plenty of soldiers available to assign to a task like this.

1600814047.korean: - 나는 땀을 닦으며 레아가 나눠준 씨앗들을 뿌렸다.
1600814047.english: I wiped my sweat and sowed the seeds Leah had given me.

1600814048.korean:
어이 사령관. 이런 일에 시간 태우지 말고… 
내일 가기 전 우리 언니랑 데이트나 해주면 좋겠는데?
1600814048.english:
Hey Commander. Don't waste time on things like this...
 I wish you would go on a date with my sister before you leave tomorrow.

1600814049.korean:
그래. 아직도 언니는 당신한테 미안해하고 있다고.
거창한 건 바라지 않아. 얘기라도 잠깐 나눠줬으면 좋겠어.
1600814049.english:
Right. Your sister still feels sorry for you.
 I'm not asking for anything grand. I just wish we could talk for a moment.

1600814050.korean:
- 이제 사건이 마무리 되었으니 기지 시찰을 이번엔 꼭 제대로 가리라 마음을 먹었지만…
이왕 칼립소가 이곳에 남는다면 마음의 응어리는 풀어주고 가야겠단 생각이 들었다.
1600814050.english:
Now that the case is over, I was determined to conduct a proper base inspection this time, but…
 I thought that since Calypso was staying here anyway, I should release the knots in my heart before leaving.

1600814051.korean:
- 세레스티아와 레아가 수고해준 덕분에… 소피아의 묘지 부근에 씨를 뿌린 수국이 피어났다.
소피아의 묘비 앞에서 잠시 묵념하며, 그녀의 명복을 기리던 중, 사뿐한 발자국 소리가 들렸다.
1600814051.english:
Thanks to the efforts of Celestia and Leah… the hydrangeas that were sown near Sophia’s grave bloomed.
 While paying a moment of silence in front of Sophia's tombstone to honor her memory, the sound of soft footsteps was heard.

1600814052.korean:
언제 이곳에… 꽃들이… 앗?
죄송합니다… 인간 님께서 저를 보시자고 했기에, 왔습니다.
1600814052.english:
When did the flowers come here...? Huh?
 I am sorry... I came because you, Human, asked to see me.

1600814053.korean: 왜… 그렇게 뚫어져라 보시죠? 혹시… 어색해서 그런 것인지요?
1600814053.english: Why… are you staring at me like that? Is it… because you feel awkward?

1600814054.korean: 예, 예엣?! 아… 그, 그게… 죄송합니다. 금방 갈아입고 오겠습니다.
1600814054.english: Yeah, yeah?! Ah... th-that... I'm sorry. I'll be right back after changing.

1600814055.korean: - 칼립소는 아오자이를 입은 채, 내 앞에서 주춤거렸다.
1600814055.english: - Calypso hesitated in front of me while wearing an ao dai.

1600814056.english: … Sophia, no. Mom… these are the clothes she left for me.

1600814057.korean:
- 칼립소는 미리 준비 해온 꽃들을 헌화한 뒤, 묵념했다.
잠시의 침묵 후, 고개를 든 칼립소는 아오자이를 매만졌다.
1600814057.english:
Calypso laid down the flowers she had prepared in advance and observed a moment of silence.
 After a brief silence, Calypso raised her head and adjusted her ao dai.

1600814058.korean:
- 바이오로이드에게 이 옷을 줬다는 것만 보더라도, 
소피아가 칼립소를 얼마나 아꼈는지 짐작할 수 있었다.
1600814058.english:
Just looking at the fact that this outfit was given to a bioroid,
 I could tell how much Sophia cherished Calypso.

1600814059.korean: 돌아가신 이후론 단 한 번도 입지 못했었지요.
1600814059.english: I haven't been able to wear it even once since he passed away.

1600814060.korean: …이 옷을 보기만 해도 그저 죄스럽기만 했습니다.
1600814060.english: … Just looking at this outfit made me feel nothing but guilty.

1600814061.korean:
그렇게 몇 년, 몇십 년을 은둔하며 회피했고… 오귀기아의 아이들과, 큰 언니 역시 제게서 사라졌죠.
저는 저를 포함해 제가 짊어진 모든 것들이 저주스럽고 원망스러웠습니다.
1600814061.english:
And so, I lived in seclusion and avoided them for several years, several decades… Oghigia’s children and my eldest sister also disappeared from me.
 I felt cursed and resentful of everything I carried, including myself.

1600814062.korean:
제 죄를 용서할 사람은 이 세상 그 어디에도 없습니다…인간 님께서 
제 과거를 대신 속죄해 주신다 한들, 이 칼립소의 목숨이 다할 때까진… 씻어낼 수 없는 흉측한 상처로 남아 살을 도려내고 싶은 충동과 싸워야겠지요.
1600814062.english:
There is no one anywhere in this world who can forgive my sins... Dear Human
 Even if you were to atone for my past on my behalf, until the day I, Calypso, die... it would remain a hideous scar that cannot be washed away, and I would have to fight the urge to tear my own flesh away.

1600814063.korean: - 나는 칼립소의 손을 잡아주었다. 그녀의 장갑 밖으로 뻗은 손톱이 들어갔다.
1600814063.english: I held Calypso's hand. Her fingernails, extending from under her glove, went inside.

1600814064.english: … Yes, do you have a question?

1600814066.korean:
- 칼립소는 잠시 걸음을 멈춘 후, 하늘을 올려다보았다.
잠시의 침묵 후, 그녀는 숨을 크게 내뱉으며 털어놓았다.
1600814066.english:
Calypso paused for a moment, then looked up at the sky.
 After a brief silence, she let out a deep breath and confessed.

1600814067.korean:
- 그렇게 이야기를 들은 후, 나는 할 말을 잃어버렸다.
그녀에게 용서니, 화해니 조언 삼아 말했던 것은 너무도 경솔한 짓이었다.
1600814067.english:
After hearing that, I was speechless.
 It was a very rash thing to have spoken to her as advice about forgiveness and reconciliation.

1600814068.english: Yes. What are you curious about?

1600814069.korean:
…인간 님께 화가 나지 않았더라면 거짓말이겠지요.
하지만… 인간 님과 얽힌 모든 분들은 저를 포기하지 않았습니다.
1600814069.english:
… It would be a lie to say I wasn't angry at you, Human.
 However… everyone involved with you, Human, did not give up on me.

1600814071.korean:
앙금을 모두 털어냈다고 말하긴 힘들겠지만...
전투 중 인간 님과 휘하의 바이오로이드 분들이 모두 하나 되는 모습을 보며…
1600814071.english:
It's hard to say that I've gotten rid of all the bitterness, but...
 Watching the Human and the Bio-androids under their command all become one during the battle…

1600814072.korean: 인간 님께선 나쁜 의도가 없음을… 바이오로이드 분들을 아끼시는 모습을 깨달았습니다.
1600814072.english: I realized that you, Human, have no bad intentions... and that you care for the Bio-Roids.

1600814073.korean: 그리고... 지금, 저를 위해 울어주고 계시지 않습니까?
1600814073.english: And... aren't you crying for me right now?

1600814074.korean: - 나는 황급히 눈물을 숨겼지만, 칼립소는 조심스럽게 까치발을 들어올려 닦아주려 했다.
1600814074.english: I hurriedly hid my tears, but Calypso carefully stood on tiptoe to wipe them away.

1600814075.korean: - 하는 수 없이 내가 허리를 숙여주자, 그녀는 미리 꺼낸 손수건으로 내 눈 주변을 닦아주었다.
1600814075.english: As I had no choice but to bend down, she wiped the area around my eyes with a handkerchief she had taken out beforehand.

1600814076.korean: 저를 위해 울어주셨던 인간 분이 계신다면, 그걸로도 충분합니다.
1600814076.english: If there is anyone who cried for me, that is enough.

1600814077.english: I'm doing this for exercise for the first time in a while.

1600814083.korean: 그 옷 엄청 예쁘네. 누가 선물해준 거야?
1600814083.english: That outfit is really pretty. Who gave it to you as a gift?

1600814086.korean: 모든 과거를… 나한테 말해줄 수 있겠어?
1600814086.english: Could you tell me your whole past...?

1600814087.english: It might be painful... but I want to hear it.

1600814089.english: May I ask just one thing?

1600814090.english: You must have been disappointed by my remarks…

1600814091.korean: 어째서... 아무 말도 안 했던 거야?

1600815001.korean: 정원을 꾸며주셔서… 감사합니다, 인간님. 엄마께서도… 이곳을 아주 좋아하실 겁니다.
1600815001.english: Thank you for decorating the garden… Human. Mom… will really like this place too.

1600815002.korean: - 내 질문에 칼립소는 걸음을 멈추었다. 그녀의 머리카락이 수국과 같은 연보랏빛으로 반짝였다.
1600815002.english: Calypso stopped walking at my question. Her hair shimmered with a pale purple hue like hydrangeas.

1600815003.english: … You really are a very affectionate person.

1600815004.korean: - 역시 거절인가 싶던 그때, 칼립소가 희미한 웃음을 지었다.
1600815004.english: Just when I thought it was a rejection after all, Calypso gave a faint smile.

1600815005.korean: 인간 님, 오귀기아와 칼립소에 대한 이야기를 아십니까?
1600815005.english: Mr. Human, do you know the story of Ogygia and Calypso?

1600815006.korean:
인간 님들의 신화에서 칼립소는 오귀기아를 다스리던 여신이었다고 들었습니다.
그녀는 평생 오디세우스라는 인간 님을 사랑했다고 들었지요.
1600815006.english:
I heard that in human mythology, Calypso was the goddess who ruled Ogygia.
 I heard that she loved a human named Odysseus her whole life.

1600815007.korean: …하지만, 칼립소는 오디세우스를 결국 보내주었습니다. 너무도 사랑했지만요.
1600815007.english: … However, Calypso eventually let Odysseus go. Even though she loved him so much.

1600815008.korean: 그 후, 칼립소는 어떻게 되었는지 아시는지요?
1600815008.english: Do you know what became of Calypso after that?

1600815009.korean: - 당연히 처음 듣는 이야기니 어떻게 대답해야 할지 몰라 머리를 긁적였다.
1600815009.english: Since it was naturally the first time I was hearing this, I scratched my head, not knowing how to answer.

1600815010.korean: 슬픔에 못 이겨 스스로 목숨을 끊었다고 하지요.
1600815010.english: They say he took his own life, unable to bear the grief.

1600815011.korean:
…저도 한때는 죽으려고 했었습니다.
스스로 목숨을 끊질 못한다면… 누구라도 좋으니 이 저주받은 목숨을 내어 주고 싶었죠.
1600815011.english:
… I, too, once tried to kill myself.
 If I couldn't take my own life... I wanted to give this cursed life to anyone.

1600815012.korean:
그렇게 몇 십 년이 지나고… 결국 그 슬픔은 억지스러운 분노가 되더군요…
마리아 리오보로스도, 삼안의 그 명령권자도 모두 죽고 아무 것도 할게 없어진 그 이후로도…
1600815012.english:
Decades passed like that... and eventually, that sorrow turned into forced anger...
 Even after Maria Rioboros and the commander of the Three Eyes were both dead and there was nothing left to do...

1600815013.korean: …엠프레시스 하운드를 다시 마주쳤을 때까지도 이런 감정이었습니다.
1600815013.english: … I felt this way even when I encountered the Empress Hound again.

1600815014.korean:
글쎄요... 지금 감정이 무엇인지, 솔직히 잘 모르겠습니다.
어떻게 살아야 할지, 앞으로는 무얼 해야 할지… 혼란스러울 뿐이죠.
1600815014.english:
Well... honestly, I'm not sure what my feelings are right now.
 I'm just confused about how to live and what to do in the future.

1600815015.korean: 제가 분노를 품을 대상도, 용서받을 대상도 없다면… 앞으로는 무엇을 위해서 살아가야 하는 걸까...
1600815015.english: If I have no one to harbor anger toward, and no one to be forgiven by… what am I to live for from now on…

1600815018.english: Looks like you don't like Calypso?

1600815019.korean: 그 여신의 이름을 따와 지은 게 제 이름이라, 신경이 쓰여서 그렇습니다.
1600815019.english: It bothers me because my name was taken from that goddess.

1600815020.korean: 하나 더 내려오는 전설이 있긴 한데. 들어 볼래?
1600815020.english: There is one more legend passed down. Do you want to hear it?

1600815021.korean: 오디세우스를 보낸 칼립소는 외로움에 몇 년, 몇 십 년을 홀로 지내다가…
1600815021.english: Calypso, having sent Odysseus away, spent years, decades alone in loneliness...

1600815022.korean: 오디세우스 귓싸대기를 열 번 왕복해 때릴 정도로 잘 생긴 남자를 만나 결혼해서 행복하게 살았어.
1600815022.english: She met a man handsome enough to slap Odysseus ten times back and forth, married him, and lived happily ever after.

1600815024.korean: 야, 칼립소. 진짜라니까? 왜 못 믿어?!
1600815024.english: Hey, Calypso. I'm telling you, it's true! Why can't you believe me?!

1600815025.english: Tell them to believe what is actually trustworthy, seriously.

1600815027.english: I remembered. Another ending to Calypso.

1600815028.korean: 제게 처음 이 신화를 말해 준 인간 님이 말하길…
1600815028.english: The human who first told me this myth said…

1600815029.korean: 잘 생긴 남자를 만나 결혼해서 행복하게 살았다는군요.
1600815029.english: I heard she met a handsome man, got married, and lived happily ever after.

1600815030.korean:
진짜인지 아닌지는 모르지만.
어쩌면 의외로 사실이 아닐까, 막연히 생각하고 있습니다.
1600815030.english:
I don't know if it's true or not.
 I am vaguely thinking that perhaps it might actually be true, surprisingly.

1600815031.korean: - 칼립소는 알 듯 모를 듯한 대답을 마친 뒤, 내게 질문했다.
1600815031.english: After giving a vague answer, Calypso asked me a question.

1600815032.english: … I would like to ask you, Human.

1600815033.korean: 이런 죄 많은 여자를… 용서해주실 수 있습니까?
1600815033.english: Can you... forgive such a sinful woman?

1600815034.korean:
…물론, 인간 님이 용서를 하실 수 있진 않으시겠죠.
하지만… 이 세상에 마지막 남은 인간 님이시라면…
1600815034.english:
… Of course, you wouldn't be able to forgive, Human.
 But… if you are the last human remaining in this world…

1600815035.korean: 딱 한 번이라도… 용서 받을 수 있다, 괜찮다… 라는 말을 들을 수 있을까요?
1600815035.english: Will I be able to hear the words, "You can be forgiven," or "It's okay," even just once?

1600815037.korean:
- 유감이지만, 칼립소가 소피아에게 저지른 죄를 일목요연하게 따질 수 없다.
이미 소피아도, 과거의 인간들도 사라졌기 때문이었다.
1600815037.english:
It is regrettable, but it is impossible to clearly determine the crime Calypso committed against Sophia.
 It was because Sophia and the people of the past had already disappeared.

1600815038.korean: - 그렇기에 나는 칼립소의 죄를 간접적으로나마 덜 수 있는 마지막 인간이다.
1600815038.english: That is why I am the last human who can at least indirectly lessen Calypso's sin.

1600815039.korean: - 괜스레 어깨가 무거워진다… 마지막 인간이 갖는 위치를 재차 실감할 수 있었다.
1600815039.english: My shoulders feel heavy for no reason... I realized once again the position of the last human.

1600815042.korean: 그건, 오귀기아의 지배인으로써 당연히 할 일을…
1600815042.english: That is, naturally, what I should have done as the manager of Oghigia…

1600815043.english: … Is that the last human's answer?

1600815044.korean: 정말... 제가 그렇게 생각해도 되겠습니까? 제 죄를 용서받을 수 있는… 겁니까?
1600815044.english: Really... may I think that way? Can my sins be forgiven...?

1600815045.korean:
- 나머지는 칼립소가 극복해야 할 몫이었다. 
얼마간 침묵이 흐른 후, 칼립소는 잠시 뒤로 물러선 뒤, 예를 갖추어 인사했다.
1600815045.english:
The rest was up to Calypso to overcome.
 After a brief silence, Calypso stepped back and bowed respectfully.

1600815046.korean:
칼립소, 명예로운 오케아니데스 프로젝트의 둘째.
마지막 인간님께 예를 갖춰 인사 올리겠습니다.
1600815046.english:
Calypso, the second of the honorable Oceanides Project.
 I will pay my respects to the last human.

1600815047.korean: 제 모든 죄를 용서하신 마지막 인간님을, 제 주인님으로 극진히… 모시겠습니다.
1600815047.english: I will serve the last human who has forgiven all my sins with the utmost devotion as my master.

1600815048.korean:
이 칼립소는 앞으로 마지막 인간님을 주인님으로 모시며,
주인님만의 검이 될 것을 영원히 맹세하겠습니다.
1600815048.english:
This Calypso will henceforth serve the last human as her master, and
 I swear forever to be your sword alone, Master.

1600815049.korean: - 대답을 마친 칼립소는 무릎을 꿇은 후, 나를 올려다 보았다.
1600815049.english: After finishing her answer, Calypso knelt down and looked up at me.

1600815050.english: My vow, my oath… will you accept it, Master…?

1600815051.korean:
- 나는 대답 대신 칼립소를 꼭 끌어안아주었다.
잠시 당혹스러워하던 그녀는 머뭇거리다 양 팔로 감싸 안았다.
1600815051.english:
Instead of answering, I gave Calypso a tight hug.
 She hesitated for a moment, then wrapped her arms around him.

1600815052.english: It's warm... warmer than a hand...

1600815053.korean:
삼안은 저와 같은 해양 생물이었던 언니의 성공을 발판으로 삼아, 
같은 해양 생물인 해파리의 유전자를 사용한 바이오로이드를 소피아님께 만들라 하셨습니다.
1600815053.english:
Saman, using the success of my older sister—who was a marine life like me—as a stepping stone,
 You instructed Sophia to create a bioroid using the genes of a jellyfish, which is a marine creature.

1600815054.korean:
저는 삼안에서 기대를 많이 안은 채 생산된 바이오로이드였지요.
절제된 행동과, 임무 성공을 위한 냉정한 성격이 강화되어 설계되었지만…
1600815054.english:
I was a bioroid produced by Saman with high expectations.
 Although designed with reinforced behavior and a cold personality for mission success…

1600815055.korean:
윗분들의 기대와 다르게 회복력과 면역력에 온 신체 에너지를 써야 했었죠.
소피아 님은 절 폐기할 수도 있었지만… 어떻게든 보완하여 절 다듬었죠.
1600815055.english:
Contrary to the expectations of my superiors, I had to use all my physical energy on recovery and immunity.
 Sophia could have discarded me, but… she somehow supplemented and refined me.

1600815056.korean: 게다가 소피아 님은… 딸 유전자 또한 제게 선물했습니다.
1600815056.english: Furthermore, Sophia… gifted me a daughter’s genes as well.

1600815057.korean:
처음엔 내키지 않았습니다. 전 완벽하지 못한 바이오로이드 인 것 같았어요.
잘 해주려는 것 자체가 싫었습니다.
1600815057.english:
At first, I wasn't keen on it. I felt like I was an imperfect bioroid.
 I hated the very act of trying to be nice to him.

1600815058.korean: 하지만 기일이 되면 종일 애처롭게 따님 사진을 보며 우시는 모습을 여러 번 봤었죠.
1600815058.english: However, on the anniversary of the death, I saw him weeping pitifully all day long while looking at his daughter's photo many times.

1600815059.korean: 조금만 딸 아이한테 신경 써줄 걸. 내 출세보단, 아이를 먼저 챙길 걸…
1600815059.english: I should have paid a little more attention to my daughter. I should have taken care of her first, rather than my own success…

1600815060.korean: …카리브디스 언니와 전 그 모습을 수없이 보았지요. 어째선지 그 모습을 볼 때면 이상하게 마음이 아파왔습니다.
1600815060.english: … Charybdis and I have seen that sight countless times. For some reason, whenever I saw it, my heart ached strangely.

1600815061.english: … She’s not even my real daughter.

1600815062.korean:
그랬으면 안 됐지만… 누군가의 특별한 소유물이라는 위치에 집착해왔어요.
큰 언니는 그걸 알면서도… 묻지 않으셨고요.
1600815062.english:
I shouldn't have... but I've been obsessed with the position of being someone's special possession.
 My eldest sister knew that, but... she didn't ask.

1600815063.korean: - 칼립소는 울음을 참고, 이내 고개를 돌려 나를 바라봤다.
1600815063.english: Calypso held back her tears and soon turned her head to look at me.

1600815064.korean: 그분이 돌아가신 이후, 어둠만 가득했습니다. 이유 없이 화가 났고, 이유 없이… 슬펐습니다.
1600815064.english: Since he passed away, only darkness filled the air. I was angry for no reason, and for no reason… I was sad.

1600815065.korean:
주인님께 잘못까지 저질렀지만… 절 대해주시는 주인님을 보며 
다시금 제 존재가 인정받는 느낌이었습니다.
1600815065.english:
Even though I have done wrong to my Master... seeing how he treats me
 It felt like my existence was being acknowledged once again.

1600815066.korean: 이젠 주인님을 위해서, 주인님을 지키기 위해서… 이 칼립소는 나아가겠습니다.
1600815066.english: Now, for my Master, to protect my Master… I, Calypso, will march forward.

1600815067.korean: - 약간의 훌쩍거림 후, 다시 물러 선 칼립소는 담담한 얼굴로 내게 고개를 숙였다.
1600815067.english: After a slight sniffle, Calypso stepped back again and bowed her head to me with a calm expression.

1600815068.english: Please give me an order, Master.

1600815069.korean: - 거창하게 말하는 것 같아 살짝 부담스러웠지만, 나는 칼립소에게 손을 내밀며 웃어보였다.
1600815069.english: I felt a little hesitant because it seemed like I was saying something grand, but I smiled and reached out my hand to Calypso.

1600815072.korean: …얼씨구, 똥폼은 다 잡고 남겠다느니 뭐니 하더니.
1600815072.english: … Well done, putting on airs and saying they’d stay and all that.

1600815075.english: You really need to get hit to stop, right?

1600815076.korean: 때려? 언니. 이번에도 우리 재밌는 거 한 번 해볼까?
1600815076.english: Do you want to hit me? Sister. Shall we try something fun again this time?

1600815078.korean: 울보, 또 우는 거 봐. 뭐 이리 질질 짜? 바닷물이 그래서 짠가? 언니면 나이값 좀 해 제발.
1600815078.english: Crybaby, look at you crying again. Why are you whining like this? Is that why the seawater is salty? Please, act your age.

1600815080.korean: - 출항하기 전, 오르카 함교에서 대만 섬을 바라보던 칼립소와 라미아에게 다가와 말했다.
1600815080.english: - Before setting sail, he approached Calypso and Lamia, who were looking at Taiwan Island from the Orca's bridge, and spoke.

1600815081.korean: - 타이난에 가득 심어둔 수국은 마치 배웅하듯 우리들에게 꽃잎을 흔들었다.
1600815081.english: The hydrangeas planted in abundance in Tainan waved their petals at us as if bidding us farewell.

1600815083.korean: - 내가 수국들을 가리키자, 칼립소는 애써 눈을 비빈 뒤 이내, 손을 흔들었다.
1600815083.english: When I pointed at the hydrangeas, Calypso rubbed her eyes with difficulty and then waved her hand.

1600815084.english: Mom, big sister…! I’ll be back!

1600815086.english: Why are you being so cheesy with your greeting?

1600815087.korean: - 라미아는 그러면서도 슬쩍 손을 들곤 흔들었다.
1600815087.english: Lamia, while doing so, subtly raised her hand and waved it.

1600815088.korean: - 은둔했던 궁전을 떠나보내는 그녀들의 모습을 나는 잠시 더, 지켜보기로 했다.
1600815088.english: I decided to watch them leave the secluded palace for a little longer.

1600815089.english: The Palace of the Reclusive Goddess END.

1600815090.english: I hope you rest well… Sophia, too.

1600815091.english: You... have no intention of joining?

1600815097.korean: 혹시 칼립소 이야기에 다른 결말은 없어?
1600815097.english: Is there by any chance another ending to the story of Calypso?

1600815101.korean: 내가 누군가한테 이미 비슷한 말을 했었어.
1600815101.english: I've already said something similar to someone.

1600815102.english: Since I am the only human...

1600815103.korean: 내 행동이 인간의 보편적인 행동양식이 아닐까? 라고 말이야.
1600815103.english: I mean, isn't my behavior a universal human pattern?

1600815104.english: Of course, I don't know what Sophia will think, but...

1600815105.korean: 넌, 하토르랑 라미아를 목숨 걸고 구하려 했어.
1600815105.english: You risked your life to save Hathor and Lamia.

1600815107.korean: 그 정도라면... 널… 용서해줄 수 있다고 생각해.
1600815107.english: If it's just that... I think I can... forgive you.

1600815112.english: It's almost time to close the hatch.

1600815115.english: Aren't you going to say hello, Lamia?

1600816001.korean: 주인님, 이번에 제가 새로 만든 미트파이에요. 드셔보실래요?
1600816001.english: Master, this is a new meat pie I made recently. Would you like to try some?

1600816003.korean: 흐잇… 왜 주인님께 드릴 미트파이를 먼저 먹는...!
1600816003.english: Hmph... Why are you eating the meat pie meant for Master first...!

1600816004.korean: 제법이군요. 파이 반죽이 질지 않고, 씹는 촉감은 합격입니다.
1600816004.english: That's pretty good. The pie dough isn't mushy, and the texture is excellent.

1600816005.korean: 에헤헤헷… 칭찬받았어… 정말 제 파이가 맛있으신가요?
1600816005.english: Hehehe... I got a compliment... Do you really find my pie delicious?

1600816006.english: … What is that green monster next to the meat pie?

1600816007.korean: 으잉?! 그, 그건… 하치코가 만든… 미, 민트초코 미트파이…
1600816007.english: Huh?! Th-that is… the… mint chocolate meat pie… made by Hachiko…

1600816008.english: … You're saying you're mixing mint chocolate and meat pie? That sounds like a flavor even the British would avoid.

1600816012.korean: 뭐, 뭡니까?! 민트초코와 돼지 고기가… 서로 내가 맛있다며 모가지 따는 소리를 내는 이 맛은…?!
1600816012.english: W-what is this?! Mint chocolate and pork… making sounds like they’re slitting each other’s throats, each claiming to be the tastiest… this taste…?!

1600816013.english: Hmph... Master said it was delicious... Eh...

1600816014.korean: 이런 음식을 주인님께 진상했단 말입니까? 대체 오르카는 어떤 곳이죠…?!
1600816014.english: Did you really present food like this to the Master? Just what kind of place is Orca…?!

1600816015.english: … What on earth are these chocolates?

1600816016.korean: 주인님께선 설마… 이 초콜릿들을 다 드신단 말씀이십니까?
1600816016.english: Master, surely you aren't saying... that you're going to eat all of these chocolates?

1600816017.korean: 단 걸 좋아하진 않지만. 어쨌든 제가 먹어보며 드실만한 음식인지 평가를...
1600816017.english: I don't really like sweets, but anyway, I'll try it and give you my assessment on whether it's something you might enjoy...

1600816018.korean: 아닙니다, 주인님께 올릴 음식은 제가 먹어봐야 하는 법… 그러니…
1600816018.english: No, I must taste the food I offer to my master... So...

1600816019.korean: …으읍… 하아, 이제 다 한 번씩 맛보았으니.
1600816019.english: … Mmm… Haa, now that I’ve tasted everything once.

1600816020.korean: - 칼립소는 그날, 다프네에게서 소화제 두 알을 받았다.
1600816020.english: That day, Calypso received two digestive pills from Daphne.

1600816023.english: Would you like to try the dish I made?

1600816025.korean: 저는, 주인님의 식단을 책임지는, 책임자… 이런 것에 굴할 순 없습니다.
1600816025.english: I cannot yield to the person in charge of my master's diet...

1600816026.korean: - 내가 말릴 새도 없이 칼립소는 아탈란테의 요리들을 입 안으로 넣었다.
1600816026.english: Before I could stop her, Calypso put Atalante's dishes into her mouth.

1600816028.korean: 저, 정말입니까?! 드디어 제 요리 실력이…
1600816028.english: Me? Really?! Finally, my cooking skills…

1600816029.korean: 이 세상 음식이 아닌 듯한 맛이…
1600816029.english: It tastes like food from another world…

1600816030.english: - … Calypso's body attempted to ascend into the sky.

1600816031.korean: …어제랑 그제는 기절해서 실려가셨다고 하는데, 몸은 괜찮사옵니까?
1600816031.english: … I heard that he fainted and was carried away yesterday and the day before. Is he feeling alright?

1600816032.korean: 절대, 저는 굴하지 않습니다… 이번에도 주인님께 진상할 음식을 맛보겠어요.
1600816032.english: I will absolutely not give up... I will taste the food to present to my master this time as well.

1600816033.korean: 훗, 그렇습니까? 드셔보시지요. 특별히 이번은 중화 요리로 준비했사옵니다.
1600816033.english: Hmph, is that so? Please have a taste. I have specially prepared Chinese cuisine for you this time.

1600816034.korean: - 칼립소는 떨리는 손으로 젓가락을 집으며 그녀의 음식을 입 안에 넣었다.
1600816034.english: Calypso picked up the chopsticks with trembling hands and put her food into her mouth.

1600816036.korean:
…인정하기 싫지만 놀랍군요. 이 소롱포의 육즙은 놀라울 정도로 달콤합니다.
그리고 이 황금 볶음밥은 노른자가 밥알 하나하나 잘 코팅된 것도 모자라, 식감 또한 부드럽군요.
1600816036.english:
… I hate to admit it, but it’s surprising. The broth of this xiao long bao is surprisingly sweet.
 And as if the yolk wasn't well coated on every single grain of rice in this golden fried rice, the texture is also soft.

1600816037.english: Hehe, thank you for the accurate assessment.

1600816038.korean: 솔직히 말씀드리면… 오귀기아에서 일했던 소완보다 실력이 좋으시군요.
1600816038.english: To be honest... you are more skilled than Sowan, who worked at Oguigia.

1600816039.korean: …생각 외로 음식에 대한 평가는 객관적인 것이 놀랍사옵니다.
1600816039.english: … It is surprising that the evaluation of the food is more objective than I expected.

1600816040.korean:
전 소완 개체에 대해 그리 좋은 생각을 가지진 않았습니다.
그저 교활하고 독점욕에 눈이 멀어 일을 그르치기만 했었지요.
1600816040.english:
I didn't have a very good opinion of the Sowan individual.
 He was just cunning and blinded by possessiveness, so he only messed things up.

1600816041.korean: 그리고… 이곳에 와 다른 분들의 음식들을 먹다보니, 이리도 맛있는 음식은 처음이에요.
1600816041.english: And… now that I’ve come here and tried other people’s food, this is the first time I’ve ever tasted food this delicious.

1600816043.korean: - 내 대답에 그 냉철한 소완의 얼굴에서 안타까움이 느껴졌다.
1600816043.english: At my answer, I could feel pity on Sowan's cold face.

1600816044.korean: …궁금한 게 있사온데, 칼립소께선 독을 가지고 계심에도 어떻게 지배인을 하셨던 것이옵니까?
1600816044.english: … I have a question. How did you serve as the manager, Calypso, even though you possessed poison?

1600816045.korean: 스스로 주방에 들어가지는 않았고, 아이들이 요리를 해오면 맛을 보며 평가했었습니다.
1600816045.english: I didn't go into the kitchen myself; instead, I would taste and evaluate the food the children brought.

1600816046.korean: 듣기론 오귀기아는 멸망 전 세계 최고의 음식 수준을 자랑했다 들었사온데…
1600816046.english: I heard that before its fall, Ogygia boasted the best food in the world...

1600816047.english: Sowan reached out her hand to Calypso and said

1600816048.korean: 최근 오르카 대원들이 많아진 만큼, 전문적인 식단을 꾸리고 맛을 평가할 분이 필요하십니다.
1600816048.english: As the number of Orca members has increased recently, we need someone to prepare professional menus and evaluate the taste.

1600816049.korean:
저 혼자 이 모든 일을 벅차긴 조금 힘에 붙이니…
오르카 호의 영양사로 같이 일해주실 생각은 없사옵니까?
1600816049.english:
It is a bit overwhelming for me to handle all of this alone...
 Would you be interested in working with us as the nutritionist for the Orca?

1600816050.korean: 그렇다면 필시, 주인께 내올 음식의 퀄리티가 훨씬 올라갈 것이라 생각되옵니다.
1600816050.english: In that case, I believe the quality of the food served to the owner will surely improve significantly.

1600816051.english: - Calypso hesitated for a moment, perhaps feeling embarrassed.

1600816053.korean:
하, 하지만… 도, 독이 있는 제가 오르카 대원들의 식단을 맡는다면… 
전에 있던 소완도 끔찍이 절 싫어하여 사사건건 싸웠는데…
1600816053.english:
B-but... if I, a poisonous person, were to be in charge of the Orca members' diet...
 Sowan, who was here before, also hated me terribly and we fought over every little thing...

1600816054.korean:
어쨌든 칼립소가 운영했던 오귀기아의 음식은 세계 최고가 아니었사옵니까.
한 번, 당신을 만나보며 이야기를 나눠보고 싶었사옵니다.
1600816054.english:
Anyway, wasn't the food at Ogygia, run by Calypso, the best in the world?
 I have wanted to meet you and have a conversation with you.

1600816056.korean: - 칼립소는 결국 머뭇거리다, 소완의 손을 잡았다.
1600816056.english: Calypso eventually hesitated, then took Sowon's hand.

1600816057.english: … I look forward to working with you, Sowan.

1600816058.korean: 후후, 저도 조금 일을 덜게 되어 다행이옵니다.
1600816058.english: Haha, I am also glad to have had a little less work done.

1600816059.english: … Valentine's Day gift from the Orca members.

1600816061.english: That's going to be a bit difficult.

1600816062.english: There's still a lot piled up over there.

1600816065.korean: 칼립소가, 대원들이 만든 음식을 먹어본다고 해서…
1600816065.english: Just because Calypso said she would try the food made by the crew...

1600816067.english: Please take good care of the Orca members' health.

1600817003.korean: 제가 오귀기아에서 남는 시간마다 늘 하는 바스트업 체조입니다.
1600817003.english: This is the bust-up exercise I always do in my spare time in Oughigia.

1600817004.korean: 그런 걸로 커진다면 전 진작에 자문위원을 관뒀을 텐데요.
1600817004.english: If it had escalated into something like that, I would have resigned as an advisor long ago.

1600817005.english: Advisory committee member? What do you mean by that?

1600817006.korean: ...아닙니다. 꿈은 누구든 꿀 수 있는 거겠죠. 응원하겠습니다.
1600817006.english: ...No. Anyone can dream, I suppose. I will be rooting for you.

1600817007.korean: 매사에 부정적이시군요. 저는 이 체조를 해온 결과, 유의미한 결과를 얻었어요.
1600817007.english: You are negative about everything. As a result of doing this exercise, I have obtained meaningful results.

1600817008.korean: 바이오로이드는 유전자를 설계할 때의 체형에서 변하지 않습니다.
1600817008.english: Bioroids do not change from their body shape when genetically designed.

1600817009.korean: 뭘 모르시는 말씀이시군요. 전 포기를 모르는 여자입니다.
1600817009.english: You don't know what you're talking about. I am a woman who never gives up.

1600817011.korean: 하나, 둘… 심호흡 하고… 쭈욱… 쭉...
1600817011.english: One, two… take a deep breath… and… take a deep breath…

1600817012.korean: …하아. 동작은 그게 아닙니다. 정확한 동작은 이거겠지요.
1600817012.english: …Sigh. That’s not the move. The correct move would be this.

1600817014.korean: 유의미한 결과를 얻은 게 사실입니까? 처음부터 다시 자세를 잡으세요.
1600817014.english: Is it true that you obtained meaningful results? Get your attitude back on track from the beginning.

1600817015.korean: 자, 다시 시작해보십시오. 하나에 팔을 뻗고, 둘에… 내쉬고…
1600817015.english: Now, try again. Stretch out your arms on one, and on two... exhale...

1600817016.english: … Is, is this what you mean?

1600817019.korean: 하, 제가 왜 이런 쓸데없는 걸 당신한테 가르치는 건지 모르겠군요.
1600817019.english: Ha, I don't know why I'm teaching you such useless things.

1600817020.korean: 쓰, 쓸데없다니요?! 언젠가 저는… 라미아처럼 큰 모습으로...
1600817020.english: W-What do you mean useless?! Someday I... will grow up like a Lamia...

1600817021.korean: 꿈이 참 크시군요. 저희는 테티스 중위보다 평생 작을 겁니다.
1600817021.english: You have such big dreams. We will be smaller than Lieutenant Tethys for the rest of our lives.

1600817022.korean: …아뇨! 당신의 그 생각이 잘못되었습니다. 어째서 비관적으로만 생각하시는 거죠?
1600817022.english: … No! You are wrong. Why are you thinking so pessimistically?

1600817023.korean: 자꾸 그런 소리만 하실 거면, 저 혼자서라도 하겠습니다.
1600817023.english: If you're going to keep saying things like that, I'll do it by myself.

1600817024.korean: …자꾸 자세가 이상하게 바뀌는데. 제가 알려드리지 않았습니까? 이건 이 자세가 맞다고요.
1600817024.english: … Your posture keeps changing strangely. Didn't I tell you? I told you this is the correct posture.

1600817025.korean: 자, 따라해보십시오. 하나 둘… 셋 넷…
1600817025.english: Now, repeat after me. One, two... three, four...

1600817026.korean: 우와… 나이트 앤젤… 요즘 체육관에 많이 오네?
1600817026.english: Wow… Night Angel… You’ve been coming to the gym a lot lately?

1600817027.english: … I am just helping Mr. Calypso with his workout.

1600817029.korean: 자세가 그게 아니라고 얼마나 알려드립니까? 자 따라해보세요. 이렇게… 이렇게!
1600817029.english: How many times have I told you that the posture isn't right? Now, try repeating after me. Like this... like this!

1600817030.korean: 아앗… 아, 알겠습니다. 이렇게 해서… 이렇게…
1600817030.english: Ah... Ah, I understand. Like this... like this...

1600817031.korean: 자, 쉴 틈 없습니다, 바로 다음 동작…
1600817031.english: Alright, no time to rest, right to the next move…

1600817033.english: Oh, what brings you here, Elven?

1600817034.korean: 요즘 살이 너무 찐 것 같아 운동을 좀 해볼까 해서요…
1600817034.english: I feel like I've gained a lot of weight lately, so I was thinking of trying to exercise...

1600817035.korean: …맞습니다. 어미의 체중이 많이 나가, 폐하께서 피하시는 걸까 생각이 들기도 하지요.
1600817035.english: … That is correct. I also wonder if His Majesty is avoiding her because the mother is very heavy.

1600817036.korean: 조금이라도 살을 빼서, 좀 더 건강한 밀크를 선물하는 거야!
1600817036.english: I'm going to lose a little weight so I can give you healthier milk as a gift!

1600817037.korean: 요즘… 상체가 많이 무거워져서… 비만이 아닐까 싶기도 해요.
1600817037.english: Lately... my upper body has felt very heavy... so I'm starting to wonder if I might be obese.

1600817038.korean: …가슴이 지나치게 크면 폐하께 큰 곤란함이 될 수도 있지요.
1600817038.english: … If the breasts are excessively large, it could cause great trouble for His Majesty.

1600817039.korean: 마이티! 지방을 확실히 없애는 운동 좀 가르쳐… 어?
1600817039.english: Mighty! Teach me some exercises to definitely get rid of fat… huh?

1600817042.korean: 너희들, 마른데 왜 여기에 운동하러 온 거야?
1600817042.english: You guys are skinny, so why did you come here to work out?

1600817045.korean: 아~ 하긴. 너무 말라도 문제지. 파이팅!
1600817045.english: Ah, right. Being too thin is a problem, too. Good luck!

1600817050.korean: 절대 포기… 할 수 없습니다! 하나… 둘! 하아아아아아!
1600817050.english: I absolutely cannot… give up! One… two! Haaah!

1600817051.korean: - 사령관실에 너무 앉아 몸이 찌뿌둥한 만큼, 근육을 풀기 위해 헬스장에 들렀다.
1600817051.english: Since I had been sitting in the commander's office for so long and my body felt stiff, I stopped by the gym to loosen up my muscles.

1600817052.korean: - 건강을 신경 쓰는 여러 대원들이 열심히 운동을 하고 있었고…
1600817052.english: Several members who were conscious of their health were exercising diligently, and…

1600817053.korean: 하나아! 두울! 하나아! 두울! 으아… 으아아아아아!
1600817053.english: One! Two! One! Two! Ugh... Ughhhhh!

1600817055.korean: 하나아! 두울! 하나아! 두울! 으아… 으아아아아아!
1600817055.english: One! Two! One! Two! Ugh... Ughhhhh!

1600817056.english: It is easier if you give up and stop thinking.

1600817057.korean: - 칼립소와 나이트 앤젤은 헬스장 한 켠에서 눈물을 흘리고 있었다.
1600817057.english: - Calypso and Night Angel were shedding tears in a corner of the gym.

1600818001.korean: 이봐 여제! 이건 계산이 안 맞잖아? 디스크 값은 물론 키카드 까지 같이 줘야지?
1600818001.english: Hey, Empress! This doesn't add up. You have to pay for the key card along with the disk, right?

1600818002.korean: 그것도 줄게… 대신, 이번 디스크에는 내가 원하는 칼립소의 핵심 데이터가 포함돼 있겠지?
1600818002.english: I'll give you that too... but in return, this disc contains the core data of Calypso that I want, right?

1600818003.korean: 그 깡통 년의 핵심 데이터는 애석하게도 이 디스크에는 없다.
1600818003.english: Unfortunately, the core data of that tin can is not on this disk.

1600818004.korean: 그럼 거래 조건이 맞지 않은데. 내가 원한 건 해독할 수 없는 독을 가졌다던 바이오로이드였다고.
1600818004.english: Then the terms of the deal don't match. What I wanted was the bioroid that supposedly had an indetoxifiable poison.

1600818005.korean: 대신 다른 년들의 데이터는 아는 대로 모두 넣어놨다. 그 정도도 빼오기 힘들었어.
1600818005.english: Instead, I put in all the data I knew about the other girls. It was hard to even extract that much.

1600818006.korean:
근데 디스크에 제대로 된 데이터를 넣어 놓은 게 맞아? 우리 측 과학자가 말하길…
오케아니데스 바이오로이드들의 핵심 유전자 정보는 전혀 들어있지 않았다고 하던데.
1600818006.english:
But are you sure the correct data was put on the disk? Our scientist said…
 I heard that it didn't contain any core genetic information about the Okeanides bioroids.

1600818007.korean:
그건… 나도 알아보려 했다고! 그런데 삼안의 어느 과학자 하나 
제대로 그 부분에 대해 아는 놈은 없었어…
1600818007.english:
That… I tried to find out about it too! But one scientist at Saman
 There wasn't anyone who knew that part properly...

1600818008.korean:
손님한테 물품을 판매하기 전엔, 품질에 대해 꼼꼼히 신경썼어야지.
네가 넘겨줬던 라미아로 만든 년은 하자가 크다고. 체온 조절 하나 못해 끙끙거리는 꼴이라니…
1600818008.english:
You should have paid close attention to the quality before selling the product to a customer.
 The bitch you handed over, the one you turned into a Lamia, is seriously flawed. To think she's groaning and struggling, unable to even regulate her body temperature...

1600818009.korean: 난 정보를 줬고 그걸로 끝이야! 그 분야 전문가는 아니니까.
1600818009.english: I gave you the information, and that's it! I'm not an expert in that field.

1600818010.korean:
(제길… 소피아 이년은 고의적으로 지 바이오로이드들에게 이상한 장난질들을 쳤던 건가?
뒤지고나서까지 내 앞길을 막아대는군!)
1600818010.english:
(Damn it... Did that bitch Sophia intentionally play weird pranks on her bioroids?)
 Even after I'm dead, you're still blocking my path!)

1600818011.korean:
그렇게 따지면 너도 못 믿을 년인 건 똑같아! 
그 카피캣으로 우리 구역을 쳐들어 오는 바람에 삼안에서 의심 산 거 몰라?!
1600818011.english:
If you look at it that way, you're just as untrustworthy!
 Don't you know Saman is suspicious because you invaded our territory with that copycat?!

1600818012.korean:
그건 우리의 거래와는 별개로 배신자를 처리하기 위해 한 선택이고… 
그러게 미리 죽여달라 할 때 죽여줬으면 좋았잖아.
1600818012.english:
That was a choice made to deal with the traitor, separate from our deal…
 See, it would have been better if you had killed them when they asked you to beforehand.

1600818013.korean: 내가 네 하인인 줄 알아? 뭐 이런 미친 년이 다 있어?!
1600818013.english: Do you think I'm your servant? What kind of crazy bitch is this?!

1600818014.korean:
미친 년? 그 말 취소해야 할 텐데… 지금 삼안한테 쫓기는 몸 아니야?
소피아까지 멋대로 죽이고 도망쳤던데… 삼안 쪽에서 가만히 있을까…?
1600818014.english:
Crazy bitch? You should take that back... Aren't you being chased by Saman right now?
 They even killed Sophia without permission and ran away... Do you think Saman will just sit idly by...?

1600818015.korean: 남 걱정 하긴. 이 자료를 탐내는 게 너 뿐인 줄 알아?
1600818015.english: Stop worrying about others. Do you think you're the only one coveting this data?

1600818016.english: You're not plotting with Angel, are you?

1600818017.korean: 왜, 복수를 못할까 두렵나? 그 놈도 해양 프로젝트에 구미가 당기는 모양이더군.
1600818017.english: Why, are you afraid you won't be able to get revenge? It looks like that guy is interested in the marine project, too.

1600818019.korean:
하하, 이봐! 나도 삼안에서 산전수전 다 겪은 놈이라고!
나도 비빌 언덕 정도는 만들어 놔야지.
1600818019.english:
Haha, look! I'm a guy who's been through hell at Saman, too!
 I should at least make some ground to lean on.

1600818021.korean:
미친 년, 이젠 거래는 끝이야! 
가족이 뒤졌다고 징징거리는 꼴 들어주는 건 그 정신병자년 하나였으면 돼!
1600818021.english:
You crazy bitch, the deal is over now!
 That one crazy bitch was enough to put up with her whining about her family dying!

1600818024.english: Come in, my cute little puppy… Varg?

1600818025.korean:
아까 계단에서 앙헬의 경호 바이오로이드와 접촉하려는 통화를 들었습니다.
그대로 처리해도 되겠습니까?
1600818025.english:
I overheard a call earlier on the stairs trying to contact Angel's bodyguard bioroid.
 May I process it as is?

1600818026.korean: 그래. 이 바닥에서 혀를 저렇게 놀리면 어떻게 되는지 자기가 직접 당해봐야겠지.
1600818026.english: Yeah. He'll have to experience firsthand what happens when you run your tongue like that in this business.

1600818027.korean: 알겠습니다. 혹시… 저 놈이 들고 있는 디스크도 탈취하는 겁니까?
1600818027.english: Understood. By any chance… are you going to steal the disc that guy is holding as well?

1600818028.korean:
아니. 더는 불량품만 파는 보따리 장수한텐 볼일 없어.
저 놈을 처리하고 디스크를 파기하고 오렴.
1600818028.english:
No. I have no business with a peddler who only sells defective goods anymore.
 Go deal with that guy, destroy the disk, and come back.

1600818031.english: You're coming so fast. Hurry up and guide them.

1600818035.korean: 옛말에 누울 자리를 보고 발을 뻗으란 말이 있지.
1600818035.english: There is an old saying that you should look before you leap.

1600818036.english: You, you are that crazy bitch's…

1600818038.korean: 여제님께서 널 죽이고 자료를 파기하라 하셨다.
1600818038.english: The Empress ordered me to kill you and destroy the data.

1600818039.korean: 이… 이봐. 꼬마야… 우리 이러지 말고… 말로 하면 안 될…
1600818039.english: Hey... hey. Little one... let's not do this... we can't just talk...

1600818042.korean: 바르그는 단숨에 간부의 목을 벤 후 디스크가 담긴 가방에 내리 꽂은 뒤, 불을 붙였다.
1600818042.english: Varg instantly beheaded the officer, slammed it into the bag containing the disc, and set it on fire.

1600818045.english: That is all. I have no intention of fighting.

1600818046.korean: 바르그는 물러선 뒤, 위협스레 검을 겨누었다.
1600818046.english: After stepping back, Varg aimed his sword menacingly.

1600818048.korean:
삼안의 바이오로이드 입니다. 상부의 명령으로 남은 데이터의 파기를 위해 왔습니다만… 
이미 진행 중으로 보이는군요, 보아하니… 그쪽은 마리아의 바이오로이드 인가요?
1600818048.english:
I am a Saman Bio-roid. I have come under orders from above to destroy the remaining data, but…
 It looks like it's already in progress... from the looks of it... Is that Maria's bioroid?

1600818050.korean: 피를 보고 싶지 않으니 물러서시기 바랍니다.
1600818050.english: I do not want to see blood, so please step back.

1600818052.korean: 카리브디스는 순식간에 접근하여, 바르그의 하티를 한 손으로 잡았다.
1600818052.english: Charybdis approached in an instant and grabbed Varg's Hati with one hand.

1600818053.korean:
다시 말씀드리겠습니다. 더 이상 피를 보고 싶지 않습니다.
서로 목표를 이뤘으니 여기서 물러서주시길 부탁드리겠습니다.
1600818053.english:
Let me say it again. I do not want to see any more blood.
 Now that we have both achieved our goals, I ask that you please step aside.

1600818054.korean: …한 번만 더 이곳에서 마주친다면 너 또한 베어버리겠다.
1600818054.english: … If I run into you here one more time, I will cut you down as well.

1600818056.korean:
예, 상황 종료되었습니다. 배신자는 확실하게 죽였고, 
디스크 안의 데이터는 소각했습니다. 이만 복귀하도록 하겠습니다.
1600818056.english:
Yes, the situation is over. The traitor was definitely killed, and
 The data on the disk has been destroyed. I will now return.

1600818058.english: It might not have been like that. You.

1600818059.korean:
그냥 얌전히 기술만 유출했어도 됐었잖아. 어차피 도망칠 거였으면…
어머니를 죽일 필요까진 없었다고… 당신은… 잔인했어... 필요 이상으로.
1600818059.english:
You could have just quietly leaked the technology. If you were going to run away anyway…
 You didn't have to go so far as to kill my mother... You... were cruel... more than necessary.

1600818060.korean: 카리브디스는 뒹구는 간부의 머리를 짓밟아 터트렸다.
1600818060.english: Charybdis stomped on the head of the rolling officer and smashed it.

1100711546.korean:
다음 스킨 구매 및 대상 전투원에게 선물 시, 배경이 활성화 됩니다.
블랙 웜 S9 용 "드림위버 웨딩 스페셜 : 되찾은 마음"
1100711546.english:
The background will be activated when purchasing the next skin and gifting it to the target combatant.
 "Dreamweaver Wedding Special: Reclaimed Heart" for Black Warm S9

1002200893.english: A cool car and a glamorous dress and

1002200895.korean: 늑대가 원하는 건 사냥만이 아닌가 봅니다.
1002200895.english: It seems that hunting is not the only thing the wolf wants.

1002200896.english: What on earth does the wolf want?

1002200897.english: Let's prepare what the wolf wants.

1002200898.english: The wolf got what it wanted.

1002200902.korean: 멋진 차와 화려한 드레스 그리고 완료
1002200902.english: A cool car, a gorgeous dress, and it's done.

1002200908.english: The time of promise has come.

1002200909.english: A new cafe building has been built in Orca.

1002200911.korean: 카페 포세이돈에서 당신만을 위한 독점 메뉴를 선보입니다.
1002200911.english: Cafe Poseidon presents an exclusive menu just for you.

1002200912.english: Lemonade Gamma Affection Level 100 or higher

1002200917.english: Do you want to create a new party?

1002200921.english: The purpose of the party is Epsilon!

1002200922.english: Now that you've found the game, you should play it, right?

1002200923.korean: 그 노트는 더 이상 올라오지 않는다.
1002200923.english: That note does not come up anymore.

1002200924.korean: 잊고 싶어도 잊을 수 없었던 풍경
1002200924.english: A landscape I couldn't forget even if I wanted to

1002200925.english: Lemonade Epsilon Affection Level 100 or higher

1002200926.english: Do you want to create a new party? Done

1001408166.korean: 프로듀서…&n이 옷은 프로듀서가&n특히나 좋아하는 옷이라고 해서&n입어봤어요…​&n체중 관리를 안 하다 입어서&n살짝 부끄러운데…&n프로듀서가 보기엔&n괜찮으신 거죠?&n…네엣? 뛰, 뛰어보라고요?!​&n깡총… 까앙… 총… 후아… 아앙…​
1001408166.english: Producer… I tried this on because I heard you especially like this outfit… I’ve been neglecting my weight, so I’m a little embarrassed… You think it looks okay, right?… What? You want me to jump?! Hop hop… bang… hoo… whoa… ahh…

1001408167.korean: 프로듀서…&n좋아해 주시는건 고마운데요….&n그, 스티커는 떼지 말아줘요…​&n이렇게까지 부끄러웠던 적은&n없었단 말이에요…!
1001408167.english: Producer… I appreciate that you like it, but… um, please don’t take the sticker off… I’ve never been this embarrassed before…!

1001408168.korean: 새로운 컨셉에 팬 분들이&n환호해주시는 건 언제나 행복하지만…&n프로듀서가 제일 좋아해 주신다는&n사실이 절 더욱 기쁘게 해요.​
1001408168.english: It’s always a happy thing when fans cheer for the new concept, but… the fact that the producer likes it the most makes me even happier.

1001408169.korean: 산 토끼 토끼야아~&n어디를 가느냐~♪&n깡총 깡총 뛰면서…&n어디를 가~느~냐! ♪&n프로듀서어… 귀여운 뮤즈가…&n프로듀서의 허벅지 위까지&n깡총 왔어요… 헤헤…
1001408169.english: Mountain rabbit, rabbityy~ Where are you going~♪ Hopping and hopping… Where~ are~ you~ going! ♪ Producer… A cute Muse… has hopped right up onto Producer’s thigh… Hehe…

1001408170.korean: 프로듀서…&n정말 제 부끄러운 모습이&n보고 싶으신 건가요?&n너무 짓궂으세요…&n알았어요…&n어, 얼굴을 가리고오…&n이렇게에… 흐으응…​
1001408170.english: Producer… do you really want to see my embarrassing side? You’re so mean… Alright… Uh, I’ll cover my face… like this… Hmmm…

1001408171.korean: 전 누군가한테 주목 받는게… 무서웠어요…&n모든 사람들이 싫어하고… 실망할까 봐요…&n하지만 1호 팬만큼은 저의 이런 점까지&n모두 응원해 주고, 지지해 줬죠.&n오늘 밤… 그 1호 팬과 함께하는&n듀엣 공연에 프로듀서를 초대할게요♥​
1001408171.english: I was… scared of being the center of attention… I was afraid everyone would dislike it… and be disappointed… But my number one fan supported and cheered for even these flaws of mine. Tonight… I’ll invite the Producer to a duet performance with that number one fan♥

1001408172.english: Producer… Please wait just until the performance ends…

1001408173.korean: 프로듀서 달링…&n어서 이 귀여운 토끼를…&n앙… 하고 마구마구…&n잡아먹어주세요오…♥​
1001408173.english: Producer Darling… Please hurry and… eat this cute bunny… go "Aww…" and… gobble it up… ♥

1001408174.korean: 프로듀서도 1호 팬이 생긴 거 아세요?&n바로 만인의 아이돌인 뮤즈에요…&n영원히 이 마음 변치 않을 게요…♥&n달링도 몇 번이고 절… 즐겁게 해 주실 거죠?
1001408174.english: Do you know that the Producer has gained a number one fan too? It's none other than everyone's idol, Muse… I won't let this feeling change forever… ♥ Darling, you will… make me happy again and again, right?

1000710045.korean: 제가 처음 도전하는 컨셉의 의상이라… 걱정 됐는데… 정말 많은 환호를 받았어요.​ 프로듀서가 응원해주신 덕분에…&n용기 낼 수 있었는걸요? 준비한 공연은 모두 끝났지만… 이대로 막을 내리긴 아쉽네요. 제 1호 팬인 프로듀서에게&n패… 팬서비스를 해드리고 싶어요. 단 둘만의 비밀 뒷풀이… 참가를 부탁드립니다, 프로듀서 달링…♥
1000710045.english: Since it was an outfit with a concept I was trying for the first time... I was worried... but I received so much cheering. Thanks to your support, Producer... I was able to muster up the courage, you know? The performance I prepared is over... but it feels a shame to end it like this. I want to give some... fan service to the Producer, my number one fan. A secret after-party just for the two of us... please join me, Producer Darling... ♥

2025000001.english: The Great War ~The Withered Flower of Muromachi~

2025000004.english: Yeah. I can see Muromachi Castle…

2025000005.english: Even though it is still far away…

2025000006.korean:
저렇게 크다니…
내가 지내던 성과는 전혀 달라...
2025000006.english:
I can't believe it's that big...
 The castle where I used to live is completely different...

2025000007.korean: 저곳에 언니를 세뇌하고, 어머니를 죽인 증오스러운 원수 '아시카가 쇼군'이 있다는 거지...
2025000007.english: So, the hateful enemy 'Ashikaga Shogun,' who brainwashed my sister and killed my mother, is over there...

2025000010.english: But it's okay. We aren't alone.

2025000012.english: I'm so glad you regained your memory.

2025000014.english: Kaen, I have almost no memories of the past.

2025000015.korean: 그래도… 스미레를 보면, 마음이 따뜻해지는 기분이 들어.
2025000015.english: Still... when I see Sumire, I feel a warmth in my heart.

2025000016.english: Sumire is a precious younger sister… she remembered that.

2025000017.korean: 그 외에 떠오르는 건, 거의 없어.
2025000017.english: There is almost nothing else that comes to mind.

2025000018.korean: 그래서, 이 기억을 지운 건, 절대로 용서 못 해.
2025000018.english: So, I can never forgive you for erasing this memory.

2025000019.korean:
카엔이 처음으로 기억하는 건, 쇼군의 명령이었어.
그러니까, 기억을 지운 건 쇼군이 확실해.
2025000019.english:
The first thing Kaen remembers is the Shogun's order.
 So, it is certain that the Shogun erased the memories.

2025000020.english: Mother was the successor of the ninja clan... right?

2025000022.korean: 어머니가 닌자 일족의 계승자라고 알려준 건, 언니였어요.
2025000022.english: It was my older sister who told me that my mother was the successor to the ninja clan.

2025000023.english: And, they also said that my mother was dead.

2025000024.korean:
그렇지만 언니는 이렇게 기억을 잃었을 뿐, 살아 있었어요…
그렇다면…
2025000024.english:
However, my sister was alive, she had only lost her memory like this…
 then…

2025000026.korean: 쇼군이, 카엔과 똑같이… 어머니를 되살려서, 조종하고 있을지도…
2025000026.english: The Shogun might be manipulating his mother by reviving her, just like Kaen...

2025000028.korean: 내가 반드시 이 손으로 쓰러뜨리고… 복수를 이루겠어!
2025000028.english: I will definitely defeat him with my own hands… and achieve revenge!

2025000031.english: As we get closer to the castle, there are more and more people.

2025000032.korean: 이제 지붕 위로 올라가서 이동하는 게 좋을 것 같아요.
2025000032.english: I think it would be best to go up onto the roof and move around now.

2025000035.korean: 확실히 지붕, 위로 가는 게 정답.
2025000035.english: Going up to the roof is definitely the right answer.

2025000037.english: That is the same for any ninja.

2025000040.korean: 지붕 위를 올라가면, 적의 닌자에게 들킬지도, 몰라.
2025000040.english: If you go up onto the roof, you might get caught by enemy ninjas.

2025000041.korean:
아직 나는 수행이 부족하구나…
역시 언니는 대단해.
2025000041.english:
I still lack sufficient practice...
 As expected, you're amazing.

2025000043.english: Kaen's kunoichi career is longer than Sumire's.

2025000044.korean:
그건 그렇지요. 저에게 쿠노이치의 기초를 알려준 건
다름 아닌 언니였으니까요.
2025000044.english:
That is true. The one who taught me the basics of the Kunoichi was
 Because it was none other than her older sister.

2025000048.korean:
기억하지 못하더라도 제가 기억하고 있어요.
그리고, 이야기를 나누면 분명 언니도 다시 기억해 주실 거예요.
2025000048.english:
Even if you can't remember, I remember.
 And if we talk, I'm sure you'll remember me again, too.

2025000049.korean: 응, 고마워. 그 말을 들으니까… 마음이 따뜻해져.
2025000049.english: Yeah, thank you. Hearing those words… warms my heart.

2025000051.korean: 흥, 적의 본거지에 들어와놓고 참 여유롭구나.
2025000051.english: Hmph, you're quite relaxed even though you've entered the enemy's stronghold.
