2025000054.english: It would be best not to move.

2025000055.korean:
나에게 등을 보이다니… 한심한 풋내기잖아.
이런 녀석에게 진 것도 모자라 감정이나 흔들리고 말이야… 카엔.
2025000055.english:
To think you turned your back on me… You’re such a pathetic rookie.
 As if losing to a guy like this wasn't enough, I even got emotionally shaken... Kaen.

2025000058.korean:
넌 아무것도 모른 채 지금까지 쇼군님의 검사 역할을 해왔으니…
우리를 모를 수도 있겠네.
2025000058.english:
Since you have been serving as the Shogun's swordsman until now without knowing anything...
 They might not know us.

2025000059.english: I am Hagane, a member of the Ashikaga Ninja Army.

2025000060.english: I'm sorry, but I guess I'll have to die here!!

2025000061.english: Ugh...! In a place like this...

2025000064.korean: 역시 카엔, 쿠노이치로서는 이류지만, 기술의 위력은 무시 못 하겠어.
2025000064.english: As expected of Kaen, she may be second-rate as a kunoichi, but the power of her techniques cannot be ignored.

2025000066.korean: 너희는 이미 내 꼭두각시 인형들에게 포위되어 있어!
2025000066.english: You are already surrounded by my puppets!

2025000068.korean: 마을 사람, 없어… 전부, 가짜였던 거야…?
2025000068.english: The villagers are gone… Were they all fake…?

2025000069.korean: 훗, 맞아. 처음부터 전부 내 꼭두각시 인형이었지!
2025000069.english: Hmph, right. They were all my puppets from the start!

2025000070.korean: 그런 것조차 간파하지 못하다니, 역시 삼류구나!
2025000070.english: To think you couldn't even see through that—you really are a third-rate!

2025000071.english: Now! Are you prepared to die a painful death?

2025010004.english: This is… the power of the Ashikaga ninja…

2025010005.korean: 적의 인형, 베어도 베어도 계속 나와.
2025010005.english: Enemy dolls keep appearing no matter how many times you cut them.

2025010006.english: Each and every one of them is strong... but at this rate...

2025010007.english: Well, you guys fought pretty well for your age.

2025010008.english: The puppets over here are quite broken too...

2025010009.korean: 솔직히, 내가 여기까지 당할 줄은 몰랐어.
2025010009.english: Honestly, I didn't expect to go this far.

2025010010.korean: 삼류라고 했지만, 이류 정도로 정정해 줄게.
2025010010.english: I said it was third-rate, but I'll correct it to second-rate.

2025010014.english: Dolls, when we gather, I'll use a secret technique.

2025010015.korean: 그러면, 잠깐이지만, 인형 수가 줄어들 거야…
2025010015.english: Then, for a moment, the number of dolls will decrease…

2025010016.english: In the meantime, take down Hagane.

2025010018.english: I don't know what you're trying to pull off, but it's no use!

2025010019.korean: 자! 꼭두각시 인형 추가야! 이걸로 죽어라!
2025010019.english: Alright! Add another puppet! Die with this!

2025010024.korean: 오오! 저렇게 많던 꼭두각시 인형이 순식간에!
2025010024.english: Oh! All those puppets disappeared in an instant!

2025010035.korean:
아니.
처음부터 너희가 싸우고 있던 건 내가 아니라, 저 꼭두각시 인형이었어.
2025010035.english:
no.
 It wasn't me you were fighting from the beginning, it was that puppet.

2025010036.korean: 그런 것조차 간파하지 못하다니… 역시 삼류네!
2025010036.english: To think you couldn't even see through that... You're just as bad as ever!

2025010037.english: Alright! The real fun starts now! Hahahaha!

2025010040.english: Sumire… run away, this is where I…

2025010041.korean: 싫습니다! 또 언니를 잃고 싶지 않아요!
2025010041.english: I don't want to! I don't want to lose my sister again!

2025010042.korean: 바보 같긴! 둘 다 죽게 될 거야!
2025010042.english: How stupid! You're both going to die!

2025010043.english: Puppet Ninja Techniques! Night Parade of Hundred Demons!

2025010050.english: My puppets were defeated in an instant!?

2025010052.english: Is this the time to be worrying about that?

2025010055.english: So you... it looks like you were second-rate after all.

2025010056.english: In an instant, we defeated Hagane, whom we had struggled so much with…

2025010057.english: The movements are… fast… quite… expert…

2025010058.korean: 진정들 해라. 이 몸은 너희들의 아군이다.
2025010058.english: Calm down, everyone. I am on your side.

2025010060.korean: 유감이지만, 우리에겐 아군 같은 건 없어!
2025010060.english: I'm sorry, but we don't have any allies!

2025010061.english: Yeah, I knew it would turn out that way.

2025010063.english: If it's an enemy? What do you intend to do?

2025010064.korean: 너희가 그토록 고전했던 상대를 순식간에 쓰러뜨린 몸이거늘 어찌할 생각인 게야?
2025010064.english: I just took down the opponent you struggled so hard against in an instant; what do you intend to do?

2025010065.korean:
상대의 실력을 눈에 보이는 것으로만 과소평가하지 말도록 하거라. 
그리고, 누가 적인지 제대로 판단할 수 있는 실력 또한 키워야겠구나.
2025010065.english:
Do not underestimate your opponent's skills based solely on what you can see.
 And, I also need to develop the skill to properly judge who the enemy is.

2025010068.english: He is the founder of the Murasaki-ryu.

2025010072.korean: 변명은 아니지만, 이런 상황에서 덜컥 믿는 쪽이야말로 더 어리석지.
2025010072.english: It’s not an excuse, but it would be even more foolish to blindly believe it in a situation like this.

2025010074.english: You can tell by looking at this knife, right?

2025010076.korean: …번개… 기술을 쓰는 것도 아닌데, 들고만 있어도 칼에서 번개와 불꽃이…
2025010076.english: … Lightning… It’s not like I’m using a technique, but just holding it, lightning and flames come out of the sword…

2025010077.korean: 너희들의 기술은, 이 몸이 칼 '화신'과 '뇌신'을 휘두르는 모습을 재현하기 위해 고안된 기술이다.
2025010077.english: Your technique was devised to recreate the sight of me wielding the swords 'Avatar' and 'Thunder God'.

2025010078.korean: 한번 힘을 겨뤄보겠느냐? 진짜 무라사키류를 직접 체험해 보는 것도 나쁘지는 않겠지.
2025010078.english: Would you like to test your strength? It wouldn't be a bad idea to experience the real Murasaki-ryu firsthand.

2025010081.korean: 흠, 정말 싸우려 드는 바보들은 아닌 것 같아 다행이구나.
2025010081.english: Hmm, it's a relief that they don't seem like the kind of fools who would actually try to fight.

2025010082.korean: 장소를 옮기자. 슬슬 아시카가 놈들이 들이닥칠 테니.
2025010082.english: Let's move to a different location. The Ashikaga bastards are about to storm in.

2025010085.english: That’s quite a fancy mansion for a hideout…

2025010086.korean: 그래, 정체를 숨기고 평범하게 사는 중이라는 설명이 더 옳겠구려.
2025010086.english: Right, it would be more accurate to say that I am living a normal life while hiding my identity.

2025010087.korean: 그래서, 카엔과 스미레를 데려온 건, 어떤 의도?
2025010087.english: So, what was the intention behind bringing Kaen and Sumire?

2025010088.korean: 죽이려 했다면 아까 죽였을 테고, 목적이 뭔가요?
2025010088.english: If I had intended to kill him, I would have done so earlier. What is your purpose?

2025010089.english: Hmm, I'm not sure where to start...

2025010090.korean:
처음에도 소개했지만, 이 몸은 무라사키류의 시조일세.
그렇기에 이미 수백 년 전 은퇴했지…
2025010090.english:
As I introduced at the beginning, I am the founder of the Murasaki-ryu.
 That is why I retired hundreds of years ago…

2025010091.english: I was living a peaceful life in seclusion...

2025010092.korean: 몇 년 전부터 아시카가 쇼군 주변이 수상해지기 시작한걸세…
2025010092.english: Things around the Ashikaga Shogun have started to get suspicious a few years ago...

2025010094.korean: 세속엔 될 수 있으면 관여하지 않으려 했던 탓에 구태여 파고들지 않았거늘.
2025010094.english: I had tried to avoid getting involved in the secular world as much as possible, so I did not go out of my way to delve into it.

2025010096.korean: 오우카의 상태가 영 의아한 탓에 어쩔 수 없었다네.
2025010096.english: I couldn't help it because Ouka's condition was very puzzling.

2025010098.korean: 그러고 보니, 그대 기억은 지워져 있구려…
2025010098.english: Come to think of it, your memory has been erased…

2025010099.korean: 일단은 내 물어보지, 스미레는 이 이름을 기억하느냐?
2025010099.english: First of all, let me ask you, Sumire, do you remember this name?

2025010100.english: Yes… it is my mother’s name…

2025010101.english: More importantly, how did you get my name…!?

2025010102.korean:
거기 있는 카엔이 평범하게 부르고 있질 않았느냐.
그리고 이 몸은 그대의 이름도 알고 있다네, 하츠나.
2025010102.english:
Wasn't Kaen there singing normally?
 And I know your name, Hatsuna.

2025010105.korean: 아, 아뇨… 언니가 사과할 일은 아니에요.
2025010105.english: Ah, no… It’s not your fault.

2025010107.english: Anyway... so Hatsuna doesn't know Ouka, right?

2025010109.korean: 오우카… 쿠노이치 엔라이… 무라사키류의 현 당주이자, 그대들의 어머니라네.
2025010109.english: Ouka… Kunoichi Enrai… The current head of the Murasaki-ryu, and your mother.

2025010111.korean: 그렇다면, 어머니는 역시 살아 계셨던 거군요!?
2025010111.english: Then, Mother was alive after all!?

2025010112.korean: 그래, 지금은 아시카가 쇼군을 지키는 쿠노이치다.
2025010112.english: Right, right now I am a kunoichi protecting the Ashikaga Shogun.

2025010113.korean: 아무래도 자신이 죽은 척하고 너희를 멀리한 채, 지키려고 했던 것 같구나.
2025010113.english: It seems he pretended to be dead and kept his distance from you all in an attempt to protect you.

2025010115.korean:
뭐, 그 판단이 이상하다고는 생각하지 않는다.
쿠노이치란 주군을 섬기고, 주군을 지키기 위해 목숨도 바치는 자니까.
2025010115.english:
Well, I don't think that judgment is strange.
 Because a kunoichi is someone who serves her lord and even sacrifices her life to protect him.

2025010116.korean: 사랑하는 딸이 있다면, 그런 선택도 충분히 할 수 있지.
2025010116.english: If you have a beloved daughter, you can certainly make that choice.

2025010117.korean: 헌데… 너희 어머니의 상태가 약 1년 전부터 갑자기 이상해졌다.
2025010117.english: However… your mother’s condition suddenly became strange about a year ago.

2025010118.english: If it were a year ago…

2025010119.korean: 저와 언니가 습격당한 시기와 거의 일치합니다…
2025010119.english: It almost coincides with the time my sister and I were attacked…

2025010120.korean: 이 몸은 말이지… 쇼군이든 나라든 어떻게 되든 상관없다는 입장으로 살아왔다.
2025010120.english: You see, I have lived my life with the stance that I do not care what happens to the Shogun or the country.

2025010123.korean: 오우카가… 무라사키류의 사람이 '츠키카게류'에게 지는 일만은 절대로 용서할 수 없다.
2025010123.english: Ouka... I can never forgive a person of the Murasaki-ryu losing to the Tsukikage-ryu.

2025010124.english: Murasaki-ryu is a school I created.

2025010126.korean:
그것들과는 옛날부터 이런저런 악연이 있었지.
라이벌 같은 존재다.
2025010126.english:
I've had all sorts of bad history with them since way back.
 He is like a rival.

2025010127.korean: 아마도 쇼군 주변의 사건들은 전부 츠키카게류의 소행일 게다.
2025010127.english: Perhaps all the incidents surrounding the Shogun are the work of the Tsukikage-ryu.

2025010128.korean:
하가네라는 쿠노이치도 츠키카게류…
그런 녀석이 무로마치에서 제멋대로 날뛰고 있는 게 그 무엇보다 증거지.
2025010128.english:
A kunoichi named Hagane is also Tsukikage-ryu…
 The fact that a guy like that is running wild in Muromachi is proof of it more than anything.

2025010129.korean: 아시카가 쇼군과 오우카는 츠키카게의 술법에 의해 조종당하고 있을 가능성이 높다.
2025010129.english: It is highly likely that the Ashikaga Shogun and the Ouka are being controlled by Tsukikage's magic.

2025010130.korean: 뭐, 이런 연유로 결국 이 몸이 직접 움직이게 된 거지만…
2025010130.english: Well, that is why I ended up taking action myself...

2025010131.korean: 그런 와중에 너희들이 하가네가 세력권으로 삼고 있는 지역에 멋지게 나타났지 뭐냐.
2025010131.english: In the midst of all that, you guys showed up spectacularly in the area that Hagane has taken over as their sphere of influence.

2025010134.korean:
처음엔 정면 돌파라도 하려는 건가 싶어 감탄했는데, 평범하게 함정에 빠져주다니…
먹고 있던 소바를 뿜고 말았다.
2025010134.english:
At first, I was impressed, thinking they were trying a frontal assault, but to think they just so casually fell into the trap…
 I ended up spitting out the soba I was eating.

2025010135.english: Now, back to the main point…

2025010136.english: You are too inexperienced as kunoichi.

2025010137.korean: 지금 같은 상태로는 언젠가 자다가 목이 날아가고 말 거다.
2025010137.english: At this rate, you're going to lose your head in your sleep someday.

2025010138.english: Hagane is probably close to the weakest type.

2025010141.korean: 이 몸이, 처음부터… 아니, 제로부터 너희들을 단련시켜주마.
2025010141.english: I will train you from the very beginning... no, from zero.

2025010142.korean: 진정한 무라사키류를 너희 몸에 때려 박아 주겠다.
2025010142.english: I will smash the true Murasaki-ryu into your bodies.

2025020004.english: My coldness melted away in an instant!?

2025020007.korean: 이건 그냥, 검을 겨누고 있을 뿐.
2025020007.english: This is just aiming a sword.

2025020010.english: Descent of the God of Incarnation

2025020012.english: It's hot! It's so hot! I hate it...!

2025020013.english: Nooooo… …! I don’t want to! I… don’t want to die… …

2025020014.english: Can you keep up with my movements?

2025020016.english: It would be impossible to even follow it with the eyes!

2025020017.korean: 그대로 무슨 일이 일어났는지도 모른 채 죽어라!
2025020017.english: Die just like that, without even knowing what happened!

2025020020.korean: 그저 빠르기만 해서는, 눈으로 쫓는 것도, 따라잡는 것도 가능하거든!
2025020020.english: Just being fast is enough to track with your eyes and catch up!

2025020021.english: What!? Suddenly right in front of my eyes…!?

2025020025.korean: 이미 네 목은 붙어 있지 않아.

2025020027.english: You really pushed me this far!

2025020028.english: However, from now on, it is my territory!

2025020030.english: I'll finish it in one go.

2025020036.english: What on earth did you do…

2025020037.korean:
몸이 땅에 꿰매진 것처럼 움직일 수 없겠지!
여긴 내 영역이라고 했잖아!
2025020037.english:
You won't be able to move, as if your body were sewn to the ground!
 I told you this is my territory!

2025020038.korean: 내 그림자 인법은… 어둠만 있다면 뭐든지 가능하지!
2025020038.english: My Shadow Ninjutsu… as long as there is darkness, anything is possible!

2025020039.korean: 이 방에 들어온 순간부터, 너희의 패배는 이미 정해져 있었던 거다!
2025020039.english: From the moment you entered this room, your defeat was already sealed!

2025020042.english: I have to break this spell somehow…

2025020043.english: It's all in vain no matter how hard you struggle!

2025020045.korean:
그래, 어떻게 해줄까.
살아 있는 채로 천천히 조각내는 것도 괜찮겠지만…
2025020045.english:
Okay, how should I handle this?
 It would be fine to slowly slice you up while you're still alive, but...

2025020046.korean: 그전에, 우선은 그 매끈한 피부를 즐겨보는 것도 좋겠지.
2025020046.english: Before that, it would be good to enjoy that smooth skin first.

2025020049.korean: 크크크… 그래, 먼저… 카엔, 네 눈앞에서 네 여동생을 천천히…
2025020049.english: Hahaha... Right, first... Kaen, slowly... your little sister right in front of your eyes...

2025020050.english: How foolish! I taught you to deal with the enemy quickly...

2025020053.english: Lightning!? Damn it! The Shadow Realm!!

2025020057.english: I’ll take my leave from here!

2025020060.korean: 지금은 자시이다. 실내가 아니여도 녀석에게 유리한 전장이다.
2025020060.english: It is the hour of the rat. Even if it is not indoors, it is a battlefield advantageous to him.

2025020062.english: I let my guard down… It might have been dangerous…

2025020063.korean:
그대들은 아직도 멀었다!
저 놈이 변태라 살았구나.
2025020063.english:
You still have a long way to go!
 I survived because that guy is a pervert.

2025020065.korean: 뭐, 고전할 수 밖에 없었을 것이오. 놈은 상당한 실력자이외다.
2025020065.english: Well, he must have had no choice but to struggle. He is a formidable opponent.

2025020066.english: You must already be used to fighting the Murasaki-ryu.

2025020068.korean: 잠깐 기다리거라. 놈들은 그대들을 속속들이 알고 있다네.
2025020068.english: Wait a moment. They know you inside and out.

2025020069.korean: 나중에 내가 직접 상대하는 편이 좋겠지.
2025020069.english: It would be better if I dealt with it myself later.

2025020070.korean: 우리의 진짜 적의 정체와 위치를 알아냈다오.
2025020070.english: We have found out the identity and location of our real enemy.

2025020075.korean: 하지만, 세상 사람들은 그녀를 이렇게 부르고 있다오.
2025020075.english: However, people in the world call her this.

2025020078.korean: 그 이름, 아시카가 쇼군의 측실 아닌가요…
2025020078.english: Isn't that name Ashikaga Shogun's concubine...

2025020080.korean:
아시카가 쇼군 주변이 수상해지기 시작한 시기
쇼군의 적자가 죽은 시기...
2025020080.english:
The time when the area around the Ashikaga Shogun began to become suspicious
 The time when the Shogun's legitimate son died...

2025020081.korean: 그 모든 걸 종합해서 생각해보면, 그대들에게 벌어진 습격과 오우카가 이상해진 연유까지 물 흐르듯자연스럽게 연결되지.
2025020081.english: If you put all of that together, the attack on you and the reason why Ouka went crazy connect naturally, like water flowing.

2025020082.english: Ouka was also the Shogun's concubine, so...

2025020083.korean: 자신의 아이를 후계자로 만들기 위해, 정실이든 측실이든 가리지 않고 죽여댄 걸 테지.
2025020083.english: He must have killed them indiscriminately, whether they were the legitimate wife or a concubine, to make his own child the successor.

2025020084.english: Or perhaps simply blinded by a lust for power…

2025020085.english: Well, either way, it is utterly pathetic.

2025020086.english: Still, I know the enemy's identity...

2025020088.korean: 네, 저는 제 복수를 이루고, 어머니를 구할 겁니다.
2025020088.english: Yes, I will take revenge and save my mother.

2025020089.english: You have a good look on your face.

2025020090.english: You are growing into a full-fledged kunoichi.

2025020091.english: That is because my master trained me.

2025020092.korean: 스승님, 없었으면, 카엔이랑 스미레, 벌써 죽었어.
2025020092.english: Master, if it weren't for you, Kaen and Sumire would have already died.

2025020094.korean: 그런 말은 목적을 이룬 뒤에 해도 늦지 않소외다.
2025020094.english: It is not too late to say such things after the goal has been achieved.

2025020096.english: The day has finally come to storm the castle…

2025020097.korean: 카엔이랑 스미레, 그 후에도 츠키카게의 닌자들 쓰러뜨리며, 강해졌어.
2025020097.english: Kaen and Sumire became stronger as they defeated the Tsukikage ninjas even after that.

2025020099.korean: 당연한 소리를, 그대들을 누가 가르쳤다고 생각하는 것이오!
2025020099.english: Who do you think taught you such obvious things!

2025020101.korean: 이 몸에게 직접 가르침을 받은 자는 흔치 않지.
2025020101.english: It is rare to find someone who has received direct instruction from me.

2025020102.korean: 자만하지 않는 한, 질 일은 없을 것이외다.
2025020102.english: As long as you do not become arrogant, you will not lose.

2025020105.korean: 그래, 성 안에는 분명 몇몇의 츠키카게류의 닌자들이 남아 있을 테지.
2025020105.english: Right, there must be some Tsukikage-ryu ninjas left inside the castle.

2025020109.korean: 이걸로 4명째… 대체 얼마나 더 남아있는 거야…
2025020109.english: That makes it the fourth one… Just how many more are left…

2025020110.korean: 힘을 내도록, 이제 곧 최상층일 것이오.
2025020110.english: Cheer up, you will soon be at the top floor.

2025020111.english: There probably isn't much left of the equator.

2025020112.korean: 방금 쓰러뜨린 저 녀석이 츠키카게류의 넘버 투다.
2025020112.english: That guy I just defeated is the number two of the Tsukikage-ryu.

2025020113.english: All that remains now are the henchmen and Tengetsu…

2025020114.korean: 그리고 딱히 맞닥뜨리고 싶진 않지만, 조종당하고 있을지 모를 오우카뿐이구나…
2025020114.english: And there is only Ouka, whom I don't particularly want to run into but who might be being manipulated...

2025020117.korean: 뭐, 어디까지나 최악의 경우. 아직 그렇다고 단정 지을 필요는 없소.
2025020117.english: Well, that is strictly the worst-case scenario. There is no need to conclude that yet.

2025020118.korean: 자 자, 여기에 계속 있어봤자 소용 없으니 서둘러 움직이시게.
2025020118.english: Now now, there's no point in staying here any longer, so hurry up and move.

2025020122.korean: 어머니, 조종당하고 있다면, 기억을 되찾게 해드리면 돼.
2025020122.english: Mother, if you are being manipulated, just help her regain her memories.

2025020123.korean: 카엔도, 스미레 덕분에, 마음이 따뜻해지는 그 기분을, 떠올릴 수 있었으니까.
2025020123.english: Because thanks to Kaendo and Sumire, I was able to recall that heartwarming feeling.

2025020125.english: Yes…! It will definitely work out somehow!

2025020132.english: In the end, it led to the worst situation…

2025020136.korean: 확인차 물어보겠네. 우리를 어떻게 할 생각인게야?
2025020136.english: I'm asking just to make sure. What do you plan to do to us?

2025020137.english: That strange question… Of course, I intend to kill you.

2025020139.korean: 이 둘은 그대의 딸이다만, 그럼에도 그리 하겠다는 겐가?
2025020139.english: These two are your daughters, but do you still intend to do so?

2025020140.korean: 딸……? 저에게는 딸 같은 건 없습니다.
2025020140.english: Daughter… …? I don’t have a daughter.

2025020143.korean: 참고로, 이 몸에 대해서도 기억나는 게 없소이까?
2025020143.english: For your information, do you not remember anything about me either?

2025020144.korean: 모릅니다. 단지, 죽이라는 명령을 받았을 뿐입니다.
2025020144.english: I don't know. I was simply ordered to kill.

2025020149.korean:
이 몸이 오우카를 막겠노라. 여긴 이 몸에게 맡기고 그대들은 위로 올라가.
그대들이 상대하기엔 버거울 것이외다.
2025020149.english:
I will stop Ouka. Leave this place to me, and you all go up.
 It will be too difficult for you to deal with.

2025020151.korean: 그런 걸 내가 허락할 것 같습니까?
2025020151.english: Do you think I would allow something like that?

2025020154.english: To think you blocked my deadly sword… …?

2025020155.korean: 자, 그대들! 어서 가라. 이 몸이 질 리 없지 않겠느냐?
2025020155.english: Now, you all! Go on. There is no way I could lose, is there?

2025020159.korean: 흥, 텐게츠 잡것. 큰 실수를 한 게야.
2025020159.english: Hmph, Tengetsu, you bastard. You made a huge mistake.

2025020160.korean: 그대의 기억에서 이 몸의 존재까지 지워버린 것 말일세.
2025020160.english: I mean, the fact that you erased even my existence from your memory.

2025020161.korean: 이 몸이 누군지 조금이라도 기억하고 있었다면, 감히 덤벼들지 않았을 테지.
2025020161.english: If you had remembered even the slightest bit who I was, you wouldn't have dared to attack me.

2025020163.korean: 그대가 잊어버린 진정한 무라사키류…… 다시 깨닫게 해주겠노라.
2025020163.english: I will make you realize the true Murasaki-ryu that you have forgotten... once again.

2025030004.korean:
내 뇌격을 정통으로 맞았군.
아무리 그대라도, 일어설 수는 없을 걸세.
2025030004.english:
You took a direct hit from my lightning strike.
 Even you won't be able to stand up.

2025030006.korean: 다행이군. 아직 숨은 붙어 있나 보구려.
2025030006.english: That's a relief. It looks like he's still alive.

2025030007.english: You still have a long way to go, too.

2025030008.english: It seems like... that's the case...

2025030011.english: Did you come back to your senses?

2025030013.korean: 지금까지의 전부가 기억에 남아 있는 것이야?
2025030013.english: Do you remember everything up until now?

2025030016.korean: 지금은 그대의 딸들을 도우러 가야 하오.
2025030016.english: I must go help your daughters now.

2025030017.korean: 네. 텐게츠…… 그 자는 강력한 환술을 사용합니다……
2025030017.english: Yes. Tengetsu… … that person uses powerful illusions… …

2025030018.korean: 그럴 터이지. 무라사키류의 현 계승자조차 걸려들었을 정도니까 말이오.
2025030018.english: That makes sense. After all, even the current successor of the Murasaki style fell for it.

2025030020.english: Let's skip the sermon and hurry up.

2025030025.english: Mother! You have regained your senses!

2025030027.english: They've both grown up so fast...

2025030028.korean: 어머니! 무사하신 건 기쁘지만! 지금은 그럴 때가 아닙니다!
2025030028.english: Mother! I am glad you are safe, but! Now is not the time for that!

2025030030.korean:
텐게츠는 쓰러뜨렸지만!
마지막 순간에 성을 폭파하겠다며 폭탄을 터뜨렸어요!
2025030030.english:
I defeated Tengetsu, but!
 At the last moment, they detonated a bomb, saying they would blow up the castle!

2025030032.korean: 쇼군… 죽었어. 조종당하고 있어서… 죽일 수밖에 없었어…
2025030032.english: The Shogun... is dead. He was being manipulated... so I had no choice but to kill him...

2025030035.english: Phew... I somehow managed to escape...

2025030036.korean: 성을 흔적도 없이 완전히 무너뜨릴 줄이야…… 정말 끝까지 자기 생각밖에 없는 자였구려.
2025030036.english: To think he would completely destroy the castle without a trace… He really was a man who thought only of himself until the very end.

2025030037.korean:
그래도 츠키카게류의 수장을 쓰러뜨리다니…… 잘 해냈노라.
스미레, 하츠나.
2025030037.english:
Still, to think you defeated the leader of the Tsukikage-ryu… … you did well.
 Sumire, Hatsuna.

2025030038.english: No, it is all thanks to my master's training.

2025030039.korean: 응. 예전이라면, 텐게츠 쓰러트릴 수 없었어.
2025030039.english: Yeah. Back then, I couldn't have defeated Tengetsu.

2025030040.korean: 그래그래. 그 말을 들으니 이 몸도 어깨가 으쓱하고 있소.
2025030040.english: Yeah, yeah. Hearing that, I feel a bit puffed up, too.

2025030041.english: And… thank you for staying alive.

2025030043.korean: 어찌 울고 있소이까. 부모와 자식이 다시 만난 감동적인 재회 아니겠소.
2025030043.english: Why are you weeping? Isn't this a touching reunion between parent and child?

2025030048.korean: 언니! 뭐하고 있는 거예요, 어머니께 같이 안겨야죠!
2025030048.english: Sister! What are you doing? You should be hugging Mother together!

2025030051.english: I'm sorry... I'm sorry... for being such a mess of a mother...

2025030052.english: From now on… we’re… always… together…!

2025030057.korean: 후우… 참 손이 많이 가는 제자들이었구려.
2025030057.english: Phew... They were quite the high-maintenance disciples.

2025030059.english: I am by nature a recluse…

2025030060.korean:
이미 세상을 떠난 자와 다름없지.
앞으로의 세상에 이 몸 같은 유령은 필요 없소외다.
2025030060.english:
He is no different from someone who has already passed away.
 The world ahead will not need a ghost like me.

2025030061.korean: 앞으로의 미래는 그대들이 스스로 개척하고, 살아가시오.
2025030061.english: You yourselves must pioneer your own future and live your lives.

2025030062.korean: 츠키카게류도 멸했소외다. 이제 정말 미련은 없소……
2025030062.english: The Tsukikage-ryu has also perished. Now, I truly have no regrets…

2025030069.korean: 시덴 촬영 종료! 상태 확인하고 회수해!
2025030069.english: Shiden filming finished! Check the status and retrieve it!

2025030070.korean: 요시미츠 감독님! 제로 팀 쪽 확인 부탁드립니다!
2025030070.english: Director Yoshimitsu! Please check with the Zero Team!

2025030071.korean: 거기! 그 건물 다시 지을 거니까, 청소 안 해도 돼!
2025030071.english: Hey there! We're going to rebuild that building, so you don't have to clean it!

2025030073.korean: 시덴, 촬영 상태 종료. 다음 지시가 있을 때까지 대기.
2025030073.english: Shiden, end shooting status. Wait until next instruction.

2025040001.korean:
- 철의 탑을 둘러싼 전투로부터 몇 주…
오르카는 겨우 본래의 평온함을 되찾을 수 있었다.
2025040001.english:
- A few weeks since the battle surrounding the Iron Tower…
 Orca was barely able to regain her original calmness.

2025040002.korean: - 아니, 애초에 철의 탑 전투 이전부터 철충의 활동은 활발해졌고, 그에 대응하기 위해 우리도 이런저런 계획을 시작했다.
2025040002.english: No, actually, the Iron蟲's activity had been intensifying even before the Battle of the Iron Tower, and we also started various plans to counter it.

2025040003.korean: - 그래서 아직 진정한 의미로써 안정을 되찾았다고는 할 수 없을지도 모른다.
2025040003.english: So, it may not yet be said that stability has been regained in the true sense.

2025040004.korean: - 게다가 동료들과 해야 할 일까지 늘어나서, 예전보다 바빠졌고……
2025040004.english: On top of that, the work I have to do with my colleagues has increased, so I've become busier than before…

2025040005.english: It's really fun... no, it's hard.

2025040006.korean: - 지금은 철의 탑에 관한 보고, 그리고 동시에 진행되고 있는 조사나 연구에 대한 결과를 닥터에게 듣고 있다.
2025040006.english: Right now, I am listening to the doctor about the report regarding the Iron Tower, as well as the results of the investigations and research that are being conducted simultaneously.

2025040007.english: Should I keep the report brief and stop here?

2025040008.korean: 그리고 남는 시간에는 하카 복원을 위해 이것저것 작업하고 있어.
2025040008.english: And in my spare time, I'm working on various things to restore the haka.

2025040011.korean: 하카 관련해서 말하고 싶은 게 있는데 말이야.
2025040011.english: I have something I want to say about the Haka.

2025040014.korean: - 내가 그녀들과 처음 새해를 맞았을 때, 닥터와 더불어 모두가 애써 준비해준 깜짝 선물이었지. 잊을 수 없어.
2025040014.english: It was a surprise gift that everyone, including the Doctor, worked hard to prepare for me when I first celebrated the New Year with them. I can't forget it.

2025040015.korean: - 아마… 세인트 오르카는 당시 근처에 추락한 비행선을 바탕으로 닥터가 급하게 수리하고 개량한 비행선이었지.
2025040015.english: - Probably… Saint Orca was an airship that the Doctor hastily repaired and improved based on an airship that crashed nearby at the time.

2025040017.korean: 그때는 다음 해에도 다시 그곳으로 돌아갈거라 생각했기에, 격납고에 넣어두었었지.
2025040017.english: Back then, I put it in the hangar because I thought I would return there the following year.

2025040019.korean:
……그 후로 오르카도 여러가지 일이 있었는데다가, 
철충의 대규모 창궐이 일어난 뒤로부터는 그대로 스발바르로 이동해버려서… 
돌아갈 수 있는 타이밍이 없었네요.
2025040019.english:
… … After that, Orca also had various things happen, and,
 After the massive outbreak of the Iron蟲, I just moved straight to Svalbard...
 There wasn't a timing to go back.

2025040020.english: That place was definitely… Hokkaido, Japan… Noboribetsu, right?

2025040021.korean: - 스발바르로 이동한 뒤에는 바로 델타와의 전투가 시작됐고…… 유럽을 거점으로 삼았으니까……
2025040021.english: - The battle with Delta began immediately after moving to Svalbard… …and since they established Europe as their base… …

2025040022.korean: - 특별한 일이 아니리면 아시아 쪽으로는 갈 이유가 없었지.
2025040022.english: Unless it was for a special reason, there was no reason to go to Asia.

2025040023.korean: 아무래도 철충 때문에 인프라가 파괴됐던 걸 생각하면, 세인트 오르카가 들어 있는 격납고도……
2025040023.english: Considering that the infrastructure was destroyed by the Iron蟲, the hangar containing Saint Orca...

2025040024.korean: 에헤헷…… 그거 말인데 사실은 에이다 언니한테 부탁해서 확인해달라고 했어.
2025040024.english: Hehehe... About that, actually, I asked Ada to check it for me.

2025040025.korean: 격납고를 겸하고 있던 건조 시설 건물 자체는 멀쩡한 것 같더라고.
2025040025.english: The construction facility building itself, which doubled as a hangar, seemed to be intact.

2025040027.korean: 그래서 말이지, 여유가 생기면 회수할 수 있지 않을까? 하고 있었거든.
2025040027.english: So, you see, I was wondering if I could recover it once I had some spare time.

2025040028.korean:
그 비행선도 원래는 블랙리버 산하의 대형 비행선이었으니까, 뭔가 참고가 될지도 모르고.
조금만 손보면 다시 쓸 수 있을지 모를 일이니까.
2025040028.english:
Since that airship was originally a large airship under Black River, it might be useful as a reference.
 You never know if it might be usable again with just a little tweaking.

2025040029.korean: 뭐, 하카에 비하면 완전 평범한 비행선이긴 하지만.
2025040029.english: Well, compared to the Haka, it is a completely ordinary airship, though.

2025040030.korean: 평범한 비행선 이전에 주인님과 처음으로 새해를 맞았던 아주 소중한 추억이 담겨있으니까요.
2025040030.english: Because it holds the very precious memory of welcoming the New Year with my master for the first time, before it was an ordinary airship.

2025040031.korean: 그렇게 생각하면… 계속 방치해둘 수는 없죠.
2025040031.english: If you think about it that way... we can't just leave it alone forever.

2025040032.korean: - 나도 콘스탄챠처럼 그건 정말 소중한 기억인걸.
2025040032.english: Just like Constancia, that is a really precious memory for me too.

2025040033.korean: - 비행선에 대해 자세히 알고 있는 지식은 없지만, 블랙리버의 비행선이라면 확실히 하카 복원에 도움이 될지도 모른다.
2025040033.english: I don't have detailed knowledge about airships, but if it is a Black River airship, it might certainly be helpful for the restoration of the Haka.

2025040034.korean: - 아니, 굳이 그렇지 않더라도 비행선의 여러 가지 운용 방법을 참고할 수 있을 테니까.
2025040034.english: No, even if that isn't strictly the case, you can refer to various methods of operating airships.

2025040036.korean: 정말? 그치만 당장은 아무래도 어렵지 않을까?
2025040036.english: Really? But wouldn't it be difficult right now?

2025040037.korean: - 현재는 철의 탑 사건 이후, 앞으로의 싸움을 대비한 준비를 여러 방면으로 하고 있다.
2025040037.english: Currently, following the Iron Tower incident, preparations for future battles are being made in various ways.

2025040038.korean: - 다른 의미로 말하자면, 그 정도의 여유는 있다는 뜻이다.
2025040038.english: In other words, it means there is that much leeway.

2025040041.korean: 회수 준비는 내가 확실하게 책임지고 맡을 테니까, 필요한게 있다면 뭐든지 말해줘!
2025040041.english: I will take full responsibility for preparing the retrieval, so just let me know if you need anything!

2025040042.korean: 일단, 회수 계획을 세우기 위해 필요한 자료들을 정리해올게!
2025040042.english: First, I'll organize the materials needed to set up a recovery plan!

2025040044.korean: - 닥터는 그렇게 말하며 순식간에 방을 나가버렸다.
2025040044.english: Saying that, the doctor left the room in an instant.

2025040046.english: Because I'm always working hard for Orca.

2025040047.korean: - 좋아, 닥터의 계획에 가담하기로 마음을 굳혔다면, 지금부터 세인트 오르카 회수 작전에 본격적으로 동참해 볼까?
2025040047.english: Alright, if you’ve made up your mind to join the Doctor’s plan, shall we fully participate in the Saint Orca recovery operation now?

2025040048.korean: - 내가 해야 할 일이 하나 더 늘었다! 최고야!
2025040048.english: I have one more thing to do! That's the best!

2025040049.english: Thank you. I'll ask for your help within reasonable limits.

2025040054.korean: 생각하고 싶진 않지만, 애초에 무사히 남아 있을까?
2025040054.english: I don't want to think about it, but would they even be safe in the first place?

2025040056.korean: 좋아, 회수할 수 있을지 한번 생각해 보자.
2025040056.english: Okay, let's think about whether we can recover it.

2025040057.korean: 확실히 어려울지 모르지만, 앞으로는 지금보다 더 힘들어질 수도 있으니까.
2025040057.english: It might certainly be difficult, but things could get even harder than they are now in the future.

2025040058.korean: 세인트 오르카 회수도 앞으로를 위한 준비 중 하나야.
2025040058.english: Recovering Saint Orca is also one of the preparations for the future.

2025040060.korean: 닥터 스스로가 원하는 바를 말하는 건 굉장히 보기 드문 일이니까. 가끔은 괜찮잖아?
2025040060.english: It’s very rare for a doctor to say what they want. It’s okay once in a while, isn’t it?

2025050001.korean: 세인트 오르카의 회수를 위해, 해로를 통해 홋카이도로 곧장 향한다면 다소 일이 커질지도 모르겠소.
2025050001.english: If we head straight to Hokkaido by sea to retrieve Saint Orca, things might get a bit complicated.

2025050002.korean: 음. 세인트 오르카의 크기를 생각한다면 소형 고속정을 쓸 수도 없는 노릇이고…
2025050002.english: Hmm. Considering the size of the Saint Orca, using a small high-speed boat isn't exactly an option either...

2025050003.korean: 그렇게 되면, 대형 수송함을 이용하는 게 옳겠지만… 단독으로 움직이는 건 어려울 거요.
2025050003.english: In that case, it would be right to use a large transport ship... but it would be difficult to move alone.

2025050004.korean: 호위함, 쇄빙함 등… 다른 함선 몇 척도 함께 보내야 하오.
2025050004.english: We must send a few other ships along, such as frigates and icebreakers.

2025050005.korean: - 함선이 그렇게 대규모로 움직이려면, 자연히 많은 대원들도 투여돼야 하겠지.
2025050005.english: - For a ship to move on such a large scale, naturally, a large number of crew members would have to be deployed as well.

2025050006.korean: 게다가, 최근까지 북아메리카 대륙 철충들의 공세가 나날이 강해지고 있어서, 북서항로를 이용하려면 그에 맞춘 전투 준비가 꼭 필요할 거예요...
2025050006.english: Furthermore, the offensive by the Iron蟲s of the North American continent has been growing stronger day by day recently, so if you plan to use the Northwest Passage, you will definitely need to make combat preparations accordingly...

2025050007.korean: 북극해 항로를 이용하는 것 역시도 하나의 방법이지만… 그쪽은 얼음으로 덮여 있을 가능성이 높소.
2025050007.english: Using the Arctic Sea route is also an option, but... it is highly likely that it is covered in ice.

2025050008.korean: 한때 지구 온난화 덕분에 언제든 통과할 수 있게 됐다는 비아냥을 들었던 항로였건만,
2025050008.english: It was a sea route that was once ridiculed for becoming passable at any time thanks to global warming, but

2025050009.korean: 인간이 멸망하면서 온난화도 어느 정도 완만해졌으니 말이오.
2025050009.english: Since global warming has slowed down to some extent as humanity has perished, you see.

2025050010.korean: - 무엇을 선택하든 인력과 시간 모두 상당 부분 필요할 거란 얘기군…
2025050010.english: So, no matter what you choose, it means it will require a significant amount of both manpower and time…

2025050011.korean: 하지만, 세인트 오르카를 회수하면 장래 오르카의 전력이 향상되는 것도 사실이오.
2025050011.english: However, it is also true that recovering Saint Orca will improve Orca's future power.

2025050012.korean:
그래서 소관도 반대하지 않겠소.
주군이 결정하면 바로 준비하겠소.
2025050012.english:
So, I will not object either.
 I will prepare immediately once my lord makes the decision.

2025050013.korean: - 결코 간단하리라 생각지는 않았지만, 대규모 작전으로 변질될 우려가 있다면 선택에 있어 다시 한 번 신중한 고민이 필요해 보인다.
2025050013.english: I never thought it would be simple, but if there is a concern that it could turn into a large-scale operation, it seems that careful consideration is needed once again regarding the choice.

2025050014.korean: - 내가 천장을 올려다보며 생각하고 있을 때, 누군가 방 문을 두드렸다.
2025050014.english: As I was looking up at the ceiling, lost in thought, someone knocked on the door.

2025050017.korean: 한창 세인트 오르카 회수 작전에 대해 이야기 중이었어요.
2025050017.english: We were in the middle of talking about the Saint Orca recovery operation.

2025050018.english: Huh? I didn't interrupt, did I?

2025050019.korean: - 나는 방금까지 나눴던 이야기를 닥터에게도 설명해 주었다.
2025050019.english: I explained the story I had just shared to the doctor as well.

2025050020.english: Ahem. So that's how it was...

2025050021.korean: 그렇다면, 차라리 세인트 오르카에게 직접 우리가 있는 곳으로 돌아오게 하는 건 어때?
2025050021.english: In that case, how about we just have Saint Orca return to where we are directly?

2025050023.korean: 응, 내 계획에 대해 설명해 줄게.

2025050024.english: Just a moment, I'll put the data on the monitor.

2025050025.korean: 이건 세인트 오르카의 동력원인데, 그때 당시 급하게 만든 탓에 대형 배터리를 사용했었지.
2025050025.english: This is the power source for Saint Orca, and since it was made in a hurry back then, it used a large battery.

2025050026.korean: 그러니까 홋카이도에 가서 동력원인 이 대형 배터리를 새로 교체하거나 충전만 해주면 세인트 오르카는 날아서 돌아올 수 있을 거야.
2025050026.english: So, if we just go to Hokkaido and replace or recharge this large battery that serves as the power source, Saint Orca will be able to fly back.

2025050027.korean: 아마 격납고만 잘 보존돼 있다면 당장 충전도 가능할 거고, 만일 그게 안 되더라도 오르카에서 개발한 고성능 배터리를 가져가면 제대로 작동할 거라 생각해!
2025050027.english: As long as the hangar is well-preserved, we should be able to charge it right away, and even if that isn't possible, I think it will work properly if we take the high-performance battery developed by Orca!

2025050028.korean: 격납고가 바다와 가까운 장소였으니까, 곧장 바다로 나가서 고고도로 올라가면 철충에게 공격당하지 않고 돌아올 수 있을 것 같아.
2025050028.english: Since the hangar was located near the sea, I think if I go straight out to sea and climb to a high altitude, I can return without being attacked by Iron蟲.

2025050029.korean: - 모니터에는 노보리베츠에서 바다로 나가 북극 방면으로 향하는 세인트 오르카의 예정 항로가 표시되어 있었다.
2025050029.english: The monitor displayed the scheduled route of the Saint Orca, which was heading out to sea from Noboribetsu toward the North Pole.

2025050030.korean: 그렇군. 확실히 이거라면 수송함이나 호위함도 필요 없을 것 같소.
2025050030.english: I see. With this, it certainly seems like we won't need transport ships or escort ships.

2025050031.korean: 그렇네요. 그래도 함선은 사용하게 될 테니, 아무쪼록 준비가 필요하지 않을까요?
2025050031.english: That's true. Still, since the ship will be used, shouldn't we at least make some preparations?

2025050032.korean: 그게 가장 간단할지도 모르지만, 오르카호는 사령관과 마찬가지로 오르카라는 조직의 주된 상징이오.
2025050032.english: That might be the simplest explanation, but the Orca is the main symbol of the organization called Orca, just like the Commander.

2025050033.korean: 웬만한 일이 아니면, 이런 장거리를 움직이는 건 삼가는 편이 좋소.
2025050033.english: Unless it is absolutely necessary, it is better to avoid traveling such long distances.

2025050034.english: May I suggest one more thing?

2025050036.korean: 응, 배터리를 직접 배달하는 건 어때?
2025050036.english: Yeah, how about delivering the battery directly?

2025050038.english: I heard the story from the doctor, Your Excellency.

2025050039.korean: 아닙니다, 각하를 도울 수 있다면 더없는 영광입니다.
2025050039.english: No, it would be the greatest honor if I could help Your Excellency.

2025050040.korean: 배터리 준비도 막바지야. 작전에 필요한 각종 장비의 최종 점검이 끝나면 언제든 출발할 수 있다구!
2025050040.english: The battery preparations are in the final stages. Once the final checks on the various equipment needed for the operation are complete, we can depart at any time!

2025050041.korean: 감사합니다. 제 성능을 최대한 발휘해, 세인트 오르카를 무사히 각하께 다시 인도하겠습니다.
2025050041.english: Thank you. I will perform to the fullest and safely return Saint Orca to Your Excellency.

2025050042.korean: - 내가 그렇게 말하자, 로크는 공손하게 고개를 숙였다.
2025050042.english: When I said that, Locke bowed his head politely.

2025050044.korean: 아, 아니요, 그냥… 로크 씨가 하카랑 좀 닮았다는 생각이 들어서요…
2025050044.english: Ah, no, it's just... I thought Mr. Locke resembled Haka a bit...

2025050047.korean: 물론 겉모습은 전혀 다르죠. 하지만 로크 씨도 결국, 하카와 마찬가지로 블랙리버 극비 기술의 결정체잖아요?
2025050047.english: Of course, they look completely different on the outside. But Mr. Locke, after all, is the culmination of Black River's top-secret technology, just like Haka, isn't he?

2025050048.korean: 그렇게 생각하면, 개념적으로 하카와 닮은 거 아닐까요…? 헤헤...
2025050048.english: Come to think of it, conceptually, isn't it similar to a hakawa...? Hehe...

2025050049.english: … … I am certainly the culmination of Black River Technology, but… …

2025050050.korean: 아, 이런... 실례했습니다. 로크 씨는 무려 그 앙헬 리오보로스 회장이 직접 제작을 명령한 기체고…
2025050050.english: Ah, dear... Excuse me. Mr. Locke is a machine that none other than Chairman Angel Rioboros personally ordered to be manufactured...

2025050051.korean: 하카는 미친 설계자들이 자기 마음대로 만든 비행선이니까요…
2025050051.english: Because the Haka is an airship made however crazy designers wanted…

2025050052.korean:
아닙니다. 하카는 철의 탑이 출현했을 때, 오르카를 구해준 블랙리버의 자랑입니다.
분신과 같은 사우의 공을 깎아내리지 마시기 바랍니다.
2025050052.english:
No. Haka is the pride of Black River, having saved Orca when the Iron Tower appeared.
 Please do not belittle the contributions of a colleague who is like a second self.

2025050053.korean: 저는 그저 앙헬 공을 모시고, 앙헬 공의 죽음을 지켜본 전직 묘지기일 뿐……
2025050053.english: I am merely a former gravedigger who served Duke Angel and witnessed his death…

2025050054.korean: 그리고 지금은 각하께 충성을 맹세하고 섬기는 한 명의 집사로서, 오르카를 위해, 각하를 위해… 헌신하는 중입니다.
2025050054.english: And now, as a butler who has sworn allegiance to Your Excellency and serves Him, I am dedicating myself for Orca, for Your Excellency…

2025050055.korean: 그런 저와 비교하자면, 하카가 오르카에 더 공헌하고 있다고 할 수 있겠지요.
2025050055.english: Compared to me, you could say that Haka is contributing more to Orca.

2025050056.english: That is too kind of you...

2025050057.korean: - 로크는 집사답게 가슴에 손을 얹고 고개를 숙였다.
2025050057.english: Locke placed his hand on his chest and bowed his head like a butler.

2025050058.korean: 저 같은 일개 조종사가 모는 하카가 블랙리버의 최고 걸작인 당신께 칭찬받다니, 정말 기쁘네요.
2025050058.english: I am truly delighted that a Haka piloted by a mere pilot like myself is being praised by you, the greatest masterpiece of the Black River.

2025050059.korean: 저도 오르카의 메카닉으로서, 계속해서 오르카에 공헌할 수 있도록 열심히 하겠습니다!
2025050059.english: As a mechanic at Orca, I will do my best to continue contributing to the team!

2025050060.korean: 그럼, 저도 같은 블랙리버 출신으로 하늘을 나는 자로서, 그녀의 몫까지 오르카에 공헌할 수 있도록 노력하겠습니다.
2025050060.english: Then, as a fellow Black River native and a soarer, I will do my best to contribute to Orca on her behalf.

2025050062.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 스털링은 뭔가 결심한 듯 고개를 끄덕였다.
2025050062.english: Saying that, Sterling nodded as if he had made a decision.

2025050063.korean: 그럼 각하, 출발 전 점검이 있으니……
2025050063.english: Then, Your Excellency, there is a pre-departure inspection...

2025050066.korean: - 스털링이 로크를 배웅하는 눈빛이 반짝이고 있었다.
2025050066.english: Sterling's eyes were sparkling as he saw Locke off.

2025050067.korean: - 그리고 그녀는 곧 입술을 꾹 다물고, 훗 하고 콧소리를 냈다.
2025050067.english: And then she soon pressed her lips together tightly and let out a nasal huff.

2025050068.korean: 아뇨, 그냥…… 로크 씨를 처음 봤을 때부터 줄곧 생각해오던 게 있거든요.
2025050068.english: No, it's just... there's something I've been thinking about ever since I first saw Mr. Locke.

2025050070.english: It's just my personal delusion, after all... Ahaha!

2025050072.korean: - 여지껏 내 경험상, 이런 반응이라면 꼭 알아내는 편이 여러가지로 좋을 때가 많았다…
2025050072.english: In my experience so far, if the reaction is like this, it is often better in many ways to find out...

2025050073.korean: - 내가 그렇게 말하자, 스털링은 얼굴을 붉히며 천천히 입을 열었다.
2025050073.english: When I said that, Sterling blushed and slowly opened his mouth.

2025050074.korean: 그게… 저… 실은 로크 씨를 처음 봤을 때부터, 로크 씨를 제 취향에 맞게 커스터마이즈하는 망상을 하고 있었어요……
2025050074.english: The thing is... um... actually, ever since I first saw Mr. Locke, I've been fantasizing about customizing him to my liking...

2025050076.korean: 그, 그렇다고 해서 진짜로 그런 바보 같은 제안을 하겠다는 건 아니에요, 아시죠? 상상은 자유니까요!
2025050076.english: I-I'm not saying I'm actually going to make such a stupid suggestion, you know? Imagination is free!

2025050077.korean: 하지만 아까 로크 씨와 깊은 대화를 나누게 되니 저도 모르게 망상이 무럭무럭 자라나서... 하나 그럴싸한 아이디어가 떠올랐거든요.
2025050077.english: However, after having a deep conversation with Mr. Locke earlier, my imagination grew wildly without me realizing it... and a plausible idea popped into my head.

2025050078.korean: 네! 원래 생각하던 커스터마이즈에다가 추가로 하카스러움을 더해보면 어떨까 해서요.
2025050078.english: Yes! I was thinking it might be a good idea to add a Haka-style touch to the customization I originally had in mind.

2025050081.english: I was surprised... Hello, Mr. Azaz.

2025050082.english: Did I startle you? I'm sorry.

2025050083.korean: 이야기가 끝난 뒤에 말을 걸려고 했는데, 스털링 씨가 재미있는 이야기를 꺼내길래 그만.
2025050083.english: I was going to speak to him after the conversation ended, but Mr. Sterling brought up an interesting story, so I stopped.

2025050084.english: More importantly, Locke's customization... looks cool.

2025050085.korean: 아, 아뇨. 어디까지나 상상이라서... 실제로 커스터마이즈하고 싶다는 건…
2025050085.english: Ah, no. It's just my imagination... so actually wanting to customize it is...

2025050086.korean: 저는 종종 상상한 걸 실제로 만들기도 하죠.
2025050086.english: I often make things I imagine into reality.

2025050087.korean: - 다른 애들은 최소한 계획서를 써서 허락을 받긴 하잖아…… 뭐, 아자즈의 그런 점은 이제 익숙해졌지만……
2025050087.english: At least the others write a plan and get permission... Well, I've gotten used to that aspect of Azaz by now, but...

2025050088.korean: - 물론 최근엔 계획서를 꼬박꼬박 보고하고 있으니까. 그래, 쓰긴… 쓰니까…
2025050088.english: Of course, I've been submitting plans regularly lately. Yeah, I do write them... since I do...

2025050089.korean: 그렇군요. 하지만 머릿속에 있는 좋은 아이디어는 간단한 설계도 형태로라도 정리해 두는 편이 좋아요.
2025050089.english: I see. However, it is better to organize good ideas in your head, even if it is just in the form of a simple blueprint.

2025050090.korean: 나중에 예상치 못한 순간 도움이 될 수 있으니까요.
2025050090.english: Because it could be helpful at an unexpected moment later on.

2025050092.korean: - 아자즈의 상상 설계도라면 이미 잔뜩 만들어두었을 것 같단 말이지.
2025050092.english: - If it's Azaz's imaginary blueprints, I mean, he would have probably already made a whole bunch of them.

2025050093.english: Thank you! I'll show you first when it's finished.

2025050094.korean: - 스털링은 기쁘다는 듯이 이를 드러내며 웃었다.
2025050094.english: Sterling grinned, baring his teeth as if pleased.

2025050095.korean: 후후후, 뭔가 곤란한 일이 있으면 언제든 말해 주세요. 상담해 드릴게요.
2025050095.english: Hahaha, if you have any trouble, please let me know anytime. I'll give you some advice.

2025050098.korean: - 안 된다는 건 아니지만, 뭔가 엄청 불길하게 들리는데...
2025050098.english: I'm not saying it can't be done, but it sounds incredibly ominous...

2025050099.korean: 기뻐요. 해체자 아자즈 님께 조언을 받을 수 있다니…!
2025050099.english: I'm so happy. To think I can get advice from Deconstructor Azaz…!

2025050100.korean: - 스털링이 이렇게나 기뻐하다니... 아자즈를 찾아가기 전에 포츈에게 먼저 상담하라고 슬쩍 둘러대는 게 좋겠어…
2025050100.english: To think Sterling is this happy... I should probably sneak a hint to tell him to consult Fortune first before going to see Azaz...

2025050101.korean: 아, 하지만 저 같은 AGS 개발에 대해 잘 모르는 초보자가 상담을 받아도 되는 걸까요……
2025050101.english: Ah, but is it really okay for a beginner like me, who doesn't know much about AGS development, to get a consultation...?

2025050102.korean: 물론이죠. 때로는 전문 외의 의견이 영감이 되는 경우도 있으니까요.
2025050102.english: Of course. After all, opinions outside of one's expertise can sometimes be inspiring.

2025050103.korean: 과연 어떤 아이디어를 보여주실 지 기대가 되네요.
2025050103.english: I really look forward to seeing what kind of ideas you will show me.

2025050104.korean: - 과연 어떤 아이디어가 현실로 탈바꿈할지 두려울 따름이다…
2025050104.english: I am simply afraid of which ideas will turn into reality…

2025050106.english: This is definitely a big problem...

2025050109.korean: 방해라니, 전혀. 논의 해보니 생각했던 것 보다 훨씬 더 대규모 작전이 될 것 같아서.
2025050109.english: Interference? Not at all. After discussing it, it looks like it will be a much larger-scale operation than we initially thought.

2025050110.english: Then, shall we use the Orca?

2025050112.english: I'm sorry for asking this so suddenly.

2025050113.english: It might be a bit far, but I'll ask you.

2025050116.korean: 로크도 정말 많은 공헌을 해주고 있어.
2025050116.english: Locke is also contributing a lot.

2025050117.english: Yeah. Make sure to do a thorough and proper maintenance before you come back.

2025050118.english: What's wrong? What are you thinking?

2025050119.korean: 그래? 그렇게 말하니까 괜히 더 신경 쓰이네……
2025050119.english: Really? Hearing you say that makes me even more worried...

2025050120.korean: 으～음… 싫지 않다면 나한테도 알려주지 않을래?
2025050120.english: Hmm... If you don't mind, won't you tell me too?

2025050125.english: Azaz is the only one who says things like that...

2025050126.korean: 나도 그 상상 속 커스터마이즈 설계도, 보고 싶어.
2025050126.english: I want to see that customized blueprint from my imagination too.

2025050127.english: If I were just doing the design, wouldn't it be okay?

2025050128.korean: 실제로 커스터마이즈 할지 말지는 로크의 의사에 달렸으니까.
2025050128.english: After all, whether or not to customize it is up to Locke.

2025060001.korean: - 로크가 일본을 향해 출발한 지 며칠이 지났다.
2025060001.english: A few days have passed since Locke set off for Japan.

2025060002.korean: - 로크의 성능이라면 혼자서도 충분히 홋카이도에 도착할 수 있지만, 이번에는 만전을 기해 도중까지는 함선으로 이동시킨 관계로 도착까지 예상보다 조금 더 걸리고 있다.
2025060002.english: With Locke's capabilities, he could have easily reached Hokkaido on his own, but this time, to be fully prepared, he was transported by ship for the first half, so it is taking a little longer than expected to arrive.

2025060003.korean: - 위성을 통한 정기 연락에 따르면 어제 중으로 홋카이도에 진입한 것 같고, 아마 오늘 안에는 세인트 오르카의 격납고에 도착했다는 보고가 올 것으로 예상 중이다.
2025060003.english: According to regular communications via satellite, it appears to have entered Hokkaido sometime yesterday, and we expect to receive a report that it has arrived at the Saint Orca's hangar sometime today.

2025060004.korean: - 그리고 나는 오전 업무를 어느 정도 마친 후, 휴식을 위해 오르카 신사로 향하고 있다.
2025060004.english: And after finishing my morning work to some extent, I am heading to Orca Shrine for a rest.

2025060005.korean: - 언젠가 휴식을 위해 '휴식용 일'을 했더니 리스트컷이 꽤 진지한 분위기로…
2025060005.english: One day, I did 'work for rest' to take a break, and the list cut took on a rather serious atmosphere…

2025060006.korean: 그런 방식은 안 하는 게 좋을 것 같아.
2025060006.english: I think it would be better not to do it that way.

2025060007.korean: 앞으로도 계속 일을 하고 싶다면 말이지.
2025060007.english: If you want to keep working in the future, that is.

2025060009.korean: - 그 이후, 누군가 그 이야기를 퍼뜨렸는지 내가 방에서 혼자 쉬겠다고 하면 페로는 의심의 눈초리를, 스노우페더는 비서실에 불쑥 확인 전화를 거는 게 일상이 되어 버렸다.
2025060009.english: Since then, whether someone had spread the story or not, it became a daily routine for Ferro to give me suspicious looks and Snowfeather to call the secretary's office to check whenever I said I was going to rest alone in my room.

2025060010.korean: - 그렇기에 어쩔 수 없이 이렇게 온몸으로 '나 휴식 중입니다'를 어필하고 있다…
2025060010.english: That is why I have no choice but to use my whole body to signal that 'I am on break'...

2025060011.korean: - 일하다 머리를 식힐겸 일을 하는 게 뭐가 어때서!!!
2025060011.english: What's wrong with working to clear your head while you're at it?

2025060012.korean: - 그런 생각을 하며 걷고 있는데, 어디선가 나무를 두드리는 듯한 소리가 들려왔다.
2025060012.english: As I was walking and thinking those thoughts, I heard a sound like someone tapping on a tree from somewhere.

2025060013.english: - And Zero and Enrai's voices, too.

2025060014.korean: - 신사 경내에서는 바르그와 쿠노이치들이 목도를 들고 모의전을 하고 있는 것 같았다.
2025060014.english: - It appeared that Barg and the kunoichi were engaging in a mock battle within the shrine grounds, wielding wooden swords.

2025060015.english: - And a little distance from there… …

2025060017.korean: 응. 오늘은 비번이라 산책 겸 나왔어.
2025060017.english: Yeah. I have the day off today, so I came out for a walk.

2025060018.english: Is Watson out for a walk too?

2025060019.korean: 뭐야~ 그럼 같이 산책하자고 부를 걸 그랬네~
2025060019.english: What? Then I should have called you to go for a walk together.

2025060021.korean: - 휴식 중이라는 걸 어필하기 위해 나온 산책이라고 말하면 안 되겠지…
2025060021.english: I shouldn't say I came out for a walk just to show that I'm taking a break...

2025060022.korean: 어차피 휴식 중이라는 거 티 내려고 여기 온 거잖아?
2025060022.english: You just came here to make it obvious you're on break, right?

2025060025.korean: 아앗, 이젠 은근슬쩍 대화 주제까지 전환하려는 거야?
2025060025.english: Ah, are you trying to subtly change the subject now?

2025060026.english: Well, I'll let it slide this one time.

2025060027.korean:
맞아, 지금 신작 게임을 하나 만들어볼까 하고 있어.
덴세츠 멤버들을 메인으로 해볼까 생각 중이야.
2025060027.english:
Right, I'm thinking of making a new game right now.
 I'm thinking of making the Densetsu members the main focus.

2025060028.english: Its name is <Great Brawl! Densetsu Fighters>!

2025060029.korean:
우선 ‘대난전’은 제로 일행의 작품 <대전란>에서 모티브를 따왔어.
그래서 세 사람은 꼭 등장시킬 계획이야.
2025060029.english:
First of all, 'Great Chaos' was inspired by Zero and his companions' work, 'The Great War'.
 So, I definitely plan to include three people.

2025060030.korean:
하지만 캐릭터 밸런스를 어떻게 해야 하나 고민 중이거든.
오늘은 그걸 참고하려고 여기 온 건데…
2025060030.english:
But I'm still thinking about how to balance the characters.
 I came here today to refer to that...

2025060031.korean: 움직임이 너무 빨라서…… 눈으로 따라가기 힘들어……
2025060031.english: The movements are so fast… … it’s hard to follow with the eyes… …

2025060032.korean: - 지금 바르그와 제로의 모의전은, 꽤 본격적인 상황처럼 보였다.
2025060032.english: The mock battle between Varg and Zero looked like a fairly full-scale situation.

2025060033.korean: - 제로는 민첩한 움직임으로 바르그의 공격을 피하면서 사각지대에서 공격을 노리고 있는 한편…
2025060033.english: - While Zero evades Varg's attacks with agile movements and looks for an attack from a blind spot…

2025060034.korean: - 바르그는 반대로 거의 움직이지 않고, 일정 간격 안으로 공격을 하러 들어온 제로의 빈틈을 순간적으로 노려 공격하고 있었다.
2025060034.english: - On the other hand, Varg hardly moved and was attacking by momentarily exploiting the opening of Zero, who had entered within a certain distance to attack.

2025060035.korean: - 그리고 그 시합을 지켜보는 엔라이와 카엔.
2025060035.english: - And Enrai and Kaen watching the match.

2025060036.korean:
스미레! 적을 쓰러뜨리는 데 시간이 얼마나 더 걸리는 겁니까!
그 상태론 주공을 지킬 수 없어요!
2025060036.english:
Sumire! How much longer is it going to take to defeat the enemy!
 You can't protect the Lord in that state!

2025060037.korean: 하지만 어머니…! 틈이 전혀 보이지 않아서……
2025060037.english: But Mother…! I couldn’t see a single opening…

2025060038.english: I'll listen to your excuses later! First, take them down!

2025060042.korean: - 제로가 승부를 내기 위해 자세를 바꾼 순간, 바르그는 눈으로도 따라가지 못할 속도로 목도를 휘둘렀고……
2025060042.english: The moment Zero changed his stance to settle the match, Varg swung his wooden sword at a speed that even the eye could not follow…

2025060045.english: The match is over! The winner, Lord Varg!

2025060049.korean:
제로도 꽤 강했다.
하지만 사각에서의 공격에 너무 집착하고 있는 것 같았다.
2025060049.english:
Zero was also quite strong.
 However, it seemed like they were too obsessed with attacking from the blind spot.

2025060050.korean: 초면의 적이나 철충 상대로는 매우 유효한 수단이긴 하지만, 그것도 지나치게 사용하면 방금처럼 쉽게 대응당하고 말 거다.
2025060050.english: It is a very effective tactic against unfamiliar enemies or Iron Bugs, but if used excessively, you will end up being easily countered just like you were just now.

2025060051.english: It is exactly as you said, Barg.

2025060052.korean: 실전 형식의 단련은 꾸준하게 해 왔다고 자부했지만…… 앞으로는 좀 더 다양한 사람들과 모의전을 해봐야겠네요.
2025060052.english: I prided myself on consistently practicing in a real-world format, but... I guess I should try mock battles with a wider variety of people from now on.

2025060053.korean:
바르그 님, 감사합니다.
잠시 휴식하시고 다음은 하츠나와 부탁드립니다.
2025060053.english:
Thank you, Barg.
 Please take a short break, and next, please ask Hatsuna.

2025060057.english: - The kunoichis and Barg ran toward me.

2025060058.korean:
죄송합니다.
주인님께서 계시다는 걸 알고 있었지만, 바로 인사를 드릴 수 없어서……
2025060058.english:
sorry.
 I knew the Master was here, but I couldn't greet him right away...

2025060059.english: I have ended up showing you my Lord a face of defeat…

2025060060.korean: - 이전에 바르그는 라비아타, 티아멧, 요안나, 샬럿을 동시에 상대하면서도 호각 그 이상의 전투 실력을 보여주었다.
2025060060.english: Previously, Varg demonstrated combat skills equal to or greater than equal to while facing Laviata, Tiamat, Joanna, and Charlotte simultaneously.

2025060061.korean: - 그런 바르그와 일대일로 싸울 수 있었다면 전투력은 이미 충분하다고 생각한다.
2025060061.english: If you were able to fight Varg one-on-one, I think your combat power is already sufficient.

2025060063.korean: 결과적으로 졌다는 사실은 그대로이니 너무 들뜨지 마.
2025060063.english: The fact remains that we lost, so don't get too carried away.

2025060065.korean: 그래서 주인님, 신사에는 무슨 일로 오신 건가요?
2025060065.english: So, Master, what brings you to the shrine?

2025060066.english: Ms. Leanne, what brings you here?

2025060067.korean:
아, 나는 쿠노이치의 전투를 직접 구경할까 해서.
스케줄을 보니까 마침 오늘 오르카 신사에서 모의전이 있길래 와 본 거야.
2025060067.english:
Ah, I was thinking of watching a kunoichi battle firsthand.
 I checked the schedule and saw that there was a mock battle at Orca Shrine today, so I came to check it out.

2025060068.english: A kunoichi's battle? Why is that…

2025060070.korean: 설마… 리앤도 쿠노이치가 될 생각인 건가!?
2025060070.english: No way… is Leanne thinking of becoming a kunoichi too!?

2025060071.english: Leanne is a formidable opponent when wearing a kunoichi outfit.

2025060072.english: Far from being a formidable opponent, it's invincible!

2025060073.korean: 다들 대체 무슨 소릴 하는 거야…
2025060073.english: What on earth is everyone talking about…

2025060074.korean: - 막상 보게 되면 상상 이상으로 어울릴 것 같은데…? 생각해보니 왜 지금까지 그런 생각을 못 했던 걸까?
2025060074.english: - Now that I actually see it, I think they would suit each other even better than I imagined…? Come to think of it, why haven't I thought of that until now?

2025060075.english: Commander, really...! What are you talking about...

2025060076.korean: 나는 그냥 새롭게 만들 대전 게임을 위해 모두를 연구하러 온 것뿐이야!
2025060076.english: I just came to study everyone for the new fighting game I'm going to create!

2025060077.english: Ah, you're talking about Densetsu Fighters.

2025060078.english: Kaen, make him the strongest character.

2025060079.english: Ahaha... well... I'll give it a try.

2025060081.korean: 아뇨… 스미레, 하츠나와 재회한 뒤로 딸들의 수련을 철저히 담당하고 있지만, 역시 실력을 향상시키는 일은 아무나 할 수 있는 게 아니라는 걸 최근 들어 느끼고 있어서요…
2025060081.english: No... Ever since Sumire reunited with Hatsuna, I have been thoroughly in charge of my daughters' training, but recently I have been realizing that improving one's skills is not something just anyone can do...

2025060082.korean: 저는 두 사람의 어머니이긴 하지만, 스승은 아닙니다… 하츠나를 단련시켰다는 설정이 있어서 일단 어느 정도 스승의 흉내를 낼 수 있습니다만…
2025060082.english: I am the mother of the two of them, but I am not their teacher… Since I have the backstory of having trained Hatsuna, I can at least pretend to be a teacher to some extent, but…

2025060083.korean: 막상 그 수련 방식을 떠올리려 하면 어딘가 안개가 낀 듯한 느낌이 듭니다.
2025060083.english: When I actually try to recall that training method, it feels like something is foggy.

2025060084.korean: 그렇군… 수련했다는 기억은 있지만, 경험은 없다는 말이로군…
2025060084.english: I see... So you mean you remember training, but have no experience...

2025060085.korean:
기억이란 건 의외로 금세 풍화된다.
더군다나 경험이 없고 기억만 있다면 더더욱이지.
2025060085.english:
Memories surprisingly weather away quickly.
 Moreover, if you have no experience and only memories, it is even more so.

2025060086.korean: 전투란 것은 그 순간의 공기, 상대의 호흡, 근육의 미묘한 움직임, 더 나아가 자신의 심리 상태조차 영향을 미치는 것이니까.
2025060086.english: After all, combat is something that influences the atmosphere of the moment, the opponent's breathing, the subtle movements of their muscles, and even one's own psychological state.

2025060087.korean: 머릿속에 있는 것만으로는 이해할 수 없는 부분도 있는 법이다.
2025060087.english: There are parts that cannot be understood solely by what is in one's head.

2025060088.korean: 네… 그래서, 제대로 된 쿠노이치로서의 수련을 시켜주지 못하고 있는 건 아닐까 싶어요.
2025060088.english: Yes… so, I wonder if I’m not able to give her proper training as a kunoichi.

2025060089.korean: 물론, 두 사람 모두 쿠노이치로서는 어엿한 실력을 갖추고 있긴 합니다만…
2025060089.english: Of course, both of them are quite skilled as kunoichis, but...

2025060090.korean: 초대님이라면 분명 두 사람을 더 강하게 만들어줄 수 있었을 거예요.
2025060090.english: If it were you, Chocha, you could definitely have made the two of them stronger.

2025060091.korean: 그분은 작품 속에서 두 사람을 제대로 수련시켰으니까요.
2025060091.english: Because he properly trained the two of them in the work.

2025060092.korean: 그걸 해내지 못하는 제 자신이 너무 분하고 한심해서...
2025060092.english: I was so frustrated and pathetic with myself for not being able to do that...

2025060093.korean: 어, 어머니…… 저희가 강해지지 못한 건 저희 잘못입니다. 그러니까 그렇게 생각하지 마세요.
2025060093.english: Uh, Mother... it is our fault that we couldn't become stronger. So please don't think that way.

2025060094.korean: 응. 카엔, 더 열심히 할게. 그러니까 안심해.
2025060094.english: Yeah. Kaen, I'll work even harder. So don't worry.

2025060095.korean: 그래 맞아! 저희는 아직 한창 성장 중이거든요!
2025060095.english: That's right! We are still in the midst of growing!

2025060097.korean: 그럼, 바로 수련을 재개합시다. 하츠나는 바르그 님과, 스미레는 저와 모의전입니다.
2025060097.english: Then, let's resume training right away. Hatsuna will have a mock battle with Lord Varg, and Sumire will have a mock battle with me.

2025060098.korean: 에에!? 저, 저 방금 막 싸운 참이라서 쉬고 싶은...
2025060098.english: Eh!? Uh, uh, I just finished fighting, so I want to rest...

2025060101.korean: 히익… 빠, 빨리… 신나는 모의전에 집중해야지~~~…
2025060101.english: Eek... H-hurry... I need to focus on this exciting mock battle~~~...

2025060103.korean: - 그렇게 해서 엔라이 일행은 모의전을 재개했다.
2025060103.english: And so, Enrai and his party resumed the mock battle.

2025060105.english: Now, let's get started with the explanation!

2025060107.korean: 엔라이 씨가 말하는 '초대님'이란! 《대전란~ 시들어 버린 무로마치의 꽃》 제3부에 등장하는 캐릭터, 무라사키류의 시조 ‘시덴’을 말하는 겁니다!
2025060107.english: The 'First Master' that Mr. Enrai is talking about! He is referring to 'Shiden,' the founder of the Murasaki-ryu and a character appearing in Part 3 of *The Great War: The Withered Flower of Muromachi*!

2025060108.korean: 제로와 카엔은 극중 시덴에게 단련을 받으며 아시카가 닌자군과 싸워! 진정한 쿠노이치로 성장해나아가는 것이죠!!!
2025060108.english: Zero and Kaen train under Shiden throughout the story and fight against the Ashikaga Ninja Army! They grow into true Kunoichi!!!

2025060109.korean: - 나도 예전에 제로와 카엔을 이해하기 위해 대전란 3부작을 봤었는데, 확실히 시덴이라는 쿠노이치가 등장했던 기억이 있다.
2025060109.english: I also watched the Great War Trilogy in the past to understand Zero and Kaen, and I definitely remember a kunoichi named Shiden appearing.

2025060110.korean: 사령관님이 영화를 보신 지도 꽤 오래되셨을 테니, 이번 기회에 대전란 감상회를 열어볼까요!
2025060110.english: It must have been quite a while since you last saw a movie, Commander, so shall we take this opportunity to hold a screening of *The Great War*?

2025060111.english: I agree~ I want to participate too!

2025060112.korean: 환영! 환영입니다! 덴세츠 작품을 전파할 좋은 기회! 덴세츠는 최강이니까요!
2025060112.english: Welcome! Welcome! A great opportunity to spread the word about Densetsu! Because Densetsu is the best!

2025060113.korean: 하지만 의외네요? 리앤 씨가 덴세츠 작품에 관심 있으셨다니.
2025060113.english: But that's unexpected. I'm surprised Ms. Leanne was interested in Densetsu's work.

2025060114.korean: 그래? 멸망 전엔 매지컬 모모 같은 것도 봤었는데? …물론 리앤이 되기 전의 내가 본 거지만...
2025060114.english: Really? I saw things like Magical Momo before the apocalypse, too? … Of course, that was me before I became Leanne, though...

2025060115.english: Wowww! That's amazing! To think you were a real-time viewer!

2025060116.korean: - 그러고 보니 확실히 리앤이 ‘자비로운 리앤’으로 불리기 전…… 토모 시절에는 매지컬 모모를 자주 보고 있었지.
2025060116.english: Come to think of it, before Leanne was called 'Merciful Leanne'... back in the Tomo days, she definitely watched Magical Momo often.

2025060117.korean: 이번엔 신작 게임을 위해서 공부하고 싶어졌어.
2025060117.english: This time, I wanted to study for the new game.

2025060119.korean: 응. 아, 물론 흐레스벨그에게는 제대로 형태가 갖춰진 다음에 상담하려고 했는데, 덴세츠 작품의 캐릭터가 등장하는 게임을 만들려고 생각 중이야……
2025060119.english: Yeah. Ah, of course, I was planning to consult Hresvelgr after it was properly formed, but I'm thinking of making a game featuring characters from Densetsu's works...

2025060120.korean: 아직은 기획 단계이지만... 뭐, 대충 이런 느낌이야…
2025060120.english: It's still in the planning stage, but... well, it's roughly like this...

2025060121.english: Hahahahahahahahaha!!! It's the best, isn't it!

2025060122.korean: 이건 대전란뿐 아니라 덴세츠 작품 전체 감상회를 열어야 할 수준의 중대 사안!!!
2025060122.english: This is a matter of such grave importance that we need to hold a screening of the entire Densetsu series, not just the Great War!!!

2025060123.korean: 어떤 잡일이라도 좋으니 제가 도와드릴 수 있는 게 있다면 뭐든 말씀해 주세요!!
2025060123.english: Please let me know if there is anything I can help with, even if it's just a chore!!

2025060124.korean: 아하하…… 그, 그 정도 까지 시간이 날까……
2025060124.english: Ahaha... ...I wonder if I'll have that much time... ...

2025060125.korean: 걱정 마세요! 일정은 잘 나눠서 개최할 테니까요! 맡겨주세요!
2025060125.english: Don't worry! We'll arrange the schedule well, so leave it to us!

2025060127.korean: 철충을 피해서 여기까지 오느라 다소 시간이 걸렸습니다.
2025060127.english: It took some time to get here while avoiding the Iron Bugs.

2025060128.english: There are Iron Bugs here, too.

2025060129.english: I hope Saint Orca is safe.

2025060130.english: First, I will exterminate the Iron蟲.

2025060132.english: It’s rare to find one in a shrine.

2025060133.english: Well, I guess that’s the case.

2025060135.korean: 그런데, 산책 겸이라는 건 신사에 볼일이라도 있었던 거야?
2025060135.english: By the way, if you said it was just for a walk, did you actually have business at the shrine?

2025060139.korean: 아니야, 바르그를 상대로 그 정도면 정말 대단했다고 생각해.
2025060139.english: No, I think that was really amazing considering he did that well against Varg.

2025060140.english: No, I just came out for a walk.

2025060146.korean: 그러게. 다시 한 번 봐두는 게 도움이 될 지도 모르겠네.
2025060146.english: Yeah, right. It might be helpful to take another look.

2025070002.korean: 손상 없음, 에너지 소모는 예상 범위 내.
2025070002.english: No damage, energy consumption within expected range.

2025070003.english: Then, I will head to the hangar.

2025070005.korean: 닥터는 단순한 격납고라고 했지만, 훌륭한 건설 시설이군요.
2025070005.english: The doctor said it was just a simple hangar, but it is an excellent construction facility.

2025070006.korean: 최소한의 철충 대책이 마련되어 있는 듯하니, 내부 시설을 비롯해 세인트 오르카도 무사할 겁니다.
2025070006.english: It seems that at least minimal countermeasures against the Iron蟲 have been prepared, so the internal facilities and Saint Orca should be safe.

2025070007.korean: 이제 시설의 메인 전원을 넣고, 세인트 오르카의 상태를 확인하면……
2025070007.english: Now, if we turn on the facility's main power and check Saint Orca's status… …

2025070009.korean: 소리? 주변의 철충은 전부 섬멸했을 텐데...
2025070009.english: Sound? I thought I had annihilated all the Iron蟲 around here...

2025070013.english: However, there was no reaction from the sensor…

2025070017.korean: 큿…! 여기서 싸우면 세인트 오르카의 피해를 면치 못합니다.
2025070017.english: Ugh…! If we fight here, we won't be able to avoid taking damage from Saint Orca.

2025070018.english: I will retreat from here for now.

2025070019.english: … It looks like you’ve finally given up.

2025070021.korean: 전투로 인해 양쪽 날개와 오른쪽 다리 손상, 부스터 출력 60% 저하, 왼팔 결손, 머리 부분에도 심각한 손상……
2025070021.english: Damage to both wings and right leg due to combat, 60% reduction in booster output, missing left arm, severe damage to the head as well…

2025070022.english: I never thought I would run into a unique entity…

2025070023.korean: 하지만 특이체에게서 특수한 파동이 나오기 때문에 분명 사전에 발견할 수 있었을 겁니다…
2025070023.english: However, since special waves emanate from the singularity, it must have been possible to detect it in advance…

2025070024.korean: 아무리 에이다가 나에게 비협조적이더라도, 특이체의 존재를 알리지 않았다는 건 말이 안 됩니다……
2025070024.english: No matter how uncooperative Ada is with me, it doesn't make sense that she didn't inform me of the existence of the singularity...

2025070026.korean: 그러고 보니, 그 특이체는 외형이 조금 달랐습니다… 전신에 있어야 할 알타이트가 거의 보이지 않았습니다.
2025070026.english: Come to think of it, that peculiar body looked a little different... The Altite that should have been all over its body was barely visible.

2025070027.korean: 그것이 파동을 감지 못한 이유일 수 있겠군요.
2025070027.english: That might be the reason why the waves were not detected.

2025070028.korean: 우선 이 상황을 각하께 보고드리는 게 좋겠습니다.
2025070028.english: First of all, I think it would be best to report this situation to Your Excellency.

2025070032.korean: 이 부스터 출력으로는 고고도로 올라가 에이다에게 신호를 보내는 것 또한 불가능…
2025070032.english: With this booster output, it is also impossible to ascend to a high altitude and send a signal to Ada…

2025070033.korean: 이런 상황을 두고 만사휴의라는 걸지도 모르겠군요…
2025070033.english: I suppose this is what they mean by "everything is fine"...

2025080001.korean: - 나는 저녁 식사를 마친 뒤, 스털링에게 불려 격납고로 향했다.
2025080001.english: After finishing dinner, I was called by Sterling and headed to the hangar.

2025080002.english: Oh my god... In the end, like this...

2025080004.korean: - 미안해 보이는 얼굴로 대답하는 스털링과는 달리, 웃고 있는 아자즈.
2025080004.english: Unlike Sterling, who answers with a apologetic look, Azaz is smiling.

2025080005.english: To summarize their story so far…

2025080006.korean: - 솔직히 말하자면 이유는 딱히 모르겠지만 결국 이렇게 될 거란 예상을 미리 하고 있었기 때문인지 별로 놀랍지도 않다…
2025080006.english: To be honest, I don't really know the reason, but perhaps because I had anticipated that it would end up like this, I'm not particularly surprised...

2025080007.korean: 스털링 씨의 설계도가 너무 훌륭해서, 그만……
2025080007.english: Mr. Sterling's blueprints were so excellent, so...

2025080008.korean: …그렇게 말씀해주시니 기쁘지만, 역시 이건 안 되는 거겠죠…?
2025080008.english: … I'm glad you say that, but I guess this won't work, right…?

2025080010.korean: 아자즈 씨에겐 물자와 신소재의 특별 사용 한도를 설정해두었는데, 이번엔 그걸 완전히 초과했어요.
2025080010.english: We had set special usage limits for supplies and new materials for Mr. Azaz, but this time, he completely exceeded them.

2025080012.korean: 그렇다니까요! 전에도 말했잖아요! 사용 한도는 초과하지 말아달라고요!
2025080012.english: I'm telling you! I told you before! Please don't exceed the usage limit!

2025080015.korean: 게다가 이 사용량… 이상한데요? 고급 AGS 한 기를 만들 수 있을 정도로 썼잖아요?
2025080015.english: Besides, this usage amount… that’s strange. You used enough to build a high-end AGS, didn’t you?

2025080016.korean: 네? 전 외장 파츠만 설계했기 때문에, 그렇게 많은 양이 들었을 리가…
2025080016.english: What? Since I only designed the exterior parts, there's no way that much went into it…

2025080017.korean: 맞아요. 좋은 아이디어가 떠올라서, 제가 신형 무장을 추가했어요.
2025080017.english: That's right. I had a good idea, so I added new weaponry.

2025080018.korean: 그에 맞춰 프레임 같은 걸 추가했기 때문에… 아마, 초과했다면 그게 원인일 거예요.
2025080018.english: Since I added things like frames to match that... if it exceeded the limit, that is probably the cause.

2025080020.english: Then of course there’s more than enough...

2025080022.korean: - 안드바리가 입을 꾹 다물고 아자즈를 바라본다… 아니, 눈을 부릅뜨고 노려보고 있다.
2025080022.english: Andvari keeps his mouth shut and stares at Azaz… no, he is glaring at him with his eyes wide open.

2025080024.korean: 하지만, 아자즈 씨의 발명은 돌아 돌아 결국 오르카한테 도움이 되니까요, 제가 사용량을 조정해 볼 수 있도록 하겠습니다.
2025080024.english: However, since Mr. Azaz's invention ultimately benefits Orca, I will try adjusting the usage.

2025080028.korean: - 일단 안드바리를 안심시키기 위해서라도, 이 자리에서 아자즈에게 한마디는 해둬야겠다……
2025080028.english: - For now, if only to reassure Andvari, I should say a few words to Azaz right here...

2025080029.korean: - 그때 내 패널이 울렸다. 이건 긴급 상황용 알림이다.
2025080029.english: Just then, my panel rang. This is an emergency alert.

2025080031.english: There is no regular contact from RF87 Locke.

2025080032.korean: RF87 로크로부터 정기 연락이 없으며, 신호도 소실되었습니다.
2025080032.english: There has been no regular contact from RF87 Lock, and the signal has been lost.

2025080033.korean: 그 후 위성을 이용해 노보리베츠의 세인트 오르카 격납고 주변을 촬영한 결과, 전투의 흔적을 발견했습니다.
2025080033.english: Afterwards, satellite imagery of the area around the Saint Orca hangar in Noboribetsu was used, revealing traces of battle.

2025080034.korean: 범위를 확장해 탐색했지만 RF87 로크로 보이는 기체의 모습은 없었고, 북동 방향으로 전투의 흔적이 점점 이어지고 있는 것을 확인했습니다.
2025080034.english: We expanded our search range but found no sign of an aircraft resembling the RF87 Locke, and confirmed that traces of battle were gradually extending in the northeast direction.

2025080035.korean: 애초에 예정되어 있던 이동 루트와는 전혀 다른 장소였던 점으로 미루어 보아, 철충 혹은 어떤 적대 세력과 조우하여 손상을 입고 통신 기능이 정지되었을 가능성이 있습니다.
2025080035.english: Judging by the fact that it was a completely different location from the originally planned route, it is possible that it encountered Iron蟲 or some hostile force, sustained damage, and had its communication functions cut off.

2025080036.english: This is merely a hopeful observation, but…

2025080037.korean: 보고된 상황으로밖에 추측할 수 없으니, 현재로서는 에이다 씨의 소견과 비슷한 이야기를 드릴 수밖에 없을 것 같아요.
2025080037.english: Since we can only make inferences based on the reported situation, for now, I think I can only offer an opinion similar to Ms. Ada's.

2025080038.korean: 하지만, 로크 씨가 통신 기능을 상실할 정도의 철충이라면, 연합체 이상… 최악의 경우 특이체 레벨의 개체일 겁니다.
2025080038.english: However, if it is an Iron蟲 (Iron Bug) strong enough to cause Mr. Locke to lose his communication capabilities, it would be something beyond the Alliance... In the worst case, it would be an individual at the level of a singularity.

2025080039.korean: 하지만, 알타이트가 내뿜는 특유의 파동은 감지되지 않았습니다.
2025080039.english: However, the distinctive waves emitted by Altite were not detected.

2025080041.english: Let me start with the conclusion.

2025080042.english: Are you planning to go rescue them?

2025080043.korean: 음, 주군이라면 그렇게 말할 거라 예상했지만, 그래도 만약이라는 것이 있으니 확인 해보았소.
2025080043.english: Well, I expected you to say that, Lord, but since there is always a possibility, I checked.

2025080044.korean: 우리는 지금 유럽이고, 로크가 있는 곳은 저 멀리 떨어진 일본이오.
2025080044.english: We are in Europe right now, and Locke is in Japan, far away.

2025080045.korean: 영국에 갔을 때와는 상황이 달라서, 당장 가는 데만 해도 많은 시간이 필요하지.
2025080045.english: The situation is different from when I went to the UK, so it takes a lot of time just to get there right now.

2025080046.korean: 부정적으로 생각하고 싶지는 않지만, 일본에 도착했을 때는 이미 너무 늦었을 가능성도 있고, 그 정체를 알 수 없는 적대 세력과 조우하게 될 수도 있소.
2025080046.english: I don't want to think negatively, but there is a possibility that it will already be too late by the time you arrive in Japan, and you might encounter hostile forces of unknown identity.

2025080048.korean: - 내 대답을 들은 용은 부드럽게 웃었다.
2025080048.english: The dragon smiled gently upon hearing my answer.

2025080050.korean: 그럼, 어떻게 구하러 갈지 생각해 보겠소.
2025080050.english: Then, I will think about how to go rescue them.

2025080051.korean: 아까도 말했듯이, 어느 정도 위험을 감수하며 함선으로 향한다고 해도, 상당한 시간이 걸릴 거요.
2025080051.english: As I mentioned earlier, even if you head to the ship while taking some risks, it will take a considerable amount of time.

2025080052.korean: 그리고 적과의 전투 가능성을 생각하면 철저한 준비가 필요하겠지만...
2025080052.english: And considering the possibility of combat with the enemy, thorough preparation would be necessary, but...

2025080053.korean: 지금 전투 부대는 오르카의 확대된 세력권을 커버하기 위해 광범위하게 분산돼 있습니다.
2025080053.english: Combat units are currently widely dispersed to cover Orca's expanded sphere of influence.

2025080054.korean: 철충의 활동도 철의 탑이 붕괴된 이후를 기준으로 예전보다는 훨씬 줄어들긴 했지만, 아직까지도 활발한 상태를 이어가고 있어요.
2025080054.english: Although the activity of the Iron蟲 has decreased significantly since the collapse of the Iron Tower, it remains active to this day.

2025080055.korean: 병력을 소집하려면 세부적인 내부 조정도 필요합니다.
2025080055.english: Detailed internal coordination is also required to mobilize troops.

2025080056.korean: 아무리 서둘러도 출발까지 하루는 걸릴 겁니다.
2025080056.english: No matter how much you hurry, it will take a day to depart.

2025080057.korean: - 지금은 일분일초가 시급하다. 하루를 낭비해버린다면 정말 손쓸 수 없게 돼 버릴지도 몰라.
2025080057.english: Every minute and second counts right now. If we waste a whole day, things might become completely unmanageable.

2025080058.english: Hmm... so this is how it ends up...

2025080060.korean: - 지금 당장 나와 함께할 수 있는 멤버들을 머릿속에 떠올려본다. 컴패니언, 스트라이커즈, 엠프레시스 하운드, 쿠노이치…
2025080060.english: I picture the members who can be with me right now. Companion, Strikerz, Empressis Hound, Kunoichi…

2025080061.korean: - 아, 그래. 나스호른이 카페에서 멍하니 있는 걸 봤으니까, 아머드 메이든까지 바로 소집할 수 있을 것 같다.
2025080061.english: - Ah, right. Since I saw Nashorn spacing out at the cafe, it looks like I can summon the Armored Maiden right away.

2025080062.english: Leave it to the relevant person.

2025080063.english: Understood. I will adjust it accordingly.

2025080064.korean: 그럼 비서실을 통해 동행할 대원을 소집하겠습니다.
2025080064.english: Then, I will summon the team members to accompany us through the secretary's office.

2025080065.korean: 저는 계속해서 홋카이도의 감시와 분석, 탐색을 진행하고, 무언가 변화가 생기면 바로 연락드리겠습니다.
2025080065.english: I will continue to monitor, analyze, and explore Hokkaido, and I will contact you immediately if anything changes.

2025080068.english: I didn't know the singularity would be this persistent.

2025080069.english: It's been a long time since the regular report was due.

2025080070.english: … By now, Your Excellency must have become aware of this situation…

2025080071.korean: 각하의 집사로서, 자력으로 이 궁지를 벗어나고 싶습니다만…
2025080071.english: As Your Excellency's butler, I wish to escape this predicament on my own, but...

2025080072.korean: 이런 성능을 가졌지만 부끄럽게도 이미 한계군요.
2025080072.english: It has this kind of performance, but I am ashamed to say it has already reached its limit.

2025080073.english: … … If it were His Excellency, he would surely send a rescue unit… …

2025080074.english: To think the butler ended up causing trouble for the master...

2025080078.korean: 그렇습니다… 정말로 믿고 있습니다. 조금의 의심도 없을 정도로…
2025080078.english: Yes... I truly believe it. To the point of having not the slightest doubt...

2025080079.korean: 앙헬 공께서 여기 계셨다면, 분명히 저를 비웃으셨겠지요.
2025080079.english: If Duke Angel were here, he would surely have laughed at me.

2025080080.korean: 불가사의한 일입니다. 센서에는 전혀 변화가 없는데, 제 마음이 지금 북받쳐 오르는 걸 느꼈습니다.
2025080080.english: It is a mystery. There is no change in the sensor at all, yet I felt my heart welling up.

2025080081.korean: ……아아, 희망이라는 건 이토록 강력한 에너지를 감추고 있는 것이군요.
2025080081.english: … … Ah, so hope hides such powerful energy.

2025080082.korean: ……그렇다면, 생존 확률을 높이기 위해서라도 여기서 이동하도록 하겠습니다.
2025080082.english: … … In that case, I will move from here to increase my chances of survival.

2025080083.korean: GPS 기능이 손상되어, 정확한 위치를 파악할 수 없군요…
2025080083.english: The GPS function is damaged, so I can't determine the exact location...

2025080084.korean: 아마도 지금쯤이면 치토세라는 지역에 들어와 있을 겁니다.
2025080084.english: By now, you would probably be in an area called Chitose.

2025080089.english: (So, it's a bioroid that doesn't exist in Orca......)

2025080092.korean: 이름을 밝히지 않겠다면… 여기서 부숴버릴 것이야! …그리 하면 되겠소?
2025080092.english: If you won't reveal your name… I will smash it right here! … Is that all you want me to do?

2025080093.korean: (이런 장소에서 살아남아 있다는 건, 혼자가 아닐 가능성이 있습니다. 당장은 자세한 사항을 숨기고 상황을 지켜보도록 하죠…)
2025080093.english: (The fact that you are surviving in a place like this means there is a possibility that you are not alone. For now, let's keep the details hidden and observe the situation…)

2025080094.english: (Above all, I want to avoid any more battles.)

2025080095.korean: 실례했습니다. 저는 블랙리버의 실험기 로크라고 합니다.
2025080095.english: Excuse me. I am Locke, an experimental aircraft of Black River.

2025080096.korean: 조금 전까지 거대한 철충에게 쫓기고 있었기에 경계하게 되었습니다. 무례를 용서해 주십시오.
2025080096.english: I was being chased by a giant Iron Bug until just a moment ago, so I became wary. Please forgive my rudeness.

2025080097.english: Locke… I’ve never heard that name before.

2025080098.english: It is because it was an experimental device.

2025080099.korean: 실험기가… 어찌하여 이곳에 있단 말이오. 혼자인겐가? …동료는?
2025080099.english: The experimental machine… how is it here? Is it alone? … Where are its colleagues?

2025080100.korean: 실험기였던 것은 예전 일입니다… 인류가 멸망한 이후, 비행선을 거점으로 바이오로이드들과 공동생활을 이어가고 있습니다.
2025080100.english: Being an experimental machine is a thing of the past… Since the extinction of humanity, we have been living together with bioroids, using the airship as our base.

2025080101.korean: …상당히 손상되어 있는 것 같은데… 괜찮은 게요? …그 동료들이라는 자들은 지금 구하러 오는 중이오?
2025080101.english: … It looks quite damaged… Is it okay? … Are those so-called comrades on their way to rescue you?

2025080102.korean: 아닙니다, 통신 기능이 손상되어 매우 곤란하던 참이었습니다.
2025080102.english: No, I was in a very difficult situation because the communication function was damaged.

2025080103.korean: 치토세에는 거대한 공항이 있을 터이니, 그곳에서 통신을 시도해보려고 이곳까지 이동해온 것입니다.
2025080103.english: There must be a huge airport in Chitose, so I traveled all the way here to attempt communication from there.

2025080104.korean: ……그 공항은 멸망 전쟁 당시 방위 거점이 되었던 탓에…… 이제는 쓸 수 없소…… 포기하시게나.
2025080104.english: … … That airport served as a defense base during the War of Annihilation… … so it cannot be used now… … give up.

2025080107.english: Follow me. I will guide you to our base.

2025080108.english: Oh, so there was a place like that…

2025080110.english: Even if you take a mysterious AGS like me…

2025080111.korean: 일 없소… 그대가 곤경에 처해 있지 않소.
2025080111.english: It's nothing... You aren't in trouble.

2025080112.korean: 곤경에 처한 자를… 돕는 건 당연한 일이지. 인간과는 다르게 말일세.
2025080112.english: It is only natural to help those in distress… unlike humans.

2025080114.korean: 게다가, 그대 같은 AGS에게… 철충이 기생하게 되거든 심히 곤란하니 말일세.
2025080114.english: Besides, it would be very troublesome if Iron蟲 were to parasitize an AGS like you.

2025080116.korean: 그럼, 말씀에 감사히 따르겠습니다. ……어떻게 부르면 될까요?
2025080116.english: Then, I will gratefully follow your words. … … How should I address you?

2025080118.korean: 이미… 데이터 대조를 마쳤을 줄 알았소이다만?
2025080118.english: I assumed… the data comparison would have already been completed?

2025080120.korean: 데이터는 있었습니다만, 불리고 싶은 것과는 별개라고 판단하였습니다.
2025080120.english: There was data, but I determined that it was separate from what I wanted to call.

2025080121.english: Thank you again for your kindness…

2025080123.english: It's a bit of a distance to the base... would that be alright?

2025080124.korean: 보행은 어떻게든 가능합니다. 어려우면 저공비행으로 이동하겠습니다.
2025080124.english: Walking is possible somehow. If it is difficult, I will move by low-altitude flight.

2025080126.korean: 뭐, 가는 길에도 철충이 있을 터이지만… 걱정은 마시게나.
