2025080126.english: Well, there are bound to be Iron Bugs on the way, but... don't worry.

2025080127.english: I will cut them all down myself.

2025080129.korean: 로크의 커스텀 파츠, 완성돼 버린 건가…
2025080129.english: Locke's custom parts, have they been completed...

2025080132.korean: 안드바리… 아자즈한테는 나도 다시 한 번 확실히 말해둘게.
2025080132.english: Andvari... I'll make sure to tell Azaz clearly once again.

2025080136.korean: 일단, 신호가 끊긴 원인은 나중에 생각하자.
2025080136.english: For now, let's think about the reason the signal was cut later.

2025080138.korean: 알아, 하지만 내 대답은 변하지 않아.
2025080138.english: I know, but my answer hasn't changed.

2025080139.korean: 이런 상황에서 선택할 수 있는 건 단 하나뿐이야…
2025080139.english: In a situation like this, there is only one choice…

2025080140.korean: 지금 당장 소집할 수 있는 전력을 전부 모아, 오르카호로 향한다.
2025080140.english: We gather all available forces right now and head to the Orca.

2025080141.english: I'm sorry, but I'll leave Europe to you.

2025080142.korean: 그리고, 만일을 대비해서 일본으로 향하는 전대를 준비해줘.
2025080142.english: And, just in case, please prepare a squadron heading to Japan.

2025080143.english: Please take good care of me.

2025090002.english: Is that huge dome a base?

2025090003.korean: 원래는 덴세츠가 건설한 돔형 촬영 스튜디오… 일명 D 엔터 돔이라 불리던 것이외다.
2025090003.english: Originally, it was a dome-shaped filming studio built by Densetsu... known as the D-Enter Dome.

2025090004.korean: 우리는 그냥 성이나… 돔이라 부르고 있네.
2025090004.english: We just call it a castle or... a dome.

2025090005.korean: 흠…… 확실히 저 정도면 거점으로서 충분히 기능하겠군요.
2025090005.english: Hmm... ...that certainly looks like it would function sufficiently as a base.

2025090006.korean: 그렇소이다. 저것 덕분에 지금까지 살아남을 수 있었다 해도... 과언이 아닐 것이라네.
2025090006.english: That is correct. It would not be an exaggeration to say that I have been able to survive until now thanks to that.

2025090007.korean: …이 근방의 철충은 우리가 전부 섬멸했으니… 안심하시오.
2025090007.english: … We have annihilated all the Iron蟲 in this vicinity… so rest assured.

2025090009.korean: 내부는 촬영 스튜디오라기보다는… 꼭 하나의 마을처럼 보이는군요.
2025090009.english: The interior looks more like a village than a filming studio.

2025090010.korean: 그렇지… 덴세츠의 고집이 구현된 시설이라고 해도 과언은 아닐 게야.
2025090010.english: That's right... It wouldn't be an exaggeration to say that this facility embodies Densetsu's stubbornness.

2025090011.korean: 실로 수도 같은 인프라가 정비되어 있을 뿐만 아니라… 건물도 허술한 장식물이 아닌 하나하나 모든 게 진짜일세…
2025090011.english: Not only is the infrastructure truly as well-established as a capital city… but the buildings are not mere decorations; every single one of them is genuine…

2025090012.korean: 덕분에 여기 사는 자들도… 각자 집을 가지고 있소외다.
2025090012.english: Thanks to that, the people living here also… each have their own homes.

2025090013.korean: 이렇게나 멀쩡한 것들을 촬영할 때마다 일일이 세우고는… 요란하게 폭파시키기 일쑤였다고 하더외다.
2025090013.english: They say that whenever they were filming, they would set up these perfectly fine things one by one... and then blow them up with a lot of noise.

2025090014.korean: 그야말로 광기 그 자체라 할 수 있지 않겠소?
2025090014.english: Wouldn't you say it is madness itself?

2025090015.korean: 말투를 보니… 당시의 상황을 모르는 듯하군요?
2025090015.english: Judging by your tone… it seems you are unaware of the situation at the time?

2025090016.korean: 응? 아아, 그렇소… 이 몸은 동경에서 당도했으니 말이지.
2025090016.english: Huh? Ah, that is right... since I arrived from Tokyo.

2025090019.korean: 아니… 그 일에 대해서는… 그다지 떠올리고 싶지 않아서 말일세...
2025090019.english: No... I just don't really want to think about that matter...

2025090021.korean: 멸망 전의 일은 누구에게나 고통스러운 기억이겠지요.
2025090021.english: The events before the apocalypse must be a painful memory for everyone.

2025090024.english: Anyway... a robot expressing 'emotions'... that's interesting.

2025090025.korean: 그런 건 덴세츠 작품에 출현하는 로봇들이나 그러는 줄 알았는데 말일세...
2025090025.english: I thought only the robots appearing in Densetsu's works did things like that...

2025090026.english: Ah, Shiden, you're back. You were quick.

2025090028.korean: 로크일세… 철충에게 습격당해서 통신 기능이 망가졌다는구려… 동료에게 연락할 수 없는 상태일세.
2025090028.english: It is Locke... I hear that the communication system was damaged after being attacked by Iron蟲... I am unable to contact my comrades.

2025090029.english: Oh my... that must have been tough for you.

2025090030.korean: 저는 '쿠노이치 레이'라고 합니다. 레이라고 편하게 불러주세요.
2025090030.english: My name is Kunoichi Rei. Please feel free to call me Rei.

2025090031.korean: 신경 써 주셔서 감사합니다. 잘 부탁드립니다.
2025090031.english: Thank you for your concern. I look forward to working with you.

2025090032.korean: 우리 쪽에도 AGS를 정비할 수 있는 아이가 있으니까, 괜찮으시면 그 아이에게 진찰을 받아보세요.
2025090032.english: We also have a child on our side who can service the AGS, so if you don't mind, please have him examine it.

2025090034.korean: 흐음, 그치만 당신… 뭔가 특별해 보이니 완벽하게 수리하는 건 어려울지도 몰라요……
2025090034.english: Hmm, but you… you look somewhat special, so it might be difficult to repair it perfectly…

2025090035.korean: 뭐… 응급 처치만 할 수 있으면 되지 않겠소?
2025090035.english: Well... wouldn't it be enough if I could just provide first aid?

2025090036.korean: 미안하지만… 레이, 하가네에게 이야기 좀 전해주시게나.
2025090036.english: I'm sorry, but... Rei, could you please pass this on to Hagane?

2025090038.english: Well then, excuse me, Mr. Locke.

2025090039.english: Yes, I hope to see you again.

2025090040.korean: 가세나. 수리하기 전에… 내 저택으로 와 주시게.
2025090040.english: Gasena. Please come to my mansion before the repairs.

2025090041.korean: 내 친히 물어보고 싶은 게 있소.
2025090041.english: There is something I would like to ask you personally.

2025090042.english: The story of the Iron蟲 that attacked you…

2025090043.korean: 그리고, 이국에서 왔을 터이니… 바다 건너의 정세에 대해서도 듣고 싶구려.
2025090043.english: And, since you must have come from a foreign land… I would also like to hear about the situation across the sea.

2025090044.korean: 알다시피… 일본은 극 초기에 수도가 함락되었지. 제대로 된 세력도… 거의 남아 있지 않소외다.
2025090044.english: As you know... Japan's capital fell very early on. There are hardly any proper forces left either.

2025090045.korean: 확실히, 일본에서 그런 세력의 이야기는 들리지 않더군요. 가고시마에 하나 거점 비슷한 것이 있긴 했습니다만……
2025090045.english: Certainly, I haven't heard any talk of such a force in Japan. There was one base of sorts in Kagoshima, though...

2025090046.english: It wasn't really something that could be called a force.

2025090048.english: Lord Shiden, have you returned safely?

2025090051.english: It's a growle named Rok. It was attacked by Iron Bugs.

2025090053.english: Ah, it's Shiden! You've already returned.

2025090056.korean: 아니, 오늘은 사슴이 아니라… 이 자를 데려오게 되었다네.
2025090056.english: No, today it’s not a deer… I ended up bringing this one.

2025090059.korean: 볼일이 끝나면 곧장 다시 다녀오겠소, 그러니 안심하시게나.
2025090059.english: I will be back as soon as I finish my business, so please rest assured.

2025090064.korean: 네~! 그럼 또 봬요! 시덴님, 로봇씨!
2025090064.english: Yes! Then, see you again! Mr. Shiden, Mr. Robot!

2025090068.korean: 정체불명의 외부인인데도, 경계심이 별로 느껴지지 않습니다.
2025090068.english: Even though he is an unidentified outsider, I don't feel much wariness.

2025090069.korean: 이 몸이 데리고 왔기 때문이기도 하겠지만… 이국의 바이오로이드들은… 이리 하지 않는 모양이지?
2025090069.english: It might be because I brought them here... but it seems foreign bioroids... don't do things like this, do they?

2025090070.korean: 모두가 그런 건 아니지만… 감히 비교하자면 확실히 이보다 더 외부인을 경계하긴 합니다.
2025090070.english: Not everyone is like that, but... if I may dare to compare, they are certainly more wary of outsiders than this.

2025090072.korean: 슬프구나… 이제야 겨우 인간이 사라졌거늘… 살아남은 자들끼리… 사이좋게 지내지 못하다니.
2025090072.english: How sad... Humanity has finally vanished... yet the survivors... cannot get along well with one another.

2025090073.korean: 결국 인간에게 만들어진 우리 역시… 인간을 닮아 나쁜 습성을 지니고 있다는 증거겠지…
2025090073.english: In the end, it must be proof that we, created by humans, also possess bad habits like humans...

2025090074.korean: (역시 인간에 대한 부정적인 감정이 다소 강한 분위기군요… 자세한 이야기를 숨겨두길 잘한 것 같습니다.)
2025090074.english: (As expected, the atmosphere is somewhat filled with negative feelings toward humans… I think it was a good thing I kept the details hidden.)

2025090075.english: I'm sorry. I did it unintentionally...

2025090077.english: Then, let's hurry to the mansion.

2025090078.korean: 뭐, 저택이라 해도 서양식 집이지만 말이지.
2025090078.english: Well, even though it is called a mansion, it is a Western-style house.

2025100001.korean: - 그로부터 며칠, 오르카호는 홋카이도의 도마코마이라는 장소에 도착했다.
2025100001.english: A few days later, the Orca arrived at a place called Tomakomai in Hokkaido.

2025100002.korean: - 이동 중 계속해서 에이다가 로크의 행방을 수색해준 덕분에, 도마코마이 북쪽에 있는 거대한 건축물로 이동한 흔적을 발견했다고 한다.
2025100002.english: - Thanks to Ada continuously searching for Locke's whereabouts while on the move, it is said that traces of him moving to a huge structure north of Tomakomai were discovered.

2025100003.korean: - 건물의 이름은 D 엔터 돔. 자료에 따르면 덴세츠 관련 건물인 듯하다.
2025100003.english: - The name of the building is D Enter Dome. According to the data, it appears to be a building related to Densetsu.

2025100005.korean: 돔이라는 이름이지만, 거대한 촬영 스튜디오라고 생각하시면 이해하기 쉬울 겁니다.
2025100005.english: Although it is called a dome, it will be easier to understand if you think of it as a giant filming studio.

2025100006.korean: 내부에는 도시나 전장 등을 촬영용으로써 완벽하게 재현해두었다고 하네요.
2025100006.english: They say that the interior has been perfectly recreated for filming purposes, such as cities and battlefields.

2025100007.korean: 멸망 전쟁 발발 직전에 완공되어서, 실사용은 그다지 못한 것 같지만…
2025100007.english: It was completed just before the outbreak of the War of Annihilation, so it doesn't seem like it was actually used much...

2025100008.korean: 작전 지역으로부터 이곳까지 온 걸 보면… 이곳을 거점으로 삼고 있는 세력에게 보호받고 있을 가능성이 높아요.
2025100008.english: Judging by the fact that they came all the way here from the operation area… it is highly likely that they are being protected by a force using this place as a base.

2025100009.english: I wish the people there were nice...

2025100010.korean: - 닥터가 기운 없이 작은 목소리로 중얼댔다.
2025100010.english: The doctor muttered weakly in a small voice.

2025100011.korean: - 세인트 오르카 회수를 결정한 건 다름 아닌 나였고, 로크에게 이런 일이 일어나리라고는 예측하지 못했다.
2025100011.english: It was none other than me who decided to retrieve Saint Orca, and I never predicted that something like this would happen to Locke.

2025100012.korean: - 그러니 닥터에게 죄책감을 느낄 필요는 없다고 일러두었건만, 영 기운을 차리지 못하고 있다.
2025100012.english: So, I told the doctor that he didn't need to feel guilty, but he still hasn't recovered.

2025100014.korean: 로크 씨가 이동한 흔적과 함께 소규모 전투의 흔적도 여기저기 이어져 있는 것을 확인했습니다.
2025100014.english: We confirmed that traces of small-scale battles were scattered here and there along with the tracks of Mr. Locke's movement.

2025100015.english: I think it is unlikely that he was dragged away against his will.

2025100017.korean:
현재, 스카이나이츠가 D 돔 주변을 정찰하고 있습니다.
끝나는 대로, 세인트 오르카가 있는 격납고로 향할 예정입니다.
2025100017.english:
Currently, the Sky Knights are scouting the area around D-Dome.
 As soon as that is finished, I plan to head to the hangar where Saint Orca is located.

2025100018.korean: 에이다 씨에 따르면 격납고 자체에 큰 손상은 없는 걸로 보아…
2025100018.english: According to Ms. Ada, judging by the fact that there is no major damage to the hangar itself…

2025100019.korean: 아마도 로크 씨는 갑작스러운 전투로 인해 세인트 오르카에 손상이 발생하지 않도록 격납고로부터 거리를 두기로 판단하신 것 같습니다.
2025100019.english: Mr. Locke likely decided to keep his distance from the hangar to prevent damage to the Saint Orca from a sudden battle.

2025100020.english: If it's Locke, he's more than capable of doing that.

2025100023.korean: 그럼, 나는 내가 할 수 있는 걸 하면서 로크 오빠가 무사히 돌아오기를 기다릴게.
2025100023.english: Then, I'll do what I can and wait for Locke to return safely.

2025100025.korean: 이번 사건에는 특이체가 관련되어 있을 가능성도 다분하니까…
2025100025.english: Since there is a high possibility that an anomaly is involved in this incident…

2025100028.korean: 이쪽은 에이다 언니와 함께 분석 중이니 기다려 줘.
2025100028.english: I'm analyzing this with Ada, so please wait.

2025100029.korean: 하지만, 어떤 존재였는지는 실제로 전투가 있었던 장소에 가보지 않으면 확정하기 어려워.
2025100029.english: However, it is difficult to determine exactly what kind of being it was unless you go to the place where the battle actually took place.

2025100030.korean: - 이미 전투가 종료되어 철충의 섬멸 흔적이 있다고 해도 언제든 의문의 존재에게 습격당할 가능성이 있다.
2025100030.english: Even if the battle has already ended and there are traces of the Iron蟲's extermination, there is still a possibility of being attacked by a mysterious entity at any time.

2025100031.korean: - 일단은 지금 스카이나이츠의 정찰 결과를 기다리는 수밖에 없다.
2025100031.english: For now, we have no choice but to wait for the Sky Knights' reconnaissance results.

2025100032.korean: D 엔터 돔 주변에 도착. 지금부터 관측을 시작합니다.
2025100032.english: Arrived near D Enter Dome. We will begin observation now.

2025100036.english: No, I thought Hresvelgr was acting like usual...

2025100038.english: The usual Hresvelgrne we always see.

2025100040.korean: 뭐가? 평소처럼 행동하는 건 좋은 일이잖아.
2025100040.english: What? Acting like usual is a good thing.

2025100041.korean: 왜냐면, 이건 덴세츠가 만든 건물이잖아? 내가 알고 있는 흐레스벨그라면 분명, '안에 들어가도 되나요!? 우효효~!' 이랬을 거라구!
2025100041.english: Because, this is a building Densetsu made, right? If it were the Hresvelgr I know, he would definitely have been like, "Can I come inside!? Woohoo~!"

2025100042.english: Hahaha! That impression was spot-on just now!

2025100043.korean: 윽… 지금 그게 중요한 게 아니잖아!
2025100043.english: Ugh... that's not important right now!

2025100044.korean: 듣고보니까 확실히 이상하긴 하네? 매지컬 모모 얘기만 나오면 안절부절 못하는데...
2025100044.english: Now that I think about it, it definitely is strange. She gets all fidgety whenever Magical Momo is mentioned...

2025100046.korean:
지, 지지지 지금은 임무 중이잖아요오오호호호...
아무리 이런 저라도 안절… 안절부절인절미 거릴 리 없잖습니까아아하아아아...
2025100046.english:
N-n
 Even someone like me wouldn't be so... so restless, you know?

2025100047.english: … I knew it. As expected, you were agitated.

2025100048.korean: 됐으니까! 이제 그 얘기는 그만해 주세요. 저, 보기와는 다르게 지금 엄청난 의지력으로 참고 있는 중이라서요.
2025100048.english: Enough! Please stop talking about that. Contrary to appearances, I am currently holding back with tremendous willpower.

2025100049.english: "Contrary to appearances"... How is this supposed to be?

2025100050.english: Anyway… I will properly carry out the mission assigned to me.

2025100051.english: Because Mr. Locke is in a crisis situation right now…

2025100053.korean: 나도 너무 놀린 것 같네. 미안해.
2025100053.english: I think I teased you too much. I'm sorry.

2025100055.english: No. Can you give me back my apple?

2025100056.english: Ah, I'm sorry, but giving something and having it taken away...

2025100057.korean: 그게 아니라, 대전란 ~ 시들어버린 무로마치의 꽃 ~ 제3부에 등장하는 쿠노이치 코노하가 바로 저기에 있습니다!!!
2025100057.english: No, that's not it. Konoha, the kunoichi who appears in Part 3 of *The Great War ~ The Withered Flower of Muromachi ~*, is right there!!!

2025100058.korean: 아, 예~ 예. 덴세츠의 바이오로이드가 있다는 거네…
2025100058.english: Ah, yes~ yes. So you're saying there's a bioroid in Densetsu...

2025100060.korean: 우와… 대박... 혼모노 코노하잖냐… 이거 진짜 대박사건…
2025100060.english: Wow… amazing… this is the real deal… this is seriously a huge deal…

2025100062.korean: 네, 돔을 둘러싸듯 일정 거리를 두고 서 있는 걸 보면, 경비 중인 것처럼 보입니다.
2025100062.english: Yes, judging by the way they are standing at a certain distance around the dome, they appear to be on guard.

2025100063.english: Hmm, so they are acting in an organized manner.

2025100064.korean: 멀리서 주변을 돌며 관찰하고, 특이 사항이 없으면 수집한 데이터를 오르카호로 보내자꾸나.
2025100064.english: Let's observe the surroundings from a distance, and if there are no unusual findings, let's send the collected data to the Orca.

2025100066.korean: 가까이서 보고 싶겠지만, 지금은 참거라. 흐레스벨그.
2025100066.english: You might want to see it up close, but hold back for now, Hresvelgr.

2025100070.korean: 여기 정찰이 끝나면, 다음은 세인트 오르카의 격납고로 향한다.
2025100070.english: Once the reconnaissance here is finished, we head to the Saint Orca's hangar.

2025100071.korean: 엥? 돔 사람들에게 인사 안 하고?
2025100071.english: Huh? You didn't greet the people in the dome?

2025100072.korean: 뭐랄까… 왠지 우리가 접촉하지 않는 편이 좋을 것 같다는 느낌이 드는구나.
2025100072.english: How should I put it... for some reason, I get the feeling that it would be better if we didn't come into contact.

2025100073.korean: 사령관께서 제대로 된 구조 부대를 편성하실 테니, 그 아이들에게 맡기도록 하자꾸나.
2025100073.english: The Commander will organize a proper rescue unit, so let's leave it to those children.

2025100074.korean: 오케이. 우로보로스가 그렇게 말하면 그런 거겠지~
2025100074.english: Okay. If Ouroboros says so, then I guess that's how it is.

2025100075.english: It's good that you understand quickly.

2025100076.english: Hehehe, being fast is my strength, after all!

2025100077.korean: 이해가 빠르다기보다, 그냥 생각이 없는 거 아니냐…?
2025100077.english: It's not so much that they understand quickly, but isn't it just that they have no brains...?

2025100080.korean: 어쨌든, 세인트 오르카 격납고 쪽에는 로크를 습격한 무언가가 있을지도 모르니
2025100080.english: Anyway, since there might be something at the Saint Orca Hangar that attacked Locke,

2025100081.english: Everyone, don't let your guard down!

2025100082.english: I want to eat vanilla cake.

2025100085.korean: 오르카호가 항구에 정박했기 때문에, 여러모로 바쁘잖아요.
2025100085.english: Since the Orca is docked at the port, it's busy in many ways.

2025100086.korean: 그보다, 그렇게 케이크가 먹고 싶었으면 유럽에 남아 있으면 됐잖아요.
2025100086.english: Besides, if you wanted to eat cake that much, you could have just stayed in Europe.

2025100087.english: I even asked Ms. Aurora for help...

2025100088.english: Why did you sneak onto the Orca?

2025100089.korean: 왜냐면… 아우로라에게 부탁하러 갔더니, 날 보자마자 도망가서…… 케이크를 못 먹을 것 같아서……
2025100089.english: Because… I went to ask Aurora for a favor, but she ran away as soon as she saw me… … so I don’t think I’ll be able to eat the cake… …

2025100090.korean: ……도대체 어떤 식으로 부탁한 거예요…… 이럴 줄 알았으면, 아자즈 씨한테 자동 급식기라도 만들어 달라고 할 걸 그랬네요……
2025100090.english: … … How on earth did you ask for this… … If I had known this would happen, I should have just asked Azaz to make me an automatic feeder… …

2025100093.korean: 방금 전에 부엌에 들어갔더니 엄청난 눈으로 노려봤어…...
2025100093.english: I just went into the kitchen and was glared at with intense eyes…

2025100094.english: Happy was at fault for going into the kitchen.

2025100095.korean: 그건 나를 요리 재료로 삼으려는 눈빛이었다……
2025100095.english: It was a look that intended to use me as cooking material…

2025100096.korean:
젠장! 그때만큼 본래의 몸으로 돌아가고 싶다고 생각한 적은 없었다!
본래의 모습이었다면 날 그런 눈으로 보지 않았을 텐데!!
2025100096.english:
Damn it! I've never wanted to return to my original body as much as I did back then!
 If you were your true self, you wouldn't have looked at me like that!!

2025100097.english: ... ... ... You have completely gotten used to your current body.

2025100098.english: Anyway! I want to eat cake!

2025100100.korean: 네 네, 제 일이 끝나면 준비해 드릴 테니 기다리세요.
2025100100.english: Yes, yes. I will prepare it for you once I finish my work, so please wait.

2025100101.english: The supplies to be moved to the external base… … Okay.

2025100102.english: Next is that one and that one…

2025100106.english: Where will Mr. Locke get it repaired when he returns?

2025100107.english: We plan to repair it on the Orca.

2025100108.korean: 로크의 부품은 특수한 게 많아서, 격납고 안쪽에 특별한 공간을 마련해 뒀어요.
2025100108.english: Locke's parts have a lot of special components, so I prepared a special space inside the hangar.

2025100111.english: I checked it earlier, so it's fine.

2025100113.korean: 휴우… 뭔가 도울 일이 없을까 해서 따라온 것치고는 엄청 바쁘네...
2025100113.english: Phew... Considering I just followed along hoping to help, I'm incredibly busy...

2025100114.korean: 물자 점검 정도밖에 도움이 안 되는 것 같지만, 일단 내 눈으로도 확인해두자.
2025100114.english: It doesn't seem to be of much help other than checking supplies, but let me verify it with my own eyes for now.

2025100115.korean: 이게 로크 씨의 부품이 들어 있는 컨테이너.
2025100115.english: This is the container holding Mr. Locke's parts.

2025100123.english: Why is this here…? Where are the other parts!?

2025100124.english: It looks like there was a mistake during loading.

2025100125.korean: 아, 아아… 아자즈 씨, 부, 분명… 아까 확인했으니까... 괘, 괜찮다고... 하지 않으셨… 어요?
2025100125.english: Ah, ah... Mr. Azaz, y-y... I'm sure... I checked earlier... so didn't you... say... that it was okay...?

2025100127.korean: ...그, 그런데 이건…! 로크 씨의 부품이 아니라... 제, 제가 설계한... 부품…
2025100127.english: ...B-but this is…! It’s not Mr. Locke’s part… M-my… part… that I designed…

2025100130.korean: 로크의 부품인 건 확실하니까 괜찮아요. 강도 면에서도 문제 없고요.
2025100130.english: It is definitely a part of Locke, so it is fine. There are no issues with strength either.

2025100134.korean: 로크 씨의 구조 부대 멤버로 선정되었어요. 바로 준비하세요.
2025100134.english: You have been selected as a member of Mr. Locke's rescue team. Get ready immediately.

2025100136.english: Still, that’s rare, isn’t it? To think we’re the rescue team…

2025100137.english: I understand if it's reconnaissance or infiltration, but...

2025100139.korean: 자세한 내용은 출발 전 회의에서 듣게 되겠지만……
2025100139.english: We will hear the details at the meeting before departure, but…

2025100140.korean: 이번에 로크 씨가 피신해 있는 것으로 보이는 장소가 덴세츠 건물이라고 합니다.
2025100140.english: It is said that the place where Mr. Locke appears to be taking refuge this time is the Densetsu Building.

2025100141.korean: 그리고, 그곳을 경비하고 있는 것으로 보이는 바이오로이드 중에 쿠노이치 코노하가 있었다고 합니다.
2025100141.english: And, it is said that among the bioroids appearing to be guarding that place, there was a kunoichi named Konoha.

2025100142.korean: 과연, 같은 덴세츠 소속의 바이오로이드라면 경계받지 않고 지나갈 수 있을 거란 거군요?
2025100142.english: So, I see, you're saying that a bioroid belonging to the same Densetsu unit would be able to pass through without being guarded?

2025100144.korean: 그런 이유로 모모 씨, 뽀끄루 씨, 사레나 씨도 함께 갑니다.
2025100144.english: For that reason, Momo, Pokkuru, and Sarena are also going together.

2025100145.korean: 원래라면 더 많은 인원으로 가는 게 맞겠지만, 이번에는 여러 가지 예측할 수 없는 상황이 고려되어 단독 행동에 능숙한 분들로 구성되었다고 해요.
2025100145.english: Ideally, it would be best to go with a larger group, but this time, considering various unpredictable situations, the team was reportedly composed of individuals skilled in independent action.

2025100148.korean: 저는 일단 적이었으니, 그다지 좋은 기억은 없습니다.
2025100148.english: Since I was an enemy, I don't have many good memories of it.

2025100149.english: Yeah. Plant-based ninjutsu… it was tricky…

2025100151.korean: 저는 한때 동료였던 적도 있어서 무척 그립네요……
2025100151.english: We were once colleagues, so I miss you very much…

2025100152.english: To think there was a survivor... really...

2025100153.english: They must have gone through tough times too.

2025100154.korean: 만약 코노하 일행이 힘든 생활을 하고 있다면, 오르카로 초대해 보는 것도 방법일 것 같네요.
2025100154.english: If Konoha and her group are having a hard time, inviting them to Orca might be a good idea.

2025100156.korean: 알고 있어. 조사 부대는 타이밍을 봐서 보내도록 할게.
2025100156.english: I know. I will send the investigation unit when the timing is right.

2025110002.english: Thank you for commanding the battle.

2025110004.korean: - 내 패널에는 페더의 단말기로부터 전송된 영상이 재생되는 중이다.
2025110004.english: - The video transmitted from Feder's terminal is playing on my panel.

2025110005.korean: - 상공에서의 정찰 영상에서도 압도감이 느껴졌지만, 지상에서는 더더욱 커 보인다…
2025110005.english: It felt overwhelming even in the aerial reconnaissance footage, but it looks even bigger on the ground…

2025110006.korean: 휴우…… 중간까진 꽤 많은 철충이 있었는데, 돔이 보이기 시작한 지점부터 갑자기 없어졌네요.
2025110006.english: Phew... There were quite a lot of Iron Bugs up until the halfway point, but they suddenly disappeared from the point where the dome started to come into view.

2025110007.korean: 역시 D돔에 있는 바이오로이드들이 처치한 걸까요?
2025110007.english: I guess the bioroids in the D-Dome took care of them?

2025110008.korean: 주변 도로 상태도 나쁘지 않고, 누군가가 어느 정도 관리를 하고 있는 것 같아요.
2025110008.english: The condition of the surrounding roads isn't bad, and it seems like someone is maintaining them to some extent.

2025110009.english: Haa... it really is a huge building~

2025110010.english: Sarena, thank you for bringing me here.

2025110011.english: You must be tired, right? It was quite a distance from the relay station...

2025110013.english: It's okay. Don't worry about it.

2025110014.english: After all, I am a member of the Demon Lord's army, too. Hahaha...

2025110015.korean: 그리고, 저를 이 임무에 배치한 이유에 대해 감독님한테 설명도 들었어요.
2025110015.english: And, I also heard an explanation from the director about why I was assigned to this mission.

2025110016.korean: 저와 스노우페더 씨는 날 수 있고, 쿠노이치 여러분은 몸놀림이 가벼워 그런 게 아니겠어요~?
2025110016.english: Isn't it because Snowfeather and I can fly, and you Kunoichi are light on your feet?

2025110017.korean: - 이번에는 정체불명의 적대 세력과 D돔에 있는 생존자들을 고려해서, 덴세츠 사의 바이오로이드를 중심으로 구조 부대를 편성했다.
2025110017.english: - This time, considering the unidentified hostile forces and the survivors in the D-Dome, a rescue unit was formed centered around Densetsu Corporation's bioroids.

2025110018.korean: - 사레나에겐 뽀끄루를 안고 이동하도록 했고, 페더에겐 만일의 사태 때 지휘 역할을 하도록 동행을 부탁했다.
2025110018.english: - Sarena was instructed to carry Pokkuru while moving, and Feder was asked to accompany them to take command in case of an emergency.

2025110020.english: You're saying I'm not far behind in my own way?

2025110021.korean: 하지만 역시 쿠노이치 여러분처럼 움직일 수 없는 건 사실이라…
2025110021.english: But it is true that I can't move like you kunoichi...

2025110023.english: Yes, just leave it to me. I will do my best!

2025110024.english: Since Sarena brought me here, I should be of proper help!

2025110028.english: Not only Konoha, but even Rei… …!

2025110029.korean: - 레이? 쿠노이치 레이를 말하는 건가… 분명 대전란에서는 적군의 쿠노이치였지.
2025110029.english: - Rei? Are you talking about Kunoichi Rei... She was definitely an enemy Kunoichi during the Great War.

2025110030.korean: - 역시 덴세츠 관련 대원으로 팀을 꾸린 게 정답이었던 것 같다.
2025110030.english: - It seems forming a team with members related to Densetsu was the right decision after all.

2025110031.english: I never thought something like this would happen...

2025110032.korean: 역시, 덴세츠의 바이오로이드들이 많이 있는 모양이군요.
2025110032.english: As expected, it seems there are many bioroids in Densetsu.

2025110035.english: Someone is running towards me from over there… …?

2025110043.korean: 다시 만날 수 있으리라곤 생각도 못했습니다.
2025110043.english: I never thought we would be able to meet again.

2025110045.english: To think we would meet kunoichi other than ourselves…

2025110046.korean: 저, 그… 엔라이님 일행은 어느 지사의 생존자…… 같은 분들이신가요?
2025110046.english: Um, um... are Enrai and his group survivors from a certain branch... or something like that?

2025110047.english: No, it is different. We were restored in Orca.

2025110053.korean: 이야기해 보겠습니까? 이 패널로 이야기할 수 있어요.
2025110053.english: Would you like to talk? We can discuss this using this panel.

2025110054.korean: - 제로가 갑자기 패널을 내밀고, 레이가 화면에 크게 비춰졌다.
2025110054.english: Zero suddenly held out a panel, and Ray was shown prominently on the screen.

2025110056.english: N-nice to meet you... You really are human...?

2025110057.korean: - 레이는 놀란 듯하면서도 당황한 표정을 지으며 말했다.
2025110057.english: Ray spoke with a surprised yet flustered expression.

2025110058.korean: …저기, 혹시 로크 씨의 동료란 분이… 인간님이신 건가요?
2025110058.english: … Excuse me, by any chance, is the person Mr. Locke’s colleague… a human?

2025110059.english: So, Locke is here after all.

2025110060.korean: 네, 며칠 전에… 음… 저희 지도자분이 이곳으로 데려오셨어요.
2025110060.english: Yes, a few days ago… um… our leader brought me here.

2025110061.korean: 철충에게 습격당해 통신 기능이 망가졌다고 해서… 응급 처치는 했지만, 통신 기능은 수리가 불가능했던 모양이에요.
2025110061.english: They said the communication functions were damaged after being attacked by Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs)... so they performed emergency treatment, but it seems the communication functions were impossible to repair.

2025110062.korean: - 이유야 어찌 됐든 로크가 무사하다는 걸 확인하고, 나는 쌓여있던 불안과 걱정을 쓸어내리며 한숨을 내쉬었다. 정말 다행이다…
2025110062.english: Whatever the reason, after confirming that Locke was safe, I let out a sigh, sweeping away the accumulated anxiety and worry. What a relief...

2025110063.english: But the person referred to as a leader? … …

2025110064.korean: 아, 제로와 카엔, 그리고 엔라이 님도 아주 잘 아는 분이에요.
2025110064.english: Ah, Zero, Kaen, and Enrai are also people I know very well.

2025110067.korean: 네, 잠깐 연락하고 올게요. 시덴님도 모두를 만나고 싶어하실 테니까요.
2025110067.english: Yes, I'll be right back after making a quick call. I'm sure Shiden would want to meet everyone as well.

2025110068.korean: 시덴님께서 안쪽 저택에서 이야기하고 싶다고 하십니다.
2025110068.english: Mr. Shiden says he would like to talk inside the mansion.

2025110073.english: Yes… I’m embarrassed to say, but…

2025110075.english: Then, Ray, please guide the invitee.

2025110076.korean: 정말로 모모나 뽀끄루까지 있을 줄은 몰랐어요.
2025110076.english: I really didn't know there would be even Momo and Pokkuru.

2025110078.korean: 스노우페더 님이나 사레나… 님은 처음 뵙지만요……
2025110078.english: Snowfeather and Sarena... it's my first time meeting you, though...

2025110079.korean: 저랑은 다른 모모의 이야기를 알고 계시는군요.
2025110079.english: You know Momo's story, which is different from mine.

2025110080.korean: 네, 모모들과는 신주쿠에서의 최종 결전까지 함께 있었습니다.
2025110080.english: Yes, I was with Momo and the others until the final battle in Shinjuku.

2025110083.korean: 모모나 뽀끄루… 그 외에도 많은 바이오로이드들이 신주쿠에서 죽었습니다.
2025110083.english: Momona, Pokkuru... and many other bioroids died in Shinjuku.

2025110085.korean: 괜찮아요. 멸망 전부터 살아남은 대부분은 누군가와 이별했으니까요……
2025110085.english: It's okay. Most of those who survived since before the apocalypse have already parted ways with someone...

2025110086.english: Everyone was great as the main character until the very end.

2025110088.english: Please listen to the full story from Mr. Shiden.

2025110089.korean: 하지만 설마 초대님이 계실 줄이야, 깜짝 놀랐어요.
2025110089.english: But I was really surprised to find out that you were here.

2025110090.korean: 확실히 초대님… 시덴 모델은 그렇게 많이 만들어지지 않았죠?
2025110090.english: Surely, sir... not that many Shiden models were made, right?

2025110091.korean: 그렇습니다. 여기에 계신 시덴 님은 최초로 만들어진 모델이라고 들었습니다.
2025110091.english: That is correct. I heard that Mr. Shiden here is the first model ever made.

2025110092.korean: 오오! 그럼 저희 기억 속 스승님을 다시 만날 수 있다는 것이로군요!
2025110092.english: Oh! Then I see that we can meet the master from our memories again!

2025110093.english: That's how it will turn out.

2025110096.korean: 근사한 양옥이네요… 여기도 원래 촬영용으로 만들어진 건가요?
2025110096.english: That's a wonderful Western-style house… Was this place originally built for filming as well?

2025110097.korean: 맞아요. 덴세츠가 만든 건물이라서 안쪽도 호화롭게 꾸며져 있답니다.
2025110097.english: That's right. Since it's a building constructed by Densetsu, the interior is also luxuriously decorated.

2025110100.korean: 제 몸으로는 안에 들어갈 수 없으니, 저는 로크 님 쪽으로 가도 될까요?
2025110100.english: I cannot enter with my current body, so may I go over to you, Locke?

2025110101.korean:
그러면, 저도 시덴 님과는 면식이 없으니 사레나 님을 따라가겠습니다.
원래 로크 님을 찾으러 온 거니까요.
2025110101.english:
In that case, since I am not acquainted with Lord Shiden, I will follow Lady Sarena.
 After all, I originally came to find Mr. Locke.

2025110103.korean:
죄송해요, 레이 님. 저희는 이쪽에서 기다리고 있을 테니까,
모두를 안내하신 다음에, 저희를 로크 님 쪽으로 데려다 주실 수 있을까요?
2025110103.english:
I'm sorry, Ray. We'll be waiting over here, so
 After you have guided everyone, could you take us over to Mr. Locke?

2025110105.korean: 그럼, 금방 돌아오겠습니다. 잠시만 기다려 주세요.
2025110105.english: Well then, I'll be right back. Please wait just a moment.

2025110107.english: Well then, everyone, have a good trip.

2025110108.korean: - 엔라이 일행이 저택 안으로 들어서자, 복도 끝 가장 안쪽 방으로 안내되었다.
2025110108.english: As Enrai and his party entered the mansion, they were guided to the innermost room at the end of the hallway.

2025110110.english: A bioroid presumed to be Shiden was sitting.

2025110114.korean: 아이처럼 기뻐하기는… 그대들은 정말이지 하나도 변치 않았구려!
2025110114.english: Rejoicing like children… You really haven’t changed at all!

2025110116.korean: 자, 이렇게 서 있지 말고 앉도록 하시게나들.
2025110116.english: Now, don't just stand here, sit down, everyone.

2025110117.korean: 시덴님, 다른 분들은 로크 씨를 만나기 위해 밖에서 기다리고 계신데, 안내드려도 괜찮을까요?
2025110117.english: Mr. Siden, the others are waiting outside to meet Mr. Locke. May I guide them in?

2025110118.korean: 음, 그래. 로크를 찾아 이곳에 당도한 걸 테니… 안내해 주도록 하시게나.
2025110118.english: Hmm, I see. Since you must have arrived here looking for Locke... please guide him.

2025110120.korean: 스미레, 하츠나, 오우카… 그대들의 얼굴을 다시 볼 수 있어 기쁨을 감출 수 없소.
2025110120.english: Sumire, Hatsuna, Ouka… I cannot hide my joy at being able to see your faces again.

2025110121.english: And to think Momo is here too. Hooray!

2025110122.korean: 아까 신주쿠 이야기를 들었습니다. 저는 그 때의 이야기를 몰라 죄송하지만, 그래도 이렇게 만나게 돼 반가워요, 시덴님.
2025110122.english: I heard the story about Shinjuku earlier. I apologize for not knowing the details of that time, but I am still glad to meet you, Mr. Shiden.

2025110124.korean: 이렇게 만날 수 있다는 것 자체가 기적이 아니겠소?
2025110124.english: Isn't the very fact that we can meet like this a miracle?

2025110125.korean: 오르카, 라고 했던가? 다들 거기서 복원된 것이오?
2025110125.english: Was it Orca? Were they all restored from there?

2025110126.korean: 네. 저희는 거기서 복원되어, 현재는 마지막 인간님… 주공을 위해 싸우고 있습니다.
2025110126.english: Yes. We were restored there, and currently, we are fighting for the last human... the Lord.

2025110130.korean: 지금 그 인간도 이 몸의 이야기를 듣고 있는 것이오?
2025110130.english: Is that person listening to my story right now, too?

2025110131.korean: 네, 지금 이 패널로 보여드리고 있습니다.
2025110131.english: Yes, I am showing you this panel right now.

2025110134.korean: - 시덴을 잘 들여다보니, 눈 밑에 짙은 다크서클이 있고, 어딘지 모르게 우호적이라 보기 힘든 분위기를 풍기고 있었다.
2025110134.english: Upon closer inspection of Shiden, I noticed deep dark circles under his eyes and an atmosphere that was somehow hard to view as friendly.

2025110136.korean: 흥, 곤경에 처한 이가 있으면 돕는 것… 당연한 일이외다.
2025110136.english: Hmph, helping someone in distress... that is only natural.

2025110137.korean: 게다가 로크는… 분명 특수한 AGS였으니까 말이지… 철충에게 기체를 이용당한다면 여러모로 곤란해질 거라 판단했을 뿐이오.
2025110137.english: Besides, Locke was… clearly a special AGS, you know… I simply judged that it would be troublesome in many ways if the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) used the machine.

2025110138.english: You… are truly a peculiar brat.

2025110140.english: He's a strange person, but he's also a wonderful one.

2025110141.korean: 맞아요! 좀 이상한 구석이 있지만 말입니다!
2025110141.english: That's right! Though there is a bit of a strange side to it!

2025110142.english: Yeah, it's strange, but... I like it.

2025110143.korean: - 이상하다는 말에는 익숙해졌다고 생각했는데... 아무리 그래도 그렇지 한 번에 너무 많이 말하는 거 아닌가?
2025110143.english: I thought I had gotten used to hearing that something is strange... but even so, aren't you saying too much at once?

2025110145.english: Master, why don't you come to Orca as well?

2025110146.korean: 요즘은 철충의 움직임이 활발해져서 위험하지 않습니까?
2025110146.english: Isn't it dangerous these days because the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) have become more active?

2025110147.korean: 그렇구먼... 확실히… 해가 갈수록 철충의 수가 늘어나고 있는 것은 참이오.
2025110147.english: I see... Certainly... it is true that the number of Iron Bugs is increasing year by year.

2025110148.korean: - 역시 철충의 활발화는 유럽만의 현상이 아니었던 것이다. 그것만으로도 여기선 꽤 큰 수확이다.
2025110148.english: As expected, the rise of Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) was not a phenomenon unique to Europe. That alone is quite a significant gain here.

2025110149.korean: 로크를 습격한 철충도… 다른 개체와는 다른 종류였다고 하였소.
2025110149.english: It was said that the Iron蟲 that attacked Locke was also… a different kind from the others.

2025110152.korean:
초대님, 특이체는 보통의 철충과는 다른 존재입니다.
그게 출현했다는 건 이곳도 위험하다는 뜻이지요.
2025110152.english:
Dear Invitation, the Unique Entity is a being different from ordinary Iron蟲.
 The fact that it appeared means that this place is dangerous, too.

2025110153.korean: 오르카가 있는 유럽에 비하면 여기는 아직 철충의 수가 적은 편이지만, 그건 오히려 앞으로 더 늘어나고, 활발화가 이어질 거란 뜻이기도...
2025110153.english: Compared to Europe, where Orca is located, the number of Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) here is still relatively small, but that actually means they will increase further and become more active in the future...

2025110154.korean: 초대님을 포함해서, 이곳 여러분 모두가 오르카에 합류하는 건 어떻습니까?
2025110154.english: How about everyone here, including you, joining Orca?

2025110155.korean:
오르카는 철충과 싸워온 조직입니다.
분명 오르카에 오시는 게 앞으로 여러분에게도 많은 도움이 될 겁니다.
2025110155.english:
Orca is an organization that has been fighting against the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs).
 Coming to Orca will definitely be of great help to you in the future.

2025110162.korean: 그 특이체가 위험하다는 건 알겠네. 하지만… 그럼에도 거절의 뜻을 굽힐 마음일랑 없구려.
2025110162.english: I understand that the singularity is dangerous. However… even so, I have no intention of changing my mind of refusal.

2025110164.korean: 이 몸은… 아니, 여기 우리들은… 인간을 증오하고 있기 때문이외다.
2025110164.english: It is because I... no, we here... hate humans.

2025110166.korean: 우리 입장에선 철충이나 인간이나… 별 차이가 없다고 느낀다오.
2025110166.english: From our perspective, there isn't much difference between Iron Bugs and humans...

2025110167.english: Duke Zhou is completely different from the people of the past.

2025110168.korean: 응, 주공은 나쁜 짓, 안 해.
2025110168.english: Yeah, Lord doesn't do bad things.

2025110171.korean:
여기 있는 자들 대부분... 이 몸과 같은 뜻을 가졌소외다.
물론, 오르카에 가고 싶다는 자가 있다면… 말릴 생각 또한 없소.
더군다나 인간의 명령을 받게 된다면... 따를 수밖에 없지 않겠는가?
2025110171.english:
Most of those here... share the same will as I do.
 Of course, if there is anyone who wants to go to Orca… I have no intention of stopping them.
 Moreover, if you receive orders from humans... wouldn't you have no choice but to obey?

2025110174.korean:
사령관은… 모두의 의사를 존중합니다.
정말로 싫다면 억지로 강요하는 일도 없습니다.
2025110174.english:
The commander… respects everyone's opinion.
 If you really don't like it, we won't force you to do it.

2025110177.korean: - 무슨 일이 있었는지는 알 수 없지만, 마음의 상처를 파헤치고 싶지 않았다.
2025110177.english: I don't know what happened, but I didn't want to dig into the emotional wound.

2025110178.korean: - 게다가 이곳에 온 본래 목적은 로크의 구출.
2025110178.english: Furthermore, the original purpose of coming here was to rescue Locke.

2025110179.korean: 방금 그 말씀, 아무리 초대님이라 하셔도 그냥 넘길 수는 없습니다.
2025110179.english: I cannot simply let what you just said slide, no matter who you are.

2025110180.korean: 철충과 인간이 같다고요…? 멸망 전 인간이라면 일부 이해되는 부분도 있습니다.
2025110180.english: You're saying Iron Bugs and humans are the same...? If we're talking about humans from before the apocalypse, then some parts are understandable.

2025110181.korean: 하지만 초대님은 지금, 주공과 철충을 같은 존재로 언급하셨습니다.
2025110181.english: However, the Grand Master just referred to the Lord and the Iron蟲 as the same entity.

2025110182.korean: 그건 주공의 검으로서… 쿠노이치로서 용납할 수 없습니다.
2025110182.english: As the Lord's sword... as a kunoichi, I cannot accept that.

2025110183.korean: 왜 그런 말씀을 하시는 건지… 그 이유를 알려 주십시오.
2025110183.english: Please tell me why you are saying that...

2025110184.korean: - 엔라이의 말투는 정중했지만, 어조는 평소보다 훨씬 강했다.
2025110184.english: Enrai's tone was polite, but his tone was much stronger than usual.

2025110185.korean:
죄송합니다.
하지만, 쿠노이치로서 양보할 수 없는 것이 있습니다.
2025110185.english:
sorry.
 However, as a kunoichi, there is something I cannot compromise on.

2025110186.english: It is rare to see Enrai get this angry...

2025110188.korean: 그렇지… 쿠노이치에게 주군이란 자신의 목숨보다도 소중한 존재…
2025110188.english: That's right... To a kunoichi, a lord is someone more precious than her own life...

2025110189.english: I suppose it would be better to tell you.

2025110190.korean: 인간, 조금 긴 이야기를 해도 괜찮겠소이까?
2025110190.english: Human, may I tell you a slightly long story?

2025110192.korean: 스미레, 이 몸의 말투… 예전 기억과는 다르다고 느껴지지 않았소?
2025110192.english: Sumire, my way of speaking... didn't you feel it was different from your memories of the past?

2025110193.korean:
아, 그건 느꼈습니다.
뭔가 느릿느릿 말씀하신다거나… 말하기 힘들어하시는 것 같기도 하고……
2025110193.english:
Ah, I felt that.
 He speaks rather slowly... or it seems like he has trouble speaking...

2025110194.korean: 응, 카엔이 알고 있는 스승, 더 빠르게 말했어.
2025110194.english: Yeah, the master Kaen knows spoke faster.

2025110196.korean: 네… 아마도 자신의 시간 감각을 늘리는 술법이었던 것으로 기억합니다……
2025110196.english: Yes… I remember it as probably a spell to extend one’s sense of time…

2025110197.korean: 그렇다네. 정확히 말하면… 시간 인식을 1.3배로 확장하는 술법이지.
2025110197.english: That is the case. To be precise… it is a technique that expands time perception by 1.3 times.

2025110198.korean: 그것은 이 몸이 죽지 않고… 최강의 캐릭터로 존재하기 위한 술법이었소외다.
2025110198.english: That was a spell to ensure my body would not die... and to exist as the strongest character.

2025110199.korean:
하지만 그것을 완전히 재현하는 기술은…
당시 기준으로는 오버 테크놀로지에 가까웠다네...
2025110199.english:
However, the technology to completely reproduce it is…
 They say it was close to over-technology by the standards of the time...

2025110200.korean: 이 몸이 의지를 가지고 임의로 제어할 수 있는 게 아니었소… 해제하려면 인간의 조작이 필요했으니까...
2025110200.english: It wasn't something I could control arbitrarily with my own will... because human manipulation was required to release it...

2025110201.korean: - 그 말을 들은 순간, 안 좋은 예감은 확신으로 바뀌고 말았다.
2025110201.english: The moment I heard those words, my bad premonition turned into certainty.

2025110203.english: Even now... it is in a activated state.

2025110204.english: The limiter was released… time recognition tripled, and…

2025110205.korean: 멸망 전쟁이 시작된 이후로… 지금까지 줄곧 이 상태로 지내고 있구려.
2025110205.english: Ever since the war of destruction began… I have been living in this state ever since.

2025110208.korean: [남들 못지않게 날렵하다는 거 알고 있으니까. 안심해.]
2025110208.english: [I know you're just as agile as anyone else. Don't worry.]

2025110209.korean: [이번엔 뽀끄루의 인지도가 중요하니까. 활약 기대하고 있을게.]
2025110209.english: [Since Pokkuru's recognition is important this time, I'll be looking forward to your performance.]

2025110211.korean: [그래, 맞아. 역시 이곳으로 로크가 온 거지?]
2025110211.english: [Yeah, that's right. So Locke came here after all, right?]

2025110213.korean: [신세를 진 마당에 로크를 데려와 달라고 말하는 건 좀 그렇지…]
2025110213.english: [It’s a bit much to ask you to bring Locke when I owe you a debt…]

2025110214.english: [Besides, Enrai probably wants to meet that Shiden too, right?]

2025110216.korean: [알겠어. 마침 누군가에게 확인을 부탁하고 싶었는데, 정말 고마워.]
2025110216.english: [Okay. I was just about to ask someone to check this for me, so thank you so much.]

2025110217.korean: [응, 그렇게 해줘. 그리고 미안한데 뽀끄루도 동행을 부탁할게.]
2025110217.english: [Okay, please do that. And I'm sorry, but I'd like to ask Pokkuru to come along too.]

2025110219.korean: [먼저, 로크를 보호해 준 것에 대해 감사를 전하고 싶어.]
2025110219.english: [First, I want to thank you for protecting Locke.]

2025120001.korean: 대전란 촬영 이후… 이 몸은 멸망 전쟁이 발발하기 전까지 스미레나 하츠나의 외전 작품이나… 스핀오프 작품에 출연하고 있었소.
2025120001.english: After filming the Great War... until the outbreak of the War of Annihilation, I was appearing in Sumirena Hatsuna's side stories or... spin-off works.

2025120002.korean: 대전란에 대한 이상한 요시미츠의 집착 덕분에… 바이오로이드치고는 정중하게 대우받고 있었지만…
2025120002.english: Thanks to Yoshimitsu's strange obsession with the Great War... he was being treated politely for a bioroid, but...

2025120003.english: One day, suddenly… Iron Bugs swarmed in.

2025120004.english: I see you are safe, Chodae.

2025120006.korean: 외부 행사 중이었거늘, 일단은 서둘러 돌아왔다네.
2025120006.english: I was at an outside event, but I hurried back for now.

2025120007.korean: 저건 대체 무엇인 게야? 도통 혼란스러워 대응이 힘들었다네.
2025120007.english: What on earth is that? I was so confused that it was hard to respond.

2025120008.korean: 저도 본사에 있었기 때문에 자세히는 모르겠습니다만… 직원분들이 외계인이라느니 뭐라느니 말하고 있었어요…
2025120008.english: I don't know the details because I was at the head office, but... the employees were saying things like they were aliens or whatever...

2025120010.korean: 그래, 그러고 보니 최근 덴세츠의 리얼리티 쇼가 인기를 끌고 있었지?
2025120010.english: Right, come to think of it, Densetsu's reality show has been gaining popularity lately, hasn't it?

2025120011.english: Are you talking about the Clover Ace Show?

2025120012.korean: 그래, 그거 말일세! 이것도 그런 촬영 소품이 아니겠소이까?
2025120012.english: Yes, that one! Isn't this also a filming prop like that?

2025120014.english: Hahahaha! Things are going to get busy from now on!

2025120015.english: For now, the Chairman will take command from a safe place—

2025120016.english: You idiot! Of course I have to film too!

2025120017.korean:
이제부터 벌어지는 모든 일들은 현실을 초월한 진짜 영웅담이 될 거라고!
1분! 아니, 1초! 단 한순간이라도 놓치지 말고 전부 찍어야 돼!
2025120017.english:
Everything that happens from now on will become a true heroic tale that transcends reality!
 One minute! No, one second! Don't miss a single moment, capture everything!

2025120019.korean: 오오! 오오! 후하하하하! 시덴! 엔라이! 너희들, 놈들을 봤냐!?
2025120019.english: Oh! Oh! Hahahaha! Shiden! Enrai! You guys, did you see those bastards!?

2025120020.english: Rather than seeing it, I was attacked, fought, and cut it down.

2025120021.korean:
도대체 저것들은 뭐지? 안에 인간이라도 들어있는 거냐?
싸우라고 명령받을 때까지 손을 댈 수가 없었다…
2025120021.english:
What on earth are those things? Is there a human inside?
 I couldn't lay a hand on it until I was ordered to fight...

2025120022.korean:
우리도 저 괴물에 대해서는 아직 아무것도 모른다!
그나저나 그래, 베어버렸단 말이지? 역시 시덴이다! 그래서 촬영은!?
2025120022.english:
We don't know anything about that monster yet either!
 Anyway, so you mean, you cut it down? As expected of Shiden! So, what about the filming!?

2025120023.korean: 같이 있던 사람들은? 전부 죽어버린 거냐?
2025120023.english: What about the people who were with you? Did they all die?

2025120025.korean: 오오, 그래! 욘석아, 그 괴물과의 전투는 찍어왔냐!?
2025120025.english: Oh, right! You punk, did you film the fight with that monster!?

2025120026.english: Ah, no... I was busy running away...

2025120028.korean: 야 이 등신아!! 그걸 찍어야 진짜 덴세츠지!!
2025120028.english: Hey you idiot!! You have to film that to be a real Densetsu!!

2025120029.korean: 아무리 그래도 그렇지... 진짜 사람들이 죽어나갔는걸요…
2025120029.english: Even so... people were really dying...

2025120030.korean: 찍어! 죽더라도 찍어!! 죽으면서 찍어!! 이 답답하고 쓸모없는 놈아!!
2025120030.english: Shoot! Shoot even if you die!! Shoot while you die!! You frustrating, useless bastard!!

2025120032.korean:
저 쓰레기 같은 놈은 그냥 밖으로 내던져라.
그 괴물 놈들 밥으로 쓰자고! 잘만 하면 좋은 장면이 나오겠지!
2025120032.english:
Just throw that piece of trash outside.
 Let's use those monsters as food! If we do it right, we should get a good scene!

2025120033.korean: 쟨 신입 직원이니까 어쩔 수 없잖습니까…
2025120033.english: He's a new employee, so it can't be helped, can it?

2025120036.korean:
그보다 지금 모을 수 있는 임원들 다 불러. 앞으로 어떻게 할지 이야기해야지.
이렇게 시간을 허비하는 중에도 명장면이 탄생하고 있을지 몰라.
2025120036.english:
Rather than that, call all the executives you can gather right now. We need to discuss how to proceed.
 Even while wasting time like this, a masterpiece might be born.

2025120037.korean: 시간 아까우니까 10분 후에 회의 시작이라고 알려!
2025120037.english: Time is precious, so let them know the meeting starts in 10 minutes!

2025120038.korean: 시덴, 엔라이! 이 건물 안에 그 괴물을 들이지 마!
2025120038.english: Shiden, Enrai! Don't let that monster into this building!

2025120040.english: I will do as you say.

2025120041.english: You incompetent fool! I'll give you a chance.

2025120042.korean: 엔라이랑 시덴의 전투 장면을 찍어! 알겠지!?
2025120042.english: Film the battle scene between Enrai and Shiden! Got it!?

2025120045.korean: 네가 들고 있는 그 패널은 뭐냐! 그냥 나무 판이냐!
2025120045.english: What is that panel you're holding! Is it just a wooden board!

2025120046.english: Should I smash your head in with that!!!

2025120047.english: Ah… Yes! Yes! I will definitely take the picture!!!

2025120048.korean: 어쩐지, 신작 리얼리티 쇼는 아닌 것 같네요.
2025120048.english: For some reason, it doesn't seem like a new reality show.

2025120049.english: But well... it looks like it will end up being something similar...

2025120051.korean: 바로 출전인가 보구려… AGS의 몸을 빼앗고 있는 것 같으니 약점도 비슷할 것이야.
2025120051.english: It looks like it's going into battle right away... Since it seems to be taking over an AGS's body, its weaknesses must be similar.

2025120052.english: Will it be alright? Oh my.

2025130001.korean: - 그렇게 덴세츠는… 덴세츠 바이오로이드들을 모아 '진짜' 영웅담의 촬영을 시작했소.
2025130001.english: And so, Densetsu… gathered the Densetsu bioroids and began filming the 'real' heroic tale.

2025130003.english: - We were soon pushed to the brink.

2025130004.korean: - 까닭으로는 여러 가지가 있었지만… 가장 큰 원인은 AGS였다네.
2025130004.english: There were various reasons, but... the biggest cause was AGS.

2025130005.korean: - 일본은 다른 나라들에 비해… 여러 분야에서 AGS의 사용을 적극 도입하던 국가였으니...
2025130005.english: Compared to other countries... Japan was a nation that actively adopted the use of AGS in various fields...

2025130006.korean: - 자연스레 철충의 수도… 방대하게 늘어난 것이외다.
2025130006.english: - Naturally, the number of Iron蟲s... has also increased vastly.

2025130007.korean: - 게다가… 가장 최악이었던 건 그 당시 연합 전쟁의 승리로 정부보다 덴세츠가 최상단에 위치했었다는 것이오.
2025130007.english: Furthermore… the worst part was that, due to the victory in the Allied War at the time, Densetsu was positioned at the very top, above the government.

2025130008.korean: - 허나 덴세츠는 혼란에 빠진 상황은 뒷전으로 여기고, 오로지 실황을 촬영하는 것밖에 생각하지 않고 있었소.
2025130008.english: However, Densetsu put the chaotic situation on the back burner and was thinking only about filming the live broadcast.

2025130009.korean: 시부야의 철충 무리! 마법소녀들이 전멸시켰습니다! 촬영도 완료됐습니다!
2025130009.english: The Iron Bug swarm of Shibuya! The magical girls have annihilated them! Filming is complete!

2025130010.korean: 좋아… 부상자는 신속히 이송하고, 바이오로이드는 수복, 다음 무리엔 샬럿을 보내라.
2025130010.english: Alright… evacuate the wounded quickly, repair the bioroids, and send Charlotte to the next group.

2025130014.korean: 이번 전쟁… 전혀 승산이 보이지 않구려.
2025130014.english: This war… I see absolutely no chance of winning.

2025130015.english: It looks like they are fighting well.

2025130017.korean: 동경에는 수도 방위용 바이오로이드에 더해 일당백의 힘을 지닌 우리 덴세츠의 바이오로이드가 있으니 그렇게 보이는 것일 뿐.
2025130017.english: It only appears that way because in Tokyo, in addition to the bioroids for capital defense, there is our Densetsu bioroid, which possesses the strength of a hundred men.

2025130018.english: We are by no means winning.

2025130019.korean: 전쟁이란 것은 물자, 병력의 질이 승패의 관건이 되는 게 당연하나...
2025130019.english: It is natural that in war, the quality of supplies and troops is the key to victory or defeat, but...

2025130020.english: There is something we are lacking.

2025130022.english: Is it a problem with the number of troops, after all?

2025130023.korean:
그렇소, 지금도 바이오로이드를 무제한으로 생산하고 있다고는 하지만…
적의 수가 압도적으로 많구려.
2025130023.english:
That is true. They say they are still producing bioroids indefinitely, but...
 The enemy's numbers are overwhelmingly large.

2025130024.korean: 그리고 무엇보다… 우리에게 가장 부족한 것… 아니, 아예 없는 것은…
2025130024.english: And above all… what we lack the most… no, what we don’t have at all is…

2025130026.korean: 장수… 회장님이나 PD가 지금 그 역할을…
2025130026.english: Jang-su… The Chairman or the PD is currently playing that role…

2025130028.korean: 그저 억제되어 있던 욕망 실현 격의 촬영을 지휘하고 있을 뿐… 일터의 단순한 감독일 뿐이다.
2025130028.english: I am merely directing a shoot that fulfills suppressed desires… I am just a simple director at the workplace.

2025130029.english: Of course, there might be generals on the Self-Defense Forces side...

2025130030.korean: 연합전쟁의 승리로 인해 정부보다 위에 서버린 덴세츠가 자위대의 말을 들을 리 없을 테지.
2025130030.english: Densetsu, having risen above the government due to the victory in the Allied War, certainly wouldn't listen to the Self-Defense Forces.

2025130031.korean: 즉, 병력과 장수가 부족한 우리 쪽은 결국 언젠가 패배하고 말 것이오. 단언할 수 있소외다.
2025130031.english: In other words, our side, lacking in troops and commanders, will eventually be defeated. I can assert this with certainty.

2025130032.korean:
요시미츠는 '영웅에 의한 대역전극'이 찍고 싶은 것이겠지만…
실제 전쟁은 개인 하나의 존재로 상황이 뒤집힐 만큼 호락호락하지 않소.
2025130032.english:
Yoshimitsu probably wants to film a 'great comeback led by a hero,' but...
 Real war is not so easy that the situation can be turned around by the existence of a single individual.

2025130033.korean: 그런 일을 벌일 수 있는 자가 있다면야 그야말로 신, 훗날엔 영웅이라 불릴 테지.
2025130033.english: If there is anyone capable of doing such a thing, they would truly be called a god, or a hero in the future.

2025130034.korean: 연합전쟁에서 승리한 탓에 자만심에 빠진 게야...
2025130034.english: He became arrogant because he won the coalition war...

2025130035.english: In that case… someday we too…

2025130039.korean: 이번 전쟁에서 지더라도… 스미레, 하츠나, 오우카는 이 몸이 죽게 두지 않겠소외다.
2025130039.english: Even if I lose this war… I will not let Sumire, Hatsuna, and Ouka die.

2025130041.english: What do you want? You crybaby.

2025130042.korean: 윽… 대체 그 얘긴 언제까지 할 생각인데?
2025130042.english: Ugh... just how long do you plan to keep talking about that?

2025130043.korean: 후후후, 농이었네. 뭣 때문에 이 몸을 불렀는가?
2025130043.english: Hahaha, I was joking. Why did you summon me?

2025130044.english: The PD is looking for you. He told me to come to the maintenance room.

2025130049.korean: 무슨 일이오? 그대가 정비실에 있는 건 드문 광경인데.
2025130049.english: What's going on? It's a rare sight to see you in the maintenance room.

2025130050.korean: 응? 그런가? 하긴, 요즘은 전투 지휘 때문에 모니터 룸에 틀어박혀 있었지.
2025130050.english: Huh? Is that so? Come to think of it, I've been holed up in the monitor room lately because of combat command.

2025130053.korean: 요즘 계속 전투에 투입되느라 '시간질주의 술'을 해제하지 않고 있지? 컨디션 어때?
2025130053.english: You haven't released the 'Time Sprint' because you've been constantly thrown into battle lately, right? How are you feeling?

2025130055.korean: 달려도 달려도 목적지에 도달하지 못하는 꿈속에 갇힌 기분일세.
2025130055.english: I feel like I'm trapped in a dream where I can't reach my destination no matter how much I run.

2025130057.korean: 그래도 그것 덕분에 네가 죽지 않고 지금까지 활약하는 거야.
2025130057.english: Still, thanks to that, you didn't die and are still active to this day.

2025130059.korean: 넌 모르겠지만, 여태까지 네 철충 격파 수는 1위다. 자랑스러워해도 돼.
2025130059.english: You might not know it, but you have the highest number of Iron Bugs destroyed so far. You can be proud of that.

2025130060.english: Right, right, I'm already standing tall.

2025130062.korean: 헌데, '시간질주의 술'이 뭐가 어쨌다는 거요? 해제해 주겠다는 것이오?
2025130062.english: But what is so special about the 'Time-Running Potion'? Are you saying you will lift it?

2025130063.korean: 아니, 너한테만큼은 승리를 위해서라도 좀 더 힘내줬으면 하거든.
2025130063.english: No, I want you to try a little harder, if only for the sake of victory.

2025130065.english: I'm trying to unlock the limiter on my ability.

2025130067.korean: 네 시간질주의 술… 시간 인식 확장 말인데… 사실 제한을 걸고 있었거든.
2025130067.english: Yes, the Time-Running Alcohol... speaking of the Time Awareness Expansion... actually, I was placing a restriction on it.

2025130068.korean: 당장 네가 느끼는 것처럼 고작 1.3배의 위력을 사용하는데도 부작용이 있잖아.
2025130068.english: As you can feel right now, even using just 1.3 times the power has side effects.

2025130069.korean: 하지만 1.3배 강해졌지. 어때? 그 이상을 시도해 보고 싶지 않냐?
2025130069.english: But it's gotten 1.3 times stronger. How about that? Don't you want to try something even more?

2025130070.korean: 뭬야…? 부작용이 있는데 어찌 그런 짓을…!
2025130070.english: What the...? There are side effects, how could you do such a thing...!

2025130071.korean:
뭐, 들어봐. 너도 알고 있겠지만 지금 전황이 좋지 않잖아.
이유는 나도 잘 알고 있어.
2025130071.english:
Well, listen. As you know, the war situation isn't good right now.
 I know the reason well, too.

2025130072.korean:
바이오로이드 병력… 하지만 이 전력 차는 어쩔 수 없어.
도쿄에 있던 AGS가 애초에 너무 많았으니까.
2025130072.english:
Bio-roid troops... but this difference in power is unavoidable.
 Because there were too many AGS units in Tokyo to begin with.

2025130073.korean: 그래서, 승리를 위해 필요한 게 뭔지 나름대로 생각해봤지.
2025130073.english: So, I thought about what was needed for victory in my own way.

2025130074.korean: 문득 깨달은 거야... 우리에게 부족한 것을 채우는 방법을…
2025130074.english: I suddenly realized... a way to fill what we lack...

2025130075.korean: 수가 어쩔 수 없다면 질을 높이면 된다는 걸.
2025130075.english: If the number is unavoidable, then the quality should be improved.

2025130076.korean: 이제부터 바이오로이드들의 품질을 자체적으로 높일 거다. 네가 그 첫 번째야.
2025130076.english: From now on, we will improve the quality of the bioroids on our own. You are the first.

2025130078.english: It might be useless, but I’ll mention it anyway.

2025130080.english: It is an order. Undergo the procedure immediately.

2025130083.korean:
- 이 몸은 명령을 받고 침대에 누웠다.
누워 있는 동안의 기분은 최악, 절망이라는 단어로는 부족할 정도로 치욕스럽고 또 고통스러웠네.
2025130083.english:
I received the order and lay down on the bed.
 I felt the worst while lying there; it was so humiliating and painful that the word despair was insufficient to describe it.

2025130084.english: I felt like I was being carried on the gallows without having committed any crime.

2025130085.korean: 그러고 보니, 리미터를 해제하면 시간 감각은 어느 정도까지 확장되는 거냐?
2025130085.english: Come to think of it, to what extent does the sense of time expand when the limiter is removed?

2025130089.korean: 오오…! 대단한데? 이러다가 이번 전쟁도 간단하게 이겨버리는 거 아냐?
2025130089.english: Wow…! That’s amazing. At this rate, aren’t they going to win this war easily too?

2025130091.korean: - 그 대화를 들은 순간부터 하나만을 바라게 됐지.
2025130091.english: From the moment I heard that conversation, I started wishing for only one thing.

2025140001.korean: - 그 후로 분명히 강해지긴 하였소. 작은 철충 무리 정도라면 혼자서도 전멸시킬 수 있을 정도로…
2025140001.english: - I have certainly become stronger since then. Strong enough to wipe out a small swarm of Iron Bugs all by myself…

2025140003.korean: - 이 몸은 강함과 맞바꿔 ‘평범함’이라는 것을 잃었지.
2025140003.english: I lost 'ordinariness' in exchange for strength.

2025140004.english: - Literally, all my senses slowed down.

2025140005.korean: - 한동안 말조차 제대로 하지 못해 괴로웠네.
2025140005.english: I was in agony for a while because I couldn't even speak properly.

2025140006.korean: - 고통을 느끼는 방식도 이전과는 달랐어. 하다못해 숨 쉬는 것조차 서툴렀지.
2025140006.english: The way I felt pain was also different from before. I was clumsy even at breathing.

2025140007.korean: - 고통과 맞바꿨다고 한들 여전히 전황이 호전될 리는 없었고…
2025140007.english: Even if it was exchanged for pain, there was still no way the war situation would improve...

2025140008.english: - Gradually pushed back by the numbers of the Iron蟲…

2025140009.korean: - 궁지에 몰리게 된 덴세츠는 결국 자위대 병력에 의지하는 꼴이 됐지만, 그마저도 쓸데없이 소모되고 말았소외다…
2025140009.english: Cornered, Densetsu ended up relying on Self-Defense Forces troops, but even those were wasted in vain...

2025140010.english: - Subsequently, as government functions completely ceased…

2025140011.english: - Yoshimitsu also went missing before I knew it.

2025140012.korean: - 어떤 이들은 요시미츠가 도망쳤다 했지만… 이 몸은 그가 터무니없는 장면을 찍으려다 못내 철충에게 죽었을 거라 생각되는 구려.
2025140012.english: Some say Yoshimitsu ran away, but... I suspect he was killed by an Iron蟲 while trying to film a ridiculous scene.

2025140014.english: Bad things keep happening one after another…

2025140015.korean: - 덴세츠는 신주쿠에서의 최종 결전에 임했지만, 제대로 된 지휘관도 없는 조직이었기에… 당연히 패배하였다네.
2025140015.english: Densetsu went into the final battle in Shinjuku, but since it was an organization without a proper commander... naturally, they were defeated.

2025140016.korean: - 그 탓에 겨우 유지되던 체계마저 붕괴했고…
2025140016.english: Because of that, even the system that was barely being maintained collapsed…

2025140017.korean: - 살아남은 우리는 덴세츠 본사에서 농성전과 가까운 상황에 놓이게 된 거라네.
2025140017.english: We who survived have found ourselves in a situation akin to a siege at the Densetsu headquarters.

2025140018.english: This is the end now, too…

2025140019.korean: 회장도 없고, 도망치지 않은 윗사람들은 전부 죽었어...
2025140019.english: There is no chairman, and all the higher-ups who didn't run away are dead...

2025140020.korean: 여기 남은 건 평범한 민간인이랑 바이오로이드뿐…
2025140020.english: The only ones left here are ordinary civilians and bioroids…

2025140021.korean: 그래… 잘 알고 있군... 게다가… 포위까지 당하고 말았고...
2025140021.english: Right... you know it well... And on top of that... we even ended up being surrounded...

2025140023.english: Even so, you have done really well…

2025140024.korean: 몇 달 전만 해도 회장한테 울며 목숨을 구걸했는데 말이오...
2025140024.english: Just a few months ago, I was crying and begging the chairman for my life...

2025140025.korean: 지금은… 여길 이끄는 지도자 중 한 명이지 않소이까...
2025140025.english: Right now… aren’t you one of the leaders guiding this place...?

2025140026.korean: 그거야 윗사람이 없어졌으니까 내가 대신하고 있는 것뿐이고...
2025140026.english: It's just that I'm filling in because the person in charge is gone...

2025140027.english: Even so… I think you are doing a really good job.

2025140028.korean: 전쟁물 엄청 좋아했거든… 그냥 여태 쌓아온 잡지식이 우연찮게 도움 됐을 뿐이야…
2025140028.english: I really loved war stories... It's just that the random knowledge I've accumulated over the years happened to be helpful by chance...

2025140029.korean: 하지만… 그래서 더 잘 알아. 여기도 이제 끝이라는 걸.
2025140029.english: But… that’s why I know it even better. That this is the end, too.

2025140031.korean: 아직… 지방은 철충이 적고, 생존자도 많은 모양이야…
2025140031.english: It looks like there are still… few Iron蟲 in the provinces, and there are many survivors…

2025140032.korean: 알고 있어? 홋카이도에는 덴세츠가 만든 거대한 스튜디오가 있어.
2025140032.english: Did you know? There is a huge studio in Hokkaido built by Densetsu.

2025140033.english: That's the first time I've heard that.

2025140034.korean: 철충의 침공이 시작되기 직전에 완성되었으니까 말이지…
2025140034.english: Because it was completed right before the Iron蟲 invasion began...

2025140035.korean: 시덴… 난 아직 죽고 싶지 않아.
2025140035.english: Shiden… I don’t want to die yet.

2025140037.english: So, I'm going to break through this siege.

2025140039.korean: 어제 레이 일행한테 정찰 시켰더니… 여기 이 장소는 건물과 지형 때문인지 철충 수가 적대.
2025140039.english: I had Ray and his group scout yesterday... and perhaps due to the buildings and terrain, the number of Iron Bugs here is hostile.

2025140040.korean: 여러 지점에 교란을 일으켜서, 철충의 주위를 끌고 그동안 재빠르게 모두를 탈출시키는 거야.
2025140040.english: You cause disruptions at multiple points to distract the Iron蟲 and quickly get everyone to escape.

2025140041.korean: - 그 ‘모두’ 안에 이 몸을 비롯한 바이오로이드는 포함되어 있지 않다는 건 굳이 물을 필요도 없었지.
2025140041.english: There was no need to even ask that bioroids like myself were not included in that 'all'.

2025140042.korean: 본사에 있는 차량 전부를 동원해 탈출할 거니까, 호위는 쿠노이치나 아탈란테처럼 발이 빠르고, 적을 상대하는 데 능한 녀석들이 맡아.
2025140042.english: We're going to mobilize all the vehicles at headquarters to escape, so have the guys who are fast on their feet and good at dealing with enemies, like Kunoichi or Atalante, handle the escort.

2025140043.english: Shiden, please take command of that.

2025140044.english: Leave the disruption to the remaining magical girls and villains.

2025140045.korean: 그리고 여기랑 여기에 폭탄을 설치하고… 아, 폭탄은 쿠노이치들에게 설치하게 할 거야.
2025140045.english: And I'll plant bombs here and here... Ah, I'll have the kunoichi plant the bombs.

2025140046.korean: 탈출 뒤… 교란에 나섰던 자들은… 어디로 집결시키면 되겠소?
2025140046.english: After the escape… where should I gather those who went out to cause disruption…?

2025140049.korean: 아니, 죽을 때까지 적의 시선을 끌어 줘야 해…
2025140049.english: No, I have to draw the enemy's attention until I die...

2025140052.korean: 아무튼! 여기서 빠져나가서 항구까지 가면, 덴세츠가 보유하고 있는 배를 탈 수 있어.
2025140052.english: Anyway! If you get out of here and go to the harbor, you can take the ship owned by Densetsu.

2025140053.english: I prepared it using my authority.

2025140054.korean: 그걸 타고 홋카이도의 스튜디오… D엔터돔으로 갈 거야.
2025140054.english: I'm going to take that to the studio in Hokkaido... D-Enterdome.

2025140055.korean: 거긴 여러 설비도 잘 갖춰져 있어서, 태세를 재정비할 수 있을 테니까.
2025140055.english: Since it is well-equipped with various facilities there, we will be able to reorganize our readiness.

2025140057.english: I'll reorganize... and then do something.

2025140058.korean: 그야… 거길 거점으로 해서… 전력을 늘리고…
2025140058.english: Well… using that as a base… to increase our power…

2025140060.korean: 아, 아무튼! 먼저 여길 탈출하지 않으면 아무것도 진행이 안 되잖아.
2025140060.english: Ah, anyway! Nothing can proceed unless we escape from here first.

2025140061.korean: 그니까 잘 부탁할게. 이 작전이 성공하면, 한동안은 전력이 크게 줄어들 테니까…
2025140061.english: So, I'm counting on you. If this operation succeeds, our military strength will be significantly reduced for a while...

2025140062.english: You're going to be busy without a moment's rest.

2025140067.english: And so the escape operation began.

2025140068.korean: 계획대로라면 조만간 철충이 교란에 넘어가 이동 경로에 빈틈이 생길 거야.
2025140068.english: If things go according to plan, the Iron蟲 will soon fall for the disruption, creating a gap in their movement path.

2025140069.english: Seize that timing to break through all at once!

2025140070.english: Ray, are all the survivors in the vehicle?

2025140071.korean: 네. 트럭과 승용차에 전원 탑승 완료했습니다.
2025140071.english: Yes. Everyone has boarded the truck and passenger car.

2025140072.english: My armored vehicle is ready, right?

2025140074.korean: 좋아, 앞서 나간 쿠노이치들에게 연락이 오면 출발이다!
2025140074.english: Alright, once we get word from the kunoichi who went ahead, we're off!

2025140075.korean: 『여기는 하가네. 예정 루트상의 철충이 이동해, 사라졌습니다!』
2025140075.english: "This is Hagane. The Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) on the planned route have moved and disappeared!"

2025140076.english: Haha! It's all going according to plan…

2025140080.korean: 분명 교란을 하고 있어야 할 방향에서… 전투 소음이… 들리지 않아…
2025140080.english: From the direction where there should clearly be disruption... I can't hear the noise of battle...

2025140082.korean:
듣고보니 좀 조용한 것 같긴 한데… 그치만 여기랑 교란 지점은 거리가 꽤 되잖아.
그보다 자꾸 이렇게 꾸물대면 녀석들이 눈치챌지도 몰라.
2025140082.english:
Now that I think about it, it does seem a bit quiet... but the distance between here and the disturbance point is quite far.
 Besides, if you keep dawdling like this, they might notice.

2025140085.korean: 시덴! 정 불안하면 네가 완벽하게 호위해!
2025140085.english: Shiden! If you're really worried, you escort them perfectly!

2025140089.english: The lead vehicle has been destroyed!!

2025140091.english: How could this be! What about the disruption!?

2025140093.english: The Iron Bugs are swarming this way!!

2025140095.english: … What do you intend to do?

2025140097.korean: 계획은 변경 없다! 나도 출발한다! 시덴! 호위해라!
2025140097.english: No change to the plan! I'm off too! Shiden! Escort me!

2025150001.korean: - 어찌저찌 가까스로 탈출에 성공했고, 우리는 계획대로 북해도의 D돔에 도착하였소.
2025150001.english: We somehow managed to barely escape, and arrived at D-Dome in Hokkaido as planned.

2025150002.english: - At the cost of many sacrifices.

2025150003.korean: - 살아남은 자는 인간도 바이오로이드도 동경 때의 20%에도 못 미칠 수준이었소외다.
2025150003.english: - The number of survivors, both humans and bioroids, was less than 20% of what it was during the Tokyo era.

2025150004.korean: - 하지만… 북해도는 동경의 상황과 비교하면 철충이 적어, 우리는 D돔에 도착하고 빠르게 안정을 찾을 수 있었다네.
2025150004.english: However... compared to the situation in Tokyo, there were fewer Iron蟲 in Hokkaido, so we were able to reach D-Dome and quickly stabilize.

2025150005.korean: - 그렇게 철충을 사냥하고, 생존자나 주인을 잃은 바이오로이드를 받아들이며 조용한 저항 활동을 이어온지도… 어느덧 2년의 시간이 흘렀소.
2025150005.english: It has already been two years since we began our quiet resistance activities, hunting Iron蟲 and accepting survivors or masterless Bio-roids.

2025150007.korean: 아직은 감당할 수 있는 숫자라 다행이지만…
2025150007.english: It's a relief that the numbers are still manageable, but...

2025150008.korean: 어딘가의 공장을 이용해 숫자를 불리고 있는 거겠지…
2025150008.english: They must be using a factory somewhere to inflate the numbers...

2025150009.korean: 언젠가 우리도 전력이 갖춰지면, 그곳을 박살내러 가야 해.
2025150009.english: Someday, when we have the power, we have to go and destroy that place.

2025150010.english: Once the power is ready… I suppose…

2025150011.english: Is it really possible to build the necessary power...

2025150012.korean: 금방 갖춰질 거야. 하루가 멀다시피 주인이 죽은 바이오로이드가 모여들고 있으니까.
2025150012.english: It will be ready soon. Bio-roids whose masters have died are gathering almost every day.

2025150013.korean: 바이오로이드라고 해도, 대부분 민간용이잖아? 도움이 되긴 할까...
2025150013.english: Even if they are bioroids, most of them are for civilian use, right? I wonder if they would actually be of any help...

2025150014.english: Well... maybe by training or something...

2025150016.korean: 애초에 바이오로이드가 모여드는 것도, 주인이 잠든 채로 일어나지 못하고 죽는 기묘한 병 때문이잖아?
2025150016.english: The reason bioroids gather in the first place is because of a strange disease where their owners die without waking up from their sleep, isn't it?

2025150017.korean: 돔 안의 인간들 사이에도 잠든 뒤로 일어나지 못하는 사람들이 하나둘씩 생겨나고 있어.
2025150017.english: Even among the humans inside the dome, people are appearing one by one who cannot wake up after falling asleep.

2025150020.english: Besides, the leader has been acting strangely lately, too…

2025150021.english: It's become... rougher compared to before.

2025150024.korean: 리더, 시덴 님은 지금 삿포로 레지스탕스를 구하러 가셨습니다.
2025150024.english: Leader, Shiden has gone to rescue the Sapporo Resistance.

2025150026.korean: 네… 그러니까… 철충이 대량으로 모여들고 있는 것 같아서, 탈출할 돌파구를 열어달라고…
2025150026.english: Yes... so... it looks like a massive swarm of Iron蟲s is gathering, so I'm asking you to open a breakthrough to escape...

2025150027.korean: 쿠노이치를 몇 명 데리고, 방금 출발했습니다.
2025150027.english: I just set off with a few kunoichi.

2025150028.korean: 하아? 그 녀석이 빠지면 여긴 누가 지키는데! 애초에 삿포로의 레지스탕스라 해봤자 100명도 안 되는 약소 세력이잖아!
2025150028.english: Huh? If that guy leaves, who's going to defend this place! Besides, the Sapporo Resistance is just a weak force of fewer than 100 people!

2025150029.korean: 그런 허접한 곳을 도와주다가 우리 쪽이 괴멸되면 어쩔 건데! 우리는 수백 명의 인간을 보호하고 있다고!
2025150029.english: What are we supposed to do if we get wiped out while helping such a pathetic place! We are protecting hundreds of humans!

2025150030.korean: 이쪽 방어는 만전입니다. 쿠노이치도 많이 있고, 얼마 전에 합류한 군사용 바이오로이드도……
2025150030.english: Our defenses here are at full capacity. We have plenty of kunoichi, and the military bio-androids that joined us recently...

2025150035.english: I'm asking what's with that look!

2025150039.korean: 너! 날 우습게 봤지? 도쿄 돌파 작전을 강행해서 많은 사람들을 죽게 만들었다고 날 깔보는 거잖아!
2025150039.english: You! You looked down on me, didn't you? You're looking down on me because I forced through the Tokyo breakthrough operation and caused so many people to die!

2025150040.korean: 네? 그런 생각… 하고 있지 않았어요! 아악! 하지 마세요!
2025150040.english: What? I wasn't… thinking that! Argh! Stop it!

2025150042.english: Damn it! Damn it! Damn it!!!!

2025150046.english: Haa... So I finally made it back...

2025150047.korean: (삿포로의 레지스탕스들은 도착했을 땐 이미 전멸해 있었다…)
2025150047.english: (The resistance in Sapporo had already been wiped out by the time they arrived…)

2025150048.korean: (함께 보낸 쿠노이치들과 죽지 않고 함께 돌아올 수 있었던 것만으로도 다행이라고 해야 하나…)
2025150048.english: (Should I say it's a relief just that I was able to return with the kunoichi I spent time with without dying…)

2025150049.korean: 시덴님, 저희는 부상 치료와 장비 정비를 하고 오겠습니다.
2025150049.english: Mr. Shiden, we will be back after treating injuries and maintaining the equipment.

2025150050.korean:
그래… 그게 끝나면… 쉬도록 하게나들.  
이 몸은 저 녀석에게… 보고하겠네.
2025150050.english:
Okay… once that’s over… you guys can rest.
 I will report to that fellow...

2025150052.english: (Huh... why is the room such a mess?)

2025150053.english: (This guy... looks like he's throwing a tantrum again...)

2025150058.english: (This bruise… and the clothes are torn…)

2025150060.english: … You scoundrel! What have you done!

2025150062.english: What did you do? It's just like that.

2025150063.english: They made good use of the bioroids.

2025150065.korean: …네 놈은 아직 미숙한 면이 있긴 해도... 이 아이들을… 소중히 여긴다고 믿었거늘…
2025150065.english: … Even though you still have your immature sides… I believed that you… cherished these children…

2025150067.korean: 그래, 소중히 여기고 있지. 너희가 없으면 나는 살아갈 수 없어.
2025150067.english: Yes, I cherish you. I can't live without you.

2025150068.korean: 나는 너희에게 지켜지지 않으면 살아갈 수 없단 말이야.
2025150068.english: I can't live unless you protect me.

2025150070.korean: 왜 네가 화를 내는 거야. 화내야 할 쪽은 나잖아…
2025150070.english: Why are you getting angry? I'm the one who should be angry...

2025150071.korean: 이곳의 방어를 내팽개치고, 삿포로 같은 델 제멋대로 가버리고 말이지!
2025150071.english: You abandoned the defenses of this place and just went off to a place like Sapporo as you pleased!

2025150072.korean: 그 잠깐 사이에 내가 죽기라도 했으면 어쩔 뻔했어! 나는! 이곳의 마지막 희망이란 말이다!!
2025150072.english: What would have happened if I had died in that brief moment! I am! I am the last hope of this place!!

2025150077.korean: 잘 들어… 이건 특별히 너한테 주는 벌이다...
2025150077.english: Listen carefully... This is a special punishment I am giving you...

2025150078.korean: 네년이 또다시 나를 1분 1초라도 위험한 상황에 처하게 만든다면, 이 아이… 아니, 네가 아끼는 쿠노 이치들을 모조리 한 명씩……
2025150078.english: If you put me in danger for even a single second again, this child… no, I’ll take every single one of the Kunoichis you cherish, one by one…

2025150080.english: (I'll kill you! I'll kill you! I'll kill you! I'll kill you! I'll kill you! I'll kill you!!!!)

2025150081.korean: - 이 몸은 시간이 늘어진 세계 속에서 간절히 바라고 또 바랐소.
2025150081.english: In a world where time has stretched out, I have earnestly wished and wished again.

2025150082.english: - Unfortunately, that wish did not come true.

2025150084.korean: - 여지없이 우리들의 상황은 계속해서 뒤틀리며 무너져만 갔소.
2025150084.english: Without fail, our situation continued to twist and crumble.

2025150085.korean: - 시간이 흐를수록… 세계의 상황도 눈에 띄게 악화되어 갔고, 휩노스 병도 퍼져나갔지.
2025150085.english: As time went by… the situation in the world deteriorated noticeably, and Hypnos disease spread.

2025150086.korean: - 우리들 사이에는 희미하고도 또렷이 '절망'이라는 공기가 감돌고 있었구려.
2025150086.english: A faint yet distinct air of 'despair' was swirling between us.

2025150087.korean: - 그리고, 그 공기에 물든… 그 녀석은…
2025150087.english: - And, stained by that air… that guy…

2025150088.english: It exposed the wickedness of humanity without any filter.

2025150090.english: Why… … did you lay a hand on Konoha?

2025150092.english: It's fine. It's not like I killed anyone...

2025150094.english: It's so noisy... It's not like I laid a hand on everyone...

2025150095.korean: 그 아이들도 힘든 가운데 필사적으로 싸우고 있지 않느냐…!
2025150095.english: Aren't those children fighting desperately amidst their hardships, too…!

2025150096.korean: 그 아이들을 더는 상처 입히지 마라…
2025150096.english: Do not hurt those children anymore…

2025150098.korean: …그럼 주인이 죽고 없는 바이오로이드한테는 손 대도 되지?
2025150098.english: … Then it’s okay to lay a hand on a bioroid whose owner is dead, right?

2025150099.korean: 근데 이럼 완전 무료 봉사 아니냐? 걔내한테만 좋은 일이잖아!
2025150099.english: But isn't this basically free volunteering? It's only good for them!

2025150102.korean: 놈 놈 거리지 마. 리더라고 불러.
2025150102.english: Don't call me a jerk. Call me Leader.

2025150104.english: But… that didn't last long either.

2025150105.english: - That guy has also developed Hypnos symptoms.

2025150107.english: I've been having nothing but nightmares lately…

2025150108.english: What on earth is this disease…

2025150109.english: The bioroids are fine, but the human population is gradually decreasing…

2025150110.english: Am I going to die too...?

2025150112.english: I hate it… I hate it, I hate it, I hate it… … !

2025150114.korean: 누구 없냐! 아무도 없는 거냐! 괜찮으니까 거기 아무나 좀 와 봐!
2025150114.english: Is anyone there! Is there really no one here! It's fine, just someone come over there!

2025150119.english: … Why are you acting like this… …

2025150124.english: Shut up! Before I smash you to pieces too!!!

2025150125.korean: 지금까진 죽기 싫어서 참아왔지만! 어차피 난 이제 죽고 말거야!
2025150125.english: I've held back until now because I didn't want to die! But anyway, I'm going to die now!

2025150126.english: I don't need any of that anymore!

2025150127.korean: 세상은 끝났어… 록 하버도 이제 한계 같으니까!
2025150127.english: The world is over… Rock Harbor seems to have reached its limit now, too!

2025150128.korean: 나는 결국 마지막 희망도 뭐도 아니었던 거야……
2025150128.english: In the end, I wasn't the last hope or anything...

2025150131.korean: - 그 녀석은 수많은 바이오로이드를 가지고 놀다 부쉈다. 자신의 공포와 졸음을 속이기 위해…
2025150131.english: - That guy played with and destroyed countless bioroids. To mask his fear and drowsiness…

2025150132.korean: - 이 몸은 그걸 보고도 못 본 척… 아니, 못 본 척하지는 않았지... 보고도… 아무것도 할 수 없어 그저 묵묵히 견디는 수밖에는 방법이 없었다...
2025150132.english: I saw it and pretended not to see... No, I didn't pretend not to see... Even though I saw it... I could do nothing; I had no choice but to endure it in silence...

2025150134.korean: - 그 녀석은 눈을 뜨지 않게 되었고, 잠들며 죽었다.
2025150134.english: That guy stopped opening his eyes and died in his sleep.

2025150138.korean: 다행이야…… 이제는 더 이상 동료가 죽지 않아도 돼……
2025150138.english: That's a relief... Now, no more comrades have to die...

2025150144.english: Shiden, what should we do with the leader's body?

2025150145.english: Should I make a grave nearby…?

2025150148.korean: 그대들이... 마음을 쏟을 가치조차 없는 존재이외다...
2025150148.english: You... are beings not even worth pouring your hearts into...

2025150150.english: Humanity is destined for destruction… This is punishment…

2025150154.korean: - 시덴의 과거 이야기를 우리는 그저 침묵하며 잠자코 들을 수밖에 없었다.
2025150154.english: We had no choice but to listen silently to Shiden's story of the past.

2025150155.korean: - 그리고, 리미터가 해제된 시간 인식의 확장…
2025150155.english: - And, the expansion of time perception with the limiter released…

2025150156.english: - The fact that it wasn't released means… that is…

2025150157.korean: - 그녀의 안에서는… 대체 몇 년이라는 시간이 흐른 것일까…?
2025150157.english: - Inside her… just how many years have passed…?

2025150158.korean:
- 아니, 애초에 시간 감각이 확장된다는 게 어떤 감각인지도 모르겠다.
분명, 내 상상을 초월하는 고통을 느끼고 있을 것이다…
2025150158.english:
No, to begin with, I don't even know what it feels like for the sense of time to expand.
 Surely, he must be feeling pain beyond my imagination…

2025150159.korean: 오우카, 이 몸은… 감히 인간이 있는 이 자리에서 말하겠노라.
2025150159.english: Ouka, I… dare to speak in this place where humans are present.

2025150160.korean: 그 오르카의 사령관… 그대의 주군은 확실히 훌륭한 인간일지도 모르지…
2025150160.english: That Orca commander… your lord might certainly be a fine human being…

2025150161.korean: 허나… 그것은 그 인간의 다양한 모습 중 단 하나일뿐이다.
2025150161.english: However… that is just one of the many aspects of that human being.

2025150162.korean: 언젠가 반드시… 반드시… 그 악성을 드러낼 때가 올 게야...
2025150162.english: Someday, without fail... without fail... the time will come to reveal that wickedness...

2025150164.korean: 이 몸은... 다시 만난 너희들을 잃고 싶지 않소…
2025150164.english: I... do not want to lose you all whom I have met again...

2025150165.korean: 그러니 오우카, 스미레, 하츠나… 그대들은 오르카를 버리고… 이 몸에게로 건너 오시게나.
2025150165.english: So Ouka, Sumire, Hatsuna… abandon Orca… and come over to me.

2025150166.english: <The Great War ~Endlessly Striking Purple Lightning~> Continued in Part 2.

2025160001.korean: 후우… 핰순이의 잔해, 잘 모이지 않네요.
2025160001.english: Phew... Hak-soon's remains aren't gathering well.

2025160002.korean: 하카를 복원하기로 한건 맞지만, 우선순위로는 아래쪽이거든?
2025160002.english: It's true that we decided to restore the Haka, but it's low on the priority list, you know?

2025160003.korean: 전담 회수 부대가 편성된 것도 아니거든?
2025160003.english: It's not like a dedicated recovery unit has been formed, either.

2025160004.korean: 임무 중에 발견하거든 다들 잊지 말고 회수해 주면 이 언니, 기쁠 것 같거든?
2025160004.english: If you find it during a mission, please don't forget to retrieve it; I'd be really happy.

2025160005.korean: 이 정도면 벌써 많이 모인 편이거든?
2025160005.english: This is already a pretty good amount to gather, you know?

2025160007.korean: 하카 양이 오르카를 구했으니까요. 다들 고마워하고 있어요.
2025160007.english: Because Miss Haka saved Orca. Everyone is grateful.

2025160008.korean: 다시 한 번 만들어주고 싶다는 마음은 모두 같아요.
2025160008.english: We all have the same desire to make it for you again.

2025160011.korean:
AGS… 그 외에도 수송기, 대원들의 무기 정비에 설비 수리…  
다행히 저도 정비는 어느 정도 할 줄 아니까, 할 수 있는 일이 있다는 게 기쁘긴 하지만요...
2025160011.english:
AGS… in addition to that, transport aircraft, maintenance of personnel's weapons, and equipment repairs…
 Fortunately, I know how to do some maintenance myself, so I am glad that there is something I can do...

2025160012.korean:
그렇지? 사실 스털링이 오기 전까지 AGS 애기들 생산 라인 늘리고 있었거든,  
언니 진짜 힘들었거든?
2025160012.english:
Right? Actually, we were expanding the production line for the AGS babies until Sterling arrived.
 It was really tough for you, unnie.

2025160013.korean: 스털링이 도와줘서 정말 큰 힘이 되고 있거든!
2025160013.english: Sterling is really giving me a lot of strength by helping out!

2025160014.english: I'm so glad to hear that I can be of help!

2025160015.korean: 앞으로도 오르카에서 지내면서 모르는 거나 힘든 일 있으면 주저 말고 말해주세요.
2025160015.english: If you have any questions or difficulties while living at Orca in the future, please do not hesitate to tell me.

2025160016.korean: 인류 멸망 이전부터 살아오신 분들은 분명 당황스럽게 느껴질 부분이 많으실 테니까요...
2025160016.english: Because those who have lived since before the extinction of humanity will surely find many parts confusing...

2025160017.korean: 아하하… 확실히, 오르카 소속이 되고 나서 부터 놀라운 일을 많이 겪고 있네요.
2025160017.english: Ahaha... Certainly, I've been experiencing a lot of surprising things since joining Orca.

2025160018.korean: 지금도 놀라고 있는 게 있는데… 그게 그러니까… '그거'요.
2025160018.english: There is something that still surprises me... I mean... 'that'.

2025160024.korean: - 페레그리누스가 스트롱홀드의 캐터필러에 있는 힘껏 달라붙었다!
2025160024.english: Peregrinus clung to Stronghold's caterpillar with all his might!

2025160026.korean: 이게 고작인가? 본 기는 아직 캐터필러 하나조차 움직이지 않았다네.
2025160026.english: Is that all? This machine hasn't even moved a single caterpillar track yet.

2025160028.english: Well, it's 490 tons, after all. If you say it's only natural, then it is.

2025160030.english: Don't underestimate the King of Harpies!!

2025160031.korean: - 나는 지금 알프레드가 기획한 AGS 스모 대회를 관람하고 있다.
