2025160031.english: I am currently watching the AGS sumo tournament organized by Alfred.

2025160032.korean: - 현재 오르카는 상황상 세력권 내 주민들의 교육, 이주, 인프라 확충을 중점으로 업무가 전환되었고, 이 때문에 자연히 스트롱홀드 같은 대규모 작전용 AGS의 출전 기회가 줄어들게 됐다.
2025160032.english: - Currently, Orca's operations have shifted to focus on the education, relocation, and infrastructure expansion of residents within its sphere of influence due to the situation, and as a result, the opportunities for large-scale operational AGS units like Strongholds to be deployed have naturally decreased.

2025160033.korean: - 스트롱홀드도 '내가 출격하지 않는 건 좋은 일이다'라고 말하며 납득 해줬지만, 계속 격납고에 대기만 시키는 건 불쌍하다는 이유가 이 스모 대회의 첫번째 기획 사유였다.
2025160033.english: Stronghold also accepted it, saying, "It is a good thing that I am not sortieing," but the first reason for planning this sumo tournament was that it was pitiful to keep him just waiting in the hangar.

2025160035.korean: - 전고 6.1m, 전장 15.2m, 중량 490톤의 거대한 철덩어리를, 3.1톤밖에 안 되는 페레그리누스가 스모로 이긴다는 건 애당초 말이 안 되는 거잖아...
2025160035.english: It makes no sense from the start that Peregrinus, weighing only 3.1 tons, could defeat a massive iron block measuring 6.1m in height, 15.2m in length, and weighing 490 tons in sumo...

2025160036.korean: 지금부터 폼 체인지 해서 전속력으로 들이받아도 돼?
2025160036.english: Can I change my form right now and ram into it at full speed?

2025160040.english: Pere-kun, you're going to get crushed!

2025160042.korean: 아무리 튼튼해도 스트롱군 쪽에 비하긴 힘들거든? 페레군은 변형 체계가 복잡하니까, 충격을 견디지 못 할 거거든!
2025160042.english: No matter how sturdy it is, it can't compare to Strong-kun, you know? Since Pere-kun has a complex transformation system, he won't be able to withstand the impact!

2025160043.korean: 그러니까 딱 잘라 안 되는 건 안 되는 거거든!!!
2025160043.english: So, if something just doesn't work, it just doesn't work!!!

2025160045.korean: 그럼 뭐 어쩔 수 없나... 괜히 무리하다가 포츈 누님께 폐끼치는 것도 뭣하고.
2025160045.english: Well, I guess it can't be helped... I don't want to overexert myself and cause trouble for Sister Fortune.

2025160047.korean: 기간테스나 알프레드한텐 이겼으니까… 이 쯤으로 만족할까.
2025160047.english: Since I beat the Gigantes and Alfred... I guess I should be satisfied with this much.

2025160048.english: Phew! I won't lose next time!

2025160049.korean: 내가 그런 비겁한 다리걸기에 넘어질 줄이야! 평생의 불명예예요!
2025160049.english: To think I would fall for such a cowardly trip! It is a disgrace for the rest of my life!

2025160050.korean: 부족한 건 기술로 메우는 거야. 하하하!
2025160050.english: I make up for what's lacking with skill. Hahaha!

2025160052.korean: - 알프레드가 땅을 구르며 분해하고 있을 때, 외부로 이어지는 해치가 열렸고 임무에서 돌아온 사레나가 서 있었다.
2025160052.english: As Alfred was rolling on the ground in disarray, the hatch leading outside opened, and Sareena, having returned from her mission, was standing there.

2025160055.english: I'm back. I have returned from my mission.

2025160056.korean: 네, 철충도 안 나타났고, 무사히 이동시킬 수 있었습니다.
2025160056.english: Yes, no Iron蟲 appeared, and I was able to move it safely.

2025160057.korean: 보고서는 나중에 제출할 테니 걱정 마세요!
2025160057.english: Don't worry, I'll submit the report later!

2025160058.english: More importantly… what is going on right now…?

2025160059.korean: 지금 AGS 스모 대회를 하고 있었습니다요. 때마침 결판이 난 참이었습니다.
2025160059.english: The AGS Sumo tournament was just taking place. It happened to be just the moment the match was decided.

2025160061.korean: 사실상 스트롱홀드를 1밀리미터라도 움직일 수 있느냐의 대회였지만.
2025160061.english: In fact, it was a competition to see if one could move a stronghold even one millimeter.

2025160062.korean: 그대들이 본 기에 부딪히는 걸 구경하는 것도 재미있었다.
2025160062.english: It was also fun watching you guys collide with the main body.

2025160063.korean: 그리고 본인의 육체에 더욱 자신을 가질 수 있었다. 본 기는 좋은 행사였다고 생각한다!!
2025160063.english: And I was able to gain more confidence in my body. I think this was a great event!!

2025160064.english: I see. Then that's a relief.

2025160065.korean: 후후후, 표정을 보니 다들 무척 즐거웠던 모양이네요.
2025160065.english: Hahaha, judging by your expressions, it looks like everyone had a great time.

2025160066.korean: 나도 오랜만에 촬영 때가 생각났어. 언젠가 또 니드호그 녀석이랑 싸우게 될지도 모르잖아? 좋은 연습이 됐을지도.
2025160066.english: It reminded me of the filming days for the first time in a while, too. You never know, I might end up fighting Nidhogg again someday, right? It might have been good practice.

2025160067.korean: - 확실히, 니드호그는 강력한 독을 사용하는 AGS다. 본격적으로 맞붙게 된다면 페레그리누스 같은 AGS들이 열쇠가 될지도 모른다.
2025160067.english: - Certainly, Nidhogg is an AGS that uses powerful poison. If a full-scale battle ensues, AGSs like Peregrinus might be the key.

2025160069.korean: 그래서 이제 어떡할래? 일단 결승까지 끝났으니 해산할까? 어차피 타이런트는 안 할 거잖아?
2025160069.english: So what are we going to do now? Since the finals are over, should we disband? You're not going to play Tyrant anyway, right?

2025160070.korean: - 페레그리누스가 기지개를 켜며 스트롱홀드 근처에서 대기 중인 타이런트에게 말을 걸었다.
2025160070.english: Peregrinus stretched and spoke to the Tyrant waiting near the Stronghold.

2025160071.korean: - 사실은 타이런트도 즐겁게 해주고 싶어서 제안 하긴 했지만...
2025160071.english: Actually, I did make the suggestion because I wanted to entertain Tyrant as well, but...

2025160072.korean: - '상대를 파괴해도 된다면 참가하겠다'라고 말했기 때문에, 도무지 참가시킬 수 없었다…
2025160072.english: - Because he said, "I will participate if I can destroy my opponent," we absolutely could not let him participate...

2025160073.english: A battle without destruction is meaningless.

2025160075.korean: 본 기는 그렇게 생각하지 않지만 말이지! 실제로 싸워보니 본 기의 실력을 객관적으로 파악할 수 있었어! 너도 한 번 해보는 게 어때?
2025160075.english: I don't think so myself, though! After actually fighting, I was able to objectively assess my own abilities! Why don't you give it a try too?

2025160077.korean: 나는 이 일에 대해 더 이상 말하지 않겠다. 스모에는 참가하지 않는다.
2025160077.english: I will not say anything more about this matter. I will not participate in sumo.

2025160079.korean: - 뭐, 타이런트 본인이 지금의 생활에 불만이 없다면, 그걸로 된 거지……
2025160079.english: Well, if Tyrant himself isn't dissatisfied with his current life, then that's all that matters...

2025160081.english: Um, would it be okay if I tried?

2025160083.korean: 네…… 일단 AGS 파츠도 장착하고 있고, 뭐랄까 조금 흥미가 있어서……
2025160083.english: Yeah... well, first of all, it's equipped with AGS parts, and... how should I put it... I'm a little interested...

2025160084.korean: AGS 파츠가 있다고는 해도 말이지, 어렵지 않겠어?
2025160084.english: Even if there are AGS parts, wouldn't it be difficult?

2025160085.korean: 이봐, 너무 쉽게 허락해 주는 거 아니야?
2025160085.english: Hey, aren't you allowing it too easily?

2025160088.korean: 그럼 본 기는 여기서 자세를 잡고 있을 테니, 언제든 들이받게나!
2025160088.english: Then, I’ll take my stance here, so charge at me at any moment!

2025160090.english: In that case, I will be the referee!

2025160091.korean: 승부는 간단합니다! 스트롱홀드 씨를 조금이라도 뒤로 밀어낼 수 있다면 승리입니다!
2025160091.english: The match is simple! If you can push Mr. Stronghold back even a little, you win!

2025160097.korean: - 그러자 알프레드의 구령과 동시에 사레나는 부스터를 점화하고 뒤로 물러났다.
2025160097.english: At that moment, at Alfred's command, Sarena ignited her booster and stepped back.

2025160098.english: Are you perhaps trying to accelerate and charge?

2025160099.english: Well, I didn't say it wouldn't work.

2025160100.korean: 사레나는 돌진하기 위한 구조를 갖추고 있고, 아자즈 씨가 충격 방지 기능도 추가했기 때문에 돌진 자체는 문제없거든.
2025160100.english: Sarena is equipped with a structure for charging, and since Mr. Azaz also added shock-absorbing features, charging itself isn't a problem.

2025160101.korean: 하지만 스트롱홀드 씨는 움직이면 안 되거든?
2025160101.english: But Mr. Stronghold, you're not supposed to move, okay?

2025160103.korean: 응. 뭐, 장갑은 찌그러지겠지만. 이번엔 언니가 확실히 고칠 생각이거든!
2025160103.english: Yeah. Well, the gloves will get squashed, but I'm definitely planning to fix them this time!

2025160104.korean: 내 차례엔 안 된다고 해놓고! 불공평하잖아!
2025160104.english: You said it wouldn't be my turn! That's unfair!

2025160105.english: The structure is different, the structure.

2025160106.korean: 나도 충격 방지 기능 추가해달라고 해볼까…
2025160106.english: Should I ask them to add a shock-absorbing feature too...

2025160107.korean: - 나는 페레그리누스에게 웃어 보이며, 사레나 쪽을 바라보았다.
2025160107.english: I smiled at Peregrinus and looked toward Sareena.

2025160110.korean: - 사레나는 그렇게 말하자마자 순식간에 스트롱홀드에게 돌진했다.
2025160110.english: As soon as Sarena said that, she rushed at Stronghold in an instant.

2025160113.english: - With a tremendous sound, the Stronghold… …

2025160118.korean: 역시 돌진이 최고야! 나도 한 번만 더 하게 해줘!
2025160118.english: Charge is the best! Let me do it just one more time!

2025160119.korean: 안 돼! 자, 사레나 장갑 상태를 보면 알 수 있거든?
2025160119.english: No! Look, you can tell by looking at the condition of Sareena's gloves, okay?

2025160120.korean: - 사레나를 보니, 전면 장갑이 심하게 찌그러져 있었다.
2025160120.english: - When I looked at Sarena, the front armor was severely dented.

2025160121.english: It ends up like that, you know?

2025160123.english: I, I'm sorry. It's quite dented.

2025160124.korean:
말했잖아? 확실히 수리해 줄 테니까 신경 쓰지 않아도 되거든!
게다가 데이터도 얻었으니 오히려 좋거든!
2025160124.english:
I told you! I'll definitely fix it for you, so you don't have to worry!
 Besides, I got the data too, so it's actually a good thing!

2025160125.korean: 그보다 다친 데는 없는지 확인이 필요하거든?
2025160125.english: More importantly, I need to check if you're hurt anywhere.

2025160126.english:
It's okay. Thank you…
 Thank you, Mr. Stronghold, as well!

2025160127.korean: 음, 본 기도 좋은 경험이 되었어! 고맙다!
2025160127.english: Hmm, this prayer was a good experience! Thank you!

2025160128.korean: 정말 대단하네…… 나는 진짜 1밀리미터도 못 움직였는데.
2025160128.english: That's amazing... I really couldn't move even a millimeter.

2025160131.korean: 그, 그럼…… 슬슬 보고서를 써야 해서……
2025160131.english: Uh, well... I need to start writing the report soon...

2025160132.english: I will go take off my equipment.

2025160134.english: Well then, Director... I'll see you again later.

2025160135.korean: - 그렇게 말한 사레나는 고개를 꾸벅 숙인 뒤 격납고 안쪽으로 걸어갔다.
2025160135.english: After saying that, Sarena bowed her head and walked into the hangar.

2025160136.english: So, shall we really disband now?

2025160137.korean: 그래, 너무 무리하지 말고. 그러다 몸 상한다?
2025160137.english: Yeah, don't push yourself too hard. You might ruin your health.

2025160139.korean:
쓸데없는 말은 필요 없다, 주인.
내게 필요한 건 파괴와 살육뿐.
2025160139.english:
No need for useless words, Master.
 All I need is destruction and slaughter.

2025160141.korean: - 나는 그렇게 말하는 타이런트에게 손을 흔들며, 격납고를 떠났다.
2025160141.english: I waved my hand at the Tyrant who was saying that and left the hangar.

2025160143.english: I wanted to spar with you too. What a shame!

2025160147.korean: 현재 밖의 상황은 이렇게 떠들어도 될 정도로 안정된 건가?
2025160147.english: Is the situation outside stable enough right now to be making such a fuss?

2025160148.korean: 그렇네~ 여전히 철충은 전보다 활발하게 움직이고 있으니까 안정되진 않았지만……
2025160148.english: Yeah~ The Iron蟲 are still moving more actively than before, so it’s not stable yet, but…

2025160149.korean: AGS 아가들 생산 라인을 늘려놔서 당장 위험하진 않다는 느낌이거든.
2025160149.english: I get the feeling that it isn't dangerous right now because they've expanded the production line for the AGS babies.

2025160150.korean: 내가 나설 전장은 정말 없는 건가?
2025160150.english: Is there really no battlefield for me to step onto?

2025160151.korean: 음~ 그런 건 스트롱홀드한테 물어보는 게 좋지 않을까 싶거든?
2025160151.english: Hmm... I think it would be better to ask a stronghold about that.

2025160156.korean: 실은 스모 대회에 참가하고 싶었던 거지?
2025160156.english: Actually, you wanted to participate in the sumo tournament, right?

2025160158.korean: 파괴 없는 전투란 건… 너희들이 이해할 수 있도록 말하자면,  취미 없는 인생 같은 것이다.
2025160158.english: A battle without destruction... to put it in a way you can understand, it is like a life without hobbies.

2025160160.english: The wait times are too long these days.

2025160163.korean:
아니… 그냥, 한 가지만 말하자면.
그럴 때일수록, 취미를 가지는 게 좋지 않겠나?
2025160163.english:
No… just to say one thing.
 Wouldn't it be good to have a hobby, especially in times like that?

2025160165.korean: 후후, 타이런트도 할 수 있을 만한 취미, 생각해 볼 거거든?
2025160165.english: Hehe, I'm going to think of a hobby that even Tyrant could do, you know?

2025160166.korean: …그럴 필요는 없다. 나는 이미 취미가 있다.
2025160166.english: … There is no need for that. I already have a hobby.

2025160169.korean:
그렇네~ 하지만, 지금은 그걸 할 수 없으니까 다른 취미를 만들어야 하거든?
뭐, 느긋하게 기다려줘.
2025160169.english:
That's true~ But since I can't do that right now, I have to come up with another hobby, you know?
 Well, just wait patiently.

2025160172.korean: 뭐, 새로운 취미가 생길 때까지 본 기와 대화나 하며 즐기지 않겠나!
2025160172.english: Well, why don't we just enjoy chatting with this guy until I find a new hobby?

2025160178.english: It felt like robots fighting each other, so it was incredibly intense.

2025160179.english: Well then, shall we wrap up for today?

2025160182.english: Since I said I wanted to do it… how about it?

2025160184.english: Good! Just don't push yourself too hard!

2025160188.korean: 응. 피곤할 테니까, 꼭 쉬어야 해.
2025160188.english: Yeah. You must be tired, so make sure you rest.

2025160190.english: Then, I'll go back to work too.

2025160191.english: Of course. I had fun today.

2025160193.english: I'll trust you and leave it to you when that time comes.

2025170001.korean: 아, 그래도 저 같은 AGS 개발 문외한이 상담을 받게 되다니… 정말 괜찮은 거죠?
2025170001.english: Ah, but to think that a complete novice like me, who knows nothing about AGS development, is getting a consultation... it's really okay, right?

2025170002.korean:
물론이에요. 때로는 전문가가 아닌 소견이 영감으로 승화 될 수 있으니까요.  
지금부터 어떤 아이디어가 나올지 기대되네요.
2025170002.english:
Of course. After all, sometimes non-expert opinions can be elevated into inspiration.
 I'm looking forward to seeing what ideas come out from now on.

2025170003.korean: - 그치만 난 지금부터 과연 어떤 아이디어가 나올지 무섭다…
2025170003.english: But I'm scared about what kind of ideas will come out from now on…

2025170004.english: Yes. I’d like to give you this.

2025170005.korean: - 아자즈는 활짝 웃으며 한 장의 신청서를 건넸다.
2025170005.english: Azaz smiled broadly and handed over an application form.

2025170006.english: - This pattern… … gives me a bad feeling.

2025170010.korean: 그건 그렇고, 아자즈. 나한테 무슨 볼일이 있어서 온 거 아니었어?
2025170010.english: Anyway, Azaz. Didn't you come here because you had business with me?

2025180001.korean: 후우, 겨우 돌아왔네. 빨리 샤워하고 싶어…
2025180001.english: Phew, I finally made it back. I want to take a shower right away...

2025180002.english: … … drenched in sweat… … I do want to take a shower, but it’s such a hassle… …

2025180003.english: But at least you help dry my hair.

2025180004.korean: 우… 그렇지만… 감는 것 자체가 힘들단 말이야… 자동으로 감겨줬으면…
2025180004.english: Ugh... but... winding it itself is hard... I wish it would wind automatically...

2025180005.korean: 하하하, 감는 것도 도와줄 테니까…… 자, 가자.
2025180005.english: Hahaha, I'll help you wrap it too... so, let's go.

2025180006.korean: 이 이상 우르를 너무 오냐오냐하면 혼자선 아무것도 못 하게 돼.
2025180006.english: If you spoil Ur any more than this, he won't be able to do anything on his own.

2025180008.english: Get out of the way! Bio-roids!!

2025180011.english: Did something run past with tremendous force?

2025180012.english: A bioroid I've never seen before…?

2025180016.korean: - 내가 황급히 정비실에서 나오자, 임무에서 돌아온 스트라이커즈와 마주쳤다.
2025180016.english: As I hurriedly left the maintenance room, I ran into the Strikers who had returned from their mission.

2025180018.english: Thank you for your hard work.

2025180019.korean: 저기… 지금 포츈이 타이런트라고 말한 거 같은데…
2025180019.english: Um... I think Fortune just said Tyrant...

2025180020.korean: - 어쨌든 지금은 작아진 타이런트를 붙잡아서 진정시키는 게 우선이다.
2025180020.english: - Anyway, the priority right now is to capture the shrunken Tyrant and calm it down.

2025180023.korean: - 미나의 말에 뭐라 형용할 수 없는 쓴웃음이 나왔다.
2025180023.english: At Mina's words, an indescribable bitter smile escaped my lips.

2025180024.korean: 또 아자즈 씨의 아자아자 하는 계획?… 후훗…! 후후후…!

2025180028.korean: 웃기지 마라…! 나를 이런 모습으로 만들다니……!
2025180028.english: Don't make me laugh…! To think you turned me into this…!

2025180029.korean: 에잇! 원래 몸은 어디에 있는 거냐!
2025180029.english: Damn it! Where is my original body?!

2025180030.english: I don't know much about the inside of the hangar!

2025180032.korean: 윽! 뭐야 이 대기 센서 반응은……!
2025180032.english: Ugh! What is this standby sensor reaction… … !

2025180033.english: Ugh… Is this what they call a 'smell'… …?

2025180034.korean: 하지만, 이 감각을 느끼고 있자니…… 어딘가 알 수 없는 욕망이 자극되는군……
2025180034.english: However, as I feel this sensation… … an inexplicable desire is being stimulated… …

2025180035.english: … … like this, the stomach and neck area… …

2025180037.english: That Azaz bastard… … I will never forgive him… … !!

2025180040.english: … … What’s going on? Is it a sortie?

2025180041.english: No, I came after hearing about it from Fortune.

2025180044.korean: 사령관이 꾼 이상한 꿈 이야기를 듣고 소형 골격을 시제품으로 만들어봤는데, 그게 도움이 될 것 같아서 다행이에요.
2025180044.english: After hearing the story about the strange dream the commander had, I made a prototype of a small skeleton, and I'm glad it seems like it will be helpful.

2025180046.korean: 하지만 무장 관련은 아직 조정 중이니 조금만 더 기다려주세요……
2025180046.english: However, the armament details are still being adjusted, so please wait a little longer…

2025180048.korean: 너는 지금 무슨 이야기를 하고 있는 거지.
2025180048.english: What are you talking about right now?

2025180049.korean: 포츈 씨한테 들었어요. 타이런트 씨가 취미를 즐기고 싶다고요.
2025180049.english: I heard from Fortune that Tyrant wants to enjoy a hobby.

2025180051.korean: 파괴와 살육이죠? 그걸 지금 못 하니까 고민하고 있다고 들었어요.
2025180051.english: Destruction and slaughter, right? I heard you are contemplating it because you can't do that right now.

2025180052.korean: 고민하지 않았다. 나는 단지 포츈에게 대기 시간이 많아졌다고 말했을 뿐이다.
2025180052.english: I didn't hesitate. I simply told Fortune that the waiting time had increased.

2025180054.korean: 그러니까 내게 쓸데없는 짓은 하지 마라.
2025180054.english: So don't do anything useless to me.

2025180059.korean: 우선 코어부터 분리할 테니까, 잠시 잠들어주세요.
2025180059.english: First, I will separate the core, so please go to sleep for a moment.

2025180061.korean: 그래서 정신 차리고 보니 이미 이런 모습이 되어 있었지……!
2025180061.english: So when I came to my senses, I had already turned into this… …!

2025180062.english: On top of that, to look like this even in front of my master… …!

2025180063.english: Damn it! My body…! Where is Azaz…!

2025180074.english: I see. So, that means it's happy.

2025180075.korean: 우우! 취소해라! 나는 전투와 파괴의 화신이다!
2025180075.english: Ooo! Cancel it! I am the embodiment of battle and destruction!

2025180077.english: I understand very well that you are Tyrant.

2025180078.korean: 그 모습은 어쩌다 그렇게 되신 건가요?
2025180078.english: How did you end up looking like that?

2025180080.korean: 그렇군요, 거기까지만 들어도 모든 상황이 이해 됐습니다.
2025180080.english: I see. Just hearing that much, I understand the whole situation.

2025180081.english: So, where were you just about to go?

2025180082.english: It's a hangar. And I was looking for Azaz.

2025180083.english: If it is the hangar, I will guide you.

2025180084.korean: 그래! 그럼 어서 나를 안내하라, 바닐라!
2025180084.english: Alright! Then hurry up and guide me, Vanilla!

2025180085.korean:
하지만, 저는 이제 이 시제품 케이크를 먹을 거라 그 이후에요.  
자, 거기 앉아서 기다려주세요.
2025180085.english:
However, I am going to eat this prototype cake now, so it is after that.
 Now, please sit there and wait.

2025180086.english: What kind of nonsense is that…!

2025180088.korean: 케이크요. 뭐, AGS라면 모를 수도 있겠네요.
2025180088.english: Cake. Well, if it's AGS, they might not know.

2025180089.korean: 케, 케이크 정도는 알고 있다! 나를 바보 취급하지 마라!
2025180089.english: I, I know what a cake is! Don't treat me like a fool!

2025180092.korean: 음. 이번엔 단맛을 좀 더했는데, 정답이었던 것 같네요.
2025180092.english: Hmm. I added a bit more sweetness this time, and I think that was the right choice.

2025180094.english: Why are you acting like this?

2025180095.korean: 그… 말캉말캉한 연약한 게 케이크라는 건가……
2025180095.english: So… that soft, delicate thing is a cake…

2025180096.korean: 맞아요. 이번 기회에 한 번 드셔보실래요?
2025180096.english: That's right. Would you like to try it this time?

2025180097.korean: 아자즈 씨라면, 아마 먹어도 괜찮은 몸으로 만들어놨을 거예요.
2025180097.english: If it were Mr. Azaz, he would probably have made his body safe to eat.

2025180099.english: Yeah, well... just to get a little taste...

2025180103.korean: 우와아아!? 바닐라여! 더, 더, 더 내놔라!
2025180103.english: Whoaah!? Vanilla! Give me more, more, more!

2025180105.english: Delicious? Is this the sensation of deliciousness!

2025180106.english: It's delicious! I said it's delicious!!

2025180109.korean: 음! 음! 다른 종류로 가져와라! 내가 전부 먹어치워 주지!!
2025180109.english: Mmm! Mmm! Bring me a different kind! I'll devour it all!!

2025180110.korean: - 바닐라에게서 '해피를 보호 중입니다'라는 메시지를 받고, 나는 급히 푸드코트로 향했다.
2025180110.english: After receiving a message from Vanilla saying, "I am protecting Happy," I hurriedly headed to the food court.

2025180112.korean: - 그곳엔 양 볼에 케이크 크림을 잔뜩 묻힌 타이런트가 있었다.
2025180112.english: There was a Tyrant there with cake cream smeared all over his cheeks.

2025180113.english: I liked this food called cake!

2025180114.korean: 아자즈는 용서할 수 없지만, 이 몸에 미각 센서를 달아준 건 칭찬해 주마!
2025180114.english: I can't forgive Azaz, but I'll give you credit for attaching a taste sensor to my body!

2025180115.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 타이런트는 쇼트케이크를 작은 입 가득 물었다.
2025180115.english: Saying that, Tyrant took a small mouthful of shortcake.

2025180116.korean: - 그리고 그 맞은편에 앉은 바닐라는 이보다 더할 수 없이 다정한 미소로 타이런트를 바라보고 있었다……
2025180116.english: - And Vanilla, sitting opposite him, was looking at Tyrant with a smile that couldn't have been any sweeter… …

2025180118.korean: 네. 저 큰 몸일 때는 해피를 귀여워할 수 없었으니까요……
2025180118.english: Yes. Because I couldn't find Happy cute when I was that big...

2025180119.korean: - 바닐라는 마키나와 메리가 오르카로 오게 된 그 사건 이후, 타이런트를 애완동물처럼 여기는 경향이 있었지……
2025180119.english: Ever since the incident where Makina and Mary came to Orca, Vanilla tended to treat Tyrant like a pet…

2025180120.korean:
나는 해피가 아니지만, 지금은 케이크를 즐기는 게 더 중요하다!  
넘어가주마! 후하하하하하!
2025180120.english:
I'm not happy, but enjoying the cake is more important right now!
 I'll let you off the hook! Hahahahaha!

2025180121.korean: 이런, 음식 입에 물고 말하지 마세요.
2025180121.english: Oh dear, don't talk with food in your mouth.

2025180123.korean: - 타이런트도 이상하게 바닐라에게 마음을 열고 있었다……
2025180123.english: Tyrant was also strangely opening his heart to Vanilla…

2025180126.korean: 이번 일, 미안하게 됐거든? 설마 이렇게 될 줄은 정말로 몰랐거든……
2025180126.english: I'm really sorry about this. I honestly never imagined it would turn out like this...

2025180127.korean: 설마 아자즈 씨가 타이런트의 소형화된 골격까지 만들었을 줄이야……
2025180127.english: To think Mr. Azaz would even create a miniaturized skeleton of the Tyrant…

2025180128.korean: - 나도 그저 이상한 꿈 이야기를 아자즈에게 했을 뿐인데, 이렇게 될 줄은 몰랐다……
2025180128.english: I just told Azaz about a strange dream, but I never imagined it would turn out like this…

2025180129.english: - No, if it's Azaz, should I have expected that...?

2025180130.korean: - 음, 그래도 '타이런트가 여자아이가 되는 꿈을 꿨어'라고 말한 것만으로 이 사태까지 오게 될 줄 누가 예측할 수 있겠어…?
2025180130.english: - Hmm, still, who could have predicted that just saying "I dreamed that Tyrant turned into a girl" would lead to a situation like this...?

2025180131.english: Even Armand wouldn't have been able to hit it...

2025180132.english: - While I was agonizing over my worries…

2025180133.korean: 뭐라고!? 바로 원래 몸으로는 못 돌아간다고!?
2025180133.english: What!? You're saying I can't go back to my original body right away!?

2025180134.korean: 미안하게 됐거든. 아자즈 씨가 기왕 이렇게 된 김에 오버홀하겠다면서 분해해버렸거든.
2025180134.english: I'm sorry about this. Mr. Azaz said that since things turned out this way, he would overhaul it, so he ended up taking it apart.

2025180136.english: So it's going to take quite a while...

2025180138.korean: 타이런트가 꼭 원한다면, 골격에서 코어를 분리해서 당분간 가상 공간에서 대기하게 할 수도 있지만……
2025180138.english: If the Tyrant really wants it, we could separate the core from the skeleton and have it wait in a virtual space for the time being, but…

2025180140.korean: 괜찮잖아요 해피. 당분간은 그 몸으로 지내보는 게 어때요?
2025180140.english: It's fine, Happy. How about you try living in that body for a while?

2025180142.korean: 다른 케이크들을 맛 보지 않아도 괜찮겠어요?
2025180142.english: Would it be okay if I didn't taste the other cakes?

2025180144.korean:
물론, 케이크 말고도 여러 가지 과자들이 있어요.
이곳엔 과자 만들기 전문가 아우로라 씨도 있으니, 부탁하면 뭐든지 만들어줄 수 있을 거예요.
2025180144.english:
Of course, there are various snacks besides cake.
 Ms. Aurora, a cookie-making expert, is here too, so if you ask her, she can make anything for you.

2025180146.korean: 물론이죠. 맛없을 건 안 나올 거예요.
2025180146.english: Of course. Nothing bad will come out.

2025180150.korean: 원래 몸으로 돌아갈 때까진, 이 몸으로 있어 주지……
2025180150.english: I'll stay in this body until I return to my original body...

2025180151.korean: 후훗. 고마워! 타이런트! 언니가 빠르게 오버홀 끝낼 거거든!
2025180151.english: Hehe. Thanks, Tyrant! I'm going to finish the overhaul quickly!

2025180152.korean: 단! 매일 다른 맛있는 걸 나에게 바치도록! 알겠지!
2025180152.english: But! Offer me something different and delicious every day! Got it!

2025180153.korean: 마음대로 이야기를 진행시켜 버렸지만, 괜찮으신가요? 주인님.
2025180153.english: I proceeded with the conversation as I pleased, but is that alright, Master?

2025180155.korean: 뭐, 뭐어… 주인님과 저의 해피를 위해서니까요……
2025180155.english: Well, well... it's for the happiness of my Master and me...

2025180157.korean: - 그 미소를 보니, 마키나에게 보여졌던 환상의 기억이 조금 떠올라 그리워졌다.
2025180157.english: Seeing that smile, I recalled a memory of the fantasy I saw in Makina a little, and I felt a sense of longing.

2025180160.english: I'd like to explain it to you, but... for now, later...

2025180164.korean: 뭐, 그건 나도 잘못한 게 있는 것 같아서……
2025180164.english: Well, I think I might have done something wrong too...

2025180165.korean: 나도 본인의 의사를 확실히 확인하라고 말해둘게…
2025180165.english: I'll also tell you to make sure you confirm their intentions clearly...

2025180166.english: Yeah, I'll tell Sowon and her group.

2025180167.english: No, I'm the one who should be thanking you, Vanilla.

2025190001.korean: - 타이런트 해피화 사건 며칠 후, 로크는 일본으로 출발했다.
2025190001.english: A few days after the Tyrant Happy incident, Locke departed for Japan.

2025190002.korean: - 타이런트 본체의 오버홀도 아자즈와 포츈이 약속대로 서둘러 마무리했지만…
2025190002.english: Azaz and Fortune hurriedly finished the overhaul of the Tyrant's main body as promised, but...

2025190005.korean: 오늘의 디저트는 자허토르테입니다. 초콜릿 케이크처럼 보이지만, 며칠 전에 드셨던 것과는 식감이 또 달라서 아주 맛있답니다.
2025190005.english: Today's dessert is Sachertorte. It looks like a chocolate cake, but the texture is different from the one you had a few days ago, so it is very delicious.

2025190008.english: It doesn't matter which way it is! Yawn!

2025190010.english: Delicious! This is delicious too! Vanilla!

2025190011.korean: - 처음엔 그렇게나 원래 몸으로 돌아가고 싶어 하던 해피였지만, 아우로라의 디저트가 상당히 마음에 들었던 모양인지, 이것저것 핑계를 대며 본래 모습으로 돌아가는 걸 미루고 있다.
2025190011.english: At first, Happy was so eager to return to his original body, but perhaps because he really liked Aurora's dessert, he is making various excuses and delaying his return to his original form.

2025190012.english: She says she will make a fruit tart tomorrow.

2025190013.korean: - 그리고 바닐라는 그런 해피를 마치 작은 동물처럼 계속 귀여워하고 있다.
2025190013.english: And Vanilla continues to adore Happy, treating him like a little animal.

2025190014.korean: 과일 타르트! 음! 이름만 들어도 맛있을 것 같군!
2025190014.english: Fruit tart! Hmm! Just hearing the name makes it sound delicious!

2025190015.english: I'm looking forward to tomorrow! Hahaha!

2025190016.korean: 해피, 입에 음식 넣은 채로 크게 웃는 건 예의가 아니랍니다.
2025190016.english: Happy, it is not polite to laugh loudly with food in your mouth.

2025190018.korean: - 덧붙이자면, 이제는 ‘해피’라고 불러도 화내지 않게 되었다.
2025190018.english: In addition, he no longer gets angry when called 'Happy'.

2025190020.korean: 저건 타이런트입니다요. 오버홀 관련해서 일시적으로 저 소체를 사용하고 있다고 들었습죠.
2025190020.english: That is a Tyrant. I heard that they are temporarily using that body for the overhaul.

2025190021.korean: 타이런트를 설계한 A.I. 관련자로서, 묘한 기분이 드네요.
2025190021.english: As an AI professional who designed Tyrant, I have a strange feeling.

2025190022.korean:
오랜만에 만난 혈연이, 어느새 어른이 되어 있었다고나 할까 뭐랄까…
지금 같은 경우엔 작아졌지만…
2025190022.english:
It was as if the blood relative I met after a long time had grown up before I knew it... how should I put it...
 In this case, it has become smaller, but...

2025190023.korean: 뭐, 제 안엔 혈액이 흐르진 않지만요!
2025190023.english: Well, I don't have blood flowing inside me, though!

2025190025.korean: 어, 당신… 인간형에 가까운 소체는 미형상 좋지 않다 말하지 않았었나요?
2025190025.english: Uh, you… didn’t you say that a body close to a humanoid form isn’t aesthetically pleasing?

2025190026.korean: 뭐, 분명 그렇게 말하긴 했다네. 하지만 생각해 보게나...
2025190026.english: Well, I certainly did say that. But think about it...

2025190027.korean: 저 타이런트가 소형화되어, 작은 동물처럼 케이크를 먹고 있다니 흥미로울 수밖에 없지 않겠나.
2025190027.english: Isn't it bound to be interesting that that Tyrant has been miniaturized and is eating cake like a small animal?

2025190028.korean: 원래의 타이런트라면 절대 볼 수 없을 장면일 걸세.
2025190028.english: It’s a scene the original Tyrant would never have seen.

2025190030.korean: 타이런트 낭자가 저 소체에 완전히 익숙해진 이후에 원래의 몸으로 돌아갔을 때, 어떤 심경과 행동의 변화를 보여 줄지… 정말 궁금하군.
2025190030.english: I am really curious to see what kind of changes in her feelings and behavior will be shown when Lady Tyrant returns to her original body after she has completely gotten used to that body...

2025190031.korean:
폭군의 모습으로 작은 몸일 때의 버릇이 나와버린다거나… 케이크를 먹고 싶어한다거나…  
오오, 상상만 해도 흥분되는군!
2025190031.english:
Like when he takes on the tyrant form and his habits from when he was small come out... or when he wants to eat cake...
 Oh, just imagining it makes me excited!

2025190032.korean: 저기… 당신 꽤 기분 나쁜 말 하고 있는 거 아세요? 이러다 또 영창 가십니다요?
2025190032.english: Hey... do you realize you're saying something pretty offensive? You're going to end up in the brig again at this rate.

2025190033.korean: 오르카는 어째서 AGS의 사랑에 있어서 이리도 박절한 것인지…
2025190033.english: Why is Orca so heartless when it comes to AGS's love...

2025190034.korean:
어쨌거나 낭자가 원래 모습으로 돌아가는 순간을 내 눈으로 꼭 지켜보고 싶군.
계속해서 타이런트 낭자를 관찰해 봐야겠네.
2025190034.english:
Anyway, I really want to see the moment the young lady returns to her original form with my own eyes.
 I'll have to keep an eye on Lady Tyrant.

2025190035.korean: 우선은 포츈 낭자에게 소체 교체 일정을 물으러 가야겠군.
2025190035.english: First, I guess I should go ask Miss Fortune about the body replacement schedule.

2025190036.english: Satgat, cut off the power supply for just 4 hours.

2025190037.korean: 아무리 그래도 친구가 또 체포되는 건 보고 싶지 않으니, 위험해지면 막아드리는 시늉 정도는 해드립죠.
2025190037.english: Even so, I don't want to see my friend arrested again, so if things get dangerous, I'll at least pretend to protect him.

2025190038.korean: 알프레드… 사식으로 전지를 준비하고 있을 네 미래가 보인다.
2025190038.english: Alfred… I can see your future where you are preparing batteries as a private meal.

2025190039.korean: - 나는 저녁을 먹은 뒤, 소화를 겸해 게임센터에 가보기로 했다.
2025190039.english: After dinner, I decided to go to the game center to help with digestion.

2025190040.korean: - 세인트 오르카 회수 작전은 무사히 진행 중……
2025190040.english: - The Saint Orca recovery operation is proceeding safely…

2025190041.korean: - 로크로부터의 정기 연락도 제대로 오고 있고, 오늘은 비교적 평화로운 하루였다.
2025190041.english: Regular contact from Locke was coming in properly, and today was a relatively peaceful day.

2025190042.english: As I looked around the shop…

2025190045.korean: - 게임센터 소파에 티아멧와 우르가 나란히 앉아 있었다.
2025190045.english: Tiamat and Ur were sitting side by side on the game center sofa.

2025190046.korean: 네. 오늘은 비번이라, 다 같이 놀러 왔어요.
2025190046.english: Yes. I have the day off today, so we all came over to hang out.

2025190047.korean:
지금 노래방 방이 비는걸 기다리고 있어.  
오늘은 좀 붐비는 것 같아.
2025190047.english:
I'm waiting for a karaoke room to become available right now.
 It seems a bit crowded today.

2025190048.korean: 미나랑 머큐리는 저기서 다른 게임하고 있어요.
2025190048.english: Mina and Mercury are playing a different game over there.

2025190049.korean: - 티아멧의 시선 끝에는 슈팅 게임을 하고 있는 미나 일행이 있었다.
2025190049.english: At the end of Tiamat's gaze were Mina and her group playing a shooting game.

2025190050.korean: 처음엔 뒤에서 게임하는 거 구경하고 있었는데, 그게 벌써 30분 째라… 잠깐 여기서 쉬는 중이야.
2025190050.english: At first, I was watching them play a game from behind, but it's already been 30 minutes... so I'm taking a break here for a bit.

2025190051.korean: 게다가 계속 안경 쓰고 있어서 그런가 눈이 엄청 피곤해.
2025190051.english: Besides, my eyes are really tired, maybe because I've been wearing glasses all the time.

2025190053.korean: 그렇군요. 그럼 이제 일은 끝난 거죠?
2025190053.english: I see. So, the work is finished now?

2025190054.english: … In that case, do you want to go to karaoke with us?

2025190055.korean: - 노래방이라… 그러고 보니 최근 들어 가 본 적이 없구나.
2025190055.english: - A karaoke room... Come to think of it, I haven't been in one recently.

2025190057.korean: 딱히 다른 바쁜 일 있는 것 처럼 보이지도 않고…
2025190057.english: They don't seem like they have anything else they're busy with, either...

2025190059.korean: 그래도 당장 빈 방이 없어서 기다려야 하지만…
2025190059.english: Still, there are no vacant rooms right now, so I have to wait...

2025190062.korean: 뭐랄까… 기쁘긴 한데… 갑자기 엄청 긴장되네요.
2025190062.english: How should I put it... I'm happy, but... I'm suddenly super nervous.

2025190063.english: Do you want to sit next to me and wait?

2025190064.korean: - 우르가 살짝 티아멧 쪽으로 몸을 기울이며, 빈 자리를 툭툭 두드렸다.
2025190064.english: Ur leaned slightly toward Tiamat and tapped the empty spot.

2025190065.korean: - 잠시 셋이서 담소를 나누며 기다리고 있자, 게임을 마친 미나 일행이 이쪽으로 다가왔다.
2025190065.english: As the three of us waited while chatting for a moment, Mina and her group, having finished their game, approached us.

2025190067.korean: 무슨 일이죠!? 셋이서 나란히 앉아 있다니…
2025190067.english: What's going on!? I can't believe the three of you are sitting side by side…

2025190073.english: I'm really looking forward to it!

2025190074.english: This situation has become quite serious...

2025190075.korean: 목소리를 잘 내게 해준다는 자이언트래빗을 준비하는 게 좋겠사와요…!
2025190075.english: You should prepare a Giant Rabbit, which is said to help you sing well…!

2025190077.korean:
접수번호 562번 고객님, 방이 준비되었습니다.  
카운터로 와주시기 바랍니다.
2025190077.english:
Customer No. 562, your room is ready.
 Please come to the counter.

2025190079.korean:
시, 시간이 없사와요.  
대안으로 니바 씨나 카페 아모르의 바니걸 아무라도...
2025190079.english:
Oh, I don't have time.
 As an alternative, anyone like Ms. Niva or the bunny girl from Cafe Amor...

2025190081.korean: - 그 후, 우리는 안내받은 방으로 가서……
2025190081.english: After that, we went to the room we were guided to…

2025190084.english: Our Story That We Fill Up~♪

2025190087.korean:
- 언제나 활기찬 미나는 차분한 노래를 불렀고,
다정한 티아멧은 뜻밖에도 록 스타일의 노래를 불렀다.
2025190087.english:
- Always energetic Mina sang a calm song, and
 The affectionate Tiamat unexpectedly sang a rock-style song.

2025190088.korean:
- 그리고 머큐리가 옛날 가요를 불러서 놀랐고……
우르는 멋지게 랩을 부르는 등…...
2025190088.english:
And I was surprised that Mercury sang an old song… …
 Ur sings cool raps, etc…

2025190089.korean: - 전혀 몰랐던 그녀들의 모습을 알게 되었다.
2025190089.english: I came to know a side of them I never knew existed.

2025190090.english: I wonder if there's anything fun going to happen...

2025190091.english: Hi, Tiamat, Ur. That's a rare combination, isn't it?

2025190092.english: Come to think of it, what about Mina and Mercury?

2025190093.korean: 소화도 시킬 겸 뭔가 해볼까 해서.
2025190093.english: I thought I'd try something to help with digestion.

2025190094.english: Then… may I butt in for a moment?

2025190095.korean: 좋아. 마침 모두의 노래도 들어보고 싶었으니까.
2025190095.english: Okay. I wanted to hear everyone's songs anyway.

2025190097.english: I'm going to join the karaoke too.

2025190099.english: I'm looking forward to it too.

2025200003.korean: 마법소녀도 적이든 아군이든 상관없이 집결해 있어.
2025200003.english: Magical girls are also gathered together, regardless of whether they are enemies or allies.

2025200004.korean: 저건…… 야마토 & 블레이드의 주인공, 야마토 히나카입니다.
2025200004.english: That is… … the protagonist of Yamato & Blade, Yamato Hinaka.

2025200005.korean:
저쪽에는 각종 전대의 리더들과 악역들……
아탈란테와 다른 멤버들도! 보기 드문 관경에 달아오르네요!
2025200005.english:
Over there are leaders of various previous generations and villains…
 Atalante and the other members too! They are getting excited by this rare sight!

2025200007.korean: 전쟁이 시작된 이후로 덴세츠도 여러모로 느슨해졌잖아요. 그래서 요즘은 덴세츠 작품을 보며 쉬는 게 일과가 되었어요…
2025200007.english: Since the war started, Dentsetsu has loosened up in many ways, hasn't it? So these days, relaxing by watching Dentsetsu works has become my daily routine...

2025200008.english: Would you like to watch it with me, too?

2025200009.korean: 전쟁, 만만하지 않아, 잘 수 있을 때 자는 게 제일.
2025200009.english: War is not easy, so it's best to sleep while you can.

2025200010.english: Ugh... I heard the right thing...

2025200011.english: Still, sometimes, it might not be bad.

2025200013.english: Let's watch it together after today's operation is over!

2025200015.korean: 바이오로이드 상태는 완벽하게 해둬! 모두가 돌격하는 장면은 분명 최고의 장면이 될 테니까!
2025200015.english: Make sure the bioroids are in perfect condition! The scene where everyone charges in will definitely be the best scene!

2025200016.korean: 한 번에 촬영할 거다. 누구 한 명이라도 뒤쳐지면 안 돼!
2025200016.english: We're going to film it in one take. No one can fall behind!

2025200018.korean: 카메라 드론은 있는 대로 전부 사용해! 어떤 캐릭터도 빠짐없이 찍히도록 대기시켜!
2025200018.english: Use every camera drone you have! Keep them on standby to ensure every single character is captured!

2025200020.korean: 이 녀석들…… 정말 전부 영화 촬영이라고밖에 생각하지 않는구나……
2025200020.english: These guys... they really seem to think it's nothing but a movie shoot...

2025200021.korean:
전쟁을 하고 있다는 분위기를…… 전혀 느낄 수가 없어.
광기다……
2025200021.english:
I can't feel the atmosphere of a war at all.
 It's madness...

2025200022.korean: 이번 작전에는 자위대 병력도 투입된다고 들었습니다.
2025200022.english: I heard that Self-Defense Forces troops will also be deployed in this operation.

2025200023.korean: 덴세츠 측도 역시 이기려는 마음으로 싸우고 있다고는 생각하지만요.
2025200023.english: I do think the Densetsu side is also fighting with the will to win, though.

2025200024.korean:
뭐, 이기고 싶긴 하겠지… 
하지만 이 자식들에겐… 승리보다도 ‘좋은 그림’이… 우선일테니 말이오.
2025200024.english:
Well, I suppose they would want to win...
 But for these guys… a 'good picture'… would be more important than victory, you know.

2025200025.english: Maybe that's why... I can't stand the anxiety.

2025200027.korean:
미안하네... 이제 와 그대를 불안하게 해봤자 아무 의미도 없을 터.  
안심하시게나... 무슨 일이 있어도… 그대들은 이 몸이 지키겠네.
2025200027.english:
I'm sorry... It would be meaningless to make you anxious now.
 Rest assured... no matter what happens... I will protect you.

2025200028.korean:
감사합니다. 쿠노이치로서는 실격일지도 모르지만,
초대님이 계셔 주시니 정말 든든합니다……
2025200028.english:
Thank you. I might be disqualified as a kunoichi, but
 I feel so reassured having you here, Invitation...

2025200029.korean: 만약 제게 무슨 일이 있더라도, 스미레와 하츠나는 분명 괜찮을 거라는 확신을 가지고 싸울 수 있어요.
2025200029.english: I can fight with the conviction that even if something happens to me, Sumire and Hatsuna will definitely be fine.

2025200030.korean:
미련한 소리 하지 말게! 그대들을 지키겠다고 했잖느냐.  
…오우카, 그대도 죽게 두지 않겠소.
2025200030.english:
Don't talk nonsense! Didn't I say I would protect you?
 … Ouka, I won't let you die either.

2025200031.korean: 더는 그대들을… 잃고 싶지 않소외다… 설령 이 세계가 끝나더라도.
2025200031.english: I don't want to lose you all anymore... even if this world ends.

2025200033.korean: 그렇다면, 저도 전력을 다해 초대님을 지켜야 하겠군요.
2025200033.english: In that case, I suppose I must also do my utmost to protect you, Invitation.

2025200034.english: Let's protect each other and make sure we survive.

2025200036.korean: 철충의 둥지에 대한 일제 포격과 폭격이 끝났다.
2025200036.english: The simultaneous shelling and bombing of the Iron蟲's nest has ended.

2025200040.korean: 제일 먼저 창을 꽂는 영광은 내가 받겠다!!!
2025200040.english: I will have the honor of being the first to plant the spear!!!

2025200043.korean: 이번 전투는 난전이외다. 질서건 뭐건 아무것도 없지.
2025200043.english: This battle is nothing but a chaotic free-for-all. There is no order or anything like that.

2025200044.english: The fact that you are dying in a battle like this is…

2025200050.korean: 우리 부대는 지형을 활용하며 한 마리씩 확실하게 처치해간다!
2025200050.english: Our unit utilizes the terrain to take them down one by one!

2025200051.korean: 서두르지 마! 진형을 유지하면서 적을 끌어들여라!
2025200051.english: Don't rush! Maintain your formation and lure the enemy in!

2025200052.korean: 아르망 추기경! 이 전장에서 가장 강력한 적을 찾아주세요!
2025200052.english: Cardinal Armand! Please find the most powerful enemy on this battlefield!

2025200053.korean: 총사대장, 혼자 돌진하지 마세요! 지원이 불가능해집니다!
2025200053.english: Captain of the Musketeers, don't charge in alone! Support will become impossible!

2025200054.korean: 이래 봬도 당신에게 맞춰드리고 있어요! 무리라도 한계라도 따라오세요!
2025200054.english: Believe it or not, I'm tailoring my approach to you! Please follow along, even if it's too much or pushes you to the limit!

2025200055.korean: 제가 강한 적을 쓰러뜨리면, 그만큼 여러분이 안전하게 싸울 수 있습니다!
2025200055.english: If I defeat a strong enemy, you can fight that much more safely!

2025200056.korean: 말하지 않아도…… 당신이 그런 생각을 하고 있다는 건 잘 알고 있어요……!
2025200056.english: Even without you saying it… I know very well that you are thinking that…!

2025200057.korean: 하지만…… 이 싸움은 당신이 아무리 분투해도……
2025200057.english: But… … no matter how hard you struggle in this fight… …

2025200060.korean: 저 개체입니다! 저 녀석이 이 전장에서 가장 강력한 철충으로 판단됩니다!
2025200060.english: That is the one! That fellow is judged to be the most powerful Iron Bug on this battlefield!

2025200063.korean: 지금! 필살의~! 매지컬! 샤이닝 회전 베기!
2025200063.english: Now! The Ultimate~! Magical! Shining Spinning Slash!

2025200067.english: Ugh! I managed to block it somehow...

2025200069.korean: 조심해, 아까 화염 마법으로 수가 줄었다고 생각했는데 전혀 줄지 않았어!
2025200069.english: Watch out! I thought the number had decreased with the fire magic earlier, but it hasn't decreased at all!

2025200070.korean: 분명 저 마물한테는 효과가 약한 거야!
2025200070.english: It's definitely not effective against that monster!

2025200072.korean: 어쨌든, 여기만 벗어나면 이 싸움도 희망이 보일 거야! 반드시 이기자!
2025200072.english: Anyway, once we get out of here, there will be hope for this fight! Let's win for sure!

2025200074.korean: 그렇다면…… 모모! 주위 마물을 합체 마법으로 쓸어버려!
2025200074.english: In that case… … Momo! Wipe out the surrounding monsters with fusion magic!

2025200076.english: Staff of the God of Magic, answer our wish!

2025200077.korean: PD! 모모로부터 매지컬 유성우 승인 요청이 들어왔습니다!
2025200077.english: PD! We have received a request from Momo to approve the Magical Meteor Shower!

2025200078.english: There are no humans around, right?

2025200079.english: It's only the Self-Defense Forces' bioroids!

2025200080.korean: 좋아! 매지컬 유성우, 승인! 마이크로 미사일 발사 준비!
2025200080.english: Alright! Magical Meteor Shower, approved! Micro Missile launch preparations!

2025200082.english: Oh Moon! Give us strength!! Magical!!!

2025200087.english: Ugh... No matter how many I defeat, they just won't decrease...

2025200088.korean: 아까의 공격으로 철충의 둥지, 부수지 못했어…
2025200088.english: I couldn't destroy the Iron蟲 nest with the attack earlier...

2025200090.korean: ……그런 것 같네…… 평소에 싸우던 철충보다 더 난폭해……
2025200090.english: … … It seems so… … They are more violent than the Iron蟲 we usually fight… …

2025200092.korean: 방심하고 있으면 적뿐만 아니라 아군의 유탄에도 맞을 수 있어요!
2025200092.english: If you let your guard down, you could get hit not only by enemy grenades but also by friendly fire!

2025200094.korean: 적, 저 지하철 입구에서 계속 나오고 있어……
2025200094.english: The enemy keeps coming out of that subway entrance…

2025200095.english: I know, right... If we stay here like this, we'll be surrounded.

2025200096.english: We'll break through here for the sake of movement as well.

2025210001.korean: 이봐, 철충이 전혀 줄지 않잖아! 어떻게 된 거야!
2025210001.english: Hey, the Iron Bugs aren't decreasing at all! What's going on!

2025210003.korean: 지원 공격을 요청해, 여기서 이기지 못하면 의미가 없어!
2025210003.english: Request backup! It’s meaningless if we don’t win here!

2025210005.korean: 젠장… 벌써 이 임시 지휘소까지 전투 소음이 가까워지고 있어…
2025210005.english: Damn it… the noise of battle is already getting closer to this makeshift command post…

2025210006.korean: 일단 여기서 이동하자. 우리가 이런 데서 허무하게 죽으면 아무런 의미 없어!
2025210006.english: Let's move on from here for now. It would be meaningless if we died pointlessly in a place like this!

2025210007.english: Everyone, move to the Densetsu Headquarters Building—

2025210008.english: What… did you say the command post was taken…!?

2025210011.english: It appears that... everyone has been killed in action...

2025210012.korean: 지휘 계통은…… 지금 어떻게 되어 있소이까?
2025210012.english: What is the chain of command… right now?

2025210013.korean: 모르겠습니다. 아마 통신 중계도 끊긴 영향으로 지시가 오지 않고 있습니다……
2025210013.english: I don't know. It seems that instructions are not coming in, likely due to the communication relay being cut off...

2025210014.korean: 코노하… 그대는… 하가네와 함께 이 상황을… 본사에 알리러 가시게나.
2025210014.english: Konoha… you… go with Hagane to… report this situation… to headquarters.

2025210015.korean: 이 몸은 만일을 대비해…… 전장에 있는 모두를…… 철수시키겠소.
2025210015.english: Just in case… I will… withdraw everyone on the battlefield.

2025210016.korean:
장식뿐인 장수마저 사라졌다면… 더 이상 승리는 불가능하오.  
…싸워봤자 의미 없지.
2025210016.english:
If even the general who was merely for show has disappeared… victory is no longer possible.
 … It’s pointless to fight.

2025210019.korean: 레이… 들었지?… 이 사실을 전파하고…… 아군을 철수시키게나!
2025210019.english: Ray… did you hear that?… Spread the word… … and withdraw our forces!

2025210023.korean: 이젠 던질 것도 얼마 남지 않았네…
2025210023.english: There isn't much left to throw now...

2025210025.english: This... ... I don't know what to do... ...

2025210028.english: The temporary command post has been attacked… Make sure to withdraw.

2025210030.korean: 아니… 이 몸의 판단이오... 지금 대신 지휘할 자도 없소.
2025210030.english: No... it is my own judgment... and there is no one to take my place right now.

2025210031.korean: 이대로 싸워봤자… 의미 없이 죽을 뿐이야.
2025210031.english: Fighting like this... we'll just die meaninglessly.

2025210032.korean: 이 몸은 그대들을 잃고 싶지 않다… 가자꾸나.
2025210032.english: I do not want to lose you all... Let's go.

2025210037.english: Ugh... Did I let my guard down...

2025210039.korean: 스미레…… 배를…… 하지만… 괜찮다, 이 정도면… 수복실로 데려가면 치료할 수 있을 걸세.
2025210039.english: Sumire… … her stomach… … but… it’s alright. With this condition… we should be able to treat it if we take her to the recovery room.

2025210040.english: Rest assured... I will take you.

2025210041.english: No, Mr. Invitation, I will take you.

2025210042.english: Invitation, please ask others to apply.

2025210044.english: I understand... Please... do not let your guard down, everyone...

2025210046.korean: 어머니, 스승님… 괜찮아요, 저도 함께 있어요.
2025210046.english: Mother, Master... It's okay, I'm with you too.

2025210051.korean: 이런 싸움으로…… 누구도 죽어서는 아니 된다...
2025210051.english: No one must die in a fight like this...

2025210052.korean: - 이날의 패배로 인해 덴세츠는 막대한 전력을 잃었다.
2025210052.english: - Due to the defeat on this day, Densetsu lost a massive amount of strength.

2025210053.korean: - 그리고 철충의 공세는 더욱 격화되며, 도쿄 함락은 급격히 속도를 붙이게 된다.
2025210053.english: And as the Iron蟲's offensive intensifies further, the fall of Tokyo accelerates rapidly.

2025220001.korean: 후우… 참 손이 많이 가는 제자들이었구려.
2025220001.english: Phew... They were quite the high-maintenance disciples.

2025220003.english: I am by nature a recluse…

2025220004.korean:
이미 세상을 떠난 자와 다름없지.
앞으로의 세상에 이 몸 같은 유령은 필요 없소외다.
2025220004.english:
He is no different from someone who has already passed away.
 The world ahead will not need a ghost like me.

2025220005.korean: 앞으로의 미래는 그대들이 스스로 개척하고, 살아가시오.
2025220005.english: You yourselves must pioneer your own future and live your lives.

2025220006.korean: 츠키카게류도 멸했소외다. 이제 정말 미련은 없소……
2025220006.english: The Tsukikage-ryu has also perished. Now, I truly have no regrets…

2025220013.korean: 시덴 촬영 종료, 상태 확인 후 회수 바람. 오버.
2025220013.english: Shiden recording finished. Please check the status and retrieve. Over.

2025220014.korean: 요시미츠 감독님! 제로 팀 쪽 확인 부탁드립니다!
2025220014.english: Director Yoshimitsu! Please check with the Zero Team!

2025220015.korean: 거기! 그 건물 다시 지을 거니까, 청소 안 해도 돼!
2025220015.english: Hey there! We're going to rebuild that building, so you don't have to clean it!

2025220017.korean: 다음 촬영 지시가 있을 때까지 대기해줘.
2025220017.english: Please wait until the next shooting instructions are given.

2025220022.korean: 정말 대단하네, 그렇게나 격렬한 전투였는데 상처 하나 없다니.
2025220022.english: That's amazing. To think you didn't get a single scratch after such a fierce battle.

2025220023.korean: 이 몸은 ‘시간질주의 술’을 쓰니까, 이 몸에게는 모든 게 마치 멈춰 있는 것처럼 보인다오.
2025220023.english: Since I use the 'Time-Running Technique,' everything appears to me as if it has stopped.

2025220024.korean: 에이, 멈춰 있는 것처럼 보인다니 과장이 너무 심한 거 아니야? 겨우 1.3배잖아.
2025220024.english: Hey, isn't it a bit of an exaggeration to say it looks like it's standing still? It's only 1.3 times.

2025220025.english: You wouldn't know unless you experienced it firsthand.

2025220027.korean: AD, 시덴한테 별 이상 없어 보이면 기억 포맷 작업에 넘겨둬.
2025220027.english: AD, if Shiden doesn't look like he has any issues, hand him over to the memory formatting process.

2025220029.english: Did you hear that? Let's go to the treatment room.

2025220031.english: I'm sorry to call you when you must be busy with filming.

2025220032.korean:
아니야 아니야, 괜찮아.
우리 기술책임자 양반이 날 찾다니 좀처럼 경험하기 드문 일이니까.
2025220032.english:
No, no, it's okay.
 It’s a rare experience for our Chief Technology Officer to look for me.

2025220033.korean: 그래, 상담하고 싶은 게 있다면서... 무슨 일인데?
2025220033.english: Right, you said you wanted to talk about something... What is it?

2025220037.korean: 시간 인식 확장이 뇌의 기억을 관장하는 부분까지 영향을 주고 있는 것 같아.
2025220037.english: It seems like the expansion of time perception is affecting even the part of the brain that governs memory.

2025220038.korean: 억지로 지우려 하면 쓸 수 없게 돼버리니…
2025220038.english: If you try to force it out, it becomes unusable...

2025220039.korean: 뭐야, 고작 그런 것 때문에 날 부른 거야?
2025220039.english: What? You called me just for something like that?

2025220040.english: "Just a little"? That's quite a serious problem.

2025220041.english: You can just make one more.

2025220042.korean: 하나 더라니 쉽게 말하네, 시덴 하나 만드는 데도 꽤 큰돈 들었었잖아?
2025220042.english: You're talking so lightly about one more. Didn't it cost quite a lot of money just to make one Shiden?

2025220043.english: Because I can't compromise on quality.

2025220045.korean: 뭐, 사장인 네가 대수롭지 않게 생각한다면야 난 상관없지만…
2025220045.english: Well, if you, the boss, don't think much of it, then I don't care...

2025220046.korean: 하하, 예산 걱정은 말라고. 그건 내가 해결해야 할 문제니까.
2025220046.english: Haha, don't worry about the budget. That's my problem to solve.

2025220047.korean: 우리 나리께서는 아무 생각 말고 최고의 테크놀로지 재현에만 궁리해 달라고.
2025220047.english: I asked our lord to think about nothing but devise a plan to recreate the best technology.

2025220048.korean: 네 실력은 누구보다 내가 믿고 있으니까.
2025220048.english: Because I believe in your skills more than anyone else.

2025220049.korean: 참나, 넌 정말 사람을 끌어당기는 재주가 있단 말이지.
2025220049.english: Good heavens, you really have a knack for attracting people.

2025220052.korean: 뭐, 어쨌든 간에 하나 더 만들어 둬. 다음 루트 촬영도 곧 시작될 테니까.
2025220052.english: Well, anyway, make one more. Filming for the next route will start soon, after all.

2025220054.korean: 그럼 지금 저 시덴은 어떻게 하지?
2025220054.english: Then what should we do with that Shiden now?

2025220055.korean:
지금 당장은 상태가 괜찮을 것 같은데 당분간 대기시켜.
언젠가 영업부 쪽에서라도 프로모션 용으로 쓸 일이 있겠지.
2025220055.english:
It seems like it will be fine for now, but keep it on standby for the time being.
 Someday, the sales department will probably use it for promotional purposes.

2025220056.korean: 시덴, 고생했다. 덕분에 좋은 컷을 많이 찍을 수 있었다.
2025220056.english: Shiden, you worked hard. Thanks to you, we were able to take a lot of good shots.

2025220057.korean: ……이 몸은 해야 할 일을 했을 뿐이외다.
2025220057.english: … … I have merely done what I had to do.

2025220058.korean: 나도 해야 할 말을 했을 뿐이다. 그럼 가보마.
2025220058.english: I just said what I had to say. Well then, I'll be going.

2025220060.english: What is the 'next route' that guy mentioned?

2025220062.korean: 그리고… 너는 이제 몰라도 되는 일이다.
2025220062.english: And… it is something you don’t need to know anymore.

2025220063.english:
Good job, Shiden.
 Enter sleep mode.

2025220066.korean: 후우…… 드디어 B루트의 최종 결전까지 도달했네요……
2025220066.english: Phew... I've finally reached the final battle of Route B...

2025220068.english: I know, right? I'd say progress was a bit slow...

2025220069.english: I guess you could say we literally struggled in the battle...

2025220070.korean: 결국 교전을 피한 탓에 성에서 기다리고 있는 적 수가 늘어나버렸고 말이지.
2025220070.english: In the end, because we avoided combat, the number of enemies waiting in the castle increased.

2025220073.korean: 이걸로 여섯 번째인가…… 도대체 얼마나 더 기다리고 있는 건가……
2025220073.english: Is this the sixth time... Just how much longer am I supposed to wait...

2025220074.korean: 힘내시게나, 이제 거의 꼭대기 층이지 않소이까…
2025220074.english: Cheer up, we're almost at the top floor now, aren't we?

2025220075.korean: 적도 이제 얼마 남아 있지 않을 터이고...
2025220075.english: There shouldn't be much left of the equator now...

2025220076.english: The guy I just defeated was also Tsukikage-ryu's number 2, so...

2025220077.english: Now all that remains is Tengetsu or the Shogun…

2025220078.english: And it must just be Ouka who was being manipulated…

2025220081.english: If that fellow shows up, you'd better be prepared...

2025220082.english: I wouldn't want to fight if possible, but...

2025220083.english: Yeah... I don't like it with my mother.

2025220084.korean: 그렇구려, 그럼 그때는 이 몸이 어떻게든 해보겠소이다.
2025220084.english: I see. Then, I will make sure to handle it somehow at that time.

2025220085.english: Now, have you caught your breath enough?

2025220090.english: Move aside, I will cut the door.

2025220097.korean: 오우카, 들으시오. 우리는 그대와 싸우고 싶지 않소외다…
2025220097.english: Ouka, listen. We do not want to fight you...

2025220099.english: I guess that would be difficult.

2025220101.english: So you're saying we have no choice but to fight in the end...

2025220102.korean:
그렇겠네요.
하지만 아무리 저라도 세 사람을 동시에 상대하는 건 조금 어려울지도 모르겠군요…
2025220102.english:
I suppose so.
 However, even for me, taking on three people at once might be a bit difficult…

2025220103.korean: 걱정 마시오. 그대의 상대는 이 몸 한 명뿐이외다.
2025220103.english: Do not worry. I am your only opponent.

2025220105.korean: 오우카는 이 몸이 맡겠네. 그대들에겐 버거울 것이외다.
2025220105.english: I will take charge of Ouka. It will be too much for you.

2025220108.english: Did you think I would just let it happen?

2025220111.english: To think you dodged my technique… … Hahaha… …

2025220112.korean: 자, 그대들은 어서 가시오! 이 몸이 질 리 없지 않소이까!
2025220112.english: Now, you all go! There is no way I could lose!

2025220113.korean: 흥, 텐게츠 그 자는 큰 실수를 했구려…
2025220113.english: Hmph, that Tengetsu made a big mistake...

2025220114.korean: 그건… 그대 기억 속에서 이 몸에 대한 것까지 지운 것이외다!
2025220114.english: That is… erasing even the memory of this body from your mind!

2025220116.english: The true Murasaki-ryu that you have forgotten... I shall show you!

2025220123.english: Oh, you all! You have brilliantly... Tengetsu...

2025220127.english: (Something is off... Could it be Tengetsu's illusion...?)

2025220131.korean: 크윽… 정녕 그대들을…… 쓰러뜨려야만 하는 겐가……
2025220131.english: Ugh... Am I really... ...must I defeat you...?

2025220135.english: The teacher wasn't anything special either.

2025220143.english: Let's salvage it with a bad ending…

2025230001.english: I figured out why Shiden Unit 2 was acting strangely.

2025230003.korean:
‘시간질주의 술’이야. 그게 제대로 작동하지 않았어.
시간 인식도 정상 동작 기준치보다 훨씬 떨어진 1.03배 수준이었을 거다.
2025230003.english:
It's 'Time-Running Alcohol.' It didn't work properly.
 Time recognition was likely at the 1.03 level, which is much lower than the normal operation standard.

2025230004.korean: 그런 것치곤 꽤 강했던 것 같은데?
2025230004.english: Considering that, it seemed pretty strong.

2025230005.korean: 음, 아마도 시간질주의 술에 맞춰 강화된 신경과 근육 덕분이겠지.
2025230005.english: Hmm, probably thanks to the nerves and muscles strengthened by the Time Rush drink.

2025230006.korean: 어쨌거나 쿠노이치를 셋이나 동시에 상대하는 건 무리였다는 얘기야.
2025230006.english: Anyway, the point is that it was impossible to take on three kunoichi at the same time.

2025230007.korean: 그래서? 그럼 3호기를 만들면 문제는 해결되는 거냐?
2025230007.english: So what? Then, will the problem be solved if we build Unit 3?

2025230008.korean: 네가 그렇게 말할 줄 알고 3호기는 이미 만들어뒀다.
2025230008.english: I knew you would say that, so I already made Unit 3.

2025230009.english: Oh wow!! You're fast at getting things done.

2025230010.korean: 하지만 아쉽게도 3호기 역시 시간질주의 술이 제대로 발동하지 않았어.
2025230010.english: But unfortunately, the Time Rush technique didn't activate properly on Unit 3 either.

2025230012.korean: 그래서 1호기를 조사해봤는데… 아무래도 걔만이 기적적인 뇌내 밸런스로 시간질주의 술을 완벽하게 발동할 수 있었던 모양이더라고.
2025230012.english: So I investigated Unit 1... and it seems that only he was able to perfectly activate the Time Rush technique thanks to his miraculous internal balance.

2025230013.korean: 그래서 지금은 1호기만이 네가 원하는 강함을 발휘할 수 있어. 뭐, 당첨이 나올 때까지 시덴을 마구 만들어대는 방법도 있긴 하지? 회사가 망할 때까지 해볼까? 하하하!
2025230013.english: So right now, only Unit 1 can unleash the strength you desire. Well, I suppose you could just keep churning out Shidens until you get the one, right? Should I keep at it until the company goes bankrupt? Hahaha!

2025230014.english: … … What kind of game is that… …

2025230015.korean: 물론 나도 럭키 시덴의 뇌내 밸런스를 분석해보긴 하겠지만… 당장은 결과를 말해주기 어려워.
2025230015.english: Of course, I will analyze Lucky Shiden's internal balance as well... but it is difficult to tell you the results for now.

2025230016.english: … Okay. Find that 'winning balance' as quickly as possible.

2025230018.korean: 명령으로 지금까지의 일을 없던 걸로 하고 다시 촬영하자.
2025230018.english: Let's cancel everything that has happened so far and film again by order.

2025230020.english: I'll be counting on you, Chief Technology Officer, Nari.

2025230022.english: Well then, shall we go wake up Unit 1?

2025230024.english: Alright! Time to bring in Zero and Kaen!

2025230026.korean: 거기! 꾸물대지 마! 그러다간 전투에 휘말린다고!
2025230026.english: Hey there! Don't dawdle! If you keep this up, you'll get caught up in a battle!

2025230028.korean: 제로와 카엔을 만난 뒤 텐게츠를 쓰러뜨리기까지의 모든 일을 전부 잊어라. 없던 일로 만드는 거다.
2025230028.english: Forget everything that happened from the time you met Zero and Kaen until you defeated Tengetsu. Make it as if it never happened.

2025230031.korean:
- 이 몸에게 인간의 명령이란 참으로 신기한 것이었소외다.
그 말을 들으면, 아무리 이상한 일이더라도 순순히 받아들여버리게 됐으니 말이오.
2025230031.english:
To this body, human commands were truly a strange thing.
 Hearing that, I ended up meekly accepting it, no matter how strange it was.

2025230032.korean:
- '촬영 상태 개시''라는 말을 듣노라면, 거기 있던 촬영 스태프조차 마치
길가의 잡초처럼 느껴져 신경도 쓰이지 않게 됐지.
2025230032.english:
- Upon hearing the words 'commence filming,' even the filming staff present seemed as
 It felt like a weed by the roadside, so I stopped caring about it.

2025230033.korean:
- 그래서 요시미츠의 명령도 자연스럽게 받아들일 수 있었소.
의미는 알 수 없었지만… 받아들였소외다.
2025230033.english:
So, I was able to naturally accept Yoshimitsu's orders as well.
 I couldn't understand the meaning, but... I accepted it.

2025230034.english: Sumire… run away, this is where I…

2025230035.korean: 싫습니다! 또 언니를 잃고 싶지 않아요!
2025230035.english: I don't want to! I don't want to lose my sister again!

2025230036.korean: 바보 같긴! 둘 다 죽게 될 거야!
2025230036.english: How stupid! You're both going to die!

2025230037.english: Puppet Ninja Techniques! Night Parade of Hundred Demons!

2025230044.english: My puppets were defeated in an instant!?

2025230046.english: Is this the time to be worrying about that?

2025230049.english: So you... it looks like you were second-rate after all.

2025230050.english: In an instant, we defeated Hagane, whom we had struggled so much with…

2025230051.english: The movements are… fast… quite… expert…

2025230052.english: Calm down, everyone. I am on your side.

2025230054.korean: 유감이지만, 우리에겐 아군 같은 건 없어!
2025230054.english: I'm sorry, but we don't have any allies!

2025230055.english: Yeah, I knew it would turn out that way.

2025230057.english: (Haha, back then I was still immature and cute)

2025230058.english: If it's an enemy? What do you intend to do?

2025230059.korean: 너희가 그토록 고전했던 상대를 순식간에 쓰러뜨린 몸이거늘 어찌할 생각인게야?
2025230059.english: I just took down the opponent you struggled so hard against in an instant; what do you intend to do?

2025230060.korean:
상대의 실력을 눈에 보이는 것으로만 과소평가하지 말도록 하거라. 
그리고, 누가 적인지 제대로 판단할 수 있는 실력 또한 키워야겠구나.
2025230060.english:
Do not underestimate your opponent's skills based solely on what you can see.
 And, I also need to develop the skill to properly judge who the enemy is.

2025230062.english: (Do I have to raise it again...)

2025230064.english: He is the founder of the Murasaki-ryu.

2025230068.korean: 변명은 아니지만, 이런 상황에서 덜컥 믿는 쪽이야말로 더 어리석지.
2025230068.english: It’s not an excuse, but it would be even more foolish to blindly believe it in a situation like this.

2025230071.english: You can tell by looking at this knife, right?

2025230074.korean: 기술을 쓰는 것도 아닌데, 들고만 있어도 칼에서 번개와 불꽃이…
2025230074.english: It’s not like I’m using any technique, but just holding it, lightning and flames come out of the sword…

2025230075.korean: 너희들의 기술은, 이 몸이 칼 '화신'과 '뇌신'을 휘두르는 모습을 재현하기 위해 고안된 기술이다.
2025230075.english: Your technique was devised to recreate the sight of me wielding the swords 'Avatar' and 'Thunder God'.

2025230076.english: (Life with these children was really fun…)

2025230077.korean: 한번 힘을 겨뤄보겠느냐? 진짜 무라사키류를 직접 체험해보는 것도 나쁘지는 않겠지.
2025230077.english: Would you like to test your strength? It wouldn't be a bad idea to experience the real Murasaki-ryu firsthand.

2025230080.korean: 흠, 정말 싸우려드는 바보들은 아닌 것 같아 다행이구나.
2025230080.english: Hmm, it's a relief that they don't seem like the kind of fools who would actually try to fight.

2025230081.korean: 장소를 옮기자. 슬슬 아시카가 놈들이 들이닥칠 테니.
2025230081.english: Let's move to a different location. The Ashikaga bastards are about to storm in.

2025230082.korean: - 이 몸의 기억은 온전히 남아 있었소.

2025230083.korean:
- 없던 일이라며 잊은 척 행동했지만 진짜로 잊은 건 아니었소.
뇌를 손댄 것도 아니니…
2025230083.english:
I acted as if it never happened and pretended to have forgotten, but I hadn't really forgotten.
 It's not like I tampered with the brain...

2025230084.korean: - 그리고 우리는 순조롭게 츠키카게류 닌자들을 쓰러뜨리며, 무로마치 성의 오우카에게 도달하였소외다.
2025230084.english: And we successfully defeated the Tsukikage-ryu ninjas and reached Ouka of Muromachi Castle.

2025230085.korean: 이 몸이 오우카를 막겠노라. 그대들이 상대하기엔 버거울 것이외다.
2025230085.english: I shall stop Ouka. It will be too difficult for you to face her.

2025230088.english: Did you think I would just let it happen?

2025230090.english: Hmph... I guess that was too shallow...

2025230092.korean: 자, 그대들은 가시게나. 이 몸의 강함은 알고 있겠지.
2025230092.english: Now, you all go. You know how strong I am.

2025230095.korean: 흥, 텐게츠 그 자는 큰 실수를 했구려…
2025230095.english: Hmph, that Tengetsu made a big mistake...

2025230096.english: … … To think Ouka erased my memories from her mind!

2025230098.english: The true Murasaki-ryu that you have forgotten... I shall show you!

2025230103.korean: 흥, 이것이 그대와 이 몸의 차이외다. 같은 기술이라도 위력이 다르지.
2025230103.english: Hmph, this is the difference between you and me. Even the same technique has different power.

2025230106.english: … … Have you not regained your senses yet?

2025230107.korean: 제정신…? 아까부터 무슨 말을 하는 건지 도통 모르겠군요.
2025230107.english: Are you out of your mind...? I have absolutely no idea what you've been talking about since earlier.

2025230109.korean: 정신을 차리시게나, 그렇지 않으면 그대를 죽여야만 하오.
2025230109.english: Snap out of it, or I will have to kill you.

2025230110.korean: 그럼, 지금까지 힘을 아낀 것이었단 말인가요?
2025230110.english: Then, are you saying that you have been conserving your strength until now?

2025230113.korean: 하지만 그런 방심이 죽음을 부르는 법…… 후후후……
2025230113.english: But such carelessness leads to death… … Hahaha… …

2025230119.english: … … You guys… Surely not, you’re under an illusion… …

2025230124.english: Do I really have to fight…!

2025230130.korean: 텐게츠……! 고얀 놈! 용서 못 한다! 절대 용서 못 해!!
2025230130.english: Tengetsu… …! You wicked bastard! I can’t forgive you! I will never forgive you!!

2025230131.english: (For what reason... did it end up like this...?)

2025230135.korean:
이번 루트도 배드 엔딩이네요.
VR 영화 쪽 멀티 엔딩용으로 필요하긴 했으니까 상관없지만요.
2025230135.english:
This route is a bad ending too.
 It doesn't matter, though, since it was necessary for the multi-ending in VR movies.

2025230137.korean: 일단 텐게츠 전투를 다 찍으면 이 루트는 거기서 끝이겠군.
2025230137.english: Once I finish filming the Battle of Tengetsu, this route will probably end there.

2025230138.korean:
어느 부분이 분기점인지도 대략 파악됐어.
다음은 여러 부분을 수정해서 패턴을 조정해보지.
2025230138.english:
I've roughly figured out where the branching point is as well.
 Next, let's try adjusting the pattern by modifying several parts.

2025230139.korean: 알겠습니다. 다음은 카엔이나 제로 중 하나가 살아남는 루트겠네요?
2025230139.english: Understood. So, the next route is one where either Kaen or Zero survives, right?

2025230140.english: Okay. First, shall we start from scratch?

2025240001.korean: - 이 몸은 그 후로 몇 번이나 반복했을꼬?
2025240001.english: - How many times have I repeated this since then?

2025240002.korean: - 이 몸은 몇 번이고 그 아이들과 만나, 단련하고……
2025240002.english: - I have met those children time and time again, trained...

2025240003.korean: - 몇 번이고 그 아이들의 따뜻함에 닿았고……
2025240003.english: I touched the warmth of those children time and time again…

2025240004.korean: - 몇 번이고 그 아이들을 도왔고, 때로는 도움을 받기도 하였소외다.
2025240004.english: - I helped those children time and time again, and sometimes I also received help from them.

2025240005.korean: - 하지만 이 몸은… 결국 그 아이들을 몇 번이고, 몇 번이고 반복해서…
2025240005.english: - But I… in the end, those children again and again…

2025240007.korean: - 설령 죽이지 않더라도, 다른 이유로 죽게 만들었소.
2025240007.english: Even if I didn't kill him, I made him die for other reasons.

2025240008.korean: - 하지만… 죽음의 사유가 무엇이든 결국 그 아이들을 가장 많이 죽인 건 이 몸이였소외다.
2025240008.english: But… whatever the cause of death, in the end, it was me who killed the most of those children.

2025240009.korean: - 엔딩을 몇 가지… 아니, 수십 가지나 촬영하기 위해……
2025240009.english: - To film a few… no, dozens of endings… …

2025240011.korean: - 상냥함과 결코 꺾이지 않는 강단을 지닌 스미레…
2025240011.english: Sumire, possessing kindness and unyielding determination…

2025240012.korean: - 미숙했지만, 그래서인지 힘에 대한 갈망은 누구보다 깊었고, 이 몸이 가르친 무라사키류의 진수를 빠르게 흡수해 나갔지.
2025240012.english: - Although he was inexperienced, perhaps because of that, his craving for power was deeper than anyone else's, and he quickly absorbed the essence of the Murasaki-ryu that I taught him.

2025240013.korean: - 오우카나 하츠나와 싸울 때는, 언제나 괴로운 표정으로 싸웠소.
2025240013.english: - When fighting Oukana Hatsuna, I always fought with a pained expression.

2025240014.korean: - 기억을 잃고도 언니로서의 마음을 간직했던 하츠나…
2025240014.english: Hatsuna, who retained her heart as an older sister even after losing her memory…

2025240015.korean: - 말을 잘 잇지 못했지만, 스미레는 늘 깊은 애정을 쏟았고, 그 애정은 이 몸에게도 닿아… 만날 때마다 구원받는 기분이었소외다.
2025240015.english: Although I couldn't quite put my words into words, Sumire always poured out deep affection, and that affection reached me as well... so every time we met, I felt like I was being saved.

2025240016.korean: - 그리고 수차례 적으로 마주해야 했던 오우카였지만…
2025240016.english: And although it was Ouka, whom I had to face as an enemy many times...

2025240017.korean: - 반대로 몇 번이고 우리 편이 되기도 했지. 자신을 형편없는 어머니라 말하곤 했지만…
2025240017.english: On the contrary, she took our side time and time again. Although she used to call herself a terrible mother…

2025240018.korean: - 대체 어디가 형편없다는 게야… 딸을 지키기 위해 모든 걸 버릴 수 있는 어머니란 좀처럼 없는 법이오.
2025240018.english: - What on earth is so terrible about it… It is rare to find a mother who can give up everything to protect her daughter.

2025240019.korean: - 뭐, 쿠노이치로서는 형편없을지도 모르겠구려. 텐게츠의 환술 따위에 걸려들기도 했으니…
2025240019.english: Well, as a kunoichi, I might be pathetic. After all, I even fell for Tengetsu's illusion...

2025240021.korean: - 그래서… 인간에 대한 감정은 증오밖에 남지 않게 되었구려.
2025240021.english: So… the only emotion left for humans is hatred.

2025240022.korean: - 이 모든 게 극본이었다면, 모든 촬영이 끝난 뒤 ‘대전란’의 스미레처럼 인간에 대한 복수가 시작됐겠지.
2025240022.english: If all of this had been a script, revenge against humans would have begun after all the filming was finished, just like Sumire in 'The Great War'.

2025240023.korean: - …허나 이 몸은 아무것도 할 수 없었네. 그래, 이 몸은 바이오로이드니까. 인간에게 손을 대는 건 허락되지 않소.
2025240023.english: - …However, I was unable to do anything. Yes, because I am a bioroid. Laying a hand on a human is not permitted.

2025240024.korean: - 마음이 부서졌을지언정, 명령 아래 자결조차 허락되지 않는,
2025240024.english: - Even if heart is broken, not even suicide is permitted under orders,

2025240025.english: - It is a truly miserable existence.

2025240026.korean: - 그리고 머지않아 '덴세츠'는 대전란 제3부를 히트시키며, 엔터테인먼트 업계에서 확고한 입지를 얻게 되었소.
2025240026.english: And before long, 'Densetsu' made a hit with the third part of the Great War, establishing a firm foothold in the entertainment industry.

2025240027.korean: - 그 덕분에 이 몸을 포함한 대전란 등장 캐릭터들은 덴세츠 소속 인간들에게 정중히 대우받게 되었고…
2025240027.english: - Thanks to that, the characters appearing in the Great War, including myself, came to be treated respectfully by the humans belonging to Densetsu, and…

2025240028.korean: - 프로모션용으로 만들어진 스미레 일행과 다시 만날 수 있게 됐구려.
2025240028.english: - I'm glad to be able to meet Sumire and her group again, who were created for the promotion.

2025240029.korean: - 이후로는 바이오로이드 치고는 '행복'이라 칭할 수 있는 나날의 연속이었소외다.
2025240029.english: From then on, it was a series of days that could be called 'happy' for a bioroid.

2025240030.korean: - 허나, 야속하게도 철충의 습격으로 인해 금세 끝나고 말았소.
2025240030.english: However, unfortunately, it ended quickly due to an attack by the Iron蟲.

2025240031.english: The Final Battle of Shinjuku Before the Apocalypse

2025240034.english: The temporary command post has been attacked… Make sure to withdraw.

2025240036.korean: 아니… 이 몸의 판단이오... 지금 대신 지휘할 자도 없소.
2025240036.english: No... it is my own judgment... and there is no one to take my place right now.

2025240037.korean: 이대로 싸워봤자… 의미 없이 죽을 뿐이야.
2025240037.english: Fighting like this... we'll just die meaninglessly.

2025240038.korean: 이 몸은 그대들을 잃고 싶지 않다… 가자꾸나.
2025240038.english: I do not want to lose you all... Let's go.

2025240043.english: Ugh... Did I let my guard down...

2025240045.korean: 스미레…… 배를…… 하지만… 괜찮다, 이 정도면… 수복실로 데려가면 치료할 수 있을 걸세.
2025240045.english: Sumire… … her stomach… … but… it’s alright. With this condition… we should be able to treat it if we take her to the recovery room.

2025240046.english: Rest assured... I will take you.

2025240047.english: No, Mr. Invitation, I will take you.

2025240048.english: Invitation, please ask others to apply.

2025240050.english: I understand... Please... do not let your guard down, everyone...

2025240052.korean: 어머니, 스승님… 괜찮아요, 저도 함께 있어요.
2025240052.english: Mother, Master... It's okay, I'm with you too.

2025240057.korean: 이런 싸움으로…… 누구도 죽어서는 아니 된다...
2025240057.english: No one must die in a fight like this...

2025240058.korean: 자, 그럼…… 다음은 저쪽에서 고립되어 있는 이들을…―
2025240058.english: Well then… next, those isolated over there… ―

2025240062.korean: 어찌… 어찌 그대가…… 방심하지 말라고 단단히 일러두었거늘……
2025240062.english: How... how could you... even though I strictly warned you not to let your guard down...

2025240063.korean: (몸의 절반이 날아갔구려…… 스미레도…… 하츠나도…… 폭발을 정통으로 맞고는……)
2025240063.english: (Half of their bodies were blown away…… Sumire too…… Hatsuna too…… took the explosion head-on……)

2025240065.korean: 스, 스미…레는……? 눈이… 잘 안 보여서…
2025240065.english: S-Sumi... Re... ...? My eyes... can't see well...

2025240066.korean: 일 없네, 저쪽에 쓰러져 있구려… 하츠나와 함께 걱정스러운 얼굴로… 여길 보고 있으니…
2025240066.english: It’s nothing. He’s collapsed over there… He’s looking over here with a worried look on his face, along with Hatsuna…

2025240068.korean: 저는…… 이제 정말… 끝인 것 같아요……
2025240068.english: I… … I think… … it really… ends now… …

2025240070.korean:
오우카… 쿠노이치로서도… 어머니로서도… 수고 많았소.
편히… 잠드시게나…
2025240070.english:
Ouka... You worked hard as a kunoichi... and as a mother...
 Rest in peace...

2025240071.korean: 이후는 이 몸이… 어떻게든 해 볼 터이니... 맡겨주시게나…
2025240071.english: As for the rest... I will somehow manage... so please leave it to me...

2025240076.korean: 어찌하여…… 왜 이 아이들이…… 이런 꼴을 당해야만 하는 게야…!
2025240076.english: Why… why do these children… have to suffer like this…!

2025240078.korean: 시덴님! 전 부대가 철수를 시작했습니다. 지금 본사에서 방어를 준비 중이고……
2025240078.english: Lord Shiden! The entire unit has begun withdrawing. Headquarters is currently preparing defenses, and…

2025240081.korean: 어찌하여 나는… 지켜낼 수가 없단 말이오...
2025240081.english: Why is it that I… cannot protect it…

2025240083.korean: 이 아이들의 죽음을 얼마나 더…… 잠자코 지켜보기만 해야 하는 겐지……
2025240083.english: How much longer do we have to… just silently watch the deaths of these children…

2025240084.korean: - …이제 더는 이 아이들을 잃고 싶지 않소.
2025240084.english: - … I don't want to lose these children anymore.

2025240086.korean: 오우카, 이 몸은… 감히 인간이 있는 이 자리에서 말하겠노라.
2025240086.english: Ouka, I… dare to speak in this place where humans are present.

2025240087.korean: 그 오르카의 사령관… 그대의 주공은 확실히 훌륭한 인간일지도 모르지…
2025240087.english: That Orca commander... your lord might certainly be a fine human being...

2025240088.korean: 허나… 그것은 그 인간의 다양한 모습 중 단 하나일뿐.
2025240088.english: However… that is just one of the many aspects of that human being.

2025240089.korean: 언젠가 반드시… 반드시… 그 악성을 드러낼 때가 올 게야...
2025240089.english: Someday, without fail... without fail... the time will come to reveal that wickedness...

2025240091.korean: 이 몸은... 다시 만난 그대들을 잃고 싶지 않소…
2025240091.english: I... do not wish to lose you, whom I have met again...

2025240092.korean: 그러니 오우카, 스미레, 하츠나… 그대들은 오르카를 버리고… 이 몸에게로 건너 오시게나.
2025240092.english: So Ouka, Sumire, Hatsuna… abandon Orca… and come over to me.

2025250001.english: You want me to abandon Orca...?

2025250002.korean: 그렇소… 이 몸이 그대들에게 무리한 부탁을 하고 있다는 것도… 알고 있소외다.
2025250002.english: Yes... I am aware that I am making an unreasonable request of you.

2025250003.korean: 알고 있지만… 그럼에도 이 몸이 부탁을 거두진 않을 게야.
2025250003.english: I know... but even so, I will not take back my request.

2025250004.korean: 그대들이 인간의 밑에 있는 건 도저히 견딜 수 없는 일이오.
2025250004.english: It is absolutely unbearable for you to be beneath humans.

2025250005.english: Of course, Momo, if you want…

2025250008.korean: 스승님, 저희도 그 제안을 받아들일 수 없습니다.
2025250008.english: Master, we cannot accept that proposal either.

2025250009.korean: 응. 카엔이랑, 모두가, 주공을 버리는 건 있을 수 없어.
2025250009.english: Yeah. It's impossible for Kaen and everyone to abandon the Lord.

2025250013.korean: 초대님의 처지, 과거… 전부 듣고, 인간에 대한 감정을 이해한 뒤라고 해도 어렵습니다.
2025250013.english: Even after hearing everything about your situation and past, and understanding human emotions, it is still difficult.

2025250014.korean: 오히려, 주공을 배신하는 것이나 다름없는 그 제안에 분노까지 느낍니다.
2025250014.english: On the contrary, I even feel anger at that proposal, which is tantamount to betraying the Lord.

2025250015.korean: - 패널 너머로도 엔라이 일행의 긴장감이 전해졌다.
2025250015.english: The tension of Enrai and his group was palpable even beyond the panel.

2025250016.korean: - 엔라이 일행을 만류하고자 대화에 끼어드는 일은 상황을 악화시킬 뿐, 여러모로 좋지 않을 것이다.
2025250016.english: Interfering in the conversation to dissuade Enrai and his party will only worsen the situation and will not be beneficial in many ways.

2025250017.korean: - 엔라이뿐 아니라, 시덴에게도 좋은 판단이 아닐 게 틀림없다.
2025250017.english: It is certainly not a good decision for Shiden, not just Enrai.

2025250018.korean: - 우리가 여기까지 온 목적은 어디까지나 로크의 구출일 뿐이다.
2025250018.english: Our sole purpose in coming this far is to rescue Locke.

2025250021.korean: 그래요. 저희는 분명 오르카에서 복원되었지만, 저희의 의지로 주공 곁에 있습니다.
2025250021.english: That is correct. We were certainly restored from Orca, but we are by the Lord's side of our own free will.

2025250022.korean: 그 의지도… 상대가 인간이라 그렇게 믿고 있을 뿐일 거란 생각은 왜 못 하는 게야.
2025250022.english: Why can't you consider that even that will... they might just be believing it because the other person is human?

2025250023.korean: 주공, 분명, 우리가 스승님 곁에 가고 싶다고 말하면… 허락할 거야...
2025250023.english: Lord, surely, if we say we want to go to Master's side... he will allow it...

2025250024.korean: 하지만, 그런 선택은 하지 않을 겁니다. 저희는 주공을 믿고, 존경하며…… 사랑하고 있으니까요.
2025250024.english: However, we will not make such a choice. Because we trust, respect, and… love you, Lord.

2025250025.korean: - 시덴은 아무 말도 하지 못한 채 제로 일행을 바라보고 있었다.
2025250025.english: Shiden was staring at Zero and his companions, unable to say a word.

2025250026.korean: - 본래라면 그녀와 더 이야기해, 이 대화를 조금이나마 원만하게 끝내고 싶었다. 하지만, 특이체가 이 땅에 있는 이상, 느긋할 여유는 없다.
2025250026.english: Ideally, I would have wanted to talk more with her and bring this conversation to a somewhat amicable conclusion. However, as long as the singularity exists on this earth, there is no room to be complacent.

2025250027.korean: - 시덴을 위해서라도 로크를 구출하고 조우 당시 데이터를 분석하여 대책을 세우고 특이체를 토벌해야 한다.
2025250027.english: - For the sake of Shiden, we must rescue Locke, analyze the data from the encounter to devise a plan, and defeat the singularity.

2025250028.korean: - 일단 유럽에 원군을 요청하긴 했지만, 일본에 도착하기까지 며칠은 걸릴 것이고, 오르카호로 데려온 병력만으로 싸워야 할 가능성도 높다.
2025250028.english: Although reinforcements have been requested from Europe, it will take several days for them to arrive in Japan, and it is highly likely that the battle will have to be fought solely with the troops brought on the Orca.

2025250034.korean: 지금 오르카 쪽 사람들과 면회 중입니다.
2025250034.english: I am currently having a meeting with people from the Orca side.

2025250037.korean: - 코노하라 이름을 댄 쿠노이치는 순식간에 모습을 감췄다.
2025250037.english: The kunoichi who mentioned Konohara's name vanished in an instant.

2025250038.english: With this, the objective has been achieved. But…

2025250040.korean: 그녀가 인간을 증오하고 있다는 건 나 나름대로 충분히 이해했다. 그걸 참고 오르카에 오라든가, 그래도 날 믿어 달라든가 그런 말은 할 생각 없다.
2025250040.english: I fully understood, in my own way, that she hates humans. I have no intention of telling her to put up with that and come to Orca, or to still trust me.

2025250042.korean: …그러니까 오르카에 오라 그리 말하고 싶은 것이오?
2025250042.english: … So, is that what you want to say, that I should come to Orca?

2025250043.korean: 들어본 바로는, 그녀의 시간 인식 확장은 우리 아니면 어떻게 할 방법이 없다.
2025250043.english: From what I've heard, there is no way to expand her time perception other than us.

2025250044.korean: - 그러니까 꼭 그것만큼은 그녀의 앞으로의 긴 인생을 위해서라도 반드시 해제해주고 싶다.
2025250044.english: So, I definitely want to release that, if only for the sake of her long future.

2025250047.korean: 어떻게든 다시 한번 설득해 보려는데, 엔라이가 그것을 눈치채고 입을 열었다.
2025250047.english: Just as I was trying to persuade him one more time, Enrai noticed and spoke up.

2025250049.english: Let's go. Hatsuna, Sumire, and Momo.

2025250051.korean: - 엔라이 일행 네 명이 자리에서 일어섰다.
2025250051.english: Enrai and his four companions stood up from their seats.

2025250054.korean: 이 몸이 이리 행동하는 건… 지금의 그대들에게는 그른 일처럼 보일 것이오.
2025250054.english: My acting this way… may seem wrong to you right now.

2025250055.korean: 하지만… 그래도… 인간에게만큼은 다시 돌려보내고 싶지 않소.
2025250055.english: But… even so… I do not want to send it back to humans, at the very least.

2025250056.korean: - 시덴은 입술을 떨며 엔라이 일행을 바라보고 있었다.
2025250056.english: Shiden was looking at Enrai and his party with trembling lips.

2025250057.english: That is impossible. Or... are you saying you intend to make them obey by force?

2025250058.english: … … If it truly must be done, I will do so.

2025250059.korean: 싸우기 싫다면 로크와 교환이라 생각해도 좋소외다. 인질로 생각하시게나.
2025250059.english: If you do not want to fight, you may consider this an exchange for Locke. Think of me as a hostage.

2025250060.korean: 저희가 순순히 인질이 될 거라 생각하시나요……?
2025250060.english: Do you think we will willingly become hostages…?

2025250061.korean: 이 몸을 이길 수 있다고 생각하는 것이오?
2025250061.english: Do you think you can defeat me?

2025250066.korean: 특이체라는 존재가 위험한 것 아니었소이까? 그렇다면, 로크를 회수한 후 서둘러 이 땅을 떠나시게나.
2025250066.english: Wasn't the existence of the Singularity dangerous? If so, retrieve Locke and leave this land in haste.

2025250067.english: Cherish your life, the last human.

2025250069.korean: - 나는 엔라이 일행을 진정시키고 마이크를 음소거했다.
2025250069.english: I calmed Enrai and his group down and muted the microphone.

2025250070.korean: - 그리고 함께 이 상황을 지켜보고 있던 아르망을 바라봤다.
2025250070.english: And then I looked at Armand, who was watching the situation with me.

2025250071.korean: 시덴의 데이터는 불충분하지만, 돔 안에 있는 오르카의 대원들에게 폐하가 지휘를 내리면 탈출은 충분히 가능합니다.
2025250071.english: Although Shiden's data is insufficient, escape is fully possible if His Majesty gives orders to the Orca members inside the dome.

2025250072.korean: 다만, 그때는 반드시 시덴을 제압해야만 합니다.
2025250072.english: However, at that time, you must subdue Shiden.

2025250073.korean: 폐하께서는… 시덴과 엔라이 씨 일행이 싸우는 걸 원치 않으시죠?
2025250073.english: Your Majesty… you do not want Shiden and Enrai’s party to fight, do you?

2025250075.korean: 물론, 전투 부대를 편성해 투입하면 엔라이 씨 일행을 싸우게 하지 않고도 구조할 수 있습니다.
