2025250075.english: Of course, if you organize and deploy a combat unit, you can rescue Mr. Enrai and his party without making them fight.

2025250076.korean:
- 하지만, 그렇게 하면 끝이다.
시덴의 인간에 대한 증오는 더 이상 돌이킬 수 없는 것이 되겠지.
2025250076.english:
However, if you do that, it's over.
 Shiden's hatred for humans will become irreversible.

2025250077.korean: - 그렇게 되면 그녀의 시간 인식을 되돌리는 일은 영원히 불가능해진다.
2025250077.english: - If that happens, it becomes forever impossible to restore her perception of time.

2025250078.korean:
- 다만, 그것밖에 방법이 없다면 할 수밖에 없는 것도 사실이다.
우리에게는 시간이 없고, 엔라이 일행을 넘길 생각 따위도 전혀 없다.
2025250078.english:
However, it is also true that if there is no other way, we have no choice but to do it.
 We have no time, and we have absolutely no intention of handing over Enrai and his party.

2025250079.korean: - 혹시 몰라 아르망에게 전투 부대 편성을 지시하려던 그때, 에이다로부터 긴급 연락이 들어왔다.
2025250079.english: Just as I was about to order Armand to organize a combat unit, just in case, I received an urgent message from Ada.

2025250080.english: Commander, we have detected waves from the singularity.

2025250081.korean:
네. 아직 미약하지만, 갑자기 반응이 나타났습니다.  
출현 지점은 D돔에서 남서쪽으로 약 10km 떨어진 산중입니다.
2025250081.english:
Yes. It is still weak, but a reaction suddenly appeared.
 The appearance point is in the mountains, about 10 km southwest of D-Dome.

2025250083.english: - Of all times... This is the worst...

2025250084.korean: - 이건… 시덴을 어떻게 할지의 문제가 아니게 되었다.
2025250084.english: This... has become no longer a matter of what to do with Shiden.

2025250091.korean: - 그 한숨과 동시에 시덴의 표정이 아주 조금 누그러졌다.
2025250091.english: At the same time as that sigh, Shiden's expression softened ever so slightly.

2025250092.korean: 흥…… 이제 막 적이 될 뻔했던 상대에게 할 말은 아니지 않소이까?
2025250092.english: Hmph... isn't that something you should be saying to someone who was just about to become an enemy?

2025250094.english: Honestly… I’m losing all my energy…

2025250095.english: I understand. I'll bring out some tea.

2025250097.english: [I have no intention of forcing you to join Orca.]

2025250098.korean: [그와 마찬가지로 엔라이 일행에게도 명령으로 억지로 따르게 한 건 아니야.]
2025250098.english: [Just like him, I didn't force Enrai and his group to follow orders.]

2025250099.korean: [시덴, 우리는 이번에 로크를 구하러 왔을 뿐이야.]
2025250099.english: [Siden, we only came to rescue Locke this time.]

2025250100.english: So, I'll leave quietly once work is finished.

2025250102.korean: [시덴, 한 가지만 이기적인 부탁을 해도 될까?]
2025250102.english: [Shiden, may I make just one selfish request?]

2025250103.korean: [너의 그 시간 인식을 정상으로 되돌려주고 싶어.]
2025250103.english: [I want to restore your perception of time to normal.]

2025250104.korean: [그게 안 된다면, 특이체를 어떻게든 처리한 뒤에 우리 쪽에서 지원을 보낼게.]
2025250104.english: [If that isn't possible, we'll deal with the singularity somehow and then send reinforcements.]

2025250106.korean: [그런 짓을 하면… 너와 싸워야만 하게 돼.]
2025250106.english: [If you do that… I’ll have to fight you.]

2025250115.english: [Can you give me a moment? I want to check the situation.]

2025250116.english: [… But, they aren't enemies yet, are they?]

2025260001.korean:
로크 오빠가 급히 보내준 데이터를 분석해봤는데,
로크 오빠를 습격한 범인은 콜로서스 프로토타입이야.
2025260001.english:
I analyzed the data Locke sent me in a hurry,
 The culprit who attacked Locke is a Colossus Prototype.

2025260002.korean:
특이체 특유의 파동을 감지하지 못했던 건, 특이체의 몸에 있어야 할 알타이트가
아직 미성숙했기 때문이라는 가능성이 높아.
2025260002.english:
The reason the unique waves of the singularity could not be detected was that the Altite that should have been in the singularity's body
 It is highly likely that it is because it is still immature.

2025260003.korean: 그러니까, 그 말씀은 처음 마주친 개체와 같은 상태라는 거지 말임다.
2025260003.english: So, what you mean is that it is in the same state as the first individual encountered.

2025260004.korean: 맞아! 그래서 콜로서스 프로토타입이라고 한 거야.
2025260004.english: That's right! That's why I called it the Colossus Prototype.

2025260005.english: And the fact that that wave was detected means…

2025260006.korean: 응, 성장해서 콜로서스가 성숙기에 접어들었다는 뜻이야. 아마 로크 오빠가 마주쳤을 때보다 더 강해졌을 거야.
2025260006.english: Yeah, it means Colossus has grown up and entered his mature stage. He's probably stronger than when Locke first encountered him.

2025260007.korean: 게다가 특이체의 영향 때문인지, 주변 철충들의 활발한 움직임도 확인되고 있습니다.
2025260007.english: Furthermore, perhaps due to the influence of the singularity, active movement of surrounding Iron Bugs is also being observed.

2025260008.korean: 이대로 시간이 지나면 돔 주변의 철충들도 활발해져서 위험한 상황이 될 겁니다.
2025260008.english: If time passes like this, the Iron蟲 around the dome will also become active, and the situation will become dangerous.

2025260009.korean:
그렇다고 해서 엔라이 씨를 지휘해 시덴을 제압하고
탈출시키는 방법을 추천드리고 싶지 않습니다.
2025260009.english:
That doesn't mean you have to command Enrai and subdue Shiden.
 I would not recommend a method to help you escape.

2025260010.korean:
시간이 오래 걸릴뿐더러, 탈출할 즈음이면 돔 밖은
흉포해진 철충들로 가득 찰 테니까요.
2025260010.english:
Not only does it take a long time, but by the time you escape, outside the dome is
 Because it will be filled with ferocious Iron Bugs.

2025260011.korean: 그렇다면, 역시 전투 부대를 편성해서 모두를 구출하는 게 가장 빠르겠지?
2025260011.english: In that case, forming a combat unit to rescue everyone would be the fastest way, right?

2025260012.korean:
그것도 특이체와의 거리가 너무 가까워서 위험합니다.
이동 중이나 작전 중에 마주칠 가능성이 있습니다.
2025260012.english:
That is also dangerous because the distance to the singularity is too close.
 There is a possibility of encountering it while moving or during operations.

2025260014.english: - Lilith is making a scary face.

2025260016.korean: 안 됩니다. 철충이 있는 곳으로 향하는 것만으로도 차고 넘치는 반대 사유인데, 이번엔 특이체와 마주칠 가능성이 있다…?
2025260016.english: No way. Just heading towards where the Iron蟲 are is more than enough reason to object, but this time there is a possibility of encountering a Singularity…?

2025260017.korean: 우연히 마주친 거라면 몰라도, 주인님께서 스스로 그곳으로 가겠다 하신다면 막아야겠습니다.
2025260017.english: It would be one thing if we ran into each other by chance, but if Master says he intends to go there on his own, I must stop him.

2025260018.korean: 주인님 본인을 작전의 일부에 포함시키는 것 그만 두세요! 진짜 나쁜 버릇이에요!
2025260018.english: Master, stop including yourself in the operation! It's a really bad habit!

2025260019.korean: - 리리스가 평소와는 다르게 화를 내고 있다.
2025260019.english: Lilith is getting angry, unlike usual.

2025260020.english: Then, what would you like to do?

2025260021.korean: - D돔 안에 있는 엔라이 일행에게 위험이 닥칠 가능성이 있다면, 그 원인을 끊으면 된다.
2025260021.english: - If there is a possibility that Enrai and his party inside the D-Dome will be in danger, the cause must be cut off.

2025260022.korean:
하지만, 시덴이 얌전히 특이체가 토벌될 때까지 기다려줄지 모르겠습니다.
지금도 적대적인 태도를 보이고 있지 않습니까.
2025260022.english:
However, I am not sure if Shiden will wait patiently until the singularity is defeated.
 Aren't you still showing a hostile attitude?

2025260023.korean: 제가 시덴이라면 특이체와 싸우는 틈을 타서 엔라이 일행을 데리고 도망친다든가, 로크에게 폭탄을 설치한다든가… 어쨌든 뭔가 하겠습니다만…
2025260023.english: If I were Shiden, I would take advantage of the fight with the Singularity to escape with Enrai and his party, or plant a bomb on Locke… Anyway, I would do something…

2025260026.korean: 대장이 그렇게까지 필사적으로 뭔가를 하신단 말임까? 작전 회의에 얌전히 참가하고 계시다니, 역시 정신을 조종하는 무언가가...
2025260026.english: Are you saying the Captain is doing something that desperately? To think he's participating in the strategy meeting so quietly—there really is something manipulating his mind...

2025260027.korean: 팬서야~ 다들 오해하겠네. 마치 내가 평소에 아무것도 안 하는 것처럼 말하잖아?
2025260027.english: Panther, everyone's going to misunderstand. You talk as if I usually don't do anything, right?

2025260029.korean: 대장이라면 아무것도 안 하지 않슴까? 진짜로.
2025260029.english: If it's the boss, wouldn't he do nothing? Seriously.

2025260031.english: I just said it from Shiden's perspective.

2025260032.korean: 통신이라고는 해도, 인간에게 반항할 정도로 엔라이 일행을 소중히 여긴다면 그런 행동을 해도 이상하지 않다는 얘기야.
2025260032.english: Even if it is just communication, if he cherishes Enrai and his group enough to rebel against humans, it wouldn't be strange for him to act that way.

2025260033.korean: - 별도로 움직이던 스노우 페더 일행이 모은 정보에 따르면, 돔에 있는 주민들의 대부분은 멸망 이전부터 살아남은 경험 많은 전투용 바이오로이드로 파악되었다.
2025260033.english: - According to information gathered by Snow Feather and her group, who were moving separately, most of the residents in the dome were identified as experienced combat bioroids who had survived since before the apocalypse.

2025260034.korean: - 게다가 모두 건강 상태도 좋고, 무기도 정비되어 있어서 전력으로도 손색이 없다고 한다.
2025260034.english: Furthermore, it is said that everyone is in good health and their weapons are well-maintained, so they are second to none in terms of combat power.

2025260035.korean: - 이번에는 평소보다 적은 전력으로 특이체와 싸워야 하니까… 강력한 전력이 있다면 협력을 요청할 필요가 있다.
2025260035.english: - Since we have to fight the singularity with less power than usual this time... we need to request cooperation if there is a powerful force.

2025260037.korean: - 나스호른은 믿을 수 없다는 듯 고개를 갸웃거렸다.
2025260037.english: Nashorn tilted his head as if he couldn't believe it.

2025260038.english: Understood. I will issue the sortie order to the Sky Knights.

2025260044.korean: …이번엔 상황이 급박해서 돔 안에 들어가기는커녕,  처음 정찰한 이후로는 가까이조차 못 갔으니까……
2025260044.english: … This time, the situation was so urgent that, far from entering the dome, we couldn't even get close since the initial reconnaissance… …

2025260045.korean: 덴세츠가 얽혀 있는데도 활약할 기회가 없다면 이렇게 되는 것도 어쩔 수 없나...
2025260045.english: If there is no chance to shine even though Densetsu is involved, I guess it can't be helped that things turn out this way...

2025260047.korean: 이번 일이 무사히 해결되면 안으로 들어가도 되는지 사령관에게 물어보자?
2025260047.english: If this matter is resolved safely, shall we ask the commander if we can go inside?

2025260049.english: That… was my intention from the beginning.

2025260050.english: … … Right. I knew you would do that.

2025260051.korean: ……뭐, 정말 괜찮습니다. 맡은 임무는 확실히 해내겠습니다.
2025260051.english: … … Well, it’s really fine. I will definitely complete the mission assigned to me.

2025260052.korean: 제 일이 미흡해서, 만에 하나 D돔에 손상이 가게 된다면, 모모 얼굴을 똑바로 못 쳐다볼 겁니다!
2025260052.english: If my work is inadequate and, by any chance, the D-Dome gets damaged, I won't be able to look Momo straight in the face!

2025260054.korean: 기세가 올랐다 싶으면 그건 그거대로 귀찮네……
2025260054.english: Just when I think I'm getting the hang of it, that's a hassle in its own way...

2025260055.korean: 뭐든, 의욕이 생기는 건 좋은 일이잖느냐.
2025260055.english: Whatever it is, getting motivated is a good thing, isn't it?

2025260057.korean: 그건 그렇고, 이제 곧 특이체의 파동을 감지한 지점이다.
2025260057.english: Anyway, this is the point where the waves of the singularity were detected.

2025260058.korean:
스카이나이츠, 긴장을 풀지 말거라.
현재 고도를 유지.
2025260058.english:
Sky Knights, do not let your guard down.
 Maintain current altitude.

2025260059.korean: - 우리는 스카이나이츠의 정찰과 닥터의 데이터 분석을 바탕으로, 특이체 토벌 작전을 수립하고…
2025260059.english: - Based on the Sky Knights' reconnaissance and the Doctor's data analysis, we formulated an operation to exterminate the singularities and…

2025260060.english: - Explained the situation to Shiden and his party.

2025260061.korean: ……즉, 이 주변 철충들도 특이체의 영향으로 흉폭 해질 것이란 말이오?
2025260061.english: … … In other words, you are saying that the Iron Bugs around here will also become ferocious due to the influence of the Unique Entity?

2025260063.korean:
그래서? 그걸 말해서 우리더러 어찌하란 것이오?
위험하니 오르카로 오라는 말이라도 하고 싶소?
2025260063.english:
So what? What are we supposed to do by saying that?
 Do you want to tell me to come to Orca because it is dangerous?

2025260064.english: I will speak from here on.

2025260066.korean:
오랜만이라고 말씀드려야 할까요?
안타깝게도 최종 결전의 기억은 남아 있지 않습니다만…
2025260066.english:
Should I say it's been a long time?
 Unfortunately, I have no memory of the final battle, but…

2025260067.korean: 일 없소, 그대의 얼굴을 보는 것만으로도… 기쁘구려.
2025260067.english: It’s no problem. Just seeing your face makes me happy.

2025260069.korean: - 아르망을 포함한 덴세츠 사의 바이오로이드들을 정말로 소중하게 생각하고 있었던 거겠지…
2025260069.english: - He must have really cherished the Densetsu bioroids, including Armand...

2025260070.korean: 후… 이야기가 새 버렸구려. 미안하오… 계속해 주게나.
2025260070.english: Phew... I've gone off on a tangent. I'm sorry... Please continue.

2025260072.korean:
아까 시덴 씨가 말씀하신 대로, 오르카로 피난해 주셨으면 좋겠지만,
이동 중에 철충이나 특이체와 조우할 위험이 있습니다.
2025260072.english:
As Mr. Shiden mentioned earlier, I would like you to evacuate to the Orca, but
 There is a risk of encountering Iron Bugs or Unique Entities while moving.

2025260073.korean: 같은 이유로 엔라이 씨도 당분간 돔 안에 머물게 할 생각입니다.
2025260073.english: For the same reason, I plan to have Mr. Enrai stay inside the dome for the time being as well.

2025260074.korean: 애초에 오르카로 피난할 생각도… 오우카 일행을 돌려보낼 생각도 없었소외다…
2025260074.english: From the start, I had no intention of evacuating to Orca... nor did I intend to send Ouka and her group back...

2025260075.korean: 우리 쪽엔 전투 경험이 풍부한 바이오로이드들도 있고… 무엇보다 이 몸, 시덴이 있소. 흉폭해진 정도의 철충에게… 질 일은 없을걸세.
2025260075.english: We have bioroids with extensive combat experience on our side... and above all, I, Shiden, am here. We will not lose to the Iron蟲 that has become this ferocious...

2025260076.korean: 그대는… 스미레 일행을 두고 유럽으로 돌아가면 그만이오.
2025260076.english: You... just need to leave Sumire and her party behind and return to Europe.

2025260077.korean: 확실히… 돔 구조도 견고하고, 시덴 씨 일행의 전투력이라면 흉폭화한 철충을 어느 정도 막아낼 수 있을 겁니다.
2025260077.english: Certainly… the dome structure is sturdy, and with the combat power of Mr. Shiden and his party, they should be able to hold off the ferocious Iron蟲 to some extent.

2025260078.korean: 이 지역 철충은 아직 바이오로이드를 적극적으로 노리는 기색도 없고요.
2025260078.english: The Iron蟲 in this region don't show any signs of actively targeting bioroids yet, either.

2025260079.korean: 하지만 유럽에선 철충이 바이오로이드를 납치하는 사례도 발생했습니다.
2025260079.english: However, in Europe, there have also been cases where Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) kidnapped Bio-roids.

2025260080.korean: 언젠가는 철충이 돔을 조직적으로 습격할 가능성도 있습니다.
2025260080.english: There is also a possibility that someday the Iron蟲 will systematically attack the dome.

2025260082.korean: 우리도 유럽에서 철충의 대공세를 받았습니다만, 여기 전력만으로는 도저히 대응할 수 없었습니다.
2025260082.english: We also faced a massive offensive by the Iron蟲 in Europe, but we were completely unable to respond with our current forces alone.

2025260083.korean: 오르카 전력으로 겨우 저항할 수 있었다는 수준입니다.
2025260083.english: It is at the level where they could barely resist with Orca's full power.

2025260084.korean: 거기에 특이체까지 있다면, 아무리 스승님들이라도 죽게 됩니다!
2025260084.english: If there is an individual on top of that, even the masters will die!

2025260085.english: That's right, unique entities are… not ordinary.

2025260086.korean: 대체 무슨 말을 하고 싶은 것이오? 우리더러 돔을 버리고, 다른 거점을 세우라 이 말이오?
2025260086.english: What on earth are you trying to say? Are you telling us to abandon the dome and establish another base?

2025260088.english: I will defeat the unique entity.

2025260089.english: … … Is it to protect Sumire and her group?

2025260090.korean: 이해가 안 되는구려… 바이오로이드 따위는 그냥 내버려두면 될 것을.
2025260090.english: I don't understand... They should just leave the bioroids alone.

2025260092.english: Definitely! You said the same thing earlier.

2025260094.english: Lord, this is just the kind of person he is.

2025260098.english: … … I’ll let you know for now… …

2025260099.korean: 이 몸은 스미레 일행을… 그대로부터 빼앗으려 했던 자.
2025260099.english: I am the one who tried to take Sumire and her group away from them.

2025260100.korean: 지금도 스미레 일행을 오르카로 돌려보내고 싶지 않다고… 생각하고 있소외다.
2025260100.english: Even now, I think that I don't want to send Sumire and her group back to Orca.

2025260101.korean: 폐하께선 이미 시덴 씨 일행을 포함한 작전을 세워두셨습니다.
2025260101.english: His Majesty has already devised a plan that includes Mr. Shiden and his party.

2025260103.korean: - 시덴은 팔짱을 끼거나, 천장을 올려다보거나 하며 끙끙거렸다.
2025260103.english: Shiden groaned while crossing his arms or looking up at the ceiling.

2025260104.korean: 그대와 말하고 있으면… 정말 맥이 풀리는구려……
2025260104.english: Talking to you… really drains my energy…

2025260105.english: Lord, this is just the kind of person he is.

2025260106.english: Hatsuna, I heard that earlier too…

2025260108.korean: 스미레, 그대는 왜 그렇게 즐거운 얼굴을… 하고 있는 것이오……
2025260108.english: Sumire, why are you making such a happy face...

2025260109.english: Because you remind me a little of my old teacher.

2025260113.english: I understand. Human... I will cooperate with you.

2025260115.english: This is not the time to be trying to persuade Shiden.

2025260116.korean: 그럼, 내가 직접 돔에 들어가서 시덴에게 명령할까?
2025260116.english: Then, should I go into the dome myself and give orders to Shiden?

2025260117.english: I guess it won't work after all...?

2025260119.korean: 음, 이렇게 된 이상 심플하게 가자.
2025260119.english: Hmm, since things have turned out this way, let's keep it simple.

2025260120.english: First, we will eliminate the unique entities.

2025260121.korean: 그건 괜찮아. 시덴 일행도 협력해줄 테니까.
2025260121.english: That's fine. Shiden and his group will cooperate too.

2025260122.korean: 그리고, 나는 시덴이 적대적이라고 생각하지 않아.
2025260122.english: And, I don't think Shiden is hostile.

2025260123.english: Haha. Let's send out a scout first.

2025260127.korean: [그래. 하지만 제로 애들이 없었어도, 그랬을 거야.]
2025260127.english: [Yeah. But even without the Zero kids, it would have been the same.]

2025260129.korean: [곤경에 처한 사람이 있다면 돕는 게 당연하다고.]
2025260129.english: [It is only natural to help someone in distress.]

2025260130.korean: [그래서 말인데, 토벌 작전엔 너도 협력해줬으면 해.]
2025260130.english: [So, I’d like you to cooperate with the subjugation operation.]

2025260132.english: Yeah. But I'd like you to cooperate now.

2025270001.korean: - 특이체 토벌을 위해 시덴 일행의 협력을 얻은 후, 우선 로크를 회수했다.
2025270001.english: - After obtaining the cooperation of Shiden's party to subdue the singularity, we first recovered Locke.

2025270003.english:
I have nothing to say.
 To think I'm the only one returning to Orca…

2025270004.korean: 신경 쓰지 마세요. 이것도 작전의 일부고, 원래 로크 씨를 구하러 여기까지 온 거잖아요.
2025270004.english: Don't worry about it. This is part of the operation, and we originally came all the way here to rescue Mr. Locke.

2025270005.korean: 게다가 이 고속 수송기는 AGS밖에 탈 수 없으니까요.
2025270005.english: Besides, only AGS can ride this high-speed transport.

2025270007.korean:
신속히 오르카로 귀환해, 수복이 완료되면 바로 전장에 복귀하여,
칠흑의 날개를 펼쳐 보일 것을 약속드리겠습니다.
2025270007.english:
Return to Orca swiftly, and as soon as repairs are complete, return to the battlefield immediately.
 I promise to spread my pitch-black wings.

2025270009.english: Then I will close the door.

2025270010.korean: - 로크는 오르카호까지는 고속 비행으로 귀환할 수 있다고 말했지만, 만일을 대비해 물자용 소형 고속 수송기로의 이송을 결정했다.
2025270010.english: Locke said that he could return to the Orca by high-speed flight, but decided to transport it by a small high-speed transport aircraft for supplies just in case.

2025270011.korean: - 그리고 토벌 작전을 더욱 완벽하게 만들기 위해 D돔에 있는 바이오로이드들의 상세 정보를 파악하기로 했다.
2025270011.english: And to make the extermination operation even more perfect, we decided to gather detailed information on the bioroids in the D-Dome.

2025270012.korean: 드디어 제가 나설 차례군요!!! 돔의 공기, 최고다!!!
2025270012.english: It's finally my turn to step up!!! The air in the dome is the best!!!

2025270014.korean: ….그 이상한 행동을 하는 자는 무엇이란 말이오.
2025270014.english: … What kind of person is that who behaves strangely?

2025270015.korean: 우오오오오오오!!! 쿠노이치 시덴!!!! 감동입니다!!! 처음 뵙겠습니다! 저는 흐레스벨그라고 합니다!!!
2025270015.english: Uoooooh!!! Kunoichi Shiden!!!! I'm so moved!!! Nice to meet you! My name is Hresvelgr!!!

2025270017.english: I'm sorry... I really like Densetsu's works.

2025270018.korean: 오타쿠라는 거냐. 멸망 전엔 엄청 많았지.
2025270018.english: Are you saying I'm an otaku? There were tons of them before the apocalypse.

2025270019.korean: 있지, 너… 최애한테 해명하게 만들다니 안 부끄러워?
2025270019.english: Hey, you... aren't you ashamed of making your bias explain themselves?

2025270021.korean: 괜찮아요. 흐레스벨그 씨의 지식은 항상 도움이 되니까요.
2025270021.english: It's alright. Mr. Hresvelgr's knowledge is always helpful.

2025270023.english: Alright, we don't have much time, so let's hurry up.

2025270026.korean: 먼저 쿠노이치 시덴! 대전란 제3부에 등장하는 작품 내 최강의 쿠노이치! 무라사키류의 시조이며, 제로와 카엔의 기술은 그녀의 검 ‘뇌신’과 ‘화신’을 휘두르는 모습을 재현한 것이라 불리고 있습니다! 즉…
2025270026.english: First up is Kunoichi Shiden! The strongest kunoichi in the series, appearing in Part 3 of the Great War! She is the founder of the Murasaki-ryu, and it is said that the techniques of Zero and Kaen are a recreation of her wielding her swords, 'Raishin' and 'Kashin'! In other words…

2025270027.korean: 시덴은 검을 그냥 휘두르기만 해도 필살기급 기술을 낼 수 있다는 거죠! 그리고 그 강력한 시덴의 필살기 하면 바로 무라사키류 오의 ‘춘뢰’! 두 자루의 검을 합체! 그것을 고속 회전시켜 번개와 불꽃의 참격을 적에게 꽂아넣는다!!
2025270027.english: Shiden can unleash a finishing move-level technique just by swinging his sword! And speaking of Shiden's powerful finishing move, it is none other than the Murasaki-ryu Secret Technique 'Spring Thunder'! He combines two swords! He spins them at high speed to thrust a slash of lightning and flames into the enemy!!

2025270028.korean: 회전하는 검에서 방출되는 번개와 불꽃의 색은 변질되고, 불꽃이 튀며, 낙뢰가 떨어진다! 그 광경은 마치 벚꽃이 흩날리는 봄날의 낙뢰! 봄에 떨어지는 벼락! 그래서 춘뢰!
2025270028.english: The colors of the lightning and flames emitted from the spinning sword change, sparks fly, and lightning strikes! The sight is just like lightning on a spring day with cherry blossoms scattering! Thunderbolts falling in spring! That is why it is called Spring Thunder!

2025270029.korean: 참고로 이 모습은 무라사키류의 비술로 변화한 모습입니다! 설정상 어떤 모습으로도 변할 수 있고, 갸루 모습으로 되어 있습니다!
2025270029.english: For reference, this is a form transformed by the secret techniques of the Murasaki-ryu! According to the setting, she can transform into any form, and she is currently in a gyaru look!

2025270030.korean: 정말 잘 알고 있구려… 이 몸도 절반은 잊고 있었는데 말이오.
2025270030.english: You really know it well... I, too, had forgotten half of it.

2025270031.korean: ……저기, 사령관… 이거 전체 분량 다 들어야 해요? 끝날 즈음엔 철충에게 포위당할지도 몰라요?
2025270031.english: … … Hey, Commander… do we have to listen to the whole thing? We might get surrounded by Iron蟲 by the time it ends?

2025270032.korean: 흐레스벨그, 누가 여기 소속되어 있는지 먼저 확인해서 사령관에게 문서로 정리해 보내거라. 최대한 빨리 말이다.
2025270032.english: Hresvelgr, first identify who is affiliated here, compile the information into a document, and send it to the Commander. Do it as quickly as possible.

2025270035.korean: 시덴, 미안하지만 여기 있는 사람들을 이 아이에게 소개해줄 수 있겠나?
2025270035.english: Shiden, I'm sorry, but could you introduce the people here to this child?

2025270036.korean: 알겠소…… 바로 전투 가능한 이들을 모아오도록 하겠네……
2025270036.english: Understood… I will have those capable of fighting brought in immediately…

2025270038.english: The vibe is similar, so I'm confused...

2025270039.korean: - D돔 측과 동시에 오르카호 측도 작전 준비가 진행되고 있다.
2025270039.english: Operation preparations are underway on the Orca side simultaneously with the D-Dome side.

2025270040.korean: 모두, 준비 서둘러! 장비 점검 잊지 말고!
2025270040.english: Everyone, hurry up and get ready! Don't forget to check your equipment!

2025270041.korean: 준비가 끝나는 대로 전선 기지로 출발하니까 빠뜨리는 거 없도록 해.
2025270041.english: We're heading to the front-line base as soon as preparations are complete, so make sure you don't miss anything.

2025270042.korean: 우르, 아까부터 왔다갔다 하던데… 뭔가 못 찾겠는 거 있어?
2025270042.english: Ur, you've been going back and forth for a while... Is there something you can't find?

2025270043.english: Hmm. I can't see my bag.

2025270044.korean: 모두가 방에서 나올 때 가져왔다고 생각했는데……
2025270044.english: I thought I brought it when everyone came out of the room...

2025270047.korean: 그거, 가방이 진짜 안 보이는 거야? 아니면 그냥 개그야?
2025270047.english: Is the bag really invisible? Or is it just a joke?

2025270050.english: If it takes time to find, have a backup—

2025270051.korean: 우르! 가방 여기 있었어. 내 침대에 대충 올려져 있었어.
2025270051.english: Urr! The bag was here. It was just haphazardly placed on my bed.

2025270052.english: Oh, right, wait a minute I was about to put it up but forgot…

2025270053.english: Seriously… … you should have put it on your own bed.

2025270054.english: Well, I put up this and that...

2025270055.korean: 그렇다고 해서 내 침대에 두지 마.
2025270055.english: Even so, don't put it on my bed.

2025270058.english: For some reason, Tiamat started to look like a mom to me.

2025270060.english: Mama~ please clean it up for me~

2025270062.korean: 그런 건… 먼저 결혼부터 하고 나서……
2025270062.english: Things like that… let's get married first…

2025270065.korean: 자자, 다들, 릴랙스하는 건 좋지만 방심은 금물이야!
2025270065.english: Alright, everyone, it's good to relax, but don't let your guard down!

2025270066.korean: 이번에 스트라이커즈는 특이체 토벌의 주축 중 하나니까.
2025270066.english: Since the Strikers are one of the key players in the extermination of the singularity this time.

2025270068.korean: 특이체 작전엔 몇 번 참가했지만, 기본적으로 교란이나 지원이 주 임무였으니까요.
2025270068.english: I participated in Singularity Operations a few times, but my primary mission was basically disruption or support.

2025270070.korean: 그만큼 스트라이커즈가 높이 평가되고 있다는 뜻이야.
2025270070.english: That means the Strikers are highly regarded.

2025270071.english: Since the commander is leading, it will definitely be fine.

2025270073.english: Let's make it a success no matter what. Everyone.

2025270075.english: Now, let's go to the briefing.

2025270077.korean: 이번에 오르카호에 타고 있는 사람 중에서 계급이 제일 높으니까요?
2025270077.english: Because you have the highest rank among the people on the Orca this time, right?

2025270078.english: Ugh... Commander Tyrant was on board...

2025270079.english: Because now I've become a cute girl~

2025270080.english: I'm a cute girl too, you know?

2025270084.korean: 그때 왜 카페 호라이즌에서 땡땡이를 쳐서……
2025270084.english: Why did I skip work at Cafe Horizon back then…

2025270085.korean: 대단해, 대장이 땡땡이친 걸 후회하고 있어……
2025270085.english: That's amazing. The captain is regretting skipping work...

2025270087.korean: 방 안에서 땡땡이쳤으면 안 들켰을지도 몰라……
2025270087.english: I might not have gotten caught if I had skipped class in my room…

2025270090.korean: 애초에, 대장이 어디 있는지 정도는 당연히 파악되고 있을 테니까.
2025270090.english: After all, they would naturally know where the commander is in the first place.

2025270091.english: It’s the same no matter where you skip work.

2025270092.korean: 거짓말이지…? 오르카엔 프라이버시라는 게 없는 거냐!?
2025270092.english: You're lying, right...? Does Orca not have any privacy!?

2025270093.korean: 사령관이니까 당연하잖아. 위치를 모르면 그게 더 문제야.
2025270093.english: It's only natural since he's the commander. If he didn't know the location, that would be an even bigger problem.

2025270095.korean: 오르카에 프라이버시가 있는지 없는지는, 신경 쓰면 안 되는 거죠~! 아하하!
2025270095.english: Whether Orca has privacy or not, you shouldn't worry about that, right?! Hahaha!

2025270099.korean: - 아직까지는 모든 것이 순조롭게 진행되고 있다……
2025270099.english: So far, everything is going smoothly…

2025270100.korean: - 다만 우려되는 사항은 특이체를 쓰러뜨리는 절차가 평소와 다르다는 점뿐이다.
2025270100.english: However, the only concern is that the procedure for defeating the unique entity is different from usual.

2025270101.korean: - 시덴 일행, D돔에 있는 바이오로이드들의 데이터도 흐레스벨그에게서 무사히 받아 확인했다.
2025270101.english: Shiden and his party also safely received and verified the data of the bioroids in the D-Dome from Hresvelgr.

2025270102.korean: - 이제 로크가 돌아와서 수복을 마치고, 전투 부대에 합류하면 완벽하다.
2025270102.english: Now, it will be perfect if Locke returns, finishes the recovery, and joins the combat unit.

2025270103.korean: 폐하, 로크 씨를 태운 고속 수송기가 도착합니다.
2025270103.english: Your Majesty, the high-speed transport plane carrying Mr. Locke is arriving.

2025270105.korean: - 하지만 내가 의자에서 일어선 순간, 패널에 철충과의 전투가 시작됐다는 알림이 들어왔다.
2025270105.english: However, the moment I stood up from the chair, a notification appeared on the panel stating that the battle with the Iron蟲 had begun.

2025270106.english: - The place where the battle began is… …

2025270107.korean: - 나는 다시 의자에 앉아, 돔 안에 있는 우로보로스에게 통신을 연결했다.
2025270107.english: I sat back down in the chair and connected to the Ouroboros inside the dome.

2025270108.korean: 자네인가, 방금 철충과의 전투가 시작되었다네. 수는 많지 않지만, 서서히 늘고 있는 것으로 보일세.
2025270108.english: Is that you? The battle with the Iron蟲 has just begun. Their numbers are not large, but they appear to be gradually increasing.

2025270109.korean: 작전을 서둘러 시작하는 편이 좋겠네, 불길한 예감이 들고 있다네.
2025270109.english: It would be best to start the operation quickly; I have a bad feeling about this.

2025270110.korean: 그럴걸세. 철충이 돔 방향으로 이동을 시작했다고 해도 놀랍지 않을 상황이라네.
2025270110.english: I suppose so. It wouldn't be surprising if the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) started moving toward the dome.

2025270111.korean: 음? 그럼 이 철충들은 어떻게 하려고 그러나?
2025270111.english: Hmm? Then what do you plan to do with these Iron Bugs?

2025270112.korean: - 전투가 본격화되기 전에 시덴 일행의 전력을 이 눈으로 확인해두고 싶다.
2025270112.english: I want to verify Shiden and his party's full power with my own eyes before the battle begins in earnest.

2025270114.korean: 그럼, 그 인간 혐오자에게 자네 능력을 제대로 보여주고 오게나.
2025270114.english: Then, go show that human hater your true abilities.

2025270119.english: Okay. Then I'll come meet you.

2025270121.english: [Will the Anomalous One Start Moving Too?]

2025270122.english: [Understood. Sky Knights, please go monitor the singularities.]

2025280005.english: Yeah... it's become violent, right? Anyway...

2025280006.english: I moved according to instructions, and I collapsed immediately…

2025280008.english: Why is Zero acting so cocky...

2025280009.english: It is thanks to the Lord's command!

2025280010.korean: 주공에게 맡기면 이 정도쯤은 식은 죽 먹기죠!
2025280010.english: If you leave it to the Lord, this is a piece of cake!

2025280011.english: Right now, it's before dinner, but.

2025280012.english: It's okay to get this excited, right?

2025280013.english: If the Lord is praised, Kaen is happy too.

2025280016.korean: 그렇구나, 제로랑 카엔은 그 인간님을 정말 좋아하는구나.
2025280016.english: I see. Zero and Kaen really like that human.

2025280018.english: All the Iron蟲 that swarmed the dome have been eradicated.

2025280019.english: They didn't break into the inside.

2025280020.korean:
이상한 감각이구려…… 저렇게 철충이 많았는데도, 
포위당하지 않고…… 눈앞의 철충 한 마리 한 마리에게 집중할 수 있었소외다.
2025280020.english:
What a strange sensation... even though there were so many Iron Bugs,
 I was able to focus on each and every Iron Bug right in front of me without being surrounded.

2025280021.english: This is the very power of the Lord.

2025280022.english: It is different from the humans the Master knows.

2025280024.english: Shiden slowly took a deep breath.

2025280025.korean:
그대들도 꽤나 강해졌소외다.
참으로 많은 생사의 고비를 넘겨온 거겠지.
2025280025.english:
You have also become quite strong.
 You must have truly overcome many life-or-death situations.

2025280026.korean: 네. 분명 주공이 아니었다면 여기까지 살아남지 못했을 거예요.
2025280026.english: Yes. If it weren't for you, I certainly wouldn't have survived this far.

2025280029.korean: - 쿠노이치들의 싸움 방식은 제로나 카엔, 엔라이를 보며 익숙해졌다고 생각했지만……
2025280029.english: I thought I had gotten used to the kunoichi's fighting style by watching Zero, Kaen, and Enrai, but...

2025280030.korean: - 시덴의 싸움 방식은 적을 제거하는 정밀도가 높다고 해야 할까,  철충 한 마리를 처리하는 데 걸리는 시간이 극단적으로 짧았다.
2025280030.english: - Shiden's fighting style was so precise in eliminating enemies that it was hard to describe; the time it took to deal with a single Iron Bug was extremely short.

2025280031.korean: - 그 덕에 전체 전투 속도도 올라갔고, 지휘하는 나도 그 속도를 따라가지 않으면 안 되었다.
2025280031.english: Thanks to that, the overall speed of the battle increased, and I, as the commander, had to keep up with that speed.

2025280032.korean: - 그래… 이건 칸이 있는 호드를 지휘할 때 느끼던 감각과 똑같다.
2025280032.english: - Yeah… this feels exactly the same as when I was commanding a horde with Khan.

2025280033.english: … … Well, I’ll admit he’s a competent person.

2025280034.english: Then, Invitation, you too to Orca…

2025280035.korean: 그럴 생각은 없소. 그리고… 그대들을 포기할 생각도 없소외다.
2025280035.english: I have no such intention. And… I have no intention of giving up on you either.

2025280038.korean: 알겠습니다. 이 이야기는 전투가 끝나고 나서 다시 나누죠.
2025280038.english: Understood. Let's talk about this again after the battle is over.

2025280041.english: You're still as stubborn as ever…

2025280043.english: Hmph... And you've even become arrogant...

2025280044.korean: - 시덴의 표정은 말과는 달리, 부드럽게 웃고 있는 듯 보였다.
2025280044.english: Contrary to his words, Shiden's expression appeared to be a gentle smile.

2025280045.korean: - 그때, 특이체 감시에 나섰던 스카이나이츠로부터 통신이 들어왔다.
2025280045.english: Just then, a communication came in from the Sky Knights who had set out to monitor the singularity.

2025280046.english: Was there any movement in the singularity?

2025280047.korean: 특이체 주변에 모여 있던 철충들이 돔과 오르카호를 향해 이동을 시작했습니다.
2025280047.english: The Iron蟲s gathered around the singularity began moving toward the Dome and the Orca.

2025280048.english: The ratio is about 7 for Dome and 3 for Orca.

2025280049.english: Did they notice from the battle just now...?

2025280050.korean: 특이체에 움직임은 없습니다. 하지만, 감지되는 파동이 점점 강해지고 있는 것으로 보아, 성장 중일 가능성이 있습니다.
2025280050.english: There is no movement in the singularity. However, judging by the fact that the detected waves are becoming stronger, there is a possibility that it is growing.

2025280052.korean: - 이 이상 특이체를 성장시킬 수는 없다.
2025280052.english: - It is not possible to grow the singularity beyond this point.

2025280053.korean: 90%는 완료되었습니다. 전투 부대는 거의 준비가 끝난 상태입니다.
2025280053.english: 90% is complete. The combat units are nearly ready.

2025280054.korean: 로크 씨는 막 돌아왔기 때문에 아직 수복 중입니다.
2025280054.english: Mr. Locke has just returned, so he is still in the process of recovery.

2025280056.english: I will deliver this to each unit.

2025280057.english: It looks like everyone is here.

2025280058.korean: 조금 이르긴 하지만 전투가 시작될 것이외다.
2025280058.english: Although it is a bit early, the battle will begin.

2025280059.korean: 이쪽을 향해 철충이 이동을 시작했다고 하오.
2025280059.english: They say the Iron蟲 has started moving toward this direction.

2025280060.korean:
이번엔 인간의 지휘를 받아 싸우게 되었소.
납득되지 않는 자가 있을 거라 생각하지만…
2025280060.english:
This time, I will be fighting under human command.
 I think there will be some who won't understand, but...

2025280063.korean:
음. 아까 전투에서 인간의 장군으로서의 능력은……
분하긴 하지만, 인정할 수밖에 없다고 생각하오.
2025280063.english:
Hmm. In the battle earlier, his ability as a human general was…
 It is frustrating, but I think I have no choice but to admit it.

2025280064.korean: 조금만 더 무능했더라면… 거리낌 없이 제안을 거절했을 텐데……
2025280064.english: If only I were a little more incompetent… I would have rejected the offer without hesitation…

2025280066.korean: 이 몸도 괜한 고집을 부려서… 그대들을 잃고 싶지 않았소.
2025280066.english: I didn't want to lose you all by being pointless and stubborn.

2025280067.korean: 듣자 하니 특이체라는 놈은 꽤 강한 개체인 듯하오.
2025280067.english: From what I hear, that so-called singularity seems to be a pretty strong individual.

2025280068.korean: 작전은 들은 대로…… 레이, 코노하, 하가네는 쿠노이치들을 이끌고 돔에 몰려드는 철충을 소탕하시게나.
2025280068.english: As I heard, the plan is as follows… Rei, Konoha, and Hagane, lead the kunoichi and wipe out the Iron蟲 swarming into the dome.

2025280070.korean: 이 몸은 스미레 일행과 함께 특이체에게 향하겠소.
2025280070.english: I will head toward the Singularity with Sumire and her companions.

2025280071.korean:
가는 길에 마주치는 철충은 최대한 베어 두겠소.
그만큼, 그대들의 부담도 조금은 줄어들 거라 생각하오.
2025280071.english:
I will cut down as many Iron Bugs as I can on the way.
 I think that will reduce your burden a little as a result.

2025280072.korean:
우리끼리만으로 이곳을 지켜낼 수 있을까요?  
지금까지는 시덴 님이 계셨기 때문에 어떻게든 가능했던 건데…
2025280072.english:
Can we protect this place by ourselves?
 Up until now, it was somehow possible because Lord Shiden was here...

2025280073.korean: 모모, 뽀끄루, 사레나, 스노우 페더가 이곳 방어를 함께 맡아 줄 거라 하였소외다.
2025280073.english: It was said that Momo, Pokkuru, Sarena, and Snow Feather would take charge of defending this place together.

2025280074.korean: 인간의 지휘도 있지. 문제는 없을 것이오.
2025280074.english: There is also human command. There shouldn't be any problems.

2025280076.korean: 그렇다면, 이 목숨을 바쳐서라도 시덴 님이 돌아올 곳을 지켜내겠습니다.
2025280076.english: In that case, I will protect the place where Lord Shiden will return, even if it costs me my life.

2025280077.korean: 어허 잡소리를! 목숨을 걸지 마시게. 정말 위험해지면 미련 없이 도망치도록 하시오.
2025280077.english: Hey, stop talking nonsense! Don't risk your life. If things get really dangerous, run away without hesitation.

2025280078.korean: 그리고… 인간이 이상한 말을 하여도 그 즉시 거절하시게.
2025280078.english: And… even if a human says something strange, refuse them immediately.

2025280079.korean:
그건 그대들에게 맡기겠소.
아직 그 인간을 직접 만난 건 아니니… 강제로 명령할 수도 없을 테지.
2025280079.english:
I will leave that to you.
 Since I haven't met that person in person yet... I probably won't be able to force an order.

2025280081.korean: 하지만 그 인간… 원래부터 좀 이상해서 “이상한 말”이라는 게 판단하기 어려워요~
2025280081.english: But that person... he's been a bit strange from the start, so it's hard to judge what he says as "strange."

2025280083.korean: 이 몸도 그렇게 생각하고 있소. 그 작자와 이야기하면 정말로 맥이 빠지니 말이오.
2025280083.english: I feel the same way. Talking to that fellow really drains my energy.

2025280084.korean:
어쩌면 이 몸도 이상해지고 있는 걸지도 모르겠구려.
실제로 그 녀석이 짠 작전에 이리 순응하고 있으니 말이오……
2025280084.english:
Perhaps my body is becoming strange, too.
 Actually, I am complying with the plan that guy devised like this...

2025280087.english: [Shiden was amazing, too. He really is everyone's master.]

2025280091.english: Okay. Please keep the surveillance going.

2025280092.korean: 아르망, 작전 준비는 어느 정도 진행됐어?
2025280092.english: Armand, how far along are the operation preparations?

2025280093.english: Okay, it's a bit early, but let's start the operation.

2025290002.korean: - 현재, 아머드 메이든, 스트라이커즈를 주축으로 한 토벌 부대가 출격해, 특이체에게 향하고 있다.
2025290002.english: - Currently, a subjugation force led by the Armored Maidens and Strikers has sortied and is heading toward the Singularity.

2025290003.korean: 진격! 최단 시간 내에 특이체를 목표로 삼는다! 앞을 막는 철충들은 쓸어버려라!
2025290003.english: Charge! Target the Singularity in the shortest possible time! Wipe out the Iron蟲 blocking our way!

2025290005.korean: 그래! 계속 나아가자―! 후딱 가서 후딱 돌아오자―!!
2025290005.english: Alright! Let's keep moving forward—! Let's hurry there and hurry back—!!

2025290006.korean: ……틀린 말은 아니지만, 다른 부대도 있으니까 말투는 좀 더 생각해보는 게 어때?
2025290006.english: ... ... It's not wrong, but since there are other units, why don't you think a little more about your tone?

2025290008.korean: 그딴 걸로 작전이 빨리 끝난다면야, 얼마든지 생각하지.
2025290008.english: If the operation could end quickly with something like that, I’d gladly consider it.

2025290009.english: It might get faster, so please keep that in mind...

2025290011.korean: ……목표! 특이체! 콜로서스! 후딱 끝내고 후딱 쉬자!
2025290011.english: … … Goal! The Singularity! Colossus! Let's finish this quickly and take a break!

2025290012.english: … … Hey, I'm dampening my spirits, so could you please leave quietly?

2025290014.korean: 이쪽은 안 그래도 평소 안 하던 호위 같은 걸 하느라 정신없는데……
2025290014.english: We're already hectic doing things we don't usually do, like escorting, and...

2025290015.english: It would be a relief if it just ended up being a case of not fitting...

2025290016.korean: 근데, 진짜 왜 우리가 뽑힌 거야?
2025290016.english: But seriously, why were we chosen?

2025290017.english: It's the unit furthest from escort duties...

2025290019.english: You guys, move your hands rather than your mouths.

2025290020.korean: 아니 근데 진짜 우리랑은 안 맞는다니까~! 게다가 여기 엄청 춥다고!
2025290020.english: No, seriously, I'm telling you, this just doesn't suit us! Besides, it's super cold up there!

2025290021.korean: 아 진짜, 빨리 돌아가서 핫팩한테 뜨끈하게 데워달라 해야겠네!
2025290021.english: Ah, seriously, I need to hurry back and ask the hot pack to heat me up nicely!

2025290022.korean: 안 어울린다면서 철충은 잘만 잡고 있는 것 같다만?
2025290022.english: You say it doesn't suit you, but it looks like you're catching Iron Bugs just fine.

2025290023.korean: 맡았으면 끝이지 뭐~ 아무리 그래도 핫팩 부탁인데 대충 할 리 없잖아?
2025290023.english: Once I've taken on the role, that's it~ Even so, it's a request for hot packs, so there's no way I'd do it half-heartedly, right?

2025290024.korean: 그런 점을 보고 기용한 거겠지. 주인님의 안목답군.
2025290024.english: That must be what you saw in him when you hired him. That’s typical of your discerning eye, Master.

2025290025.english: By the way, where did Babonir go?

2025290026.english: Ahaha! Ahahahahahaha! The best! My stomach hurts!

2025290028.korean: 너 개그 진짜 대박이야! 그런 건 대체 어디서 어떻게 생각해내는 거야?
2025290028.english: Your jokes are seriously amazing! Where on earth do you come up with those?

2025290032.korean: 파프니르의 꼬리는 꼿꼿해서 꿈쩍할 꼴이 아니야.
2025290032.english: Fafnir's tail is so stiff it won't budge.

2025290035.korean: 응, 철충이 늘어나고 있어…… 서둘러야 해……
2025290035.english: Yeah, the number of Iron Bugs is increasing... We have to hurry...

2025290038.korean: 우르 개그 듣고 파프니르 씨가 빵 터졌어……
2025290038.english: Mr. Fafnir burst out laughing after hearing Ur's gag...

2025290039.english: Ah... come to think of it...

2025290040.korean: 호드 애들이랑 있을 때도, 한동안 개그 멈추질 않았지……
2025290040.english: Even when I was with the Horde guys, I didn't stop telling jokes for a while...

2025290042.korean: 뭐, 우르가 즐거워 보여서 괜찮긴 한데……
2025290042.english: Well, Ur looks happy, so it's fine, but...

2025290047.korean: (저 두 사람, 전혀 호위를 안 하고 있어…!)
2025290047.english: (Those two aren't providing any protection at all…!)

2025290050.korean: 이런 데서 빈둥거리지 말고! 얼른 자리로 돌아가지 못하겠느냐!
2025290050.english: Stop loitering around here! Can't you return to your seat immediately!

2025290051.korean: 뭐야! 그렇게 소리 지를 것까진 없잖아!
2025290051.english: What! You didn't have to scream like that!

2025290053.korean: 엣!? 아…… 알, 알았다고! 알았으니까! 옷 당기지 마!
2025290053.english: Eh!? Ah... I, I got it! I got it, so don't pull on my clothes!

2025290054.english: It's increasing! I'm telling you, it's increasing!

2025290056.korean: 미안… 파프니르…… 내 개그가 너무 웃겼나 봐……
2025290056.english: Sorry... Fafnir... I guess my joke was too funny...

2025290059.korean:
- D돔에서는 시덴, 엔라이, 제로, 카엔이 토벌 부대로 출격하고,
스카이나이츠가 상공해서 그들을 지원한다.
2025290059.english:
- At D-Dome, Shiden, Enrai, Zero, and Kaen sortie as a subjugation force, and
 The Sky Knights support them from the sky.

2025290061.english: This is it! This is the one!!

2025290062.korean: 지금! 눈앞에서 대전란 제3부의 장면이 펼쳐지고 있다구요!!!
2025290062.english: Right now! The scene from Part 3 of the Great War is unfolding right before your eyes!!!

2025290064.korean: 대단해요. 저렇게 소리 지르면서도, 완벽하게 저희를 지원하고 있어요.
2025290064.english: That's amazing. Even while shouting like that, they are supporting us perfectly.

2025290065.korean: 손이랑 눈이랑 입이 따로 놀고 있어서 무서워…… 어떻게 된 거야……?
2025290065.english: My hands, eyes, and mouth are moving independently, it's scary… … What’s going on… … ?

2025290067.korean: 아니, 저건 진지하게 임하라고 혼내야 되는 거 아닌가?
2025290067.english: Wait, shouldn't they be scolding them to take this seriously?

2025290068.korean: 하지만, 역할은 완벽을 넘어서 지나치게 잘 수행하고 있으니 말이지……
2025290068.english: However, he is performing his role beyond perfect, even excessively well...

2025290069.korean: 쟤는 저런 면모가 진짜로 성가시단 말이야……
2025290069.english: That side of him is seriously annoying...

2025290070.korean: 쿠노이치들, 꽤 빠르네……! 이러면 나도 질 수 없지!
2025290070.english: Kunoichi, you're pretty fast… …! I can't lose at this rate!

2025290071.korean: 모두 가자! 우리가 뒤처지면 멋이 안 나잖아!
2025290071.english: Let's all go! It wouldn't look cool if we fell behind!

2025290072.korean:
여러분, 탐색과 교란은 제게 맡겨주세요! 완벽하게 지원해드리겠습니다!  
그 누구 하나 다치게 하지 않고 목표 지점까지 에스코트해드리겠어요오오오오!
2025290072.english:
Everyone, leave the exploration and disruption to me! I will provide perfect support!
 I will escort you to your destination without letting a single person get hurt!

2025290076.english: This much is just a warm-up!

2025290079.english: Master! It is okay if you speed up even more!

2025290081.korean: 그럼 스미레, 하츠나, 눈앞의 적을 쓸어버리도록 하시오!
2025290081.english: Then, Sumire and Hatsuna, wipe out the enemy in front of you!

2025290086.korean: - 두 사람의 불꽃과 번개에 의해 철충들의 포위망에 구멍이 생기고, 쿠노이치들이 그 틈으로 돌진한다.
2025290086.english: - A hole opens in the Iron蟲's encirclement by the flames and lightning of the two people, and the Kunoichi rush through the gap.

2025290087.korean: 자, 전진이오! 눈에 보이는 모든 걸 베어 넘겨 가는 것이외다!
2025290087.english: Now, advance! Cut down everything in sight!

2025290088.english: Invitation, there is a giant Iron Bug ahead!

2025290089.english: Ouka, synchronize your breath with me!

2025290093.korean: - 쿠노이치들이 철충을 베고, 불태우고, 쓸어버리는 모습은 마치 영화의 한 장면을 보는 듯했다.
2025290093.english: The sight of the kunoichi slashing, burning, and wiping out the Iron蟲 was like watching a scene from a movie.

2025290094.korean: - 각자가 연계하고, 때로는 돌진하고, 또 서로를 커버하며 하나의 덩어리로 움직였다.
2025290094.english: Each of them linked up, sometimes charged forward, and covered for one another, moving as a single unit.

2025290095.korean: - 불꽃이 흩날리고, 천둥이 울리며, 카엔의 거대한 불길이 치솟는가 싶더니, 곧 그 안에서 제로와 엔라이의 번개의 섬광이 뻗쳐 나간다.
2025290095.english: Flames scatter, thunder roars, and just as Kaen's massive flames seem to rise, flashes of lightning from Zero and Enrai soon spread out from within.

2025290096.korean: - 그리고 그런 빛의 흐름 속에서 유독 눈에 띄는 시덴의 색이 다른 번개와 불꽃.
2025290096.english: - And amidst that flow of light, Shiden's differently colored lightning and flames stood out particularly.

2025290097.korean: - 마치 화려한 꽃이 피어나는 착각을 일으킬 정도로 전장은 격렬히 반짝이며 어둠을 찢고 있었다.
2025290097.english: The battlefield was tearing through the darkness, sparkling violently enough to create the illusion of a magnificent flower blooming.

2025290098.korean: - 쿠노이치들은 더욱 속도를 높이며, 철충들을 재로 만들어버리며 돌파해 나갔다.
2025290098.english: The kunoichis increased their speed even further, breaking through and turning the Iron Bugs into ash.

2025300001.korean: 콜로서스의 비가시 영역 확인! 접근 중!

2025300002.korean: 아머드 메이든의 공격을 신호로 우르가 최대 출력으로 저격.
2025300002.english: Urga sniped at maximum output at the signal of the Armored Maiden's attack.

2025300003.english: After that, they all launch an attack!

2025300009.korean: - 나스호른을 시작으로 아머드 메이든의 무장이 일제히 불을 뿜는다.
2025300009.english: Starting with Nashorn, the Armored Maidens' weapons all fire at once.

2025300010.korean: - 그 폭열의 폭풍에 휩싸여 콜로서스는 견디지 못하고 비가시 영역을 해제하며 모습을 드러냈다.
2025300010.english: Swept up in the storm of explosive heat, Colossus could not endure it and revealed itself by releasing the invisible zone.

2025300012.korean: - 발사된 우르의 최대 출력 플라즈마 라이플이 콜로서스의 흉부를 꿰뚫었다.
2025300012.english: - Ur's maximum output plasma rifle fired pierced Colossus's chest.

2025300013.korean: - 나스호른의 나겔링에 이어 우르의 최대 출력을 맞은 콜로서스는 중심을 잃은 듯 천천히 뒤로 넘어졌다.
2025300013.english: Colossus, having been hit by Ur's maximum output following Nashorn's Nageling, slowly fell backward as if losing his balance.

2025300014.english: Got it, here comes the Strikers!

2025300016.korean:
장화, 천아는 계속해서 공격 부대의 호위를!  
너희들은 무리해서 콜로서스와 싸우려 하지 마라!
2025300016.english:
Janghwa, Cheona, continue to escort the attacking unit!
 Don't try to force a fight with Colossus!

2025300017.korean: 그런 말 안 해도…! 저런 괴물이랑은 안 싸워!
2025300017.english: You don't have to tell me...! I won't fight a monster like that!

2025300018.korean: 그보다도 저런 거한테 칼이 통하긴 해……?
2025300018.english: More importantly, does a knife even work on something like that...?

2025300022.korean: 뭐, 저 바보가 호위하러 가봤자 도움이라곤 전혀 안 될 거 같은데...
2025300022.english: Well, I don't think that idiot would be of any help at all if he went to escort them...

2025300023.korean: 그래도 쟤 돌머리라 튼튼하니까 몇 대 맞아도 괜찮을 거야.
2025300023.english: Still, he's thick-headed and sturdy, so he'll be fine even if he gets hit a few times.

2025300024.korean: 야! 나, 너희들처럼 무기 안 들었거든! 맨손이야! 맨손!
2025300024.english: Hey! I'm not carrying a weapon like you guys! I'm barehanded! Barehanded!

2025300026.korean: 그건 그렇지만…… 그래도 무리! 절대 무리!
2025300026.english: That's true, but... still, it's impossible! Absolutely impossible!

2025300027.korean:
아무리 봐도 너는 저런 큰 놈들 상대로 싸우기 딱인 성능이잖아.
핫팩도 그렇게 생각하지?
2025300027.english:
No matter how I look at it, your performance is perfect for fighting against big guys like that.
 You think so too with hot packs, right?

2025300032.korean: - 오르카호 측 부대가 콜로서스와 전투를 개시하고 몇 분도 지나지 않아 시덴 일행이 도착했다.
2025300032.english: Shiden and his party arrived less than a few minutes after the Orca's forces began fighting the Colossus.

2025300034.english: Yes. That is the unique entity, Colossus.

2025300035.english: I didn't expect it to be that bad...

2025300036.korean: 확실히, 저건 우리 힘으로는 어쩔 수 없었겠구려.
2025300036.english: Certainly, that wouldn't have been possible with our own strength.

2025300037.korean: 하지만, 저희는 저런 녀석을 지금까지 여러 번 토벌해왔습니다.
2025300037.english: However, we have defeated such a guy many times so far.

2025300038.english: Yeah, since Lord is here, I'm not scared.

2025300040.korean: 그러니 인간. 우린 어떻게 하면 되는 것이오?
2025300040.english: So, humans. What are we supposed to do?

2025300041.korean: - 콜로서스는 아무 행동도 못 하게 한 번에 쓰러뜨리는 것이 정석이다.
2025300041.english: - The standard strategy is to defeat Colossus in one go so that he cannot do anything.

2025300042.korean: - 틈을 보이면 이쪽 공격에 적응해서 강력한 반격을 해온다.
2025300042.english: If you show a weakness, they will adapt to your attacks and launch a powerful counterattack.

2025300043.korean: 알겠소. ……그럼 그때까지는 주위의 잡것들을 처리하도록 하겠네.
2025300043.english: Understood. … … Then, until then, I will take care of the trash around here.

2025300045.english: What...? The fact that it's a break...

2025300046.korean: 호오…? 아까는 준비 운동이라 하지 않았소외까?
2025300046.english: Oh...? Didn't you say that was a warm-up earlier?

2025300047.english: Ugh... I did say that, though...

2025300048.english: I resent myself for being so excited...

2025300050.english: You look happy, older sister… Aren’t you tired?

2025300051.korean: 피곤해… 그래도, 정말 기뻐. 다시 스승님과, 이렇게 함께, 싸울 수 있어서.
2025300051.english: I'm tired... but I'm really happy. That I can fight alongside my master again like this.

2025300052.english: The fact that the current master looks happy.

2025300054.korean:
그대들, 대체 뭘 그렇게 히죽거리고 있는 것이오?
아직 전투 중이라는 걸 잊지 마시게나.
2025300054.english:
What on earth are you guys grinning at?
 Don't forget that we are still in battle.

2025300055.korean: 이래서야 원... 나중에 제대로 다시 단련시켜야겠소외다.
2025300055.english: At this rate... I'll have to train him properly again later.

2025300056.korean: 히익~…… 제발 봐주세요~! 저희는 이미 충분히 강하다구요~!
2025300056.english: Eek~… … Please spare us~! We are already strong enough~!

2025300057.korean: 흠, 방심을 넘어 자만심까지 보이다니…… 간도 크구려.
2025300057.english: Hmm, to see you go beyond carelessness and even show arrogance... You're quite bold.

2025300058.korean: 스미레, 괜한 말, 하면 안 돼……
2025300058.english: Sumire, you shouldn't say unnecessary things...

2025300063.english: [Fafnir, please take care of Varg and Colossus!]

2025310001.korean: - 전투가 시작된 지 수십 분이 지났다.
2025310001.english: Tens of minutes have passed since the battle began.

2025310002.korean: - 특이체가 예상 이상으로 성장했기 때문인지, 아니면 원래부터 강한 개체였던 것인지, 아직 쓰러뜨릴 수 없었다.
2025310002.english: Whether it was because the singularity grew more than expected, or because it was a strong individual to begin with, we were unable to defeat it yet.

2025310003.korean: - 전투 부대가 평소와 다르다는 것도 있지만……
2025310003.english: - It’s partly because the combat units are different from usual, but…

2025310004.korean: - 나스호른의 나겔링과 우르의 플라즈마 라이플을 맞고 쓰러졌을 땐 금방 끝날 줄 알았는데……
2025310004.english: - When I collapsed after being hit by Nashorn's Nagelling and Ur's plasma rifle, I thought it would be over quickly…

2025310005.korean: 겉모습은 크게 다르지 않지만, 처음 조우한 이후 꽤 시간이 지났으니까.
2025310005.english: Although the outward appearance hasn't changed much, quite some time has passed since we first met.

2025310006.korean: 그 개체는 기존의 콜로서스와는 뭔가 다를지도 몰라… 쓰러뜨리고 나서 제대로 조사해야겠어.
2025310006.english: That individual might be somehow different from the existing Colossus… I’ll have to investigate it properly after I defeat it.

2025310007.english: The doctor's expression was bright as he said that.

2025310008.korean:
응, 사과했어. 나한텐 잘못 없다고 로크 오빠가 말해줬지만,
그래도 나한테 책임이 있다고 생각하니까…
2025310008.english:
Yeah, I apologized. Locke told me I wasn't at fault, but,
 Still, because I think I have a responsibility…

2025310009.english: So I made sure to fix and modify it properly!

2025310010.korean: 응. 그거 있잖아, 유럽 떠날 때 정신없어서, 스털링 언니가 설계한 부품을 들고 왔었지?
2025310010.english: Yeah. You know, when we were leaving Europe, things were hectic, so we brought the parts Sterling designed, right?

2025310011.korean: - 맞다… 보고는 받았지만, 홋카이도에 도착하고 나서 너무 일이 많아서 완전히 잊고 있었네…
2025310011.english: - Right... I did receive the report, but I've been so busy since arriving in Hokkaido that I completely forgot...

2025310012.korean: - 전체 구조는 아직 모르지만, 디자인이 꽤 다르긴 했지…… 색상도 정반대고……
2025310012.english: I don't know the overall structure yet, but the design was quite different... The colors were the exact opposite, too...

2025310014.korean: "우리 주인의 고결함과 하카의 영혼을 구현한 모습입니다.”라고 했어.
2025310014.english: "He said, 'It embodies our master's nobility and the soul of the Haka.'"

2025310015.english: The armament specifications have changed a bit, so please check them.

2025310016.korean: 자, 이건 뉴 로크 오빠 관련 자료야.
2025310016.english: Here, this is material related to New Rok.

2025310017.korean: 아자즈 언니 성격상, 안 보냈을 수도 있으니까 혹시 몰라서 보내둘게.
2025310017.english: Given Azaz's personality, she might not have sent it, so I'm sending it just in case.

2025310018.korean: - 닥터가 그렇게 말하자, 패널로 데이터가 전송되었다.
2025310018.english: As the doctor said that, the data was transmitted to the panel.

2025310021.korean: - 내가 급히 로크의 스펙을 확인하고 있을 때, 그 로크로부터 통신이 들어왔다.
2025310021.english: While I was hurriedly checking Locke's specifications, a communication came in from Locke.

2025310022.korean: 기다리게 해서 죄송합니다. 각하, 곧 푸른 하늘의 기사, 전장에 도착합니다.
2025310022.english: I apologize for keeping you waiting. Your Excellency, the Knight of the Blue Sky will arrive on the battlefield soon.

2025310023.english: - Ah… looks like you really liked it…

2025310025.korean: 저 같은 고성능 기체라면 어떤 무장이 추가되더라도 성능을 충분히 발휘하고 자유롭게 다룰 수 있습니다.
2025310025.english: With a high-performance machine like mine, I can fully demonstrate my capabilities and handle it freely, regardless of what additional weapons are added.

2025310026.korean: 이 힘으로 반드시 지난 패배를 설욕해 보이겠습니다.
2025310026.english: With this strength, I will definitely avenge the past defeat.

2025310027.korean:
- 지금은 스트라이커즈를 대신해 시덴 일행이 콜로서스와 싸우고 있다.
로크가 도착하면 전 부대로 한꺼번에 몰아쳐서 끝낼 계획이다.
2025310027.english:
- Right now, Shiden and his group are fighting Colossus in place of the Strikers.
 The plan is to finish it off by sending the entire unit in at once once Locke arrives.

2025310028.korean: 그러고 보니, 각하. 하나 보고드릴 게 있습니다.
2025310028.english: Come to think of it, Your Excellency. I have something to report to you.

2025310029.korean: 오르카호에서 출격할 때, 제 등에 타이런트가 올라탔습니다…
2025310029.english: When I took off from the Orca, a Tyrant climbed onto my back…

2025310031.korean: - 내가 머리를 갸웃하고 있는데, 다급한 표정의 바닐라가 뛰어들어왔다.
2025310031.english: While I was tilting my head, Vanilla rushed in with a frantic expression.

2025310035.korean: 그래! 나는 해피…가 아니다! 타이런트다! 주인!
2025310035.english: Right! I am Happy… No! I am Tyrant! Master!

2025310036.korean: 그보다, 왜 나를 특이체 토벌에 보내지 않은 것이냐! 나야말로 적임일 텐데!
2025310036.english: More importantly, why weren't I sent to exterminate the Singularity! I would be the perfect person for the job!

2025310037.korean: 나는 작아졌어도 파괴의 화신이라는 사실은 변하지 않는다!
2025310037.english: Even though I have shrunk, the fact that I am the embodiment of destruction remains unchanged!

2025310038.english: I will prove it right now!

2025310039.english: Happy! What are you doing acting so recklessly!

2025310041.korean: 제대로 무사히 돌아오지 않으면 케이크는 금지예요!
2025310041.english: If you don't return safely, cake is forbidden!

2025310042.korean:
흥! 내가 질 리 없다! 특이체를 파괴하고! 케이크를 먹겠다!  
오르카호에 있는 과자란 과자는 전부 준비해두고 내 귀환을 기다리도록 해라! 바닐라!
2025310042.english:
Hmph! There's no way I'll lose! Destroy the singularity! And eat the cake!
 Prepare every single snack on the Orca and wait for my return! Vanilla!

2025310043.english: Alright! Knight of the Azure Sky!

2025310044.korean:
먼저 우리가 전장에 나타났다는 것을 놈들에게 알려주는 거다!  
내게 맞춰라!
2025310044.english:
First, we let them know that we have appeared on the battlefield!
 Adjust to me!

2025310045.korean: - 그러자 해피는, 타이런트의 머리를 본뜬 방패를 콜로서스를 향해 겨누었다.
2025310045.english: Then Happy aimed a shield modeled after a Tyrant's head at Colossus.

2025310047.korean: - 나는 급히 전 부대에 타이런트 쪽 사선에서 벗어나라고 지시를 내렸다.
2025310047.english: I urgently ordered the entire unit to move out of the line of fire toward the Tyrant.

2025310048.english: It’s a bit unpleasant to be ordered around by you, but…

2025310049.english: Well, given the situation, I will cooperate.

2025310051.korean: - 각 부대원들로부터 퇴피 완료 보고가 잇따라 들어온다.
2025310051.english: - Reports of the completion of evacuation are coming in one after another from each unit member.

2025310052.english: Hold on!!!! You worm bastard!!!! Hahahahahahaha!

2025310053.korean: - 해피는 로크의 위에 올라탄 채 프라이멀 파이어를 뿜어냈다.
2025310053.english: Happy spewed Primal Fire while riding on top of Locke.

2025310054.korean: - 그 열선은 원래 모습인 타이런트가 발사했을 때와 다를 바 없는 위력처럼 보였다……
2025310054.english: - That heat ray appeared to have the same power as when the Tyrant fired it in its original form… …

2025310055.korean: - 아니 아니… 지금은 궁금해 할 때가 아니지.
2025310055.english: No, no... now is not the time to be curious.

2025310056.korean: - 나는 머릿속에 떠오른 거대한 궁금증을 떨쳐내고 전투 지휘에 집중했다.
2025310056.english: I shook off the huge curiosity that had arisen in my mind and focused on commanding the battle.

2025310058.english: Did you have a proper talk with Locke?

2025310063.english: Right, this is something I didn't know either…

2025310064.korean: 여러 가지가 달라서 평소와는 좀 다를 텐데 괜찮겠어?
2025310064.english: There are a lot of differences, so it will be a bit different from usual. Are you sure that will be okay?

2025310067.english: [No, if it were its original form, I would have sent it into battle, but…]

2025310068.english: [Wait! I'm going to kick everyone out.]

2025310071.korean: [이걸로 끝내는 거야! 이 공격에 이어서 일제히 밀어붙여!]
2025310071.english: [Let's finish this! Following this attack, push forward all at once!]

2025320008.korean: 동시에, 주변의 철충 공세가 둔화되고 있습니다.
2025320008.english: At the same time, the offensive by the surrounding Iron蟲 is slowing down.

2025320009.korean: - 돔으로 밀려들던 철충의 공세도 갑자기 진정되었다.
2025320009.english: The offensive of the Iron蟲s surging into the dome also suddenly subsided.

2025320010.korean: 이봐, 주인! 너무 빨리 끝났잖아! 나는 아직 싸움이 고프다!
2025320010.english: Hey, Master! That ended too quickly! I'm still hungry for a fight!

2025320011.korean: 각하께서 충분히 약화시켜 두셨던 모양이군요. 우리에게 공을 넘겨주신 겁니다.
2025320011.english: It seems Your Excellency had sufficiently weakened it. You have passed the ball to us.

2025320013.korean: 이번엔 저 때문에 오르카 분들께 많은 폐를 끼쳐 드리고 말았습니다.
2025320013.english: This time, I ended up causing a lot of trouble for the Orca members because of me.

2025320014.korean: 앞으로 이 새로운 힘을 사용해… 우리 주인은 물론, 여러분께도 속죄… 아니, 은혜를 갚아 나갈 생각입니다.
2025320014.english: From now on, I intend to use this new power to atone... no, to repay the grace... not only to our master, but also to all of you.

2025320015.korean: 물론 우리 주인이 창천의 기사 모습이 아닌, 원래의 칠흑의 날개를 원하신다면, 바이오로이드들처럼 어떤 모습으로든 변신하겠습니다.
2025320015.english: Of course, if our master desires the original Pitch Black Wings rather than the appearance of the Knight of the Azure Sky, we will transform into any form, just like the Bio-roids.

2025320017.korean:
나는 역시 원래의 모습이 좋군. 이번 전투는 역시 뭔가 부족했어.
파괴에는 역시 육체의 묵직함이 필요하다.
2025320017.english:
I guess I prefer my original self. This battle was just lacking something.
 Destruction, after all, requires the heaviness of the body.

2025320018.korean: 하지만, 이 몸이 나쁘다고는 하지 않겠다. 이 녀석 등에 올라타 철충을 불태우는 건 꽤나 유쾌했거든!
2025320018.english: However, I won't say I'm bad. Riding on this guy's back and burning the Iron蟲s was quite fun!

2025320019.english: Hmm! I'll ask for a cake when I get back!

2025320022.korean: 그런 것 같네요…… 철충들도 물러나고 있어요.
2025320022.english: It seems so... The Iron蟲s are retreating as well.

2025320025.korean: 철충을 모조리 쓰러뜨릴 때까지 절대 방심하지 마시오.
2025320025.english: Do not let your guard down until you have defeated all the Iron Bugs.

2025320029.english: … … No, I went a little too far… …

2025320031.korean: 아니... 괜찮아요, 확실히 아직, 철충 남아 있어.
2025320031.english: No... it's okay. There are definitely still Iron蟲s left.

2025320032.korean: 전부 쓰러뜨리기 전까진, 안심할 수 없어.
2025320032.english: I can't rest easy until I take them all down.

2025320033.korean: 맞아요! 방심해서 다치기라도 하면, 수행 시간이 늘어나버릴 테니까요!
2025320033.english: That's right! If I let my guard down and get injured, my training time will just get longer!

2025320035.korean: 다치지 않더라도, 수행 시간은 늘릴 겁니다.
2025320035.english: Even if I don't get hurt, I will increase the execution time.

2025320036.korean: 이번 전투에서 여러모로 너희들의 과제가 보였거든요.
2025320036.english: I could see your challenges in many ways during this battle.

2025320041.english: Hey, I told you not to let your guard down.

2025320043.korean: - 작전의 사후 처리가 무사히 끝나고, 주변의 안전을 확보한 후에 나는 D돔으로 향했다.
2025320043.english: After the aftermath of the operation was safely completed and the surrounding area was secured, I headed to D-Dome.

2025320044.english: - In order to speak directly with Shiden…

2025320045.korean: - 특이체 때문에 어영부영된 상태였지만, 일단은 엔라이 일행이 아직 시덴에게 연금된 상태이다.
2025320045.english: Although things were in disarray due to the unique entity, Enrai and his party are still being held captive by Shiden for now.

2025320046.korean: - 우리가 돔에 도착했을 때, 카엔, 제로, 레이 세 사람이 입구 앞에서 기다리고 있었다.
2025320046.english: When we arrived at the dome, Kaen, Zero, and Ray were waiting in front of the entrance.

2025320048.korean: - 그 상황에 나도 모르게 입가가 느슨해졌다.
2025320048.english: In that situation, I found myself unconsciously opening my mouth.

2025320051.english: … … I’ll greet you again… I am Kunoichi Rei.

2025320052.korean: 인간 분께 도움을 받았으니까… 내쫓는 건 할 수 없어요.
2025320052.english: Since I received help from a human... I can't kick them out.

2025320053.korean: 이번 일은 저희 힘만으로는 어떻게 할 수 없었던 일이었다고 생각해요.
2025320053.english: I think this was something we couldn't have handled on our own.

2025320054.english: This is an opinion that everyone here has agreed upon.

2025320056.korean: 후후, 왜… 인간 분이 감사 인사를 하시는 건가요?
2025320056.english: Hehe, why... is a human thanking you?

2025320057.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 레이는 내 눈을 피하고 어색한 표정을 지었다.
2025320057.english: Saying that, Ray avoided my gaze and wore an awkward expression.

2025320058.english: If you ask if I'm scared... I'm a little scared.

2025320062.korean: 두 분을 보고 있으니까, 믿어도 되는 걸까… 하고 저는 생각했어요……
2025320062.english: As I watched the two of you, I wondered if I could trust you...

2025320063.korean: 분명 이곳에 있는 모두도 진심으로 당신을 거부하고 싶은 건 아닐 거예요.
2025320063.english: Surely, not everyone here genuinely wants to reject you.

2025320064.korean: 그래도, 그래도 아직 인간이 무섭다고… 그런 눈으로 바라보는 아이도 있을지 모르지만, 불쾌하게 생각하지 말아 주세요.
2025320064.english: Even so, even so, there might be some children who look at me with eyes like that, thinking that humans are still scary... but please do not take offense.

2025320066.english: Yes... Then I will guide you.

2025320067.korean: - 돔 안은 현대적인 거리 풍경이 정비되어 있어서, 세트라기보다는 돔 안에 진짜 도시가 존재한다고 말하는 편이 더 정확한 표현일 것 같았다.
2025320067.english: The inside of the dome was set up with a modern streetscape, so it seemed more accurate to say that a real city existed inside the dome rather than a set.

2025320068.korean: 정말 대단하네요. 진짜 멸망 전의 도시로 착각할 정도예요.
2025320068.english: That's really amazing. It's enough to make you mistake it for a city from before its destruction.

2025320069.english: As expected, there are hardly any products at the convenience store...

2025320070.korean: 처음 여기 왔을 때는 실제 가게와 비슷한 상품 구성이라서요. 조금씩 먹고 마시다 보니 없어져 버렸어요.
2025320070.english: When I first came here, the product selection was similar to the actual store. I ate and drank little by little, and it all disappeared.

2025320071.korean: 지금은 음식을 보존하기 위해 냉장고를 쓰는 정도예요.
2025320071.english: Right now, I only use a refrigerator to preserve food.

2025320072.korean: - 확실히 냉장고나 냉동고로 보이는 곳에는 깔끔하게 처리된 무언가의 고기가 놓여 있었다.
2025320072.english: In what looked like a refrigerator or freezer, there was some kind of neatly prepared meat.

2025320075.korean: - 건물 창문 너머로 바이오로이드들이 이쪽을 뚫어지게 바라보고 있다.
2025320075.english: The bioroids are staring intently at us from beyond the building windows.

2025320076.korean: 네. 안도 충실하게 만들어져 있어서, 침대나 목욕탕도 있어요.
2025320076.english: Yes. The interior is also well-made, so there is a bed and a bathroom.

2025320077.korean: - 하지만 기본적으로 돔 안이니까 밖에서도 지내기 편해서, 건물 옥상에서 생활하는 아이도 있답니다.
2025320077.english: However, since it is basically inside a dome, it is comfortable to live outside as well, so there are even children who live on the rooftop of the building.

2025320078.korean: - 여러 곳을 안내받으며 걷고 있자, 눈앞에 커다란 양옥이 보이기 시작했다.
2025320078.english: As I walked along, being guided to various places, a large Western-style house began to appear before my eyes.

2025320079.english: - And in front of the Western-style house…

2025320081.english: I've been waiting for you, Director.

2025320082.english: It was good. Everyone treated me well!

2025320084.korean: 옛날의 저를 아는 분들이 많아서, 그 이야기를 들려주셨거든요. 저는 여기 와서 정말 잘했다고 생각해요.
2025320084.english: There are many people who knew me from the past, so they told me that story. I think I made the right decision coming here.

2025320085.korean: - 옛날의 그녀… 그러니까 사레나가 사레나로서 다시 태어나기 전 말인가.
2025320085.english: - The woman of the past… I mean, before Sarena was reborn as Sarena?

2025320090.english: The Commander might have felt it, but...

2025320091.korean: 시덴 씨는 사령관을 믿고 싶은 거라고 생각해요.
2025320091.english: I think Mr. Shiden wants to trust the commander.

2025320093.korean: - 양옥 안으로 들어가자 우리는 안쪽 다다미방으로 안내되었다.
2025320093.english: As we entered the Western-style house, we were guided to the inner tatami room.

2025320094.english: I have been waiting, my lord.

2025320096.korean: 초대님, 이분이 마지막 인간 분이며, 오르카의 총사령관을 맡고 계신 저의 주공입니다.
2025320096.english: Dear Invitation, this is the last human and my Lord, who serves as the Supreme Commander of Orca.

2025320099.english: You really are human. If it were a fake, I would have cut it down...

2025320100.korean: 그런 짓, 제가 용서하지 않을 거예요.
2025320100.english: I won't forgive such an act.

2025320101.english: - Release threatens in a low voice.

2025320102.english: Is it the Black Lilith model…

2025320103.english: So…? What did you come all the way here for?

2025320104.korean: 감사 인사? 로크 말인가…? 그건 통신으로 이미 지겹도록 하지 않았소이까.
2025320104.english: A thank you? You mean Locke...? Haven't we already said that endlessly in the communications?

2025320106.english: I accept your thanks. I will return Ouka and her party as well.

2025320108.korean: 오우카 일행이 시끄러워서 말이지…… 일 없네. 오르카의 삶이 얼마나 행복한 지는 충분히 이해했소……
2025320108.english: Ouka and her group were being noisy, you see... ...no problem. I fully understand just how happy Orca's life is... ...

2025320109.korean: 그리고 스미레 일행이 수행을 게을리하고… 과자를 먹으며 영상이나 게임을 즐기고 있는 것도 포함해서 말이오.
2025320109.english: And that includes Sumire and her group neglecting their training... and enjoying videos or games while eating snacks.

2025320114.korean: - 시덴은 제로 일행을 바라보며 다정하게 웃었다.
2025320114.english: Shiden smiled affectionately as he looked at Zero and his companions.

2025320117.korean: 오우카, 이것은 동료나… 사랑하는 이들을 잃어본 자가 아니면…… 이해할 수 없을 것이오.
2025320117.english: Ouka, this is something that cannot be understood unless you have lost a comrade... or a loved one...

2025320118.korean: 가령… 이 몸이 철충에게 복종하고 있다 치자… “이 철충은 괜찮으니 믿어라” 라고 말한다면 믿겠소외까?
2025320118.english: For instance… let’s say I am obeying an Iron蟲… If I were to say, “This Iron蟲 is fine, so trust me,” would you believe me?

2025320119.english: That is… a completely different story.

2025320120.english: To me, it is the same…

2025320121.korean: …그대가 이 몸이 그 인간과 철충을 동일시한 것에 분노했음이 틀림 없을 것이오……
2025320121.english: … You must have been enraged that I equated that human with the Iron蟲… …

2025320122.korean: 빠른 이해를 위한 것이었으니 사과하겠네. 첨언하자면 저 인간은 분명 선한 인간이라는 것이오…
2025320122.english: I apologize, as it was merely for the sake of quick understanding. To add to that, that person is clearly a good person...

2025320123.korean: 그래도, 이 몸에게 그것만큼은 도저히 받아들일 수 없는 것이외다.
2025320123.english: Even so, that is something I absolutely cannot accept.

2025320125.korean: - 확실히… “만약” 레모네이드 델타의 다른 개체가 있었다고 해도…… 그때의 델타와는 다르다 하여 오르카가 받아들이는 건… 무리일 것이다.
2025320125.english: Certainly… even if there were another individual of Lemonade Delta… … it would be unreasonable for Orca to accept it just because it is different from the Delta of that time.

2025320126.korean: - 그런 이야기…… 비록 말도 안 되는 “만약의 이야기”라 해도…… 나는 리스트컷이나 알키오네 일행에게 제안하는 건…… 할 수 없다.
2025320126.english: - Such a story… even if it is a ridiculous “what if”… I cannot propose it to List Cut or Alcyone’s party.

2025320128.korean: 맞아요! 스승님은 분명 솔직하지 못할 뿐이에요!
2025320128.english: That's right! Master, you're definitely just not being honest!

2025320129.english: That's right, Master, you're a tsundere.

2025320134.korean: 이미 익숙해졌소. 게다가… 앞으로도 여기를 지켜나갈 생각이니, 이 힘이 필요하오.
2025320134.english: I have already gotten used to it. Besides… I intend to continue protecting this place, so I need this strength.

2025320136.korean: 인간의 시혜는 받지 않겠소. 이것이 이 몸의 대답이외다. 알겠으면 이제 이 땅을 떠나시게나. 더는 볼일 없을 것이오.
2025320136.english: I will not accept human benevolence. This is my answer. If you understand, leave this land now. I have no further business with you.

2025320137.english: Shiden stared straight at me and said.

2025320141.korean: 더는 할 말이 없으니…… 그만 물러가게나.
2025320141.english: I have nothing more to say... so please leave.

2025320144.english: [But still, I'm really glad you guys came.]

2025320148.korean: 설마 마중 나와 줄 줄은 몰랐어.
2025320148.english: I never imagined you would come out to meet me.

2025320151.english: I thought I might get kicked out.

2025320153.korean: 저 방 하나하나에 모두가 살고 있는 거야?
2025320153.english: Do you all live in every single one of those rooms?

2025320155.korean: 그래, 그렇구나… 안정을 찾으면 나한테도 들려줘.
2025320155.english: Right, I see... Tell me about it when you settle down.

2025320158.english: I'll say hello again. I'm glad to see you.

2025320159.english: First of all, I wanted to express my gratitude.

2025320160.english: Still, I wanted to say it directly.

2025320164.korean: 네 시간 인식 확장을 해제해줬으면 해.
2025320164.english: I'd like you to disable the four-hour recognition extension.

2025320165.korean: 명령이 아니라 기술적인 문제라고 들었으니까, 한 번 오르카에―
2025320165.english: Since I heard it's a technical issue, not an order, let's try Orca—

2025330003.korean: 무슨 일로 또 이 곳에 온 것이오… 어제 돌아갔던 것이 아니었소?
2025330003.english: What brings you here again… Weren't you supposed to have gone back yesterday?

2025330004.korean: 보통은 그 흐름이면, 동경을 떠나는 게 맞지 않겠소이까……
2025330004.english: Normally, given the current trend, wouldn't it be right to leave Tokyo...?

2025330005.english: Ahaha... Well, usually that would be the case...

2025330006.english: Lord, since you are not ordinary…

2025330008.korean: 그리고, 아직 스승님과 이별하고 싶지 않아요.
2025330008.english: And, I don't want to part ways with my master yet.

2025330009.korean: 응. 아직 스승님과 이야기하고 싶은 게, 많이 있어.
2025330009.english: Yes. There are still many things I want to talk about with my master.

2025330011.korean: 그건 그렇다 치고…… 인간, 그대는 이국으로 돌아가지 않아도 되는 것이오?
2025330011.english: That aside... Human, do you not have to return to a foreign land?

2025330012.korean: - 우리는 아직 여기 온 지 얼마 되지 않았고, 본래 목적이었던 세인트 오르카의 회수도 못 했다.
2025330012.english: We haven't been here long, and we haven't even been able to recover Saint Orca, which was our original objective.

2025330013.english: I plan to stay in Hokkaido for the time being.

2025330014.korean: 쓸데없는 참견은 집어 치우고, 어서 돌아가시게.
2025330014.english: Stop your useless meddling and go back.

2025330015.english: Dear Invitation... why are you so stubborn?

2025330016.korean: 아무리 괜찮다고 해도, 괴로움은 있을 텐데요.
2025330016.english: No matter how much you say it’s okay, there must be some distress.

2025330017.english: … … I’ve already gotten used to things like suffering.

2025330018.korean: - 시덴은 깊게 다크서클이 진 눈으로 말했다.
2025330018.english: Shiden spoke with deep dark circles under his eyes.

2025330019.korean: 이 몸은 지금부터 볼일이 있다, 가도 되겠소이까?
2025330019.english: I have business to attend to right now. May I leave?

2025330022.english: Oh! Then, may we come along too?

2025330024.english: Will it be alright, my lord?

2025330025.korean: 하지만, 그대들… 인간의 호위를 위해 따라온 것 아니었소?
2025330025.english: But, you guys... weren't you supposed to follow to escort the humans?

2025330026.korean: - 그러자 뒤에 있던 리리스가 앞으로 나왔다.
2025330026.english: Then Lilith, who was behind, stepped forward.

2025330027.korean: 걱정 마세요, 주인님은 제가 지킬 테니까요.
2025330027.english: Don't worry, I'll protect you, Master.

2025330028.english: I am with you as well.

2025330031.korean: - 그대로 시덴은 제로와 카엔을 데리고 산쪽으로 달려갔다.
2025330031.english: Shiden took Zero and Kaen and ran toward the mountain.

2025330033.korean: 주인님이 거기까지 하실 필요는 없다고 생각합니다만……
2025330033.english: I don't think you need to go that far, Master...

2025330034.english: - Turn back time a little, yesterday… …

2025330035.korean: - 시덴과의 대화를 마치고, 우리가 돔의 출구로 향하고 있을 때……
2025330035.english: - After finishing our conversation with Shiden, as we were heading toward the dome's exit… …

2025330036.english: Ray and the residents of the dome rushed over.

2025330039.korean: - 리리스가 나를 지키기 위해 내 앞에 나섰다.
2025330039.english: Lilith stepped forward in front of me to protect me.

2025330041.english: How did the conversation with Mr. Shiden go?

2025330042.korean: 일단 저희를 해방하고 그것으로 끝입니다. 주공께서 오르카로 초대하셨지만, 오실 생각은 없으시답니다.
2025330042.english: For now, we will be freed, and that is the end of it. The Lord invited us to Orca, but he says he has no intention of coming.

2025330044.english: Um... I have a favor to ask.

2025330047.korean: - 레이는 가슴 앞에서 손을 모은 채 깊게 숨을 들이쉬었다.
2025330047.english: Ray took a deep breath with his hands clasped in front of his chest.

2025330048.korean: 시덴 님의 시간질주의 술을 해제해 주셨으면 해요……
2025330048.english: I would like you to release Shiden's Time-Running spell...

2025330049.korean: 물론 그것도 주공께서 제안하셨지만, 초대님께서 거절하셨어요.
2025330049.english: Of course, Lord Joong suggested that as well, but the Grand Master refused.

2025330051.korean: 시덴 님은 멸망 전부터 줄곧 시간질주의 술에 걸려 계셔서… 괴로워하고 계세요……
2025330051.english: Lord Shiden has been under the spell of Time-Running ever since before the apocalypse... so he is suffering...

2025330052.korean: 제대로 잠도 못 자고 계실 거예요……
2025330052.english: You probably can't even get proper sleep...

2025330053.korean: 이대로 두면… 정신이든 몸이든 무너질지도 몰라요.
2025330053.english: If left like this… either your mind or your body might collapse.

2025330055.korean: 저는 어떻게 되어도 상관없어요. 뭐든지 협력할 테니까… 시덴 님의 시간질주의 술을 풀어주세요!
2025330055.english: I don't care what happens to me. I'll cooperate with anything... so please release Lord Shiden's Time-Running spell!

2025330056.korean: 부탁드려요! 인간 님! 저도 어떻게 되어도 괜찮아요! 대신 오르카에 오라 하신다면, 갈게요!
2025330056.english: Please, Human! I don't mind what happens to me! However, if you tell me to come to Orca, I will go!

2025330058.english: The bioroids bow their heads one after another.

2025330059.korean: 레이 일행은 주공을 아직 잘 모르고 있군요.
2025330059.english: Ray and his party don't know the Lord very well yet.

2025330063.korean: - 나는 애초부터 시덴의 시간질주의 술을 해제할 생각이었다.
2025330063.english: I intended to release Shiden's time-running technique from the very beginning.

2025330064.korean: 시덴을 어떻게든 전력으로서 합류시키고 싶다거나…… 그런 상황이라면 또 몰라도……
2025330064.english: If it were a situation where they wanted to somehow bring Shiden into the fight as a full force... that would be a different story...

2025330065.english: That is a completely different situation...

2025330067.korean: 이대로 초대님께서 주공의 마음을 거절하시겠다면, 미련 없이 유럽으로 돌아갑시다.
2025330067.english: If you intend to reject the Lord's offer like this, let us return to Europe without hesitation.

2025330068.korean: - 솔직히 의외였다. 엔라이에게 시덴은 부모에 가까운 존재일 거라 생각했는데…
2025330068.english: Honestly, it was unexpected. I thought Shiden would be like a parent to Enrai...

2025330069.korean: 의외네요? 결국 마지막엔 당신과 의견이 충돌할 줄 알았거든요.
2025330069.english: That's unexpected. I thought we would clash in the end.

2025330071.korean:
초대님은 분명히 저의 스승님이십니다. 여전히 존경 하고 있고, 부모처럼 생각하기도 합니다.
하지만, 저는 오르카에서 복원된 개체입니다.
2025330071.english:
Chodae is undoubtedly my teacher. I still respect him, and I even think of him like a parent.
 However, I am an entity restored from Orca.

2025330072.korean: 대전란 당시 함께 지낸 기억은 있지만, '그때'의 저는 지금의 제가 아닙니다.
2025330072.english: I have memories of spending time together during the Great War, but the me of 'back then' is not the me of today.

2025330073.english: And above all, I am the sword of Lord Kunoichi.

2025330074.korean: 주공을 가장 먼저 생각하는 건 당연한 일이죠.
2025330074.english: It is only natural to think of the Lord first.

2025330075.korean: 이것은 제 안에 있는 쿠노이치로서의 자존심… 어쩌면 덴세츠가 새긴 감정일지도 모르지만요…
2025330075.english: This is my pride as a kunoichi within me… though perhaps it is a feeling Densetsu engraved in me…

2025330077.korean: - 하지만 그렇게 말하는 엔라이도 표정만큼은 미련 없이 떠날 생각을 가진 것 처럼 보이지 않았다.
2025330077.english: However, even Enrai, as he said that, did not look like he had any intention of leaving without any lingering regrets, at least not in his expression.

2025330082.english: Master! I have come as well!

2025330084.korean: 그대들 말이야…… 그 인간을 말리지 못하겠소이까…… 어쨌거나 신하들이잖소……
2025330084.english: I mean, you guys... can't you stop that man... After all, you are his subjects...

2025330085.korean: 맞아요! 신하이기 때문에 어좌님이 하고 싶은 일을 돕고 있는 것이옵니다!
2025330085.english: That is correct! It is because I am a subject that I am helping Your Majesty with the work you wish to do!

2025330086.english: Well, I guess it really depends on how you put it...

2025330087.korean: 그래서? 또 그대는 어제와 같은 말을 하려는 것이오?
2025330087.english: So what? Are you going to say the same thing as yesterday again?

2025330091.korean: 디저트뿐만 아니라, 요리도 맛있어요. 그리고, 카엔의 초밥도 맛있어요.
2025330091.english: Not only the desserts, but the dishes are delicious as well. And Kaen's sushi is also delicious.

2025330092.korean: 오늘은 많이 가져왔으니, 스승님도 나눠주는 거 도와주세요!
2025330092.english: I brought a lot today, so please help share it, Master!

2025330093.korean: 그, 그대들… 무얼 믿고 이렇게 제멋대로인지……
2025330093.english: You, you guys... what are you relying on to act so selfishly...

2025330097.english: Aren't you even tired of it...?

2025330098.english: What brings you here this time?

2025330099.english: I clearly told you I didn't need it...

2025330100.english: Why are you being so persistent...

2025330101.english: I fully understand how you feel.

2025330103.korean: 이 몸은 인간이 싫소… 용서하지 않았소. 아니…… 용서해서는 안 되는 것이외다……
2025330103.english: I detest humans… I have not forgiven them. No… … I must not forgive them… …

2025330104.korean: 이 몸이 용서하게 되거든… 이 몸이 죽여야 했던 그 아이들의 죽음을…… 치욕 속에, 부조리하게 살해당한 그 아이들의 죽음을…… 누가 대신 분노할 수 있단 말이오.
2025330104.english: If I come to forgive… the deaths of those children I had to kill… the deaths of those children murdered absurdly in shame… who could possibly feel anger on my behalf?

2025330105.korean: 대체 누가 기억해 줄 것이란 말이오...
2025330105.english: Who on earth is going to remember...

2025330106.korean: - 시덴은 주먹을 쥐고, 그것을 뚫어지게 바라보고 있다.
2025330106.english: Shiden clenches his fist and stares intently at it.

2025330107.korean: 그대에게는 진정 없는 것이오? 그런 존재가……
2025330107.english: Is it truly something you do not have? Such a being…

2025330108.korean: - 분명히 용서할 수 없다고 생각했던 존재는 있었다. 그리고, 내 눈으로 보더라도 멸망 전 인간의 잔혹함은 눈 뜨고 보기 힘들 정도였다.
2025330108.english: There was definitely someone I thought I could never forgive. And, even looking at it with my own eyes, the cruelty of humanity before the apocalypse was unbearable to behold.

2025330109.korean: - 그렇기에, 인간에게 이토록 깊은 증오를 품는 것도 이해 할 수 있다. 뭐, 내가 시덴의 증오를 완벽히 이해하고 있다고는 생각하지 않지만…
2025330109.english: That is why I can understand him harboring such deep hatred toward humans. Well, I don't think I fully understand Shiden's hatred, though...

2025330117.korean: 그대는…… 참으로 이상한 녀석이구려! 인간이 '인간을 원망하는 건 어때?' 라니!
2025330117.english: You… … are truly a strange fellow! To think a human would say, 'What about resenting other humans?'

2025330118.korean: - 시덴은 입을 크게 벌리고 웃기 시작했다. 마침내는 땅바닥에 쓰러져서 헉헉거리고 있다……
2025330118.english: Shiden opened his mouth wide and started laughing. Eventually, he collapsed onto the ground, gasping for breath…

2025330119.english: … … Phew… … It’s been a long time since I’ve laughed my heart out… …

2025330123.korean: - 하지만, 그 말은 차마 입 밖에 낼 수 없소.
2025330123.english: However, I cannot bring myself to say those words out loud.

2025330126.korean: 그래도…… 이 몸은 그대에게 도움 받을 수 없소외다……
2025330126.english: Even so… I cannot accept your help…

2025330128.korean: - 이 인간의 손을 잡는다면, 분명 인간에 대한 증오는 약해질 것이외다. 이 몸은… 그것이 두려웠소.
2025330128.english: If you take this human's hand, your hatred toward humanity will surely weaken. I... I was afraid of that.

2025330129.korean: - 다음 날도 어김없이 그 인간은 날 찾아왔소외다.
2025330129.english: The next day, without fail, that person came looking for me.

2025330130.korean: - 그 다음 날도…… 또 그 다음 날도……
