2025330130.english: - The next day too… … and the day after that too… …

2025330132.korean: - 이곳의 아이들은 이미 인간에게 마음을 열고 있는 듯 하였소.
2025330132.english: The children here seemed to already be opening their hearts to humans.

2025330133.korean: - 그래, 만약 그 아이들이 오르카에 가고 싶다고 말한다면 말릴 생각은 없지.
2025330133.english: Yeah, if those kids say they want to go to Orca, I have no intention of stopping them.

2025330134.korean: - 자신의 행복은 원래 스스로 손에 넣는 것이니…… 여기서의 생활도 언젠가는 막을 내리게 될 테니 말이오.
2025330134.english: - After all, happiness is something you earn for yourself... and life here will eventually come to an end, too.

2025330136.korean: - 이 몸도, 오르카에 가면 함께 행복해질 거라고 생각하고 있는 것일테지…
2025330136.english: I suppose I, too, think that if I go to Orca, we will be happy together...

2025330137.korean: - 그렇지, 차라리… 이 몸을 제외한 전부를 오르카에 가게 하는 것도 썩 괜찮은 방책이 되지 아니하겠소…
2025330137.english: - That's right, perhaps... sending everyone except myself to Orca wouldn't be a pretty good plan...

2025330138.korean: - 그 녀석이 돌아간 뒤, 그런 생각을 혼자 하고 있었소외다……
2025330138.english: After that guy went back, I was having those thoughts to myself...

2025330139.english: Humans brought a lot of clothes today.

2025330140.korean: - 이 몸에게 “갸루가 되고 싶다면 딱 맞는 옷이 있다”고 말하며 몇 벌을 건네줬소외다.
2025330140.english: - He handed me a few outfits, saying, “If you want to become a gyaru, there are clothes that fit perfectly.”

2025330142.korean: - 스스로 입가가 풀어지고 있다는 걸 알 수 있었소.
2025330142.english: I could tell that the corners of my mouth were loosening on their own.

2025330144.korean: - 그날 밤… 오우카, 스미레, 하츠나가 이 몸의 방으로 찾아왔다네.
2025330144.english: That night… Ouka, Sumire, and Hatsuna came to my room.

2025330145.korean: - 셋은 모두 입을 굳게 다문 채 이 몸을 바라보고 있었지.
2025330145.english: All three of them were staring at me with their mouths tightly shut.

2025330146.korean: - 이 얼굴이 무얼 뜻하는지 이 몸은 잘 알고 있소.
2025330146.english: I know very well what this face means.

2025330147.english: It is the face before the sword duel…

2025330148.korean: 여기서는 분명 방해가 들어올 테니…… 밖으로 나가는 게 어떻겠소이까.
2025330148.english: There will surely be interference here... so how about going outside?

2025330150.korean: - 우리는 돔 밖으로 나왔소. 밤하늘의 별은 아름다웠고, 달빛이 우리를 환하게 비추고 있었다네.
2025330150.english: We came out of the dome. The stars in the night sky were beautiful, and the moonlight was shining brightly on us.

2025330151.korean: 그래서? 그런 얼굴을 하고… 무슨 일인 게야?
2025330151.english: So? With that look on your face... what's wrong?

2025330152.korean: 벌써 저희가 여기 온 지도 일주일이 넘었습니다.
2025330152.english: It has already been over a week since we arrived here.

2025330153.korean: 그렇구려. 레이 일행도… 표정들이 하나같이 밝아졌다는 걸 느끼고 있었소외다.
2025330153.english: I see. I could feel that Ray and his group… their expressions had all brightened up, too.

2025330154.english: It's all thanks to you, Lord.

2025330155.korean: 주공은 강하고, 상냥하며, 모두에게 빛을 주는 분이십니다.
2025330155.english: The Lord is strong, kind, and a person who brings light to everyone.

2025330156.korean: 지금까지도 계속 이렇게 누군가를 구해 오셨습니다.
2025330156.english: You have continued to save people like this until now.

2025330158.korean:
그건 초대님… 당신도 처음 주공과 대화했을 때부터…
알고 계셨던 거 아닌가요?
2025330158.english:
That is, Invitation... even you, ever since the first time you spoke with the Lord...
 Didn't you know?

2025330159.korean:
당신은 우리에게 오르카를 버리라고 하셨습니다.
그런 건… 인간이 명령만 하면, 금세 소용없는 짓인데도.
2025330159.english:
You told us to abandon the Orca.
 Even though such things… quickly become useless if a human just gives the order.

2025330160.korean: 당신은 주공이 어떤 분인지 알고 계시기에, 그렇게 말한 거예요.
2025330160.english: You said that because you know what kind of person the Duke is.

2025330161.korean:
……그리고, 주공은 아직도 초대님께 명령하지 않았습니다.
명령하면 될 일을… 매일같이 당신을 찾아가 설득하려 하고 있어요.
2025330161.english:
… … And, the Lord has not yet given an order to the Grand Master.
 I could just give an order... but I go to you every day trying to persuade you.

2025330163.english: How long will you rely on your lord's kindness?

2025330164.korean: ……기댄 적 없소. 저 녀석이 포기하고 이 땅을 떠나면 그만일 뿐이외다.
2025330164.english: … … I have never leaned on anyone. If that fellow gives up and leaves this land, that will be the end of it.

2025330165.korean: - 마치 전곡을 찌르듯 하였소. 이 몸의 술을 해제하는 것도, 오르카로 데려가는 것도, 간단히 명령 한 마디면 되는 일이었으니…
2025330165.english: It was as if it pierced the very core of the song. Dispelling my spell and taking me to Orca were matters that required a mere single command…

2025330166.korean: - 그런데도, 저 녀석은 매일 찾아와 상냥하게 말을 걸어왔지. 그런 인간은 본 적이 없었소외다.
2025330166.english: Even so, that guy came every day and spoke to me kindly. I had never seen anyone like him.

2025330167.korean: - 그 울보조차도 처음부터 우리를… 촬영 소품처럼 보고 있었지 않소이까.
2025330167.english: Even that crybaby was looking at us... like filming props from the very beginning, wasn't he?

2025330169.korean: 하지만… 주공는…… 당신이 고개를 끄덕일 때까지 포기하지 않아요. 그런 분이십니다……
2025330169.english: But… the Lord… … does not give up until you nod. That is the kind of person he is… …

2025330171.korean:
주공는… 오르카는… 절망에 빠진 이들을 위해 싸우고 있습니다.
진심으로 우리 바이오로이드를… 아니, 세계를 구하려 하십니다.
2025330171.english:
Lord... Orca... is fighting for those who have fallen into despair.
 He sincerely intends to save our bioroids... no, the world.

2025330172.korean:
주공은 틀림없이… 새로운 세계를 만든 영웅이 되어,
후세에 전해질 것입니다.
2025330172.english:
The Lord will undoubtedly… become the hero who created a new world,
 It will be passed down to future generations.

2025330173.korean: 그런 주공의 걸음을 멈추게 하지 말아주세요.
2025330173.english: Please do not stop the Lord's steps.

2025330174.korean: …뭘 어쩌겠다는 것이오?…… 그대가 이 몸을 힘으로 복종이라도 시키겠다, 이것이오?
2025330174.english: … What do you intend to do?… … Is this your plan to force me into submission by force?

2025330176.korean:
저는 쿠노이치, 주공의 검…
주공의 뜻을 이루는 것이 제 역할입니다.
2025330176.english:
I am a Kunoichi, Lord's Sword...
 My role is to fulfill the Lord's will.

2025330177.korean:
흥. 억지로 누군가를 구하다니…… 그건 단지 구하는 쪽의 오만이오외다.
그런 방식, 그 인간이 인정이나 할 것 같소?
2025330177.english:
Hmph. To think you would save someone by force… that is merely the arrogance of the one doing the saving.
 Do you think that person would even acknowledge such a method?

2025330178.korean:
인정하지 않겠죠… 분명 화내실 겁니다……
그리고, 저에게 실망하시겠죠.
2025330178.english:
They won't admit it... They will definitely be angry...
 And, you will be disappointed in me.

2025330179.korean:
하지만, 그게 뭐가 문제인가요? 주공의 패도를 막는 조약돌이 있다면
주공을 섬기는 쿠노이치로서, 그것을 치우는 건 당연한 일……!
2025330179.english:
But what is the problem? If there is a pebble to block the Lord's path of hegemony...
 As a kunoichi serving my lord, it is only natural to remove that… …!

2025330180.korean: 저도…… 당신이 아니라면, 이런 일은 하지 않았을 겁니다. 하지만… 당신도 저도 쿠노이치……
2025330180.english: I... ...would not have done this if it weren't for you. But... both you and I are kunoichi... ...

2025330182.korean: 당신이 그 뜻을 굽히지 않겠다면, 우리를 베면 됩니다.
2025330182.english: If you refuse to yield to that will, you can cut us down.

2025330185.korean: 방해가 되는 조약돌이라니…… 많이 컸구려…… 오우카……
2025330185.english: To think a pebble gets in the way… You’ve grown so much… Ouka…

2025330186.korean: 잊지는 않았겠지? 그대들은… 한 번도 '이 나'를 이긴 적이 없다는 것을…
2025330186.english: You haven't forgotten, have you? That you… have never once defeated ‘this me’…

2025330187.english: It doesn't matter. Orca's kunoichi is not just a facade.

2025330188.korean: 시덴… 아니, '무라사키 나데시코' 지금부터 당신을… 벱니다.
2025330188.english: Shiden… no, 'Murasaki Nadeshiko,' from now on, I… will cut you.

2025330191.korean: 돌아갈 거야. 하지만 아직 정리되지 않은 일이 많이 남아 있어서…
2025330191.english: I'm going back. But there's still a lot of unfinished work left, so...

2025330192.korean: 그리고 네 시간질주의 술도 아직 해제하지 못했어.
2025330192.english: And I haven't even been able to release the alcohol from your time rush yet.

2025330199.english: You know the saying, "Three visits to persuade someone."

2025330200.korean: 아직 일본에 있어야 하니까, 그때까진 버텨볼게.
2025330200.english: I still have to stay in Japan, so I'll hold out until then.

2025330203.english: I know, right. But I brought dessert today.

2025330204.english: It's been quite a while since something like this happened, hasn't it?

2025330206.korean: 무슨 일이긴, 네 시간 인식 말이야.
2025330206.english: What do you mean, what's the matter? I'm talking about your time recognition.

2025330207.korean: 괴롭다면 어떻게든 도와주고 싶은 게 당연하잖아?
2025330207.english: If someone is having a hard time, isn't it only natural to want to help them in any way possible?

2025330209.english: Everyone here... has been asking me for a favor.

2025330210.korean: 자기들은 어떻게 돼도 좋으니 시덴 널 도와달라고.
2025330210.english: They said they didn't care what happened to them, just to help you, Shiden.

2025330211.korean: 물론 부탁받았다고 해서 해제하려는 건 아니야.
2025330211.english: Of course, I’m not trying to unlock it just because I was asked.

2025330212.korean: 일단 술법을 해제하고, 그다음에 인간을 미워하는 건… 어때?
2025330212.english: How about releasing the spell first, and then hating humans...?

2025340001.korean:
- 이 몸은 도대체 무얼 하고 있는 거야?
그토록 지키고 싶었던 제자들과 이렇게 칼날을 맞대면서……
2025340001.english:
- What on earth am I doing?
 Facing blades like this with the disciples I wanted to protect so much…

2025340002.english: - … … To think you made me make a face like this… …

2025340005.korean: - 오우카의 칼날이 다가온다. 분명 이 몸이 피하는 건 쉽다. 하지만……
2025340005.english: Ouka's blade is approaching. It would certainly be easy for me to dodge. But…

2025340006.korean: - 이걸로 모든 것을 끝내는 게 좋겠지……
2025340006.english: - I suppose it would be best to end everything with this… …

2025340009.korean: - 몸 전체에 느릿한 격통이 몰려오기 시작하였소.
2025340009.english: A slow, intense pain began to surge through my entire body.

2025340011.korean: - 이 몸의 피가 눈앞에서 선명하게 흩날렸고, 그 너머로 오우카 일행의 얼굴이 보였소외다.
2025340011.english: My blood splattered vividly before my eyes, and beyond it, I could see the faces of Ouka and her companions.

2025340012.korean: - 그만… 지금 무슨 얼굴을 하고 있는 게야… 끝까지 숨기지도 못하고…
2025340012.english: Stop... What kind of face are you making right now... You couldn't even hide it until the very end...

2025340014.korean: - 이 몸이 땅에 쓰러지자, 셋은 다급하게 달려왔다네.
2025340014.english: As soon as I fell to the ground, the three of them rushed over in a panic.

2025340017.korean: - 천천히 흐려지는 의식 속에서도 목소리가 들려왔소…
2025340017.english: Even as my consciousness slowly faded, I heard a voice…

2025340018.english: I'll give you first aid right now! Mind...!

2025340022.korean: 안심하십시오. 제가 순식간에 오르카 호까지 이송하겠습니다.
2025340022.english: Rest assured. I will transport you to the Orca in an instant.

2025340027.korean:
- 그저께 밤, “쿠노이치 방식으로 시덴을 설득하겠다”는 내용의 메모를 발견한 후로,
로크가 부상당한 시덴을 오르카 호에 데려왔다.
2025340027.english:
- Since discovering a memo the night before last stating, “I will persuade Shiden using the Kunoichi method,”
 Locke brought the injured Siden to the Orca ship.

2025340028.korean:
- 처음엔 무슨 일인지 몰라 특이체가 또다시 나타난 줄로만 알고 당황했지만,
로크에게 사건의 경위를 듣고, 늦게 돌아온 엔라이 일행에게도 설명과 함께 사과를 받았다.
2025340028.english:
At first, not knowing what was going on, I was flustered, thinking that the singularity had appeared again, but
 I heard the details of the incident from Locke, and also received an explanation and apology from Enrai and his group, who returned late.

2025340029.korean: ……전, 부… 이… 몸의… 탓…... 그, 애…들……은…
2025340029.english: … … It’s… all… the… fault… of… the… body… … Those… kids… … are…

2025340033.korean: 응. 덤으로 리미터도 설정해서, 스스로 발동과 해제가 가능하게 해두었어.
2025340033.english: Yeah. On top of that, I set up a limiter so it can activate and deactivate on its own.

2025340035.korean: 리미터 설정을 어떻게 할까 고민했는데, 역시 시간 인식을 3배로 한다는 건 뇌에 엄청난 부담이 되니까 말이지.
2025340035.english: I was debating how to set the limiter, but after all, tripling the time perception puts a huge strain on the brain.

2025340036.english: As per the original settings, I've set it so that even if it activates, it only goes up to 1.3 times.

2025340037.korean: 실제로도 시덴 언니의 뇌와 모듈은 거의 쉬질 못했던 것 같아.
2025340037.english: In fact, it seems like Shiden's brain and module hardly got any rest.

2025340038.korean: 이대로 뒀다면 모듈이 타버리거나 정신이 무너졌을 거야.
2025340038.english: If I had left it like this, the module would have burned up or my mind would have broken down.

2025340040.korean: - 그러자 시덴은 조용히 눈물을 흘리기 시작했다.
2025340040.english: Then Shiden quietly began to shed tears.

2025340042.korean: - 엔라이 일행이 벌인 일은 분명 충격적이었으나, 한편으로는 시덴에게 상처를 입힐 수 밖에 없는 싸움을 하게 만든 일에는 슬픔과 책임을 느꼈다.
2025340042.english: What Enrai and his group did was certainly shocking, but on the other hand, I felt sadness and responsibility for forcing Shiden into a fight that was bound to injure him.

2025340043.korean:
…그 아이들은… 잘못이 없소.
모든 건 이 몸이… 그대를… 인간을 믿을 용기가… 없었기 때문이외다…
2025340043.english:
… those children… are not at fault.
 It is all because I... lacked the courage... to trust you... or to trust a human...

2025340046.korean: - 이건 그렇게 쉽게 옳고 그름을 판단할 수 있는 문제가 아니다. 분명 나도 같은 상황이었다면 시덴처럼 고민했을 것이다.
2025340046.english: This is not a matter where you can easily judge right from wrong. If I were in the same situation, I would certainly have agonized over it just like Shiden.

2025340047.korean: - 그렇기에, 엔라이는 엔라이 나름의 방식으로 시덴을 구하려 했던 거겠지.
2025340047.english: That is why Enrai must have tried to save Shiden in his own way.

2025340048.korean: - 상처도 아물었고, 오늘 하루 푹 쉬면, 일어날 수 있게 될 거야.
2025340048.english: The wound has healed, and if you get a good rest today, you'll be able to get up.

2025340051.korean: - 나와 시덴은 엔라이 일행이 있는 독방으로 향했다.
2025340051.english: Shiden and I headed to the solitary cell where Enrai and his party were.

2025340053.korean: - 독방의 문을 열자 엔라이, 제로, 카엔 세 사람이 바닥에 정좌한 채 우리를 맞이했다.
2025340053.english: As we opened the door to the solitary cell, Enrai, Zero, and Kaen greeted us while seated cross-legged on the floor.

2025340054.english: … … No, putting Sumire and Hatsuna aside… … I… …

2025340058.korean: - 그제야 세 사람은 어두운 독방에서 나왔다.
2025340058.english: Only then did the three people come out of the dark solitary cell.

2025340061.korean:
술법은 해제되었소. 아직은 익숙치 않지만……
오랜만에 그대들의 진짜 목소리를 들으니 기분이 좋구려.
2025340061.english:
The spell has been lifted. I am not used to it yet, but…
 It feels good to hear your real voices for the first time in a long while.

2025340062.english: That's a relief... That's a really relief...

2025340064.korean: - 엔라이 일행은 시덴을 껴안고, 시덴도 세 사람의 등을 살며시 감쌌다.
2025340064.english: Enrai and his companions hugged Shiden, and Shiden also gently wrapped his arms around the backs of the three.

2025340066.english: I have made you do something truly painful…

2025340068.english: We are the ones who should be... sorry...

2025340069.english: There is no other way to... you...

2025340070.korean: 울지 마시게. 쿠노이치로서 자신의 뜻을 꿋꿋이 관철했지 않소이까? 당당히 가슴을 펴시오.
2025340070.english: Do not cry. As a kunoichi, did you not steadfastly see your will through? Hold your head high.

2025340071.korean: 이 몸이 꺾였기 때문에, 그대들의 뜻을 따른 것일 뿐이외다.
2025340071.english: I merely followed your will because my body was broken.

2025340072.english: You have truly become strong... my lovely disciples.

2025340074.korean: - 시덴은 나를 향해 돌아서서, 천천히 심호흡을 했다.
2025340074.english: Shiden turned toward me and took a slow, deep breath.

2025340075.korean: 인간… 그대에게 정말로 큰 도움을 받았소……
2025340075.english: Human... I have received truly great help from you...

2025340076.korean: 무슨 말을 하는 것이오. 그대가 없었다면 아무것도 시작되지 않았을 터!
2025340076.english: What are you talking about? Without you, nothing would have started!

2025340077.korean: 사양하지 마시오. 지금은 그저 감사를 받아들이시게.
2025340077.english: Do not decline. Just accept the gratitude for now.

2025340081.english: What do you intend to do now?

2025340082.korean:
- 시덴의 술법을 해제한 이상, 우리가 일본에 있을 이유는 없어졌다.
세인트 오르카도 해체해서 오르카 호에 실어 두었다.
2025340082.english:
Now that Shiden's spell has been lifted, there is no longer any reason for us to be in Japan.
 Saint Orca was also dismantled and loaded onto the Orca ship.

2025340083.korean: - 유럽을 너무 오래 비워둘 수도 없으니, 내일쯤 이 땅을 떠날 생각이다.
2025340083.english: I can't leave Europe alone for too long, so I plan to leave this land around tomorrow.

2025340085.korean:
- 사실 D돔에 있는 바이오로이드들의 뜻은 확인해두었다.
다들 입을 모아 시덴의 술법만 풀어준다면, 어디든 따라가겠다고 말했었다.
2025340085.english:
- Actually, I have confirmed the intentions of the bioroids in the D-Dome.
 Everyone said in unison that if only Shiden's spell were released, they would follow him anywhere.

2025340086.korean:
- 그러니 이제는 시덴이 어떻게 할지가 남은 일이다.
만약 이곳에 남겠다면, 사용할 수 있는 물자와 식량을 D돔에 운반할 생각이다.
2025340086.english:
So now, it remains to be seen what Shiden will do.
 If I stay here, I intend to transport usable supplies and food to D-Dome.

2025340088.english: Shiden started laughing for some reason.

2025340089.korean: 그대는…… 정녕 상황이 이렇게 되어도 오르카에 오라고는 않는구려?
2025340089.english: So... even with the situation turned out this way, you really aren't asking me to come to Orca?

2025340090.korean: 후후후…… 너무 상냥한 것도 이쯤하면 문제로 보아야겠구려.
2025340090.english: Hahaha... At this point, being too kind should be considered a problem.

2025340095.korean: 쿠노이치 시덴, 이 은혜에 보답하기 위해… 오늘부터 그대를 모시게 됐소이다.
2025340095.english: Kunoichi Shiden, to repay this kindness… I have come to serve you starting today.

2025340096.korean: …계속 인간이라 칭하기도 그러니, 애송이라 칭해도 불만은 없겠지? 아무래도 이 몸이 연상이니 말일세.
2025340096.english: … It feels a bit awkward to keep calling you a human, so you won't have any complaints if I call you a brat, right? After all, I am older than you.

2025340097.english: I reached out my hand to Shiden.

2025340099.english: Shiden quietly gazed at my hand.

2025340100.english: It’s my first time shaking hands with a human.

2025340101.korean: - 시덴은 그렇게 말하며 살며시 내 손을 잡았다.
2025340101.english: Shiden said that and gently took my hand.

2025340102.korean: 이렇게 따뜻한 손을 가졌다니…… 정말로 이 몸은, 인간의 어두운 면밖에 몰랐던 모양이오……
2025340102.english: To think you have such warm hands… It seems I truly knew nothing but the dark side of humanity…

2025340103.korean: 앞으로, 그대라는 빛을… 이 몸에게 보여주도록 하시게.
2025340103.english: From now on, let yourself show this light that is you to me.

2025340104.english: <The Great War ~Endlessly Fading Purple Lightning~> END.

2025340106.english: This is the Orca's recovery room.

2025340107.english: I'm sorry, but I disabled time awareness extension.

2025340109.korean: 자기 멋대로 했다며 스스로 독방에 들어가 있더라고.
2025340109.english: He said he did as he pleased and voluntarily went into solitary confinement.

2025340110.korean: 컨디션이 나아지면, 같이 엔라이 일행들을 만나러 가자.
2025340110.english: Once you feel better, let's go meet Enrai and his group together.

2025340111.english: Enough with the self-reflection, everyone, please come out now.

2025340112.english: Please don't make me give orders...

2025340113.korean: 아니. 너를 구한 건 엔라이 일행이야.
2025340113.english: No. It was Enrai's group who saved you.

2025340116.english: I'm thinking of going back to Europe around tomorrow.

2025340117.english: What are you going to do?

2025340119.english: I look forward to working with you... Shiden.

2025350003.english: Oh, a training ground in the basement…

2025350005.korean: 어때, 훌륭하지 않소이까? 이 곳에서 그대들을 철저히 단련시켜주도록 하겠소.
2025350005.english: How about that? Isn't it excellent? I will thoroughly train you here.

2025350006.korean: 하지만 여기… 지하라고는 해도, 무로마치잖아요? 이런 곳에서 수련해서… 괜찮은 거예요?
2025350006.english: But here… even though it’s underground, this is Muromachi, isn’t it? Training in a place like this… is it really okay?

2025350007.korean:
일 없네, 지하는 소리가 새지 않도록 술법을 걸어두었구려.
이 몸이 평소부터 수련에 사용하고 있소외다.
2025350007.english:
No problem. The basement has cast a spell to prevent sound from leaking out.
 This body has been using this for training since its inception.

2025350008.korean: 그대들이 비명을 질러도 밖에는 들리지 않을 것이외다. 후후후후……
2025350008.english: Even if you scream, it will not be heard outside. Hahahahaha...

2025350009.english: Kaen and his party… the person to follow might be the wrong one…

2025350010.english: Ugh... ... I guess we should just leave... ...

2025350011.korean: 뜻대로 하시게나. 밖은 그대들이 생각하는 것 이상으로 적들이 들끓고 있소이다만?
2025350011.english: Do as you please. However, the outside is swarming with enemies far more than you imagine.

2025350012.english: You struggled even against Hagane, so are you sure you'll be okay?

2025350016.korean: (정말 모든 걸 다시 처음부터 시작해야 하는 건가…)
2025350016.english: (Do I really have to start everything over from the beginning…)

2025350021.korean: 그보다 '시덴 님'이라니…? 천치 같긴… 앞으로는 이 몸을 스승님이라 부르도록 하시오.
2025350021.english: More importantly, 'Lord Shiden'...? What an idiot... From now on, call me Master.

2025350022.korean: 좋아, 오늘의 수련은 이걸로 끝일세. 이제 식사를 하는게 좋겠소.
2025350022.english: Alright, that concludes today's training. It would be best to have a meal now.

2025350025.korean: 그대들… 놀랄 만큼 쉽게도 약한 소리를 하는구려...
2025350025.english: You guys... you speak weak words surprisingly easily...

2025350026.english: I won't go easy on you just because you're tired.

2025350027.korean: 그, 그 정도는 백 번도 알고 있습니다.
2025350027.english: I, I know that much a hundred times over.

2025350029.korean: 스미레, 그런 말은, 별로 안 하는 게 좋아……
2025350029.english: Sumire, you really shouldn't say things like that...

2025350031.korean: 호오, 그렇단 말이지? 그럼, 수련을 연장해도 괜찮겠소이까?
2025350031.english: Oh, so that is how it is? Then, would it be alright if I extended my training?

2025350032.english: Why is it turning out like that!?

2025350035.korean: (이 녀석들은 정말 수련을 싫어하는구려… 이 몸이 제대로 단련시키지 않으면… 금방 죽어버릴 것 같소……)
2025350035.english: (These guys really hate training... If I don't train them properly... it looks like they'll die in no time...)

2025350036.korean: 음? 하츠나, 무엇을 하고 있는 것이오?
2025350036.english: Hmm? Hatsuna, what are you doing?

2025350039.english: Yeah. Since my master always cooks for me, this is my way of repaying him.

2025350040.english: … … Hmm… … I appreciate the thought, but… …

2025350041.korean: 그대, 지금까지 요리를 해본 적은 있는 것이오?

2025350042.english: Yes, there is. Grilled fish, chicken skewers, and grilled vegetables.

2025350043.korean: ……그건… 그 태도로 베어서 동시에 구워진 것뿐이지 않겠소이까…?
2025350043.english: … … Isn’t that… just that it was cut with that attitude and roasted at the same time…?

2025350044.english: Yeah. If you cut it, it'll be finished.

2025350046.korean: 하아…… 우선은 조리 도구부터 배우도록 하시게나…… 그 태도는 집어넣으시오.
2025350046.english: Haa... First, you should learn how to use cooking tools... Put that attitude away.

2025350048.korean: 스승님. 지금 와서 이런 말씀 드리기 뭐하지만……
2025350048.english: Master. I know it feels a bit late to say this now, but...

2025350052.korean: 정말이지 새삼스럽게도 이제 와서 하는 말이구려, 그대는……
2025350052.english: It really seems absurd to say this now, but you…

2025350053.korean:
진짜일세… 이 몸의 아비가 호랑이 요괴였는데, 그 흔적이외다.
귀엽지 않소이까? 이 몸도 퍽 마음에 드는 부분이오.
2025350053.english:
It is true... My father was a tiger demon, and this is the trace of him.
 Isn't it cute? It's a part of me that I quite like, too.

2025350054.korean: 하지만, 눈에 띄지 않나요? 변신 술법이라면 그 귀도 없애는 게……
2025350054.english: But, isn't it noticeable? If it's a transformation spell, getting rid of that demon too...

2025350055.korean:
천치 같은 소리, 이 몸은 갸루의 모습을 연구해 이 모습이 된 것이오.
그렇다면, 이 귀야말로 남겨두는 것이 좋지 않겠소이까!
2025350055.english:
What a load of nonsense. I became this way after studying the appearance of a gyaru.
 In that case, wouldn't it be best to keep this ear?

2025350057.korean: 갸루는 귀여운 걸 좋아하니 달고 있는 편이 더 어울리지 않겠냐는 말이오!
2025350057.english: I'm saying that since Gyaru like cute things, wouldn't it suit them better to wear it?

2025350059.english: Why are you looking at me like that?

2025350060.korean: 갸루라고 해도… 갸루는 그런 말투로 말하지 않아요.
2025350060.english: Even if they are Gyaru... Gyaru don't speak in that kind of tone.

2025350062.korean: - 이 몸은 그렇게 그 아이들과 두 번째 인생을 살아갔소.
2025350062.english: And so, I lived my second life with those children.

2025350063.korean: - 첫 번째 인생의 끝에서, 아무 대화도 나누지 못한 채 이별을 하게 된 이 몸은… 기억을 간직한 채 다시 시작하는 삶이란 의외로 싫지만은 않을 때도 있었소.
2025350063.english: - At the end of my first life, having parted ways without exchanging a single word... there were times when I surprisingly didn't dislike the idea of ​​starting a new life while cherishing my memories.

2025350066.korean: 하가네, 저번에 분명 스승님이 쓰러뜨렸을 텐데…
2025350066.english: Hagane, Master definitely defeated him last time...

2025350067.korean: 그렇구려…… 하가네는 이 몸이 그때, 확실히 죽였소외다.
2025350067.english: I see... I certainly killed Hagane back then.

2025350068.english: That must have been revived by Tsukikage's secret technique...

2025350072.korean:
정신 바짝 차리시오.
상태가 이상하구려, 뭔가 강화를 받은 것일 수도 있소.
2025350072.english:
Stay alert.
 The condition is strange; it might have received some kind of enhancement.

2025360001.korean: - 몇 번이나 인생을 반복했을꼬…… 이 몸은 그 아이들을 몇 번이나 죽게 했고, 베어 죽였소…...
2025360001.english: - How many times have I repeated my life… … How many times have I caused those children to die, and how many times have I cut them to death… …

2025360003.english: - Again and again, and again and again…

2025360004.korean: - 하지만, 인간이 명령하면 아무 일도 없었다는 듯 새로운 인생이 시작되었소.
2025360004.english: However, when a human gave an order, a new life began as if nothing had happened.

2025360005.korean: - 앞으로 어떤 슬픔이 기다리고 있을지 알고 있으면서도…… 모든 것을 잊고, 아무 일 없던 듯 행동하는 자신에게, 이 몸의 마음은 식어갔소.
2025360005.english: Even though I knew what sorrow awaited me… my heart grew cold toward myself as I forgot everything and acted as if nothing had happened.

2025360006.korean: - 하지만, 어느 날… 처음 있는 일이 벌어졌소외다.
2025360006.english: However, one day… something unprecedented happened.

2025360007.korean: 그림자 인법 사용자 에이게츠… 감히 이 몸의 소중한 제자들을 욕보이려 하다니…… 절대로 놓치지 않겠소!
2025360007.english: Shadow Ninjutsu user Eigetsu… How dare you try to disgrace my precious disciples… … I will never let you get away!

2025360008.english: If he were a coward… he would surely have run underground…

2025360012.english: Stop letting it get to the point of death!

2025360016.korean: - 엔라이가 최종전이 아닌 이야기 중반에 등장했던 것이외다.
2025360016.english: Enrai appeared in the middle of the story, not in the final battle.

2025360017.korean: 에이게츠, 당신을 여기서 죽게 할 수는 없습니다. 가세요.
2025360017.english: Eigetsu, I cannot let you die here. Go.

2025360019.korean: 설마 그대와 여기서 만나게 될 줄은 몰랐소……
2025360019.english: I never imagined I would meet you here…

2025360020.korean: 죄송합니다. 저는 당신을 본 기억이 없는데요……
2025360020.english: I'm sorry. I don't remember seeing you...

2025360022.english: Oh, you mean you don't know me?

2025360023.korean: 역시, 그대는 환술에 걸려 있는 모양이구려……
2025360023.english: As expected, it seems you are under an illusion…

2025360025.korean: 일단은 묻겠소, 그대는 이 몸을 어떻게 할 생각이오?
2025360025.english: First of all, let me ask you: what do you intend to do with me?

2025360026.korean:
이상한 소릴… 당신은 우리 아시카가 닌자군에 손을 댔습니다.
당연히, 벱니다.
2025360026.english:
That's strange... You have laid hands on our Ashikaga ninja army.
 Of course, I cut.

2025360027.korean: 하아…… 그대가 이 몸을 이길 리가 없지 않소이까.
2025360027.english: Haa... There is no way you could defeat me.

2025360028.english: Stop acting like you know everything…!

2025360029.korean: 유감이지만… 이 몸은 그대를 알고 있소. 아둔한 녀석 같으니…!
2025360029.english: I am sorry, but… I know you. You foolish fellow…!

2025360033.english: More than that, why my technology...

2025360034.english: Hmph, why do you think that is?

2025360039.korean: 그대의 이름이외다! 그것조차도 잊었소이까! 떠올려 내시오! 그대 자신의 이름을!!
2025360039.english: It is your name! Have you forgotten even that! Recall it! Your own name!!

2025360041.english: Snap out of it! Ouka! Ouka!

2025360045.english: You're still alive...! Was it just a faint...?

2025360046.english: It's all or nothing... I guess I'll have to take them to the mansion...

2025360052.english: That's a relief…! I'm so relieved…!

2025360053.english: … … Good heavens… Crying like a child… …

2025360059.korean: - 이렇게 해서 오우카의 환술은 예상치 못한 타이밍에 풀리며, 다시 우리 동료가 되었소외다.
2025360059.english: In this way, Ouka's illusion was dispelled at an unexpected moment, and she became our comrade again.

2025360060.korean: - 오우카는 조종당하고 있던 동안의 기억도 가지고 있었기에, 우리는 그 정보를 바탕으로 츠키카게 무리들을 하나하나 처리해 나갔소…
2025360060.english: Since Ouka retained memories from the time she was being controlled, we used that information to take out the Tsukikage group one by one…

2025360062.korean: - 우리가 숨 가삐 텐게츠를 몰아붙인 탓에, 그녀는 스스로의 술법을 연마했고……
2025360062.english: Because we relentlessly pushed Tengetsu, she honed her own spells…

2025360063.korean: - 마지막 전투에서 텐게츠는 오우카의 몸을 빼앗았소외다.
2025360063.english: - In the final battle, Tengetsu took over Ouka's body.

2025360064.korean: 후후후… 시덴… 고마워. 전부 네 덕분이야.
2025360064.english: Hahaha... Shiden... Thank you. It's all thanks to you.

2025360065.korean: 나는 육체라는 감옥에서 해방되어, 고차원적인 존재가 되었어!
2025360065.english: I was liberated from the prison of the body and became a higher-dimensional being!

2025360066.english: Now, no one can stop me… …!

2025360068.korean: 흥, 그만 두시게. 엔라이의 의식은 이미 사라져 가고 있소.
2025360068.english: Hmph, stop it. Enrai's consciousness is already fading away.

2025360072.korean: 확신은 없지만, 놈이 말한 게 사실이라면 오우카의 마음은 아직 사라지지 않았을 것이오!
2025360072.english: I'm not entirely sure, but if what he said is true, Ouka's heart wouldn't have disappeared yet!

2025360073.english: I must regain control of my body somehow… …!

2025360074.korean: 후후후…… 할 수 있으면 해보시지? 내가 널 죽이기 전에!
2025360074.english: Hahaha... Try it if you can, before I kill you!

2025360076.english: Kaen, I don't want to fight with Mom!

2025360077.english: Get into position! Here it comes!

2025360078.korean: - 텐게츠와의 싸움 속에서, 우리의 부름에 의해 분명 오우카는 의식을 되찾을 수 있었소……
2025360078.english: - In the midst of the battle with Tengetsu, Ouka was surely able to regain consciousness at our call… …

2025360080.korean:
- 스미레, 하츠나! 내 의식은 이제… 지금밖에 유지되지 않아!
지금 이 순간, 나와 함께 텐게츠를 죽여라!
2025360080.english:
- Sumire, Hatsuna! My consciousness is… only staying up to this moment!
 Kill Tengetsu with me at this very moment!

2025360084.english: So… don’t say things like that…

2025360086.english: Master! Can't you... can't you do something somehow!?

2025360089.korean: 이 몸 역시…… 어찌할 도리가…… 텐게츠를 확실히 쓰러뜨리려면…… 지금밖에… 없소외다……!
2025360089.english: I, too… … have no other choice… … to defeat Tengetsu for sure… … now is the only… time… … !

2025360092.korean: 크윽……! 서둘러! 더는, 억제할 수 없어…
2025360092.english: Ugh...! Hurry! I can't hold back anymore...

2025360096.english: I ask the two of them… to…

2025360101.english: I won't let my sister shoulder the burden alone.

2025360102.korean: ……고마워, 두 사람 다…… 너희들에게 베인다면 여한이 없어……
2025360102.english: … … Thank you, both of you… … If I am cut down by you, I will have no regrets… …

2025360106.english:
Thunder God Flash!
 Descent of the God of Incarnation

2025360112.korean: 쿠노이치로서 이토록 사랑에 넘치는 엔딩이 또 있을까!?
2025360112.english: As a kunoichi, could there ever be another ending this overflowing with love!?

2025360113.korean: 이거다! 바로 이게 내가 원하던 엔딩이다! 이걸 정식 스토리로 채택한다! 알겠지!?
2025360113.english: This is it! This is exactly the ending I wanted! I'm adopting this as the official story! Got it!?

2025360114.korean: 알겠습니다. 그럼 앞으로 VR 영화용 촬영은 이 루트를 중심으로 한 것으로 변경하겠습니다.
2025360114.english: Understood. Then, from now on, we will change the focus of VR movie filming to center around this route.

2025360115.english: Alright, do that! I'll leave that to you!

2025360116.korean: 후후후후…… 엔라이, 이제 대전란은 내 최고의 걸작이 되었다!!
2025360116.english: Hahahahaha... Enrai, the Great War has now become my greatest masterpiece!!

2025360117.korean: 너의 죽음, 정말 훌륭했다! 나는 그 죽음을 반드시 보답하겠다!
2025360117.english: Your death was truly magnificent! I will surely repay that death!

2025370003.korean: 무슨 일이죠? 가 아니야! 케이크는 어떻게 된 거냐! 준비해주겠다고 했잖아!
2025370003.english: What's wrong? No, that's not it! What happened to the cake! You said you'd prepare it for me!

2025370004.korean: 아, 죄송해요. 최근 갑작스레 이것저것 정신없어서, 완전히 잊고 있었어요.
2025370004.english: Oh, I'm sorry. I've been so suddenly busy with this and that lately that I completely forgot.

2025370005.korean: 뭐야, 아직 정신 못 차린 거야?
2025370005.english: What? You still haven't come to your senses?

2025370006.korean: 아무래도 특이체가 확인된 모양이라, 그 토벌 작전이 시작된대요.
2025370006.english: It seems an anomaly has been confirmed, so the extermination operation is said to be starting.

2025370007.english: What!? A singularity!? That's the first time I've heard of it!

2025370008.korean: 그건… 그렇겠죠. 해피는 선발 전투원이 아니니까요.
2025370008.english: That… I suppose so. After all, Happy isn't a starter combatant.

2025370009.korean: 나는 파괴의 화신이다! 내가 전투원이 아니면 누가 전투원이냐!
2025370009.english: I am the embodiment of destruction! If I am not a combatant, then who is!

2025370010.korean: 지금은 아니잖아요? 그런 모습으로 싸울 수나 있어요?
2025370010.english: That's not the case now, is it? Can you even fight looking like that?

2025370011.korean:
우습게 보지 마라! 이 모습이어도 신체 능력은 웬만한 바이오로이드보다 낫다!
무기만 있으면 어떻게든 된다!
2025370011.english:
Don't underestimate me! Even in this form, my physical abilities are better than most bioroids!
 As long as you have a weapon, you can manage somehow!

2025370012.english: Haa... but I don't have that weapon, do I?

2025370016.english: Lord Azaz… … please don’t startle me… …

2025370017.english: Oh my, I'm sorry. I didn't mean to.

2025370018.korean: 놀라다니… 지금 이게 놀란다는 감각인가…… 하아……
2025370018.english: To think I was surprised... Is this what it feels like to be surprised... ...Haa... ...

2025370019.english: Have you felt it for the first time?

2025370020.korean: 윽… 센서가 과잉 반응했다고 할까, 센서랑 동시에 몸이 반응했다고 할까…… 신기한 감각이었어……
2025370020.english: Ugh… Should I say the sensor overreacted, or that my body reacted at the same time as the sensor… It was a strange sensation…

2025370021.english: Haha, so that’s how Mr. Tyrant expresses surprise.

2025370023.korean: 나를 연구 대상으로 보지 마라! 짜증난다……
2025370023.english: Don't treat me like a research subject! It's annoying...

2025370024.english: More importantly, what brings you here?

2025370025.korean: 네. 타이런트씨의 무장이 완성돼서 보여주러 왔습니다.
2025370025.english: Yes. Mr. Tyrant's armament is complete, so I have come to show it to you.

2025370026.korean: 무장! 이 모습으로도 싸울 수 있다는 건가!?
2025370026.english: Armed! Does this mean you can fight even in this form!?

2025370027.english: That is correct. Once the final adjustments are complete.

2025370028.korean: 오오! 그럼 당장 최종 조정하러 가자!
2025370028.english: Oh! Then let's go do the final adjustments right away!

2025370031.english: The fact that Happy is fighting in that form…

2025370032.english: It’s fine. The armament has been miniaturized, but the power remains the same.

2025370033.english: That is a bit unsettling in its own way, though…

2025370034.english: Are you feeling anxious? Then, shall I explain it to you while looking at the materials?

2025370035.korean: 아뇨, 괜찮습니다. 아마 들어도 이해 못 할 것 같습니다.
2025370035.english: No, it's fine. I probably wouldn't understand even if I heard it.

2025370036.korean:
뭘 하고 있느냐! 아자즈! 어서 최종 조정하러 가자!
바닐라! 케이크는 내가 돌아올 때까지다! 준비해놓고 기다려라!
2025370036.english:
What are you doing, Azaz! Let's go do the final adjustments right away!
 Vanilla! The cake is until I return! Get it ready and wait!

2025370037.korean:
해피, 너무 흥분해서 날뛰지 마세요.
물건이라도 부수면 케이크는 다음으로 미룰 거예요.
2025370037.english:
Happy, don't get too excited and run wild.
 If anything gets broken, I'll postpone the cake until next time.

2025370042.english: Welcome back. I'm glad to see you safe.

2025370043.english: Mr. Locke, I am entering the private hangar.

2025370044.korean: 우와… 영상으로는 봤지만, 실제로 보니 손상이 꽤 심하네요……
2025370044.english: Wow… I saw it in the video, but seeing it in person, the damage is quite severe…

2025370046.korean:
아니요, 로크 씨는 전혀 잘못이 없는 걸요.
나쁜 건 전부 특이체라는 철충이잖아요…… 콜로서스였죠……?
2025370046.english:
No, Mr. Locke is not at fault at all.
 All the bad ones are those Iron Bugs called the Singularities, aren't they... ...it was Colossus... ...?

2025370047.korean: 네. 놈의 불가시 역장 때문에 접근을 감지하지 못하고, 공격을 고스란히 받았습니다……
2025370047.english: Yes. Due to that bastard's invisible force field, we couldn't detect his approach and took the full brunt of the attack…

2025370048.korean: 그 이후의 공격은 피할 수 있었습니다만......
2025370048.english: I was able to avoid the subsequent attacks, but......

2025370049.korean: 첫 타격의 피해가 생각보다 커서, 이렇게 볼품없는 모습이 되고 말았습니다…...
2025370049.english: The damage from the first hit was greater than expected, so it ended up looking this unsightly...

2025370050.korean: 이번 토벌 작전에는 저도 당연히 참가하라는 각하의 명이 있었습니다. 반드시, 설욕을 해보이겠습니다.
2025370050.english: His Excellency has ordered that I, too, naturally participate in this punitive operation. I will certainly avenge this defeat.

2025370052.korean: 다시 전장에 칠흑의 날개를 펼치기 위해!
2025370052.english: To spread pitch-black wings once again on the battlefield!

2025370055.korean: 안색이 좋지 않네요? 무슨 일이라도 있으신가요?
2025370055.english: You look unwell. Is something wrong?

2025370059.korean: 오, 닥터. 방금 귀함했습니다. 이번엔 걱정을 끼쳐드렸군요.
2025370059.english: Oh, Doctor. I just returned. I've caused you worry this time.

2025370060.english: Oppa Locke… … looking so tattered like this… …

2025370062.korean: 닥터… 이번 사태는 당신 탓이 아닙니다. 모든 것은 방심한 제가 자초한 일입니다…
2025370062.english: Doctor… this situation is not your fault. I brought it all upon myself by letting my guard down…

2025370063.korean: 당신은 저를 믿고 세인트 오르카 회수 임무를 맡기겠다고 말해주셨죠…… 저는 지금도 그것이 자랑스럽습니다.
2025370063.english: You told me that you trusted me and would entrust me with the mission to retrieve Saint Orca… I am still proud of that.

2025370065.korean: 당신에게 그런 어두운 표정은 어울리지 않습니다……
2025370065.english: Such a gloomy expression doesn't suit you…

2025370071.korean:
그럼, 바로 수리를 부탁드려도 괜찮을까요? 각하의 작전에는 제가 편성되어 있어서……
지체할 수는 없습니다.
2025370071.english:
Then, may I ask you to repair it right away? I have been assigned to Your Excellency's operation, so...
 We cannot delay.

2025370073.english: Um, before that, would you mind a moment?

2025370074.korean: 무슨 일이야? 표정이 엄청 안 좋아 보이는데?
2025370074.english: What's wrong? You look really upset.

2025370075.korean: 닥터 씨… 저기, 로크 씨의 부품……
2025370075.english: Dr. Mr.… um, Mr. Locke’s parts… …

2025370079.korean: 훌륭합니다…… 저의 주군의 고결함과 하카의 혼을 구현한 듯한 모습입니다.
2025370079.english: It is magnificent… It looks as if it embodies the nobility of my lord and the spirit of the Haka.

2025370081.korean: 문제 없습니다. 이 신형 무장도 제 고성능 모듈이라면 무난히 다룰 수 있을 것입니다.
2025370081.english: No problem. My high-performance module should be able to handle this new weapon without any issues.

2025370082.korean: 흠…… 하지만, 이 모습으로는 칠흑의 날개나 사신이라 자칭하기는 어렵겠네요.
2025370082.english: Hmm... but, in this form, it would be difficult to call myself the Wings of Pitch Black or the Grim Reaper.

2025370083.korean: …그렇다면, 이 모습의 저는 굳이 말하자면… 창공의 기사일까요?
2025370083.english: … In that case, if I had to say what I look like now… would I be a Knight of the Sky?

2025370088.korean: 저기… 로크 씨… 만약 원래 모습으로 돌아가고 싶으시면 언제든지 말씀해 주세요……
2025370088.english: Um... Mr. Locke... If you would like to return to your original form, please let me know anytime...

2025370090.korean:
즉, 저의 주군께서 바라시는 모습으로 언제든 변할 수 있다는 것이로군요……
후후후… 참으로 훌륭하군요.
2025370090.english:
In other words, I see that I can transform into the form my lord desires at any time…
 Hahaha... That is truly excellent.

2025380001.english: You scum! Be shattered into pieces!

2025380003.korean: 어…… 뭐야, 저거……? 철충을 때렸더니 두부처럼 부서졌는데……
2025380003.english: Uh... what is that...? I hit the Iron蟲 and it shattered like tofu...

2025380004.korean: 조정이 잘 된 것 같아 다행이네요.
2025380004.english: It's a relief that the adjustment seems to have gone well.

2025380005.korean:
파괴의 화신이 아니면 내가 아니라 하셨기에,
작은 몸이 되어도 파괴력이 떨어지지 않도록 신경 썼습니다.
2025380005.english:
Because you said that if I am not the embodiment of destruction, I am not myself,
 I took care to ensure that its destructive power would not decrease even with a small body.

2025380006.korean: 타이런트 씨는 확고한 정체성을 가지고 있어서 멋지네요.
2025380006.english: Mr. Tyrant, it's cool that you have a strong identity.

2025380007.english: Even though you shattered that identity......

2025380008.korean: 후후후…… 역시 어떤 창조든 파괴로부터 시작되는 거니까요.
2025380008.english: Hahaha... After all, any creation begins with destruction.

2025380010.english: I'm not praising you at all!

2025380011.korean: 저도 타이런트 님처럼 멋진 정체성이 있으면 좋겠어요.
2025380011.english: I wish I had a cool identity like Tyrant.

2025380012.english: You already have a distinct identity...

2025380013.korean:
그런가요?
우후후…… 드라큐리나 님은 저를 잘 봐주고 계시네요.
2025380013.english:
Is that so?
 Uhuhu... Lady Dracurina, you are looking out for me.

2025380014.korean: 시험 삼아 어떤 정체성인지 말해주실 수 있을까요?
2025380014.english: Could you tell me what your identity is, just to test it out?

2025380016.korean:
아, 너는… 사령관을 좋아해서 그 녀석을 위해서라면
요리든 전투든 뭐든……
2025380016.english:
Ah, you... because you like the Commander, if it's for that guy
 Whether it's cooking, fighting, or whatever…

2025380019.english: … … Ugh! What’s with that look! I’m quitting after all!

2025380020.english: Oh my... that's a shame. Why?

2025380021.english: Because that look on your face annoys me!

2025380023.korean: 그럼 우리가 드라큐리나 씨의 멋진 정체성을 말씀드리도록 하죠.
2025380023.english: Then, let us tell you about Ms. Dracurina's wonderful identity.

2025380026.english: I apologize, but I would like to speak first…

2025380027.korean: 됐거든!! 아니 지금 전투 중이잖아!! 진지하게 해!!
2025380027.english: Enough!! I mean, we're in the middle of a battle right now!! Take it seriously!!

2025390001.korean: 후우… 시작할 땐 진짜 가능할까 걱정됐지만…… 어떻게든 마무리됐군요.
2025390001.english: Phew... When I started, I was really worried if it would be possible... but somehow, it ended up being finished.

2025390002.korean: 로크 씨도 오르카 호로 돌아와 수복 중인 듯하고, 나머지는 사령관님이 어떻게든 해주시겠죠.
2025390002.english: Mr. Locke seems to have returned to the Orca and is currently in the process of repairs, and I'm sure the Commander will take care of the rest somehow.

2025390003.english: Alright! Then let's go! To Lord Pokkuru the Great Demon King!

2025390004.korean: 그게 무슨 말인가. 지금은 오르카의 방위를 맡고 있지 않나.
2025390004.english: What do you mean? Aren't you in charge of Orca's defense right now?

2025390005.korean: '무슨 소리냐'는 이쪽 대사다! 뽀끄루 대마왕님은 지금 혼자서 철충 군단과 싸우고 계신단 말이다!
2025390005.english: "What are you talking about?" is my line! Great Demon King Pokkuru is fighting the Iron蟲 Legion all by herself right now!

2025390006.english: No, I don't think you're alone, but...

2025390007.korean:
돔에 있던 생존자들도 전투에 익숙하다고 들었네.
사령관이 지휘한다면 괜찮을 것이네.
2025390007.english:
I heard that the survivors in the dome are also used to combat.
 It will be fine if the commander is in charge.

2025390008.korean: 으으…… 하지만 말이다. 역시 전력이 많은 게 나쁠 건 없겠지?
2025390008.english: Ugh... but you know what? There's really no harm in having a lot of power, right?

2025390009.korean:
그것도 그렇지만, 여기서부터 달려서 갈 셈인가?
가는 도중 흉폭화한 철충 무리랑 마주칠 게 뻔한데 말이네.
2025390009.english:
That's true, but are you planning to run all the way from here?
 It's obvious we're going to run into a swarm of ferocious Iron Bugs on the way.

2025390010.english: Ugh... If only I had wings...

2025390011.korean: 역시 그때 뽀끄루 대마왕님을 따라갔어야 했다!
2025390011.english: I really should have followed Great Demon King Pokkuru back then!

2025390012.english: Damn it!! I'm so sorry! Great Demon King Pokkuru!!

2025390013.korean: 여하튼 자네는…… 뽀끄루 낭자 이야기만 나오면 태도가 뒤바뀌는군.
2025390013.english: Anyway, you… … your attitude completely changes whenever Lady Pokkuru is mentioned.

2025390015.english: Hey, call me 'Great Demon King Pokkuru' or 'Great Space Demon King Pokkuru'!

2025390016.english: Wouldn't I be better than Goltarion...

2025390018.korean: 보아하니, 이 중에 제정신인 건 역시 AGS의 대표인 저 하나뿐인 것 같군요……
2025390018.english: From the looks of it, it seems I am the only sane one here, the representative of AGS…

2025390019.korean:
그보다, 타이런트를 찾아야 되지 않습니까?
당연히 당신은 타이런트를 따라 오르카 호에 탄 줄 알았는데 말입죠?
2025390019.english:
More importantly, shouldn't we find the Tyrant?
 I naturally assumed you boarded the Orca following the Tyrant, you know?

2025390020.korean: 이보게… 자네, 정말로 날 변태라 생각하고 있는 건 아니겠지?
2025390020.english: Hey... you don't really think I'm a pervert, do you?

2025390022.korean: 나는 순수하게 로크가 걱정돼서 사령관을 따라온 것뿐일세.
2025390022.english: I only followed the commander purely because I was worried about Locke.

2025390023.korean: ……그렇다면 실례했군요. 당신을 변태로밖에 안 봤던 터라……
2025390023.english: … … In that case, I apologize for the inconvenience. I only saw you as a pervert… …

2025390025.korean:
게다가 타이런트 낭자의 신규 유기체엔 아무런 관심이 없다네.
말했잖나? 난 원래 모습으로 돌아올 때가 기대될 뿐이라고 말일세.
2025390025.english:
Besides, I have no interest in Lady Tyrant's new organism.
 Didn't I tell you? I'm just looking forward to returning to my original self.

2025390027.english: Well! I don't have skin, though!

2025390028.english: Please stay safe! Great Demon King Pokkuru!!

2025390029.korean:
타이런트씨의 프라이멀 파이어 출력은 떨어지지 않은 것 같네요.
다행이에요.
2025390029.english:
It looks like Mr. Tyrant's Primal Fire output hasn't dropped.
 That's a relief.

2025390030.korean:
저 작은 몸에서 엄청난 열선이 뿜어져 나오는 걸 봤을 땐
꿈이라도 꾸는 줄 알았어……
2025390030.english:
When I saw tremendous heat rays shooting out of that small body
 I thought I was dreaming...

2025390031.english: Hahaha, it’s because I put a lot of thought into that part.

2025390032.korean: 하지만 역시 몸무게가 가벼워서 프라이멀 파이어 발사 시 바람 압력에 떠올라버리네요.
2025390032.english: However, as expected, since it is light, it gets lifted up by the wind pressure when firing Primal Fire.

2025390033.korean: 여러 가지 새로운 과제가 보여서 즐겁네요.
2025390033.english: It is enjoyable to see various new challenges.

2025390035.korean: 타이런트가 마구 날뛰어준 덕분에 철충도 거의 정리됐네.
2025390035.english: Thanks to Tyrant going on a rampage, the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) are almost all gone.

2025390036.korean:
그렇네요. 좀 더 근접전 샘플이 있었으면 했지만……
오르카 호가 안전해진 걸 기뻐해야겠죠.
2025390036.english:
I see. I was hoping for a bit more close-quarters combat samples, but...
 We should be glad that the Orca is safe.

2025390037.english: Mr. Tyrant, it's time for a break.

2025390038.korean:
휴식? 나에게 그런 건 필요 없다! 그보다 더 싸우게 해주거라!
약한 놈들뿐이라 지루했다! 너무 금방 끝났잖느냐!
2025390038.english:
Rest? I don't need that! Let me fight even harder!
 It was boring because they were all weaklings! It ended way too quickly!

2025390039.korean:
해피, 투정 부리지 마세요.
전투가 금방 끝났다는 건, 그만큼 주인님의 부담이 줄었다는 뜻이에요.
2025390039.english:
Happy, don't whine.
 The fact that the battle ended quickly means that your burden has been reduced by that much.

2025390041.korean:
으으으… 싫다! 아직 싸우고 싶단 말이다!
나를 특이체한테 데려가라!
2025390041.english:
Ugh... I hate this! I still want to fight!
 Take me to the singularity!

2025390042.korean: 정말…… 이 애는…… 당연히 안 될게 뻔하잖아요?
2025390042.english: Seriously… … this kid… … it’s obvious he won’t make it, isn’t it?

2025390043.korean: 으으으! 이렇게 된 이상 주인에게 직접 말하겠다!
2025390043.english: Ugh! Since things have come to this, I'll tell the owner directly!

2025390045.english: It sped away at an incredible speed…

2025390046.english: Haa... He's such a high-maintenance kid.

2025390047.english: The master must surely be on the bridge… …!

2025390048.korean: 응……? 저 캐터펄트 위에 있는 건……
2025390048.english: Huh… …? That thing on the catapult is… …

2025390049.english: Well then, I'll be going now.

2025390050.korean: 네, 조심히 다녀오세요. 문제가 생기면 언제든지 연락 주시구요.
2025390050.english: Yes, please take care on your trip. And please contact me anytime if you encounter any problems.

2025390052.korean: 그럼, 창공의 기사 로크…… 설욕을 위해 복수의 날개를 펼칩니다.
2025390052.english: Then, Knight of the Sky Locke… … I spread the wings of vengeance for revenge.

2025390058.korean: 가, 가버렸어…… 방금 그거…… 설마 타이런트……?
2025390058.english: Th-he's gone... ...that just now... ...could it be the Tyrant... ...?

1001408206.korean: 요즘 오르카 이곳저곳에서&n러브 콜이 쇄도하고 있어요.&n너무 많은 직책을 맡고 있으니,&nAGS 자문위원은 물려줄 때가 오지 않았나요?
1001408206.english: These days, Orca is flooded with offers from all over. Since you hold so many positions, isn't it time to hand over the AGS Advisory Committee role?

1001408207.korean: 부끄럽지 않냐니…&n어째서 그런 말씀을 하시는 거죠?&n완벽한 제 몸매를 뽐내는데&n아주 적합한 의상이라 볼 수 있죠.&n통풍도 잘 된답니다? 왜요? 뭐요?
1001408207.english: Asking if I'm not embarrassed… Why are you saying that? You could say it's the perfect outfit to show off my perfect figure. It's also very breathable, you know? Why? What?

1001408208.korean: 사령관,&n그렇게 노골적으로 제 빈 공간을&n관찰하는 건 참아주세요.
1001408208.english: Commander, please refrain from observing my empty space so blatantly.

1001408209.korean: 제 하체도 매력 포인트긴 하지만…&n사령관이 원하는 건 역시,&n그 부분이겠죠?&n오늘을 위해서,&n그간 연습해온 것들을&n모두 보여드릴 때가 왔네요.
1001408209.english: My lower body is an attractive feature, too, but... I suppose that is what the Commander wants, right? The time has come to show you everything I’ve been practicing for today.

1001408210.english: Bunny and Reverse Bunny… Which one is the Commander’s preference?

1001408211.korean: 아래쪽 씰이…&n물기 때문에 제거돼 버렸네요.&n개봉 후 반품은 불가하니...&n최고품질의 샴페인을 맛보시겠어요?
1001408211.english: The seal on the bottom... got removed due to moisture. Returns are not accepted after opening, so... would you like to taste some of the finest champagne?

1001408213.english: Don't hold it in, just let it all out. Hurry...

1001408214.korean: 사령관과 함께 할 수 있음에&n제 자신이 완벽해지는 기분이 들어요.&n더 이상 두려운 건 없어요.
1001408214.english: Being able to be with the Commander makes me feel complete. I have nothing to fear anymore.

1000710049.korean: 성공이군요. 제 매력을 적극적으로 어필하는 전략이 완벽하게 먹혀 들었어요. 이제 우리 두 사람의 관계는 리버스 된 걸까요?&n그런 의미에서 사령관을 위해, 저도 제가 할 수 있는 모든 걸 오늘 밤 전부 보여 드리겠어요.&nCAFÉ amor의 영업이 끝나는 대로, 이 옷을 입고 늘 사령관이 저에게 주문했던 걸… 준비하고 있을 게요.
1000710049.english: It was a success. My strategy of actively showcasing my charm worked perfectly. Has our relationship been reversed now? In that sense, for the Commander, I will show you everything I can tonight. As soon as CAFÉ amor closes for business, I will be wearing this outfit and preparing... what you always ordered from me.

1411111145.korean: 멸망 후 북미, 반 앙헬파의 비밀 연구소-
1411111145.english: Post-apocalyptic North America, Anti-Angelpa's Secret Laboratory-

1600824001.korean: [c][00FF00][너희는 내 복수를 이룰 부대이며, 오직 복수만이 최우선이자 최후의 명령이다.][-][/c]
1600824001.english: [c][00FF00][You are the unit to fulfill my vengeance, and vengeance is the only top priority and final command.][-][/c]

1600824002.korean: [c][00FF00][앙헬을 지구 끝까지 쫓아 찢어죽여라. 이 몸이 죽는다 해도, 너희들은 반드시 명령을 완수해라.][-][/c]
1600824002.english: [c][00FF00][Chase Angel to the ends of the earth and tear him to pieces. Even if I die, you must carry out this order.][-][/c]

1600824003.korean: [c][00FF00][니콜라스가 어떻게 죽었는지, 이 몸이 얼마나 고통스러운 삶을 살았는지 절대 잊지 마라.][-][/c]
1600824003.english: [c][00FF00][Never forget how Nicholas died, and how painful a life this body has lived.][-][/c]

1600824004.korean:
지금 라이브 방송을 시청하고 계신 여러분, 좋은 밤입니다. 오늘의 투나잇 쇼는 평론가들의 극찬과 대중의 마음을 모두 사로잡은 '인간' 여배우,
마리아 리오보로스 양과 함께 합니다. 인사 해주시겠어요?
1600824004.english:
Good evening to everyone watching the live broadcast right now. Tonight's Tonight Show features a 'human' actress who has captured both critical acclaim and the hearts of the public,
 I am with Miss Maria Rioboros. Would you please say hello?

1600824005.korean: 안녕하세요, 이렇게 인사드릴 수 있어 영광입니다.
1600824005.english: Hello, it is an honor to greet you like this.

1600824006.korean: 드라마, 영화, 뮤지컬을 넘어 이젠 오페라까지 도전하신다는 소식인데요,
1600824006.english: I hear the news that you are now taking on the challenge of opera, going beyond dramas, movies, and musicals.

1600824007.korean:
바이오로이드 배우가 낯설지 않은 시대에서
여주인공으로 당당히 캐스팅되셨을 때 기분이 어떠셨나요?
1600824007.english:
In an era where bioroid actors are not unfamiliar
 How did you feel when you were confidently cast as the female lead?

1600824008.korean: 당연한 결과라고 할 수 있겠네요. 바이오로이드는 인간이 만든 모조품과 같죠.
1600824008.english: You could say it is a natural result. Bio-roids are just like imitations made by humans.

1600824009.korean: 인간을 연기한다는 것은 결국, 인간만이 가능하다, 이것이 마리아 양의 연기 철학이란 말씀이군요?
1600824009.english: So, you are saying that portraying a human is ultimately something only a human can do—is that Maria's acting philosophy?

1600824010.korean:
당연합니다, 연기는 단순한 바이오로이드 따위가 절대 흉내낼 수 없는
...오로지 인간만이 할 수 있는 예술의 영역이죠.
1600824010.english:
Of course, acting is something that a mere bioroid can never imitate.
 ...It is a realm of art that only humans can engage in.

1600824011.english: This is a bit off-topic, but...

1600824012.korean:
요즘 뉴올리언스 사태 때문에 파장이 커지고 있는데, 
혹시 마리아 양께선 앙헬 리오보로스 대표님의 대처에 대해 어떻게 생각하고 계신지...
1600824012.english:
The repercussions of the New Orleans situation are growing these days,
 Miss Maria, what do you think about CEO Angel Rioboros's handling of the situation...?

1600824014.korean:
죄송하지만, 질문의 의도가 다분하다고 생각하는데… 노코멘트 하겠습니다.
…애초부터 정치적 이슈 관련해서는 질문을 받지 않겠다고 사전에 협의를 했었는데 말이죠?
1600824014.english:
I apologize, but I believe there is a clear ulterior motive behind the question... I will decline to comment.
 … We had agreed in advance from the beginning that we wouldn't take questions regarding political issues, you know?

1600824015.korean: 아... 워낙 사안이 사안이다 보니… 이런게 또 생방송의 묘미 아니겠습니까? 자, 잠시 광고 보고 오시죠!
1600824015.english: Ah... given the nature of the matter... isn't that the beauty of a live broadcast? Alright, let's take a quick look at the commercials!

1600824017.korean:
이새끼가… 똥을 싸놔도 적당히 싸놔야 할 거 아냐?!
네가 벌인 짓 때문에 지금 내가 인터뷰 자리에서도 물 먹은 거 몰라?!
1600824017.english:
This bastard... even if you're going to poop, you should at least do it in moderation!
 Don't you know that because of what you did, I even got shut out of the interview?!

1600824019.korean:
내 약혼자인 니콜라스만 아니었더라도… 후계구도에서 널 밀어주진 않았을 거야.
마고 인터내셔널 회장 자리까지 올라갔으면 적어도 내가 무슨 말이 하고 싶은 건지 잘 알겠지?
1600824019.english:
If it weren't for my fiancé Nicholas… I wouldn't have pushed you in the succession.
 If you've risen to the position of Chairman of Mago International, you should at least know exactly what I'm trying to say, right?

1600824020.korean: 물밑에서 내가 지원하지 않았으면 넌 평생 정부 밑에서 지저분한 일이나 하고 살았을 거라고.
1600824020.english: If I hadn't supported you behind the scenes, you would have spent your whole life doing dirty work for the government.

1600824021.english: [c][00FF00][Don't get too angry... I have a plan, too.][-][/c]

1600824022.korean:
후안보다 한참은 모자란 머리로 대체 얼마나 잘나신 계획을 세우고 계신진 모르겠지만, 처신 잘 해.
그리고 알아 둘 게 있는데… 내 남편이 될 남자한테 하대하지 마.
1600824022.english:
I don't know what kind of brilliant plan you're coming up with with a head that's far less sharp than Juan's, but behave yourself.
 And there's something you should know... Don't treat the man who's going to be my husband poorly.

1600824024.korean:
뭣하면 내가 널 '동생'이 아니라 '사생아'라고 불러줄 수도 있어.
네 매형한테 그따위 말을 한 번만 더 한다면…
1600824024.english:
If necessary, I could call you a 'bastard' instead of a 'younger sibling'.
 If you say something like that to your brother-in-law one more time...

1600824026.korean: 나도 더는 가만히 보고 있진 않을 거야.
1600824026.english: I'm not going to just sit by and watch anymore, either.

1600824029.korean: 하아… 하아… 젠장, 젠장 젠장 젠장!!!
1600824029.english: Haa… Haa… Damn it, damn it, damn it, damn it!!!

1600824031.korean: …뭐냐, 니콜라스? 네가 반대했던 계획을 강행해서 세계적으로 망신당하고 있는 걸 축하라도 하러 온 거냐?!
1600824031.english: … What is it, Nicholas? Did you come here to celebrate the worldwide disgrace we're facing for pushing ahead with a plan you opposed?!

1600824032.korean: 아닙니다... '케인' 프로젝트 때문에 중단 되었던 '셀틱' 프로젝트의 보완점들을 추합한 보고서입니다.
1600824032.english: No... This is a report compiling the improvements to the 'Celtic' project that was suspended due to the 'Kane' project.

1600824033.korean: …젠장, 김지석… 이 개새끼… 이 수모를 그냥 넘어갈 생각은 마라…!!!
1600824033.english: … Damn it, Kim Ji-seok… This bastard... Don't think about ignoring this humiliation... !!!

1600824034.korean:
잠깐… 니콜라스. 이 '셀틱'이란 거 말이야. 양산에 여성 유전자를 넣는 모양인데...
기존 고블린 개체보다 통제가 쉬운 게 확실해?
1600824034.english:
Wait... Nicholas. You know what 'Celtic' is. It looks like they're putting female genes into parasols...
 Are you sure it's easier to control than the existing goblin population?

1600824035.korean:
고블린의 폭주는 애덤 존스의 유전자 고유 문제이기 때문에...
당장 출시할 '셀틱'은 고블린보다 약할지 몰라도 안전성 면에선 훨씬 용이합니다.
1600824035.english:
The goblin's rampage is due to an inherent genetic problem of Adam Jones...
 The 'Celtic' to be released right now may be weaker than the Goblin, but it is much easier in terms of safety.

1600824036.korean: 결국 돌고 돌아오는군... 제기랄. 이럴 시간 없어. 올해 안에 '셀틱'의 상용화를 목표로 해.
1600824036.english: It really comes full circle... Damn it. I don't have time for this. Aim to commercialize 'Celtic' within this year.

1600824037.korean: 올해 안에 바로 상용화라니요, 테스트 필드에 없던 오작동을 또 일으킬지도 모릅니다…!
1600824037.english: Commercialization within this year? It might cause malfunctions again that weren't present in the test field...!

1600824038.korean:
이 새끼가… 안 그래도 날 물어 뜯으려는 이사회 장로 놈들한테 빌미를 준 마당에…
이대로 아무 대책 없이 꼼지락 거리기만 하면 너나 나나 끝장이야, 잔말 말고 해!!
1600824038.english:
This bastard... as if giving those board elders, who were already trying to tear me apart, a pretext wasn't enough...
 If we just keep fiddling around without any plan like this, it's the end for both you and me. Stop talking nonsense and do it!!

1600824040.korean: 우리 가문 골빈년이랑 약혼하고 매형 행세를 하니까… 이젠 아주 블랙 리버가 네 것 같지?
1600824040.english: Since you're engaged to that airhead from our family and acting like my brother-in-law... now you think Black River is totally yours, don't you?

1600824041.korean: 네 빌어먹을 약혼녀가 후안의 바이오로이드 생산 시설을 물려받은 뒤로 내 머리 꼭대기 위에 앉으려는 것도 모자라… 감히 이젠 주제도 모르고 블랙 리버의 회장직을 네게 넘기라고 하더군.
1600824041.english: Ever since your damn fiancée inherited Juan's bioroid production facility, not only has she been trying to sit right on top of me... but now she dares to tell me to hand over the chairmanship of Black River to you, completely out of her league.

1600824043.korean:
네가 블랙 리버의 회장직을 넘겨받으려면…
적어도 그 장로 놈들이 뉴올리언스에서 있었던 사고를 핑계로 날 다시 끌어내리려 하는 걸 막는 데 힘을 보태는 게 좋을 거야.
1600824043.english:
If you want to take over the chairmanship of Black River…
 At the very least, you'd better help stop those elder bastards from trying to drag me down again using the accident in New Orleans as an excuse.

1600824045.korean:
넌 내 누이랑 다르게 머리가 좋으니까 잘 알 거야, '셀틱'을 당장 완성시키지 않으면...
나는 물론 나랑 한 배를 탄 피앙세도 같이 밑바닥에 처 박힐 거라고.
1600824045.english:
Unlike my sister, you're smart, so you'll know well that if you don't complete 'Celtic' right now...
 Of course, my fiancé, who is in the same boat as me, will be thrown to the bottom along with me.

1600824046.korean: 네가 여기까지 올 수 있었던 건 나한테 쓸모가 있었기 때문이라는 걸 잊지 마.
1600824046.english: Don't forget that the reason you were able to come this far is because you were useful to me.

1600824047.korean: 당신, 요즘 많이 바쁜가 봐? 시사회에 오지도 않고…
1600824047.english: You must be really busy these days? You didn't even come to the premiere...

1600824048.english: [c][00FF00][I'm really busy these days because of 'Celtic'...][-][/c]

1600824049.korean: 미안. 내 멍청한 남동생 때문에… 장로들이 앙헬을 몰아내는데 협력해달라고 난리라고.
1600824049.english: Sorry. Because of my stupid younger brother… the elders are making a fuss, asking for cooperation to drive out Angel.

1600824050.korean: [c][00FF00][앙헬 밑에서 일하지 않았더라면 나도 후안을 지지했을 거야.][-][/c]
1600824050.english: [c][00FF00][If I hadn't worked under Angel, I would have supported Juan too.][-][/c]

1600824051.korean: 어머… 당신 웃기네? 당신이 앙헬 밑에서 일하지 않았다면 나랑 당신이 마주칠 수나 있었겠어?
1600824051.english: Oh my... you're funny. If you hadn't worked under Angel, do you think you and I would have even crossed paths?

1600824052.korean: [c][00FF00][당신... 처음 공항에서 내가 마중 안 나갔으면 길 잃고 국제 미아 되서 울고불고 난리 쳤을 거 아냐. 조만간 일이 마무리되는 대로 보러 갈게.][-][/c]
1600824052.english: [c][00FF00][You... If I hadn't come to pick you up at the airport the first time, you would have gotten lost, become an international missing child, and made a huge fuss crying. I'll come see you as soon as work is finished.][-][/c]

1600824053.korean: 이참에 당신 바쁜 일 끝나는 대로 우리 식 올릴까? 날 언제까지 혼자 둘 셈이야?
1600824053.english: Shall we get married as soon as you finish your busy work? How long do you plan to leave me alone?

1600824054.korean: [c][00FF00][하핫, 당신이랑 결혼하는 날... 온 세상 당신 팬들이 날 죽이러 올 텐데...][-][/c]
1600824054.english: [c][00FF00][Haha, on the day I marry you... all your fans in the world will come to kill me...][-][/c]

1600824055.english: If it's that noisy, I'll just retire.

1600824056.korean: …배우 생활도 좋긴 하지만, 내 진정한 가치를 알아봐 주는 당신이야말로, 내 평생 반려니까.
1600824056.english: … My life as an actor is nice, but you, who recognize my true worth, are the one I will be with for the rest of my life.

1600824057.korean:
일이 잘 해결되면, 내가 앙헬한테 부탁해서, 블랙 리버의 회장직을 달라 할게.
후안이 남긴 바이오로이드 공장을 합친다면… 분명 블랙 리버는 당신 손에서 더 성장할 수 있을 거야.
1600824057.english:
If things work out well, I'll ask Angel for the chairmanship of Black River.
 If you combine the bioroid factory Juan left behind… Black River will surely be able to grow even more under your hands.

1600824058.korean: [c][00FF00][…그래, 당신 말이 맞아. 이번 프로젝트가 끝나는 대로 나와 결혼해줘.][-][/c]
1600824058.english: [c][00FF00][… Yeah, you're right. Marry me as soon as this project is finished.][-][/c]

1600824060.english: Chairman, we have succeeded in realizing 'Celtic'.

1600824061.korean: 호오… 어떻게 됐지? 고블린 보다 명령을 잘 따르나?
1600824061.english: Hoho... how did it go? Do they follow orders better than goblins?

1600824062.korean: 아직 실전 투입 데이터는 전무하지만, 고블린 기종들에게 나타나는 폭력성만큼은 현시점까지 발견되지 않았습니다.
1600824062.english: Although there is no data on actual combat deployment yet, the violence exhibited by Goblin models has not been detected to date.

1600824063.english: Interesting... Good. Proceed with mass production.

1600824064.korean: …저, 하지만 아직 실증 평가를 끝마치지 못했는데 정말 괜찮을까요?
1600824064.english: ...Um, but we haven't finished the empirical evaluation yet. Is it really okay?

1600824066.korean: 그건 걱정하지 않아도 돼. 내가 알아서 할 테니까.
1600824066.english: You don't have to worry about that. I'll take care of it.

1600824067.korean: 뉴올리언스 사태 이후 정부의 간섭이 심해지고 있어서 평가서를 꼭…
1600824067.english: Since government interference has intensified following the New Orleans crisis, the evaluation report must…

1600824069.korean:
예전엔 시키는 일 말고는 안중에 없어서 좋았는데, 
요즘 들어 자꾸 내 신경을 건드리는 짓만 골라서 하네, 니콜라스?
1600824069.english:
It used to be nice because I didn't care about anything other than what I was told,
 Lately, you keep picking on things that get on my nerves, Nicholas.

1600824071.korean:
AGS 같아서 좋았는데 말이야, 그러니까 내가 널 기꺼이 리오보로스 가문의 여자까지 소개해 준 거고...
같이 어깨를 좀 나란히 해 보니까 블랙 리버가 정말 네 것 같나?
1600824071.english:
I liked it because it felt like an AGS, you know. That's why I willingly introduced you to a woman from the Rioboros family...
 Now that we've stood shoulder to shoulder, does Black River really seem like yours?

1600824073.korean: …내가 며칠 전 내렸던 지시사항도 네가 멋대로 어겼다고 들었는데. 무슨 배짱으로 그딴 짓을 한 거지?
1600824073.english: … I heard you disobeyed the instructions I gave a few days ago on your own accord. What nerve did you have to do something like that?

1600824074.korean: 그, 그건… 조금 더 효율성을 추구하기 위해 제 재량으로… 판단한…
1600824074.english: Th-that... was a decision I made at my own discretion to pursue a little more efficiency...

1600824076.korean: ...내가 충고 하나 하지. 중간 관리자가 필요한 건 복종이야. 판단은 총 책임자가 하지, 관리자 따위가 하는 게 아냐.
1600824076.english: ...Let me give you some advice. What middle managers need is obedience. The person in charge makes the decisions, not some mere manager.

1600824078.korean:
...아니지. 그래도 잘 따라와준 너한테 잔소리가 너무 심했어.
조만간 있을 '셀틱' 런칭쇼에 이사회 장로들을 불러 모을테니, 너도 마리아와 같이 참석해.
1600824078.english:
...No, that's not right. Still, I nagged you too much for following along so well.
 I will be inviting the board elders to the upcoming 'Celtic' launch show, so please attend with Maria.

1600824080.korean: 그래, 그 자리에서 니콜라스 너를 우리 가문으로 받아들이고, 블랙 리버 회장직도 넘겨주지.
1600824080.english: Right then and there, we will accept you into our family, Nicholas, and hand over the chairmanship of Black River to you.

1600824082.english: … Right. It really is something to celebrate.

1600824084.korean: …헌데, 정말 니콜라스 자식한테 블랙 리버를 넘기실 생각이십니까?
1600824084.english: … But, do you really intend to hand over Black River to that bastard Nicholas?

1600824085.korean: 내가 미쳤다고 내 자식이나 다름 없는 기업을 그 놈한테 넘길 것 같나.
1600824085.english: Do you think I'm crazy enough to hand over a company that's like my own child to that guy?

1600824086.korean: 누이도 참 순수하지, 사랑 하나 때문에 안절부절 못하는 모습이… 참 웃기기 그지 없어.
1600824086.english: My sister is so innocent, too. The way she gets so restless just because of love... it’s absolutely hilarious.

1600824087.korean:
아니… 순수하진 않지. 간사하고 밝히는 년. 
'셀틱' 프로젝트 런칭 이야길 듣더니 대뜸 마고 지분의 절반을 달라고 하더군.
1600824087.english:
No... she's not innocent. A deceitful and lustful bitch.
 As soon as he heard about the launch of the 'Celtic' project, he abruptly asked for half of Margot's shares.

1600824088.korean: …미친년. 푸흡, 푸하하하하하! 남매들 수준 알만 하군! 그깟 후안 따위는 나 혼자서도 충분히 몰아낼 수 있었다고.
1600824088.english: … You crazy bitch. Pfft, hahahaha! I can tell what level you siblings are at! I could have easily driven out someone like Juan all by myself.

1600824089.korean:
내가 호랑이 새끼를 키운 꼴이야. 니콜라스… 
제법 머리가 잘 돌아가서 내 수족으로 부리려고 마리아를 미끼로 던진 거지만…
1600824089.english:
It's like I raised a tiger cub. Nicholas…
 She's quite clever, so I threw Maria out as bait to use her as my right-hand woman, but...

1600824090.korean:
사사건건 내 권력을 노리려 하더군… '셀틱'으로 블랙 리버가 정상 궤도에 무사히 오른다면
앞으로도 꽤 거슬리는 영향력을 휘두를 거야... 이참에 반대파 놈들이랑 같이 처리 해야겠어.
1600824090.english:
They were trying to seize my power at every turn… If Black River safely gets back on track as 'Celtic'
 He's going to continue wielding quite a bothersome influence... I'm going to take this opportunity to deal with him along with the opposing faction.

1600824091.korean:
처리라면, 후안처럼 사고사 처리… 말씀입니까?
하지만 마리아는 후안의 생산 설비를 가지고 있지 않습니까?
1600824091.english:
By "handling," do you mean treating it as an accidental death like Juan's...?
 But doesn't Maria have Juan's production facilities?

1600824092.english: If by any chance a bioroid is created to oppose the Chairman…

1600824093.korean:
후안 놈의 바이오로이드 설비는 우리보다 훨씬 질이 안 좋아.
내가 왜 손 놓고 가만히 있겠나?
1600824093.english:
Juan's bioroid facilities are of much worse quality than ours.
 Why would I just sit idly by?

1600824095.korean:
당장 내 돈 받아 먹은 기자들한테 연락해. 
뉴올리언스 사태 유가족들이 블랙 리버를 테러한다는 소문을 흘려.
1600824095.english:
Contact the reporters who took my money right now.
 Spread rumors that the families of the victims of the New Orleans tragedy are terrorizing Black River.

1600824097.korean: 그리고, 런칭 쇼인 만큼 자연스럽게 '셀틱' 실험기들을 모조리 가져가 대기 시키라고.
1600824097.english: And, since it is a launch show, naturally bring all the 'Celtic' experimental machines and have them on standby.

1600824098.english: May I ask what you are thinking?

1600824099.korean: 그 자리에서 분수를 모르는 두 년놈이랑 내게 반기를 드는 이사회 장로들을 모두 처리하겠다.
1600824099.english: I will take care of those two brats who know no place, as well as all the board elders who are rebelling against me, right there on the spot.

1600824100.korean: 하핫, 이제 전면적으로 회장님께서 마고를 틀어쥘 생각이시군요. 명령만 내리신다면 바로 준비하겠습니다.
1600824100.english: Haha, so you intend to take full control of Mago now, Chairman. Just give the order, and I will prepare immediately.

1600824101.korean:
후후… 하하하하하!! 마리아… 니콜라스… 네 놈들이 꼴값 떠는 것도 그날로 끝이다…!
내가 김지석한테 당했다고 해서 너희들한테 멍청하게 휘둘릴 정도로 바보는 아니란 걸 보여주지!!
1600824101.english:
Hahaha... Hahahahaha!! Maria... Nicholas... Your pathetic antics end right today...!
 I'll show you guys that just because I got beaten by Kim Ji-seok, I'm not stupid enough to be swayed like an idiot!!

1600824102.korean:
이야~ 대배우 마리아 리오보로스님, 환영합니다. 
누추하지만 여기 앉으시겠습니까? 커피라도 대접할까요? 아님 밀크티?
1600824102.english:
Wow~ Welcome, great actress Maria Rioboros.
 It is humble, but would you like to sit here? Shall I treat you to coffee? Or perhaps milk tea?

1600824103.korean: 네 멍청함 때문에 니콜라스랑 내가 얼마나 물먹었는지 알아?
1600824103.english: Do you know how much Nicholas and I got screwed over because of your stupidity?

1600824104.korean: 그거 미안하게 됐군… 오늘 자리에서 나한테 요구하던 모든 것들을 들어줄 테니 마음 풀길 바라.
1600824104.english: I'm sorry about that... I'll grant everything you asked of me today, so please let it go.

1600824105.korean: 말 조심해. 요구라니? 이건 정당한 대가야.
1600824105.english: Watch your words. A demand? This is a fair price.

1600824106.korean: 그래, 그간 누님의 도움 덕분에 여기까지 왔는데, 남동생으로서 그 정도도 못 해주겠어?
1600824106.english: Right. I've come this far thanks to your help, so as your younger brother, can't I do at least that much for you?

1600824107.korean:
그래, 알아주니 다행이구나.
천박한 사생아 핏줄 주제에, 참 성공한 인생이야. 그렇지?
1600824107.english:
Right, I'm glad you understand.
 For a vulgar illegitimate child, what a successful life. Right?

1600824110.korean: 회장님, 시간이 다 됐습니다. 단상으로 올라가시지요.
1600824110.english: Chairman, time is up. Please come up to the podium.

1600824111.korean: 그래, 어서 가지. 곧 본 공연이 시작될 거야.
1600824111.english: Okay, let's go. The main performance is about to start.

1600824112.english: … I think you should move to a different seat.

1600824113.english: Nicholas...? What's wrong all of a sudden?

1600824114.korean: …뭔가 수상해. 지금 초대받은 상당수가 반 앙헬파로 활동하는 장로들이야.
1600824114.english: … Something is suspicious. A significant number of those invited are elders active in the anti-Angel faction.

1600824116.korean: 필요 이상으로 실험기들을 데리고 온 게 영 불안해..
1600824116.english: I'm really worried that I brought more test equipment than necessary..

1600824117.korean:
당신도 참 쓸데 없는 걱정을… 매스컴도 다 불렀는데 
이사회 장로들이랑 임원을 대놓고 카메라 앞에서 숙청하는 짓을 하겠어?
1600824117.english:
You're really worrying for nothing... even the media called in.
 Would they really do something like openly purge the board elders and officers in front of the cameras?

1600824118.korean:
이건 블랙 리버 VIP용 격납고 키 카드야. 당신은 연회장에 오지 말고 숨어 있어.
안전하다고 판단되면… 그때 다시 당신을 부를게. 주인공은 원래 마지막에 등장하는 법이잖아?
1600824118.english:
This is the key card for the Black River VIP hangar. Don't come to the banquet hall; stay hidden.
 If I judge it to be safe… I’ll call you back then. The protagonist is always supposed to appear last, you know?

1600824119.korean:
다, 당신… 진심이야? 날 더러 연회복을 입고 AGS 사이에 숨어 있이라고?
그리고 당신은 왜 같이 안 숨어있으려 그래?
1600824119.english:
W-you... are you serious? You want me to wear a banquet dress and hide among the AGS?
 And why don't you want to hide together?

1600824120.korean: 괜히 나까지 숨으면 눈치 챌 지도 몰라… 당신이나 나나 필요 이상으로 저 놈을 자극한 것 같으니 신중하게 생각해도 나쁠 건 없어.
1600824120.english: If I hide too, he might notice... It seems like both you and I have provoked that guy more than necessary, so it wouldn't hurt to think carefully.

1600824121.english: If that's what you want... I'll gladly.

1600824122.korean:
이 자리를 빛내주신 여러분… 그간 삼안의 모략에도 불구하고 
끝까지 이 앙헬 리오보로스를 믿어주신 것에 대한 결과를 선보이겠습니다.
1600824122.english:
Thank you to everyone who has graced us with your presence... Despite Saman's schemes all this time
 I will present the results for your trust in Angel Rioboros until the very end.

1600824124.korean: 블랙 리버의 새로운 보병 바이오로이드, '셀틱'의 결과물로 생산된 'T-2 브라우니' 입니다!
1600824124.english: This is 'T-2 Brownie', the new infantry bio-android of Black River, produced as a result of 'Celtic'!

1600824125.korean: …뭐야, 여성 바이오로이드? 이봐 앙헬. 오히려 T-1보다 더 퇴보된 모델 아닌가?
1600824125.english: … What, a female bioroid? Hey Angel. Isn't that actually a more regressive model than the T-1?

1600824126.korean: 물론 근력이나 근지구력은 기존 보다 낮지만… 보다 안정성있는 설계로 폭주의 위험이 영점에 수렴합니다.
1600824126.english: Of course, muscle strength and endurance are lower than before... but with a more stable design, the risk of running wild converges to zero.

1600824127.korean:
흥, 네 놈은 처음 고블린을 만들었을 때도 똑같은 말을 하지 않았나?
실증 평가부터 가져와서 우릴 설득해 봐!
1600824127.english:
Hmph, didn't you say the exact same thing when you first created the goblins?
 Bring us the empirical evaluation first and try to convince us!

1600824128.english: ... Actually, we were unable to complete the empirical evaluation.

1600824129.korean: 뭐라고?! 이 자식… 기어코 네 놈의 정신이 돌아버린…
1600824129.english: What?! You bastard... You've finally lost your mind...

1600824131.korean: 자, 그러니 지금 이 자리에서 시작하도록 하지요.
1600824131.english: So, let's get started right here and now.

1600824132.korean: …브라우니! 지금 당장 회의장에 모인 '반 블랙 리버' 테러 단체를 말살 해라!
1600824132.english: … Brownie! Annihilate the 'Anti-Black River' terrorist group gathered in the meeting room right now!

1600824136.korean: 회장님! 도대체 어쩌려고 이러시는 겁니까! 지금 이 일이 언론에 나간다면…커헉?!
1600824136.english: Chairman! What on earth are you trying to do?! If this gets reported in the media… *Cough*?!

1600824137.korean: 하하하… 하하하하!! 멍청한 놈… 내가 순순히 블랙 리버를 네 녀석한테 줄 거라 생각했나?
1600824137.english: Hahaha… Hahahaha!! You fool… Did you think I would meekly hand over the Black River to you?

1600824140.korean:
그래, 마리아! 마리아는 어디에 있지?
그간 정을 생각해 그 쥐새끼 같은 년도 똑같이 만들어 지옥에서도 외롭진 않게 해주지…!
1600824140.english:
Right, Maria! Where is Maria?
 그간 정을 생각해 그 쥐새끼 같은 년도 똑같이 만들어 지옥에서도 외롭진 않게 해주지…!

1600824141.korean: 김지석의 나라에는 재밌는 말이 있더군… 토끼 사냥이 끝나면 사냥개를 솥에 삶는다는 말.
1600824141.english: There is an interesting saying in Kim Ji-seok's country... that when the rabbit hunt is over, the hunting dogs are boiled in a pot.

1600824142.korean: 아하하하하!! 아주 재밌군! 기일에 찾아가서 헌화 정도는 해주겠어.
1600824142.english: Ahahahaha!! This is quite amusing! I’ll go visit on the anniversary and at least lay some flowers.

1600824143.korean:
수고했네 니콜라스. 자네는 반 블랙 리버 테러단체에 의해 살해된 
블랙 리버의 안타까운 인재로 남을 거야… 아하하하하하하하!!!
1600824143.english:
Good job, Nicholas. You were killed by an anti-Black River terrorist group.
 I'm going to remain a regrettable talent of Black River… Ahahahahahahahaha!!!

1600824144.korean: 대체 이건… 무슨 소란이 있었던 거지?
1600824144.english: What on earth is this… what was all the commotion about?

1600824148.korean: 니콜라스… 아니지? 제발… 몸이 왜 이렇게 차가워…
1600824148.english: Nicholas… no, right? Please… why is my body so cold…

1600824149.korean:
에이… 니콜라스, 대배우 앞에서… 죽은 척 연기하는 거야?
재미없어… 진심으로 화내기 전에 그만해…
1600824149.english:
Hey... Nicholas, are you pretending to be dead in front of a big actor?
 It's not fun... Stop it before I get genuinely angry...

1600824152.english: You promised to marry me after today...

1600824157.korean: 네 놈의 면상을 짓밟고 네 생살을 직접 씹어 먹을 테다!!!
1600824157.english: I will trample your face and chew on your own flesh!!!

1600824158.korean: 절대… 용서 못해. 죽여버리겠어, 사지를 갈갈이 찢어 죽여버리겠어!!!!!!
1600824158.english: I will never… forgive you. I’ll kill you, I’ll tear you limb from limb and kill you!!!!!!

1600824159.korean: - 속보입니다. 현재 뉴올리언스 학살의 배후로 알려진 부사장, 니콜라스 로드리게스와 마고의 이사진들이 희생자로 이뤄진 보복 테러 단체에 의해 암살되는 사고가 일어났습니다.
1600824159.english: Breaking news. An incident has occurred in which Vice President Nicholas Rodriguez, known as the mastermind behind the New Orleans massacre, and Margo’s board members were assassinated by a retaliatory terrorist group composed of the victims.

1600824160.korean:
- 이 바이오로이드 테러 단체는 회장 앙헬 리오보로스도 사살하려 했으나,
앙헬 측에선 '셀틱'을 통해 양산에 성공한 T-2 브라우니 모델들을 동원하여 진압하였으며…
1600824160.english:
This bioroid terrorist group also attempted to assassinate Chairman Angel Rioboros, but,
 Angel's side suppressed the situation by mobilizing T-2 Brownie models, which were successfully mass-produced through 'Celtic', and...

1600824161.korean:
- …현재, 니콜라스 로드리게스의 부인이자, 니콜라스와 함께 학살에 연관된 것으로 추정되는
여배우, 마리아 리오보로스는 은퇴 선언 후 갑작스레 잠적하였습니다.
1600824161.english:
- … Currently, Nicholas Rodríguez's wife, and presumed to be involved in the massacre along with Nicholas
 Actress Maria Rioboros suddenly disappeared after announcing her retirement.

1600824162.korean: - 다음 뉴스 입니다… 최근 바이오로이드에 대한 대대적인 불신이…
1600824162.english: - Next news… Recently, widespread distrust regarding bioroids…

1600824163.korean: …그게 사실인가? 마리아 리오보로스가 바이오로이드 군단을 만들었다는게?
1600824163.english: … Is that true? That Maria Rioboros created a bioroid army?

1600824164.korean: 아무래도 후안이 물려준 시설을 이용한 것 같더군.
1600824164.english: It seemed like he was using the facilities Juan left him.

1600824165.korean:
그래봤자, 앙헬 놈의 군대한테 어쩌지는 못할 것 같지만…
최근 블랙 리버 측에 가한 테러 행위를 본다면 제법 쓸모가 있어 보이네.
1600824165.english:
Even so, I don't think we'll be able to do anything against Angel's army...
 Judging by the recent acts of terrorism against Black River, it looks quite useful.

1600824166.korean: 적당히 이용하다, 바이오로이드 설계 노하우만 터득하면 우리도 자체 제작을 해보세나.
1600824166.english: Let's use it appropriately, and once we master the know-how for designing bioroids, let's try making them ourselves.

1600824167.korean: 오늘, 마리아가 회합 장소에 오기로 했지? 협력하는 척 잘 구슬려야 할걸세.
1600824167.english: Maria is coming to the meeting place today, isn't she? You'll have to coax her well by pretending to cooperate.

1600824168.korean: 여태 가문의 적녀 취급을 해주지 않았는데 마리아가 우리를 거두어 줄 지는 모르겠네.
1600824168.english: She hasn't treated us like the legitimate daughters of the family so far, so I'm not sure if Maria will take us in.

1600824169.korean: 그깟 년이 우리 협력 없이 어떻게 앙헬과 맞서겠다고. 당연히 도움이 필요하겠지.
1600824169.english: How does that wretched woman think she can stand up to Angel without our cooperation? Of course she'll need help.

1600824171.korean: 무, 뭐야! 어, 어떻게 들어왔어! 너 누구… 커헉?!
1600824171.english: W-what! W-how did you get in! Who are you... *Cough*?!

1600824172.korean: 밖에 경호원 놈들도 제압 끝났어요, 여제님.
1600824172.english: The bodyguards outside have been subdued as well, Empress.

1600824174.korean: …반가운 얼굴들이 여기 다 모여있었네. 다들 그동안 잘 지냈나?
1600824174.english: … It's so good to see so many familiar faces gathered here. How has everyone been?

1600824176.korean: 이, 이게 무슨 짓이냐 마리아! 감히 가문 어른들을 네 멋대로...
1600824176.english: W-what have you done, Maria! How dare you treat the elders of the family as you please...

1600824177.korean: 이젠 익숙하지? 앙헬이 후안 분파를 정리할 때 겪어봤을 거 아냐.
1600824177.english: You're used to it by now, aren't you? You must have experienced this when Angel was cleaning up Juan's faction.

1600824180.korean: 영감탱이~ 늙어서 상황 파악이 빨리 안 되나 본데... 아직도 누가 위인지 모르겠어?
1600824180.english: You old geezer~ Looks like you can't grasp the situation quickly because you're old... Do you still not know who's on top?

1600824181.korean: 여제님이라고 불러. 너희들이 앞으로 섬길 분이니까.
1600824181.english: Call her the Empress. She is the one you will serve from now on.

1600824183.korean: 내 남편이 어떻게 죽었는진 다들 알고 있겠지?
1600824183.english: You all know how my husband died, right?

1600824186.korean: 그래, 너희들이 원하는 대로 앙헬 놈의 모가지를 따주겠어.
1600824186.english: Yeah, I'll cut off Angel's head just as you guys want.

1600824187.english: Kneel down, be loyal to me, and obey.

1600825001.korean: 야, 오늘 저녁에 카페 아모르 가서 한 잔 할래?
1600825001.english: Hey, wanna go to Café Amor for a drink tonight?

1600825002.korean: 술 존나 못하는 주제에 무슨. 야, 근데 너 돈은 있냐?
1600825002.english: What are you talking about, you're totally hopeless at drinking? Hey, but do you have any money?

1600825003.korean: 너네들 빌려간 참치캔 언제 갚을 거야?! 갚는다 하고 며칠이 지났는데?!
1600825003.english: When are you guys going to pay back the cans of tuna you borrowed?! You said you'd pay them back, but it's been days?!

1600825004.korean:
나중에 알바비 나오면 갚을게. 아직 월급 날 아니라서.
야 근데 바보니르. 어차피 이렇게 된 거 좀만 더 빌려주면 안 되냐? 이자 쳐서 줄게.
1600825004.english:
I'll pay you back when I get my part-time pay. It's not payday yet.
 Hey, but you idiot. Since things have turned out this way, can't you lend me just a little more? I'll pay you back with interest.

1600825005.korean: 뭘 또 빌려달라는 건데? 좀 아끼면서 살란 말이야!
1600825005.english: What do you want to borrow again? I'm telling you to save money!

1600825006.korean: 우리도 아끼면서 살고 싶지~ 요즘 돈 들어가는데가 어디 한두 곳뿐이야?
1600825006.english: We want to live frugally too, right? These days, it's not just one or two places where you have to spend money, is it?

1600825007.english: Anyway, I'm telling you, the ones who have more are the stingiest.

1600825009.korean: 그나저나 우리 똥강아지, 오늘따라 조용하네. 무슨 일 있어?
1600825009.english: Anyway, my little rascal is unusually quiet today. Is something wrong?

1600825011.korean: …요즘 너희들, 하운드 보안 채널에 들어가 본 적은 있나?
1600825011.english: … Have you guys tried entering the Hound security channel lately?

1600825012.korean: 거긴 들어간 적 없지. 이젠 그 회선 안 쓰고 오르카 보안 채널 쓰잖아.
1600825012.english: You've never been in there, have you? We don't use that line anymore; we use the Orca security channel.

1600825013.korean: 뭐야, 그거 아직도 있었어? 생각해보니까, 나 아이디 까먹었는데.
1600825013.english: What? That's still around? Come to think of it, I forgot my ID.

1600825014.korean: 뭘 이제 와서 까먹은 척하고 앉아있어 빡대가리.
1600825014.english: Why are you sitting there pretending you forgot now, you idiot?

1600825015.korean: 이이이익… 나 바보 아냐! 더는 쓸 것 같지 않아서 일부러 머리 속에서 지워버린 거라고!
1600825015.english: Eeeek… I’m not an idiot! I deliberately erased it from my head because I didn’t think I’d need it anymore!

1600825016.korean: 하여튼 정리하자면 너희들은 최근까지 하운드 보안 채널을 이용한 적 없다, 이건가?
1600825016.english: Anyway, to summarize, you guys haven't used the Hound security channel until recently, is that it?

1600825017.korean: 아~ 난 최근에 궁금해서 들어간 적 있었어.
1600825017.english: Ah, I went in there recently out of curiosity.

1600825018.english: Have you not received a new message?

1600825019.korean: 딱히. 장화 넌 들어가 본 적 있냐.
1600825019.english: Not really. Janghwa, have you ever been inside?

1600825020.korean: 굳이 들어갈 이유가 있냐. 더 쓸 일이 뭐가 있다고.
1600825020.english: Is there really any reason to go in? What more use would there be?

1600825021.korean:
문득 든 생각인데, 우리 말고도 생존한 개체들이 더 있을까?
장화 넌 죽은 애 시체 본 적 있다고 말한 적 있지 않냐?
1600825021.english:
It just occurred to me, are there any other surviving individuals besides us?
 Janghwa, didn't you say you'd seen a dead kid's body?

1600825022.korean: 여제 임무를 수행하다 죽은 애들은 복원 시키기 힘들 거야.
1600825022.english: It will be hard to restore the ones who died while carrying out the Empress's mission.

1600825023.korean: 확실히 알겠다. 너희들 외에는 여제님께서 다시 만들진 않으셨으니까.
1600825023.english: I understand for sure. Because the Empress didn't remake anyone other than you.

1600825024.english: But why are you suddenly asking that?
