1600832058.korean: 그냥, 내 부하가 꾀죄죄한 꼴로 다니는 게 보기 싫어 그런 거야.
1600832058.english: It's just that I don't like seeing my subordinate walking around looking shabby.

1600832061.korean: 뭐, 뭐야! 징그러워… 왜 이래?! 달라붙지 마!
1600832061.english: W-what! That's gross... What's wrong with you?! Don't stick to me!

1600832062.korean: 다행이야… 역시 진짜 여제 아줌마는 아니었구나 너… 흐으읍…
1600832062.english: What a relief… I knew you weren’t the real Empress… *Sob*…

1600832064.korean: 그 아줌만 맨날 멍청하다고 구박만 했는데… 잘못하면 밥도 안 주고… 흐읍… 흐우…
1600832064.english: That lady always just nagged me for being stupid... and if I did something wrong, she wouldn't even give me food... *Sob*... *Sniff*...

1600832065.korean: …그 옷도 네가 처음 만들어 졌을 때 내가 준 거 아니야?
1600832065.english: … Wasn't that outfit the one I gave you when you were first made, too?

1600832068.korean: …야! 내 옷에다 대고 코 풀지 마!
1600832068.english: … Hey! Don't blow your nose on my clothes!

1600832071.english: How about this? Does it suit me?

1600832072.korean: 이 몸의 안목을 믿지 못하는 거야? 괜찮네.
1600832072.english: You don't trust my judgment? It's fine.

1600832074.korean: 다 골랐어. 밖에 나가 있을 테니까 계산해, 명령이야.
1600832074.english: I've picked everything out. I'll go outside, so pay the bill. It's an order.

1600832075.english: … What?! Why do I have to pay?

1600832076.korean: 너희들이 말하는 참치캔 없다니까. 나중에 갚을 테니까 계산하라고. 명령이야.
1600832076.english: I told you, we don't have the tuna cans you're talking about. I'll pay you back later, so pay up. It's an order.

1600833002.korean: 나 이번 달에 남는 참치캔 없는데.
1600833002.english: I don't have any leftover tuna cans this month.

1600833003.english: Then let's take Battery with us.

1600833004.english: Do you think so? I wonder if he's at his accommodation right now...

1600833005.korean: 우이씨… 야! 무겁다고! 좀 들어주면 안 돼?!
1600833005.english: Ugh... Hey! It's heavy! Can't you lift it for me?!

1600833006.korean: 너 힘세잖아. 이 몸이 모양 빠지게 그런 걸 들어야겠니?
1600833006.english: You're strong. Do I really have to lift something like that and look pathetic?

1600833007.korean: 뭐야… 뭘 저렇게 옷을 많이 샀어? 바보니르, 네가 옷에 언제부터 관심이 많았다고…
1600833007.english: What… why did you buy so many clothes? Babonir, since when have you been so interested in clothes…

1600833008.korean: 억울해! 이거 내 옷 아니야! 거의 다 여제 옷이라고!
1600833008.english: This is unfair! These aren't my clothes! Almost all of them are the Empress's clothes!

1600833009.korean: 야, 바보니르. 넌 그렇게 저년한테 욕을 처먹고도 짐꾼을 해주고 싶어?
1600833009.english: Hey, Babonir. Do you still want to be a porter for her even after getting cursed at like that?

1600833010.korean: …하, 진짜 모지리같이 왜 그래 배터리. 쟤가 뭐라 해도 같이 무시하자고 했잖아.
1600833010.english: … Ha, seriously, why are you acting like such an idiot, Battery? I told you we were going to ignore whatever he says together.

1600833011.korean:
그, 그게… 그냥 지나치기 좀 그랬어… 길도 몰라서 헤매고…
며, 명령이라고 하는데 어떡해…
1600833011.english:
Uh, well… I felt a bit bad just passing by… I was wandering around because I didn’t know the way…
 They say it's an order, so what am I supposed to do...

1600833012.korean: 아 존나 빡치네. 뭐 저런 이상한 명령만 내리고 있어?
1600833012.english: Ah, this is fucking pissed off. Why is he only giving out weird orders like that?

1600833013.korean:
쟤 오르카 애들이 싹 다 이상한 년 취급하니까 외로워서 저러는 거겠지.
쟤도 손발 달렸잖아? 왜 너만 생고생하고 있어?
1600833013.english:
She's probably acting like that because she's lonely since all the Orca kids treat her like a weirdo.
 He has hands and feet too, you know? Why are you the only one suffering?

1600833014.english: Hey. Your hand is going down? Put it back up.

1600833015.english: You're starting the power struggle again, my Empress?

1600833016.korean: 나 빡도는 거 보기 전에, 내려 놔.
1600833016.english: Put it down before you see me lose my temper.

1600833017.english: Who told you to put it down? Listen. It's an order.

1600833018.korean: 진짜 죽기 직전까지만 개 패도 되냐?
1600833018.english: Is it okay if I beat the dog right up to the point of death?

1600833019.korean: 야, 핫팩이 일 크게 벌리지 말라 했잖아.
1600833019.english: Hey, Hot Pack told you not to make a big fuss.

1600833020.korean:
이것들이… 내 명령 대신 그 덜떨어진 놈 명령을 듣겠다… 이거지?
난 너희를 만든 인간이자, 엠프레시스 하운드의 여제라고!! 그 덜 떨어지는 놈 따윈…
1600833020.english:
So these guys… they’re going to obey that dummy’s orders instead of mine… is that it?
 I am the human who created you, and the Empress of the Empress Hound!! That dimwit is…

1600833021.korean:
...걔는 말이야, 너랑 같은 인간인데도 우리한테 거지 같은 명령 내린 적 없어. 
명령권 없으면 아무것도 못 하는 주제에.
1600833021.english:
...You know, even though he's a human just like you, he's never given us crappy orders.
 You can't do anything without command authority.

1600833022.korean: 뭐? 이 년 말하는 싸가지가 씨…
1600833022.english: What? This bitch has such a terrible attitude...

1600833023.korean:
자자, 그만 그만. 장화 너도 그만 발끈하고… 
명령을 내리고 싶으면 합당한 이유를 대 봐, 여제님. 왜 우리 배터리를 짐짝처럼 쓰는지.
1600833023.english:
Come on, come on, stop, stop. You, Janghwa, stop getting worked up too...
 If you want to issue an order, give me a valid reason, Empress. Why are you using our batteries like baggage?

1600833024.english: Is there a reason why I command my subordinates...

1600833025.korean: 장화 말처럼 명령권 없으면 아무 것도 못하는 븅신이야?
1600833025.english: Are you a pathetic idiot who can't do anything without command authority, just like the horse Janghwa?

1600833028.korean: 그, 그… 나, 나는 기, 길을 몰라서 그랬을 뿐이라고!
1600833028.english: Th-th-that... I-I just did it because I didn't know the way!

1600833029.korean: 으음… 길을 모르신다? 뭐, 그래. 그럴 수 있지. 처음 왔으니까.
1600833029.english: Hmm... You don't know the way? Well, fine. That can happen. It's your first time here, after all.

1600833030.korean: 숙소까지 가는 길 몰라? 엎어지면 코 닿을 거리인데?
1600833030.english: Don't you know the way to the accommodation? It's practically right next door.

1600833031.korean: 이 몸이 직접 걸어다니면서 길을 찾았던 적이 있을 것 같아?
1600833031.english: Do you think I've ever found my way around on my own?

1600833032.english: Ah, yes~ Of course you would, Empress.

1600833033.english: Fafnir. Put all of that down.

1600833035.korean: …하, 그래. 사령관 얼굴을 봐서라도 친하게 지내는 줄게.
1600833035.english: … Ha, fine. I’ll get along well with you, if only for the Commander’s sake.

1600833036.english: Hey, what's wrong all of a sudden?

1600833037.korean: 우리 여. 제. 님이 길을 모르신다는데, 숙소까지 친절하게 모셔다 드릴게.
1600833037.english: My dear lady says she doesn't know the way, so I'll kindly escort her to her accommodation.

1600833038.korean: 야, 천아. 우리 알바할 때 입던 옷 있냐?
1600833038.english: Hey, Cheon. Do you have the clothes we wore when we worked part-time?

1600833040.korean: 같이 다니면서 길 좀 가르쳐 드리자고.
1600833040.english: Let's go around together and I'll show you the way.

1600833041.english: What, what's up with you guys... Suddenly... What's going on...

1600833043.korean: - 각자 휴식을 취하는 대원들을 둘러본 뒤, 사령관실로 돌아가려는 순간이었다.
1600833043.english: It was the moment I was about to return to the commander's office after looking around at the soldiers taking their individual rests.

1600833045.korean: 자, 이쪽으로 쭉 가면 된다고 여제님!
1600833045.english: Now, just keep going straight this way, My Empress!

1600833048.english: Wow, our Empress is really beautiful.

1600833049.korean: 숙소 가는 길을 모르신다고 해서, 같이 안내해줄 겸 가는 길이야.
1600833049.english: I'm on my way to show you around since you said you didn't know the way to your accommodation.

1600833051.korean: - …천아와 장화의 호라이즌 메이드 코스튬을 입은 여제는 목줄에 묶인 채 바닥을 기고 있었다.
1600833051.english: - … The Empress, wearing Cheona and Janghwa's Horizon Maid costumes, was crawling on the floor tied with a leash.

1600833052.korean: 얘가 우리 괴롭히고 있다는 이상한 소리 할까봐 물려 놨지. 우리가 괴롭히고 있니?
1600833052.english: I bit him because I was afraid he’d say something weird like we’re bullying him. Are we bullying him?

1600833054.korean: -… 여제의 엉덩이에는 장화의 손자국들이 큼지막하게 나 있었다.
1600833054.english: There were large handprints of boots on the Empress's buttocks.

1600833055.korean:
우리가 길 안내 해주는 거야, 길을 잘못 들을 때마다 '툭툭' 쳐서 알려주는 거라고.
옷도 예쁜 거 입혀줬는데 우리가 괴롭히는 걸로 보여?
1600833055.english:
We're here to guide you. We just tap you to let you know whenever you take the wrong path.
 We even dressed you in pretty clothes, so does it look like we're bullying you?

1600833056.korean: - 나는 측은함이 들어, 여제의 입에 단단히 물린 재갈을 풀었다.
1600833056.english: Feeling pity, I untied the gag tightly placed in the Empress's mouth.

1600833057.korean: 이 개같은 것들이... 이 몸을 이딴 식으로 능멸해?! 당장 너희를 산 채로 갈아버리겠… 으브브븝?!
1600833057.english: You bastards... How dare you insult me ​​like this?! I'll grind you to pieces alive right now... Ugh?!

1600833058.korean: 아이 착하다, 여제님. 집까지 빨리 데려다 드릴게요? 잔소리 그만~
1600833058.english: You're such a good boy, Empress. Shall I take you home quickly? Stop nagging~

1600833059.korean: 그만… 으브븝?! 으으읍! 엉엉이 으만 때혀!
1600833059.english: Stop… Ugh?! Ugh! Stop hitting me!

1600833060.korean:
- 처절할 정도로 비명을 지르는 여제를 어떻게든 도와주고는 싶었지만…
그나마 오르카 대원들 중에선 '있는 취급을 하면서 챙겨주는 대원'들이니, 놔두기로 했다.
1600833060.english:
I wanted to help the Empress, who was screaming in agony, somehow, but…
 At least among the Orca members, they are the ones who are treated like they exist and taken care of, so I decided to leave them alone.

1600833061.korean:
자, 잘 외워두라고. 여제. 까먹지 않게 우리가 친절하게 안내 해줄게.
명령은 확. 실. 히 들어주는 거니까, 괜히 싫은 소리 하지 마.
1600833061.english:
Now, make sure you memorize this well, Empress. We'll kindly guide you so you don't forget.
 I will definitely follow your orders, so don't complain for no reason.

1600833062.korean: 고마워 눈물이 나지 여제? 엉덩이가 탱탱한 게 손맛이 참 좋네?
1600833062.english: Thank you, it brings tears to your eyes, Empress? Your butt is so firm, it feels really good to touch.

1600833066.english: Hey guys. Um... what are you doing right now?

1600833068.english: Why did you put a gag in its mouth?

1600833070.english: I think it's okay to teach him gently.

1600834003.english: No. I don't think this is the right place.

1600834004.korean:
깊은 산속에~ 푸른 숲속에~ 솔바람 속에~ 나의 꿈 속에~
감마 님은 항상 계시네~ 메로페 님도 함께 계시네~ 멀린 님도 같이 계시네~♬
1600834004.english:
Deep in the mountains~ In the green forest~ In the pine breeze~ In my dream~
 Gamma is always here~ Merope is with us too~ Merlin is with us too~♬

1600834005.korean: 거기 꼬맹이. 물어볼 게 있는데, 여기로 가면 사령관실이 나와?
1600834005.english: Hey kid over there. I have a question. If I go this way, will the Commander's Office be there?

1600834006.korean: 후에에엥~! 여기 막 들어오시면 안 돼요!
1600834006.english: Whoaah! You can't just barge in here!

1600834007.korean: 이 몸이 못 들어갈 곳 따위는 없어. 여기가 그 사령관 놈팽이가 있는 곳 맞지?
1600834007.english: There is nowhere I cannot enter. This is where that scumbag commander is, right?

1600834008.korean: 여긴… 오르카 호가 아니라 포세이돈 함선인데.
1600834008.english: This isn't the Orca... it's the Poseidon.

1600834009.english: Can you escort me to the commander's office?

1600834010.korean: 전 메로페 님께서 시키신 일이 있어서… 아, 안 돼요!! 거기로 들어가시면 안 돼요!
1600834010.english: I have something Ms. Merope asked me to do… Ah, no!! You can't go in there!

1600834011.english: What? It was closer than I thought?

1600834012.korean: - 안 그래도 여제와 이야기를 나누기 위해 불렀는데 2시간이 넘도록 오지 않아 의아하던 참이었다.
1600834012.english: I had called to speak with the Empress anyway, but I was wondering why she hadn't come for over two hours.

1600834013.korean: 네가 직접 내 숙소로 오지 못할 망정, 네가 뭔데 이렇게 먼 곳까지 날 오라 마라야?!
1600834013.english: Even if you can't come to my place yourself, who do you think you are, telling me to come all the way here?!

1600834015.korean: 다음부턴 네비게이션을 줘. 이곳... 구조가 어려우니까.
1600834015.english: Give me the navigation next time. The structure here... is difficult.

1600834016.korean: 나쁘진 않아. 물론 이 몸이 살던 곳보다 좋진 않지만.
1600834016.english: It's not bad. Of course, it's not as good as where I used to live, though.

1600834017.english: I handed the temporary registration card to the Empress.

1600834018.korean: 이봐, 난 바이오로이드가 아니라고! 대우하려면 너랑 같은 인간으로 대우하란 말이야!!
1600834018.english: Hey, I'm not a bioroid! If you're going to treat me like that, treat me like a human just like you!!

1600834019.korean: 그럼 내가 인간이지, 그럼 네가 부리는 그 도구들이랑 같다고 생각해?
1600834019.english: Then I'm human, so do you think I'm the same as those tools you control?

1600834020.korean: 그거야, 날 인간으로 인정하긴 싫으니, 애써 부정하는 거겠지!!
1600834020.english: I mean, they probably just don't want to acknowledge me as a human, so they're desperately trying to deny it!!

1600834021.korean:
…너, 왜 날 그딴 눈으로 쳐다보는 거야? 지금 내가 이런 꼴로 다니니까…
날 평범한 여자쯤으로 생각하나 본데… 나 마리아 리오보로스야!!
1600834021.english:
… Why are you looking at me like that? Because I'm walking around in this state…
 You must think I'm just an ordinary woman... but I'm Maria Rioboros!!

1600834022.korean:
- 결국 여제는 자신이 바이오로이드 취급을 받기 싫었는지, 임시 등록증을 내 테이블 위로 내던졌다.
하는 수 없이 주머니에 넣은 후, 항복의 표시로 손을 올리자 그제야 기분이 풀린 듯했다.
1600834022.english:
In the end, perhaps because she didn't want to be treated like a bioroid, the Empress threw the temporary registration card onto my table.
 Having no choice, I put it in my pocket, and only when I raised my hand as a sign of surrender did he seem to feel relieved.

1600834025.korean:
앙헬처럼 마치, 나를 네 밑의 무언가로 생각하는 듯한 태도와 눈빛이 싫다고!!
난 너 따위한테 동정받을 여자가 아니란 말이야. 너 내가 얼마나 유명했던 인간인지 알아?!
1600834025.english:
I hate that attitude and look in your eyes, just like Angel's, as if you think of me as something beneath you!!
 I'm not a woman who deserves pity from someone like you. Do you even know how famous I used to be?!

1600834027.korean: …하하하하하!! 미친 새끼, 어쨌든 명령권은 나한테 있다고!!
1600834027.english: … Hahahahaha!! You crazy bastard, anyway, I have the authority to give orders!!

1600834029.korean:
- 여제의 얼굴을 보자마자, 장화는 표정을 구겼고 파프니르는 겁에 질렸다.
 오랫동안 그녀들을 폭력적으로 다루며 충성을 유지했으리라 짐작되었다.
1600834029.english:
As soon as he saw the Empress's face, Janghwa scowled, and Fafnir was terrified.
 It was presumed that he had maintained his loyalty for a long time while treating them violently.

1600834030.korean: - 오르카 호에 승선한 이후, 멸망 전 군인들이 남긴 군사학 서적을 읽던 중 머리 속에 남는 문장이 있었다.
1600834030.english: After boarding the Orca, while reading military books left behind by soldiers from before the apocalypse, there was a sentence that stuck in my mind.

1600834031.korean:
- "복종하는 군인보다 더 무서운 것은 바로 충성하는 군인"이라는 문장이다.
물론… 오르카 바이오로이드와 나의 관계를 단순한 몇 줄의 글귀로 정의할 수 없겠지만…
1600834031.english:
- It is the sentence, "What is more terrifying than an obedient soldier is a loyal soldier."
 Of course… I know I can’t define my relationship with the Orca Bio-roid in just a few lines of text…

1600834032.korean: 그렇게까지 날 비웃고 싶은 이유가 뭐지? 빌어먹을…
1600834032.english: What is the reason you want to laugh at me that much? Damn it...

1600834033.korean:
함부로 지껄이지 마. 난 여제야! 이 몸은 배우였고, 사랑하는 약혼자, 니콜라스도 있었어!
이 몸은 엠프레시스 하운드 위에 군림하는 여제 마리아 리오보로스란 말이야!
1600834033.english:
Don't speak so carelessly. I am the Empress! I used to be an actress, and I even had a beloved fiancé, Nicholas!
 I am Maria Rioboros, the Empress who reigns over the Empressis Hound!

1600834035.korean: - 아니, 정확히는 '여제'의 유전자와 '기억'을 이식 받은 바이오로이드가 민감하게 반응했다.
1600834035.english: No, to be precise, the bioroid that received the 'Empress's' genes and 'memories' reacted sensitively.

1600834036.korean:
- 오르카에는 특정 유전자를 첨가하여 만들어진 바이오로이드들도 존재했다.
호세피나의 유전자를 받은 셰퍼드나, 소피아 딸의 유전자를 받은 칼립소가 있다.
1600834036.english:
- In Orca, there were also bioroids created by adding specific genes.
 There is a Shepherd who received Josefina's genes, and a Calypso who received Sophia's daughter's genes.

1600834037.korean:
- 저장된 기억을 이어받는 바이오로이드들도 그리 희귀한 케이스는 아니었다.
피톤의 기억들을 이어 받은 우로보로스도 있었고 조작된 기억으로 세뇌되었던 레이시도 있다.
1600834037.english:
Bio-roids that inherited stored memories were not exactly rare cases either.
 There was also Uroboros, who inherited Python's memories, and Lacy, who was brainwashed with fabricated memories.

1600834038.korean:
- 하지만 '여제'는 자신의 모듈에 업로드된 기억을 자신의 기억처럼 여기는 듯하다.
조작된 기억임을 인지한 순간, 명령 수행에 큰 차질이 있는 만큼 강력하게 설정한 것일지도 몰랐다.
1600834038.english:
However, the 'Empress' seems to regard the memories uploaded to her module as her own.
 It might have been set so strongly that the moment one realized it was a fabricated memory, it caused significant disruption to the execution of orders.

1600834039.korean: 천박한 떨거지 주제에!! 명심해, 난 너 따위가 우러러 보지도 못할 고결하고 격이 다른 인간, 마리아 리오보로스라고!!
1600834039.english: You vulgar loser!! Remember this: I am Maria Rioboros, a noble and classless human being whom a nobody like you wouldn't even dare to look up to!!

1600834040.korean: 난 네가 거느린 그 도구들이랑 달라... 난... 마리아... 리오보로스야… 인간… 이라고.
1600834040.english: I'm different from those tools you command... I'm... Maria... Rioboros... a human...

1600834041.english: I'm not some kind of bioroid!

1600834043.korean: 숙소에서 몇 걸음만 나오면 바로 사령관실이었는데.
1600834043.english: The commander's office was just a few steps out of the quarters.

1600834045.english: Human... do you still think that way?

1600834046.korean: 근데 왜 다른 바이오로이드들이 네 말은 안 들을까?
1600834046.english: But why don't the other bioroids listen to you?

1600834049.korean: 아 참, 파프니르한테 빌렸다는 참치캔은 내가 갚아줬어.
1600834049.english: Oh right, I paid back the tuna can you borrowed from Fafnir.

1600834051.korean: 난 너를 절대 밑으로 뒀다고 생각 안 해.
1600834051.english: I never think I put you on the bottom.

1600834052.korean: 네 명령을 나보다 우선하는 하운드 애들이 어째서 날 신뢰하고 있는 지 아직 모르겠어?
1600834052.english: You still don't understand why the Hounds, who prioritize your orders over mine, trust me?

1600834054.english: You're abusing your authority for useless things.

1600834055.korean: 다른 바이오로이드는 네 명령을 듣지 않는다는 이유만으로…
1600834055.english: Just because the other bioroids don't obey your orders…

1600834056.korean: 하운드 애들에게 과도할 만큼 의지하고 있지 않아?
1600834056.english: Aren't you relying on the Hounds too much?

1600835001.korean:
컷! 뮤즈 씨께서 조금 더 도발적인 표정을 짓는 게 어떨까 싶네요…
그리고, 어썰트 씨! 확실히 앵글이 좋아졌네요!
1600835001.english:
Cut! I think it would be good if Ms. Muse made a slightly more provocative expression…
 And, Mr. Assault! Your angles have definitely improved!

1600835002.korean:
사령관님의 시선이 어디에 집중되는지 나름 영상을 보며 분석해 보았습니다.
탈론페더 중령님의 조언이 아니었으면 AGS의 감수성 만으로는 깨닫지 못했을 것입니다.
1600835002.english:
I analyzed the video to see where the Commander's gaze is focused.
 If it weren't for Lieutenant Colonel Talonfeather's advice, the AGS would not have realized it with its sensitivity alone.

1600835003.korean: 이번 우리 듀엣은 발칙한 이중생활이라는 컨셉이라 그런지 엄청 부끄러운데... 프로듀서가 좋아해 주겠지?
1600835003.english: Maybe it's because our duet concept this time is 'Outrageous Double Life,' but I'm super shy... but the producer will like it, right?

1600835004.korean:
훌륭해요, 섹시 디바라면 역시 바니걸이 최고인데… 발상을 뒤집어서 역바니라니!
혹시 이 훌륭하고 박수가 절로 나오는 기획은 누가 발안하신 건지 여쭤봐도 될까요?
1600835004.english:
Excellent! A bunny girl is definitely the best for a sexy diva... but to flip the concept on the back and go for a reverse bunny!
 May I ask who came up with this excellent and applause-worthy plan?

1600835005.korean:
니바 말을 듣고 나랑 뮤즈가 함께 기획 했지~
그런데 이 부끄럼쟁이가 이렇게 적극적으로 듀엣을 해줄 줄은 정말 몰랐다니까?
1600835005.english:
Muse and I planned this together after listening to Niva~
 But I really didn't expect this shy kid to be so enthusiastic about doing a duet!

1600835006.korean: 우으… 에라토 씨… 이 옷은… 너무 야하잖아요…
1600835006.english: Ugh... Erato-san... this outfit... is too revealing...

1600835007.korean: 응? 니바는 역바니의 신이 강림한 의상이라고 그랬는걸?
1600835007.english: Huh? Didn't Niba say it was an outfit where the god of reverse bunny descended?

1600835008.korean:
야하다뇨, 뮤즈 씨. 사령관님이 분명 만족하실 거라니까요?!
그나저나 칸 대장님도 이 역바니를 입으시면… 으흐흐흐…!!
1600835008.english:
What do you mean lewd, Ms. Muse? I'm telling you, the Commander will definitely be satisfied!
 Anyway, if Captain Khan wears this reverse bunny too… Hehehe…!!

1600835009.korean: 대체 내 숙소가 어디냐고?! 젠장할… 뭐가 이리 복잡... 뭐야? 이 괴상하고 천박한 복장은.
1600835009.english: Where on earth is my accommodation?! Damn it... Why is this so complicated... What is this? This bizarre and vulgar outfit.

1600835011.english: Ah, are you that... actor? The Empress?

1600835012.korean:
훗, 그래. 잘 알고 있구나. 이 몸은 멸망 전 덴세츠의 바이오로이드들 따윈 
따라가지도 못한 대배우, 마리아 리오보로스…
1600835012.english:
Hmph, really. You know me well. I am nothing like the bioroids of pre-apocalypse Densetsu
 The great actor whom no one could even come close to, Maria Rioboros…

1600835013.korean: 그 테러리스트 부대 지휘하던 인간 맞지?
1600835013.english: You're the guy who commanded that terrorist unit, right?

1600835014.korean: …그것도 맞긴 하지만. 그 얘긴 접어두고. 보아하니 뭘 찍고 있었나 본데?
1600835014.english: … That’s true, too, but let’s put that aside. From the looks of it, it seems like you were filming something.

1600835015.korean: 응! 나랑 뮤즈랑 같이 촬영하는 뮤직비디오인데... 관심 있어?
1600835015.english: Yeah! It's a music video I'm filming with Muse... Are you interested?

1600835016.korean: 흐음… 그런데, 쟤 표정은 전혀 프로 같아 보이진 않아서 말이지.
1600835016.english: Hmm... but his expression doesn't look professional at all.

1600835017.korean: 오, 옷이 너무 부끄러워서… 그게 그러니까…
1600835017.english: Oh, my clothes are so embarrassing... well, I mean...

1600835018.korean:
이 몸은 배우 역을 하며 수많은 역할을 맡아왔지.
귀족과 여왕 같은 고급스러운 배역도 있지만… 매춘부 같이 하류층 역을 맡은 적도 있었다고.
1600835018.english:
I have taken on countless roles as an actor.
 She has played luxurious roles like nobles and queens, but... she has also taken on roles from the lower class, such as a prostitute.

1600835019.korean:
하지만, 그 배역을 부끄러워하거나 어색해하지 않았어.
배역이 무엇이든 간에 그것을 보는 관객에게 완벽히 몰입시키는 게 중요하니까.
1600835019.english:
However, I wasn't ashamed of or awkward about the role.
 Because no matter what the role is, it is important to completely immerse the audience watching it.

1600835021.korean: 뮤직비디오라 하면… 음악이 채워주지 못하는 시각적인 부분을 네 연기로 채워주는 게 중요하지 않나?
1600835021.english: When it comes to music videos… isn't it important to fill in the visual aspects that the music can't provide with your acting?

1600835022.korean: …물론 복장은 상당히 퇴폐적이지만, 어쨌든 네가 맡은 일인 이상 최선을 다해야지.
1600835022.english: … Of course, the outfit is quite decadent, but anyway, since it is the job you have been entrusted with, you have to do your best.

1600835023.korean: 맞아! 공연에서는 당연히 최선을 다해서 관객에게 퍼포먼스를 보여야 한다고!
1600835023.english: That's right! Of course you have to give your all and show the audience your best performance at a show!

1600835024.korean:
팬은 널 보기 위해 돈과 시간을 투자하니까.
부끄러워해야 하는 건 단지 네가 입은 그 의상 쪼가리가 부끄러워, 최고의 퍼포먼스를 보여주지 못하는 프로의식 없는 너 자신뿐이야.
1600835024.english:
Fans invest money and time to see you.
 The only one you should be ashamed of is that piece of clothing you are wearing, and your own lack of professionalism for failing to deliver your best performance.

1600835025.korean: 오늘 공연도 잘 봤어. 당신… 정말 눈을 뗄 수 없던걸?
1600835025.english: I really enjoyed today's performance, too. You… I really couldn't take my eyes off you.

1600835026.korean: 당신, 정말이지 넋을 잃고 보던데… 가끔 너무 뚫어져라 쳐다봐서 어디에서 보고 있는지 느껴질 정도라고.
1600835026.english: You really look at me completely spaced out... Sometimes you stare so intently that I can feel where you're watching from.

1600835027.korean: 어쩌겠어, 무대 위 당신이 가장 예쁘고 아름다운데.
1600835027.english: What can I do? You are the prettiest and most beautiful on stage.

1600835028.korean: 당신 말이야~ 내가 은퇴하게 되면 더 이상 예쁘다고 안 해줄 거야?
1600835028.english: Hey you~ If I retire, aren't you going to tell me I'm pretty anymore?

1600835029.korean: 그럴 리가. 당신은 은퇴하면 더 예뻐질 거야.
1600835029.english: That's impossible. You'll get even prettier when you retire.

1600835030.korean:
언제나 당당하고 자신 있는 모습이 아름다워… 사랑받으면 더 예뻐진다고들 하잖아. 
늘 그렇게 아름다운 모습으로 나와 평생을 함께 해주면 좋겠어.
1600835030.english:
You look beautiful always so confident and self-assured... You know how they say you become prettier when you are loved.
 I wish you would stay with me for the rest of my life, always looking as beautiful as you do.

1600835032.korean: 자! 그러니까 그 얼빠진 표정부터 바꿔. 나는 아름답다, 나는 무대 위에서 만큼은 사랑스럽다... 따라 해.
1600835032.english: Now! So, change that goofy face of yours first. I am beautiful, I am lovely, at least on stage... Repeat after me.

1600835033.english: I, I am beautiful… I… am lovely…

1600835034.korean: 그거야 뮤즈! 그렇게 가슴만 가리지 말고! 이렇게 몸을 자신있게!
1600835034.english: That's right, Muse! Don't just cover your chest like that! Show off your body confidently like this!

1600835036.korean:
부끄러워하지 마. 네가 가진 장점을 극적으로 활용하는 것도 강력한 무기가 될 수 있으니까.
자, 표정은 더 도도하게. 겨우 그딴 퍼포먼스로 그 변태 놈을 만족시킬 수 있겠어?
1600835036.english:
Don't be shy. Dramatically utilizing your strengths can also be a powerful weapon.
 Now, put on a haughtier look. Do you think you can satisfy that pervert with just that kind of performance?

1600835038.korean: 나는 어때? 연예계 대선배님께서 나의 연기 지도도 해준다면 좋겠는데, 여제?
1600835038.english: How about me? It would be great if a senior figure in the entertainment industry could give me acting guidance, Empress?

1600835039.korean:
좋아. 내가 보기엔 이 장면이 하이라이트인데… 
이거라면 더 자신있는 제스처가 필요하다고. 그러니까…
1600835039.english:
Okay. In my opinion, this scene is the highlight...
 If it's this, I need a more confident gesture. I mean...

1600835043.korean: - 나는 무선 헤드폰을 벗은 후, 멀뚱히 서 있는 바르그에게 손짓했다.
1600835043.english: After taking off my wireless headphones, I gestured to Varg, who was standing there blankly.

1600835045.korean:
- 나는 시간을 내어, 여제가 출연했던 영화와 뮤지컬, 오페라 등을 찾아보았다.
아주 오래전 자료라 화질이 낮고 음질까지 조잡했지만… 그녀가 그 누구보다 열정적으로 주어진 역할에 임하고 있다는 것만큼은 알 수 있었다.
1600835045.english:
I took the time to look up the movies, musicals, and operas in which the Empress appeared.
 Since it was very old material, the video quality was low and even the sound was crude... but I could tell that she was approaching her given role with more passion than anyone else.

1600835046.korean: - 나는 넉살 좋게 바르그를 부른 뒤, 무릎에 앉혔다.
1600835046.english: I called out to Varg with good manners and sat him on my lap.

1600835047.korean: 이렇게… 환한 표정의 여제님은 처음 보는 것 같습니다.
1600835047.english: I think this is the first time I’ve seen the Empress with such a bright expression.

1600835048.korean: 저희에겐 이런 모습을 보여주신 적이 없었습니다만…
1600835048.english: You have never shown us this side of yourself before, but...

1600835049.korean:
- 아무래도 마리아 리오보로스는 자신의 배우 커리어를 상당히 자랑스러워하는 모양이다.
바이오로이드 여제도 자신의 커리어에 대해 이야기할 땐, 황금을 자랑하는 파프니르처럼 어깨를 으쓱였다.
1600835049.english:
It seems Maria Rioboros is quite proud of her acting career.
 When the Bio-roid Empress spoke of her career, she also shrugged her shoulders like Fafnir boasting of gold.

1600835050.korean: - 영상이 끝나자, 나는 바르그의 머리를 쓰다듬으며 물었다.
1600835050.english: When the video ended, I stroked Varg's head and asked.

1600835051.korean:
당분간은 큰 소란을 부리진 않을 듯 합니다. 
불손한 일을 모의하거나, 하운드 대원을 제대로 조종하려는 시도는 여태 없었습니다.
1600835051.english:
It seems unlikely that there will be any major disturbances for the time being.
 There have been no attempts to plot disrespectful acts or properly control the Hound members so far.

1600835052.korean: 주인님을 뵈러 오기 전까지만 해도… 뮤즈와 에라토의 연기 지도를 하고 있더군요.
1600835052.english: Up until I came to see the Master... I saw that he was giving acting lessons to Muse and Erato.

1600835053.korean: 그게 잘 적응하는 건지는 모르겠습니다만… 명령을 내리는 것에 집착하는 것만 제외한다면… 어쩐지 제가 모시던 과거의 여제님과는 전혀 다른 성격인 것 같습니다.
1600835053.english: I'm not sure if that means adapting well, but... aside from her obsession with giving orders... somehow, she seems to have a completely different personality from the Empress I used to serve.

1600835054.korean: …주인님께서는 정말로 그 바이오로이드를 오르카호로 들이실 생각이십니까?
1600835054.english: … Master, do you really intend to bring that bioroid onto the Orca?

1600835056.korean:
주제넘은 대답이지만… 가장 가까운 곳에서 여제님을 보필하던 입장으로선, 당연히 바라는 마음입니다.
하지만 끝내 주인님의 뜻을 이해하고 받아들이지 않는다면 붙잡을 마음은 없다는 걸 꼭 말씀드리고 싶었습니다.
1600835056.english:
It may be presumptuous of me to answer, but... as someone who has served the Empress from the closest proximity, it is only natural that I hope for this.
 However, I wanted to make it clear that if you ultimately do not understand and accept your will, I have no intention of holding you back.

1600835057.korean: 그 아이는 바이오로이드일 뿐이고… 현재 저의 주인님께서는 유일무이한 인간님이시기 때문… 아아앗?!
1600835057.english: That child is just a bioroid... and because my current master is the one and only human... Aaaah?!

1600835059.korean:
- 나는 바르그의 머리를 부드럽게 쓰다듬었다.
늘 그랬듯 바르그는 미약한 홍조를 띄우며 짧은 꼬리를 흔들었다.
1600835059.english:
I gently stroked Varg's head.
 As always, Varg wagged his short tail with a faint blush.

1600835060.korean: 빛나는 꿈과 함께 모두의 사랑을 담아~♬
1600835060.english: With shining dreams and filled with everyone's love~♬

1600835061.korean: 채워가는 우리의 Story 지금 이곳에 With You~♬
1600835061.english: Our Story, Filling Up, Right Here With You~♬

1600835062.korean: …노래는 잘 부르는군. 여기 와서 새로 배운 노래인가?
1600835062.english: … You sing well. Is this a song you learned after coming here?

1600835064.korean: 못 볼 걸 보기라도 했나, 여제?
1600835064.english: Did you see something you shouldn't have, Empress?

1600835065.english: Hey, why did we come here?

1600835066.korean:
시간이 난다면… 나와 함께 여제님의 묘에 참배하러 가지 않겠나?
오랜만에 이곳에 온 만큼, 묘를 찾아가 관리할 때가 온 것 같군.
1600835066.english:
If you have some time… wouldn’t you like to come with me to pay respects at the Empress’s grave?
 Since it has been a long time since I was here, it seems like it is time to visit and tend to the grave.

1600835067.korean: 하! 멍청하긴. 몇 번을 말해줘야 알아들을 거지? 난 너희들 앞에 살아있다고. 무슨 허무맹랑한 소리야?
1600835067.english: Ha! You're so stupid. How many times do I have to tell you? I'm alive right in front of you. What kind of nonsense is that?

1600835068.korean: 내가 아는 여제님은 '명령권'에 기대어 우리를 조종하지 않으셨다.
1600835068.english: The Empress I know did not manipulate us by relying on 'command authority'.

1600835069.korean:
납득할 수 있는 여제님의 진짜 면모를 보여주지 않으면서, 
그저 인간 행세를 하기 때문에 우리 부대원이 너를 따르지 않는 것이다.
1600835069.english:
Without revealing the Empress's true, convincing side,
 Our unit members do not follow you simply because you are pretending to be human.

1600835070.korean: 가르치려 들지 마! 부하 주제에 감히…
1600835070.english: Don't try to teach me! How dare a mere subordinate...

1600835071.korean:
…설령 진짜 여제님이 군림한다고 해서 기뻐할 녀석들도 아니지만.
주인님께서 자비를 베풀어 무례한 널 돌봐주겠노라 마음 먹으셨기에 네게 충고하나 하지.
1600835071.english:
… Not that they would be happy even if a real Empress were to reign.
 Since the Master has decided to show mercy and look after you, a rude person, let me give you some advice.

1600835072.korean: 네가 처음 하운드 아이들을 해하려 했던 모습… 그리고 명령에 집착하는 모습을 보이지 마라.
1600835072.english: Do not show the way you first tried to harm the Hound children… and do not show an obsession with orders.

1600835074.korean:
절대 여제님을 따라하지 마라. 그 끝은 한없이 비참하고 슬펐다.
네가, 이곳에 와 과거의 여제님과 다른 삶을 사는 모습이… 난 보기가 좋다.
1600835074.english:
Never imitate the Empress. The end was infinitely miserable and sorrowful.
 I like seeing you here, living a life different from the Empress of the past.

1600835076.english: Sorry, I was looking at something.

1600835077.english: The movies and musicals the Empress starred in.

1600835078.korean: 부른 이유도 이건데. 같이 와서 볼래?
1600835078.english: This is the reason I called you. Do you want to come and take a look?

1600835079.english: How is the Empress these days?

1600835080.korean: 나름 잘 적응하고 있는 것 같네.
1600835080.english: It seems like you are adapting quite well.

1600835081.english: Would a real empress do that?

1600835082.english: Saying she was a very terrifying woman.

1600835084.english: It was the same with Janghwa, and it was the same with Barg, but...

1600835085.korean: 다들 여기서 함께 잘 지내고 있잖아. 여제라고 그러지 말란 법 있어?
1600835085.english: Everyone is getting along well together here. Is there a rule that says the Empress can't do that?

1600835087.korean: 바르그도 내심 함께 지내길 바라지 않아?
1600835087.english: Doesn't Varg secretly want to stay together too?

1600835088.korean: 너희들이 태초부터 못된 애들은 아니었잖아. 여제도 그럴 거야.
1600835088.english: You guys weren't mean from the beginning, were you? The Empress is probably the same.

1600836001.korean: 빨리 따라 와, 대체 뭘 그렇게 꾸물거리는 거야?!
1600836001.english: Hurry up and follow me! What on earth are you dawdling for?!

1600836003.korean: 야! 바보니르, 한참 동안 찾았네. 너 이번에 분리수거 당번 아냐?!
1600836003.english: Hey! Babonir, I've been looking for you for ages. Aren't you on recycling duty this time?!

1600836004.korean: 어?! 아 맞다… 그게… 나중에 할 테니까 기다려…
1600836004.english: Huh?! Oh right... um... I'll do it later, so wait...

1600836005.korean: 야, 설마 너 쟤 심부름 때문에 기다리라고 하는 거야?
1600836005.english: Hey, seriously, you're not telling me to wait because of that kid's errand, are you?

1600836007.korean: 내가 말하지 않았냐? 저년이 우리한테 시키는 거 해주지 말자고.
1600836007.english: Didn't I tell you? Let's not do what that bitch tells us to do.

1600836008.english: Who gave you the right to do that?

1600836010.korean: …썅년? 이년이 입에 걸레를 물었나. 소모품 주제에 누가 누구한테 뭐라… 으브븝?!
1600836010.english: … You bitch? Did this whore put a rag in her mouth? You're just a disposable item, who are you to talk back to… Ugh?!

1600836011.korean: 이젠 진짜 못 참겠다... 말하는 거 좆같네… 뭘 꼬라 봐, 또 그 명령질 할 생각이냐?
1600836011.english: I really can't take it anymore... The way you talk sucks... What are you glaring at? Are you planning to give orders again?

1600836013.korean: 야… 야 장화! 잠깐만! 얘 우리보다 약하잖아…!
1600836013.english: Hey… hey, Janghwa! Wait a minute! This guy is weaker than us…!

1600836014.korean: 재밌는 광경이네? 배터리~ 좋은 말 할 때 넌 잠깐 나와 있어 봐.
1600836014.english: What a funny sight, Battery. I'm telling you nicely, step out for a moment.

1600836015.korean: 큭… 하아… 처, 천아! 얼른 이년을 떼어…
1600836015.english: *Gasp*... *Haa*... Che-Cheon-ah! Quickly, get this bitch off...

1600836016.english: I don't want to. Why would I?

1600836018.korean: 우리가 웃으면서 넘기니까... 주제 파악이 덜 됐냐?
1600836018.english: Just because we laughed it off... haven't you grasped the situation yet?

1600836019.korean:
그 면상 들이밀면서 여제네 뭐네 하는 거, 내가 한 두 번 참아준 줄 알아?
내가 임무 실패했을 때마다 그 여자한테 당했던 체벌이 뭐였는지 알려줄까?
1600836019.english:
Do you think I've put up with you shoving your face in my face and calling yourself the Empress or whatever just once or twice?
 Do you want me to tell you what punishment that woman inflicted on me every time I failed a mission?

1600836020.korean: 쟤 1분도 못 버티고 질질 짤 걸.
1600836020.english: He won't last even a minute before he starts whimpering.

1600836021.english: For a mere collection of failures...!

1600836024.korean: 미안... 손이 잘못 날아갔네? 그래서… 다시 말해 봐... 뭐라고?
1600836024.english: Sorry... my hand flew in the wrong direction? So... say that again... what?

1600836026.english: You fucking bitch, do you really do it just because I tell you to?

1600836027.korean: 아 진짜~ 옛날 성격 나오게 하네. 왜 이렇게 속을 자꾸 긁어? 너 말이야… 진짜 여제 아니라고.
1600836027.english: Ugh, seriously~ You're really bringing out my old self. Why do you keep getting on my nerves? I'm telling you... I'm not the Empress, seriously.

1600836028.korean:
인간? 하, 씨발… 인간 다워야 인간으로 모시지.
너 뭔가 착각하나 본데, 사령관이 우리한테 사정사정하니까 적당히 맞춰 주는 거야.
1600836028.english:
Human? Ha, fuck... You have to act like a human to be treated like one.
 You seem to be mistaken. We are just going along with it because the commander is practically begging us.

1600836029.korean: 비위 좀 맞춰주니까... 우리가 진짜 네 개라도 된 것 같냐?
1600836029.english: Just because we played along a little... do you think we're actually four?

1600836031.korean: 꼴에 여제 유전자랑 기억 데이터를 이어받은 바이오로이드라 하던데.
1600836031.english: They say she's a bioroid who inherited the Empress's genes and memory data, for some reason.

1600836032.korean: 우리를 '물건' 취급하던 여자가 결국 우리한테 남긴 건 '바이오로이드'라는 거... 존나 짜치지 않냐?
1600836032.english: The woman who treated us like 'objects' ended up leaving us with 'bioroids'... Isn't that totally lame?

1600836033.korean: 너 말이야, 다른 오르카 애들한테 개무시 당하니까 명령이 먹히는 우리한테 매달리는 것 같은데.
1600836033.english: You know, it looks like you're clinging to us because the other Orcas completely ignore you, so we're the ones who actually follow your orders.

1600836034.korean:
존나 븅신 같다 진짜로. 네가 그렇게 혐오하는 핫팩은 적어도
그렇게 가오 잡고 다니면서 감놔라 배놔라 우리한테 명령으로 다 때우려는 애는 아니거든?
1600836034.english:
You're such a fucking idiot, seriously. At least the hand warmers you hate so much...
 He's not the type to go around acting all tough and trying to boss us around with orders, you know?

1600836037.korean:
야~ 명령하지 말고, 우리를 제대로 좀 컨트롤 해보라고.
적어도 진짜 여제 아줌마는 명령권을 남발하진 않았거든.
1600836037.english:
Hey, stop giving orders and try to control us properly.
 At least the real Empress didn't abuse her authority.

1600836041.english: Hey, are you crying? Are you really crying?

1600836042.korean: 하지 말라고! 흐윽…. 흑… 너희들 따위가… 흑, 날 욕 보이지 말란 말이야!
1600836042.english: I said stop! *Sob*... *Sob*... You worthless people... *Sob*, I said don't disgrace me!

1600836046.korean: 내가 아무리 그 마귀할멈을 좆같이 싫어하지만…
1600836046.english: No matter how much I hate that witch like shit...

1600836047.korean:
…적어도 내 기억 속 마귀할멈은 이렇게 찌질하지 않았단 말이야!
네가 진짜 인간 여제라 주장하고 싶다면 제발 좀 비슷하게 보일 수 있게 노력이라도 해봐.
1600836047.english:
… At least the witch in my memory wasn't this pathetic!
 If you really want to claim to be a human empress, please at least try to look somewhat like one.

1600836048.korean:
흉내를 잘 내던가, 하지를 말던가.
여제라는 인간이 고작 할 수 있는 일이라는 게 저 바보한테 심부름 시키기야?
1600836048.english:
Either imitate well, or don't do it.
 Is ordering that idiot on an errand the Empress is capable of?

1600836049.korean: 씨발... 고작 그딴게 명령권이 있는 인간이 할 수 있는 일이야?!
1600836049.english: Fuck... Is that all a person with command authority can do?!

1600836051.korean: 하… 씨, 질질 짜는 것 밖에 모르는 게 여제?
1600836051.english: Ha... damn it, is the Empress someone who knows nothing but whining?

1600836052.english: There is an abundance of bullshit.

1600836053.korean: 이야~ 장화도 참 많이 봐준다~ 명령이고 나발이고 여제 운운하는 주둥이를 다 꿰매버리겠다고 하더니…
1600836053.english: Wow, even Janghwa is being really lenient. He said he'd sew up the mouths of those who dared to talk about the Empress, order or whatever...

1600836054.english: Hey, Battery. Hurry up and follow me.

1600836057.korean: 어… 응?! 아… 으, 응. 잠깐만… 기다려. 바로 갈 테니까.
1600836057.english: Uh… huh?! Ah… uh, yeah. Just a moment… wait. I’ll be right there.

1600836058.korean: 야, 넌 아직도 저년 돕고 싶냐? 순 호구처럼 부려먹는 여제 짝퉁이 뭐가 좋다고…
1600836058.english: Hey, do you still want to help that bitch? What's so great about that fake Empress who just bosses you around like a total pushover...

1600836060.korean: 꺼져…! 너도 저따위로 날 생각하는 거지, 그렇지?!
1600836060.english: Get lost…! You think of me like that too, don't you?!

1600836062.korean: 당장 내 눈 앞에서 꺼지란 말이야, 이 쓸모없는 도구…
1600836062.english: Get out of my sight right now, you useless tool…

1600836063.korean: 있잖아. 나도 널 여제 아줌마라고 생각 안 하는 건 똑같지만… 뭔가 새로웠어.
1600836063.english: You know what? I'm just the same—I don't think of you as the Empress either—but... it felt kind of new.

1600836065.korean: 여제 아줌마랑 팔짱 끼고 같이 옷 보러 다니고... 이곳저곳 구경하는 건 난 상상도 해본 적 없었어.
1600836065.english: I never even imagined going around looking at clothes arm in arm with the Empress... and sightseeing here and there.

1600836066.korean: 나도 장화나 천아처럼 여제 아줌마한테 쌓인 건 많아, 근데…
1600836066.english: I have a lot of grudges against the Empress, just like Janghwa and Cheona, but...

1600836067.korean: 내가 생각할 때 넌, 여제 아줌마가 아니야. 그래서… 난 오히려… 좋았어.
1600836067.english: The way I see it, you're not an Empress. So… I actually… liked it.

1600836068.english: What on earth... are you talking about?

1600836069.korean:
천하의 재수 없는 그 인간 여제가 아니라, 같이 친하게 지낼 수 있는… 엠프레시스 하운드의 바이오로이드였으면 좋겠어.
장화나… 천아나 바르그 같이… 말이야.
1600836069.english:
I wish it were not that utterly unlucky human empress, but a bio-android of the Empressis Hound that I could get along with...
 Like Janghwa... or Cheon-a or Barg... I mean.

1600836071.korean: 짐은 마저 들어주고 갈게. 혼자 들고 가기 무거울 거 아냐.
1600836071.english: I'll finish carrying the rest of the luggage before I go. It's going to be heavy to carry alone.

1600836073.korean: 그럼 난 뭐가 돼야 하는 건데? 그럴 리가 없잖아… 난 인간이고, 여제라고!
1600836073.english: Then what am I supposed to become? That can't be right... I'm human, and I'm an Empress!

1600836076.korean: 굳이 그 인간처럼 되고 싶어? 엄청 심술 많고… 쭈글쭈글한 무서운 아줌마였는데.
1600836076.english: Do you really want to become just like that person? She was super mean... and a wrinkled, scary middle-aged woman.

1600836077.english: I like you better right now.

1600836079.korean: 이이이익… 아, 아무튼 난 네가 진짜 여제처럼 행동하진... 않았으면 좋겠어.
1600836079.english: Eeeek… Ah, anyway, I hope you don’t act like a real empress…

1600836080.korean:
주인님, 북미 동부를 정리하다, 수상쩍은 시설 하나를 발견했어요.
정황 상 블랙 리버 요인들이 썼던 건물 같은데…
1600836080.english:
Master, while clearing out the East Coast of North America, I discovered a suspicious facility.
 Judging by the circumstances, it looks like a building used by the Black River agents…

1600836081.english: It had the Empress Hound mark drawn on it.

1600836082.korean:
- 여전히 하운드 대원들과 마찰을 빚고 있는 여제에 대한 처분을 어떻게 해야 할까 고민이 되던 그때,
알파가 위성 사진과 보고서 하나를 내게 내밀었다.
1600836082.english:
Just as I was contemplating how to deal with the Empress, who was still clashing with the Hound members,
 Alpha handed me a satellite photo and a report.

1600836083.korean: 직접 현장을 확인해 봐야 할 것 같아요. 워낙 비밀스럽게 활동하던 조직이었으니까요…
1600836083.english: I think I need to check the site myself. After all, it was an organization that operated in such secrecy...

1600836084.korean:
엠프레시스 하운드의 건물이라면 AGS 생산 시설이 아닐 가능성이 매우 높습니다.
경비 없이 무인 시설로 운영하는 것 같더군요.
1600836084.english:
If it is the Empressis Hound building, it is highly likely that it is not an AGS production facility.
 It seemed like it was operating as an unmanned facility without security.

1600836085.korean: 네, 쓸만한 자료가 있다면 바로 주인님께 가져다 드릴게요.
1600836085.english: Yes, if I find any useful materials, I will bring them to you right away, Master.

1600836086.korean: - 다행히도 북미를 성공적으로 접수한 만큼, 해답을 찾는데 그리 오랜 시간이 필요하진 않을 듯했다.
1600836086.english: Fortunately, having successfully taken over North America, it seemed that finding the answer would not take very long.

1600836088.korean:
- 여전히 자신을 여제라고 믿는 바이오로이드와, 
앙금이 쌓인 하운드 대원들 간의 불화를 해결할 수 있는 단서까지 찾을 수 있을까?
1600836088.english:
- A bioroid who still believes herself to be the empress, and
 Will they be able to find clues that could resolve the deep-seated discord among the Hound members?

1600836089.english: -<Project ORCA, Sunrising Stage> To be continued in Part 2.

1600836090.english: … Is it the Empress's secret base?

1001408237.korean: 하필 내 페어가 바보니르 라니…&n그래도 미운 정이 들어서 그런가&n천아랑 집중케어 하니까&n그나마 좀 들어줄만 해졌어.&n…뭐? 내가 저 바보랑 잘 어울린다고?&n말 함부로 하지 마!
1001408237.english: Of all people, why did my partner have to be Babonir... Still, maybe it's because I've grown fond of him, but since Cheona is giving him intensive care, he's become at least somewhat bearable. ...What? You're saying I'm a good match for that idiot? Don't speak so carelessly!

1001408238.korean: 내가 밴드 한다니까&n몽구스 애들이 ’이모…’&n응원하러 온다더라…&n혹시 귀띔이라도 해준 거야?&n홍련도 응원하러 온다 했는데…&n진짜 쪽팔리게 가족놀이는&n왜 하는 거냐고…!​
1001408238.english: When I told them I was in a band, the Mongoose kids said, 'Auntie...' and that they're coming to cheer me on... Did they give you a heads-up or something? Hongryeon said she's coming to support me too... Seriously, why are you playing this embarrassing family game?!

1001408239.korean: 내가 왜 신디사이저냐고?&n테러를 하러 돌아다니다 보니&n작은 소리나 기척에도&n민감하게 반응하는 편인데…&n천아가 이 포지션에&n내가 딱이라고 하더라?&n게다가 우아~하고 화려한 잔기교를&n부릴 수 있다는 점에서&n운명이 점지해준 거나 다름없지!
1001408239.english: You ask why I'm a synthesizer? Since I go around committing terror, I tend to react sensitively to even the slightest sound or presence... and Cheon-ah told me I'm perfect for this position. Plus, considering I can pull off elegant and flashy finer techniques, it's practically a match made in heaven!

1001408240.korean: 흥, 어차피 넌 여제 년이 부르는&n노래에 홀려서 난 쳐다보지도 않았겠지!&n…내 솔로가… 제일 좋았다고? 진짜?&n으헤헤… 헤헤… 으흠! 흐음… 그래?&n뭐~ 더 듣고 싶은 거 없어?
1001408240.english: Hmph, anyway, you probably wouldn't have even looked at me because you were captivated by the song that bitch Empress was singing!… You said my solo… was the best? Really? Hehehe… Hehe… Ahem! Hmm… Really? Well~ Isn't there anything else you want to hear?

1001408241.korean: 무대의상 되게 별로라고 생각했는데…&n천아 말로는 멸망 전 인간 애들이&n많이 입었다고 하더라?&n…헤헷, 어울려?&n평소랑 많이 달라 보이나?&n나… 멋있어 보여?​
1001408241.english: I thought the stage costume was really lame... but Cheona said a lot of the humans from before the apocalypse wore them? ... Hehe, does it suit me? Do I look very different from usual? Do I... look cool?

1001408242.korean: 저기… 프로… 듀… 서어…&n이번 공연도 끝났는데…&n혹시 나 원하는 만큼&n마음껏 칭찬 받을 수 있을까…&n이 바가지 머리 년이…?!&n시꺼! 방해마! 응?&n머, 머리 쓰다듬는 것도 좋지만…&n입으로 더 칭찬해줘… &n 진짜 연습 열심히 했어, 헤헤…
1001408242.english: Hey… Pro… D…u…ss… The show is over now… but… I wonder if I can get as much praise as I want… and get to my heart’s content… This bowl-cut bitch…?! Shut up! Don’t get in the way! Huh? Well, patting my head is nice, but… praise me more with your mouth… I really practiced hard, hehe…

1001408243.english: Want me to show you how I smash someone's head with Cindy Size?

1001408244.korean: 있잖아… 세게… 만질수록…&n더 좋은 소리가 나니까…&n세게… 누르고 만져 줘…♥
1001408244.english: You know… the harder… you touch… it makes a better sound… so… please… press and touch me hard… ♥

1001408245.korean: 밴드 끝나고 마리아랑 화해했어.&n이렇게 된 이상 앞으로는&n잘 지내보려고.&n아~ 그러고 보니까…&n걔 요즘 숙소에서 고양이 머리띠 하고&n애교 부리는 거 연습하던데,&n알고 있어?​
1001408245.english: I made up with Maria after the band performance. Since things have turned out this way, I’m going to try to get along well with her from now on. Oh, come to think of it... I noticed she’s been practicing wearing a cat headband and acting cute at the dorm lately. Do you know about that?

1000710052.korean: 무대에 서고 싶은 생각은 없었어. 자유시간 없이 연습만 죽어라 하는 것도 나하곤 영 안 맞는 것 같아서 말이지…&n…그래도 네가 무대에서 연주하는 내 모습에 반했다는 소감은 마음에 들어. 이렇게 반지도 주고 말이야.&n그럼 이제 네가 연주할 차례야. 오늘 밤, 날 꼭 끌어안고… 밤새 연주해줘… 내 몸에 흔적이 남을 때 까지…
1000710052.english: I didn't really want to stand on stage. It just didn't seem to suit me at all to practice like crazy without any free time... Still, I like the comment that you fell in love with me watching me play on stage. And you even gave me a ring like this. Well then, it's your turn to play now. Tonight, hold me tight... and play all night long... until you leave a mark on my body...

1001500180.korean: Rising Up! 장화의 현란한 신디사이저와 함께!
1001500180.english: Rising Up! With Janghwa's dazzling synthesizer!

1001500181.korean:
스킨 선물 하면 개방
장화 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Sprit and Soul"
1001500181.english:
If you gift a skin, it opens
 Janghwa Yong "Project Orca: Sunrise Stage Sprit and Soul"

1001500183.korean: Rising Up! 파프니르의 짜릿한 일렉트리컬 솔로!
1001500183.english: Rising Up! Fafnir's Thrilling Electrical Solo!

1001500184.korean:
스킨 선물 하면 개방
장화 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Sprit and Soul"
1001500184.english:
If you gift a skin, it opens
 Janghwa Yong "Project Orca: Sunrise Stage Sprit and Soul"

1001408246.korean: 제가 드럼을 맡은 이유는&n체력이 제일 좋은 것도&n있지만… 대장인 만큼 그&n중추인 드럼이 어울린다는&n천아의 말에… 하아…&n하지만 박자를 탄다는말이&n무엇인지는 조금&n이해하기 어렵습니다…
1001408246.english: The reason I took on the drums is partly because I have the best stamina, but... hearing Cheon-ah say that since I am the leader, the drums—the backbone—suit me... *Sigh*... but I find it a little hard to understand what it means to "get the beat"...

1001408247.korean: 무대라… 여제님께서도&n가끔씩은 제게 옛날&n이야기를 해주셨습니다.&n훌륭한 배우셨던 만큼,&n다시 한 번 무대에 오르고&n싶다고 말씀하셨죠.&n여제님께서 지금의 저희를&n보셨더라면… 좋아하셨을…&n까요?
1001408247.english: The stage… The Empress used to tell me stories from the past from time to time. As a great actor, she mentioned that she wanted to return to the stage once again. If the Empress were to see us now… would she have liked it?

1001408248.korean: 제 박자감이&n바닥 수준이라는 말에…&n틈틈이 오르카 오락실에서&n리듬 게임을 연습 중입니다.&n…제가 살다 보니 토모와&n브라우니한테 수련을 받게&n될 줄은 정말 생각지도&n못했습니다.
1001408248.english: Hearing that my sense of rhythm is at rock bottom... I've been practicing rhythm games at the Orca Arcade in my spare time. ...I really never imagined that in my life I would end up receiving training from Tomo and Brownie.

1001408249.korean: 부대원 모두가&n프로듀서님의 기대에&n부응하기 위해 열심히&n노력하고 있습니다.&n늘 투덜거리던 마리아도&n그렇고… 솔직히 단결이&n가능하게 될 줄이라고는&n꿈에도 몰랐습니다.
1001408249.english: All the squad members are working hard to live up to the Producer's expectations. Even Maria, who used to always grumble, is doing so... Honestly, I never dreamed that unity would be possible.

1001408250.korean: 스콜과 하티로 적들을&n베어내듯, 유려한 동작으로&n드럼을 연주해라… 이미지론&n그려지지만 실전은 역시&n어렵습니다. 프로듀서님께&n한 수 배워보려 하는데…&n단 둘이서… 집중 케어&n해주시면 안 되겠습니까?
1001408250.english: Play the drums with fluid movements, just as you slice through enemies with Squall and Hati… I can picture it, but in practice, it’s still difficult. I’d like to learn a thing or two from you, Producer… but could you please give us some focused care, just the two of us?

1001408251.korean: 드럼은 치면 칠수록 참&n다채로운 소리가 나는 게&n정말 신기한 악기인 것&n같습니다.&n…네? 저, 저도 동침 때마다&n다양한 소리를 낸다고요?&n주인님! 침대 위에서의 일은&n비밀로 지켜 주겠단 말씀을&n하지 않으셨습니까?!
1001408251.english: Drums seem like such a fascinating instrument; the more you play them, the more diverse sounds they produce. ...What? You mean, I make various sounds every time we sleep together? Master! Didn't you promise to keep what happens in bed a secret?!

1001408252.english: It's embarrassing enough wearing clothes like this... I'm so mortified, Producer...!

1001408253.korean: 프로듀서님,&n무, 무대에 올라야&n합니다! 그… 그러니까…&n…긴장이 풀리도록 조금&n쓰다듬어 주시기&n바랍니다… 멍멍
1001408253.english: Producer, I-I have to go on stage! Um... so... could you please pet me a little to help me relax... Woof woof

1001408254.korean: 저희 부대원들이&n화합하여 이렇게 무사히&n무대를 끝낸 건 모두&n프로듀서님 덕분입니다.&n총애해주셔서 감사드리고…&n앞으로도 저희 다섯 모두&n충성을 다해 모시겠습니다...!
1001408254.english: It is all thanks to you, Producer, that our squad members were able to work together in harmony and safely finish the performance. Thank you for your favor... and all five of us will continue to serve you with unwavering loyalty...!

1000710053.korean: 부대원들에게 미안… 했습니다. 모범을 보여야 할 제가 오히려 구멍이 되는 것이 싫어… 더 연습에 몰두하였습니다. 무엇보다… 프로듀서님께서 절 믿어 주고 계시기에 포기할 수 없었고요.&n늘 응원해주신 것도 모자라, 주어진 공연 임무 수행을 착실히 했을 뿐인 제게 반해 반지까지 주시다니, 정말 몸 둘 바를 모르겠습니다…! 저도 많이 사랑합니다, 프로듀서님!
1000710053.english: I felt sorry for my fellow squad members. I hated the thought of becoming a liability when I should have been setting an example, so I immersed myself even more in practice. Above all, I couldn't give up because you, the Producer, still believe in me. Not only did you always cheer me on, but to think you fell for me and even gave me a ring just for faithfully carrying out my assigned performance duties—I truly don't know what to say! I love you very much, Producer!

1001500186.korean: Rising Up! 바르그의 파워풀한 드럼, 스윙 타임!
1001500186.english: Rising Up! Varg's powerful drums, swing time!

1001500189.korean: Rising Up! 천아의 리드미컬한 베이스와 함께!
1001500189.english: Rising Up! With Cheona's rhythmic bass!

1001500192.korean: Shred the stage! 엠프레시스 하운드의 팬들이여 전율하라!
1001500192.english: Shred the stage! Fans of Empress Hound, tremble!

1001500187.korean:
스킨 선물 하면 개방
장화 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Sprit and Soul"
1001500187.english:
If you gift a skin, it opens
 Janghwa Yong "Project Orca: Sunrise Stage Sprit and Soul"

1001500190.korean:
스킨 선물 하면 개방
바르그 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Flick and Sting"
1001500190.english:
If you gift a skin, it opens
 Varg Yong "Project Orca: Sunrise Stage Flick and Sting"

1001500193.korean:
스킨 모두 선물 하면 개방
장화 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Sprit and Soul"
바르그 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Flick and Sting"
1001500193.english:
If you gift all skins, they will open.
 Janghwa Yong "Project Orca: Sunrise Stage Sprit and Soul"
 Varg Yong "Project Orca: Sunrise Stage Flick and Sting"

1600856001.korean:
요즘, 체조를 또 어떻게 활용할 수 있을까 고민을 많이 해봤는데
오르카 싱크로나이즈드부라... 꽤 훌륭한 생각이에요 디오네!
1600856001.english:
Lately, I've been thinking a lot about how else I can utilize gymnastics.
 Orca Synchronized Bra... That's quite a great idea, Dione!

1600856002.korean:
지루한 수영보다는 역시, 수영과 체조를 동시에 배울 수 있는 싱크로나이즈드는 획기적인 생각 같아요.
특히나 새로운 취미를 원하시는 대원 분들께, 엄청 좋을 거에요…!!
1600856002.english:
Rather than boring swimming, synchronized swimming, where you can learn swimming and gymnastics at the same time, seems like a groundbreaking idea.
 This will be especially great for members looking for a new hobby…!!

1600856003.korean: 안 그래도 이번에 가입하신 분들이랑 같이 기초 강습을 해보려는데… 써니 씨께서 도와주시겠어요?
1600856003.english: I was actually planning to hold a basic lesson with the new members... Sunny, would you be able to help?

1600856007.korean: 본기의 싱크로나이즈드를 가르쳐 줄 대원들이시군요? 잘 부탁하겠습니다.
1600856007.english: So you are the members who will teach this unit synchronized swimming? I look forward to working with you.

1600856008.english: … You're actually learning synchronized swimming? Really?

1600856009.korean:
본기는 우아함과 아름다움, 그리고 그 미학을 엘리 양에게 배우며
고상함과 아름다움을 동시에 뽐낼 수 있는 스포츠를 찾았는데, 수중 공연만큼 탁월한 것은 없을 거라 생각했습니다.
1600856009.english:
Bongi learns elegance, beauty, and aesthetics from Miss Ellie.
 I was looking for a sport that could showcase both elegance and beauty, and I thought there would be nothing as excellent as underwater performance.

1600856011.english: Why are you looking at me like that?

1600856012.korean: …수영하기엔 조금 힘든 체형이 아닐까 생각이 들어서요.
1600856012.english: … I was thinking that it might be a bit difficult for your body type to swim.

1600856013.korean: 요 며칠 전, 에이다 님과 글라시아스 님께서 사령관 님과 수영하시는 모습을 본 적 있었습니다.
1600856013.english: A few days ago, I saw Ada and Glacias swimming with the Commander.

1600856014.korean:
…사령관님 또한 그 모습을 보시며 그 분들의 아름다움을 느끼셨죠.
저 또한 센서로 그 모습을 똑똑히 지켜보았습니다.
1600856014.english:
… The Commander also felt their beauty as he watched them.
 I also clearly observed that scene with a sensor.

1600856016.korean: 질 수 없습니다. 저 또한 아름다움이 있다는 것을 사령관님께 꼭 알려드리고 싶습니다.
1600856016.english: I cannot lose. I really want to let the Commander know that I, too, possess beauty.

1600856017.korean:
...궁금한 게 있는데 셀주크 님이야 그렇다 치더라도...
스트롱홀드 씨는 싱크로나이즈드를 하면 녹이 슬지 않을까요…?
1600856017.english:
...I have a question. I'll leave Seljuk aside for now...
 Mr. Stronghold, won't you rust if you do synchronized swimming...?

1600856018.korean:
아자즈 씨께 개조를 받는다면 어렵진 않으리라 생각됩니다.
혹시나 섬세함이 문제라면… 본기는 호라이즌 분점에서 차를 타고 서빙까지 했던 몸입니다.
1600856018.english:
I don't think it would be difficult if you had the modifications done by Mr. Azaz.
 If, by any chance, meticulousness is an issue... I am someone who even drove a car and served at the Horizon branch.

1600856019.korean:
또한, 일전 골타리온은 소완 양 대신 직접 음식을 만들고 설거지를 하기까지 했는데,
어째서 불가능하다 단정짓는 것인지 본기의 사고 회로로는 이해할 수가 없습니다.
1600856019.english:
Furthermore, Goltarion previously even cooked the food and did the dishes himself instead of Miss Sowon,
 With this unit's thought process, I cannot understand why it is concluded that it is impossible.

1600856021.korean: 음… 맞아요. 꼭 AGS라고 해서, 불가능한 건 아니죠.
1600856021.english: Hmm... that's right. Just because it's AGS, it's not impossible.

1600856022.english: Let's do this together, Ms. Dione!!

1600856026.korean: 시, 심호흡을 하고… 몸에 힘을 쭉 빼고…
1600856026.english: Okay, take a deep breath... and completely relax your body...

1600856029.korean: 저, 스트롱홀드 님께서 물에 가라앉으셨는데… 어떤 말을 하고 계신지 모르겠어요.
1600856029.english: Um, Stronghold has sunk into the water... I don't know what he's saying.

1600856030.english: He says he's fine and will try to relax.

1600856031.korean: …저거 힘을 빼는 게 아닌 것 같은데요?
1600856031.english: … I don't think that's relaxing the muscles.

1600856033.korean: 스트롱홀드 씨!! 거기서 전원을 끄면 안 돼요!!! 힘을 빼라고요!!!
1600856033.english: Mr. Stronghold!! You can't turn off the power there!!! I said relax!!!

1600856034.korean: 어, 어서 구해서 인공호흡을… 해야 하는데… 스트롱홀드 씨를 저희 둘이서 꺼낼 수 있을까요?
1600856034.english: Uh, we need to hurry up and rescue him and give him artificial respiration... but can the two of us get Mr. Stronghold out?

1600856037.korean: …싱크로나이즈드는 말 그대로, 동체를 거꾸로 한 뒤, 다리를 드는 것이겠죠?
1600856037.english: … Synchronized swimming literally means turning the body upside down and lifting the legs, right?

1600856039.english: I will give it a try… First, turn the fuselage upside down…

1600856041.korean: 지금, 수영장 벽이 박살난 것 같은데…
1600856041.english: It looks like the swimming pool wall has been smashed right now...

1600857001.korean:
본 유닛은 오르카에서 복구된지 얼마 되지 않아, 아직 부 활동에 대해 이해하지 못하였습니다.
셀주크 유닛, 자세히 그것에 대해 설명해주시길 요구합니다.
1600857001.english:
As this unit was recently restored from Orca, we have not yet understood the club activities.
 Seljuk unit, I request that you explain it in detail.

1600857002.korean: 최근 AGS 분들께서도 각자 취미를 찾아보라는 사령관 각하의 지시에 여러 활동을 하고 있습니다.
1600857002.english: Recently, the AGS members have also been engaging in various activities in accordance with the Commander's directive to find hobbies.

1600857003.korean:
최근 셀주크 유닛은 에이다 님과 글라시아스 씨...
그리고 사령관님의 수영장 데이트를 보며 열심히 수영을 연습하시더군요. 그것이 '취미'겠지요.
1600857003.english:
Recently, the Seljuk unit is Lady Ada and Ms. Glacias...
 And I noticed you were practicing swimming diligently while watching the Commander's pool date. I suppose that is your 'hobby'.

1600857004.korean: 취미라, 본 유닛의 취미라 하면 시위 진압과 시가전, 험지전투 훈련이라고 할 수 있습니다.
1600857004.english: As for hobbies, this unit's hobbies are riot control, urban warfare, and rough terrain combat training.

1600857005.korean:
그것은 훈련이며, 사령관 각하께서는 그것을 취미라 사고하시지 않고 계십니다.
데스스토커 개체는 오르카 시크릿 네트워크에 접속하여 '취미' 활동을 검색해보시기 바랍니다.
1600857005.english:
It is training, and His Excellency the Commander does not consider it a hobby.
 For Deathstalker entities, please access the Orca Secret Network and search for 'hobby' activities.

1600857006.korean: 취미' 검색 중… 검색 완료. 에이다 님과 글라시아스 씨의 비키니 사진… 사령관님의 시선 분석…
1600857006.english: Searching for 'hobbies'... Search complete. Ada and Glacias' bikini photos... Commander's gaze analysis...

1600857008.korean: …뭘 인식했다는 거죠? 게다가 당신들… 절 두고 어떤 사고 회로를 돌리고 계신 건지 모르겠습니다.
1600857008.english: … What do you mean by recognizing? Besides, you guys… I don’t know what kind of thought processes you’re running regarding me.

1600857009.korean: 셀주크 유닛도 홀로그램 상으론 에이다 님과 글라시아스 씨의 동체와 유사함을 지닙니다.
1600857009.english: The Seljuk unit also resembles the bodies of Lady Ada and Lady Glacias in the hologram.

1600857010.korean: 하지만 셀주크 양은 홀로그램으로 그 모양을 유지할 뿐입니다.
1600857010.english: However, Miss Seljuk only maintains her form as a hologram.

1600857011.korean: 셀주크 유닛은 엄연히 에이다 님과 글라시아스 씨하곤 다르게, 동체가 유기질 물체로 이뤄지지 않았습니다.
1600857011.english: Seljuk units are strictly different from Ada and Glacias; their bodies are not made of organic matter.

1600857012.korean:
다시 말해서, 본 유닛의 사고한 바… 셀주크 유닛의 싱크로나이즈드는 
기괴한 AGS의 발악일 뿐, 사령관님께서 이성으로 느끼실 수 없습니다.
1600857012.english:
In other words, regarding this unit's thought... the Seljuk unit's synchronized is
 It is merely a bizarre desperate struggle by the AGS; Commander, you cannot perceive it with reason.

1600857013.korean: 분하지만… 맞는 말이군요. 여러분께선 꽤나 냉정하시군요.
1600857013.english: It’s frustrating, but… you’re right. You are all quite level-headed.

1600857014.korean: 데스스토커 개체에게 반박합니다. 저희는 오히려 보통 분들과 달리 많은 다리를 가지고 있습니다.
1600857014.english: We refute the Deathstalker entities. Unlike ordinary people, we actually have many legs.

1600857015.english: … I’m not sure what this unit means.

1600857016.korean:
우리는 디오네 양과 다르게 뽐낼 다리가 많습니다.
다시 말해, 바이오로이드 분들보다 싱크로나이즈드를 더욱 화려하고 아름다운 무브먼트를 준비할 수 있단 뜻이죠.
1600857016.english:
Unlike Miss Dione, we have many legs to show off.
 In other words, it means that they can prepare more spectacular and beautiful synchronized movements than the bioroids.

1600857017.korean: …사령관님의 미적 기준과, AGS의 미적 기준은 다르다고 생각이 듭니다만.
1600857017.english: … I think the Commander’s aesthetic standards and the AGS’s aesthetic standards are different, though.

1600857018.korean: 이의있습니다. 본 유닛은 며칠 전, 데카르트 보이저 삿갓 유닛에게 미적으로 아름답다는 말을…
1600857018.english: I object. A few days ago, this unit told the Descartes Voyager Hat Unit that it was aesthetically beautiful…

1600857019.korean: 그 변태 AGS의 말은 듣지 마십시오.
1600857019.english: Do not listen to that perverted AGS.

1600857020.korean: 이김에 저도, 오르카 싱크로나이즈드부에 들어… 아름다운 수영 솜씨를 사령관 각하께 뽐낼 생각입니다.
1600857020.english: While I’m at it, I’m also thinking of joining the Orca Synchronized Swimming Club… and showing off my beautiful swimming skills to Your Excellency the Commander.

1600857022.korean: 포트리스 씨랑 데스스토커 씨도 싱크로나이즈드부에 입부할 수 있도록… 허가해달라고요?
1600857022.english: You're asking for permission for Mr. Fortress and Mr. Deathstalker to join the Synchronized Club as well?

1600857023.korean: 그렇습니다. 이미 아자즈 님께 녹슬음 방지 키트를 장착했기에 문제가 없으리라 봅니다.
1600857023.english: That is correct. Since the anti-rust kit has already been installed for Azaz, I believe there will be no problem.

1600857024.korean: 또한 본 유닛에게 어울리는 수영복 또한 바이오로이드 분들께 요구하는 바입니다.
1600857024.english: In addition, we are requesting that the Bio-androids also provide swimsuits suitable for this unit.

1600857025.korean: 그… 써니 씨… 저희 수영복이… 경기용 수영복 밖에 없지 않나요?
1600857025.english: Um... Sunny... don't we only have competition swimsuits?

1600857026.korean: 응. 그렇긴 한데 AGS 몸에 맞진 않을 거야.
1600857026.english: Yeah. That's true, but it probably won't fit an AGS body.

1600857028.korean:
괜찮습니다. 오드리 씨께 부탁해 특수한 경기용 수영복을 주문할 테니...
디오네 씨와 써니 씨께선 본 기체들에게 수영과 싱크로나이즈드를 전수해주십시오.
1600857028.english:
It’s alright. I’ll ask Ms. Audrey to order a special competition swimsuit...
 Ms. Dione and Ms. Sunny, please teach these machines swimming and synchronized swimming.

1600857029.korean: 제가 장담하는데, 사령관 각하께서도 분명 만족해하실 만한 퍼포먼스를 할 수 있으리라 생각됩니다.
1600857029.english: I guarantee that I will be able to deliver a performance that will surely satisfy His Excellency the Commander.

1600857030.english: … They say delusion is free, but.

1600857031.korean:
저는 따로 제 동체에 수영복을 입기보단, 그냥 마키나 님께 부탁해, 
경기용 수영복을 입은 제 홀로그램 모습을 추가해달라 말씀드리겠습니다.
1600857031.english:
Rather than wearing a swimsuit on my torso separately, I'll just ask Makina-sama.
 I would like to request that you add a hologram of me wearing a competition swimsuit.

1600857032.english: … Suddenly, I am reminded of the words our enemies use.

1600857034.english: It is a disgrace to imitate a weak mass of flesh.

1600857035.korean: …포트리스 씨. 그 아름다운 다리에 바람 구멍 내기 전에 조용하세요.
1600857035.english: … Mr. Fortress. Be quiet before you make a hole in that beautiful bridge.

1600857036.english: … Something… isn’t something… really wrong with us?

1600857037.korean: 헤헤… 생각해보니까… AGS랑 같이 체조를 하는 건 새로운 경험인데? 완전 럭키 써니잖아~!
1600857037.english: Hehe... Come to think of it... doing gymnastics with AGS is a new experience, isn't it? I'm totally Lucky Sunny~!

1600857038.korean: 저도 세 분을 서포트하는 청일점으로써 최선을 다해 임하겠습니다.
1600857038.english: As the only male member supporting the three of you, I will also do my best.

1600857039.korean: …제 논리회로로는 전혀 이해가 가진 않지만, 알았어요.
1600857039.english: … It doesn't make any sense to me with my logic circuits, but I got it.

1600858001.korean: - 한참 부 활동의 중간 결과물을 보여달라는 대원들을 위하여, 시찰에 나서기로 했다.
1600858001.english: We decided to go on an inspection for the members who had been asking to see the interim results of our club activities.

1600858002.korean: - 맨 처음 도착한 곳은… 디오네와 써니가 만든 색다른 동아리… 싱크로나이즈드 부였다.
1600858002.english: The first place we arrived at was… the unique club created by Dione and Sunny… the Synchronized Swimming Club.

1600858003.english: Why are you looking at it that way, Commander?

1600858004.korean:
사령관. 이미 자네는 에이다 낭자와 글라시아스 낭자의 마음을 얻지 않았는가?
어째서 연애의 하수인 내게 조언을 구하려는 건지 잘 모르겠네.
1600858004.english:
Commander, haven't you already won the hearts of Lady Ada and Lady Glacias?
 I don't really understand why you want to ask me for advice, a mere novice at dating.

1600858006.korean: 열심히는 준비했어. 다만… 내가 가진 상식으론 여전히 어려워서…
1600858006.english: I prepared really hard. However… based on my common sense, it’s still difficult…

1600858007.korean:
- 그때 써니가 손을 흔들며 등장한 뒤 내게 인사했다.
어색하게 손을 흔들며 등장한 써니가 이윽고 휘슬을 불었다.
1600858007.english:
Just then, Sunny appeared waving her hand and greeted me.
 Sunny appeared waving awkwardly, and soon blew the whistle.

1600858009.korean: - 엄청난… 진동이 의자에서 느껴졌다. 그리고 그와 동시에 AGS를 위해 특수 제작된 수영장에서…
1600858009.english: - Tremendous… vibrations were felt in the chair. And at the same time, in the swimming pool specially made for the AGS…

1600858011.korean: 숙녀 분들, 모두 준비되셨습니까? 제 동체를 단단하게 밟으십시오.
1600858011.english: Ladies, are you all ready? Please step firmly on my body.

1600858015.korean: - 그리고 굉음과 함께, 수영장을 질주하는 스트롱홀드…
1600858015.english: - And with a roar, Stronghold races across the pool…

1600858016.korean: -…그 위에선 경기용 수영복을 입은 데스스토커와 포트리스가 활짝, 다리를 벌렸다.
1600858016.english: -… On top of that, Deathstalker and Fortress, wearing competition swimsuits, spread their legs wide.

1600858017.korean: 시원한 물을 가르는 데스스토커 양과 포트리스 양의 물기 젖은 외장갑 피부…!!
1600858017.english: Miss Deathstalker and Miss Fortress's wet outer armor skin cutting through the cool water…!!

1600858018.korean: 아름답게 호를 그리는 저 다리들은… 마치 연꽃과도 같군…!
1600858018.english: Those bridges forming a beautiful arc… are just like lotus flowers…!

1600858019.korean: 아름다워, 이것이야 말로 AGS 궁극의 미학…!
1600858019.english: Beautiful, this is truly the ultimate aesthetic of AGS…!

1600858021.korean: 비록 셀주크 양의 저 홀로그램은 AGS와 물의 만남이라는 예술과는 달리 아쉬운 면이 있지만…
1600858021.english: Although Miss Seljuk's hologram leaves something to be desired compared to the art of the meeting of AGS and water...

1600858022.korean: …포트리스 양의 저 쭉 뻗은 다리는 마치 그 아름다운 곡선을 뽐내며…
1600858022.english: … Miss Fortress’s long, slender legs were as if showing off their beautiful curves…

1600858023.korean: - 수면 아래, 경영 수영복을 입은 셀주크의 홀로그램 얼굴에 부끄러움이 섞이다 사라지는 것 같았다.
1600858023.english: - Beneath the surface, it seemed as though embarrassment was mixing with and fading away on Seljuk's holographic face wearing a management swimsuit.

1600858024.korean: 아쉽군… 내가 조금만 더 강해져서 그녀들을 번쩍 들을 수 있었다면…
1600858024.english: What a shame... If only I were a little stronger and could have lifted them up in a flash...

1600858025.korean: 저 낭자들 사이 청일점은 스트롱홀드가 아닌 내가 됐었을 수도 있었을텐데…
1600858025.english: I could have been the only man among those ladies instead of Stronghold...

1600858026.english: Stronghold… You are a rival I acknowledge…!!

1600858027.korean:
- 삿갓한테 뭔가 해주고 싶은 말이 있긴 했지만…
그의 상상을 깨주지 않기 위해 입을 다물기로 했다.
1600858027.english:
I did have something I wanted to say to Satgat, but...
 I decided to keep my mouth shut so as not to shatter his imagination.

1600858028.korean:
- 하지만, 특별히 홀로그램 경기용 수영복을 입곤 싱크로나이즈드 자세를
취한 셀주크에게 살풋 미소를 지으며 손을 흔들었다.
1600858028.english:
However, wearing a special holographic competition swimsuit, synchronized poses
 He smiled faintly at the drunk Seljuk and waved his hand.

1600858030.korean: - 차가워보이는 셀주크의 홀로그램 입가에 미약한 웃음이 번지는 듯했다.
1600858030.english: A faint smile seemed to spread across the corners of Seljuk's cold-looking holographic lips.

1600858032.korean: …그, 내가 AGS 감수성을 잘 몰라서 널 데리고 다니는 건데…
1600858032.english: …Um, I’m taking you around because I don’t really understand AGS sensibilities…

1600858033.english: You can… explain it well to me, right?

1600858034.english: Your voice sounds a bit sulky...

1600858035.english: … You look a bit gloomy. Dione?

1600858037.english: It was difficult for me at first too, but…

1600859001.korean:
멀린 씨, 갑자기 하운드 분들이 밴드 연습 때문에 빠져서 업무에 차질이 생길 것 같아요.
혹시 멀린 씨께서 추천할 만한 바이오로이드나 AGS 분들이 계신가요?
1600859001.english:
Mr. Merlin, the Hounds are suddenly absent due to band practice, so it looks like it will cause a disruption to our work.
 Mr. Merlin, do you happen to have any Bio-Roids or AGS units you would recommend?

1600859002.korean: 음, 우리 포세이돈 대원들이 도와주면 괜찮을 것 같네.
1600859002.english: Hmm, I think it will be fine if our Poseidon members help out.

1600859003.korean:
그게… 이번 카페 호라이즌은 축제 때 대형 야외 부스를 만들어야 하거든요.
오르카 대원 뿐만 아니라, 주둔지 바이오로이드 분들도 오시는 만큼… 인원이 더 필요해요.
1600859003.english:
The thing is... for this Cafe Horizon, we have to set up a large outdoor booth for the festival.
 Since not only the Orca members but also the garrison bio-androids are coming... we need more personnel.

1600859004.korean: 하긴… 천아랑 장화, 바르그 모두 분점의 에이스긴 했지. 흐음… 임시 인원이라…
1600859004.english: Come to think of it… Cheona, Janghwa, and Barg were all the aces of the branch, after all. Hmm… temporary staff…

1600859005.korean:
…으음! 생각났어! 포세이돈 인원들을 데리고 영업하는 건 어때?
이 귀염둥이 초 천재 멀린이 지휘한다면, 문제 없이 바로 실전에 투입할 수 있을 거야!!
1600859005.english:
… Hmm! I just thought of something! How about we take the Poseidon crew and run a business?
 If this adorable super genius Merlin is in command, we can deploy him straight into battle without any problems!!

1600859007.english: Huh? What's with the sudden change in your expression?

1600859008.english: Ah, no... I mean... it's a bit unexpected.

1600859010.korean: 그러니까… 로데 씨야 워낙 디저트 류를 좋아하시니 이해는 하겠지만…
1600859010.english: I mean... I understand, Mr. Rode, since you really like desserts, but...

1600859013.korean: 그 놈의 카페… 그래. 같이 해 주마. 됐지?
1600859013.english: That damn cafe... Fine. I'll do it with you. Got it?

1600859014.korean: …진짜죠? 약속하신 거에요? 저 대장님한테 유니폼도 입힐 거에요?
1600859014.english: … Really? Did you promise? Are you going to put a uniform on the Captain too?

1600859015.korean: 그래, 그래. 다 들어 줄테니까 어디 한 번 신나게 날뛰어 보라고.
1600859015.english: Yeah, yeah. I'll listen to everything you say, so go ahead and have some fun running wild.

1600859017.english: Why are you suddenly laughing, Mr. Merlin?

1600859018.korean: 약속이 떠올랐다. 우리 감마 대장님도… 카페를 해주시겠단 말씀이!!!
1600859018.english: I remembered a promise. Our Captain Gamma... said he would open a cafe for us too!!!

1600859019.korean: ...그 감마가… 카페 유니폼을 입고… 어… 음…
1600859019.english: ...That Gamma... wearing a cafe uniform... uh... um...

1600859020.korean: 로스팅 기계를 다루다 열받아서 때려 부수지나 않으면 다행… 아닐까요?
1600859020.english: It would be a relief if you didn't get so worked up handling the roasting machine that you smashed it... wouldn't it?

1600859021.korean:
우리 대장님을 너무 단순무식하게 취급하지 말라구!!
세이렌 너도 대장님이 바디콘 드레스 입고 쉬는 모습 보지 않았어?
1600859021.english:
Don't treat our captain so simply and ignorantly!!
 Siren, didn't you see the Captain resting in a bodycon dress too?

1600859022.korean: …확실히, 그때 사령관님이 뒤집어지셨긴 했죠. 하지만… 메이드 카페는 일상복이 아니라, 정말 유니폼이라고요…
1600859022.english: … Certainly, the Commander was furious back then. But… maid cafes aren't everyday wear; they are actually uniforms…

1600859023.korean:
우리 대장님이 한 입으로 두 말 할 분은 아니지만 
음... 생각해보니 이래저래 대장님이 바쁘셔서 이번 카페 호라이즌 지원은 못 올지도…
1600859023.english:
Our leader isn't the type to go back on his word, but
 Hmm... come to think of it, the boss is busy with this and that, so he might not be able to come for Cafe Horizon support this time...

1600859024.korean: 적어도 포세이돈 대원들은 올 수 있을 거야. 내가 모아서 얘기 좀 해볼겡.
1600859024.english: At least the Poseidon members should be able to come. I'll gather them and talk to them.

1600859025.english: Alright. Then, I'm counting on you, Mr. Merlin…!!

1600860001.korean: 자, 주목!! 그래서 이번 오르카 축제에 카페 호라이즌 측 지원 사격을 하게 될 예정인데… 어떻게 생각해?
1600860001.english: Hey, listen up!! So, Cafe Horizon is planning to provide support for this Orca Festival... what do you think?

1600860002.korean: 카… 카페 호라이즌이요?! 저희가 정말 지원을 가도 되는 건가요, 멀린 님?!
1600860002.english: Ka... Cafe Horizon?! Are we really allowed to go provide support, Merlin?!

1600860003.korean:
이미 세이렌한테 허락은 받아놨다구. 그리고 이번 지원을 끝으로,
우린 카페 호라이즌의 아성을 따라잡을 '카페 포세이돈'을 창업하는 꿈을 이룰 수 있을 거라구!
1600860003.english:
I've already gotten permission from Siren. And with this support being the last,
 We'll be able to fulfill our dream of founding 'Cafe Poseidon' to catch up to the stronghold of Cafe Horizon!

1600860004.korean: 헤헤…!! 좋아요!!! 벤테도 있었으면 엄청 좋아했을 텐데…!!
1600860004.english: Hehe… !! Great!!! Bente would have loved it too if he were there… !!

1600860006.korean: ..왜 나까지 카페 호라이즌 점원을 해야 하는 거야?
1600860006.english: Why do I have to be a Cafe Horizon clerk too?

1600860007.korean: 하? 너도 명예 포세이돈 아니었어? 감마 대장님한테 입은 은혜를 저버리려는 거야?
1600860007.english: Huh? Weren't you an honorary Poseidon too? Are you trying to betray the favor you owed Captain Gamma?

1600860008.korean: 그건 아니지만… 그래도 축제 날까지 일이라니… 가디언 언니들이랑 어떻게 놀지 계획까지 다 짜놨는데...
1600860008.english: That's not it, but... still, work right up until the day of the festival... I even made all the plans for how to hang out with the Guardian sisters...

1600860009.korean: 그럴 줄 알고, 네 언니한테까지 같이 부탁했단 말씀!!
1600860009.english: I knew this would happen, that's why I even asked your older sister to help!

1600860010.english: Hehe… What can I help you with?

1600860011.korean: 어, 언니?! 언니도 이번에 도와주기로 한 거야?
1600860011.english: Uh, sis?! Did you decide to help this time too?

1600860012.korean: 하핫, 하나뿐인 동생이랑 일 해보는 것도 좋은 경험일 것 같아서 지원해봤지.
1600860012.english: Haha, I applied because I thought it would be a good experience to work with my only sibling.

1600860013.korean:
알키오네. 혹시, 이번 카페 호라이즌 지원이 끝나면… 
우리랑 같이 '카페 포세이돈'의 점원으로 일해줄 수 있어?
1600860013.english:
Alcyone. By any chance, once support for Cafe Horizon ends...
 Can you work with us as a staff member at 'Cafe Poseidon'?

1600860014.korean: 호라이즌 애들이 하고 있는 그 메이드 카페 말이지? 컨셉 혹시 정해진 거라도 있어?
1600860014.english: You mean that maid cafe the Horizon guys are running? Is the concept set by any chance?

1600860015.english: Hmm… nothing has been clearly decided yet, but…

1600860016.korean: 감마 대장님이 무용 대장님처럼 활약할 수 있는 카페면 좋겠지?!
1600860016.english: Wouldn't it be great if Captain Gamma could shine just like Captain Muyong?!

1600860019.korean: 그래!! 카페 호라이즌의 아성을 뛰어 넘을 핫플레이스를 감마 대장님이랑 만들 거라고!!
1600860019.english: Yeah!! I'm going to create a hot spot with Captain Gamma that will surpass Cafe Horizon's stronghold!!

1600860020.korean: 이 초 천재 미소녀 점장 멀린 님이랑 같이 말이야!!
1600860020.english: Together with this super genius beautiful girl manager, Merlin!!

1600860021.korean: 자, 잠깐만!! 어째서 점장이 너인 거야?
1600860021.english: W-wait a minute!! Why are you the manager?

1600860022.korean: 당연히 참모인 내가 점장이 되는 게 맞지 않겠어?
1600860022.english: Of course, wouldn't it be right for me, the aide, to become the store manager?

1600860023.korean: 인정할 수 없어! 적어도 부관 생활을 오래했던 내가 점장이 되는 게 맞잖아!!
1600860023.english: I can't accept this! At the very least, it makes sense for me to become the store manager since I've been an assistant for so long!!

1600860024.korean: 흥, 카페 아르바이트도 해본 적 없는 꼬맹이 주제에 무슨 점장? 자신 있어?
1600860024.english: Hmph, what makes you think you can be a manager? You're just a kid who's never even worked a part-time job at a cafe. Are you confident?

1600860025.korean: 내가 못할 줄 알아?! 두고 봐!! 내가 호라이즌 지원 나가서 단숨에 배워 올 테니까!!
1600860025.english: Do you think I can't do it?! Just you wait!! I'll go support Horizon and learn it in a flash!!

1600860026.korean:
저… 알키오네 님, 메로페 님께선 원래… 저런 분이셨나요?
분명 아까까지만 하더라도 일하기 싫다고 하셨…
1600860026.english:
Um... Lady Alcyone, was Lady Merope always... like that?
 You clearly said just a moment ago that you didn't want to work...

1600860027.korean: 우리 동생이 나름 지휘관 개체로 만들어져서 저런 건 못 참을 때가 있지~
1600860027.english: My little brother was made into a commander, so there are times when he just can't stand things like that.

1600860028.english: Whoa…?! What on earth is this vibration?!

1600860029.korean: 입력된 임무… 해석 가능. 실제 시행 여부 재확인…
1600860029.english: Input mission… Interpretable. Reconfirming actual execution status…

1600860031.korean: 에?! 이, 이건… 제가 말로만 듣던 포세이돈의 결전병기… 맞나요?!
1600860031.english: Eh?! Th-this is… Poseidon’s ultimate weapon that I’ve only heard about… is it right?!

1600860032.korean: 자, 소개할게. 미래의 카페 포세이돈의 에이스가 될 수 있는 이 멀린 님의 필살기!!
1600860032.english: Now, let me introduce this. This is Merlin's ultimate move, who could become the ace of the future Café Poseidon!!

1600861001.korean: 정말 감사해요 멀린 씨, 이렇게 많은 분들이 지원을 와주실 줄은 몰랐어요.
1600861001.english: Thank you so much, Merlin. I didn't expect so many people to come and support us.

1600861002.korean: 후훗, 이게 다 카페 포세… 아, 아니!! 아서의 성대한 축제를 도와주기 위해서지, 으흠흠!!
1600861002.english: Hehe, this is all to help with Café Fosse… Ah, no!! It’s to support Arthur’s grand festival, hmm hmm!!

1600861003.korean: 이번 축제에 지원을 와줘서 고맙소, 멀린… 덕분에 야외 카페 운영에 차질이 없을 것 같소.
1600861003.english: Thank you for coming to support us at this festival, Merlin... Thanks to you, it looks like there won't be any issues with the operation of the outdoor cafe.

1600861004.english: Haha, Captain Dance, you are too kind...

1600861005.korean: …저 근데, 이번에 지원 오신 분들 중엔 상당히 덩치가 크신 분들이 계시네요?
1600861005.english: … By the way, there are quite a few big-bodied people among those who came to support us this time?

1600861006.korean: 설마 우리 언니 말하려는 건 아니지?!
1600861006.english: You're not planning to talk about my older sister, are you?!

1600861007.korean: 메로페 씨… 저희 기준에서 덩치가 크다라는 말은 단순히 알키오네 씨 만을 보고 그런 게 아니에요.
1600861007.english: Mr. Merope… When we say he is big by our standards, we aren't just looking at Mr. Alcyone alone.

1600861008.english: … I mean the Triton holding the signpost right now…

1600861009.korean: 트리톤? 왜? 일 잘하잖아!! 멀리서도 '야 카페 호라이즌이 저기 있구나!!' 하고 눈에 딱 들어올 거 아냐?!
1600861009.english: Triton? Why? He's good at his job!! Even from a distance, you'll spot him instantly and think, 'Hey, there's Cafe Horizon!!' right?!

1600861010.korean: 그… 확실히 눈에 띄어서 좋긴 한데요… 너무 눈에 띄지 않나요?
1600861010.english: Um… it’s certainly nice that it stands out… but isn’t it too noticeable?

1600861011.korean: 모드 실시… 파츠별 유압 실린더의 용량 부족. 워터밤 모드 불가.
1600861011.english: Mode activated… Insufficient hydraulic cylinder capacity per part. Water Bomb mode unavailable.

1600861012.korean: 본기의 여름 특수 모드를 실시하기 위해선 가용 가능한 물의 용량을 채워주기 바람.
1600861012.english: To activate the summer special mode of this unit, please fill the available water capacity.

1600861013.english: … By any chance, did you modify this, Mr. Azaz?

1600861014.korean:
후훗, 눈치가 빠르셔서 좋군요. 이번 축제 때 바이오로이드 분들께 
시원한 워터밤을 선사할 '뉴 트리톤 워터 스플레쉬'에요.
1600861014.english:
Hehe, it’s nice that you’re so perceptive. To the Bio-Roids at this festival
 It is the 'New Triton Water Splash' that will deliver a refreshing water bomb.

1600861015.korean: …사령관님께 허가는 받고 트리톤을 개조하신 거 맞아요?
1600861015.english: … Did you get permission from the Commander to modify the Triton?

1600861016.korean:
며칠 전 계획서 초안을 올려두었으니 지금쯤이면 읽으셨을 거예요.
하운드 분들께서 오르실 무대도 작업해야 해서, 미리미리 손을 좀 봐야겠다 싶어, 개조를 우선적으로 진행했죠.
1600861016.english:
I uploaded the draft of the plan a few days ago, so you have probably read it by now.
 Since I also needed to work on the stage for the Hounds, I thought I should take care of it in advance, so I prioritized the renovations.

1600861017.english: So, you're saying they didn't get permission in the end...

1600861018.korean: 괜찮아요. 허락을 해주실 사령관님의 마음을 예측하고 행동한 빠른 판단이죠.
1600861018.english: It’s alright. It was a quick decision made by anticipating the Commander’s intention to grant permission.

1600861019.korean: …그래요, 뭐. 그럴 수 있긴 한데요… 왜 트리톤한테 메이드 파츠를 장착시킨 거죠?
1600861019.english: … Yeah, well. I suppose that’s possible… but why did they put maid parts on Triton?

1600861020.korean:
카페 호라이즌은 메이드 컨셉 카페 아닌가요? 
메이드 카페를 홍보하는 AGS도 당연히 메이드 코스튬을 장착해야죠.
1600861020.english:
Isn't Cafe Horizon a maid-themed cafe?
 Of course, the AGS promoting the maid cafe must also wear a maid costume.

1600861021.korean:
제가 특별히 포인트로 트리톤의 머리와 골반 쪽에 고양이 귀랑 꼬리를 달았는데, 괜찮죠?
많은 홍보가 될 수 있을 거예요.
1600861021.english:
I specially added cat ears and a tail to Triton's head and pelvis as a focal point. It looks good, right?
 It could be a great source of publicity.

1600861022.korean: 정말 될 수 있을 거라 생각해요?!
1600861022.english: Do you really think it's possible?!

1600861023.korean:
사령관이 요즘 AGS 쪽도 많이 신경 써주는 것 같아 좋군.
이봐 알프레드, 이번엔 트리톤 낭자가 아름다운 옷을 입고 홍보를 돕는 중이네.
1600861023.english:
It's good to see the Commander paying a lot of attention to the AGS side these days.
 Hey Alfred, this time Miss Triton is helping with the promotion wearing beautiful clothes.

1600861024.korean:
…트리톤 씨께 '낭자'… 라고요? 삿갓. 당신… 흐긴 아씨와 무닌 아씨한테 
포격당한 뒤로 AI 코어가 어떻게 됐습니까?
1600861024.english:
… You called Mr. Triton ‘Lady’…? Straw Hat. You… to the Black Lady and the Munin Lady
 What happened to the AI ​​core after it was bombarded?

1600861025.korean: 잠깐 알프레드. 하나 질문이 있는데… 어째서 넌 트리톤 개체를 남자로 정의하지?
1600861025.english: Wait, Alfred. I have a question... Why do you define Triton entities as male?

1600861026.korean: 그야… 당연히 남성 목소리를 가지셨으니 남자 AGS가 아닌가요.
1600861026.english: Well… since you have a male voice, aren't you a male AGS?

1600861027.korean:
내가 듣기론 트리톤 개체는 아직 AI 코어 쪽에서 확실히 자신의 성별을 인식하지 않고 있네.
굳이 생물학적으로 따진다면… '성 정체성'이 확립되지 않았다는 표현이 어울리겠군.
1600861027.english:
From what I hear, the Triton entity's AI core hasn't definitely recognized its own gender yet.
 If we were to be biologically precise… the expression that 'sexual identity' has not been established would be fitting.

1600861028.korean: 예? 정말 그렇게 흘러가는 게 맞습니까? 이거 좀 어지러운데요?
1600861028.english: Huh? Is it really going to go that way? This is a bit dizzying.

1600861029.korean:
트리톤도 제법 좋아하고 있는 것 같지 않나.
알프레드, AGS 대표이면서도 그렇게 이해를 하지 못하다니… 다음 선거 때 대체 어떡하려고 그러나?
1600861029.english:
It seems like Triton likes it quite a bit, too.
 Alfred, to think you don't understand that, even though you are the CEO of AGS... What on earth are you going to do in the next election?

1600861030.korean: 확실히… 아름답군. 트리톤, 역시 소문대로 멋진 AGS 로군 그래…
1600861030.english: Certainly… it’s beautiful. Triton, as expected, it’s a cool AGS just like the rumors say…

1600861031.korean: AGS 분들의 사고방식은 정말이지 어렵네요… 저희가 바이오로이드라서 그런 걸까요?
1600861031.english: The way the AGS members think is really difficult... Is it because we are bioroids?

1600861032.korean:
후훗… 트리톤의 AI에게 앞으로 어떤 학습을 하느냐에 따라 달라지지 않을까요?
후훗… 여러 생각이 떠오르네요. 트리톤이 성 정체성을 확립하게 된다면, 그에 맞는 방향으로 별도 개조를 시도 해보는 것도 좋겠네요.
1600861032.english:
Hehe... wouldn't it depend on what kind of learning Triton's AI undergoes in the future?
