 Hehe... various thoughts are coming to mind. If Triton establishes his gender identity, it might be a good idea to try modifying him in a way that suits it.

1600861033.korean: …지금 여기서 저 혼자만 못 따라가고 있는 건가요?
1600861033.english: … Am I the only one here who can't keep up?

1600861034.korean: 여어, 내 부하들이 뭘 하나 궁금해서 잠깐 시간 내 와봤더니만…
1600861034.english: Hey, I took a quick break to stop by because I was curious what my subordinates were up to, and...

1600861035.english: You're doing something pretty fun, aren't you?

1600862002.korean:
흥, 내가 여기에 오지 못할 이유라도 있나? 애송이 부함장…?
내 부하들이 이곳에 투입됐는데, 구경 차 올 수 있지. 안 그래?
1600862002.english:
Hmph, is there a reason I can't come here? You brat, First Officer...?
 My subordinates have been deployed here, so they might come over to take a look. Right?

1600862003.korean: 그나저나 용은 어딨지? 그 소문의 메이드복을 입은 모습을 내 눈으로 직접 보고 싶은데?
1600862003.english: Anyway, where is the dragon? I want to see it with my own eyes in that rumored maid outfit.

1600862004.english: I didn't expect you to come here.

1600862005.korean:
하하하하하하하하!!! 천하의 용이 이런 옷을 입고 바리스타를 할 줄이야!!!
나 참… 정말 오래 살다 보니 이런 일을 내 눈으로 다 보게 되는군.
1600862005.english:
Hahahahahahahaha!!! To think the mighty Dragon would wear clothes like this and work as a barista!!!
 Good heavens... I've really lived long enough to see something like this with my own eyes.

1600862006.english: If you came to mock me, please stop…

1600862007.english: Who said when did you laugh, Dragon?

1600862009.korean:
처음 멀린한테 네 얘기를 들었을 땐 어이가 없긴 했다만…
네가 나름 진지한 모습으로 맡은 임무를 임하고 있기에 비웃고 싶진 않아.
1600862009.english:
I was dumbfounded when I first heard your story from Merlin, but...
 I don't want to laugh at you because you are taking your assigned mission quite seriously.

1600862011.korean: 이봐 용. 난 남의 각오를 비웃을 정도로 한심한 여자는 아니라고?
1600862011.english: Hey, Yong. I'm not a pathetic woman who would laugh at someone else's resolve, okay?

1600862012.korean: 이런 모습의 용도 자꾸 보니 썩 괜찮은데?
1600862012.english: The more I look at this kind of dragon, the more I think it looks pretty good.

1600862014.english: Gamma, you really haven't changed at all...

1600862015.korean: 뭐… 이번 축제인가 뭔가 하는 건, 포세이돈 함대 재건과 관련된 용무 때문에 참여하긴 어렵겠지만…
1600862015.english: Well… as for this festival or whatever it is, it will be difficult for me to participate due to business related to the reconstruction of Poseidon’s fleet, but…

1600862016.korean: 만일 시간의 여유가 있었더라면... 나 역시도 꼭 참여했을 것이다.
1600862016.english: If I had had the time... I would definitely have participated as well.

1600862017.korean: 이봐 용. 이왕 이렇게 온 김에 커피 한 잔 주문할까 하는데. 가능하나?
1600862017.english: Hey, Yong. Since I'm already here, I was thinking of ordering a cup of coffee. Is that possible?

1600862018.korean: 금방 내오도록 하겠소. 아… 커피를 마시면서 담소를 나눌 정도의 시간은 괜찮소?
1600862018.english: I will bring it out right away. Ah... is it okay for us to chat over coffee?

1600862019.english: Sounds good. Shall we take a break for the first time in a while?

1600862021.korean:
후후, 좋아 좋아… 생각 이상으로 대장님도 나쁘지 않게 생각하고 계셔…
이대로 감마 대장님과 함께… 으흐흐흐…
1600862021.english:
Hehe, good, good... The Captain thinks it's pretty good, better than I thought...
 Just like this, together with Captain Gamma… Hehehe…

1600862022.korean: …저기, 멀린 씨 말이에요, 가면 갈수록 탈론페더 닮아가는 거 같지 않나요?
1600862022.english: … Hey, Mr. Merlin, don't you think you're starting to look more and more like Talonfeather?

1600862023.korean:
…동경의 방법은 여러가지니 신경 쓰진 마세요. 그나저나 테티스 씨,
가디언 분들도 같이 왔던데 교육은 잘 되가나요?
1600862023.english:
… There are many ways to yearn, so don't worry about it. By the way, Tethys,
 The Guardians came along as well; is the training going well?

1600862024.korean: …그게, 알키오네 씨는 아직 교육이 더 필요할 것 같긴 한데.
1600862024.english: … Well, it seems like Alcyone still needs more training.

1600862026.korean: 머랭 케이크 하나, 치즈 크레이프, 딸기 쿠키… 밀크쉐이크, 아메리카노 투 샷.
1600862026.english: One meringue cake, cheese crepe, strawberry cookies… milkshake, two shots of Americano.

1600862028.korean: 이 정도는 기본이죠. 그나저나… 로데, 손이 보이는데 멍하니 서 있을 거에요?!
1600862028.english: This much is just the basics. Anyway... Rode, I can see your hand, are you just going to stand there blankly?!

1600862030.korean: 우리 메로페 엄청 일 잘하네… 언니는 아직 하나도 모르겠는데…
1600862030.english: Our Merope is doing such a great job… I still don't know anything about it, though…

1600862031.korean: 당연히 잘 해야지!! 내가 겨우 멀린 따위한테 뒤쳐질 것 같아?!
1600862031.english: Of course I have to do well!! Do you think I would fall behind someone like Merlin?!

1600862032.korean: 잘 봐! 그리고 이건 내가 운디네한테 배운 신 기술이야!!
1600862032.english: Watch closely! And this is a new technique I learned from Undine!!

1600862033.korean: 세상에… 네리랑 내가 엄청나게 버벅거렸던 걸 저렇게 단숨에?!
1600862033.english: Oh my god… Neri and I fumbled so much over that, and they did it in one go like that?!

1600862036.korean:
좋아, 우리도 뒤쳐질 순 없죠. 테티스, 우리도 힘내보자고요!!
사령관님께서 시찰하러 오실 때, 원조인 우리가 버벅거릴 순 없어요.
1600862036.english:
Alright, we can't fall behind. Tethys, let's give it our all!!
 We, as the aid workers, cannot stumble when the Commander comes for an inspection.

1600862037.korean: 간만에 부함장님 기합이 엄청 들어가셨네요? 좋아요, 그렇다면 우리도 힘 좀 내볼까요?!
1600862037.english: Vice Commander, you're really fired up for the first time in a while? Alright, then shall we give it our all too?!

1600862038.korean:
안 그래도 바이오로이드 기지에 계신 분들이 
카페 호라이즌 분점을 내고 싶다고 하던데, 시범 겸 홍보를 빡세게 보여줘야겠어요!!
1600862038.english:
As it is, the people at the bioroid base
 I heard they want to open a Cafe Horizon branch, so I'm going to have to really push the promotion as a test run!!

1600862039.english: Yes, let's do our best until the festival!!

1600837001.english: Commander... came wearing a hot swimsuit.

1600837002.korean: 주공, 카엔 봐줘. 어머니한테 배운 쿠노이치 밤기술.
1600837002.english: Lord, spare Kaen. The kunoichi night technique I learned from my mother.

1600837003.korean:
- 여름이 돌아올 때마다 많은 대원들이 내게 어필하고자
기상천외한 의상을 입고 오는 것도 이젠 어느 정도 적응됐다 생각했는데...
1600837003.english:
- Every time summer comes around, many members try to appeal to me
 I thought I had gotten somewhat used to them coming in such outrageous outfits...

1600837005.english: Yeah, of course. How about it?

1600837006.korean:
- 가끔 이 아이들이 찾아올 때마다 어떻게 에둘러 돌려보내야 할지 난감할 때가 있다.
특히나, 네오딤은 브라우니한테 코칭을 받은 뒤론… 두렵기까지 하다.
1600837006.english:
- Sometimes, whenever these children come to visit, I find myself at a loss as to how to indirectly send them away.
 In particular, ever since Neodim received coaching from Brownie… he is even afraid.

1600837008.korean: 오늘 밤, 당신의 팬티를 훔쳐가겠습니다. 범죄 예고장, 괴도 N.
1600837008.english: Tonight, I will steal your panties. Crime Notice, Phantom Thief N.

1600837009.korean: 응. 사령관. 오늘 밤에는 우리랑 같이 놀자.
1600837009.english: Yeah. Commander. Let's hang out tonight.

1600837011.korean:
- 시간을 내서라도 꼭 올바른 성교육을 가르쳐 주겠노라 마음을 먹었건만,
내 시야가 닿지 않는 이상한 곳에서 배워오는 경우가 많다보니, 날이 갈수록 난감한 상황만 많아지고 있다.
1600837011.english:
I had made up my mind to make time for proper sex education, but,
 Since I often learn things from strange places out of my sight, I find myself in increasingly awkward situations day by day.

1600837012.korean: - 이럴 땐 역시, 그녀들의 정서에 딱 맞는 유흥거리를 추천해 주는 것이야말로 참된 사령관의 의무가 아닐까…?
1600837012.english: In times like this, wouldn't it be the true duty of a commander to recommend entertainment that perfectly suits their sensibilities...?

1600837013.english: … I heard it from the Arsenal captain. They say in the summer, you fight fire with fire.

1600837014.korean: 이열치열. 카엔, 그 뜻 알아. 뜨거울 땐 더 뜨겁게.
1600837014.english: Fight fire with fire. Kaen, I know what that means. When it's hot, make it even hotter.

1600837015.korean: 서로 몸을 맞대면 더 뜨거워져. 사령관의 열기까지 괴도 N이 훔쳐 갈 거야.
1600837015.english: It gets hotter when we press our bodies together. Phantom Thief N is going to steal even the Commander's heat.

1600837016.korean: 응. 맞아. 이열치열, 사령관. 우리 잔뜩 이열치열하자.
1600837016.english: Yeah. That's right. Fight fire with fire, Commander. Let's fight fire with fire to the fullest.

1600837017.korean: - ...나중에 꼭 이 세 명이 자주 어울리는 사람들에 대한 면담을 대대적으로 실시해야 할 것만 같다.
1600837017.english: - ...It seems we will definitely have to conduct extensive interviews later on the people these three frequently hang out with.

1600837018.korean: 이열치열 여름축제? ...역시 사령관은 나랑 땀 흘리고 싶은 거지?
1600837018.english: A "fight fire with fire" summer festival? ...As expected, Commander, you just want to sweat it out with me, right?

1600837019.korean: 주공, 카엔 잘해. 물 나오는 거 보여줄게.
1600837019.english: Lord, do well, Kaen. I'll show you the water coming out.

1600837020.english: Commander... let's make lots of water balloons together.

1600837021.korean:
- 감정에 미숙한 아이들에게는 이왕이면 교육적인 면에서도 자극이 될 수 있는 걸 챙겨주고 싶은 게 내 진짜 마음인데…
벌써부터 안 좋은 것들을 답습하는 건 앞으로 이 아이들의 정신건강에도 해악이 될 것이다.
1600837021.english:
My true desire is to provide emotionally immature children with things that can also serve as educational stimulation...
 Repeating bad habits from such an early age will be detrimental to these children's mental health in the future.

1600837022.korean: 그러고보니 사령관. 토모가 그랬는데 멸망 전, 여름에는 학교에서 축제라는 걸 했대.
1600837022.english: Come to think of it, Commander. Tomo said that before the apocalypse, schools used to hold festivals in the summer.

1600837023.korean: 응. 부원…이 정확히 뭔지 모르겠는데, 부원들이 모여서 공연도 하고… 맛있는 걸 먹으면서 실컷 놀았대. 아르망이 잘 설명해줬어.
1600837023.english: Yeah. I'm not exactly sure what "club members" means, but they said the members got together, put on a performance, and had a blast eating delicious food. Armand explained it well.

1600837024.korean:
- 에밀리와 네오딤의 말에 정기 회의 중 아이들을 가르치던 알렉산드라가 주었던 제안이 떠올랐다.
청소년의 정서를 가진 대원들이 함께 즐길 수 있는 축제를 한 번 개최해 보자는 의견이었다.
1600837024.english:
Emily and Neodim's words reminded me of the suggestion Alexandra had given me while teaching the children during the regular meeting.
 The suggestion was to hold a festival that members with the sensibilities of youth could enjoy together.

1600837025.korean: - 말이 나온 김에 이번 축제 컨셉으로 어린 대원들 모두가 즐길 수 있는 행사를 함께 준비하고 개최해 보는 건 어떨까?
1600837025.english: Speaking of which, how about we prepare and host an event together for this festival concept that all the young members can enjoy?

1600837026.english: I didn't know Alexandra would be here, too.

1600837027.korean: 호오… 그 옷을 입은 모습은 오랜만에 보는군요, 아르망 양.
1600837027.english: Hoho... It's been a while since I've seen you in that outfit, Miss Armand.

1600837028.korean:
폐하께서 말씀하시는 축제를 보다 자세히 설명하기 위해 오늘과 같은 복장으로 오게 되었습니다.
알렉산드라 님께서도 축제에 대해선 잘 아시겠지요?
1600837028.english:
I have come dressed like this today to explain the festival Your Majesty speaks of in more detail.
 Alexandra, you must be well aware of festivals, right?

1600837029.korean: - 그래, 학생들이 즐겼던 축제라면 오르카 대원들도 즐겁게 즐길 것이다.
1600837029.english: - Yes, if the students enjoyed the festival, the Orca members will enjoy it too.

1600837030.korean:
후후, 청춘의 피날레라고 할 수 있죠.
학교 후문 등나무 아래서 기다리는 수줍은 소녀의 두근거리는 마음이라던가…
1600837030.english:
Haha, you could call it the finale of youth.
 Like the pounding heart of a shy girl waiting under the wisteria at the school's back gate...

1600837031.korean: 잘 알고 계시군요. 성인이신 분들께서도 동심으로 돌아가 즐길 수 있는 건전한 문화라고 할 수 있죠.
1600837031.english: You are well aware of this. It can be described as a wholesome culture where even adults can return to their childlike innocence and enjoy themselves.

1600837032.korean:
네, 폐하. 학교 축제란 말 그대로 취미나 취향의 결이 비슷한 학생들이 모여 만들어진 부서에서
활동 기간 동안의 결과물이나 갈고닦은 재능과 끼를 외부에 선보이며 성장의 결실을 맺는 행사입니다.
1600837032.english:
Yes, Your Majesty. A school festival, as the name suggests, is a department formed by students with similar hobbies or tastes.
 It is an event where participants showcase the results of their activities or their honed talents and skills to the outside world, reaping the fruits of their growth.

1600837033.korean: - 문득 생각해 보면 오르카에도 많은 대원들이 자유로이 부 활동을 하며 자기 계발에 힘쓰고 있다.
1600837033.english: Come to think of it, many members of Orca are also freely engaging in club activities and striving for self-development.

1600837034.korean: 설마 SM클럽을 이번 학교 축제에서 홍보하시려는 생각은 아니시겠죠?
1600837034.english: You aren't planning to promote the SM Club at this school festival, are you?

1600837035.korean: 오르카에는 생각보다 부 활동이라고 할 만한 대원들의 활동이 그리 많진 않습니다 폐하.
1600837035.english: Your Majesty, there aren't as many activities in Orca that could be called club activities as you might expect.

1600837036.korean: 축제를 열기 전, 부 활동을 장려하기 위해서라도 미리 동아리 개설 신청서를 받아보시는 건 어떻습니까?
1600837036.english: How about accepting club creation applications in advance before the festival to encourage extracurricular activities?

1600837037.korean:
네, 알겠습니다. 학교 축제라는 컨셉에 맞게 
알렉산드라 님과 제가 들어오는 신청서를 먼저 추려낸 후, 폐하께 보고드리겠습니다.
1600837037.english:
Yes, I understand. In line with the concept of a school festival.
 Lady Alexandra and I will first review the incoming applications and then report to His Majesty.

1600837038.korean:
- 오르카에 건전한 문화가 가득할 수 있는 방법에 대해 최근 여러 고민을 하고 있었던 만큼,
성인임에도 아직은 미성숙하거나, 어린 아이들까지 모두 즐길 수 있는 축제가 되길 바란다.
1600837038.english:
As I have recently been giving a lot of thought to ways to fill Orca with a healthy culture,
 I hope this becomes a festival that everyone can enjoy, from adults who are still immature to young children.

1600837039.korean: 야, 요즘 새로운 부활동 신청서 때문에 애들 난리던데, 우리도 뭐 하나 만들어볼까?
1600837039.english: Hey, kids are going crazy these days because of the new club activity application forms. Should we make one too?

1600837040.korean: 새로운 부활동? 우리 카페 알바하고 있잖아.
1600837040.english: A new club activity? We're working part-time at a cafe, you know.

1600837041.korean: 그건 너랑 나랑, 바르그 셋이서 하고 있잖아. 배터리까지 껴서 동아리 같은 거 새로 만들어보고 싶긴 한데.
1600837041.english: You, me, and Varg are already doing that, the three of us. I do want to try starting a new club or something, even adding batteries, though.

1600837043.korean: 막상 설명하려니까 좀 어렵네. 취미 활동? 비슷한 거라고 하면 되려나...
1600837043.english: It's a bit hard to explain now that I'm actually trying to. A hobby? I guess I could say something like that...

1600837044.korean: 아 왜~ 그, 오르카 미식회처럼 정기적으로 다 같이 시간을 갖고 뭔가 하는 활동이라고 핫팩이 설명하더라.
1600837044.english: Ah, why~ Hotpack explained that it's an activity where we all regularly spend time together and do something, like the Orca Gourmet Club.

1600837045.korean: 네가 이렇게까지 친절하게 설명하는 거 보면 이미 하고 싶은 거 다 정해둔 거 맞지? 말을 해. 뜸 들이지 말고.
1600837045.english: Seeing how kindly you're explaining this, you've already decided exactly what you want to do, right? Just say it. Don't beat around the bush.

1600837046.korean:
우리 안 그래도 노래방 자주 가잖아. 음악이랑 관련된 동아리를 만들어 볼까 하고 말이야.
이를테면, 밴드라던가… 어떻게 생각해 다들?
1600837046.english:
We go to karaoke often anyway. I was thinking of starting a music-related club.
 For example, a band... what do you all think?

1600837048.korean: 밴드 음악이라면… 북 같은 거 치고 막 기타 같은 거 치는 그런 거지?
1600837048.english: If you mean band music… it’s the kind where they hit things like drums and guitars, right?

1600837049.korean: 오~ 잘 아네. 자~ 그럼 설명은 스킵하고 내가 좋아하는 음반을 만든 밴드 영상 가져왔는데, 우리도 이런 거 해보자!
1600837049.english: Oh, you know a thing or two. Alright then, let's skip the explanation. I brought a video of a band that made an album I like, so let's try doing something like this!

1600837050.english: What...? Why is this song so loud?

1600837051.korean: 우와. 이거 뭐야. 이 사람은 좀 멋있어 보이는데?
1600837051.english: Wow. What is this? This person looks kind of cool.

1600837052.korean:
끌리지? 어때? 아르망이 그러는데… 옛날 학교란 곳에선 밴드부? 라는 동아리가 제일 잘나갔대.
전에 스카이 나이츠 애들이 아이돌 했던 것처럼, 우리도 무대에서 이런 거 해보면 좋을 거 같아서.
1600837052.english:
Intrigued? What do you think? Armand says... back in the day at school, the band club was the most popular.
 Just like the Sky Knights did as idols before, I thought it would be nice for us to try something like this on stage.

1600837053.english: Are you good at playing musical instruments?

1600837054.korean:
음… 제대로 해본 적은 없어. 이런 장르 노래를 많이 듣고 흥얼거려봤다, 이 정도?
뮤즈나 에라토같은 프로들한테 제대로 코칭 받으면 되지 않을까?
1600837054.english:
Hmm... I've never really tried it properly. I've listened to a lot of songs in this genre and hummed along, that's about it?
 Wouldn't it be better to get proper coaching from pros like Muse or Erato?

1600837055.korean: 나도! 나도 이런 멋진 거 하고 싶어!
1600837055.english: Me too! I want to do something cool like this, too!

1600837056.korean:
야, 바보니르. 악기 다루면서 노래 부르는 게 어디 말처럼 쉬운 건 줄 알아?
그리고 너희 악보는 볼 줄 알면서 그런 말 하는 거냐?
1600837056.english:
Hey, Babonir. Do you think singing while playing an instrument is as easy as it sounds?
 And are you saying that when you actually know how to read sheet music?

1600837057.korean: 그치만 핫팩한테 이런 거 딱 보여주면 엄청 좋아하지 않겠어?
1600837057.english: But wouldn't Hot Pack love it if you showed him something like this?

1600837059.korean: 야, 핫팩이 헤벌쭉하면서 응원봉 흔드는 거 진짜 안 보고 싶어?
1600837059.english: Hey, don't you really want to see Hot Pack grinning widely while waving the light stick?

1600837060.korean: 취지는 좋은 것 같지만, 문제는 시간이지 않나? 듣기론 몇 개월 후 바로 축제가 열릴 거라 하던데?
1600837060.english: The intention seems good, but isn't the problem the timing? I heard the festival is going to be held in just a few months.

1600837061.korean: 핫팩한테 프로듀싱 맡아달라고 하면 되잖아, 스카이나이츠 애들한테도 훌륭하게 해줬다는데?
1600837061.english: You can just ask Hotpack to handle the producing. I heard he did a fantastic job with the Sky Knights too.

1600837064.korean: 오, 바르그? 너 지금 꼬리 엄청 살랑거린다.
1600837064.english: Oh, Varg? You're wagging your tail like crazy right now.

1600837065.korean: 으흠… 흐음! 좋다. 나쁘지 않은 생각이군… 천아, 그렇다면 우리는 밴드에서 무얼 하면 되지?
1600837065.english: Hmm... Hmm! Good. Not a bad idea... Cheon-ah, then what should we do in the band?

1600837066.korean:
말 그대로, 밴드 부원들 모두가 하나의 노래를 연주하는 거지.
한 명은 드럼을, 한 명은 기타를… 그리고 한 명은 신디사이저랑… 아, 참고로 밴드는 단합이 제일 중요 하단 거 알고 있겠지?
1600837066.english:
Literally, all the band members play one song.
 One plays the drums, one plays the guitar… and one plays the synthesizer… Oh, by the way, you know that teamwork is the most important thing in a band, right?

1600837069.korean:
여태껏 단합이란 걸 해본 적이 없는 우리 네 명이 
각기 다른 악기를 가지고 하나의 노래라도 제대로 완주할 수 있을 거라 생각하나?
1600837069.english:
The four of us who have never united before
 Do you think you can properly finish playing even a single song with different instruments?

1600837070.korean: …하다 못해, 내가 너희랑 카페 알바를 할 때는 멀린의 특훈이 있었는데.
1600837070.english: …At the very least, when I was working part-time at the cafe with you guys, there was Merlin's special training.

1600837072.english: Me? Why me all of a sudden?

1600837074.korean: 뭐, 뭐야! 그 이상한 눈빛은! 나 악기 다룰 줄 알아!
1600837074.english: What, what is that! That weird look! I know how to play a musical instrument!

1600837076.korean: 무시하지 마! 나, 나! 악기 다룰 줄 아는 거 많아! 트라이앵글이랑, 캐스터네츠랑, 리코더도 조금…
1600837076.english: Don't underestimate me! Me, me! I know how to play a lot of instruments! The triangle, the castanets, and a little bit of the recorder too…

1600837077.korean: LRL한테 많이 배웠다고! 나 바보 취급 하지 마!
1600837077.english: I learned a lot from LRL! Don't treat me like an idiot!

1600837079.korean: 장화, 넌 악기 같은 걸 연습해본 적 있나?
1600837079.english: Janghwa, have you ever practiced a musical instrument?

1600837082.korean: 아이씨! 어떻게든 뭐 죽어라 연습하면 될 거 아냐! 뭐 이렇게 비관적으로 생각해?
1600837082.english: Damn it! I can just practice like crazy and it'll work! Why are you being so pessimistic?

1600837083.korean: 그렇다면 하나만 더 묻지. 그 밴드란 활동도 대장 같이 이끄는 직책이 있을 텐데... 누가하지?
1600837083.english: In that case, let me ask one more thing. That band activity must have a leader-like position... Who does it?

1600837086.korean: 야, 나 악기 다룰 줄 안다니까?! 나 무시하지 마!
1600837086.english: Hey, I'm telling you I know how to play a musical instrument! Don't underestimate me!

1600837087.korean: 내가 먼저 말을 꺼냈으니까 리더는 당연히 나지! 너네들 너무한 거 아냐?!
1600837087.english: I spoke first, so of course I'm the leader! Aren't you guys being too much?!

1600837088.korean: 네가 뭔데 리더를 한다는 거야? 야, 가위바위보로 정해. 난 인정 못해.
1600837088.english: Who do you think you are to be the leader? Hey, let's decide with rock-paper-scissors. I don't accept that.

1600837089.korean: 이이이이이익…!!!! 야 너네 둘! 나 무시하지 말라고! 나… 나 바보 아냐!
1600837089.english: Eeeeeek…!!!! Hey you two! Don't ignore me! I… I'm not an idiot!

1600838001.korean: - 다가올 축제 중 다양한 부스와 공연을 확보하기 위해 부활동을 장려한다는 말에 대원들은 수많은 동아리 개설 신청서를 제출했다.
1600838001.english: Upon hearing that extracurricular activities were being encouraged to secure various booths and performances for the upcoming festival, the members submitted numerous applications to open clubs.

1600838002.korean: 사령관님, 정말 이번에 연극부도 만드신단 말씀이십니까?
1600838002.english: Commander, are you really saying that you are forming a drama club this time as well?

1600838003.korean: 후훗, 학교 축제의 꽃은 다름 아닌 연극! 특히나 오르카에는 출중한 덴세츠의 배우님들이 계시니만큼, 연극부 개설은 지당하신 선택이십니다!
1600838003.english: Hehe, the highlight of the school festival is none other than the play! Especially since Orca has the outstanding actors from Densetsu, establishing a drama club is the right choice!

1600838004.korean: 이왕 이렇게 된 거 덴세츠 특촬물 연구부의 허가까지 내주신다면…!
1600838004.english: Since things have turned out this way, if you could even grant permission from the Densetsu Tokusatsu Research Club…!

1600838005.english: What? Which question are you referring to?

1600838006.korean:
- 아니나 다를까, 연극부를 개설한다는 말에 골타리온과 진조의 공주님께서 
서로 부장 자리를 맡으시겠다 신경전을 벌이고 있는 상황이었다.
1600838006.english:
Sure enough, upon hearing that a drama club was being established, Goltarion and the Princess of the True Ancestors
 They were engaged in a war of nerves over who would take the department head position.

1600838007.korean:
그건… 으음… 아무래도 저의 팬심으로는 덴세츠 대원 분이 부장을 맡아주시면 좋겠지만…
비스마르크 분들도 《드레곤 슬레이어》로 무시할 수 없는 명성을 얻으셨으니…
1600838007.english:
Well… hmm… personally, as a fan, I would love for Member Densetsu to take on the role of Vice-Captain, but…
 Even the Bismarcks gained undeniable fame with *Dragon Slayer*, so...

1600838008.korean: …그, 그래도 역시 부장의 자리란 연기력 못지않게 모두를 이끌 수 있는 리더십의 여부가 우선이지 않겠습니까? 모모 씨라면 분명… 헤헤…
1600838008.english: … B-but still, for the position of department head, wouldn't the ability to lead everyone be the priority, just as much as acting skills? If it's Momo-san, surely… Hehe…

1600838009.korean:
비스마르크 분들께서도 충분히 연극부를 이끄실 리더의 자격이 있으시죠.
저는 비스마르크 분들도 충분히 잘 해내실 거라 믿습니다.
1600838009.english:
Mr. Bismarck and his associates are also fully qualified to be leaders of the drama club.
 I believe that the Bismarcks will also do a sufficiently good job.

1600838010.korean:
- 아르망 덕분에 무리 없이 일처리를 이어나가던 중,
별안간 한 동아리 신청서가 내 눈에 띄었다.
1600838010.english:
While I was continuing to handle work without any trouble thanks to Armand,
 Suddenly, a club application caught my eye.

1600838011.korean: - 밴드를 동경했던 마음을 너스레 털어놓던 천아의 모습이 떠오른다.
1600838011.english: I recall Cheon-ah jokingly confessing her longing for a band.

1600838012.korean: 밴드부군요. 학교 축제에선 빼놓을 수 없는 하이라이트라 할 수 있죠.
1600838012.english: It's the band club. It's an indispensable highlight of the school festival.

1600838013.korean: 연극이 축제의 개막이라면 밴드는 폐막으로써 잊지 못할 감동으로 클라이맥스를 이끄는 쌍두마차라고 볼 수 있습니다.
1600838013.english: If the play is the opening of the festival, the band can be seen as the driving force leading the climax with an unforgettable emotional impact as the closing act.

1600838014.korean:
- 문득 흐레스벨그를 비롯한 스카이 나이츠 대원들이 
화려한 무대를 펼쳤던 추억이 떠올라 나도 모르게 입가에 미소가 번졌다.
1600838014.english:
- Suddenly, Hresvelgr and the other Sky Knights members
 Memories of performing on a spectacular stage came to mind, and a smile spread across my lips without me realizing it.

1600838015.korean: - 흐레스벨그와 하르페이아, 그리고 슬레이프니르가 주축이 된 밴드가 있었지…
1600838015.english: There was a band led by Hresvelgr, Harpeia, and Sleipnir…

1600838016.korean: 그때, 단 세명이서 호흡을 맞췄었는데도 꽤 힘들었죠. 그나저나... 이번엔 하운드 분들께서 밴드부를 결성하여 공연을 하신다고요?
1600838016.english: Back then, even though there were only three of us, it was quite tough. Anyway... I hear the Hounds are forming a band and putting on a performance this time?

1600838017.korean: 하운드 분들의 열의를 폄훼하고 싶은 건 아닙니다만, 무엇보다 협동이 중요한 활동이 바로 밴드입니다.
1600838017.english: I do not mean to belittle the enthusiasm of the Hound members, but a band is an activity where cooperation is paramount above all else.

1600838018.korean: - 나는 동아리 신청서 속, 등록하는 부원들의 이름을 훑곤 고개를 내저었다.
1600838018.english: I scanned the names of the members registering in the club application form and shook my head.

1600838019.korean: 여제라면… 그 바이오로이드를 말하는 것이겠지요 폐하?
1600838019.english: If you mean the Empress… you must be referring to that bioroid, Your Majesty?

1600838020.korean:
- 나는 고개를 끄덕였다. 물론 하운드 멤버들이야 싫은 게 당연하겠지만…
오르카에 온 뒤로 홀로 의기소침하게 다니는 여제의 모습에서 왠지 모를 쓸쓸함이 보이기도 했다.
1600838020.english:
I nodded. Of course, it’s only natural that the Hound members would dislike it, but…
 Since arriving in Orca, the Empress had been walking around alone and dejected, and there was a certain loneliness to be seen in her.

1600838021.korean: 폐하께선 그 여제라는 바이오로이드도 함께 밴드에 참여하는 모습을 보고 싶으시겠지요?
1600838021.english: Your Majesty would surely want to see that bio-android known as the Empress join the band as well, wouldn't you?

1600838022.korean:
하지만… 가뜩이나 하운드 대원들 모두가 오르카 대원들 그 누구보다 그 분을 가장 싫어하는 것 같던데...
단합이 중요한 밴드에 과연 올바른 판단일까요?
1600838022.english:
But... as if the Hound members already hated him more than any of the Orca members...
 Is this really the right decision for a band where unity is important?

1600838023.korean: - 단 한 사람이라도 소외되는 일 없이 모두 함께 축제를 즐기는 게 내 소망이다.
1600838023.english: My wish is for everyone to enjoy the festival together without a single person being left out.

1600838024.korean: - 나는 잠시 회의를 중단하고, 하운드 대원들에게 내 의견과 축제의 목적을 전달해 보기로 했다.
1600838024.english: I decided to pause the meeting for a moment and convey my opinion and the purpose of the festival to the Hound members.

1600838025.korean: 야이씨. 가슴도 나보다 작은 게, 속옷 다 마르면 재깍재깍 좀 걷어라?
1600838025.english: Damn it. Your breasts are smaller than mine, so roll up your underwear as soon as it dries!

1600838026.korean: 지랄. 이거 내 거 아니거든? 사이즈 보면 모르냐? 딱 봐도 똥강아지 거잖아.
1600838026.english: Fuck off. This isn't mine, okay? Can't you tell by the size? It's obviously your little punk's.

1600838027.korean: 그럼 이건? 네 팬티 맞지? 야, 빨리 가져가.
1600838027.english: Then what about this? It's your panties, right? Hey, take it quickly.

1600838028.korean: 아~ 그건 버리려고 했던 거라 필요 없어. 잠깐 나와 봐. 쓰레기통으로… 슛!
1600838028.english: Ah, I was going to throw that away anyway, so I don't need it. Come out for a moment. Into the trash can… Shoot!

1600838029.korean: - ...하운드 생활관 문을 열자, 무언가 이상한 것이 내 얼굴을 덮쳤다.
1600838029.english: - ...As I opened the door to the Hound barracks, something strange covered my face.

1600838032.korean: - 천아는 후다닥 달려와 내 얼굴에 얹어진 속옷을 집어 쓰레기통 속으로 내던졌다.
1600838032.english: Cheona rushed over, picked up the underwear placed on my face, and threw it into the trash can.

1600838034.korean: - 나는 천아와 장화의 눈높이에 맞게 의자에 고쳐 앉아 말을 이었다.
1600838034.english: I adjusted my seat to match Cheona and Janghwa's eye level and continued speaking.

1600838035.korean: - 나는 가져온 동아리 신청서를 둘에게 내밀었다.
1600838035.english: I handed the club application form I had brought to the two of them.

1600838036.korean: 설마… 그 짭 여제 말하는 거냐 너?
1600838036.english: No way… are you talking about that fake Empress?

1600838037.english: … Wait, are you telling us to form a band with that kid?

1600838038.korean: 스카이 나이츠 애들은 그냥 도와줬잖아! 왜 우리한테만 그런 말도 안 되는 조건을 붙이는 거야!
1600838038.english: The Sky Knights just helped us out! Why are you attaching such ridiculous conditions only to us!

1600838039.korean: - 나의 제안이 껄끄러운 첫 대면을 한 하운드에게는 유치하고 난폭하게 느껴질 수 있겠지만, 이번 기회를 잘 살려보고자 하는 마음에 억지를 부리게 됐다.
1600838039.english: My suggestion might seem childish and violent to Hound, with whom I had an awkward first meeting, but I ended up being unreasonable because I wanted to make the most of this opportunity.

1600838040.korean: 하! 웃기지도 않아... 우리가 미쳤다고 우릴 죽이려 했던 그 사이코 년이랑 같이 밴드를 하겠어?
1600838040.english: Ha! It's not even funny... Do you think we're crazy enough to be in a band with that psycho bitch who tried to kill us?

1600838041.korean: 그년도 분명히 우리 같은 것들이랑은 격이 다르다느니 뭐니, 어쩌구 저쩌구 지랄할 거 뻔한데?
1600838041.english: It's obvious she's going to whine about how she's on a completely different level from people like us, and all that bullshit.

1600838042.korean: …뭐야 너. 왜 이렇게까지 그 애한테 집착하는 거야?
1600838042.english: … What's wrong with you? Why are you so obsessed with that kid?

1600838043.korean: - 물론 반발이 클 것이라고 예상했지만, 그렇다고 해서 오르카 모두가 여제를 따돌리는 상황을 보고만 있을 순 없었다.
1600838043.english: Of course, we expected a strong backlash, but that didn't mean we could just sit by and watch the entire Orca sideline the Empress.

1600838047.korean: …하, 진짜. 그런 눈으로 부탁한다고 우리가 들어줄 것 같아?!
1600838047.english: … Ha, seriously. Do you think we’ll grant your request just because you look at us like that?!

1600838048.english: … I really hate hot packs to death.

1600838049.korean:
- 결국 내 부탁을 들어주기로 결정한 건지, 천아와 장화는 떨떠름하게 고개를 끄덕였다.
명령으로 목숨을 위협했던 그녀에게 적이 아닌 동료라는 이름표를 건네보자는 나의 부탁은 엠프레시스 대원들에게 분명 실망으로 다가왔을 것이다.
1600838049.english:
Cheona and Janghwa nodded reluctantly, as if they had finally decided to grant my request.
 My request to give the label of "comrade" rather than "enemy" to the woman whose life had been threatened by orders must have come as a disappointment to the Empressis members.

1600838050.korean:
- 하지만 축제라는 오르카의 몇 없는 이벤트를 제대로 활용할 수 있다면... 여제도 생각이 바뀌고,
모두가 즐거운 추억을 쌓으며 진정한 부대로 성장할 수 있는 좋은 계기가 될 수도 있을 것이다.
1600838050.english:
However, if we can properly utilize the Festival, one of Orca's few events... even the Empress might change her mind, and
 It could be a good opportunity for everyone to build enjoyable memories and grow into a true unit.

1600838051.korean: …여긴가? 아니, 여긴 식당이잖아?! 아니 대체 사령관실은 어디 있는 거야?!
1600838051.english: … Is this it? No, this is the cafeteria?! Wait, where on earth is the Commander's Office?!

1600838052.korean: 실례지만 누구시지요? 지금은 식사 시간이 아닙니다. 저녁 때 다시 오십시오.
1600838052.english: Excuse me, but who are you? It is not mealtime right now. Please come back in the evening.

1600838053.korean:
누가 밥 먹고 싶어서 온 줄 알아? 마침 잘 됐구나. 
이봐, 해파리 너! 사령관실로 나를 안내하거라. 뭐 이리 복잡한지… 명령이야!
1600838053.english:
Do you think I came here because I wanted to eat? It’s perfect timing.
 Hey, you jellyfish! Guide me to the commander's office. What is all this fuss about... It's an order!

1600838054.korean: 주인님 집무실은 이 곳과 정 반대인 곳입니다만…
1600838054.english: Master's office is on the exact opposite side from here, but...

1600838055.korean: 당신… 엠프레시스 하운드를 통솔할 거라며 난리를 쳤다던, 자칭 '마리아 리오보로스'입니까?
1600838055.english: Are you… the self-proclaimed 'Maria Rioboros' who caused such a fuss claiming she would lead the Empressis Hound?

1600838057.english: Hmph, then what are you planning to do?

1600838058.korean:
…만일 합류하기 전, 저를 만나셨다면 입도 뻥긋 하기도 전에 손톱을 찔러 넣었겠지요.
리오보로스 가문에 의해 우리 호텔이 반파되고, 제 어머니와도 같은 분이 억울하게 돌아가셨거든요.
1600838058.english:
… If you had met me before joining, you would have stabbed me with your fingernails before I could even open my mouth.
 Our hotel was half-destroyed by the Rioboros family, and someone who was like a mother to me passed away unjustly.

1600838060.korean: 그래서... 뭐 어쩌란 거지? 내가 사과라도 해야 하는 거야?!
1600838060.english: So... what am I supposed to do about it? Do I have to apologize or something?!

1600838061.korean:
그러실 이유는 없습니다. 지난 일은 대장인 바르그 님께 사과를 받았거든요.
…그리고, 당신에게 무슨 일이 있어도 화를 내지 말아달라, 부탁 또한 받았습니다.
1600838061.english:
There is no reason for you to do so. I received an apology from the Captain, Barg, regarding the past.
 … And, I was also asked not to get angry at you no matter what happens.

1600838062.korean: 내가 하운드 지휘관이라고! 명령권은 나한테 있으니까 엠프레시스 하운드의 진정한 대장은 바로…
1600838062.english: I'm the Hound Commander! The authority is mine, so the true leader of the Empress Hound is…

1600838063.korean: …명령권이 있다고 해서 대장은 아닙니다. 적어도 대장이라 하면 그 품격이 있어야 하는 법이죠.
1600838063.english: ... Just because you have the authority to issue orders does not make you a commander. At the very least, a commander is supposed to possess a certain dignity.

1600838064.korean: 하, 웃기고 앉았네… 너나 그 바르그나 꼴값 떨긴.
1600838064.english: Ha, what a joke... You and that Varg are both putting on airs.

1600838065.korean:
당신의 모습을 옆에서 지켜보는 입장으로써... 안타깝기 그지없군요…
하여튼 사담이 길어졌습니다. 자, 명령은 됐고 저를 따라오시지요.
1600838065.english:
As someone watching you from the sidelines... it is incredibly unfortunate...
 Anyway, I’ve rambled on a bit. Now, never mind the orders. Follow me.

1600838066.korean: 무슨 일로 자꾸 오라가라 불러대고 난리야?! 이럴 거면 하다 못해 지도라도 달란 말이야!
1600838066.english: What is all this fuss about, constantly calling me back and forth?! If you're going to act like this, at least give me a map!

1600838067.korean: - ...분명 만날 때마다 확실하게 가르쳐 주는데 어째서 매번 길을 잘못 드는 건지 이유를 알 수 없다.
1600838067.english: - ...I clearly teach them every time we meet, but I can't understand why they take the wrong path every time.

1600838070.korean: 흥, 사설은 됐어. 본론부터 말해. 왜 이 몸을 부른 건지!
1600838070.english: Hmph, enough of the chatter. Get straight to the point. Why did you summon me?!

1600838072.english: Haa... A band? It’s not like it’s some silly childish game.

1600838073.korean: …가만있어 봐. 날 인정조차 하지 않는 그 천박한 애들이랑 같이 광대 흉내라도 내란 소리야?!
1600838073.english: … Wait a minute. Are you telling me to act like a clown with those vulgar kids who won't even acknowledge me?!

1600838074.korean: 애당초 그 싹바가지 없는 년들이 이 몸과는 하기 싫다며 욕을 한 바가지로 쏟아 낼 게 뻔한데…
1600838074.english: It was obvious from the start that those ill-mannered bitches were going to pour out a bucketful of curses, saying they didn't want to do it with me...

1600838076.korean: - 여제는 자기 귀를 의심하듯 눈을 동그랗게 떴다.
1600838076.english: The Empress opened her eyes wide as if she could not believe her ears.

1600839003.korean: - 어이가 없다는 듯 깔깔거리던 여제는 나를 맹렬히 쏘아보았다.
1600839003.english: The Empress, who had been cackling in disbelief, glared at me fiercely.

1600839004.english: Are you telling me to sing with those tool bitches?

1600839005.korean: 웃기지 마! 네가 뭔데 나보고 해라 마라 지껄이는 거야?
1600839005.english: Don't be ridiculous! Who do you think you are, telling me what to do?

1600839006.korean: 내가 우스워지는 걸 즐기는 악취미가 있는 모양이구나 너?
1600839006.english: It looks like you have a bad sense of humor, enjoying making a fool of me?

1600839007.korean: 내가 네 광대 짓거리에 놀아날 것 같아?!
1600839007.english: Do you think I'll fall for your clown antics?!

1600839008.korean: 난 마리아 리오보로스야! 앙헬조차 아무것도 하지 못한 그 무시무시한 여자…
1600839008.english: I'm Maria Rioboros! That terrifying woman whom even Angel could do nothing to…

1600839009.korean: 너희 따위와는 비교조차 허용 안 되는 탑 클래스! 모두가 우러러보던 인간 대배우였다고!
1600839009.english: Top class, not even allowed to be compared to the likes of you! He was a great human actor whom everyone looked up to!

1600839010.korean: 그래, 그 불량품 년들 따위 네가 노리개로 쓰던, 노래를 부르게 하던 알아서 해. 난 하기 싫으니까.
1600839010.english: Yeah, do whatever you want with those defective bitches—use them as playthings or make them sing. I don't want to do it.

1600839011.korean: 난 곧장 여기서 나가, 새롭게 엠프레시스 하운드를 갈무리해서 꼭 복수를… 복수를…
1600839011.english: I'm getting out of here right away. I'm gathering the Empress Hound anew and I will definitely get revenge... revenge...

1600839015.korean: 그딴 식으로 쳐다보지 말라니까!! 난 너 따위한테 놀아날 여자가 아니라고!!
1600839015.english: I told you not to look at me like that!! I'm not a woman who'll be played by someone like you!!

1600839017.korean: …날, 그 소모품들과 동급으로 취급하지 말란 말이야!!
1600839017.english: … Don't treat me like I'm on the same level as those expendables!!

1600839019.korean:
...그야 당연히 그 도구들 입장에서 난 악명 높았던 쓰레기 인간이고, 넌 굴러다니는 모든 바이오로이드한테 
잘 곳과 먹을 것을 나눠 주는 물렁한 인간이기 때문이겠지.
1600839019.english:
...Of course, from the perspective of those tools, I am a notorious piece of trash, and you are to every bio-android rolling around
 It must be because he is a soft-hearted person who shares shelter and food.

1600839021.korean:
- 내 질문에 여제는 입술을 꾹 깨물었다.
명령권과 인간의 권위에 집착하는 그녀의 벽을 대체 어떻게 깨부숴야 할지 도무지 갈피가 잡히지 않는다.
1600839021.english:
The Empress bit her lip tightly at my question.
 I have absolutely no idea how to break down the wall she has built around herself, obsessed with command and human authority.

1600839022.korean: - 게임의 판도를 뒤바꾸기 위해선 역시 떠오르는 겜블러 샛별인 그녀의 도움이 필요하다.
1600839022.english: To turn the tide of the game, we need the help of her, the rising star gambler.

1600839025.korean: 자, 자꾸 친하다고 말하지 말라고! 애들이 놀린단 말이야…
1600839025.english: Come on, stop saying we're close! The kids are teasing me...

1600839026.korean: 하? 지금 누가 기분 나빠해야 할 상황인데?!
1600839026.english: Huh? Who should be offended right now?!

1600839030.english: … Oh, thanks for looking at the clothes with me…

1600839031.korean: 그 옷 입고 다니니까, 장화랑 천아가 예쁘다고 칭찬해 줬단 말이야…
1600839031.english: Since I was wearing that outfit, Janghwa and Cheona complimented me, saying it looked pretty…

1600839032.english: - ...It was a sincere answer typical of Fafnir.

1600839033.korean: 그건 그냥… 누더기 같은 옷 입고 다니는 게 없어 보여서 같이 봐준 것뿐이야!
1600839033.english: That was just… I just looked after you because you looked pathetic walking around in those rags!

1600839034.korean: 여제의 사냥개로써 꼭 지켜야 할 품위라는 게 있으니까!
1600839034.english: Because as the Empress's hound, there is a dignity I must uphold!

1600839035.korean: …평소의 여제라니? 내가 여제이고 이게 평소의 모습인데… 무슨 개소리를 하는 거야?!
1600839035.english: … The usual Empress? I am the Empress, and this is my usual form… What kind of bullshit are you talking about?!

1600839036.english: The Empress muttered with a confused expression.

1600839037.korean: - 소동이 있고 난 후 나는 마리아 리오보로스에 대해 남아있는 모든 멸망 전 기록들을 찾아 읽어보았다.
1600839037.english: After the commotion, I looked up and read all the remaining pre-apocalyptic records about Maria Rioboros.

1600839038.korean:
- 그녀가 복수를 위해 저지른 악행과 용서받을 수 없는 온갖 만행들… 
앙헬의 기분이 잠시라도 나쁠 수 있다면, 화가 나 면상을 조금이라도 구길 수 있는 건수라면 물불 가리지 않고 무엇이든지 뛰어들었다는 그녀.
1600839038.english:
- The evil deeds and all sorts of unforgivable atrocities she committed for revenge…
 She was someone who would stop at nothing to throw herself into anything if it meant Angel could be in a bad mood for even a moment, or get angry and scowl at all.

1600839039.korean: - 그런 그녀가 본인을 여제라 칭하며 복수를 위해 만든 바이오로이드 친위부대, 엠프레시스 하운드.
1600839039.english: The Empress Hound, a bio-android elite guard unit created by her for revenge while calling herself the Empress.

1600839040.korean: - 추측이지만, 사후세계에서조차 복수를 이어가기 위해 '여제'의 자리를 대신할 바이오로이드를 제작한 것이라면…
1600839040.english: - It is just a guess, but if they created a bioroid to take the place of the 'Empress' in order to continue the revenge even in the afterlife…

1600839041.korean: - 그 어떤 것보다 완벽한 유전자로 이뤄진 바이오로이드를 만들고자 노력했을 것이다.
1600839041.english: They would have strived to create a bioroid made of perfect genes more than anything else.

1600839042.korean: - 하지만 홍련의 복제품인 장화와 라미아의 복제품인 천아를 실패작 취급했던 여제의 행적을 근거로 추측하자면 끝내 자체 바이오로이드를 만들어내지 못했을 가능성이 크다.
1600839042.english: However, judging by the Empress's actions of treating Janghwa, a replica of Hongryeon, and Cheona, a replica of Lamia, as failures, it is highly likely that she ultimately failed to create her own bioroids.

1600839043.korean: - …그리고 정황 상, 비밀리에 만든 '이 특수 바이오로이드'조차 나약하다.
1600839043.english: ...And judging by the circumstances, even 'this special bioroid' created in secret is weak.

1600839044.korean: - 왜 마리아 리오보로스는 그토록 신뢰하던 바르그에게 존재의 사실을 알리지 않으면서까지 비밀리에 '여제 바이오로이드'를 처참한 상태로 완성한 걸까?
1600839044.english: - Why did Maria Rioboros secretly complete the 'Empress Bio-roid' in such a wretched state, even going so far as to not inform Varg, whom she trusted so much, of its existence?

1600839046.korean: 그래서… 날 여제의 자리에서 뭐 끌어내리기라도 하겠다는 거야?!
1600839046.english: So… are you trying to drag me down from the Empress’s throne or something?!

1600839047.english: Why is it so serious... the atmosphere... Ugh...

1600839049.english: A role? I haven't decided yet.

1600839050.korean: 아직도 누가 리더 할지 가지고 싸우는 중이야.
1600839050.english: They are still fighting over who will be the leader.

1600839051.korean: 물론, 밴드의 리더는 결국 이 파프니르가 하게 되겠지만…
1600839051.english: Of course, this Fafnir will eventually become the band leader, but…

1600839052.korean: 밴드 리더는 천아, 그 애가 하는 게 낫겠지. 원본 유전자가 가지고 있던 능글맞고 유연한 성격을 최대한 살려 설계했으니까. 투덜거리면서도 교통정리는 원활하게 할 수 있을 거야.
1600839052.english: Cheon-ah would be better off as the band leader. She was designed to maximize the sly and flexible personality of the original genes, after all. She'll be able to manage traffic smoothly, even while grumbling.

1600839053.english: Eeeeeek!! I can do it too!

1600839054.korean: …되겠니? 아니, 그래 그래... 만약 네가 맡는다면…
1600839054.english: … Can you do it? No, yeah, yeah... If you take on the role…

1600839055.english: If I were to take on the role?

1600839057.english: No, this won't work. You... aren't.

1600839058.korean: 왜 그렇게 날 불쌍하게 쳐다보면서 대답하는 건데에에에에!!!
1600839058.english: Why are you answering while looking at me like that, looking so pitifulyyyyy!!!

1600839059.korean:
전투적인 면에서라면 당연 바르그가 어울리겠지만, 용 유전자를 베이스로 설계한 애라 
시선을 끌만한 예능과 퍼포먼스를 담당하기엔 어울리진 않아.
1600839059.english:
In terms of combat ability, Varg would naturally be the fit, but Aera, designed based on dragon genes
 He isn't suited to handle eye-catching variety shows and performances.

1600839060.korean: …뭐야? 이미 그렇게 생각하고 있었으면 네가 평소처럼 지도편달 해주라고.
1600839060.english: … What? If you were already thinking that, you should have just guided and mentored me like usual.

1600839061.english: … You slip away just like a loach. Hmph.

1600839062.korean: 흥, 이제 와 입발린 소리 해봤자...
1600839062.english: Hmph, what's the point of empty words now...

1600839065.korean: 뭐야. 빡통. 그 이상한 표정 저리 안 치워?!
1600839065.english: What the heck. You idiot. Get that weird face off of me!

1600839066.korean: 꼭 저렇게 내빼는 애들이 제일 재밌게 놀고 나선 나중에 또 하자고 하던데.
1600839066.english: It’s always the kids who run away like that who have the most fun and then ask to play again later.

1600839067.korean: 아니? 절대 안 해! 내가 유치하게 너희들이랑 그런 광대짓 따윌 할 것 같아?
1600839067.english: No? Absolutely not! Do you think I would be childish enough to pull off that kind of clown act with you guys?

1600839068.korean: 그래! 당연한 걸 왜 자꾸 물어?
1600839068.english: Right! Why do you keep asking the obvious?

1600839069.english: Yeah! I won't do it! Absolutely not!

1600839070.english: Yeah! I'm telling you, that's the case.

1600839071.korean: 그래, 그래! 대체 몇 번이나 더 말해줘야 이해할 거니?! 한다고!
1600839071.english: Yeah, yeah! How many more times do I have to tell you before you understand?! I'll do it!

1600839073.korean: 자, 잠깐! 내가 분명 안 한다고...
1600839073.english: Wait, hold on! I clearly said I wouldn't...

1600839075.korean:
- 파프니르한테 반강제로 뜯어간 참치캔을 대신해서 갚아주었는데,
여제의 성격이라면 치졸하게 떼먹거나 모르쇠 하진 않을 것 같아 은근슬쩍 거론했다.
1600839075.english:
I paid back the tuna cans that Fafnir had forcibly taken from me,
 Given the Empress's personality, I didn't think she would petty try to rip me off or feign ignorance, so I brought it up subtly.

1600839076.korean: 하, 그깟 얼마 되지도 않는 금액으로… 내가 돈만 있었더라면…
1600839076.english: Ha, for that measly small amount… If only I had the money…

1600839078.korean: 만약에 안 갚으면 어떻게 할 거야?
1600839078.english: What will you do if I don't pay it back?

1600839080.korean:
아침부터 밤까지 이 나를 엉망진창으로 만들려는 것이냐?! 우, 웃기지 마라!
나는 나의 영원한 부군, 니콜라스가 있으니까!
1600839080.english:
Are you trying to make a mess of me from morning till night?! W-don't make me laugh!
 Because I have my eternal husband, Nicholas!

1600839081.korean: 설사, 네가 날 강제로 취한다 하여도, 내 마음만은 절대로 가질 수 없을 거야!
1600839081.english: Even if you force yourself upon me, you will never be able to have my heart!

1600839082.korean: 아무도 그런 말 안 했는데. 혼자 머릿속으로 무슨 생각 했어?
1600839082.english: Nobody said that. What were you thinking to yourself?

1600839083.korean: - 파프니르 말대로 그녀가 무슨 상상을 한건 지 조금은 엿보고 싶었지만 참기로 했다.
1600839083.english: As Fafnir said, I wanted to peek a little to see what she was imagining, but I decided to hold back.

1600839084.english: Since you're saying it like that... what else can I do!

1600839085.korean: - 나는 턱을 괸 채 여제를 흐뭇하게 바라보았다.
1600839085.english: I rested my chin on my hand and gazed at the Empress with satisfaction.

1600840003.english: What, what are you guys looking at?!

1600840004.english: You're saying you'll share a room with us?

1600840005.korean: 야. 진짜 넌 어떻게 볼 때마다 기분을 엿같이 만드냐.
1600840005.english: Hey. Seriously, how do you make me feel like shit every time I see you?

1600840006.korean:
…여제도 동의했고, 주인님 또한 우리가 함께 지내며 결속을 다져야 한다 말씀하셨다.
여제도 우리에게 쓸데없는 명령은 내리지 않겠다고 자신의 이름을 걸며 맹세했지.
1600840006.english:
… The Empress agreed, and the Master also said that we must live together and strengthen our bond.
 The Empress also swore on her name that she would not give us any useless orders.

1600840008.korean: 비록 불편하더라도, 주인님의 큰 뜻을 너희 또한 너른 마음으로 이해할 수 있도록.
1600840008.english: Even if it is inconvenient, may you also understand the Master's great intentions with a broad mind.

1600840009.korean: 여기서도 여제라고 개소리 찍찍댈 생각이면 나가는 게 좋을 거야.
1600840009.english: If you plan to keep spouting bullshit about being an empress even here, you'd better leave.

1600840011.english: Hey, aren't you going to answer?

1600840013.korean: 이 몸이 너희 광대짓에 어울려주니까 호구로 보이나?
1600840013.english: Do I look like a pushover just because I'm playing along with your clown antics?

1600840015.korean: 야, 놔 봐. 명령권 쓰지 말고 덤벼. 네 얼굴에 땜방 날 각오는 됐냐?
1600840015.english: Hey, let go. Don't use your authority, just fight me. Are you prepared to get a patch on your face?

1600840016.korean: 오냐 그래. 그깟 명령권 없이도 내가 너희의 주인임을 보여주겠다.
1600840016.english: Alright, sure. I will show you that I am your master, even without that mere authority to command.

1600840017.korean: 역시 이래야 우리 여제님이지. 고분고분하지 않으신 거 보니까 아직 덜 맞으셨나봐?
1600840017.english: That’s just like our Empress. Seeing as you aren’t being obedient, it looks like you haven’t been beaten enough yet?

1600840018.korean: 근본 없는 개일 수록 더 크게 짖는다는 말 들어봤나?
1600840018.english: Have you ever heard the saying that the more rootless a dog is, the louder it barks?

1600840019.korean: 이야~ 우리 여제님 가오잡는 거 봐? 야 배터리, 똥강아지. 말리지 마라. 서열 정리 다시 좀 해보자.
1600840019.english: Wow~ Look at our Empress acting all tough. Hey Battery, you little rascal. Don't stop her. Let's sort out the hierarchy again.

1600840020.korean: 그만해… 여제 그래도… 약속하고 왔다니까... 사이좋게 잘 지내겠다고.
1600840020.english: Stop it... Empress, still... I told you I came here after promising... that we would get along well.

1600840023.korean: 으, 으흠. 흐음. 저, 저기… 여제… 나랑 삼안 영업소 갈까? 생필품 필요하지 않아?
1600840023.english: Uh, hmm. Hmm. Um, excuse me... Empress... Shall we go to the Saman Sales Office? Don't you need any daily necessities?

1600840026.korean: 저년 싸가지 하곤… 은근히 속 긁는 재주가 있다니까?
1600840026.english: Look at that bitch's manners... I'm telling you, she really has a knack for getting on your nerves.

1600840027.korean: 아무리 참으려 해도… 난 저년한테 좋은 감정을 가질래야 가질 수가 없어.
1600840027.english: No matter how hard I try to hold back… I just can’t bring myself to have any positive feelings toward that bitch.

1600840028.korean:
…우린 모두 복수를 위해 만들어진 개체였잖아.
평생을 목적도 없이 떠돌게 만들어 놓곤, 이제와서 여제님이니 뭐니 하는 거, 난 정말 찢어 죽이고 싶을 만큼 싫어.
1600840028.english:
… We were all created for revenge, weren't we?
 You made me wander aimlessly for the rest of my life, and now you're calling me Empress or whatever—I hate that so much I want to tear you apart.

1600840029.english: … even if it’s the commander’s request.

1600840030.korean: 존나 빡쳐! 아까 그냥 머리채 확 잡아버릴걸!
1600840030.english: I'm so pissed off! I should have just grabbed her by the hair earlier!

1600840031.korean:
명령권만 있을 뿐이지. 실상 저 아이 또한 여제님에 의해 만들어진 바이오로이드 아니더냐.
…대체 무슨 연유로 여제님께서 만드셨는진 잘 모르겠지만 말이다.
1600840031.english:
She only has the authority to issue commands. In reality, isn't that child also a bio-android created by the Empress?
 … I’m not entirely sure why the Empress made it, though.

1600840032.korean: …나라고 좋은 건 아니다. 다만 '여제님'의 의사를 어떻게든 존중드리고 싶을 뿐이지.
1600840032.english: … It’s not that it’s good for me. I just want to respect the Empress’s wishes in any way possible.

1600840033.korean: 나라고 무조건 싸고 돌고 싶은 생각은 없다.
1600840033.english: I have no intention of unconditionally shielding and protecting you just because it’s me.

1600840034.korean:
다만… 이를 어떻게든 이해하고자 노력하는 중이다. 여제님의 뜻이라고.
그리고 여제님이 남기신 게 사실이라면... 인정하고 받아들이면 된다. 그것이 내가 할 일이니까.
1600840034.english:
However… I am trying to understand this somehow. That it is the Empress's will.
 And if what the Empress left behind is true... I just need to acknowledge and accept it. Because that is my job.

1600840035.korean: 얼씨구, 역시 엄마한테 제일 사랑받은 맏딸은 뭔가 달라도 한참 다르다 이거야?
1600840035.english: Well then, so you're saying the eldest daughter, who was loved the most by her mother, is just way different?

1600840036.korean: 난 라미아 짝퉁이니 뭐니 불량품이란 소리만 들었는데.
1600840036.english: I only heard things like Lamia being a knockoff or a defective product.

1600840037.korean:
그쪽에서 요새 말 걸고 싶어 하던데 왜 자꾸 도망 다녀?
그러고 보니 백아는 그 여자가 데리고 다니는 동물 바이오로이드랑 비교하면 실지렁이 같던데~
1600840037.english:
They've been wanting to talk to you lately, so why do you keep running away?
 Come to think of it, Baek-ah looked like an earthworm compared to the animal bio-android that woman carries around.

1600840038.korean: 시끄러워! 그 이상한 근육 떡대 아줌마랑 엮지 좀 마!
1600840038.english: Shut up! Don't associate me with that weird, burly, muscular woman!

1600840039.korean:
…뭐, 이 김에 다른 부대원들이랑 교류하는 것도 나쁘진 않지.
그간 우리들이 들쑤시고 다닌 일이 많은 만큼 더는 적을 만들지 않는 것도 좋은 판단이다.
1600840039.english:
… Well, while we're at it, it wouldn't be bad to interact with the other unit members.
 Given how much we have stirred up trouble in the past, it is a good decision not to make any more enemies.

1600840040.korean:
그리고 여제 건에 대해선… 어디로 튈지 모르는 성향이 건방지긴 하지만... 
여제님과 주인님을 위해서라도 협력적으로 대해라. 선을 넘으면 내가 직접 주인님께 보고해 처리할 테니.
1600840040.english:
And as for the Empress... her unpredictable nature is indeed arrogant, but...
 Treat them cooperatively for the sake of the Empress and the Master. If they cross the line, I will report it directly to the Master and handle it myself.

1600840041.english: It's quite spacious for a submarine mart, isn't it?

1600840042.korean: 일단은 샴푸랑… 그다음에 폼 클랜징… 아? 이거 괜찮던데. 한 번 써볼래?
1600840042.english: First off, the shampoo... and then the foam cleanser... Oh? This one was pretty good. Want to try it?

1600840044.korean: 어… LRL은 어디 가고 알비스 혼자 있어?
1600840044.english: Uh… where did LRL go and why is Alvis alone?

1600840045.korean:
어엇… 레오나 언니가 아니었네…? 하핫, 미, 미안…
LRL은 메로페랑 같이 창고 들어갔다가 걸려서 지금 엄청 혼나고 있어…
1600840045.english:
Uh... it wasn't Leona...? Haha, S-Sorry...
 LRL got caught going into the warehouse with Merope and is getting severely scolded right now…

1600840046.korean: 세상에… 안드바리가 메로페한테 한 번 당한 뒤로 창고를 얼마나 무섭게 개조해놨는지…
1600840046.english: Good heavens… Andvari has remodeled the warehouse in such a terrifying way ever since he got beaten by Merope once…

1600840047.korean: 만약에 파프니르 언니가 있었으면 정전으로 빠앙! 하고 쉽게 끝났을 텐데.
1600840047.english: If Fafnir had been here, it would have ended easily with a blackout and a loud bang.

1600840048.korean: 다, 다신 안 해! 너희들이랑 같이 갔다가 바르그한테 얼마나 혼났는지 알아?!
1600840048.english: I-I'm never doing this again! Do you know how much Varg scolded me for going with you guys?!

1600840050.korean: 뭐야. 너, 왜 날 그렇게 뚫어져라 쳐다보고...
1600840050.english: What's wrong? Why are you staring at me like that...

1600840051.english: No matter how I look at it… she looks exactly like Leona…

1600840052.korean: …하? 그 암사자랑 내가 닮았다고? 웃기는 소리하네.
1600840052.english: … Huh? You're saying I look like that lioness? What a joke.

1600840054.english: … I never said you were ugly, you know?

1600840055.korean:
그래! 앙헬이 레오나를 출시했을 때 외모가 상당히 준수하다는 평가가 우세했지.
꽤 괜찮아 보이긴 해서 내가 만들 바이오로이드에도 레오나의 유전자를 일부 섞으려 했었으니까...
1600840055.english:
Right! When Angel released Leona, the prevailing opinion was that her appearance was quite decent.
 It looked pretty good, so I was planning to mix some of Leona's genes into the bioroid I was going to make as well...

1600840060.english: … Just a headache. Haa… It’s fine.

1600840061.korean: 저기, 근데 말이야… 왜 우리들은 전부 다른 바이오로이드들의 유전자가 섞여 있는 거야?
1600840061.english: Hey, but you know... why do we all have genes from other bioroids mixed in?

1600840062.korean: 블랙 리버의 자본과 기술력을 단기간에 넘어 서기엔 돈과 시간 모든 게 부족했어… 잔꾀를 부려 너희를 기획해 낸 것도 사실상 행운에 가까웠지.
1600840062.english: We lacked both money and time to surpass Black River's capital and technological prowess in a short period... It was practically a stroke of luck that I managed to come up with a plan against you guys using such cunning.

1600840063.korean:
군수업체였던 블랙 리버를 물려받은 앙헬은 이미 AGS로 세계적인 우위를 잠식한 상태였고…
버려지다시피한 후안의 생산라인을 복원해 생산을 시도할 수 있는 한계는 이미 정해져있었어.
1600840063.english:
Angel, who inherited the defense contractor Black River, had already seized global dominance with AGS, and…
 There was already a limit to how much production could be attempted by restoring Juan's production line, which had been practically abandoned.

1600840064.korean: …하루라도 빨리 천한 사생아 새끼한테 가장 수치스러운 방법으로 복수하려면 나 역시 극단적인 선택을 할 수밖에 없었어. 그렇게 자신과 경쟁사가 만든 바이오로이드들에게 목숨을 위협받게 된다면 어떤 표정을 지을 지 너무도 궁금했거든…
1600840064.english: … To take revenge on that lowly bastard in the most humiliating way possible as soon as possible, I had no choice but to make an extreme decision myself. I was just so curious to see what kind of expression he would make if his life were threatened by the bioroids created by himself and his competitor…

1600840065.korean: 블랙 리버 상표를 달고 세상에 탄생한 바이오로이드와 삼안산업의 유전자 씨앗을 빼돌려 제작한 엠프레시스 하운드는 자연스레 일정 부분 원래 유전자 주인이 따로 있는 개체가 되었지.
1600840065.english: The Bio-roids born under the Black River brand and the Empressis Hounds, created by stealing the genetic seeds of Saman Industries, naturally became entities that had a separate original genetic owner to a certain extent.

1600840066.korean: ...따지고 보면 유전자 원본을 개조 해놓고 왜 원본만큼 하지 못하냐고 짜증 낸 내가 아이러니네.
1600840066.english: ...Come to think of it, it’s ironic that I got annoyed asking why it couldn’t perform as well as the original after modifying the original genes.

1600840067.korean: 그나저나 내가 레오나 유전자를 베이스로 새로운 바이오로이드를…
1600840067.english: Anyway, I'm going to make a new bioroid based on Leona's genes…

1600840068.korean: 젠장… 으읏… 머리야… 꼭 기억을 더듬을 때면… 두통이…
1600840068.english: Damn it… Ugh… My head… Whenever I try to recall… I get a headache…

1600840069.korean:
저기, 그러면 내 유전자 주인은 누구야?
라미아나 홍련이나… 용처럼 나도 좋은 유전자로 만들어졌지?
1600840069.english:
Hey, then who is the owner of my genes?
 Lamia or Hongryeon... like the dragons, I was made with good genes too, right?

1600840071.korean: 참 기대가 컸는데… 지능이 원본의 반 이상이라도 따라갔더라면…
1600840071.english: I had really high expectations... If only the intelligence had matched even half of the original...

1600840073.korean: 아냐… 아무것도. 그래도… 천아랑 달리 성능을 최대로 구현하는데 성공했으니까.
1600840073.english: No... nothing. Still... unlike Cheona, I succeeded in maximizing its performance.

1600840074.korean: 이이이이이익!! 뭐야! 왜 그런 식으로 말하는데!!
1600840074.english: Eeeeeek!! What! Why are you talking like that!!

1600840076.english: Alvis? So you were here. Huh? You...

1600840079.korean: 흥. 그 건방진 표정은 참 여전하네. 망가뜨려버리고 싶을 정도로.
1600840079.english: Hmph. That arrogant look of yours is still the same. Enough to make me want to smash it.

1600840080.korean: 나한테 당했던 앙금이 아직은 풀리지 않았나 보지?
1600840080.english: It looks like you still hold a grudge against what I did to you, doesn't it?

1600840082.korean: …대원들이 하나같이, 나랑 네 분위기가 어딘지 모르게 비슷하다 말하던데.
1600840082.english: … The team members all said that you and I have a similar vibe in some way.

1600840083.korean:
정식으로 합류할지 모르겠지만...
날 닮은 얼굴로 수준 낮은 언행이나 유아같은 행동은 삼가주면 좋겠어.
1600840083.english:
I'm not sure if I'll officially join, but...
 I wish you would refrain from using low-level language or acting like a child with a face that looks just like mine.

1600840084.korean: 알비스, 조금 있으면 저녁 시간이니까 초콜렛 너무 많이 먹지는 말고… 알겠니?
1600840084.english: Alvis, it's almost dinner time, so don't eat too much chocolate... got it?

1600840087.korean:
에에? 언니… 숙소에선 그래도 뭔가 친밀감 생긴다고 말했으면서...
헤헤… 어, 언니가 저렇게 말해도 속은 따뜻해… 먼저 가볼게! 또 봐~
1600840087.english:
Eh? Unnie... You said you felt a sense of closeness at the dorm, though...
 Hehe… Yeah, even though you say that, I’m warm-hearted inside… I’ll be going now! See you again~

1600841001.korean: …야, 진짜 걔, 오늘부터 밴드 연습 같이 하기로 한 거 맞아?
1600841001.english: … Hey, seriously, is he sure he agreed to start band practice with us today?

1600841002.korean:
그래… 그래! 그만 좀 물어봐! 같이 하기로 한 거 맞으니까 사령관이 우리한테 연습실까지 빌려줬지. 
어떻게 구워삶아서 하겠다는 말을 받아 낸 건지는 모르겠지만…
1600841002.english:
Yeah… yeah! Stop asking! It’s true we agreed to work together, that’s why the Commander even lent us a practice room.
 I don't know how they managed to sweet-talk him into agreeing, but...

1600841003.korean:
그렇다면 오늘이야말로 그간 미뤄놨던 밴드부의 리더를 선출해야겠군.
그리고 각자 연주해야 할 악기를 선정해두는 게 앞으로의 연습에도 도움이 될 것이다.
1600841003.english:
In that case, today is the day to finally elect the band leader we've been putting off.
 Also, selecting an instrument for each person to play will be helpful for future practice.

1600841004.korean: 듣기론 축제까지 남은 시간이 그리 많지 않으니 말이다.
1600841004.english: I heard that there isn't much time left until the festival.

1600841005.english: Sorry, we're late, aren't we? We're here!

1600841007.korean: 야~ 배터리랑 마침 딱 맞춰 왔네? 밴드 리더를 뽑으려던 참이었거든. 이제 와 생뚱맞게 리더 하겠다는 말은 하지 않길 바라~
1600841007.english: Hey, Battery, you arrived just in time! We were actually just about to pick a band leader. I hope you don't come up with some random offer to be the leader now.

1600841008.korean: 네가 해. 네가 엠프레시스 하운드 중에선 가장 둥글한 편이니까.
1600841008.english: You do it. Because you're on the roundest side among the Empress Hounds.

1600841009.korean: 뭐어어어? 헐 대박! 설마 네 입에서 그런 말이 나올 줄은 상상도 못 했는데...
1600841009.english: Whateeee? OMG, that's crazy! I never imagined something like that would come out of your mouth...

1600841010.english: Got it? Now you guys decide.

1600841011.korean:
들었지? 내가 리더래. 다들 불만 없지?
그럼 앞으로는 내가 밴드의 방향성을 조율하는 걸로… 포지션 분배는 어떻게 할래?
1600841011.english:
Did you hear that? I'm the leader. You all have no complaints, right?
 Then, from now on, I'll be in charge of coordinating the band's direction... How do you want to distribute the positions?

1600841012.korean:
너 드럼 하면 딱이겠네. 요새 팔뚝에 살 좀 붙은 거 같던데?
가슴에는 안 붙고 왜 거기만 점점 굵어지는 것 같냐?
1600841012.english:
You'd be perfect for the drums. It looks like you've put some weight on your arms lately.
 It's not sticking to my chest, so why does it seem like only that part is getting thicker?

1600841013.korean: 야 뒤질라고 진짜… 같이 처 먹고 다니는 년이 그런 말 할 처지가 돼?
1600841013.english: Hey, seriously, you're gonna die... Is a bitch who hangs out with you in a position to say things like that?

1600841014.korean: 난 보컬 할래! 너희들 내가 무대에서 노래 부른 경험 있는 거 알지?
1600841014.english: I'm going to be the vocalist! You guys know I have experience singing on stage, right?

1600841015.english: If you're a vocalist, aren't you practically the center?

1600841016.korean: 하~ 센터를 우리 빡통 대가리님이 하시겠다고요? 뇌를 가끔 두고 다니는 것 같더라니, 이번엔 염치까지 같이 두고 왔냐?
1600841016.english: Ha~ You're saying our thick-headed idiot wants to run the center? I thought you sometimes left your brain at home, but did you leave your shame behind this time too?

1600841017.english: Eeeeeek! You don't even have any stage experience!

1600841018.korean:
바보니르 네 얼빵한 얼굴이 우리 밴드 간판이면 누가 공연을 보러 오겠냐? 
적어도 내가 간판이어야… 다들 인정하지 않겠어?
1600841018.english:
Babonir, if your goofy face is the face of our band, who would come to watch our performance?
 At least I have to be the face... so everyone will acknowledge me, right?

1600841019.korean: 뭔 둘이서 븅신같은 소리를 하고 있어?
1600841019.english: What kind of idiotic nonsense are you two talking about?

1600841020.korean: 시, 싫어! 나 보컬 할 거야!
1600841020.english: No, no! I'm going to be the vocalist!

1600841021.korean:
이이이이… 너희들 여제 아줌마 임무 수행할 때 내가 맨날 양보해 줬던 거 벌써 다 까먹었어?!
낙하산도 없이 나 혼자 맨몸 다이빙하고… 맨날 미끼로 두고 도망쳐서 나 혼자 개고생하고!
1600841021.english:
Eeeeee… Have you guys already forgotten how I always gave way to you when Auntie Empress was on her missions?!
 I went diving all alone with nothing but my bare body, without a parachute... and they always left me as bait and ran away, so I was the only one suffering like crazy!

1600841022.english: Ah, so what? Got a problem? Feeling wronged?

1600841023.korean: 이이이이익!! 맨날 이런 식이지! 이번엔 진짜로 양보 안 할 거야!
1600841023.english: Eeeeeek!! It's always like this! I'm really not giving in this time!

1600841024.korean: 양보 안 하면? 야, 네가 뭘 할 수 있는데?! 참 나~
1600841024.english: What if you don't yield? Hey, what can you do?! Seriously~

1600841026.korean: 바르그, 네가 조용히 좀 시켜 봐.
1600841026.english: Varg, you try telling them to be quiet.

1600841027.korean: 네가 밴드의 리더인 만큼 직접 나서야지. 월권은 리더에 대한 예의가 아니다.
1600841027.english: Since you are the band leader, you should step up personally. Overstepping your authority is disrespectful to a leader.

1600841028.korean: 내가 너희들을 통제할 때의 고통을 이 기회에 똑똑히 느껴라.
1600841028.english: Take this opportunity to clearly feel the pain of me controlling you.

1600841029.korean:
아 진짜 지랄 났네… 야! 너네들 뭐 알고서나 큰소리 치는 거야?
그렇게 노래가 하고 싶으면 다 같이 떼창 하면 될 거 아냐!
1600841029.english:
Oh my god, this is total bullshit... Hey! Do you guys even know what you're talking about before you start acting all high and mighty?
 If you want to sing that much, why don't you all just sing along together?

1600841031.korean: 야, 넌 무슨 애가 한다고 와놓고 가만히 구경질만 하냐?
1600841031.english: Hey, why do you come here saying the kid is doing it, only to just sit there watching?

1600841032.korean: 분명 내가 리더는 너라고 하지 않았나?
1600841032.english: Didn't I clearly say you were the leader?

1600841033.korean: 너까지 이렇게 나온다 이거지?! 이런 애들을 데리고 밴드라니… 내가 생각해도 한참 잘못 생각했다.
1600841033.english: So you're saying even you're acting like this?! To think you'd put kids like this in a band... even I think I made a huge mistake.

1600841034.korean: 인간 죽이는 그런 거 말고… 나도 한 번쯤은 간지나게 무대에 서보고 싶었는데.
1600841034.english: Not that kind of killing people... I just wanted to stand on stage looking cool at least once.

1600841036.korean: …내가 명령을 내릴 때도 그런 생각을 했어?
1600841036.english: … Did you think that even when I gave the order?

1600841037.korean:
암살하러 다닐 땐 별생각이 없었어. 명령이 머리를 지배했다고.
…멸망 후 그 빌어먹을 명령 때문에 떠돌아다니다… 드디어 좀 해보고 싶은 게 생겼는데. 그중 하나가 음악이었다고.
1600841037.english:
I didn't think much when I was out assassinating people. Orders controlled my mind.
 … After wandering around after the apocalypse because of that damn order… I finally found something I wanted to try. And one of them was music.

1600841038.korean: 이젠 나도 복수 같은 거 말고 내가 해보고 싶은 것 좀 하자고!
1600841038.english: Now, let me do what I want to do, not something like revenge!

1600841039.korean:
…정말 밴드가 하고 싶은 거라면,
밴드 활동에 가장 적극적으로 임할 수 있는 사람이 제일 중요한 중추를 맡는 게 좋을 거야.
1600841039.english:
… If you really want to be in a band,
 It would be best for the person who can be most actively involved in band activities to take on the most important central role.

1600841040.korean: 밴드에서 제일 중요한 포지션이 뭐라고 생각해?
1600841040.english: What do you think is the most important position in a band?

1600841041.korean: 난 누가 뭐래도 베이스랑 드럼이 밴드에서 가장 중요하다고 봐.
1600841041.english: No matter what anyone says, I think the bass and drums are the most important parts of a band.

1600841042.korean:
좋아. 그러면 네 말대로 그 포지션을 뽑아보자고.
그 중요한 포지션을 빡대가리랑 정신 파탄자한테 맡기긴 아무래도 어려울 테니.
1600841042.english:
Okay. Then let's try picking for that position just like you said.
 It would probably be difficult to entrust that important position to a dimwit and a mentally broken person.

1600841043.english: A psychopath? Are you done talking?!

1600841044.english: I told you I'm not a fool!

1600841045.korean: …네 말이 맞긴 한데. 하아… 이것도 명령인가?
1600841045.english: … You're right, but. Haa… Is this an order, too?

1600841046.korean: 드럼은… 네가 맡는 게 좋아 보여.
1600841046.english: The drums… I think it would be good if you took charge.

1600841047.english: No matter how much I think about it, I don't think that's right...?

1600841048.korean: 아니, 드럼이 팀의 리더 격이나 다름없는 역할이라고 들었는데… 네가 그 중추를 맡는 게.
1600841048.english: No, I heard the drummer is practically the leader of the team... so you're taking on that pivotal role.

1600841049.korean: 차라리 내가 베이스를 하고 말지. 그래, 내가 베이스 하는 게 낫겠다.
1600841049.english: I'd rather just play bass myself. Yeah, it would be better if I played bass.

1600841050.english: … If that's the case, why did you ask me?

1600841051.korean: 의견은 물어볼 수 있는 거고! 명령이 아니라면 리더는 나니까 내 마음대로 정할 거야. 그래서… 꼽아?
1600841051.english: I have the right to ask for opinions! Unless it's an order, I'm the leader, so I'm going to decide however I want. So… are you picking a fight?

1600841052.korean: …하, 꼽긴. 너 알아서 해. 입 아파서 말하기도 귀찮아.
1600841052.english: … Ha, you're being petty. Do whatever you want. My mouth hurts from talking, I can't be bothered to say it.

1600841053.korean: 그럼… 바르그, 네가 드럼 좀 해줘.
1600841053.english: Then… Varg, you play the drums.

1600841055.english: I, I… I’m telling you, my sense of rhythm is weak?!

1600841056.korean: 하면 늘어… 배터리한테 우리 드럼 맡기면 풍비박산 날 거 뻔하잖아?
1600841056.english: You get better with practice... It's obvious we'll fall apart if we leave our drums to Battery, right?

1600841057.korean: 이이이이익!! 왜 나 개무시하냐고!!! 나도 잘 찰 수 있어! 나 발차기 잘해!!!
1600841057.english: Eeeeeek!! Why are you totally ignoring me!!! I can kick well too! I'm good at kicking!!!

1600841058.korean: …야. 차긴 뭘 차. 그냥 네가 일렉 해라. 그게 제일 낫겠다.
1600841058.english: … Hey. What do you mean, kick it? Just you play electric. That would be the best option.

1600841059.english: You're saying you'll make that idiot the main guitarist?

1600841060.korean:
의외로 배터리가 잘 할 수도 있는 거잖아? 쟤 은근 임무에서 큰 건수 하나씩은 꼭 했으니까.
너야말로 싫긴 해도 뭔갈 해야 할 텐데... 뭐 시키지?
1600841060.english:
You know Battery might actually do surprisingly well? He's secretly always managed to pull off at least one big job on a mission.
 You're the one who has to do something, even if you hate it... What should I make you do?

1600841061.korean: 너희들끼리도 합을 맞추기 힘든 마당에 내가 굳이 무대까지 따라 나가야 할 이유가 있을까?
1600841061.english: Given how hard it is for you guys to coordinate even among yourselves, is there really any reason for me to go out of my way to follow you onto the stage?

1600841062.korean: 지금처럼 무대 뒤에 있는 게 내가 할 수 있는 최선이야. 관객들한테 괜스레 불협화음을 보여줄 필요는 없지.
1600841062.english: Staying backstage like this is the best I can do. There is no need to show the audience unnecessary discord.

1600841063.korean: 아~ 또 이년 지랄하네. 핫팩이 너도 끼라고 하는데 협조하는 척이라도 좀 해라 븅신아.
1600841063.english: Ah, this bitch is at it again. Hot Pack is telling you to wear it too, so at least pretend to cooperate, you idiot.

1600841064.korean: - 한참 연습 중일 하운드 멤버들을 응원하기 위해 나는 흐레스벨그와 함께 연습실을 방문했다.
1600841064.english: I visited the practice room with Hresvelgr to cheer on the Hound members who were in the middle of practicing.

1600841065.english: Hey, what are you doing here, Hresvelg?

1600841066.korean: 하운드 대원 분들께서 직접 밴드 공연을 하신다고 해서 같이 와봤습니다.
1600841066.english: We came along because we heard that the Hound members were performing live.

1600841067.korean: 맞다, 너랑 슬레이프니르랑, 하르페이아가 밴드 곡을 했던가? 밖에 있을 때 나름 잘 들었어.
1600841067.english: Right, did you, Sleipnir, and Harpeia play a band song? I actually enjoyed listening to it when I was outside.

1600841068.korean: 그때는… 꽤 힘들었죠. 저희는 한 곡만 연주했다지만, 하운드 분들은 여러 번 연주하지 않습니까?
1600841068.english: It was… quite tough back then. We only played one song, but the Hound members play multiple times, don't they?

1600841069.korean: 사령관님께서 기획하신 축제의 일정을 보니 하운드 분들이 결성한 밴드부가 축제의 하이라이트를 장식할 예정이더군요.
1600841069.english: Looking at the schedule for the festival planned by the Commander, I saw that the band formed by the Hounds is scheduled to be the highlight of the event.

1600841070.korean: 어? 우리가 클라이맥스를 맡게 되는 거야 그럼?
1600841070.english: Huh? So we're in charge of the climax then?

1600841071.korean:
큰 변동 사항이 없다면 말입니다. 
자고로 음악이란 나이와 성별, 국적과 언어를 떠나 모두가 한마음 한뜻으로 즐길 수 있는 마법이나 다름없잖습니까?
1600841071.english:
That is, unless there are any major changes.
 After all, isn't music practically magic that everyone can enjoy with one heart and mind, regardless of age, gender, nationality, or language?

1600841072.korean:
- 흐레스벨그가 이번 축제에 상당한 열의를 보여주고 있기에, 
아르망과 함께 축제의 메인 기획에 참여하는 것을 허락하기로 했다.
1600841072.english:
- Since Hresvelgr is showing considerable enthusiasm for this festival,
 I decided to allow Armand to participate in the main planning of the festival.

1600841073.korean: …죄송합니다. 주인님. 많은 기대를 하고 계신 중에 이런 모습을 보여드리다니…
1600841073.english: … I am sorry, Master. To think I’ve shown you this side of myself when you have been looking forward to it so much…

1600841074.english: Hey hey! Hey Anna?! Ugh ugh ugh ugh?!

1600841075.korean: 너, 너야말로 내 가슴 꼬집지 말고 놔라?! 자… 하나 둘 셋 하면 놓는 거다? 하나 둘…
1600841075.english: You, you're the one who should stop pinching my chest and let go! Alright... you let go on the count of three, okay? One, two...

1600841079.korean: 여러분들은 혹시 매지컬 모모 더 락! 이라는 시리즈를 본 적 있습니까?
1600841079.english: Have you ever seen the series called Magical Momo the Rock!?

1600841081.korean:
마왕의 수하를 잡기 위해, 평범한 학교에 정체를 숨기고 잠입한 모모와 백토가 
밴드부를 결성해 음악으로 악을 정화하는 대단한 스핀 오프 작품이었지요.
1600841081.english:
Momo and Baekto, who infiltrated an ordinary school hiding their identities to capture the Demon King's subordinate
 It was a great spin-off work about forming a band and purifying evil through music.

1600841082.korean: 특히나 바니걸 의상을 입은 모모와 마녀 의상을 입은 백토가 무대에서 함께 섰을 때의 그 전율이란…!
1600841082.english: Especially the thrill when Momo in a bunny girl outfit and Baekto in a witch outfit stood together on stage…!

1600841083.korean: 여하튼 요점부터 말씀드리자면, 오히려 이런 충돌을 겪을수록 밴드는 더욱 단단하게 결속되는 법이죠!
1600841083.english: Anyway, to get straight to the point, the more conflicts like this arise, the more tightly the band bonds together!

1600841084.korean: 지금 우리 꼴을 보고도… 정말 그렇게 될 거라 생각하나?
1600841084.english: Even looking at the state we're in right now... do you really think it will turn out that way?

1600841085.korean: - 나는 내가 온 것도 모른 체 지금도 서로를 꼬집으며 아웅다웅거리는 파프니르와 장화를 불렀다.
1600841085.english: I called out to Fafnir and Boots, who were still pinching each other and bickering, unaware that I had come.

1600841087.english: It's me... I'm doing well, right...

1600841088.english: I'm doing well too! Probably… too?

1600841089.korean:
- 나의 부름에 투닥거리던 둘은 언제 그랬냐는 듯 순해진 두 사람은 쪼르르 내게 다가왔다.
그런 그녀들이 귀엽게 느껴져 양팔 가득 끌어안고 눈앞에 모인 네 개의 말랑한 살덩이 사이로 얼굴을 파묻었다.
1600841089.english:
At my call, the two, who had been bickering, became gentle as if nothing had happened and scurried over to me.
 Finding them cute, I hugged them tightly with both arms and buried my face between the four soft lumps of flesh gathered in front of me.

1600841092.korean:
내가 있어봤자 어차피 단합도 잘 안될 게 뻔해.
지금도 저런 와중에 내가 괜히 들어갔다가 무대에서 비웃음 당하느니 안 하는 게 나아.
1600841092.english:
It's obvious that even if I were here, we wouldn't be able to unite well anyway.
 In the midst of things like this, it’s better not to do it than to go in for no reason and get ridiculed on stage.

1600841093.korean:
- 말문이 막힌 여제가 내 품에 꼭 안겨있는 장화와 파프니르만 물끄러미 쳐다본다.
나의 첫인상으로 여제가 발언했던 '난봉꾼'이라는 단어가 괜스레 떠올라 조용히 팔을 풀었다.
1600841093.english:
The speechless Empress stares blankly at Janghwa and Fafnir, who are tightly nestled in my arms.
 The word 'womanizer' that the Empress had mentioned regarding my first impression inexplicably came to mind, so I quietly unfastened my arm.

1600841096.korean: …야, 내가 방금 쟤 애교부리면서 '웅'하는 거 들었는데 실화냐?
1600841096.english: … Hey, I just heard her acting all cute and saying 'Ung'. Is that for real?

1600841099.english: Why are you guys suddenly splitting up and making such a fuss?!

1600841100.korean: - 조금 누그러진 여제의 어조에 나오려는 웃음을 애써 참았다.
1600841100.english: I struggled to hold back the laughter that threatened to escape at the Empress's slightly softened tone.

1600842003.korean: 언제부터 핫팩 말에 웅~♥ 하고 소녀처럼 대답하기 시작했대?
1600842003.english: Since when did you start answering "Woof~♥" like a little girl at the mention of a hot pack?

1600842004.korean: 하긴~ 장화나 바르그도 그랬던 적이 있었지.
1600842004.english: Come to think of it, Janghwa and Barg were like that once, too.

1600842005.korean: 내가 행복해질 수 없는 건 내가 더 잘 아는… 으브브븝?!
1600842005.english: I know better than anyone that I can't be happy… Ugh?!

1600842006.korean: 야, 뒤지고 싶어?! 너 그 말 안 꺼내기로 나랑 약속했잖아?! 응?!
1600842006.english: Hey, do you want to die?! You promised me you wouldn't bring that up, didn't you?! Huh?!

1600842008.korean: 뭐야… 너 왜 이렇게 날 뚫어져라 쳐다봐? 할 말이라도 있어?
1600842008.english: What's wrong... why are you staring at me like this? Do you have something to say?

1600842009.korean: …아무것도 아니다. 그냥, 옛날 여제님 생각이 났을 뿐이다.
1600842009.english: … It’s nothing. I was just thinking of the Empress of old.

1600842010.korean: 하? 왜. 네가 말하는 그 과거의 여제님과 지금 네 눈앞에 있는 여제님은 다른 사람이다 이거야?
1600842010.english: Huh? Why? Are you saying that the Empress of the past you were talking about is a different person from the Empress standing in front of you right now?

1600842011.korean: 됐어. 하… 씨, 바르그 네가 나한테까지 이렇게 잔소리가 많을 줄은 상상도 못 했는데 진짜…
1600842011.english: Fine. Ugh... damn it, Varg, I never imagined you'd nag me this much, seriously...

1600842012.korean: 야, 천아. 난 무슨 파트를 맡으면 돼?
1600842012.english: Hey, Cheon-ah. What part should I take?

1600842015.english: … Hey, why is he getting the bass?

1600842016.korean: 널 설계했을 땐 홍련과는 다르게 잠입과 1인 테러를 차질 없이 수행할 수 있는 것을 목표했어.
1600842016.english: When I designed you, unlike Hongryeon, my goal was to be able to carry out infiltration and one-man terror without any setbacks.

1600842017.korean: 폭탄 하나 하나를 격발시킬 수 있는 섬세한 손 놀림이라던가, 필요 이상으로 예민한 청각이라던가.
1600842017.english: Things like the delicate hand movements to detonate each and every bomb, or hearing that is more sensitive than necessary.

1600842018.korean: 그렇게 따지면 베이스 쪽이 훨씬 수월하겠지.
1600842018.english: If you look at it that way, the bass side would be much easier.

1600842019.korean: 지랄. 그 논리면 건반도 그게 그거 아냐?
1600842019.english: Bullshit. By that logic, isn't a keyboard basically the same thing?

1600842020.korean: 아 씨... 그러니까 이딴 식으로 물고 늘어질 거면 왜 자꾸 내 의견을 들어보자 하냐니까?
1600842020.english: Ah, damn... I'm telling you, if you're going to keep harping on like this, why do you keep asking to hear my opinion?

1600842021.korean: 다시 말하지만 네가 내는 건 그냥 의견이라고. 내가 리더고 넌 그냥 팀원이고. 오케이?
1600842021.english: I'll say it again: what you're saying is just an opinion. I'm the leader, and you're just a team member. Okay?

1600842022.korean: 따박따박 대응해주는 것도 귀찮아 죽겠는데 짜증나게…
1600842022.english: It’s already a pain to have to respond to you one by one, but to make it even more annoying…

1600842023.korean: 야. 삐졌냐? 그래도 너한테는 꽤 중요한 거 맡길 생각이었는데.
1600842023.english: Hey. Are you sulking? Still, I was planning to entrust you with something pretty important.

1600842024.korean: 미안하지만 일말의 눈곱조차 기대감이 안 생기는구나. 대충 스태프나 매니저 같은 걸 시킬 셈이지?
1600842024.english: I'm sorry, but I don't have even the slightest bit of hope. You're just planning to make me do some staff or manager work, aren't you?

1600842025.korean:
그래도 명색이 밴드부 멤버인데 아무리 그래도 내가 그런 걸 너한테 시키겠냐.
내가 너 같이 못된 앤 줄 아냐… 그래도 우리 지휘하라 만들어진 것 같은데 머리 좀 굴려 보라고.
1600842025.english:
Still, you're a band member by name, so do you think I would make you do something like that?
 Do you think I'm a mean kid like you... Still, it seems like you were made to lead us, so use your head a little.

1600842026.korean:
난 만들어진 게 아니래도?! 
됐고, 미안하지만 나도 악기에 대한 소양은 없으니까 기대는 빨리 접는 게 서로에게 좋을 거야.
1600842026.english:
I'm not made, you know?!
 Okay, I'm sorry, but I don't have any aptitude for musical instruments either, so it would be best for both of us to give up on expecting anything soon.

1600842027.korean: 굳이 악기 다룰 필요 있나? 악기 없이 맡는 맡을 수 있는 파트가 있는데.
1600842027.english: Is it really necessary to play an instrument? There are parts I can handle without one.

1600842028.korean: 설마… 보컬? 야, 천아. 너 진심이야?
1600842028.english: No way… Vocals? Hey, Cheon-ah. Are you serious?

1600842029.korean: 워, 원래 보컬은 메인 기타가 같이 하는 거 아냐?!
1600842029.english: Whoa, isn't the main guitar supposed to do the vocals too?!

1600842030.korean: 미쳤다고 내가 너한테 보컬이랑 메인 기타를 동시에 맡기겠냐?
1600842030.english: Do you think I'm crazy enough to entrust you with both vocals and main guitar at the same time?

1600842032.korean: 야, 진짜 필요 없어? 너 찐따처럼 진짜 아무 것도 안 할 거야?
1600842032.english: Hey, do you really not need it? Are you really going to do absolutely nothing like a loser?

1600842033.korean: 파프니르가 보컬도 하고 싶다잖아? 하고 싶은 애한테 기회를 주던가 해.
1600842033.english: Fafnir said he wants to sing too, right? Give the kid who wants to do it a chance.

1600842034.korean: 야, 네가 우리를 만든 여제라면 잘 알텐데… 배터리 주제에 과연 멀티 플레이가 가능할 것 같냐?
1600842034.english: Hey, if you're the Empress who created us, you should know this well... Do you really think a mere battery can handle multiplayer?

1600842035.english: Hiiiing… There’s no reason why it can’t be done!!

1600842036.korean: 됐어. 관심 없으니까. 남는 자리 끼워 맞추기 식이라면 나도 할 생각 없어.
1600842036.english: Forget it. I'm not interested. If it's just going to be a last resort, I have no intention of doing it either.

1600842037.korean: …하, 이래서 진짜 우리 무대 나갈 순 있겠냐?
1600842037.english: … Ha, at this rate, do you really think we can go on stage?

1600842038.korean:
너희들 말이야. 무대는 모든 인원이 단합해 최고의 결과를 보여주는 곳이야.
배역도 하나 하나 신중하게 정해야 한다고. 너희같이 구구주먹 식으로 결정하는 게 맞다고 생각해?
1600842038.english:
I'm talking about you guys. The stage is a place where everyone unites to show the best results.
 You have to be careful with every single role. Do you really think it's right to make decisions like you guys do, in such a haphazard way?

1600842039.korean:
웃기고 자빠졌네. 목숨이 오가는 현장에선 맨날 우리끼리 잘 때워왔어.
너처럼 위에서 명령이나 내리는 게 뭘 안다고…
1600842039.english:
That's ridiculous. We've always managed just fine on our own in life-or-death situations.
 What would someone like you, who just gives orders from above, know...

1600842040.korean: 아이씨, 가만히 성질 죽여주고 있으니까 이것들이… 명령이라도 내려줄까?
1600842040.english: Damn it, I've been keeping my temper down, but these guys... Should I give them an order?

1600842041.korean: 지금 리더 말 안 듣고 지랄하는 게 누군데 큰 소리야?
1600842041.english: Who are you to yell at and ignore the leader?

1600842042.korean:
…그만해라. 이래봤자 도돌이표 아니더냐.
주인님이 우리를 위해 뭐든 해주려는데 대체 이게 무슨 추태지?
1600842042.english:
… Stop it. Isn't this just going back to square one?
 Our master is willing to do anything for us, so what on earth is this disgraceful behavior?

1600842043.korean:
다시 말하지만 적어도 내가 무대에 올라가려면 모든 게 완벽해야 한다고.
하려면 제발 책임감을 가지고 철저하게 하란 말이야…!
1600842043.english:
I'll say it again: at least for me to go on stage, everything has to be perfect.
 If you're going to do it, please do it thoroughly with a sense of responsibility…!

1600842044.korean: ...야, 설마 너… 뒤지게 노래 못 불러서 빼는 거냐?
1600842044.english: ...Hey, no way... are you skipping this because you're terrible at singing?

1600842045.korean: 뭐??? 어이가 없어서! 단순 가창력으로만 따지면 너희들은 전부 수준 미만이라고!
1600842045.english: What??? I'm speechless! If you judge solely on singing ability, you're all substandard!

1600842046.korean: 얼씨구… 발끈하는 거 보니 찔리긴 하나 보지?
1600842046.english: Well then... seeing you get all worked up, I guess you do feel a bit guilty?

1600842047.korean: 야, 말만 나불거리지 말고, 직접 해보라고.
1600842047.english: Hey, stop just talking and do it yourself.

1600842048.korean: 어디 그 잘나신 실력 구경이나 좀 해보자!
1600842048.english: Let's see those splendid skills of yours!

1600842049.korean:
거만하게 이거 해라 저거 해라 해놓곤 정작 와선 수준이 안 맞다느니 하는 거 진심 꼴값이야~
지금 네가 누구 가르치려 들고 싶은 거라면, 같이 올라가서 뭐라도 보여주고 지껄이라고.
1600842049.english:
You act all arrogant telling me to do this and that, and then when you actually show up, you complain that we don't match your level—seriously, what a load of nonsense.
 If you want to teach someone a lesson right now, go up with them and show them something before you start blabbering.

1600842050.english: Seriously, acting like such an idiot... Are you going to whine again?

1600842051.korean:
하! 그래, 천박하긴. 니콜라스를 홀린 이 몸의 가창력과 
무대 연기를 유감 없이 보여주도록 하지!
1600842051.english:
Ha! Right, how vulgar. My singing ability that captivated Nicholas and
 I'll make sure to show you my full stage acting skills!

1600842052.korean: 니콜라스는 무슨… 야, 걍 다 꺼져. 엠프레시스 밴드 해체야. 이런 미친 년들 데리고 밴드는 무슨, 어우…
1600842052.english: Nicholas? What the... Hey, just get lost, everyone. The Empresses band is breaking up. What kind of band is this with these crazy bitches? Ugh...

1600842054.korean: 수많은 남자 중 유일하게 자신을 있는 그대로 사랑해 준 분이라며 늘 그리워하셨지…
1600842054.english: She always missed him, saying he was the only man out of countless who loved her just the way she was…

1600842055.korean: 야, 똥깨! 너까지 머리가 어떻게 됐냐? 진짜 너까지 맛탱이 가면 우리 망해!!!
1600842055.english: Hey, you little bastard! What's wrong with your head, too? Seriously, if you lose your mind too, we're doomed!!!

1600842056.korean: 그래! 자고로 남자란 내 기억 속에서 살아 숨 쉬는 니콜라스 만큼 매력이 있어야 하는 법.
1600842056.english: Right! A man should be as charming as Nicholas, who lives and breathes in my memory.

1600842057.korean:
평생… 휩노스 병으로 돌아가실 때까지… 그 마음 만큼은 변치 않으셨다.
내가 봐왔던 여제님께선 늘 젊었을 적 부군과 찍으신 사진들을 보곤 하셨지…
1600842057.english:
Throughout his life… until he passed away from Hypnos disease… that one thing about his heart never changed.
 The Empress I knew always used to look at photos taken with her husband when she was young…

1600842059.korean: 말 나온 김에 너희들한테 에피소드 하나만 들려주지, 한참 사귀던 중이었을 거야…
1600842059.english: Speaking of which, let me tell you a little anecdote. We must have been dating for quite a while...

1600842060.korean:
