1600850004.english: I really don't know what I want to do... hurting, laughing, getting angry, feeling dumbfounded...

1600850005.english: Ugh... Ugh... My head... My head... It hurts...

1600850006.korean:
- 별안간 그레이스는 심하게 두통이 몰려오는 듯 제 머리카락을 쥐어 뜯었다.
심하게 몸을 떨던 그녀가 이내, 나를 보며 울먹인다.
1600850006.english:
Suddenly, Grace tore at her hair as if a severe headache was sweeping over her.
 She, who had been trembling violently, soon looks at me and chokes up.

1600850007.korean: 이게 내가… 자폭하려는 증상이라는 거지? 어서 피해… 너, 다칠 지도 몰라…
1600850007.english: So this is a sign that I… am trying to self-destruct, right? Get out of the way… You might get hurt…

1600850009.korean: - 로크가 나를 보호하기 위해 날개를 뻗었지만, 나는 뒷걸음치는 그레이스에게 한 발자국 다가갔다.
1600850009.english: Locke spread his wings to protect me, but I took a step closer to Grace, who was backing away.

1600850010.korean: - 자신의 목적을 새로 정하며, 공허함을 극복한 아이가 있었다.
1600850010.english: There was a child who overcame the emptiness by setting a new purpose for himself.

1600850011.korean: - 자신에게 부여된 목적에 고통받고, 분노로 표출하며 파괴하려는 아이도 있었다.
1600850011.english: There was also a child who suffered from the purpose assigned to them, expressed it through anger, and tried to destroy it.

1600850012.korean: - 자신의 목적이 없어지자, 아무렇지 않은 척했지만 실은 크게 방황했던 아이도 있었으며…
1600850012.english: There was also a child who pretended to be fine when their purpose disappeared, but was actually deeply lost…

1600850013.korean: - 자신을 만든 어머니를 가슴에 묻고 애써 덤덤한 척 살아가는 아이도 있었다.
1600850013.english: There was also a child who buried the mother who created him in his heart and tried hard to live as if he were indifferent.

1600850014.korean:
- 하지만 그 아이들 모두를 이해하며 나는 손을 내밀었다.
그것이 항명권이 있음에도 하운드 대원들이 나를 따른 이유이리라.
1600850014.english:
But understanding all those children, I reached out my hand.
 That must be the reason the Hound members followed me, despite having the right to disobey.

1600850015.korean: - 나는 어쩔 줄 몰라 얼굴을 구기는 마리아 그레이스를 품 속으로 와락 끌어안았다.
1600850015.english: I hugged Maria Grace tightly into my arms as she scowled, not knowing what to do.

1600850016.korean: 뭐 하는 짓이야… 난 내가 언제 어떻게 널 다치게 할지 몰라, 비켜…!!
1600850016.english: What are you doing… I never know when or how I might hurt you, get out of my way…!!

1600850017.korean: …실패작인 나 따위한테 대체 왜 이러는 거야?
1600850017.english: … Why on earth are you doing this to someone like me, a failure?

1600850021.korean: - 나는 그레이스의 머리카락에 입을 맞췄다. 두려움과 고통에 눈을 질끈 감았던 그녀는 아무 일도 일어나지 않자, 다시금 눈물을 흘렸다.
1600850021.english: I kissed Grace's hair. She, who had squeezed her eyes shut in fear and pain, shed tears again when nothing happened.

1600850023.english: But… I’m happy… I’m not scared anymore…

1600850025.english: … Is it similar to the feelings the Empress had for Nicholas?

1600850026.korean: 내가 그 누구든 간에, 나를 순수하게 바라보는 널 향한… 나의 감정 말이야…
1600850026.english: No matter who I am, I mean... my feelings for you, who look at me so purely...

1600850027.korean: - 나는 대답 대신 등을 토닥여주자, 그레이스는 마침내 희미한 미소를 지었다.
1600850027.english: When I patted her back instead of answering, Grace finally gave a faint smile.

1600850029.english: … It seems like my headache is going away very, very slowly.

1600850030.korean: …잠깐 동안 널 머릿속에 떠올렸을 뿐인데. 마음이 편해지는 것 같아.
1600850030.english: … I only thought of you for a moment, but it feels like I’m finding peace.

1600850031.korean: - 그레이스는 나의 가슴팍에 동그란 이마를 비비며 어리광을 피웠다.
1600850031.english: Grace rubbed her round forehead against my chest and acted spoiled.

1600850032.english: But I… I’m still so scared.

1600850033.korean: 내가 죽을 수도 있다는 두려움 보다… 내가… 마리아 리오보로스라는 기억을 버리면, 난 뭐가 될 수 있을까…
1600850033.english: Rather than the fear that I might die… if I… cast aside the memory of being Maria Rioboros, what could I become…

1600850034.english: … I’m too afraid to even take a single step...

1600850035.korean: 내가… 여제의 모조품이자 껍데기를 뒤집어 쓰고 살아왔다는… 사실을 잊을 수 있도록…
1600850035.english: So that I can forget the fact that I… have been living as a counterfeit of the Empress, wearing her shell…

1600850036.korean:
내가 마리아 리오보로스가 아닌, 마리아 그레이스의 삶을 살 수 있도록…
니콜라스가 마리아 리오보로스에게 그랬던 것처럼 사랑을 담아…
1600850036.english:
So that I may live the life of Maria Grace, not Maria Rioboros…
 With love, just as Nicholas did for Maria Rioboros…

1600850037.english: Fill my memories… entirely with you…

1600850038.korean: - 내답에 그레이스는 그제야 나를 끌어안으며 웃었다.
1600850038.english: At my answer, Grace finally hugged me and smiled.

1600850040.korean: - 그렇게 마리아 리오보로스는 끝내 자신을 마리아 그레이스로 인정했다.
1600850040.english: And so, Maria Rioboros finally acknowledged herself as Maria Grace.

1600850041.english: -<Project ORCA, Sunrising Stage> To be continued in Part 3.

1600851001.korean:
밴드 연주자들 간 협동심은 필수 요소이지만 일렉이랑 신디는 특히나,
서로의 센스를 믿고 등 뒤를 맡길 수 있을 만큼의 신뢰도가 제일 중요해.
1600851001.english:
Teamwork among band members is an essential element, but especially for electric and synthesizers,
 The most important thing is a level of trust where you can rely on each other's senses and entrust your back to one another.

1600851003.korean:
자, 그런고로! 장화랑 파프니르는 서로의 장점을 파악하면서도, 
즉흥적인 텔레파시적 협동 센스가 필요하다 이 말이야.
1600851003.english:
So, therefore! While Boots and Fafnir understood each other's strengths,
 I'm saying that an impromptu telepathic sense of cooperation is needed.

1600851004.korean: 그런 연설을 왜 오르카 부식 창고에서 하시는 거죠?
1600851004.english: Why are you giving such a speech in the Orca food storage?

1600851005.korean:
지금부턴 악기를 어떻게 연주할 것인가보다는, 서로의 믿음을 다지는 게 도움이 될 거야.
자, 내가 생각하는 가장 호흡이 맞는 두 애들을 데려왔어. 어때?
1600851005.english:
From now on, rather than focusing on how to play the instrument, it will be more helpful to strengthen your trust in each other.
 Okay, I’ve brought the two guys I think have the best chemistry. What do you think?

1600851006.korean:
후훗, 진조의 하얀 야수와 짐은 이미 영혼의 계약까지 맺은 사이!
이 보물 창고의 그 어떤 함정도 능히 피해갈 수 있노라!
1600851006.english:
Hehe, the White Beast of the True Ancestors and I have already even formed a soul contract!
 I can easily avoid any trap in this treasure vault!

1600851007.korean: 후훗, 이 알비스 님한테 창고털이는 그야말로 식은 죽 먹기… 아야야야야야!!
1600851007.english: Hehe, for this Lord Alvis, robbing a warehouse is a piece of cake... Ow ow ow ow!!

1600851008.korean:
내가 못 살아!! 알비스 언니, 제 앞에서 그런 거 막 자랑하면 안 되거든요?!
LRL도 좋은 이유로 온 거 아니니까 잘난 척 그만 해!!
1600851008.english:
I can't believe it!! Alvis, you shouldn't brag about things like that in front of me!
 LRL didn't come here for a good reason either, so stop acting all high and mighty!!

1600851009.korean: …그래서, 지금 우리가 뭘 하려고 창고까지 온 거야?
1600851009.english: … So, what are we trying to do by coming all the way to the warehouse?

1600851011.korean: LRL이랑 알비스는 오르카 부식 창고의 모든 함정을 외운 대단한 듀오라고 할 수 있지.
1600851011.english: LRL and Alvis are an amazing duo who have memorized all the traps in the Orca Corrosion Warehouse.

1600851012.korean: 간단해. 안드바리가 설치한 함정을 둘이서, 알비스랑 LRL보다 더 빠르게 탈출하는 훈련이야~
1600851012.english: It's simple. It's a training exercise where the two of you escape the trap set by Andvari faster than Alvis and LRL.

1600851013.korean:
하, 우리가 겨우 어린 애들이랑 대결을 해서 이기는 게 훈련이라고?
야... 내가 잠입하는 임무를 원 데이 투데이 해본 줄 아냐?
1600851013.english:
Ha, you call beating mere kids training?
 Hey... do you think I've only done infiltration missions once or twice?

1600851014.korean: 그쯤이야 당연히 우리가 이기고 남을 텐데 우릴 무시해도 한참이나 무시하는 거 아냐?! 우리 하운드라고!!
1600851014.english: Of course we would win that and then some! Aren't you seriously ignoring us?! We're the Hounds!!

1600851015.korean: 나는 LRL이랑 알비스가 이길 것 같다고 생각하는데~ 정말 이 최강의 듀오를 이길 수 있겠어?
1600851015.english: I think LRL and Albies will win~ Can you really beat this ultimate duo?

1600851016.korean: 하다하다… 이젠 제 보안 장치로 협동심 트레이닝이라고요? 제발…
1600851016.english: To think I’d go too far… now you’re using my security device for teamwork training? Please…

1600851017.korean: 후훗, 어리석은 황금용이여… 진조의 하얀 야수와 이 짐을 물로 보지 말거라!!
1600851017.english: Hehe, foolish Golden Dragon... Do not underestimate the White Beast of the True Ancestors and this burden!!

1600851018.korean: 흥, 웃기고 앉았네. 우리가 너희 꼬맹이들 하나 못 이길 것 같아?!
1600851018.english: Hmph, you're kidding. Do you think we can't beat you little brats?!

1600851019.english: I'm telling you, this isn't a brag!!!

1600851022.korean: 흥 꼬맹이, 달리기도 훨씬 느린 주제… 으아아아앗?! 이건 웬 지하 함정이냐고오오오오?!
1600851022.english: Hmph, kid, you're much slower at running... Aaaah?! What kind of underground trap is this?!

1600851023.korean: 기다려, 당황하지 마라! 이건 안드바리의 함정이니라!!
1600851023.english: Wait, do not panic! This is Andvari's trap!!

1600851024.korean: 야!! 바보니르!! 부비트랩이잖아!! 왜 그런 걸 밟고 난리야!!!
1600851024.english: Hey!! Babonir!! It's a booby trap!! Why are you making such a fuss by stepping on something like that!!!

1600851027.korean: 난 가슴이 커서 창살을 못 비집고 나간… 아아아아아아악!!! 아파아아아앗?!
1600851027.english: My breasts are too big so I couldn't squeeze through the bars… Aaaaaaaah!!! It hurtsttttt?!

1600851028.korean: 야, 가슴에 살 좀… 빼 이년아!!!
1600851028.english: Hey, lose some fat on your chest... you bitch!!!

1600851029.english: Next time, I'll have to make the bars closer together...

1600851030.korean: 야, 바보니르… 제발, 함정에 걸리지… 아이씨 나까지 엮였잖아아아아아!!!!
1600851030.english: Hey, Babonir... please, don't fall into the trap... Ugh, now I'm dragged into this too!!!!

1600851031.korean: 알비스는 이미, 함정의 사각지대를 다 외워 놨다고!!
1600851031.english: Alvis has already memorized all the blind spots of the trap!!

1600851032.english: It's not something to brag about...

1600851033.korean: 자, 알비스랑 LRL은 1분 2초 탈출… 그리고 파프니르랑 천아는… 5분!!
1600851033.english: Okay, Alvis and LRL escaped at 1 minute 2 seconds... and Fafnir and Cheona... 5 minutes!!

1600851034.korean: 무슨 소리야? 내가 알비스랑 LRL 다음으로 얼마 안 돼서 들어왔는데!
1600851034.english: What are you talking about? I joined shortly after Alvis and LRL!

1600851035.korean: 팀전이라니까~ 개인이 아무리 빨리 들어와 봤자 아무런 소용없어!
1600851035.english: I told you, it's a team match! No matter how fast an individual comes in, it's no use!

1600851036.korean: …미치겠다. 얠 데리고 같이 결승선 까지 와야 한다고?!
1600851036.english: … I'm going crazy. I have to take this kid all the way to the finish line with me?!

1600851037.korean: 야!! 내가 함정에 걸리면 네가 구해줘야 할 거 아냐!! 너만 냅다 뛰면 어떡해?!
1600851037.english: Hey!! If I fall into a trap, you're supposed to save me!! What do you mean by just running off by yourself?!

1600851038.korean: 야! 너야말로 그 둔한 신경으로 촐랑거리니까 함정을 다 밟는 거 아냐?!
1600851038.english: Hey! You're the one who keeps stepping into traps because you're so hyperactive with those dull nerves!

1600851039.korean: 답이 나왔네. 너희들은 각자 개인플레이만 할 줄 알지, 전혀 호흡을 안 맞추고 있잖아.
1600851039.english: The answer is clear. You guys only know how to play your own games; you aren't coordinating at all.

1600851041.english: What am I doing with this idiot...

1600851042.korean: 후훗, 짐과 하얀 야수를 이기려면 100년은 더 수련해야 할 것이야… 크큭!
1600851042.english: Hehe, you'll have to train for another 100 years to defeat Jim and the White Beast... Hehe!

1600851043.korean: 자랑 아니라고…!! 아자즈 씨 말대로 정말 레일건을 설치할 걸 그랬어!!!
1600851043.english: I'm not bragging...!! Just like Mr. Azaz said, I really should have installed a railgun!!!

1600851044.korean: 으흠… 에헴!! 어디 한 번 더 해보겠느냐?
1600851044.english: Ahem... Ahem!! Would you like to try one more time?

1600851045.korean: …이게 대체 밴드랑 무슨 상관이 있는 건지는 모르겠다만.
1600851045.english: … I don’t know what on earth this has to do with the band, though.

1600851046.korean: 나도 이 빡통 데리고 온갖 포위망을 뚫던 고인물이거든?!
1600851046.english: I'm a veteran who used to break through all sorts of encircles with this idiot, you know?!

1600851047.korean: 좋아, 제대로 한 번 해볼 생각인데?
1600851047.english: Alright, I'm thinking of giving it a proper try.

1600851048.korean: 좋다, 어디 한 번 더 도전 해보거라!!
1600851048.english: Good, go ahead and try one more time!!

1600851049.english: Now, White Beast... It's a smoke bomb!!

1600851050.korean: 좋았어! LRL 이때야! 어서 이터널 사이클롭스 빔을…!!
1600851050.english: Alright! LRL, now's the time! Hurry, the Eternal Cyclops Beam…!!

1600851051.english: Hey!! Babonir!! You fell into a trap again?!

1600851053.korean: 허억… 허억… 바보니르으으으으으!!!! 그 함정 건들지 마아아아아아아!!!!!!!!!

1600851055.korean: 후훗, 언제든지 덤벼도 우리 둘의 팀워크를 절대 이길 수 없노라!!
1600851055.english: Hehe, no matter when you challenge us, you can never beat our teamwork!!

1600851057.korean: 으우… 왜 그렇게 무섭게 쏘아보는 건데에… 히이이잉…
1600851057.english: Ugh... Why are you staring at me so menacingly... Hiiiiiiing...

1600851058.korean: …정말이지, 지독할 정도로 이렇게까지 합이 안 맞는 듀오는 처음 보는데.
1600851058.english: … Honestly, this is the first time I’ve seen a duo that is so terribly out of sync.

1600851059.korean: 잠깐… 하, 한 번만 더… 한 번만…
1600851059.english: Wait... Ha, just one more time... Just one more time...

1600851060.english: Are you sure you can really pull this off...?

1600851061.korean: 우릴 바보 취급 하지 말라고…!! 이제 정말 파악 끝났어!!!
1600851061.english: Don't treat us like fools…!! I’ve really figured it out now!!!

1600851062.korean: …여전히 뒤쳐지는데… 그나저나, 파프니르는 걸렸던 함정에도 또 걸리고… 응?
1600851062.english: … Still falling behind… Anyway, Fafnir fell into the same trap again… Huh?

1600851063.english: Hurry up and go first, Janghwa!!

1600851065.korean: …서로 장애물을 극복하는게 아니라, 아예 파프니르가 장애물의 탱커 역할을 하고 있어?!
1600851065.english: … They aren't overcoming obstacles together; Fafnir is actually acting as the tank for the obstacles?!

1600851066.korean: 아자즈 씨의 함정을… 몸으로 극복하고 있잖아...?! 저 언니들 대체… 뭐죠?!
1600851066.english: They're overcoming Azaz's trap... with their bodies...?! What on earth are those older sisters...?!

1600851067.english: I figured it out...!! The trap pattern in this corrosive warehouse!!

1600851069.english: W-what are you talking about... No?!

1600851070.korean: 좋았어!! 꼬맹이들보다 내가 먼저 들어 왔어…!
1600851070.english: Great!! I got in before the little ones…!

1600851071.korean: ...아직 저 아래에 파프니르 언니가... LRL!! 얼른 뛰어 와!!!
1600851071.english: ...Fafnir is still down there... LRL!! Hurry up and run over!!!

1600851072.korean: 바보니르!! 와이어를 잡아!! 단숨에 끌어 당긴다?!
1600851072.english: Babonir!! Grab the wire!! Pull it in in an instant?!

1600851078.korean: …내가 의도하려던 건 아니었는데. 전혀 다른 방식으로 해냈어?
1600851078.english: … That wasn't what I intended. Did you manage to do it in a completely different way?

1600851079.korean: 하아… 하아… 진짜 이건 미친 짓… 야! 무거워, 얼른 안 비켜, 바보니르?!
1600851079.english: Haa... Haa... This is seriously crazy... Hey! It's heavy, get out of the way, you idiot?!

1600851080.korean: 내가 함정을 다 밟아준 거 아니면 넌 골인도 못했다고!!
1600851080.english: If it weren't for me stepping on all the traps, you wouldn't have even made it to the goal!!

1600851081.korean: 무식한 언니들. 보통 바이오로이드라면 피해갈 함정을… 몸으로 파훼했다고...?
1600851081.english: You ignorant sisters. You destroyed a trap that a normal bioroid would have avoided... with your body...?

1600851082.korean: 대단하도다… 짐은 그런 식으로는 절대 창고를 빠져나가지 못할 것이느니라…
1600851082.english: How magnificent… The cargo will never be able to escape the warehouse in that manner…

1600851083.korean: 대단해… 헤헤, 우리도 배워야 겠는… 아야야야야!!!
1600851083.english: That's amazing… Hehe, we should learn from this too… Ow ow ow ow!!!

1600851084.korean: 대체 뭘 배워요!! 지금 이게 자랑이라고 알비스 언니는 생각해요?!
1600851084.english: What on earth are you learning!! Do you really think this is something to be proud of, Alvis?!

1600851085.english: … Hey, Babonir. Your judgment earlier was good, wasn't it?

1600851086.korean:
내가 다 당해보면서 외운 거라고… 
네가 함정이 어디서 나올 건지 미리 알려줬으니까 사전에 당황하지 않고 맞을 수 있었어!
1600851086.english:
I memorized it by going through it all myself...
 Since you told me in advance where the traps would come from, I was able to take them without panicking!

1600851087.korean: 바로 그거야, 어쨌든 둘이서 장점을 살린 거잖아? 나는 이런 걸 바랐다고.
1600851087.english: That's exactly it. Anyway, the two of you really brought out your strengths, didn't you? That's exactly what I was hoping for.

1600851088.korean:
신디랑 일렉은 서로를 믿고 음악이 뭉개지지 않게 조율하는 게 좋아.
앞으로도 그렇게 의외성 있는 플레이를 해보라고!
1600851088.english:
It's good for the synthesizer and electric to trust each other and coordinate so the music doesn't get messed up.
 Keep playing with that kind of unexpected flair in the future!

1600851089.korean: …하, 어이가 없네. 내가 살다 살다 바보니르랑 이런 것까지 하게 되다니...
1600851089.english: … Ha, this is ridiculous. I can't believe I've lived long enough to end up doing something like this with Babonir...

1600851090.korean: 진짜 성격이 제일 더러운 애랑… 어떻게…
1600851090.english: With the kid with the really the worst personality... how...

1600851091.korean: …너, 아까 전엔 그래도 좀 꽤 쳤다?
1600851091.english: … You actually hit pretty well earlier, didn't you?

1600851092.korean: 하하! 그러니까 바보 취급 하지 말라고!!
1600851092.english: Haha! I told you not to treat me like an idiot!!

1600851093.korean: 좋아… 그래, 최대한 내가 네 템포에 맞춰줄 테니까. 돌아가면 다시 합주해 보자.
1600851093.english: Okay… fine, I’ll try my best to match your tempo. Let’s play together again when we get back.

1600851094.korean: 그럼 이렇게 정해. 내가 먼저 들어가고, 모자라면 내가 눈짓할 테니까, 네가 바로 들어와서 도와줘.
1600851094.english: Okay, let's decide this. I'll go in first, and if we run out of space, I'll signal you, so you come right in and help.

1600851095.korean: 후우… 그래, 그 마귀할멈 밑에서 온갖 엿같은 일은 다했는데… 우리가 이거 하나 못하겠냐?
1600851095.english: Phew... Yeah, we did all sorts of shitty work under that witch... Do you think we can't do this one thing?

1600851096.korean: 알았어. 이번엔 제대로 해서 칭찬 받아보자고!
1600851096.english: Alright. Let's do it right this time and get praised!

1600852001.korean:
…아시다시피, 베이스와 드럼은 밴드의 중추나 다름없습니다. 
빈 부분을 센스있게 채워주는 일렉과 신디와 다르게, 둘 중 하나가 무너지면 완전히 그 리듬이 틀어지죠.
1600852001.english:
… As you know, the bass and drums are practically the backbone of the band.
 Unlike the electric and synth instruments, which cleverly fill in the empty spaces, if either one collapses, the rhythm gets completely messed up.

1600852003.korean: 우리 둘 중 한 명이라도 삐끗한다면 공연을 말아먹기 딱 좋다는 거군.
1600852003.english: So, if even one of us slips up, it's the perfect recipe for ruining the show.

1600852004.korean: …으이구, 야. 너는 어떻게 쿵짝짝! 응? 이런 기본적인 박자 하나 못 맞춰서 그러냐?!
1600852004.english: … Ugh, hey. How can you not even keep up with a basic beat like that?!

1600852006.korean: 노력하고 있긴 뭘!! 아니 이게 어려워?
1600852006.english: Trying hard for what?! I mean, is this hard?

1600852007.korean: …그렇게 서로만 탓하고 있다면, 절대 밴드 실력이 늘진 않을 겁니다.
1600852007.english: … If you keep blaming each other like that, your band skills will never improve.

1600852008.korean: 근데, 특훈을 한다면서 왜 하필 오락실로 우릴 끌고 온 거야?
1600852008.english: But why did you drag us to the arcade of all places when you said you were doing special training?

1600852009.korean: 현재 하운드 분들, 특히나 천아 씨와 바르그 씨의 호흡 향상을 위해 필요한 건 '협동심'과 '박자감'이죠.
1600852009.english: What is needed right now for the Hound members, especially Cheon-ah and Barg, to improve their teamwork is 'cooperation' and 'a sense of rhythm'.

1600852010.english: The goal of the special training is simple.

1600852011.english: ...You're saying Epsilon and I need special training?

1600852012.korean:
엡실론 씨와 이레이나 씨는 이 오락실의 제왕과도 같은 존재.
GAL 9000 씨도 결국 두 분께 무릎꿇고 말았죠.
1600852012.english:
Mr. Epsilon and Ms. Ireina are like the kings of this arcade.
 Even GAL 9000 ended up kneeling before the two of you.

1600852013.korean: 천아 씨와 바르그 씨가 이 두 분의 게임 점수보다 높게 나온다면 특훈을 종료하도록 하지요.
1600852013.english: If Cheona and Barg score higher than these two, we will end the special training.

1600852014.korean: 얘네를 게임으로 어떻게 이기라고?! 밥만 먹고 오락실만 오는 둘을 무슨 수로…
1600852014.english: How am I supposed to beat these guys at a game?! How am I supposed to deal with two who just eat and come to the arcade...

1600852015.korean:
종목은 리듬 게임입니다. 아무리 게임을 잘한다 한들, 
둘이 하나 되어 한 곡을 클리어하는 것은 고난도의 기술일 겁니다...
1600852015.english:
The game is a rhythm game. No matter how good you are at the game,
 Clearing a song as two people becomes one must be a high-level skill...

1600852016.korean:
우으… 마, 마왕 오빠를 모든 게임으로 이긴 내가 절대 게임을 질 리 없어!
엡실론 언니도 그렇게 생각하지?
1600852016.english:
Ugh... M-I, having beaten the Demon King in every game, there's absolutely no way I'll lose!
 Epsilon, you think so too, right?

1600852017.korean: …이런 일로 날 부르는 게 말이 된다고 생각해? 나 숙소에서 신작 게임 할 거 있는데.
1600852017.english: … Do you think it makes sense to call me for something like this? I have a new game to play at my accommodation.

1600852018.korean: 이번 특훈에 참가하시면 사령관님께서 특별히 엡실론 씨께 휴가권을 지급해드리기로 약속했습니다.
1600852018.english: If you participate in this special training, the Commander has promised to grant you a special vacation pass, Mr. Epsilon.

1600852019.korean: ...잠깐 기다려 봐. 내가 쓰는 게임용 패드 좀 가져올게.
1600852019.english: ...Wait a moment. I'll go get the gaming controller I use.

1600852020.english: Then, shall we get started, all four of you?

1600852021.korean: …특훈이 왜 이렇게 된 건지 모르지만, 어쩔 수 없네. 알았어.
1600852021.english: … I don't know why the special training turned out this way, but I guess it can't be helped. Got it.

1600852022.english: … *Sniff*. What the heck. I played really hard for nothing.

1600852023.korean: 야, 똥강아지!! 정신 안 차려?! 오른쪽 사이드는 네가 맡기로 했잖아!!!
1600852023.english: Hey, you little brat!! Get a grip?! You're the one who's supposed to take the right side!!!

1600852024.korean: 롱 노트가 네 쪽으로 가는데 그 쪽은 네 소관이 아니냐?!
1600852024.english: The long note is going toward you, isn't that your responsibility?!

1600852025.korean: 그리고 이 패턴은 왜 계속 놓치는 거야?! 이거 몰라?!
1600852025.english: And why do you keep missing this pattern?! Don't you know this?!

1600852027.korean:
자꾸 그렇게 서로만 탓하신다면, 절대 협동심이 늘 수 없습니다.
더군다나 두 분은 특히나 완벽한 호흡이 필요한 포지션이시죠. 두 분 중 한 분이 무너져도 음악이 망가집니다.
1600852027.english:
If you keep blaming each other like that, your teamwork will never improve.
 Moreover, your positions require perfect chemistry. If either of you falters, the music falls apart.

1600852028.korean: 서로의 문제점을 먼저 파악한 후, 그것을 보완하는 방법은 어떠십니까?
1600852028.english: How about identifying each other's weaknesses first and then working to improve them?

1600852029.korean:
알겠거든?! 자꾸 그렇게 강조 안 해도 이미 엄청나게 압박받고 있거든~~~?!
잔소리만 하지 말고 추천하는 방법이라도 있으면 좀 알려줘보던가!
1600852029.english:
I get it, right?! You don't have to keep emphasizing it; I'm already under tremendous pressure~~~?!
 Stop just nagging and at least let me know if you have a suggestion!

1600852030.korean:
리듬게임을 둘이서 플레이하려면 어느 한 쪽 부분만 담당을 정하는 걸로는 절대 높은 점수를 얻기 힘들어.
실시간으로 서로의 모자란 부분을 채워 넣고 밀고 나가는 게 중요하지.
1600852030.english:
If you want to play a rhythm game with two people, it is impossible to get a high score by assigning only one part to a specific player.
 It is important to fill in each other's shortcomings in real time and push forward.

1600852031.korean: 모자란 부분...? 엡실론 언니는 내가 모자랐던 부분이 있었다고 생각해?!
1600852031.english: My shortcomings...? Epsilon, do you think there were parts where I was lacking?!

1600852032.english: … Hehehe, I don't want to teach a novice.

1600852033.korean: 하, 하수라니?! 엡실론 언니 나보다 못하잖아!!
1600852033.english: H-What do you mean, a novice?! Epsilon, you're worse than me!!

1600852034.korean:
좋습니다. 이틀 후, 다시 뵙도록 하죠. 
엡실론 씨와 이레이나 씨 듀오를 이기려면 많이 노력하셔야 할 것입니다.
1600852034.english:
Okay. I'll see you again in two days.
 You will have to work hard to beat the duo of Mr. Epsilon and Ms. Ireina.

1600852035.korean: …뭔데 너희 갑자기 리듬게임을 미친 듯이 연습하냐?
1600852035.english: … What’s up with you guys suddenly practicing rhythm games like crazy?

1600852037.english: You little brat, that thing on the right!

1600852039.korean:
아오! 야, 그걸 또 놓쳐?! 이게… 어? 이게… 하아… 아냐 됐어.
그래, 이번엔 포지션을 바꿔서 다시 해보자.
1600852039.english:
Argh! Hey, you missed that again?! This... huh? This... Haa... No, never mind.
 Okay, let's switch positions and try again this time.

1600852042.korean: …우, 울긴 누가 운다고?! 다, 단지… 그냥, 답답해서…
1600852042.english: … W-Who said I’m crying?! It’s, just… I’m just… frustrated…

1600852043.korean: 와, 나 쟤가 이런 걸로 글썽거리는 거 처음 봐.
1600852043.english: Wow, this is the first time I've seen him get teary-eyed over something like this.

1600852045.korean:
…야 바르그. 너 말이야. 내가 너한테 화를 내는 건...
네 몫도 제대로 못하면서 내가 맡은 것까지 욕심내니까 그러는 거야.
1600852045.english:
… Hey, Varg. I'm talking about you. The reason I'm angry at you is...
 It's because you're greedily taking on the work I was in charge of, when you can't even do your part properly.

1600852046.korean:
내가 맡은 노트는 내가 알아서 칠 테니까, 네가 맡은 몫만 열심히 하면 된다고.
네가 우리 부대 대장이라고 해서, 네가 잘해야지, 뭐 해야지 그딴 생각 하는 거면 좀 버려 제발!
1600852046.english:
I'll take care of the notes I'm in charge of, so you just need to do your part well.
 Just because you're the commander of our unit, if you're thinking you have to do a good job or whatever, please just get rid of that nonsense!

1600852047.korean: 하지만, 네가 못한다고 하도 구박하지 않았느냐…
1600852047.english: But didn't I scold you so much for being bad at it...

1600852048.korean:
그야 못 하는 거랑 오지랖 부리는 건 또 다른 문제니까 그렇지!
아무튼 내 걱정은 하지 말고 바르그 너는 네가 맡은 일에 최선을 다하면 된다고.
1600852048.english:
That’s because being unable to do something and being nosy are two completely different things!
 Anyway, don't worry about me, Barg; you just need to do your best at the work assigned to you.

1600852049.english: … I'm telling you to trust me.

1600852050.korean: 하, 멸망 전에 배신자 처형하고 다니던 애가 오지랖 안 부리는 게 말처럼 쉽겠냐.
1600852050.english: Ha, do you think it’s as easy as it sounds for a kid who went around executing traitors before the apocalypse to stop being nosy?

1600852052.korean: 파프니르랑 넌… 어떻게 됐냐? 슬레이프니르랑 특훈한다 하지 않았어?
1600852052.english: You and Fafnir... what happened? Didn't you say you were doing special training with Sleipnir?

1600852053.korean:
…우린 통과했지. 너희랑 마리아만 끝나면 돼. 난 여유롭게 바보니르 캐리까지 해줬는데…
둘은 대체 뭐 하느라 그렇게 얼타고 있는 거냐?
1600852053.english:
… We made it through. We just need to finish up with you guys and Maria. I even leisurely carried Babonir…
 What on earth are you two doing, standing there looking so spaced out?

1600852054.korean: …하, 내가 살다 살다 쟤한테 잔소리를 다 듣네.
1600852054.english: … Ha, I can't believe I'm getting nagged by him in my life.

1600852056.korean: 야, 똥강아지. 우리가 쟤한테 잔소리까지 들어가면서 이래야겠냐?
1600852056.english: Hey, you little brat. Do we really have to go through all this trouble and listen to him nag us?

1600852057.korean:
이번엔 전략을 이렇게 바꿔보자. 바르그 넌 박치니까… 
롱 노트를 기본으로 전담하고, 내가 다른 노트를 최대한 커버 칠 테니까…
1600852057.english:
Let's change the strategy this time. Varg, since you're a headbutt...
 You'll take charge of the long notes as the base, and I'll cover the other notes as much as possible...

1600852058.korean:
그 다크서클들은... 설마 제대로 주무시지도 않고 내내 연습만 하신 겁니까?
멀쩡한 정신도 아닌데, 엡실론 씨와 이레이나 씨 듀오한테 재도전 하시겠다고요?
1600852058.english:
Those dark circles... surely you didn't practice all day without getting any proper sleep, did you?
 You're not exactly in your right mind, yet you're saying you're going to challenge the Epsilon and Ireina duo again?

1600852059.korean: 할 수 있어… 가뜩이나 합주 연습해야 하는데… 이런 특훈에 시간 뺏길 수 없다고.
1600852059.english: I can do it… I have to practice the ensemble as it is… I can’t let this kind of special training take up my time.

1600852060.korean: ...좋은 자세인 걸? 마왕 오빠가 칼 갈고 우리한테 도전장을 내밀었을 때 모습 같은데?
1600852060.english: ...That's a good attitude, isn't it? It looks just like when the Demon King was sharpening his sword and issuing a challenge to us.

1600852061.korean: 알겠습니다. 그렇다면 다시 시작하지요. 모두 준비하시고, 집중해주시기 바랍니다.
1600852061.english: Understood. In that case, let's begin again. Please get ready and concentrate, everyone.

1600852063.korean: …좋아, 하던 대로 하는 거야. 똥강아지. 알겠어?
1600852063.english: … Fine, just do what you've been doing. You little rascal. Got it?

1600852064.english: Got it… Are you ready, Cheon?

1600852067.english: Sister, is this another plan to brutally defeat us?

1600852068.english: ...Your chemistry has improved more than I expected.

1600852070.korean: 걱정 마! 바르그, 내가 누를 동안 잠깐 연주해 줘!!
1600852070.english: Don't worry! Varg, play for a moment while I press the button!!

1600852072.korean: 좋아, 똥강아지. 싱크로나이즈드 훈련 때 그거야!!
1600852072.english: Alright, little rascal. That's the one from synchronized training!!

1600852073.english: I understand, then here I go!!

1600852074.korean: 대단해... 어려운 끝판왕 곡을… 우리랑 똑같이 퍼펙트로 치고 있어…?
1600852074.english: That's amazing... You're playing that tough, ultimate song... perfectly, just like us...?

1600852075.english: Okay, sis and I are going serious too…!!

1600852076.korean: 마의 구간… 물론 이레이나 씨와 엡실론 씨한테는 별 거 아니겠지만…
1600852076.english: The dreaded section… Of course, it’s probably no big deal to Ms. Ireina and Mr. Epsilon…

1600852078.korean: 흣… 앗?! 천아! 네 쪽으로 노트 하나가!!
1600852078.english: Hmph... Ah?! Cheon-ah! There's a notebook towards you!!

1600852079.english: Ah, this looks like it'll be hard to play...

1600852080.english: I'll handle this! Cheon-ah, form change...!!

1600852082.korean: 엡실론 언니... 왜 거기서 퍼펙트 대신 그레이트를…?!
1600852082.english: Epsilon... why did you say Great instead of Perfect there...?!

1600852084.english: Alright!! Cheon-ah!! It's time for a turnaround!!

1600852085.english: … That’s amazing. To think it grew in just two days.

1600852086.english: Haa... Haa... Seriously... It was tough for us...

1600852087.korean: 그래, 이것이 팀워크, 잠시… 이 감각을 잊고 있었어…
1600852087.english: Yeah, this is teamwork. For a moment... I had forgotten this feeling...

1600852088.korean:
…수고하셨습니다. 베이스와 드럼은 바로 그런 것.
그 마인드를 잊지 말고, 연습 하신다면, 분명 향상된 무대를 펼치실 수 있으실 겁니다.
1600852088.english:
… Thank you for your hard work. That is exactly what bass and drums are.
 If you do not forget that mindset and practice, you will surely be able to deliver an improved performance.

1600852089.english: We will conclude the special training here.

1600852090.korean: 엡실론 언니. 나한테 뭐 할 말 없어?
1600852090.english: Epsilon, don't you have anything to say to me?

1600852092.korean: 내가 모를 줄 알아?! 언니 말이야… 아까 전에 그 강아지 언니가 친 노트는 그레이트였는데…
1600852092.english: Do you think I wouldn't know?! I'm talking about you, sis… The note you typed earlier was Great…

1600852093.korean: 언니가 게임기 속으로 정신 옮긴 뒤에 퍼펙트로 대신 쳐줬잖아!
1600852093.english: After my sister transferred her mind into the game console, she played it perfectly for me!

1600852094.korean: 그레이트 삑사리도 그것 때문에 난 거 아냐?!
1600852094.english: Wasn't that the reason for that great squeak too?!

1600852095.english: What are you talking about? Yawn...

1600852096.korean: …숙소 가서, 다른 게임 하자. 안 그래도 사령관이 새로 나온 던전 못 깨서 우리한테 같이 깨달라고 엉엉 울던데?
1600852096.english: … Let's go back to the lodgings and play another game. The Commander was actually crying his eyes out, begging us to clear the new dungeon with him because he couldn't.

1600852097.korean: …진짜? 마왕 오빠가 못 깨고 엉엉 우는 거면 당연히 내가 같이 깨줘야지…
1600852097.english: …Really? If the Demon King is crying his eyes out because he can't wake up, of course I have to wake up with him…

1600852098.english: Epsilon unnie~ Let's go~ Let's go~

1600853001.korean: 여제의 가창력에 대해서 에라토는 어떤 게 문제라고 생각해?
1600853001.english: Erato, what do you think is the problem with the Empress's singing ability?

1600853002.korean:
여제의 노래가 어설픈 건 아니야. 확실히 기본기는 잡혀있지만…
하르페 말 대로… 기교에만 머무른 느낌이랄까?
1600853002.english:
It’s not that the Empress’s singing is amateurish. She certainly has the basics down, but…
 As Harpe said… it feels like it stuck only in technique, I guess?

1600853005.korean:
코러스를 넣는 다른 멤버들은 큰 문제가 안 되지만… 
메인 보컬은 가사를 전달하는 스토리텔러인 만큼 다른 밴드 멤버들보다 훨씬 관객의 집중도를 이끌어낼 수 있어야 하지.
1600853005.english:
The other members who add the chorus aren't a big problem, but...
 As the main vocalist is the storyteller delivering the lyrics, they must be able to draw the audience's attention much more than the other band members.

1600853006.korean: 노래랑 연기는 그 영역이 다른 건가…
1600853006.english: Are singing and acting in different realms...

1600853007.korean: 그건 아니라고 생각해. 연기도 몰입하는 거고, 노래도 몰입하면서 부르는 거니까…?
1600853007.english: I don't think so. Acting is about immersion, and singing is about immersing yourself, so...?

1600853009.korean: 혹시, 이 노래를 꼭 들려주고 싶는 상대가 있어?
1600853009.english: Is there someone you really want to play this song for?

1600853011.korean: 딱히 생각해본 적은… 없어. 공연을 펼치는 관객… 이랑, 니콜라스… 정도?
1600853011.english: I haven't really thought about it... Maybe the audience putting on the performance... and Nicholas...?

1600853012.korean: 음~ 관객도 좋지만 몰입하기엔 너무 추상적이라고 생각하지 않아? 이입하기 까다로울 것 같아.
1600853012.english: Hmm... I like the audience, but don't you think it's too abstract to get immersed in? I think it would be difficult to connect with.

1600853013.korean: 하르페는 공연했을 때 노래를 부르면서 떠오른 대상이…
1600853013.english: The object that came to mind while Harpe was singing during the performance…

1600853014.english: Ah~ haha… Of course it must have been the producer~?

1600853016.korean:
그때야 사실… 사령… 아니, 프로듀서한테 내 노래를 꼭 들려주고 싶었으니까… 
응, 맞아! 프로듀서를 생각하면서 노래를 불렀어.
1600853016.english:
Back then, actually… the commander… no, the producer… I really wanted to let him hear my song…
 Yeah, that's right! I sang the song while thinking of the producer.

1600853017.korean: 이 무대를 준비해주고, 우리를 응원해줬던 건 다름 아닌 프로듀서였으니까.
1600853017.english: Because it was none other than the producer who prepared this stage and cheered for us.

1600853018.korean: 이런 말 하면 조금 부끄럽긴 하지만… 사랑하는 마음으로 불렀다… 랄까… 에헤헤…
1600853018.english: It feels a little embarrassing to say this, but... I sang it with love... or something like that... Hehehe...

1600853020.english: … I did sing it while thinking of Nicholas, too.

1600853021.korean: 아냐… 그건 사랑하는 사람을 떠올리며 부르는 느낌이 아니었어. 호소력이 전혀 없었거든.
1600853021.english: No… that didn’t feel like singing while thinking of someone you love. It lacked any emotional depth at all.

1600853022.korean: 무, 무슨… 내가 그럼 니콜라스를 사랑한다는 게 아니란 거야?!
1600853022.english: W-what... So you're saying I don't love Nicholas?!

1600853023.english: Why don't you try empathizing with the commander instead?

1600853024.korean:
…그 변태 한량한테 이입할 게 뭐가 있다고?!
난 절대 그 인간한테 들려줄 아량으로는 노래 못 불러!
1600853024.english:
… What is there to empathize with about that perverted loser?!
 I could never sing with the generosity to let that guy hear it!

1600853025.korean: 차라리… 니콜라스를 떠올리면서 노래를 하는 게 훨씬…
1600853025.english: Rather… it would be much… to sing while thinking of Nicholas…

1600853027.english: … But considering how you say it, how should I put it… it lacks 'sincerity'...

1600853028.korean: 비난하려는 의도는 없지만 그 니콜라스란 사람은… 너무 오래 전 사람 아닌가…? 헤헤…
1600853028.english: I don't mean to be critical, but that Nicholas... isn't he from way back...? Hehe...

1600853029.korean:
후렴 가사에도, '너에게' 라는 가사가 있는데, '너'한테 부르는 느낌이 안 들어…
이걸 계속 인식하면서 연습하는 게 좋겠어.
1600853029.english:
Even in the chorus, there is the line 'to you,' but it doesn't feel like it's being sung to 'you'...
 It would be good to practice while keeping this in mind.

1600853031.korean: 내 부하들이 불렀던 코러스에서는… 어색하거나 이상한 감정이 느껴지진 않았어?
1600853031.english: In the chorus my subordinates sang… didn’t you feel any awkwardness or strangeness?

1600853032.korean: 오히려 여제를 서포트 하려는 파워풀한 기상이 느껴지던데!
1600853032.english: On the contrary, I could sense a powerful spirit intending to support the Empress!

1600853034.korean: …아무리 그래도 그렇지, 나보고 그 변태 놈을 떠올리라니.
1600853034.english: … Even so, to think of that pervert.

1600853035.korean: 너희들이야… 이미 그놈을 따르고 있으니까, 그런 가사에도 그 남자를 떠올리면서 자연스럽게 이입할 수 있겠지.
1600853035.english: As for you guys... since you're already following that guy, you can naturally empathize with those lyrics while thinking of him.

1600853036.korean:
오르카에도 노래를 부를 기회가 생긴 대원들이 제법 많아졌는데~
매번 내가 트레이닝을 해주면서 느낀 건, 누구에게나 가창력으로 부족한 면모가 있지만…
1600853036.english:
Quite a few members of Orca have also gotten the chance to sing~
 What I’ve felt every time I train is that everyone has areas where their singing ability is lacking, but…

1600853037.korean:
하나같이 모두 노래 안에서 녹여내는 감정은 진심이었는걸?
방금 여제도 하운드 대원들이 사령관 생각하면서 부른다는 건 인정하지 않았어?
1600853037.english:
The emotions poured into every single one of the songs were genuine, weren't they?
 Didn't the Empress just admit that the Hound members are calling out while thinking of the Commander?

1600853039.korean:
스카이 나이츠가 공연할 때도 그랬지만… 우린 프로듀서가 우리 무대를 보면서 
행복하고… 즐거웠으면 좋겠다는 마음으로 열심히 했었어.
1600853039.english:
It was the same when Sky Knights performed, but... as our producer watched our stage
 I worked hard with the hope that you would be happy and... have fun.

1600853040.korean: 그렇게 합이 안 맞는 하운드 멤버들이 슬레이프니르랑 흐레스벨그의 특훈을 받는 것도 결국 그런 이유가 아닐까?
1600853040.english: Isn't that ultimately the reason why the Hound members, who are so out of sync, are receiving special training from Sleipnir and Hresvelgr?

1600853042.korean: 결국 나한테도 어느 정도 진심을 내달라는 거잖아 너희들.
1600853042.english: In the end, you guys are basically asking me to show some sincerity too.

1600853043.korean: 하아… 그래도 말이지 대체 내가 여기서 뭘 더 어떻게 해야 할지 모르겠어. 이미 진심을 담아서 부르고 있는데...
1600853043.english: Haa... but still, I really don't know what else I should do here. I'm already singing with all my heart...

1600853044.korean:
…아니, 아무리 너희들이 바이오로이드라 해도... 
아니, 아냐… 하아, 됐어. 그래, 나한테도 모자란 부분이 있다는 건 인정할게.
1600853044.english:
… No, even if you guys are bioroids...
 No, no... Haa, never mind. Fine, I'll admit that I have my shortcomings, too.

1600853045.korean: 난, 무대 위에서 만큼은 최고이고 싶으니까.
1600853045.english: Because I want to be the best, at least on stage.

1600853046.korean: …대단해. 어떻게 보면 정말 최후의 인간 대배우 였단 칭호가 괜히 붙은 게 아닌 것 같네.
1600853046.english: … That’s amazing. In a way, it seems the title of being the last great human actor wasn't given to him for nothing.

1600853047.korean: 너희들한테 굳이 칭찬은… 도태되고 싶지 않았던 마음 정도로 생각하라고.
1600853047.english: As for the praise I'm giving you guys... just think of it as my desire not to be left behind.

1600853048.korean: 난 무대 위에서 만큼은 최고야. 앞으로도 최고일 거고.
1600853048.english: I'm the best, at least on stage. And I'll continue to be the best.

1600853051.korean: 방금 특훈이 끝나, 숙소에서 쉬고 올라오는 길이다. 여제, 네 특훈은 언제 끝나는 거지?
1600853051.english: I just finished special training and am on my way back up after resting at the quarters. Empress, when is your special training ending?

1600853052.korean:
특훈이라고 거창하게 이야기할 거 까지야...
으음… 너희들이 당연하게 가지고 있는 걸… 여제는 아직 못 찾은 정도?
1600853052.english:
There's really no need to make such a big deal out of calling it special training...
 Hmm... something you guys take for granted... the Empress just hasn't found it yet?

1600853053.korean: 오르카 대원들은 가지고 있지만… 아직 여제는 받아들이기 힘든 무언가?
1600853053.english: The Orca members have it, but… is it something the Empress still finds difficult to accept?

1600853054.korean: 존나게 잘난 척은 다 하더니, 뭐가 문제라서 나머지 공부야?
1600853054.english: You acted all high and mighty, but what's the problem that you have to do extra study?

1600853055.english: What problem does our great actor have?

1600853057.korean: 그나저나, 너희들… 너희들은 무슨 이유로 밴드에 이렇게 열심히인 거야?
1600853057.english: Anyway, you guys... what is the reason you are so dedicated to the band?

1600853058.korean: 그야 당연히 프로듀서가 우리 무대를 보면서 확 빠지는 걸 보고 싶어 그런 거 아니겠어?
1600853058.english: Of course, isn't it because the producer wants to see us get completely captivated while watching our performance?

1600853060.english: Because you are really looking forward to our performance…

1600853061.korean: 조금이라도 더 좋은 무대 보여주고 싶어서.
1600853061.english: Because I wanted to show a slightly better performance.

1600853062.korean:
야~ 프로듀서가 우리 무대 보고 안 빠지겠냐? 그건 당연한 거고…
난 내가 하고 싶었던 일이니까, 이왕 하는 거 열심히 해보는 거지.
1600853062.english:
Hey~ Do you think the producer wouldn't fall for our performance? That's a given...
 Since it's something I wanted to do, I might as well do my best while I'm at it.

1600853063.korean:
너랑 내가 쓴 가사를 모두가 듣고, 엠프레시스 하운드가 
나쁜 년들 집합소가 아니란 걸… 보여주고 싶은 마음도 있지.
1600853063.english:
Everyone listens to the lyrics you and I wrote, and Empresses Hound
 I also want to show that it’s not a gathering place for bad girls.

1600853064.english: But why are you asking that, Empress?

1600853065.korean: …그냥, 너희들이 어떤 마음으로 임하고 있는 건지 궁금해서 물어본 거야. 별 의미는 없었어.
1600853065.english: … I just asked because I was curious about your mindset. It didn't really mean anything.

1600853066.english: Right, if that is the reason...

1600853068.korean: 너희만큼 오래 봐오진 않았고 아직 별 생각도 없긴 했지만…
1600853068.english: I haven't known you guys for as long as I have, and I haven't really thought much about it yet, but...

1600853069.korean: …조금은 연기를 해볼게. 메소드 연기까지 하면서 이입하고 싶진 않은데.
1600853069.english: … I’ll try acting a little. I don’t want to get too immersed and go as far as method acting, though.

1600853070.korean: 헤헤… 여제 눈빛이 좀 달라진 것 같은데?
1600853070.english: Hehe… The Empress’s gaze seems a bit different?

1600853071.korean: 여기부턴 우리가 다듬어주기보단, 여제의 마음먹기에 따라 다른 것 같네.
1600853071.english: From here on, it seems to depend on the Empress's mindset rather than us refining it.

1600853072.korean: 어때 이거? 전에 입었던 건데… 어울리지?
1600853072.english: How about this? I wore this before... It suits me, right?

1600853073.korean: …카엔, 엄마한테 필살 애교 전수 해왔어. 그런 옷만으로 주공의 사랑… 얻을 수 없어.
1600853073.english: … Kaen taught Mom her ultimate cuteness trick. You can’t win the Lord’s love… with just clothes like that.

1600853074.english: … Everyone is fully prepared. Since things have turned out this way, I will too.

1600853079.korean: 사령관이랑 데이트 준비 겸 여기서 기다리는 중인데…
1600853079.english: I'm waiting here getting ready for a date with the commander...

1600853080.korean: 그 변태 놈은… 참 여기저기 인기도 많네.
1600853080.english: That pervert... he's really popular everywhere.

1600853081.korean: 그러고 보니, 아자즈가 새로운 무대를 만들 때 내 힘 빌려달랬는데. 혹시 네가 노래 부르는 거… 맞아?
1600853081.english: Come to think of it, Azaz asked me to lend her my strength when she was creating a new stage. Are you... the one singing?

1600853082.korean:
그래. 엠프레시스 하운드 전원이 올라가서 공연 할 거야. 
문제는… 그렇게 준비한 거에 비해 우리 실력이 좋진 않으니까…
1600853082.english:
Right. The entire Empress Hound is going up to perform.
 The problem is… our skills aren't that great compared to how much we prepared…

1600853083.korean: 나도 노래 부르는 거 좋아하는데. 사령관도 내가 노래 부를 때마다 박수치면서 좋아했어.
1600853083.english: I like singing too. The Commander liked it too, clapping whenever I sang.

1600853084.korean: 그러고 보니까, 마리아. 배우라 했어. 카엔도 배우.
1600853084.english: Come to think of it, Maria. You said she's an actress. Kaen is an actor, too.

1600853085.korean: 그래, 먼 옛날에… 너희들과 연기 경쟁을 했던 적도 있었지...
1600853085.english: Yeah, long ago… I even competed in acting with you guys…

1600853086.english: Kaen, I heard from Mom. A famous actor…

1600853087.korean: 후훗, 그래. 옛날의 일이지만… 유명한 배우였지.
1600853087.english: Hehe, right. It was a long time ago, but... he was a famous actor.

1600853088.english: But why... do you look so unconfident?

1600853089.korean: …노래 말이야. 쉽다고 생각했는데, 막상 해보니까 어렵다고 해야 할까.
1600853089.english: … I mean the song. I thought it would be easy, but now that I've actually tried it, I guess I should say it's difficult.

1600853090.korean: 노래… 어렵지 않을 것 같아. 카엔, 여러가지 해봤어. 춤도… 연기도… 요리도. 주공, 위해서라면…
1600853090.english: Singing… I don’t think it will be difficult. Kaen has tried all sorts of things. Dancing… acting… cooking, too. For the sake of my Lord…

1600853091.korean: 브라우니가 예전에 말했었는데… 노래를 부를 땐 잘하고 못하고가 아니라… 마음이 담긴 게 중요하대.
1600853091.english: Brownie once told me... that when singing, it's not about whether you do it well or not... but that putting your heart into it is what matters.

1600853092.korean: 늘 마음을 담아 부르면, 사령관이 잘 들어줘.
1600853092.english: If you always call out with all your heart, the commander will listen well.

1600853093.korean: …너희도 그 바이오로이드들이랑 같은 말만 하는구나. 난 아직 그 마음이라는 게 뭔지 잘 모르겠는데.
1600853093.english: … You guys are just saying the same things as those bioroids. I still don't really understand what that feeling is.

1600853095.english: Always sincere for the Lord... mode...

1600853096.english: … like the mindset of the Arsenal captain.

1600853097.korean:
사령관한테 마음을 전달하는 건 노래가 제일 쉬워.
…하운드 멤버처럼 나도 언젠간 무대 위에서 사령관한테 노래 부를 거야.
1600853097.english:
Singing is the easiest way to convey your feelings to the commander.
 … Like the Hound members, someday I’m going to sing for the Commander on stage.

1600853098.english: Should we try being in a band later?

1600853099.english: Kaen, you're good at the shamisen.

1600853101.korean: …혹시 나중에, 우리가 밴드하게 되면 마리아가 가르쳐줄 수 있어?
1600853101.english: … By any chance, if we start a band later, can Maria teach us?

1600853102.english: … You want me to teach you? Me?

1600853103.korean: 사령관이 기대 많이 하던데… 우리 손 잡고 같이 공연 보러 가자 했어.
1600853103.english: The commander was really looking forward to it... He asked us to hold hands and go see the performance together.

1600853105.korean: 흐레스벨그가 가르쳐 준 건데… 이번 공연에선 이런 것도 해보래.
1600853105.english: Hresvelgr taught me this... and told me to try something like this for this performance.

1600853107.korean: 이번… 하운드 응원 퍼포먼스… 사령관이, 응원단장.
1600853107.english: This… Hound cheering performance… the commander is the cheerleading captain.

1600853108.korean: 비밀인데… 사령관도 우리랑 이거 몰래 연습 중이야…
1600853108.english: It's a secret... but the commander is secretly practicing this with us too...

1600853110.korean: 기대 많이하는 중이니까… 공연 성공해. 오르카 모두한테 보여줘…
1600853110.english: I'm really looking forward to this... so make the performance a success. Show it to everyone in Orca...

1600853111.korean: …그 남자, 대체 뭐길래 바보 같은 행동만 하는 거야?!
1600853111.english: … What on earth is that guy, acting so stupidly?!

1600853112.korean: 주공은… 바보… 우리만 생각하고 위하는… 잘생긴 바보.
1600853112.english: Lord is… a fool… a handsome fool who only thinks of and cares for us.

1600853113.english: A heartfelt Hound performance… I’ll be looking forward to it.

1600854003.korean: 오늘은 반 앙헬파 장로들과의 회담을 가질 예정입니다.
1600854003.english: Today, I plan to hold a meeting with the elders of the anti-Angel faction.

1600854004.english: What is this?! Is this an attack by Angel's gang?

1600854005.korean: …여제님. 위험합니다! 여제님께 원한이 있는 앙헬 쪽 인간의 소행인 듯합니다! 어서 피하십시오!!
1600854005.english: … Your Majesty. It is dangerous! It appears to be the work of a human from Angel's faction who holds a grudge against you! Please flee immediately!!

1600854006.korean: 하필 내 호위 부대가 없는 사이에 이런 일을…!
1600854006.english: Of all times, why did this have to happen while my bodyguard unit is away…!

1600854007.korean: …너! 네가 회피할 수 있게 시선을 끌어. 명령이야!
1600854007.english: … You! Draw attention so you can evade. It's an order!

1600854011.korean: 그래! 뭐 하고 있어! 얼른 나 대신 시선을 끌어버리라고! 명령이야!
1600854011.english: Got it! What are you doing! Hurry up and distract them instead of me! It's an order!

1600854012.english: … You're kidding me. Why would I?

1600854014.korean: 하하하하!! 우릴 소모품 취급하는 널, 내가 왜 목숨을 걸고 지켜줘야 하지?!
1600854014.english: Hahaha!! Why should I risk my life to protect you, who treats us like expendables?!

1600854015.korean: 무슨… 말이야 너?! 지금 내 말 안 들려?! 명령이야!
1600854015.english: What… are you talking about?! Can't you hear me?! It's an order!

1600854016.korean: 당신의 그 미친 복수심 때문에 우리만 소모품처럼 쓰인다고! 당신도 똑같이 우리처럼 버림 받아 봐!!!
1600854016.english: Because of your insane vengefulness, we're the only ones being used like expendables! You try being abandoned just like us!!!

1600854017.korean: 닥쳐! 닥쳐! 명령이야!!! 돌아 와, 돌아 와 날 지키라고, 명령이야!!
1600854017.english: Shut up! Shut up! It's an order!!! Come back, come back and protect me, it's an order!!

1600854018.korean: 그래, 실컷 지껄여 보라고! 그래봤자 내가 듣나 봐…
1600854018.english: Fine, go ahead and babble all you want! I guess I won't even listen...

1600854020.english: Test failed… What do you mean?

1600854021.english: One by one, they are all useless.

1600854022.korean: …뭐야. 너. 왜 나랑 똑같은 얼굴을 하고 있는 거야?
1600854022.english: … What? You. Why do you have the exact same face as me?

1600854023.english: Do you process it and proceed to the next object?

1600854024.english: Blow that bitch up right now.

1600854026.korean:
…빌어먹을 명령권은 대체 왜 듣지 않는 거냐고!!!
방금 저 도구가 항명권으로 날 배신하는 걸 보지 않았어?!
1600854026.english:
… Why on earth won't you listen to the damn orders!!!
 Didn't you just see that tool betray me with the right of insubordination?!

1600854027.english: … I, I am sorry. I will fix it immediately in the next test.

1600854028.korean:
성공해야 해… 지금 살아있는 년들도… 어쩌면… 어쩌면 바르그도… 내 명령을 잊고 무시할지 몰라…
방금 저년, 명령권이 들어먹지 않으니까, 날 배신하던 걸 너도 봤잖아!!
1600854028.english:
I have to succeed… Even the women who are alive now… maybe… maybe Varg too… might forget and ignore my orders…
 You saw that bitch just now betray me because she wasn't following orders!!

1600854029.korean: 지나친 걱정이십니다… 바르그는… 여제님에 대한 충성심이 강한 개체…
1600854029.english: You are worrying too much... Barg is... a creature with strong loyalty to the Empress...

1600854030.korean:
…그래서, 넌… 그 아이도 결국 내 명령을 잊지 않으라는 법이 있다 확신해?
방금 저년이 배신하고 도망간 모습을 보고도 넌 그 말이 나와?!
1600854030.english:
… So, are you… sure that even that child won't forget my orders in the end?
 You still say that after seeing that bitch betray you and run away just now?!

1600854032.korean:
난 이미 늙어가고… 앙헬한텐 어떤 타격도 없었어… 이렇게 세월을 보낼 수 없다고…
설사 내가 죽더라도, 내 의지를 잇는 도구가 하운드를 통제해야 한다고… 절대, 앙헬이 편히 죽는 꼴을 보면 안 돼!!!
1600854032.english:
I'm already getting old... and it didn't hit Angel at all... I can't let time pass like this...
 Even if I die, the tool carrying on my will must control the Hound… I absolutely cannot let Angel die peacefully!!!

1600854033.english: Your Excellency, I have an urgent matter to report.

1600854035.korean:
…정보망에 따르면 최근 반 앙헬 파의 마리아 리오보로스가 
'새로운 바이오로이드'를 개발 중이란 첩보를 입수했습니다.
1600854035.english:
… According to the intelligence network, Maria Rioboros of the anti-Angel faction recently
 We have received intelligence that a 'new bioroid' is under development.

1600854037.korean:
유전자 하나 제대로 다루지도 못해서 여기저기 짜깁기한 실패작들을 
친위대랍시고 굴리는 멍청한 년 따윌 굳이 내가 신경 써야 하나?
1600854037.english:
Failed creations patched together from here and there because they couldn't even handle a single gene properly
 Do I really need to care about some stupid bitch who acts like a personal guard?

1600854038.korean:
혹시나 나중에라도 걸림돌이 될 것 같아 말씀을 드려봤습니다, 각하.
이 건에 대해선 더 조사를 하지 않아도 되겠습니까?
1600854038.english:
I mentioned this because I was concerned it might become a stumbling block later on, Your Excellency.
 Would it be alright if we did not investigate this matter further?

1600854039.korean:
새로운 바이오로이드라고 해봤자 기술도 없는 년이 할 수 있는 게 뭐 있다고.
그때 못 죽인 게 살짝 아쉽긴 하지만, 어차피 한 줌 세력인 지금, 굳이 그년 따위한테 힘쓸 이유는 없어.
1600854039.english:
Even if she is a new bioroid, what can a woman with no skills possibly do?
 It is a bit of a shame that I couldn't kill her back then, but since we are just a handful of people now, there is no reason to waste energy on someone like her.

1600854040.korean: 알겠습니다. 마리아 리오보로스의 새 바이오로이드에 대한 조사는 여기서 멈추겠습니다.
1600854040.english: Understood. We will stop the investigation into Maria Rioboros's new bioroid here.

1600854041.korean:
지금은 김지석 놈을 어떻게 깔아뭉게느냐가 중요하지.
그년의 헛웃음 나오는 복수극에 같이 어울려 줄 정도로 우린 한가하지 않아.
1600854041.english:
Right now, the important thing is how to crush that bastard Kim Ji-seok.
 We aren't free enough to hang in with her laughable revenge plot.

1600854042.korean: 하찮은 발악이라. 이해했습니다. 괜스레 신경 끼치게 해드려 죄송합니다.
1600854042.english: A petty struggle, I suppose. I understand. I apologize for bothering you unnecessarily.

1600855003.english: … How many days has it been since I woke up this time?

1600855006.english: … Yes, Varg. You didn't leave me.

1600855007.korean: 제가 여제님을 두고… 어찌 떠날 수 있습니까?
1600855007.english: How could I... leave the Empress behind?

1600855008.english: … As for the other girls, Fafnir… Janghwa… and Cheona?

1600855009.korean: 모두… 앙헬이 숨은 은신처를 찾고 있습니다. 하지만… 어디로 숨었는진 행방이 묘연하여…
1600855009.english: Everyone… is searching for Angel’s hiding place. However… his whereabouts and where he has hidden are unknown…

1600855010.korean: 안 돼… 니콜라스의 복수를 이렇게 허무하게…

1600855012.korean: …니콜라스가 어떻게 생겼는지, 이젠 기억이 나지 않구나.
1600855012.english: … I can’t remember what Nicholas looked like anymore.

1600855013.korean: 앙헬도… 이젠… 기억이… 잘 나지 않아…
1600855013.english: Even Angel... now... I can't really remember...

1600855015.korean:
아직, 내 복수는… 니콜라스의 복수는…
비서를… 당장 연구 총 책임자였던 내 비서를 불러 오거라…
1600855015.english:
Not yet, my revenge… Nicholas’s revenge…
 The secretary… Bring my secretary, who was the head of the research, here immediately…

1600855016.korean: 여제님… 그 비서는 여제님이 제게 명령하여 죽였습니다…
1600855016.english: Empress... I killed that secretary on your command...

1600855017.korean:
그런… 그래. 내가 그런 명령을 했던가…? 하아… 그렇다면…
...잠시 혼자 갔다 올 곳이 있다. 바르그…. 넌 따라오지 말거라.
1600855017.english:
So... right. Did I give such an order...? Haa... then...
 ...I have somewhere to go alone for a while. Varg... Do not follow me.

1600855018.english: But… Empress, outside, due to the Iron蟲 invasion…

1600855022.korean: 이제야… 이제야… 완벽하게… 내 명령을 수행할 도구를… 만들었는데…
1600855022.english: Finally… finally… I have created a tool… to perfectly… execute my commands…

1600855025.english: … You resemble me a lot when I was young.

1600855026.korean:
…널 끝까지 불완전하게 만들고 떠날 것 같아.
이렇게 마지막을 맞이하는 결말은 예상하지 못했는데.
1600855026.english:
… I feel like I’m going to leave you incomplete until the very end.
 I didn't expect the ending to come like this.

1600855027.korean: …니콜라스, 당신이 젊었을 적에 날 봤으면, 이런 모습일까?
1600855027.english: … Nicholas, if you had seen me when you were young, would I look like this?

1600855029.korean: 야, 마리아!! 이 계집애가 너 연극 주연 맡더니 요새 남자들이 줄을 섰다면서?!
1600855029.english: Hey, Maria!! I heard guys are lining up for you these days since you landed the lead role in that play?!

1600855030.english: That unlucky girl… she has to be so pretty…

1600855031.english: If you feel wronged, were you born well?

1600855032.english: Bullshit, I flattered you a little and now you're acting all high and mighty?

1600855033.korean: 야, 이번에 출연료 많이 받으면 클럽 가자. 마리아가 쏘는 거다?
1600855033.english: Hey, if we get paid a lot this time, let's go to a club. Maria's treating, okay?

1600855034.korean: …너희들 마리아가 아무리 부자에 잘 나가는 배우라 해도 한 번쯤 돈은 더치페이로 낼 수 있지 않나?
1600855034.english: … Even if Maria is a rich and successful actress, couldn't you guys at least split the bill once?

1600855035.korean: 맞아. 얘 말 좀 본 받아라 진짜…
1600855035.english: Right. You really need to learn from what he said...

1600855036.korean: 아 진짜 개 꼰대같이 왜 저래 또…
1600855036.english: Ugh, seriously, why is he acting like such a total old fogey again...

1600855037.korean: 아, 그럼 이번에 얘 돈 빌리는 걸로 할까?
1600855037.english: Ah, then should we borrow money from him this time?

1600855038.english: Eeeeeek!! You guys borrowed it last time too, didn't you?!

1600855039.korean: 근데 너 내달라고 하면 또 엄청 잘 내주긴 하잖아.
1600855039.english: But if you ask me to pay, I really pay for it easily, you know.

1600855040.korean: 복수하기로 했는데... 이젠 기억이… 흐릿해… 니콜라스도… 앙헬도…
1600855040.english: I decided to get revenge... but now my memories... are hazy... Nicholas... and Angel too...

1600855041.english: … Why are only useless memories left?

1600855042.korean: 젊은 시절 친하게 지냈던 내 친구들도... 내가 은퇴하고 나선… 만난 적이 없었어…
1600855042.english: Even the friends I was close with in my younger days... I haven't met them since I retired...

1600855043.english: … If only I could go back to that time.

1600855044.korean: …네 이름을 아직 정하지 않았구나. 실험기로만 불렀는데.
1600855044.english: … You haven't decided on a name yet. I've only called you Experimental.

1600855045.korean: …하하, 인생은 가까이서 보면 비극, 멀리서 보면 희극이라더니.
1600855045.english: … Haha, they say life is a tragedy when seen up close, but a comedy when seen from afar.

1600855046.english: My life... was just a comedy of chasing phantoms.

1600855047.korean:
…이름은 붙여주고 가마. 그레이스, 내가 선망했던 배우의 애칭… 
마리아 그레이스... 그것이… 네 이름이다.
1600855047.english:
… I’ll give it a name before I go. Grace, the nickname of the actress I admired…
 Maria Grace... that is... your name.

1600855048.korean:
일정 시간이 지나면 동면에서 깨도록 입력 해주겠다.
비록… 네 뇌에 심어둔 문제를 혼자 남은 내가 해결해줄 순… 없겠지만.
1600855048.english:
I will input it so that it wakes up from hibernation after a certain amount of time.
 Although… I, left all alone, cannot solve the problem planted in your brain…

1600855049.korean: 바르그…! 거기 없느냐! 아… 바르그도… 나가 있는 상태… 인가?
1600855049.english: Varg…! Isn’t he there! Ah… Is Varg… out too…?

1600855050.korean: 졸려… 이번에도 기절한다면, 언제 깨어날지도 모르는데…
1600855050.english: I'm sleepy... If I faint again this time, I don't know when I'll wake up...

1600855052.korean: 그래, 바르그에게 따로 남길 말은 끝났어… 얼굴을 보며 이야기 하고 싶었는데…
1600855052.english: Right, I'm done leaving Varg a private message... I wanted to talk to him face-to-face...

1600855053.korean: …통신기가… 그래… 여기 있구나. 하아... 하아… 더 혼미해지기 전에 하운드들에게 내 명령을…
1600855053.english: … The communicator… yes… it’s here. Haa… haa… Before I get any more disoriented, I’ll give my orders to the hounds…

1600855054.korean: ...너희는 내 복수를 이룰 부대이며, 오직 복수만이 최우선이자 최후의 명령이다.
1600855054.english: ...You are the unit to fulfill my vengeance, and vengeance is the only top priority and final command.

1600855055.korean: 앙헬을 지구 끝까지 쫓아 찢어죽여라. 이 몸이 죽는다 해도, 너희들은 반드시 명령을 완수해라.
1600855055.english: Chase Angel to the ends of the earth and tear him to pieces. Even if I die, you must carry out this order.

1600855056.korean: 니콜라스가 어떻게 죽었는지, 이 몸이 얼마나 고통스러운 삶을 살았는지 절대 잊지 마라.
1600855056.english: Never forget how Nicholas died and how painful a life this body lived.

1600855058.korean: (그리고 앙헬이 죽어 나의 복수가 이루어진 이후엔)
1600855058.english: (And after Angel dies and my revenge is fulfilled)

1600855059.korean: (마리아 그레이스와 함께 내가 꿈꿨던 미래를 너희 모두가 대신하여… 자유롭게 살거라...)
1600855059.english: (Live freely, taking the future I dreamed of with Maria Grace on my behalf...)

1600855060.english: (This is the final command I give you...)

1600855063.korean: [c][00FF00][너희는 내 복수를 이룰 부대이며, 오직 복수만이 최우선이자 최후의 명령이다.][-][/c]
1600855063.english: [c][00FF00][You are the unit to fulfill my vengeance, and vengeance is the only top priority and final command.][-][/c]

1600855064.korean: [c][00FF00][앙헬을 지구 끝까지 쫓아 찢어죽여라. 이 몸이 죽는다 해도, 너희들은 반드시 명령을 완수해라.][-][/c]
1600855064.english: [c][00FF00][Chase Angel to the ends of the earth and tear him to pieces. Even if I die, you must carry out this order.][-][/c]

1600855065.korean: [c][00FF00][니콜라스가 어떻게 죽었는지, 이 몸이 얼마나 고통스러운 삶을 살았는지 절대 잊지 마라.][-][/c]
1600855065.english: [c][00FF00][Never forget how Nicholas died, and how painful a life this body has lived.][-][/c]

1600855067.korean: …염병할 마귀할멈. 이미 인류는 철충 때문에 다 망해가는 와중에 왜 아직도 정신을 못 차리는 거야?!
1600855067.english: … You damned witch. Humanity is already on the verge of ruin because of the Iron Bugs, so why haven't you come to your senses yet?!

1600855068.korean: 씨발… 당신 복수 때문에… 대체 우린 얼마나 떠돌아하는 거냐고… 이 빌어먹을 악녀!!!
1600855068.english: Fuck... because of your revenge... how long are we supposed to wander... you goddamn villainess!!!

1600855069.korean: [c][00FF00][너희는 내 복수를 이룰 부대이며, 오직 복수만이 최우선이자 최후의 명령이다.][-][/c]
1600855069.english: [c][00FF00][You are the unit to fulfill my vengeance, and vengeance is the only top priority and final command.][-][/c]

1600855070.korean: [c][00FF00][앙헬을 지구 끝까지 쫓아 찢어죽여라. 이 몸이 죽는다 해도, 너희들은 반드시 명령을 완수해라.][-][/c]
1600855070.english: [c][00FF00][Chase Angel to the ends of the earth and tear him to pieces. Even if I die, you must carry out this order.][-][/c]

1600855071.korean: [c][00FF00][니콜라스가 어떻게 죽었는지, 이 몸이 얼마나 고통스러운 삶을 살았는지 절대 잊지 마라.][-][/c]
1600855071.english: [c][00FF00][Never forget how Nicholas died, and how painful a life this body has lived.][-][/c]

1600855073.korean:
웬일로 말하나 했더니… 결국 그놈의 앙헬 타령이네.
휩노스 병에 걸려서 정신도 온전치 못한 노친네 때문에 대체 무슨 고생이냐.
1600855073.english:
I wondered what was going on... but it turns out it's just that damn Angel rant.
 What on earth is all this suffering caused by that old man who is mentally unstable because of Hypnos disease?

1600855074.korean:
이제 그만 할 때도 되지 않았나…
아니, 그런 말이 나올까 기대한 내가 븅신이지. 우린 애초부터 도구였는데….
1600855074.english:
Isn't it time to stop...
 No, I'm an idiot for expecting something like that to come up. We were tools from the start...

1600855075.korean: 진짜 이 마귀할멈… 뒤져도 내가 명복을 빌어주나 봐라…
1600855075.english: Seriously, that wicked witch... I'll never pray for her to rest in peace even if she dies...

1600855076.korean: [c][00FF00][너희는 내 복수를 이룰 부대이며, 오직 복수만이 최우선이자 최후의 명령이다.][-][/c]
1600855076.english: [c][00FF00][You are the unit to fulfill my vengeance, and vengeance is the only top priority and final command.][-][/c]

1600855077.korean: [c][00FF00][앙헬을 지구 끝까지 쫓아 찢어죽여라. 이 몸이 죽는다 해도, 너희들은 반드시 명령을 완수해라.][-][/c]
1600855077.english: [c][00FF00][Chase Angel to the ends of the earth and tear him to pieces. Even if I die, you must carry out this order.][-][/c]

1600855078.korean: [c][00FF00][니콜라스가 어떻게 죽었는지, 이 몸이 얼마나 고통스러운 삶을 살았는지 절대 잊지 마라.][-][/c]
1600855078.english: [c][00FF00][Never forget how Nicholas died, and how painful a life this body has lived.][-][/c]

1600855080.korean: 어디 숨었는지 코빼기도 안 보이는 앙헬을 어떻게 찾으란 말이야!!!
1600855080.english: How am I supposed to find Angel when he's nowhere to be seen, I don't know where he's hiding!!!

1600855082.korean: 근데… 여제 아줌마, 오늘따라 조금 목소리가 슬픈 것 같네...
1600855082.english: But... Auntie Empress, your voice sounds a little sad today...

1600855083.korean: 여제님… 임무 다녀왔습니다… 앙헬은 아직 발견하지…
1600855083.english: Your Majesty... I'm back from my mission... I haven't found Angel yet...

1600855084.english: … Empress!!! Snap out of it!! Empress!! Empress!!!

1600855085.korean:
수, 숨을 쉬지 않으셔… 제가 자리를 비운 사이에… 안 돼… 안 돼!!!
여제님… 제발… 정신 차리십시오… 제발… 제발!!!
1600855085.english:
He... he's not breathing... while I was away... No... No!!!
 Empress... please... come to your senses... please... please!!!

1600855086.english: What the Empress is holding in her hand is… a voice recorder?

1600855088.korean: [c][00FF00][다른 것들은 다 나를 실망시켜도 너는 나를 실망시키지 않아.][-][/c]
1600855088.english: [c][00FF00][Even if everything else disappoints me, you never disappoint me.][-][/c]

1600855092.korean: [c][00FF00][다른 것들도 너를 본 받으면 얼마나 좋을까?][-][/c]
1600855092.english: [c][00FF00][How wonderful it would be if other things followed your example?][-][/c]

1600855093.english: [c][00FF00][With you, I can even kill Angel.][-][/c]

1600855094.korean: 여제님… 마지막 말씀은… 제게 남긴 마지막 말씀은… 제발… 제발…
1600855094.english: Empress... your last words... the last words you left me... please... please...

1600855095.english: [c][00FF00][… It was only for a moment, but I’m sorry for doubting you… ][-][/c]

1600855096.korean: [c][00FF00][...바르그… 내 귀여운 딸... 이 몸이 다시 태어난다면…][-][/c]
1600855096.english: [c][00FF00][...Varg... My sweet daughter... If I were to be reborn... ][-][/c]

1600855097.english: [c][00FF00][If that world… is a world without Angel… ][-][/c]

1600855099.korean:
[c][00FF00][그 때의 나는 세상 물정도 모르고, 철부지일 거야… 
천아랑, 장화, 파프니르가 싫어해도… 네가 잘 돌봐주렴…][-][/c]
1600855099.english:
[c][00FF00][Back then, I must have been naive and clueless about the world…
 Even if Cheon-a-rang, Jang-hwa, and Fafnir hate it… please take good care of them… ][-][/c]

1600855101.korean: 여제… 님… 여제님께서 살아 돌아오신다면… 꼭, 그렇게 모시겠습니다…
1600855101.english: Empress... My Lady... If you return alive... I will certainly serve you just that way...

1600837095.korean: …내가 이런 옷을 입고 오면 좋아할 거라 생각한 거야?
1600837095.english: … Did you think I would like it if I came wearing clothes like this?

1600837097.korean: 네오딤은 그 옷이 엄청 마음에 드나보네?
1600837097.english: Neodim must really like that outfit.

1600837098.english: Looks like everyone is really bored.

1600837099.korean: 여름인데… 너희들은 내 옆에 있으면 안 더워?
1600837099.english: It's summer... aren't you guys hot when you're next to me?

1600837100.korean: 모두가 더울 텐데… 다 함께 이열치열할 수 있는 축제를 준비해 보는 건 어때?
1600837100.english: It must be hot for everyone... how about we prepare a festival where we can all fight fire with fire together?

1600837101.korean: …미안해. 그동안 내가 여러모로 신경을 못 써줬구나.
1600837101.english: … I'm sorry. I haven't been able to take care of you in many ways lately.

1600837104.korean: 그러게 그 옷은 진짜 오랜만에 보네…
1600837104.english: Yeah, it's been a really long time since I've seen that outfit...

1600837105.korean: 학교 축제에 대해 더 자세히 설명해줄래?
1600837105.english: Could you explain the school festival in more detail?

1600837106.english: I wonder if the department at Orca is in a similar context?

1600837110.english: Yeah, that's a really good idea.

1600838079.korean: 연극부 개설은 덴세츠와 비스마르크 대원 모두가 반기며 좋아했는데…
1600838079.english: Both Densetsu and Bismarck's crew members welcomed and were happy about the opening of the drama club, but...

1600838080.korean: 회장을 누구로 할 지 정하면서 분쟁이 생겼거든…?
1600838080.english: A dispute arose while deciding who to be the chairman...

1600838083.english: Knowing that makes me even more worried...

1600838084.english: … The Empress’s name isn’t on the list.

1600838086.korean: …그런 이유로 모두를 위한 축제에서 제외되는 건 너무하잖아.
1600838086.english: … It’s too much to be excluded from a festival for everyone for that reason.

1600838087.english: I should go to Hound's lodging.

1600838088.english: Guys, wait a minute, I have a question...

1600838089.english: … Cheon-ah, so you wear underwear of this color too.

1600838091.korean: 으흠… 흐음… 아직 쓸만한 것 같은데…
1600838091.english: Hmm... Hmm... It seems like it's still usable...

1600838093.english: You guys... said you wanted to join the band?

1600838094.korean: 이번 축제의 하이라이트 무대로 아주 좋을 것 같아.
1600838094.english: I think it would be perfect as the highlight stage for this festival.

1600838095.english: I also want to provide various forms of support.

1600838096.english: … But I want to set one condition.

1600838097.korean: 여기, 마리아 리오보로스까지 가입 맴버가 된다면 전폭 지원할게.
1600838097.english: If Maria Rioboros joins as well, I will give her my full support.

1600838099.korean: 뮤즈를 포함한 모두가 참여했기 때문에 프로듀싱을 맡았던 거야.
1600838099.english: I took on the producing role because everyone, including Muse, participated.

1600838100.korean: 너희들도 대원 모두가 참여해야만 동아리 승인과 프로듀싱을 제공해 줄 생각이야.
1600838100.english: I intend to provide club approval and production only if all members participate.

1600838102.korean: 너희 둘도 여기 정착하기까지 사건사고 많았잖아.
1600838102.english: You two went through a lot of trouble before settling here, too.

1600838103.korean: 특히나, 장화 너는… 몽구스 대원들이랑 충돌까지 했었는데 말이지?
1600838103.english: Especially you, Janghwa... you even clashed with the Mongoose squad, you know?

1600838104.korean: 여제가 내 제안을 거절한다면 어쩔 수 없지만…
1600838104.english: If the Empress refuses my proposal, there is nothing I can do...

1600838105.korean: 혹시라도 여제가 참여하겠다고 하면 너희가 꼭 데리고 무대에 서줘.
1600838105.english: If the Empress decides to participate, make sure you take her on stage.

1600838107.english: I've listened to you so well. All this time…

1600838108.english: Let's give the Empress a chance, too.

1600838109.korean: …아니 그렇게 멀지 않다고 몇 번을 말해.
1600838109.english: … No, I've told you several times that it's not that far.

1600838110.english: Anyway, I have something to tell you...

1600838112.english: Based on a tip from an anonymous member.

1600838113.korean: 하운드가 밴드부를 한다는데. 같이 참여해줄 수 있어?
1600838113.english: I heard Hound is in the band. Can you join?

1600838115.korean: 하운드 애들을 잘 조율할 수 있지 않을까 해서.
1600838115.english: I thought I might be able to coordinate the hound kids well.

1600838116.english: He said he would do that.

1600838117.english: If you are sincerely willing to do it…

1600839088.korean: 여기 있는 모두가 왜 너를 나처럼 대우하지 않는지.
1600839088.english: Why everyone here doesn't treat you like me.

1600839089.korean: 악명 높은 쓰레기 인간? 스스로를 정말 그렇게 생각하고 있는 거야?
1600839089.english: A notorious piece of trash? Do you really think of yourself that way?

1600839090.english: Do you feel a little better only if you torment yourself like that?

1600839094.korean: 그나마 하운드 대원들 중에서 제일 친해보이는 거 같아서.
1600839094.english: Because they seem to be the closest among the Hound members.

1600839095.korean: 그래도 온 김에 솔직하게 말해 봐, 파프니르.
1600839095.english: But since you're here, tell me honestly, Fafnir.

1600839096.korean: 왜 다른 애들이 놀려도 넌 여제를 챙기려고 하는지.
1600839096.english: I wonder why you try to look after the Empress even when the other kids tease you.

1600839098.korean: 그래도 파프니르는 네가 진짜 여제랑은 좀 다른 구석이 있는 것 같다면서 좋아해.
1600839098.english: Still, Fafnir likes you, saying that you seem to have some sides that are different from the real Empress.

1600839099.korean: 그동안 내가 익히 들은 바, 평소의 여제라면 절대 그런 자비를 베풀 거라 생각되지 않는데.
1600839099.english: From what I have heard, I do not think the Empress would ever show such mercy in her usual state.

1600839101.korean: 난 여제인 네 진짜 과거를 몰라.
1600839101.english: I don't know your real past as the Empress.

1600839102.korean: 과거는 이미 지나가고 없어. 우리는 계속해서 현실을 살아야 해.
1600839102.english: The past is already gone. We must continue to live in the present.

1600839103.korean: …네가 계속해서 오르카에 비협조적이라면 어쩔 수 없는 선택이 되겠지.
1600839103.english: … If you continue to be uncooperative with Orca, it will be an unavoidable choice.

1600839105.english: What is your role in the band?

1600839106.korean: 진짜? 아직 아무 것도 안 정해졌어?
1600839106.english: Really? Nothing has been decided yet?

1600839108.english: I see. I agree with your opinion in some ways.

1600839109.korean: 난 평등한 동아리 활동을 위해 부 개설 및 가입이 불가능하다는 조항을 넣었어.
1600839109.english: I included a clause stating that opening or joining a club is not allowed to ensure equal club activities.

1600839110.korean: 하운드 멤버들과 함께 할 수 있는 건 내가 아니라 여제, 바로 너야.
1600839110.english: It is not me who can be with the Hound members, but the Empress, it is you.

1600839111.korean: 사랑하는 부하들과 상봉한 여제로써 뭐라도 보여줘야 하지 않겠어?
1600839111.english: As an Empress reunited with her beloved subordinates, shouldn't you show them something?

1600839114.english: Are you really not going to do it?

1600839115.english: So you're saying it's not something you should do?

1600839116.korean: 절대로 안 하는 게 아니라는 거지?
1600839116.english: So you're saying it's not that you absolutely won't do it?

1600839117.korean: 그러니까 하는 게 아니지만 절대로 안 하는 게 아니라서 결국 하는 게 맞다는 거지?
1600839117.english: So you're saying that it's not that I'm doing it, but since it's not that I'm absolutely not doing it, doing it is the right thing to do in the end, right?

1600839119.korean: 여제님, 한 입으로 두 말 하는 거야?
1600839119.english: Empress, are you speaking out of both sides of your mouth?

1600839120.english: Please take good care of me.

1600839121.korean: 조만간 나한테 갚아야 할 참치캔도 있잖아.
1600839121.english: You also have cans of tuna that you owe me soon.

1600839122.english: I'll peel it for you, so please help the Hound members.

1600839123.english: Unfortunately, it's not available right now.

1600839125.english: Well, I won't just sit still.

1600839126.korean: 따뜻한 물에 집어 넣은 후… 배부를 때까지 먹이고…
1600839126.english: After putting it in warm water… feed it until full…

1600839127.english: Laying down on the soft bed…

1600839130.english: Anyway, you're saying you'll help, right?

1600839131.english: Yeah, thanks for the words, at least.

1600841103.korean: 잘 하고 있나 궁금해서 와 봤지.
1600841103.english: I came to check if you were doing well.

1600841105.english: Is the Empress practicing well too?

1600841106.korean: 같이 밴드부 하기로 했잖아. 무슨 포지션을 맡게 됐어?
1600841106.english: You said we were going to be in the band together. What position did you get?

1600841107.korean: 여제님이니까 팀원들의 단합 정도야 문젯거리도 아니지 않나?
1600841107.english: Since she is the Empress, the team's unity isn't really a problem, is it?

1600841108.english: I'll be looking forward to the performance, Empress.

1600843097.korean: 오~ 흐레스벨그. 그 옷 오랜만에 보는데?
1600843097.english: Oh, Hresvelgr. It's been a while since I've seen that outfit.

1600843098.korean: 하긴, 이번 의상을 제작하는데 있어서도 흐레스벨그가 큰 도움을 줬지?
1600843098.english: Come to think of it, Hresvelgr helped a lot with making this costume, too, didn't she?

1600843099.english: Since it's a midterm evaluation, the seniors should lead the way.

1600843100.korean: 천아도 너희를 보고 꼭 하고 싶다 했거든.
1600843100.english: Cheona said she really wanted to do it after seeing you guys.

1600843101.english: Alright, shall we give it a listen?

1600843102.english: … You're doing well. You're really good.

1600843103.korean: 뭐랄까, 처음 내가 Blooming Heart 노래를 들었을 때의 감동보단…
1600843103.english: How should I put it... rather than the emotion I felt when I first heard the song Blooming Heart...

1600843104.english: It feels like something is slightly lacking...?

1600843105.english: That was a sharp observation, Harpeia.

1600843106.english: No, rather, you should evaluate it like this.

1600843108.korean: 너희들의 노래를 들을 오르카 대원들 한테도…
1600843108.english: To the Orca members who will listen to your songs, too…

1600843109.korean: 그런 감정을 전달해야 할 것 같아.
1600843109.english: I feel like I need to convey those feelings.

1600843111.english: I hope you guys burn up on stage too.

1600843112.english: Just a little more, let's keep going...!

1600844071.english: … The Hound Empress’s dignity really stands out, doesn’t it?

1600844072.english: But you still got it right in the end, didn't you?

1600844073.english: … What is this, giving something and then taking it away?

1600844074.korean: 거 봐. 여기 있는 누가 음료수에 뭔갈 탔을 거 같아?
1600844074.english: See? Do you think someone here put something in the drink?

1600844076.korean: 당연히 이런 활동은 처음일 테니 설레서 그러는 게 아닐까?
1600844076.english: Of course, since it must be their first time doing an activity like this, isn't it just because they are excited?

1600844077.korean: 여제도 첫 데뷔 무대는 많이 떨렸을 거 아냐?
1600844077.english: Even the Empress must have been really nervous for her first debut stage, right?

1600844078.korean: 그러고 보니, 다른 하운드 멤버들은 오를 무대를 먼저 구경했는데...
1600844078.english: Come to think of it, the other Hound members checked out the stage first...

1600844079.english: Would you like to see the Empress in person?

1600844080.english: It finished much faster than expected.

1600844081.korean: 정말 아기자기하고 훌륭한 무대야. 이렇게나 열심히 해주다니.
1600844081.english: It’s such a charming and wonderful performance. I can’t believe you worked so hard.

1600844082.english: That is diligence befitting a candidate for promotion to Major.

1600844083.english: If you hate the military, how about becoming the Minister of Construction?

1600844086.english: … Okay. Let's assume that's the case.

1600844091.korean: 한 번 입고 와주면 좋았을 텐데.
1600844091.english: It would have been nice if you had worn it just once.

1600844093.korean: …내가 칸한테 오빠란 소리를 들을 줄은 몰라서…
1600844093.english: … I didn’t know I’d hear Khan call me Oppa…

1600844094.korean: 어… 음, 그래. 색다른 경험이 될 수도…
1600844094.english: Uh… um, yeah. It could be a unique experience…

1600844096.english: So, I'd like you to show me.

1600845102.english: Is it about the Empress by any chance?

1600845103.korean: 잘 왔어. 아무래도 같이 봐줬으면 하는 게 있었는데.
1600845103.english: You came at the right time. There was something I really wanted you to look into with me.

1600845104.korean: …아마, 여제는 여기 나온 수 많은 유전자 씨앗의 실험 과정을 거쳐 만들어진 개체겠지.
1600845104.english: … The Empress is probably an individual created through the experimental process of the numerous genetic seeds shown here.

1600845106.korean: …그래서 장화와 천아도 진짜 여제의 명령과는 전혀 다른 느낌이었다고 말한 거였구나.
1600845106.english: … So that’s why Janghwa and Cheona said it felt completely different from the real Empress’s orders.

1600845107.korean: …정말 그랬더라면 앙헬이 가만히 지켜보고만 있지 않았을 거야.
1600845107.english: … If that had really been the case, Angel wouldn't have just stood by and watched.

1600845108.korean: 게다가 인간임에 자부심을 느끼던 여제가 선뜻 그런 선택을 했을 거라고는 생각되지 않네.
1600845108.english: Besides, I don't think the Empress, who took pride in being human, would have readily made such a choice.

1600845109.english: Are there any cases where a bioroid became human?

1600845110.korean: 닥터, 혹시 이 진실을 우리가 먼저 말해준다면… 지금 여제는 어떻게 될까?
1600845110.english: Doctor, if we were to tell you the truth first… what would happen to the Empress right now?

1600846096.english: It's good because it looks like a rain boot.

1600846099.english: Cheona, you should wear it too.

1600846100.english: It seems like everyone is shining brilliantly.

1600846101.korean: 얘들아. 닥터가 이야기했던 거 잊지 말고 꼭 명심해 주면 좋겠어.
1600846101.english: Guys, please don't forget what the Doctor told you and make sure to keep it in mind.

1600846104.english: Alright, alright... everyone, let's stop here.

1600846105.korean: 네가 무대에서 입을 옷도 가져왔는데… 입어 볼래?
1600846105.english: I brought the clothes you'll wear on stage too... do you want to try them on?

1600846107.english: Are you okay? Barg is acting strangely today.

1600847066.english: … How much longer until the stage?

1600847072.korean: 너희들은… 여제를 찾아 줘. 난 바르그를 만나러 가볼게.
1600847072.english: You guys… please find the Empress. I’ll go meet Varg.

1600847076.korean: 너희 다섯 명 모두, 내가 무대에 올릴 테니까. 약속할게.
1600847076.english: I promise I will put all five of you on stage.

1600847078.korean: 그럼 그럼. 파프니르도 뚝 그치고 여제 찾는 것 좀 도와줘.
1600847078.english: Okay, okay. Fafnir, stop it and help me find the Empress.

1600847082.english: Bargji, the dignified captain of the Hounds.

1600847085.korean: 우리 바르그, 잠깐 얘기 좀 할까?
1600847085.english: Varg, shall we talk for a moment?

1600847086.english: I fully understand how Barg feels.

1600847088.english: You are the captain of the Empress Hounds, and…

1600847089.english: She is the Empress's proud daughter.

1600847091.english: I was thinking I should share it right away, but

1600847092.korean: 특이 케이스이다 보니 닥터가 교차 검증을 하고 싶다고 해서 말이야.
1600847092.english: Since it is a unique case, the doctor said he wanted to cross-verify it.

1600847093.korean: …여제는, 그 바이오로이드를 정말로 아꼈기 때문에 명령권을 준 걸까?
1600847093.english: … Did the Empress give her command authority because she really cared for that bioroid?

1600847094.korean: 그 아이가 사실 너희들 중에 제일 비참한 아이야.
1600847094.english: That child is actually the most miserable among you.

1600847095.korean: 바르그는 용의 유전자를 가지고 만들어진 개체잖아.
1600847095.english: Varg is an individual created with dragon genes, isn't he?

1600847098.korean: 너희를 통제하기 위해 만든… 도구 같은 존재가 맞았어.
1600847098.english: It was true that it was a tool-like existence created to control you...

1600847099.english: So that you can kill Angel…

1600847100.korean: 설령 자신이 죽어도 절대 배신하지 않도록…
1600847100.english: So that I would never betray you, even if I were to die...

1600847101.korean: …알파가 가져 온 자료와 닥터의 분석에 의한 결과로는.
1600847101.english: … Based on the data brought by Alpha and the results of the Doctor's analysis.

1600847102.korean: 지금 우리가 보호 중인 마리아 그레이스는… 추정으로 200호기라고 하더라.
1600847102.english: Maria Grace, whom we are currently protecting, is estimated to be Unit 200.

1600847104.korean: 인간에게 있는 명령권을 바이오로이드가 온전한 방법으로 가질 순 없어.
1600847104.english: Bioroids cannot fully possess the command authority that humans have.

1600847105.korean: …델타가 바이오로이드를 못 만든 이유가 뭔지 잘 알잖아.
1600847105.english: … You know very well why Delta couldn't make bioroids.

1600847106.korean: 여제는 자신의 유전자로 바이오로이드 실험기를 생산했어.
1600847106.english: The Empress produced a bioroid experimental machine using her own genes.

1600847107.korean: 어떻게든… 명령권이 작동할 때까지. 새로운 프로토 타입을 만들기 위해서.
1600847107.english: Somehow… until command authority is activated. To create a new prototype.

1600847108.korean: 덕분에 자신의 손으로 직접 자신의 분신을 200번도 넘게 폐기했을 거야.
1600847108.english: Thanks to that, he must have personally disposed of his own clones more than 200 times.

1600847110.korean: 삶은 가까이서 보면 비극이지만… 멀리서 보면 희극이란 말 알아?
1600847110.english: Do you know the saying that life is a tragedy when seen up close, but a comedy when seen from afar?

1600847111.korean: 마리아가… 하운드 셋보다 더 취급이 지독했다면 믿을래?
1600847111.english: Would you believe me if I told you Maria… was treated even worse than the Hound Set?

1600848070.english: … Okay. I'll give you some time to think.

1600848072.english: It feels like my 'thoughts' are drifting elsewhere.

1600848073.english: … If things calm down, it won’t be too late to join then.

1600848075.english: … It wasn't there when I was comforting Varg.

1600848076.english: … Locke? What are you doing here?

1600848078.english: Thank you, I'll ask you a favor…

1600849052.korean: 로크, 잠깐… 마리아의 기억을 건들면 안 돼… 너도 폭발에 휘말릴지 몰라…
1600849052.english: Locke, wait... You mustn't touch Maria's memories... You might get caught in the explosion too...

1600849053.english: … Locke? What are you trying to do?

1600849057.korean: 난 멸망 후의 인간이라, 리오보로스 가문의 일에 가타부타 말을 하긴 어려워.
1600849057.english: I am a human from the post-apocalypse, so it is difficult for me to comment on the affairs of the Rioboros family.

1600849059.korean: 네가 마리아 그레이스로서 삶이라는 영화를 다시 찍는다면.
1600849059.english: If you were to remake the movie of life as Maria Grace.

1600849060.english: I'll be a supporting actor to help you with that life.

1600850046.english: I never said it was a failure.

1600850047.korean: 그저 널 조금이라도 더 행복하게 만들어 주고 싶어 노력하고픈 평범한 인간일 뿐이야.
1600850047.english: I'm just an ordinary human being who wants to try to make you even a little bit happier.

1600850049.korean: '마리아 그레이스'한테 행복한 추억과 미래를 향한 용기를 주고 싶은.
1600850049.english: Wanting to give 'Maria Grace' happy memories and courage for the future.

1600850051.english: As a supporting actor to the noble great actor,

1600850052.korean: 마리아 그레이스라는 새로운 영화를 함께 만들어보겠어?
1600850052.english: Would you like to make a new movie called Maria Grace together?

1600850054.english: As long as you don't give up on me.

1600850057.english: I won't give up on you.

1001408255.korean: 이 몸의 이름은 마리아 그레이스다.&n멸망 전이라면…&n훗, 너 같은 건 말도 못 걸었을 테지.&n자, 특별히 묻는 걸 허락할 테니…&n이 몸의 어떤 점이 궁금하지?
1001408255.english: My name is Maria Grace. If this were before the apocalypse… Hmph, someone like you wouldn't have even dared to speak to me. Now, I will allow you to ask a special question… What exactly about me are you curious about?

1001408256.korean: 이 몸은 여제님이 없어지더라도&n복수를 이룰 수 있도록 동면에 들어갔지.&n…그간 아주 긴 세월이 지났어...
