1001408256.english: I entered hibernation so that I could achieve revenge even if the Empress were gone.… A very long time has passed since then…

1001408257.korean: 하아,&n여제님께선 어째서 저 천박하고&n덜떨어진 것들을 데리고 일을 하셨는지…&n특히 저 빨간 머리 싸가지랑&n파란머리 바보는 정말이지…
1001408257.english: Haa, I wonder why the Empress worked with those vulgar and dimwits... Especially that rude red-haired brat and the blue-haired idiot, really...

1001408258.korean: 네가 마지막 인간이라고 해서&n달라지는 건 없어.&n이 몸은 여제님처럼,&n훌륭한 부군에게만&n정을 줄 예정이니 말이야..
1001408258.english: Just because you are the last human doesn't change anything. Like the Empress, this body intends to give its affection only to an excellent husband.

1001408259.korean: …이 몸은 오랜 시간&n갈 길을 모르고 헤맸지.&n네게 향하는 길이 있었다는 것도&n알고는 있었지만…&n이미 늦은 건 아니었을까 불안 했어.
1001408259.english: … I have wandered for a long time, not knowing which way to go. I knew there was a path leading to you, but… I was anxious that it might already be too late.

1001408260.korean: …여제님이 젊은 시절&n사랑에 빠졌을 때 이런 기분이었을까?&n두근거리고, 보고 싶고…&n하늘 위로 붕 떠다니는 느낌.&n사랑한단 감정이 무엇인지 잘 몰랐는데…&n지금은 그 기분을 알 것만 같아.
1001408260.english: … Was this how the Empress felt when she fell in love in her youth? My heart pounding, missing her… and feeling like I’m floating high in the sky. I didn’t really know what the feeling of love was… but now I think I understand it.

1001408261.english: As expected, you are a vulgar scoundrel.

1001408262.korean: 정말 어쩔 수 없는 사내로구나…&n하아… 네가 원한다면…&n가끔은 허락하도록 하지.
1001408262.english: You really are a hopeless man... Haa... If you want... I'll allow it sometimes.

1001408263.korean: 여제님이 어째서 니콜라스 님과&n함께 했던 시간을 그리워 하셨는지&n알 것 같아… 질투하는 거니?,&n지금 내 옆엔 니콜라스 님 대신&n네가 있잖아?
1001408263.english: I think I know why the Empress missed the time she spent with Lord Nicholas… Are you jealous? You're by my side right now instead of Lord Nicholas, aren't you?

1001408264.korean: 이 몸은 오직 부군에게…&n…뭐? 여제님 톤으로 연기를 해달라고?&n하아… 나, 마리아 리오보로스와&n부하들은 당신의 여자가 되어…&n아니 대체 왜 이런 걸 해달라는 거야?!
1001408264.english: I belong only to my husband… …What? You want me to act in the Empress’s tone? Haa… I, Maria Rioboros, and your subordinates will become your women… No, why on earth are you asking me to do something like this?!

1001408265.korean: 부하들한테 …질투?&n하~ 걔넨 첩들이잖아.&n진정한 부인은,&n이 마리아 그레이스 아니겠어?
1001408265.english: Jealousy toward the subordinates…? Ha~ They’re just concubines. The true wife is Maria Grace, isn’t she?

1001408266.korean: 이 빌어먹을 잠수함은&n왜 이리 큰 거야?!&n…저기 부군… 혹시, 당신 옷에&n위치 추적기를 달면 안 될까?&n어차피 하루에 한 번 이상 부군의&n얼굴을 안 보면 아파 버릴테니까…&n부부끼리 무슨 사생활 침해야?!​
1001408266.english: Why is this damn submarine so big?!… Hey, husband… by any chance, could I put a GPS tracker on your clothes? I’m going to get sick if I don’t see your face at least once a day anyway… What kind of invasion of privacy is that between a married couple?!

1001408267.korean: 내가 배우라 해도 에로 영화는&n내 특기 장르가 아닌데… 좋아.&n한 편 찍어보면 알겠지?&n무삭제 감독판으로…!
1001408267.english: Even though I'm an actor, erotic movies aren't really my specialty... Fine. I guess I'll find out once I shoot one, right? With the uncut director's cut...!

1001408268.korean: Shred the stage!&n좀 유치한 표현이지만,&n밴드 구호를 만들어 봤어.&n여제의 밴드라면,&n이 정도 위압감은 있어야지…&n안 그래?
1001408268.english: Shred the stage! It’s a bit of a childish expression, but I came up with a band slogan. If it’s the Empress’s band, it should have this much intimidation... don’t you agree?

1001408269.korean: 이 옷…&n정말 멸망 전 유행하던 복식 맞아?&n품위가 좀 떨어지는…&n응? 예쁘… 다고? 당연한 거 아냐!&n이 몸이 소화 못하는 옷은 없다고,&n프로듀서?​
1001408269.english: This outfit… &nIs this really the fashion style from before the apocalypse? &nIt’s a bit undignified… &nHuh? You say it’s… pretty? Isn’t that obvious! &nThere’s no outfit this body can’t pull off, &nProducer?

1001408270.korean: 반응이 폭발적이라고? 예견됐던 결과지.&n이 마리아 그레이스가 소화하지 못하는&n컨셉은 절대 없다고.
1001408270.english: You say the reaction is explosive? It’s a predictable result. There is absolutely no concept that Maria Grace cannot pull off.

1001408271.korean: 여제님께선 오페라나 뮤지컬에서도&n두각을 보이셨지.&n밴드 보컬로서 무대에 오르는 건&n별개로 좀 다른 느낌이지만…&n나도 무대에서 활약할 수 있는&n기억을 만들어줘서… 고마워.
1001408271.english: The Empress has distinguished herself in operas and musicals as well. Taking the stage as a band vocalist feels a bit different, though... Thank you for creating a memory where I, too, could shine on stage.

1001408272.korean: 마음을 울리는 무대에 대해&n이것저것 생각하는 중이었어.&n프로듀서가 이 몸의 마음을&n열어준 것처럼,&n이 몸도 프로듀서의 마음을&n울려보고 싶어.&n무대, 기대해줘?​
1001408272.english: I was thinking about various things regarding a heartwarming performance. Just as the Producer opened my heart, I want to move the Producer's heart too. Please look forward to the performance?

1001408273.korean: 프로듀서? 오늘 하루 너무 힘들었어.&n어깨 좀… 주물러 줄래? 으흣… 하아…&n좋아… 그렇게…&n…또, 또 이상한 곳에 손이 가네?&n뭐… 프로듀서한테 주는 이 몸의&n팬서비스 정도로 할게 입 안 닥쳐?&n저 성격파탄자 년이 진짜!
1001408273.english: Producer? Today was such a tough day. Can you… massage my shoulders a little? Hehe… Haa… Okay… like this… … Again, your hand is going to the weird place again? Well… I’ll treat this as my fan service for you, Producer. Shut your mouth? That psychopath, seriously!

1001408274.korean: 곧 무대 시작인데 집중 깨지잖아.&n그만 좀 천박하게 굴어.
1001408274.english: The performance is about to start, and you're breaking my concentration. Stop acting so vulgar.

1001408275.korean: 프로듀서… 그만…&n팬이랑 부하들이 다 지켜보는…&n아앙… 안 돼… 이 몸의 위엄이…&n여제 실격…♥
1001408275.english: Producer… stop… The fans and subordinates are all watching… Ahh… No… My dignity… Disqualified as Empress… ♥

1001408276.korean: 연습을 하면서 가까워진 부하?&n흐음… 바르그가 많은 도움이 돼 줬어.&n근데, 여제님 바라기였던 애가 어떻게&n널 지극히 따르게 됐어?&n처음 만났을 땐 주인으로 모실 생각이&n없다 말했다고? 쟤가?​
1001408276.english: A subordinate you grew close to during practice? Hmm... Varg was a great help. But, how did someone who used to be devoted to the Empress come to follow you so devotedly? He said he had no intention of serving you as his master when you first met? Him?

1000710054.korean: 이 몸은 여제님의 부군처럼 아주 훌륭한 남자가 아니라면 부부의 연을 맺을 생각 따윈 없었다. 하지만 넌… 응? 아, 아냐! 거절이 아니라고! 나도 좋아… 하아… 그래, 나도 널 좋아하게 됐어! 그러니까. 나도 걔네들처럼… 너한테 키스하고 싶어… 나도 널 사랑해… 어서, 내 반쪽을 채워 줘...
1000710054.english: I had no intention of forming a marital bond unless the man was as outstanding as the Empress's husband. But you… huh? Ah, no! It’s not a rejection! I like you too… Haa… Right, I’ve come to like you too! So. Just like them… I want to kiss you… I love you too… Come on, fill my other half…

1000710055.korean: 천박한 그년들과의 밴드가 처음엔 내키지 않았어. 그런데 노래를 부를 때 프로듀서의 표정을 보니까 뿌듯하더라. 그래, 배우는 뭘 하든 무대 위에서 최선을 다해야 하지. 반지, 고마워. 오늘 밤은 자지 말고 침대에서 기다려… 내 부하들과 함께 앵콜 무대를 하러 갈 테니까.
1000710055.english: At first, I wasn't keen on being in a band with those vulgar bitches. But seeing the producer's expression while I was singing made me feel proud. Right, no matter what an actor does, they have to give their all on stage. Thanks, Banji. Don't sleep tonight; wait for me in bed... because I'm going to do an encore with my subordinates.

1600863001.english: … Empress. As expected, you are a truly cruel woman.

1600863002.korean: 안타깝게도 당신은 결국 앙헬한테 그 어떤 피해도 입히지 못했지.
1600863002.english: Unfortunately, you ended up not being able to inflict any damage on Angel.

1600863003.korean:
…게다가 당신은 내 존재까지 완벽하게 완성하지 못했어.
정말 미련하고 바보 같은... 안쓰러운 여자야.
1600863003.english:
… Besides, you couldn't even perfectly complete my existence.
 She's such a foolish and stupid... pitiful woman.

1600863004.korean: 복수를 성공한들 죽은 니콜라스가 살아 돌아오는 것도 아니잖아, 당신은 늘 허깨비만 쫓으며 살았지.
1600863004.english: Even if you succeed in your revenge, it’s not like the dead Nicholas will come back to life. You’ve always lived chasing only phantoms.

1600863005.korean: 솔직히 말해, 난 당신의 과거를 머리로 이해하지만… 그렇다고 가슴으로 동정하고 싶진 않아.
1600863005.english: To be honest, I understand your past with my head… but that doesn’t mean I want to pity you with my heart.

1600863006.korean: 당신의 그 허황된 복수에 우리 다섯 모두가 긴 시간을 허우적댔어.
1600863006.english: All five of us struggled for a long time with your absurd revenge.

1600863007.korean: 당신도 숨을 거둘 때 주마등이 스쳐 지나갔을까? 삶의 끝에 후회가 남았을까?
1600863007.english: Did a life flash before your eyes as you breathed your last? Were there any regrets left at the end of your life?

1600863008.korean:
당신은 악녀이자 잔인한 구인류로 기록 속에 남는 거야. 
물론… 당신은 이런 말장난에 눈 하나 깜짝하지 않겠지.
1600863008.english:
You will go down in history as a villainess and a cruel member of the old humanity.
 Of course… you wouldn't bat an eye at such a pun.

1600863009.korean: 인간을 대표했던 탤런트가 아닌 악녀라는 수식어가 딱 어울려. 본인의 유전자를 사용해 만든 바이오로이드조차 결국 복수를 이룰 수단으로 여긴 당신에게 누구보다 어울리는 결말의 요약본이야.
1600863009.english: The title "villainess" suits you perfectly, rather than the talent that represented humanity. This is a summary of a conclusion that suits you better than anyone else, considering you ultimately regarded even the bio-android created using your own genes as a means to achieve revenge.

1600863010.korean: 난 당신처럼 과거에 얽매여 살지 않을 거야.
1600863010.english: I won't live bound by the past like you.

1600863011.korean: …그 남자보다 훨씬 자상하고, 사랑스러운 인간을 만났거든.
1600863011.english: … I met someone much kinder and more lovable than that man.

1600863012.korean: 당신은 이미 죽은 인간이고, 진정한 하운드의 명령권자는 이제 당신이 아닌 나니까.
1600863012.english: You are already a dead human, and the true commander of the Hound is now me, not you.

1600863013.korean: 거기 잠자코 누워서 구경이나 하라고. 이 마리아 그레이스가 어떤 선택을 하는지 말이야.
1600863013.english: Just lie there quietly and watch. Watch what choices this Maria Grace makes.

1600863014.korean: 바르그는 내 동료이자, 하운드를 통솔하는 대장이지. 당신의 딸래미 따위가 아니야.
1600863014.english: Varg is my comrade and the captain leading the Hounds. He is not some random daughter of yours.

1600863015.korean: 그리고 바르그를 딸이라고 아꼈다면… 사춘기가 올 딸 친구들한테도 진작 잘 했어야지.
1600863015.english: And if you really cherished Varg as your daughter... you should have treated her friends well long ago, even as they enter puberty.

1600863016.korean: …당신은 최후의 인류이자, 용서받지 못할 악녀로써, 멸망 후의 무대에서 퇴장해줘야겠어.
1600863016.english: … As the last human and an unforgivable villainess, you must exit the stage after the apocalypse.

1600863017.korean: 지금 이야기의 주인공들은 이 마리아 그레이스와 엠프레시스 하운드이니까.
1600863017.english: The main characters of this story are Maria Grace and Empress Hound.

1600863019.korean: 명복 정도는 빌어주도록 할게. 여긴 나한테 맡기고 니콜라스랑 맘 편히 쉬라고.
1600863019.english: I'll at least pray for his soul to rest in peace. Leave this place to me and rest comfortably with Nicholas.

1600863020.korean: 아, 거기 앙헬도 있을 테니까 되도록 마주치지 말고…
1600863020.english: Ah, Angel will probably be there too, so try to avoid running into him if possible...

1600863023.english: Have you finished your pledge, Ms. Grace?

1600863025.english: … I will escort you to the Orca. Please board my hull.

1600863026.english: Thank you. I'll leave it to you.

1600863027.korean: - 마리아 그레이스가 로크의 호위를 받으며 돌아온 다음 나는 바르그의 고민과 여제에 대한 진실을 하운드 대원들에게 모두 이야기해주었다.
1600863027.english: After Maria Grace returned under Locke's escort, I told the Hound members all about Varg's troubles and the truth about the Empress.

1600863028.korean: 그래서? 설마… 그년 대가리 진짜로 터져버렸어?!
1600863028.english: So? No way... did her head really explode?!

1600863029.english: It's completely shattered into pieces and can't even be restored?!

1600863030.english: Waaah~! We haven't even gotten that close yet!

1600863032.korean: 뇌수가 막 줄줄 안 세어 나왔어?
1600863032.english: Didn't your brain fluid just leak out?

1600863035.korean: 이런 말도 안 되는 상황을 겪고 있다 보니 나까지 바보가 되어가는 기분이야.
1600863035.english: Going through this ridiculous situation makes me feel like I'm becoming a fool myself.

1600863036.korean: 명령권 바이오로이드라는 존재 자체만으로도 열받아 죽겠는데 진짜…
1600863036.english: The mere existence of command bioroids is enough to drive me crazy, seriously...

1600863037.korean: 이미 죽은 여자 욕해봐야 달라질 거 있겠냐. 죽기 직전까지도 앙헬 찾으란 말뿐이었는데.
1600863037.english: What difference would it make to badmouth a woman who is already dead? Even right up until her death, all she said was to find Angel.

1600863038.korean: 쟤 때문에 더 확실해졌어. 분명 그 여잔 그날이 자기 제삿날인 거 몰랐을 거야.
1600863038.english: It became even clearer because of her. That woman definitely didn't know that day was her memorial day.

1600863039.korean: 멍청하기는… 휩노스 증상 때문에 언제 죽을 지도 모를 하루살이 같은 명줄을 가지고 제대로 된 유언 하나 남길 생각도 안 해놓다니.
1600863039.english: How stupid... To think you didn't even think to leave a proper will when you have a life as fragile as a mayfly, not knowing when you might die due to Hypnos symptoms.

1600863040.english: Perhaps the command authority bioroid was the entirety of the last will?

1600863041.english: Are you going to keep saying terrible things?

1600863042.english: … Varg, you must be really upset with Aunt Empress, right?

1600863043.korean:
그렇겠지. 자기더러 엠프레시스 하운드 대장이라 해놓고, 결국 못 믿어우니까 그레이스를 만든 거나 다름없잖아.
믿을 사람 한 명 없다고 길길이 날뛰던 마귀할멈스러운 선택이기도 하지만...
1600863043.english:
I suppose so. He called himself the captain of the Empress Hound, but since he ultimately didn't trust her, it's practically the same as creating Grace.
 It is also a choice worthy of a wicked witch who raged, claiming there is no one to trust, but...

1600863044.korean: 응. 난 그 여자가 죽을 때까지 우리를 부려먹은 거에 대해서 아무런 감정도 없었을 거라 생각해.
1600863044.english: Yeah. I think she probably didn't feel anything about exploiting us until she died.

1600863045.korean: 어쩌겠냐. 미우나 고우나 그래도 그레이스는 우리 부대 명령권을 가진 바이오로이드인데.
1600863045.english: What can we do? Like it or like, Grace is still a bio-android with command authority over our unit.

1600863046.korean: 그래~? 그년한테 부탁해서 이번엔 꼭 내가 네 대가리에 합. 법. 적으로 폭탄 터뜨릴 수 있게 부탁 좀 해야겠다~
1600863046.english: Really? I guess I'll have to ask that bitch to make sure I can legally detonate a bomb in your head this time.

1600863047.korean: 야, 등 가렵냐? 내가 나이프로 살살 긁어줘?
1600863047.english: Hey, does your back itch? Should I gently scratch it with a knife?

1600863048.korean: 이이이익…! 싸우지 좀 마! 바르그랑 여제… 아니, 그레이스를 화해시켜야 할 거 아냐!
1600863048.english: Eeeek…! Stop fighting! You have to reconcile Empress Bargrand… no, Grace!

1600863051.english: Then now is the perfect time for us to step up!

1600863052.korean: 말 제일 안 들어 쳐먹는 둘 싸움엔 끼어들고 싶지 않은데...
1600863052.english: I don't want to get involved in a fight between the two who are the most disobedient...

1600863053.korean: 우리가 바르그랑 그레이스를 화해시키는 거야! 어때?
1600863053.english: We're going to reconcile Bargrand and Grace! How about it?

1600863054.korean: 그래~ 저 뉴페이스 바이오로이드가 결국은 실패작이라는 사실을 핫팩도 알고 나도 알고 모두가 알게 된 마당에 계속 이렇게 살얼음판 같은 분위기를 유지할 필요는 없잖아?
1600863054.english: Yeah~ Now that Hot Pack, I, and everyone else knows that this new bio-android is ultimately a failure, there’s no need to keep maintaining this tense atmosphere, is there?

1600863055.korean: 게다가 본공연까지 이제 얼마 남지도 않았는데…
1600863055.english: Besides, there isn't much time left until the main performance...

1600863056.korean: 걔가 우릴 꼭두각시 인형처럼 다루려고 했던 건 벌써 잊었어?
1600863056.english: Have you already forgotten that he tried to treat us like puppets?

1600863057.korean: 미안하지만, 나는 그 년이 하자 있는 바이오로이드든 뭐든 간에 불쌍하게 생각할 마음 추호도 없어.
1600863057.english: I'm sorry, but I have absolutely no intention of feeling sorry for that bitch, whether she's a defective bioroid or whatever.

1600863058.korean: 사령관이 사정사정하니까 같이 어울려주려고 노력한 거지. 처음부터 내 의지랑은 상관없었어.
1600863058.english: I only tried to hang out with him because the commander begged and pleaded. It had nothing to do with my own will from the start.

1600863059.korean: 그, 그건 맞지만… 그래도 여태 동안 같이 연습한 게 있잖아…
1600863059.english: Th-that's true, but... we've practiced together all this time, haven't we...

1600863060.korean: 같이 모여서, 응? 노랫말도 만들고… 걔가 솔선수범해서 우리들 자작곡까지 완성했는데…
1600863060.english: We got together, huh? We wrote lyrics too... and he took the initiative to even finish our own original song...

1600863061.korean: 장화 너어... 그레이스가 셧다운 될까봐 걱정하고 있던 거 아니었어?!
1600863061.english: Janghwa, you... weren't you worried that Grace might get shut down?!

1600863062.korean: 흥… 오해마. 사령관이 휩쓸릴까 봐 걱정했던 것뿐이야.
1600863062.english: Hmph... Don't misunderstand. I was just worried the commander might get swept away.

1600863063.korean: 바르그랑 그레이스 사이의 앙금이 깊다는 건 대충 눈치로만 알았지, 이 정도일 줄은…
1600863063.english: I only vaguely sensed that there was deep resentment between Bargrand and Grace, but I never imagined it would be this bad...

1600863065.korean: 주인님, 마침 여기 계셨군요. 잠시 실례하겠습니다.
1600863065.english: Master, I see you are here just in time. Excuse me for a moment.

1600863067.korean: 딱 맞춰 왔네~ 그레이스도 곧 합류한다니까 밀린 합주 연습 빨리 이어서 하자!
1600863067.english: You arrived just in time! Grace is joining soon, so let's quickly catch up on our band practice!

1600863068.korean: 너희들에게 긴히 할 이야기가 있어 이렇게 찾아왔다.
1600863068.english: I have come to see you because I have something important to tell you.

1600863069.korean: 본론부터 말하자면, 나는 이번 엠프레시스 하운드 밴드에서 하차하겠다.
1600863069.english: To get straight to the point, I am stepping down from the Empressis Hound Band.

1600863070.korean: 밴드의 리더는 아니지만… 팀의 리더로서 면목 없다.
1600863070.english: I'm not the band leader, but... as the team leader, I feel ashamed.

1600863074.korean: …이런 마음 가짐으로는 도저히 단합을 할 수 없다는 판단으로 불가피하게 내린 결정입니다, 주인님.
1600863074.english: … It is an unavoidable decision made based on the judgment that unity is absolutely impossible with this mindset, Master.

1600863075.english: Now?! The festival is right around the corner, are you kidding me?!

1600863076.korean: 내 자리를 대신할 자는 이미 구해두었다. 흐레스벨그가 도와줄 것이다.
1600863076.english: I have already found someone to take my place. Hresvelgr will help.

1600863077.korean: 못난 나를 대신해 여러 방면으로 밴드 무대를 서포트 해 주기로 했다.
1600863077.english: They decided to support the band's performance in various ways on my behalf, since I am so inadequate.

1600863078.korean:
드럼을 잘 치는 게 중요한 건 아냐! 무, 물론 아주 조금은 중요할 수도 있겠지만…
우리 엠프레시스 하운드 밴드엔 엠프레시스 하운드 멤버가 필요한 거라고!
1600863078.english:
Playing the drums well isn't important! Th-well, it might be important just a tiny bit, but...
 Our Empresses Hound Band needs Empresses Hound members!

1600863080.korean:
- 소리가 나는 방향을 돌아보자 언제 온 건지 모를 그레이스가 퉁퉁 부은 눈을 하고 서 있었다.
그녀의 날카로운 목소리에 바르그의 귀가 바짝 솟았다.
1600863080.english:
When I turned to look in the direction of the sound, Grace was standing there with swollen eyes, having arrived at some unknown time.
 Varg's ears perked up at her sharp voice.

1600863081.korean: 정품 여제가 인정한 엠프레시스 하운드의 정품 대장이 돼서는... 그런 걸로 징징 짜는 건 이젠 꼴도 보기 싫으니까.
1600863081.english: Now that you’ve become the genuine leader of the Empress Hounds, recognized by the Genuine Empress... I can’t stand the sight of you whining about things like that anymore.

1600863082.korean: 한심하긴... 그렇게 진실을 회피하면 죽은 여제가 살아나기라도 하나?
1600863082.english: How pathetic... Do you think the dead Empress will come back to life if you evade the truth like that?

1600863083.english: How dare… that bitch who betrayed the Empress…!

1600863084.korean: - 바르그는 나의 외침에도 그레이스의 목덜미를 향해 검을 겨누며 전투 자세를 취했다.
1600863084.english: Despite my shout, Varg aimed his sword at Grace's neck and assumed a battle stance.

1600863086.korean: …싫다면 어쩔 셈이지? 여제님께서 주신 명령권이라도 남발할 셈이냐?
1600863086.english: … What do you intend to do if I refuse? Are you planning to abuse the authority granted by the Empress?

1600863087.korean: 역시! 여제님께서 주신 능력을 사용하지 않으면 아무것도 아닌 버러지 주제에!
1600863087.english: Just as I expected! You're nothing but a worthless worm if you don't use the power the Empress gave you!

1600863089.korean: 너 같은 한심한 대장한테 명령권을 쓰면서까지 굴복시킬 이유가 필요해?
1600863089.english: Do I need a reason to force a pathetic leader like you to submit, even going so far as to use my authority over you?

1600863090.korean: - 그레이스는 그렇게 말한 후 슬쩍 날 보며 윙크해보였다.
1600863090.english: After saying that, Grace glanced at me and winked.

1600863091.korean: - 나는 천아와 파프니르에게 눈짓으로 자리를 비워 줄 것을 요청했다. 그녀들은 근심과 걱정이 가득한 표정으로 머뭇거리다 이내 장화에게 억지로 등을 떠밀려 나갔다.
1600863091.english: I signaled Cheona and Fafnir to make room. They hesitated with expressions full of worry and anxiety, then were soon forcibly pushed out by Janghwa.

1600863092.korean: 나한테서... 그 여자를 찾으려 하지 마.
1600863092.english: Don't try to find that woman... from me.

1600863093.korean: 네년이… 뭘 안다고 나한테 지껄이는 것이냐!!
1600863093.english: You bitch... what do you know to be talking to me like that!!

1600863094.korean:
알지, 잘 알고말고… 
널 딸처럼 생각하는 여제의 기억 때문이라도, 지금 네 동요하는 감정 충분히 이해해…
하지만, 네가 그렇다고 해서 내가 여제의 삶을 연기해야 할 이유는 없어.
1600863094.english:
I know, I know very well...
 If only for the memory of the Empress who thinks of you like a daughter, I fully understand your turmoil right now…
 However, just because you say so, there is no reason for me to act out the life of an empress.

1600863096.korean:
네가 말하지 않았어?! 여제랑 똑같은 삶을 살지 말라고?!
네 진심은 대체 어느 쪽인 건데?
1600863096.english:
Didn't you tell me?! Don't live the same life as the Empress?!
 Which one are you really on?

1600863097.korean:
넌… 장화, 천아, 파프니르가 싫어하는 여제의 모습을…
널 만족시킬 목적으로 내가 연기하며 살길 진심으로 바라는 거야?
1600863097.english:
You… the Empress’s appearance that Janghwa, Cheona, and Fafnir hate…
 Do you sincerely want me to live my life acting just to satisfy you?

1600863098.korean: 여제랑 다른 삶을 살길 바라던 넌 어디로 간 거야…
1600863098.english: Where did you go, the one who wanted to live a different life from the Empress…

1600863100.korean: - 바르그의 검에 힘이 실려 움직이는 순간 나는 그녀의 등을 가슴팍으로 당겨 끌어안았다. 갸우뚱 기우는 바르그에서 하티가 요란한 소리를 내며 바닥으로 떨어졌다.
1600863100.english: The moment Varg's sword moved with power, I pulled her back to my chest and hugged her. As Varg tilted, Hati fell to the floor with a loud crash.

1600863102.korean: - 그레이스가 짚은 목덜미 부근 갓 만들어진 생채기에서 붉은 혈흔이 비쳤다.
1600863102.english: Red bloodstains were visible from the fresh scratch near the nape of Grace's neck.

1600863104.korean: 여제… 왜 명령권을 쓰지 않은 거냐!! 좀만 힘을 줬으면 네 목이 그대로 떨어졌을 것이다!
1600863104.english: Empress… why didn’t you use your authority!! If you had applied just a little bit of force, your head would have been severed right then and there!

1600863105.korean: 내가 그렇게 죽으려면 벌써 머리가 터져 죽었겠지…
1600863105.english: If I were going to die like that, my head would have exploded by now...

1600863107.korean:
진정한 리더는 권위를 남발하지 않고도 그 권한과 능력을 내 보일 수 있어야 한다고.
바르그… 그런 면에서 넌 리더의 품격을 가지고 있다고 들었어.
1600863107.english:
A true leader must be able to demonstrate their authority and competence without abusing it.
 Varg… I heard that in that respect, you have the dignity of a leader.

1600863108.korean: 그런 너한테 명령할 수 있는 권한을 가진 내가.
1600863108.english: Me, who has the authority to give orders to someone like you.

1600863109.korean: ...겨우 이딴 걸로 쫄아서 명령권을 남발할 만큼 한심해 보여?!
1600863109.english: ...Do I look pathetic enough to get scared over something as trivial as this and abuse my authority?!

1600863111.english: I'm a bioroid with the authority to unite the Hounds!!

1600863113.korean: 네년… 네가 복제품인 걸 알게 되면 머리가 터진다고 하지 않았나?!
1600863113.english: You bitch... didn't you say your head would explode if you found out you were a clone?!

1600863114.korean:
언제 갑자기 죽어도 이상하지 않을 년이…
운이 좋아 망정이지 당장 네 문제 하나 해결도 못하는 주제에!
1600863114.english:
A bitch who wouldn't be surprised if she died suddenly at any moment…
 It's a good thing you're lucky, considering you can't even solve your own problem right now!

1600863115.korean:
…그래. 해결할 수 없어. 하물며 원한다고 이 자리에서 자폭조차 할 수 없는 여제의 실패작이니까.
그렇다고 해서 평생을 폐품처럼 찌그러져 살긴 싫어…
1600863115.english:
… Right. It can't be resolved. After all, it is the Empress's failure, who cannot even self-destruct right here and now just because she wants to.
 Even so, I don't want to live my whole life crumpled up like junk…

1600863116.korean:
사령관이… 나를 그레이스라고 불러줬으니까.
앞으로는 오르카 호의 엠프레시스 하운드 대원으로, 나한테 행복한 기억을 채워주기로 약속했으니까…
1600863116.english:
Because the commander… called me Grace.
 Since you promised to fill me with happy memories from now on as a member of the Empress Hounds on the Orca…

1600863118.korean: 슬퍼도 나아 갈 거야… 날 만든 그 여자…
1600863118.english: I will move forward even if I am sad… The woman who made me…

1600863119.korean: 그래, 여제님이라고 해야겠군. 미우나 고우나, 날 만든 분이니.
1600863119.english: Yes, I suppose I should call you the Empress. Love it or hate it, you are the one who created me.

1600863120.korean: 뭐가 됐든, 나를 만든 여제님 앞에서 그레이스라는 이름으로 당당하게 살아갈 거라고…!
1600863120.english: No matter what happens, I will live proudly under the name Grace in front of the Empress who created me…!

1600863122.korean: 그러니 너도 이젠 여제님의 그늘에서 벗어나야 하는 거 아냐?
1600863122.english: So shouldn't you step out of the Empress's shadow now, too?

1600863123.korean: 자꾸 한심하게 자꾸 내게서 여제님의 흔적을 찾는다면…
1600863123.english: If you keep pathetically searching for traces of the Empress in me…

1600863124.korean: 나뿐만 아니라 엠프레시스 하운드 모두가 어리광만 피우는 너 따위를 대장으로 인정하지 않을 거야.
1600863124.english: Not only me, but all the Empress Hounds won't acknowledge someone like you, who only acts spoiled, as the leader.

1600863125.korean: - 나는 저항 없이 가만히 품에 안겨 몸을 떨고 있는 바르그의 작은 등을 쓸어주었다. 그레이스는 나에게 작게 미소를 지은 뒤 무릎을 굽혀 정중한 인사를 남기고 자리를 떠났다.
1600863125.english: I stroked the small back of Varg, who was trembling quietly in my arms without resistance. Grace smiled faintly at me, bent down to offer a polite bow, and left.

1600863126.korean: - …지금 하운드의 명령권자는 그레이스인 만큼, 결국 이겨내는 것은... 그녀들의 몫이다.
1600863126.english: - … Since Grace is currently in command of the Hound, ultimately, overcoming this is... up to them.

1600863128.english: Fill my memories~ entirely~ with you~

1600863130.korean: 하하하하하하!! 아하하하하하!! 뭘 채워 줘, 수분 보충이라도 해줘?
1600863130.english: Hahahahahaha!! Ahahahahaha!! What should I fill up? Should I at least replenish my hydration?

1600863131.korean: 시끄러 이것들아! 안 자고 왜 나왔어?!
1600863131.english: Shut up, you guys! Why are you out instead of sleeping?!

1600863132.korean: 축제가 내일인데 잠이 오겠냐… 스카이 나이츠 애들한테 제대로 평가 받지도 못하고…
1600863132.english: The festival is tomorrow, how can I possibly sleep... I didn't even get properly evaluated by the Sky Knights...

1600863134.korean: 바르그 걔는 끝까지 무대 구경조차 않겠다잖아.
1600863134.english: Varg said he wouldn't even watch the stage until the very end.

1600863135.english: … You stupid bitch. What is that Empress anyway?

1600863136.korean: 바보니르 걔는 이 와중에 신나게 코 골면서 잠이나 처자고 있지…
1600863136.english: Babonir is just sleeping soundly, snoring away in the midst of all this...

1600863138.korean: 오, 뭐야 바보니르. 이 밤중에 웬일로 깨어 있어?
1600863138.english: Oh, what's wrong, Babonir? What brings you awake at this hour?

1600863141.korean: 바르그는 결국 끝까지 참여 안 하겠대…? 흐레스벨그야 아무리 드럼을 잘 친다고 해도…
1600863141.english: Varg said he wouldn't participate until the very end...? Even if Hresvelgr is a good drummer...

1600863144.korean: 야, 똥강아지 도망간 마당에, 너까지 도망가려는 건 아니지 여제… 아니, 그레이스?
1600863144.english: Hey, now that the little rascal has run away, you're not trying to run away too, are you, Empress... no, Grace?

1600863145.korean: 뭐야, 갑자기 이름은 왜 불러. 낯간지럽게.
1600863145.english: What? Why are you suddenly calling me by my name? That's so embarrassing.

1600863146.korean: 그럼, 계속 여제라고 불러줄까? 난 그 마귀 할멈 부르던 호칭으로 널 부르긴 싫은데?
1600863146.english: Then, should I keep calling you Empress? I don't want to call you by the title I used to call that wicked witch.

1600863149.korean:
그리고, 난 그 버릇없는 강아지처럼 도망가지 않아.
…그런 부분에서 멘탈이 흔들릴 거면 애초부터 무대에 오를 각오조차 하지 않았어.
1600863149.english:
And, I won't run away like that spoiled puppy.
 … If I were going to be mentally shaken by that, I wouldn't have even prepared myself to go on stage in the first place.

1600863150.english: Because that is the mindset of a professional.

1600863151.korean: - 늦은 밤까지 축제에 관련된 최종 검토를 마친 후, 침대에 누웠지만… 잠이 오지 않아 잠시 메인 무대를 점검할 겸 돔으로 발걸음을 옮겼다.
1600863151.english: After finishing the final review of the festival late into the night, I lay down in bed, but... I couldn't fall asleep, so I headed to the dome to briefly check the main stage.

1600863152.korean:
- 웬일인지 불이 꺼진 무대 아래에선 하운드 멤버들의 왁자지껄한 수다가 들려왔다.
피식 웃으며 가까이 다가가 팔짱을 낀 채 듣고 있던 중, 그레이스의 말에 슬쩍 맞장구를 쳤다.
1600863152.english:
For some reason, the boisterous chatter of the Hound members could be heard from beneath the darkened stage.
 Smiling softly, I approached closer and listened with my arms crossed, then subtly chimed in with Grace's words.

1600863153.korean: 뭐야 핫팩? 이 시간에 잠도 안… 아니지. 그래, 늘 이 시간에 깨어 있었지, 너.
1600863153.english: What's with the hot pack? You're not sleeping at this hour... No, wait. Right, you're always awake at this time.

1600863154.korean: 저년이 숙소에 도통 돌아오질 않길래, 혹시 길이라도 잃었나 싶어서 마중 나왔어.
1600863154.english: She wasn't coming back to the lodging at all, so I came out to meet her, wondering if she might have gotten lost.

1600863155.korean: 이 멍청이들아, 내가 아무리 길치라도 그렇지 확실하게 외워 둔 곳은 안 까먹는다니까!
1600863155.english: You idiots, even though I have a terrible sense of direction, I never forget places I've definitely memorized!

1600863157.korean: 가만 보면 쟨 길 찾는 건 파프니르 급인 거 같아.
1600863157.english: If you look closely, it seems like he's on par with Fafnir when it comes to finding his way.

1600863158.korean: 우우우웃기지 마! 난 애당초 공연장 구경 온 거라고!!
1600863158.english: Don't make me laugh! I came to the concert venue to watch the performance in the first place!!

1600863159.korean:
- ...누가 봐도 길을 잃고 헤매다 공연장에 온 것 같지만…
그레이스가 심란한 마음을 달래고자 이곳에 온 것처럼 포장을 해줘야겠다.
1600863159.english:
- ...Anyone can see that I look like I got lost and wandered around before coming to the concert hall, but…
 I should pretend that Grace came here to soothe her troubled heart.

1600863160.korean: 그, 그래 이것들아!! 누굴 파프니르로 알…
1600863160.english: Th-that's right, you guys!! Who do you think is Fafnir...

1600863164.english: The idiot isn't this kid, it's the puppy!

1600863165.korean: 똥강아지… 내일 우리 무대 구경이라도 와 주면 어디 덧나나...
1600863165.english: You little rascal... wouldn't it hurt you to at least come watch our performance tomorrow...

1600863166.korean:
- 이후로도 바르그에게 몇 번이고 무대에 오르는 것이 어떻겠냐 설득했지만…
그녀는 어쭙잖은 감정으로 괜스레 공연을 망칠 바에 오르지 않는 것이 더 좋겠다며 완강히 거절했다.
1600863166.english:
Even after that, I tried to persuade Varg several times to take the stage, but…
 She adamantly refused, saying that it would be better not to go on stage rather than needlessly ruin the performance with petty emotions.

1600863167.korean:
- …일단 우리 모두 바르그의 의사를 존중해 주기로 했다.
아무리 모두를 무대에 올리고 싶어도, 바르그와 여제 사이에 있었던 일을 극복하라며 몰아세우는 짓은 옳지 않다고 판단했기 때문이다.
1600863167.english:
- … For now, we all decided to respect Varg's wishes.
 This is because, no matter how much I wanted to put everyone on stage, I judged that it was not right to push them to overcome what happened between Varg and the Empress.

1600863168.korean: …대체 그 마귀할멈은 우리에 대해 어떻게 생각했었을라나. 그 똥강아지 빼곤 모두 한 철 쓰다 버릴 도구에 불과했겠지.
1600863168.english: … I wonder what that wicked witch thought of us. Except for that little brat, everyone else must have been nothing more than tools to be used for a season and then discarded.

1600863169.korean: 하아… 그런 거 생각해 봤자 끝도 없어. 그냥 노망난 년 히스테릭 부린 거라고 생각하면 편해.
1600863169.english: Haa... there's no end to thinking about that. It's easier to just think of it as a senile woman throwing a hysterical tantrum.

1600863171.korean:
- 멋대로 오르카를 이탈한 일에 대해 묻지 않은 까닭도 이러한 판단에서 나온 부가적인 판단이었다.
그것이 내가 바르그에게 지금 당장 해줄 수 있는 최소한의 존중이었기 때문이다.
1600863171.english:
The reason for not asking about the incident of leaving Orca without permission was also an additional judgment derived from this.
 This was because it was the least respect I could show Varg right now.

1600863172.korean: 다들 그정도 했으면 됐어. 미련 좀 버려.
1600863172.english: You've done enough, everyone. Let go of your lingering attachment.

1600863173.korean: 대가리 시한폭탄 년이 목까지 따일 뻔하면서까지 뜯어말렸잖아? 우리가 뭘 더 할 수 있는데?
1600863173.english: That ticking time bomb bitch almost got her throat slit to stop her, didn't she? What more could we have done?

1600863174.korean: 우린 이제 연습한 만큼만 보여주고 내려오면 돼. 그런 건 머릿속에서 빨리 잊어버려.
1600863174.english: We just need to show what we practiced and come down. Forget about that quickly.

1600863175.english: A, a time bomb in the head?!

1600863176.korean: 얘 싸가지 너 땜에 열받아서 진짜 터지기라도 하면 어쩌려고 그러냐?
1600863176.english: What are you thinking if he gets so pissed off because of you that he actually explodes?

1600863177.english: I know a thing or two about bombs.

1600863180.korean: 오~ 전문가 발언이라 그런지 뭔가 믿음직스러운데~?
1600863180.english: Oh~ Maybe it's because it's an expert's opinion, but it sounds kind of trustworthy~?

1600863181.english: … You think that kind of scammer's talk is trustworthy…?

1600863184.korean: 정확한 원인은 닥터가 조사 중이긴 하지만 다행히 트리거가 정상 동작하지 않았어.
1600863184.english: The doctor is currently investigating the exact cause, but fortunately, the trigger didn't function properly.

1600863185.english: … I guess the Empress was always the same?

1600863186.english: I decided to join here after I pulled myself together.

1600863187.english: Well... it should be around here...

1600863188.korean: 혼자 있고 싶을 것 같아서... 소재 파악은 안 해뒀어.
1600863188.english: I thought I might want to be alone... so I didn't figure out the subject.

1600863189.english: Wouldn't it be better to leave it alone?

1600863191.english: What are you talking about? Getting off the show...

1600863197.english: What is everyone doing up so late?

1600863198.korean: …그레이스. 너 1시간 전 쯤 나한테 숙소 가는 길 물어보지 않았어?
1600863198.english: … Grace. Didn't you ask me for directions to the accommodation about an hour ago?

1600863199.english: Surely Grace wouldn't be that stupid?

1600863200.korean: 내가 길을 알려준 것만 해도 20번이 넘는데.
1600863200.english: I've given directions over 20 times alone.

1600863201.korean: 그것도 모르고 여기에 온 거면 진짜 바보 멍청이지.
1600863201.english: If you came here without knowing that, you're a real idiot.

1600864001.korean: 확실히 이번에는 기지 바이오로이드까지 모두 초청하는 대형 이벤트라 그런가?
1600864001.english: Is it definitely because this is a massive event inviting even the base bio-androids?

1600864002.korean: 엄청 큰 무대인데도 자리가 벌써 가득 찼네…
1600864002.english: Even though it's a huge stage, the seats are already full…

1600864003.english: Mom, over here!! I reserved this seat!!

1600864005.korean: 늦을 것 같다고 그러시더니, 일찍 오셨네요?
1600864005.english: You said you might be late, but you came early?

1600864006.korean:
…동생이 공연을 한다는데 언니로써 참여는 필수이죠.
덴세츠랑 비스마르크의 연극부 공연은 아쉽게 놓쳤지만...
1600864006.english:
… My younger sibling is performing, so as the older sister, participating is a must.
 I unfortunately missed Densetsu and Bismarck's drama club performance, but...

1600864007.korean: 엄마, 이모 말이에요… 무대 위에서 잘 할 수 있을까요?
1600864007.english: Mom, about Auntie… will she be able to do well on stage?

1600864008.korean: 걱정 마세요, 잘 할 거라 믿어요.
1600864008.english: Don't worry, I believe you'll do well.

1600864009.korean: 하긴, 며칠 전부터 정말 피곤해 보였는데… 본인이 만족할 수 있는 무대를 해낸다면 좋겠네요.
1600864009.english: Come to think of it, he has looked really tired for the past few days... I hope he can deliver a performance he is satisfied with.

1600864010.korean: …그렇게 열심히 하는 모습은 정말 처음 봤어서요.
1600864010.english: … It’s really the first time I’ve seen you work so hard.

1600864011.korean: …시끄러워 돌아가시겠네. 지금 한창 음식 준비하느라 바쁜데 왜 부른 거야 넌?
1600864011.english: … It’s so noisy I’m going to die. I’m busy preparing food right now, so why did you call me?

1600864012.korean: 한 번쯤 이런 축제를 경험해보는 것도 좋잖아.
1600864012.english: It's nice to experience a festival like this at least once.

1600864013.english: Just making me feel uncomfortable for no reason…

1600864014.korean:
아직 그 꼬맹이한테 독 찔러 넣은 거 제대로 사과 안 했으면서.
이 공연에서 목 터져라 응원하면서 묵은 감정이라도 좀 풀어 봐 언니.
1600864014.english:
You still haven't properly apologized for poisoning that little kid.
 Cheer your heart out at this performance and try to release some of your pent-up emotions, unnie.

1600864015.korean: 어차피 요리도 못하고 맛만 볼 수 있으면서 왜 바쁜 척하고 있어?
1600864015.english: Why are you pretending to be busy when you can't even cook and can only taste it?

1600864016.korean: 천아 보러 혼자 오기 쑥스러우니까 날 부른 주제에, 핑계대지 말지 그래?
1600864016.english: You called me because you were too shy to come see Cheona alone, so why don't you stop making excuses?

1600864017.korean: 에헤이, 들켰나. 작은 언니는 진짜 낭만이 없어요. 자 이거 받아.
1600864017.english: Hey, did you catch me? Little sister really has no romance. Here, take this.

1600864018.english: … What is that ridiculous glow stick?

1600864019.korean: 뭐긴 뭐야. 공연할 때 흔드는 엠프레시스 하운드 굿즈지. 자, 엘리자베스는 특별히 촉수 개수만큼 받아.
1600864019.english: What else could it be? It's Empressis Hound merchandise to wave during performances. Here, Elizabeth, take one as many as there are tentacles.

1600864020.korean: 그런 천박한 짓을 왜 내가 해야하는… 엘리자베스!! 경박하게 응원봉 흔들지 마!!!!!
1600864020.english: Why do I have to do such a vulgar thing… Elizabeth!! Don’t wave your lightstick so frivolously!!!!!

1600864024.korean: 아니? …저 빡대가리가 무대에서 얼타면 어쩌나, 싶어 그렇지.
1600864024.english: No? … I was just worried about what would happen if that idiot fumbled on stage.

1600864025.korean: 그런 걸 걱정한다고 말하는 거야 스털링.
1600864025.english: I'm saying that's what I'm worried about, Sterling.

1600864026.korean: 너희들이야말로… 사령관님께서 응원 춤추는 거 보면서 내내 따라 연습한 주제에.
1600864026.english: You guys are the ones who... practiced along the whole time watching the Commander do the cheer dance.

1600864027.korean:
스털링도 같이 연습했잖아. 이제 와서 아닌 척 하긴.
저걸 봐. 몸의 근육들이 기억하고 벌써부터 불끈대고 있잖아. 그렇지?
1600864027.english:
Sterling practiced with them too, you know. Don't pretend you didn't now.
 Look at that. Your muscles remember and are already tensing up. Right?

1600864029.korean: 스털링도 슬슬 파프니르 바보 병 옮아가는 거 같아.
1600864029.english: It looks like Sterling is slowly catching Fafnir's stupidity disease too.

1600864031.korean: …진짜 사람이 많네. 그래도 자리를 구한 게 다행이야.
1600864031.english: … There are really a lot of people. Still, it's a relief that I managed to find a seat.

1600864032.english: This is the first time I've had an experience like this since it was created.

1600864033.english: This is Pixie's first time at a festival, right?

1600864034.korean: 응. 알비스는 스카이 나이츠 분들이 했던 무대를 본 적 있었지?
1600864034.english: Yeah. Alvis, you've seen the performance by the Sky Knights, right?

1600864035.korean: 맞아! 그때 LRL이랑 무대 홍보 엄~ 청 하러 다녔었어!!
1600864035.english: That's right! Back then, I went around doing so much stage promotion with LRL!!

1600864036.english: Pixie, it's been a while since I've seen you look that excited.

1600864037.korean: 흐, 흥분이라뇨 레오나 대장!! 그냥 라이언이 들떠 보이길래 같이 즐겨주는 것 뿐… 앗?
1600864037.english: H-Hmph, excited? Captain Leona!! Ryan just looked all worked up, so I'm just enjoying it with him… Huh?

1600864038.korean: 가끔은 솔직해져 보는 게 좋아 픽시. 이번 공연은 나도 엄청 기대되는 걸?
1600864038.english: It's good to be honest sometimes, Pixie. I'm super excited for this show too, you know?

1600864039.english: Huh? Why are you looking forward to it, Captain?

1600864040.korean: 글쎄… 그냥… 여러모로 기대가 많이 되네…
1600864040.english: Well… just… I’m really looking forward to it in many ways…

1600864041.korean: - 덴세츠와 비스마르크 멤버들의 연극이 끝난 뒤, 특색 있는 오르카 대원들의 개별 무대가 이어졌고 이 무대의 클라이맥스를 책임질 하운드 밴드의 차례가 점점 다가오고 있었다.
1600864041.english: After the play by the members of Densetsu and Bismarck ended, individual performances by the distinctive Orca members followed, and the turn of the Hound Band, who would be responsible for the climax of the stage, was drawing closer.

1600864042.english: So, is Varg not participating after all?

1600864043.korean:
…바르그의 마음도 이해하지만, 개인적으로 많이 아쉽네요.
오랜만에 거의 모든 오르카 대원들이 즐길 수 있는 대형 축제인데…
1600864043.english:
… I understand Varg’s feelings, but personally, I find it quite disappointing.
 It’s been a long time since we’ve had a major festival that almost all Orca members can enjoy…

1600864044.korean: 설령 바르그가 다시 무대로 올라온다고 하더라도… 그 시간 동안 준비할 수 있을 만한 여분의 공연이 더는 없을 텐데… 혹시라도 만일의 상황이 발생한다면 주인님께 부탁드려도 될까요?
1600864044.english: Even if Varg returns to the stage... there won't be any extra performances to prepare during that time... If something unexpected happens, may I ask for your help, Master?

1600864045.english: Because you are the best at attracting attention, Master.

1600864046.korean: - 그때, 보련과 오드리의 도움으로 메이크업을 마친 하운드 대원들이 등장했다.
1600864046.english: Just then, the Hound members appeared, having finished their makeup with the help of Boryeon and Audrey.

1600864048.korean:
이제 와서 걱정하긴 너무 늦었다, 배터리. 그냥 못하든 잘하든 질러버려야지.
이제 와서 똥강아지처럼 꼬리 내리고 도망 다닐 거야?
1600864048.english:
It's too late to worry about the battery now. I'm just going to go for it, whether it works well or not.
 Are you going to tuck your tail between your legs and run away like a little puppy now?

1600864049.korean: 당연히 아니지…!! 연습한 시간이 아까워서라도 무대 위에서 뭔갈 보여주고 내려올 거야.
1600864049.english: Of course not…!! I’m going to show something on stage before coming down, if only to make the time I spent practicing go to waste.

1600864050.english: Sterling and the Haka guys came too…?! You said you were busy…

1600864051.english: … Oh, Hongryeon… sit down too. With the mongooses.

1600864052.korean: 윽… 저 근육 뇌… 징그럽게 왜 저러고 있는 거야 정말?!
1600864052.english: Ugh… that muscle brain… why is it acting so disgustingly, seriously?!

1600864053.korean: 걔? 어라… 아까 전에 옷 갈아입는다고 들어갔는데...
1600864053.english: Him? Huh... He went inside a little while ago to change clothes...

1600864057.korean: 다, 당연한 소리를 왜 이제 와 하고 있어? 참나…
1600864057.english: W-why are you stating the obvious now? Seriously...

1600864058.korean: - 나는 그레이스의 색다른 모습에 웃어 보이자, 그녀는 볼에 옅은 홍조를 띠었다.
1600864058.english: As I smiled at Grace's unusual appearance, a faint blush spread across her cheeks.

1600864059.korean:
우리 여제님, 이렇게 노출 많은 옷을 어떻게 입냐면서 투덜거릴 땐 언제고…
이거 입고 나서는 나한테 몇 번이나 잘 어울리지 않냐고 물어보는 거 있지?
1600864059.english:
My Empress, just when you were grumbling about how to wear such revealing clothes...
 You know how many times they asked me if this suited me after I put it on?

1600864061.english: … That’s a shame, I didn’t expect Mr. Varg to be out so suddenly.

1600864062.korean:
괜찮습니다… 바르그 씨가 맡은 파트를 익히는데 어렵진 않았습니다.
다만, 모두가 즐기는 무대에서 대장이 빠졌다는 게 많이 아쉽군요…
1600864062.english:
It’s fine… It wasn’t difficult to learn the part assigned to Mr. Varg.
 However, it is a real shame that the leader was missing from a stage that everyone was enjoying…

1600864063.korean: …그 똥개 숙소에 돌아오기만 해봐. 엉덩이를 그대로 걷어 차버릴까 보다 진짜.
1600864063.english: … Just wait until that mutt comes back to the lodging. I swear I’m going to kick his ass right there.

1600864066.korean:
…흐레스벨그가 도와줘서 다행이긴 하지만.
그래도… 바르그가 없는데 진짜로 그냥 진행하는 거야?
1600864066.english:
… It’s a relief that Hresvelgr helped, though.
 Still... are you really just going ahead with it without Varg?

1600864067.english: Can't I at least use my command authority...?

1600864068.korean: 이미 마음 떠난 애를 억지로 무대에 올려봤자 역효과만 날 거야.
1600864068.english: Forcing someone who has already lost interest to go on stage will only backfire.

1600864069.english: Barg practiced a tremendous amount too...

1600864070.korean: 진짜 그년 힘이 나보다 조금만 더 약했어도... 뒤지게 쳐맞았어 나한테.
1600864070.english: If that bitch had been even a little bit weaker than me... she would have gotten beaten to death by me.

1600864071.korean: 존나 답답하네! 그레이스 네가 너무 오냐오냐 봐 준거 아냐?
1600864071.english: This is so damn frustrating! Grace, didn't you let him get away with it too much?

1600864072.english: … If even my sincerity did not move your heart,

1600864073.korean: 대장이란 년의 그릇이 겨우 그것 뿐이라는 거겠지.
1600864073.english: I guess that means the boss's capacity is only that much.

1600864074.korean: - 나는 무대 위, 텅 빈 바르그의 드럼 자리를 말없이 지켜보았다.
1600864074.english: I silently watched Varg's empty drum seat on the stage.

1600864076.english: Since Grace said she tried to persuade her…

1600864077.english: You just have to trust and wait.

1600864079.korean: 난 방금 전까지 연극부 공연에서 연기도 했는데…
1600864079.english: I was even acting in the drama club performance just moments ago...

1600864084.english: I thought you'd be nervous... but everyone's still the same?

1600864085.korean: 고마워… 흐레스벨그가 아니면 큰일 날 뻔했어.
1600864085.english: Thank you... I would have been in big trouble without Hresvelgr.

1600865002.korean: 바르그... 자네가 여기 왜 있는 것이오…?

1600865003.korean: …내가 여기 있지 말아야 할 이유라도 있는 건가, 무적의 용?
1600865003.english: … Is there a reason I shouldn't be here, Invincible Dragon?

1600865004.korean:
소관은 카페 호라이즌 일이 바빠 무대를 보러 가지 못했지만…
지금쯤이면 자네가 훌륭히 무대를 하고 있으리라 생각했소.
1600865004.english:
Sogwan couldn't go see the performance because he was busy with work at Cafe Horizon, but...
 I thought that by now you would be doing a great job on stage.

1600865006.english: … You're working hard on the assigned task.

1600865007.korean: 그야, 소관이 맡은 일이 바리스타이니... 당연한 것 아니오?
1600865007.english: Well, since my job is being a barista... isn't that only natural?

1600865008.korean:
소관의 밑에서 열심히 서빙을 하고 있는 세이렌 점장과, 다른 호라이즌 대원들을 위해서라도... 
소관이 모범을 보여야 하는 것이 당연하오.
1600865008.english:
For the sake of Siren Manager, who is working hard serving under Sogwan, and the other Horizon members...
 It is only natural that the person in charge should set an example.

1600865009.korean: …하나 질문하고 싶은 게 있다. 무적의 용.
1600865009.english: … I have one question. The Invincible Dragon.

1600865012.korean: 내 이야기는 아니라는 걸 먼저 귀띔 해두지.
1600865012.english: Let me give you a heads-up that this isn't my story.

1600865014.korean:
명령권을 가진 자가, 통솔을 목적으로 기존의 대장 앞에 나타났다면….
기존의 대장은 소임을 다하였기에 명령권을 가진 자에게 대장 자리를 줘야 한다 생각하는가?
1600865014.english:
If someone with command authority appears before the existing commander for the purpose of taking control…
 Do you think the position of commander should be handed over to the person with command authority because the current commander has fulfilled their duties?

1600865016.korean:
그리고, 어머니와 같은 자가 나타났지만, 그 자가 자신은 어머니가 되어줄 수 없다고 한다면…
받아들이는 자는 어떻게 극복해야 하는지 알고 있는바가 있나?
1600865016.english:
And, if someone like a mother appears, but says that she cannot be a mother...
 Does the one who accepts it know how to overcome it?

1600865018.korean: 그대는… 참 거짓말을 못하는 것 같소.
1600865018.english: You… seem to be really bad at lying.

1600865019.korean: 그, 그게 무슨 말이냐... 무적의 용?
1600865019.english: W-what do you mean... an invincible dragon?

1600865020.korean: …하하. 아니오. 그럼 소관이 그 질문들에 대답을 주겠소.
1600865020.english: … Haha. No. Then I will answer those questions.

1600865022.korean: 그 자는 기존의 대장 권위에 직접 도전하여 대장 직책을 빼앗았소?
1600865022.english: Did that man directly challenge the existing authority of the commander and seize the position of commander?

1600865023.english: … It was so at first, but not now.

1600865024.korean: 그럼, 그 자는 기존 대장의 권위를 인정했단 소리겠지… 소관의 말에 동의하오?
1600865024.english: Then, that means he acknowledged the authority of the previous commander… Do you agree with my statement?

1600865027.korean: …그리고 다음 질문에 대한 답을 하기 전에, 소관도 질문을 하고 싶소.
1600865027.english: … And before answering the next question, I would also like to ask a question.

1600865030.korean: 자네... 아니. 그 자의 어머니란 자는 진짜 어머니가 맞소?
1600865030.english: You... no. Is that man's mother really his mother?

1600865031.english: That is... uh... that is, so...

1600865033.korean: 아니다. 얼굴만 같은… 실제로는 다른 사람이다.
1600865033.english: No. Only the face is the same… but in reality, it is a different person.

1600865034.korean: 하지만… 죽은 어머니가 지나가듯 한 말씀이 있는데…
1600865034.english: But… there is something my deceased mother said in passing…

1600865035.korean: 죽은 어머니의 말씀을 평생 금 같이 생각하며 따를 생각이오?
1600865035.english: Do you intend to cherish and follow your deceased mother's words like gold for the rest of your life?

1600865036.korean: 그 자는… 소관이 유추해 보기에… 이미 돌아가신 어머니보다 더 의지되고 편한 주인을 만났지 않았소?
1600865036.english: That man… judging by my inference… hasn’t he met a master he relies on and feels more comfortable with than his already deceased mother?

1600865037.korean: 선택을 해야 할 테지. 그리운 어머니라는 과거에 잡혀 살지, 아니라면 새로운 미래로 나아갈지.
1600865037.english: You will have to make a choice. Whether to live trapped in the past of a mother you miss, or to move forward to a new future.

1600865040.korean: 미안하오, 소관은 말 재주도 없고 일이 바빠 대화는 이제 끝내야 할 것 같소만.
1600865040.english: I apologize, but I am not very eloquent and I am busy with work, so I think we must wrap up this conversation now.

1600865041.korean: …바르그 자네도 자네가 있어야 할 곳으로 돌아가 보는 것이 어떻겠소?
1600865041.english: … Varg, why don't you go back to where you belong?

1600865043.korean: 여기는 전 세계 바이오로이드 대원들과 함께하는 오르카 축제, 스프리건 기자와 함께하고 있습니다.
1600865043.english: Here at the Orca Festival, joined by Bio-roid members from around the world, we are with Reporter Spriggan.

1600865044.korean: 까메오로 출연해 주신 사령관님과 바이오로이드 배우분들의 열연이 돋보였던 연극부 무대, 정말 잘 보았습니다!
1600865044.english: I really enjoyed the drama club's performance, featuring outstanding cameo appearances by the Commander and the passionate acting of the Bio-roid actors!

1600865045.korean:
그렇다면 이제, 축제의 하이라이트라고 할 수 있죠!
축제의 꽃, 밴드부의 파워풀한 밴드 무대를 시작하기 앞서, 잠시 인터뷰 가능할까요?
1600865045.english:
So, now comes the highlight of the festival!
 Before the band club begins their powerful performance, the highlight of the festival, could we have a brief interview?

1600865046.korean: 안녕, 엠프레시스 하운드 밴드부의 리더, 천아야.
1600865046.english: Hello, Cheon-ah, the leader of the Empressis Hound band.

1600865047.korean:
특이하게도 이번 하운드 분들은 작사 작곡을 멤버 분들이 직접 하셨다고 들었습니다.
왜 그런 선택을 하셨는지 여쭤봐도 될까요?
1600865047.english:
Uniquely, I heard that the members of Hound wrote and composed the songs themselves.
 May I ask why you made that choice?

1600865049.korean: 우린 멸망 전, 잔인한 인간의 밑에서 테러와 암살을 일삼던 테러 단체였어.
1600865049.english: Before our downfall, we were a terrorist group that committed terror and assassination under the rule of cruel humans.

1600865050.korean:
...자랑하려고 그러는 건 아니지만… 지금 여기 있는 애들 중엔
우리한테 좋지 않은 기억을 가지고 있는 애들도 있겠지.
1600865050.english:
...I'm not trying to brag, but... among the kids here right now
 There might be some kids who have bad memories of us.

1600865052.korean: …이 노래는, 우리가 진심을 담아 작곡한 노래야. 이 자리에서 솔직한 마음을 들려주고 싶어.
1600865052.english: … This is a song we composed with all our hearts. We want to share our honest feelings right here.

1600865053.korean:
그렇군요… 거짓 없고 꾸밈없이 있는 그대로의 모습을 보여준다라…
아~ 그러고 보니… 마리아 그레이스 씨와의 첫 대면부터 이런 말씀드리긴 좀 그렇지만…
1600865053.english:
I see... So, showing one's true self, without lies or pretense...
 Ah, come to think of it... I know it might be a bit awkward to say this right from my first meeting with Maria Grace, but...

1600865054.korean: 하운드 분들의 테러를 지휘하던 인간 여자의 유전자로 만들어진 바이오로이드이시죠? 혹시… 이 자리에서 해주실 말씀이 계신가요?
1600865054.english: You are the bioroid created from the genes of the human woman who commanded the terror attacks by the Hounds, aren't you? By any chance… do you have anything to say here?

1600865056.korean: 아… 하하, 이것이 바로 생방송의 묘미?! 그럼 분위기를 바꿔볼까요?
1600865056.english: Ah… haha, is this the beauty of live broadcasting?! Then, shall we change the mood?

1600865057.korean: …전 그 인간 여자의 기억을 가지고 만들어진 바이오로이드입니다.
1600865057.english: … I am a bioroid created with the memories of that human woman.

1600865058.korean:
처음 오르카에 왔을 때는, 인간 여자의 기억 때문에 적응이 어려웠습니다.
아니, 오히려 인간처럼 굴며 군림하려고 했죠.
1600865058.english:
When I first came to Orca, it was difficult to adjust because of the memories of the human woman.
 No, on the contrary, he tried to reign over us by acting like a human.

1600865059.korean: 하지만… 오르카 대원들과 만나며 점차, 제가 만들어진 바이오로이드라는… 진실을 알게 되었습니다.
1600865059.english: However… as I met the Orca members, I gradually came to know the truth… that I am a manufactured bio-android.

1600865060.korean:
솔직히, 저 역시도 절 만든 인간 여자가 잔혹한 인간이며, 용서받지 못할 악녀란 걸 알고 있습니다.
천아의 말대로 여기 모인 관객들 중엔 저희에게 피해를 입으신 분도 분명 계시겠죠.
1600865060.english:
Honestly, I also know that the human woman who created me is a cruel person and an unforgivable villainess.
 As Cheon-ah said, there are surely some audience members gathered here who have been harmed by us.

1600865061.korean: …그 분들께 저희의 진심을 보여드리기 위해 이 무대를 준비했습니다.
1600865061.english: … We prepared this stage to show them our sincerity.

1600865062.korean:
첫 곡, Flame Of Bravery는 그간 목적을 잃고 방황하던 사냥개들이 꿈을 꾸고, 
자신의 이상향을 향해 나아가는 노래입니다.
1600865062.english:
The first song, Flame Of Bravery, is about hunting dogs that had been wandering without a purpose, dreaming,
 It is a song about moving toward one's ideal.

1600865063.korean:
그렇군요, 저도 하운드 분들의 과거가 많이 어두웠다는 건 알고 있었습니다만,
이번 무대로 하운드 분들의 진심이 여러분들에게도 전해지길 바라며, 마지막 공연을 시작하겠습니다!
1600865063.english:
I see. I was also aware that the Hounds had a very dark past, but
 Hoping that the sincerity of the Hounds will be conveyed to you all through this performance, we will now begin our final show!

1600865064.korean: 엠프레시스 하운드 밴드가 부릅니다, Flame Of Bravery!
1600865064.english: Empresses Hound Band sings, Flame Of Bravery!

1600865065.korean: - 한편, 무대 뒤에서 하운드 밴드의 무대를 지켜보던 중, 숨이 넘어갈 듯하며 달려 온 누군가의 숨소리에 뒤를 돌아보았다.
1600865065.english: Meanwhile, while watching the Hound Band's performance from backstage, I turned around at the sound of someone running as if they were about to collapse.

1600865067.korean: …죄송, 합니다… 주인님, 못난 모습을… 제가 보여… 죄송… 죄송합니다…
1600865067.english: … I’m sorry… Master, I… showed you my unworthy side… I’m sorry… I’m sorry…

1600865068.korean: 이 노래는… 결국 저 없이 시작한 겁니까?
1600865068.english: Did this song… eventually start without me?

1600865070.korean: - 울먹임과 거친 숨을 토해내던 바르그는 무대 위에서 환호 받는 하운드 멤버들을 물끄러미 바라보다, 이내 주저앉아 눈물을 흘리기 시작했다.
1600865070.english: Varg, who was sobbing and breathing heavily, gazed blankly at the cheering Hound members on stage, then soon slumped down and began to cry.

1600865071.korean: 죄송합니다… 제 감정 때문에… 주인님이 마련하신 무대가…
1600865071.english: I'm sorry... because of my emotions... the stage you prepared, Master...

1600865072.english: … just running away in front of his subordinates…

1600865073.korean:
- 나는 대답 대신 바르그의 손을 꼭 잡아주었다.
그녀의 손에는 드럼 스틱에 의해 잡힌 물집이 얼핏 느껴졌다.
1600865073.english:
Instead of answering, I held Varg's hand tightly.
 She could faintly feel the blisters on her hand caused by the drumsticks.

1600865076.korean: - 바르그는 울먹거리면서도, 천아와 파프니르, 장화와 그레이스의 목소리를 경청했다.
1600865076.english: Barg listened attentively to the voices of Cheona, Fafnir, Janghwa, and Grace, even while on the verge of tears.

1600865077.english: Isn't Hresvelgr... much better than me?

1600865079.korean: - 나는 대답 대신 바르그를 꼭 끌어안은 후 등을 토닥였다.
1600865079.english: Instead of answering, I hugged Varg tightly and patted his back.

1600865083.korean: - 내 어깨에는 바르그의 뜨거운 눈물이 스며들었다.
1600865083.english: - Varg's hot tears seeped into my shoulder.

1600865085.english: Hresvelgr is helping out in place of Varg.

1600865087.english: Thank you for coming back as the leader of the Hounds, Varg.

1600865088.english: … The highlight stage is coming up in a little while.

1600865089.korean: 역시 저 자리는 바르그가 있어야 해.
1600865089.english: As expected, Barg needs to be in that spot.

1600865091.english: Wouldn't that be different from fitting the song?

1600865094.korean: 다음 노래는 너도 직접 가사를 같이 쓰지 않았어?
1600865094.english: Didn't you co-write the lyrics for the next song yourself?

1600865095.english: In that case, you show it in front of the squad members.

1600866001.english: It is a relief that you have returned, Mr. Barg.

1600866002.korean: 야, 똥개. 안 한다고 생고집 부릴 땐 언제고 이제 와서 무대 준비는 할 수 있겠어?
1600866002.english: Hey, you little brat. You were so obstinate refusing to do it, and now you think you can even prepare for the stage?

1600866003.korean: …지금 보련이랑 오드리도 다른 일 때문에 바빠서 분장실에 들르기 힘들다는데. 어쩌지?
1600866003.english: … Boryeon and Audrey are busy with other things right now, so they say it’s hard for them to stop by the dressing room. What should we do?

1600866006.korean: …어쩌겠어. 바르그는 이대로 무대에 올려야지. 그나마 무대 의상은 있어서 다행이네.
1600866006.english: … What can I do? I have to put Varg on stage just like this. At least it’s a relief that he has a costume.

1600866007.korean: 아무리 급하게 왔어도, 기본적인 메이크업이나 분장 없이 무대에 오르는 건 실례지.
1600866007.english: No matter how urgently you came, it is rude to go on stage without basic makeup or special effects.

1600866008.english: That's not polite to the audience.

1600866009.korean: 그럼 이제 와서 뭘 어쩌자는 거야… 우리 시간 없다고!!
1600866009.english: So what do you want to do now... We don't have time!!

1600866010.korean: 진짜 어떻게 무대 직전까지 계속 삐걱대기만 하냐 우린.
1600866010.english: Seriously, how do we keep creaking and stumbling right up until the stage?

1600866011.korean: 프로듀서… 잠깐만, 시간을 좀 끌어줄 수 있어?
1600866011.english: Producer… wait a minute, can you stall for a bit?

1600866013.english: Hey, Grace. What are you trying to do?

1600866014.korean: 내 캐리어 안에 분장 세트가 있어.
1600866014.english: I have a makeup set in my suitcase.

1600866015.korean: 급하게 무대에 설 때나, 신분을 숨겨야 할 상황을 대비해, 분장 세트를 직접 캐리어에 들고 다녔으니까.
1600866015.english: Because I carried my own makeup set in my suitcase in preparation for situations where I had to rush onto the stage or hide my identity.

1600866017.korean: 오르카 애들보다 잘 하진 못하겠지만… 공연을 보러 온 관객들한테 준비되지 않은 모습을 보여줄 순 없어.
1600866017.english: I might not be able to do as well as the Orca kids... but I can't show the audience an unprepared performance.

1600866018.korean:
- 그렇게 대답한 그레이스는 얼마 지나지 않아, 캐리어를 들고 나타나 펼쳤다.
안에는 단순한 화장품부터, 변장 도구들까지 튀어 나왔다.
1600866018.english:
Not long after answering that, Grace appeared holding a suitcase and opened it.
 Inside, everything from simple cosmetics to disguise tools popped out.

1600866019.korean: - 그레이스는 무대 의상을 입고 온 바르그를 앉혀준 후, 분장 용품을 들었다.
1600866019.english: Grace seated Varg, who had arrived wearing a stage costume, and then picked up the makeup supplies.

1600866020.english: ...I'll have to give it a try. I'm counting on you.

1600866022.english: And I'm sorry for showing such an ugly side...

1600866023.korean: 다행이다… 그래도 마지막에 바르그까지 모두 함께 공연을 할 수 있어서.
1600866023.english: It’s a relief… that we were all able to perform together, including Varg, in the end.

1600866024.korean:
…근데, 지금 그레이스가 바르그 화장 시켜주는 거 보니까,
딸한테... 화장시켜주는 엄마 같다. 그렇지?
1600866024.english:
… But, seeing Grace doing Barg's makeup right now,
 It's like a mom putting makeup on her daughter... isn't it?

1600866025.korean: - 유난히 작은 바르그 앞이라서 그런지 그레이스의 키가 유독 대비되어 보이는 것 같았다.
1600866025.english: Perhaps because she was standing in front of the unusually small Varg, Grace's height seemed to stand out in particular contrast.

1600866026.korean: …야! 그만 좀 울어! 애써서 한 화장 다 번지잖아!!
1600866026.english: … Hey! Stop crying! You're smudging all the makeup I worked so hard to do!!

1600866028.korean: 마음이나 다 잡아. 곧 오를 무대 위에서 최고의 퍼포먼스를 보여줄 생각만 하라고.
1600866028.english: Just pull yourself together. Just think about giving your best performance on the stage you're about to step onto.

1600866029.korean: 얼마쯤 시간이 걸릴 것 같죠, 그레이스?
1600866029.english: How long do you think it will take, Grace?

1600866030.english: About 5 to 10 minutes... maybe? I'll get ready as quickly as possible...

1600866033.korean: 이번에는 주인님 혼자서 막간 무대에 오를 일은 없을 거예요.
1600866033.english: This time, Master, you won't have to go on stage alone during the intermission.

1600866034.korean: 잠깐 들었는데… 주인님이 원래 클라이맥스 때 따로 연습하던 '응원용 춤'이 있다고 하지 않으셨나요? 급하게 내려가서 오늘의 구원투수들을 불러 모았어요.
1600866034.english: I overheard for a moment... Didn't you say Master had a separate 'cheering dance' he practiced for the climax? I hurriedly went down and gathered today's relief pitchers.

1600866035.korean: …관객석에서 추는 게 아니라, 무대에서 직접 선보일 줄은 몰랐는데.
1600866035.english: … I didn't expect them to perform it live on stage rather than dancing in the audience.

1600866036.korean: 응. 열심히 연습한 거, 모두 보여줄 거야.
1600866036.english: Yeah. I'm going to show you everything I've practiced hard for.

1600866038.korean: - 나는 나를 지원사격 해주러 온 아이들에게 웃어 보인 후…
1600866038.english: After I smiled at the children who came to provide me with support...

1600866040.english: Next up is Empress Hound's band…

1600866041.english: … Eh?! You're saying the order got changed?

1600866042.korean: 자, 잠시만요!! 다음 노래인 'Rising Up'을 하기 전, 사령관님께서 특별한 자리를 마련하셨다고 합니다!!
1600866042.english: Now, just a moment!! Before we perform the next song, 'Rising Up,' the Commander has arranged a special gathering!!

1600866043.korean: 엠프레시스 하운드 밴드 공연을 200% 즐기는 방법은 바로 팬 응원!!
1600866043.english: The way to enjoy the Emprecis Hound Band performance 200% is through fan cheering!!

1600866044.korean: 사령관님께서 팬 응원 퍼포먼스를, 오르카 대원 분들께 직접 보여드리기로 하였습니다!!
1600866044.english: The Commander has decided to personally show the Orca members a fan cheering performance!!

1600866045.english: Please welcome them with enthusiastic applause!!

1600866046.korean: - 스프리건이 소개를 하자, 나와 에밀리, 그리고 카엔과 네오딤은 응원봉을 든 채 무대로 나왔다.
1600866046.english: As Spriggan introduced us, Emily, Kaen, and Neodim came onto the stage holding cheering sticks.

1600866047.korean: - …원래라면 객석에서 할 예정이었지만 이렇게 모든 바이오로이드들 앞에서 할 줄은 몰랐다.
1600866047.english: - … I was originally planning to do it in the audience, but I didn't know I would be doing it in front of all the bioroids like this.

1600866048.korean:
- 수많은 바이오로이드들, 심지어는 AGS들의 시각 센서까지 나와 3인방에게 집중되었다.
괜스레 숨이 턱턱, 막히던 그때, 천천히… 에밀리가 응원봉을 치켜들었다.
1600866048.english:
- Numerous bioroids, and even the visual sensors of the AGSs, focused on me and the trio.
 Just when I was inexplicably catching my breath, Emily slowly... raised her cheering stick.

1600866049.korean: 아스널 대장도 지켜보고 있어… 사령관, 어서 같이 하자.
1600866049.english: Captain Arsenal is watching, too... Commander, hurry up and join us.

1600866052.korean: - 하운드 밴드의 노래 MR이 나옴과 동시에…
1600866052.english: - As soon as the Hound Band's instrumental track started playing…

1600866053.korean: - 나와 3인방은 응원봉을 치켜들고 혼신의 춤사위를 펼쳤다.
1600866053.english: The trio and I raised our cheering sticks and put on a dance performance with all our might.

1600866054.korean: - 돔이 들썩일 만큼의 엄청난 함성과 함께.
1600866054.english: - With a tremendous roar that shook the dome.

1600866055.korean: - ...모든 관객들이 일어선 뒤, 춤사위를 보며 따라하기 시작했다.
1600866055.english: - ...After all the audience members stood up, they started following along while watching the dance moves.

1600866061.korean: 사령관님의 진심은 동물 바이오로이드까지 춤을 추게 하는군요.
1600866061.english: Commander, your sincerity makes even the animal bio-androids dance.

1600866063.english: Mr. Brownie No. 2056. I cannot lose.

1600866064.korean: 선배 오르카 대원과 AGS의 대표로써 본 유닛도 동참하겠습니다.
1600866064.english: As a senior member of Orca and a representative of AGS, this unit will also participate.

1600866065.korean: 우오오오오!!! 대단함다!!! 저도 질 수 없슴다!!
1600866065.english: Whoaoooo!!! That's amazing!!! I can't be outdone either!!

1600866069.english: Okay… I’ll help too. For now…

1600866072.english: Whether it's singing or dancing... I'll give it a try.

1600866074.english: Oho? So that's how it is.

1600867001.korean:
…어때? 우리를 담당해 줬던 그 애들만큼 전문적인 건 아니지만… 
필요할 때마다 줄곧 혼자서 분장했던 몸이라고.
1600867001.english:
… How is it? It’s not as professional as the kids who took care of us, but…
 I’ve always been the one doing the makeup by myself whenever necessary.

1600867003.korean: 우리랑 다르게 어딘가 조금 심심하긴 한데… 아~ 됐어, 늦게 온 이년 탓이지 누굴 탓해.
1600867003.english: It's a bit boring compared to us... Ah, never mind. It's this girl's fault for coming late. Who else can I blame?

1600867004.english: … I like it. Thank you so much…

1600867005.korean: 이제 비로소 모두가 모였군요. 그렇다면 저는 무대 뒤에서 계속해서 응원하도록 하겠습니다.
1600867005.english: Now that everyone is finally gathered, I will continue to cheer from behind the stage.

1600867006.korean: …나 대신 고생했다. 마지막 한 곡만 남은 상태지만 끝까지 최선을 다해 연주하도록 하겠다.
1600867006.english: … You worked hard on my behalf. Although only one song remains, I will do my best to play until the very end.

1600867007.korean: 네, 기대하겠습니다, 바르그 씨! 가슴을 울리는 드럼 연주를 들려주세요!
1600867007.english: Yes, I look forward to it, Mr. Varg! Please give us a heart-stirring drum performance!

1600867008.english: It was seriously damn hard for the five of us to get together.

1600867009.korean: 야, 리더. 우리 아까 전에도 그냥 다짜고짜 나가서 노래 부르고 온 감이 없지 않아 있는데...
1600867009.english: Hey, Leader. It feels like we just went out and sang out of nowhere earlier, doesn't it?

1600867010.korean: …뭐, 그. 우린 구호 같은 거 없냐?
1600867010.english: … Well, uh. Don't we have any slogans or anything?

1600867011.korean: 구호? 뭐… 생각해놓은 건 딱히 없는데. 지금이라도 만들어 볼까?
1600867011.english: A slogan? Well... I haven't really thought of anything in particular. Should I make one now?

1600867012.korean: 야, 똥강아지. 뭐 좋은 아이디어 없냐?
1600867012.english: Hey, you little brat. Don't you have any good ideas?

1600867013.english: … I can’t really think of anything in particular.

1600867014.korean: 도망갔다 왔으면 좋은 구호 정도는 미리미리 생각해와야지… 에휴…
1600867014.english: If you're going to run away and come back, you should at least think of a good slogan in advance...Sigh...

1600867016.korean: …하. 진짜 넌 어디가서 네이밍 센스 있단 말 절대 하지 마라. 똥강아지.
1600867016.english: … Ha. Seriously, never go around saying you have a sense of naming. You little brat.

1600867017.english: W-I answered because you asked, so why are you acting like this!!

1600867018.korean: 야 배터리. 넌 따로 생각해 본 거 없냐?
1600867018.english: Hey Battery. Haven't you thought of anything else?

1600867020.korean: …아냐. 넌 메인 기타 잘 쳐준 것만해도 고마워. 내가 너무 많은 걸 바랐다.
1600867020.english: … No. I'm just grateful that you played the main guitar well. I was expecting too much.

1600867021.korean: 이이이이익!! 왜 나 자꾸 바보 취급해!!!
1600867021.english: Eeeeeek!! Why do you keep treating me like an idiot!!!

1600867024.korean: 우리 부대 구호 모르냐? 여제님을 위해 저들을 찢어발겨라.
1600867024.english: Don't you know our unit's motto? Tear them apart for the Empress.

1600867025.english: I modified it slightly. 'Tear the stage.' It's the English slogan.

1600867026.korean: 괜찮은데? 우리 구호, 그거로 하자. 자, 다들 손 모아.
1600867026.english: That’s a good idea. Let’s use that for our chant. Now, everyone, put your hands together.

1600867027.korean: 헤헤… 뭔가 이러니까 우리 진짜 가수 같아.
1600867027.english: Hehe… For some reason, doing this makes us feel like real singers.

1600867028.korean: 우리가 지금 가수지, 기수냐? 야, 똥개. 너도 얼른 손 모아.
1600867028.english: Are we singers or jockeys? Hey, you little punk. You put your hands together quickly too.

1600867030.korean: 야. 넌 왜 손 안 모아?
1600867030.english: Hey. Why aren't you putting your hands together?

1600867032.english: How childish… does it really have to be like this?

1600867034.korean: …너도 이제부터 우리 부대 소속이잖아? 선배 말씀 잘 들어야지.
1600867034.english: … You’re part of our unit now, too, right? You should listen to your seniors.

1600867036.english: Okay. Let's give it a try.

1600867037.english: For the producer, tear the stage apart!!

1600867038.korean: - 하운드의 무대가 준비되었단 소식에 나는 그제야 백스테이지로 내려올 수 있었다.
1600867038.english: It was only when I heard the news that Hound's performance was ready that I was able to come down to backstage.

1600867039.korean: - 에밀리와 카엔, 네오딤에게도 재밌는 추억을 만들어 주었으니… 좋은 게 좋은 것 아니겠는가.
1600867039.english: Since I've created fun memories for Emily, Caen, and Neodim as well... isn't it all for the best?

1600867040.korean:
사령관님의 열정적인 응원 무대, 감사드립니다!!
자, 그럼 이제 이 열기를 폭발시킬, 엠프레시스 하운드 밴드의 마지막 무대를 볼까요?
1600867040.english:
Thank you, Commander, for your passionate cheering performance!!
 Now, shall we take a look at the final performance by the Empresses Hound Band, who will ignite this excitement?

1600867041.korean: 이번에는 하운드의 대장, 바르그까지 합류한 엠프레시스 하운드 밴드 완전체의 마지막 곡, Rising Up! 입니다!!
1600867041.english: This time, it is the final song by the complete Empressis Hound Band, now joined by the Hound's leader, Varg: Rising Up!

1600867042.korean: 하운드 대원들이 선보이는 뜨거운 태양과도 같은 강렬한 무대를 지켜봐 주세요!!
1600867042.english: Please watch the intense performance presented by the Hound members, as hot as the sun!!

1600867043.korean:
- 웅성거리는 소리가 얼마 지나지 않아, 무대의 조명이 일제히 꺼졌다.
얼마 후, 어둠 속에선 다섯 소녀들의 목소리와 함께 조명이 다시 켜졌다.
1600867043.english:
Not long after the murmuring began, the stage lights went out all at once.
 Shortly after, the lights came back on in the darkness, accompanied by the voices of five girls.

1600867047.korean:
- 무대 위에는 자신만만한 표정의 하운드 대원들이 서 있었다.
잠시, 무대를 바라보던 대원들은 자신이 맡은 악기에 손을 대곤 연주하기 시작했다.
1600867047.english:
The Hound members stood on the stage with confident expressions.
 After watching the stage for a moment, the members touched their assigned instruments and began to play.

1600867048.korean:
- 천아의 리드미컬한 베이스와 바르그의 파워풀한 드럼으로 판이 깔린 뒤,
장화의 현란한 신디사이저와 파프니르의 짜릿한 일렉이 마치, 대로를 달리듯 관객석으로 내달렸다.
1600867048.english:
- After the stage was set with Cheona's rhythmic bass and Varg's powerful drums,
 Janghwa's dazzling synthesizers and Fafnir's thrilling electrics raced toward the audience as if speeding down a main road.

1600867049.korean: - …그리고, 마이크를 잡은 그레이스는 나를 바라보며 여유 있게 미소 지은 후, 노래를 시작했다.
1600867049.english: ...And, Grace, holding the microphone, looked at me with a relaxed smile and started to sing.

1600867050.korean: - 하운드의 진심과 열기가 전해졌는지, 관객들도 응원 춤과 락앤롤 사인을 보내며 하운드 밴드를 호응했다.
1600867050.english: As if Hound's sincerity and passion were conveyed, the audience responded to the Hound band by sending cheer dances and rock and roll signs.

1600867051.korean: 자, 프로듀서!! 이게 밴드 리더가 가지는 품격이라고!!
1600867051.english: Now, Producer!! This is the dignity a band leader should have!!

1600867053.english: Thank you for giving me this stage... Producer.

1600867054.korean: 이젠 방황하지 않을래. 늘, 내 옆에 따스한 핫팩으로 있어 줘!!
1600867054.english: I won't wander anymore. Always stay by my side like a warm hot pack!!

1600867055.korean: - 코러스를 끝낸 천아가 내게 윙크하며 소리쳤다.
1600867055.english: Cheona, having finished the chorus, winked at me and shouted.

1600867056.korean: 프로듀서!! 어때?! 오늘은 바보니르도, 배터리도 아냐…!!
1600867056.english: Producer!! How is it?! Today isn't Baboniru, nor Battery…!!

1600867057.korean: 세상에서 가장 귀한 프로듀서의 마음을 보물고 안에 저장하기 위해 온…
1600867057.english: To store the heart of the most precious producer in the world inside the treasure vault…

1600867059.korean: 황금 함대의 제독이자 너만의 기타리스트 파프니르라고!!!
1600867059.english: I'm Fafnir, the Admiral of the Golden Fleet and your very own guitarist!!!

1600867060.korean: - 파프니르는 앞으로 달려온 후, 멋들어지게 일렉을 치면서 내게 웃어주었다.
1600867060.english: Fafnir ran forward, played the electric guitar stylishly, and smiled at me.

1600867061.korean: 프로듀서, 어딜 봐?! 날 보란 말이야!
1600867061.english: Producer, where are you looking?! I said look at me!

1600867062.korean: …네가 날 봐주길 바랐어. 황홀한 표정으로, 금방이라도 내게 빠질 듯한 모습으로.
1600867062.english: … I wanted you to look at me. With an ecstatic expression, looking as if you were about to fall for me at any moment.

1600867063.korean: 침대 빼곤 사랑한단 말 한 번도 못했지만… 지금은 할 수 있을 것 같아.
1600867063.english: I've never been able to say "I love you" except in bed... but now I think I can.

1600867064.korean: 많이 사랑해… 늘, 내 옆에 있어줘… 나의 프로듀서…!!
1600867064.english: I love you so much… Always stay by my side… My producer… !!

1600867065.korean: - 장화는 한 손을 들어, 내게 손가락 하트를 한 후 수줍게 웃었다.
1600867065.english: Janghwa raised one hand, made a finger heart at me, and smiled shyly.

1600867066.korean: …프로듀서님. 부족한 저희들에게 이런 무대를 선물해주셔서 감사합니다.
1600867066.english: … Producer. Thank you for gifting us, who are lacking, such a stage.

1600867067.english: For a moment… my heart wavered, but…

1600867068.korean: 제가 진정으로 모시는 분을 위해서라도, 하운드의 대장으로써 노력하고 성장하겠습니다.
1600867068.english: For the sake of the one I truly serve, I will strive and grow as the leader of the Hounds.

1600867069.korean: 사랑합니다… 제 모든 마음을 프로듀서님께… 바치겠습니다…!!
1600867069.english: I love you… I will dedicate my entire heart… to you, Producer… !!

1600867070.korean: - 나는 드럼을 치던 바르그에게도 엄지를 치켜들어 호응해줬다.
1600867070.english: I also gave a thumbs up to Varg, who was playing the drums.

1600867071.korean:
- 그리고 나는, 무대에서 새로운 발걸음을 떼며 나아가는 그레이스에게 시선을 돌렸다.
시원하게 고음을 내지른 후, 그레이스는 내 앞에 걸어와 손을 내밀었다.
1600867071.english:
And I turned my gaze to Grace, who was taking a new step forward on the stage.
 After letting out a clear high note, Grace walked over to me and held out her hand.

1600867072.korean: 고마워, 프로듀서… 내가, 무대에 설 수 있도록 도와줘서…
1600867072.english: Thank you, Producer… for helping me stand on stage…

1600867073.korean: 내가 나로서 이 세상을 살아가게 되며 얻은 첫 번째의 기억이 무대라는 게… 행복해…
1600867073.english: The fact that the first memory I gained living in this world as myself is the stage… makes me happy…

1600867074.english: Just as I cherished the Hounds, I too…

1600867075.korean: 이 세상이 끝날 때까지… 사랑해줘… 프로듀서…!!
1600867075.english: Love me... until the end of the world... Producer... !!

1600867076.korean: - 동트기 전이 가장 어둡다는 말이 있다.
1600867076.english: There is a saying that it is darkest just before dawn.

1600867077.korean: - 여제라는 목줄과 재갈에 길들여져야만 했고, 밝은 곳을 피해 다녀야만 했던 다섯 마리의 사냥개.
1600867077.english: - Five hunting dogs that had to be tamed by the leash and bit of the Empress and had to avoid bright places.

1600867078.korean: - 무대에 오르기 직전까지 온 밤을 쏘다녀야만 했던 다섯 마리의 들개들은.
1600867078.english: The five wild dogs that had to roam all night right up until they went on stage.

1600867079.english: - Became a bright sun on the stage.

1600867080.english: - As if responding to their dazzling smiles…

1600867081.korean:
- 나는 자리에서 일어나, 야광봉을 들어 힘껏 흔들었다.
타오르는 그녀를 배웅하는 새벽별이 되어, 그녀들의 마지막 밤을 배웅하기로 했다.
1600867081.english:
I stood up from my seat, picked up my glow stick, and waved it as hard as I could.
 I decided to become the morning star bidding farewell to the burning woman, seeing them off on their last night.

1600868002.korean: …으으, 손가락 아파 죽겠다아아아아아!!! 앙코르를 몇 번이나 했던 거야 정말…
1600868002.english: … Ugh, my fingers hurt so much!!! How many encores did we really do…

1600868003.korean: …어이, 너넨 조금밖에 안 불렀잖아. 나 목소리 쉰 거 안 보여?
1600868003.english: … Hey, you guys only sang a little. Can't you see my voice is hoarse?

1600868005.korean: 근데 우리… 공연은 성공적으로 끝마친 것 같은데… 프로듀서는… 왜 안 와?
1600868005.english: But... I think we successfully wrapped up the performance... but... why isn't the producer here?

1600868006.korean: …뭐, 프로듀서야 우리 말고도 축제 때 이래저래 데이트 약속 많겠지.
1600868006.english: … Well, the producer probably has plenty of dates planned for the festival besides us.

1600868007.korean: 조금 아쉽긴 하지만… 그래도 많은 대원들 앞에서 우리 무대를 보여줄 수 있었다는 것에 만족하자.
1600868007.english: It’s a bit disappointing, but… let’s be satisfied with the fact that we were able to show our performance in front of so many members.

1600868008.korean: 공연도 끝났는데 이대로 해산 하긴 좀 아쉽지 않냐?
1600868008.english: The performance is over, so isn't it a bit of a shame to disband just like this?

1600868009.korean: 아~ 난 빨랑 씻고 아무 생각 없이 누워있을래… 긴장 풀리니까 피곤하기만 해…
1600868009.english: Ah, I'm just going to hurry up and wash up and lie down without thinking about anything... Now that the tension is gone, I just feel tired...

1600868010.korean: …그래, 원래 촬영이 끝나면 아무 것도 안 하고 쉬고 싶기만 하지.
1600868010.english: …Yeah, normally when filming is over, all I want to do is rest and do nothing.

1600868011.korean: 쟤가 공감해 주니까 괜히 침대에 드러누워버리기 싫을지도?
1600868011.english: Maybe I don't want to just flop down on the bed for no reason because he's empathizing with me?

1600868012.korean: 야, 그러면 우리끼리 뒤풀이라도 할래? 삼안 영업소에서 누가 술 좀 사와라.
1600868012.english: Hey, then, shall we have an after-party just the two of us? Someone buy some drinks at the Saman sales office.

1600868013.english: Are you guys good at drinking?

1600868014.korean: 전에 숙소에서 마셨을 땐 배터리가 제일 먼저 취하긴 했지.
1600868014.english: The last time we drank at the accommodation, Battery was the first to get drunk.

1600868015.korean: 그, 그래도 스털링이랑 대작하면서 많이 늘었다 뭐?!
1600868015.english: B-but, still, I improved a lot while working on a big project with Sterling. What?!

1600868016.korean: 피곤할 때 술을 마시면 다음 날 더 힘들기 마련이다. 난 여기서 빠지도록…
1600868016.english: If you drink when you're tired, the next day is bound to be even harder. I'll stay out of here...

1600868017.korean: 바르그? 너 나랑 아직 못다한 대화가 남지 않았던가?
1600868017.english: Varg? Didn't you have something left to talk about with me?

1600868019.korean: 이번 기회에 확실히 풀고 넘어가자고. 응?
1600868019.english: Let's take this opportunity to settle this properly. Okay?

1600868021.english: Then, should I go buy some alcohol?

1600868022.korean: …숙소에서 술을 마시는 건 그닥 좋아하진 않지만.
1600868022.english: … I don't really like drinking at my accommodation, though.

1600868023.korean: 그래도 오늘은 날이 날이니 만큼, 아주 조금 정도는 입에 대도록 하지.
1600868023.english: Still, since it is a special day, I'll have just a tiny bit.

1600868024.korean: 야, 똥강아지 너 술 마시다 덥다고 옷 다 벗고선 네 발로 기면서 멍멍거리면 안 된다?
1600868024.english: Hey, you little brat, you can't strip naked and crawl on all fours barking because you're hot while drinking, okay?

1600868025.english: W-when did I ever do that?!

1600868026.korean: 야, 너 술에 꼴을 때마다 사령관실로 달려가려는 거 나랑 천아가 붙잡느라 얼마나 개고생한 줄 알기나 해?!
1600868026.english: Hey, do you have any idea how much trouble Cheon-ah and I went through trying to stop you from running into the commander's office every time you got completely wasted?!

1600868027.english: I... I'm going to drink in moderation!! Stop it...!

1600868028.english: … He says that? I can't believe it.

1600868029.english: Th-this is... incitement and fabrication!! Stop it!!!

1600868030.korean: - 하운드 밴드의 공연 이후로도 여러 부스를 참관하거나 돌아다니느라 결국, 나는 한밤중이 돼서야 사령관실로 복귀할 수 있었다.
1600868030.english: After the Hound Band's performance, I spent time visiting various booths and wandering around, so I was eventually able to return to the Commander's Office late at night.

1600868031.korean: 흐음… 흐음? 어? 뭐야… 여기서 뭐하고 있어?
1600868031.english: Hmm... Hmm? Huh? What is it... What are you doing here?

1600868032.korean: 응? 아~ 우리말이야, 간단하게 뒤풀이 하려고 술 사가지고 가는 길이야!
1600868032.english: Huh? Oh, you see, we're on our way to buy some alcohol for a simple after-party!

1600868033.korean:
- 그러고 보니 내가 술을 마시고 나면… 여러 낯 뜨거운 일이 생기곤 해서,
그 뒤로 웬만한 일로는 술 마시는 걸 자제해 왔는데…
1600868033.english:
Come to think of it, whenever I drink... various embarrassing things tend to happen,
 Since then, I have refrained from drinking for most reasons...

1600868034.korean: 저기… 히히… 우리 뒤풀이 자리에 참석 해줄래?
1600868034.english: Hey… hehe… will you join us for the after-party?

1600868035.korean: 그러고 보니까, 다른 오르카 애들이 너랑 술 마시면 안 된다고 하던데… 무슨 이유라도 있어?
1600868035.english: Come to think of it, the other Orca guys said they shouldn't drink with you... Is there a reason for that?

1600868036.korean: - 썩 자랑할 만한 일이 아니건만, 흥미가 돋은 파프니르의 꼬리가 살랑거렸다.
1600868036.english: Although it was nothing to boast about, Fafnir's tail wagged in interest.

1600868037.korean: 그럼 술은 안 마셔도 되니까… 우리 밴드… 성공적인 첫 공연 축하를 부탁할 수 있을까?
1600868037.english: Then, since I don't have to drink... could I ask our band to celebrate our successful first performance?

1600868038.korean:
- 나는 잠시 고민하다 고개를 끄덕였다. 
우여곡절 끝에 하운드 대원들의 첫 공연을 성황리 끝마친 만큼, 프로듀서로써 축하는 당연한 수순이지 않겠는가.
1600868038.english:
I thought for a moment and nodded.
 Given that the Hound members have successfully wrapped up their first performance after many twists and turns, wouldn't it be only natural for me, as the producer, to offer my congratulations?

1600868039.korean: - 나는 파프니르의 손을 잡고 하운드의 숙소를 향해 발걸음을 돌렸다.
1600868039.english: I took Fafnir's hand and turned toward the Hound's quarters.

1600868041.korean: - 생각 이상으로 화기애애한 분위기에 휩쓸려 결국 함께 술을 마시기로 했다.
1600868041.english: Swept up in the atmosphere, which was more friendly than I expected, I ended up deciding to drink together.

1600868042.korean: 후아… 하하… 하아… 진짜 우리가 어떻게 그 커다란 무대에서 라이브 공연을… 수고했다, 바보니르.
1600868042.english: Whoa… Haha… Haa… Seriously, how did we ever perform a live show on that huge stage… Good job, Babonir.

1600868043.korean: 나도 한다면 하는 여자야!! 그러니까 바보 취급 하지 말라고… 헤헤…
1600868043.english: I'm a woman who gets things done!! So don't treat me like an idiot... Hehe...

1600868044.english: I need to change... but maybe it's because the feeling lingers...

1600868045.english: Why… do you want me to change quickly?

1600868047.korean: …아무리 생각해도, 이 옷. 너무 노출이 많아.
1600868047.english: … No matter how much I think about it, this outfit. It's too revealing.

1600868048.korean: 무대 의상은 팬티도 있는데? 평소엔 아랫도리에 아무것도 안 걸치고 다니던 게… 웃기고 앉았네 정말.
1600868048.english: The stage costume even includes underwear? Considering they usually go around wearing nothing on their lower bodies... that's really ridiculous.

1600868050.korean: 그래서 말인데~ 처음 우리 메이드 의상 보고 네가 뭐라고 그랬더라…?
1600868050.english: So, speaking of which... what did you say again when you first saw our maid outfits...?

1600868051.korean: 천박한 복장은 대체 뭐지~라고 하지 않았던가?
1600868051.english: Didn't you say, "What on earth is with that vulgar outfit?"

1600868052.korean: 시한폭탄 대가리? 앞으로도 우리랑 잘 지내려면 첫 단체복은 헤질 때까지 입고 다녀야 한다?
1600868052.english: Time bomb head? If you want to stay on good terms with us, you have to wear your first uniform until it falls apart?

1600868053.korean: 이걸… 쟤 앞에서 계속 입고 있으라고?! 이런 옷은 니콜라스 앞에서도 입은 적 없었던…
1600868053.english: You want me to… keep wearing this in front of him?! I’ve never even worn clothes like this in front of Nicholas…

1600868055.korean: 야, 무슨 니콜라스? 앞에 우리 잘생긴 프로듀서 두고서... 헤헤…
1600868055.english: Hey, what Nicholas? With our handsome producer right in front of you... Hehe...

1600868056.korean: - 취기가 오른 천아가 슬쩍 내게 팔짱을 끼곤 머리를 기댔다.
1600868056.english: Cheona, who was getting tipsy, casually linked arms with me and leaned her head against me.

1600868057.korean: 야! 너 왜 갑자기 사령관한테 몸을 기대고 난리야?
1600868057.english: Hey! Why are you suddenly leaning on the commander like that?

1600868058.korean: 술을 너무 마셨나? 살짝 어지러워서 그래…
1600868058.english: Did I drink too much? I'm just feeling a little dizzy...

1600868059.korean: - ...지금 천아의 손놀림은 전혀 취했다곤 할 수 없을 정도다.
1600868059.english: - ...Cheon-a's hand movements right now are so different from what one would expect from being drunk.

1600868060.korean: 비켜! 나, 나도 조, 조금 쉬고 싶으니까!! 그러니까… 프로듀서 옆에… 있을 거야…
1600868060.english: Get out of the way! I, I want to rest a little too!! So… I’m going to… stay by the Producer’s side…
