1600868061.korean: - …장화도 다른 팔에 매달린 채 머리를 기댔다.
1600868061.english: ...Janghwa also leaned his head while hanging from the other arm.

1600868062.korean: 너희들… 취하지 않은 것쯤은 다 알고 있다. 축하해주러 온 프로듀서님께 무슨 추태냐?
1600868062.english: You guys... we all know you aren't drunk. What kind of disgraceful behavior is this towards the producer who came to congratulate you?

1600868064.korean: - 반면 파프니르는 술을 과하게 마셨는지 대담하게 내 가슴팍에 안겨오며 머리를 비비적거렸다.
1600868064.english: On the other hand, Fafnir, perhaps having drunk too much, boldly snuggled into my chest and rubbed his head against me.

1600868065.korean: 내가? 아니… 히히… 딱 좋아… 알딸딸하면서도… 뭐든 힘이 불끈 나는 것 같아…
1600868065.english: Me? No... Hehe... It's just right... Feeling a bit tipsy... yet somehow giving me a burst of energy...

1600868066.korean: 황금… 아니, 프로듀서도 앞꼬리가 단단한 것 같은데… 맞지?
1600868066.english: Golden... no, the producer seems to have a solid front tail too... right?

1600868067.korean: 너희들… 옷을 갈아 입지 않고 프로듀서님께 술을 권한 것도 결국 교태를 부리려는 수작이었구나!
1600868067.english: You guys... so offering the Producer a drink without changing your clothes was just a ploy to flirt!

1600868068.korean: - ...확실히 노출도가 많은 의상이었기에 하운드 대원들이 내 몸에 달라붙을수록 말랑한 질감들이 잔뜩 느껴지기 시작했다.
1600868068.english: ...Since the outfit was certainly revealing, as the Hound members clung to my body, I started to feel a lot of soft textures.

1600868069.korean: 자기도 안 갈아입었으면서… 그래서 바르그… 솔직히 프로듀서도 좋아하는 것 같은데… 넌 화만 내고 있을 거야?
1600868069.english: You didn't even change yourself... So, Varg... Honestly, it seems like the producer likes it too... Are you just going to keep getting angry?

1600868072.korean:
- …처음 보는 그레이스 앞에서 이런 므흣한 상황을 연출하는 게 맞나 싶지만,
하운드 대원들은 이 순간만을 기다렸다는 듯 쉽사리 나를 놓아주지 않을 모양이다.
1600868072.english:
...I wonder if it is right to create such a steamy situation in front of Grace, whom I am meeting for the first time, but,
 It seems the Hound members won't let me go easily, as if they have been waiting for this very moment.

1600868073.english: Grace? Ah… right, that’s right. Grace is…

1600868074.korean: 니콜라스가 더 좋다는데, 저기서 구경이나 하라고 해.
1600868074.english: Nicholas says he likes it better, so tell him to just watch from over there.

1600868075.korean: 맞아, 우리가 하는 거 지켜보기나 하라고.
1600868075.english: Right, just watch what we do.

1600868076.english: W-stop, you guys! It's an order!

1600868077.korean: - 부끄러움에 얼굴이 달아오른 그레이스의 명령에 나를 차지하려던 대원들이 아쉬운 소리를 내며 떨어져 나갔다.
1600868077.english: At Grace's command, her face flushed with embarrassment, the squad members who had been trying to claim me left with disappointed sighs.

1600868078.english: … These things are truly beyond vulgar!!

1600868079.english: Vulgar? Ugh, here we go again...

1600868080.korean: 하다 못해, 포르노그래피도 도입, 발단, 전개, 위기, 절정, 결말의 5막 구조가 있단 말이야.
1600868080.english: Even pornography has a five-act structure: introduction, beginning, rising action, climax, falling action, and resolution.

1600868082.korean: 자, 이 몸께서 고품격 성인 영화가 무엇인지 친히 가르쳐주도록 하지.
1600868082.english: Now, I will personally teach you what a high-quality adult film is.

1600868083.korean:
- …이제 보니 마리아 그레이스의 얼굴은 부끄러운 게 아니라 취기로 달아올라 있었다.
평소라면 입 밖으로 말하지 않을 것들을 주르륵 털어놓는 걸 보니 분명 내일이면 기억하지 못할 만큼 취해버린 게 틀림없었다.
1600868083.english:
— … Now that I look closely, Maria Grace’s face was flushed not from embarrassment, but from intoxication.
 Seeing him pour out things he wouldn't normally say, he must have been drunk enough not to remember them by tomorrow.

1600868084.korean: 오늘은 너희들의 명령권자, 이 그레이스님께서 올바른 예시를 보이겠다.
1600868084.english: Today, your commander, I, Grace, will set a proper example.

1600868085.korean: …니콜라스라니, 이 몸의 마음에는 프로듀서… 아니 나를 아껴주고 사랑해주기로 한 부군이 있는 법.
1600868085.english: … Nicholas? In my heart, there is a producer… no, a husband who has promised to cherish and love me.

1600868086.korean: - 그렇게 대답한 그레이스는 내 품에 안기곤, 나를 양팔로 끌어안은 후 미소를 지었다.
1600868086.english: Grace answered like that, then hugged me tightly with both arms and smiled.

1600868087.korean: 너희들이야말로 거기서 지켜보라고. 이것이 부군과 나의 첫날 밤이 될 테니.
1600868087.english: You guys are the ones who should watch from there. This will be my husband and my first night together.

1600868090.korean: 그레이스는 하운드의 명령권자이고, 하운드의 대원인 만큼…
1600868090.english: Grace is the commander of the Hound, and as a member of the Hound…

1600868091.korean: 대장인 제가 판단하기에 그녀에게 처음을 양보해야 할 듯싶습니다.
1600868091.english: As the leader, I think we should yield the first place to her.

1600868092.korean: - 그렇게 대답한 바르그는 숙소의 불을 끈 후, 문을 걸어 잠갔다.
1600868092.english: After answering that, Varg turned off the lights in the lodging and locked the door.

1600868093.korean:
- 체념한 듯한 내 대답에도 불구하고, 어둠 속에선 하운드 대원들이 
일제히 내 품 안으로 파고 드는 듯했다.
1600868093.english:
Despite my resigned answer, the Hound members in the darkness
 It seemed as though they were all burrowing into my arms at once.

1600868094.korean:
- 치명적인 말캉함과 함께, 포상을 바라듯 달려드는 사냥개들이었기에... 
오늘은 내 몸을 아낌없이 내어 그녀들의 갈증을 달래주기로 한다.
1600868094.english:
- Because they were hunting dogs rushing in as if seeking a reward, accompanied by a fatal softness...
 Today, I decide to wholeheartedly offer my body to quench their thirst.

1600868095.korean: …괜히 핫팩이 술 마시면 안 된다고 이야기 했던 게 아니구나...
1600868095.english: … So Hotpack wasn't talking nonsense about not drinking alcohol...

1600868096.korean: 아직도… 허리가… 노곤해서 도저히 못 일어나겠어… 아침은 너네끼리 먹어라…
1600868096.english: My back is still... so tired I can't possibly get up... You guys eat breakfast yourselves...

1600868099.korean: …주인님의 숙취를 해소시키기 위해서라도 음식을 대접하고 싶었는데.
1600868099.english: … I wanted to treat you to a meal, if only to help cure your hangover.

1600868100.korean: 바르그, 너 목소리 엄청 쉰 거 같다?
1600868100.english: Varg, your voice sounds really hoarse.

1600868101.korean: 어제 바르그 넋나가서 멍멍거리고 별 난리를 쳤는데… 목소리 안 쉰 게 이상하지…
1600868101.english: Varg was completely spaced out yesterday, barking and making a huge fuss... It's a shame his voice wasn't hoarse...

1600868103.english: What is the Empress doing right now?

1600868104.korean: 그만, 그만. 이제 그만 채워줘도… 돼…
1600868104.english: Stop, stop. You can stop filling it up now... it's okay...

1600868105.korean: ...어디론가 계속 가버린다고 소리지르더니... 뻗은 뒤로 돌아오지 않고 있다.
1600868105.english: ...he kept shouting that he was going somewhere... and after passing out, he hasn't come back.

1600868106.korean: 우리 중 가장 체력도 약한 주제에, 취기가 오르신 주인님을 처음 받아내는 경험은 힘들었겠지.
1600868106.english: Considering you have the weakest stamina among us, it must have been tough for you to take on a drunk master for the first time.

1600868107.english: Ha, as they say, an empty cart makes the most noise. What a load of nonsense…

1600868108.korean: 야… 우리 거의 날밤 샜는데… 환기라도 좀 하자… 더워 죽겠다 진짜로…
1600868108.english: Hey... we practically pulled an all-nighter... let's at least air out the room... it's seriously so hot...

1600868109.korean: …아까까지 달려놓고, 그대로 옷 입고서 출근한 것도 대단하다 핫팩.
1600868109.english: … It’s amazing that you ran until just a moment ago and then went to work still wearing your clothes, Hot Pack.

1600868110.korean: 야, 쟤 감기 걸리겠다, 이불이나 잘 덮어줘라.
1600868110.english: Hey, he's going to catch a cold. Make sure he's covered with a blanket.

1600868111.english: … Haa, I love you… Husband, I… I love you so much…

1600868112.korean: 이제 뒷정리 끝내고 사령관실로 가는 중이었지.
1600868112.english: I had just finished cleaning up and was on my way to the commander's office.

1600868115.english: … Well, attending shouldn't be difficult, but

1600868116.english: I don't think it'll be easy to drink with you.

1600868119.korean: 그런데 너네들, 왜 아직도 옷 안 갈아 입었어?
1600868119.english: By the way, why haven't you guys changed your clothes yet?

1600868124.korean: 나중에 그레이스가 잠들러 가면, 그때 하자… 응?
1600868124.english: Let's do it later when Grace goes to sleep... okay?

1600868126.korean: 내가 뭘 잘못 들은 건 아니지?
1600868126.english: I didn't hear that right, did I?

1600868128.korean: 그레이스가 좀 취한 것 같은데 말려줘!
1600868128.english: Grace seems a bit drunk, please stop her!

1600868129.korean: …엠프레시스 하운드 미드나잇 멤버쉽 트레이닝이다. 이 말이지?
1600868129.english: … It’s the Empressis Hound Midnight Membership Training. Is that what you mean?

1600869001.korean: - 성공적인 축제의 막을 내린 우리는 다시 일상으로 돌아왔다.
1600869001.english: Having brought the successful festival to a close, we returned to our daily lives.

1600869002.korean:
- 특히나 오르카의 다양한 부 활동에 기지 바이오로이드들도 흥미가 있었는지
기존 오르카 대원들이 누렸던 것들을 자신들의 보금자리에서도 하고 싶다는 제안과 관련된 결제 서류가 많이 늘었다.
1600869002.english:
- In particular, were the base bioroids also interested in Orca's various extracurricular activities?
 The number of payment documents related to the proposal to do the things that the existing Orca members enjoyed in their own home has increased significantly.

1600869003.korean: - 덕분에 눈치 보지 않고 매일 야근을 해도 되는 현재 상황은 상당히 만족스럽다.
1600869003.english: Thanks to this, I am quite satisfied with my current situation where I can work overtime every day without feeling pressured.

1600869005.korean: - 한참 일에 열중하고 있던 중 노크 소리와 함께 문이 열렸다.
1600869005.english: I was deeply engrossed in my work when the door opened with a knock.

1600869006.english: … Who do you think is Fafnir?

1600869007.english: I've come to the right place this time!

1600869009.korean: 그럴 거면 네비게이션을 달라고 몇 번을 말해!
1600869009.english: If that's the case, how many times do I have to tell you to give me the navigation!

1600869010.korean: - …가끔 보면 그레이스는 평범한 잠수함을 미로로 만드는 숨겨진 능력이 있는 것 같다.
1600869010.english: - … Sometimes it seems Grace has a hidden ability to turn an ordinary submarine into a maze.

1600869011.english: W-why can't I give it to you?!

1600869012.korean:
- 하운드에게 명령을 내릴 수 있는 특수 명령권은 물론, 우리에게 적대감이 있을 수 있는 
바이오로이드에게 잠수함 안내 기능이 있는 네비게이션을 줄 수가 있겠는가?
1600869012.english:
- In addition to special command authority to issue orders to the Hound, those who may be hostile to us
 Could you give a bioroid a navigation system with a submarine guidance function?

1600869013.english: Because it wasn't? What the heck~ It's in the past tense~?

1600869014.korean: - 나는 대답 대신 미리 준비해둔 소형 네비게이션과 인식표를 마리아 그레이스에게 내밀었다.
1600869014.english: Instead of answering, I handed Maria Grace the small navigation device and identification tag I had prepared in advance.

1600869015.english: … Are you really giving it to me?

1600869016.korean: - 마리아 그레이스는 눈을 동그랗게 뜨다, 주섬거리며 인식표와 네비게이션을 들었다.
1600869016.english: Maria Grace widened her eyes and fumbled with her identification tag and navigation system.

1600869019.korean: - 인식표에 있는 자신의 얼굴과 이름을 물끄러미 바라보던 그레이스의 입가에 희미한 미소가 퍼졌다.
1600869019.english: A faint smile spread across Grace's lips as she gazed intently at her face and name on the identification tag.

1600869022.korean: - 그레이스는 이내, 내 책상 앞으로 다가온 후, 캐리어를 뒤적거려 내게 무언가를 내밀었다.
1600869022.english: Grace soon approached my desk, rummaged through her suitcase, and handed me something.

1600869023.korean: 선물이야. 원래는… 뒷풀이 날 때 주려고 했는데… 이제야 너한테 주네.
1600869023.english: It's a gift. I was originally planning to give it to you at the after-party... but I'm finally giving it to you now.

1600869024.korean: - 테이블 위에 놓인 것을 들고 확인해 본 난 피식, 입가에 웃음이 나왔다.
1600869024.english: I picked up what was on the table and took a look, then let out a chuckle.

1600869025.english: … This is a photo we took while practicing together at dawn.

1600869026.korean: 나랑 내 동료들한테 좋은 기억을 네가 채워줬으니까… 우리도 이걸로 네 기억을 조금이나마 채울 수 있다면 좋겠어.
1600869026.english: Since you filled my colleagues and me with good memories... I hope we can fill your memories, even if just a little, with this.

1600869027.korean: - 나는 그레이스가 준 하운드 멤버들의 연습실 셀카를 조심스레 사령관실의 벽에 붙여두었다.
1600869027.english: I carefully pasted the selfie of the Hound members in the practice room that Grace gave me onto the wall of the commander's office.

1600869028.english: I look forward to working with you, Commander...

1600869031.korean: …이미 우리가 그렇고 그런 진도까지 나갔는데, 고작 널 남자친구나 약혼자 급으로 취급할 것 같아?
1600869031.english: … We’ve already gone that far, so do you really think I’d treat you like a boyfriend or fiancé?

1600869032.korean: 내 부하들은 너한테 있어 첩이지, 그 아이들의 명령권자인 나는 부군의 둘도 없는 진정한 부인이고.
1600869032.english: My subordinates are concubines to you, but I, their commander, am the husband's one and only true wife.

1600869033.english: It was truly a Grace-like answer.

1600869034.korean: 내 두통이 멎을 때까지, 내 기억이 온통 너로 채워져 행복할 때까지…
1600869034.english: Until my headache subsides, until my memories are completely filled with you and I am happy…

1600869035.korean: 하운드의 지휘권자이자, 이 마리아 그레이스의 부군으로써 평생 함께 해줘.
1600869035.english: As the commander of the Hound and the husband of this Maria Grace, please stay with me for the rest of my life.

1600869036.korean: 이만 가볼게. 안 그래도 요즘 이곳 저곳에서 연기를 봐달라는 둥, 사인을 해달라는 둥 바빠서 말이야.
1600869036.english: I'll be going now. I've been busy lately, with people asking me to watch my acting and give autographs here and there.

1600869037.korean: - 내가 손을 흔들자, 마리아 그레이스는 인식표를 목에 걸은 후 웃으며 사령관실을 나갔다.
1600869037.english: As I waved my hand, Maria Grace hung her dog tag around her neck, smiled, and left the commander's office.

1600869038.korean: - 벽에 붙여둔 하운드의 사진에는 환한 햇살이 잔잔하게 내려앉았다.
1600869038.english: Bright sunlight gently settled on the photo of the hound hanging on the wall.

1600869039.english: - It is very bright and... beautiful.

1600869041.korean: 다행히 오늘은 딴 길로 안 샜나 보네?
1600869041.english: Looks like you didn't stray off the path today, for the luck of the matter.

1600869043.english: I was only 20 minutes late this time.

1600869044.korean: 보안 상 그런 걸 줄 수 없어서 그래, 미안.
1600869044.english: I can't give you that for security reasons, sorry.

1600869045.korean: 넌 아직 정식 오르카 대원이 아니었으니까.
1600869045.english: Because you weren't an official Orca member yet.

1600869046.korean: 자, 이거 두 개면 이제 오르카에서 길 잃을 일은 없을 거야.
1600869046.english: Now, with these two, you won't get lost in Orca anymore.

1600869050.english: This level of welfare is the bare minimum.

1600870001.korean: 우리 생각해보니까, 여태 단 한번도 단체 사진 찍은 적 없지 않아?
1600870001.english: Come to think of it, haven't we never taken a group photo even once?

1600870002.english: Why are you suddenly bringing that up?

1600870003.korean: 그레이스까지 다 모였는데… 우리 단체 사진 한 번만 찍자, 응?
1600870003.english: Now that Grace is here too... let's take a group photo just once, okay?

1600870004.english: Why bother with something like that?

1600870005.korean: 이거 찍어서 사령관한테 주면 좋아하지 않을까?
1600870005.english: Wouldn't the commander like it if I took a picture of this and gave it to him?

1600870006.english: It seems like not a bad idea, but...

1600870007.english: … Empress, what are you doing sneaking away?

1600870008.english: … You guys take the picture. I don't need it.

1600870009.korean: 야, 그러면서 머리 정돈하는 건 또 뭔 심보야? 저년 가만 보면 입이랑 몸이 다르게 움직인다니까?
1600870009.english: Hey, what kind of mentality is it to fix your hair while doing that? If you look closely at her, I'm telling you, her mouth and body move differently.

1600870011.korean: 야, 마리아. 내 얼굴 가리지 말고, 옆에 좀 서.
1600870011.english: Hey, Maria. Don't block my face, stand next to me.

1600870013.korean: …그래. 이제 좀 잡히는군. 파프니르, 카메라를 좀 켜 봐라.
1600870013.english: … Right. It’s starting to take shape now. Fafnir, turn on the camera.

1600870015.korean: 야… 잠깐. 나 왜 이렇게 얼빵하게 나와?
1600870015.english: Hey… wait. Why do I look so goofy?

1600870016.korean: 얼빵하게 생겼으니까 얼빵하게 나오지… 이거 핫팩한테도 줄 거니까, 다들 포즈 제대로 잡아~
1600870016.english: You look goofy, so of course you look goofy... I'm going to give this to the hot pack too, so everyone strike a proper pose~

1600870017.korean: 잠깐만... 나 파운데이션 좀 바를까? 좀 칙칙해 보이지 않아?
1600870017.english: Wait a minute... Should I put on some foundation? Don't I look a bit dull?

1600870018.korean: 지랄 좀 그만해. 호박에 줄 긋는다고 수박 되냐?!
1600870018.english: Stop bullshitting. Do you think drawing lines on a pumpkin turns it into a watermelon?!

1600870019.korean: …다들 포즈나 잡거라. 주인… 아니, 프로듀서님께서 보실 사진이니 말이다.
1600870019.english: … Everyone, strike a pose. After all, this is a photo for the Master… no, the Producer to see.

1600870020.korean: 자, 다들 준비 됐지? 찍는다? 하나… 둘…
1600870020.english: Alright, everyone ready? Time to film? One... two...

1600870021.korean: 야! 셋에 찍는거잖아! 왜 두 번 세다 셔터 누르는데!!
1600870021.english: Hey! You're supposed to take the picture on three! Why are you counting to two and pressing the shutter?!

1600870022.korean: 야, 넌 애초에 이 바보가 숫자나 제대로 세고 사진 찍을 거라 믿었냐?!
1600870022.english: Hey, did you really believe this idiot would at least count the numbers properly before taking a picture in the first place?!

1600870023.korean: 넌 사진 찍는다고 할 때부터 똥 씹은 표정이더니, 이제 와서 적극적인 이유가 뭔데?
1600870023.english: You had a sour look on your face the moment I said I was going to take a picture, so why are you being so enthusiastic now?

1600870024.korean: 파프니르, 혹시 이 카메라… 배터리 충전은 해놨나?
1600870024.english: Fafnir, by any chance, this camera... did you charge the battery?

1600870025.korean: 아니, 이거 따로 충전은 안 해놨는데.
1600870025.english: No, I didn't charge this separately.

1600870026.korean: …애초부터 기대도 안 했다. 센스가 좀 늘은 줄 알았더니만.
1600870026.english: … I didn't expect it from the start. I thought your sense of style had improved a bit, but...

1600870027.korean: 아쉽긴 하지만… 무대까지 얼마 안 남았는데… 셀카는 이정도로 하지.
1600870027.english: It's a shame, but... there isn't much time left until the stage... so I'll stop the selfie here.

1600870028.korean: 잠깐만! 나 표정 이상하게 나왔어!! 한 장만 더!
1600870028.english: Wait! My expression came out weird!! Just one more!

1600870029.korean: 그렇게 아쉬우면 평소에도 좀 웃고 다니시던가~
1600870029.english: If you're so disappointed, why don't you go around smiling more often?

1600870031.korean: 우리랑 같이 한 사진에 찍히는 게 싫지만은 않은 모양이다?
1600870031.english: It looks like you don't mind being in a photo with us?

1600870033.korean: 흥, 그냥 내가 이상하게 나와서 그런 것 뿐이야.
1600870033.english: Hmph, it's just that I came across strangely.

1600870034.korean: 생각해보니… 여제님께선 늘 차가운 웃음만 지으셨는데…
1600870034.english: Come to think of it… the Empress always wore only a cold smile…

1600870035.english: … It’s good to see your expression change, Empress.

1600870036.korean: 여기에 우리 사인도 해서, 공연 성공하면 사령관한테도 주자. 알았지?
1600870036.english: Let's sign this too, and if the performance is a success, let's give it to the Commander as well. Got it?

1600870037.korean: 올~ 바보니르. 네가 그런 생각도 할 줄 아냐?
1600870037.english: Oh~ Babonir. You can actually think like that?

1600870038.korean: 좋은 생각이네. 이참에 나도 사인 하나 만들어놔야겠네. 이거 어때?
1600870038.english: That's a good idea. I should get a signature made while I'm at it. How about this one?

1600870039.english: … That’s not a signature, it’s just scribbling.

1600870040.korean: 자, 다들 모여 봐. 좀 있어 보이게 사인하는 거 가르쳐 줄 테니까.
1600870040.english: Alright, everyone gather around. I'm going to teach you how to sign in a cool way.

1600870041.korean: 오… 진짜 예쁘다… 근데… 사인에 쓴 영어… 중에 시리우스가 뭐야?
1600870041.english: Oh… it’s really pretty… but… what is Sirius in the English written on the signature?

1600870043.english: Sirius is the brightest star in the constellation Canis Major.

1600870044.english: … The five brightest wild stars in the sky… to you.

1600871002.korean: …하여, 감히 네 놈이 연극부의 회장이 되겠다 하였느냐?
1600871002.english: … So, how dare you say you will become the president of the drama club?

1600871003.korean:
공주, 배우로써의 커리어는 이 몸이 많다는 사실을 잊었나?
이 부분에 있어선 당연히 선배를 존중하는 것이 필요하다.
1600871003.english:
Princess, have you forgotten that I have a lot of body parts for your acting career?
 In this regard, it is naturally necessary to respect your seniors.

1600871004.korean: …아니, 인정할 수 없다. 겨우 연공서열 따위로 이것을 정하는 것이 말이나 된다고 생각하나?
1600871004.english: … No, I cannot accept that. Do you really think it makes sense to decide this based on something as trivial as seniority?

1600871005.korean: 그렇다면 진조, 이번 연극을 무대에 올린 후 대원들의 투표로 회장을 정하는 것이 어떤가 묻고 싶다.
1600871005.english: In that case, Jinjo, I would like to ask how we could decide the president through a vote by the members after staging this play.

1600871006.korean:
…좋다. 하지만 우리는 서로 장르와 분야가 다르다는 건 알고 있겠지?
'마법 소녀'와 '드래곤 슬레이어'의 연극을 펼치는 것보다, 전혀 새로운 창작극을 올려 승부를 보는 건 어떠느냐.
1600871006.english:
… Fine. But you know that we are in different genres and fields, right?
 Instead of staging plays like 'Magical Girl' and 'Dragon Slayer,' how about putting on a completely new original play to make your mark?

1600871008.korean: 흐음… 하지만 창작극이라... 당장, 무얼 준비해야 하는 거지? 흐으으으음…
1600871008.english: Hmm... But an original play... Right now, what do I need to prepare? Hmmm...

1600871009.korean: 서로 배역을 맡은 분야가 다르다보니, 쉽게 진검 승부를 벌이긴 어렵겠군.
1600871009.english: Since the roles they play are in different fields, it seems it will be difficult to have a real showdown.

1600871011.english: What brings you here out of the blue?

1600871012.korean: …잠시 토론을 듣던 중 흥미로운 의견이 생겨 오게 되었습니다.
1600871012.english: … While listening to the discussion for a while, an interesting opinion came to mind, so I came over.

1600871013.english: What do you mean by an interesting opinion?

1600871014.korean: 이번에 하이라이트를 맡은 엠프레시스 하운드 밴드부의 이야기에 대해 아십니까?
1600871014.english: Do you know the story of the Empress Hound band, who took on the highlight role this time?

1600871015.korean:
으음… 그 밴드부에 당시 '최후의 인간 여배우'를 본떠 만든 바이오로이드가 있단 소식은 들었노라. 
헌데 그것은 왜 묻는 것이지?
1600871015.english:
Hmm... I heard the news that there is a bioroid in that band club modeled after the 'Last Human Actress' at the time.
 But why are you asking that?

1600871016.korean: 여제와 그 부대의 이야기를 창작극으로 올리는 것은 어떤지에 대해 말씀드리고자 합니다.
1600871016.english: I would like to suggest staging an original play about the story of the Empress and her troops.

1600871017.korean: 그게 무슨 말인지 의도를 모르겠군 로크.
1600871017.english: I don't understand what you mean by that, Locke.

1600871018.korean:
엠프레시스 하운드는 멸망 전부터 자신을 적대하는 바이오로이드와 
인간들에 대한 테러 행위를 지속하였습니다.
1600871018.english:
Empressis Hound is a bio-android that has been hostile to him since before the apocalypse and
 They continued acts of terror against humans.

1600871019.korean:
비록 각하께선 너그러히 용서한단 말씀을 하셨지만… 
일부 피해자인 바이오로이드에게 있어선 여전히 거부감이 드는 것도 사실이겠지요.
1600871019.english:
Although Your Excellency said you would generously forgive...
 It is likely true that some of the victimized bioroids still feel a sense of repulsion.

1600871020.korean: 이번 기회에 한 번 그들의 이야기를 연극을 올려 그분들에 대한 인식을 바꾸는 건 어떨까 싶어 제안드립니다.
1600871020.english: I would like to suggest taking this opportunity to stage a play about their story to change the perception of them.

1600871021.korean: 엠프레시스 하운드의 이야기로 연극이라… 과거의 일을 토대로한 역사극...
1600871021.english: A play based on the story of the Empress Hound… a historical drama based on events of the past…

1600871022.korean:
…음, 생각보다 난이도는 높긴 하다만, 
어차피 당사자들이 모두 가까이에 실존하는 만큼… 극을 구성하는 데는 그리 어렵진 않겠군.
1600871022.english:
… Hmm, the difficulty is higher than I thought, but,
 Since the parties involved are all actually nearby anyway... structuring the play shouldn't be that difficult.

1600871023.korean:
좋다. 이 연극의 인기투표를 통해, 회장과 부회장을 가리도록 하지.
덴세츠 쪽의 회장 후보는 골타리온, 자네인가?
1600871023.english:
Alright. Let's decide the president and vice president through the popularity vote of this play.
 Is the chairman candidate on the Densetsu side you, Goltarion?

1600871024.korean: 대마왕님과 마법소녀들은 이번에 따로 회장 자리에 출마하진 않겠다고 하니, 이몸이 맡기로 했네. 비스마르크 쪽 회장 후보는 공주겠지?
1600871024.english: Since the Great Demon Lord and the Magical Girls have said they won't be running for the chairman position this time, I've decided to take it on. The candidate for chairman on the Bismarck side must be the Princess, right?

1600871025.korean:
…성녀 실격인 짐은 영 관심 없어하고, 다른 동료들은 짐을 후보로 내세우기로 하였다.
사실상, 골타리온 자네와, 짐의 연기 대결이라고 할 수 있겠지.
1600871025.english:
… Jim, who was disqualified as a saint, had absolutely no interest, so her colleagues decided to put her forward as a candidate.
 In fact, you could say it’s an acting showdown between you, Goltarion, and me.

1600871026.korean:
…알겠다. 올리비아 양에게 공연 대본을 맡기는 것으로 하지.
덴세츠의 진수를 이 골타리온께서 유감없이 보여주도록 하겠다.
1600871026.english:
… Alright. I’ll have Miss Olivia handle the performance script.
 I, Goltarion, will show you the true essence of Densetsu without reservation.

1600871027.korean: 훗, 부디 짐의 연기 혼을 깨울 수 있는 대결이 되었으면 좋겠노라.
1600871027.english: Hmph, I hope this becomes a duel that can awaken my acting spirit.

1600871028.korean: 두 분의 불꽃 튀는 연기 대결을 기대하겠습니다.
1600871028.english: I look forward to the fierce acting showdown between the two of you.

1600871029.korean: - 한편, 축제 준비와 하운드의 무대 준비를 위해 바쁜 와중, 로크가 나와의 면담을 요청했다.
1600871029.english: Meanwhile, while I was busy preparing for the festival and the Hound's stage, Locke requested a meeting with me.

1600871030.korean: 바쁜 와중에 죄송합니다. 오르카 연극부에 관련하여 제 의견을 드리고 왔습니다만...
1600871030.english: I apologize for bothering you while you are busy. I have just gone to offer my opinion regarding the Orca Drama Club, but...

1600871031.korean: - 로크의 이야기들을 들은 후, 나는 고개를 천천히 끄덕였다.
1600871031.english: After listening to Locke's stories, I slowly nodded my head.

1600871032.english: I know it might be presumptuous, but this is my perspective.

1600871033.korean:
마리아 리오보로스는 앙헬 공과 같이 홀로 외로운 싸움을 하며 살아왔습니다.
그리고 멸망 전의 악행은 모두, 자신들의 목적과 이익을 위해 벌인 이기적인 행동인 건 변함없습니다.
1600871033.english:
Maria Rioboros has lived a lonely life fighting a battle all by herself, just like Duke Angel.
 And the fact remains that all the evil deeds committed before the destruction were selfish actions carried out for their own purposes and interests.

1600871034.korean: …하지만, 앙헬 공이 자신의 욕심을 위하여 벌인 일에 의해 마리아 리오보로스가 비극을 맞이한 건 사실이니 만큼, 마리아 리오보로스의 삶을 투명하게 알리고 엠프레시스 하운드에게 앙금이 쌓였던 바이오로이드에게 그녀들의 평가를 직접 맡겨보는 것이 어떤가 싶어 말씀을 드렸습니다.
1600871034.english: … However, since it is true that Maria Rioboros met a tragedy due to what Duke Angel did for his own greed, I suggested that we transparently reveal Maria Rioboros’s life and entrust the evaluation of them directly to the bioroids who harbored resentment toward the Empressis Hound.

1600871035.korean:
…적어도 바이오로이드 분들께선 저희 AGS보다 
다양한 감정을 가지고 계신 만큼 여러 생각을 해보게 하는 것도 좋을 것 같습니다.
1600871035.english:
… At least the bioroids are better than our AGS
 Since you have a wide range of emotions, it would be good to encourage you to think about various things.

1600871037.korean:
그래도 자신을 여제라 칭하는 바이오로이드까지 나타난 이 시점에서 한 번은 반드시 짚고 넘어가야 할 일이라 사료됩니다.
각하께서 엠프레시스 하운드를 이해한다 한들, 여제에게 시달렸던 멸망 전 바이오로이드 분들은 다른 생각을 가질 수도 있을 테니 말입니다.
1600871037.english:
However, given that a bioroid calling herself an empress has even appeared, I believe this is a matter that must be addressed at least once.
 Even if Your Excellency understands the Empress Hound, the pre-apocalyptic bio-androids who suffered under the Empress might have different thoughts.

1600871038.korean: - 최선의 판단은 아닐지 몰라도 로크의 제안은 확실히 축제라는 기회의 장을 이용해 그동안의 앙금을 풀어낼 수 있다는 이점이 있었다.
1600871038.english: - It may not have been the best decision, but Locke's suggestion certainly had the advantage of using the festival as an opportunity to resolve past grudges.

1600871039.korean:
- 나는 각본과 대사를 담당하게 될 올리비아를 찾아가 얘기를 나누기로 했다.
싱글벙글하던 그녀는 복잡한 리오보로스 가문의 이야기를 듣게 되자 표정이 급격히 구겨지기 시작했다.
1600871039.english:
I decided to go and talk to Olivia, who will be in charge of the script and dialogue.
 She, who had been beaming, began to frown rapidly as she heard the complicated story of the Rioboros family.

1600871040.korean: 와… 이거 정말 헬 난이도 인데…? 자투리로 대본을 쓸 게 아니라 정말 각 잡고 써야 하겠는 걸?
1600871040.english: Wow… this is seriously hellish…? I shouldn't be writing the script using spare scraps; I really need to get serious about writing it.

1600871041.korean: 에?! 이번 연극부 대본을 올리비아한테 맡긴다고? 나도 잘 쓸 자신 있는…
1600871041.english: What?! You're entrusting the drama club script to Olivia this time? I'm confident I can write one well too…

1600871042.korean: 시끄러워 언니. 어딜 도망가려 하는 거야?
1600871042.english: You're so noisy, sis. Where are you trying to run off to?

1600871043.korean: 게다가 대원들 모두 너도 나도 축제 중엔 교복을 입겠다고 맞춤 제작 주문 엄청 밀린 거 알고 있어? 안 그래도 축제 무대 의상 코디 때문에 바쁜 거 아시면서…
1600871043.english: Besides, do you know that custom orders are backed up like crazy because everyone in the group wants to wear school uniforms during the festival? You know we're already busy enough with the stage costume styling...

1600871044.english: If you're short-handed, I'll help you.

1600871045.english: I'm a woman who used to handle scissors, you know.

1600871046.korean: 어깨 너머 이야기로 듣긴 했는데… 제법 올리비아도 하고 싶어하던 눈치던데?
1600871046.english: I heard it over their shoulder... but it looked like Olivia quite wanted to do it, too.

1600871047.korean:
리스트컷 언니가 도와준다고 하면… 괜찮지만…
갑자기 언니가 왜 나서서 도와주겠다는 거야? PECS에 관련된 이야기도 아닌데.
1600871047.english:
If my older sister says she’ll help with the wrist cut… it’s fine, but…
 Why are you suddenly stepping forward to help? It's not even about PECS.

1600871048.korean:
그 여자가 우리한테 명령이니 뭐니 하는 것들 무시하고 다니긴 했는데…
멀리서 떨어져 보니까 뭔가 불쌍한 것 같기도 하고.
1600871048.english:
She did go around ignoring orders and whatnot from us, but...
 Looking at it from a distance, it seems kind of pitiful.

1600871049.korean:
…델타 밑에서 온갖 짓거리를 다 해봤는데, 그래도 저 정도 꼬장이면 양반이다 싶기도 하고.
그년은 자기 반성도 없던 글러먹은 년이었어서… 조금은 불쌍하다 싶더라.
1600871049.english:
… I’ve done all sorts of crazy things under Delta, but even so, I think that level of obstinacy is actually quite decent.
 She was a worthless bitch who didn't even reflect on herself... so I felt a little sorry for her.

1600871050.korean:
간만에 실력 발휘 해볼까나. 올리비아도 해보고 싶은 모양인데. 이번엔 내가 도와줄테니까 해 봐.
안 그래도 너, 그 여자 만난 뒤로 사인도 꼭 한 번 받고 싶다면서 흥분하지 않았던가?
1600871050.english:
Shall I show off my skills for the first time in a while? It looks like Olivia wants to try it too. I'll help you this time, so give it a go.
 Didn't you get all worked up saying you really wanted to get an autograph after meeting that girl?

1600871051.english: Hmm... would that still be okay?

1600871053.english: Me too! Me too! I want to try the drama club!!

1600871055.english: … Alright! Then I’ll write the script myself.

1600871056.korean: - 축제의 취지가 대원들의 다채로운 부 활동인 만큼, 이런 계획을 장려해도 나쁘진 않을 것 같다.
1600871056.english: Given that the purpose of the festival is to showcase the members' diverse extracurricular activities, it wouldn't be a bad idea to encourage plans like this.

1600871059.english: I didn't expect you to think of me this much.

1600871060.korean: …괜찮을까 싶네. 멸망 전의 일을 가지고 각색하고 섣불리 판단 내리게 한다는 게.
1600871060.english: … I wonder if it’s okay. To dramatize events from before the apocalypse and make people make hasty judgments.

1600871062.korean: 바쁘긴 하겠지만… 이왕 공연하려는 거면, 제대로 써야 하지 않을까 싶네.
1600871062.english: I know you'll be busy... but since you're planning to perform anyway, I think you should write it properly.

1600871063.korean: …아무래도 이제 와서 주문을 거절하는 건 힘들겠지?
1600871063.english: … I suppose it would be hard to refuse the order now, right?

1600871065.english: Are you sure it'll be okay?

1600871066.english: Your older sister said she’ll help, so give it a try.

1600871067.korean: 안 그래도 연극부 한 번 들고 싶어하던 눈치던데…
1600871067.english: It looked like you wanted to join the drama club anyway...

1600871068.korean: 정식으로 연극부 각본가로 활약해보는 건 어때?
1600871068.english: How about you officially become a playwright for the drama club?

1600871069.korean: 테일러는 탈론페더가 따로 찾는 것 같던데.
1600871069.english: It looks like Talonfeather is looking for Taylor separately.

1600871070.english: Well… I’ll pretend I don’t know.

1600872001.korean: 저기~ 여제? 여제! 잠깐 시간 좀 돼?
1600872001.english: Hey~ Empress? Empress! Do you have a moment?

1600872003.korean: 이번에 연극부에서 축제에 연극을 올릴까 하고 있어. 여제랑 하운드의 인생사를 보여주는 역사극을 올릴 계획을 가지고 있거든.
1600872003.english: The drama club is thinking of putting on a play for the festival this time. We are planning to stage a historical drama that depicts the life stories of the Empress and the Hound.

1600872004.korean: 인류 최후의 여배우이자, 테러리스트의 수장이었다는 두 얼굴을 보여주고 싶어서… 내가 각본을 맡게 돼서 네게 여러 가지 도움을 좀 받을 수 있을까 하고!
1600872004.english: I wanted to show the two faces of humanity—the last actress and the leader of terrorists... Since I’ve been put in charge of the script, I was wondering if I could get some help from you!

1600872006.korean: 응! 그래서 말인데, 여제와 관련된 것들에 대해… 이야기를 들어볼 수 있을까?
1600872006.english: Yeah! So, speaking of which, could I hear a story about the things related to the Empress...?

1600872007.korean: …나, 아니. 여제님의 이야기는… 말해 줄 수야 있긴 하지만. 그렇게 좋은 이야기는 아닐 것 같은데 괜찮나?
1600872007.english: … Me, no. I could tell you the Empress’s story… but… it doesn’t seem like a very good story. Is that okay?

1600872008.korean: 밝은 이야기가 아닐 거란 건 나도 각오하고 있어.
1600872008.english: I'm prepared for the fact that it won't be a bright story.

1600872009.korean: …알겠어. 내가 가진 기억 선에선 최대한 모든 걸 말해주도록 하지.
1600872009.english: … Alright. I’ll tell you everything I can within the limits of my memory.

1600872011.english: … Why are you crying like that?

1600872012.korean: 정말 순애였구나… 니콜라스를 위해서 평생을 바친 여자라니.
1600872012.english: It was truly a pure love... To think she was a woman who dedicated her entire life to Nicholas.

1600872013.korean: …그래봤자 엠프레시스 하운드가 테러리스트였다는 건 숨길 수 없는 과거 아닌가?
1600872013.english: … Even so, isn't the fact that Empressis Hound was a terrorist an undeniable past?

1600872014.korean: 의외로 자기 과거… 아니, 여제 과거에 대해선 냉철하게 말하는 편이네?
1600872014.english: Surprisingly, you tend to speak quite cool-headedly about your past... no, the Empress's past?

1600872015.korean:
…그러게. 객관적이게 생각할 수 있게 되다 보니 단호해진 모양이야.
솔직히 말해, 생각이 좀 많아지는 대목이라서 말이야. 영원한 사랑과 복수라는 건 말이지.
1600872015.english:
… I know. It seems he’s become more resolute now that he’s able to think objectively.
 To be honest, it’s a point that really makes me think. You know, eternal love and revenge.

1600872016.korean: 아, 이왕 여제님의 이야기에 대해 쓰기로 마음 먹었다면…
1600872016.english: Ah, since I’ve decided to write about the Empress’s story…

1600872017.korean:
…바르그 이야기도 참고하는 게 좋을 거야.
그 녀석은 여제님이 임명하신 진정한 대장이고, 여제님이 나이 먹은 이후에도 함께한 기억을 가지고 있으니까.
1600872017.english:
… You should also refer to the story of Varg.
 He is a true captain appointed by the Empress, and he holds memories of being with her even after she grew old.

1600872018.korean: 에? 넌 명령권 있다면서… 네가 하운드의 대장이 아니었어?
1600872018.english: Huh? You said you had command authority... Weren't you the leader of the Hounds?

1600872020.korean: …글쎄, 명령권이 있다고 대장이 맞을까? 내 명령은 죽어도 듣지 않는 애들인데.
1600872020.english: … Well, just because I have the authority to give orders, does that make me the boss? They are kids who would never listen to my orders, not even if their lives depended on it.

1600872022.korean: 아무튼 간에 내가 알고 있는 건 멸망 전 젊은 시절의 끼워 맞춰진 이야기뿐이니까.
1600872022.english: Anyway, all I know is a pieced-together story from my youth before the apocalypse.

1600872023.korean:
저… 저기이… 혹시 나중에 연극 연습할 때 꼭 한 번 바르그랑 같이 와줄 수 있어?
당사자 둘이 와서 고증을 해주면 좋고… 한 번 대배우의 코칭을 받고 싶기도 해서…
1600872023.english:
Um... excuse me... by any chance, could you please come with Varg to the play rehearsal later?
 It would be great if the two people involved could come and verify the history... and I also want to get some coaching from a great actor...

1600872027.korean: …연극 말인가? 여제님과 우리 엠프레시스 하운드의 연극?
1600872027.english: … You mean a play? A play between the Empress and our Empress Hound?

1600872028.korean:
응! 이번에 사령관이 한 번 해보자고 해서 내가 각본을 맡았거든.
그런데 뭐랄까… 참고할 게 있을까 싶어 둘 이야기를 들어보고 싶어서 찾아왔어!
1600872028.english:
Yeah! The commander suggested we give it a try this time, so I took charge of the script.
 But... how should I put it... I came here to hear your story in case there's anything I can use as a reference!

1600872029.korean: …여제님의 이야기는 마리아 그레이스를 찾아가는 게 더 빠를 텐데 굳이 날 찾아온 이유가 뭐지?
1600872029.english: … It would have been faster to go find Maria Grace to hear the Empress's story, so why did you go out of your way to find me?

1600872030.korean: 그레이스가 오히려 네가 더 뚜렷하고 세세한 최근 기억을 가지고 있을 거라 말해줘서 찾아 온 거야.
1600872030.english: I came here because Grace told me that you would actually have clearer and more detailed recent memories.

1600872031.korean: 그게 무슨 말이지? 여제님의 기억을 이은 그 여자야말로 가장 정확한...
1600872031.english: What do you mean? That woman who inherited the Empress's memories is indeed the most accurate...

1600872032.korean: 인간 여제님을 끝까지 보필했던 건 네가 맞잖아? 그레이스가 인정하던 걸?
1600872032.english: It's true that you were the one who served the Human Empress until the very end, isn't it? Grace even acknowledged that.

1600872033.korean: 그 여자 입에서 그런 말이 나왔단 말이냐…?
1600872033.english: Are you saying such words actually came out of her mouth...?

1600872034.korean: 나 참... 서로 자꾸 이런 식으로 하기 싫은 티 내면서 미루면 연극 때까지 대본 못 쓴다고!! 얼른 바르그 너도 얘기해달란 말이야!!
1600872034.english: Seriously... If we keep putting it off like this, making it obvious we don't want to do it, I won't be able to write the script by the play!! Barg, hurry up and tell me what you want too!!

1600872035.english: Ah... I get it... In that case, I'll tell you.

1600872036.english: … The Empress, she really lived a turbulent life.

1600872037.korean:
비록 누군가한테는 멸망 전 잔인했던 구 인류중 하나였겠지만… 
내게 있어선 어머니나 다름 없는 존재다.
1600872037.english:
Although to some, he might have been one of the cruel old humans before the apocalypse…
 To me, she is like a mother.

1600872038.korean: …그렇다고 하여, 악행을 미화하거나 가릴 생각은 없지만 말이다.
1600872038.english: … That said, I have no intention of glorifying or concealing evil deeds.

1600872039.korean: 흐음, 좀 의미심장하네. 기억을 물려주긴 했지만, 결국 대장은 바르그였다라…
1600872039.english: Hmm, that's a bit significant. He passed down his memories, but in the end, the captain was Varg...

1600872041.korean:
여제님의 기억과 유전자를 받은 자야말로 하운드의 대장이지.
안 그래도 이번 밴드 일이 끝나면 하운드의 대장을 여제로 바꿔달라 청하기로 마음 먹었다.
1600872041.english:
The one who inherited the Empress's memories and genes is the true leader of the Hounds.
 I had already decided that once this band project is over, I would ask to have the leader of the Hounds replaced by an Empress.

1600872042.korean: 잠깐… 여제는 네가 진정한 하운드의 대장이라고 하던데?
1600872042.english: Wait... I heard the Empress said you're the true leader of the Hounds?

1600872044.korean:
…여제님이 그렇게 생각하셨으면, 나한테 명령권을 주셨겠지. 
그 여자의 입 발린 소리 따위는 한 귀로 듣고 흘려라.
1600872044.english:
… If the Empress thought so, she would have given me the authority to issue commands.
 Let that woman's empty words go in one ear and out the other.

1600873002.korean: …요즘 여기저기서 우릴 찾는 일이 많군. 또 무슨 일이지?
1600873002.english: … We’ve been getting a lot of people looking for us lately. What’s going on this time?

1600873003.korean: 그것이… 이번 네 역을 맡은 건 이 몸인데… 뭔가 묻고 싶은 게 있어 찾아왔다.
1600873003.english: The thing is... I am the one who took on the role this time... but I came to see you because there is something I want to ask.

1600873004.korean: 마음이 심란해서… 되도록 일찍 정리해 준다면 좋겠군.
1600873004.english: I'm feeling a bit unsettled... so it would be nice if you could sort this out as early as possible.

1600873005.korean: 실제 인물을 연기하는 만큼, 어느 정도는 고증이 필요하기에 요청하는 것이다. 오래 걸리진 않을 테니 부탁한다.
1600873005.english: I am making this request because, as you are portraying a real person, a certain degree of historical accuracy is necessary. It won't take long, so please bear with me.

1600873007.korean: 여제에 대한 네 진짜 감정은 무엇인지, 전체적인 감정선을 어떻게 이어가며 연기를 해야 할지 조언을 부탁한다.
1600873007.english: I would like to ask for advice on what your true feelings are for the Empress and how to maintain the overall emotional arc while acting.

1600873008.korean:
올리비아가 쓴 각본을 이해하기론… 내가 대마왕님께 바치는 충성과 비슷한 맥락이라 느껴졌다.
하지만… 네 발언을 참고해 만들었다는 대사는 조금 다른 결이 섞인 느낌이 들더군.
1600873008.english:
As I understood the script Olivia wrote… it felt like it was in a similar context to the loyalty I offer to the Great Demon King.
 However… the lines that were created by referencing your remarks felt like they had a slightly different tone mixed in.

1600873009.korean: …부모 자식 간의 사랑과 주인에 대한 충성이 섞인… 조금은 어려운 구조더군. 이에 대해 설명을 부탁한다.
1600873009.english: … It was a somewhat difficult structure, a mixture of parent-child love and loyalty to the master… I would like to ask for an explanation regarding this.

1600873010.english: … I’m a bit at a loss as to how to explain this.

1600873011.korean: 자신을 낳아주고, 꿈을 꿀 수 있게 해준 부모에 대한 보은… 정도로 이해하면 되나?
1600873011.english: Should I understand it as a token of gratitude to the parents who gave birth to me and allowed me to dream?

1600873012.korean: 조금 더 자세한 설명을 요한다. 또한 현재, 여제를 본떠 만든 대원에 대해서도 네가 느끼는 감정을 설명해주길 바란다.
1600873012.english: I require a more detailed explanation. Also, I would like you to explain your feelings regarding the member currently modeled after the Empress.

1600873013.korean: 예를 들면, 뽀끄루가 널 태어나게 했다고 친다면...
1600873013.english: For example, let's say Pokkuru brought you into existence...

1600873014.korean: 내 어머니가 되어 줬을 지도 모르는 대마왕님이라니… 오오오오오옷?!
1600873014.english: To think the Great Demon Lord might have been my mother… Ooooooh?!

1600873015.korean:
…그렇게 예를 든다면, 충성보단 다른 느낌이지 않을까 싶군.
날 태어나게 해주신 분께 그 어느 것도 해드리고 싶다는... 충성과는 조금 결이 다른 복종에 가깝지.
1600873015.english:
… If I were to give that as an example, I think it would feel different from loyalty.
 Wanting to do anything for the one who brought me into this world... it is closer to obedience, though slightly different in nature from loyalty.

1600873017.korean:
…영 마음에 들지 않지만. 그래도 여제님께서 남기신 바이오로이드를 
후계자로 인정하고 존중하려는 각오를 다잡고 있는 느낌이라고 해야 할까?
1600873017.english:
… I don't like it at all, but still, the bioroid left behind by the Empress
 Should I say it feels like they are steeling themselves to acknowledge and respect him as the successor?

1600873018.korean:
…이해했다. 만일 대마왕님께서 매지컬 젠틀맨의 아이를 낳는다면
그 아이를 대마왕님의 후계자로 인정하고 존중하는… 그런 느낌과 비슷하겠나?
1600873018.english:
… I understood. If the Great Demon King were to have a child with the Magical Gentleman
 Would it be similar to the feeling of acknowledging and respecting that child as the Great Demon King's successor...?

1600873019.korean: …그래. 그렇게 이해하려고 한다만은, 쉽사리 받아들이진 못하겠군.
1600873019.english: … Right. I try to understand it that way, but I can't easily accept it.

1600873020.korean: 그러고 보니 바르그. 밴드 공연 준비는 잘 되어가나?
1600873020.english: Come to think of it, Varg. How are the band performance preparations going?

1600873022.english: Excuse me. I have something urgent to do...

1600873023.english: Hey Barg. Thanks for the advice today.

1600873024.korean: 네 고귀한 신념을 반드시 무대 위에서 다른 대원들에게 보여줄 수 있도록 노력하겠다.
1600873024.english: I will do my best to show your noble beliefs to the other members on stage.

1600873025.english: … A noble conviction. Thank you for praising me like that.

1600873026.korean:
처음 만나겠노라. 여제. 짐의 이름은 사이클롭스 프린세스. 
'드래곤 슬레이어'에 나오는 진조의 역을 맡았던 배우이노라.
1600873026.english:
I shall meet you for the first time, Empress. My name is Cyclops Princess.
 Inora, the actor who played the role of Jinjo in 'Dragon Slayer'.

1600873027.korean: 그대는... 그 유명한 멸망 전의 대배우의 유전자가 들어간 바이오로이드라고 하지?
1600873027.english: You say you are... a bioroid containing the genes of that famous pre-apocalyptic great actor?

1600873029.korean:
짐이 듣기론, 파란만장한 삶을 살았던 대배우라 하더군.
그 여자의 삶의 흔적을 듣고 연기에 대입해보고자 하는데… 조언 해줄 수 있겠나?
1600873029.english:
Jim heard that he was a great actor who lived a turbulent life.
 I want to hear about the traces of that woman's life and apply them to my acting... Could you give me some advice?

1600873030.english: … I’ll explain it to the best of my knowledge.

1600873031.korean:
재연 연기는 짐에게 있어서도 처음하는 연기이기에 상당히 난이도가 어렵노라.
…그리고 내가 연기했던 대상은 바이오로이드와 경쟁했던 '최후의 인간 여배우', 그에 대한 존중은 해주는 것이 옳다고 생각하노라.
1600873031.english:
Since this reenactment is a first for me as well, it is quite difficult.
 … And the character I portrayed was the 'last human actress' who competed against the bioroids, and I believe it is right to show her some respect.

1600873032.korean: …솔직히 말해, 껍대기 바이오로이드일 뿐인 내게 굳이 자문을 구할 필요가 있을까?
1600873032.english: … Honestly, is there really a need to seek advice from someone like me, who is nothing but a bioroid shell?

1600873033.korean: 전에 뮤즈랑 에라토의 연기를 지도해줬다 하던데... 프로 배우로써 같은 배우를 도와주는 게 마음에 들지 않더냐?
1600873033.english: I heard you coached Muse and Erato's acting before... As a professional actor, didn't you like helping a fellow actor?

1600873034.korean:
복제품 바이오로이드 따위의 조언이 그리도 필요한지까진 모르겠네.
여제님이 은퇴한 이후로 영화계는 덴세츠와 너희가 거의 장악하지 않았나?
1600873034.english:
I don't know if advice from a replica bioroid is really that necessary.
 Ever since the Empress retired, haven't you guys, Densetsu and I, practically taken over the film industry?

1600873035.korean: …실망이로다. 짐은 네가 말했다던 그 프로의식이 참으로 좋았는데 말이지.
1600873035.english: … What a disappointment. I really liked that professionalism you mentioned.

1600873036.korean: 네가 복제품이라 한다면... 네 연기에 대한 열정과 무대에 오르고 싶은 열망도 거짓이더냐?
1600873036.english: If you call yourself a replica... are your passion for acting and your desire to step onto the stage also lies?

1600873037.korean: 너 따위가 뭘 안다고 나한테 훈계…
1600873037.english: What do you know to be lecturing me...

1600873038.korean: 훈계를 들을만하지 않나? 아무리 바이오로이드다 하더라도 네가 우리들보다 더 윗 세대의 '선배 배우'지 않나.
1600873038.english: Don't you deserve a lecture? Even if you are a bioroid, aren't you a 'senior actor' from a generation older than ours?

1600873039.korean: 짐이 그대를 존중하는 태도를 어째서 가벼히 취급하는 것이지?
1600873039.english: Why do you treat the respect I show you so lightly?

1600873041.korean: 그렇다면 짐이 바이오로이드 시점이 되서 말해주면 좀 더 이해하겠나?
1600873041.english: In that case, would you understand a little better if I told you from the perspective of a bioroid?

1600873042.korean:
네가 그렇게 고깝고 깎아내리던 바이오로이드와 이제 같아졌으니…
그깟 자존심과 프로 의식도 같이 없어지기라도 했단 것이냐?
1600873042.english:
Now that you have become just like the bioroid you used to look down on so harshly…
 Does that mean even your pride and professionalism have vanished along with it?

1600873045.korean: 그래, 이제 여제. 그렇다면 다시 말하겠다. 그대를 만든 대배우의 삶의 궤적을 짐에게 소상히 설명하여라.
1600873045.english: Yes, now, Empress. Then I will speak again. Explain to me in detail the life trajectory of the great actor who made you.

1600873047.korean: 짐의 선배 배우로써 짐의 연기 지도를 부디 부탁하노라.
1600873047.english: As a senior actor to Jim, I earnestly ask you to guide Jim's acting.

1600874001.korean: 이번에 맡은 니콜라스 라는 인간 역을 맡아줄 배우가 따로 없어서… 너무 급하게 대본 건네서 미안해!
1600874001.english: There wasn't a specific actor available to play the human character named Nicholas this time... so I'm sorry for handing you the script so hastily!

1600874002.korean:
맞아~ 여제 마리아 리오보로스가 유일하게 사랑했던 남자가 바로 니콜라스 아니겠어?
진조 공주님도, 당신이 꼭 상대 역으로 나와야 몰입이 될 수 있다고 했던 걸?
1600874002.english:
That's right~ Wasn't Nicholas the only man Empress Maria Rioboros ever loved?
 Didn't Princess Jinjo say that she could only fully immerse herself if you were her co-star?

1600874003.korean: - …다짜고짜 연기를 해달라니 곤란한 건 어쩔 수 없지만, 모두가 즐기는 축제인데 이 정도 부탁도 못 들어준다면 사내대장부 체면이 말이 아닐 것이다.
1600874003.english: ...I can't help but feel awkward being asked to act out of the blue, but since this is a festival for everyone to enjoy, failing to grant even a small request would be a disgrace to my dignity as a man.

1600874004.korean: - 하는 수 없이 나는 올리비아가 건네 준 니콜라스의 대사를 외운 후, 리허설에 참여하기로 했다.
1600874004.english: Having no other choice, I memorized Nicholas's lines that Olivia had given me and decided to participate in the rehearsal.

1600874005.english: Nicholas? My play today... was it okay?

1600874007.korean: - 잠시 홍조를 띤 공주님은 다시 목소리를 가다듬고 연기에 집중해 나갔다.
1600874007.english: The princess, blushing briefly, composed herself and focused on her acting.

1600874008.korean: 으흠… 그래, 당신, 늘 사랑해… 죽음이 우릴 갈라선다 해도, 절대 헤어지지 않을 거야…
1600874008.english: Ahem… Yes, I will always love you… Even if death separates us, we will never be apart…

1600874009.korean:
- 대체적으로 전반부는 니콜라스와 여제의 러브스토리가 주였지만,
중반부와 후반부는 니콜라스가 암살당한 후 돌변하고 복수귀로 변하는 여제의 이야기였다.
1600874009.english:
- Generally, the first half was mainly the love story between Nicholas and the Empress, but
 The middle and latter parts were the story of the Empress, who turned into a vengeful spirit after Nicholas was assassinated.

1600874010.korean: - 적당히 퇴장한 후, 슬쩍 관객석에 내려온 그때, 의외의 인물이 자리에 앉은 모습을 보게 되었다.
1600874010.english: After making a leisurely exit, I quietly came down to the audience seats, and saw an unexpected person sitting in a seat.

1600874011.korean: …제법 하네. 포르노 배우로만 활동하는 줄 알았더니.
1600874011.english: … You're pretty good. I thought you only worked as a porn actor.

1600874012.korean: 어조랑 발음이 부자연스럽긴 하지만, 나쁘진 않았어.
1600874012.english: The tone and pronunciation were unnatural, but it wasn't bad.

1600874013.korean: - 그렇게 마리아와 앉아 오르카 연극부의 공연을 감상하기 시작했다.
1600874013.english: So I sat with Maria and started watching the Orca Drama Club's performance.

1600874014.english: … How many days has it been since I woke up this time?

1600874015.korean: 바르그… 내 충실한 강아지는… 날 떠난 것이냐…?!
1600874015.english: Varg… has my loyal puppy… left me…?!

1600874016.korean: 제가 여제님을 두고… 어찌 떠날 수 있겠습니까?
1600874016.english: How could I... leave the Empress behind?

1600874017.korean:
- …비록 골타리온과 바르그의 덩치는 하늘과 땅 차이긴 했지만,
역시 베테랑인 골타리온과 진조의 공주님은 마치 빙의 한 것처럼 명연기를 이어나갔다.
1600874017.english:
- … Although the size difference between Goltarion and Varg was like heaven and earth,
 As expected, the veteran Goltarion and the Princess of the True Ancestors continued their brilliant acting as if they were possessed.

1600874018.korean:
- 마리아 그레이스도 어느새 숨죽여 리허설을 지켜보고 있었다.
마침내, 여제가 죽은 후, 엠프레시스 하운드의 이야기가 이어졌다.
1600874018.english:
Maria Grace, too, was holding her breath and watching the rehearsal before anyone realized it.
 Finally, after the Empress died, the story of the Empress Hound continued.

1600874019.english: There are various reasons for serving a lord.

1600874020.korean: 부, 명예, 공포, 전통, 보은처럼 간단하게 한 단어로 정의할 수도 있고.
1600874020.english: It can also be defined simply in a single word, like wealth, honor, fear, tradition, and gratitude.

1600874021.korean: 좀 더 복잡한 스토리가 있을 수도 있죠.
1600874021.english: There might be a more complex story.

1600874022.english: Does Delta happen to resemble Maria Rioboros?

1600874024.korean: 알지도 못하면서 함부로 여제님을 모욕하지 마라!
1600874024.english: Do not insult the Empress so carelessly when you do not even know her!

1600874025.korean: 마리아 리오보로스가 악인이라는 것을 알면서, 왜 그녀를 계속 섬기는 거죠?
1600874025.english: Why do you continue to serve Maria Rioboros when you know she is evil?

1600874026.korean: 자신을 세상에 나게 한 이를 뭐라고 부르지?
1600874026.english: What do you call the person who brought you into the world?

1600874027.korean: 존재하지 않았던 자신을 세상에 나게 한 이를 뭐라고 부르나?
1600874027.english: What do you call the one who brought you into the world when you did not exist?

1600874028.korean: 부모다! 자신을 세상에 나게 한 이를 부모라고 한다!
1600874028.english: It is parents! The one who brought you into the world is called a parent!

1600874031.korean: - 단편적으로 입력된 여제에 대한 기억, 하지만 그 기억에 입력이 되지 못한 '자식'의 기억…
1600874031.english: - Fragmentary memories of the Empress, but the memories of the 'child' that could not be entered into those memories…

1600874032.korean:
- 여제는 말없이 바르그에게 있었던 일에 빠져드는 듯했다.
이후, 자신의 무덤 앞에서 우는 모습까지 모두 지켜 본 여제는 박수를 쳤다.
1600874032.english:
The Empress seemed to be silently absorbed in what had happened to Varg.
 Afterwards, the Empress, having watched everything including the scene of crying in front of her own grave, clapped.

1600874035.korean: 바르그도 왔다면 좋았을 텐데... 응? 여제… 갑자기 왜 우는 것이냐?
1600874035.english: It would have been nice if Varg had come too... Huh? Empress... Why are you suddenly crying?

1600874037.korean: 아, 아무 것도 아냐… 그저, 여제님이…
1600874037.english: Ah, it's nothing... just, the Empress...

1600874038.korean: 정말로 충직한 따님을 두셨던 것 같아서…
1600874038.english: It seems like you had a truly loyal daughter…

1600874039.korean:
- 바르그가 말은 하지 않고 티도 잘 내진 않았지만, 
그 누구보다 여제의 일거수 일투족에 상당한 관심을 보였다.
1600874039.english:
Although Varg didn't say anything and didn't show it much,
 He showed more interest in the Empress's every move than anyone else.

1600874040.korean:
- 그리고 나 또한 다시금 바르그가 여제에 대해 
복잡한 마음을 가지고 있을 것이라 세삼 다시금 깨달게 되었다.
1600874040.english:
- And I, too, once again regarding Varg the Empress
 I realized once again that he must have a complicated mind.

1600874042.english: (I told you a needlessly sentimental story.)

1600874043.korean: (…저 여자한테까지 내가 가진 감정을 알리고 싶지 않았는데.)
1600874043.english: (…I didn’t want to let that woman know how I feel.)

1600874044.english: I'm the only man around... what can I do?

1600874045.korean: 내가 니콜라스…? 그레이스가 화 내는 거 아닐까…
1600874045.english: Me, Nicholas...? Won't Grace get angry...?

1600874046.english: Yeah. I couldn't take my eyes off it.

1600874047.korean: 당신, 정말 마리아 테레지아 여제가 빙의한 줄 알았는 걸?
1600874047.english: I really thought you were possessed by Empress Maria Theresa!

1600874048.korean: 그래, 죽음조차 우릴 갈라서진 못할 거야.
1600874048.english: Yeah, even death won't be able to separate us.

1600875001.korean: - 꽤 큰 규모의 학교 축제 컨셉인 만큼, 오르카 대원들은 물론, 기지의 바이오로이드들 중에서도 교복을 입고 온 인원들이 많이 보였다.
1600875001.english: As the concept was a fairly large-scale school festival, many people wearing school uniforms were seen not only among the Orca members but also among the base's bio-androids.

1600875002.korean: - 멸망 전 학교 축제가 이런 느낌일까, 괜스레 마음 속이 들뜨는 기분이었다.
1600875002.english: I wondered if this is what a school festival before the apocalypse felt like; I felt a sense of excitement for no reason.

1600875003.korean: - 소완의 요리부에 들러 음식을 맛보기도 했고…
1600875003.english: I also stopped by Sowan's cooking club to taste some food...

1600875004.korean: - 코스어 부에 들러, 팬텀과 레이스의 신들린 연기를 보기도 했다.
1600875004.english: I stopped by the cosplayer section and watched Phantom and Race's incredible acting.

1600875005.korean: - 그렇게 둘러보던 중 한참 부스로 북적거리던 학교를 두리번 거리다…
1600875005.english: While looking around like that, I glanced around the school, which was bustling with booths...

1600875006.english: I headed to the comics club.

1600875007.korean:
- 만화부 동아리실 앞에는 많은 기지 바이오로이드 대원들이, 겁먹은 표정으로 서 있었다.
무슨 일인가 싶어 안으로 들어서자, 나는 그 이유를 단박에 알아 챌 수 있었다.
1600875007.english:
Many base bio-android members were standing in front of the manga club room with frightened expressions.
 Wondering what was going on, I stepped inside and immediately realized the reason.

1600875009.english: Hehe, Oppa, it's been a while, hasn't it?

1600875010.korean:
관심있는 건 아니고, 멸망 전에 잘 나가는 여자 고등학생들은 만화부에 가입했다는데?
봐봐, 여기 만화에서 남자 주인공은 만화부에서 우리 같은 여자들을 만나잖아?
1600875010.english:
I'm not interested, but I heard that popular high school girls joined the manga club before the apocalypse?
 Look, in this comic, the male protagonist meets girls like us in the comics club, right?

1600875011.korean:
회장은 메리에요 오빠~ 우리한테 잠깐 홍보 활동 좀 해달라고 해서...
교복 의상을 입고 돌아다니는 중이었어요~
1600875011.english:
The president is Mary, oppa~ She asked us to do some promotional work for a bit...
 I was walking around wearing a school uniform.

1600875012.korean: - …멸망 전 불량한 학생들은 만화를 상당히 좋아했나 보다.
1600875012.english: - … It seems that delinquent students before the apocalypse really liked comics.

1600875013.english: … What’s up with those girls? They’re scary.

1600875014.korean: 만화라고 해서 구경하고 싶었는데… 우리가 올 곳이 아닌가 봐…
1600875014.english: I wanted to check it out because it was a comic book... but I guess this isn't the place for us...

1600875015.korean: - …뭔가 단단히 오해가 생긴 듯 했지만, 나는 어색하게 웃으며 그녀들의 옆에 앉았다.
1600875015.english: ...It seemed like there was a serious misunderstanding, but I smiled awkwardly and sat down next to them.

1600875016.korean: 지금 여기서 몇 개 꺼내 읽는 중이긴 한데, 재밌는 게 생각보다 많네.
1600875016.english: I'm reading a few of them right now, and there are more interesting ones than I expected.

1600875017.korean: 세상에~ 중년 남자랑 사랑을 나누는 로맨스 만화에요… 정말 두근거리죠?
1600875017.english: Oh my gosh~ It's a romance comic about falling in love with a middle-aged man… Isn't it really heart-fluttering?

1600875018.korean: - ...미성년자 관람 불가 마크가 붙은 만화에 대한 검열을 강화시켜야 할 듯했다.
1600875018.english: - ...It seemed that censorship of comics marked as unsuitable for minors needed to be strengthened.

1600875019.korean: …그건 좀. 하아, 역시 강하고 근육질인 남자한테 패배하는 것이야말로 여자의 로망 아니겠어?
1600875019.english: … That’s a bit much. Haa, after all, isn’t being defeated by a strong, muscular man every woman’s dream?

1600875020.korean: 에이, 아니지! 푸근한 아저씨한테 안겨서 사랑받는 것이야말로 여자의 로망이라고!
1600875020.english: Nah, no way! Being held and loved by a warm, friendly older man is a woman's absolute dream!

1600875021.korean:
하긴, 바로 실전이 가능한데, 이런 만화는 애들 장난이지.
오빠, 우리 호피 무늬 보니까… 불끈거리는 것 같은데… 맞죠?
1600875021.english:
Come to think of it, since it's ready for real combat, this kind of comic is just child's play.
 Oppa, seeing this leopard print... I feel like I'm getting all worked up... right?

1600875022.korean: 하아~ 아쉽네 아쉬워… 여기 만화에서는 만화를 좋아하는 남주인공 집에서 여주인공이 만화를 보다 결국 그렇고 그렇게 된다는데…
1600875022.english: Ah~ What a shame... I heard that in this comic, the female protagonist watches comics at the male protagonist's house who likes them, and eventually, things turn out that way...

1600875023.korean: 오빠가 지금 여기서 안경만 딱 쓰면 주인공이랑 똑같을 것 같아요~
1600875023.english: I think if you just put on your glasses right now, you'd look exactly like the main character.

1600875024.korean: 사령관, 온 김에 우리랑 같이 데이트 해주지 않겠어?
1600875024.english: Commander, since you're here, won't you go on a date with us?

1600875025.korean: 맞아요~ 오빠랑 이것 저것 잔뜩 하면서 놀고 싶은데~ 안 돼요?
1600875025.english: That's right~ I want to play and do all sorts of things with you, oppa~ Is that not allowed?

1600875026.korean: 에이, 우리도 선을 지킬 줄 안다고. 같이 나가서 부스 음식 먹으러 갈까?
1600875026.english: Hey, come on, we know how to keep our distance. Shall we go out and get some food from the booth?

1600875027.korean: 가요 오빠, 얼른! 딱 만화에서 튀어 나온 주인공 같아요~
1600875027.english: Come on, oppa, hurry up! You look just like a character straight out of a cartoon~

1600875028.korean:
- 내 질문에 보련은 씩 웃으며 내게 안경을 씌운 후, 머리에 빗질을 했다.
얼마 지나지 않아, 만화에서 톡 튀어나온 듯한 안경 쓴 주인공 남학생 스타일의 내가 거울에 서 있었다.
1600875028.english:
Boryeon grinned at my question, put glasses on me, and combed my hair.
 Not long after, I stood in front of the mirror looking like a glasses-wearing male protagonist straight out of a comic book.

1600875029.korean: 이런 사령관도 색다르고 좋은데? 뭐랄까… 흐흣, 엉망진창 괴롭히고 싶은 충동이 마구마구 드는 걸?
1600875029.english: A commander like this is unique and nice, isn't he? How should I put it... Hehe, I feel an overwhelming urge to torment him to a pulp.

1600875030.korean: 헤헤~ 오빠, 얼른 가요 네? 얼른~
1600875030.english: Hehe~ Oppa, let's go quickly, okay? Quickly~

1600875031.korean: - 그렇게 나는 막간의 데이트를 즐긴 후, 학교 구획으로 돌아온 나는 시계를 보자 반나절이나 지나있다는 걸 깨달았다.
1600875031.english: After enjoying a brief date like that, I returned to the school district and looked at my watch, realizing that half a day had passed.

1600875032.korean: - 흐음… 알렉산드라가 말하기론, 옥상이라는 장소가 학생 시절의 로망이라던데…
1600875032.english: - Hmm... Alexandra said that rooftops are the dream place of student days...

1600875035.korean: - 옥상의 철문을 열고 들어가자, 그곳에는 낡은 책걸상에 걸터앉아 하늘을 바라보는… 칸이 있었다.
1600875035.english: When I opened the iron door on the rooftop and went inside, there was a man sitting on an old desk and chair, gazing at the sky...

1600875036.korean:
타, 탈론페더가… 추천해준 장소다.
생각보다 바람도 선선하기도 하고, 조용해서 나름… 좋은 곳이다.
1600875036.english:
Ta-Talonfeather... recommended this place.
 The breeze is cooler than I expected, and it's quiet, so it's a pretty good place in its own way.

1600875037.korean: - 칸은 잠시 부끄러운 듯 말을 잊지 못하다, 이내 주머니에서 무언가를 꺼내 내게 건네주었다.
1600875037.english: Khan was speechless for a moment, appearing shy, then took something out of his pocket and handed it to me.

1600875038.korean: …꽤 맛이 있더군. 같이 한 잔 마시지 않겠나?
1600875038.english: … It was quite tasty. Would you like to have a drink together?

1600875041.english: … Hey, does that give me goosebumps?

1600875042.korean: - 나는 대답 대신 칸이 걸터 앉은 의자에 옆에 자리잡은 후 빤히 그녀를 쳐다보았다.
1600875042.english: Instead of answering, I took a seat next to the chair Khan was sitting on and stared at her intently.

1600875044.korean:
- 내 대답에 칸은 부끄러워 하면서도 캔커피를 딴 후 내게 내밀었다.
기분 좋게 웃으며 마시던 중 칸이 내게 물었다.
1600875044.english:
At my answer, Khan was embarrassed but opened a can of coffee and handed it to me.
 While we were drinking and laughing happily, Khan asked me.

1600875045.korean: …비록 학교란 곳을 다녀본 적 없지만, 사령관과 학교를 다니면 이런 느낌이지 않을까 싶다.
1600875045.english: … Although I have never been to school, I imagine it would feel like going to school with the Commander.

1600875046.korean: 늘 장난기 있게 다가와주고, 스스럼 없이 대해주는 선배라…
1600875046.english: A senior who always approaches me playfully and treats me without hesitation…

1600875047.korean: 그럴 지도 모르겠지. 다른 호드 대원들과 다르게… 필요 이상으로 말을 하진 않는 성격이니까.
1600875047.english: Maybe so. Unlike the other Horde members… he’s not the type to talk more than necessary.

1600875048.english: … It would be very easy for you, Oppa. Even now...

1600875049.korean: - 잠시 머뭇거리던 칸은 내 앞머리를 넘긴 후, 이마에 살포시 입을 맞추었다.
1600875049.english: After hesitating for a moment, Khan brushed my bangs back and gently kissed my forehead.

1600875050.english: Didn't I melt my junior's heart...?

1600875051.korean: - 나는 대답 대신 칸을 품에 안았다. 칸은 내게 안긴 후 나를 올려다보며 미소를 지었다.
1600875051.english: Instead of answering, I held Khan in my arms. After being held, Khan looked up at me and smiled.

1600875052.korean: …고맙다 오빠. 조금은, 스스로에 대해… 용기가 생긴 것 같다.
1600875052.english: … Thank you, Oppa. I think I’ve gained a little bit of courage… about myself.

1600875053.korean: 아니, 오빠라는 단어만 쓸 뿐… 말투는 여전히 딱딱하군. 몇 번이고 혼자 연습했는데… 후우… 하아…
1600875053.english: No, you just use the word 'Oppa'... but your tone is still stiff. I practiced alone time and time again... Phew... Haa...

1600875056.korean: 휴, 휴지 여기 있다, 진정해라 사령관!!
1600875056.english: Phew, here's the tissue. Calm down, Commander!!

1600875057.korean:
- 나는 겨우 코를 틀어막은 후, 크게 숨을 내뱉었다.
이렇게나 사랑스러운 말을 칸의 입으로 듣게 될 줄은 정말 상상도 못했다.
1600875057.english:
I barely managed to cover my nose, then let out a deep breath.
 I never imagined I would hear such lovely words from Khan's lips.

1600875058.korean: - 그렇게 나는 막간의 데이트를 즐긴 후, 학교 구획으로 돌아온 나는 시계를 보자 반나절이나 지나있다는 걸 깨달았다.
1600875058.english: After enjoying a brief date like that, I returned to the school district and looked at my watch, realizing that half a day had passed.

1600875059.korean: - 문득 참 특이하다 싶었던 풍기위원회 간판이 떠올라 그곳으로 발걸음을 옮겼다.
1600875059.english: I suddenly remembered the sign for the Disciplinary Committee, which I thought was quite peculiar, so I headed there.

1600875060.korean: - 풍기위원회로 들어서자, 그곳에는 마리가 나를 보며, 상당히 부끄러운 모습으로 서 있었다.
1600875060.english: As I entered the Disciplinary Committee, Mari was standing there looking at me with a very embarrassed expression.

1600875061.english: Your Excellency the Commander, what brings you here…

1600875062.korean: 하하… 풍기위원회는 시티가드 측에서 '건전한 오르카 정신'을 함양하기 위해 만든 부입니다.
1600875062.english: Haha... The Discipline Committee is a department created by the City Guard to foster a 'sound Orca spirit'.

1600875063.korean: 사디어스 경정은 잠시 자리를 비운 상태입니다만… 불러드립니까?
1600875063.english: Superintendent Thaddeus is out for a moment, but... would you like me to call him?

1600875064.korean: 그렇군요… 각하, 여기까지 오셨는데 직접 커피를 대접해드려도 되겠습니까?
1600875064.english: I see... Your Excellency, since you have come all this way, may I personally treat you to coffee?

1600875065.korean: - 마리의 질문에 나는 고개를 내젓곤 의자를 끌어 앉았다.
1600875065.english: I shook my head at Marie's question and pulled up a chair to sit down.

1600875066.korean: …비록 교복을 입었어도, 상하 관계가 있어야 하지 않겠습니까?
1600875066.english: … Even though they are wearing school uniforms, shouldn't there be a hierarchy?

1600875068.korean: - 장난스레 마리에게 '선배'라 부르자, 그녀는 코피를 흘리며 쓰러졌다.
1600875068.english: When I jokingly called Marie 'senpai,' she collapsed with a nosebleed.

1600875069.korean: 서, 선배라고 불러주신 겁니까?! 하아… 흐읍… 흐읏…
1600875069.english: Did you... did you call me senior?! Haa... hmph... hmph...

1600875070.korean: 아무리 그래도 어찌 각하께 그런 호칭을…
1600875070.english: Even so, how could you use such a title for Your Excellency...

1600875071.korean: - 마리가 여전히 어색해하고, 조심스러워 하는 것 같아, 나는 먼저 한 발 나서주기로 했다.
1600875071.english: Mari still seemed awkward and cautious, so I decided to take the first step.

1600875072.korean: 저, 정말 그렇게… 불러도 되는 겁니까…?
1600875072.english: Um, is it really okay... to call you that...?

1600875073.korean: - 내 부드러운 존칭에 마리는 눈을 반짝거리며 내 손을 잡았다.
1600875073.english: Marie's eyes sparkled at my gentle honorifics, and she took my hand.

1600875074.korean: 후배… 뭐든 원하는 게 있나? 이 선배에게 말해라!!
1600875074.english: Junior… is there anything you want? Tell this senior!!

1600875076.korean: 그, 그렇다면… 서, 선배로써… 후배에게 이것저것 알려줄까 한다!!
1600875076.english: Th-then... as a senior... I thought I'd teach this and that to my junior!!

1600875077.korean: 그러니까… 그, 그… 가, 각개전투를 하는 방법이나… 그, 소총 파지법이나…
1600875077.english: So... uh, uh... the method of individual combat or... the rifle grip or...

1600875078.korean: 사, 사격 말이냐!! 좋다!!! 아주 자세하게 알려주도록 하지!!
1600875078.english: You mean, shooting?! Fine!!! I’ll teach you in great detail!!

1600875079.korean:
- 밖으로 나온 마리는 사격 부스에 간 뒤, 총을 잡아 자세를 취했다.
물론 기초 사격술에 대한 교육을 받았지만, 마리와의 분위기를 깨지 않기 위해 서투른 척 해주기로 했다.
1600875079.english:
Marie came out, went to the shooting booth, grabbed the gun, and took a stance.
 Of course, I received training in basic marksmanship, but I decided to pretend to be clumsy so as not to spoil the mood with Marie.

1600875080.korean: 호흡을 가다듬고, 개머리판을 단단히 어깨에 고정을 시켜준다.
1600875080.english: Take a deep breath and firmly secure the stock to your shoulder.

1600875081.korean: 자세가 올바르지 않군. 서, 선배가… 흐흠!! 가르쳐주도록 하겠다.
1600875081.english: Your posture isn't right. S-senpai... Hmm!! I'll teach you.

1600875082.korean: - 가까이 다가 온 마리는 뒤에서 나를 끌어안은 후, 견착하는 방법을 가르쳐 주며 손등을 꼭 쥐어주었다.
1600875082.english: Marie came close, hugged me from behind, taught me how to brace my shoulder, and squeezed the back of my hand tightly.

1600875083.korean: …처음 만났을 땐 풋풋했었는데. 이렇게 멋있는 사내가 될 줄은 몰랐어.
1600875083.english: … You were so fresh-faced when we first met. I never knew you would become such a cool guy.

1600875084.korean:
- 마리의 혼잣말과 함께 사격을 하자, 과녁이 픽, 쓰러졌다.
슬쩍, 마리에게도 총을 건네주자, 익숙한 자세로 사격 자세를 취한 그녀의 등 뒤에 다가가 꼭 안아주었다.
1600875084.english:
As Marie fired her shot while muttering to herself, the target fell over with a thud.
 I quietly handed the gun to Marie as well, and as she assumed a familiar shooting stance, I approached her from behind and gave her a tight hug.

1600875087.korean: 흐흠… 으흠… 선배의 등을 함부로 껴안다니, 영악한 후배로군.
1600875087.english: Hmm... Ahem... To hug your senior's back so carelessly, you're quite a cunning junior.

1600875088.english: Acting like a spoiled brat... that's cheating...

1600875089.korean: - 마리는 붉게 홍조를 띄더니, 이내 얼굴을 위로 들어, 내 입술에 귀엽게 뽀뽀했다.
1600875089.english: Marie blushed bright red, then lifted her face up and gave me a cute kiss on the lips.

1600875090.korean: 이런 버릇없는 후배를 길들이는 것도, 선배의 덕목이겠지.
1600875090.english: Taming such an ill-mannered junior is also a virtue of a senior, I suppose.

1600875091.korean: - 그렇게 나는 막간의 데이트를 즐긴 후, 학교 구획으로 돌아 온 나는 시계를 보자 반나절이 지나있었다.
1600875091.english: After enjoying a brief date like that, I returned to the school district and checked my watch to see that half a day had passed.

1600875092.korean: - 나는 대원들이 축제를 즐기는 모습을 뿌듯하게 지켜보았다.
1600875092.english: I watched proudly as the members enjoyed the festival.

1600875093.english: I saw a sign that said "Manga Club."

1600875095.english: Were you guys interested in comics?

1600875099.english: I guess I should just accept it.

1600875100.english: You two over there, do you have a favorite cartoon?

1600875102.korean: 성인 코너는 나중에 혼자 있을 때 보는 게 좋지 않을까?
1600875102.english: Wouldn't it be better to look at the adult section later when you're alone?

1600875105.korean: 아직은 한창 축제 중이니 나중에 몰래 만나자.
1600875105.english: The festival is still in full swing, so let's meet secretly later.

1600875106.korean: 너희 만화를 너무 많이 본 것 같아.
1600875106.english: I think I've watched too many cartoons.

1600875107.english: That kind of thing… please, later…

1600875113.english: I didn't know you would be here...

1600875117.english: To think you call me Oppa with a face like that…

1600875118.english: Then is Khan a taciturn junior?

1600875119.english: Then it will be difficult to capture.

1600875122.korean: 풍기위원회… 가 축제엔 어떤 명목으로 참여했을까 싶어서.
1600875122.english: I was wondering under what pretext the Disciplinary Committee participated in the festival.

1600875125.english: Oh, right, the chairman was Thaddeus.

1600875126.korean: 아냐. 괜찮아. 뭐 하나 싶어서 온 거야.
1600875126.english: No. It's fine. I just came because I was wondering what was going on.

1600875127.korean: 아냐 괜찮아. 그나저나 그렇게 입고서도 각하라 부르네?
1600875127.english: No, it's fine. Anyway, you're calling me 'Your Excellency' even dressed like that?

1600875128.english: I told you to call me senior sometime.

1600875130.english: Feel free to call Mari, too.

1600875131.korean: 정말이야. 오늘은 편하게 대원들이랑 있고 싶어서 그래.
1600875131.english: Really. I just want to relax and be with the team members today.

1600875132.english: Yes, Senior. Please feel free to call me that.

1600875133.korean: 잠시 둘이 데이트라도 해줄 수 있을까요?
1600875133.english: Could you two go on a date for a little while?

1600875134.english: There was a shooting booth nearby...

1600875135.korean: 마리 선배가 가르쳐 주실 수 있으세요?

1600875137.english: You're not on a date yet, Senior?

1600875138.english: You just need to get used to it.

1600875139.english: Could you stay like this for just a moment, Senior?

1600875141.english: I wondered if there was someone on the rooftop as well.

1600875142.english: I saw a sign that read "Discipline Committee."

1001500195.korean: Rising Up! 마리아 그레이스의 결의를 담은 보컬과 함께!
1001500195.english: Rising Up! With Maria Grace's determined vocals!

1001500198.korean: 모조품에서 벗어나, 만인의 태양이 될 수 있게.
1001500198.english: Break free from imitation and become the sun of all.

1001500201.english: Burn away the darkness and blaze up into the sky.

1001500196.korean:
스킨 선물 하면 개방
마리아 그레이스 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Joy"
1001500196.english:
If you gift a skin, it opens
