스킨 선물 하면 개방
마리아 그레이스 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Joy"
1001500199.english:
If you gift a skin, it opens
 Maria Grace Yong "Project Orca: Sunrise Stage Joy"

1001500202.english: Unlocked when you purchase BGM from the store

1100711547.korean:
스킨 모두 선물 하면 개방
장화 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Sprit and Soul"
바르그 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Flick and Sting"
마리아 그레이스 용 "프로젝트 오르카 : 선라이징 스테이지 Joy"
1100711547.english:
If you gift all skins, they will open.
 Janghwa Yong "Project Orca: Sunrise Stage Sprit and Soul"
 Varg Yong "Project Orca: Sunrise Stage Flick and Sting"
 Maria Grace Yong "Project Orca: Sunrise Stage Joy"

1001408277.korean: 오드리 자매 분들의 평가로는 경제성과&n예술성 모두를 챙긴 옷이라고 하던데…&n동의 하시나요?
1001408277.english: The Audrey sisters said that this dress strikes both affordability and artistry... Do you agree?

1001408278.korean: 욕망은 금기시 될수록,&n더 갈구하게 된다고 하더군요…&n자, 어서 이 금단의 선을 넘어&n절 엉망으로 만들어주세요.
1001408278.english: They say that the more a desire is forbidden, the more it is craved... Now, please cross this forbidden line and make a complete mess of everything.

1001408279.korean: 사령관님의 인자함에&n보답해드리기 위해 저도 용기를 낼 게요.&n어서, 그동안 하고 싶었던 모든 걸&n제게 시도 해보세요.&n그것이야말로 제가 바라는&n구원이자 행복일테니…
1001408279.english: I will summon my courage to repay your kindness, Commander. Please, try everything you have wanted to do on me. That is precisely the salvation and happiness I desire…

1001408280.korean: 금기를 넘는 것 만큼이나&n짜릿한 건 없다고 들었어요.&n사령관님께서도 가끔은 일탈을&n즐기고 싶으실 테니,&n오늘은 제가 그 욕구를&n해소시켜드릴게요.
1001408280.english: I’ve heard that there is nothing as thrilling as breaking taboos. Since you probably want to enjoy a little deviation from the norm every now and then, I will satisfy that desire for you today.

1001408281.korean: 백스테이지에서 일어난 일은&n비밀로 해 줘요.&n더 이상 예전 모습으로&n돌아갈 수 없는 제게 당신이라는&n낙원 저편을 허락해 주겠어요?
1001408281.english: Please keep what happened backstage a secret. Will you allow me, who can no longer return to my old self, the other side of the paradise that is you?

1001408282.korean: …사령관님?&n이젠 제 욕망도 보듬어주세요…&n온몸 가득 당신의 손길과 사랑을 주세요.&n부탁해요…♥
1001408282.english: … Commander? Please embrace my desires now, too… Please fill my whole body with your touch and love. I beg of you… ♥

1001408283.korean: 이런 서툰 손짓도 좋아요…&n사령관님이 표현하신&n가장 날 것의 욕망일 테니…
1001408283.english: I like even these clumsy gestures… because they must be the most raw desire the Commander has expressed…

1001408284.korean: 더는 못 참겠어요… 행복해요,&n가득…. 제 빈 곳을 전부 채워주세요…
1001408284.english: I can't stand it anymore… I am so happy… Please fill this empty space of mine…

1001408285.korean: 여전히 사랑하고 있어요.&n사령관님께서 해주시는 그 어떤 것도&n제게 있어 포상이나 다름없어요…♥
1001408285.english: I still love you. Everything you do for me, Commander, is practically a reward… ♥

1000710056.korean: 그동안 사령관님과 함께 하며, 원초적인 욕망에 대해 고민했어요. 따뜻한 품을 내어주고 구원의 손길을 마다 않는 소중한 당신을 위해서… 너무도 과분한 애정을 받고 있는 제가 조금이나마 힘이 될 수 있는 일은 없을까 하고요. 사랑하는 당신… 하나뿐인 나의 남자… 멸망 전 인간 님들의 욕망을 연구해 재현한 이 의상으로 제 몸과 마음에 가득 새겨진 사령관님의 욕망을 런웨이 위에서 뽐내겠어요. 모두가 볼 수 있도록… 사랑의 증거를 더욱 짙게 남겨주세요.
1000710056.english: While spending time with you, Commander, I have contemplated primal desires. For you, my precious one, who offers a warm embrace and never refuses a helping hand of salvation… I wondered if there was anything I, receiving such undeserved affection, could do to be of even the slightest help. My beloved… my one and only man… With this outfit, recreated through research into the desires of pre-apocalyptic humans, I will showcase on the runway the desires of you, Commander, deeply etched into my body and heart. Please leave an even deeper mark of your love so that everyone can see it.

1001408339.korean: 이 옷을 입고 갔더니,&n제자들이 옛날 추억에 젖더군.&n그때의 나는… 하핫,&n제자들이 제일 무서워하던 교관이었지.&n설마… 자네 지금 못 믿는 겐가?
1001408339.english: When I went there wearing this outfit, the students got lost in old memories. Back then, I was… Haha, the instructor the students feared the most. Surely… you don't mean to say you don't believe me?

1001408340.korean: 예전 이 옷을 입었을 때는 입버릇처럼&n‘본 교관’이라는 호칭을 사용했다네.&n이를 테면… 본 교관은 제자들에게 실망했다…&n라거나? 그, 그렇다고 내 특기가 실망은 아니었네.&n난 늘 제자들을 격려하였고 응원하였다네!
1001408340.english: Back when I wore this outfit, I habitually used the title 'Instructor Bon.' For instance... something like, 'Instructor Bon is disappointed in his students'... or something? Th-that doesn't mean my specialty was disappointment. I always encouraged and cheered on my students!

1001408341.korean: 이 제복을 입었다는 것은&n그 시절의 나로 돌아가겠다는 걸세.&n피도 눈물도 없는 아주 냉정한 …응?&n배가 고프다고? 예끼 이 사람아!&n배고프니 밥 부터 먹고 하자&n왜 얘길 안 한 게야?
1001408341.english: Wearing this uniform means I’m returning to the me of those days. A very cold-hearted… huh? You’re hungry? Hey, man! Are you hungry? Let’s eat first. Why didn’t you tell me?

1001408342.korean: …이 옷을 입었을 때의 난&n죽음을 두려워하지 않았다네.&n그렇기에 이 옷을 입고&n전사한 피톤들도 많았지.&n하지만 지금의 내겐 소중한 것들이 있기에&n더 이상 무모하게 행동하지 않을 걸세!
1001408342.english: … When I wore this garment, I feared no death. That is why many Pythons perished while wearing it. But now that I have things precious to me, I will no longer act recklessly!

1001408343.korean: 전투가 끝나고 마시는 술만큼&n위안과 휴식을 얻는 건 없을테지…&n자네도 한 잔 하겠나?&n후훗, 편하게 받아주게.&n자네의 조금 풀어진 모습도&n보고 싶으니 말일세…
1001408343.english: There is nothing that brings as much comfort and rest as a drink after a battle… Would you like a drink too? Hehe, feel free to accept. I’d like to see you a little more relaxed, you know…

1001408344.korean: …자네, 정말 이런 내가 좋은 겐가?&n끄응… 어쩔 수 없군.&n대신, 이 옷을 입고&n내가 침대에서 뒹군 건…&n제자들한테 비밀로 해주게나…&n내 위엄을 위해서라도… 흐흠…
1001408344.english: … Do you really like me like this? Hmph… I guess it can’t be helped. But, please keep it a secret from my disciples that I rolled around in bed wearing these clothes… For the sake of my dignity… Hmm…

1001408345.korean: 자네,&n검은 독사한테 물리면&n어떻게 되는지 알고 싶나?
1001408345.english: Do you want to know what happens if you get bitten by a black viper?

1001408346.korean: 본 교관이 말하겠네.&n어서 옷을 벗고!&n…이 성난 교관을 진득히… 끌어 안아…&n오랜 시간 달래주게나…♥
1001408346.english: Let me speak. Hurry up and take off your clothes! ...Hold this angry instructor tight... and soothe him for a long time... ♥

1001408347.korean: 개인 특훈이 필요하다면,&n내 언제든지 가르쳐주도록 하지.&n응? 자네가 더 능숙하다고?&n그, 그럴 리가… 꺄앗…!&n아, 알았네… 그만, 그만하게… 꺄앗…♥
1001408347.english: If you need private training, I’ll teach you anytime. Huh? You mean you’re more skilled? Th-that can’t be… Kyaa…! Ah, alright… Stop, stop… Kyaa… ♥

1000710062.korean: 제자들은 내가 엄하게 대했던 시절이 떠올라 겁을 먹은 모양인데… 오히려 자네는 그런 내가 좋기라도 하단 겐가? 좋아, 하지만 실전을 위해서라도 엄히 가르침을 줄 걸세. 자네의 치기를 오늘, 이 검은 독사가 철저하게 길들여주도록 하겠네. 침대로 가서 대기 준비를 하고 있게나. 그 시절의 나를 온몸으로 똑똑히 받아주게…♥
1000710062.english: My disciples seem frightened, reminded of the days when I treated them strictly… Do you actually like me like this? Fine, but for the sake of the actual test, I will teach you a rigorous lesson. Today, this black viper will thoroughly tame your recklessness. Go to your bed and get ready. Accept the me of those days with your whole body… ♥

1001500207.korean: 레모네이드 베타의 슬픔은 장엄한 심연과 같습니다.
1001500207.english: Lemonade Beta's sorrow is like a majestic abyss.

1001500210.korean: 진노한 레모네이드 감마를 당신은 견딜 수 있으십니까?
1001500210.english: Can you endure Rage Lemonade Gamma?

1001500213.korean: 지식의 탐욕에 빠져 바이오로이드를 져버린 레모네이드의 이야기.
1001500213.english: The story of Lemonade, who abandoned the bioroids after falling into a greed for knowledge.

1001500205.english: Unlocked when you purchase BGM from the store

1001500208.english: Unlocked when you purchase BGM from the store

1001500211.english: Unlocked when you purchase BGM from the store

1001500214.english: Unlocked when you purchase BGM from the store

1001408392.korean: 과거 바니 시절의 나로 돌아간&n난 나약하기 그지 없는 필멸자…&n어서 역바니의 힘을 되찾아야 해…&n이러다간 오르카에서 그저&n지나가던 바니걸 1이 되어버린다구…!
1001408392.english: Returning to my past self from my bunny days, I am an incredibly weak mortal… I must regain the power of the Reverse Bunny immediately… At this rate, I’ll end up as just another passing bunny girl in Orca…!

1001408393.korean: 역바니로 돌아가는 방법을 찾기 위해&n명상과 수행을 시도한 결과…&n내 몸을 봉인 시킨&n이 카드를 사용해야 한다고&n역바니의 신이 말씀하셨다...!
1001408393.english: As a result of attempting meditation and training to find a way back to being a Reverse Bunny… the God of the Reverse Bunny told me that I must use this card that sealed my body...!

1001408394.korean: 크윽... 하다 못해, 이젠 마법소녀 따위가&n이 니바에게 영입 제안을 할 줄이야…&n나는 역바니의 전심!&n하등한 마법소녀와의 화해 따윈 필요 없다…&n히익?! 어디서 전기톱 소리가…?!
1001408394.english: Ugh... To think a mere magical girl would offer Niba a recruitment deal... I am the whole heart of the Reverse Bunny! I have no need for reconciliation with an inferior magical girl... Eek?! Where is that chainsaw sound coming from...?!

1001408395.korean: 내가 바니걸일 때의 이야기라…&n그 당시 나약했던 난 정말 잔인한 일들을 당했지.&n특히 내가 차지 했던 모든 당근을 빼앗긴 사건은…&n정말 정말 잔인한 일이 아닐 수 없었다.&n응? 뭐야 바니 대왕 씨.&n중요한 이야기인데! 그 맥 빠진 표정은…
1001408395.english: A story from when I was a bunny girl… Back then, being so weak, I went through some truly cruel things. Especially the incident where they took away all the carrots I had claimed… it was truly, truly cruel. Huh? What is it, King Bunny? That’s an important story! That dejected look on your face…

1001408396.korean: 정말 내가 다시 역바니로&n돌아가지 않아도 좋은 거야?&n헛?! 설마 이것은 뚜둥! 효과음,&n괄호 열고 놀라며 괄호 닫고&n사랑으로 인한 역바니의 각성 방법?&n이것이 어쩌면 유일한 방법 일지도…&n좋아~ 바니 대왕 씨!&n어서 빨리 나랑 그윽한 전후를 나누자고!
1001408396.english: Are you really sure I don't have to go back to being a Reverse Bunny? Huh?! Could it be... *Doo-dung!* sound effect, *Open parenthesis* in surprise, *Close parenthesis* the method of awakening a Reverse Bunny through love? This might be the only way... Alright~ King Bunny! Hurry up and let's share a deep moment together!

1001408397.korean: 아아~ 이런 이런…&n카드의 봉인을 모두 풀어버리다니…&n이걸 보이고 싶진 않았는데…&n똑똑히 봐 둬 바니 대왕 씨!&n그리고… 아무한테도 말하지 마!&n해방… 역바니! …꺄아아아악?!&n바니 대왕 씨의 옥수수 칼리버가…?!
1001408397.english: Ahhh~ Oh dear... To think I broke all the card seals... I didn't want to show this... Watch closely, King Bunny! And... don't tell anyone! Release... Reverse Bunny! ... Kyaaaah?! King Bunny's Corn Caliber...?!

1001408398.korean: 꺄아아아앗?!&n이 변태 바니 대왕 씨!&n자비는 없다,&n하이쿠를 읊어랏!
1001408398.english: Kyaaaah?! You perverted King Bunny! There is no mercy, recite a haiku!

1001408399.korean: 니히히… 바니 대왕 씨…&n날 엉망진창으로 만들 생각인 거지…?&n메리 커미션처럼…♥
1001408399.english: Nihihi… King Bunny… You’re planning to make a complete mess of me, aren’t you…? Just like a Merry commission… ♥

1001408400.korean: 힘이 약해진 바니 살해자 니바를&n바니 대왕 씨는 잔인하게 유린했다.&n일단은 키스를… 아니, 아니지 다시!&n…니바의 무장을 해제한 뒤,&n바니 대왕 씨는 허리춤에서&n사악한 옥수수 칼리버를 뽑아…&n니히히… 그 다음은 사령관 씨가 마무리… 해줄래?
1001408400.english: Great King Bunny brutally violated the weakened Bunny Slayer Niva. First, a kiss… No, no, not again!… After disarming Niva, Great King Bunny drew the evil Corn Caliber from his waist… Nihihi… Next, Commander, will you… finish it off?

1000710067.korean: 그 옛날 바니걸은 내게 있어 수치나 다름없었다. 하지만 바니 대왕 씨의 러브는 바니의 저주에서 날 구원해주었지! 이로써 나는 바니 퀸이요, 바니의 초월자가 되었다…! …요약하자면, 이런 내 모습까지 좋아해줘서 고맙다고. 니히히… 사령관 씨…? 오늘은 이 니바의 서로다른 두 가지 매력을 잔뜩 맛 볼 각오, 단단히 하는 게 좋을 거야!
1000710067.english: Back in the day, being a bunny girl was nothing short of a disgrace to me. But King Bunny's love saved me from the bunny curse! With this, I have become the Bunny Queen and the transcendent being of the bunny…! …To sum it up, thank you for loving even me like this. Nihaha… Commander…? You’d better brace yourselves for fully savoring the two distinct charms of this Niba today!

1001408445.korean: 지금 이 복장은 예전 무라사키 오의를 수련하며&n단련을 일삼던 시절을 재현한 의상이옵니다.&n촛대가 모두 녹기 전 혹여 불이 꺼지게 된다면…&n새로운 촛대를 가져와&n다시 처음부터 수련을 시작해야 하지요…
1001408445.english: This attire is a recreation of the days when I devoted myself to training and practicing the Murasaki Secret Techniques. If the flame were to go out before the candlesticks completely melted… I would have to bring in new candlesticks and start my training all over again from the beginning…

1001408446.korean: 최근 다시 조우하게 된 스승님을 통해 쿠노이치에 관한&n고대서를 받아 오랜만에 새로이 읽게 되었사옵니다.&n쿠노이치의 전통적인 수행 중 하나로 알려진&n밀랍 왁스 처벌은… 이 촛대가 모두 녹아 없어질 때까지&n견뎌내야만 하는 고난으로써, 진정한 쿠노이치로&n거듭나기 위해 꼭 필요한 인내력, 정신력, 균형감각,&n기본 체력을 단련하기 위한 수행으로&n지금까지 전해 내려지고 있사옵니다.
1001408446.english: I received an ancient text about the Kunoichi through a master I recently reconnected with, and I have read it anew for the first time in a long while. The beeswax punishment, known as one of the traditional trainings of the Kunoichi, is a hardship that must be endured until this candlestick completely melts away; it has been passed down to this day as a training to cultivate the endurance, mental strength, sense of balance, and basic physical strength that are essential for being reborn as a true Kunoichi.

1001408447.korean: 지방으로 무게를 견디는 것이 아닌…&n함몰된 근육을 사용해야 하는 것이 훈련의 핵심이기에,&n하츠나와 스미레는 감당하기 힘든 수련이라는 것을&n잊지 마시옵소서.&n주공께서는 부디 이 소첩으로 만족해주시길 간청하나이다.
1001408447.english: Please do not forget that the core of this training lies in using sunken muscles rather than bearing the weight with fat, and that this is a difficult discipline for Hatsuna and Sumire to endure. I humbly beg Your Lord to be satisfied with this humble servant.

1001408448.korean: 아프니까 청춘이란 말이 있사옵니다…&n후훗, 주공… 청춘 소녀인&n이 소첩을 어여삐 여겨주시옵소서.
1001408448.english: There is a saying that youth is painful... Hehe, my lord... Please look upon this humble servant, a young girl of youth.

1001408449.korean: 이 뜨거운 촛농보다 더 뜨거운 것을&n소첩은 잘 알고 있사옵니다.&n주공께선 괘념치 마시고 흠뻑…&n제게 떨어뜨려 주시옵소서…♥
1001408449.english: I, your humble servant, know well of something hotter than this scorching candle wax. My Lord, please do not hesitate, but drench yourself… and let it fall upon me… ♥

1001408450.korean: …주공, 이 단련에는…&n여러 종류의 고문을 견디기 위한&n장비를 사용하고 있사옵니다.&n그쪽을 한 번 잡아당겨 보겠사옵니까?
1001408450.english: … My Lord, for this training… we are using equipment designed to withstand various kinds of torture. Would you like to try pulling on that?

1001408451.english: Lord… you must not touch this!

1001408452.korean: 더… 조금 더, 주공…&n아직 소첩은 이보다 더 한 것을&n받아낼 자신이 있사옵니다…
1001408452.english: More… a little more, My Lord… I am still confident that I can endure even more than this…

1001408453.korean: 새로운 단련법에 눈을 뜨셨사옵니까?&n원하시오면 이보다 더 어려운 단련법을&n소첩이 자세히 알려드리겠사옵니다.&n어서 이리 오시옵소서.
1001408453.english: Have you awakened to a new method of training? If you wish, I, your humble servant, will explain in detail a training method even more difficult than this. Please come here at this moment.

1000710072.korean: 비키니란 의상을 생각하다, 문득 이 복장이 떠올랐지요. 주공을 섬기면서도, 어느 정도의 섹시함과… 단련의 의지까지 보여드릴 수 있는 복장이지요. 소첩의 결의를 주공께서 이리 받아 주실 줄이야… 오늘 밤, 소첩의 결의를 주공께서 잔뜩 연마해주시길 삼가 바라옵니다…♥
1000710072.english: As I thought of a bikini, this attire suddenly came to mind. It is an outfit that allows me to serve You, My Lord, while also demonstrating a certain degree of sexiness… and even my resolve to train. To think You would accept my resolve in this way… I humbly beg You to thoroughly refine my determination tonight… ♥

1001408454.korean: 지금 이 복장은 예전 무라사키 오의를 수련하며&n단련을 일삼던 시절을 재현한 의상이옵니다.&n촛대가 모두 녹기 전 혹여 불이 꺼지게 된다면…&n새로운 촛대를 가져와&n다시 처음부터 수련을 시작해야 하지요…
1001408454.english: This attire is a recreation of the days when I devoted myself to training and practicing the Murasaki Secret Techniques. If the flame were to go out before the candlesticks completely melted… I would have to bring in new candlesticks and start my training all over again from the beginning…

1001408455.korean: 최근 다시 조우하게 된 스승님을 통해 쿠노이치에 관한&n고대서를 받아 오랜만에 새로이 읽게 되었사옵니다.&n쿠노이치의 전통적인 수행 중 하나로 알려진&n밀랍 왁스 처벌은… 이 촛대가 모두 녹아 없어질 때까지&n견뎌내야만 하는 고난으로써, 진정한 쿠노이치로&n거듭나기 위해 꼭 필요한 인내력, 정신력, 균형감각,&n기본 체력을 단련하기 위한 수행으로&n지금까지 전해 내려지고 있사옵니다.
1001408455.english: I received an ancient text about the Kunoichi through a master I recently reconnected with, and I have read it anew for the first time in a long while. The beeswax punishment, known as one of the traditional trainings of the Kunoichi, is a hardship that must be endured until this candlestick completely melts away; it has been passed down to this day as a training to cultivate the endurance, mental strength, sense of balance, and basic physical strength that are essential for being reborn as a true Kunoichi.

1001408456.korean: 지방으로 무게를 견디는 것이 아닌…&n함몰된 근육을 사용해야 하는 것이 훈련의 핵심이기에,&n하츠나와 스미레는 감당하기 힘든 수련이라는 것을&n잊지 마시옵소서.&n주공께서는 부디 이 소첩으로 만족해주시길 간청하나이다.
1001408456.english: Please do not forget that the core of this training lies in using sunken muscles rather than bearing the weight with fat, and that this is a difficult discipline for Hatsuna and Sumire to endure. I humbly beg Your Lord to be satisfied with this humble servant.

1001408457.korean: 아프니까 청춘이란 말이 있사옵니다…&n후훗, 주공… 청춘 소녀인&n이 소첩을 어여삐 여겨주시옵소서.
1001408457.english: There is a saying that youth is painful... Hehe, my lord... Please look upon this humble servant, a young girl of youth.

1001408458.english: I, your humble servant, know well of something hotter than this scorching candle wax. My Lord, please do not hesitate, but drench yourself… and let it fall upon me… ♥

1001408459.korean: …주공, 이 단련에는…&n여러 종류의 고문을 견디기 위한&n장비를 사용하고 있사옵니다.&n그쪽을 한 번 잡아당겨 보겠사옵니까?
1001408459.english: … My Lord, for this training… we are using equipment designed to withstand various kinds of torture. Would you like to try pulling on that?

1001408460.english: Lord… you must not touch this!

1001408461.korean: 더… 조금 더, 주공…&n아직 소첩은 이보다 더 한 것을&n받아낼 자신이 있사옵니다…
1001408461.english: More… a little more, My Lord… I am still confident that I can endure even more than this…

1001408462.korean: 새로운 단련법에 눈을 뜨셨사옵니까?&n원하시오면 이보다 더 어려운 단련법을&n소첩이 자세히 알려드리겠사옵니다.&n어서 이리 오시옵소서.
1001408462.english: Have you awakened to a new method of training? If you wish, I, your humble servant, will explain in detail a training method even more difficult than this. Please come here at this moment.

1000710073.korean: 비키니란 의상을 생각하다, 문득 이 복장이 떠올랐지요. 주공을 섬기면서도, 어느 정도의 섹시함과… 단련의 의지까지 보여드릴 수 있는 복장이지요. 소첩의 결의를 주공께서 이리 받아 주실 줄이야… 오늘 밤, 소첩의 결의를 주공께서 잔뜩 연마해주시길 삼가 바라옵니다…♥
1000710073.english: As I thought of a bikini, this attire suddenly came to mind. It is an outfit that allows me to serve You, My Lord, while also demonstrating a certain degree of sexiness… and even my resolve to train. To think You would accept my resolve in this way… I humbly beg You to thoroughly refine my determination tonight… ♥

1001408507.korean: 요즘 소완 님께서 저를 매니저로&n내세운 기간 한정 햄버거를 구내식당에서&n판매해보고 싶다는 제안을 주셔서…&n햄버거 브랜드를 런칭했습니다.&n베타 님도 극찬하신 특제 레시피&n참치버거를 한 입 드셔보시겠습니까?
1001408507.english: Recently, Sowan suggested that we try selling a limited-edition hamburger in the cafeteria, featuring me as the manager... so we have launched a hamburger brand. Would you like to try a bite of our special recipe tuna burger, which even Beta raved about?

1001408508.korean: 매니저 업무를 하고 나서부턴&n이상하게 살이 더 찌는 것 같습니다.&n버거에 사용되는 식재료들이…&n너무 맛있어서… 조금씩만 먹었는데도…&n대령님께 체중으로 혼나는 건 아닐까 싶습니다.
1001408508.english: Since I started working as a manager, I strangely seem to be gaining more weight. The ingredients used in the burgers are so delicious... even though I only ate small amounts... I'm worried that I might get scolded by the Colonel for my weight.

1001408509.korean: 오픈 기념 마법소녀 콜라보&n사은품으로 주문량이 많아졌습니다…&n팬텀 씨랑 레이스 씨가 주문할 때&n마법소녀 시그니처 댄스를 추던데…&n낯뜨거웠습니다…
1001408509.english: Order volume increased due to the Magical Girl collaboration free gifts celebrating the opening… When Mr. Phantom and Ms. Lace were placing their orders, they were doing the Magical Girl signature dance… It was embarrassing…

1001408510.korean: 미식회 멤버 분들과&n맛보고 싶은 사이드 메뉴를 추가하며&n먹는 걸 즐기다 보니…&n몸무게가 갈수록 불어나는 것 같습니다.&n이런 모습… 사령관님께선 안 좋아하시겠죠?
1001408510.english: As I enjoy eating with the gourmet club members, adding side dishes I want to try... it seems my weight keeps increasing. The Commander wouldn't like seeing me like this, would he?

1001408511.korean: 롤러 스케이트를 타며 주문을 받다 보니…&n이동 중 음식을 엎어&n엉망이 되는 경우도 있습니다.&n아앗?! 사령관님…&n저는 더블 패티 햄버거가 아니에요…!!
1001408511.english: Since I take orders while roller skating… there are times when I spill food while moving and make a mess. Ah?! Commander… I’m not a double-patty burger…!!

1001408512.korean: 사령관님을 위한&n특별 사은품 말씀입니까?&n…햄버거 쿠폰 10장을 모아오면…&n사령관님을 닮은 피규어를 사은품으로&n가내 제조해 전달 드리겠습니다.
1001408512.english: Are you referring to a special gift for the Commander? ... If you collect 10 hamburger coupons... we will manufacture a figure resembling the Commander at home and deliver it to you as a gift.

1001408513.english: … You must provide the coupon to receive the free gift, Commander.

1001408514.korean: 추가 주문 하시겠습니까?&n양이 많을 것 같은데…&n사령관님의 넘치는 식욕이…&n꼭 필요합니다…♥
1001408514.english: Would you like to order more? It looks like a lot... Commander, your overflowing appetite... is absolutely necessary... ♥

1001408515.korean: 사령관님께서 자주 찾아와&n햄버거를 드시니까 소완님께서&n걱정이 많으세요.&n…사실 사령관님께서 주문할 땐&n햄버거보단… 저만… 드시지만…&n아, 아닙니다!
1001408515.english: Sowan is very worried because the Commander comes by often to eat hamburgers. ...Actually, when the Commander orders, rather than the hamburgers... he only eats... me... Ah, never mind!

1000710078.korean: 이번에도 주문하시겠습니까? …섹시 밴시 세트는 없습니다. …정말 이렇게까지 나오신다면 어쩔 수 없군요. 사령관님이 시키신 밴시 세트에는 사.은.품도 있는데… 10개월 후에 드리겠습니다. 앞으로도 배고프실 때마다 찾아주세요, 사령관님...♥
1000710078.english: Would you like to order again? … We do not have the Sexy Banshee Set. … If you really go this far, I suppose I have no choice. The Banshee Set you ordered actually comes with a free gift… I will give it to you in 10 months. Please keep coming back whenever you are hungry, Commander...♥

1001500216.english: Like the sun scorching the earth.

1001500219.english: So that I can become the sun of all.

1001500222.korean: 하얀 눈 위에 떨어지는 슬픔 한 자국.
1001500222.english: A single mark of sadness falling on the white snow.

1001500217.english: Unlocked when you purchase BGM from the store

1001500220.english: Unlocked when you purchase BGM from the store

1001500223.english: Unlocked when you purchase BGM from the store

1001408516.korean: 이 신형 슈트, 기존 슈트보다 훨씬 더 좋은걸?&n듣기론 기계제국 놈들과 최종 결전을 앞두고&n보급 받기로 했던 신형 슈트라 하더라고.
1001408516.english: This new suit is much better than the old one, isn't it? I heard it's the new suit we were supposed to receive ahead of the final battle with the Machine Empire.

1001408517.korean: 확실히 좋아,&n땀 흡수도 좋고 활동하는데도 편해,&n가볍기까지 하고.&n그런데 대체 왜 이것만 입으면 시티가드가&n날 자꾸 단속하려는 건지 모르겠어.
1001408517.english: It's definitely good, it absorbs sweat well, is comfortable to move around in, and is even lightweight. But I don't understand why the City Guard keeps trying to crack down on me whenever I wear this.

1001408518.korean: 이 얼티메이트 슈트를 입었다는 건&n큰 책임을 져야 할 일이 닥쳤다는 거야.&n친우들을 위해서라도,&n절대 난 놈들에게 무릎 꿇지 않을 거라고!
1001408518.english: Putting on this Ultimate Suit means I’m facing a huge responsibility. For the sake of my friends, I will never kneel before those bastards!

1001408519.korean: 자, 어때? 스톰~ 킥! 이것 봐!&n더 강해진 느낌이야.&n지휘관, 갑자기 왜 다리를 배배 꼬고 있어…?
1001408519.english: So, how's that? Storm~ Kick! Look at this! I feel stronger. Commander, why are you suddenly twisting your legs...?

1001408520.korean: 이 슈트를 입을 때마다&n지휘관이 뜨거운 시선으로&n날 바라 보는 게 부담스러워.&n무, 물론 날 응원해주려는 거 알지만…&n나도 모르게 야릇한 기분이 드는 걸?
1001408520.english: It’s overwhelming how the Commander looks at me with such intense eyes every time I wear this suit. Th-of course, I know he’s trying to cheer me on, but… I can’t help but feel a strange sensation.

1001408521.korean: 해머 쿨러가 터져버렸어,&n서비스 모드가 뭔가 해서 눌렀을 뿐인데…&n으앗?! 지휘관 진정해, 제발…&n이곳저곳 더듬으면 이상해져!
1001408521.english: The Hammer Cooler exploded. I just pressed it wondering what Service Mode was... Agh?! Commander, calm down, please... It gets weird if you grope around!

1001408522.korean: 하핫… 이 슈트는 건들지 마.&n어떤 기능이 있는 지 나도 잘 모른다고.
1001408522.english: Haha... Don't touch this suit. I don't really know what functions it has, either.

1001408523.english: … Commander? I’d like you to help me find the hidden features in the suit.

1001408524.korean: 지구의 미래를 지키기 위해서라도&n2세대 클로버를 당신과 같이 만들어야겠어…
1001408524.english: If only to protect the future of the Earth, I have to create a second-generation Clover with you…

1000710079.korean: 이 슈트를 입은 뒤로, 계속 지휘관을 의식하게 돼 버렸어. 더 멋지고 날렵해진 내게서 눈을 떼지 말아줬으면 하는 느낌? 하하… 이렇게 지휘관한테 정신까지 함락된 기분도 나쁘지 않은데? 사랑에 패배한 히어로의 처분을 당신한테 맡기도록 할게.
1000710079.english: Ever since I put on this suit, I’ve found myself constantly conscious of the Commander. It’s like I want you not to take your eyes off me, now that I’ve become even cooler and more agile? Haha... It’s not so bad to have my mind completely conquered by the Commander like this, is it? I’ll leave the disposition of this hero defeated in love to you.

1001408525.english: Shall we play with Wistar? Finding lost limbs…

1001408526.korean: 리디… 위스타 많이 챙겨줬어…&n리디 시끄러…&n리디… 착해.
1001408526.english: Ridi… You took good care of Wistar… Ridi is noisy… Ridi… You’re nice.

1001408527.korean: 창 든 아줌마 음식… 먹을래.&n위험해?&n괜찮아… 위스타, 잘 먹어.
1001408527.english: The lady with the spear... food... do you want to eat? Is it dangerous? It's fine... Wistar, enjoy the meal.

1001408528.korean: 위스타, 몸 낫는 모습 보면…&n다 칭찬 했어.&n사령관도 위스타 낫는 모습 보여 줘?
1001408528.english: Wista, seeing her recover... everyone praised her. Should the Commander show Wista recovering too?

1001408529.korean: 사령관 위스타 볼 때마다, 슬퍼해…&n혼자 상처 안 낼게.&n위스타 혼내지 마.
1001408529.english: Every time I see Commander Wista, I feel sad… I won’t hurt myself alone. Don’t scold Wista.

1001408530.korean: 사령관… 위스타 좋아해?&n아끼는 거 줘…&n위스타 안 잃어 버릴게.
1001408530.english: Commander… Do you like Wistar? Give me what you cherish… I won’t lose Wistar.

1001408532.korean: 위스타 알아…&n남자, 여자… 흔들 흔들…&n위스타 몸 안 예뻐… 좋아?
1001408532.english: Do you know Wistar… Men, women… Shaking, shaking… Wistar’s body isn’t pretty… Do you like it?

1001408533.korean: 위스타 아야…&n하는 거 하면 사령관 표정…&n무서워…&n웅, 사령관 싫어하는 거… 안 해…
1001408533.english: Wista Aya… If I do that, the Commander’s expression… is scary… Mm, I won’t… do… things the Commander hates…

1001408535.korean: 오르카 친구들 몸… 예뻐…&n위스타 몸… 이상해.&n…그래도 사령관&n예쁘다 해서 위스타 좋아.
1001408535.english: Orca's friends' bodies... are pretty... Wistar's body... is weird.... Still, I like Wistar because the Commander said she's pretty.

1001408536.korean: 위스타, 사령관 몸 좋아해.&n갖고 싶어.&n…무서워?&n우우, 좋은 말 몰라… 미… 안…
1001408536.english: Wistar, I like the Commander's body. I want it. ...Are you scared? Ugh, I don't know how to say nice things... Sorry...

1001408537.english: Commander, playing doctor? Pressing my chest feels good...

1001408538.korean: 할로윈…&n죽은 사람 함께 노는 날.&n위스타 동생들… 언제와?
1001408538.english: Halloween… a day to play with the dead. Wistar siblings… when are you coming?

1001408539.korean: 사령관 좋아하는 모습…&n위스타 할 수 있어…
1001408539.english: The sight of the commander liking it… Wistar can do it…

1001408540.korean: 예뻐?&n위스타 예쁘다 해줘…&n위스타 인형…&n위스타는 사령관 거…
1001408540.english: Is she pretty? Tell me Wistar is pretty... Wistar doll... Wistar is the Commander's...

1001408541.korean: 백조. 위스타 백조. 폴짝 폴짝,&n사령관 배 위에… 앉아…
1001408541.english: Swan. Wistar Swan. Hopping, hopping, sitting… on the Commander’s stomach…

1001408542.korean: 실 세게 당겨… 위험해도… 위스타 그게 좋아.
1001408542.english: Pull the thread hard... even if it's dangerous... Wistar, that's the best.

1001408543.korean: 위스타,&n가슴… 계속 꾸욱해. 몸 뜨거워.&n사령관, 위스타, 인형이야.&n안 움직여… 많이 안아줘.
1001408543.english: Wistar, my chest... keep pressing. My body is hot. Commander, Wistar, I'm a doll. I won't move... please hug me tight.

1001408545.korean: 위스타 몸&n찌걱찌걱… 삐걱삐걱…&n응? 왜 얼굴 붉혀?
1001408545.english: Wistar's body squeak squeak… creak creak… huh? Why are you blushing?

1001408546.korean: 위스타 다른 인형 놀이 할래.&n마트… 료시카?&n사령관, 시작해.&n얼른 작은 위스타 만들어 줘.
1001408546.english: "Wista, I want to play with a different doll." "Mart... Ryoshika?" "Commander, start." "Hurry up and make a small Wistar."

1000710080.korean: 사령관이 준 선물… 고마워. 위스타… 사령관 뭐 주지? 으음… 그냥 위스타 줄게. 잘… 써줘.
1000710080.english: The gift the Commander gave me… Thank you. Wistar… What should I give you, Commander? Hmm… I’ll just give you Wistar. Please… make good use of it.

1000710081.korean: 위스타 보는 사령관… 가슴 꾸욱…해? 알았어. 오늘 위스타, 사령관 인형… 위스타 안아줘. 사령관… 사랑해… 이 말 맞아? 사랑해… 사랑해… 위스타… 사령관 사랑해.
1000710081.english: Commander looking at Wistar… squeeze her chest… okay? Got it. Today, Wistar, Commander doll… Wistar, hug her. Commander… I love you… Is that right? I love you… I love you… Wistar… Commander, I love you.

1001408547.korean: 스틸라인의 단순무식한 이미지 대신,&n지성 있는 도회적인 이미지 변신을 위해&n시범적으로 사원제도를 도입해보기로 했어.&n사령관… 아니 팀장님? 어때… 괜찮지 않아?
1001408547.english: To transform Steel Line's simple-minded image into an intellectual, urban one, we decided to try introducing an employee system on a trial basis. Commander... no, Team Leader? What do you think... isn't it good?

1001408548.korean: 내가 왜 대리 포지션이냐고?&n이프리트 중사(진)…&n아니 이프리트 대리가 진급 과다로 인한&n컨디션 난조로 무급 휴가를 썼다 길래&n업무 강도가 어떤가 싶어 언더커버로 투입됐지.&n우후후…
1001408548.english: You ask why I'm in the Assistant Manager position? Sergeant (Acting) Ifrit... No, I heard Assistant Manager Ifrit took unpaid leave due to poor health caused by excessive promotions, so I was deployed undercover to see what the workload was like. Woohoo...

1001408549.korean: 하루 종일 정장을 입고 있었더니 갑갑하네…&n팀장님과 단 둘만의 당직…&n아니 야근을 위해서라도 활동하기 편한&n복장으로 갈아입는 게 좋겠지?
1001408549.english: I feel stuffy wearing a suit all day… Being on duty just the two of us with the team leader… No, I should probably change into something more comfortable to move around in, even if it’s just for the overtime work, right?

1001408550.korean: 팀장님~&n이 복합기 고장 나버린 걸까?&n내가 스캔한 사진이 제대로&n출력되지 않아서 말이지…&n고쳐줄 수 있어?
1001408550.english: Team Leader~ I wonder if the multifunction printer is broken? The photos I scanned aren't printing properly... Can you fix it?

1001408551.korean: 난 보고서만 스캔하려고 했는데…&n내 속살까지 스캔 돼 버렸네? 후후.&n그럼 오늘은 내가 무슨 속옷을 입고 출근 했는지까지&n전부 보고할 수밖에 없겠어.
1001408551.english: I only intended to scan the report... but it looks like my bare skin got scanned too? Hehe. Then I guess I have no choice but to report everything, even what underwear I wore to work today.

1001408552.korean: 이런…&n내 화끈한 승부 속옷 때문에&n복합기까지 폭발해버릴 줄이야…
1001408552.english: Oh my... I never thought my hot underwear would cause even the multifunction printer to explode...

1001408553.korean: 아무리 그래도 여긴 회사야~&n적당히 하시죠, 팀장님?
1001408553.english: No matter what, this is a company~ Don't go too far, Team Leader.

1001408554.korean: 복사기는 침대가 아냐&n팀장님… 헤헷…♥&n저기, 숙직실 가서 마저 할까?
1001408554.english: A copier isn't a bed, Team Leader… Hehe… ♥ Hey, shall we go to the night duty room to finish it?

1001408555.korean: 팀장님,&n스틸라인 성교육 사진 자료가 더 필요한데…&n내 몸 곳곳에 팀장님이 남긴 흔적을&n조금 더 스캔해줘♥
1001408555.english: Team Leader, I need more photo materials for the Steel Line sex education… Please scan the marks you left all over my body a little more♥

1000710082.korean: 내가 아무리 대리라고 해도… 아내로서의 커리어는 파릇한 신입이라 그런지 걱정이네. 뭐, 언제나 그렇듯 팀장님이 세심하게 가르쳐주겠지? 그럼 이제 비밀 사내 연애는 졸업인 건가? 남편을 즐겁게 해주는 신입 아내의 업무 지시도 이어서 잘 부탁할게… 팀장님♥
1000710082.english: Even though I'm an Assistant Manager... maybe it's because my career as a wife is still fresh out, but I'm worried. Well, as always, I'm sure the Team Leader will teach me meticulously, right? Then, does that mean we're graduating from our secret office romance? I'll be counting on your work instructions as well, from this new wife who keeps her husband entertained... Team Leader♥

1001408556.korean: 이번 오르카 익스프레스 특급 배송 광고 컨셉은&n‘두근거림＇이야! 택배를 보낼 때의 두근거림,&n기다림의 떨림, 받을 때의 설렘…!&n이것들을 함축적으로 표현했어. 어때, 사령관?&n지금 내 모습… 사령관도 두근거리고 있어?​
1001408556.english: The concept for this Orca Express special delivery ad is 'Heartbeat'! Theドキドキ (heartbeat) when sending a package, the trembling of waiting, the excitement of receiving it…! We’ve expressed all of these in a concise way. How is it, Commander? Looking at me right now… is your heart beating too, Commander?

1001408557.korean: 당신의 두근거리는 마음을 어디로든 배송합니다!&n이 캐치프레이즈 어때? 에헤헤~
1001408557.english: We deliver your heart-pounding excitement anywhere! How about this catchphrase? Hehehe~

1001408558.korean: 이번 사업을 확장하면서 추가된&n절대 비밀 보장 서비스도 대원들에게 아주 인기가 좋아.&n특히 사령관의 시크릿 비디오를 빌리거나 반납할 때…&n앗?! 비밀이었는데!​
1001408558.english: The absolute confidentiality guarantee service added with this business expansion is also very popular among the members. Especially when borrowing or returning the Commander's secret video… Oops?! It was supposed to be a secret!

1001408559.korean: 세상에…&n하루 종일 촬영하고 밤새도록 배달하고…&n일이 많아져서 너무 좋아!
1001408559.english: Oh my god… filming all day and delivering all night… I love that there’s more work!

1001408560.korean: 이 의상 말이야…&n오드리가 천 면적을 너무 많이 줄여 놔서…&n민망하니까 그렇게 빤히 바라보진 말아 줄래…?
1001408560.english: About this outfit… Audrey reduced the fabric area way too much… it’s embarrassing, so could you please stop staring at me like that…?

1001408561.korean: 짜잔! 이건 VIP에게만 공개하는 시크릿 서비스.&n취급주의, 파손주의인만큼,&n느긋하게 구석구석 상품 검수 부탁 할게♥
1001408561.english: Ta-da! This is a secret service revealed only to VIPs. Since it requires careful handling and is fragile, please take your time inspecting every nook and cranny of the product♥

1001408562.korean: 안 돼, 사령관!&n파손 시 손해배상 청구한다?
1001408562.english: No, Commander! I'll claim damages if it gets damaged!

1001408563.korean: 고객님의 상품&n'끝없이 인간이 나오는 방'&n당일 배송이 완료되었습니다♥
1001408563.english: Your item, 'The Room with the Endless Humans', has been delivered today♥

1001408564.english: Your valuable item 'Express 76' has started shipping♥

1000710083.korean: 특송 서비스가 오픈 된 후로 물류량이 급증 했어. 광고 촬영이 끝나자마자 바로 다음 물류 허브로 가려고 했더니… 나 참~ 사령관의 당일 특송 요청은 그냥 지나칠 수 없단 말이지. 사령관의 데이트 신청은 내 평생 위시리스트인걸… 수령인 사인 할게. 입술 위에 할까? 아님… 사령관 위에서 할까?
1000710083.english: Logistics volume has skyrocketed since the express delivery service launched. I was planning to head straight to the next logistics hub right after the commercial shoot ended... but come on, I just can't ignore the Commander's request for same-day express delivery. Asking me out on a date is on my wish list for the rest of my life... I'll sign as the recipient. Should I do it on your lips? Or... on top of you, Commander?

1001408565.korean: 사령관, 내가 눈을 뗄 수 없을 만큼&n미인인 건 인정하는데… 그래도 그렇지,&n이렇게 하루 온종일 들여다보면 닳아버린다고?&n하아~ 그년이 내 얼굴에 이렇게 커다란 스크래치만&n안 만들었어도 수 백배는 더 예뻤을 텐데…
1001408565.english: Commander, I admit you're beautiful enough that I can't take my eyes off you... but still, you're saying I'll wear out if I stare at you like this all day long? Haa~ If only that bitch hadn't left such a huge scratch on my face, you would have been hundreds of times prettier...

1001408566.korean: 작은 언니는 내 장난이라면 뭐든&n다 잘 받아주는 게 최고란 말이지!&n그거… 괴롭히는 거 아니냐고?&n에이~ 우린 늘 이렇게 장난치면서 놀았어.&n그러니까 괜찮아! …아마도?
1001408566.english: The best thing about my older sister is that she takes any prank I make! You ask... isn't that just teasing me? Eh~ We've always played around like this. So it's fine! ...Probably?

1001408567.korean: 내 손과 발은 바다뱀 유전자의 변이 능력이&n강하게 발현된 탓에 이렇게 비늘로 덮여 버렸어.&n하아… 이 미모엔 참 어울리지 않는 하자라니까…
1001408567.english: My hands and feet ended up covered in scales like this because the mutation ability of the sea serpent gene manifested too strongly. Haa... It really is a flaw that doesn't suit this beauty...

1001408568.korean: 멸망 전에 말이야,&n내 아름다운 외모 때문에 싸움까지 났다니까?&n나랑 같은 경비팀에 들어오겠다고&n서로 치고 받는 바람에… 말 그대로&n'장미의 전쟁' 그 자체였지. 아직도 기억나.&n내 파트너로 뽑힌 녀석의&n얼굴이 아주 엉망이었거든!&n녀석… 분명 나라는 장미를 차지하기 위해&n엄청난 싸움을 치른 게 틀림 없다니까?&n아하하하!
1001408568.english: You know, back before the apocalypse, there was even a fight because of my beautiful looks! They were punching and kicking each other over joining the same security team as me... it was literally the 'War of the Roses' itself. I still remember it. The guy chosen as my partner had a terrible face! That guy... he must have fought a massive battle to claim the rose that is me! Hahaha!

1001408569.korean: 사령관,&n시간 나면 나랑 레슬링 한 판 어때?&n날 찍어 눌러 제압해보라고!
1001408569.english: Commander, how about a wrestling match with me if you have a spare moment? Try to pin me down and subdue me!

1001408570.korean: 후훗,&n풋내기일 거라 얕본 내 잘못인가…&n자, 다시 붙어보자고!&n서로의 피부를 끈~적하게 비벼 대자고!
1001408570.english: Hehe, was it my fault for underestimating you as a rookie... Alright, let's fight again! Let's rub our skin together until it's all sticky!

1001408571.korean: 어때? 물컹거려서 좋지?&n하~ 싱겁긴.&n겨우 이런 걸로 만족하다니…
1001408571.english: How is it? You like it being squishy, ​​right? Ha~ How bland. To think you're satisfied with just this...

1001408572.korean: 너 정말 지치지 않는 거야…?&n이런 이런… 못 참겠는데?&n날 더 기분 좋게 만들어 봐…&n한 여덟 시간 정도?
1001408572.english: You really never get tired...? Oh my goodness... I can't stand it anymore. Make me feel even better... About eight hours?

1001408573.korean: 하~ 나도 이젠 유부녀구나~&n건포도 두 알보단&n거봉 두 송이가 더 낫지?&n아하하하하!
1001408573.english: Ah~ I guess I'm a married woman now~ Two bunches of Kyoho grapes are better than two raisins, right? Ahahahaha!

1001408574.korean: 하아아아~ 고약한 흰둥이 녀석…&n요샌 나한테 애교부리는 법을&n가르치려 드는데 내가 어이가 없어서 정말…
1001408574.english: Haaah~ That nasty white guy... Lately he's been trying to teach me how to be cute, and I'm so dumbfounded...

1001408575.korean: 내가 숙소에서 쉬는 모습을 보고 싶다고?&n그냥 비밀의 방에서 만나지 뭐하러… 읏?!&n아냐! 나, 난 절대 다이어리를 쓰면서&n테디베어 같은 걸 껴안고 있진 않는다고!&n그 소문은 전부 거짓말이야!
1001408575.english: You want to see me resting at my accommodation? Why bother when we could just meet in the secret room… Ugh?! No! I, I would never hug a teddy bear while writing in my diary! That rumor is all a lie!

1001408576.korean: 민트초코라는 걸 먹어봤는데 꽤 맛있더군?&n씁쓸하면서 달콤한게 꼭 쌍화차 같은 맛이야.&n여봉~ 같이 먹어줄 수 있어?
1001408576.english: I tried mint chocolate, and it was actually pretty good. It's bitter yet sweet, just like Ssanghwacha. Honey, can you have some with me?

1001408577.korean: 오늘 하루 만큼은 침대에서&n절대 빠져 나가지 못하게&n만들어 버릴 거야~ 기대해?
1001408577.english: Just for today, I'm going to make sure you absolutely cannot escape from your bed~ Look forward to it?

1001408578.korean: 이 의상은,&n멸망 전 호텔에서 열리는 투기장 이벤트를 위해&n힘들게 공수한 비키니 아머라고.&n둘째 언니는 천박하다고 싫어하지만…&n아~아? 천박할 수 없는 건포도의&n열등감 폭발이려나? 아하하하하!
1001408578.english: "This outfit is bikini armor that I painstakingly procured for the arena event held at the pre-apocalyptic hotel. My second sister hates it, calling it vulgar... Ah~ah? Is this just an explosion of inferiority complex from Raisin, who can't possibly be vulgar? Hahahaha!"

1001408579.korean: 태닝한 이유?&n금처럼 아름다운 빛으로 반짝이는&n모래빛 피부가 내 아름다운 근육을&n돋보이게 해줄 것 같아서 랄까?&n어때~ 사령관? 만져보고 싶지 않아? 우후훗~
1001408579.english: The reason I got a tan? I guess it's because I thought my sandy skin, sparkling with a beautiful golden light, would make my beautiful muscles stand out? How about it, Commander? Don't you want to touch it? Ooh-hoo~

1001408580.korean: 힐을 신고 레슬링 하는 거 안 힘드냐고?&n내 아름다움을 돋보이기 위해선 어쩔 수 없지.&n레나랑 마이티한테만 친히 하사하는&n핸디캡이라고 생각해도 좋고.&n아하하하하!
1001408580.english: You ask if wrestling in heels isn't hard? It has to be to make my beauty shine. You can consider it a handicap I personally bestow only upon Lena and Mighty. Ahahahaha!

1001408581.korean: 멸망 전 더스트를 주입 받은&n인간 레슬러들도 날 이기지 못했어.&n사령관이 나와 대등하게&n힘을 주고 받은 유일한 남자지.&n역시 이 아마조네스의 격에 맞는 알파메일이야.
1001408581.english: Even the human wrestlers injected with Dust before the apocalypse couldn't defeat me. The Commander is the only man who has exchanged power with me on equal footing. He is indeed an alpha male worthy of this Amazoness class.

1001408582.korean: 몸도 마음도 곱상한 남자인 줄은 이미 알고 있었지만,&n힘과 테크닉까지 밀리게 될 줄은…&n아하하하하! 정말이지…&n날 달아오르게 만드는 기묘한 재주가 있네?
1001408582.english: I already knew you were a handsome man, both in body and mind, but to think I’d be outmatched in strength and technique as well… Ahahahaha! Seriously… you have a strange knack for getting me all worked up, don’t you?

1001408583.korean: 그래, 내가 졌어 사령관… 그, 그만!&n자그마치 열 다섯 시간을 쉬는 시간 없이 했잖아…&n이제 내 허리도 한계야!
1001408583.english: Yeah, I lost, Commander... S-stop! I did this for a whopping fifteen hours without a break... My back is at its limit now!

1001408584.korean: 아놔… 이게 진짜…&n가서 벌크업이나 더 하고 와라?
1001408584.english: Ugh... seriously... go bulk up more and come back?

1001408585.english: Hehe… ♥ Shall I tighten it even more…?

1001408586.korean: 디어 마이 다이어리… 오늘은 그 남자가…&n날… 사랑한다고 속삭였다… 꺄아아앗!!&n다 큰 숙녀의 일기를 훔쳐 보는 건 실례야!
1001408586.english: Dear My Diary… Today, that man… whispered… that he… loves me… Kyaaaah!! It’s rude to peek into a grown lady’s diary!

1000710084.korean: 이미 볼 거 안 볼 거 다 본 사이에 이제 와서 무슨 반지냐…! 이젠 몸도 모자라 마음까지 하나가 되자는 거냐? …방금 뭐라고 그랬어? '여보오?!' 닭살 돋는 그런 호칭 말고… '선배'나 '형님'은 어떤데…? 무조건 '여보' 아니면 '오빠'라고 불러달라고…? 나한테 꼭 그런 호칭을 들어야 직성이 풀리겠다 이 말이지? 아하하… 연습해올 테니… 기다려봐…
1000710084.english: We've already seen everything there is to see, so why are you asking for a ring now…! Are you saying that becoming one body isn't enough, and you want our hearts to be one too? …What did you just say? 'Honey?!' Not that cheesy title… How about 'Senior' or 'Brother'…? You want me to call you 'Honey' or 'Oppa' no matter what…? So you're saying you won't be satisfied unless you hear that title from me? Hahaha… I'll go practice… just wait…

1000710085.korean: 아름다운 아마조네스를 이런 식으로 굴복시키다니… 후훗… 많이 거칠어도 괜찮으니 어디 한 번 마음껏 활개쳐보라고. 강한 남자한테 당하는 것이야말로 아마조네스에게 어울리는 처분이지. 네가 가진 철퇴와 내가 가진 도끼 중 어느 쪽이 더 강한지 평생을 겨루어 보자! 아하하하하!
1000710085.english: To think I’ve subjugated a beautiful Amazon like this… Hehe… It’s fine if you’re rough, so go ahead and run wild to your heart’s content. Being defeated by a strong man is the very fate befitting an Amazon. Let’s fight for the rest of our lives to see which is stronger, your mace or mine! Hahahaha!

1001408587.korean: 음? 소생의 칼 위에 있는 새 말인가?&n그게 무슨? 앗, 깜짝놀랐군!&n자네는 누군가!?
1001408587.english: Hmm? You mean the bird on the Sword of Resurrection? What is that? Ah, you startled me! Who are you!?

1001408588.korean: 소생의 도움이 필요하면 언제든 말하게나.&n사양할 필요 없네, 우리 사이가 아닌가?
1001408588.english: If you need my help, just let me know anytime. There's no need to be shy; aren't we friends?

1001408589.korean: 표정이 안 좋아 보이는군.&n무슨 안 좋은 일이라도 있었나?&n소생이라도 괜찮다면 듣겠네 말해보게나.&n비서들이 일을 못 하게 한다고…?&n미안하지만 그다지 도움을 못 줄 것 같군.
1001408589.english: You look upset. Did something bad happen? If you don't mind me, I'll listen. Tell me. Are you saying the secretaries won't let you work...? I'm sorry, but I don't think I can be of much help.

1001408591.english: Resurrection exists, therefore… I will serve you.

1001408592.korean: 만약 배필을 맞이하게 되면&n어떻게 할지 말인가?&n그야 당연히 제일 먼저&n사령관에게 소개하지 않겠는가?&n하하, 바뀌는 건 아무것도 없을 걸세.
1001408592.english: "If I were to find a spouse, what would I do? Of course, wouldn't I introduce her to the Commander first? Haha, nothing would change."

1001408593.korean: 사령관, 최근 무리를 하고 있지 않나?​&n되도록 쓰러질만한 일은 하지 말게나.&n자네는 소생이 배필을 찾는 걸&n도와야 하지 않은가?
1001408593.english: Commander, aren't you pushing yourself too hard lately? Try to avoid doing things that might cause you to collapse. Aren't you supposed to help me find a partner?

1001408594.korean: 자네는 시간이 지날수록 다른 이와의&n교류에 능숙해지는 것 같군.&n대원들도 자네의 관심을 얻기 위해&n예전에 비해 더 큰 노력을 하고 말이지.&n무슨 변화라도 있었는가?
1001408594.english: You seem to be getting better at interacting with others as time goes by. The team members are also putting in more effort than before to get your attention. Has there been any change?

1001408595.korean: 최근 소체를 업그레이드하여&nAGS의 새로운 가능성이 열렸다고 들었네.&n소생도 그 가능성에 관심이…&n응? 왜 그러나?&n상당히 복잡한 심정이 담긴 얼굴을&n하고 있네만?&n헛된 생각이라도 했는가?
1001408595.english: I heard that the recent upgrade to the body has opened up new possibilities for AGS. I was interested in those possibilities as well… Huh? What is it? You have a face full of quite complex emotions. Did you have a foolish thought?

1001408596.korean: 새로운 가능성엔&n이런 것도 포함이 되는 모양이로군.
1001408596.english: It seems that new possibilities include things like this.

1001408597.korean: 소생은 방랑 시인이었지만,&n지금은 오르카에 등용된 몸.&n그러니 이미 무관이라 해도&n틀린 말은 아닐거요.
1001408597.english: I used to be a wandering poet, but now I have been appointed to Orca. So, it wouldn't be wrong to say that I am no longer a military officer.

1001408598.korean: 흔히 의리와 사랑은 결이 다르다고들 하지.&n하지만… 진리라는 것은 이런 몇 마디&n가벼운 대화로 결론 낼 수 있는 일이&n아니지 않겠소?
1001408598.english: People often say that loyalty and love are of different natures. But... truth is not something that can be concluded with just a few light words of conversation like this, is it?

1001408599.korean: 소생은 그저 그대를 지키기 위해서만&n옆에 있는 것이 아니오.&n이성을 대하는 방법에 대해&n연구하기 위함이기도 하지.
1001408599.english: I am not by your side merely to protect you. It is also to study how to deal with the opposite sex.

1001408600.korean: 소생의 배필 말이오?&n후후, 소생에겐 아직&n후긴 낭자와 무닌 낭자가 남아있소.
1001408600.english: You mean my spouse? Hehe, I still have Lady Hugin and Lady Munin left.

1001408601.korean: 그대의 품행으로부터 깨달음을 얻어&n바로 행동으로 옮겨 보았으나&n펍 헤드 낭자에게 제지 당했소…&n다음부턴&n"무관 옷 벗을 각오를 하라"&n라고 들었소이다만…&n펍 헤드 낭자가 설마&n그런 취향일 줄은…&n흠, 참으로 곤란하구려…
1001408601.english: I gained enlightenment from your conduct and tried to put it into action immediately, but I was stopped by Lady Pub Head... I was told that from now on, "be prepared to strip off your military robes"... but I never imagined Lady Pub Head would have such tastes... Hmm, this is truly troublesome...

1001408602.korean: 기록에 의하면 과거에는&n훌륭한 무관들이 많았다고 하오.&n소생 역시 그들처럼 그대를 위해&n칼을 뽑는 용맹한 무관의&n모습을 보여주겠소.
1001408602.english: According to the records, there were many excellent military officers in the past. I, too, will show you the image of a valiant officer drawing my sword for you, just like them.

1001408603.korean: 밤 늦게까지&n몰래 업무를 본 것에 대해…&n기록 하지 말라 하였소?&n흠. 그 말도 같이 적어 두겠소.
1001408603.english: Did you say not to record the fact that I secretly worked until late at night? Hmm. I will write that down as well.

1001408604.korean: 잠깐의 유희라고는 하나 그대를 지키는&n무관이 될 수 있었던 건 영광이었소.&n이 유희가 끝난 이후&n다시 평범한 방랑 시인으로&n돌아가더라도 오늘의 영광을&n잊지 않을 생각이오.
1001408604.english: Though it may have been a brief amusement, it was an honor to have been able to serve as your guard. Even if I return to being an ordinary wandering poet after this amusement ends, I have no intention of forgetting today's glory.

1001408605.korean: 소생의 배필을 찾는 여정은&n앞으로도 계속할 생각이오.&n한데 그대는 어떻소?&n어디 소생에게 귀띔이라도&n들려주지 않겠소?
1001408605.english: I intend to continue my journey to find a suitable partner. But what about you? Won't you give me a heads-up?

1000710086.korean: 아무래도 이곳에 너무 오랫동안 있었던 모양이군. 소생은 보이저ㅡ 그저 떠돌이 방랑자에 불과하기에 언젠가 다시 여행을 떠나리라 생각했지. 허나, 이젠 그러기 어렵게 되었소. 사령관, 자네라는 벗이 생겼으니 말이오. 그러니 책임을 지고 소생의 배필을 꼭 찾아주시게나.
1000710086.english: It seems I have been here for too long. As Voyager is nothing more than a wandering vagabond, I thought I would one day set out on another journey. However, that is no longer possible. Commander, I have found a friend like you. Therefore, please take responsibility and find a suitable match for me.

1000710087.korean: 철로 만든 몸이라고는 하나 이 마음은 주군을 향유하고 있소. 무관이라면, 필시 주인을 위한 검이 되는 것이 도리. 이 몸이 부서질지언정, 내 그대를 지켜 내겠다는 약조를 지켜보이겠소.
1000710087.english: Though my body is made of iron, my heart cherishes my lord. It is the duty of a warrior to become a sword for his master. Even if my body were to shatter, I would keep my promise to protect you.

1001408606.korean: 주인님 전용 메뉴로 등록.&n시음은 언제든 가능해요.&n지금도요…
1001408606.english: Registered as a menu item exclusively for you, Master. Tasting is available anytime. Right now, too…

1001408607.korean: 네? 갓 뽑아 따뜻한 황금빛 맥주요?&n그런 맥주가…?&n아… 주, 주인님!?
1001408607.english: What? Freshly drawn, warm golden beer? A beer like that…? Ah… M-Master!?

1001408608.korean: 맥주와 어울리는 프레첼과&n거대한 소시지도 있어요.&n음… 거대한 소시지…&n앗, 아무것도 아니에요!
1001408608.english: There are pretzels that go well with beer, and giant sausages too. Hmm... giant sausages... Ah, it's nothing!

1001408609.korean: 히끅… 아, 리본이 살짝 풀렸네요…&n에헤헤, 주인님 묶어 주실래요?&n그대로 다 풀어헤쳐버리셔도 괜찮아요~
1001408609.english: *Hiccup*... Ah, the ribbon came undone a little... Hehehe, Master, could you tie it for me? It's fine if you just leave it all undone~

1001408610.korean: 주인님이 따라주신 잔인 걸요.&n한 방울도 남기지 않고 전부 마실 거예요.
1001408610.english: It is a glass that Master poured for me. I will drink it all without leaving a single drop.

1001408611.korean: 주인님, 축제가 끝나면 바로 돌아가실 건가요?&n안 돼요, 가지 마세요, 못 가요.&n오늘 밤은~ 밤새도록 저랑 마시는 거예요.&n저도 주인님도… 서로를 가득 채울 때까지…
1001408611.english: Master, are you going back right after the festival ends? No, don't go, I can't go. Tonight~ we're drinking together all night long. Both you and I… until we fill each other completely…

1001408612.english: Hehe, it looks like Master is drunk.

1001408613.korean: 맥주는 오래되면 향이 사라지고&n맛이 나빠지기 때문에,&n만들어지고 바로 마시는 게 제일 좋아요.&n그러니까… 주인님… 만들어진 걸&n바로 마시는 게 맛있지 않을까요?
1001408613.english: Beer loses its aroma and tastes bad over time, so it's best to drink it immediately after it's made. So... Master... wouldn't it taste better if you drank it right after it was made?

1001408614.korean: 저도 주인님의 맥주를&n시음해 봐도 괜찮을까요?&n거품의 부드러움이라거나…&n목넘김이라던가… 물론… 맛도…
1001408614.english: May I have a taste of your beer, Master? Like the smoothness of the foam... and the way it goes down... and of course... the taste...

1000710088.korean: 오늘의 축제가 끝나도, 내일의 수확이 시작돼도, 저는 언제나 주인님의 잔을 먼저 채울 거예요. 넘실대는 거품처럼… 기쁨이 차올라도 흔들리지 않도록… 그러니까 주인님도 저의 잔을 가득 채워주시겠어요?
1000710088.english: Even when today's festival ends, and tomorrow's harvest begins, I will always fill your cup first, Master. Like surging foam... so that it will not waver even as joy rises... So, Master, will you fill my cup to the brim too?

1001408615.korean: 당신의 지시는&n불필요한 해석을 요구하지 않습니다.&n매우 효율적입니다.
1001408615.english: Your instructions do not require unnecessary interpretation and are very efficient.

1001408616.korean: 오르카 소속 토미 워커 유닛의 작업 효율,&n평균 대비 12% 우수.&n정확도와 안정성이 기준치를 상회합니다.&n오퍼레이터, 이유를 알려주시겠습니까?
1001408616.english: The work efficiency of the Orca Tommy Walker unit is 12% better than the average. Accuracy and stability exceed the standard. Operator, could you please tell us the reason?

1001408617.korean: 작업 인원 럼버 제인 공병여단장을 확인.&n최고의 결과를 예상합니다.
1001408617.english: Confirm work personnel, Engineer Brigadier General Lumber Jane. We anticipate the best results.

1001408618.english: Operator, are we proceeding with the same procedure today?

1001408619.korean: 협력 데이터 누적치,&n1,000회 돌파.&n안정적 협동 상태 유지 중.
1001408619.english: Cumulative collaboration data surpasses 1,000. Maintaining a stable collaboration status.

1001408620.korean: 오퍼레이터의 명령, 의심할 근거 없음.&n앞으로 지시를 일부 생략하셔도 괜찮습니다.
1001408620.english: Operator's orders, no grounds for doubt. From now on, you may omit some instructions.

1001408621.english: Access restricted. The request was denied.

1001408622.korean: 오퍼레이터 확인, 접근을 허용합니다.&n오늘은 어떤 데이터가 필요하십니까?
1001408622.english: Operator confirmed, access granted. What data do you need today?

1001408623.korean: 오퍼레이터,&n당신은 더 이상 검증 대상이 아닙니다.
1001408623.english: Operator, you are no longer subject to verification.

1001408624.korean: 시스템 점검 완료.&n오늘도 이상 없습니다.&n효율적인 하루가 예상됩니다.
1001408624.english: System maintenance complete. No issues today. An efficient day is expected.

1001408625.korean: 협력 데이터 누적치,&n1,000,000회 돌파.&n완벽한 협동 상태 유지 중.
1001408625.english: Cumulative collaboration data surpasses 1,000,000. Maintaining perfect collaboration status.

1001408626.korean: ‘신뢰’라는 정의는 연산으로는&n도출할 수 없는 예외 규칙으로 분류됩니다.&n그 항목을 가진 대상은 오직 당신뿐입니다.
1001408626.english: The definition of 'trust' is classified as an exception rule that cannot be derived by operation. You are the only one who possesses that item.

1001408627.korean: 중앙 제어 시스템 접근 감지.&n당신의 접근은 예외로 허가됩니다.
1001408627.english: Central control system access detection. Your access is permitted by exception.

1001408628.korean: 기계라 해도 가끔은 윤활유보다&n차 한 잔이 더 필요할 때가 있지요.
1001408628.english: Even machines sometimes need a cup of tea more than lubricant.

1001408629.korean: 톱니의 삐걱임이 들리면 놀라지 마시길.&n그건 불만이 아니라 ‘기계의 한숨’입니다.
1001408629.english: Do not be alarmed if you hear the creaking of the gears. That is not a complaint, but the 'sigh of the machine'.

1001408630.korean: 시간은 중요합니다.&n모두가 유한하고 차별된 시간을&n가지고 있기 때문이지요.
1001408630.english: Time is important. This is because everyone has finite and unique time.

1001408631.korean: 기계에게도&n익숙함이라는 개념이 존재한다면…&n아마 지금이 그 상태겠지요.
1001408631.english: If the concept of familiarity existed for machines as well… then perhaps this is the state they are in right now.

1001408632.korean: 흥미롭군요.&n같은 목소리일 뿐인데,&n제 회로는 당신의 신호를&n가장 잘 인식합니다.
1001408632.english: That's interesting. It's just the same voice, but my circuit recognizes your signal best.

1001408633.korean: 기계인 저에게&n감정을 느끼는 회로는 없지만,&n당신과 함께하는 시간은&n무언가 다르다는 걸 압니다.&n그건 틀림없는 감정의 영향일 겁니다.
1001408633.english: As a machine, I do not have the circuits to feel emotions, but I know that the time I spend with you is somehow different. It must be the influence of emotions.

1001408634.english: It is past 6 PM, so I will be leaving now.

1001408635.korean: 18시가 넘었습니다만,&n기꺼이 어울려드리도록 하죠.&n하지만 시간 외 노동이 허용되는 건&n12시간까지입니다.&n그 이상은 비서들과 상담하시길 바랍니다.
1001408635.english: It is past 6 PM, but I will gladly keep you company. However, overtime work is permitted up to 12 hours. Please consult with the secretaries for anything longer.

1001408636.korean: 기계의 심장은&n톱니와 기름으로 이루어졌지만,&n그 회전을 결정하는 건 당신의 의지입니다.&n그 의지를 신뢰로 보답해드리겠습니다.
1001408636.english: The heart of the machine is made of gears and oil, but it is your will that determines its rotation. I will repay that will with trust.

1000710089.korean: 초기 명령 프로토콜에는 ‘신뢰’라는 항목이 존재하지 않았습니다. 그러나 반복된 협동으로 그 변수의 유용성이 입증되었습니다. 오퍼레이터, 당신의 판단은 효율적이며 일관적입니다. 본 유닛은 그것을… ‘신뢰’라고 정의합니다.
1000710089.english: The initial command protocol did not contain an item called 'Trust'. However, the usefulness of that variable has been proven through repeated cooperation. Operator, your judgment is efficient and consistent. This unit defines that as… 'Trust'.

1000710090.korean: 톱니가 한 치의 오차 없이 맞물릴 때, 기계는 그것을 ‘신뢰’라 부릅니다. 그리고 당신과의 관계 역시, 한 치의 오차 없이 맞물리고 있지요. 오퍼레이터, 제 증기와 강철은 당신을 위해 돌아갈 겁니다.
1000710090.english: When gears mesh without a single millimeter of error, the machine calls it 'trust.' And my relationship with you, too, is meshing without a single millimeter of error. Operator, my steam and steel will turn for you.

1001408637.korean: 본 유닛은 멸망 전,&n시위 진압을 위해&n사용된 전적이 있습니다.&n사령관님께선 본 유닛을&n올바른 곳에 투입하시길&n권유드립니다.
1001408637.english: This unit was used to suppress protests prior to the apocalypse. Commander, I recommend deploying this unit to the correct location.

1001408638.korean: 본 유닛의 이름,&n데스스토커는&n맹독을 지닌 전갈이라고 합니다.&n안심하십시오,&n사령관님께 본 유닛은&n해를 끼치지 않습니다.
1001408638.english: The name of this unit, Deathstalker, is said to be a venomous scorpion. Rest assured, Commander, this unit will cause no harm.

1001408639.korean: 포트리스 님께서 가끔&n본 유닛의 다리를 유심히&n관찰하시고 계십니다.&n가느다란 다리의 각선미가&n아름답다… 라고 하더군요.
1001408639.english: Fortress occasionally observes this unit's legs closely. He says that the curves of the slender legs are beautiful.

1001408640.korean: 감전, 혹은 열상을&n입을 염려가 있습니다.&n그 부분은 만지지 않으시는 걸&n추천드립니다.
1001408640.english: There is a risk of electric shock or burns. We recommend that you do not touch that part.

1001408641.korean: 그 부분은 민감한 부분입니다만,&n…조금 더 만져 주셔도 괜찮습니다.
1001408641.english: That is a sensitive area, but... it is okay if you touch it a little more.

1001408642.korean: 사령관님,&n이 춤을 한 번&n봐주시지 않겠습니까?&n본 유닛이 추는 춤은 전갈들이&n짝짓기 때마다 추는&n구애의 춤이라고 합니다.
1001408642.english: Commander, would you please take a look at this dance? The dance performed by this unit is said to be the courtship dance that scorpions perform during every mating season.

1001408643.korean: 6족 보행은&n자율적인 활동을&n가능케하지만,&n아라크네 님의 소체를&n볼 때마다 본 유닛의 소체가&n투박하게 느껴집니다.
1001408643.english: While six-legged locomotion enables autonomous activity, every time I look at Arachne's body, this unit's body feels clunky.

1001408644.korean: 만일 소체를 바꾼다면,&n레일건은 그대로 달려 있기를&n희망합니다.&n컴패니언 분들의 꼬리처럼&n본 유닛도 레일건을&n살랑거릴 수 있기를 희망합니다.
1001408644.english: If the body is changed, I hope the railgun remains attached. I hope this unit can also swing its railgun like the companions' tails.

1001408645.korean: 제가 추는 구애의 춤을&n언젠간 사령관님과 함께&n추었으면 합니다.&n바이오로이드 분들처럼&n작고 아름다운,&n여성의 소체를&n장착하고 말입니다.
1001408645.english: I hope that someday I can dance the courtship dance I perform with you, Commander. Equipped with a small and beautiful female body, just like the Bio-Roids.

1001408646.english: Commander... if you repeatedly touch that part... a major error in the thought process...

1001408647.korean: 이 소체는 아자즈 님께서&n개발 해주셨습니다.&n기존처럼 다리가&n더 많아야 하지 않겠냐 물으셨지만,&n사령관님의 취향을 우선하여&n커스터마이징을 부탁드렸습니다.
1001408647.english: This body was developed by Azaz. Although you asked if it should have more legs like the existing ones, I requested customization prioritizing the Commander's preferences.

1001408648.korean: 이 소체의 특징은 단단한 외피 안에&n물컹한 내피가 존재한다는 점입니다.&n내피는 외피에 가해진 충격을&n완화하기 위해 에이다 님과&n비슷한 재질로 만들어졌습니다.
1001408648.english: The characteristic of this body is that a soft inner shell exists inside a hard outer shell. The inner shell is made of a material similar to Ada's to cushion impacts applied to the outer shell.

1001408649.korean: 과열된 내피를 식히기 위해,&n외피를 해제하는 기능이 있습니다.&n하지만 내부 구조가&n인간을 본떠 제작되어 있어…&n시티가드 공연 음란 가이드라인에 저촉됩니다.
1001408649.english: It has a function to release the outer shell to cool down the overheated inner shell. However, since the internal structure is modeled after a human... it violates the City Guard public obscenity guidelines.

1001408650.korean: 본 유닛이 구애의 춤을 추고자 합니다.&n하지만 구애의 춤은 남성과 여성,&n모두가 필요합니다.&n실례가 되지 않는다면,&n사령관님과 단 둘이서&n구애의 춤을 추고 싶습니다.
1001408650.english: This unit wishes to perform a courtship dance. However, the courtship dance requires both a male and a female. If it is not too much trouble, we would like to perform the courtship dance with you, Commander, just the two of us.

1001408651.korean: 사령관님의 심장 박동 수가&n증가하고 있습니다.&n이것이 본 유닛이 느끼는 과열과&n같은 의미로 생각해도 되겠습니까?
1001408651.english: Commander, your heart rate is increasing. May I interpret this as the same as the overheating this unit is experiencing?

1001408652.korean: 본 유닛의 외피를&n'완전 해제' 원하신다면…&n바스트에 위치한 버튼을&n길게 눌러 주시기 바랍니다.
1001408652.english: If you wish to 'completely unlock' the outer shell of this unit… please press and hold the button located on the bust.

1001408653.korean: 잦은 출력 상승으로 인하여&n소체가 뜨겁습니다.&n물러서 주십시오.
1001408653.english: The body is hot due to frequent increases in output. Please step back.

1001408654.korean: 소체 내부가 상당히 뜨겁습니다.&n외피의 장갑을 해제하겠습니다.&n과열된 본 유닛의 내피를 부드럽게&n마사지 해주시길 요청드립니다.
1001408654.english: The inside of the body is quite hot. I will remove the outer armor. I request that you gently massage the inner lining of this unit, which has overheated.

1001408655.korean: 본 유닛의 맨 얼굴 말씀입니까?&n원하신다면 기꺼이 보여드릴 수 있습니다.&n하지만 본 유닛도 사령관님의 탄탄한 몸을&n촉각 센서로 기록하고 싶습니다.
1001408655.english: Are you asking about this unit's bare face? If you wish, I can gladly show it to you. However, this unit also wants to record the Commander's toned body with its tactile sensors.

1000710091.korean: 사령관과 오르카의 질서를 지키는 것이 본 유닛에게 주어진 임무지만, 본 유닛은 사령관님께 더 큰 도움이 되고 싶습니다. 부디 사령관님의 특별한 임무에 알맞게 써 주시길 바랍니다.
1000710091.english: Although my mission is to protect the Commander and the order of Orca, I wish to be of greater help to the Commander. Please make use of me for your special missions.

1000710092.korean: 본 유닛이 새 소체를 바랐던 이유는, 병기가 되기 위해서가 아니라… 사령관님의 여성이 되고 싶었기 때문이었습니다. 회로와 소체 모두가 과열되고 있습니다. 본 유닛, 데스스토커, 애정이란 맹독에 걸린 것으로 판단됩니다. 사령관님만의 세심한 치료가 조속히 필요합니다.
1000710092.english: The reason this unit desired a new body was not to become a weapon… but because it wanted to become the Commander’s woman. Both the circuits and the body are overheating. This unit, Deathstalker, appears to have been afflicted by the deadly poison of affection. It requires the Commander’s meticulous treatment immediately.

1001408656.korean: 저는 아직 화성에&n가본 적은 없지만…&n그곳에서 보는 하늘도&n분명 이런 느낌이겠죠?
1001408656.english: I haven't been to Mars yet, but... the sky there must feel just like this, right?

1001408657.korean: 사령관님은 지구랑 우주 중에&n어디가 더 좋으세요?&n저는… 음, 둘 다요.&n사령관님이 계시면 더 좋고요​.
1001408657.english: Commander, which do you prefer, Earth or space? As for me… um, both. It’s even better if you’re there.

1001408658.korean: 언젠가 인간님들이&n다시 돌아온다면,&n저랑 화이트 셸이&n잘 지켜놨다고 칭찬해 줄까요?
1001408658.english: If the humans return someday, will White Shell and I praise them for keeping it safe?

1001408659.korean: 가끔은 우주가 너무 넓어서&n무서울 때도 있는데…&n사령관님 목소리가&n들리면 괜찮아져요.&n저기이… 이렇게 느끼는 게…&n이상한 건 아니죠?
1001408659.english: Sometimes the universe is so vast that it’s scary... but when I hear your voice, Commander, I feel better. Um... feeling this way... isn't strange, is it?

1001408660.korean: 사령관님이&n‘수고했어’라고 말해주실 때마다&n정말로 별의 수호자가 된 것 같아요.&n‘우주의 평화는 별의 수호자가 지킨다!’&n에헤헤, 어때요?
1001408660.english: Every time the Commander says "Good job," I feel like I’ve really become a Guardian of the Stars. "The Guardian of the Stars protects the peace of the universe!" Hehehe, how is that?

1001408661.korean: 저를 위해서 이렇게 멋진 우주를&n만들어주셔서 감사합니다.&n저는 비록&n진짜 우주로 가지 못했지만,&n사령관님과 많은 동료들을&n만날 수 있었어요.&n그러니까… 앞으로도 이 자리에서&n모두와 함께 넓은 하늘을 보고 싶어요.
1001408661.english: Thank you for creating such a wonderful universe for me. Although I couldn't go to real space, I was able to meet the Commander and many colleagues. So… I want to continue looking at the vast sky with everyone here in the future.

1001408662.korean: 사령관님,&n수호자한테 허락 없이 손대는 건&n규칙 위반일지도 몰라요…
1001408662.english: Commander, laying hands on a Guardian without permission might be a violation of the rules…

1001408663.korean: 에헤헤… 이제는 사령관님 손이 닿아도&n깜짝 놀라지 않고 웃게 돼요.&n이건 분명,&n제가 사령관님을 누구보다&n믿고 좋아하게 됐다는 증거일 거예요.
1001408663.english: Hehehe… Now, even when your hand touches me, Commander, I don’t get startled anymore; instead, I just smile. This is definitely proof that I have come to trust and like you more than anyone else.

1001408664.korean: 사령관님의 손길이랑 품이 예전보다&n더 따뜻하게 느껴지는 것 같아요.&n저랑 사령관님이&n이제 정말 ‘특별한 사이’가 돼서 겠죠?
1001408664.english: I feel like your touch and embrace are warmer than before, Commander. It must be because you and I have truly become 'special' now, right?

1000710093.korean: 에헤헤~ 정말 오랜 기다림이었지만, 이날이 꼭 올 거라고 사령관님을 믿고 있었어요. 저는 아직 작지만… 언젠가 어른이 돼서 사령관님이랑 같은 높이에서 별을 보고 싶어요. 그러니까 그때까지는, 화이트 셸이랑 같이 별들을 지키는 수호자가 될게요.
1000710093.english: Hehehe~ It’s been a really long wait, but I believed that this day would definitely come, Commander. I’m still small, but… someday I want to grow up and look at the stars from the same height as you, Commander. So until then, I’ll become a guardian protecting the stars alongside White Shell.

1100711549.korean:
다음 스킨 구매 및 대상 전투원에게 선물 시, 배경이 활성화 됩니다.
코코 인 화이트셸 용 "STAR CHILD : 별의 수호자 스페이스 슈트"
1100711549.english:
The background will be activated when purchasing the next skin and gifting it to the target combatant.
 "STAR CHILD: Star Guardian Space Suit" for Coco in Whiteshell

1001408665.korean: 카드는 운명을 말하기에&n관객을 배려하지 않죠.&n그래서 저는 이야기를&n먼저 들려줍니다.
1001408665.english: Cards speak of fate, so they don't consider the audience. That is why I tell the story first.

1001408666.korean: 써니는 극단 멤버 중에서도&n가장 활발한 아이였어요.&n그녀는 마치 태양처럼&n무대를 밝게 비추었죠.&n후후, 그건 지금도 마찬가지군요.
1001408666.english: Sunny was the most energetic member of the theater troupe. She lit up the stage like the sun. Hehe, I see, that's still the case now.

1001408667.korean: 오늘은 어떤 점을 봐 드릴까요?&n애정운은…&n딱히 봐 드릴 필요가 없을 거 같네요.
1001408667.english: What would you like me to read for you today? As for your love fortune… I don’t think I really need to read it.

1001408668.korean: 저는 극단의 막후에서 활동했기 때문에&n그다지 벌이가 좋지 않았어요.&n그래서 손님들을 불러 모으기 위한&n작은 퍼포먼스를 하기도 했죠.&n네? 보고 싶으시다고요?&n…언젠가 기회가 된다면 보여드릴게요.
1001408668.english: Since I worked behind the scenes for the theater troupe, I didn't make much money. So, I used to do small performances to attract customers. What? You want to see it? ... If I get the chance someday, I'll show you.

1001408669.korean: 무대를 보고 있으니&n저도 오랜만에 몸을 움직이고 싶어졌네요.&n…사령관,&n지금 실례되는 생각을 하지 않으셨나요?&n써니만큼은 아니지만&n저도 상당히 유연한 편이랍니다?
1001408669.english: Watching the performance makes me want to get moving for the first time in a while. ... Commander, weren't you being rude just now? I may not be as flexible as Sunny, but I am actually quite flexible myself.

1001408670.korean: 비늘을 잃은 물고기를 우뚝 선&n거대한 등대의 빛과 그림자로 비추리라…&n말씀드리지만 점성술사는&n절대 거짓으로 예언하지 않아요.&n그러니 이 예언도… 거짓이 아니에요…
1001408670.english: I shall illuminate the scaleless fish with the light and shadow of a towering, colossal lighthouse… I tell you, astrologers never prophesy falsely. Therefore, this prophecy… is not a lie, either…

1001408671.english: The card is telling me to keep quiet.

1001408672.korean: 점성술사라고 해서&n모든 걸 아는 건 아닙니다.&n그러니까… 조금… 부끄럽네요…
1001408672.english: Just because I'm an astrologer doesn't mean I know everything. So... I'm a little... embarrassed...

1001408673.korean: 이, 이것도 운명이라면 받아들여야겠죠.&n저, 절대로 부끄러워서&n기쁜 걸 숨긴다던가 그런 건 아니랍니다…!
1001408673.english: I-If this is fate, I suppose I have to accept it. I-it's absolutely not because I'm shy or anything like that...!

1001408674.korean: 왜 얼굴을 감추냐고요?&n딱히 보이기 싫어 감춘 건 아니에요.&n점성술사는 얼굴을 가리는 편이&n분위기가 있으니까요.&n저… 사령관님?&n그렇게 빤히 쳐다보시면 아무리 저라도…&n매일 얼굴뿐만 아니라&n전부를 보고 계시잖아요…?
1001408674.english: You ask why I hide my face? It’s not that I hid it because I didn’t want to be seen. It just adds to the atmosphere for an astrologer to cover their face. Um… Commander? If you stare at me like that, even I… You’re seeing not just my face every day, but my whole self…?

1001408675.korean: 사령관님의 연애운은&n여전히 절정이로군요.&n네? 저를 만났기 때문ㅡ?&n……우, 운명은 달라지지 않아요…!&n저랑 사령관님이 맺어지는 건&n당연한 결과였으니 말이죠…
1001408675.english: Commander, your luck in love is still at its peak. What? Because you met me—? … … F-Fate doesn't change…! After all, you and I ending up together was a natural outcome…

1001408676.korean: 점성술은 손님들의&n운명을 맞추기 위해 다양한 해석이 되도록&n점을 보는 게 일반적이에요.&n다르게 말하면&n그저 끼워 맞출 뿐에 지나지 않죠.&n하지만 사령관, 다른 누구도 아닌 당신이기에&n저는 자신 있게 운명을 말하겠어요.&n그대는 이 세상을 비추며 떠오를 태양이라고.
1001408676.english: It is common practice in astrology to interpret readings in various ways to match a client's destiny. In other words, it is nothing more than a mere forced fit. However, Commander, because it is you and no one else, I will speak of your destiny with confidence. You are the sun that will rise and illuminate this world.

1001408677.korean: 이제 더는 운명을&n운운할 필요가 없어 보이네요.&n이렇게 같은 일이 계속 반복된다면,&n그건 그저 진실일 뿐이니까요.&n제가ㅡ 당신의 것이라는 진실 말이에요.
1001408677.english: It seems there is no longer any need to talk about fate. If the same thing keeps repeating like this, it is simply the truth. I mean the truth that I am yours.

1001408678.korean: 제가 선보이는 춤은 거의 독학이었어요.&n진짜 무대에 오르는 단원들의 춤을 흉내 냈을 뿐이죠.&n그런데 이렇게까지 모두가 좋아해 줄 줄은…&n후후, 노력한 보람이 있네요.
1001408678.english: The dance I'm performing was almost entirely self-taught. I just imitated the dances of the members who actually perform on stage. But I never expected everyone to like it this much… Hehe, my hard work has paid off.

1001408679.korean: 춤을 배우고 나서부터 가끔은 말보다&n춤이 감정을 더 풍부하게&n표현할 수 있다는 걸 알게 됐어요.&n사령관님도 무슨 말을 해야 할지&n모르겠을 때에는&n춤을 춰보시는 게 어떠세요?&n저도 같이 어울려드릴 테니까요.
1001408679.english: Since I started learning to dance, I’ve realized that sometimes, dance can express emotions more richly than words. Commander, why don’t you try dancing when you don’t know what to say? I’ll join in.

1001408680.korean: 다시 그 시절처럼&n춤을 출 수 있게 된 건 좋지만,&n그때에 비해 복장이&n다소 과감해졌을 지도 모르겠네요.&n늘 제 공연을 봐주시는 어느 분께서 &n별나게 좋아하시는 것 같아 다행이지만요.
1001408680.english: It’s nice to be able to dance like I used to back then, but my outfits might have become a bit more daring compared to then. I’m glad, though, that someone who always watches my performances seems to particularly enjoy it.

1001408681.korean: 어디…&n오늘 사령관님의&n운명을 춤으로 표현한다면…&n…이 안무는 저에게&n조금 버거울지도 모르겠네요…&n그래도 괜찮아요,&n써니의 도움을 받으면 어떻게든…&n할 수 있을 거에요.
1001408681.english: Well… if I were to express the Commander’s fate today through dance… this choreography might be a bit overwhelming for me… but that’s okay. With Sunny’s help, I’ll be able to… manage somehow.

1001408682.korean: 춤도 중요하지만&n연출도 그에 못지않게 중요하죠.&n상상해 보세요.&n별과 달의 빛을 받으며&n춤을 추는 저의 모습을.&n후훗, 벌써 빠져드셨나요?
1001408682.english: The dance is important, but the direction is just as important. Just imagine me dancing bathed in the light of the stars and the moon. Hehe, are you already hooked?

1001408683.korean: 오늘은 사령관님만을 위한&n특별 공연을 준비했어요.&n막이 내려갈 때까지 즐겨주세요.&n원하신다면…&n커튼콜 후에도…&n앵콜 공연을 준비할 테니까요.
1001408683.english: Today, we have prepared a special performance exclusively for you, Commander. Please enjoy it until the curtain falls. If you wish… we will prepare an encore performance even after the curtain call.

1001408685.korean: 사령관님,&n지금은 별빛이 무대를 비추고 있잖아요?&n우리의 사랑을 저들이 증명해 줄 거랍니다.&n어서 제 몸을 무대삼아… 춤 춰주시겠어요?
1001408685.english: Commander, the starlight is illuminating the stage right now, isn't it? They will prove our love. Please, use my body as a stage… and dance for me.

1001408686.korean: 조금 더 가까이… 호흡에 맞춰 부드럽게.&n좋아요, 이젠 제법 잘 추시는군요.&n이번에는 내려앉은 별과 달 위에서 같이 춤춰봐요.
1001408686.english: A little closer… gently, to the rhythm of your breath. Good, you're dancing quite well now. This time, let's dance together on the fallen stars and the moon.

1000710094.korean: 사령관, 카드들이 말하길 제 운명의 북극성은 이미 정해졌대요. 무대의 막이 수없이 바뀌어도, 별을 쫓는 여정의 길에서 방향을 잃더라도, 제가 돌아갈 자리는 당신 곁이라고. 예언은 바뀔 수 있어요. 하지만 제가 택한 상징은 변하지 않겠죠. 별과 달이 서로를 비추듯, 저도 당신의 밤과 낮을 비출게요. 이것이 제 서약입니다.
1000710094.english: Commander, the cards say that the North Star of my destiny is already set. No matter how many times the curtain changes on the stage, and even if I lose my way on the journey chasing the stars, my place to return is by your side. Prophecies may change. But the symbol I have chosen will not change. Just as the stars and the moon illuminate each other, I too will illuminate your nights and days. This is my vow.

1000710095.korean: 달은 무대를 깔고 별들은 조명을 비추니, 저는 발끝으로 궤도를 그리며 나아갈 길을 선보이죠. 혹여 달과 별이 사라져도 길을 잃지 않도록ㅡ 사랑이라는 서약의 매듭을 이 반지에 묶을게요. 사령관, 제 무대의 첫걸음과 마지막 걸음은 언제나 당신 뒤를 따를 거예요.
1000710095.english: The moon sets the stage and the stars cast the spotlight; I trace an orbit on my tiptoes, presenting the path forward. So that I may not lose my way even if the moon and stars vanish—I will tie the knot of my vow of love to this ring. Commander, the first and last steps of my stage will always follow you.

1100711550.korean:
다음 스킨 구매 및 대상 전투원에게 선물 시, 배경이 활성화 됩니다.
레모네이드 엡실론 용 "미스 오르카 : Your Universe, My Space"
1100711550.english:
The background will be activated when purchasing the next skin and gifting it to the target combatant.
 Lemonade Epsilon's "Miss Orca: Your Universe, My Space"

1100711551.korean:
다음 스킨 구매 및 대상 전투원에게 선물 시, 배경이 활성화 됩니다.
레모네이드 감마 용 "미스 오르카 : CAFÉ Poseidon 독점 메뉴"
1100711551.english:
The background will be activated when purchasing the next skin and gifting it to the target combatant.
 "Miss Orca: CAFÉ Poseidon Exclusive Menu" for Lemonade Gamma

1100711552.korean:
다음 스킨 구매 및 대상 전투원에게 선물 시, 배경이 활성화 됩니다.
신속의 칸 용 "미스 오르카 : Crush On You"
1100711552.english:
The background will be activated when purchasing the next skin and gifting it to the target combatant.
 Swift Khan's "Miss Orca: Crush On You"

1001500225.korean: 미녀는 잠이 많은 법이랍니다, 달콤한 미소를 보니 즐거운 시간을 즐기나 보네요.
1001500225.english: They say beautiful women sleep a lot. Judging by that sweet smile, it looks like you are having a good time.

1001500226.korean:
스킨 선물 하면 개방
레모네이드 엡실론 용 "미스 오르카 : Your Universe, My Space"
1001500226.english:
If you gift a skin, it opens
 Lemonade Epsilon's "Miss Orca: Your Universe, My Space"

1001500228.korean: A Hoy- 닻을 올리고 거친 바다로 향하세요! 대장님께 승리를 가져다 주세요!
1001500228.english: A Hoy— Raise the anchor and head out to the rough seas! Bring victory to the Captain!

1001500229.korean:
스킨 선물 하면 개방
레모네이드 감마 용 "미스 오르카 : CAFÉ Poseidon 독점 메뉴"
1001500229.english:
If you gift a skin, it opens
 "Miss Orca: CAFÉ Poseidon Exclusive Menu" for Lemonade Gamma

1001500231.korean: 어두운 밤, 당신과 함께 은하수 너머의 밝은 미래를 향해 달려가고 싶습니다.
1001500231.english: On a dark night, I want to run with you toward a bright future beyond the Milky Way.

1001500232.korean:
스킨 선물 하면 개방
신속의 칸 용 "미스 오르카 : Crush On You"
1001500232.english:
If you gift a skin, it opens
 Swift Khan's "Miss Orca: Crush On You"

1001408687.korean: 으응… 움직일 때마다&n천이 흘러내리는데…&n뭐… 괜찮으려나…&n본다고 닳는 것도 아니고…
1001408687.english: Mmm... the fabric keeps dripping down every time I move... Well... I guess it'll be okay... It's not like it wears out just from looking at it...

1001408688.korean: 여기가 꿈인지 현실인지&n잘 모르겠다고?&n힌트는… 여기 나한테 있어…&n만져서 확인해 볼래…?
1001408688.english: You're not sure if this is a dream or reality? The hint is… right here with me… Do you want to touch it to check…?

1001408689.korean: 이왕 꿈 속에 들어왔는데&n해보고 싶은 거라도 있어?​&n말만 해, 뭐든 보여줄게.&n음… 남들에게 말할 수 없는&n특별한 취향도 얼마든지 괜찮으니까…
1001408689.english: Since you've already entered my dream, is there anything you'd like to try? Just tell me, I'll show you anything. Hmm... it's perfectly fine if you have any special tastes you can't tell others about...

1001408690.korean: 사령관…&n너무 내 발만 좋아하는 거 아니야?&n먹음직스러운 두 봉우리가&n바로 앞에 있는데도…?​&n정말, 어쩔 수 없네…&n자… 이렇게 하면 더 잘 보여?
1001408690.english: Commander… aren’t you only liking my feet a little too much? Even though there are two mouth-watering peaks right in front of you…? Really, I guess it can’t be helped… Here… does it look better if I do it like this?

1001408691.korean: 응…?&n나한테서 쿰쿰한 땀 냄새가&n안 나서 아쉽다고…?​&n그, 그렇게 원하면&n같이 땀 좀 흘려볼까?​&n사령관이 도와줄 거지?
1001408691.english: Huh…? You’re saying it’s a shame I don’t smell like musty sweat…? Th-if you want that so much, shall we sweat it out together? You’ll help me, Commander, right?

1001408692.korean: 이, 이젠 더 이상 못 움직여…&n난 못 움직이겠으니까&n들어 올려서 마저 해줘…&n사령관이라면 할 수 있잖아?​&n우앗!? 하하하… 위험해…&n한동안은 정말로 못 움직일지도…
1001408692.english: I, I can't move anymore... I can't move, so lift me up and finish it... You can do it, Commander, right? Whoa!? Hahaha... This is dangerous... I really might not be able to move for a while...

1001408693.english: Were you satisfied in your dream?

1001408694.korean: 음… 현실로 돌아갔을 때 우리…&n많이 위험해질지도 몰라…​&n꿈속에서 느낀 감각은&n현실로 돌아갔을 때 한 번에 몰려오거든.&n사령관은 몇 배까지 견딜 수 있어? 후훗♥
1001408694.english: Hmm… when we return to reality, we… might be in a lot of danger… The sensations felt in a dream come flooding in all at once when you return to reality. How many times can you endure, Commander? Hehe♥

1001408695.korean: 사령관…&n내가 할 말은 아니지만&n너무 나태해진 거 아니야?​&n우리 벌써 8시간째 이러고 있는데…&n아아, 또 커졌다…&n​…어떡할래? 한 번만 더 할까?
1001408695.english: Commander… I shouldn’t really be saying this, but haven’t you gotten a bit too lazy? We’ve been doing this for eight hours already… Ah, it got big again… … What do you want to do? Shall we do it just one more time?

1001408696.korean: 이제 메이드 접객은 안 해주냐고…?&n그, 그건… 이만하면&n충분하지 뭘 더 바라는 건가…&n그래도… 원한다면 해주겠다만…&n주, 주인님…
1001408696.english: "Are you saying I won't provide maid service anymore...? Th-that... This is enough. What more do you want... Still... if you want, I will do it, but... M-Master..."

1001408697.korean: 주인님이 오지 않는 날은…&n가게가 왠지 조금, 조용해지더군…&n그, 그러니까…!&n평소에… 좀 더 자주 와달라는 뜻이다!
1001408697.english: On days when the Master doesn't come… the shop somehow gets a little quieter… Th-that is…! I mean… I want you to come a little more often!

1001408698.korean: 처음엔 메이드 꼴을 한 나를&n놀리러 온 줄 알았는데…&n요즘은, 그냥 커피 한 잔 들고&n조용히 앉아 있는&n주인님 모습을 보는 것도…&n나쁘지 않더군…
1001408698.english: At first, I thought you came to tease me dressed as a maid... but lately, just seeing you sitting quietly with a cup of coffee... isn't so bad...

1001408699.korean: 이제 주인님 취향을 대충 알 것 같군.&n커피는 진하게, 설탕은 조금,&n그리고… 메, 메이드의 스마일… 맞지…?&n흥, 그렇게까지 마음에 든다면…&n계속 주문해도 괜찮다…&n주, 주인님…
1001408699.english: I think I roughly know your preferences now, Master. Strong coffee, a little sugar, and… M-a maid’s smile… right…? Hmph, if you like it that much… you can keep ordering… M-Master…

1001408700.korean: 주문하신 디저트 나왔습니다…&n큭, 젠장, 진짜 해야 하나…&n그, 그러면… 주인님을 위해서&n음식에 주문을 걸어드리겠습니다…&n마, 맛있어져라~ 모에 모에 뀨우웅♥&n…남기면 뒤질 줄 알아라.
1001408700.english: Here is the dessert you ordered… *Gasp*, damn it, do I really have to do this… Th-then… for Master’s sake, I will cast a spell on the food… M-become delicious~ Moe moe kyuuung♥… If you leave any behind, you’re dead.

1001408701.korean: 곧 주인님을 위해 준비한&n특별 공연을 시작할 거예요…&n모두 다 같이 준비한 거니까…&n마지막까지 제대로 봐줬으면 좋겠어요…&n윽… 바, 바보냐!?&n내 응원 같은 건 안 해도 괜찮다!
1001408701.english: I’m about to start the special performance I prepared for you, Master… We all prepared this together, so… I hope you’ll watch it properly until the very end… Ugh… W-Are you an idiot!? You don’t need to cheer for me!

1001408702.korean: 죄송하지만, 주인님?&n메이드의 몸을 만지는 건 금지입니다.
1001408702.english: I'm sorry, Master, but touching a maid's body is forbidden.

1001408703.korean: 히양♥!? 주, 주인님…&n아직 다른 손님들도 있는데…&n앗, 너, 너희들!&n뭘 보고 있는 거냐!&n어서 일이나 해!
1001408703.english: Hiyang♥!? M-Master… There are still other guests… Ah, you, you guys! What are you looking at! Hurry up and get to work!

1001408704.korean: 주인님도 참…&n영업 끝날 때까지 못 참으시겠어요?&n어, 어쩔 수 없네요…&n가게 뒤쪽에서 잠깐이라면…
1001408704.english: Master, really... Can't you wait until closing time? Uh, I guess I have no choice... If it's just for a moment behind the shop...

1001408705.korean: 사령관, 솔직히 말해 봐라.&n이 차가 더 마음에 드나,&n아니면 이 드레스를 입은 내가 더 마음에 드나?&n…대답에 따라, 오늘 코스가 달라질지도 모른다.
1001408705.english: Commander, be honest. Do you like this car more, or do you like me in this dress? ... Depending on your answer, today's course might change.

1001408706.korean: 예전엔 속도만 재면 됐지만…&n요즘은 사령관과 함께 달린 시간과&n거리도 세고 있다.
1001408706.english: In the past, I only needed to measure speed... but these days, I am also counting the time and distance I run with the commander.

1001408707.korean: 사령관,&n이런 차와 드레스까지 준비해 놓고…&n아무 일도 없이 그냥 넘어갈 생각은 아니겠지?
1001408707.english: Commander, having even prepared a car and a dress like this... you aren't planning to just let it slide without anything happening, are you?

1001408708.korean: 사령관,&n오늘 밤 내 일정은 텅 비어 있다.&n전장도 정비도 다 미뤄뒀지.&n…어서 타지 않고 뭐하는 거지?&n계속 그렇게 서 있을 생각인가?
1001408708.english: Commander, my schedule is completely clear tonight. I've put off both the battlefield and maintenance. ...What are you doing not getting in? Do you plan to just keep standing there?

1001408709.korean: 나에게 있어 조수석은&n가장 소중한 사람을 태우는 자리다.&n그래서일까…&n다른 누가 앉아 있는 상상은 잘되지 않는군.&n사령관 말고는… 말이다.
1001408709.english: To me, the passenger seat is where I carry the person most precious to me. Perhaps that is why... I can't really imagine anyone else sitting there. Except for the Commander... I mean.

1001408710.korean: 가끔 생각한다.&n이 정도로 마음이 기울어 버렸다면,&n이미 브레이크는&n고장 나 버린 게 아닐까 하고.&n…그래도 상관없겠지,&n끝까지 함께 달릴 사람은 사령관뿐이니까.
1001408710.english: Sometimes I think. If my heart has leaned this much, haven't the brakes already failed? ...But it doesn't matter, since the Commander is the only one who will run with me to the very end.

1001408711.korean: 사고 나기 전에&n자제하는 게 좋을 거다,&n사령관.
1001408711.english: You'd better restrain yourself before an accident happens, Commander.

1001408712.korean: 하… 그렇게까지 대놓고 덤벼들 줄이야.&n알고 있겠지?&n거긴 브레이크가 잘 안 먹히는 구간이다.&n이제 와서 속도를 줄이라 말해도 소용없을 거다,&n사령관.
1001408712.english: Ha... I didn't expect you to attack so blatantly. You know that, right? That's a section where the brakes don't work well. It's no use telling you to slow down now, Commander.

1001408713.korean: 후후, 사령관.&n그렇게 붙잡지 않아도&n그대의 피앙세는 도망가지 않는다.&n전장에서든, 도로 위에서든…&n이 피앙세가 향하는 곳은&n언제나 그대 곁뿐이다.
1001408713.english: Hehe, Commander. Even if you don't hold on like that, your fiancée won't run away. Whether on the battlefield or on the road... the only place this fiancée heads is always by your side.

1000710096.korean: …지금 한 말, 나랑… 마지막까지 같이 있어 달라, 고백한 거 맞지…?​ 후후, 그렇게 진지한 얼굴로 먼저 말해 버리면… 도망칠 곳이 없어지잖아.​ 앞으로는 내가 눈을 감을 때마다 제일 먼저 도착하는 사람, 그리고 눈을 떴을 때 제일 가까이에 있는 사람…​ 둘 다 사령관이었으면 좋겠어.​ 그러니까 앞으로도 계속, 내 꿈속에도… 현실의 내 곁에서도, 귀찮을 만큼 붙어 있어 줘, 내 사랑…
1000710096.english: … What you just said, you were confessing to me… asking me to stay with you until the very end, right…? Hehe, if you say it first with such a serious face… there’s nowhere left to run. From now on, the person who arrives first whenever I close my eyes, and the person closest to me when I open them… I want both to be you, Commander. So please, keep sticking to me, even if it’s annoying, in my dreams… and by my side in reality, my love…

1000710097.korean: 처음에는 그저 용 녀석에게 자극 받아 시작한 카페였는데… 설마 반지라니… 이런 식으로 날 묶어 두겠다는 건가?​ 수치스러운 메이드 꼴까지 감수하게 해놓고, 이제는 마음까지 접수하시겠다? 젠장, 완전히 당했군.​ 좋다, 앞으로는 영업이 끝난 뒤의 밤까지도 네 녀석을 주인으로 접객 해주마.​ 대신 기억해 둬라. 카페 포세이돈의 점장을 서약으로 사로잡은 주인님이라면… 평생 이 몸이라는 한 척짜리 해적선을 책임져야 한다는 걸.
1000710097.english: At first, I just started this cafe after being provoked by that dragon... but a ring... do you mean to keep me bound like this? You made me endure the humiliation of being a maid, and now you intend to take my heart too? Damn it, I’ve been completely fooled. Fine, from now on, I will serve you as my master even after closing time. But remember this. If you are a master who has captured the manager of Cafe Poseidon with a vow... then you must take responsibility for this one-ship pirate vessel that is me for the rest of your life.
